Genesis1:1 PACIYAMBI Mulungu adalenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi. 
Genesis1:2 Dziko lapansi ndipo linali lopanda kanthu; ndipo mdima unali pamwamba pa nyanja; ndipo mzimu wa Mulungu unaliokufungatira pamwamba pa madzi. 
Genesis1:3 Ndipo anati Mulungu, Kuyere; ndipo kunayera." 
Genesis1:4 Ndipo anaona Mulungu kuti kuyerako kunali kwabino: ndipo Mulungu analekanitsa kuyera ndi mdima. 
Genesis1:5 Ndipo Mulungu anacha kuyerako Usana, ndi mdimawo anaucha Usiku. Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa, tsiku loyamba." 
Genesis1:6 Ndipo anati Mulungu, Pakhale thambo pakati pa madzi, lilekanitse madzi ndi madzi." 
Genesis1:7 Ndipo Mulungu anapanga thambo, nalekanitsa madzi anali pansi pa thambolo ndi madzi analf pamwamba pa thambolo: ndipo kunatero." 
Genesis1:8 Ndipo Mulungu analicha thambolo Kumwamba. Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa, tsiku laciwiri." 
Genesis1:9 Ndipo anati Mulungu, Madzi a pansi pa kumwamba asonkhane pamodzi pa malo amodzi, uoneke mtunda: ndipo kunatero." 
Genesis1:10 Ndipo Mulungu adaucha mtundawo Dziko lapansi; kusonkhana kwa madziko ndipo adaucha Nyanja: ndipo anaona Mulungu kuti kunali kwabwino. 
Genesis1:11 Mulungu ndipo anati, Dziko lapansi limere maudzu, therere lobala mbeu, ndi mtengo wazipatso wakubala zipatso monga mwa mtundu wace, momwemo muli mbeu yace, pa dziko lapansi: ndipo kunatero." 
Genesis1:12 Ndipo dziko lapansi linamera maudzu, therere lobala mbeu monga mwa mtundu wace, ndi mtengo wakubala zipatso, momwemo muli mbeu yace, monga mwa mtundu wace; ndipo anaona Mulungu kuti kunali kwabwino." 
Genesis1:13 Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa, tsiku lacitatu." 
Genesis1:14 Ndipo Mulungu anati, Pakhale zounikira pa thambo la kumwamba, zakulekanitsa usana ndi usiku; zikhale zizindikiro ndi nyengo, ndi masiku, ndi zaka;" 
Genesis1:15 zikhale zounikira m'thambo la kumwamba, kuti ziunikire pa dziko lapansi; ndipo kunatero." 
Genesis1:16 Ndipo Mulungu anapanga zounikira zazikuru ziwiri; counikira cacikuru cakulamulira usana, counikira cacing'ono cakulamulira usiku, ndi nyenyezi zomwe." 
Genesis1:17 Mulungu ndipo adaika zimenezo m'thambo la kumwamba, kuti ziunikire pa dziko lapansi," 
Genesis1:18 nizilamulire usana ndi usiku, nizilekanitse kuyera ndi mdima: ndipo anaona Mulungu kuti kunali kwabino." 
Genesis1:19 Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa, tsiku lacinai." 
Genesis1:20 Ndipo anati Mulungu, Madzi abale zocuruka zamoyo zoyendayenda, ndi mbalame ziuluke pamwamba pa dziko lapansi ndi pamlengalenga." 
Genesis1:21 Mulungu ndipo adalenga zinsomba zazikuru ndi zoyendayenda zamoyo zakucuruka m'madzi mwa mitundu yao, ndi mbalame zamapiko, yonse monga mwa mtundu wace: ndipo anaona Mulungu kuti kunali kwabwino." 
Genesis1:22 Mulungu ndipo anadalitsa zimenezo, nati, Zibalane, zicuruke, zidzaze madzi a m'nyanja, ndi mbalame zicuruke pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis1:23 Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa, tsiku lacisanu." 
Genesis1:24 Ndipo adati Mulungu, Dziko lapansi libale zamoyo monga mwa mitundu yao, ng'ombe, ndi zokwawa, ndi zinyama za dziko lapansi monga mwa mitundu yao: ndipo kunatero." 
Genesis1:25 Ndipo Mulungu anapanga zinyama za dziko lapansi monga mwa mitundu yao; ndi ng'ombe monga mwa mtundu wace, ndi zonse zakukwawa pansi monga mwa mitundu yao; ndipo Mulungu anaona kuti kunali kwabwino." 
Genesis1:26 Ndipo anati Mulungu, Tipange munthu m'cifanizo cathu, monga mwa cikhalidwe cathu: alamulire pa nsomba za m'nyanja, ndi pa mbalame za m'mlengalenga, ndi pa ng'ombe, ndi pa dziko lonse lapansi, ndi pa zokwawa zonse zakukwawa pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis1:27 Mulungu ndipo adalenga munthu m'cifanizo cace, m'cifanizo ca Mulungu adamlenga iye; adalenga iwo mwamuna ndi mkazi." 
Genesis1:28 Mulungu ndipo anadalitsa iwo, ndipo adati kwa iwo, Mubalane, mucuruke, mudzaze dziko lapansi, muligonjetse: mulamulire pa nsomba za m'nyanja, ndi pa mbalame za m'mlengalenga, ndi pa zamoyo zonse zakukwawa pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis1:29 Ndipo anati Mulungu, Taonani, ndakupatsani inu therere lonse lakubala mbeu liri pa dziko lapansi, ndi mitengo yonse m'mene muli cipatso ca mtengo wakubala mbeu; cidzakhala cakudya ca inu:" 
Genesis1:30 ndiponso ndapatsa zinyama zonse za dziko lapansi, ndi mbalame zonse za m'mlengalenga, ndi zakukwawa zonse za dziko lapansi m'mene muli moyo, therere laliwisi lonse likhale cakudya: ndipo kunatero." 
Genesis1:31 Ndipo anaziona Mulungu zonse zimene adazipanga, ndipo, taonani, zinali zabwino ndithu. Ndipo panali madzulo ndipo panali m'mawa, tsiku lacisanu ndi cimodzi." 
Genesis2:1 Ndipo zinatha kupangidwa zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, ndi khamu lao lonse." 
Genesis2:2 Tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri Mulungu anamariza nchito yonse anaipanga; ndipo anapuma tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri ku nchito yace yonse. 
Genesis2:3 Mulungu ndipo anadalitsa tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri, naliyeretsa limenelo: cifukwa limenelo ada puma ku nchito yace yonse imene Mulungu anailenga ndi kupanga." 
Genesis2:4 Imeneyo ndiyo mibadwo yao ya zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, pamene zinalengedwa, tsiku lomwe Yehova Mulungu anapanga dziko lapansi ndi zakumwamba." 
Genesis2:5 Ndi zomera zonse za m'munda zisanakhale m'dziko lapansi, ndiponso matherere onse a m'munda asanamere; cifukwa Yehova Mulungu sanabvumbitsire mvula pa dziko lapansi, ndipo panalibe munthu wakulima nthaka;" 
Genesis2:6 kama inakwera nkhungu yoturuka pa dziko lapansi, niithirira ponse pamwamba pa nthaka." 
Genesis2:7 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaumba munthu ndi dothi lapansi, nauzira mpweya wa moyo m'mphuno mwace; munthuyo nakhala wamoyo." 
Genesis2:8 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anabzala m'munda ku Edene cakum'mawa; momwemo ndipo adaika munthu adamuumbayo. 
Genesis2:9 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anameretsa m'nthaka mitengo yonse yokoma m'maso ndi yabwino kudya; ndiponso mtengo wa moyo pakati pa mundapo, ndi mtengo wakudziwitsa zabwino ndi zoipa." 
Genesis2:10 Ndipo unaturuka m'Edene mtsinje wakuthirira m'mundamo, m'menemo ndipo unalekana nucita miyendo inai." 
Genesis2:11 Dzina la wakuyamba ndi Pisoni: umenewo ndiwo wozungulira dziko lonse la Havila, m'mene muli golidi;" 
Genesis2:12 golidi wa dziko ali wabwino; ndimonso muli bedola ndi mwala wasohamu. 
Genesis2:13 Dzina la mtsinje waciwiri ndi Gihoni: umenewo ndiwo wozungulira dziko lonse la Kusi. 
Genesis2:14 Dzina la mtsinje wacitatu ndi Hidikeli: umenewo ndiwo wakuyenda ca kum'mawa kwace kwa Asuri. Mtsinje wacinai ndi Pirate. 
Genesis2:15 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anatenga munthuyo, namuika iye m'munda wa Eriene kuti aulime nauyang'anire." 
Genesis2:16 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anamuuza munthuyo, nati, Mitengo yonse ya m'munda udyeko;" 
Genesis2:17 koma mtengo wakudziwitsa zabwino ndi zoipa, usadye umenewo; cifukwa tsiku lomwe udzadya umenewo udzafa ndithu." 
Genesis2:18 Yehova Mulungu ndipo anati, Si kwabwino kuti munthuakhale yekha; ndidzampangira womthangatira iye." 
Genesis2:19 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaumba ndi nthaka zamoyo zonse za m'thengo, ndi mbalame zonse za m'mlengalenga; ndipo anapita nazo kwa Adamu kuti aone maina omwe adzazicha; ndipo maina omwe onse anazicha Adamu zamoyo zonse, omwewo ndiwo maina ao." 
Genesis2:20 Adamu ndipo anazicha maina zinyama zonse, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga ndi zamoyo zonse za m'thengo: koma kwa Adamu sanapezedwa womthangatira iye." 
Genesis2:21 Koma Yehova Mulungu anamgonetsa Adamu tulo tatikuru, ndipo anagona: ndipo anatengako nthiti yace imodzi, natsekapo ndi mnofu pamalo pace:" 
Genesis2:22 ndipo nthitiyo anaicotsa Yehova Mulungu mwa Adamu anaipanga mkazi, ndipo ananka naye kwa Adamu." 
Genesis2:23 Ndipo anati Adamu, Uyu tsopano ndiye pfupa la mafupa anga, ndi mnofu wa mnofu wanga; ndipo adzachedwa Mkazi, cifukwa anamtenga mwa mwamuna." 
Genesis2:24 Cifukwa cotero mwamuna adzasiya atate wace ndi amace nadzadziphatika kwa mkazi wace: ndipo adzakhala thupi limodzi. 
Genesis2:25 Onse awiri ndipo anali amarisece, mwamuna ndi mkazi wace, ndipo analibe manyazi." 
Genesis3:1 Ndipo njoka inali yakucenjera yoposa zamoyo zonse za m'thengo zimene anazipanga Yehova Mulungu, Ndipo inati kwa mkaziyo, Ea! kodi anatitu Mulungu, Usadye mitengo yonse ya m'mundamu?" 
Genesis3:2 Mkaziyo ndipo anati kwa njoka, Zipatso za mitengo ya m'mundamu tidye." 
Genesis3:3 Koma zipatso za mtengo umene uti m'kati mwa munda, Mulungu anati, Musadye umenewo, musakhudze umenewo, mungadzafe." 
Genesis3:4 Njokayo ndipo inati kwa mkaziyo, Kufa simudzafai;" 
Genesis3:5 cifukwa adziwa Mulungu kuti tsiku limene mukadya umenewo, adzatseguka maso anu, ndipo mudzakhala ngati Mulungu, wakudziwa zabwino ndi zoipa." 
Genesis3:6 Ndipo pamene anaona mkaziyo kuti mtengo unali wabwino kudya, ndi kuti unali wokoma m'maso, mtengo wolakalakika wakupatsa nzeru, anatenga zipatso zace, nadya, napatsanso mwamuna wace amene ali nave, nadya iyenso," 
Genesis3:7 Ndipo anatseguka maso ao a onse awiri, nadziwa kuti anali amarisece: ndipo adasoka masamba amkuyu, nadzipangira mateweta." 
Genesis3:8 Ndipo anamva mau a Yehova Mulungu alinkuyendayenda m'munda nthawi yamadzulo: ndipo anabisala Adamu ndi mkazi wace pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu pakati pa mitengo ya m'munda. 
Genesis3:9 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaitana mwamunayo nati kwa iye, Uli kuti?" 
Genesis3:10 Ndipo anati, Ndinamva mau anu m'mundamu, ndipo ndinaopa cifukwa ndinali wamarisece ine; ndipo ndinabisala." 
Genesis3:11 Ndipo anati, Ndani anakuuza iwe kuti uli wamarisece? Kodi wadya za mtengo uja, umene ndinakuuza iwe kuti usadye?" 
Genesis3:12 Ndipo anati mwamunayo, Mkazi amene munandipatsa ine kuti akhale ndi ine, ameneyo anandipatsa ine za mtengo, ndipo ndinadya." 
Genesis3:13 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anati kwa mkaziyo, Ciani cimene wacitaci? Ndipo anati mkaziyo, Njoka inandinyenga ine, ndipo ndinadya." 
Genesis3:14 Ndipo anati Yehova Mulungu kwa njokayo, Cifukwa kuti wacita ici, wotembereredwa ndiwe wopambana ndi zinyama zonse ndi zamoyo zonse za m'thengo: uziyenda ndi pamimba pako, uzidya pfumbi masiku onse a moyo wako:" 
Genesis3:15 ndipo ndidzaika udani pakati pa iwe ndi mkaziyo, ndi pakati pa mbeu yako ndi mbeu yace; ndipo idzalalira mutu wako, ndipo iwe udzalalira citende cace." 
Genesis3:16 Kwa mkaziyo ndipo anati, Ndidzacurukitsa kusauka kwako ndi potenga mimba pako; udzasauka pakubala: udzakhumba mwamuna wako, ndipo iye adzakulamulira iwe." 
Genesis3:17 Kwa Adamu ndipo anati, Cifukwa kuti wamvera mau a mkazi wako, nudya za mtengo umene ndinakuuza iwe kuti, Usadyeko; nthaka ikhale yotembereredwa cifukwa ca iwe; m'kusauka udzadyako masiku onse a moyo wako:" 
Genesis3:18 minga ndi mitula idzakubalira iwe; ndipo udzadya therere la m'thengo: 
Genesis3:19 m'thukuta la nkhope yako udzadya cakudya, kufikira kuti udzabwerera kunthaka: cifukwa kuti m'menemo unatengedwa: cifukwa kuti ndiwe pfumbi, ndi kupfumbiko udzabwerera." 
Genesis3:20 Ndipo mwamuna anamucha dzina la mkazi wace, Hava; cifukwa ndiye amace wa amoyo onse." 
Genesis3:21 Yehova Mulungu ndipo anapangira Adamu ndi mkazi wace maraya azikopa, nawabveka iwo." 
Genesis3:22 Ndipo anati Yehova Mulungu, Taonani, munthuyo akhala ngati mmodzi wa ife, wakudziwa zabwino ndi zoipa: ndipo tsopano kuti asatambasule dzanja lace ndi kutenga za mtengo wa moyo, ndi kudya, ndi kukhala ndi moyo nthawi zonse," 
Genesis3:23 Yehova Mulungu anamturutsa iye m'munda wa Edene, kuti alime nthaka m'mene anamtenga iye." 
Genesis3:24 Ndipo anamuingitsa munthuyo; nakhazika Makerubi ca kum'mawa kwace kwa munda wa Edene, ndi lupanga lamoto lakuzungulira ponsepo, lakusunga njira ya ku mtengo wa moyo." 
Genesis4:1 Ndipo mwamunayo anadziwa mkazi wace Hava: ndipo anatenga pakati, nabala Kaini, ndipo anati, Ndalandira munthu kwa Yehova." 
Genesis4:2 Ndipo anabalanso mphwace Abele. Abele anakhala mbusa wa nkhosa, koma Kaini anali wakulima nthaka." 
Genesis4:3 Ndipo panali atapita masiku, Kaini anatenga zipatso za nthaka, nsembe ya kwa Yehova." 
Genesis4:4 Ndiponso Abele anatenga iyenso mwana woyamba wa nkhosa zace ndi mafuta omwe. Yehova ndipo anayang'anira Abele ndi nsembe yace: 
Genesis4:5 koma sanayang'anira Kaini ndi nsembe yace. Kaini ndipo anakwiya kwambiri, niigwa nkhope yace." 
Genesis4:6 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Kaini, Ukwiyiranji? Yagweranji nkhope yako?" 
Genesis4:7 Ukacita zabwino, sudzalandiridwa kodi? Ukaleka kucita zabwino, ucimo ubwatama pakhomo: kwa iwe kudzakhala kulakalaka kwace, ndipo iwe udzamlamulira iye." 
Genesis4:8 Kaini ndipo ananena ndi Abele mphwace. Ndipo panali pamene anali kumunda, Kaini anamuukira Abele mphwace, namupha," 
Genesis4:9 Yehova ndipo anati kwa Kaini, Ali kuti Abele mphwako? Ndipo anati, Sindidziwai: kodi ndine woyang'anira mphwanga?" 
Genesis4:10 Ndipo anati, Wacita ciani? Mau a mwazi wa mphwako andipfuulira Ine kunthaka." 
Genesis4:11 Tsopano ndiwe wotembereredwa kunthaka, Imene inatsegula pakamwa pace kulandira pa dzanja lako mwazi wa mphwako:" 
Genesis4:12 pamene udzalima panthaka siidzaperekanso kwa iwe mphamvu yace: udzakhala wothawathawa ndi woyendayenda pa dziko lapansi. 
Genesis4:13 Ndipo Kaini anati kwa Yehova, Kulangidwa kwanga nkwakukuru kosapiririka." 
Genesis4:14 Taonani, mwandiingitsa ine lero lomwe padziko; ndi pankhope panu ndidzabisika; ndipo ndidzakhala wothawathawa ndi woyendayenda pa dziko lapansi; ndipo kudzatero kuti onse akundipeza adzandipha." 
Genesis4:15 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye, Cifukwa cace ali yense amene adzapha Kaini kudzabwezedwa kwa iye kasanu ndi kawiri. Ndipo Yehova anaika icizindikiro pa Kaini, kuti asamuphe ali yense akampeza." 
Genesis4:16 Ndipo Kaini anaturuka pamaso pa Yehova, ndipo anakhalam'dziko la Nodi, kum'mawa kwace kwa Edene." 
Genesis4:17 Ndipo Kaini anamdziwa mkazi wace; ndipo anatenga pakati, nabala Enoke: ndipo anamanga mudzi, naucha dzina lace la mudziwo monga dzina la mwana wace, Enoke." 
Genesis4:18 Kwa Enoke ndipo kunabadwa Irade; Irade ndipo anabala Mehuyaeli; Mehuyaeli ndipo anabala Metusaeli; Metusaeli ndipo anabala Lameke. 
Genesis4:19 Ndipo Lameke anadzitengera yekha akazi awiri: dzina lace la wina ndi Ada, dzina lace la mnzace ndi Zila." 
Genesis4:20 Ndipo Ada anabala Yabala; iye ndiye atate wao wa iwo okhala m'mahema, akuweta ng'ombe," 
Genesis4:21 Ndi dzina la mphwace ndilo Yubala; iye ndiye atate wao wa iwo oyimba zeze ndi citoliro. 
Genesis4:22 Ndipo Zila, iyenso anabala Tubala-Kaini, mwini wakuphunzitsa amisiri onse a mkuwa ndi a citsulo; mlongo wace wa Tubala-Kaini ndi Nama." 
Genesis4:23 Lameke ndipo anati kwa akazi ace: Tamvani mau anga, Ada ndi Zila; Inu akazi a Lameke, mverani kunena kwanga: Ndapha munthu wakundilasa ine, Ndapha mnyamata wakundiphweteka ine," 
Genesis4:24 Ngati Kaini adzabwezeredwa kasanu ndi kawiri, Koma Lameke makumi asanu ndi awiri." 
Genesis4:25 Ndipo Adamu anadziwanso mkazi wace; ndipo anabala mwana wamwamuna, namucha dzina lace Seti: Cifukwa, nati iye, Mulungu wandilowezera ine mbeu yina m'malo mwa Abele amene Kaini anamupha," 
Genesis4:26 Ndiponso kwa Seti, kwa iye kunabadwamwana wamwamuna: anamucha dzina lace Enosi: pomwepo anthu anayamba kuchula dzina la Yehova." 
Genesis5:1 Ili ndi buku la mibadwo ya Adamu. Tsiku lomwe Mulungu analenga munthu anamlenga m'cifanizo ca Mulungu; 
Genesis5:2 anawalenga iwo mwamuna ndi mkazi, nawadalitsa iwo nacha mtundu wao anthu, tsiku lomwe anawalenga iwo." 
Genesis5:3 Ndipo Adamu anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana limodzi kudza makumi atatu, nabala mwana wamwamuna m'cifanizo cace; namucha dzina lace Seti." 
Genesis5:4 Masiku ace Adamu atabala Seti, anali zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu; ndipo anabala ana amuna ndi akazi." 
Genesis5:5 Masiku ace onse anakhala ndi moyo Adamu anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai, kudza makumi atatu; ndipo anamwalira." 
Genesis5:6 Ndipo Seti anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza zisanu, nabala Enosi;" 
Genesis5:7 ndipo Seti anakhala ndi moyo, atabala Enosi, zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri: ndipo anabala ana amuna ndi akazi:" 
Genesis5:8 masiku ace onse a Seti anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai kudza khumi ndi ziwiri; ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis5:9 Ndipo Enosi anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi anai, nabala Kenani;" 
Genesis5:10 ndipo anakhala ndi moyo Enosi, atabala Kenani, zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza khumi ndi zisanu: ndipo anabala ana amuna ndi akazi." 
Genesis5:11 Masiku ace onse a Enosi anali mazana asanu ndi anai kudza zisanu; ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis5:12 Ndipo Kenani anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi awiri, ndipo anabala Mahalalele:" 
Genesis5:13 ndipo Kenani anakhala ndi moyo, atabala Mahalalele zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza makumi anai, ndipo anabala ana amuna ndi akazi;" 
Genesis5:14 masiku ace onse a Kenani anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai kudza khumi; ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis5:15 Ndipo Mahalalele anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza zisanu, nabala Yaredi;" 
Genesis5:16 ndipo Mahalalele anakhala ndi moyo, atabala Yaredi, zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza makumi atatu, nabala ana amuna ndi akazi:" 
Genesis5:17 masiku ace onse a Mahalalele anali zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza makumi asanu ndi anai ndi zisanu; ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis5:18 Ndipo Yaredi anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi ziwiri, nabala Enoke;" 
Genesis5:19 ndipo Yaredi anakhala ndi moyo, atabala Enoke, zaka mazana asanu ndi atatu, nabala ana amuna ndi akazi;" 
Genesis5:20 masiku ace onse a Yaledi anali zaka mazana asanu ndi anai kudza maitumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi ziwiri: ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis5:21 Ndipo Enoke anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza zisanu, nabala Metusela:" 
Genesis5:22 ndipo Enoke anayendabe ndi Mulungu, atabala Metusela, zaka mazana atatu, nabala ana amuna ndi akazi;" 
Genesis5:23 masiku ace onse a Enoke anali mazana atatu kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi zisanu; 
Genesis5:24 ndipo Enoke anayendabe ndi Mulungu; ndipo panalibe iye; pakuti Mulungu anamtenga. 
Genesis5:25 Ndipo Metusela anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza makumi asanu ndi atatu ndi zisanu ndi ziwiri, nabala Lameke;" 
Genesis5:26 ndipo Metusela anakhala ndi moyo, atabala Lameke, zaka mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu ndi atatu ndi ziwiri, nabala ana amuna ndi akazi:" 
Genesis5:27 masiku ace onse a Metusela anali mazana asanu ndi anai kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza zisanu ndi zinai; ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis5:28 Ndipo Lameke anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana kudza makumi asanu ndi atatu ndi ziwiri, nabala mwana wamwamuna;" 
Genesis5:29 namucha dzina lace Nowa, ndi kuti, Yemweyu adzatonthoza mtima wathu pa nchito zathu zobvuta za manja athu, cifukwa ca nthaka imene anaitemberera Yehova;" 
Genesis5:30 ndipo Lameke anakhala ndi moyo atabala Nowa, zaka mazana asanu kudza makumi asanu ndi anai ndi zisanu, nabala ana amuna ndi akazi:" 
Genesis5:31 masiku ace onse a Lameke anali zaka mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu ndi awiri; ndipo anamwa lira. 
Genesis5:32 Ndipo Nowa anali wa zaka mazana asanu; ndipo Nowa anabala Semu ndi Hamu ndi Yafeti. 
Genesis6:1 Ndipo panali pamene anthu anayamba kucuruka padziko, ndi ana akazi anawabadwira iwo," 
Genesis6:2 kuti ana amuna a Mulungu anayang'ana ana akazi a anthu, kuti iwo anali okongola; ndipo anadzitengera okha akazi onse amene anawasankha." 
Genesis6:3 Ndipo anati Yehova, Mzimu wanga sudzakangana ndi anthu nthawi zonse, cifukwa iwonso ndiwo thupi lanyama: koma masiku ace adzakhala zaka zana limodzi kudza makumi awiri." 
Genesis6:4 Pa dziko lapansi panali anthu akurukuru masiku omwewo ndiponso pambuyo pace, ana amuna a Mulungu atalowa kwa ana akazi a anthu, ndipo anabalira iwo ana, amenewo ndiwo anthu amphamvu akalekale, anthu omveka." 
Genesis6:5 Ndipo anaona Yehova kuti kuipa kwa anthu kunali kwakukuru pa dziko lapansi, ndiponso kuti ndingaliro zonse za maganizo a mitima yao zinali zoipabe zokhazokha." 
Genesis6:6 Ndipo Yehova anamva cisoni cifukwa anapanga munthu pa dziko lapansi, ndipo anabvutika m'mtima mwace." 
Genesis6:7 Ndipo anati Yehova, Ndidzafafaniza anthu amene ndawalenga pa dziko lapansi; anthu, ndi nyama, ndi zokwawa, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga: pakuti ndimva cisoni cifukwa ndapanga izo." 
Genesis6:8 Koma Nowa anapeza ufulu pamaso pa Yehova. 
Genesis6:9 Mibadwoya Nowandiiyi: Nowa anali munthu wolungama ndi wangwiro m'mibadwo yace; Nowa anayendabe ndi Mulungu. 
Genesis6:10 Ndipo Nowa anabala ana amuna atatu, Semu, Hamu ndi Yafeti." 
Genesis6:11 Ndipo dziko lapansi linabvunda pamaso pa Mulungu, dziko lapansi ndipo linadzala ndi ciwawa." 
Genesis6:12 Ndipo Mulungu anaona dziko lapansi, ndipo taonani, linabvunda; pakuti anthu onse anabvunditsa njira yao pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis6:13 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Nowa, Cimariziro cace ca anthu onse cafika pamaso panga; pakuti dziko lapansi ladzala ndi ciwawa cifukwa ca iwo; taonani, ndidzaononga iwo pamodzi ndi dziko lapansi." 
Genesis6:14 Udzipangire wekha cingalawa ca mtengo wanjale; upangemo zipinda m'cingalawamo, ndipo upake ndi utoto m'kati ndi kunja." 
Genesis6:15 Kupanga kwace ndi kotere: m'litari mwace mwa cingalawa mikono mazana atatu, m'mimba mwace mikono makumi asanu, m'msinkhu mwace mikono makumi atatu." 
Genesis6:16 Uike zenera m'ciogalawaco, ulimarize ndi kusiya mkono umodzi pamwamba pace: khomo la cingalawa uike m'mbali mwace; nucipange ndi nyumba yapansi, ndi yaciwiri, ndi yacitatu." 
Genesis6:17 Ndine, taonani, ndipo Ine ndidzadzetsa cigumula ca madzi pa dziko lapansi, kuti cionooge zamoyo zonse, m'mene muli mpweya wa moyo pansi pa thambo; zinthu zonse za m'dziko lapansi zidzafa." 
Genesis6:18 Koma ndidzakhazikitsa ndi iwe pangano langa; ndipo udzalowa m'cingalawamo iwe ndi ana ako ndi mkazi wako, ndi akazi a ana ako pamodzi ndi iwe." 
Genesis6:19 Ndipo zonse zokhala ndi moyo, ziwiri ziwiri za mtundu wao ulowetse m'cingalawamo, kuti zikhale ndi moyo pamodzi ndi iwe; zikhale zamphongo ndi zazikazi." 
Genesis6:20 Za mbalame monga mwa mitundu yao, ndi zinyama monga mwa mitundu yao, ndi zokwawa zonse za dziko lapansi monga mwa mitundu yao, ziwiri ziwiri monga mwa mitundu yao, zidzadza kwa iwe kuti zikhale ndi moyo." 
Genesis6:21 Ndipo iwe udzitengereko wekha zakudya zonse zodyedwa, oudzisonkhanitsire izi wekha: ndipo zidzakhala zakudya za iwe ndi za iwo." 
Genesis6:22 Cotero anacita Nowa, monga mwa zonse anamlamulira iye Mulungu, momwemo anacita." 
Genesis7:1 Ndipo anati Yehova kwa Nowa, Talowani, iwe ndi a ku nyumba ako onse m'cingalawamo; cifukwa ndakuona iwe kuti uli wolungama pamaso panga m'mbadwo uno." 
Genesis7:2 Nyama zonse zodyedwa udzitengereko wekha zisanu ndi ziwiri, zisanu ndi ziwiri, yamphongo ndi yaikazi yace; ndi nyama zosadyedwa ziwiri ziwiri yamphongo ndi yaikazi yace." 
Genesis7:3 Ndiposo mbalame za kumlengalenga zisanu ndi ziwiri, zisanu ndi ziwiri, yaimuna ndi yaikazi, kuti mbeu ikhale ndi moyo pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Genesis7:4 Pakuti akapita masiku asanu ndi awiri Ine ndidzabvumbitsa mvula pa dziko lapansi masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku; ndi zinthu zamoyo zonse zomwe ndazipanga ndidzaziononga pa dziko lapansi," 
Genesis7:5 Ndipo anacita Nowa monga mwa zonse anamlamulira iye Yehova. 
Genesis7:6 Ndipo Nowa anali wa zaka mazana asanu ndi limodzi, pamene cigumula ca madzi cinali pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis7:7 Ndipo analowa Nowa ndi ana ace ndi mkazi wace ndi akazi a ana ace m'cingalawamo, cifukwa ca madzi a cigumula." 
Genesis7:8 Nyama zodyedwa ndi nyama zosadyedwa, ndi mbalame, ndi zonse zokwawa pansi," 
Genesis7:9 zinalowa ziwiri ziwiri kwa Nowa m'cingalawamo, yamphongo ndi yaikazi, monga momwe Mulungu anamlamulira Nowa." 
Genesis7:10 Ndipo panali pamene anapita masiku asanu ndi awiri, madzi a cigumula anali pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis7:11 Caka ca mazana asanu ndi limodzi ca moyo wa Nowa, mwezi waciwiri, tsiku la khumi ndi asanu ndi awiri la mwezi, tsiku lomwelo akasupe onse a madzi akuru anasefuka, ndi mazenera a kumwamba anatseguka." 
Genesis7:12 Ndipo mvula inali pa dziko lapansi masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku. 
Genesis7:13 Tsiku lomwelo analowa m'cingalawamo Nowa, ndi Semu, ndi Hamu, ndi Yafeti, ana a Nowa, ndi mkazi wace wa Nowa, ndi akazi atatu a ana ace pamodzi nao:" 
Genesis7:14 iwo, ndi zamoyo zonse monga mwa mitundu yao, ndi zinyama zonse monga mwa mitundu yao, zokwawa zonse zokwawa pa dziko lapansi monga mwa mitundu yao, ndi zouluka zonse monga mwa mitundu yao, ndi mbalame zonse za mitundu mitundu." 
Genesis7:15 Ndipo zinalowa kwa Nowa m'cingalawamo ziwiri ziwiri zamoyo zonse, m'mene muli mpweya wa moyo." 
Genesis7:16 Zimene zinalowazo, zinalowa yamphongo ndi yaikazi zamoyo zonse, monga momwe Mulungu anamlamulira iye: ndipo Yehova anamtsekera iye." 
Genesis7:17 Ndipo cigumula cinali pa dziko lapansi masiku makumi anai: ndipo madzi anacuruka natukula cingalawa, ndipo cinakwera pamwamba pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis7:18 Ndipo madzi anapambana, nacuruka ndithu pa dziko lapansi, ndipo cingalawa cinayandama pamadzi." 
Genesis7:19 Ndipo madzi anapambana ndithu pa dziko lapansi; anamizidwa mapiri atari onse amene anali pansi pa thambo lonse. 
Genesis7:20 Madzi anapambana ndithu nakwera mikono khumi ndi isanu: namizidwa mapiri," 
Genesis7:21 Ndipo zinafa zamoyo zonse zoyenda pa dziko lapansi, zouluka, ndi nyama, ndi zamoyo, ndi zokwawa zonse zakukwawa pa dziko lapansi, ndi anthu onse:" 
Genesis7:22 zonse zimene m'mphuno zao munali mpweya wa maimu wa moyo, zonse zinali pamtunda, zinafa." 
Genesis7:23 Ndipo zinaonongedwa zamoyo zimene zonse zinali pa dziko lapansi, anthu, ndi nyama, ndi zokwawa, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga; ndipo zinaonongedwa pa dzikolapansi: anatsala Nowayekha ndi amene anali pamodzi naye m'cingalawa." 
Genesis7:24 Ndipo anapambana madzi pa dziko lapansi masiku zana kudza makumi asanu. 
Genesis8:1 Ndipo Mulungu anakumbukira Nowa ndi zamoyo zonse, ndi nyama zonse zimene zinali pamodzi naye m'cingalawamo; ndipo Mulungu anapititsa mphepo pa dziko lapansi, naphwa madzi;" 
Genesis8:2 ndipo anatsekedwa akasupe a madzi akuru ndi mazenera a kumwamba, niletsedwa mvula ya kwuwamba;" 
Genesis8:3 ndipo madzi anaphweraphwerabe pa dziko lapansi: pamene anatha masiku zana limodzi kudza makumi atatu madzi anacepa. 
Genesis8:4 Ndipo cingalawa cinaima pa mapiri a Ararati, mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri, tsiku lakhumi ndi asanu ndi awiri la mwezi." 
Genesis8:5 Ndipo madzi analinkucepa kufikira mwezi wakhumi; mwezi wakhumi tsiku loyamba mwezi ndipo padaoneka mitu ya mapiri. 
Genesis8:6 Ndipo panali atapita masiku makumi anai, Nowa anatsegula pa zenera la cingalawa limene analipanga:" 
Genesis8:7 ndipo anaturutsa khungubwe, ndipo anaturuka kunka kwina ndi kwina kufikira adaphwa madzi pa dziko lapansi," 
Genesis8:8 Ndipo anaturutsa njiwa imcokere, kuti aone kapena madzi anaphwa pamwamba pa dziko lapansi;" 
Genesis8:9 koma njiwayo siinapeza popondapo phazi lace, nibwera kwa iye kucingalawako, pakuti madzi analipo pa dziko lonse lapansi; ndipo anaturutsa dzanja lace, naitenga, nailowetsa kwa iye m'cingalawamo." 
Genesis8:10 Ndipo analinda masiku ena asanu ndi awiri; naturutsanso njiwayo m'cingalawamo; 
Genesis8:11 ndipo njiwa inadza kwa iye madzulo; ndipo, taonani, m'kamwa mwace munali tsamba lazitona lotyoledwa: ndipo anadziwa Nowa kuti madzi analimkuphwa pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis8:12 Ndipo analindanso masiku ena asanu ndi awiri; naturutsa njiwayo: ndipo siinabweranso konse kwa iye. 
Genesis8:13 Ndipo panali caka ca mazana asanu ndi limodzi kudza cimodzi, mwezi woyamba, tsiku loyamba mwezi, madzi anaphwa pa dziko lapansi; ndipo Nowa anacotsa cindwi lace pacingalawa, nayang'ana, ndipo taonani, padauma pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis8:14 Mwezi waciwiri tsiku la makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi awiri la mwezi, lidauma dziko lapansi." 
Genesis8:15 Mulungu ndipo ananena kwa Nowa, kuti," 
Genesis8:16 Turukamoni m'cingalawamo, iwe ndi ana ako, ndi mkazi wako, ndi akazi a ana ako pamodzi ndi iwe." 
Genesis8:17 Turutsa pamodzi ndi iwe zamoyo zonse ziti ndi iwe za nyama zonse, zouluka, ndi zinyama, ndi zokwawa zonse zakukwawa pa dziko lapansi; kuti ziswane pa dziko lapansi, zibalane, zicuruke pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis8:18 Ndipo anaturuka Nowa ndi ana ace, ndi mkazi wace, ndi akazi a ana ace, pamodzi naye:" 
Genesis8:19 zinyama zonse, zokwawa zonse, zouluka zonse, ndi zonse zokwawa pa dziko lapansi, monga mwa mitundu yao, zinaturuka m'cingalawamo." 
Genesis8:20 Ndipo Nowa anamanga guwa la nsembe la Yehova; natengapo nyama zodyedwa zonse ndi mbalame zodyedwa zonse napereka nsembe zopsereza paguwapo. 
Genesis8:21 Ndipo Yehova anamva conunkhira cakukondweretsa; nati Yehova m'mtima mwace, Sindidzatembereranso konse nthaka cifukwa ca munthu; pakuti ndingaliro ya mtima wa munthu iri yoipa kuyambira pa unyamata wace; sindidzaphanso konse zinthu zonse zamoyo, monga momwe ndacitiramo." 
Genesis8:22 Pakukhalabe masiku a dziko lapansi, nthawi yakubzala ndi yakukunkha, cisanu ndi mafundi, malimwe ndi msakasa, usana ndi usiku sizidzalekai." 
Genesis9:1 Ndipo Mulungu anadalitsa Nowa ndi ana ace, nati kwa iwo, Mubalane, mucuruke, mudzaze dziko lapansi." 
Genesis9:2 Kuopsya kwanu, ndi kucititsa mantha kwanu kudzakhala pa zinyama zonse za dziko lapansi, ndi pa zouluka zonse za m'mlengalenga; ndi pa zonse zokwawa pansi, ndi pa nsomba zonse za m'nyanja, zapatsidwa m'dzanja lanu." 
Genesis9:3 Zoyenda zonse zamoyo zidzakhala zakudya zanu; monga therere laliwisi ndakupatsani inu zonsezo. 
Genesis9:4 Koma nyama, m'mene muli moyo wace, ndiwo mwazi wace, musadye." 
Genesis9:5 Zoonatu mwazi wanu wa miyoyo yanu ndidzafuna; pa dzanja la zinyama zonse ndidzaufuna: ndi pa dzanja la munthu, pa dzanja la mbale wace wa munthu ndidzaufuna moyo wa munthu." 
Genesis9:6 Amene akhetsa mwazi wa munthu, ndi munthunso mwazi wace udzakhetsedwa: cifukwa m'cifanizo ca Mulungu Iye anampanga munthu." 
Genesis9:7 Ndi inu, mubalane, mucuruke; muswane pa dziko lapansi, nimucuruke m'menemo." 
Genesis9:8 Ndipo Mulungu ananena kwa Nowa ndi kwa ana ace pamodzi naye, kuti," 
Genesis9:9 Ndipo Ine, taonani, Ine ndikhazikitsa pangano langa pamodzi ndi inu, ndi mbeu zanu pambuyo panu;" 
Genesis9:10 ndi zamoyo zonse ziti pamodzi ndi inu, zouluka, ng'ombe, ndi zinyama zonse za dziko lapansi, pamodzi ndi inu; zonse zoturuka m'cingalawa, zinyama zonse za dziko lapansi," 
Genesis9:11 Ndipo ndidzakhazikitsa pangano langa pamodzi ndi inu; zamoyo zonse sizidzamarizidwanso konse ndi madzi a cigumula; ndipo sikudzakhalanso konse cigumula cakuononga dziko lapansi. 
Genesis9:12 Ndipo anati Mulungu, Ici ndici cizindikiro ca pangano limene ndipangana ndi Ine ndi inu, ndi zamoyo zonse ziti pamodzi ndi inu, ku mibadwo mibadwo;" 
Genesis9:13 ndiika Uta-wa-Leza wanga m'mtambomo, ndipo udzakhala cizindikiro ca pangano lopangana ndi Ine ndi dziko lapansi." 
Genesis9:14 Ndipo padzakhala popimba ndi mtambo Ine dziko lapansi, utawo udzaoneka m'mtambomo;" 
Genesis9:15 ndipo ndidzakumbukira pangano langa limene liri ndi Ine ndi inu, ndi zamoyo zonse zokhala ndi moyo; ndipo madzi sadzakhalanso konse cigumula cakuononga zamoyo zonse." 
Genesis9:16 Ndipo utawo udzakhala m'mtambo; ndipo ndidzauyang'anira kuti ndikumbukire pangano lacikhalire liri ndi Mulungu ndi zamoyo zonse zokhala ndi moyo pa dziko lapansi. 
Genesis9:17 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Nowa, Ici ndici cizindikiro ca pangano ndalikhazikitsa popaogana ndi Ine ndi zamoyo zonse za pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis9:18 Ndi ana amuna a Nowa amene anaturuka m'cingalawa ndiwo Semu, ndi Hamu, ndi Yafeti: Hamu ndiye atate wace wa Kanani." 
Genesis9:19 Amenewa ndiwo ana amuna atatu a Nowa: ndiwo anafalikira dziko lonse lapansi. 
Genesis9:20 Ndipo anayamba Nowa kukhala munthu wakulima nthaka, ndipo analima munda wamphesa:" 
Genesis9:21 namwa vinyo wace, naledzera; ndipo anali wamarisece m'kati mwa bema wace." 
Genesis9:22 Ndipo Hamu atate wace wa Kanani, anauona umarisece wa atate wace, nauza abale ace awiri amene anali kunja." 
Genesis9:23 Semu ndi Yafeti ndipo anatenga copfunda, naciika pa mapewa ao a onse awiri, nayenda cambuyo, napfunditsa umarisece wa atate wao: nkhope zao zinali cambuyo, osaona umarisece wa atate ao." 
Genesis9:24 Nowa ndipo anauka kwa kuledzera kwace, nadziwa cimene anamcitira iye mwana wace wamng'ono." 
Genesis9:25 Ndipo anati, Wotembereredwa ndi Kanani: Adzakhala kwa abale ace kapolo wa akapolo:" 
Genesis9:26 Ndipo anati: Ayamikike Yehova, Mulungu wa Semu; Kanani akhale kapolo wace." 
Genesis9:27 Mulungu akuze Yafeti, Akhale iye m'mahema a Semu; Kanani akhale kapolo wace." 
Genesis9:28 Ndipo Nowa anakhala ndi moyo cigumula citapita, zaka mazana atatu kudza makumi asanu." 
Genesis9:29 Ndipo masiku onse a Nowa anali mazana asanu ndi anai kudza makumi asanu: ndipo anamwalira. 
Genesis10:1 Mibadwo ya ana a Nowa, Semu, Hamu, ndi Yafeti, ndi iyi; kwa iwo ndipo kunabadwa ana amuna, citapita cigumula cija." 
Genesis10:2 Ana amuna a Yafeti: Gomeri, ndi Magogi, ndi Madai, ndi Yavani, ndi Tubala, ndi Mesheki, ndi Tirasi," 
Genesis10:3 Ndi ana amuna a Gomeri: Asekenazo, ndi Rifata, ndi Togarma." 
Genesis10:4 Ndi ana amuna a Yavani: Elisa, ndi Tarisisi, ndi Kitimu, ndi Dodanimu." 
Genesis10:5 Amenewo ndipo anagawa zisi za amitundu m'maiko mwao, onse amene monga mwa cinenedwe cao; ndi mwa mabanja ao, ndi m'mitundu yao." 
Genesis10:6 Ndi ana amuna a Hamu: Kusi, ndi Mizraimu, ndi Puti, ndi Kanani." 
Genesis10:7 Ndi ana amuna a Kusi: Seba, ndi Havila, ndi Sabita, ndi Raama, ndi Sabiteka; ndi ana a Raama: Sheba ndi Dedane." 
Genesis10:8 Ndipo Kusi anabala Nimrode; ndipo iye anayamba kukhala wamphamvu pa dziko lapansi. 
Genesis10:9 Iye ndiye mpalu wamphamvu pamaso pa Yehova: cifukwa cace kunanenedwa, Monga Nimrode mpalu wamphamvu pamaso pa Yehova." 
Genesis10:10 Ndipo kuyamba kwace kwa ufumu wace kunali Babele, ndi Ereke, ndi Akadi, ndi Kaline, m'dziko la Sinara." 
Genesis10:11 M'dziko momwemo iye anaturuka kunka ku Ashuri, namanga Nineve, ndi mudzi wa Rehoboti, ndi Kala," 
Genesis10:12 ndi Resene pakati pa Nineve ndi Kala: umenewo ndi mudzi waukuru. 
Genesis10:13 Mizraimu ndipo anabala Ludimu, ndi Anamimu, ndi Lehabimu, ndi Nafituhimu," 
Genesis10:14 ndi Patrusimu, ndi Kasiluhimu, m'menemo ndipo anaturuka Afilisti, ndi Kafitorimu." 
Genesis10:15 Ndipo Kanani anabala Sidoni woyamba wace, ndi Heti:" 
Genesis10:16 ndi Ajebusi, ndi Aamori, ndi Agirigasi;" 
Genesis10:17 ndi Ahivi, ndi Aariki, ndi Asini;" 
Genesis10:18 ndi Aaravadi, ndi Aazemari, ndi Ahamati; pambuyo pace pamenepo ndipo mabanja a Akanani anafalikira." 
Genesis10:19 Ndipo malire a Akanani anayamba pa Sidoni, pakunka ku Gerari ndi ku Gaza; pakunka ku Sodomu, ndi ku Gomora, ndi Adima, ndi Zeboimu, kufikira ku Lasa." 
Genesis10:20 Amenewa ndi ana amuna a Hamu monga mwa mabanja ao, mwa zinenedwe zao, m'maiko ao, m'mitundu yao." 
Genesis10:21 Ndiponso kwa Semu atate wa ana onse a Ebere, mkuru wa Yafeti, kwa iye kunabadwa ana." 
Genesis10:22 Ana amuna a Semu; Elamu, ndi Ashuri, ndi Aripakasadi, ndi Ludi, ndi Aramu." 
Genesis10:23 Ndi ana a Aramu: Uzi ndi Huli, ndi Getere, ndi Masi." 
Genesis10:24 Aripakasadi ndipo anabala Sela; ndipo Sela anabala Ebere. 
Genesis10:25 Kwa Ebere ndipo kunabadwa ana amuna awiri; dzina la wina ndi Pelege; cifukwa kuti m'masiku ace dziko lapansi linagawanikana; dzina la mphwace ndi Yokitani. 
Genesis10:26 Ndipo Yokitani anabala Alamodadi, ndi Selefe, ndi Hazaramaveti, ndi Yera;" 
Genesis10:27 ndi Hadorimu ndi Uzali, ndi Dikila;" 
Genesis10:28 ndi Obali, ndi Abimaele, ndi Sheva;" 
Genesis10:29 ndi Ofiri ndi Havila, ndi obabi; onse amenewa ndi ana a okitani." 
Genesis10:30 Kwao kunayamba pa Mesa pakunka ku Sefere phiri la kum'mawa. 
Genesis10:31 Amenewa ndi ana a Semu, monga mwa mabanja ao, mwa zinenedwe zao, m'maiko ao, m'mitundu yao." 
Genesis10:32 Amenewo ndi mabanja a ana a Nowa monga mwa mibadwo yao, m'mitundu yao: ndi amenewo anagawanika mitundu pa dziko lapansi, citapita cigumula." 
Genesis11:1 Ndipo dziko lapansi linali la cinenedwe cimodzi ndi cilankhulidwe cimodzi. 
Genesis11:2 Ndipo panali pamene anayendayenda ulendo kum'mawa, anapeza cigwa m'dziko la Sinara, ndipo anakhala kumeneko." 
Genesis11:3 Ndipo ananenana wina ndi wina, Tiyeni tipange njerwa, tiziocetse. Ndipo anali ndi njerwa naziyesa miyala, ndi katondo anayesa matope." 
Genesis11:4 Ndipo anati, Tiyeni, timange mudzi ndi nsanja, pamutu pace pafikire kumwamba; ndipo tidzipangire ife tokha dzina kuti tisabalalike pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Genesis11:5 Ndipo Yehova anatsikira kudzaona mudzi ndi nsanja imene analinkumanga ana a anthu. 
Genesis11:6 Ndipo Yehova anati, Taonani, anthu ali amodzi, ndipo onse ali naco cinenedwe cao cimodzi; ndipo ici ayamba kucita: ndipo tsopano palibe kanthu kakuletsedwa nao kamene akafuna kucita." 
Genesis11:7 Tiyeni, titsike, pomwepo tisokoneze cinenedwe cao, kuti wina asamvere cinenedwe ca mnzace." 
Genesis11:8 Ndipo Yehova anabalalitsa iwo pa dziko lonse lapansi, ndipo analeka kumanga mudzi." 
Genesis11:9 Cifukwa cace anacha dzina lace Babele; pakuti kumeneko Yehova anasokoneza cinenedwe ca dziko lonse lapansi; kuyambira pamenepo Yehova anabalalitsa iwo pa dziko lonse lapansi. 
Genesis11:10 Mibadwo ya Semu ndi iyi: Semu anali wa zaka zana limodzi ndipo anabala Aripakasadi, citapita cigumula zaka ziwiri;" 
Genesis11:11 ndipo Semu anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana asanu, atabala Aripakasadi, nabala ana amuna ndi akazi." 
Genesis11:12 Ndipo Aripakasadi anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi atatu kudza zisanu, nabala Sela;" 
Genesis11:13 ndipo Aripakasadi anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana anai kudza zitatu, atabala Sela, nabala ana amuna ndi akazi." 
Genesis11:14 Ndipo Sela anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi atatu, nabala Ebere;" 
Genesis11:15 ndipo Sela anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana anai kudza zitatu, atabala Ebere, nabala ana amuna ndi akazi." 
Genesis11:16 Ndipo Ebere anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi atatu kudza zinai, nabala Pelege;" 
Genesis11:17 ndipo Ebere anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana anai kudza makumi awiri, atabala Pelege, nabala ana amuna ndi akazi." 
Genesis11:18 Ndipo Pelege anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi atatu, nabala, Reu;" 
Genesis11:19 ndipo Pelege anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana awiri kudza zisanu ndi zinai, atabala Reu, nabala ana amuna ndi akazi." 
Genesis11:20 Ndipo Reu anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi atatu kudza ziwiri, nabala Serugi:" 
Genesis11:21 ndipo Reu anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana awiri kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri, atabala Serugi, nabala ana amuna ndi akazi." 
Genesis11:22 Ndipo Serugi anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi atatu, nabala Nahori:" 
Genesis11:23 ndipo Serugi anakhala ndi moyo zaka mazana awiri, atabala Nahori, nabala ana amuna ndi akazi." 
Genesis11:24 Ndipo Nahori anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi awiri kudza zisanu ndi zinai, nabala Tera:" 
Genesis11:25 ndipo ahori anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana limodzi kudza khumi ndi zisanu ndi zinai, atabala Tera, nabala ana amuna ndi akazi." 
Genesis11:26 Ndipo Tera anakhala ndi moyo zaka makumi asanu ndi awiri, nabala Abramu, ndi Nahori ndi Harana." 
Genesis11:27 Mibadwo ya Tera ndi iyi: Tera anabala Abramu, ndi Nahori, ndi Harana; ndipo Harana anabala Loti." 
Genesis11:28 Ndipo anafa Harana pamaso pa atate wace Tera m'dziko la kubadwa kwace, m'Uri wa kwa Akaldayo." 
Genesis11:29 Ndipo Abramu ndi Nahori, anadzitengera okha akazi; dzina lace la mkazi wa Abramu ndilo Sarai; ndi dzina lace la mkazi wa Nahori ndilo Milika, mwana wace wa Harana, atate wace wa Milika, ndi atate wace wa Yisika." 
Genesis11:30 Koma Sarai anali wouma; analibe mwana. 
Genesis11:31 Ndipo Tera anatenga Abramu mwana wace wamwamuna, ndi Loti mwana wa Harana, mwana wace wamwamuna, ndi Sarai mpongozi wace, mkazi wa mwana wace Abramu; ndipo anaturuka pamodzi nao ku Uri wa kwa Akaldayo kuti amuke ku dziko la Kanani, ndipo anafika ku Harana, nakhala kumeneko." 
Genesis11:32 Masiku a Tera anali zaka mazana awiri kudza zisanu; ndipo anafa Tera m'Harana. 
Genesis12:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Abramu, Turuka iwe m'dziko lako, ndi kwa abale ako, ndi ku nyumba ya atate wako, kunka ku dziko limene ndidzakusonyeza iwe;" 
Genesis12:2 ndipo ndidzakuyesa iwe mtundu waukuru, ndipo ndidzakudalitsa iwe, ndi kubukitsa dzina lako; nukhale iwe mdalitso;" 
Genesis12:3 ndipo ndidzadalitsa amene akudalitsa iwe; ndi kutemberera iye amene akutemberera iwe; ndipo mwa iwe adzadalitsidwa mabanja onse a dziko lapansi," 
Genesis12:4 Ndipo anamuka Abramu monga Yehova ananena kwa iye, ndipo Loti anamuka pamodzi naye: ndipo Abramu anali wa zaka makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza zisanu, pamene anaturuka m'Harana." 
Genesis12:5 Ndipo Abramu anatenga Sarai mkazi wace, ndi Loti mwana wa mphwace, ndi cuma cao cimene anasonkhanitsa, ndi miyoyo imene anabala m'Harana; naturuka kunka ku dziko la Kanani, ndipo anadza ku dziko la Kanani." 
Genesis12:6 Ndipo Abramu anapitira m'dziko kufikira ku malo a Sekemu, kufikira ku mtengo wathundu wa ku More. Akanani anali m'dzikomo nthawi yomweyo." 
Genesis12:7 Ndipo Yehova anaonekera kwa Abramu nati, Ndidzapatsa mbeu yako dziko lino: pamenepo anammangira Yehova guwa la nsembe amene anamuonekera iye." 
Genesis12:8 Ndipo iye anacoka kumeneko kunka ku phiri la kum'mawa kwa Beteli, namanga hema wace; Beteli anali kumadzulo, ndi Ai anali kum'mawa: kumeneko ndipo anammangira Yehova guwa la nsembe, naitanira dzina la Yehova." 
Genesis12:9 Ndipo Abramu anayenda ulendo wace, nayendayenda kunka kumwela." 
Genesis12:10 Ndipo munali njala m'dzikomo, ndipo anatsikira Abramo ku Aigupto kukakhala kumeneko, cifukwa kuti njala inali yaikuru m'dziko m'menemo." 
Genesis12:11 Ndipo panali pamene anayandikira kulowa m'Aigupto, anati kwa Sarai mkazi wace, Taonani, ndidziwa kuti ndiwe mkazi wokongola maonekedwe ako;" 
Genesis12:12 ndipo padzakhala pamene adzakuona iwe Aaigupto, adzati, Uyu ndi mkazi wace: ndipo adzandipha ine, koma iwe adzakuleka ndi moyo." 
Genesis12:13 Uzikanenatu, kuti iwe ndiwe mlongo wanga: kuti cidzakhala cabwino ndi ine, cifukwa ca iwe, ndi kuti moyo wanga usungike ndi iwe." 
Genesis12:14 Ndipo panali pamene Abramu analowa m'Aigupto, Aaigupto anaona kuti mkazi anali wokongola kwambiri." 
Genesis12:15 Ndipo akaronga ace a Farao anamuona iye, namyamikira iye kwa Farao; ndipo anamuka ndi mkazi kunyumba kwace kwa Farao." 
Genesis12:16 Ndipo anamcitira Abramu bwino cifukwa ca iyeyo; ndipo anali nazo nkhosa, ndi ng'ombe, ndi aburu, ndi akapolo, ndi adzakazi, ndi aburu akazi, ndi ngamila." 
Genesis12:17 Koma Yehova anabvutitsa Farao ndi banja lace ndi nthenda zazikuru cifukwa ca Sarai mkazi wace wa Abramu," 
Genesis12:18 Ndipo Farao anaitana Abramu, nati, Nanga nciani ici wandicitira ine? cifukwa canji sunandiuza ine kuti ndiye mkazi wako?" 
Genesis12:19 Cifukwa canji unati, Ndiye mlongo wanga? Kotero ndinamtenga iye akhale mkazi wanga; tsopano suyu mkazi wako; mtenge nucoke." 
Genesis12:20 Ndipo Farao analamulira anthu ace za iye; ndipo anamperekeza iye m'njira ndi mkazi wace ndi zonse anali nazo. 
Genesis13:1 Ndipo anakwera Abramu kucoka ku Aigupto, iye ndi mkazi wace, ndi zonse anali nazo, ndi Loti pamodzi naye, kunka ku dziko la kumwera." 
Genesis13:2 Ndipo Abramu anali wolemera ndithu ndi ng'ombe ndi siliva ndi golidi," 
Genesis13:3 Ndipo anankabe ulendowace kucokera ku dziko la kumwera kunka ku Beteli, kufikira kumalo kumene kunali hema wace poyamba paja, pakati pa Beteli ndi Ai;" 
Genesis13:4 kumalo kwa guwa la nsembe analimanga iye kumeneko, poyamba paja; ndipo pamenepo Abramu anaitanira dzina la Yehova." 
Genesis13:5 Ndiponso Loti anayenda ndi Abramu anali ndi nkhosa ndi ng'ombe ndi mahema. 
Genesis13:6 Ndipo dziko silinathe kuwakwanira iwo, kuti akhale pamodzi: cifukwa kuti cuma cao cinali cambiri, ndipo sanathe kukhala pamodzi." 
Genesis13:7 Ndipo panali ndeu, abusa a Abramu kudana ndi abusa a Loti: Akanani ndi Aperezi ndipo analinkukhala nthawi yomweyo m'dzikomo." 
Genesis13:8 Ndipo Abramu anati kwa Loti, Tisacite ndeu, ine ndi iwe, abusa anga ndi abusa ako: cifukwa kuti ife ndife abale." 
Genesis13:9 Dziko lonse siliri pamaso pako kodi? Ulekanetu ndi ine: ukanka iwe ku dzanja lamanzere, ine ndinka ku dzanja lamanja: ukanka iwe ku dzanja lamanja, ine ndinka ku dzanja lamanzere." 
Genesis13:10 Ndipo Loti anatukula maso ace nayang'ana cigwa conse ca Yordano kuti conseco cinali ndi madzi ambiri, asanaononge Yehova Sodomu ndi Gomora, monga munda wa Yehova, monga dziko la Aigupto pakunka ku Zoari." 
Genesis13:11 Ndipo Loti anasankha cigwa conse ca Yordano; ndipo Loti anacoka ulendo wace kunka kum'mawa: ndipo analekana wina ndi mnzace. 
Genesis13:12 Ndipo Abramu anakhala m'dziko la Kanani, ndipo Loti anakhala m'midzi ya m'cigwa, nasendeza hema wace kufikira ku Sodomu." 
Genesis13:13 Ndipo anthu a ku Sodomu anali oipa ndi ocimwa kwambiri pamaso pa Yehova. 
Genesis13:14 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Abramu, atalekana naye Loti, Tukulatu maso ako, nuyang'anire kuyambira kumene uliko, kumpoto, ndi kumwela, ndi kum'mawa, ndi kumadzulo:" 
Genesis13:15 cifukwa kuti dziko lonse limene ulinkuona, ndidzakupatsa iwe ndi mbeu yako nthawi yonse." 
Genesis13:16 Ndipo ndidzayesa mbeu yako monga pfumbi lapansi: cotere kuti ngati munthu angathe kuwerenga pfumbi lapansi, comweconso mbeu yako idzawerengedwa." 
Genesis13:17 Tauka, nuyendeyendc m'dzikoli m'litari mwace ndi m'mimba mwace; cifukwa kuti ndidzakupatsa iwe limenelo." 
Genesis13:18 Ndipo Abramu anasuntha hema wace nafika nakhala pa mitengo yathundu ya pa Mamre, imene iri m'Hebroni, nammangira Yehova kumeneko guwa la nsembe." 
Genesis14:1 Ndipo panali masiku a Amarafele mfumu ya Sinara, ndi Arioki mfumu ya Elasara, ndi Kedorelaomere mfumu ya Elami, ndi Tidala mfumu ya Goimu," 
Genesis14:2 iwo anathira nkhondo pa Bera mfumu ya Sodomu, ndi pa Birisa, mfumu ya Gomora, ndi pa Sinabi mfumu ya Adima, ndi pa Semebere mfumu ya Ziboimu, ndi pa mfumu ya Bela (kumeneko ndi ku Zoari)." 
Genesis14:3 Onse amenewo anadziphatikana pa cigwa ca Sidimu (pamenepo ndi pa nyanja yamcere). 
Genesis14:4 Zaka khumi ndi ziwiri iwo anamtumikira Kedorelaomere, caka cakhumi ndi citatu anapanduka," 
Genesis14:5 Caka cakhumi ndicinai ndipo anadza Kedorelaomere ndi mafumu amene anali naye, nawakantha Arefai m'Aseteroti-kamaimu, ndi Azuzi m'Hamu, ndi Aemi m'Savekiriataimu," 
Genesis14:6 ndi Ahori pa phiri lao Seiri kufikira ku Eliparana, kumene kuli pacipululu." 
Genesis14:7 Ndipo anabwera nafika ku Eni-Misipati (ku meneko ndi ku Kadese), nakantha dziko lonse la Aamaleki, ndiponse Aamori amene akhala m'Hazezoni-tamara." 
Genesis14:8 Ndipo anaturuka mfumu ya Sodomu, ndi ya Gomora, ndi mfumu ya Adima, ndi mfumu ya Zeboimu, ndi mfumu ya Bela (kumeneko ndi ku Zoari) ndipo anawathira nkhondo m'cigwa ca Sidimu" 
Genesis14:9 ndi Kedorelaomere mfumu ya Elamu, ndi Tidala mfumu ya Goimu ndi Amarafele mfumu ya Sinara, ndi Arioki mfumu ya Elasara; mafumu anai kugwirana ndi asanu." 
Genesis14:10 Cigwa ca Sidimu cinali ndi zitengetenge tho; ndipo anathawa mafumu a ku Sodomu ndi Gomora nagwa m'menemo: amene anatsala anathawira kuphiri. 
Genesis14:11 Ndipo anatenga cuma conse ca Sodomu ndi Gomora ndi zakudya zao zonse, namuka." 
Genesis14:12 Ndipo anagwira Loti mwana wa Abramu amene anakhala m'Sodomu, ndi cuma cace, namuka." 
Genesis14:13 Ndipo anadza wina amene anapulumuka namuuza Abramu Mhebri; ndipo iye analinkukhala pa mitengo yathundu ya pa Mamre M-amori, mkuru wace wa Esakolo, ndi mkuru wace wa Aneri; amenewo ndiwo opangana naye Abramu." 
Genesis14:14 Pamene anamva Abramu kuti mphwace anagwidwa, anaturuka natsogolera anyamata ace opangika, obadwa kunyumba kwace, mazana atatu kudza khumi ndi asanu ndi atatu, nawalondola kutikira ku Dani." 
Genesis14:15 Ndipo anadzigawanizira iwo usiku, iye ndi anyamata ace, nawakantha, nawapitikitsa kufikira ku Hoba, ndiko ku dzanja lamanzere la ku Damasiko." 
Genesis14:16 Ndipo anabwera naco cuma conse, nabwera naye Loti yemwe ndi cuma cace, ndi akazi ndi anthu omwe." 
Genesis14:17 Ndipo anaturuka mfumu ya Sodomu kukomana naye, atabwera anatha kuwakantha Kedorelaomere ndi mafumu amene anali naye, ku cigwa ca Save (ndiko ku cigwa ca mfumu)," 
Genesis14:18 Ndipo Melikizedeke mfumu ya ku Salemu, anaturuka nao mkate ndi vinyo: iye ndiye wansembe wa Mulungu Wamkurukuru." 
Genesis14:19 Ndipo anamdalitsa iye, nati, Abramu adalitsike ndi Mulungu Wamkurukuru, mwini kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi;" 
Genesis14:20 ayamikike Mulungu Wamkurukuru amene wapereka adani ako m'dzanja lako. Ndipo anampatsa iye limodzi la magawo khumi la zonse. 
Genesis14:21 Mfumu ya Sodomu ndipo inati kwa Abramu, Ndipatse ine anthu, nutenge cuma iwe wekha." 
Genesis14:22 Ndipo Abramu anati kwa mfumu ya Sodomu, Dzanja langa ndamtukulira Yehova, Mulungu Wamkurukuru, mwini kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi," 
Genesis14:23 kuti sindidzatenga ngakhale thonje ngakhale cingwe ca nsapato, ngakhale kanthu kali konse kako, kuti unganene, Ndamlemeza Abramu;" 
Genesis14:24 koma cokhaci anadya anyamata, ndi gawo lao la anthu amene ananka pamodzi ndi ine, Aneri, Esikolo, ndi Mamre, iwo atenge gawo lao." 
Genesis15:1 Zitapita izo, mau a Yehova anadza kwa Abramu m'masomphenya, kuti, Usaope, Abramu, Ine ndine cikopa cako ndi mphotho yako yaikurukuru." 
Genesis15:2 Ndipo Abramu anati, Ambuye Mulungu, mudzandipatsa ine ciani popeza ndine wopanda mwana, ndi amene adzakhala mwini nyumba yanga ndiye Eliezere wa ku Damasiko?" 
Genesis15:3 Ndipo Abramu anati, Taonani, simunandipatse ine mbeu; ndipo, taonani, wobadwa m'nyumba mwanga adzalowa m'malo mwanga." 
Genesis15:4 Ndipo, taonani, mau a Yehova anadza kwa iye kuti, Uyu sadzakhala wakulowa m'malo mwako; koma iye amene adzaturuka m'cuuno mwako, ndiye adzakhala wakulowa m'malo mwako." 
Genesis15:5 Ndipo anamturutsa iye kunja, nati, Tayang'anatu kumwamba, uwerenge nyenyezi, ngati ukhoza kuziwerenga zimenezo: ndipo anati kwa iye, Zoterezo zidzakhala mbeuzako." 
Genesis15:6 Ndipo anakhulupirira Yehova, ndipo kunayesedwa kwa iye cilungamo." 
Genesis15:7 Ndipo anatikwaiye, Ine ndine Yehova amene ndinaturutsa iwe m'Uri wa kwa Akaldayo, kuti ndikupatse iwe dziko limeneli likhale lako lako." 
Genesis15:8 Ndipo anati, Ambuye Mulungu, nanga ndidzadziwa bwanji kuti lidzakhala colowa canga?" 
Genesis15:9 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Kanditengere Ine ng'ombe yaikazi ya zaka zitatu, ndi mbuzi yaikazi ya zaka zitatu, ndi tonde wa zaka zitatu, ndi njiwa, ndi bunda." 
Genesis15:10 Ndipo anatenga iye zonse zimenezo, nazidula pakati, naika bandu popenyana ndi linzace: koma mbalame sanazidula." 
Genesis15:11 Pamene miimba inatsikira panyama, Abramu anaingitsa iyo." 
Genesis15:12 Ndipo linalinkulowa dzuwa, ndi tulo tatikuru tinamgwera Abramu: ndipo taonani, kuopsya kwa mdima waukuru kunamgwera iye." 
Genesis15:13 Ndipo anati kwa Abramu, Dziwitsa ndithu kuti mbeu zako zidzakhala alendo m'dziko la eni, nizidzatumikira iwo, ndipo iwo adzasautsa izo zaka mazana anai;" 
Genesis15:14 ndiponso mtunduwo adzautumikira, Ine ndidzauweruza: ndiponso pambuyo pace adzaturuka ndi cuma cambiri." 
Genesis15:15 Ndipo iwe udzanka kwa makolo ako m'mtendere; nudzaikidwa ndi ukalambawabwino. 
Genesis15:16 Koma iwo adzabweranso kuno mbadwo wacinai: pakuti mphulupulu za Aamori sizinakwaniridwe. 
Genesis15:17 Ndipo panali pamene litalowa dzuwa ndi kudza mdima, taonani, ng'anjo yofuka utsi ndi muuni wamoto wapita pakati pa mabanduwo." 
Genesis15:18 Tsiku lomwelo Yehova anapangana cipangano ndi Abramu, nati, Ndidzapatsa mbeu zako dziko ili, kuyambira pa nyanja ya Aigupto kufikira pa nyanja yaikuru, nyanja ya Firate:" 
Genesis15:19 Akeni ndi Akenizi, Akadimoni, ndi Ahiti, ndi Aperezi, ndi Arefai, ndi Aamori, ndi Akanani, ndi Agirigasi, ndi Ajebusi." 
Genesis16:1 Ndipo Sarai mkazi wace wa Abramu sanambalire iye mwana; ndipo anali ndi mdzakazi, wa ku Aigupto, dzina lace Hagara." 
Genesis16:2 Ndipo Sarai anati kwa Abramu, Taonanitu, Yehova anandiletsa ine kuti ndisabale: lowanitu kwa mdzakazi wanga; kapena ndikalandire ndi iye ana. Ndipo Abramu anamvera mau a Sarai." 
Genesis16:3 Ndipo Sarai mkazi wace wa Abramu anatenga Hagara mdzakazi wace wa ku Aigupto, Abramu atakhala m'dziko la Kanani zaka khumi, nampereka iye kwa Abramu mwamuna wace, kuti akhale mkazi wace." 
Genesis16:4 Ndipo analowa kwa Hagara, ndipo iye anatenga pakati. Pamene anaona kuti anatenga pakati, anapeputsa wakuka wace m'maso mwace." 
Genesis16:5 Ndipo Sarai anati kwa Abramu, Kusauka kwanga kukhale pa iwe: ndakupatsa iwe mdzakazi wanga pamtima pako; ndipo pakuona kuti anatenga pakati anandipeputsa ine m'maso mwace: Yehova aweruze pakati pa iwe ndi ine." 
Genesis16:6 Koma Abramu anati kwa Sarai, Taona, mdzakazi wako ali m'dzanja lako, umcitire iye cimene cikukomera m'maso mwako. Ndipo Sarai anamsautsa iye, ndipo anathawa kumaso kwace." 
Genesis16:7 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anampeza iye pa kasupe wa madzi m'cipululu, pa kasupe wa pa njira ya ku Suri." 
Genesis16:8 Ndipo anati, Hagara, mdzakazi wace wa Sarai, ufumira kuti? Unka kuti? Ndipo anati, Ndithawa ine kumaso kwace kwa wakuka wanga Sarai." 
Genesis16:9 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa iye, Bwera kwa wakuka wako, udzicepetse wekha pamanja pace." 
Genesis16:10 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa iye, Ndidzacurukitsa ndithu mbeu zako, kuti unyinji wao sudzawerengeka." 
Genesis16:11 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa iye, Taona, uli ndi pakati, ndipo udzabala mwana wamwamuna; nudzamucha dzina lace Ismayeli; cifukwa Yehova anamva kusauka kwako." 
Genesis16:12 Ndipo iye adzakhala munthu wa m'thengo; ndipo dzanja lace lidzakhala lotsutsana ndi anthu onse, ndi manja a anthu onse adzakhala otsutsana naye: ndipo iye adzakhala pamaso pa abale ace onse." 
Genesis16:13 Ndipo anacha dzina la Yehova amene ananena naye, Ndinu Mulungu wakundiona ine; pakuti anati, Kodi kunonso ndayang'ana pambuyo pace pa iye amene wakundiona ine?" 
Genesis16:14 Cifukwa cace citsimeco cinachedwa Beerelahai-roi; taonani ciri pakati pa Kadese ndi Berede. 
Genesis16:15 Ndipo Hagara anambalira Abramumwana wamwamuna, ndipo Abramu anacha dzina la mwana wace amene anambalira iye Hagara, lsmayeli." 
Genesis16:16 Ndipo Abramu anali wa zaka makumi asanu ndi atatu kudza zisanu ndi cimodzi, pamene Hagara anambalira Abramu Ismayeli." 
Genesis17:1 Pamene Abramu anali wa zaka makumi asanu ndi anai kudza zisanu ndi zinai, Yehova anamuonekera Abramu nati kwa iye, Ine ndine Mulungu Wamphamvuyonse; yenda iwe pamaso panga, nukhale wangwiro." 
Genesis17:2 Ndipo ndidzapangana pangano langa ndi Ine ndi iwe, ndipo ndidzacurukitsa iwe kwambiri." 
Genesis17:3 Ndipo Abramu anagwa nkhope pansi, ndipo Yehova ananena naye kuti," 
Genesis17:4 Koma Ine, taona, pangano langa liri ndi iwe, ndipo udzakhala iwe atate wa khamu la mitundu." 
Genesis17:5 Sudzachedwanso dzina lako Abramu, koma dzina lako lidzakhala Abrahamu; cifukwa kuti ndakuyesa iwe atate wa khamu la mitundu." 
Genesis17:6 Ndipo ndikubalitsa iwe ndithu, ndipo ndidzakuyesa iwe mitundu, ndipo mafumu adzaturuka mwa iwe." 
Genesis17:7 Ndipo ndidzalimbitsa pangano langa ndi Ine ndi iwe pa mbeu zako za pambuyo pako m'mibadwo yao, kuti likhale pangano la nthawi zonse, kuti ndikhale Mulungu wako ndi wa mbeu zako za pambuyo pako." 
Genesis17:8 Ndipo ndidzakupatsa iwe ndi mbeu zako za pambuyo pako, dziko la maulendo anu, dziko lonse la Kanani likhale lako nthawi zonse: ndipo Ine ndidzakhala Mulungu wao." 
Genesis17:9 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Abrahamu, Koma iwe, uzikumbukira pangano langa, iwe ndi mbeu zako za pambuyo pako m'mibadwo yao." 
Genesis17:10 Ili ndi pangano langa limene uzisunga pakati pa Ine ndi iwe ndi mbeu zako zapambuyo pako: azidulidwa amuna onse a mwa inu. 
Genesis17:11 Muzidula khungu lanu; ndipo cidzakhala cizindikiro ca pangano pakati pa Ine ndi inu. 
Genesis17:12 A masiku asanu ndi atatu azidulidwa mwa inu, ana amuna onse m'mibadwo mwanu, amene abadwa m'nyumba ndi amene agulidwa ndi ndalama kwa alendo ali onse, wosakhala mwa mbeu zako." 
Genesis17:13 Azidulidwatu amene abadwa m'nyumba mwako ndi amene agulidwa ndi ndalama zako: ndipo pangano langa lidzakhala m'thupi mwako pangano losatha. 
Genesis17:14 Ndipo mwamuna wosadulidwa, wosadulidwa khungu lace munthuyo amsadze mwa anthu a mtundu wace; waphwanya pangano langa." 
Genesis17:15 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Abrahamu, Koma Sarai mkazi wako, usamcha dzina lace Sarai, koma dzina lace ndi Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Ndipo ndidzamdalitsa iye, ndiponso ndidzakupatsa iwe mwana wamwamuna wobadwa mwa iye, inde, ndidzamdalitsa iye, ndipo adzakhala amace a mitundu, mafumu a anthu adzaturuka mwa iye." 
Genesis17:17 Ndipo Abrahamu adagwa nkhope pansi, naseka, nati m'mtima mwace, Kodi mwana adzabadwa kwa iye amene ali wa zaka zana? Kodi Sara wa zaka makumi asanu ndi anai adzabala?" 
Genesis17:18 Ndipo Abrahamu anati kwa Mulungu, Ha! Ismayeli akhale ndi moyo pamaso panu!" 
Genesis17:19 Ndipo Mulungu anati, Koma Sara mkazi wako adzakubalira iwe mwana wamwamuna; ndipo udzamucha dzina lace Isake; ndipo ndidzalimbikitsa nave pangano langa, kuti likhale pangano la nthawi zonse, la ku mbeu zace za pambuyo pace." 
Genesis17:20 Koma za Ismayeli, ndamvera iwe: taona, ndamdalitsa iye, ndipo ndidzamcurukitsa iye ndithu; adzabala akaronga khumi ndi awiri, ndipo ndidzamuyesa iye mtundu waukuru." 
Genesis17:21 Koma pangano langa ndidzalimbikitsa ndi Isake, amene Sara adzakubalira iwe nthawi yomwe yino caka camawa." 
Genesis17:22 Ndipo analeka kunena naye, ndipo Mulungu anakwera kucokera kwa Abrahamu." 
Genesis17:23 Ndipo Abrahamu anatenga Ismayeli mwana wace ndi onse amene anabadwa m'nyumba mwace, ndi onse, amene anagulidwa ndi ndalama zace, amuna onse a mwa anthu a kunyumba kwace kwa Abrahamu, nadula khungu lao tsiku lomwelo, monga Mulungu ananena naye." 
Genesis17:24 Ndipo Abrahamu anali wa zaka makumi asanu ndi anai kudza zisanu ndi zinai, pamene anadulidwa m'khungu lace." 
Genesis17:25 Ndipo Ismayeli mwana wace anali wa zaka khumi ndi zitatu pamene anadulidwa m'khungu lace. 
Genesis17:26 Tsiku lomwelo anadulidwa Abrahamu ndi Ismayeli mwana wace. 
Genesis17:27 Ndipo amuna onse a m'nyumba mwace obadwa m'nyumba, ndi ogulidwa ndi ndalama kwa alendo, anadulidwa pamodzi naye." 
Genesis18:1 Ndipo Yehova anamuonekera iye pa mtengo yathundu ya ku Mamre, pamene anakhala pa khomo la hema wace pakutentha dzuwa." 
Genesis18:2 Ndipo anatukula maso ace, nayang'ana, taonani, anthu atatu anaima pandunji pace; pamene anaona iwo, anawathamangira kucoka ku khomo la hema kukakomana nao, nawerama pansi, nati," 
Genesis18:3 Mbuyanga, ngatitu ndikapeza ufulu pamaso panu, musapitiriretu pa kapolo wanu;" 
Genesis18:4 nditengetu madzi pang'ono, ndikusambitseni mapazi anu, mupumule pansi pa mtengo;" 
Genesis18:5 ndipo ndidzatenga cakudya pang'ono, nimutonthoze mitima yanu; mutatero mudzapitirira, cifukwa mwafika kwa kapolo wanu. Ndipo anati, Cita comweco monga momwe wanena." 
Genesis18:6 Ndipo Abrahamu analowa msanga m'hema wace kwa Sara, nati, Konza msanga miyeso itatu ya ufa wosalala, nuumbe, nupange mikate." 
Genesis18:7 Ndipo Abrahamu anafulumira kunka kuzoweta, natenga kamwana ka ng'ombe kofewa ndi kabwino, napatsa mnyamata, ndipo anafulumira kuphika." 
Genesis18:8 Ndipo anatenga mafuta amkaka, ndi mkaka, ndi kamwana ka ng'ombe kamene anaphika, naziika patsogolo pao; ndipo iye anaimirira iwo patsinde pa mtengo, ndipo anadya." 
Genesis18:9 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Ali kuti Sara mkazi wako? Ndipo anati, Taonani m'hemamo." 
Genesis18:10 Ndipo anati, Ndidzabwera kwa iwe ndithu pakufika nyengo yace; taonani Sara mkazi wako adzakhala ndi mwana wamwamuna. Ndipo Sara anamva pakhomo pa hema amene anali pambuyo pace." 
Genesis18:11 Koma Abrahamu ndi Sara anali okalamba, ana pitirira masiku ao; ndipo kunaleka kwa Sara konga kumacita ndi akazi;" 
Genesis18:12 ndipo Sara anaseka m'mtima mwace, nati, Kodi ndidzakhala ndi kukondwa ine nditakalamba, ndiponso mbuyanga ali wokalamba?" 
Genesis18:13 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Abrahamu, Bwanji anaseka Sara, kuti, Kodi ndidzabala ine ndithu, ine amene ndakalamba?" 
Genesis18:14 Kodi ciripo cinthu comlaka Yehova? Pa nthawi yoikidwa ndidzabwera kwa iwe, pakufika nyengo yace, ndipo Sara adzakhala ndi mwana wamwamuna." 
Genesis18:15 Koma Sara anakana, nati, Sindinasekai; cifukwa anaopa, Ndipo anati, lai; koma unaseka." 
Genesis18:16 Ndipo anthuwo anauka kucokera kumeneko nayang'ana ku Sodomu; ndipo Abrahamu ananka nao kuwaperekeza. 
Genesis18:17 Ndipo Yehova adati, Kodi ndidzabisira Abrahamu cimene ndicita?" 
Genesis18:18 Pakuti Abrahamu adzakhala ndithu wamkuru ndi wamphamvu, ndipo mitundu yonse ya dziko lapansi idzadalitsika mwa iye?" 
Genesis18:19 Cifukwa ndamdziwa iye kuti alamulire ana ace ndi banja lace la pambuyo pace, kuti asunge njira ya Yehova, kucita cilungamo ndi ciweruziro, kuti Yehova akamtengere Abrahamu comwe anamnenera iye." 
Genesis18:20 Ndipo anati Yehova, Popeza kulira kwa Sodomu ndi Gomora kuli kwakukuru, ndipo popeza kucimwa kwao kuli kulemera ndithu," 
Genesis18:21 ndidzatsikatu ndikaone ngati anacita monse monga kulira kwace kumene kunandifikira: ngati sanatero ndidzadziwa. 
Genesis18:22 Ndipo anthuwo anatembenuka nacoka kumeneko, napita kunka ku Sodomu. Koma Abrahamu anaimabe pamaso pa Yehova." 
Genesis18:23 Ndipo Abrahamu anayandikira nati, Kodi mudzaononga olungama pamodzi ndi oipa?" 
Genesis18:24 Kapena alipo olungama makumi asanu m'kati mwa mudzi; kodi mudzaononga, simudzasiya malowa cifukwa ca olungama makumi asanu ali momwemo?" 
Genesis18:25 Musamatero ai, kupha olungama pamodzi ndi oipa, kuta olungama akhale monga oipa; musamatero ai; kodi sadzacita zoyenera woweruza wa dziko lonse lapansi?" 
Genesis18:26 Ndipo anati Yehova, Ndikapeza m'Sodomu olungama makumi asanu m'kati mwa mudzi, ndidzasiya malo onse cifukwa ca iwo." 
Genesis18:27 Ndipo anayankha Abrahamu nati, Taonanitu, ndadziyesera kunena kwa Ambuye, ine ndine pfumbi ndi phulusa:" 
Genesis18:28 kapena akaperewera asanu pa olungama makumi asanuwo; kodi mudzaononga mudzi wonse cifukwa ca kuperewera asanu? Ndipo anati, Ndikapeza makumi anai ndi asanu sindidzauononga." 
Genesis18:29 Ndipo ananenanso kwa iye nati, Kapena akapezedwa makumi anai m'menemo. Ndipo anati, Sindidzacita cifukwa ca makumi anai." 
Genesis18:30 Ndipo anati, Asakwiyetu Ambuye, ndipo ndidzanenanso: kapena akapezedwa makumi atatu m'menemo? Ndipo anati, Ndikapeza makumi atatu m'menemo sindidzacita." 
Genesis18:31 Ndipo anati, Taonanitu, ndadziyesera kunena kwa Ambuye: kapena akapezedwa makumi awiri m'menemo. Ndipo anati, Sindidzacita cifukwa ca makumi awiri." 
Genesis18:32 Ndipo anati, Asakwiyetu Ambuye, ndipo ndidzanena kamodzi aka kokha: kapena akapezedwakhumim'menemo: Ndipo anati, Sindidzacita cifukwa ca khumi." 
Genesis18:33 Ndipo Yehova anapita atatha kunena naye Abrahamu: ndipo Abrahamu anabwera kumalo kwace. 
Genesis19:1 Ndipo anadza ku Sodomu madzulo amithenga awiri; ndipo Loti anakhala pa cipata ca Sodomu, ndipo Loti anaona iwo, nauka kuti akakomane nao, ndipo anaweramitsa pansi nkhope yace." 
Genesis19:2 Ndipo anati, Taonanitu, ambuye anga, tembenukanitu, kulowa m'nyumba mwa kapolo wanu, mugone usiku wonse, mutsuke mapazi anu, ndipo mudzalawira m'mawa kunka ulendo wanu. Ndipo anati, lai; koma tigone m'khwalalamu usiku wonse." 
Genesis19:3 Ndipo anawaumiriza iwo ndithu: ndipo anapatukira kwa iye, nalowa m'nyumba mwace; ndipo anawakonzera iwo madyerero, naphika mikate yopanda cotupitsa, ndipo anadya," 
Genesis19:4 Koma asanagone, anthu a m'mudzimo anthu a Sodomu, anazinga nyumba, anyamata ndi okalamba, anthu onse a m'mbali zonse;" 
Genesis19:5 ndipo anamuitana Loti, nati kwa iye, Ali kuti anthu amene anadza kwa iwe madzulo ano, utiturutsire iwo kuti tiwadziwe." 
Genesis19:6 Ndipo Loti anaturukira kwa iwo pakhomo, natseka cambuyo pakhomo pace." 
Genesis19:7 Ndipo anati, Abale anga, musacitetu koipa kotere." 
Genesis19:8 Taonanitu, ndiri ndi ana akazi awiri, amene sanadziwe mwamuna; ndiwaturutsire iwo kwa inu, mucite nao comwe cikomera inu; koma anthu awa musawacitire iwo kanthu; cifukwa kuti anadza iwo pansi pa mthunzi wa cindwi langa," 
Genesis19:9 Ndipo anati iwo, Baima; natinso, Uyu anadza kuno kukhala ngati mlendo, ndipo afuna kutilamulira; tsopano tidzakucitira iwe koipa koposa iwo. Ndipo iwo anamkakamiza munthuyo Loti ndithu, nayandikira kuti aswe citseko." 
Genesis19:10 Komo anthu aja anaturutsa dzanja lao, namlowetsa Loti momwe anali iwo m'nyumba, natseka pakhomo," 
Genesis19:11 Ndipo anacititsa khungu m'maso mwa anthu amene anali pakhomo pa nyumba, ang'ono ndi akuru, ndipo anabvutika kufufuza pakhomo." 
Genesis19:12 Ndipo anthu aja anati kwa Loti, Kodi muli nao ena pano? Mkamwini, ndi ana ako amuna, ndi ana ako akazi, ndi onse ali nao m'mudzi muno, uturuke nao m'malo muno:" 
Genesis19:13 popeza ife tidzaononga malo ano, cifukwa kulira kwao kwakula pamaso pa Yehova, ndipo Yehova anatitumiza ife kuti tiuononge." 
Genesis19:14 Ndipo anaturuka Loti nanena nao akamwini ace amene anakwata ana ace akazi, nati, Taukani, turukani m'malo muno; popeza Yehova adzaononga mudziwu; koma akamwini ace anamyesa wongoseka." 
Genesis19:15 Pamene kunaca, amithengawo anafulumiza Loti, nati, Uka, tenga mkazi wako, ndi ana ako akazi awiri amene ali kunowa, kuti munganyeke m'mphulupulu ya mudzi." 
Genesis19:16 Koma anacedwa; ndipo anthuwo anamgwira dzanja lace, ndi dzanja la mkazi wace ndi dzanja la ana ace akazi awiri; cifukwa ca kumcitira cifundo Yehova; ndipo anamturutsa iye, namuika kunja kwa mudzi." 
Genesis19:17 Ndipo panali pamene anawaturutsa iwo kunja, anati, Tapulumuka ndi moyo wako; usaceuke, usakhale pacigwa pali ponse; thawira kuphiri, kuti unganyeke." 
Genesis19:18 Ndipo Loti anati kwa iwo, Iaitu, mfumu;" 
Genesis19:19 taonanitu, kapolo wanu anapeza ufulu pamaso panu, ndipo munakuza cifundo canu, cimene munandicitira ine, pakupulumutsa moyo wanga; ine sindikhoza kuthawira kuphiri kuti cingandipeze ine coipaco ndingafe:" 
Genesis19:20 taonanitu, mudzi uwu uli pafupi pothawirapo, ndipo uli wong'ono; ndithawiretu kumeneko, suli wong'ono nanga? ndipo ndidzakhala ndi moyo." 
Genesis19:21 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Taona, ndikubvomereza iwe pamenepanso kuti sindidzaononga mudzi uwu umene wandiuza." 
Genesis19:22 Fulumira, thawira kumeneko; pakuti sindithai kucita kanthu usadafike kumeneko. Cifukwa cace anacha dzina la mudziwo Zoari." 
Genesis19:23 Ndipo dzuwa lidakwera pa dziko pamene Loti anafika ku Zoari. 
Genesis19:24 Ndipo Yehova anabvumbitsa pa Sodomu ndi pa Gomora miyala ya sulfure ndi mota kuturuka kwa Mulungu kumwamba; 
Genesis19:25 ndipo anaononga midziyo, ndi cigwa conse, ndi onse akukhala m'midzimo, ndi zimene zimera panthaka." 
Genesis19:26 Koma mkazi wace anaceuka ali pambuyo pace pa Loti, nasanduka mwala wamcere." 
Genesis19:27 Ndipo Abrahamu analawiram'mamawa kunka kumalo kumene anaima pamaso pa Yehova: 
Genesis19:28 ndipo anayang'anira ku Sodomu ndi ku Gomora ndi ku dziko lonse la cigwa, ndipo anapenya, taonanitu, utsi wa dzikolo unakwera, monga utsi wa ng'anjo." 
Genesis19:29 Ndipo panali pamene Mulungu anaononga midzi ya m'cigwa, Mulungu anakumbukira Abrahamu, naturutsa Loti pakati pa cionongeko, pamene anaononga midzi m'mene anakhalamo Loti." 
Genesis19:30 Ndipo Loti anabwera kuturuka m'Zoari nakhala m'phiri ndi ana akazi awiri pamodzi naye: cifukwa anaopa kukhala m'Zoari, ndipo anakhata m'phanga, iye ndi ana ace akazi." 
Genesis19:31 Woyamba ndipo anati kwa wamng'ono, Atate wathu akalamba, ndipo palibe pa dziko lapansi mwamona amene adzalowa kwa ife monga amacita pa dziko lonse lapansi:" 
Genesis19:32 tiyeni, timwetse atate vinyo, tidzagona naye, kuti tisunge mbeu za atate wathu." 
Genesis19:33 Ndipo anamwetsa atate wao vinyo usiku womwewo; woyamba ndipo analowa nagona naye atate wace; ndipo sanadziwa pomwe anagona ndi pomwe anauka," 
Genesis19:34 Ndipo panali m'mamawa, woyamba anati kwa wamng'ono, Taona, ndinagona ine ndi atate wanga usiku walero: timwetsenso iye usikunso: udzalowe nugone naye kuti tisunge mbeu za atate wathu." 
Genesis19:35 Ndipo anamwetsa vinyo atate wao usiku womwenso; wamng'ono ndipo anauka nagona naye; ndipo iye sanadziwa pomwe anagona ndi pomwe anauka. 
Genesis19:36 Ndipo ana akazi awiri a Loti anali ndi pakati pa atate wao. 
Genesis19:37 Woyamba ndipo anabala mwana wamwamona, namcha dzina lace. Moabu; yemweyo ndi atate wa Amoabu kufikira lero." 
Genesis19:38 Wamng'ono ndipo anabala mwana wamwamuna, namcha dzina lace Benammi; yemweyo ndi atate wa Aamoni kufikira lero." 
Genesis20:1 Abrahamu ndipo anacoka kumeneko kunka ku dziko la kumwera, ndipo anakhala pakati pa Kedesi ndi Suri, ndipo anakhala ngati mlendo m'Gerari." 
Genesis20:2 Ndipo Abrahamu anati za Sara mkazi wace, Iye ndiye mlongo wanga: ndipo Abimeleke mfumu ya Gerari anatumiza namtenga Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Koma Mulungu anadza kwa Abimeleke m'kulota kwa usiku, nati kwa iye, Taona, wakufa iwe, cifukwa ca mkazi amene wamtenga: pakuti iye ndiye mkazi wa mwini." 
Genesis20:4 Koma Abimeleke sanayandikire naye; ndipo anati, Ambuye, kodi mudzaphanso mtundu wolungama?" 
Genesis20:5 Kodi iye sanati kwa ine, Ndiye mlongo wanga: ndipo mkazi iye yekha anati, iye ndiye mlongo wanga: ndi mtima wanga wangwiro ndi manja anga osacimwa ndacita ine ici." 
Genesis20:6 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa iye m'kulota, lode ndidziwa ine, kuti wacita ico ndi mtima wangwiro, ndipo lnenso ndinakuletsa iwe kuti usandicimwire ine: cifukwa cace sindinakuloleza iwe kuti umkhudze mkaziyo." 
Genesis20:7 Tsopano, umbwezere munthuyo mkazi wace; cifukwa iye ndiye mneneri, ndipo adzakupempherera iwe, ndipo udzakhala ndi moyo: koma ukaleka kumbwezera, udziwe kuti udzafa ndithu, iwe ndi onse amene uli nao." 
Genesis20:8 Ndipo Abimeleke analawira m'mamawa, naitana anyamata ace onse, nanena zonse rimenezo m'makutu mwao, ndipo anthu anaopa kwambiri." 
Genesis20:9 Ndipo Abimeleke anaitana Abrahamu, nati kwa iye, Waticitira ife ciani iwe? Ndakucimwiranji iwe kuti waufikitsa pa ine ndi pa ufumu wanga ucimo waukuru? Wandicitira ine zosayenera kuzicita." 
Genesis20:10 Ndipo Abimeleke anati kwa Abrahamu, Unaona ciani iwe kuti wacita ici?" 
Genesis20:11 Ndipo Abrahamu anati, Cifukwa ndinati, Pompano palibe ndithu kumuopa Mulungu, ndipo adzandipha ine cifukwa ca mkazi wanga." 
Genesis20:12 Koma ndiye mlongo wanga ndithu, mwana wa atate wanga, koma si mwana wa amai wanga: ndipo anakhala ndi ine mkazi wanga." 
Genesis20:13 Ndipo panali pamene Mulungu anandiyendetsa ine kunyumba kwa atate wanga, ndinati kwa mkaziyo, Ici ndico cokoma mtima udzandicitire ine, konse kumene tidzafika ife, uzinena za ine, iye ndiye mlongo wanga." 
Genesis20:14 Ndipo Abimeleke anatenga nkhosa ndi ng'ombe nd akapolo ndi adzakazi nampatsa Abrahamu, nambwezera iye Sara mkazi wace." 
Genesis20:15 Ndipo Abimeleke anati, Taona dziko langa liri pamaso pako; kumene kuli kwabwino pamaso pako takhala kumeneko." 
Genesis20:16 Kwa Sara ndipo anati, Taona, ndapatsa mlongo wako ndalama za siliva mazana khumi; taona, izo ndizo zoyeretsa maso za kwa onse amene ali ndi iwe: ndi pamaso pa onse ukhale wolungama." 
Genesis20:17 Ndipo Abrahamu anapemphera Mulungu, ndipo Mulungu anaciritsa Abimeleke, ndi mkazi wace, ndi adzakazi ace; ndipo anabala ana." 
Genesis20:18 Pakuti Yehova anatseketsa mimba yonse ya a m'nyumba ya Abimeleke, cifukwa ca Sara mkazi wace wa Abrahamu." 
Genesis21:1 Ndipo Yehova anayang'anira Sara monga momwe anati, ndipo Yehova anamcitira iye monga ananena." 
Genesis21:2 Ndipo Sara anatenga pakati, nambalira Abrahamu m'ukalamba wace mwana wamwamuna, nthawi yomweyo Mulungu anamuuza iye." 
Genesis21:3 Ndipo Abrahamu anamucha dzina lace la mwana wace wamwamuna amene anabala iye, amene anambalira iye Sara, Isake." 
Genesis21:4 Ndipo Abrahamu anamdula mwana wace wamwamuna Isake pamene anali wa masiku ace asanu ndi atatu, monga Mulungu anamlamulira iye." 
Genesis21:5 Ndipo Abrahamu anali wa zaka zana limodzi pamene anambadwira iye Isake mwana wace. 
Genesis21:6 Ndipo Sara anati, Mulungu anandisekeretsa ine; onse akumva adzasekera pamodzi ndi ine." 
Genesis21:7 Ndipo anati, Akadatero ndani kwa Abrahamu kuti Sara adzayamwitsa ana? pakuti ndambalira iye mwana wamwamuna m'ukalamba wace." 
Genesis21:8 Ndipo anakula mwanayo naletsedwa kuyamwa: ndipo Abrahamu anakonza madyerero akuru tsiku lomwe analetsedwa Isake kuyamwa. 
Genesis21:9 Ndipo Sara anaona mwana wace wamwamuna wa Hagara M-aigupto, amene anambalira Abrahamu, alinkuseka." 
Genesis21:10 Cifukwa cace anati kwa Abrahamu, Cotsa mdzakazi uyo, ndi mwana wace wamwamuna; cifukwa mwana wa mdzakazi uyo sadzalowa m'nyumba pamodzi naye mwana wanga Isake." 
Genesis21:11 Ndipo mauwo anaipira Abrahamu cifukwa ca mwana wace. 
Genesis21:12 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Abrahamu, Usaipidwe nao, cifukwa ca mnyamatayo, ndi cifukwa ca mdzakazi wako; momwe monse akunenera iwe Sara umvere iwe mau ace; cifukwa kuti mwa Isake zidzaitanidwa mbeu zako." 
Genesis21:13 Ndipo mwana wamwamuna wa mdzakazi uyo ndidzayesa mtundu, cifukwa iye ndiye mbeu yako." 
Genesis21:14 Ndipo Abrahamu analawira m'mamawa, natenga mkate ndi mcenje wa madzi, nampatsa Hagara, naika paphewa pace, ndi mwana, namcotsa iye: ndipo iye anamuka, nasocerera m'cipululu ca Beereseba." 
Genesis21:15 Ndipo anatha madzi a m'mcenje ndipo anaika mwana pansi pa citsamba. 
Genesis21:16 Ndipo ananka nakhala pansi popenyana naye patari, monga pakugwa mubvi: cifukwa anati, Ndisaone kufa kwa mwana. Ndipo anakhala popenyana naye, nakweza mau ace nalira," 
Genesis21:17 Ndipo Mulungu anamva mau a mnyamatayo, ndi mthenga wa Mulungu anamuitana Hagara, ndi mau odzera kumwamba, nati kwa iye, Watani Hagara? usaope; cifukwa Mulungu anamva mau a mnyamata kumene ali." 
Genesis21:18 Tauka, nuukitse mnyamatayo, ndi kumgwira m'dzanja lako; cifukwa ndidzamuyesa iye mtundu waukuru." 
Genesis21:19 Ndipo Mulungu anamtsegula m'maso mwace, ndipo anaona citsime ca madzi; namuka nadzaza mcenje ndi madzi, nampatsa mnyamata kuti amwe." 
Genesis21:20 Ndipo Mulungu anakhala ndi mnyamata, ndipo anakula iye; nakhala m'cipululu, nakhala wauta." 
Genesis21:21 Ndipo anakhala m'cipululu ca Parana; ndipo amace anamtengera iye mkazi wa ku dziko la Aigupto. 
Genesis21:22 Ndipo panali nthawi yomweyo. Abimeleke ndi Fikolo kazembe wa nkhondo yace anati kwa Abrahamu, kuti, Mulungu ali pamodzi ndi iwe m'zonse uzicita iwe;" 
Genesis21:23 tsopano iwe undilumbirire ine pano pa Mulungu kuti sudzandinyenga ine, kapena mwana wanga, kapena mdzukulu wanga: koma monga ufulu ndakucitira iwe udzandicitire ine, ndi dziko lomwe wakhalamo, ngati mlendo." 
Genesis21:24 Ndipo Abrahamu anati, Ine ndidzalumbira." 
Genesis21:25 Ndipo Abrahamu anamdzudzula Abimeleke cifukwa ca citsime ca madzi, anyamata ace a Abimeleke anacilanda." 
Genesis21:26 Ndipo anati Abimeleke, Sindinadziwe amene anacita ico; ndipo iwe sunandiuze ine, ndiponso sindinamve koma lero lino." 
Genesis21:27 Ndipo Abrahamu anatenga nkhosa ndi ng'ombe, nampatsa Abimeleke, ndipo anapangana pangano onse awiriwo." 
Genesis21:28 Ndipo Abrahamu anapatula ana a nkhosa akazi asanu ndi awiri pa okha. 
Genesis21:29 Ndipo Abimeleke anati kwa Abrahamu, Nanga ana a nkhosa akazi asanu ndi awiri amene wapatula pa okha?" 
Genesis21:30 Ndipo anati, Ana a nkhosa akazi asanu ndi awiriwa uwalandire pa dzanja langa, kuti akhale mboni zanga, kuti ndakumba ine citsime cimeneci." 
Genesis21:31 Cifukwa cace anacha malowo Beereseba: cifukwa pamenepo analumbira onse awiri. 
Genesis21:32 Ndipo anapangana pangano pa Beereseba: ndipo anauka Abimeleke ndi Fikolo kazembe wa-nkhondo yace, nabwera kunka ku dziko la Afilisti." 
Genesis21:33 Ndipo Abrahamu ananka mtengo wabwemba pa Beereseba, naitanira pamenepo dzina la Yehova, Mulungu wa nthawi zonse." 
Genesis21:34 Ndipo Abrahamu anakhala ngati mlendo masiku ambiri m'dziko la Afilisti. 
Genesis22:1 Ndipo panali zitapita zimenezo, Mulungu anamuyesa Abrahamu nati kwa iye, Abrahamu; ndipo anati, Ndine pano." 
Genesis22:2 Ndipo anati, Tengatu mwana wako, wamwamuna wayekhayo, Isake, amene ukondana naye, numuke ku dziko la Moriya; numpereke iye kumeneko nsembe yopsereza pa limodzi la mapiri lomwe ndidzakuuza iwe." 
Genesis22:3 Ndipo Abrahamu analawira m'mamawa namanga buru wace, natengako anyamata ace awiri pamodzi naye, ndi Isake mwana wace, nawaza nkhuni za nsembe, nauka, nanka kumalo komwe Mulungu anamuuza iye," 
Genesis22:4 Tsiku lacitatu Abrahamu anatukula maso ace naona malowo patari. 
Genesis22:5 Ndipo Abrahamu anati kwa anyamata ace, Khalani kuno ndi buru, ine ndi mwanayu tinka uko, ndipo tikapemphera ndi kubweranso kwa inu." 
Genesis22:6 Ndipo Abrahamu anatenga nkhuni za nsembe yopsereza, nazisenzetsa Isake mwana wace; natenga mota m'dzanja lace ndi mpeni; nayenda pamodzi onse awiri." 
Genesis22:7 Ndipo Isake ananena ndi Abrahamu atate wace, nati, Atate wanga; ndipo iye anati, Ndine pano, mwana wanga. Ndipo anati, Taonani moto ndi nkhuni; koma mwana wa nkhosa wa nsembe yopsereza ali kuti?" 
Genesis22:8 Ndipo Abrahamu anati, Mwana wanga, Mulungu adzadzifunira yekha mwana wa nkhosa wa nsembe yopsereza; nayenda pamodzi onse awiri." 
Genesis22:9 Ndipo anafika kumalo komwe Mulungu anamuuza iye; ndipo Abrahamu anamanga guwa la nsembe nakonza nkhuni, namanga Isake mwana wace, namuika iye pa guwa la nsembe pamwamba pa nkhuni." 
Genesis22:10 Ndipo Abrahamu anatambasula dzanja lace, natenga mpeni kuti amuphe mwana wace." 
Genesis22:11 Koma mthenga wa Yehova anamuitana iye ndi mau odzera kumwamba, nati, Abrahamu, Abrahamu; ndi iye anati, Ndine pano." 
Genesis22:12 Ndipo mthenga anati, Usaike dzanja lako pa mwana, usamcitire iye kanthu; cifukwa tsopano ndidziwa kuti iwe umuopa Mulungu, pakuti sunandikanize ine mwana wako, mwana wako wayekha." 
Genesis22:13 Ndipo Abrahamu anatukula maso ace nayang'ana taonani, pambuyo pace nkhosa yamphongo yogwiridwa ndi nyanga zace m'ciyangoyangomo; ndipo ananka Abrahamu nakatenga nkhosa yamphongoyo, naipereka nsembe yopsereza m'malo mwa mwana wace." 
Genesis22:14 Ndipo Abrahamu anacha dzina lace la malowo Yehova-Yire: monga ati lero lomwe, M'phiri la Yehova cidzaoneka." 
Genesis22:15 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anamuitana Abrahamu ndi mau odzera kumwamba kaciwiri," 
Genesis22:16 nati, Pa Ine ndekha ndalumbira, ati Yehova, popeza wadta ici, sunandikaniza mwana wako, mwana wako wa yekha," 
Genesis22:17 kudalitsa ndidzakudalitsa iwe, kucurukitsa ndidzacurukitsa mbeu zako monga nyenyezi za kumwamba, monga mcenga wa m'mphepete mwa nyanja; ndipo mbeu zako zidzagonjetsa cipata ca adani ao;" 
Genesis22:18 m'mbeu zako mitundu yonse ya dziko lap ansi idzadalitsidwa: cifukwa wamvera mau anga. 
Genesis22:19 Ndipo Abrahamu anabwera kwa anyamata ace, ndipo anauka nayenda pamodzi kumuka ku Beereseba; ndipo anakhala Abrahamu pa Beereseba." 
Genesis22:20 Ndipo panali zitapita izi, anauza Abrahamu kuti, Taonani, Milika iyenso anambalira Nahori mphwako ana;" 
Genesis22:21 Huzi woyamba ndi Buzi mphwace, ndi Kemueli atate wace wa Aramu;" 
Genesis22:22 ndi Kesede, ndi Hazo, ndi Pilidasi ndi Yidilafi, ndi Betuele." 
Genesis22:23 Ndimo Betuele anabala Rebeka: amenewa asanu ndi atatu Milika anambalira Nahori mphwace wa Abrahamu. 
Genesis22:24 Ndipo mkazi wace wamng'ono, dzina lace Rcuma, iyenso anabala Teba, ndi Gahamu, ndi Tahasi, ndi Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Ndipo Sara anali wa zaka zana limodzi kudza makumi awiri ndi zisanu ndi ziwiri: ndizo zaka za moyo wa Sara. 
Genesis23:2 Ndipo Sara anafa m'Kiriyati-araba (ndiwo Hebroni), m'dziko la Kanani; ndipo Abrahamu anadza ku maliro a Sara, kuti amlire." 
Genesis23:3 Ndipo Abrahamu anauka pa wakufa wace, nanena kwa ana a Heti, nati," 
Genesis23:4 Ine ndine mlendo wakukhala ndi inu: mundipatse ndikhale ndi manda pamodzi ndi inu, kuti ndiike wakufa wanga ndisamthirenso maso." 
Genesis23:5 Ndipo ana a Heti anayankha Abrahamu nati kwa iye," 
Genesis23:6 Mutimvere ife mfumu, ndinu karonga wamkuru pakati pa ife; muike wakufa wanu m'manda mwathu mosankhika: palibe munthu yense wa ife adzakaniza manda ace, kuti muike wakufa wanu." 
Genesis23:7 Ndipo anauka Abrahamu naweramira anthu a m'dzikomo, ana a Heti." 
Genesis23:8 Ndipo ananena nao, kuti, Ngati mukandibvomereza kuti ndiike wakufa wanga ndisamthirenso maso, mundimvere ine, mundinenere ine kwa Efroni mwana wace wa Zohari," 
Genesis23:9 kuti andipatse ine phanga la Makipela, limene liri pansonga pa munda wace; pa mtengo wace wonse andipatse pakati pa inu, ndikhale nao manda." 
Genesis23:10 Ndipo Efroni anakhala pakati pa ana a Heti: ndipo Efroni Mhiti anayankha Abrahamu alinkumva ana a Heti, onse amene analowa pa cipata ca mudzi wace, kuti," 
Genesis23:11 Iai, mfumu, mundimvere ine; munda ndikupatsani inu, ndi phanga liri m'menemo ndikupatsani inu, pamaso pa ana a anthu anga ndikupatsani inu; ikani wakufa wanu." 
Genesis23:12 Ndipo Abrahamu anawerama pamaso pa anthu a m'dzikomo. 
Genesis23:13 Ndipo ananena kwa Efroni alinkumva anthu a m'dzikomo, kuti, Koma ngati ufuna, undimveretu ine: ndidzakupatsa iwe mtengo wace wa munda; uulandire kwa ine, ndipo ndidzaika wakufa wanga m'menemo." 
Genesis23:14 Ndipo Efroni anamyankha Abrahamu, nati kwa iye,"
