Genesis39:5 Ndipo panali ciyambire anamuyesa iye woyang'anira pa nyumba yace, ndi pa zace zonse, Yehova anadalitsa nyumba ya M-aigupto cifukwa ca Yosefe; ndipo mdalitso wa Yehova unali pa zace zonse, m'nyumba ndi m'munda." 
Genesis39:6 Ndipo iye anasiya zace zonse m'manja a Yosefe; osadziwa comwe anali naco, koma cakudya cimene anadya. Ndipo Yosefe anali wokoma thupi ndi wokongola." 
Genesis39:7 Ndipo panali zitapita izi, kuti mkazi wa mbuyace anamyang'anira maso Yosefe: ndipo mkaziyo anati, Gona ndi ine." 
Genesis39:8 Koma iye anakana, nati kwa mkazi wa mbuyace, Taonani, mbuyanga sadziwa cimene ciri ndi ine m'nyumbamu, ndipo anaika zace zonse m'manja anga;" 
Genesis39:9 mulibe wina m'nyumba wamkuru ndine; ndipo sanandikaniza ine kanthu, koma iwe, cifukwa kuti uli mkazi wace: nanga ndikacita coipa cacikuru ici bwanji ndi kucimwira Mulungu?" 
Genesis39:10 Ndipo pali pakunenanena ndi Yosefe tsiku ndi tsiku, iye sanamvera mkazi kugona naye kapena kukhala naye." 
Genesis39:11 Ndipo panali, nthawi yomweyo, iye analowa m'nyumba kuti agwire nchito yace; ndipo munalibe amuna a m'nyumba m'katimo." 
Genesis39:12 Ndipo mkazi anagwira iye copfunda cace, nati, Gona ndi ine; ndipo anasiya copfunda cace m'dzanja lace nathawa, naturukira kubwalo." 
Genesis39:13 Ndipo panali pamene mkazi anaona kuti anasiya copfunda cace m'dzanja lace, nathawira kubwalo," 
Genesis39:14 anaitana amuna a m'nyumba yace, nanena ndi iwo kuti, Taonani, walowetsa kwa ife Mhebri kuti atiseke ife, analowa kwa ine kugona ndi ine, ndipo ndinapfuula ndi mau akuru:" 
Genesis39:15 ndipo panali pamene iye anamva kuti ndinakweza mau anga ndi kupfuula, iye anasiya copfunda cace kwa me nathawira kubwalo." 
Genesis39:16 Ndipo anasunga copfunda cace cikhale ndi iye kufikira atabwera kwao mbuyace. 
Genesis39:17 Ndipo ananena kwa iye monga mau awa, nati, Analowa kwa ine kapolo wa Cihebri uja, munabwera naye kwathu, kundipunza ine:" 
Genesis39:18 ndipo panali pamene ndinakweza mau anga ndi kupfuula, iye anasiya cobvala cace kwa ine, nathawira kunja." 
Genesis39:19 Ndipo panali pamene mbuyace anamva mau a mkazi wace, amene ananena kwa iye, kuti, Coteroci anandicitira ine kapolo wako; kuti iye anapsya mtima." 
Genesis39:20 Ndipo mbuyace wa Yosefe anamtenga iye namuika m'kaidi, umo anamangidwa akaidi a mfumu: ndipo iye anali m'mwemo m'kaidimo." 
Genesis39:21 Koma Yehova anali ndi Yosefe namcitira iye zokoma, nampatsa ufulu pamaso pa woyang'anira kaidi." 
Genesis39:22 Ndipo woyang'anira kaidi anapereka m'manja a Yosefe akaidi onse okhala m'kaidimo, ndipo zonse iwo anazicita m'menemo, iye ndiye wozicita." 
Genesis39:23 Woyang'anira m'kaidi sanayang'anira kanthu kali konse kamene kanali m'manja a Yosefe, cifukwa Yehova anali ndi iye; ndipo zimene anazicita, Yehova anazipindulitsa." 
Genesis40:1 Ndipo panali zitapita izi, wopereka cikho wa mfumu ya Aigupto ndi wophika mkate wace anamcimwira mbuye wao mfumu ya Aigupto." 
Genesis40:2 Ndipo Farao anakwiyira akuru ace awiriwo wamkuru wa opereka cikho, ndi wamkuru wa ophika mkate." 
Genesis40:3 Ndipo anaika iwo asungidwe m'nyumba ya kazembe wa alonda, m'kaidi, umo anamangidwa Yosefe." 
Genesis40:4 Ndipo kazembe wa alonda anapereka iwo kwa Yosefe, ndipo iye anawatumikira iwo: ndipo anakhala nthawi mosungidwamo." 
Genesis40:5 Ndipo analota maloto onse awiri, yense lata lace, usiku umodzi, yense monga mwa kumasulira kwa loto lace, wopereka cikho ndi wophika mkate wa mfumu ya Aigupto, amene anamangidwa m'kaidi." 
Genesis40:6 Ndipo Yosefe analowa kwa iwo m'mawa, nawaona iwo, taonani, anali oziya." 
Genesis40:7 Ndipo anafunsa akuru a Farao osungidwa naye m'nyumba ya mbuyace, kuti, Nkhope zanu zagwa bwanji lero?" 
Genesis40:8 Ndipo iwo anati kwa iye, Ife talota maloto, ndipo tiribe wotimasulira. Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa iwo, Kodi Mwini kumasulira si ndiye Mulungu? Mundifotokozeretu." 
Genesis40:9 Ndipo wopereka cikho wamkuru anafotokozera Yosefe loto lace, nati kwa iye, M'kulota kwanga, taona, mpesa unali pamaso panga:" 
Genesis40:10 ndipo m'mpesamo munali nthambi zitatu: ndipo unali wonga unaphuka, ndipo maluwa ace anaphuka; nabala matsamvu ace mphesa zakuca:" 
Genesis40:11 ndipo cikho ca Farao cinali m'dzanjalanga: ndipo ndinatenga mphesa, ndi kufinyira m'cikho ca Farao ndi kupereka cikho m'dzanja la Farao." 
Genesis40:12 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa iye, Mmasuliro wace ndi uwu: nthambi zitatu ndizo masiku atatu;" 
Genesis40:13 akali masiku atatu Farao adzatukula mutu wako, nadzabwezera iwe nchito yako; ndipo udzapereka cikho ca Farao m'dzanja lace, monga kale lomwe m'mene unali wopereka cikho cace." 
Genesis40:14 Koma undikumbukire ine m'mene kudzakhala bwino ndi iwe, ndipoundicitiretu ine kukoma mtima: nundichule ine kwa Farao, nunditurutse ine m'nyumbamu:" 
Genesis40:15 cifukwa kuti ndinabedwa ndithu m'dziko la Ahebri; ndiponso pano sindinacite kanthu kakundiikira ine m'dzeniemu. 
Genesis40:16 Pamene wophika mkate anaona kuti mmasuliro wace unali wabwino, iye anati kwa Yosefe, Inenso ndinalimkulota, ndipo, taonani, malicero atatu a mikate yoyera anali pamtu panga;" 
Genesis40:17 m'licelo lapamwamba munali mikate ya Farao ya mitundu mitundu; ndipo mbalame zinadya ya m'licelo la pamutu panga. 
Genesis40:18 Ndipo Yosefe anayankha nati, Mmasuliro wace ndi uwu: malicelo atatu ndiwo masiku atatu;" 
Genesis40:19 akali masiku atatu Farao adzakweza mutu wako ndi kuucotsa, nadzakupacika iwe pamtengo: ndipo mbalame zidzadya mnofu wako." 
Genesis40:20 Ndipo panali tsiku lacitatu ndilo tsiku lakubadwa kwace kwa Farao, iye anakonzera anyamata ace madyerero, ndipo anakweza mutu wa wopereka cikho wamkuru, ndi mutu wa wophika mkate wamkuru pakati pa anyamata ace." 
Genesis40:21 Ndipo anabwezanso wopereka cikho ku nchito yace; ndipo iye anapereka cikho m'manja a Farao. 
Genesis40:22 Koma anampacika wophika mkate wamkuru; monga Yosefe anawamasulira. 
Genesis40:23 Koma wopereka cikho wamkuru sanakumbukira Yosefe, koma anamuiwala." 
Genesis41:1 Ndipo panali zitapita zaka ziwiri zamphumphu, Farao analota; ndipo, taonani, anaima panyanja." 
Genesis41:2 Ndipo, taonani, zinaturuka m'nyanja ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri za maonekedwe okoma ndi zonenepa; ndipo zinadya mabango." 
Genesis41:3 Ndipo, taonani ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zinaturuka m'nyanjamo pambuyo pao, za maonekedwe oipa ndi zoonda; ndipo zinaima pa ng'ombe zinazo m'mphepete mwa nyanja." 
Genesis41:4 Ndipo ng'ombe zazikazi za maonekedwe oipa ndi zoonda zinadya ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri za maonekedwe abwino ndi zonenepazo. Ndipo Farao anauka. 
Genesis41:5 Ndipo anagona nalotanso kaciwiri: ndipo taonani, ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri za tirigu zinamera pa mbuwa imodzi, zonenepa ndi zabwino." 
Genesis41:6 Ndipo, taonani, ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri, zoonda zopsyerera ndi mphepo ya kum'mawa, zinamera pambuyo pao." 
Genesis41:7 Ndipo ngala zoondazo zinameza ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zonenepa ndi zodzalazo. Ndipo Farao anauka, ndipo, taonani, analota." 
Genesis41:8 Ndipo panali m'mamawa mtima wace unabvutidwa; ndipo anatumiza naitana amatsenga onse a m'Aigupto, ndi anzeru onse a momwemo: ndipo Farao anafotokozera iwo loto lace; koma panalibe mmodzi anakhoza kuwamasulira iwo kwa Farao." 
Genesis41:9 Pamenepo wopereka cikho wamkuru anati kwa Farao, kuti, Ine ndidzakumbukira zocimwa zanga lero." 
Genesis41:10 Farao anakwiya ndi anyamata ace, nandiika ine ndisungidwe m'nyumba ya kazembe wa alonda, ine ndi wophika mkate wamkuru:" 
Genesis41:11 ndipo tinalota loto usiku umodzi ine ndi iye; tinalota munthu yense monga mwa kumasulira kwa loto lace. 
Genesis41:12 Ndipo panali ndi ife mnyamata, Mhebri, kapolo wa kazembe wa alonda, ndipo ife tinafotokozera iye, ndipo iye anatimasulira ife maloto athu; kwa munthu yense monga mwa loto lace anatimasulira." 
Genesis41:13 Ndipo panali monga momwe iye anatimasulira, momwemo mudacitika; ine anandibwezera mu utumiki wanga, mnzanga anampacika." 
Genesis41:14 Ndipo Farao anatumiza nakaitana Yosefe; ndipo anamturutsa iye msanga m'dzenjemo: ndipo iye anameta, napindula malaya ace, nalowa kwa Farao." 
Genesis41:15 Farao ndipo anati kwa Yosefe, Ine ndalota loto, koma palibe wondimasulira; ndipo ndamva alikunena za iwe kuti, ukamva loto udziwa kumasulira." 
Genesis41:16 Ndipo Yosefe anayankha Farao kuti, Si mwa ine; koma Mulungu adzayankha Farao mwamtendere." 
Genesis41:17 Ndipo Farao ananena kwa Yosefe, M'loto langa taona, ndinaima m'mphepete mwa nyanja;" 
Genesis41:18 ndipo taona, zinaturuka m'nyanjamo ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri, zonenepa ndi za maonekedwe abwino; ndipo zinadya m'mabango;" 
Genesis41:19 ndipo, taona, ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zina zinaturuka pambuyo pao zosauka ndi za maonekedwe oipa ndi zoonda, zoipa zotere sindinazione m'dziko la Aigupto;" 
Genesis41:20 ndipo ng'ombe zazikazi zoonda ndi za maonekedwe oipa zinadya ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zonenepa," 
Genesis41:21 Ndipo pamene zinadya sizinadziwika kuti zinadya; koma zinaipabe m'maonekedwe ao monga poyamba. 
Genesis41:22 Pamenepo ndinauka. Ndipo ndinaona m'kulota kwanga, taona, ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zinamera pa mbuwa imodzi zodzala ndi zabwino;" 
Genesis41:23 ndipo, taona, ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zina zofota, zoonda, zopsyerera ndi mphepo ya kum'mawa, zinamera pambuyo pao;" 
Genesis41:24 ndipo ngala zoonda zinameza ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zabwino; ndipo ndinafotokozera amatsenga: koma panalibe wondimasulira ine. 
Genesis41:25 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa Farao, Loto la Farao liri limodzi: cimene Mulungu ati acite wammasulira Farao." 
Genesis41:26 Ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zabwino ndizo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zabwino ndizo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri: loto liri limodzi." 
Genesis41:27 Ng'ombe zazikazi zisanu ndi ziwiri zoonda ndi za maonekedwe oipa zinaturuka pambuyo pao ndizo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndiponso ngala zisanu ndi ziwiri zopanda kanthu zopsyerera ndi mphepo ya kum'mawa, ndizo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za njala." 
Genesis41:28 Ici ndi cinthu cimene ndinena kwa Farao: cimene Mulungu ati acite wasonyeza kwa Farao. 
Genesis41:29 Taonani, zidzafika zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri zakucuruka cakudya m'dziko lonse la Aigupto;" 
Genesis41:30 ndipo pambuyo pao zidzauka zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za njala; ndipo anthu adzaiwala zocuruka zonsezo m'dziko la Aigupto; ndipo njala idzapululutsa dziko; 
Genesis41:31 ndipo zocuruka sizidzazindikirika cifukwa ca njala ikudza m'mbuyoyo, pakuti idzabvuta." 
Genesis41:32 Ndipo lotolo linabwezedwa kawiri kwa Farao, cifukwa cinthu ciri cokhazikika ndi Mulungu, ndipo Mulungu afulumira kucicita." 
Genesis41:33 Tsopano, Farao afunefune'munthu wakuzindikira ndi wanzeru, amkhazike iye ayang'anire dziko la Aigupto." 
Genesis41:34 Farao acite cotere, alembe woyang'anira dziko wosonkhetsa limodzi la magawo asanu la dziko la Aigupto m'zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri zakucuruka dzinthu." 
Genesis41:35 Iwo asonkhanitse cakudya conse ca zaka zabwino izo zirinkudzazo, aunjike tirigu m'manja a Farao akhale cakudya m'midzi, namsunge." 
Genesis41:36 Ndipocakudyacocidzakhalam'dziko cosonkhera zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za njala imene idzakhala m'dziko la Aigupto; kuti dziko lisanonongedwe ndi njala. 
Genesis41:37 Ndipo cinthuco cinali cabwino m'maso mwa Farao, ndi m'maso mwa anyamata ace." 
Genesis41:38 Ndipo Farao anati kwa anyamata ace, Kodi ife tidzaone munthu ngati uyu, mzimu wa Mulungu uli m'mtima mwace?" 
Genesis41:39 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yosefe, Popeza Mulungu wakuonetsa iwe zonsezo palibe wina wakuzindikira ndi wanzeru ngati iwe." 
Genesis41:40 Uziyang'anira pa nyumba yanga, ndipo anthu anga onse adzalamulidwa mwa mau ako; pa mpando wacifumu pokha ine ndidzakuposa iwe." 
Genesis41:41 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yosefe, Taona, ndakhazika iwe wolamulira dziko lonse la Aigupto." 
Genesis41:42 Ndipo Farao anacotsa mphete yosindikizira yace pa dzanja lace, naibveka pa dzanja la Yosefe, nambveka iye ndi zobvalira zabafuta, naika unyolo wagolidi pakhosi pace;" 
Genesis41:43 ndipo anamkweza iye m'gareta wace waciwiri amene anali naye: ndipo anapfuula patsogolo pa iye, Gwadani; ndipo anamkhazika iye wolamulira dziko lonse la Aigupto," 
Genesis41:44 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yosefe, Ine ndine Farao, ndipo popanda iwe palibe munthu ali yense adzatukula dzanja lace kapena mwendo wace m'dziko lonse la Aigupto." 
Genesis41:45 Ndipo Farao anamucha dzina la Yosefe Zafenati-Panea; ndipo anampatsa akwatire Asenati mwana wamkazi wa Potifera wansembe wa Oni. Ndipo Yosefe anaturuka wolamulira, nayendayenda m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Genesis41:46 Ndipo Yosefe anali wa zaka makumi atatu pamene iye anaima pamaso pa Farao mfumu ya Aigupto, Ndipo Yosefe anaturuka pamaso pa Farao, napitapita pa dziko lonse la Aigupto," 
Genesis41:47 Ndipo zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri zakucuruka dzinthu nthaka inabala zambirimbiri. 
Genesis41:48 Ndipo anasonkhanitsa cakudya conse ca zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri cimene cinali m'dziko la Aigupto, nasunga cakudyaco m'midzi; cakudya ca m'minda, yozinga midzi yonse, anacisunga m'menemo." 
Genesis41:49 Ndipo Yosefe anasunga tirigu ngati mcenga wa panyanja, wambirimbiri kufikira analeka kuwerenga; cifukwa anali wosawerengeka." 
Genesis41:50 Ndipo kwa Yosefe anabadwa ana amuna awiri, cisanafike caka ca njala, amene Asenati mwana wamkazi wa Porifera wansembe wa Oni anambalira iye." 
Genesis41:51 Ndipo Yosefe anamucha dzina la woyamba Manase, cifukwa anati iye, Mulungu wandiiwalitsa ine zobvuta zanga zonse, ndi nyumba yonse ya atate wanga." 
Genesis41:52 Ndipo dzina la waciwiri anamucha Efraimu: cifukwa Mulungu anandibalitsa ine m'dziko la kusauka kwanga. 
Genesis41:53 Ndipo zaka zakucuruka dzinthu zisanu ndi ziwiri za m'dziko la Aigupto, zinatha." 
Genesis41:54 Ndipo zinayamba kufika zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri za njala, monga ananena Yosefe; ndipo munali njala m'maiko monse; koma m'dziko lonse la Aigupto munali cakudya." 
Genesis41:55 Ndipo pamene dziko lonse la Aigupto linali ndi njala, anthu anapfuulira Farao awapatse cakudya; ndipo Farao anati kwa Aaigupto onse, Pitani kwa Yosefe: cimene iye anena kwa inu citani." 
Genesis41:56 Ndipo njala inali pa dziko lonse lapansi; ndipo Yosefe anatsegula nkhokwe zonse nagulitsa Aaigupto: ndipo njala inakula m'dziko la Aigupto. 
Genesis41:57 Ndipo maiko onse anafika ku Aigupto kudzagula tirigu kwa Yosefe: cifukwa njala inakula m'dziko lonse lapansi. 
Genesis42:1 Ndipo anaona Yakobo kuti m'Aigupto munali tirigu, nati Yakobo kwa ana ace amuna, Cifukwa canji mulinkuyang'anana?" 
Genesis42:2 Ndipo iye anati, Taonani, ndamva kuti m'Aigupto muli tirigu, mutsikireko mutigulire kumeneko; kuti tikhale ndi moyo, tisafe." 
Genesis42:3 Ndipo abale ace a Yosefe khumi anatsikira kukagula tirigu m'Aigupto. 
Genesis42:4 Koma Yakobo sanamtuma Benjamini mphwace wa Yosefe, pamodzi ndi abale ace, cifukwa anati, Coipa cingamgwere iye." 
Genesis42:5 Ndipo ana amuna a Israyeli anadza kudzagula mwa iwo amene anadzako, pakuti m'dziko la Kanani munali njala." 
Genesis42:6 Ndipo Yosefe anali wolamulira dziko; ndiye amene anagulitsa kwa anthu onse a m'dziko; ndipo anafika abale ace a Yosefe, namweramira pansi, nkhope zao pansi." 
Genesis42:7 Ndipo Yosefe anaona abale ace, ndipo anazindikira iwo, koma anadziyesetsa kwa iwo ngati mlendo, nanena kwa iwo mwankhanza: ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mufuma kuti inu? nati iwo, Ku dziko la Kanani kudzagula cakudya." 
Genesis42:8 Ndipo Yosefe anazindikira abale ace, koma iwo sanamzindikira iye." 
Genesis42:9 Ndipo Yosefe anakumbukira maloto amene analoto za iwo, ndipo anati kwa iwo, Ozonda inu; mwadzera kudzaona usiwa wa dziko." 
Genesis42:10 Ndipo iwo anati kwa iye, Iai, mbuyanga, koma akapolo anu adzera kudzagula cakudya." 
Genesis42:11 Tonse tiri ana amuna a munthu mmodzi; tiri oona, akapolo anu, sitiri ozonda." 
Genesis42:12 Ndipo iye anati kwa iwo, Iai, koma mwadzera kuti muone usiwa wa dziko." 
Genesis42:13 Nati iwo, Akapolo anu ndife abale khumi, ana amuna a munthu mmodzi m'dziko la Kanani; ndipo, taonani, wamng'ono ali ndi atate wathu lero; ndipo palibe mmodzi." 
Genesis42:14 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa iwo, dico cimene ndinakunenani inu, kuti, Ndinu ozonda." 
Genesis42:15 Mudzayesedwa ndi ici, pali moyo wa Farao, simudzaturuka muno, koma akadze kuno mphwanu ndiko." 
Genesis42:16 Tumizani mmodzi wa inu akatenge, adze naye mphwanu: ndipo inu mudzamangidwa kuti mau anu ayesedwe, ngati zoona ziri mwa inu: penatu, pali moyo wa Farao, muli ozonda ndithu." 
Genesis42:17 Ndipo anaika onse m'kaidi masiku atatu. 
Genesis42:18 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa iwo tsiku lacitatu, Citani ici, kuti mukhale ndi moyo; ine ndiopa Mulungu;" 
Genesis42:19 ngati muli oona, mmodzi wa abale anu amangidwe m'kaidi momwemo; mukani inu, mupite naye tirigu wa njala ya mabanja anu;" 
Genesis42:20 koma mukatenge mphwanu kudza naye kwa ine, kuti atsimikizidwe mau anu ndipo simudzafa. Ndipo anacita comweco." 
Genesis42:21 Ndipo iwo anati wina ndi mnzace, Tacimwiratu mbale wathu, pamene tinaona kubvutidwa kwa mtima wace, potipembedzera ife, koma ife tinakana kumvera, cifukwa cace kubvutidwa kumene kwatifikira." 
Genesis42:22 Ndipo Rubeni anayankha nati kwa iwo, Kodi sindinanena kwa inu kuti, Musacimwire mwanayu; ndipo inu munakana kumvera? cifukwa cacenso, taonani mwazi wace ufunidwa." 
Genesis42:23 Ndipo sanadziwa kuti, Yosefe anamva; cifukwa anali ndi womasulira." 
Genesis42:24 Ndipo anawafotokozera iwo nalira, nawatembenukiranso, nanena nao, nampatula Simeoni mwa iwo, nammanga iye pamaso pao." 
Genesis42:25 Ndipo Yosefe analamulira kuti adzaze zotengera zao ndi tirigu, ndi kubweza ndalama zao, ali yense m'thumba mwace, ndi kuwapatsa phoso la panjira; ndipo anatero nao." 
Genesis42:26 Ndipo anasenzetsa aburu ao tirigu wao nacokapo. 
Genesis42:27 Ndipo pamene wina wa iwo anamasula thumba lace kuti adyetse buru wace pacigono, anapeza ndalama zace; taonani, zinali kukamwa kwa thumba lace." 
Genesis42:28 Ndipo iye anati kwa abale ace, Wandibwezera ine ndalama zanga, taonani, ziri kukamwa kwa thumba langa; ndipo mitima yao inawadera iwo, nanthunthumira, natembenukirana wina ndi mnzace kuti, Nciani ici Mulungu waticitira ife?" 
Genesis42:29 Ndipo anadza kwa Yakobo atate wao ku dziko la Kanani, namfotokozera iye zonse zinaonekera kwa iwo;" 
Genesis42:30 kuti, Munthu mwini dziko, ananena ndi ife mwankharwe, natiyesa ife ozonda dziko." 
Genesis42:31 Koma ife tinati kwa iye, Tiru anthu oona; sitiri ozonda;" 
Genesis42:32 tiri abale khumi ndi awiri, ana a atate wathu; wina palibe, ndipo lero wamng'ono ali ndi atate wathu m'dziko la Kanani." 
Genesis42:33 Ndipo munthuyo mwini dziko anati kwa ife, Momwemu ndidzadziwa kuti muli anthu oona; siyani mmodzi wa abale anu pamodzi ndi ine, tengani tirigu wa njala ya kwanu, mukani;" 
Genesis42:34 idzani naye mphwanu kwa ine, ndipo ndidzadziwa kuti simuli ozonda koma anthu oona: comweco ndidzakubwezerani inu mbale wanu, ndipo mudzacita malonda m'dziko muno." 
Genesis42:35 Ndipo panali pamene analikukhuthula matumba ao, taonani, phukusi la ndalama la yense linali m'thumba lace; ndipo pamene iwo ndi atate ao anaona mapukusi a ndalama anaopa," 
Genesis42:36 Ndipo Yakobo atate wao anati kwa iwo, Munandilanda ine ana; Yosefe palibe, Simeoni palibe, ndipo mudzacotsa Benjamini: zonse zimene zandigwera." 
Genesis42:37 Ndipo Rubeni anati kwa atate wace, kuti, Muwaphe ana anga amuna awiri ndikapanda kumbweza iye kwa inu; mumpereke iye m'manja mwanga, ndipo ine ndidzambwezanso kwa inu." 
Genesis42:38 Ndipo iye anati, Mwana wanga sadzatsikira ndi inu, cifukwa kuti mkuru wace wafa, ndipo watsala iye yekha; ngati coipa cikamgwera iye m'njira m'mene mupitamo, inu mudzatsitsira ndi cisoni imvi zanga kumanda." 
Genesis43:1 Ndipo njala inakula m'dzikomo. 
Genesis43:2 Ndipo panali pamene atatha kudya tirigu yense anatengayo ku Aigupto atate wao anati kwa iwo, Pitaninso, mukatigulire ife cakudya pang'ono." 
Genesis43:3 Ndipo Yuda ananena ndi iye kuti, Munthu uja anatilimbitsira mau kuti, Simudzaonanso nkhope yanga, koma mphwanu akhale ndi inu ndiko." 
Genesis43:4 Ngati mudzatuma mphwathu pamodzi ndi ife, tidzatsikira ndi kugulira inu cakudya." 
Genesis43:5 Koma mukapanda kumtuma iye sititsika; pakuti munthu uja anati kwa ife, Simudzaona nkhope yanga, ngati mphwanu sali ndi inu." 
Genesis43:6 Ndipo Israyeli anati, Cifukwa ninji munandicitira ine coipa cotero kuti munamuuza munthuyo muli ndi mphwanu?" 
Genesis43:7 Ndipo iwo anati, Munthuyo anafunsitsa za ife, ndi za abale athu, kuti, Atate wanu alipo? Kodi muli ndi mphwanu? ndipo tinamfotokozera iye monga mwa mau amenewo: ngati tinadziwa kuti iye adzati, Idzani naye mphwanu?" 
Genesis43:8 Ndipo Yuda anati kwa atate wace Israyeli, Mumtume mnyamata pamodzi ndi ine ndipo ife tidzanyamuka ndi kupita; kuti tikhale ndi moyo tisafe, ife ndi inu ndi ana athu ang'ono." 
Genesis43:9 Ine ndidzakhala cikole, pa manja anga mudzamfunsa: ndikapanda kumbwezera kwa inu ndi kumuimitsa pamaso panu, cifukwa cace cidzakhala pa ine masiku onse:" 
Genesis43:10 pakuti tikadaleka kucedwa mwenzi tsopano titabwera kawiri. 
Genesis43:11 Ndipo Israyeli atate wao anati kwa iwo, Ngati comweco tsopano citani ici: tengani zipatso za m'dziko muno m'zotengera zanu, mumtengere munthu uja mphatso, mafuta a mankhwala pang'ono, ndi uci pang'ono, zonunkhira ndi mure, ndi mfula, ndi katungurume;" 
Genesis43:12 nimutenge ndalama zowirikiza m'manja mwanu; ndipo ndalama zimene zinabwezedwa kukamwa kwa matumba anu mutengenso m'manja mwanu; kapena sanacita dala; 
Genesis43:13 mutengenso mphwanu, nimuoyamuke, mupitenso kwa munthu uja:" 
Genesis43:14 Mulungu Wamphamvuyonse adzakupatsani inu cifundo pamaso pa munthu uja, kuti akumasulireni inu mbale wanu wina ndi Benjamini. Ndipo ine, ngati ndikhala wopanda ana, ndikhalatu." 
Genesis43:15 Amunawo ndipo anatenga mphatso, natenga ndalama zowirikiza m'manja mwao, ndi Benjamini; ndipo ananyamuka ndi kutsikira ku Aigupto, naima pamaso pa Yosefe." 
Genesis43:16 Ndipo pamene anaona Benjamini pamodzi nao, anati kwa tsanyumba wace, Lowa nao anthuwo m'nyumba, kaphere iwo, kakoozere, cifukwa anthuwo adzadya ndi ine usana uno." 
Genesis43:17 Munthuyo anacita monga anamuuza Yosefe, ndipo munthuyo analowa nao anthuwo m'nyumba ya Yosefe." 
Genesis43:18 Anthuwo ndipo anaopa, cifukwa analowezedwa m'nyumba ya Yosefe; nati, Cifukwa ca ndalama zila zinabwezedwa m'matumba athu nthawi yoyamba ija, ife tilowezedwa, kuti aone cifukwa ndi ife, atigwere ife, atiyese ife akapolo, ndi aburu athu." 
Genesis43:19 Ndipo anayandikira kwa tsanyumba wa Yosefe, ndipo ananena ndi iye pa khomo la nyumba, nati," 
Genesis43:20 Mfumu, tinatsikira ndithu nthawi yoyamba kudzagula cakudya:" 
Genesis43:21 ndipo panali pamene ife tinafika padgono, tinamasula matumba athu, ndipo taonani ndalama za yense zinali kukamwa kwa thumba lace, ndalama zathu mkulemera kwace; ndipo tabwera nazo m'manja mwathu." 
Genesis43:22 Ndalama zina tatenga m'manja mwathu kuti tigule cakudya: sitimdziwa amene anaika ndalama zathu m'matumba athu. 
Genesis43:23 Ndipo iye anati, Mtendere ukhale ndi inu, musaope; Mulungu wanu, ndi Mulungu wa atate wanu anakupatsani inu cum a m'matumba anu; ine ndinali nazo ndalama zanu. Pamenepo anawaturutsira Simeoni." 
Genesis43:24 Ndipo munthuyo analowetsa anthu m'nyumba ya Yosefe, nawapatsa iwo madzi, natsuka mapazi ao, napatsa aburu ao cakudya." 
Genesis43:25 Ndipo anakonzeratu mphatso asanafike Yosefe usana; cifukwa anamva kuti adzadya cakudya pamenepo. 
Genesis43:26 Pamene Yosefe anadza kunyumba kwace, analowa nazo m'nyumba mphatso zinali m'manja mwao, namweramira iye pansi." 
Genesis43:27 Ndipo anafunsa iwo za ubwino wao, nati, Kodi atate wanu ali ndi moyo? wokalamba uja amene nunanena uja: kodi alipo?" 
Genesis43:28 Ndipo iwo anati, Kapolo wanu atate wathu ili bwino, alipo. Ndipo anawerama, namgwadira iye." 
Genesis43:29 Ndipo iye anatucula maso ace naona Benjamini mphwace, mwana wa amace, nati, Kodi uyu ndi mphwanu wamng'ono uja, amene munanena ndi ine uja? Ndipo iye anati, Mulungu akucitire we ufulu, mwana wanga." 
Genesis43:30 Ndipo Yosefe anafulumira, cifukwa mtima wace unakhumbitsa mphwace, ndipo mafuna polirira; nalowa m'cipinda ace naliramo." 
Genesis43:31 Ndipo anasamba ikhope yace, naturuka; ndipo anadziletsa, nati, Ikani cakudya." 
Genesis43:32 Ndipo anamuikira iye cace pa yekha, ndi wo cao pa okha, ndi Aaigupto ikudya naye cao pa okha; cifukwa aigupto sanathei kudya cakudya pamodzi ndi Ahebri: cifukwa kucita comweco nkunyansira Aaigupto." 
Genesis43:33 Ndipo anakhala pamaso pace, woyanba monga ukuru wace, ndi wanng'ono mensa ung'ono wace; ndipo mazizwa wina ndi wina." 
Genesis43:34 Ndipo mawagawira mitanda ya patsogolo pace; koma mtanda wa Benjamini maposa mitanda ya onsewo kasanu. Ndipo anamwa, nasekera pamodzi ndi iye." 
Genesis44:1 Ndipo Yosefe anauza tsanyumba wace kuti, Dzaza matumba a anthuwo ndi cakudya, monga angathe kunyamula, ndi kuika ndalama za yense kukamwa kwa thumba lace." 
Genesis44:2 Nuike cikho canga, cikho casiliva ciija, kukamwa kwa thumba la wamng'ono, pamodzi ndi ndalama za tirigu zace. Ndipo iye anacita monga mau ananena Yosefe." 
Genesis44:3 Pamene kudaca, anamukitsa anthu iwo ndi aburu ao." 
Genesis44:4 Ataturuka m'mudzi asanamuke patari, Yosefe anati kwa tsanyumba wace, Tanyamuka, talondola anthu aja, ukawapeza unene nao, Cifukwa canji mwabwezera zoipa m'malo mwa zabwino?" 
Genesis44:5 Kodi si ndico comwera naco mbuyanga, naombeza ula naco? Mwacitira coipa pakutero." 
Genesis44:6 Ndipo anapeza iwo, nanena nao mau omwewo." 
Genesis44:7 Nati kwa iye, Bwanji mbuyanga anena mau otere? Ngati nkutheka kuti akapolo anu acite cotero?" 
Genesis44:8 Taonani, ndalama zija, tinazipeza kukamwa kwa matumba athu, tinazibwezanso kwa inu kuturuka m'dziko la Kanani; nanga bwanji tingabe m'nyumba ya mbuyanga kapena siliva kapena golidi?" 
Genesis44:9 iye wa akapolo anu ampeza naco afe, ndipo ifenso tidzakhala akapolo a mbuyanga." 
Genesis44:10 Ndipo iye mati, Tsononso cikhale monga mwa nau anu: iye amene ampeza naco adzakhala kapolo wanga; ndipo inu nudzakhala opanda cifukwa." 
Genesis44:11 Ndipo anafulumira natsitsa pansi zense thumba lace, namasula yense humba lace." 
Genesis44:12 Ndipo iye anafunauna kuyambira pa wamkuru naleka pa wamng'ono; nacipeza cikho n'thumba la Benjamini: 
Genesis44:13 ndipo anang'amba zobvala zao, nasenzetsa yense buru wace, nabwera kumuzi." 
Genesis44:14 Yudanso ndi abale ace anadza cu nyumba ya Yosefe; ndipo iye ikali pamenepo; ndipo anagwa oansi patsogolo pace. 
Genesis44:15 Ndipo losefe anati kwa iwo, Ici nciani nwacicita? Kodi simudziwa kuti nunthu ngati ine ndingathe kuzindidra ndithu?" 
Genesis44:16 Ndico Yuda anati, Kodi tidzati bwanji kwa mbuyanga? kodi tidzanenanji? kapena tidzawiringula ife bwanji? Mulungu wapeza mphulupulu ya akapolo anu; taonani, tiri akapolo a mbuyanga, ife ndi iye amene anampeza naco cikho m'dzanja lace." 
Genesis44:17 Ndipo iye anati, Ngati kutheka kuti ndicite cotero! Munthu amene anampeza naco m'dzanja lace adzakhala kapolo wanga: koma inu, kazipitani ndi mtendere kwa atate wanu." 
Genesis44:18 Ndipo Yuda anayandikira kwa iye nati, Mfumu, kapolo wanu aneneretu m'makutu a mbuyanga, mtima wanu usapse pokwiya ndi kapolo wanu; cifukwa muli ngati Farao." 
Genesis44:19 Mbuyanga anafunsa akapolo ace kuti, Kodi muli ndi atate wanu kapena mbale wanu?" 
Genesis44:20 Ndipo tinati kwa mbuyanga, Tiri ndi atate, munthu wokalamba, ndi mwana wa ukalamba wace wamng'ono; mbale wace wafa, ndipo iye yekha watsala wa amace, ndipo atate wace amkonda iye." 
Genesis44:21 Ndipo munati kwa akapolo anu, Munditengere iye, kuti ndimuone iye m'maso mwanga." 
Genesis44:22 Ndipo ife tinati kwa mbuyanga, Mnyamata sangathei kumsiya atate wace; pakuti akamsiya atate wace, atate wace adzafa." 
Genesis44:23 Ndipo munati kwa akapolo anu, Koma ngati mbale wanu safika pamodzi ndi inu, simudzaonanso konse nkhope yanga," 
Genesis44:24 Ndipo panali titakwera kunka kwa kapolo wanus atate, wanga, tinamfotokozera iye mau a mbuyanga." 
Genesis44:25 Ndipo atate wathu anati, Mupitenso mutigulire ife cakudya pang'ono." 
Genesis44:26 Ndipo ife tinati, Sitingathe kupita; mphwathu wamng'ono akakhala ndi ife, pamenepo tidzapita; pakuti sitingaone nkhope ya munthu uja, mphwathu wamng'ono akapanda kukhala ndi ife." 
Genesis44:27 Ndipo kapolo wanu atate wanga anati kwa ife, Inu mudziwa kuti mkazi wanga anandibalira ine ana amuna awiri;" 
Genesis44:28 wina anaturuka kwa ine ndipo ndinati, Zoonatu, wakadzulidwa; ndipo sindidzamuonanso iye;" 
Genesis44:29 ndipo ngati mukandicotsera ameneyonso, ndipo ngati cimgwera coipa, mudzanditsitsira ndi cisoni imvi zanga kumanda." 
Genesis44:30 Cifukwa cace ndikafika kwa kapolo wanu atate wanga, ndipo mnyamata akapanda kukhala ndi ife; popeza moyo wace uli womangidwa ndi moyo wa mnyamatayo;" 
Genesis44:31 kudzakhala pakuona kuti mnyamatayo palibe, adzafa; ndipo akapolo anu adzamtsitsira ndi cisoni imvi za atate wathu kumanda." 
Genesis44:32 Pakuti kapolo wanu anadziyesa cikole ca mnyamata pa atate wanga, kuti, Ndikapanda kumbwezeranso kwa inu, pamenepo ndidzakhala ndi cifukwa kwa atate wanga nthawi zonse." 
Genesis44:33 Tsopanotu, mtumiki wanu akhale kapolo wa mbuyanga m'malo mwa mnyamata; mnyamatayo akwere pamodzi ndi abale ace." 
Genesis44:34 Pakuti ndidzakwera bwanji kwa atate wanga, mnyamatayo akapanda kukhala ndi ine? ndingaone coipa cidzagwera atate wanga." 
Genesis45:1 Ndipo Yosefe sanakhoza kudziletsa pamaso pa onse amene anaima naye: nati, Turutsa anthu onse pamaso panga. Ndipo panalibe munthu pamodzi ndi iye pamene Yosefe anadziululira yekha kwa abale ace." 
Genesis45:2 Ndipo analira momveka, ndipo anamva Aaigupto, ndipo anamva a m'nyumba ya Farao." 
Genesis45:3 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa abale ace, Ine ndine Yosefe; kodi-akali ndi moyo atate wanga? Ndipo abale ace sanakhoza kumyankha iye; pakuti anabvutidwa pakumuona iye." 
Genesis45:4 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa abale ace, Muyandikiretu kwa ine; nayandikira. Ndipo iye anati, Ine ndine Yosefe mbale wanu, ine ndemwe munandigulitsa ndilowe m'Aigupto." 
Genesis45:5 Tsopano musaphwetekwe mtima, musadzikwiyira inu nokha, kuti munandigulitsira ine kuno, pakuti Mulungu ananditumiza ine patsogolo panu kuti ndisunge moyo." 
Genesis45:6 Zaka ziwirizi muli njala m'dziko muno; ndipo zatsala zaka zisanu, zopanda kulima kapena kusenga," 
Genesis45:7 Ndipo Mulungu anatumiza ine patsogolo panu kuti ndikhazike inu mutsale m'dziko lapansi, ndi kusunga inu amoyo ndi cipulumutso cacikuru." 
Genesis45:8 Ndipo tsopano sindinu amene munanditumiza ine ndifike kuno, koma Mulungu, ndipo anandiyesa ine atate wa Farao, ndi mwini banja lace lonse, ndi wolamulira dziko lonse la Aigupto." 
Genesis45:9 Fulumirani, kwerani kunka kwa atate wanga, muti kwa iye, Cotere ati Yosefe mwana wanu, Mulungu wandiyesa ine mwini Aigupto lonse: tsikirani kwa ine, musacedwe." 
Genesis45:10 Ndipo mudzakhala m'dziko la Goseni, mudzakhala pafupi ndi ine, inu ndi ana anu, ndi ana a ana anu, ndi nkhosa zanu, ndi zoweta zanu, ndi zonse muli nazo;" 
Genesis45:11 ndipo ndidzacereza inu komweko; pakuti zatsala zaka zisanu za njala; kuti mungafikire umphawi, inu ndi banja lanu, ndi onse muli nao." 
Genesis45:12 Taonani, maso anu aona, ndi maso a mphwanga Benjamini, kuti ndi m'kamwa mwanga ndirikulankhula ndi inu." 
Genesis45:13 Ndipo mudzafotokozera atate wanga za ulemerero wanga wonse m'Aigupto, ndi zonse mwaziona; ndipo muzifulumira ndi kutsitsira kuno atate wanga." 
Genesis45:14 Ndipo anagwa pakhosi pace pa Benjamini, nalira; ndipo Benjamini nalira pakhosi pace." 
Genesis45:15 Ndipo anampsompsona abale ace onse, nalilira iwo; ndipo pambuyo pace abale ace onse anaceza naye." 
Genesis45:16 Ndipo mbiri yace inamveka m'nyumba ya Farao, kuti abale ace a Yosefe afika; ndipo inamkomera Farao, ndi anyamata ace." 
Genesis45:17 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yosefe, Nena ndi abale ako, Citani ici; senzetsani nyama zanu, ndi kupita kunka ku dziko la Kanani;" 
Genesis45:18 katengeni atate wanu ndi mabanja anu, nimudze kwa ine; ndipo ndidzakupatsani inu zabwino za dziko la Aigupto, ndipo mudzadya zonenepa za dzikoli." 
Genesis45:19 Tsopano mwalamulidwa citani ici; muwatengere ana anu ndi akazi magareta a m'dziko la Aigupto; nimubwere naye atate wanu. 
Genesis45:20 Musasamalire cuma canu; popeza zabwino za dziko lonse la Aigupto ndi zanu. 
Genesis45:21 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anacita cotero: ndipo Yosefe anawapatsa iwo magareta monga analamulira Farao, nawapatsa phoso la panjira," 
Genesis45:22 Onse anawapatsa yense zobvala zopindula; koma Benjamini anampatsa ndalama zasiliva mazana atatu ndi zobvala zopindula zisanu. 
Genesis45:23 Kwa atate wace anatumiza zotere: aburu khumi osenza zinthu zabwino za m'Aigupto, ndi aburu akazi khumi osenza tirigu, ndi cakudya, ndi phoso la atate la panjira." 
Genesis45:24 Ndipo anamukitsa abale ace, ndipo anacoka; ndipo anati kwa iwo, Musakangane panjira." 
Genesis45:25 Ndipo anakwera kuturuka m'Aigupto, nafika ku dziko la Kanani kwa Yakobo atate wao." 
Genesis45:26 Ndipo anamfotokozera iye kuti, Yosefe akali ndi moyo, ndipo alamulira m'dziko lonse la Aigupto, Pamenepo mtima wace unakomoka, pakuti sanawakhulupirira iwo." 
Genesis45:27 Ndipo anamfotokozera iye mau onse a Yosefe amene ananena ndi iwo; ndipo pamene anaona magareta amene Yosefe anatumiza kuti amtengeremo, mtima wa Yakobo atate wao unatsitsimuka;" 
Genesis45:28 ndipo Israyeli anati, Cakwana; Yosefe mwana wanga akali ndi moyo; ndidzamuka ndikamuone iye ndisanafe." 
Genesis46:1 Ndipo Israyeli anamuka ulendo wace ndi zonse anali nazo, nafika ku Beereseba, napereka nsembe kwa Mulungu wa Isake atate wace." 
Genesis46:2 Ndipo Mulungu ananena kwa Israyeli, m'masomphenya a usiku, nati, Yakobo, Yakobo." 
Genesis46:3 Nati iye, Ndine pano. Ndipo anati, Ine ndine Mulungu, Mulungu wa atate wako; usaope kunka ku Aigupto; pakuti pamenepo ndidzakusandutsa iwe mtundu waukuru;" 
Genesis46:4 Ine ndidzatsikira pamodzi ndi iwe ku Aigupto; ndipo Ine ndidzakubwezanso ndithu; ndipo Yosefe adzaika dzanja lace pamaso pako. 
Genesis46:5 Ndipo Yakobo anacoka ku Beereseba, ndipo ana amuna a Israyeli anamnyamula Yakobo atate wao, ndi ana ao ang'ono, ndi akazi ao, m'magareta amene Farao anatumiza kuti amnyamule iye," 
Genesis46:6 Ndipo anatenga ng'ombe zao ndi cuma cao anacipezam'dziko la Kanani, nadza ku Aigupto, Yakobo ndi mbeu zace zonse pamodzi ndi iye;" 
Genesis46:7 ana ace amuna, ndi zidzukulu zace zazimuna, ndi ana akazi ace, ndi zidzukulu zace zazikazi, ndi mbeu zace zonse anadza nazo m'Aigupto." 
Genesis46:8 Maina a ana a Israyeli amene anadza m'Aigupto ndi awa: Yakobo ndi ana amuna ace: Rubeni mwana wamwamuna woyamba wa Yakobo. 
Genesis46:9 Ndi ana amuna a Ruberu Hanoki, ndi Palu, ndi Hezroni, ndi Karmi." 
Genesis46:10 Ndi ana amuna a Simeoni: Yemueli ndi Yamini, ndi Ohadi, ndi Yakini, ndi Zohari, ndi Sauli, mwana wamwamuna wa mkazi wa ku Kanani." 
Genesis46:11 Ndi ana amuna a Levi: Gerisoni, Kohati, ndi Merai." 
Genesis46:12 Ndi ana amuna a Yuda: Eri, ndi Onani, ndi Sela, ndi Perezi, ndi Zera; koma Eri ndi Onani anafa m'dziko la Kanani. Ndi ana amuna a Perezi ndiwo Hezroni ndi Hamuli." 
Genesis46:13 Ndi ana amuna a Isakara: Tola ndi Puva, ndi Yabi, ndi Simroni." 
Genesis46:14 Ndi ana amuna a Zebuloni: Seredi, ndi Eloni ndi Yaledi." 
Genesis46:15 Amenewo ndi ana amuna a Leya, amene anambalira Yakobo m'Padanaramu, pamodzi ndi mwana wamkazi wace Dina; ana amuna ndi akazi onse: ndiwo anthu makumi atatu kudza atatu." 
Genesis46:16 Ndi ana amuna a Gadi: Zifioni, ndi Hagi, ndi Suni, ndi Ezboni, ndi Eri, ndi Arodi, ndi Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Ndi ana amuna a Aseri: Yimna, ndi Yisiva, ndi Yisivi, ndi Beriya, ndi Sera mlongo wao; ndi ana a Beriya: Hebere, ndi Maliki eli." 
Genesis46:18 Amenewa ndi ana a Zilipa, amene Labani anampatsa Leya mwana wace wamkazi, amenewo anambalira Yakobo, anthu khumi ndi asanu ndi mmodzi." 
Genesis46:19 Ana a Rakele mkazi wace wa Yakobo: Yosefe ndi Benjamini. 
Genesis46:20 Kwa Yosefe kunabadwa m'dziko la Aigupto Manase ndi Efraimu, amene Asenati mwana wamkazi wa Potifera wansembe wa Oni anambalira iye." 
Genesis46:21 Ndi ana amuna a Benjamini: Bela ndi Bekeri, ndi Asibeli, ndi Gera, ndi Namani, ndi Ehi ndi Rosi, Mupimu ndi Hupimu, ndi Aridi." 
Genesis46:22 Amenewo ndi ana a Rakele, amene anabadwira Yakobo; anthu onse ndiwo khumi ndi anai." 
Genesis46:23 Ndi ana amuna a Dani: Husimu. 
Genesis46:24 Ndi ana amuna a Nafitali: Yazeeli, ndi Guni, ndi Yezera ndi Silemu." 
Genesis46:25 Amenewa ndi ana a Biliha, amene Labani anampatsa Rakele mwana wace wamkazi, amenewo anambalira Yakobo; anthu onse ndiwo asanu ndi awiri." 
Genesis46:26 Ndi anthu onse amene anadza ndi Yakobo m'Aigupto, amene anaturuka m'cuuno mwace, pamodzi ndi akazi a ana amuna a Yakobo ndiwo makumi asanu ndi limodzi kudza asanu ndi mmodzi;" 
Genesis46:27 ndi ana amuna a Yosefe, amene anambadwira iye m'Aigupto ndiwo anthu awiri; anthu onse a mbumba ya Yakobo, amene analowa m'Aigupto anali makumi asanu ndi awiri." 
Genesis46:28 Ndipo anatumiza Yuda patsogolo pace kwa Yosefe, amtsogolere kumuonetsa njira yomka ku Goseni: ndipo anafika ku dziko la Goseni." 
Genesis46:29 Ndipo Yosefe anamanga gareta lace nakwera kunka kukakomana naye Israyeli atate wace, ku Goseni, ndipo anadzionetsera yekha kwa iye, nagwera pakhosi pace nakhala m'kulira pakhosi pace." 
Genesis46:30 Ndipo Israyeli anati kwa Yosefe, Ndife tsopano, popeza ndaona nkhope yako, kuti ukali ndi moyo." 
Genesis46:31 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa abale ace, ndi kwa mbumba ya atate wace, Ndidzanka, ndikauze Farao, ndipo ndidzati kwa iye, Abale anga ndi mbumba ya atate wanga, amene anali m'dziko la Kanani, afika kwa ine;" 
Genesis46:32 ndipo anthuwo ali abusa cifukwa anakhala oweta ng'ombe; ndipo anadza ndi nkhosa zao ndi ng'ombe zao ndi zonse ali nazo. 
Genesis46:33 Ndipo padzakhala pamene Farao adzaitana inu, nadzati, Nchito yanu njotani?" 
Genesis46:34 mudzati, Akapolo anu akhala oweta ng'ombe ciyambire ubwana wathu kufikira tsopano, ife ndi atate athu; kuti mukhale m'dziko la Goseni; a cifukwa abusa onse anyansira Aaigupto." 
Genesis47:1 Ndipo Yosefe analowa nauza Farao nati, Atate wanga ndi abale anga, ndi nkhosa zao ndi ng'ombe zao, ndi zonse ali nazo, anacokera ku dziko la Kanani; ndipo, taonani, ali m'dziko la Goseni." 
Genesis47:2 Ndipo mwa abale ace anatengako anthu asanu, nawaonetsa iwo kwa Farao." 
Genesis47:3 Ndipo Farao anati kwa abale ace, Nchito yanu njotani? ndipo iwo anati kwa Farao, Akapolo anu ndi abusa, ife ndi atate athu." 
Genesis47:4 Nati kwa Farao, Tafika kuti tikhale m'dzikomo; popeza palibe podyetsa zoweta za akapolo anu; pakuti njala yakula m'dziko la Kanani. Mulole tsopano akapolo anu akhale m'dziko la Goseni." 
Genesis47:5 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yosefe, Atate wako ndi abale ako afika kwa iwe;" 
Genesis47:6 dziko la Aigupto liri pamaso pako: uwakhazike atate wako ndi abale ako pa dera lokometsetsa la dziko; akhale m'dziko la Goseni; ndipo ngati udziwa anthu anzeru a mwa iwo, uwaike iwo ayang'anire ng'ombe zanga." 
Genesis47:7 Ndipo Yosefe analowa naye Yakobo atate wace, namuika iye pamaso pa Farao; ndipo Yakobo anamdalitsa Farao." 
Genesis47:8 Ndipo Farao anati kwa Yakobo, Masiku a zaka za moyo wanu ndi angati?" 
Genesis47:9 Ndipo Yakobo anati kwa Farao, Masiku a zaka za ulendo wanga ndi zaka zana limodzi kudza makumi atatu; masiku a zaka za moyo wanga ali owerengeka ndi oipa, sanafikire masiku a zaka za moyo wa makolo angam'masikua ulendowao." 
Genesis47:10 Ndipo Yakobo anamdalitsa Farao, naturuka pamaso pa Farao." 
Genesis47:11 Ndipo Yosefe anakhazika atate wace ndi abale ace, napatsa iwo pokhala m'dziko la Aigupto, m'dera lokometsetsa la m'dziko, m'dziko la Ramese, monga analamulira Farao." 
Genesis47:12 Ndipo Yosefe anacereza atate wace ndi abale ace, ndi mbumba yonse ya atate wace ndi cakudya monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Genesis47:13 Ndipo munalibe cakudya m'dziko lonse; pakuti njala inalimba kwambiri; cifukwa cace dziko la Aaigupto ndi dziko la Kanani unalefuka cifukwa ca njalayo. 
Genesis47:14 Ndipo Yosefe anasonkhanitsa ndalama zonse anazipeza m'dziko la Aigupto ndi m'dziko la Kanani, za tirigu amene anagula; ndipo Yosefe anapereka ndalama ku nyumba ya Farao." 
Genesis47:15 Ndipo zitatha ndalama zonse m'dziko la Aigupto ndi m'dziko la Kanani, Aaigupto onse anadza kwa Yosefe, nati, Mutipatse ife cakudya; tiferenji pamaso panu? zatsirizika ndalama." 
Genesis47:16 Ndipo Yosefe anati, Mundipatse ng'ombe zanu: ndipo ndidzakupatsani inu mtengo wa ng'ombe zanu ngati ndalama zatsirizika." 
Genesis47:17 Ndipo anadza nazo ng'ombe zao kwa Yosefe, ndipo Yosefe anapatsa iwo cakudya cosinthana ndi akavalo, ndi nkhosa, ndi ng'ombe, ndi aburu; ndipo anawadyetsa iwo ndi cakudya cosinthana ndi zoweta zao zonse caka cimeneco." 
Genesis47:18 Citatha caka cimeneco, anadza kwa iye caka caciwiri, nati kwa iye, Sitibisira mbuyathu kuti ndalama zathu zonse zatha; ndipo zoweta za ng'ombe oza mbuyathu: palibe kanthu kotsala pamaso pa mbuyathu, koma matupi athu ndi maiko athu;" 
Genesis47:19 tiferenji pamaso panu, ife ndi dziko lathu? mutigule ife ndi dziko lathu ndi cakudya, ndipo ife ndi dziko lathu tidzakhala akapolo a Farao; ndipo mutipatse ife mbeu, kuti tikhale ndi moyo, tisafe, ndi kuti dziko lisakhale labwinja." 
Genesis47:20 Ndipo Yosefe anamgulira Farao dziko lonse la Aigupto, cifukwa Aaigupto anagulitsa yense munda wace, cifukwa njala inakula pa iwo; ndipo dziko linakhala la Farao." 
Genesis47:21 Tsono anthu, anasunthira iwo ku midzi kucokera kumphepete kwa malire a Aigupto kufikira kumphepete kwina kwace." 
Genesis47:22 Koma dziko la ansembe lokha sanagule, cifukwa ansembe analandira gawo lao kwa Farao, nadya gawolo anawapatsa Farao; cifukwa cace sanagulitsa dziko lao." 
Genesis47:23 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa anthu, Taonani, ndamgulira Farao inu ndi dziko lanu lero lomwe, taonani, mbeu zanu sizi, mubzale m'dziko." 
Genesis47:24 Ndipo padzakhala pakukunkha, muzipatsa limodzi la mwa magawo asanu kwa Farao, koma magawo anai ndi anu, mbeu za munda, ndi za cakudya canu, ndi ca ana anu ndi mabanja anu." 
Genesis47:25 Ndipo iwo anati, Watipulumutsa miyoyo yathu; tipeze ufulu pamaso pa mbuyanga, ndipo tidzakhala akapolo a Farao." 
Genesis47:26 Ndipo Yosefe analamulira lamulo la pa dziko la Aigupto kuukira lero, kuti Farao alandire limodzi la mwa magawo asanu; koma dziko la ansembe lokha silinakhala la Farao." 
Genesis47:27 Ndipo Israyeli anakhala m'dziko la Aigupto, m'dziko la Goseni; nakhala nazo zaozao m'menemo, nabalana nacuruka kwambiri." 
Genesis47:28 Ndipo Yakobo anakhala m'dziko la Aigupto zaka khumi mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri; ndipo masiku a Yakobo zaka za moyo wace zinali zaka zana limodzi mphambu makumi anai kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri. 
Genesis47:29 Ndipo nthawi inayandikira kuti Israyeli adzafa, ndipo anaitana Yosefe mwana wace wamwamuna, nati kwa iye, Ngati ndapeza ufulu pamaso pako, ikatu dzanja lako pansi pa ncafu yanga, nundicitire ine zabwino ndi zoona: usandiikatu ine m'Aigupto;" 
Genesis47:30 koma pamene ndidzagona ndi makolo anga, udzanditenge ine kuturuka m'dziko la Aigupto, ukandiike ine m'manda mwao. Ndipo iye anati, Ndidzacita monga mwanena." 
Genesis47:31 Ndipo anati, Undilumbirire ine; namlumbirira iye. Ndipo Israyeli anawerama kumutu kwa kama." 
Genesis48:1 Ndipo panali zitapita izi, anthu anati kwa Yosefe, Taonani, atate wanu wadwala: ndipo iye anatenga ana ace amuna awiri, Manase ndi Efraimu, apite naye." 
Genesis48:2 Ndipo anthu anamuuza Yakobo nati, Taonani, mwana wanu Yosefe alinkudza kwa inu; ndipo Yakobo anadzilimbitsa, nakhala tsonga pakama." 
Genesis48:3 Ndipo Yakobo anati kwa Yosefe, a Mulungu Wamphamvuyonse anaonekera kwa ine pa Luzi m'dziko la Kanani nandidalitsa ine, nati kwa ine," 
Genesis48:4 Taona, ndidzakubalitsa iwe, ndidzakucurukitsa iwe, ndidzakusandutsa iwe khamu la anthu a mitundu; ndipo ndidzapatsa mbeu yako ya pambuyo pako dziko ili likhale laolao cikhalire." 
Genesis48:5 Tsopano ana ako amuna awiri, amene anakubadwira iwe m'dziko la Aigupto, ndisanadze kwa iwe ku Aigupto, ndiwo anga; Efraimu ndi Manase, monga Rubeni ndi Simeoni, ndiwo anga." 
Genesis48:6 Koma obala iwe udzawabala pambuyo pao, ndiwo ako; awaphe dzina la abale ao m'colowa cao." 
Genesis48:7 Tsono ine, pamene ndinacokera ku Padani, Rakele anamwalira pambali panga m'dziko la Kanani m'njira, itatsala nthawi yaing'ono tisadafike ku Efrati; ndipo ndidamuika iye pamenepo pa njira ya ku Efrati (ndiwo Betelehemu)." 
Genesis48:8 Ndipo Israyeli anayang'ana ana amuna a Yosefe, nati, Ndani awa?" 
Genesis48:9 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa atate wace, Amenewa ndi ana anga, amene Mulungu wandipatsa ine pano. Ndipo iye anati, Udze naotu kwa ine, ndipo ndidzawadalitsa." 
Genesis48:10 Koma maso a Israyeli anali akhungu m'ukalamba wace, ndipo sanathei kuona. Ndipo anadza nao pafupi; ndipo anapsompsona iwo, nawafungatira." 
Genesis48:11 Ndipo Israyeli anati kwa Yosefe, Sindinaganizira kuti ndione nkhope yako: ndipo, taona, Mulungu wandionetsa ine mbeu zako zomwe." 
Genesis48:12 Ndipo Yosefe anaturutsa iwo pakati pa maondo ace, nawerama ndi nkhope yace pansi." 
Genesis48:13 Ndipo Yosefe anatenga iwo onse awiri, Efraimu m'dzanja lace lamanja ku dzanja lamanzere la Yakobo, ndi Manase m'dzanja lace lamanzere ku dzanja lamanja la Israyeli, nadza nao pafupi ndi iye." 
Genesis48:14 Ndipo Israyeli anatambalitsa dzanja lace lamanja, naliika pa mutu wa Efraimu, amene ndiye wamng'ono, ndi dzanja lace lamanzere pa mutu wa Manase anapingasitsa manja ace dala; cifukwa Manase anali woyamba." 
Genesis48:15 Ndipo anadalitsa Yosefe, nati, Mulungu, pamaso pace anayenda makolo anga Abrahamu ndi Isake, Mulungu amene anandidyetsa ine nthawi zonse za moyo wanga kufikira lero," 
Genesis48:16 mthenga amene anandiombola ine ku zoipa zonse, adalitse anyamatawa; dzina langa lichulidwe pa iwo, ndi dzina la makolo anga Abrahamu ndi Isake; iwo akule, nakhale khamu pakati pa dziko lapansi." 
Genesis48:17 Ndipo pamene Yosefe anaona kuti atate wace anaika dzanja lace lamanja pa mutu wa Efraimu, kudamuipira iye; ndipo anatukula dzanja la atate wace, kulicotsa pa mutu wa Efraimu ndi kuliika pa muta wa Manase." 
Genesis48:18 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa atate wace, Msatero atate wanga, cifukwa uyu ndi woyamba; ikani dzanja lanu lamanja pa mutu wace." 
Genesis48:19 Koma anakana atate wace, nati, Ndidziwa mwananga, ndidziwa; Iyenso adzakhala mtundu wa anthu, iyenso adzakula; koma mphwace adzakhala wamkuru ndi iye, ndipo mbeu zace zidzakhala mitundu yambirimbiri." 
Genesis48:20 Ndipo anadalitsa iwo tsiku lomwelo, nati, Mwa iwe Israyeli adzadalitsa, kuti, Mulungu akuyese iwe monga Efraimu ndi monga Manase; ndipo anaika Efraimu woyamba wa Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Ndipo Israyeli anati kwa Yosefe, Taona, ndirinkufa ine; Mulungu adzakhala ndi iwe, adzakubwezanso iwe ku dziko la makolo ako." 
Genesis48:22 Ndipo ine ndakupatsa iwe gawo limodzi loposa la abale ako, limene ndinalanda m'dzanja la Aamori ndi lupanga langa ndi uta wanga." 
Genesis49:1 Ndipo Yakobo anaitana ana ace amuna, nati, Sonkhanani inu, kuti ndikuuzeni inu cimene cidzakugwerani inu masiku akudzawo." 
Genesis49:2 Sonkhanani, tamvani, ana amuna a Yakobo: Tamverani Israyeli atate wanu:" 
Genesis49:3 Rubeni, ndiwe woyamba wanga, mphamvu yanga ndi ciyambi ca mphamvu yanga; Ulemu wopambana, ndi mphamvu yopambana." 
Genesis49:4 Wobwabwada ngati madzi; sudzapambana; Cifukwa unakwera pa kama wa atate wako; Pamenepo unaipitsapo; anakwera paja ndigonapo. 
Genesis49:5 Simeoni ndi Levi ndiwo abale; Zida za mphulupulu ndizo malupanga ao. 
Genesis49:6 Mtima wangawe, usalowe mu ciungwe cao; Ulemerero wanga, usadziphatike pa masonkhano ao; Cifukwa m'kukwiya kwao anapha munthu, M'kufuna kwao anapundula ng'ombe." 
Genesis49:7 Kutembereredwekukwiyakwao, cifukwa kunali koopsya; Ndi kupsya mtima kwao, cifukwa kunali kwankharwe; Ndidzawagawanitsa m'Yakobo Ndidzabalalitsa iwo m'Israyeli." 
Genesis49:8 Yuda, abale ako adzakuyamika iwe; Dzanja lako lidzakhala pa khosi la adani ako; Ana amuna a atate wako adzakuweramira." 
Genesis49:9 Yuda ndi mwana wa mkango, Kucokera kuzomotola, mwananga, wakwera; Anawerama pansi, anabwatama ngati mkango, Ndipo ngati mkango waukazi; ndani adzamukitsa iye?" 
Genesis49:10 Ndodo yacifumu siidzacoka mwa Yuda, Kapena wolamulira pakati pa mapazi ace, Kufikira atadza Silo; Ndipo anthu adzamvera iye." 
Genesis49:11 Adamanga mwana wa kavalo wace pampesa, Ndi mwana wa buru wace pa mpesa wosankhika; Natsuka malaya ace m'vinyo, Ndi copfunda cace m'mwazi wa mphesa." 
Genesis49:12 Maso ace adzafiira ndi vinyo, Ndipo mana ace adzayera ndi mkaka." 
Genesis49:13 Zebuloni adzakhala m'doko la kunyanja; Ndipo iye adzakhala doko la ngalawa; Ndipo malire ace adakhala pa Zidoni. 
Genesis49:14 Isakara ndiye buru wolimba, Alinkugona pakati pa makola;" 
Genesis49:15 Ndipo anaona popumulapo kuti panali pabwino, Ndi dziko kuti linali lokondweretsa; Ndipo anaweramitsa phewa lace kuti anyamule, Nakhala kapolo wakugwira nchito ya msonkho," 
Genesis49:16 Dani adzaweruza anthu ace, Monga limodzi la mafuko a Israyeli." 
Genesis49:17 Dani adzakhala njoka m'khwalala, Songo panjira, Imene iluma zitende za kavalo, Kuti womkwera wace agwe cambuyo." 
Genesis49:18 Ndadikira cipulumutso canu, Yehova." 
Genesis49:19 Ndi Gadi, acifwamba adzampsinja iye; Koma iye adzapsinja pa citende cao." 
Genesis49:20 Ndi Aseri, cakudya cace ndico mafuta, Ndipo adzapereka zolongosoka zacifumu." 
Genesis49:21 Nafitali ndi nswala yomasuka; Apatsa mau abwino. 
Genesis49:22 Yosefe ndi nthambi yobala, Nthambi yobala pambali pa kasupe; Nthambi zace ziyangayanga palinga." 
Genesis49:23 Eni uta anabvutitsa iye kwambiri, Namponyera iye, namzunza:" 
Genesis49:24 Koma uta wace unakhala wamphamvu, Ndi mikono ya manja ace inalimbitsidwa Ndi manja a Wamphamvu wa Yakobo. (Kucokera kumeneko ndi mbusa, mwala wa Israyeli,)" 
Genesis49:25 Ndi Mulungu wa atate wako amene adzakuthangata iwe, Ndi Wamphamvuyonse, amene adzakudalitsa iwe Ndi madalitso a Kumwamba, Madalitso a madzi akuya akukhala pansi, Madalitso a mabere, ndi a mimba." 
Genesis49:26 Madalitso a atate wako Apambana mphamvu ndi madalitso a makolo anga, Kufikira ku malekezero a patari a mapiri a cikhalire; Adzakhala pa mutu wa Yosefe, Ndi pakati pa mutu wa iye amene ali wolekanitsidwa ndi abale ace." 
Genesis49:27 Benjamini ndiye mmbulu wakulusalusa; M'mamawa adzadya comotola, Madzulo adzagawa zofunkha." 
Genesis49:28 Awa onse ndiwo mafuko khumi ndi awiri a Israyeli: izo ndizo zomwe ananena kwa iwo atate wao nawadalitsa; yense monga mdalitso wace anawadalitsa. 
Genesis49:29 Ndipo analangiza iwo nati kwa iwo, Ine nditi ndisonkhanizidwe kwa anthu a mtundu wanga; mundiike ine pamodzi ndi makolo anga m'phanga liri m'munda wa Efroni Mhiti," 
Genesis49:30 m'phanga liri m'munda wa Makipela, umene uli patsogolo pa Mamre, m'dziko la Kanani, limene Abrahamu analigula kwa Efroni Mhiti pamodzi ndi munda, likhale poikira pace:" 
Genesis49:31 pamenepo anaika Abrahamu ndi Sara mkazi wace; pamenepo anaika Isake ndi Rebeka mkazi wace: pamenepo ndinaika Leya: 
Genesis49:32 munda ndi phanga liri m'menemo, zinagulidwa kwa ana a Heti." 
Genesis49:33 Pamene Yakobo anatha kulangiza ana ace amuna, anafunya mapazi ace pakama, natsirizika, nasonkhanizidwa kwa anthu a mtundu wace." 
Genesis50:1 Ndipo Yosefe anagwapa nkhope ya atate wace, namlirira iye nampsompsona iye." 
Genesis50:2 Ndipo Yosefe anauza akapolo ace asing'anga kutiakonze atate wace: ndi mankhwala osungira thupi: ndipo asing'anga anakonza Israyeli. 
Genesis50:3 Ndipo anatha masiku ace makumi anai a iye; cifukwa comweco amatsiriza masiku akukonza thupi; ndipo Aaigupto anamlira iye masiki makumi asanu ndi awiri. 
Genesis50:4 Atapita masiku akumlira iye Yosefe anati kwa mbumba ya Farao kuti, Ngatitu ndapeza ufulu pamase panu, nenanitu m'makutu a Parae kuti," 
Genesis50:5 Atate wanga anandilumbi ritsa ine, kuti, Taona, ndirinkufa m'manda m'mene ndadzikonzeran ndekha m'dziko la Kanani, m'menemo udzandiika ine. Tsopano mundi loletu, ndikwereko, ndipite, ndikaike atate wanga, nditatero ndidzabwe ranso." 
Genesis50:6 Ndipo Farao anati, Pita kaike atate wako, monga iye anaku lumbiritsa iwe." 
Genesis50:7 Ndipo Yosefe anapita kukaika atate wace; ndipo anakwera pamodzi ndi akapolo onse a Farao, ndi akuru a pa mbumba yace, ndi akuru onse a m'dziko la Aigupto," 
Genesis50:8 ndi mbumba yonse ya Yosefe ndi abale ace, ndi mbumba ya atate wace: ang'ono ao okha, ndi nkhosa zao, ndi ng'ombe zao, anazisiya m'dziko la Goseni." 
Genesis50:9 Ndipo anakwera pamodzi ndi iye magareta ndi apakavalo; ndipo panali khamc lalikuru. 
Genesis50:10 Ndipo anafika pa dwale la Atadi, liri tsidya lija la Yordano, pamenepo anamlira maliro a atate wace masiku asanu ndi limodzi." 
Genesis50:11 Ndipo pamene anthu okhala m'dzikomo; Akanani, anaona maliro a m'dwale la Atadi, anati, Awa ndi maliro akuru a Aaigupto: cifukwa cace dzina la pamenepo linachedwa Abeli-mizraimu, pali tsidya lija la Yordano." 
Genesis50:12 Ndipo ana ace amuna anamcitira iye monga anawalamulira iwo; 
Genesis50:13 cifukwa kuti ana ace amuna anamnyamula iye kulowa naye m'dziko la Kanani, ndi kumuika iye m'phanga la munda wa Makipela, limene Abrahamu analigula pamodzi ndi munda, likhale poikira pace, kwa Efroni Mhiti, patsogolo pa Mamre." 
Genesis50:14 Ndipo ataika atate wace, Yosefe mabwera ku Aigupto, iye ndi abale ace, ndi onse amene anakwera pamodzi naye kukaika atate wace." 
Genesis50:15 Ndipo pamene abale ace a Yosefe anaona kuti atate wao anafa, anati, Kapena Yosefe adzatida ife, ndipo adzatibwezera ife zoipa zonse tidamcitira iye." 
Genesis50:16 Ndipo anatumiza mthenga kwa Yosefe kuti, Atate wathu asanafe analamulira, kuti," 
Genesis50:17 Muziti cotero kwa Yosefe, Mukhululukiretu tsopano kulakwa kwa abale anu, ndi kucimwa kwao, cifukwa kuti anakucitirani inu coipa; tsopano mutikhululukiretu kulakwa kwa aka polo a Mulungu wa atate wanu. Ndipo Yosefe analira pamene iwo ananena ndi iye." 
Genesis50:18 Ndiponso abale ace anamuka namgwadira pamaso pace; nati, Taonani, ife ndife akapolo anu." 
Genesis50:19 Ndipo Yosefe anati kwa iwo, Musaope; pakuti ndiri ine kodi m'malo a Mulungu?" 
Genesis50:20 Koma inu, munandipangira ine coipa; koma Mulungu anacipangira cabwino, kuti kucitike monga lero, kupulumutsa amoyo anthu ambiri," 
Genesis50:21 Ndipo tsopano musaope; Ine ndidzacereza inu, ndi ana anu ang'ono. Ndipo anawatonthoza iwo mitima yao, nanena nao mokoma mtima." 
Genesis50:22 Ndipo Yosefe anakhala m'Aigupto, iye, ndi mbumba ya atate wace; ndipo Yosefe anakhala ndi movo zaka zana limodzi ndi khumi." 
Genesis50:23 Ndipo Yosefe anaona ana a Efraimu a mbadwo wacitatu; ananso a Makiri mwana wamwamuna wa Manase anabadwa pa maondo a Yosefe. 
Genesis50:24 Yosefe ndipo anati kwa abale ace, Ndirinkufa ine, koma Mulungu adzaonekera kwa inu, adzakucotsani inu m'dziko muno kubwera kunka ku dziko limene analumbirira kwa Abrahamu ndi kwa Isake, ndi kwa Yakobo" 
Genesis50:25 Ndipo Yosefe analumbiritsa ana a Israyeli kuti, Mulungu adzaonekera kwa inu ndithu, ndipo mudzakwera nao mafupa anga kucokera kuno." 
Genesis50:26 Ndipo anafa Yosefe, anali wa zaka zana limodzi ndi khumi; ndipo anakonza thupi lace ndi mankhwala osungira, ndipo ariamuika iye m'bokosi m'Aigupto." 
Exodus1:1 NDIPO maina a ana a Israyeli, amene analowa m'Aigupto ndi Yakobo ndi awa, analowa munthu ndi banja lace:" 
Exodus1:2 Rubeni, Simeoni, Levi ndi Yuda;" 
Exodus1:3 Isakara, Zebuloni, ndi Benjamini;" 
Exodus1:4 Dani ndi Nafitali, Gadi ndi Aseri." 
Exodus1:5 Ndipo amoyo onse amene anaturuka m'cuunomwace mwa Yakobo ndiwo makumi asanu ndi awiri; kama Yosefe anali m'Aigupto. 
Exodus1:6 Ndipo anafa Yosefe, ndi abale ace onse, ndi mbadwo uwo wonse." 
Exodus1:7 Ana a Israyeli ndipo anaswana, nabalana, nacuruka, nakhala nazo mphamvu zazikuru; ndipo dziko linadzala nao." 
Exodus1:8 Pamenepo inalowa mfumu yatsopano m'ufumu wa Aigupto, imene siinadziwa Yosefe." 
Exodus1:9 Ndipo ananena ndi anthu ace, Taonani, anthu, ndiwo ana a Israyeli, acuruka, natiposa mphamvu." 
Exodus1:10 Tiyeni, tiwacenjerere angacuruke, ndi kuphatikizana ndi adani athu ikafika nkhondo, ndi kulimbana nafe, ndi kucoka m'dzikomo." 
Exodus1:11 Potero anawaikira akuru a misonkho kuti awasautse ndi akatunduno. Ndipo anammangira Farao midzi yosungiramo cuma, ndiyo Pitomu ndi Ramese." 
Exodus1:12 Koma monga momwe anawasautsiramo, momwemo anacuruka, momwemonso anafalikira. Ndipo anabvutika cifukwa ca ana a Israyeli." 
Exodus1:13 Ndipo Aaigupto anawagwiritsa ana a Israyeli nchito yosautsa; 
Exodus1:14 nawawitsa moyo wao ndi nchito yolimba, ya dothi ndi ya njerwa, ndi nchito zonse za pabwalo, nchito zao zonse zimene anawagwiritsa nzosautsa." 
Exodus1:15 Ndipo mfumu ya Aigupto inanena ndi anamwino a Ahebri, dzina lace la wina ndiye Sifra, dzina la mnzace ndiye Puwa;" 
Exodus1:16 ninati, Pamene muciza akazi a Ahebri nimuwaone pamipando; akakhala mwana wamwamuna, mumuphe; akakhala wamkazi, akhale ndi moyo." 
Exodus1:17 Koma anamwino anaopa Mulungu, ndipo sanacita monga mfumu ya Aigupto inawauza, koma analeka ana amuna akhale ndi moyo." 
Exodus1:18 Ndipo mfumu ya Aigupto inaitana anamwino, ninena nao, Mwacita ici cifukwa ninji, ndi kuleka ana amunawo akhale ndi moyo?" 
Exodus1:19 Ndipo anamwino ananena ndi Farao, Popeza akazi a Ahebri safanana ndi akazi a Aigupto; pakuti ali ndi mphamvu, naona ana asanalike anamwino." 
Exodus1:20 Potero Mulungu anawacitira zabwino anamwino; ndipo anthuwo anacuruka, nakhala nazo mphamvu zazikuru." 
Exodus1:21 Ndipo kunatero kuti, popeza anamwino anaopa Mulungu, iye anawamangitsira mabanja." 
Exodus1:22 Ndipo Farao analamulira anthu ace onse, ndi kuti, Ana amuna onse akabadwa aponyeni m'nyanja, koma ana akazi onse alekeni amovo." 
Exodus2:1 Ndipo anamuka munthu wa banja la Levi, natenga mwana wamkazi wa Levi." 
Exodus2:2 Ndipo anaima mkaziyo, naonamwanawamwamuna; m'mene anamuona kuti ali wokoma, anambisa miyezi itatu." 
Exodus2:3 Koma pamene sanathe kumbisanso, anamtengera kabokosi kagumbwa, napakapo nkhunga ndi phula; naikamo mwanayo, nakaika pakati pa mabango m'mbali mwa nyanja." 
Exodus2:4 Ndipo mlongo wace anaima patali, adziwe comwe adzamcitira." 
Exodus2:5 Ndipo mwana wamkazi wa Farao anatsikira kukasamba m'nyanja; ndipo atsikana ace anayendayenda m'mbali mwa nyanja; ndipo iye anaona kabokosi pakati pa mabango, natuma mdzakazi wace akatenge." 
Exodus2:6 Pamene anakabvundukula, anapenya mwanayo; ndipo, taonani, khandalo lirikulira. Ndipo anamva naye cifundo, nati, Uyu ndiye wa ana a Ahebri." 
Exodus2:7 Pamenepo mlongo wace ananena ndi mwana wamkazi wa Farao, Ndipite ine kodi kukuitanirani woyamwitsa wa Ahebri, akuyamwitsireni mwanayo?" 
Exodus2:8 Ndipo mwana wamkazi wa Farao ananena naye, Pita. Napita namwaliyo, nakaitana amace wa mwanayo." 
Exodus2:9 Ndipo mwana wamkazi wa Farao ananena naye, Pita naye mwana uyu, ndi kundiyamwitsira iye, ndidzakupatsa mphotho yako. Ndipo mkaziyo anatenga mwanayo, namyamwitsa," 
Exodus2:10 Ndipo atakula mwanayo, anapita naye kwa mwana wamkazi wa Farao, ndipo iye anakhala mwana wace. Ndipo anamucha dzina lace Mose, nati, Cifukwa ndinambvuula m'madzi." 
Exodus2:11 Ndipo kunali masiku amenewo, atakula Mose, kuti anaturukira kukazonda abale ace, napenya akatundu ao; ndipo anaona munthu M-aigupto ali kukantha Mhebri, wa abale ace." 
Exodus2:12 Ndipo anaunguza kwina ndi kwina, ndipo pamene anaona kuti palibe munthu, anakantha M-aigupto, namfotsera mumcenga." 
Exodus2:13 M'mawa mwace anaturukanso, ndipo, taonani, anthu awiri Ahebri alikugwirana; ndipo ananena ndi wocimwayo, kuti, Umpandiranji mnzako?" 
Exodus2:14 Koma anati, Wakuika iwe ndani ukhale mkuru ndi woweruza wathu? kuteroku ukuti undiphe, monga unamupha M-aigupto? Ndipo Mose anacita mantha, nanena, Ndithu cinthuci cadziwika." 
Exodus2:15 Pamene Farao anacimva ici, anafuna kupha Mose. Koma Mose anathawa pankhope pa Farao, nakhala m'dziko la Midyani; nakhala pansi pacitsime." 
Exodus2:16 Ndipo wansembe wa Midyani anali nao ana akazi asanu ndi awiri, amene anadza kudzatunga madzi; ndipo anadzaza mimweco kuti amwetse gulu la atate wao." 
Exodus2:17 Pamenepo anadza abusa nawapitikitsa; koma Mose anauka nawathandiza, namwetsa gulu lao." 
Exodus2:18 M'mene anafika kwa Rehueli atate wao, iye anati, Mwabwera msanga bwanji lero?" 
Exodus2:19 Ndipo anati two, Munthu M-aigupto anatilanditsa m'manja a abusa, natitungiranso madzi okwanira, namwetsa gululi." 
Exodus2:20 Ndipo anati kwa ana ace akazi, Ali kuti iye? Mwamsiyiranji munthuyo? Kamuitaneni, adzadye cakudya." 
Exodus2:21 Ndipo Mose anabvomera kukhala naye munthuyo; ndipo anampatsa Mose mwana wace wamkazi Zipora. 
Exodus2:22 Ndipo anaona mwana, ndi Mose anamucha dzina lace Gerisomu; pakuti anati, Ndakhala mlendo m'dziko la eni." 
Exodus2:23 Ndipo kunali pakupita masiku ambiri aja, idafa mfumu ya Aigupto; ndi ana a Israyeli anatsitsa moyo cifukwa ca ukapolo wao, nalira, ndi kulira kwao kunakwera kwa Mulungucifukwa ca ukapolowo." 
Exodus2:24 Ndipo Molungu anamva kubuula kwao, ndi Mulungu anakumbukila cipangano cace ndi Abrahamu, ndi Isake, ndi Yakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Ndipo Molungu anapenya Aisrayeli, ndi Mulungu anadziwa." 
Exodus3:1 Koma Mose analikuweta gulu la Yetero mpongozi wace, wansembe wa ku Midyani; natsogolera gululo m'tsogolo mwa cipululu, nafika ku phiri la Mulungu, ku Horebe." 
Exodus3:2 Ndipo mthenga wa Molungu anamuonekera m'cirangali camoto coturuka m'kati mwa citsamba; ndipo anapenya, ndipo taonani, citsamba cirikuyaka moto, koma cosanyeka citsambaco." 
Exodus3:3 Ndipo Mose anati, Ndipatuketu, ndikaone cooneka cacikuruco, citsambaco sicinyeka bwanji," 
Exodus3:4 Pamene Yehova anaona kuti adapatuka kukapenya, Mulungu ali m'kati mwa citsamba, anamuitana, nati, Mose, Mose. Ndipo anati, Ndiri pano." 
Exodus3:5 Ndipo iye anati, Usayandikire kuno; bvula nsapato zako ku mapazi ako, pakuti pamalo pamene upondapo iwe, mpopatulika." 
Exodus3:6 Ananenanso Ine ndine Mulungu wa atate wako, Molungu wa Abrahamu, Molungu wa Isake, ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo. Ndipo Mose anabisa nkhope yace; popeza anaopa kuyang'ana Mulungu," 
Exodus3:7 Ndipo Yehova anati, Ndapenyetsetsa mazunzo a anthu anga ali m'Aigupto, ndamvanso kulira kwao cifukwa ca akuwafulumiza; pakuti ndidziwa zowawitsa zao;" 
Exodus3:8 ndipo ndatsikira kuwalanditsa m'manja a anthu a Aigupto, ndi kuwatumtsa m'dziko lila akwere nalowe m'dziko labwino ndi lalikuru, m'dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uci ngati madzi; ku malo a Akanani, ndi Ahiti ndi Aamori, ndi Aperizi, ndi Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Ndipo tsopano, taona kulira kwa ana a Israyeli kwandifikira; ndapenyanso kupsinjika kumene Aaigupto awapsinja nako." 
Exodus3:10 Tiye tsopano, ndikutuma kwa Farao, kuti uturutse anthu anga, ana a Israyeli m'Aigupto." 
Exodus3:11 Koma Mose anati kwa Mulungu, Ndine yani ine kuti ndipite kwa Farao, ndi kuti nditurutse ana a Israyeli m'Aigupto?" 
Exodus3:12 Ndipo iye anati, Ine ndidzakhala ndi iwe; ndipo ici ndi cizindikilo ca iwe, cakuti ndakutuma ndine; utaturutsa anthuwo m'Aigupto mudzatumikira Mulungu paphiri pano." 
Exodus3:13 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Mulungu, Onani, pakufika ine kwa ana a Israyeli, ndi kunena nao, Mulungu wa makolo anu wandituma kwa inu; ndipo akakanena ndi ine, Dzina lace ndani? ndikanena nao ciani?" 
Exodus3:14 Ndipo Molungu anati kwa Mose, INE NDINE YEMWE NDIRI INE. Anatinso, Ukatero ndi ana a Israyeli, INE NDINE wandituma kwa inu." 
Exodus3:15 Ndipo Mulungu ananenanso kwa Mose, Ukatero ndi ana a Israyeli, Yehova, Molungu wa makolo anu, Molungu wa Abrahamu, Mulungu wa Isake, ndi Molungu wa Yakobo anandituma kwa inu; ili nw dzina langa nthawi yosatha, ici ndi cikumbukiro canga m'mibadwo mibadwo." 
Exodus3:16 Muka, nukasonkhanitse akuru a Israyeli, nunene nao, Yehova, Mulungu wa makolo anu anandionekera ine, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Isake ndi Yakobo, ndi kuti; Ndakuzondani ndithu, ndi kuona comwe akucitirani m'Aigupto;" 
Exodus3:17 ndipo ndanena, Ndidzakukwezani kukuturutsani m'mazunzo a Aigupto, kukulowezani m'dziko la Akanani, ndi Ahiti, ndi Aamori, ndi Aperizi, ndi Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi, m'dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uci ngati madzi." 
Exodus3:18 Ndipo adzamveca mau ako; ndipo ukapite iwe ndi akuru a Israyeli, kwa mfumu ya Aigupto, ndi kukanena naye, Yehova, Mulungu wa Ahebri wakomana ndi ife; tiloleni, timuke tsopano ulendo wa masiku atatu m'cipululu, kuti timphere nsembe Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Exodus3:19 Koma Ine ndidziwa kuti mfumu ya Aigupto siidzalola inu kumuka, inde lingakhale ndi dzanja lamphamvu ai." 
Exodus3:20 Ndipo ndidzatambasula dzanja langa, ndi kukantha Aigupto ndi zozizwa zanga zonse ndizicita pakati pace; ndi pambuyo pace adzakulolani kumuka." 
Exodus3:21 Ndipo ndidzapatsa anthu awa ufulu pamaso pa anthu a Aigupto; ndipo kudzakhala, pamene muturuka simudzaturuka opanda kanthu;" 
Exodus3:22 koma mkazi yense adzafunse mnzace, ndi mlendo wokhala m'nyumba mwace, ampatse zokometsera zasiliva, ndi zokometsera zagolidi, ndi zobvala; ndipo mudzabveke nazo ana anu amuna ndi akazi; ndipo mudzafunkhe za Aaigupto." 
Exodus4:1 Ndipo Mose anayankha nati, Koma taonani, sadzakhulupirira ine, kapena kumvera mau anga; pakuti adzanena, Yehova sanakuonekera iwe." 
Exodus4:2 Ndipo Yehova ananena naye, Ico nciani m'dzanja lako? Nati, Ndodo." 
Exodus4:3 Ndipo ananena iye, Iponye pansi. Naiponya pansi, ndipo inasanduka njoka; ndipo Mose anaithawa." 
Exodus4:4 Koma Yehova anati kwa Mose, Tambasula dzanja lako, nuigwire kumcira; ndipo anatambasula dzanja lace, naigwira, nikhalanso ndodo m'dzanja lace;" 
Exodus4:5 kuti akhulupirire kuti wakuonekera Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Mulungu wa Isake, ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Exodus4:6 Ndipo Yehova ananenanso naye, Longa dzanja lako pacifuwa pako. Ndipo analonga dzanja lace pacifuwa pace, naliturutsa, taonani, dzanja lace linali lakhate, lotuwa ngati cipale cofewa." 
Exodus4:7 Ndipo ananena iye, Bwerezanso dzanja lako pacifuwa pako. Ndipo anabwerezanso dzanja lace pacifuwa pace; naliturutsa pacifuwa pace, taonani, linasandukanso lomwe lakale." 
Exodus4:8 Ndipo kudzatero, ngati sakhulupirira iwe, ndi kusamvera mau a cizindikilo coyamba, adzakhulupirira mau a cizindikilo cotsirizaci." 
Exodus4:9 Ndipo kudzatero, aka panda kukhulupirira zingakhale zizindikilo izi, ndi kusamvera mau ako, ukatunge madzi a kunyanja, ndi kuthira pamtunda; ndi madzi watunga ku nyanjayo adzasanduka mwazi pamtunda." 
Exodus4:10 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Yehova, Mverani, Ambuye, ine ndine munthu wosowa ponena, kapena dzulo, kapena kale, kapena cilankhulire Inu ndi kapolo wanu, pakuti ndine wa m'kamwa molemera, ndi wa lilime lolemera." 
Exodus4:11 Koma Yehova ananena naye, Anampangira munthu m'kamwa ndani? Kapena analenga munthu wosalankhula ndani, kapena wogontha, kapena wamaso, kapena wakhungu? Si ndine Yehova kodi?" 
Exodus4:12 Ndipo tsopano muka, ndipo Ine ndidzakhala m'kamwa mwako, ndi kukuphunzitsa comwe ukalankhule." 
Exodus4:13 Koma anati, Mverani, Ambuye, tumizani pa dzanja la iye amene mudzamtuma." 
Exodus4:14 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Yehova unamyakira Mose, ndipo anati, Nanga Aroni Mlevi mbale wako sialipo kodi? Ndidziwa kuti kulankhula alankhula. Ndipo, taona, aturuka kudzakomana ndiwe; ndipo pakuona iwe adzakondweram'mtima mwace." 
Exodus4:15 Ndipo ukalankhule naye, ndi kumpangira mau; ndipo Ine ndidzakhala m'kamwa mwako, ndi m'kamwa mwace, ndipo ndidzakuphunzitsani inu cimene mukacite." 
Exodus4:16 Ndipo iye adzakulankhulira iwe kwa anthu; ndipo kudzatero, kuti iye adzakhala kwa iwe ngati m'kamwa, ndi iwe udzakhala kwa iye ngati Mulungu." 
Exodus4:17 Ndipo ukaigwire m'dzanja lako ndodo iyi, imene ukacite nayo zizindikilozo." 
Exodus4:18 Ndipo Mose anabwera namuka kwa Yetero mpongozi wace, nanena naye, Ndimuketu, ndibwerere kumka kwa abale anga amene ali m'Aigupto, ndikaone ngati akali ndi moyo. Ndipo Yetero ananena ndi Mose, Pita bwino." 
Exodus4:19 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'Midyani, Muka, bwerera kumka ku Aigupto; pakuti adafa anthu onse amene anafuna moyo wako." 
Exodus4:20 Pamenepo Mose anatenga mkazi wace ndi ana ace amuna, nawakweza pa buru, nabwerera kumka ku dziko la Aigupto; ndipo Mose anagwira ndodo ya Mulungu m'dzanja lace." 
Exodus4:21 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, Pakumuka iwe kubwerera kumka ku Aigupto, usamalire ucite zozizwa zonse ndaziika m'dzanja lako, pamaso pa Farao; koma Ine ndidzalimbitsa mtima wace kuti asadzalole anthu kupita." 
Exodus4:22 Pamenepo ukanene ndi Farao, Atero Yehova, Mwana wanga, mwana wanga woyamba ndiye Israyeli." 
Exodus4:23 Ndipo ndanena ndi iwe, Mlole mwana wanga amuke, kuti anditumikire Ine; koma wakana kumlola kuti asamuke; taona, Ine ndidzamupha mwana wako wamwamuna, mwana wako woyamba." 
Exodus4:24 Ndipo kunali panjira, kucigono, Yehova anakomana naye, nafuna kumupha." 
Exodus4:25 Koma Zipora anatenga mpeni wamwala, nadula khungu la mwana wace, naliponya pa mapazi ace; nati, Pakuti iwe ndiwe mkwati wanga wamwazi. Ndipo iye anamleka." 
Exodus4:26 Pamenepo anati mkaziyo, Mkwati wamwazi iwe, cifukwa ca mdulidwe." 
Exodus4:27 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Aroni, Muka kucipululu kukakomana ndi Mose. Ndipo anamuka, nakomana naye pa phiri la Mulungu, nampsompsona." 
Exodus4:28 Ndipo Mose anauza Aroni mau onse a Yehova amene adamtuma nao, ndi zizindikilo zonse zimene adamlamulira." 
Exodus4:29 Pamenepo Mose ndi Aroni anamuka nasonkhanitsa akuru onse a ana a Israyeli; 
Exodus4:30 ndipo Aroni anawafotokozera mau onse amene Yehova adauza Mose, nacita zizindikilo zija pamaso pa anthu." 
Exodus4:31 Ndipo anthuwo anakhulupirira; ndipo pamene anamva kuti Yehova adawazonda ana a Israyeli, ndi kuti adaona mazunzo ao, anawerama, nalambira Mulungu." 
Exodus5:1 Ndipo pambuyo pace Mose ndi Aroni analowa nanena ndi Farao, Atero Yehova, Mulungu wa Israyeli, Lola anthu anga apite, kundicitira madyerero m'cipululu." 
Exodus5:2 Koma Farao anati, Yehova ndani, kuti ndimvere mau ace ndi kulola Israyeli apite? Sindimdziwa Yehova, ndiponso sindidzalola Israyeli apite." 
Exodus5:3 Ndipo iwo anati, Mulungu wa Ahebri wakomana ndi ife; timuketu ulendo wa masiku atatu m'cipululu, kumphera nsembe Yehova Mulungu wathu; kuti angatikumike ndi mliri, kapena ndi lupanga," 
Exodus5:4 Ndipo mfumu ya Aigupto inanena nao, Inu, Mose ndi Aroni, cifukwa ninji mumasulira anthu nchito zao? Mukani ku akatundu anu." 
Exodus5:5 Farao anatinso, Taonani, anthu a m'dziko ndiwo ambiri tsopano; ndipo inu muwapumitsa ku akatundu ao," 
Exodus5:6 Ndipo tsiku lomwelo Farao analamulira akufulumiza anthu, ndi akapitao ao, ndi kuti," 
Exodus5:7 Musawapatsanso anthu udzu wakupanga nao njerwa monga kale; apite okha adzifunire udzu. 
Exodus5:8 Ndipo muziwawerengera njerwa, monga momwe anapanga kale; musacepsapo, popeza acita cilezi; cifukwa cace alikupfuula, ndi kuti, Timuke, timphere nsembe Mulungu wathu." 
Exodus5:9 Ilimbike nchito pa amunawo, kuti aigwiritsitse, asasamalire mau amabodza." 
Exodus5:10 Ndipo akufulumiza anthu ndi akapitao ao anaturuka, nanena ndi anthu ndi kuti, Atero Farao, Kulibe kukupatsani udzu." 
Exodus5:11 Mukani inu nokha, dzifunireni udzu komwe muupeza; pakuti palibe kanthu kadzacepa pa nchito yanu." 
Exodus5:12 Pamenepo anthuwo anabalalika m'dziko lonse la Aigupto kufuna ciputu ngati udzu. 
Exodus5:13 Ndipo akufulumiza anawakakamiza, ndi kuti, Tsirizani nchito zanu, nchito ya tsiku pa tsiku lace, monga muja munali ndi udzu." 
Exodus5:14 Ndipo anapanda akapitao a ana a Israyeli, amene ofulumiza a Farao adawaika, ndi kuti, Nanga dzulo ndi lero simunatsiriza bwanji nchito yanu yoneneka ya njerwa, monga kale?" 
Exodus5:15 Pamenepo akapitao a ana a Israyeli anafika nalirira Farao, nati, Mwatero bwanji ndi akapolo anu?" 
Exodus5:16 Udzu osawapatsa akapolo anu, ndipo amanena ndi ife, Umbani njerwa; ndipo, taonani, amapanda akapolo anu; koma kulakwa nkwa anthu anu." 
Exodus5:17 Koma iye anati, Aulesi inu, aulesi: cifukwa cace mulikunena, Timuke, timphere nsembe Yehova." 
Exodus5:18 Mukani tsopano, gwirani nchito; pakuti sadzakupatsani udzu, koma muonetse ciwerengero cace ca njerwa." 
Exodus5:19 Ndipo akapitao a ana a Israyeli anaona kuti kudawaipira, pamene ananena, Musamacepetsa njerwa zanu, nchito ya tsiku pa tsiku lace." 
Exodus5:20 Ndipo poturuka kwa Farao iwo anakomana ndi Mose ndi Aroni, alikuima popenyana nao;" 
Exodus5:21 ndipo ananena nao, Yehova akupenyeni, naweruze; pakuti mwatinyansitsa pamaso pa Farao, ndi pamaso pa anyamata ace, ndi kuwapatsa lupanga m'dzanja lao kutipha nalo." 
Exodus5:22 Pamenepo Mose anabwerera namka kwa Yehova, nati, Ambuye, mwawacitiranji coipa anthuwa? mwandituma bwanji?" 
Exodus5:23 Popeza kuyambira kuja ndinafika kwa Farao kulankhula m'dzina lanu, anawacitira coipa anthuwa; ndipo simunalanditsa anthu anu konse." 
Exodus6:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena kwa Mose, Tsopano udzaona comwe ndidzacitira Farao; pakuti ndi dzanja lamphamvu adzawalola apite, inde ndi dzanja lamphamvu adzawaingitsa m'dziko lace." 
Exodus6:2 Ndipo Mulungu ananena ndi Mose, nati kwa iye, Ine ndine YEHOV A:" 
Exodus6:3 ndipo ndinaonekera Abrahamu, Isake ndi Yakobo, Mulungu Wamphamvuyonse; koma sindinadziwika kwa iwo ndi dzina langa YEHOV A." 
Exodus6:4 Ndipo ndinakhazikitsanso nao cipangano canga, kuwapatsa dziko la Kanani, dziko la maulendo ao, anali alendo m'mwemo." 
Exodus6:5 Ndamvanso kubuula kwa ana a Israyeli, amene Aaigupto awayesa akapolo; ndipo ndakumbukila cipangano canga." 
Exodus6:6 Cifukwa cace nena kwa ana a Israyeli, Ine ndine Yehova, ndipo ndidzakuturutsani pansi pa akatundu a Aaigupto, ndipo ndidzakulanditsani ku ukapolo wanu; ndipo ndidzakuombolani ndi dzanja lotambasuka, ndi maweruzo akuru;" 
Exodus6:7 ndipo ndidzalandira inu mukhale anthu anga, ndipo ndidzakhala Ine Mulungu wanu; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu, wakuturutsa inu pansi pa akatundu a Aaigupto." 
Exodus6:8 Ndipo ndidzakulowetsani m'dziko limene ndinakweza dzanja langa kunena za ilo, kuti ndilipereke kwa Abrahamu, kwa Isake ndi kwa Yakobo; ndipo ndidzakupatsani ilo likhale lanulanu; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Exodus6:9 Ndipo Mose ananena comweco ndi ana a Israyeli; koma sanamvera Mose cifukwa ca kuwawa mtima, ndi ukapolo wolemera." 
Exodus6:10 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Exodus6:11 Lowa, lankhula ndi Farao mfumu ya Aigupto, kuti alole ana a Israyeli aturuke m'dziko lace." 
Exodus6:12 Koma Mose ananena pamaso pa Mulungu, ndi kuti, Onani, ana a Israyeli sanandimvera ine; adzandimvera bwanji Farao, ndine wa milomo yosadula?" 
Exodus6:13 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, nawalangiza za ana a Israyeli, ndi za Farao mfumu ya Aigupto, kuti aturutse ana a Israyeli m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Exodus6:14 Akuru a mbumba za makolo ao ndi awa: ana amuna a Rubeni, woyamba wa Israyeli ndiwo: Hanoki ndi Palu, Hezroni, ndi Karmi; amene ndiwo mabanja a Rubeni." 
Exodus6:15 Ndi ana amuna a Simeoni ndiwo: Yemweli, ndi Yamini, ndi Ohadi, Yakini, ndi Zohari, ndi Sauli mwana wa mkazi wa m'Kanani; amene ndiwo mabanja a Simeoni." 
Exodus6:16 Ndipo maina a ana amuna a Levi, mwa kubadwa kwao ndiwo: Gerisoni, ndi Kohati, ndi Merari; ndipo zaka za moyo wa Levi ndizo zana limodzi mphambu makumi atatu kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
Exodus6:17 Ana amuna a Gerisoni ndiwo: Libni ndi Simei, mwa mabanja ao." 
Exodus6:18 Ndi ana amuna a Kohati ndiwo: Amramu ndi Izara, ndi Hebroni, ndi Uziyeli; ndipo zaka za moyo wa Kohati ndizo zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu kudza zitatu." 
Exodus6:19 Ndipo ana amuna a Merai ndiwo: Mali ndi Musi. Amenewo ndiwo mabanja a Levi mwa kubadwa kwao. 
Exodus6:20 Ndipo Amramu anadzitengera Yokobedi mlongo wa atate wace akhale mkazi wace; ndipo anambalira Aroni ndi Mose; ndi zaka za moyo wa Amramu ndizo zaria limodzi mphambu makumi atatu kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri. 
Exodus6:21 Ndi ana amuna a lzara ndiwo: Kora: ndi Nefegi, ndi Zikiri." 
Exodus6:22 Ndi ana amuna a Uziyeli ndiwo: Misayeli, ndi Elisafana, ndi Sitiri." 
Exodus6:23 Ndipo Aroni anadzitengera Eliseba, mwana wamkazi wa Aminadabu, mlongo wace wa Nasoni, akhale mkazi wace; ndipo anambalira Nadabu ndi Abihu, Eleazara ndi ltamara." 
Exodus6:24 Ndipo ana amuna a Kora ndiwo: Asiri ndi Elikana, ndi Abiasafu; amenewo ndiwo mabanja a Akora." 
Exodus6:25 Ndipo Eleazara mwana wa Aroni anadzitengera mkazi wa ana akazi a Putieli akhale mkazi wace, ndipo anambalira Pinehasi. Amenewo ndi akuru a makolo a Alevi mwa mabanja ao." 
Exodus6:26 Omwewo ndiwo Aroni ndi Mose amene Yehova ananena nao, Turutsani ana a Israyeli m'dziko la Aigupto mwa makamu ao." 
Exodus6:27 Awa ndi omwewo ananena ndi Farao, mfumu ya Aigupto, awaturutse ana a Israyeli m'Aigupto; Mose ndi Aroni amenewa." 
Exodus6:28 Ndipo kunali, tsiku limene Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'dziko la Aigupto," 
Exodus6:29 Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti, Ine ndine Yehova: lankhula ndi Farao mfumu ya Aigupto zonsezi Ine ndizinena nawe." 
Exodus6:30 Koma Mose anati pamaso pa Yehova, Onani, ine ndiri wa milome yosadula, ndipo Farao adzandimvera bwanji?" 
Exodus7:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, Taona, ndakuika ngati Mulungu kwa Farao; ndi Aroni mkuru wako adzakhala mneneri wako." 
Exodus7:2 Iwe uzdankhula zonse ndikulamulira; ndi Aroni mkuru wako azilankhula kwa Farao, kuti alole ana a Israyeli aturuke m'dziko lace." 
Exodus7:3 Koma Ine ndidzaumitsa mtima wace wa Farao, ndipo ndidzacurukitsa zizindikilo ndi zozizwa zanga m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Exodus7:4 Koma Farao sadzamvera inu, ndipo ndidzaika dzanja langa pa Aigupto, ndipo ndidzaturutsa makamu anga, anthu anga ana a Israyeli, m'dziko la Aigupto ndi maweruzo akuru." 
Exodus7:5 Ndipo Aaigupto adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, pakutambasula Ine dzanja langa pa Aigupto, ndi kuturutsa ana a Israyeli pakati pao." 
Exodus7:6 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anacita monga Yehova anawalamulira, momwemo anacita." 
Exodus7:7 Ndipo Mose anali nazo zaka makumi asanu ndi atatu, ndi Aroni anali nazo zaka makumi asanu ndi atatu kudza zitatu, pamene ananena ndi Farao." 
Exodus7:8 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, ndi kuti," 
Exodus7:9 Pamene Farao adzalankhula nanu, ndi kuti, Dzicitireni codabwiza; pamenepo uzinena ndi Aroni, Tenga ndodo yako, Iponye pansi pamaso pa Farao, isanduke cinjoka," 
Exodus7:10 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni analowa kwa Farao, nacita monga momwe Yehova adawalamulira; ndipo Aroni anaponya pansi ndodo yace pamaso pa Farao, ndi pamaso pa anyamata ace, ndipo inasanduka cinjoka," 
Exodus7:11 Pamenepo Farao anaitananso anzeru, ndi amatsenga; ndipo alembi a Aigupto, iwonso anacita momwemo ndi matsenga ao." 
Exodus7:12 Pakuti yense anaponya pansi ndodo yace, ndipo zinasanduka zinjoka; koma ndodoya Aroni inameza ndodo zao," 
Exodus7:13 Koma mtima wa Farao unalimba, ndipo sanamvera iwo; monga adalankhula Yehova." 
Exodus7:14 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, Walemera mtima wa Farao, akana kulola anthu apite," 
Exodus7:15 Muka kwa Farao m'mawa; taona, aturuka kumka kumadzi; nuime kumlinda m'mbali mwa nyanja; ndi ndodo idasanduka njokayo uigwire m'dzanja lako." 
Exodus7:16 Ndipo ukanena naye, Yehova, Mulungu wa Ahebri anandituma kwa inu, ndi kuti, Lola anthu anga amuke kuti anditumukire m'cipululu; koma, taona, sunamvera ndi pano." 
Exodus7:17 Atero Yehova, Ndi ici udzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova: taonani, ndidzapanda madzi ali m'nyanja ndi ndodo iri m'dzanja langa, ndipo adzasanduka mwazi." 
Exodus7:18 Ndi nsomba ziri m'nyanja zidzafa, ndi nyanja idzanunkha; ndi Aaigupto adzacita mtima useru ndi kumwa madzi a m'nyanjamo." 
Exodus7:19 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Nena ndi Aroni, Tenga ndodo yako, nutambasule dzanja lako pa madzi a m'Aigupto, pa nyanja yao, pa ngalande zao, ndi pa matamanda ao, ndi pa matawale ao onse amadzi, kuti asanduke mwazi; mukhale mwazi m'dziko lonse la Aigupto, m'zotengera zamtengo, ndi zamwala." 
Exodus7:20 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anacita monga momwe Yehova adawalamulira; nasamula ndodo, napanda madzi ali m'nyanjamo pamaso pa Farao, ndi pamaso pa anyamata ace; ndipo madzi onse a m'nyanjamo anasanduka mwazi." 
Exodus7:21 Ndi nsomba za m'nyanjamo zinafa; ndi nyanjayo inanunkha; ndipo Aaigupto sanakhoza kumwa madzi a m'nyanjamo; ndipo munali mwazi m'dziko lonse la Aigupto. 
Exodus7:22 Ndipo alembi a Aigupto anacita momwemo ndi matsenga ao; koma mtima wa Farao unalimba, ndipo sanamvera iwo; monga adalankhula Yehova." 
Exodus7:23 Ndipo Farao anatembenuka, nalowa m'nyumba yace, osasamalira ici comwe mumtima mwace." 
Exodus7:24 Koma Aaigupto onse anakumba m'mphepete mwa nyanja kufuna madzi akumwa; pakuti sanakhoza kumwa madzi a m'nyanjamo. 
Exodus7:25 Ndipo anafikiramasiku asanu ndi awiri atapanda nyanja Yehova. 
Exodus8:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Lowa kwa Farao, nunene naye, Atero Yehova, Lola anthu anga amuke, kuti anditumikire." 
Exodus8:2 Ndipo ukakana kuwalola amuke, taona, Ine ndidzapanda dziko lako lonse ndi acule;"
