Exodus8:3 ndipo m'nyanjamo mudzacuruka acule, amene adzakwera nadzalowa m'nyumba mwako, ndi m'cipinda cogona iwe, ndi pakama pako, ndi m'nyumba ya anyamata ako, ndi pa anthu ako, m'micembo yanu yooceramo, ndi m'mbale zanu zoumbiramo." 
Exodus8:4 Ndipo acule adzakwera pa iwe, ndi pa anthu ako, ndi pa anyamata ako onse." 
Exodus8:5 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Nena ndi Aroni, Tambasula dzanja lako ndi ndodo yako, panyanja, pangalande, ndi pamatamanda, nukweretse acule pa dziko la Aigupto." 
Exodus8:6 Ndipo Aroni anatambasula dzanja lace pa madzi a m'Aigupto; ndipo anakwera acule, nakuta dziko la Aigupto." 
Exodus8:7 Ndipo alembi anacita momwemo ndi matsenga ao, nakweretsa acule pa dziko la Aigupto." 
Exodus8:8 Pamenepo Farao anaitana Mose ndi Aroni, nati, Mundipembere Yehova, kuti andicotsere ine ndi anthu anga aculewo; ndipo ndidzalola anthu amuke, kuti amphere Yehova nsembe." 
Exodus8:9 Koma Mose anati kwa Farao, Ulemu ndi wanu, wa ine ai; ndipembere inu ndi anyamata anu ndi anthu anu liti, kuti aonongeke aculewo, acokere inu ndi nyumba zanu, atsale m'nyanja mokha?" 
Exodus8:10 Ndipo anati, Mawa. Nati Mose, Kukhale monga mau anu, kuti mudziwe, kuti palibe wina wonga Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Exodus8:11 Ndipo acule adzacokera inu, ndi nyumba zanu, ndi anyamata anu, ndi anthu anu; adzatsala m'nyanja mokha." 
Exodus8:12 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anaturuka kwa Farao; ndi Mose anapfuulira kwa Yehova kunena za acule amene adawaika pa Farao. 
Exodus8:13 Ndipo Yehova anacita monga mwa mau a Mose; nafa aculewo kucokera m'zinyumba, ndi m'mabwalo, ndi m'minda." 
Exodus8:14 Ndipo anawaola miulu-miulu; ndi dziko linanunkha. 
Exodus8:15 Koma pamene Farao, anaona kuti panali kupuma, anaumitsa mtima wace, osamvera iwo; monga adalankhula Yehova." 
Exodus8:16 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Nena ndi Aroni, Samula ndodo yako, nupande pfumbi lapansi, kuti lisanduke nsabwe m'dziko lonse la Aigupto." 
Exodus8:17 Ndipo anacita comweco; pakuti Aroni anasamula dzanja lace ndi ndodo yace, napanda pfumbi lapansi, ndipo panali nsabwe pa anthu ndi pa zoweta; pfumbi lonse lapansi liinasanduka nsabwe m'dziko lonse la Aigupto." 
Exodus8:18 Alembi anateronso ndi matsenga ao kuonetsa nsabwe, koma sanakhoza; ndipo panali nsabwe pa anthu, ndi pa zoweta." 
Exodus8:19 Pamenepo alembi anati kwa Farao, Cala ca Mulungu ici; koma mtima wa Farao unalimba, osamvera iwo; monga adalankhula Yehova." 
Exodus8:20 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Uuke ulawire mamawa, nuime pamaso pa Farao; taona, aturuka kumka kumadzi; nunene naye, Atero Yehova, Lola anthu anga amuke, anditumikire." 
Exodus8:21 Pakuti ukapanda kulola anthu anga amuke, taona, ndidzatuma mizaza pa iwe, ndi pa anyamata ako, ndi pa anthu ako, ndi pa nyumba zako; ndipo nyumba za Aaigupto zidzadzala nayo mizaza, ndi nthaka yomwe imene ikhalapo." 
Exodus8:22 Ndipo tsiku ilo ndidzalemba malire dziko la Goseni, m'mene mukhala anthu anga, kuti pamenepo pasakhale mizaza; kotero kuti udziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova pakati pa dzikoli." 
Exodus8:23 Ndipo ndidzaika cosiyanitsa pakati pa anthu anga ndi anthu ako; mawa padzakhala cizindikilo ici. 
Exodus8:24 Ndipo Yehovaanacita comweco; ndipo kunafika magulu a mizaza m'nyumba ya Farao, ndi m'nyumba za anyamata ace, ndi m'dziko lonse la Aigupto; dziko linaipatu cifukwa ca mizazayo." 
Exodus8:25 Pamenepo Farao anaitana Mose ndi Aroni, nati, Mukani, mphereni nsembe Mulungu wanu m'dzikomu." 
Exodus8:26 Koma Mose anati, Sikuyenera kutero; pakuti tidzamphera Yehova Mulungu wathu conyansa ca Aaigupto; taonani, ngati tikamphera nsembeconyansaca Aaigupto pamaso pao sadzatiponya miyala kodi?" 
Exodus8:27 Timuke ulendo wa masiku atatu m'cipululu, tikamphere Yehova Mulungu wathu nsembe, monga adzanena nafe." 
Exodus8:28 Ndipo Farao anati, Ndidzakulolani mumuke, kuti mukamphere nsembe Yehova. Mulungu wanu m'cipululu; komatu musamuke kutaritu: mundipembere." 
Exodus8:29 Ndipo Mose anati, Onani, ndirikuturuka ine kwanu, ndidzapemba Yehova kuti mizaza icoke mawa kwa Farao, ndi kwa anyamata ace, ndi kwa anthu ace; komatu, Farao asanyengenso ndi kukana kulola anthuwa amuke kukamphera nsembe Yehova." 
Exodus8:30 Ndipo Mose anaturuka kwa Farao, napemba Yehova." 
Exodus8:31 Ndipo Yehova anacita monga mwa mau a Mose; nacotsera Farao ndi anyamata ace ndi anthu ace mizazayo, sunatsala ndi umodzi wonse." 
Exodus8:32 Koma Farao anaumitsa mtima wace nthawi yomweyonso, ndipo sanalola anthu amuke." 
Exodus9:1 Pamenepo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Lowa kwa Farao, numuuze, Atero Yehova Mulungu wa Ahebri, Lola anthu anga amuke, kuti anditumikire." 
Exodus9:2 Pakuti ukakana kuwalola amuke, ndi kuwagwira cigwiritsire," 
Exodus9:3 taona, dzanja la Yehova lidzakhala pa zoweta zako za kubusa, pa akavalo, pa aburu, pa ngamila, pa ng'ombe, ndi pa zoweta zazing'ono ndi kalira woopsa." 
Exodus9:4 Ndipo Yehova adzasiyanitsa pakati pa zoweta za Israyeli ndi zoweta za Aigupto; kuti kasafe kanthu kali konse ka ana a Israyeli," 
Exodus9:5 Ndipo Yehova anaika nthawi yakuti, nati, Mawa Yehova adzacita cinthu ice m'dzikomu." 
Exodus9:6 Ndipo m'mawa mwace Yehova anacita cinthuco, ndipo zinafa zoweta zonse za m'Aigupto; koma sicinafa cimodzi conse ca zoweta za ana a Israyeli." 
Exodus9:7 Ndipo Farao anatuma, taonani, sicidafa cingakhale cimodzi comwe ca zoweta za Aisrayeli. Koma mtima wa Farao unauma, ndipo sanalola anthu amuke." 
Exodus9:8 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, Tengani phulusa la ng'anjo lodzala manja; ndi Mose aliwaze kuthambo pamaso pa Farao." 
Exodus9:9 Ndipo lidzakhala pfumbi losalala pa dziko lonse la Aigupto, ndipo lidzakhala pa anthu ndi pa zoweta ngati zironda zobuka ndi matuza, m'dziko lonse la Aigupto." 
Exodus9:10 Ndipo anatenga phulusa la m'ng'anjo, naima pamaso pa Farao; ndi Mose analiwaza kuthambo; ndipo linakhala zironda zobuka ndi matuza pa anthu ndi pa zoweta." 
Exodus9:11 Ndipo alembi sanakhoza kuima pamaso pa Mose cifukwa ca zirondaw; popeza panali zironda pa alembi ndi pa Aaigupto onse. 
Exodus9:12 Koma Yehova analimbitsa mtima wa Farao, kuti sanamvera iwo; moga Yehova adalankhula ndi Mose." 
Exodus9:13 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Uka oulawire mamawa, nuime pamaso pa Farao, nunene naye, Atero Yehova, Mulungu wa Ahebri, Lola anthu anga amuke, akanditumikire." 
Exodus9:14 Pakuti nthawi yino ndidzatuma miliri yanga yonse pamtima pako, ndi pa anayamata ako, ndi pa anthu ako; kuti udziwe kuti palibe wina wonga Ine pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Exodus9:15 Pakuti ndatambasula dzanja langa tsopano, kuti ndikupande iwe ndi anthu ako ndi mliri, ndi kuti uonoogeke pa dziko lapansi." 
Exodus9:16 Koma ndithu cifukwa cace ndakuimika kuti ndikuonetse mphamvu yanga, ndi kuti alalikire dzina langa pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Exodus9:17 Kodi udzikwezanso pa anthu anga, ndi kusawalola amuke?" 
Exodus9:18 Taona, mawa monga nthawi yino ndidzabvumbitsa mbvumbi wa matalala, sipadakhala unzace m'Aigupto kuyambira tsiku lija lidakhazikika kufikira lero lino." 
Exodus9:19 Ndipo tsopano, tumiza, thawitsa zoweta zako ndi zonse uli nazo pabwalo; pakuti anthu onse ndi zoweta zonse zopezeka pabwalo, zosasonkhanidwa m'nyumba, matalala adzazigwera, ndipo zidzafa." 
Exodus9:20 Iyeyu wa anyamata a Farao wakuopa mau a Yehova anathawitsira m'zinyumba anyamata ace ndi zoweta zace; 
Exodus9:21 koma iyeyu wosasamalira mau a Yehova anasiya anyamata ndi zoweta zace kubusa. 
Exodus9:22 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Tambasula dzanja lako kuthambo, kuti pakhale matalala pa dziko lonse la Aigupto, pa anthu ndi pa zoweta, ndi pa zitsamba zonse za kuthengo, m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Exodus9:23 Pamenepo Mose anasamulira ndodo yace kuthambo, ndipo Yehova anatumiza bingu ndi matalala, ndi moto unatsikira pansi; ndipo Yehova anabvumbitsa matalala pa dziko la Aigupto." 
Exodus9:24 Potero panali matalala, ndi mota wakutsikatsika pakati pa matalala, coopsa ndithu; panalibe cotere m'dziko lonse la Aigupto ciyambire mtundu wao." 
Exodus9:25 Ndipo matalala anapanda m'dziko lonse la Aigupto zonse za pabwalo, kuyambira anthu kufikira zoweta; ndipo matalala anapanda zitsamba zonse za kuthengo, nathyola mitengo yonse ya kuthengo." 
Exodus9:26 M'dziko la Goseni mokha, mokhala ana a Israyeli, munalibe matalala." 
Exodus9:27 Ndipo Farao anatumiza, naitana Mose ndi Aroni, nanena nao, Ndacimwa tsopano; Yehova ndiye wolungama, ine ndi anthu anga ndife oipa," 
Exodus9:28 Pembani kwa Yehova; cifukwa akwanira ndithu mabingu a Mulungu ndi matalala; ndipo ndidzakulolani mumuke, osakhalanso." 
Exodus9:29 Ndipo Mose ananena naye, Poturuka m'mudzi ine, ndidzasasatulira manja anga kwa Yehova; mabingu adzaleka, ndi matalala sadzakhalaponso; kuti mudziwe kuti dziko lapansi nla Yehova." 
Exodus9:30 Koma inu ndi anyamata anu ndidziwa kuti simudzayamba kuopa nkhope ya Yehova Mulungu. 
Exodus9:31 Ndipo thonje ndi barele zinayoyoka; pakuti barele lidafura, ndi thonje lidayamba maluwa." 
Exodus9:32 Koma tirigu ndi rai sizinayoyoka popeza amabzala m'mbuyo. 
Exodus9:33 Ndipo Mose anaturuka kwa Farao m'mudzi nasasatulira manja ace kwa Yehova; ndipo mabingu ndi matalala analeka, ndi mvula siinabvumbanso padziko." 
Exodus9:34 Pamene Farao anaona kuti mvula ndi matalala ndi mabingu zidaleka anaonjezanso kucimwa, naumitsa mtima wace, iye ndi anyamata ace." 
Exodus9:35 Potero mtima wa Farao unalimba, ndipo sanalola ana a Israyeli amuke; monga Yehova adalankhula mwa Mose." 
Exodus10:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Lowa kwa Farao; pakuti ndaumitsa mtima wace, ndi mtima wa anyamata ace, kuti ndiike zizindikilo zanga izi pakati pao;" 
Exodus10:2 ndi kuti ufotokozere, m'makutu a ana ako, ndi a zidzukulu zako, comwe ndidzacita m'Aigupto, ndi zizindikilo zanga zimene ndinaziika pakati pao; kuti mudziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Exodus10:3 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni analowa kwa Farao nanena naye, Atero Yehova, Mulungu wa Ahebri, Ukana kudzicepetsa pamaso panga kufikira liti? Lola anthu anga amuke, akanditumikire;" 
Exodus10:4 pakuti ukakana kulola anthu anga amuke, taona, mawa ndidzafikitsa dzombe m'dziko lako;" 
Exodus10:5 ndipo lidzakuta nkhope ya dziko, kotero, kuti palibe munthu adzakhoza kuona dziko; ndipo lidzadya zotsalira zidapulumuka, zidatsalira inu pamatalala, ndipo lidzadya mtengo uti wonse wokuphukirani kuthengo;" 
Exodus10:6 ndipo lidzadzaza m'nyumba zako, ndi m'nyumba za anyamata ako onse, ndi m'nyumba za Aaigupto onse; sanaciona cotere atate ako kapena makolo ako, kuyambira tsiku lija lakukhala iwo pa dziko lapansi kufikira lero lino. Ndipo anatembenuka, naturuka kwa Farao." 
Exodus10:7 Ndipo anyamata ace a Farao ananena naye, Ameneyo amaticitira msampha kufikira liti? Lolani anthuwo amuke, akatumikire Yehova Mulungu wao. Kodi simunayambe kudziwa kuti Aigupto laonongeka?" 
Exodus10:8 Ndipo anawabwereretsa Mose ndi Aroni kwa Farao, nanena nao, Mukani, katumikireni Yehova Mulungu wanu. Koma amene adzapitawo ndiwo ani?" 
Exodus10:9 Ndipo Mose anati, Tidzamuka ndi ana athu ndi akuru athu, ndi ana athu amuna ndi akazi; tidzamuka nazo nkhosa zathu ndi ng'ombe zathu; pakuti tiri nao madyerero a Yehova." 
Exodus10:10 Ndipo ananena nao, Momwemo, Yehova akhale nanu ngati ndilola inu ndi ana ang'ono anu mumuke; cenjerani, pakuti pali coipa pamaso panu," 
Exodus10:11 Cotero ai, mukani tsopano, inu amuna akuru, tumikirani Yehova pakuti ici mucifuna. Ndipo anawapitikitsa pamaso pa Farao." 
Exodus10:12 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Tambasulira dzanja lako pa dziko la Aigupto, lidze dzombe, kuti likwere pa dziko la Aigupto, lidye zitsamba zonse za m'dziko, ndizo zonse adazisiya matalala." 
Exodus10:13 Pamenepo Mose analoza ndodo yace pa dziko la Aigupto; ndipo Yehova anaombetsa padziko mphepo ya kum'mawa usana wonse, ndi usiku womwe; ndipo kutaca mphepo ya kum'mawa inadza nalo dzombe." 
Exodus10:14 Ndipo dzombe linakwera pa dziko lonse la Aigupto, ndipo linatera pakati pa malire onse a Aigupto, lambirimbiri; lisanafike ili panalibe dzombe lotere longa ili, ndipo litapita ili sipadzakhalanso lotere." 
Exodus10:15 Pakuti linakuta nkhope ya dziko lonse kuti dziko linada; ndipo linadya zitsamba zonse za m'dziko, ndi zipatso zonse za mitengo zimene matalala adazisiya; ndipo sipanatsala cabiriwiri ciri conse, pamitengo kapena pa zitsamba za kuthengo, m'dziko lonse la Aigupto." 
Exodus10:16 Pamenepo Farao anafulumira kuitana Mose ndi Aroni; nati, Ndalakwira Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi inu." 
Exodus10:17 Ndipo tsopano, ndikhululukirenitu kulakwa kwanga nthawi yino yokha, nimundipembere kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu, kuti andicotsere imfa yino yokha." 
Exodus10:18 Ndipo anaturuka kwa Farao, napemba Yehova." 
Exodus10:19 Ndipo Yehova anabweza mphepo yolimbatu ya kumadzulo, imene inapita nalo dzombe niliponya m'Nyanja Yofiira: silinatsala dzombe limodzi pakati pa malire onse a Aigupto." 
Exodus10:20 Koma Yehova analimbitsa mtima wa Farao, ndipo sanalola ana a Israyeli amuke." 
Exodus10:21 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Tambasulira dzanja lako kuthambo, ndipo padzakhala mdima pa dziko la Aigupto, ndiwo mdima wokhudzika." 
Exodus10:22 Ndipo Mose anatambasulira dzanja lace kuthambo; ndipo munali mdima bii m'dziko lonse la Aigupto masiku atatu; 
Exodus10:23 sanaonana, sanaukanso munthu pamalo pace, masiku atatu; koma kwa ana onse a Israyeli kudayera m'nyumba zao." 
Exodus10:24 Ndipo Farao anaitana Mose, nati, Mukani, tumikirani Yehova; nkhosa zanu ndi ng'ombe zanu zokha zitsale; mumuke nao ana anu ang'ononso." 
Exodus10:25 Koma Mose anati, Mutipatsenso m'dzanja mwathu nsembe zophera ndi nsembe zopsereza, kuti timkonzere Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Exodus10:26 Zoweta zathu zomwe tidzapita nazo; cosatsala ciboda cimodzi; pakuti mwa izo tiyenera kutenga zakutumikira nazo Yehova Mulungu wathu; ndipo tisanafikeko, sitidziwa umo tidzamtumikira Yehova." 
Exodus10:27 Koma Yehova analimbitsa mtima wace wa Farao, ndipo anakana kuwaleka amuke." 
Exodus10:28 Ndipo Farao ananena naye, Coka pano, uzicenjera usaonenso nkhope yanga; pakuti tsiku limene uonanso nkhope yanga udzafa." 
Exodus10:29 Ndipo Mose anati, Mwanena bwino; sindidzaonanso nkhope yanu." 
Exodus11:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, Watsala moo umodzi ndidzamtengera Farao, ndi Aigupto; pambuyo pace adzakulolani mucoke kuno; pamene akulolani kupita, zoonadi adzakuingitsani kuno konse." 
Exodus11:2 Lankhula tsopano m'makutu a anthu, kuti mwamuna yense apemphe kwa mnzace, ndi mkazi yense kwa mnzace, zokometsera zasiliva ndi zagolidi." 
Exodus11:3 Ndipo Yehova anawapatsa anthu cisomo pamaso pa Aaigupto. Munthuyo Mose ndiyenso wamkuru ndithu m'dziko la Aigupto, pamaso pa anyamata a Farao, ndi pamaso pa anthu." 
Exodus11:4 Ndipo Mose anati, Atero Yehova, Monga pakati pa usiku ndidzaturuka loe kumka pakati pa Aigupto;" 
Exodus11:5 ndipo ana onse oyamba a m'dziko la Aigupto adzafa, kuyambira mwana woyamba wa Farao wokhala pa mpando wacifumu wace, kufikira mwana woyamba wa mdzakazi wokhala pa miyala yopera; ndi ana onse oyamba a zoweta." 
Exodus11:6 Ndipo kudzakhala kulira kwakukuru m'dziko lonse la Aigupto, kunalibe kunzace kotere, sikudzakhalanso kunzace kotere." 
Exodus11:7 Koma palibe garu adzafunyitsira lilime lace ana onse a Israyeli ngakhale anthu kapena zoweta; kuti mudziwe kuti Yehova asiyanitsa pakati pa Aaigupto ndi Aisrayeli. 
Exodus11:8 Ndipo anyamata ako onse awa adzanditsikira, nadzandigwadira, ndi kuti, Turukani inu, ndi anthu onse akukutsatani; ndipo pambuyo pace ndidzaturuka. Ndipo anaturuka kwa Farao wakupsa mtima." 
Exodus11:9 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Farao sadzamvera inu; kuti zozizwa zanga zicuruke m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Exodus11:10 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anacita zozizwa izi zonse pamaso pa Farao; koma Yehova analimbitsa mtima wace wa Farao, ndipo sanalola ana a Israyeli aturuke m'dziko lace." 
Exodus12:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni m'dziko la Aigupto, ndi kuti," 
Exodus12:2 Mwezi uno uzikhala kwa inu woyamba wa miyezi; muziuyesa mwezi woyamba wa caka. 
Exodus12:3 Mulankhule ndi msonkhano wonse wa Israyeli ndi kuti, Tsiku lakhumi la mwezi uno adzitengere munthu yense mwana wa nkhosa, monga mwa mabanja a atate ao, mwana wa nkhosa pabanja." 
Exodus12:4 Banja likaperewera mwana wa nkhosa, munthu ndi mnzace ali pafupi pa nyumba yace atenge monga mwa kufikira kwa anthu ao; muziwerengera mwana wa nkhosa monga mwa kudya kwao." 
Exodus12:5 Mwana wa nkhosa wanu azikhala wangwiro, wamwamuna, wa caka cimodzi; muzimtenga ku nkhosa kapena ku mbuzi." 
Exodus12:6 Ndipo mukhale naye cisungire kufikira tsiku lakhumi ndi cinai la mwezi womwe; ndipo bungwe lonse la anthu a Israyeli lizimupha madzulo. 
Exodus12:7 Ndipo azitengako mwazi, naupake pa mphuthu za mbali ndi ya pamwamba m'nyumba zimene adyeramo." 
Exodus12:8 Ndipo azidya nyamayo usiku womwewo, yooca pamoto, ndi mkate wopanda cotupitsa; aidye ndi ndiwo zowawa," 
Exodus12:9 Musaidya yaiwisi, kapena yophika ndi madzi konse ai, koma yooca pamoto; muti wace ndi miyendo yace ndi matumbo ace." 
Exodus12:10 Ndipo musasiyako kufikira m'mawa; koma yotsalira kufikira m'mawayo muipsereze ndi moto: 
Exodus12:11 Ndipo muziidya cotero: okwinda m'cuuno, nsapato zanu pa mapazi anu ndodo yanu m'dzanja lanu, ndipo muziidya msanga; ndiye Paskha wa Yehova." 
Exodus12:12 Pakuti ndidzapita pakati pa dziko la Aigupto usiku womwewo, ndi kukantha ana oyamba onse m'dziko la Aigupto, anthu ndi zoweta; ndipo ndidzacita maweruzo pa milungu yonse ya Aigupto; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Exodus12:13 Ndipo mwaziwo udzakhala cizindikilo kwa inu pa nyumba zimene mukhalamo; pamene ndiona mwaziwo ndidzapitirira inu, ndipo sipadzakhala mliri wakukuonongani, pakukantha Ine dziko la Aigupto," 
Exodus12:14 Ndipo tsiku lino lidzakhala kwa inu cikumbutso, muzilisunga la madyerero a Yehova; ku mibadwo yanu muzilisunga la madyerero, likhale lemba losatha." 
Exodus12:15 Masiku asanu ndi awiri muzidya mkate wopanda cotupitsa; lingakhale tsiku loyamba muzicotsa cotupitsa m'nyumba zanu; pakuti ali yense wakudya mkate wa cotupitsa kuyambira tsiku loyamba kufikira tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri, munthu amene adzasadzidwa kwa Israyeli." 
Exodus12:16 Ndipo tsiku loyamba kukhale kusonkhana kopatulika, ndi tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri kukhalenso kusonkhana kopatulika; pasacitike nchito masikuwo, zokhazi zakudya anthu onse ndizo muzicita." 
Exodus12:17 Ndipo muzisunga madyerero a mkate wopanda cotupitsa; pakuti tsiku lomwe lino ndinaturutsa makamu anu m'dziko la Aigupto; cifukwa cace muzisunga tsiku lino m'mibadwo yanu, lemba losatha." 
Exodus12:18 Mwezi woyamba, tsiku lace lakhumi ndi cinai madzulo ace, muzidya mkate wopanda cotupitsa, kufikira tsiku la makumi awiri mphambu limodzi la mwezi, madzulo ace." 
Exodus12:19 Cisapezeke cotupitsa m'nyumba zanu masiku asanu ndi awiri; pakuti ali yense wakudya kanthu ka cotupitsa, munthuyo adzasadzidwa ku msonkhano wa Israyeli, angakhale ndiye mlendo kapena wobadwa m'dziko." 
Exodus12:20 Musadye kanthu ka cotupitsa; mokhala inu monse muzidya mkate wopandacotupitsa. 
Exodus12:21 Pamenepo Mose anaitana akuru onse a Israyeli, nanena nao, Pitani, dzitengereni ana a nkhosa monga mwa mabanja anu, nimuphere Paskha." 
Exodus12:22 Ndipo muzitenga mpukutu wa hisope, ndi kuubviika m'mwazi uli m'mbale, ndi kupaka mwazi uli m'mbalemo pa mphuthu ya pamwamba ndi pambali; koma inu, asaturuke munthu pakhomo pa nyumba yace kufikira m'mawa." 
Exodus12:23 Pakuti Yehova adzapita pakatipo kukantha Aaigupto; koma pamene adzaona mwaziwo pa mphuthu pamwamba ndi za pambali, Yehova adzapitirira pakhomopo, osalola woonongaalowe m'nyumba zanu kukukanthani." 
Exodus12:24 Ndipo muzisunga cinthu ici cikhale lemba la kwa inu, ndi kwa ana anu ku nthawi zonse." 
Exodus12:25 Ndipo kudzakhala, pamene mulowa m'dziko limene Yehova adzakupatsani, mensa analankhula, muzisunga kutumikira kumeneku." 
Exodus12:26 Ndipo kudzakhala, pamene ana anu adzanena ndi inu, Kutumikiraku muli nako nkutani?" 
Exodus12:27 mudzati, Ndiko nsembe ya Paskha wa Yehova, amene anapitirira nyumba za ana a Israyeli m'Aigupto, pamene anakantha Aaigupto, napulumutsa nyumba zathu." 
Exodus12:28 Ndipo anthu anawerama, nalambira. Ndipo ana a Israyeli anamuka nacita monga Yehova adalamulira Mose ndi Aroni; anacita momwemo." 
Exodus12:29 Ndipo panakhala pakati pa usiku, Yehova anakantha ana oyamba onse a m'dziko la Aigupto, kuyambira mwana woyamba wa Earao wakukhala pa mpando wacifumu wace kufikira mwana woyamba wa wam'nsinga ali m'kaidi; adi ana oyamba onse a zoweta." 
Exodus12:30 Ndipo Farao anauka usiku, iyendi anyamata ace onse, ndi Aaigupto onse; ndipo kunali kulira kwakukulu m'Aigupto; pakuti panalibe nyumba yopanda wakufa m'mwemo." 
Exodus12:31 Ndipo anaitana Mose ndi Aroni usiku, nati, Ukani, turukani pakati pa anthu anga, inu ndi ana a Israyeli; ndipo mukani katumikireni Yehova, monga mwanena." 
Exodus12:32 Muka nazoni zoweta zanu zazing'ono ndi zazikuru, monga mwanena; cokani, ndi kundidalitsa Inenso." 
Exodus12:33 Ndipo Aaigupto anaumiriza anthuwo, nafulumira kuwaturutsa m'dziko; pakuti anati, Tiri akufa tonse." 
Exodus12:34 Ndipo anthu anatenga mtanda wao usanatupe, ndi zoumbiramo zao zomangidwa m'zobvala zao pa mapewa ao." 
Exodus12:35 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anacita monga mwa mau a Mose; napempha Aaigupto zokometsera zasiliva, ndi zagolidi, ndi zobvala." 
Exodus12:36 Ndipo Yehova anapatsa anthu cisomo pamaso pa Aaigupto, ndipo sanawakaniza. Ndipo anawafunkhira Aaigupto." 
Exodus12:37 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anayenda ulendo wakucokera ku Ramese kufikira ku Sukoti, zikwi mazana asanu ndi limodzi oyenda okha, ndiwo amuna, osawerenga ana." 
Exodus12:38 Ndipo anthu ambiri osokonezeka anakwera nao; ndi nkhosa ndi ng'ombe, zoweta zambirimbiri." 
Exodus12:39 Ndipo anaoca timitanda topanda cotupitsa ta mtanda umene anabwera nao ku Aigupto, popeza sadaikamo cotupitsa; pakuti adawapitikitsa ku Aigupto, ndipo sanathe kucedwa, kapena kudzikonzeratu kamba." 
Exodus12:40 Ndipo kukhala kwa ana a Israyeli anakhala m'Aigupto ndiko zaka mazana anai kudza makumi atatu. 
Exodus12:41 Ndipo kunakhala pakutha zaka mazana anai kudza makumi atatu, inde panakhala tsiku lomwelo, makamu onse a Yehova anaturuka m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Exodus12:42 Ndiwo usiku wosungira Yehova ndithu, cifukwa ca kuwaturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto; usiku womwe uno ukhale wosungira Yehova ana onse a Israyeli ku mibadwo yao." 
Exodus12:43 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose ndi Aroni, Lemba la Paskha ndi ili: mwana wa mlendo ali yense asadyeko;" 
Exodus12:44 koma kapolo wa mwini ali yense, wogula ndi ndarama, utamdula, ndipo adyeko." 
Exodus12:45 Mlendo kapena wolembedwa nchito asadyeko. 
Exodus12:46 Audye m'nyumba imodzi; usaturukira nayo kubwalo nyama yina; ndipo musathyole pfupa lace. 
Exodus12:47 Msonkhano wonse wa Israyeli uzicita ici. 
Exodus12:48 Koma akakhala nanu mlendo, nakonzera Yehova Paskha, adulidwe amuna ace onse, ndipo pamenepo asendere kuucita; nakhale ngati wobadwa m'dziko; koma wosadulidwa ali yense asadyeko." 
Exodus12:49 Pakhale lamulo lomweli pa wobadwa m'dziko, ndi pa mlendo wakukhala pakati pa inu." 
Exodus12:50 Ndipo ana onse a Israyeli anacita monga Yehova adawalamulira Mose ndi Aroni, momwemo anacita." 
Exodus12:51 Ndipo kunakhala tsiku lomwelo, kuti Yehova anaturutsa ana a Israyeli m'dziko la Aigupto, monga mwa makamu ao." 
Exodus13:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi kuti," 
Exodus13:2 Ndipatulire Ine yense woyamba kubadwa, wotsegulira pa amace mwa ana a Israyeli, mwa anthu ndi mwa zoweta; ndiwo anga." 
Exodus13:3 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi anthu, Kumbukirani tsiku linu limene munaturuka m'Aigupto, m'nyumba ya akapolo; pakuti Yehova anakuturutsani muno ndi dzanja lamphamvu; ndipo asadye kanthu ka cotupitsa." 
Exodus13:4 Muturuka lero lino mwezi wa Abibu. 
Exodus13:5 Ndipo kudzakhala atakulowetsa Yehova m'dziko la Akanani, ndi la Ahiti, ndi la Aamori ndi la Ahivi, ndi la Ayebusi, limene analumbira ndi makolo ako kukupatsa, m'dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uci ngati madzi, uzikasunga kutumikira kumeneku mwezi uno." 
Exodus13:6 Masiku asanu ndi awiri uzikadya mkate wopanda cotupitsa, ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri likhale la madyerero a Yehova." 
Exodus13:7 Azikadya mkate wopanda cotupitsa masiku asanu ndi awiriwo ndipo kasaoneke kanthu ka cotupitsa kwanu; inde cotupitsa cisaoneke kwanu m'malire ako onse. 
Exodus13:8 Ndipo ukauze mwana wako wamwamuna tsikulo, ndi kuti, Nditero cifukwa comwe Yehova anandicitira ine poturuka ine m'Aigupto," 
Exodus13:9 Ndipo cizikhala ndi iwe ngati cizindikilo pa dzanja lako, ndi cikumbutso pakati pa maso ako; kuti cilamulo ca Yehova cikhale m'kamwa mwako; pakuti Yehova anakuturutsa m'Aigupto ndi dzanja lamphamvu." 
Exodus13:10 Cifukwa cace uzikasunga lemba ili pa nyengo yace caka ndi caka. 
Exodus13:11 Ndipo kudzakhala, atakulowetsa Yehova m'dziko la Akanani, monga anakulumbirira iwe ndi makolo ako, ndipo anakupatsa ilo," 
Exodus13:12 kuti uzikapatulira Yehova onse oyamba kubadwa ndi oyamba onse uli nao odzera kwa zoweta; amunawo ndi a Yehova. 
Exodus13:13 Koma woyamba yense wa buru uzimuombola ndi mwana wa nkhosa; ndipo ukapanda kumuombola uzimthyola khosi; koma oyamba onse a munthu mwa ana ako uziwaombola. 
Exodus13:14 Ndipo kudzakhala, akakufunsa mwana wako masiku akudzawo ndi kuti, Ici nciani? ukanene naye, Yehova anatiturutsa m'Aigupto, m'nyumba ya aka polo, ndi dzanja lamphamvu;" 
Exodus13:15 ndipo kunakhala, pamene Farao anadziumitsa kuti tisamuke, Yehova anawapha onse oyamba kubadwa m'dziko la Aigupto, kuyambira oyamba a anthu, kufikira oyamba a zoweta; cifukwa cace ndimphera nsembe Yehova zazimuna zoyamba kubadwa zonse; koma oyamba onse a ana anga ndiwaombola." 
Exodus13:16 Ndipo cizikhala ngati cizindikilo pa dzanja lako, ndi capamphumi pakati pa maso ako; pakuti Yehova anatiturutsa m'Aigupto ndi dzanja lamphamvu." 
Exodus13:17 Ndipo kunakhala pamene Farao adalola anthu amuke, Mulungu sanawatsogolera njira ya dziko la Afilisti, ndiyo yaifupi; pakuti Mulungu anati. Angadodome anthuwo pakuona nkhondo ndi kubwerera m'mbuyo kumka ku Aigupto." 
Exodus13:18 Koma Mulungu anawazungulitsa anthuwo, ku njira ya kucipululu ya Nyanja Yofiira; ndipo ana a Israyeli anakwera kucokera m'dziko la Aigupto okonzeka." 
Exodus13:19 Ndipo Mose anamuka nao mafupa a Yosefe; pakuti adawalumbiritsatu ana a Israyeli ndi kuti, Mulungu adzakuzondani ndithu ndipo mukakwere nao mafupa anga osawwya kuno." 
Exodus13:20 Ndipo anacokera ku Sukoti, nagona ku Etamu, pa malekezero a cipululu." 
Exodus13:21 Ndipo Yehova anawatsogolera usana ndi mtambo njo kuwatsogolera m'njira; ndi usiku ndi moto njo, wakuwawalitsira; kuti ayende usana ndi usiku;" 
Exodus13:22 sanacotsa mtambo usana, kapena mtambo wamoto usiku, pamaso pa anthu." 
Exodus14:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Exodus14:2 Lankhula ndi anthu a Israyeli kuti abwerere m'mbuyo nagone patsogolo pa Pihahiroti, pakati pa Migidoli ndi nyanja yamcere, patsogolo pa Baala-Zefoni; pandunji pace mugone panyanja." 
Exodus14:3 Ndipo Farao adzanena za ana a Israyeli, Azimidwa dziko, cipululu cawatsekera." 
Exodus14:4 Ndipo ndidzalimbitsa mtima wace wa Farao kuti awalondole; ndipo ndidzalemekezedwa pa Farao ndi pa nkhondo yace yonse; pamenepo Aaigupto adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, Ndipo anacita comweco." 
Exodus14:5 Ndipo anauza mfumu ya Aigupto kuti anthu adathawa; ndi mtima wa Farao ndi wa anyamata ace inasandulikira anthuwo, ndipo anati, Ici nciani tacita, kuti talola Israyeli amuke osatigwiriranso nchito?" 
Exodus14:6 Ndipo anamanga gareta lace, napita nao anthu ace;" 
Exodus14:7 napita nao magareta osankhika mazana asanu ndi limodzi, ndi magareta onse a m'Aigupto, ndi akapitao ao onse." 
Exodus14:8 Ndipo Yehova analimbitsa mtima wa Farao, mfumu ya Aigupto, ndipo iye analondola ana a Israyeli; koma ana a Israyeli adaturuka ndi dzanja lokwezeka." 
Exodus14:9 Ndipo Aaigupto anawalondola, ndiwo akavalo ndi magareta onse a Farao, ndi apakavalo ace, ndi nkhondo yace, nawapeza ali kucigono kunyanja, pa Pihahiroti, patsogolo pa Baala-Zefoni." 
Exodus14:10 Ndipo pamene Farao anayandikira ana a Israyeli anatukula maso ao, taonani, Aaigupto alinkutsata pambuyo pao; ndipo anaopa kwambiri; ndi ana a Israyeli anapfuulira kwa Yehova." 
Exodus14:11 Ndipo anati kwa Mose, Kodi mwaticotsera kuti tikafe m'cipululu cifukwa panahbe manda m'Aigupto? Nciani ici mwaticitira kuti mwatiturutsa m'Aigupto?" 
Exodus14:12 Si awa maowo tinalankhula nanu m'Aigupto ndi kuti, Tliekeni, kuti tigwirire nchito Aaigupto? pakuti kutumikira Aaigupto kutikomera si kufa m'cipululu ai." 
Exodus14:13 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi anthu, Musaope, cirimikani, ndipo penyani cipulumutso ca Yehova, cimene adzakucitirani lero; pakuti Aaigupto mwawaona lerowa simudzawaonansokonse." 
Exodus14:14 Yehova adzakugwirirani nkhondo, ndipo inu mudzakhala cere." 
Exodus14:15 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Upfuuliranji kwa Ine? lankhula ndi ana a Israyeli kuti aziyenda." 
Exodus14:16 Ndipo iwe nyamula ndodo yako, nutambasulire dzanja lako kunyanja, nuigawe, kuti ana a Israyeli alowe pakati pa nyanja pouma." 
Exodus14:17 Ndipo Ine, taonani, ndilimbitsa mitima ya Aaigupto, kuti alowemo powatsata; ndipo ndidzalemekezedwa pa Farao, ndi pa nkhondo yace yonse, pa magareta ace, ndi pa okwera pa akavalo ace." 
Exodus14:18 Ndipo Aaigupto adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, polemekezedwa Ine pa Farao, pa magareta ace, ndi pa okwera pa akavalo ace." 
Exodus14:19 Ndipo mthenga wa Mulungu, wakutsogolera ulendo wa Israyeli, unacokako, nutsata pambuyo pao; ndipo mtambo njo uja unacoka patsogolo pao, nuima pambuyo pao;" 
Exodus14:20 nulowa pakati pa ulendo wa Aaigupto ndi ulendo wa Aisrayeli ndipo mtambo unacita mdima, komanso unaunikira usiku; ndipo ulendo wina sunayandikizana ndi unzace usiku wonse." 
Exodus14:21 Ndipo Mose anatambasulira dzanja lace kunyanja; ndipo Yehova anabweza nyanja ndi mphepo yolimba ya kum'mawa usiku wonse, naumitsa nyanja; ndipo madziwo anagawikana." 
Exodus14:22 Ndipo ana a Israyeli analowa pakati pa nyanja pouma; ndi madziwo anakhala kwa iwo ngati khoma palamanja, ndi palamanzere." 
Exodus14:23 Ndipo Aaigupto anawalondola, nalowa pakati pa nyanja powatsata, ndiwo akavalo onse a Farao, magareta ace, ndi apakavalo ace." 
Exodus14:24 Ndipo kunali, ulonda wa mamawa, Yehova ali m'moto ndi m'mtambo njo anapenyera pa ulendo wa Aaigupto, Baubvuta ulendo wa Aaigupto." 
Exodus14:25 Ndipo anagurula njinga za magareta ao, nawayendetsa molemetsa; pamenepo Aaigupto anati, Tithawe pamaso pa Israyeli; pakuti Yehova alikuwagwirira nkhondo pa Aaigupto." 
Exodus14:26 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Tambasulira dzanja lako kunyanja, kuti madziwo abwerere kudzamiza Aaigupto, magareta ao, ndi apakavalo ao." 
Exodus14:27 Ndipo Mose anatambasulira dzanja lace kunyanja, ndi nyanja inabwerera m'mayendedwe ace mbanda kuca; ndipo Aaigupto pothawa anakomana nayo; ndipo Yehova anakutumula Aaigupto m'kati mwa nyanja." 
Exodus14:28 Popeza madziwo anabwerera, namiza magareta ndi apakavalo, ndiwo nkhondo yonse ya Farao imene idalowa pambuyo pao m'nyanja; sanatsala wa iwowa ndi mmodzi yense." 
Exodus14:29 Koma ana a Israyeli anayenda pouma pakati pa nyanja; ndi madziwo anakhala ngati khoma kwa iwo, palamanja ndi palamanzere." 
Exodus14:30 Comweco Yehova anapulumutsa Israyeli tsiku lomwelo m'manja a Aaigupto; ndipo Israyeli anaona Aaigupto akufa m'mphepete mwa nyanja. 
Exodus14:31 Ndipo Israyeli anaiona nchito yaikuru imene Yehova anacitira Aaigupto, ndipo anthuwo anaopa Yehova; nakhulupirira Yehova ndi mtumiki wace Mose." 
Exodus15:1 Nyimbo yolemekeza Mulungu, Pamenepo Mose ndi ana a Israyeli anayimbira Yehova nyimbo iyi, nanena, ndi kuti, Ndidzayimbira Yehova pakuti wapambanatu; Kavalo ndi wokwera wace anawaponya m'nyanja." 
Exodus15:2 Yehova ndiye mphamvu yanga ndi nyimbo yanga, Ndipo wakhala cipulumutso canga; Ameneyo ndiye Mulungu wanga, ndidzamlemekeza: Ndiye Mulungu wa kholo langa, ndidzammveketsa." 
Exodus15:3 Yehova ndiye wankhondo; Dzina lace ndiye Yehova. 
Exodus15:4 Magareta a Farao ndi nkhondo yace anawaponya m'nyanja; Ndi akazembe ace osankhika anamira m'Nyanja Yofiira. 
Exodus15:5 Nyanja inawamiza: Anamira mozama ngati mwala. 
Exodus15:6 Dzanja lanu lamanja, Yehova, lalemekezedwa ndi mphamvu, Dzanja lanu lamanja, Yehova, laphwanya mdani." 
Exodus15:7 Ndipo ndi ukulu wanu waukuru mwapasula akuukira Inu; Mwatumiza mkwiyo wanu, unawanyeketsa ngati ciputu." 
Exodus15:8 Ndipondi mpumo wa m'mphuno mwanu madzi anaunjikika, Mayendedwe ace anakhala ciriri ngati mulu; Zozama zinalimba m'kati mwa nyanja." 
Exodus15:9 Mdani anati, Ndiwalondola, ndiwakumika, ndidzagawa zofunkha; Ndidzakhuta nao mtima; Ndidzasolola lupanga langa, dzanja langa lidzawaononga." 
Exodus15:10 Munaombetsa mphepo yanu, nyanja inawamiza; Anamira m'madzi akuru ngati mtobvu." 
Exodus15:11 Manana ndi Inu ndani mwa milungu, Yehova? Manana ndi Inu ndani, wolemekezedwa, woyera, Woopsa pomyamika, wakucita zozizwa?" 
Exodus15:12 Mwatambasula dzanja lanu lamanja, Nthaka inawameza," 
Exodus15:13 Mwa cifundo canu mwatsogolera anthu amene mudawaombola; Mwa mphamvu yanu mudawalondolera njira yakumka pokhala panu poyera. 
Exodus15:14 Mitundu ya anthu idamva, inanthunthumira; Kuda mtima kwagwira anthu okhala m'Filistiya." 
Exodus15:15 Pamenepo mafumu a Edomu anadabwa; Agwidwa nako kunthunthumira amphamvu a ku Moabu; Okhala m'Kanani onse asungunukamtima. 
Exodus15:16 Kuopa kwakukuru ndi mantha ziwagwera; Pa dzanja lanu lalikuru akhala cete ngati mwala; Kufikira apita anthu anu, Yehova, Kufikira apita anthu amene mudawaombola." 
Exodus15:17 Mudzawafikitsa, ndi kuwaoka pa phiri la colowa canu, Pamalo pamene munadzipangira mukhalepo, Yehova, Malo oyera, amene manja anu, Ambuye, adakhazikika." 
Exodus15:18 Yehova adzacita ufumu nthawi yomka muyaya. 
Exodus15:19 Pakuti akavalo a Farao analowa m'nyanja, ndi magareta ace ndi apakavalo ace, ndipo Yehova anawabwezera madzi a m'nyanja; koma ana a Israyeli anayenda pouma pakati pa nyanja." 
Exodus15:20 Ndipo Miriamu mneneriyo, mlongo wa Aroni, anagwira lingaka m'dzanja lace; ndipo akazi onse anaturuka kumtsata ndi malingaka ndi kuthira mang'ombe." 
Exodus15:21 Ndipo Miriamu anawayankha, Yimbirani Yehova, pakuti wapambanatu; Kavalo ndi wokwera wace anawaponya m'nyanja. Madzi a ku Mara." 
Exodus15:22 Ndipo Mose anatsogolera Israyeli kucokera ku Nyanja Yofiira, ndipo anaturukako nalowa m'cipululu ca Suri; nayenda m'cipululu masiku atatu, osapeza madzi." 
Exodus15:23 Pamene anafika ku Mara, sanakhoza kumwa madzi a Mara, pakuti anali owawa; cifukwa cace anacha dzina lace Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Ndipo anthu anadandaulira Mose, ndi kuti, Tidzamwa ciani?" 
Exodus15:25 Ndipo iye anapfuulira kwa Yehova; ndipo Yehova anamsonyeza mtengo ndipo anauponya m'madzimo, ndi madzi anasanduka okoma. Pamenepo anawapangira lemba ndi ciweruzo, ndi pomwepa anawayesa;" 
Exodus15:26 ndipo anati, Ngati udzamveratu mau a Yehova, Mulungu wako, ndi kucita zoona pamaso pace, ndi kuchera khutu pa malamulo ace, ndi kusunga malemba ace onse, za nthenda zonse ndinaziika pa Aaigupto sindidzaziika pa iwe nnena imodzi; pakuti Ine Yehova ndine wakuciritsa iwe." 
Exodus15:27 Ndipo anafika pa Elimu, ndi pamenepo panali akasupe a madzi khumi ndi awiri, ndi akanjedza makumi asanu ndi awiri; ndipo anamanga cigono cao pomwepo pa madziwo." 
Exodus16:1 Ndipo anacoka ku Elimu, ndi khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli linalowa m'cipululu ca Sini, ndico pakati pa Elimu ndi Sinai, tsiku lakhumi ndi cisanu la mwezi waciwiri ataturuka m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Exodus16:2 Ndipo khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli linadandaulira Mose ndi Aroni m'cipululu; 
Exodus16:3 nanena nao ana a Israyeli, Ha! mwenzi titafa ndi dzanja la Yehova m'dziko la Aigupto, pokhala ife pa miphika ya nyama, pakudya mkate ife cokhuta; pakuti mwatiturutsa kudza nafe m'cipululu muno kudzapha msonkhano uwu wonse ndi njala." 
Exodus16:4 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Taona, ndidzabvumbitsira inu mkate wodzera kumwamba; ndipo anthu azituruka ndi kuola muyeso wa tsiku pa tsiku lace, kuti ndiwayese, ngati ayenda m'cilamulo canga kapena iai." 
Exodus16:5 Ndipo kudzakhala tsiku lacisanu ndi cimodzi, kuti azikonza umene adabwera nao, ataoniezapo muyeso unzace wa pa tsiku limodzi." 
Exodus16:6 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni ananena ndi ana onse a Israyeli, Madzulo mudzadziwa kuti Yehova anakuturutsani m'dziko la Aigupto;" 
Exodus16:7 ndi m'mawa mwace mudzaona ulemerero wa Yehova, popeza alinkumva mulikudandaulira Yehova; pakuti ife ndife ciani, kuti mutidandaulira ife?" 
Exodus16:8 Nanenanso Mose, Pakukupatsani Yehova nyama ya kudya madzulo, ndi mkate wokhuta m'mawa, atero popeza Yehova adamva madandaulo anu amene mumdandaulira nao. Koma ife ndife ciani? simulikudandaulira ife koma Yehova." 
Exodus16:9 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Aroni, Nena ndi khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli, Yandikizani pamaso pa Yehova, pakuti anamva madandaulo anu." 
Exodus16:10 Ndipo kunakhala, pakunena Aroni ndi khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli kuti iwo anatembenukira kucipululu, ndipo, taonani, ulemerero wa Yehova unaoneka mumtambo." 
Exodus16:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Exodus16:12 Ndamva madandaulo a ana a Israyeli; lankhula nao ndi kuti, Madzulo mudzadya nyama, ndi m'mawa mudzakhuta mkate; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Exodus16:13 Ndipo kunali madzulo zinakwera zinziri, ndipo zinakuta tsasa, ndi m'mawa padagwa mame pozungulira tsasa." 
Exodus16:14 Ndipo atasansuka mame adagwawo, taonani, pankhope pa cipululu pali kanthu kakang'ono kamphumphu, kakang'ono ngati cipale panthaka." 
Exodus16:15 Ndipo pamene ana a Israyeli anakaona, anati wina ndi mnzace, Nciani ici? pakuti sanadziwa ngati nciani. Ndipo Mose ananena nao, Ndiwo mkatewo Yehova wakupatsani ukhale cakudya canu," 
Exodus16:16 Amenewo ndiwo mau walamulira Yehova, Aoleko yense monga mwa njala yace; munthu mmodzi omeri limodzi, monga momwe muli, yense atengere iwo m'hema mwace." 
Exodus16:17 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anatero, naola wina wambiri, wina pang'ono." 
Exodus16:18 Ndipo pamene anayesa ndi omeri, iye amene adaola wambiri sunamtsalira, ndi iye amene adaola pang'ono sunamsowa; yense anaola monga mwa njala yace." 
Exodus16:19 Ndipo Mose ananena nao, Palibe munthu asiyeko kufikira m'mawa." 
Exodus16:20 Koma sanammvera Mose; ndipo ena anasiyako kufikira m'mawa; koma unagwa mphutsi, nununkha. Ndipo Mose anakwiya nao." 
Exodus16:21 Ndipo anauola m'mawa ndi m'mawa, yense monga mwa njala yace; popeza likatentha dzuwa umasungunuka." 
Exodus16:22 Ndipo kunali tsiku lacisanu ndi cimodzi, anaola mkate, naonjezapo linzace, maomeri awiri pa munthu mmodzi; ndipo akazembe a khamulo anadza nauza Mose." 
Exodus16:23 Ndipo ananena nao, Ici ndi comwe Yehova analankhula, Mawa ndiko kupuma, Sabata lopatulika la Yehova; cimene muzioca, ocani, ndi cimene muziphika phikani; ndi cotsala cikukhalireni cosunguka kufikira m'mawa." 
Exodus16:24 Ndipo anausunga kufikira m'mawa, monga adalamulira Mose; koma sunanunkha, ndipo sunagwa mphutsi." 
Exodus16:25 Ndipo Mose anati, Muudye lero; pakuti lero ndilo Sabata la Yehova; simuupeza lero pabwalo." 
Exodus16:26 Muziola uwu masiku asanu ndi limodzi; koma tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri ndilo la Sabata, pamenepo padzakhala palibe." 
Exodus16:27 Ndipo kunali tsiku la Sabata, kuti anthu ena anaturuka kukaola, koma sanaupeza." 
Exodus16:28 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Mukana kusunga zouza zanga ndi malamulo anga kufikira titi?" 
Exodus16:29 Taonani, popeza Yehova anakupatsani Sabata, cifukwa cace tsiku lacisanu ndi cimodzi alikupatsa inu mkate wofikira masiku awiri; khalani yense m'malo mwace, munthu asaturuke m'malo mwace tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri." 
Exodus16:30 Ndipo anthu anapumula tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri. 
Exodus16:31 Ndipo mbumba ya Israyeli inaucha dzina lace Mana; ndiwo ngati zipatso zampasa, oyera; powalawa akunga timitanda tosanganiza ndi uci." 
Exodus16:32 Ndipo Mose anati, Awa ndi mau anauza Yehova, Dzazani omeri nao, asungikire mibadwo yanu; kuti aone mkatewo ndinakudyetsani nao m'cipululu, muja ndinakuturutsani m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Exodus16:33 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Aroni, Tenga mphika, nuthiremo mana odzala omeri, nuuike pamaso pa Yehova, usungikire mibadwo yanu." 
Exodus16:34 Monga Yehova anauza Mose, momwemo Aroni anauika patsogolo pa Mboni, usungikeko." 
Exodus16:35 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anadya mana zaka makumi anai, kufikira atalowa dziko la midzi; anadya mana kufikira analowa malire a dziko la Kanani." 
Exodus16:36 Koma omeri ndilo limodzi la magawo khumi la efa. 
Exodus17:1 Ndipo khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli linacoka m'cipululu ca Sini, m'zigono zao, monga mwa mau a Yehova, nagona m'Refidimu. Koma kumeneko kunalibe madzi akumwa anthu." 
Exodus17:2 Pamenepo anthu anatsutsana ndi Mose, nati, Tipatseni madzi timwe, Koma Mose ananena nao, Mutsutsana nane bwanji? Muyeseranji Yehova?" 
Exodus17:3 Ndipo pomwepo anthu anamva ludzu lokhumba madzi; ndi anthu anadandaulira Mose, nati, Munatikwezeranji kucokera ku Aigupto, kudzatipha ife ndi ana athu ndi zoweta zathu ndi ludzu?" 
Exodus17:4 Ndipo Mose anapfuulira kwa Yehova, ndi kuti, Ndiwacitenji anthuwa? andilekera pang'ono kundiponya miyala." 
Exodus17:5 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, Pita pamaso pa anthu, nutenge pamodzi nawe akuru ena a Israyeli; nutenge m'dzanja mwako ndodo ija unapanda nayo nyanja, numuke." 
Exodus17:6 Taona, ndidzaima pamaso pako pathanthwe m'Horebe; ndipo upande thanthwe, nadzaturukamo madzi, kuti anthu amwe. Ndipo Mose anacita comweco pamaso pa akuru a Israyeli." 
Exodus17:7 Ndipo anacha dzina la malowo Masa, ndi Meriba, cifukwa ca kutsutsana kwa ana a Israyeli; popezanso anayesa Yehova, ndi kuti, Kodi Yehova ali pakati pa ife, kapena iai?" 
Exodus17:8 Pamenepo anadza Amaleki, nayambana ndi Israyeli m'Refidimu." 
Exodus17:9 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Yoswa, Utisankhulire amuna, nuturuke kuyambana naye Amaleki; mawa ndidzaima pamwamba pa citunda, ndi ndodo ya Mulungu m'dzanja langa." 
Exodus17:10 Ndipo Yoswa anacita monga Mose adanena naye, nayambana ndi Amaleki; ndipo Mose, ndi Aroni, ndi Huri anakwera pamwamba pa citunda." 
Exodus17:11 Ndipo kunakhala, pamene Mose anakweza dzanja lace Israyeli analakika; koma pamene anatsitsa dzanja lace Amaleki analakika." 
Exodus17:12 Koma manja a Mose analema; ndipo anatenga mwala, nauika pansi pa iye, nakhala pamenepo; ndipo Aroni ndi Huri anagwiriziza manja ace, wina mbali yina, wina mbali yina; ndi manja ace analimbika kufikira litalowa dzuwa." 
Exodus17:13 Ndipo Yoswa anatyola Amaleki ndi anthu ace ndi kuukali kwa lupanga. 
Exodus17:14 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Lembera ici m'buku, cikhale cikumbutso, nucimvetse Yoswa; kuti ndidzafafaniza konse cikumbukilo ca Amaleki pansi pa thambo." 
Exodus17:15 Ndipo Mose anamanga guwa la nsembe, nalicha dzina lace Yehova Nisi:" 
Exodus17:16 nati, Yehova walumbira: padzakhala nkhondo ya Yehova pa Amaleki m'mibadwo mibadwo." 
Exodus18:1 Ndipo Yetero, wansembe wa Midyani, mpongozi wa Mose, anamva zonse zimene Mulungu adacitira Mose ndi Israyeli anthu ace, kuti Yehova adaturutsa Israyeli m'Aigupto." 
Exodus18:2 Ndipo Yetero, mpongozi wa Mose, anabwera naye Zipora mkazi wa Mose (atamtuma kwao), ndi ana ace awiri;" 
Exodus18:3 dzina la winayo ndiye Gerisomu, pakuti anati, Ndakhala mlendo m'dziko lacilendo;" 
Exodus18:4 ndi dzina la mnzace ndiye Eliezere; pakuti anati, Mulungu wa kholo langa anakhala thandizo langa nandilanditsa ku lupanga la Farao." 
Exodus18:5 Ndipo Yetero, mpongozi wa Mose, anadza ndi ana ace amuna ndi mkazi wace kwa Mose kucipululu kumene adamangako, pa phiri la Mulungu;" 
Exodus18:6 nati kwa Mose, Ine mpongozi wako Yetero ndadza kwa iwe, ndi mkazi wako, ndi ana ace omwe awiri." 
Exodus18:7 Ndipo Mose anaturuka kukakomana ndi mpongozi wace, nawerama, nampsompsona; nafunsana ali bwanji, nalowa m'hema." 
Exodus18:8 Ndipo Mose anafotokozera mpongozi wace zonse Yehova adazicitira Farao ndi Aaigupto cifukwa ca Israyeli; ndi mabvuto onse anakomana nao panjira, ndi kuti Yehova adawalanditsa." 
Exodus18:9 Ndipo Yetero anakondwera cifukwa ca zabwino zonse Yehova adazicitira Israyeli, ndi kuwalanditsa m'dzanja la Aaigupto." 
Exodus18:10 Nati Yetero, Woyamikika Yehova, amene anakulanditsani m'dzanja la Aaigupto, ndi m'dzanja la Farao; ameneanalanditsa anthu awa pansi pa dzanja la Aaigupto." 
Exodus18:11 Tsopano ndidziwa kuti Yehova ali wamkuru ndi milungu yonse; pakuti momwe anadzikuza okha momwemo anawaposa," 
Exodus18:12 Ndipo Yetero, mpongozi wa Mose, anamtengera Mulungu nsembe Yopsereza, ndi nsembe zophera; ndipo Aroni ndi akuru onse a Israyeli anadza kudzadya mkate ndi mpongozi wa Mose pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Exodus18:13 Ndipo kunatero kuti m'mawa mwace Mose anakhala pansi kuweruzira anthu mirandu yao; ndipo anthu anakhala ciriri pamaso pa Mose kuyambira m'mawa kufikira madzulo. 
Exodus18:14 Ndipo pamene mpongozi wace wa Mose anaona zonsezi iye anawacitira anthu, anati, Cinthu ici nciani uwacitira anthuci? Umakhala pa wekha bwanji, ndi anthu onse amakhala ciriri pamaso pako kuyambira m'mawa kufikira madzulo?" 
Exodus18:15 Ndipo Moce anati kwa mpongozi wace, Cifukwa anthu amadza kwa ine kudzafunsira Mulungu;" 
Exodus18:16 akakhala nao mlandu adza kwa ine, kuti ndiweruze pakati pa munthu ndi mnansi wace, ndi kuti ndiwadziwitsemalemba a Mulungu, ndi malamulo ace." 
Exodus18:17 Koma mpongozi wa Mose ananena naye, Cinthu ucitaci siciri cabwino ai." 
Exodus18:18 Udzalema konse, iwe ndi anthu amene uli nao; pakuti cikulaka cinthu ici; sungathe kucicita pa wekha." 
Exodus18:19 Tamvera mau anga tsopano, ndikupangire nzeru, ndi Mulungu akhale nawe; ukhale m'malo mwa anthu kwa Mulungu, nupite nayo mirandu kwa Mulungu;" 
Exodus18:20 nuwamasulire malemba, ndi malamulo, ndi kuwadziwitsa njira imene ayenera kuyendamo, ndi nchito imene ayenera kucita." 
Exodus18:21 Koma iwe, dzisankhire mwa anthu ako onse, amuna amtima, akuopa Mulungu, amuna oona, akudana nalo phindu la cinyengo; nuwaikire iwo oterewa, akuru a pa zikwi, akuru a pa mazana, akuru a pa makumi asanu, akuru a pa makumi;" 
Exodus18:22 ndipo iwo aweruze mirandu ya anthu nthawi zonse; ndipo kudzakhala kuti mirandu yaikuru yonse abwere nayo kwa iwe; koma mirandu yaing'ono yonse aweruze okha; potero idzakucepera nchito, ndi iwo adzasenza nawe." 
Exodus18:23 Ukacite cinthuci, ndi Mulungu akakuuza cotero, udzakhoza kupirira, ndi anthu awa onse adzapita kwao mumtendere." 
Exodus18:24 Ndipo Mose anamvera mau a mpongozi wace, nacita zonse adazinena." 
Exodus18:25 Ndipo Mose anasankha amuna amtima mwa Aisrayeli onse, nawaika akuru a pa anthu, akuru a pa zikwi, akuru a pa mazana, akuru a pa makumi asanu, ndi akuru a pa makumi." 
Exodus18:26 Ndipo anaweruza anthu nthawi zonse; mlandu wakuwalaka amabwera nao kwa Mose, ndi milandu yaing'ono yonse amaweruza okha." 
Exodus18:27 Ndipo Mose analola mpongozi wace amuke; ndipo anacoka kumka ku dziko lace. 
Exodus19:1 Mwezi wacitatu ataturuka ana a Israyeli m'dziko la Aigupto, tsiku lomwelo, analowa m'cipululu ca Sinai." 
Exodus19:2 Pakuti anacoka ku Refidimu, nalowa m'cipululu ca Sinai, namanga tsasa m'cipululumo; ndipo Israyeli anamanga tsasa pamenepo pandunji pa phirilo." 
Exodus19:3 Ndipo Mose anakwera kwa Mulungu; ndipo Yehova ali m'phirimo anamuitana, ndi kuti, Uzitero kwa mbumba ya Yakobo, nunene kwa ana a Israyeli, kuti," 
Exodus19:4 Inu munaona cimene ndinacitira Aaigupto; ndi kuti ndanyamula inu monga pa mapiko a mphungu, ndi kubwera nanu kwa Ine ndekha." 
Exodus19:5 Ndipo tsopano, ngati mudzamvera mau anga ndithu, ndi kusunga cipangano canga, ndidzakuyesani cuma canga ca padera koposa mitundu yonse ya anthu; pakuti dziko lonse lapansi ndi langa;" 
Exodus19:6 ndipo ndidzakuyesani ufumu wanga wa ansembe, ndi mtundu wopatulika. Awa ndi mau amene ukalankhule ndi ana a lsrayeli." 
Exodus19:7 Ndipo Mose anadza, naitana akuru a anthu, nawaikira pamaso pao mau awa onse amene Yehova adamuuza." 
Exodus19:8 Ndipo anthu onse anabvomera pamodzi, nati, Zonse adazilankhula Yehova tidzazicita. Ndipo Mose anabwera nao mau a anthu kwa Yehova." 
Exodus19:9 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Taona, ndikudza kwa iwe mu mtambo wakuda bii, kuti anthu amve pamene ndilankhula ndi iwe, ndi kuti akubvomereze nthawi zonse. Pakuti Mose adauza Yehova mau a anthuwo." 
Exodus19:10 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Muka kwa anthuwo, nuwapatulitse lero ndi mawa, ndipo atsuke zobvala zao," 
Exodus19:11 nakonzekeretu tsiku lacitatu; pakuti tsiku lacitatu Yehova adzatsika pa phiri la Sinai pamaso pa anthu onse. 
Exodus19:12 Ndipo ukalembere anthu malire pozungulira, ndi kuti, Muzicenjera musakwere m'phiri, musakhudza cilekezero cace; wokhudza phirilo adzaphedwa ndithu;" 
Exodus19:13 dzanja liri lonse lisalikhudze, wakulikhudza azimponyatu miyala, kapena kumpyoza; ngakhale coweta ngakhale munthu, zisakhale ndi moyo. Pamene lipenga libanika liu lace azikwera m'phirimo." 
Exodus19:14 Ndipo Mose anatsika m'phiri kumka kwa anthu, nawapatulitsa anthu; natsuka iwo zobvala zao." 
Exodus19:15 Ndipo anati kwa anthu, Mukonzekeretu tsiku lacitatu nimusayandikiza mkazi." 
Exodus19:16 Ndipo kunali tsiku lacitatu, m'mawa, panali mabingu ndi zimphezi, ndi mtambo wakuda bii paphiripo, ndi liu la lipenga lolimbatu; ndi anthu onse okhala kutsasa ananjenjemera." 
Exodus19:17 Ndipo Mose anaturutsa anthu kutsasa, kuti akomane ndi Mulungu; ndipo anaima patsinde pa phiri." 
Exodus19:18 Ndipo phiri la Sinai linafuka monsemo, popeza Yehova anatsikira m'moto pamenepo; ndi utsi wace unakwera ngati utsi wa m'ng'anjo, ndi phiri lonse linagwedezeka kwambiri," 
Exodus19:19 Ndipo pamene liu la lipenga linamveka linakulira-kulira, Mose ananena, ndi Mulungu anamyankha ndi mau." 
Exodus19:20 Ndipo Yehova anatsikira pa phiri la Sinai, pamutu pace pa phiri; ndipo Yehova anaitana Mose akwere pamutu pa phiri; ndi Mose anakwerapo." 
Exodus19:21 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Tsika, cenjeza anthu, kuti angapyolere kwa Yehova kudzaona, ndipo angagwe ambiri a iwowa." 
Exodus19:22 Ansembenso, akuyandikiza kwa Yehova adzipatulitse, angawapasule Yehova." 
Exodus19:23 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Yehova, Anthu sangathe kukwera m'phiri la Sinai; pakuti Inu mwaticenjeza, ndi kuti, Lemba malire m'phirimo, ndi kulipatula." 
Exodus19:24 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye, Muka, tsika: nukwere iwe ndi Aroni pamodzi ndi iwe; koma ansembe ndi anthu asapyole kukwera kwa Yehova, angawapasule." 
Exodus19:25 Pamenepo Mose anawatsikira anthu, nanena nao." 
Exodus20:1 Ndipo Mulungu ananena mau onse amenewa, nati:" 
Exodus20:2 INE ndine YEHOVA Mulungu wako, amene ndinaturutsa iwe ku dziko la Aigupto, ku nyumba ya akapolo." 
Exodus20:3 Usakhale nayo milungu yina koma Ine ndekha. 
Exodus20:4 Usadzipangire iwe wekha fano losema, kapena cifaniziro ciri conse ca zinthu za m'thambo la kumwamba, kapena za m'dziko lapansi, kapena za m'madzi a pansi pa dziko;" 
Exodus20:5 usazipembedzere izo, usazitumikire izo; cifukwa Ine Yehova Mulungu wako ndiri Mulungu wansanje, wakulanga ana cifukwa ca atate ao, kufikira mbadwo wacitatu ndi wacinai wa iwo amene akudana ndi Ine;" 
Exodus20:6 ndi kuwacitira cifundo anthu zikwizikwi a iwo amene akondana ndi Ine, nasunga malamulo anga." 
Exodus20:7 Usaehule dzina la Yehova Mulungu wako pacabe; cifukwa Yehova sadzamuyesa iye wosacimwa, amene achula pacabe dzina lacelo." 
Exodus20:8 Uzikumbukila tsiku la Sabata, likhale lopatulika." 
Exodus20:9 Masiku asanu ndi limodzi uzigwira, ndi kumariza nchito zako zonse;" 
Exodus20:10 koma tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri ndilo Sabata la Yehova Mulungu wako; usagwire nchito iri yonse, kapena iwe wekha, kapena mwana wako wamwamuna, kapena mwana wako wamkazi, kapena wanchito wako wamwamuna, kapena wanchito wako wamkazi, kapena nyama zako, kapena mlendo amene ali m'mudzi mwako;" 
Exodus20:11 cifukwa masiku asanu ndi limodzi Yehova adamariza zakumwamba ndi zapansi, ndi nyanja, ndi zinthu zonse ziri m'menemo, napumula tsiku ladsanu ndi ciwiri; cifukwa cace Yehova anadalitsa tsiku la Sabata kuti likhale lopatulika." 
Exodus20:12 Uzilemekeza atate wako ndi amako; kuti acuruke masiku ako m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wako akupatsa iwe. 
Exodus20:13 Usaphe. 
Exodus20:14 Usacite cigololo. 
Exodus20:15 Usabe. 
Exodus20:16 Usamnamizire mnzako. 
Exodus20:17 Usasirire nyumba yace ya mnzako, usasirire mkazi wace wa mnzako, kapena wanchito wace wamwamuna, kapena wanchito wace wamkazi, kapena ng'ombe yace, kapena buru wace, kapena kanthu kali konse ka mnzako." 
Exodus20:18 Ndipo anthu onse anaona mabingu ndi zimphezi, ndi liu la lipenga, ndi phiri lirikufuka; ndipo pamene anthu anaziona, ananjenjemera, naima patali." 
Exodus20:19 Ndipo anati kwa Mose, Mulankhule nafe ndinu, ndipo tidzamva; koma asalankhule nafe Mulungu, kuti tingafe," 
Exodus20:20 Ndipo Mose anati kwa anthu, Musaope; pakuti Mulungu wadza kukuyesani ndi kuti kumuopa iye kukhale pamaso panu, kuti musacimwe." 
Exodus20:21 Ndipo anthu anaima patali, koma Mose anayandikiza ku mdima waukuru kuli Mulungu." 
Exodus20:22 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Uzitero ndi ana a Israyeli, kuti, Mwapenya nokha kuti ndalankhula nanu, kucokerakumwamba." 
Exodus20:23 Musapange milungu yasiliva ikhale pamodzi ndi Ine; musadzipangire milungu yagolidi. 
Exodus20:24 Undiumbire guwa la nsembe ladothi, nundiphere pomweponsembe zako zopsereza, ndi nsembe zako zamtendere, nkhosa zako ndi ng'ombe zako; pali ponse ndikumbukiritsa anthu dzina langa ndidzakudzera ndi kukudalitsa." 
Exodus20:25 Ndipo ukandimangira guwa la nsembe lamiyala, usalimanga ndi miyala yosema; ukakwezapo cosemera cako, waliipsa." 
Exodus20:26 Kapena usakwere ndi makwerero ku guwa langa la nsembe, kuti angaoneke marisece ako pamenepo." 
Exodus21:1 Ndipo awa ndiwo maweruzo amene uziika pamaso pao. 
Exodus21:2 Ukagula mnyamata Mhebri, azigwira nchito zaka zisanu ndi cimodzi; koma cacisanu ndi ciwiri azituruka waufulu cabe." 
Exodus21:3 Akalowa ali yekha azituruka ali yekha; akakhala ndi mkazi, mkazi wace azituruka naye." 
Exodus21:4 Akampatsa mkazi mbuye wace, ndipo akambalira ana amuna ndi akazi, mkaziyo ndi ana ace azikhala a mbuye wace, ndipo azituruka ali yekha." 
Exodus21:5 Koma mnyamatayo akanenetsa, Ndikonda mbuye wanga, mkazi wanga, ndi ana anga; sindituruka waufulu;" 
Exodus21:6 pamenepo mbuye wace azifika naye kwa oweruza, nafike naye kukhomo, kapena kumphuthu, ndipo mbuye wace amboole khutu lace ndi lisungulu; ndipo iye azimgwirira nchito masiku onse." 
Exodus21:7 Ndipo munthu akagulitsa mwana wace wamkazi akhale mdzakazi, iyeyo asaturuke monga amaturuka anyamata." 
Exodus21:8 Akapanda kumkonda mbuye wace, amene anamtoma mwini yekha, azilola kuti amuombole; alibe mphamvu yakumgulitsa kwa anthu acilendo, popeza wacita naye monyenga." 
Exodus21:9 Koma ngati amtomera mwana wace wamwamuna, amcitire monga kuyenera ana akazi." 
Exodus21:10 Akamtengera mkazi wina, asacepetse cakudya cace, zobvala zace, ndi za ukwati zace zace." 
Exodus21:11 Ndipo akapanda kumcitira izi zitatu, azituruka cabe, osaperekapo ndalama." 
Exodus21:12 Iye amene akantha munthu kotero kuti wafa, aphedwe ndithu." 
Exodus21:13 Koma akapanda kumlalira, koma Mulungu akalola akomane ndi mnzace, ndidzakuikirani pothawirapo iye." 
Exodus21:14 Koma munthu akacita dala pa mnzace, kumupha monyenga; uzimcotsa ku guwa langa la nsembe, kuti afe." 
Exodus21:15 Munthuwakukanthaatatewace, kapena amai wace, aphedwe ndithu." 
Exodus21:16 Iye wakuba munthu, angakhale wamgulitsa, kapena akampeza m'dzanja lace, aphedwe ndithu." 
Exodus21:17 Munthu wakutemberera atate wace, kapena amai wace, aphedwe ndithu." 
Exodus21:18 Akalimbana amuna, ndipo wina akakantha mnzace ndi mwala, kapena ndi nkhonyo, wosafa iye, koma wakhulungira pakama;" 
Exodus21:19 akaukanso, nakayendayenda pabwalo ndi ndodo yace, womkanthayo azikhala womasuka; pakutsotsa pace pokha azimbwezera, namcizitse konse." 
Exodus21:20 Munthu akakantha mnyamata wace, kapena mdzakazi wace, ndi ndodo, ndipo akafa padzanja pace; ameneyo aliridwe ndithu." 
Exodus21:21 Koma akakhala wosafa tsiku limodzi kapena awiri, asalirike, pakuti ndiye ndalama ya mbuye wace." 
Exodus21:22 Akayambana amuna, nakakantha mkazi ali ndi pakati, kotero kuti abala, koma alibe kuphwetekwa; alipe ndithu, monga momwe amchulira mwamuna wa mkaziyo; apereke monga anena oweruza." 
Exodus21:23 Koma ngati kuphweteka kukalipo, uzipereka moyo kulipa moyo," 
Exodus21:24 diso kulipa diso, dzino kulipa dzino, dzanja kulipa dzanja, phazi kulipa phazi," 
Exodus21:25 kutentha kulipa kutentha, bala kulipa bala, mkwapulo kulipa mkwapulo." 
Exodus21:26 Munthu akampanda mnyamata wace, kapena mdzakazi wace, padiso, nalithudzula, azimlola amuke waufulu cifukwa ca diso lace." 
Exodus21:27 Ndipo akagurula dzino la mnyamata wace, kapena dzino la mdzakazi wace, azimlola amuke waufulu cifukwa ca dzino lace." 
Exodus21:28 Ng'ombe ikatunga mwamuna kapena mkazi, nafa, aiponyetu miyala ng'ombeyo, osadya nyama yace; koma mwini ng'ombeyo azimasuka." 
Exodus21:29 Koma ngati ng'ombe ikatunga masiku adapitawo, ndipo anamcenjeza mwiniyo, koma osaisunga iye, ndipo ikapha mwamuna kapena mkazi, aiponye miyala ng'ombeyo, ndi mwini waceyo amuphenso." 
Exodus21:30 Akamuikira dipo, azipereka ciombolo ca moyo wace monga mwa zonse adamuikira." 
Exodus21:31 Ingakhale yatunga mwana wamwamuna kapena wamkazi, aicitire monga mwa ciweruzo ici." 
Exodus21:32 Ng'ombeyo ikatunga mnyamata kapena mdzakazi, azipatsa mbuye wace ndalama za masekele a siliva makumi atatu, ndipo ng'ombeyo aiponye miyala." 
Exodus21:33 Munthu akafukula dzenje, kapena akakumba dzenje, osalibvundikira, ndipo ikagwamo ng'ombe kapena buru," 
Exodus21:34 mwini dzenje azilipa; azilipa ndalama kwa mwini nyamayo, koma yakufayo ndi yace." 
Exodus21:35 Ng'ombe ya mwini ikapweteka ng'ombe ya mnzace, nifa, azigulitsa ng'ombe yamoyoyo, nagawe ndalama zace; naigawe, ndi yakufa yomweyo." 
Exodus21:36 Kapena kudadziwika kuti ng'ombeyo ikatunga masiku adapitawo, koma osaisunga mwiniyo, azilipa ndithu, ng'ombe kulipa ng'ombe, koma yakufayo ndi yace." 
Exodus22:1 Munthu akaba ng'ombe, kapena nkhosa, nakaipha, kapena kuigulitsa, azilipa ng'ombe zisanu pa ng'ombeyo; ndi nkhosa zinai pa nkhosayo," 
Exodus22:2 Akampeza wakuba alimkuboola, nakamkantha kotero kuti wafa, palibe camwazi." 
Exodus22:3 Litamturukira dzuwa, pali camwazi; wakubayo azilipa ndithu; ngati alibe kanthu, amgulitse pa umbala wace." 
Exodus22:4 Akacipeza cakubaco ciri m'dzanja lace camoyo, ngakhale ng'ombe, kapena buru, kapena nkhosa, alipe mowirikiza." 
Exodus22:5 Munthu akadyetsa coweta pabusa kapena pa munda wamphesa, atamasula coweta cace, ndipo citadya podyetsa pa mwini wace; alipe podyetsa pace poposa, ndi munda wa mphesa wace woposa." 
Exodus22:6 Ukayaka moto, nukalandira kuminga, kotero kuti unyeketsa mulu wa tirigu, kapena tirigu wosasenga, kapena munda; woyatsa motoyo alipe ndithu." 
Exodus22:7 Munthu akaikiza ndalama kapena cuma kwa mnansi wace, ndipo zibeka m'nyumba ya munthuyo; akapeza mbala, ilipe cowirikiza." 
Exodus22:8 Akapanda kumpeza mbalayo, abwere naye mwini nyumbayo kwa oweruza, kumuyesa ngati anaika dzanja lace pa cuma ca mnansi wace." 
Exodus22:9 Mlandu uti wonse wa colakwa, kunena za ng'ombe, za buru, za nkhosa, za cobvala, za kanthu kali konse kotayika, munthu anenako kali kace; mlandu wa onse awiri ufike kwa oweruza; iye amene oweruza amtsutsa alipe cowirikiza kwa mnansi wace." 
Exodus22:10 Munthu akaikiza buru, kapena ng'ombe, kapena nkhosa, kapena coweta cina kwa mnansi wace, ndipo cikafa, kapena ciphwetekwa, kapena wina acipitikitsa osaciona munthu;" 
Exodus22:11 lumbiro la Yehova likhale pakati pa iwo awiri, kuti sanaturutsa dzanja lace pa cuma ca mnansi wace; ndipo mwiniyo azibvomereza, ndipo asalipe." 
Exodus22:12 Koma ngati cidabedwa kwaoko ndithu, alipe kwa mwiniyo." 
Exodus22:13 Ngati cajiwa ndithu, abwere naco cikhale mboni; asalipe pa cojiwaco." 
Exodus22:14 Munthu akabwereka cinthu kwa mnansi wace, ndipo ciphwetekwa, kapena cifa, mwiniyo palibe, azilipa ndithu." 
Exodus22:15 Akakhalapo mwiniyo, asalipe; ngati cagwirira nchito yakulipira, cadzera kulipira kwace." 
Exodus22:16 Munthu akanyenga namwali wosapalidwa ubwenzi, nakagona nave, alipetu kuti akhale mkazi wace." 
Exodus22:17 Atate wace akakana konse kumpatsa iye, alipe ndalama monga mwa colipa ca anamwali." 
Exodus22:18 Wanyanga usamlola akhale ndi moyo. 
Exodus22:19 Ali yense agona ndi coweta aphedwe ndithu. 
Exodus22:20 Wakuphera nsembe mulungu wina, wosati Yehova yekha, aonongeke konse." 
Exodus22:21 Ndipo usasautsa mlendo kapena kumpsinja; pakuti munali alendo m'dziko la Aigupto. 
Exodus22:22 Musazunza mkazi wamasiye, kapena mwana wamasiye ali yense." 
Exodus22:23 Ukawazunza ndi kakuti konse, nakandilirira pang'ono ponse iwowa, ndidzamvadi kulira kwao;" 
Exodus22:24 ndi mkwiyo wanga idzayaka, ndipo ndidzapha inu ndi lupanga; ndipo akazi anu adzakhala amasiye, ndi ana anu omwe." 
Exodus22:25 Ukakongoletsa ndalama anthu anga osauka okhala nanu, usamkhalira ngati wangongole; usamwerengera phindu." 
Exodus22:26 Ukati ulandire cikole kaya cobvala ca mnansi wako, koma polowa dzuwa ucibwezere kwa iye;" 
Exodus22:27 popeza copfunda cace ndi ici cokha, ndico cobvala ca pathupi pace; azipfundira ciani pogona? Ndipo kudzakhala kuti akandipfuulira Ine, ndidzamva; pakuti Ine ndine wacisomo." 
Exodus22:28 Usapeputsa oweruza, kapena kutemberera mkuru wa anthu a mtundu wako." 
Exodus22:29 Usacedwa kuperekako zipatso zako zocuruka, ndi zothira zako. Woyamba wa ana ako amuna undipatse Ine." 
Exodus22:30 Uzitero nazo ng'ombe zako, ndi nkhosa zako; masiku asanu ndi atatu akhale ndi amai wace; tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu uzimpereka kwa Ine." 
Exodus22:31 Ndipo muzindikhalira Ine anthu opatulika; cifukwa cace musamadya nyama yojiwa kuthengo; itayireni agaru. 
Exodus23:1 Usatola mbiri yopanda pace; usathandizana naye woipa ndi kukhala mboni yocititsa ciwawa. 
Exodus23:2 Usatsata unyinji wa anthu kucita coipa; kapena usacita umboni kumlandu, ndi kupatukira kutsata unyinji ndi kukhotetsa mlandu;" 
Exodus23:3 kapena usakometsera munthu wosauka pa mlandu wace. 
Exodus23:4 Ukakomana ndi ng'ombe kapena buru wa mdani wako zirimkusokera, uzimbwezera izo ndithu." 
Exodus23:5 Ukaona buru wa munthuwakudana nawe alikugona pansi ndi katundu wace, ndipo ukadaleka kuthandiza, koma uzimthandiza ndithu." 
Exodus23:6 Usakhotetsa mlandu wa mnzako waumphawi. 
Exodus23:7 Uzikhala kutali ndi mlandu wonama; ndipo usapha munthu wosacimwa ndi wolungama; pakuti sindidzayesa wolungama munthu woipa. 
Exodus23:8 Usalandira cokometsera mlandu; pakuti cokometsera mlandu cidetsa maso a openya, nicisanduliza mlandu wa olungama," 
Exodus23:9 Usampsinia mlendo; pakuti mudziwa mtima wa mlendo popeza munali alendo m'dziko la Aigupto. 
Exodus23:10 Ndipo uzibzala m'munda mwako zaka zisanu ndi cimodzi, ndi kututa zipatso zako;" 
Exodus23:11 koma caka cacisanu ndi ciwiri uuleke, ugone; kuti aumphawi a anthu a mtundu wako adyemo ndipo zotsalira iwowa zoweta za kubusa zizidye; momwemo uzicita ndi munda wako wamphesa, ndimundawakowaazitona." 
Exodus23:12 Uzicita nchito yako masiku asanu ndi limodzi, koma tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri uzipumula; kuti ng'ombe yako ndi buru wako zipumule, ndi kuti mwana wa mdzakaziwako ndi mlendo atsitsimuke." 
Exodus23:13 Ndipo samalirani zonse ndanena ndi inu; nimusachule dzina la milungu yina; lisamveke pakamwa pako. 
Exodus23:14 Muzindicitira loe madyerero katatu m'caka. 
Exodus23:15 Uzisunga madyerero a mkate wopanda cotupitsa; masiku asanu ndi awiri uzidya mkate wopanda cotupitsa, monga ndinakuuza, nyengo yoikika, mwezi wa Abibu, pakuti m'menemo unaturuka m'Aigupto; koma asaoneke munthu pamaso panga opanda kanthu;" 
Exodus23:16 ndi madyerero a masika, zipatso zoyamba za nchito zako, zimene udazibzala m'munda; ndi madyerero a kututa, pakutha caka, pamene ututa nchito zako za m'munda." 
Exodus23:17 Katatu m'caka amuna onse azioneka pamaso pa Ambuye Yehova. 
Exodus23:18 Usapereka mwazi wa nsembe yanga pamodzi ndi mkate wacotupitsa; ndi mafuta a madyerero anga asagonamo kufikira m'mawa. 
Exodus23:19 Uzibweca nazo zoyambayamba za m'munda mwako ku nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wako. Usaphike mwana wa mbuzi mu mkaka wa mace. Mulungu aloniezana nao za Kanani. 
Exodus23:20 Taona, ndituma mthenga akutsogolere, kukusunga panjira, ndi kukufikitsa pamalo pomwe ndakonzeratu." 
Exodus23:21 Musamalire iye, ndi kumvera mau ace; musamwawitsa mtima, pakuti sadzakhululukira zoo lakwa zanu; popeza dzina langa liri m'mtima mwace." 
Exodus23:22 Pakuti ukamveratu mau ace, ndi kucita zonse ndizilankhula, ndidzakhala mdani wa adani ako, ndipo ndidzasautsa akusautsa iwe." 
Exodus23:23 Pakuti mthenga wanga adzakutsogolera, nadzakufikitsa kwa Aamori, ndi Ahiti, ndi Aperizi, ndi Akanani, Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi; ndipo ndidzawaononga." 
Exodus23:24 Usagwadira milungu yao, kapena kuwatumikira, kapena kucita monga mwa nchito zao; koma uwapasule konse, ndi kugamulatu zoimiritsa zao." 
Exodus23:25 Ndipo muzitumikira Yehova Mulungu wanu, potero adzadalitsa cakudya cako, ndi madzi ako; ndipo ndidzacotsa nthenda pakati pa iwe." 
Exodus23:26 M'dziko mwanu simudzakhala wakutaya mwana, kapena wosabala; ndidzakwaniritsa kuwerenga kwa masiku ako." 
Exodus23:27 Ndidzatumiza kuopsa kwanga kukutsogolere, ndipo ndidzapitikitsa anthu onse amene udzafika kwao, ndipo ndidzacita kuti adani ako onse adzakuonetsa m'mbuyo mwao." 
Exodus23:28 Ndipo ndidzatumiza mabvu akutsogolere amene adzaingitsa Ahivi, Akanani, ndi Ahiti, pamaso pako." 
Exodus23:29 Sindidzawaingista pamaso pako caka cimodzi; kuti dziko lingakhale bwinja, ndi zirombo za kuthengo zingakucurukire." 
Exodus23:30 Ndidzawaingitsa pang'ono pang'ono pamaso pako, kufikira utacuruka, ndi kulandira dziko colowa cako." 
Exodus23:31 Ndipo ndidzalemba malire ako kuyambira ku Nyanja Yofiira, kufikira ku nyanja ya Afilisiti, ndi kuyambira kucipululu kufikira ku Nyanja; popeza ndidzapereka okhala m'dzikolo m'dzanja lako, ndipo uziwaingitsa pamaso pako." 
Exodus23:32 Usapangana nao, kapena ndi milungu yao." 
Exodus23:33 Asakhale m'dziko lako iwowa, kuti angakulakwitse pa loe; pakuti ukatumikira milungu yao, kudzakukhalira msampha ndithu." 
Exodus24:1 Ndipo iye ananena ndi Mose, Ukwere kudza kwa Yehova, iwe ndi Aroni, Nadabu ndi Abihu, ndi akuru a Israyeli makumi asanu ndi awiri; ndipo mugwadire pakudza kutali;" 
Exodus24:2 ndipo Mose yekha ayandikire kwa Yehova; koma asayandikire iwowa; ndi anthunso asakwere naye. 
Exodus24:3 Ndipo Mose anadza nafotokozera anthu mau onse a Yehova, ndi masveruzo onse; ndipo anthu onse anabvomera pamodzi, nati, Mau onse walankhula Yehova tidzacita." 
Exodus24:4 Ndipo Mose analembera mau onse a Yehova, nalawira kuuka mamawa, namanga guwa la nsembe patsinde pa phiri, ndi zoimiritsa khumi ndi ziwiri, kwa mafuko khumi ndi awiri a Israyeli." 
Exodus24:5 Ndipo anatuma ana a Israyeli a misinkhu ya anyamata, ndiwo anapereka nsembe zopsereza, naphera Yehova nsembe zamtendere, zang'ombe." 
Exodus24:6 Ndipo Mose anagawa mwaziwo, nathira wina m'zotengera, nawaza wina pa guwa la nsembe." 
Exodus24:7 Ndipo anatenga buku la Cipangano, nawerenga m'makutu a anthu; ndipo iwo anati, Zonse zimene Yehova walankhula tidzacita, ndi kumvera." 
Exodus24:8 Ndipo Mose anatenga mwaziwo, nawaza pa anthu, nati, Taonani mwazi wa cipangano, cimene Yehova anacita nanu, kunena za mau awa onse," 
Exodus24:9 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni, Nadabu ndi Abihu, ndi akuru a Israyeli makumi asanu ndi awiri anakwerako;" 
Exodus24:10 ndipo anapenya Mulungu wa Israyeli; ndipo pansi pa mapazi ace panali ngati mayalidwe oyera a miyala yasafiri, ndi ngati thupi la thambo loti mbe." 
Exodus24:11 Koma sanaturutsa dzanja lace pa akuru a ena a Israyeli; ndipo anapenya Mulungu, nadya, namwa." 
Exodus24:12 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Ukwere kudza kwa Ine m'phiri muno, nukhale pompano; ndipo ndidzakupatsa magome amiyala, ndi cilamulo ndi malamulo, ndawalembera kuti uwalangize." 
Exodus24:13 Ndipo anauka Mose, ndi Yoswa mtumiki wace; ndipo Mose anakwera m'phiri la Mulungu." 
Exodus24:14 Ndipo anati kwa akuru, Tilindeni kuno kufikira tidzabwera kwa inu; ndipo taonani, Aroni ndi Huri ali nanu; munthu akakhala ndi mlandu abwere kwa iwowa." 
Exodus24:15 Ndipo Mose anakwera m'phirimo, ndi mtambo unaphimba phirilo," 
Exodus24:16 Ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unakhalabe pa phiri la Sinai, ndi mtambo unaliphimba masiku asanu ndi limodzi; ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri iye ali m'kati mwa mtambo anaitana Mose." 
Exodus24:17 Ndipo maonekedwe a ulemerero wa Yehova anali ngati mota wonyeketsa pamwamba pa phiri, pamaso pa ana a Israyeli." 
Exodus24:18 Ndipo Mose analowa m'kati mwa mtambo, nakwera m'phirimo; ndipo Mose anakhala m'phiri masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku." 
Exodus25:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Exodus25:2 Lankhula ndi ana a Israyeli, kuti anditengere copereka; ulandire copereka canga kwa munthu ali yense mtima wace umfunitsa mwini." 
Exodus25:3 Ndipo coperekaco ucilandire kwa iwo ndi ici: golidi, ndi, siliva, ndi mkuwa," 
Exodus25:4 ndi lamadzi, ndi: lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, ndi ubweya wa mbuzi;" 
Exodus25:5 ndi zikopa za nkhosa zamphongo zonika zofiira, ndi zikopa za akatumbu, ndi mtengo wasitimu;" 
Exodus25:6 mafuta akuunikira, zonunkhira za mafuta odzoza, ndi za cofukiza ca pfungo lokoma;" 
Exodus25:7 miyala yaberulo, ndi miyala yoika paefodi, ndi pacapacifuwa." 
Exodus25:8 Ndipo andimangire malo opatulika; kuti ndikhale pakati pao," 
Exodus25:9 Monga mwa zonse Ine ndirikuonetsa iwe, cifaniziro ca kacisi, ndi cifaniziro ca zipangizo zace zonse, momwemo ucimange." 
Exodus25:10 Ndipo azipanga likasa la mtengo wasitimu: utali wace mikono iwiri ndi hafu, kupingasa kwace mkono ndi hafu, msinkhu wace mkono ndi hafu." 
Exodus25:11 Ndipo ulikute ndi golidi woona, ulikute m'kati ndi kubwalo, nulipangire mkombero wagolidi pozungulira pace." 
Exodus25:12 Ndipo uliyengere mphete zinai zagolidi, ndi kuziika ku miyendo yace inai; mphete ziwiri pa mbali yace yina, ndi mphete ziwiri pa yina." 
Exodus25:13 Ndipo uzipanga mphiko za mtengo wasitimu, ndi kuzikuta ndi golidi." 
Exodus25:14 Nupise mphiko m'mphetezo pa mbali zace za likasa, zakunyamulira nazo likasalo." 
Exodus25:15 Mphiko zikhale m'zimphete za likasa; asazisolole. 
Exodus25:16 Ndipo uziika m'likasamo mboni imene ndidzakupatsa. 
Exodus25:17 Ndipo uzipanga cotetezerapo ca golidi woona; utali wace mikono iwiri ndi hafu, ndi kupingasa kwace mkono ndi hafu." 
Exodus25:18 Uzipanganso akerubi awiri agolidi; uwasule mapangidwe ace, pa mathungo ace awiri a cotetezerapo." 
Exodus25:19 Nupange kerubi mmodzi ku thungo lino, ndi kerubi wina ku thungo lina; upange akerubi ocokera kucotetezerapo, pa mathungo ace awiri." 
Exodus25:20 Ndipo akerubi afunyululire mapiko ao m'mwamba, ndi kuphimba cotetezerapo ndi mapiko ao, ndi nkhope zao zipenyane; nkhope za akerubi ziphenye kucotetezerapo," 
Exodus25:21 Ndipo uziika cotetezerapo pamwamba pa likasa, ndi kuikamo mboni ndidzakupatsayo m'likasamo." 
Exodus25:22 Ndipo pomwepo ndidzakomana ndi iwe, ow kulankhula ndi iwe, ndiri pamwamba pa cotetezerapo, pakati pa akerubi awiriwo okhala pa likasa la mboni, zonse zimene ndidzakuuza za ana a Israyeli." 
Exodus25:23 Ndipo uzipanga gome la mtengo wasitimu; utali wace mikono iwiri, ndi kupingasa kwace mkono umodzi, ow msinkhu wace mkono ndi hafu." 
Exodus25:24 Ndipo ulikute ndi golidi woona ndi kulipangira mkombero wagolidi pozungulira pace. 
Exodus25:25 Nulipangire mitanda pozungulirapo yoyesa cikhato m'kupingasa kwace, ndi pamitanda pace pozungulira upangirepo mkombero wagolidi." 
Exodus25:26 Nulipangire mphete zinai zagolidi, ndi kuika mphetezo pa ngondya zinai zokhala pa miyendo yace inai." 
Exodus25:27 Mphetezo zikhale pafupi pa mitanda, zikhale zopisamo mphiko za kunyamulira nazo gome." 
Exodus25:28 Ndipo uzipanga mphiko za mtengo wasitimu, ndi kuzikuta ndi golidi, kuti anyamulire nazo gome." 
Exodus25:29 Ndipo uzipanga mbale zace, ndi zipande zace, ndi mitsuko yace, ndi zikho zace zakuthira nazo; uzipanga za golidi woona." 
Exodus25:30 Ndipo uziikamkate woonekera pa gomelo pamaso panga nthawi zonse. 
Exodus25:31 Ndipo uzipanga coikapo nyali ca golidi woona; coikapoco cisulidwe mapangidwe ace, tsinde lace ow thupi lace; zikho zace, mitu yace, ndi maluwa ace zikhale zocokera m'mwemo;" 
Exodus25:32 ndipo m'mbali zace muturuke mphanda zisanu ndi imodzi; mphanda zitatu za coikapo nyalico zituruke m'mbali yace yina, ndi mphanda zitatu za coikapo nyalico zituruke m'mbali inzace." 
Exodus25:33 Ku mphanda yina kukhale zikho zitatu zopangika ngati katungurume, mutu ndi luwa; ndi ku mphanda inzace zikho zitatu zopangika ngati katungurume, mutu ndi luwa; zitere mphanda zisanu ndi imodzi zoturuka m'coikapo nyalico." 
Exodus25:34 Ndipo pa coikapo nyali comwe pakhale zikho zinai zopangika ngati katungurume, mitu yace ndi maluwa ace;" 
Exodus25:35 pakhale mutu pansi pa mphaada ziwiri zoturuka m'mwemo, ndi mutu pansi pa mphanda ziwiri zoturuka m'mwemo, ndi mutu pansi pa mphanda ziwiri zoturuka m'mwemo; itere ku mphanda zisanu ndi imodzi zoturuka m'coikapo nyalico." 
Exodus25:36 Mitu yao ndi mphanda zao zikhale zoturuka m'mwemo; conseci cikhale cosulika cimodzi ca golidi woona. 
Exodus25:37 Ndipo uzipanga nyali zace, zisanu ndi ziwiri; ndipo ayatse nyali zace, ziwale pandunji pace." 
Exodus25:38 Ndipo mbano zace, ndi zoolera zace, zikhale za golidi woona." 
Exodus25:39 Acipange ici ndi zipangizo izi zonse za talente wa golidi woona. 
Exodus25:40 Ndipo uyang'anire uzipanga monga mwacifaniziro cao, cimene anakuonetsa m'phirimo." 
Exodus26:1 Ndipo uzipanga kacisi ndi nsaru zophimba khumi, za bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, ndi thonje lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira; uombemo akerubi, nchito ya mmisiri." 
Exodus26:2 Utali wace wa nsaru yophimba imodzi ndiwo mikono makumi awiri kudza isanu ndi itatu, ndi kupingasa kwa nsaru imodzi ndiko mikono inai; nsaru zonse zikhale za muyeso umodzi." 
Exodus26:3 Nsaru zisanu zilumikizane yina ndi inzace; ndi nsaru zisanu zina zilumikizane yina ndi inzace. 
Exodus26:4 Ndipo uziika magango a nsaru yamadzi m'mphepete mwace mwa nsaru imodzi, ku mkawo wa cilumikizano; nucite momwemo m'mphepete mwace mwa nsaru ya kuthungoya cilumikizano dna." 
Exodus26:5 Uziika magango makumi asanu pa nsaru yocingira imodzi, nuikenso magango makumi asanu m'mphepete mwace mwa nsaru ya cilumikizano cina; ndipo magango akomanizane lina ndi linzace." 
Exodus26:6 Uzipanganso zokowera makumi asanu zagolidi, ndi kumanga nsaruzo pamodzi ndi zokowerazo; kuti kacisi akhale mmodzi." 
Exodus26:7 Ndipo uziomba nsaru zophimba za ubweya wa mbuzi zikhale hema pamwamba pa kacisi; uziomba nsaru khumi ndi imodzi. 
Exodus26:8 Utali wace wa nsaru imodzi ndiwo mikono makumi atatu, ndi kupingasa kwace kwa nsaru imodzi ndiko mikono inai; nsarukhumi ndi imodzi zikhale za muyeso womwewo." 
Exodus26:9 Nuzisoka pamodzi nsaru zisanu pa zokha ndi nsaru zisanu ndi imodzi pa zokha, nupinde nsaru yacisanu ndi cimodziyo pa khomo la hema." 
Exodus26:10 Ndipo uziika magango makumi asanu m'mphepete mwa nsaru imodzi, ya kuthungo ya cilumikizano, ndi magango makumi asanu m'mphepete mwa nsaru ya kuthungo ya cilumikizano cina." 
Exodus26:11 Ndipo uzipanga zokowera makumi asanu zamkuwa, ndi kukowetsa zokowerazo m'magangomo, ndi kumanga pamodzi hemalo likhale limodzi." 
Exodus26:12 Ndipo cotsalaco pa nsaru za hemalo, hafu yace ya nsaru yotsalirayo, icinge pambuyo pace pa kacisi." 
Exodus26:13 Ndi mkono wa pa mbali yino, ndi mkono wa pa mbali inzace, wakutsalira m'utali wace wa nsaru za hemalo, icinge pambali zace za kacisi, mbali yino ndi mbali yina, kumphimba." 
Exodus26:14 Ndipo uzipangira hema cophimba ca zikopa za nkhosa zamphongo zonika zofiira, ndi cophimba za zikopa za akatumbu pamwamba pace." 
Exodus26:15 Ndipo uzipangira kacisi matabwa oimirika, a mtengo wasitimu." 
Exodus26:16 Utali wace wa thabwa limodzi ndiwo mikono khumi, ndi kupingasa kwace kwa thabwali mkono ndi hafu." 
Exodus26:17 Pa thabwa limodzi pakhale mitsukwa iwiri, yomangika pamodzi; uzitero pa matabwa onse a kacisi." 
Exodus26:18 Ndipo uzipanga matabwa a kacisi, matabwa makumi awiri ku mbali ya kumwela, kumwela." 
Exodus26:19 Nuzipanga makamwa makumi anai asiliva pansi pa matabwa makumi awiri; makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa limodzi kwa mitsukwa yace iwiri, ndi makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa lina kwa mitsukwa yace iwiri;" 
Exodus26:20 ndi pa mbali yace yina ya kacisi, mbali ya kumpoto, pakhale matabwa makumi awiri; ndi makamwa asiliva makumi anai;" 
Exodus26:21 makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa limodzi, ndi makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa lina." 
Exodus26:22 Ndipo uzipanga matabwa asanu ndi limodzi kwa mbali ya kacisi ya kumbuyo kumadzulo. 
Exodus26:23 Nupange matabwa awiri a ngondya za kacisi za kumbuyo. 
Exodus26:24 Ndipo akhale ophatikizika pamodzi patsinde, nakhalenso ophatikizika pamodzi kumutu kwace ndi mphete imodzi; azitero onse awiri; azikhala a ngondya ziwiri." 
Exodus26:25 Ndipo pakhale matabwa asanu ndi atatu, ndi makamwa ao asiliva, ndiwo makamwa khumi mphambu asanu ndi limodzi; makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa limodzi, ndi makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa lina." 
Exodus26:26 Ndipo uzipanga mitanda ya mtengo wasitimu; isanu ya matabwa a pa mbali yina ya kacisi," 
Exodus26:27 ndi mitanda isanu ya matabwa a Pel mbali yina ya kacisi, ndi mitanda isanu ya matabwa a pa mbali ya kacisi ya kumbuyo kumadzulo." 
Exodus26:28 Ndi mtanda wa pakati pa matabwa ufikire kuthungo. 
Exodus26:29 Ndipo uzikuta matabwa ndi golidi, ndi kupanga mphete zao zagolidi zopisamo mitandayo; uzikutanso mitandayo ndi golidi." 
Exodus26:30 Ndipo uutse kacisi monga mwa makhalidwe ace amene anakusonyeza m'phiri. 
Exodus26:31 Ndipo uziomba nsaru yocinga ya thonje lamadzi, ndi lofiirira ndi lofiira, ndi la bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, aiombe ndi akerubi nchito ya mmisiri;" 
Exodus26:32 ndipo uicinge pa mizati inai ya mitengo wasitimu, zokuta ndi golidi; zokowera zao zikhale zagolidi, ndi makamwa anai asiliva." 
Exodus26:33 Ndipo uzicinga nsaru yocinga pa zokowerazo, nulowetse likasa la mboni kukati kwa nsaru yocinga; ndipo nsaru yocingayo idzakugawirani pakati pa malo opatulika ndi malo opatulikitsa." 
Exodus26:34 Ndipo uziika cotetezerapo pa likasa la mboni, m'malo opatulikitsa." 
Exodus26:35 Nuziika gomelo kunja kwa nsaru yocinga, ndi coikapo nyali pandunji pa gome, pa mbali ya kumwela ya kacisi; koma uike gomelo pa mbali ya kumpoto," 
Exodus26:36 Ndipo uziomba nsaru yotsekera pa khomo la bema, ya lakuda, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, nchito ya wopikula." 
Exodus26:37 Ndipo uzipangira nsaru yotsekerayo nsanamira zisanu za mtengo wasitimu, ndi kuzikuta ndi golidi; zokowera zao zikhale zagolidi; nuziyengera makamwa asanu amkuwa." 
Exodus27:1 Ndipo upange guwa la nsembe la mtengo wasitimu, utali wace mikono isanu, ndi kupingasa kwace mikono isanu, guwa la nsembelo likhale lampwamphwa, ndi msinkhu wace mikono itatu." 
Exodus27:2 Ndipo uzipanga nyanga zace pa ngondya zace zinai; nyanga zace zikhale zoturuka m'mwemo: nulikute ndi mkuwa: 
Exodus27:3 Ndipo uzipanga zotayira zace zakulandira mapulusa ace, ndi zoolera zace, ndi mbale zowazira zace, ndi mitungo yace, ndi zoparira moto zace; zipangizo zace zonse uzipanga zamkuwa." 
Exodus27:4 Ndipo ulipangire made, malukidwe ace ndi amkuwa; nupange pa malukidwewo ngondya zace zinai mphete zinai zamkuwa." 
Exodus27:5 Nuwaike pansi pa matso a guwa la nsembelo posungulira, kuti malukidwe alekeze pakati pa guwa la nsembelo." 
Exodus27:6 Ndipo upangire guwa la nsembe mphiko, mphiko za mtengo wasitimu, ndi kuzikuta ndi mkuwa." 
Exodus27:7 Ndipo apise mphiko m'mphetezo kuti mphikozo zikhale pa mbali ziwiri za guwa la nsembe polinyamula. 
Exodus27:8 Ulipange lagweregwere ndi matabwa; monga anakuonetsa m'phirimo; alipange momwemo. 
Exodus27:9 Upangenso bwalo la cihema; pa mbali yace ya kumwela, kumwela, pakhale nsaru zocingira zakubwaloza nsaru ya bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, utali wace wa pa mbali imodzi mikono zana;" 
Exodus27:10 ndi nsici zace makumi awiri, ndi makamwa ao makumi awiri akhale amkuwa; zokowera za nsici ndi mitanda yace zikhale zasiliva." 
Exodus27:11 Momwemonso pa mbali ya kumpoto m'utali mwace pakhale nsaru zocingira za mikono zana limodzi m'utali mwace; ndi nsici zace makumi awiri, ndi makamwa ao akhale amkuwa; zokowera za nsicizo ndi mitanda yace zikhale zasiliva." 
Exodus27:12 Ndipo m'kupingasa kwa bwaloli pa mbali ya kumadzulo mukhale nsaru zocingira za mikono makumi asanu; nsici zace zikhale khumi, ndi makamwa ao khumi." 
Exodus27:13 Ndipo m'kupingasa kwace kwa bwalo pa mbali ya kum'mawa, kum'mawa, mukhale mikono makumi asanu." 
Exodus27:14 Ndi nsaru zocingira za pa mbali imodzi ya kucipata zikhale za mikono khumi ndi isanu; nsici zace zikhale zitatu, ndi makamwa ao atatu." 
Exodus27:15 Ndi pa mbali yina pakhale nsaru zocingira za mikono khumi ndi isanu; nsici zace zikhale zitatu, ndi makamwa ao atatu."
