Exodus27:16 Ndipo pa cipata ca bwalolo pakhale nsaru yotsekera ya mikono makumi awiri, ya lamadzi ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, nchito ya wopikula; nsici zace zikhale zinai, ndi makamwa ao anai." 
Exodus27:17 Nsici zonse za pabwalo pozungulira zimangike pamodzi ndi mitanda yasiliva; zokowera zao zasiliva, ndi makamwa ao amkuwa." 
Exodus27:18 Utali wace wa bwalolo ukhale wa mikono zana limodzi, ndi kupingasa kwace makumi asanu monsemo, ndi msinkhu wace wa mpanda mikono isanu; ukhale wabafuta wa thonje losansitsa; ndi makamwa a nsicizo akhale amkuwa." 
Exodus27:19 Zipangizo zonse za kacisi, m'macitidwe ace onse, ndi ziciri zace zonse, ndi ziciri zonse za bwalo lace, zikhale zamkuwa." 
Exodus27:20 Ndipo uuze ana a Israyeli akutengere mafuta a azitona oyera opera akuunikira, kuti awalitse nyali kosalekeza." 
Exodus27:21 Aroni ndi ana ace aikonze m'cihema cokomanako, kunja kwa nsaru yocinga yokhala kumboni, kuyambira madzulo kufikira m'mawa; likhale lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yao, alisunge ana a Israyeli." 
Exodus28:1 Ndipo akuyandikire Aroni mbale wako, ndi ana ace amuna pamodzi naye, mwa ana a Israyeli, kuti andicitire Ine nchito ya nsembe, ndiwo Aroni, Nadabu, ndi Abihu, Eleazara ndi ltamara, ana a Aroni." 
Exodus28:2 Ndipo usokere Aroni mbale wako zobvala zopatulika, zikhale zaulemerero ndi zokoma." 
Exodus28:3 Ndipou lankhule ndi onse a mtima waluso, amene ndawadzaza ndi mzimu waluso, kuti amsokere Aroni zobvala apatulidwe nazo, andicitire Ine nchito ya nsembe." 
Exodus28:4 Ndipo zobvala azisoka ndizi: capacifuwa ndi efodi, ndi mwinjiro, ndi malaya opikapika, ndi nduwira, ndi mpango; tero apangire Aroni mbale wako ndi ana ace zobvala zopatulika, kuti andicitire Ine nchito ya nsembe," 
Exodus28:5 Ndipo atenge golidi, ndi lamadzi ndi lofiirira ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa." 
Exodus28:6 Naombe efodi ndi golidi, ndi lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, nchito ya mmisiri." 
Exodus28:7 Akhale nazo zapamapewa ziwiri zomangika ku nsonga zace ziwiri, kuti amangike nazo." 
Exodus28:8 Ndipo mpango wa efodi, wokhala pamenepo, kuti ammange nao, ukhale wa ciombedwe comweco, ndi woombera kumodzi, wagolidi, ndi thonje lamadzi, ndi lofiirira ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa." 
Exodus28:9 Ndipo utenge miyala iwiri yaberulo, nulocepo maina a ana a Israyeli;" 
Exodus28:10 maina asanu ndi limodzi pa mwala wina, ndi maina asanu ndi limodzi otsala pa mwala unzace, mwa kubadwa kwao." 
Exodus28:11 Uloce miyala iwiriyo ndi maina a ana a Israyeli, monga mwa nchito ya woloca miyala, monga malembedwe a cosindikizira, uipange igwirike ndi zoikamo zagolidi," 
Exodus28:12 Ndipo ulike miyala iwiriyo pa zapamapewa za efodi, ikhale miyala ya cikumbutso ca ana a Israyeli; ndipo Aroni azinyamula maina ao pa mapewa ace awiri, akhale cikumbutso pamaso pa Yehova." 
Exodus28:13 Ndipo upange zoikamo za golidi; 
Exodus28:14 ndi maunyolo awiri a golidi woona; uwapote ngati zingwe, nchito yopota; numange maunyolo opotawo pazoikamo." 
Exodus28:15 Upangenso capacifuwa ca ciweruzo, nchito ya mmisiri; uciombe mwa ciombedwe ca efodi; uciombe ndi golidi, lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa." 
Exodus28:16 Cikhale campwamphwa, copindika, utali wace cikhato cimodzi, ndi kupingasa kwace cikhato cimodzi." 
Exodus28:17 Ndipo uikepo miyala yoikikapo, mizere inai ya miyala; mzere wa odemu, pitida, ndi bareketi, ndiyo ya mzere woyamba;" 
Exodus28:18 ndi mzere waciwiri wa nofeki, safiri, ndi yahaloni;" 
Exodus28:19 ndi mizere wacitatu wa lesemu, sibu, ndi akalama;" 
Exodus28:20 ndi mzere wacinai wa tarisisi, sohamu, ndi yasefe; zikhale zogwirika ndi golidi m'zoikamo zao." 
Exodus28:21 Ndi miyalayi ikhale monga mwa maina a ana a Israyeli, khumindiawiri, monga maina ao; monga malocedwe a cosindikizira, yonse ikhale monga maina ao, kwa mafuko khumi ndi awiri." 
Exodus28:22 Upangenso maunyolo pa capacifuwa ngati zingwe, nchito yopota, ya golidi woona." 
Exodus28:23 Nupangire pa capacifuwa mphete ziwiri zagolidi, ndi kuzika mphete ziwirizo pa nsonga zace ziwiri za capacifuwa." 
Exodus28:24 Numange maunyolo awiri opota agolidi ku mphete ziwiri pansonga pace pa capacifuwa. 
Exodus28:25 Koma nsonga zace ziwiri za maunyolo opotawo uzimange ku zoikamo ziwiri, ndi kuziika pa zapamapewa ziwiri za efodi, m'tsogolo mwace." 
Exodus28:26 Ndipo upange mphete ziwiri zagolidi, ndi kuzimanga pa nsonga zace ziwiri za capacifuwa, m'mphepete mwace, m katimo ku mbali ya kuefodi." 
Exodus28:27 Upangenso mphete ziwiri zagolidi, ndi kuzimanga pa zapamapewa ziwiri za efodi, m'munsi, ku mbali yace ya kutsogolo, pafupi pa msoko wace, pamwamba pa mpango wa efodi." 
Exodus28:28 Ndipo amange capacifuwa pa mphete zace ndi mphete za efodi ndi mkuzi wamadzi, kuti cikhale pa mpango wa efodi; ndi kuti capacifuwa cisamasuke paefodi," 
Exodus28:29 Ndipo Aroni azinyamula maina a ana a Israyeli pa capacifuwa ca ciweruzo pamtima pace, pakulowa iye m'malo opatulika, akhale cikumbutso pankhope pa Yehova kosalekeza." 
Exodus28:30 Ndipo uike Urimu ndi Tumimu mwa capacifuwa ca ciweruzo; ndipo zikhale pa mtima wa Aroni, pakulowa iye pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo Aroni azinyamula ciweruzo ca ana a Israyeli pamtima pace pamaso pa Yehova kosalekeza." 
Exodus28:31 Ndipo uombe mwinjiro wa efodi ndi lamadzi lokha. 
Exodus28:32 Ndipo polowa mutu pakhale pakati pace; pakhale mkawo pozungulira polowa pace, wa nchito yoomba, ngati polowa pa malaya ociniiriza, pangang'ambike." 
Exodus28:33 Ndipo pa mbinyiru wace upange makangaza a lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiirira, pambinyiru pace pozungulira, ndi kuwapakiza ndi miliu yagolidi pozungulira;" 
Exodus28:34 mliu wagolidi ndi khangaza, mliu wagolidi ndi khangaza, pa mbinyiru wa mwinjiro pozungulira." 
Exodus28:35 Ndipo Aroni aubvale kuti atumikire nao; ndipo limveke liu lace pakulowa iye m'malo opatulika pamaso pa Yehova, ndi pakuturuka iye, kuti asafe." 
Exodus28:36 Ndipo upange golidi waphanthiphanthi woona, ndi kulocapo, monga malocedwe a cosindikizira. KUPATULIKIRA YEHOVA." 
Exodus28:37 Nuciike pamkuzi wamadzi, ndipo cikhale panduwira, cikhale patsogolo pace pa nduwira." 
Exodus28:38 Ndipo cizikhala pamphumi pace pa Aroni, ndipo Aroni azinyamula mphulupulu ya zopatulidwa, zimene ana a Israyeli azipatulira, ndi zopereka zao zonse zopatulira; ndipo cizikhala pamphumi pace kosalekeza, kuti alandiridwe pamaso pa Yehova." 
Exodus28:39 Ndipo upikule maraya am'kati abafuta a thonje losansitsa, nusoke nduwira wabafuta, nusokenso mpango wopikapika." 
Exodus28:40 Ndipo usokere ana a Aroni maraya am'kati, nuwasokere mipango; uwasokerenso akapa akhale aulemerero ndi okoma." 
Exodus28:41 Ndipo ubveke nazo Aroni mbale wako, ndi ana ace omwe; ndi a kuwadzoza, ndi kudzaza dzanja lao, ndi kuwapatula, andicitire Ine nchito ya nsembe." 
Exodus28:42 Uwasokerenso zobvala za miyendo za bafuta wa thome losansitsa kubisa marisece ao; ziyambire m'cuuno zifikire kuncafu. 
Exodus28:43 Ndipo azibvale Aroni, ndi ana ace, pakulowa iwo ku cihema cokomanako, kapena poyandikiza iwo ku guwa la nsembe kutumikira m'malo opatulika; anganyamule mphulupulu, nangafe; likhale lemba losatha la iye ndi mbumba zace pambuyo pace." 
Exodus29:1 Ici ndico uwacitire kuwapatula, andicitire nchito ya nsembe: tenga ng'ombe yamphongo, ndi nkhosa ziwiri zamphongo zangwiro," 
Exodus29:2 ndi mkate wopanda cotupitsa, ndi timitanda topanda cotupitsa tosanganiza ndi mafuta, ndi timitanda taphanthi topanda cotupitsa, todzoza ndi mafuta; utipange ndi ufa wosalala watirigu." 
Exodus29:3 Ndipo uziike mu mtanga umodzi, ndi kubwera nazo mumtanga, pamodzi ndi ng'ombe yamphongo ndi nkhosa ziwiri zamphongo." 
Exodus29:4 Ndipo ubwere nao Aroni ndi ana ace amuna ku khomo la cihema cokomanako indi kuwasambitsa m'madzi. 
Exodus29:5 Pamenepo utenge zobvalazo ndi kubveka Aroni maraya am'kati, ndi mwinjiro wa efodi, ndi efodi, ndi capacifuwa, ndi kummangira m'cuuno ndi mpango wa efodi woluka mwanzeru;" 
Exodus29:6 ndipo uike nduwira pamutu pace, ndi kuika korona wopatulika panduwirapo." 
Exodus29:7 Pamenepo utenge mafuta odzoza nao nuwatsanulire pamutu pace, ndi kumdzoza." 
Exodus29:8 Ndipo ubwere nao ana ace amuna ndi kuwabveka maraya am'kati. 
Exodus29:9 Uwamangirenso Aroni ndi ana ace amuna mipango m'cuuno mwao, nuwamangire akapa pamutu pao; ndipo akhale ansembe mwa lemba losatha; nudzaze dzanja la Aroni ndi dzanja la ana ace amuna," 
Exodus29:10 Ndipo ubwere nayo ng'ombe yamphongo patsogolo pa cihema cokomanako; ndipo Aroni ndi ana ace amuna aike manja ao pamutu pa ng'ombe yamphongoyo. 
Exodus29:11 Nuphe ng'ombe yamphongoyo pamaso pa Yehova, pa khomo la cihema cokomanako." 
Exodus29:12 Pamenepo utapeko pa mwazi wa ng'ombe yamphongo, ndi kuupaka pa nyanga za guwa la nsembe ndi cala cako, nutsanulire mwazi wonse pa tsinde la guwa la nsembe." 
Exodus29:13 Nutenge mafuta onse akukuta matumbo, ndi cokuta ca mphafa ndi imso ziwiri, ndi mafuta ali pa izo, ndi kuzitentha pa guwa la nsembe." 
Exodus29:14 Koma nyama ya ng'ombeyo, ndi cikopa cace, ndi cipwidza cace, uzitentha izi ndi moto kunja kwa cigono; ndiyo nsembe yaucimo." 
Exodus29:15 Utengenso nkhosa yamphongo imodziyo; ndi Aroni ndi ana ace amuna aike manja ao pamutu pa nkhosa yamphongoyo. 
Exodus29:16 Nuiphe nkhosa yamphongoyo, ndi kutenga mwazi wace, ndi kuuwaza pa guwa la nsembe pozungulira." 
Exodus29:17 Ndipo upadzule nkhosa yamphongo m'ziwalo zace, ndi kutsuka matumbo ace, ndi miyendo yace, ndi kuziika pa ziwalo zace, ndi pamutu pace." 
Exodus29:18 Pamenepo upsereze, nkhosa yamphongo yonse pa guwa la nsembe; ndiyo nsembe yopsereza ya Yehova, ya pfungo lokoma; ndiyo nsembe yamoto ya Yehova." 
Exodus29:19 Ndipo utenge nkhosa yamphongo yinayo; ndi Aroni ndi ana ace amuna aike manja ao pamutu pa nkhosa yamphongoyo. 
Exodus29:20 Pamenepo uiphe nkhosa yamphongoyo, nutapeko pa mwazi wace, ndi kuupaka pa ndewerere ya khutu lamanja la Aroni, ndi pa ndewerere ya khutu lamanja la ana ace amuna, ndi pa cala cacikulu ca dzanja lao lamanja, ndi pa cala cacikulu ca phazi lao lamanja, ndi kuuwaza mwaziwo pa guwa la nsembe posungulira," 
Exodus29:21 Ndipo utapeko pamwazi uli pa guwa la nsembe, ndi pa mafuta akudzoza nao, ndi kuwaza pa Aroni, ndi pa zobvala zace, ndi pa ana ace amuna, ndi pa zobvala za ana ace amuna, pamodzi ndi iye; kuti akhale wopatulidwa, ndi zobvala zace zomwe, ndi ana ace amuna ndi zobvala zao zomwe pamodzi ndi iye." 
Exodus29:22 Utengenso mafuta a nkhosa yamphongoyo, ndi me ira, ndi mafuta akukuta mat umbo, ndi cokuta ca mphafa, ndi imso ziwiri, ndi mafuta ali pamenepo, ndi mwendo wam'mwamba wa ku dzanja lamanja; pakuti ndiyo nkhosa yamphongo ya kudzaza manja;" 
Exodus29:23 ndi mkate wamphumphu umodzi, ndi kamtanda ka mkate wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ndi kamtanda kamodzi kaphanthi, ziri mu mtanga wa mkate wopanda cotupitsa wokhala pamaso pa Yehova;" 
Exodus29:24 ndipo uike zonsezo m'manja a Aroni, ndi m'manja a ana ace amuna; nuziweyule nsembe yoweyula pamaso pa Yehova." 
Exodus29:25 Pamenepo uzilandire m'manja mwao, ndi kuzipsereza pa guwa la nsembe, pa nsembe yopsereza, zicite pfungo lokoma pamaso pa Yehova; ndiyo nsembe yamoto ya Yehova." 
Exodus29:26 Ndipo utenge nganga ya nkhosa yamphongo yodzaza manja ya Aroni, ndi kuiweyula ikhale nsembe yoweyula pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo ikhale gawo lako." 
Exodus29:27 Ndipo upatule nganga va nsembe yoweyula, ndi mwendo wam'mwamba wa nsembe yokweza, imene anaiweyula, ndi imene anaikweza, za nkhosa yamphongo yakudzaza manja; ziri za Aroni, ndi za ana ace amuna;" 
Exodus29:28 ndipo zikhale za Aroni ndi za ana ace amuna, mwa lemba losatha, ziwadzere kwa ana a Israyeli; popeza ndiyo nsembe yokweza; ndipo ikhale nsembe yokweza yodzera kwa ana a Israyeli, ya kwa nsembe zamtendere zao, ndiyo nsembe yao yokweza ya Yehova." 
Exodus29:29 Ndipo zobvala zopatulika za Aroni zikhale za ana ace amuna pambuyo pace, kuti awadzoze atazibvala, nadzaze manja ao atazibvala;" 
Exodus29:30 mwana wace wamwamuna amene adzakhala wansembe m'malo mwace azibvala masiku asanu ndi awiri, pakulowa iye m'cihema cokomanako kutumikira m'malo opatulika." 
Exodus29:31 Ndipo utenge nkhosa yamphongo yodzaza manja, nuphike nayama yace m'malo opatulika." 
Exodus29:32 Ndipo Aroni ndi ana ace amuna adye nyama ya nkhosa yamphongoyo, ndi mkate uli mumtanga, pa khomo la cihema cokomanako." 
Exodus29:33 Ndipo adye zimene anacita nazo coteteza, kuti awadzaze manja ndi kuwapatulitsa; koma mlendo asadyeko, pakuti nzopatulika izi." 
Exodus29:34 Ndipo ikatsalako nyama yodzaza manja, kapena mkate kufikira m'mawa, pamenepo utenthe zotsalazo ndi moto; asazidye popeza ncopatulika ici." 
Exodus29:35 Ndipo utero nao Aroni, ndi ana ace amuna, monga mwa zonse ndakuuza; udzaze manja ao masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
Exodus29:36 Nukonze ng'ombe yamphongo, ndiyo nsembe yaucimo yakuteteza nayo, tsiku ndi tsiku; ndipo uyeretsa guwa la nsembe, pakucita coteteza pamenepo; ndipo ulidzoze kulipatula." 
Exodus29:37 Ucitire guwa la nsembe coteteza masiku asanu ndi awiri ndi kulipatula; ndipo a guwa la nsembelo likhale lopatulikitsa; ciri conse cikhudza guwa la nsembelo cikhale copatulika. 
Exodus29:38 Koma izi ndizo uzikonza pa guwa la nsembelo; ana a nkhosa awiri a caka cimodzi, tsiku ndi tsiku kosalekeza." 
Exodus29:39 Mwana wa nkhosa wina ukonze m'mawa; ndi mwana wa nkhosa wina ukonze madzulo; 
Exodus29:40 ndi pa mwana wa nkhosa mmodziyo pakhale limodzi la magawo khumi la ufa wosalala, wosanganiza ndi limodzi la magawo anai la hini wa mafuta opera; ndi limodzi la magawo anai la hini wa vinyo, likhale nsembe yothira." 
Exodus29:41 Ndi mwana wa nkhosa wina ukonze madzulo; umkonze umo unacitira copereka ca m'mawa ndi nsembe yace yothira, akhale pfungo lokoma, nsembe yamoto ya Yehova." 
Exodus29:42 Ikhale nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza ya mwa mibadwo yanu, pa khomo la cihema cokomanako, pamaso pa Yehova, kumene ndidzakomana nanu, kulankhula nawe komweko." 
Exodus29:43 Ndipo pamenepo ndidzakomana ndi ana a Israyeli; ndipo cihema cidzapatulidwa ndi ulemerero wanga. 
Exodus29:44 Ndipo ndidzapatula cihema cokomanako, ndi guwa la nsembe; ndidzapatulanso Aroni ndi ana ace amuna omwe, andicitire nchito ya nsembe." 
Exodus29:45 Ndipo ndidzakhala pakati pa ana a Israyeli, ndi kukhala Mulungu wao." 
Exodus29:46 Ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wao, amene ndinawaturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto, kuti ndikhale pakati pao. Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wao." 
Exodus30:1 Ndipo upange guwa la nsembe la kufukizapo; ulipange la mtengo wasitimu. 
Exodus30:2 Utali wace ukhale mkono, ndi kupingasa kwace mkono; likhale lampwamphwa; ndi msinkhu wace mikono iwiri; nyanga zace zituruke m'mwemo." 
Exodus30:3 Ndipo ulikute ndi golidi woona, pamwamba pace ndi mbali zace zozungulira, ndi nyanga zace; ulipangirenso mkombero wagolidi pozungulira," 
Exodus30:4 Ndipo ulipangire mphete ziwiri zagolidi pansi pa mkombero wace; uziike pa nthiti zace ziwiri, pa mbali zace ziwiri; zikhale zopisamo mphiko kulinyamula nazo." 
Exodus30:5 Ndipo upange mphiko za mtengo wasitimu, ndi kuzikuta ndi golidi." 
Exodus30:6 Nuliike cakuno ca nsaru yocinga iri ku likasa la mboni, patsogolo pa cotetezerapo ciri pamwamba pa mboni, pomwe ndidzakomana ndi iwe." 
Exodus30:7 Ndipo Aroni azifukizapo cofukiza ca zonunkhira zokoma m'mawandim'mawa, pamene akonza nyalizo, acifukize." 
Exodus30:8 Ndipo pamene Aroni ayatsa nyalizo madzulo, acifukize cofukiza cosatha pamaso pa Yehova mwa mibadwo yanu," 
Exodus30:9 Musafukizapo cofukiza cacilendo, kapena nsembe yopsereza, kapena copereka; musathirepo nsembe yothira." 
Exodus30:10 Ndipo Aroni azicita coteteza pa nyanga zace kamodzi m'caka; alicitire coteteza ndi mwazi wa nsembe yaucimo ya coteteza, mwa mibadwo yanu; ndilo lopatulikitsa la Yehova." 
Exodus30:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Exodus30:12 Pamene uwerenga ana a Israyeli, monga mwa mawerengedwe ao, munthu yense apereke kwa Yehova ciombolo ca pa moyo wace, pa kuwerengedwa iwowa; kuti pasakhale mliri pakati pao, pakuwerengedwa iwowa." 
Exodus30:13 Ici acipereke, yense wakupita kwa owerengedwa; limodzi la magawo awiri a sekeli, monga sekeli la malo opatulika; (sekeli ndilo magera makumi awiri) limodzi la magawo awiri a sekeli, ndilo copereka ca Yehova." 
Exodus30:14 Yense wakupita kwa owerengedwawo, wa zaka makumi awiri ndi wa mphambu zace, apereke coperekaco kwa Yehova." 
Exodus30:15 Wacuma asacurukitsepo, ndi osauka asacepse pa limodzi mwa magawo awiri a sekeli, pakupereka copereka kwa Yehova, kucita coteteza ca miyoyo yanu." 
Exodus30:16 Ndipo uzilandira ndarama za coteteza kwa ana a Israyeli, ndi kuzipereka pa nchito ya cihema cokomanako; kuti zikhale cikumbutso ca ana a Israyeli pamaso pa Yehova, kucita coteteza ca miyoyo yanu." 
Exodus30:17 Ndipo Yehova analankhula ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Exodus30:18 Upangenso mkhate wamkuwa, ndi tsinde lace lamkuwa, wakusambiramo; nuuike pakati pa ciliema cokomanako ndi guwa la nsembe, ndi kuthiramo madzi." 
Exodus30:19 Ndipo Aroni ndi ana ace amuna azisambiramo manja ao ndi mapazi ao; 
Exodus30:20 pakulowa iwo m'cihema cokomanako asambe ndi madzi, kuti angafe; kapena poyandikiza guwa la nsembe kutumikirako, kufukiza nsembe yamoto ya Yehova;" 
Exodus30:21 asambe manja ao ndi mapazi ao, kuti angafe: liwakhalire lemba losatha, kwa iye ndi kwa mbeu zace, mwa mibadwo yao." 
Exodus30:22 Yehova ananenanso ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Exodus30:23 Udzitengerenso zonunkhira zomveka, mure woyenda masekeli mazana asanu, ndi kinimani lonunkhira limodzi mwa magawo awiri a mureyo, ndilo masekeli mazana awiri kudza makumi asanu, ndi kane lonunkhira mazana awiri kudza makumi asanu," 
Exodus30:24 ndi kida mazana asanu, monga sekeli la malo opatulika, ndi mafuta a azitona hini limodzi;" 
Exodus30:25 ndipo ukonze nazo mafuta odzoza opatulika, osanganizika monga mwa macitidwe a wosanganiza; akhale mafuta odzoza opatulika." 
Exodus30:26 Ndipo udzoze nao cihema cokomanako, ndi likasa la mboni," 
Exodus30:27 ndi gomelo ndi zipangizo zace zonse, ndi coikapo nyali ndi zipangizo zace," 
Exodus30:28 ndi guwa la nsembe lofukizapo, ndi guwa la nsembe yopsereza ndi zipangizo zace zonse, ndi mkhate wosambiramo ndi tsinde lace." 
Exodus30:29 Ndipo uzipatule, kuti zikhale zopatulika ndithu; zonse zakuzikhudza zidzakhala zopatulika." 
Exodus30:30 Ndipo udzoze Aroni ndi ana ace amuna, ndi kuwapatula andicitire nchito ya nsembe." 
Exodus30:31 Nulankhule ndi ana a Israyeli, ndi kuti, Awa ndi mafuta odzoza opatulika a Ine mwa mibadwo yanu." 
Exodus30:32 Asawatsanulire pa thupi la munthu; kapena musakonza ena onga awa, mwa makonzedwe ace; awa ndiwo opatulika, muwayese opatulika." 
Exodus30:33 Ali yense amene akonza ena otere, kapena ali yense awaika pa mlendo, ameneyo asazidwe kwa anthu a mtundu wace." 
Exodus30:34 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Udzitengere zonunkhira, natafi, ndi sekeleti, ndi kelebuna; zonunkhira pamodzi ndi libano loona; miyeso yofanana;" 
Exodus30:35 ndipo uzikonza nazo cofukiza, cosanganiza mwa macitidwe a wosanganiza, cokometsera ndi mcere, coona, copatulika;" 
Exodus30:36 nupere cina cisalale, nuciike cakuno ca mboni m'cihema cokomanako, kumene ndidzakomana ndi iwe; uciyese copatulika ndithu." 
Exodus30:37 Koma za cofukizaco ucikonze, musadzikonzere nokha cina, mwa makonzedwe ace amene; muciyese copatulika ca Yehova." 
Exodus30:38 Ali yense wokonza cina cotere kununkhizapo, asadzidwe kwa anthu a mtundu wace." 
Exodus31:1 Za amisiri opanga nchitoyi, Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Exodus31:2 Taona ndaitana ndi kumchula dzina lace, Bezaleli, mwana wa Uri, mwana wa Huri, wa pfuke la Yuda;" 
Exodus31:3 ndipo ndamdzaza nd mzimu wa Mulungu, ndi luso, ndi nzeru, ndi cidziwitso, ndi m'nchito ziri zonse," 
Exodus31:4 kulingirira nchito zaluso, kucita ndi golidi ndi siliva ndi mkuwa," 
Exodus31:5 ndi kuzokota miyala yoikika, ndi kuzokota mtengo, kucita nchito ziri zonse." 
Exodus31:6 Ndipo Ine, taona, ndampatsa Aholiabu, mwana wa Ahisama, wa pfuko la Dani, akhale naye; ndipo ndaika luso m'mitima ya onse a mtima waluso, kuti apange zonse ndakuuza iwe;" 
Exodus31:7 cihema cokomanako, likasa la mboni, ndi cotetezerapo ciri pamwamba pace, ndi zipangizo zonse za cihemaco;" 
Exodus31:8 ndi gomelo ndi zipangizo zace, ndi coikapo nyali coona ndi zipangizo zace, ndi guwa la nsembe lofukizapo;" 
Exodus31:9 ndi guwa la nsembe yopsereza ndi zipangizo zace zonse, ndi mkhate ndi tsinde lace;" 
Exodus31:10 ndi zobvala zotumikira nazo, ndi zobvala zopatulika za Aroni wansembe, ndi zobvala za ana ace, zakucita nazo nchito ya nsembe;" 
Exodus31:11 ndi mafuta odzoza, ndi cofukiza ca zonunkhira zokoma za malo opatulika; azicita monga mwa zonse ndakuuza iwe." 
Exodus31:12 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Exodus31:13 Koma iwe, lankhula ndi ana a Israyeli, ndi kuti, Muzisunga masabata anga ndithu; pakuti ndiwo cizindikilo pakati pa Ine ndi inu mwa mibadwo yanu; kuti mudziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova wakukupatulani." 
Exodus31:14 Ndipo muzisunga Sabata; popeza ndilo lopatulika la kwa inu; ali yense wakuliipsa aphedwe ndithu; pakuti ali yense wakugwira nchito m'mwemo, munthu ameneyo asadzidwe mwa anthu a mtundu wace." 
Exodus31:15 Agwire nchito masiku asanu ndi limodzi; koma lacisanu ndi ciwiri ndilo Sabata lakupumula, lopatulika la Yehova; ali yense wogwira nchito tsiku la Sabata aphedwe ndithu." 
Exodus31:16 Cifukwa cace ana a Israyeli azisunga Sabata, kucita Sabata mwa mibadwo yao, likhale pangano losatha;" 
Exodus31:17 ndico cizindikilo cosatha pakati pa Ine ndi ana a Israyeli; pakuti Yehova analenga zam'mwamba ndi dziko lapansi masiku asanu ndi limodzi, napumula tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri, naonanso mphamvu." 
Exodus31:18 Ndipo atatha iye kulankhula ndi Mose, pa phiri la Sinai, anampatsa magome awiri a mboni, magome amiyala, olembedwa ndi cala ca Mulungu." 
Exodus32:1 Koma pamene anaona kuti Mose anacedwa kutsika m'phiri, anthuwo anasonkhana kwa Aroni, nanena naye, Ukani, tipangireni milungu yakutitsogolera; pakuti Mose uyu, munthuyu anatikweza kucokera m'dziko la Aigupto, sitidziwa comwe camgwera." 
Exodus32:2 Ndipo Aroni ananena nao, Thyolani mphete zagolidi ziri; m'makutu a akazi anu, a ana anu amuna ndi akazi, ndi kubwera nazo kwa ine." 
Exodus32:3 Ndipo anthu onse anathyola mphete zagolidi zinali m'makutu mwao, nabwera nazo kwa Aroni." 
Exodus32:4 Ndipo anazilandira ku manja ao, nacikonza ndi cozokotera, naciyenga mwana wa ng'ombe; ndipo anati, Siyi milungu yako, Israyeli, imene inakukweza kucokera m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Exodus32:5 Pakuciona Aroni, anamanga guwa la nsembe patsogolo pace; ndipo Aroni anapfuula nati, Mawa aliko madyerero a Yehova." 
Exodus32:6 Ndipo m'mawa mwace anauka mamawa, nafukiza nsembe zopsereza, nabwera nazo nsembe zamtendere; ndi anthu anakhala pansi kudya ndi kumwa, nauka kusewera." 
Exodus32:7 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Muka, tsikatu, pakuti anthu ako udakwera nao kucokera m'dziko la Aigupto wadziipsa;" 
Exodus32:8 wapatuka msanga njira imene ndinawauza; wadzinyengera mwana wa ng'ombe, namgwadira, namphera nsembe, nati, Siyi milungu yako, Israyeli, imene inakukweza kucokera m'dziko la Aigupto," 
Exodus32:9 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Ndawapenya anthu awa, taona, ndiwo anthu opulupudza;" 
Exodus32:10 ndipo tsopano ndileke, kuti ndipse mtima pa awo ndi kuwatha, ndi kukuza iwe ukhale mtundu waukuru." 
Exodus32:11 Ndipo Mose anapemba kwa Yehova Mulungu wace, nati, Yehova, mtima wanu upserenji pa anthu anu, amene munawaturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto ndi mphamvu yaikuru, ndi dzanja lolimba?" 
Exodus32:12 Akaneneranji Aaigupto; ndi kuti, Anawaturutsa coipa, kuti awaphe m'mapiri, ndi kuwatha pankhope pa dziko lapansi? Pepani, lekani coipaco ca pa anthu anu." 
Exodus32:13 Kumbukilani Abrahamu, Isake ndi Israyeli, atumiki anu, amene munawalumbirira ndi kudzichula nokha, amene munanena nao, Ndidzacurukitsa mbeu zanu ngati nyenyezi za kuthambo, ndi dziko ili lonse ndanenali ndidzapatsa mbeu zanu, likhale colowa cao nthawi zonse." 
Exodus32:14 Ndipo Yehova analeka coipa adanenaci, kuwacitira anthu ace." 
Exodus32:15 Ndipo Mose anatembenuka, natsika m'phirimo, magome awiri a mboni ali m'dzanja lace; magome olembedwa kwina ndi kwina; analembedwa mbali yina ndi inzace yomwe." 
Exodus32:16 Ndipo magomewo ndiwo nchito ya Mulungu, kulembaku ndiko kulemba kwa Mulungu, kozokoteka pa magomewo." 
Exodus32:17 Ndipo pamene Yoswa anamva phokoso la kupfuula kwa anthu, anati kwa Mose, Kuli phokoso la nkhondo kucigono." 
Exodus32:18 Koma iye anati, Phokosoli sindilo la kupfuula kwa olakika, kapena la kupfuula kwa opasuka; koma phokoso ndikumvali ndilo la othirirana mang'ombe." 
Exodus32:19 Ndipo kunali, pamene anayandikiza cigono, anaona mwana wa ng'ombeyo ndi kubvinako; ndipo Mose anapsa mtima, nataya magome ali m'manja mwace, nawaswa m'tsinde mwa phiri." 
Exodus32:20 Ndipo anatenga mwana wa ng'ombe anampangayo, namtentha ndi moto, nampera asalale, namwaza pamadzi, namwetsako ana a Israyeli." 
Exodus32:21 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Aroni, Anthu awa anakucitiranji, kuti iwe watengera iwo kulakwa kwakukuru kotere?" 
Exodus32:22 Ndipo Aroni anati, Asapse mtima mbuye wanga; udziwa anthuwa kuti akhumba coipa." 
Exodus32:23 Pakuti ananena nane, Tipangireni milungu yakutitsogolera; popeza Mose uyu, munthuyu anatikweza kucokera m'dziko la Aigupto, sitidziwa comwe camgwera." 
Exodus32:24 Ndipo ndinanena nao, Ali yense ali naye golidi amthyole; ndipo anandipatsa; ndipo ndinaciponya m'moto, ndimo anaturukamo mwana wa ng'ombe uyu." 
Exodus32:25 Ndipo pamene Mose anaona kuti anthu anamasuka, popeza Aroni adawamasula kuti awatonze adani ao," 
Exodus32:26 Mose anaima pa cipata ca cigono, nati, Onse akubvomereza Yehova, adze kwa ine. Pamenepo ana amuna onse a Levi anasonkhana kwa iye," 
Exodus32:27 Ndipo ananena nao, Atero Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, Yense amange lupanga lace m'cuuno mwace, napite, nabwerere kuyambira cipata kufikira cipata, pakati pa cigono, naphe yense mbale wace, ndi yense bwenzi lace, ndi yense mnansi wace." 
Exodus32:28 Ndipo ana a Levi anacita monga mwa mau a Mose; ndipo adagwa tsiku lija anthu ngati zikwi zitatu. 
Exodus32:29 Popeza Mose adati, Mdzazireni Yehova manja anu lero, pakuti yense akhale mdani wa mwana wace wamwamuna, ndi mdani wa mbale wace; kuti akudalitseni lero lino." 
Exodus32:30 Ndipo kunali m'mawa mwace, kuti Mose anati kwa anthu, Mwacimwa kucimwa kwakukulu; koma ndikwera kwa Yehova tsopano, kapena ndidzacita cotetezera ucimo wanu." 
Exodus32:31 Ndipo Mose anabwerera kumka kwa Yehova, nati, Ha! pepani, anthu awa anacimwa kucimwa kwakukuru, nadzipangira milungu yagolidi." 
Exodus32:32 Koma tsopano, kapena mudzakhululukira kucimwa kwao; koma ngati mukana, mundifafanizetu, kundicotsa m'buku lanu limene munalembera," 
Exodus32:33 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, iye amene wandicimwira, ndifafaniza yemweyo kumcotsa m'buku langa." 
Exodus32:34 Ndipo tsopano, muka, tsogolera anthu kumka nao kumene ndinakuuza; taona, mthenga wanga akutsogolera; koma tsiku lakuwazonda Ine ndidzawalanga cifukwa ca kucimwa kwao." 
Exodus32:35 Ndipo Yehova anakantha anthu, cifukwa anapanga mwana wa ng'ombe amene Aroni anapanga." 
Exodus33:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Muka, kwera kucokera kuno, iwe ndi anthu amene unawakweza kucokera m'dziko la Aigupto, kumka ku dzikolo ndinalumbirira nalo Abrahamu, ndi Isake, ndi Yakobo, ndi kuti, Ndidzapatsa mbeu zako ilo;" 
Exodus33:2 ndipo ndidzatuma mthenga akutsogolere; ndipo ndidzapitikitsa Akanani, ndi Aamori, ndi Ahiti, ndi Aperizi, Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi;" 
Exodus33:3 kudziko koyenda mkaka ndi uci ngati madzi; pakuti sindidzakwera pakati pa inu; popeza inu ndinu anthu opulupudza; ndingathe inu panjira. 
Exodus33:4 Ndipo pamene anthu anamva mau awa oipa anacita cisoni; ndipo panalibe mmodzi anabvala zokometsera zace. 
Exodus33:5 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, Inu ndinu anthu opulupudza; ndikakwera kulowa pakati pa inu kamphindi kamadzi, ndidzakuthani; koma tsopano, bvulani zokometsera zanu, kuti ndidziwe comwe ndikucitireni." 
Exodus33:6 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anazicotsera zokometsera zao kuyambira pa phiri la Horebe. 
Exodus33:7 Ndipo Mose akatenga cihemaco nacimanga kunja kwa cigono, kutari kwa cigono; nacicha, Cihema cokomanako. Ndipo kunakhala kuti yense wakufuna Yehova anaturuka kumka ku cihema cokomanako kunja kwa cigono." 
Exodus33:8 Ndipo kunali, pakuturuka Mose kumka ku cihemaco kuti anthu onse anaimirira, nakhala ciriri, munthu yense pakhomo pa hema wace, nacita cidwi pa Mose, kufikira atalowa m'cihemaco." 
Exodus33:9 Ndipo kunali, pakulowa Mose m'cihemaco, mtambo njo udafutsika, nuima pakhomo pa cihemaco; ndipo Yehova analankhula ndi Mose." 
Exodus33:10 Ndipo anthu onse anaona mtambo njo ulikuima pakhomo pa cihema; ndi anthu onse anaimirira, nalambira, yense pakhomo pa hema wace." 
Exodus33:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose kopenyana maso, monga munthu alankhula ndi bwenzi lace. Ndipo anabwerera kumka kucigono; koma mtumiki wace Yoswa, mwana wa Nuni, ndiye mnyamata msinkhu wace, sanacoka m'cihemamo." 
Exodus33:12 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Yehova, Taonani, Inu munena ndi ine, Kwera nao anthu awa; koma simunandidziwitsa amene mudzamtuma amuke nane. Koma munati, Ndikudziwa dzina lako, wapezanso ufulu pamaso panga," 
Exodus33:13 Ndipo tsopano, ngati ndapeza ufulu pamaso panu, mundidziwitsetu njira zanu, kuti ndikudziweni, ndi kuti ndipeze ufulu pamaso panu; ndipo penyani kuti mtundu uwu ndi anthu anu." 
Exodus33:14 Ndipo anati, Nkhope yanga idzamuka nawe, ndipo ndidzakupumuza." 
Exodus33:15 Ndipo ananena ndi Iye, Ikapanda kumuka nane nkhope yanu, musatikweze kucokera kuno." 
Exodus33:16 Pakuti cidziwfka ndi ciani tsopano kuti ndapeza ufulu pamaso panu, ine ndi anthu anu? Si pakumuka nafe Inu, kuti ine ndi anthu anu tisiyane ndi anthu onse akukhala pa nkhope ya dziko lapansi?" 
Exodus33:17 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Ici comwe wanenaci ndidzacita; pakuti wapeza ufulu pamaso panga, ndipo ndikudziwa dzina lako." 
Exodus33:18 Ndipo anati, Ndionetsenitu ulemerero wanu." 
Exodus33:19 Ndipo iye anati, Ndidzapititsa ukoma wanga wonse pamaso pako, ndipo ndidzachula dzina la Yehova pamaso pako; ndipo ndidzacitira ufulu amene ndidzamcitira ufulu; ndi kucitira cifundo amene ndidzamcitira cifundo." 
Exodus33:20 Ananenanso, Sungathe kuona nkhope yanga; pakuti palibe munthu adzandiona Ine ndi kukhala ndi moyo." 
Exodus33:21 Ndipo Yehova anati, Taona pali Inepo pali malo, ndipo uime pathanthwe;" 
Exodus33:22 ndipo kudzakhala, pakupitira olemerero wanga, ndidzakuika mu mpata wa thanthwe, ndi kukuphimba ndi dzanja langa, mpaka nditapitira;" 
Exodus33:23 ndipo pamene ndicotsa dzanja langa udzaona m'mbuyo mwanga; koma nkhope yanga siidzaoneka. 
Exodus34:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Dzisemere magome awiri amiyala onga oyamba aja; ndipo ndidzalembera pa magomewo mau omwewo anali pa magome oyambawo, amene unawaswa." 
Exodus34:2 Nukonzekeretu m'mawa, nukwere m'mawa m'phiri la Sinai, nuimepo pamaso panga pamwamba pa phiri." 
Exodus34:3 Palibe munthu akwere ndi iwe, asaonekenso munthu ali yense m'phiri monse; ndi zoweta zazing'ono kapena zoweta zazikuru zisadye kuphiri kuno." 
Exodus34:4 Ndipo anasema magome awiri a miyala, onga oyamba aja; ndipo Mose anauka mamawa nakwera m'phiri la Sinai, monga Yehova adamuuza, nagwira m'dzanja mwace magome awiri amiyala." 
Exodus34:5 Ndipo Yehova anatsika mumtambo, naimapo pamodzi ndi iye, napfuula dzina la Yehova." 
Exodus34:6 Ndipo Yehova anapita pamaso pace, napfuula, Yehova, Yehova, Mulungu wacifundo ndi wacisomo, wolekereza, ndi wa ukoma mtima wocuruka, ndi wacoonadi;" 
Exodus34:7 wakusungira anthu osawerengeka cifundo, wakukhululukira mphulupulu ndi kulakwa ndi kucimwa; koma wosamasula woparamula; wakulangira ana ndi zidzukulu cifukwa ca mphulupulu ya atate ao, kufikira mbadwo wacitatu ndi wacinai." 
Exodus34:8 Ndipo Mose anafulumira, naweramira pansi, nalambira." 
Exodus34:9 Ndipo anati, Ngati ndapeza ufulu tsopane pamaso panu, Ambuye, ayendetu Ambuye pakati pa ife; pakuti awa ndi anthu opulupudza; ndipo mutikhululukire mphulupulu ndi ucimo wathu, ndipo mutilandire tikhale colowa canu." 
Exodus34:10 Ndipo iye anati, Taona, Ine ndicita pangano; ndidzacita zozizwa pamaso pa anthu ako onse, sizinacitika zotere ku dziko lonse lapansi, kapena ku mtundu uti wonse wa anthu; ndipo anthu onse amene uli pakati pao adzaona nchito ya Yehova, pakuti cinthu ndikucitiraci ncoopsa." 
Exodus34:11 Dzisungire cimene Ine ndikuuza lero lino: taona, ndiingitsa pamaso pako Aamori ndi Akanani, ndi Ahiti ndi Aperizi, ndi Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi." 
Exodus34:12 Dzicenjere ungacite pangano ndi anthu a ku dziko limene umukako, lingakhale msampha pakati panu;" 
Exodus34:13 koma mupasule maguwa a nsembe ao, ndi kuphwanya zoimiritsa zao, ndi kulikha zifanizo zao;" 
Exodus34:14 pakuti musalambira mulungu wina; popeza Yehova dzina lace ndiye Wansanje, ali Mulungu wansanje;" 
Exodus34:15 ungacite pangano ndi iwo okhala m'dzikomo; ndipo angacite cigololo pakutsata milungu yao, nangaphere nsembe milungu yao, ndipo angakuitane wina, nukadye naye nsembe zace;" 
Exodus34:16 ndipo ungatengereko ana ako amuna ana ao akazi; nangacite cigololo ana ao akazi potsata milungu yao, ndi kucititsa ana anu amuna cigololo potsata milungu yao." 
Exodus34:17 Usadzipangire milungu yoyenga. 
Exodus34:18 Uzisunga madyerero a mkate wopanda cotupitsa. Uzidya mkate wopanda cotupitsa masiku asanu ndi awiri, monga ndakuuza pa nthawi yonenedwa, m'mwezi wa Abibu; pakuti mwezi wa Abibu unaturuka m'Aigupto." 
Exodus34:19 Onse oyambira kubadwa ndi anga; ndi zoweta zanu zonse zazimuna, zoyamba za ng'ombe ndi za nkhosa." 
Exodus34:20 Koma woyamba wa buru uzimuombola ndi mwana wa nkhosa; ukapanda kumuombola, uzimthyola khosi. Ana anu amuna oyamba onse uziwaombola. Ndipo asamaoneka pamaso panga opanda kanthu." 
Exodus34:21 Masiku asanu ndi limodzi uzigwira nchito, koma lacisanu ndi ciwiri uzipumula; nyengo yakulima ndi nyengo yamasika uzipumula." 
Exodus34:22 Ndipo uzicita madyerero a masabata, ndiwo madyerero a zipatso zoyamba za masika a tirigu, ndi madyerero a kututa pakutha pa caka." 
Exodus34:23 Amuna ako onse azioneka pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu, Mulungu wa Israyeli, katatu caka cimodzi." 
Exodus34:24 Pakuti ndidzaingitsa mitundu ya anthu pamaso pako, ndi kukulitsa malire ako; ndipo palibe munthu adzakhumba dziko lako, pakukwera iwe kudzaoneka pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wako katatu caka cimodzi." 
Exodus34:25 Usapereke mwazi wa nsembe yanga yophera pamodzi ndi mkate wacotupitsa; ndi nsembe yophera ya madyerero a Paskha asaisiye kufikira m'mawa. 
Exodus34:26 Uzibwera nazo zipatso zoyambayamba za nthaka yako ku nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wako. Usaphika mwana wa mbuzi mu mkaka wa mace. 
Exodus34:27 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Ulembere mau awa; pakuti monga mwa mau awa ndapangana ndi iwe ndi Israyeli." 
Exodus34:28 Ndipo anakhala pomwepo ndi Yehova masiku makumi anai, usana ndi usiku; sanadya mkate kapena kumwa madzi. Ndipo analembera pa magomewo mau a panganolo, mau khumiwo." 
Exodus34:29 Ndipo kunali pakutsika Mose pa phiri la Sinai, ndi magome awiri a mboni m'dzanja lace la Mose, pakutsika iye m'phirimo, Mose sanadziwa kuti khungu la nkhope yace linanyezimira popeza iye adalankhula naye." 
Exodus34:30 Ndipo pamene Aroni ndi ana onse a Israyeli anaona Mose, taonani, khungu la nkhope yace linanyezimira; ndipo anaopa kumyandikiza." 
Exodus34:31 Koma Mose anawaitana; ndipo Aroni ndi akazembe onse a khamu la anthu anabwera kwa iye; ndipo Mose analankhula nao. 
Exodus34:32 Ndipo atatero, ana onse a Israyeli anayandikiza; ndipo iye anawauza zonse Yehova adalankhula naye m'phiri la Sinai." 
Exodus34:33 Ndipo Mose atatha kulankhula nao, anaika cophimba pankhope pace." 
Exodus34:34 Koma pakulowa Mose pamaso pa Yehova kunena ndi iye, ariacotsa cophimbaco, kufikira akaturuka; ndipo ataturuka analankhula ndi ana a Israyeli cimene adamuuza." 
Exodus34:35 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anaona nkhope ya Mose, kuti khungu la nkhope ya Mose linanyezimira; ndipo Mose anaikanso cophimba pankhope pace, kufikira akalowa kulankhula ndi iye." 
Exodus35:1 Ndipo Mose anasonkhanitsa khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli, nanena nao, Siwa mau amene Yehova anauza, kuti muwacite." 
Exodus35:2 Masiku asanu ndi limodzi azigwira nchito; koma tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri muliyese lopatulika, Sabata lakupuma la Yehova: ali yense agwira nchito pamenepo, aphedwe," 
Exodus35:3 Musamasonkha mota m'nyumba zanu ziri zonse tsiku la Sabata. 
Exodus35:4 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli, ndi kuti, Ici ndi cimene Yehova anauza ndi kuti," 
Exodus35:5 Mumtengere Yehova copereka ca mwa zanu; ali yense wa mtima womfunitsa mwini abwere naco, ndico copereka ca Yehova;" 
Exodus35:6 golidi, ndi siliva, ndi mkuwa; ndi lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, ndi ubweya wa mbuzi;" 
Exodus35:7 ndi zikopa za nkhosa zamphongo zonika zofiira, ndi zikopa za akatumbu, ndi mtengo wasitimu;" 
Exodus35:8 ndi mafuta akuunikira, ndi zonunkhira za mafuta odzoza, ndi cofukiza ca pfungo lokoma;" 
Exodus35:9 ndi miyala yasohamu, ndi miyala yoika ya efodi, ndi ya capacifuwa." 
Exodus35:10 Ndipo abwere yense wa mtima waluso mwa inu, napange zonse zimene Yehova anauza;" 
Exodus35:11 kacisi, hema wace, ndi cophimba cace, zokowera zace, ndi matabwa ace, mitanda yace, mizati, nsanamira, ndi nsici zace, ndi makamwa ao;" 
Exodus35:12 likasa, ndi mphiko zace, cotetezerapo, ndi nsaru yocinga yotseka;" 
Exodus35:13 gome, ndi mphiko zace, ndi zipangizo zace zonse, ndi mkate woonekera;" 
Exodus35:14 ndi coikapo nyali ca kuunika, ndi zipangizo zace, ndi nyali zace, ndi mafuta a kuunika;" 
Exodus35:15 ndi guwa la nsembe lofukizapo, ndi mphiko zace, ndi mafuta odzoza, ndi cofukiza ca pfungo lokoma, ndi nsaru yotsekera pakhomo, pa khomo la kacisi;" 
Exodus35:16 guwa la nsembe yopereza, ndi made amkuwa, mphiko zace, ndi zipangizo zace zonse, mkhate ndi tsinde lace;" 
Exodus35:17 nsaru zocingira za kubwalo, nsici zace, ndi makamwa ace, ndi nsaru yotsekera ku cipata ca pabwalo;" 
Exodus35:18 ziciri za cihema, ndi ziciri za kubwalo, ndi zingwe zao;" 
Exodus35:19 zobvala za kutumikira nazo m'maopatulika, zobvala zopatulika za. Aroni wansembe, ndi zobvala za ana ace, zakugwira nazo nchito ya nsembe." 
Exodus35:20 Ndipo khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli linacoka pamaso pa Mose. 
Exodus35:21 Ndipo anadza, ali yense wofulumidwa mtima, ndi yense mzimu wace wamfunitsa, nabwera naco copereka ca Yehova, ca ku nchito ya cihema cokomanako, ndi ku utumiki wace wonse, ndi ku zobvala zopatulika." 
Exodus35:22 Ndipo anadza amuna ndi akazi, onse akufuna mtima eni ace, nabwera nazo mphete za mphuno, mphete za m'makutu, ndi mphete zosindikizira, ndi zidzingwiri, zonsezi zokometsera zagolidi; inde yense wakupereka kwa Yehova copereka cagolidi." 
Exodus35:23 Ndipo ali yense kwao kunapezeka lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, ndi ubweya wa mbuzi, ndi zikopa za nkhosa zamphongo zonika zofiira, ndi zikopa za akatumbu, anabwera nazo." 
Exodus35:24 Yense wakupereka copereka ca siliva ndi mkuwa, anabwera naco copereka ca Yehova; ndi yense amene kwao kunapezeka mtengo wasitimu wa ku macitidwe onse a nchitoyi, anabwera nao." 
Exodus35:25 Ndi akazi onse a mtima waluso anapota ndi manja ao, nabwera nalo thonje lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa." 
Exodus35:26 Ndi akazi onse ofulumidwa mtima ndi luso anapota ubweyawo wa mbuzi. 
Exodus35:27 Ndi akuru anabwera nayo miyala yasohamu, ndi miyala yoti aiike kuefodi, ndi kucapacifuwa;" 
Exodus35:28 ndi zonunkhira, ndi mafuta akuunikira, ndi mafuta odzoza, ndi cofukiza za pfungo lokoma." 
Exodus35:29 Amuna ndi akazi onse a ana a Israyeli amene mitima yao inawafunitsa eni kubwera nazo za ku nchito yonse imene Yehova anauza Ipangike ndi dzanja la Mose, anabwera naco copereka cofuna mwini, kucipereka kwa Yehova." 
Exodus35:30 Ndipo Mose anati kwa ana a Israyeli, Taonani, Yehova anaitana, ndi kumchula dzina lace, Bezaleli, mwana wa Uri, mwana wa Huri, wa pfuko la Yuda;" 
Exodus35:31 ndipo anamdzaza ndi mzimu wa Mulungu, ndi luso, ndi nzeru, ndi cidziwitso, za m'nchito ziri zonse;" 
Exodus35:32 kulingirira nchito zaluso, kucita ndi golidi, ndi siliva, ndi mkuwa;" 
Exodus35:33 ndi kuzokota miyala voikika, ndi kuzokota mitengo, kucita m'nchito ziri zonse zaluso." 
Exodus35:34 Ndipo anaika m'mtima mwace kuti alangize ena, iye ndi Aholiabu mwana wa Ahisama, wa pfuko la Dani." 
Exodus35:35 Amenewo anawadzaza ndi luso lamtima, lakucita nchito ziri zonse, ya kuzokota miyala, ndi ya mmisiri waluso, ndi ya wopikula ndi lamadzi ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, ndi ya muomba, ya iwo akucita nchito iri yonse, ndi ya iwo olingirira nchito yaluso." 
Exodus36:1 Aholiabu, ndi anthu aluso, amene Yehova adaika luso ndi nzeru m'mtima mwao adziwe macitidwe ace a nchito yonse ya utumiki wace wa malo opatulika, monga mwa zonse adauza Yehova." 
Exodus36:2 Ndipo Mose adaitana Bezaleli ndi Aholiabu, ndi anthu onse aluso, amene Yehova adaika luso m'mtima mwao, onse ofulumidwa mtima ayandikize kunchito kuicita." 
Exodus36:3 Ndipo analandira kwa Mose copereka conse, cimene ana a Israyeli adabwera naco cikhale ca macitidwe a nchito ya malo opatulika, aipange naco. Koma anaonjeza kubwera nazo kwa iye zopereka zofuna mwini, m'mawa ndi m'mawa." 
Exodus36:4 Ndipo aluso onse, akucita nchito yonse ya malo opatulika, anadza onse ndi kusiya nchito yao: analinkucita;" 
Exodus36:5 nanena ndi Mose, ndi kuti, Anthu alinkubwera nazo zocuruka, zakuposera zoyenera nchito imene Yehova anauza icitike." 
Exodus36:6 Ndipo Mose analamulira, ndipo anamveketsa mau mwa cigono conse, ndi kuti, Asaonjezere nchito ya ku copereka ca malo opatulika, ngakhale mwamuna ngakhale mkazi. Tero anawaletsa anthu asabwere nazo zina." 
Exodus36:7 Popeza zipangizo zinakwanira nchito yonse icitike, zinatsalakonso." 
Exodus36:8 Ndipo onse a mtima waluso mwa iwo akucita nchitoyi anapanga kacisi ndi nsaru zophimba khumi; anaziomba ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, ndi lamadzi; ndi lofiira, ndi lofiira, ndi akerubi, nchito ya mmisiri." 
Exodus36:9 Utali wace wa nsaru yophimba imodzi ndiwo mikono makumi awiri kudza isanu ndi itatu, ndi kupingasa kwace kwa nsaru imodzi mikono inai; nsaru zonse zinafanana muyeso wao." 
Exodus36:10 Ndipo analumikiza nsaru zisanu yina ndi inzace; nalumikiza nsaru zisanu zina yina ndi inzace. 
Exodus36:11 Ndipo anaika magango ansaru yamadzi m'mphepete mwace mwa nsaru imodzi ku mkawo wa cilumikizano; nacita momwemo m'mphepete mwace mwa nsaru ya kuthungo, ya cilumikizano caciwiri." 
Exodus36:12 Anaika magango makumi asanu pa nsaru imodzi, naikanso magango makumi asanu m'mphepete mwace mwa nsaru ya cilumikizano cina; magango anakomanizana lina ndi linzace." 
Exodus36:13 Ndipo anazipanga zokowera makumi asanu zagolidi, namanga nsaru pamodzi ndi zokowerazo; ndipo kacisi anakhala mmodzi." 
Exodus36:14 Ndipo anaomba nsaru zophimba za ubweya wa mbuzi zikhale hema pamwamba pa kacisi; anaomba nsaru zophimba khumi ndi imodzi. 
Exodus36:15 Utali wace wa nsaru imodzi ndiwo mikono makumi atatu, ndi kupingasa kwace kwa nsaru imodzi ndiko mikono inai; nsaru khumi ndi imodzi zinafanana muyeso wao." 
Exodus36:16 Ndipo anamanga pamodzi nsaru zisanu pa zokha, ndi nsaru zisanu ndi imodzi pa zokha." 
Exodus36:17 Ndipo anapanga magango makumi asanu m'mphepete mwa nsaru imodzi, ya kuthungo, ya cilumikizano, naika magango makumi asanu m'mphepete mwa nsaru ya kuthungo, ya cilumikizano cina." 
Exodus36:18 Ndipo anapanga zokowera makumi asanu zamkuwa kumanga pamodzi hemalo, kuti likhale limodzi." 
Exodus36:19 Ndipo anasokera hemalo cophimba ca zikopa za nkhosa zamphongo zonika zofiira, ndi cophimba ca zikopa za akatumbu pamwamba pace." 
Exodus36:20 Ndipo anapanga matabwa a kacisi, oimirika, a mtengo wasitimu." 
Exodus36:21 Utali wace wa thabwa limodzi ndiwo mikono khumi, ndi kupingasa kwace kwa thabwa limodzi ndiko mkono ndi hafu." 
Exodus36:22 Pa thabwa limodzi panakhala mitsukwa iwiri, yomangika pamodzi; anawapanga momwemo matabwa onse a kacisi." 
Exodus36:23 Ndipo anapanga matabwa a kacisi; matabwa makumi awiri a ku mbali ya kumwela, kumwela;" 
Exodus36:24 napanga makamwa makumi anai pansi pamatabwa makumi awiri; makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa limodzi kwa mitsukwa yace iwiri, ndi makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa lina kwa mitsukwa yace iwiri." 
Exodus36:25 Ndi ku mbali yina ya kacisi, mbali ya kumpoto, anapanga matabwa makumi awiri, ndi makamwa ao makumi anai asiliva;" 
Exodus36:26 makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa limodzi, ndi makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa lina." 
Exodus36:27 Ndi ku mbali ya kumbuyo ya kacisi kumadzulo anapanga matabwa asanu ndi limodzi. 
Exodus36:28 Anapanganso matabwa awiri a ku ngondya za kacisi, m'mbali zace ziwirio" 
Exodus36:29 Ndipo anaphatikizika pamodzi patsinde, naphatikizilca pamodzi pamutu pace ndi mphete imodzi; anatero nao onse awiri pa ngondya ziwiri." 
Exodus36:30 Ndipo panali matabwa asanu ndi atatu ndi makamwa ao asiliva, makamwa khumi kudza asanu ndi limodzi; makamwa awiri pansi pa thabwa limodzi." 
Exodus36:31 Ndipo anapanga mitanda ya mtengo wasmmu; Isanu ya matabwa a pa mbali yina ya kacisi," 
Exodus36:32 ndi mitanda isanu ya matabwa a pa mbali inzace ya kacisi, ndi mitanda lsanu ya matabwa a kacisi ali pa mbali ya kumadzulo." 
Exodus36:33 Ndipo anapititsa mtanda wa pakatipo, pakati pa matabwa kufikira kuthungo." 
Exodus36:34 Ndipo anakuta matabwa ndi golidi, napanga mphete zao zagolidi zikhale zopisamo mitandayo, nakuta mitandayo ndi golidi." 
Exodus36:35 Ndipo anaomba nsaru yocinga ndi lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa; anaciomba ndi akerubi nchito ya mmisiri." 
Exodus36:36 Ndipo anaipangira mizati inai yasitimu, nazikuta ndi golidi; zokowera zao zinali zagolidi; ndipo anaziyengera makamwa anai asiliva." 
Exodus36:37 Ndipo anaomba nsaru yotsekera pa khomo la cihemaco, ya lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, nchito ya wopikula;" 
Exodus36:38 ndi nsamamira zace zisanu ndi zokowera zao; nakuta mitu yao ndi mitanda yao ndi golidi; ndi makamwa ao asanu anali amkuwa. 
Exodus37:1 Ndipo Bezaleli anapanga likasa la mtengo wasitimu; utali wace mikono iwiri ndi hafu, ndi kupingasa kwace mkono ndi hafu, ndi msinkhu wace mkono ndi hafu;" 
Exodus37:2 ndipo analikuta ndi golidi woona m'kati ndi kunja, nalipangira mkombero wagolidi pozungulira pace." 
Exodus37:3 Ndipo analiyengera mphete zinai zagolidi pa miyendo yace inai; mphete ziwiri pa mbali yace imodzi, ndi mphete: ziwiri pa mbali yace yina." 
Exodus37:4 Ndipo anapanga mphiko za mtengo wasitimu, nazikuta ndi golidi." 
Exodus37:5 Ndipo anapisa mphiko m'mphetezo pa mbali zace za likasalo, kuti anyamulire nazo likasa." 
Exodus37:6 Ndipo anapanga cotetezerapo ca golidi woona; utali wace mikono iwiri ndi hafu, ndi kupingasa kwace mkono ndi hafu." 
Exodus37:7 Anapanganso akerubi awiri agolidi; anacita kuwasula mapangidwe ace, pa mathungo ace swiri a coteteze rapo;" 
Exodus37:8 kerubi mmodzi pa mbali yace imodzi, ndi kerubi wilia pa mbali yace yina; anapanga akerubi ocokera m'cotetezerapo, pa mathungo ace awiri." 
Exodus37:9 Ndipo akerubi anafunyulira mapiko ao m'mwamba, ndi kuphimba cotetezerapo ndi mao piko ao, ndi nkhope zao zopeoyana; zinapenya kucotetezerapo nkhope zao." 
Exodus37:10 Ndipo anapanga gome la mtengo wasitimu; utali wace mikono iwiri, ndi kupingasa kwace mkono limodzi, ndi msinkhu wace mkono ndi hafu;" 
Exodus37:11 ndipo analikuta ndi golidi woona, nalipangira mkombero wagolidi pozungulira pace." 
Exodus37:12 Analipangiranso mitanda pozungulirapo, yoyesa cikhato m'kupingasa kwace, ndi pamitanda pace pozungulira anapangirapo mkombero wagolidi." 
Exodus37:13 Ndipo analiyengera mphete zinai zagolidi, naika mphetezo pa ngondya zace zinai zokhala pa miyendo yace inai." 
Exodus37:14 Mphetezo zinali pafupi pa mitanda, zikhale zopisamo mphiko kunyamulira nazo gomelo." 
Exodus37:15 Ndipo anapanga mphiko za mtengo wasitimu, nazikuta ndigolidi, kunyamulira nazo gomelo." 
Exodus37:16 Anapanganso zipangizo za gomelo, mbale zace, ndi zipande zace, ndi mitsuko yace, ndi zikho zace zakuthira nazo, za golidi woona." 
Exodus37:17 Ndipo anapanga coikapo nyali ca golidi woona; mapangidwe ace a coikapo nyalico anacita cosula, tsinde lace ndi thupi lace, zikho zace, mitu yace, ndi maluwa ace zinakhala zocokera m'mwemo;" 
Exodus37:18 ndi m'mbali zace munaturuka mphanda zisanu ndi imodzi; mphanda zitatu za coikapo nyali zoturuka m'mbali yace imodzi, ndi mphanda zitatu za coikapo nyali zoturuka m'mbali yace yina;" 
Exodus37:19 pa mphanda imodzi panali zikho zitatu zopangika ngati katungurume, mutu ndi luwa; ndi pa mphanda yina zikho zitatu zopangika ngati katungurume, mutu ndi luwa; zinatero mphanda zisanu ndi imodzi zoturuka m'coikapo nyali." 
Exodus37:20 Ndipo pa coikapo nyali comwe panali zikho zinai zopangika ngati katungurume, mitu yace ndi maluwa ace;" 
Exodus37:21 ndipo panali mutu pansi pa mphanda ziwiri, zoturuka m'mwemo, ndi mutu pansi pa mphanda ziwiri, zoturuka m'mweno, ndi mutu pansi pa mphanda ziwiri, zoturuka m'mwemo, inatero pa mphanda zisanu ndi imodzi zocokera m'mwemo." 
Exodus37:22 Mitu yao ndi mphanda zao zinaturuka m'mwemo; conseci cinali cosulika pamodzi ca golidi woona. 
Exodus37:23 Ndipo anapanga nyali zace zisanu ndi ziwiri ndi mbano zace, ndi zoolera zace, za golidi woona." 
Exodus37:24 Anacipanga ici ndi zipangizo zace zonse za talente wa golidi woona. 
Exodus37:25 Ndipo anapanga guwa la nsembe lofukizapo la mtengo wasitimu; utali wace mkono, ndi kupingasa kwace mkono, lampwamphwa; ndimsinkhu wace mikono iwiri; nyanga zace zinaturuka m'mwemo." 
Exodus37:26 Ndipo analikuta ndi golidi woona, pamwamba pace, ndi mbali zace pozungulira, ndi nyanga zace; ndipo analipangira mkombero wagolidi pozungulira pace." 
Exodus37:27 Ndipo analipangira mphete ziwiri zagolidi pansi pa mkombero wace, pa ngondya zace ziwiri, pa mbali zace ziwiri, zikhale zopisamo mphiko kulinyamulira nazo." 
Exodus37:28 Ndipo anazipanga mphiko za mtengo wasitimu, nazikuta ndi golidi." 
Exodus37:29 Anapanganso mafuta opatulika akudzoza nao, ndi cofukiza coona ca pfungo lokoma, mwa macitidwe a wosanganiza." 
Exodus38:1 Ndipo anapanga guwa la nsembe yopsereza la mtengo wasitimu; utali wace mikono isanu, ndi kupingasa kwace mikono isanu, lampwamphwa; ndi msinkhu wace mikono itaru." 
Exodus38:2 Ndipo anapanga nyanga zace pa ngondya zace zinai; nyanga zace zinakhala zoturuka m'mwemo; ndipo analikuta ndi mkuwa. 
Exodus38:3 Anapanganso zipangizo zonse za guwalo, zotayira, ndi zoolera, ndi mbale zowazira, ndi mitungo, ndi zoparira moto; zipangizo zace zonse anazipanga zamkuwa." 
Exodus38:4 Ndipo anapangira guwa La nsembelo made, malukidwe ace nja mkuwa, pansi pa matso ace wakulekeza pakati pace." 
Exodus38:5 Ndipo anayengera mathungo anai a made amkuwawo mphete zinai, zikhale zopisamo mphiko." 
Exodus38:6 Napanga mphiko za mtengo wasitimu, nazikuta ndi mkuwa." 
Exodus38:7 Ndipo anapisa mphikozo m'zimphetemo pa mbali za guwa la nsembe, kulinyamulira nazo; analipanga ndi matabwa, lagweregwere." 
Exodus38:8 Ndipo anapanga mkhate wamkuwa, ndi tsinde lace lamkuwa, wa akalirole a akazi otumikira, akutumikira pa khomo la cihema cokomanako." 
Exodus38:9 Ndipo anapanga bwalo; pa mbali ya kumwela, kumwela, nsaru zocingira za pabwalo zinali za bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, mikono zana limodzi;" 
Exodus38:10 nsici zace makumi awiri, ndi makamwa ao makumi awiri, amkuwa; zokowera za nsici ndi mitanda yace zasiliva." 
Exodus38:11 Ndi pa mbali ya kumpoto mikono zana limodzi, nsici zace makumi awiri, nw makamwa ace makumi awiri, amkuwa; zokowera za nsici ndi mitanda yace yasiliva." 
Exodus38:12 Ndi pa mbali ya kumadzulo panali nsaru zocingira za mikono makumi asanu, nsid zace khumi, ndi makamwa ace khumi; zokowera za nsici ndi mitanda yace yasiliva." 
Exodus38:13 Ndi pa mbali ya kum'mawa, kum'mawa, mikono makumi asanu." 
Exodus38:14 Nsaru zocingira za pa mbali imodzi ya cipata nza mikono khumi ndi isanu; nsici zace zitatu, ndi makamwa ace atatu;" 
Exodus38:15 momwemonso pa mbali yina: pa mbali yino ndi pa mbali yina ya cipata ca pabwalo panali nsaru zocingira za mikono khumi ndi isanu; nsici zace zitatu, ndi makamwa ace atatu." 
Exodus38:16 Nsaru zocingira zonse za pabwalo pozungulira zinali za bafuta wa thonje losansitsa. 
Exodus38:17 Ndipo makamwa a nsici anali amkuwa; zokowera za nsici ndi mitanda Iyace zasiliva; ndi zokutira mitu yace zasiliva; ndi nsici zonse za pabwalo zinagwirana pamodzi ndi siliva. 
Exodus38:18 Ndi nsaru yotsekera pa cipata ca pabwalo ndiyo nchito ya wopikula, ya lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa; utali wace mikono makumi awiri, ndi msinkhu wace mu kupingasa kwace mikono isanu, yolingana ndi nsaru zocingira za pabwalo." 
Exodus38:19 Ndi nsici zace zinali zinai, ndi makamwa ace anai, amkuwa; zokowera zace zasiliva, ndi zokutira mitu yace ndi mitanda yace zasiliva." 
Exodus38:20 Ndi ziciri zonse za cihema, ndi za bwalo lace pozungulira, nza mkuwa." 
Exodus38:21 Ici ndi ciwerengo ca zinthu za cihema, cihema ca mboni, monga anaziwerenga, monga mwa mau a Mose, acite nazo Alevi; anaziwerenga Itamara, mwana wa Aroni wansembe." 
Exodus38:22 Ndipo Bezaleli mwana wa Uri, mwana wa Huri, wa pfuko la Yuda, anapanga zonse zimene Mulungu adauza Mose." 
Exodus38:23 Ndi pamodzi naye Aholiabu, mwana wa Ahisama, wa pfuko la Dani, ndiye wozokota miyala, ndi mmisiri waluso, ndiponso wopikula ndi lamadzi ndi lofiira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa." 
Exodus38:24 Golidi yense anacita naye mu nchito yonse ya malo opatulika, golidi wa coperekaco, ndico matalente makumi awiri kudza asanu ndi anai, ndi masekeli mazana asanu ndi awiri, kudza makumi atatu, monga mwa sekeli wa malo opatulika." 
Exodus38:25 Ndipo siliva wa iwo owerengedwa a khamulo ndiwo matalente zana limodzi, ndi masekeli cikwi cimodzi, kudza mazana asanu ndi awiri, mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza asanu, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika;" 
Exodus38:26 munthu mmodzi anapereka beka, ndiwo limodzi la magawo awiri la sekeli, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika, anatero onse akupita kumka kwa owerengedwawo, kuyambira munthu wa zaka makumi awiri ndi oposa, ndiwo anthu zikwi mazana asanu ndi limodzi kudza zitatu, ndi mazana asanu mphambu makumi asanu." 
Exodus38:27 Ndipo matalente zana limodzi a siliva ndiwo a kuyengera makamwa a malo opatulika, ndi makamwa a nsaru yocinga; makamwa zana limodzi matalente zana limodzi, talente limodzi kamwa limodzi." 
Exodus38:28 Ndipo anapanga zokowera za mizati nsanamira ndi nsici ndi masekeli aja cikwi cimodzi kudza mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu asanu, nakuta mitu yace, nazigwirizitsana pamodzi." 
Exodus38:29 Ndi mkuwa wa coperekaco ndiwo matalente makumi asanu ndi awiri, ndi masekeli zikwi ziwiri kudza mazana anai." 
Exodus38:30 Ndipo anapanga nao makamwa a pa khomo la cihema cokomanako, ndi guwa la nsembe lamkuwa, ndi made ace amkuwa, ndi zipangizo zonse za guwa la nsembe," 
Exodus38:31 ndi makamwa a pabwalo pozungulira, ndi makamwa a ku cipata ca pabwalo, ndi ziciri zonse za cihema, ndi ziciri zonse za pabwalo pozungulira." 
Exodus39:1 Ndipo anaomba zobvala zakutumikira nazo ndi lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, atumikire nazo m'malo opatulika, naomba zobvala zopatulika za Aroni; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose." 
Exodus39:2 Ndipo anaomba efodi wa golidi, lamadzi, lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa." 
Exodus39:3 Ndipo anasula golidi waphanthiphanthi, nalemba nsambo, kuti amuombe pamodzi ndi lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, nchito ya mmisiri." 
Exodus39:4 Anapangira efodi zapamapewa zolumikizana; pa nsonga ziwirizo anamlumikiza. 
Exodus39:5 Ndi mpango wa efodi wokhala pamenepo, wakummanga nao unali woombera kumodzi wa ciombedwe comweci; wa golidi, ndi lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa; monga Yehova adauza Mose." 
Exodus39:6 Ndipo anakonza miyala yasohamu, yogwirika m'zoikamo zagolidi, yoloca ngati malocedwe a cosindikizira, ndi maina a ana a lsrayeli." 
Exodus39:7 Ndipo anaiika pa zapamapewa za efodi, ikhale miyala ya cikumbutso kwa ana a Israyeli; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose." 
Exodus39:8 Ndipo anaomba capacifuwa, nchito ya mmisiri, monga maombedwe ace a efodi; ca golidi, lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa." 
Exodus39:9 Cinakhala camowamphwa; anaciomba capacifuwa copindika; utali wace cikhato cimodzi, ndi kupingasa kwace cikhato cimodzi, cinakhala copindika." 
Exodus39:10 Ndipo anaika pomwepo mizere inai ya miyala; mzere wa odemu, pitida, ndi bareketi, ndiyo ya mzere woyamba." 
Exodus39:11 Ndi mzere waciwiri wa nofeki, safiri, ndi yahalomu." 
Exodus39:12 Ndi mzere wacitatu wa lesemu, sibu, ndi akalama." 
Exodus39:13 Ndi mzere wacinai wa tarisisi, sohamu, ndi yasefe; inakhala yogwirika ndi golidi maikidwe ace." 
Exodus39:14 Ndipo miyalayi inakhala monga mwa maina a ana a Israyeli, khumi ndi awiri, monga mwa maina ao; ngati malocedwe a cosindikizira, yonse monga mwa maina ace, kwa mafuko khumi ndi awiriwo." 
Exodus39:15 Ndipo anapangira pacapacifuwa maunyolo ngati zingwe, nchito yopota ya golidi woona." 
Exodus39:16 Anapanganso zoikamo ziwiri zagolidi, ndi mphete ziwiri zagolidi; naika mphete ziwirizo pa nsonga ziwiri za capacifuwa." 
Exodus39:17 Ndipo anamanga maunyolo awiri opota agolidi pa mphete ziwiri pa nsonga za capacifuwa. 
Exodus39:18 Ndi nsonga zace ziwiri zina za maunyolo awiri opotawo anazimanga pa zoikamo ziwiri, nazimanga pa zapamapewa za efodi, m'tsogolo mwace." 
Exodus39:19 Ndipo anapanga mphete ziwiri zagolidi, naziika pa nsonga ziwiri za capacifuwa, m'mphepete mwace m'katimo, pa mbali ya kuefodi." 
Exodus39:20 Ndipo anapanga mphete ziwiri zagolidi, naziika pa zapamapewa ziwiri za efodi pansi pace, pa mbali yace ya kutsogolo, pafupi pa msoko wace, pamwamba pa mpango wa efodi." 
Exodus39:21 Ndipo anamanga capacifuwa pa mphete zace ndi mphete za efodi ndi mkuzi wamadzi, kuti cikhale pa mpango wa efodi, ndi kuti capacifuwa cisamasuke paefodi; monga Yehova anamuuza Mose." 
Exodus39:22 Ndipo anaomba mwinjiro wa efodi, nchito yoomba ya lamadzi lokha;" 
Exodus39:23 ndi pakati pace polowa mutu, ngati polowa pa maraya ocingirizira, ndipo anabinyira pozungulira polowa pace, pangang'ambike." 
Exodus39:24 Napangira pa mkawo wa mwinjiro makangaza a lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa." 
Exodus39:25 Ndipo anapanga miriu ya golidi woona, napakiza miriu ndi makangaza, pa mkawo wa mwinjiro pozungulira, popakiza ndi makangaza." 
Exodus39:26 Mliu ndi khangaza, mliu ndi khangaza pa mkawo wa mwinjiro pozungulira, kutumikira nazo; monga Yehova anamuuza Mose." 
Exodus39:27 Ndipo anaomba maraya a bafuta, a nchito yoomba, a Aroni, ndi a ana ace amuna," 
Exodus39:28 ndi nduwira va bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, ndi akapal okometsetsa a bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, ndi zobvala za kumiyendo za bafuta wa thonje losansitsa," 
Exodus39:29 ndi mpango wabafuta wa thonje losansitsa, ndi lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, nchito ya wopikula; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose." 
Exodus39:30 Ndipo anapanga phanthiphanthi wa korona wopatulika wa golidi woona, nalembapo lemba, ngati malocedwe a cosindikizira, KUPATULIKIRA YEHOVA." 
Exodus39:31 Namangako mkuzi wamadzi, kuumanga nao pamwamba pa nduwira; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose." 
Exodus39:32 Potero anatsiriza nchito yonseya kacisi wa cihema cokomanako; ndipo ana a Israyeli adacita monga mwa zonse Yehova adamuuza Mose, anacita momwemo." 
Exodus39:33 Ndipo anabwera naye kacisi kwa Mose, cihemaco, ndi zipangizo zace zonse, zokowera zace, matabwa ace, mitanda yace, ndi mizati yace, nsanamira zace ndi nsici zace, ndi makamwa ace;" 
Exodus39:34 ndi cophimba ca zikopa za nkhosa zamphongo zonika zofiirira, ndi cophimba ca zikopa za akatumbu, ndi nsaru yocinga yotsekera;" 
Exodus39:35 likasa la mboni, ndi mphiko zace, ndi cotetezerapo;" 
Exodus39:36 gomelo, zipangizo zace zonse, ndi mkate woonekera;" 
Exodus39:37 coikapo nyali coona, nyali zace, ndizo nyali zimakonzekazi, ndi zipangizo zace zonse, ndi mafuta a kuunikira;" 
Exodus39:38 ndi guwa la nsembe lagolidi, ndi mafuta odzoza, ndi cofukiza ca pfungo lokoma, ndi nsaru yotsekera pa khomo la cihemaco;" 
Exodus39:39 guwa la nsembe lamkuwa, ndi made ace amkuwa, mphiko zace, ndi zipangizo zace zonse, mkhate ndi tsinde lace;" 
Exodus39:40 nsaru zocingira za pabwalo, osici zace, ndi makamwa ace, ndi nsaru yotsekera pa cipata ca pabwalo, zingwe zace, ndi ziciri zace, ndi zipangizo zonse za nchito ya kacisi, za ku cihema cokomanako;" 
Exodus39:41 zobvala zokoma za kutumikira nazo m'malo opatulika, ndi zobvala zopatulika za Aroni wansembe, ndi zobvala za ana ace, kucita nazo nchito ya usembe." 
Exodus39:42 Monga mwa zonse Yehova adamuuza Mose, momwemo ana a Israyeli anacita nchito zonse." 
Exodus39:43 Ndipo Mose anaona nchito zonse, ndipo, taonani, adaicita monga Yehova adamuuza, momwemo adacita. Ndipo Mose anawadalitsa." 
Exodus40:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Exodus40:2 Tsiku loyamba la mwezi woyamba ukautse kacisi wa cihema cokomanako. 
Exodus40:3 Ndipo ukaikemo likasa la mboni, nucinge likasalo ndi nsaru yocingayo." 
Exodus40:4 Ulongenso gomelo, nukonzerepo zokonzera zace; ulongenso coikapo nyalico, ndi kuyatsa nyali zace." 
Exodus40:5 Ndipo ukaike guwa la nsembe lofukizapo lazolidi cakuno ca likasa la mboni, numange pakacisi nsaru yotsekera pakhomo." 
Exodus40:6 Ndipo ukaike guwa la nsembe yopsereza kunja kwa khomo la kacisi wa cihema cokomanako. 
Exodus40:7 Ukaikenso mkhate pakati pa cihema cokomanako, ndi guwa la nsembe, ndi kuthiramo madzi." 
Exodus40:8 Ndipo ukamange mpandawo pozungulira, ndi kupacika nsaru yotsekera pa cipata ca pabwalo." 
Exodus40:9 Pamenepo ukatenge mafuta odzoza, ndi kudzoza nao kacisi, ndi zonse ziri m'mwemo, ndi kumpatula, ndi zipangizo zace zonse; ndipo adzakhala wopatulika." 
Exodus40:10 Ndipo udzoze guwa la nsembe yopsereza, ndi zipangizo zace zonse, ndi kulipatula guwalo; ndipo guwalo lidzakhala lopatulikitsa." 
Exodus40:11 Udzozenso mkhate ndi tsinde lace, ndi kuupatula." 
Exodus40:12 Ndipo ubwere nao Aroni ndi ana ace amuna ku khomo la cihema cokomanako, ndi kuwasambitsa ndi madzi." 
Exodus40:13 Nubveke Aroni cobvala zopatulikazo; ndi kumdzoza, ndi kumpatwa andicitire Ine nchito ya nsembe." 
Exodus40:14 Ndipo ubwere nao ana ace amuna ndi kuwabveka maraya am'kati; 
Exodus40:15 nuwadzoze, monga unadzoza atate wao, kuti andicitire nchito ya nsembe; ndi kudzozedwa kwao kuwakhalire unsembe wosatha mwa mibadwo yao." 
Exodus40:16 Anatero Mose; monga mwa zonse Yehova adamuuza, momwemo anacita." 
Exodus40:17 Ndipo kunali, mwezi woyamba wa caka caciwiri, tsiku loyamba la mwezi, anautsa kacisi." 
Exodus40:18 Ndipo Mose anautsa kacisi, nakhazika makamwa ace, naimika matabwa ace, namangapo mitanda yace, nautsa mizati ndi nsanamira zace." 
Exodus40:19 Ndipo anayalika hema pamwamba pa kacisi, naika cophimba ca cihema pamwamba pace; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose." 
Exodus40:20 Ndipo anatenga mboniyo, naiika mlikasa, napisa mphiko palikasa, naika cotetezerapo pamwamba pa likasa;" 
Exodus40:21 nalowa nalo likasa m'kacisi, napacika nsaru yocinga, nacinga likasa la mboni; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose." 
Exodus40:22 Ndipo anaika gomelo m'cihema cokomanako, pa mbali ya kumpoto ya kacisi, kunja kwa nsaru yocinga." 
Exodus40:23 Nakonzerapo mkate pamaso pa Yehova; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose. 
Exodus40:24 Ndipo anaika coikapo nyali m'cihema cokomanako, popenyana ndi gome, pa mbali ya kumwela ya kacisi." 
Exodus40:25 Nayatsa nyalizo pamaso pa Yehova; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose. 
Exodus40:26 Ndipo anaika guwa la nsembe lagolidi m'cihema cokomanako cakuno ca nsaru yocinga; 
Exodus40:27 nafukizapo cofukiza ca pfungo lokoma; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose. 
Exodus40:28 Ndipo anapacika kukacisi nsaru yotsekera pakhomo. 
Exodus40:29 Ndipo anaika guwa la nsembe yopsereza pa khomo la kacisi wa cihema cokomanako, natenthapo nsembe yopsereza, ndi nsembe yaufa; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose." 
Exodus40:30 Ndipo anaika mkhate pakati pa cihema cokomanako, ndi guwa la nsembe; nathiramo madzi osamba." 
Exodus40:31 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni ndi ana ace amuna anasamba manja ao ndi mapazi ao m'menemo; 
Exodus40:32 pakulowa iwo m'cihema cokomanako, ndi pakuyandikiza guwa la nsembe anasamba; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose." 
Exodus40:33 Ndipo anautsa mpanda pozungulira pa cihema ndi guwa la nsembe, napacika nsaru yotsekera pa cipata ca pabwalo. Momwemo Mose anatsiriza nchitoyi." 
Exodus40:34 Pamenepo mtambo unaphimba cihema cokomanako, ndi ulemerero wa Yehova unadzaza kacisiyo." 
Exodus40:35 Ndipo Mose sanathe kulowa m'cihema cokomanako, popeza mtambo unakhalabe pamenepo; ndi ulemerero wa Yehova unadzaza kacisi." 
Exodus40:36 Ndipo pakukwera mtambo kucokera kukacisi, ana a Israyeli amayenda maulendo ao onse;" 
Exodus40:37 koma ukapanda kukwera mtambo, samayenda ulendo wao kufikira tsiku loti wakwera." 
Exodus40:38 Pakuti mtambo wa Yehova unakhala pakacisi msana, ndi usiku munali moto m'menemo, pamaso pa mbumba yonse ya Israyeli, m'maulendo ao onse." 
Leviticus1:1 NDIPO Yehova anaitana Mose, nanena naye ali m'cihema cokomanako iye, nati," 
Leviticus1:2 Lankhula ndi ana a lsrayeli, nunene nao, Ali yense mwa inu akabwera naco copereka ca kwa Yehova, muzibwera naco copereka canu cikhale ca zoweta, ca ng'ombe, kapena ca nkhosa, kapena ca mbuzi." 
Leviticus1:3 Copereka cace cikakhala nsembe yopsereza ya ng'ombe, azibwera nayo yaimuna yopanda cirema; abwere nayo ku khomo la cihema cokomanako, kuti alandirike pamaso pa Yehova." 
Leviticus1:4 Ndipo aike dzanja lace pamutu pa nsembe yopsereza; ndipo idzalandiridwa m'malo mwace, imtetezere." 
Leviticus1:5 Pamenepo aiphe ng'ombeyo pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo ana a Aroni, ansembewo, abwere nao mwazi, nawaze mwaziwo pozungulira pa guwa la nsembe, lokhala pa khoma la cihema cokomanako." 
Leviticus1:6 Ndipo asende nsembe yopsereza, ndi kuikadzula ziwalo zace." 
Leviticus1:7 Ndipo ana a Aroni asonkhe mota pa guwa la nsembe, ndi kukonza nkhuni pamotopo;" 
Leviticus1:8 ndi ana a Aroni, ansembewo, akonze ziwalozo, mutu, ndi mafuta pa nkhuni ziri pa mota wa pa guwa la nsembe;" 
Leviticus1:9 koma atsuke ndi madzi matumbo ace ndi miyendo yace; ndi wansembe atenthe zonsezi pa guwa la nsembe, zikhale nsembe yopsereza, nsembe yamoto, ya pfungo lokoma la kwa Yehova." 
Leviticus1:10 Ndipo copereka cace cikakhala ca nkhosa, kapena ca mbuzi, cikhale nsembe yopsereza; azibwera nayo yaimuna yopanda cirema." 
Leviticus1:11 Ndipo aiphere iyo pa mbali ya kumpoto ya guwa la nsembe, pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo ana a Aroni, ansembewo, awaze mwazi wace pa guwa la nsembe pozungulira." 
Leviticus1:12 Ndipo aikadzule ziwalo zace, pamodzi ndi mutu wace ndi mafuta ace; ndi wansembeyo akonze izi pa nkhuni ziri pa mota wa pa guwa la nsembe." 
Leviticus1:13 Koma atsuke ndi madzi matumbo ndi miyendo; ndi wansembe abwere nazo zonse nazitenthe pa guwa la nsembe; ndiyo nsembe yopsereza, nsembe yamoto, ya pfungo lokoma la kwa Yehova." 
Leviticus1:14 Ndipo copereka cace ca kwa Yehova cikakhala nsembe yopsereza ya mbalame, azibwera naco copereka cace cikhale ca njiwa, kapena ca maunda." 
Leviticus1:15 Ndipo wansembe abwere naco ku guwa la nsembe, namwetule mutu wace, naitenthe pa guwa la nsembe; ndi mwazi wace aukamulire pa mbali ya guwa la nsembe," 
Leviticus1:16 nacotse citsokomero, ndi cipwidza cace, nazitaye kufupi kwa guwa la nsembe, kum'mawa, kudzala;" 
Leviticus1:17 nang'ambe mapiko ace osawacotsa konse ai; ndipo wansembeyo aitenthe pa guwa la nsembe, pa nkhuni ziri pamoto; ndiyo nsembe yopsereza, nsembe yamoto, ya pfungo lokoma la kwa Yehova." 
Leviticus2:1 Ndipo munthu akabwera naco copereka ndico nsembe yaufa ya kwa Yehova, copereka cace cizikhala ca ufa wosalala; ndipo athirepo mafuta, ndi kuikapo libano." 
Leviticus2:2 Ndipo abwere nayo kwa ana a Aroni, ansembewo; natengeko ufa, ndi mafuta odzala manja, ndi libano wace wonse; ndipo wansembeyo aitenthe cikumbutso cace pa guwa la nsembe, ndiyo nsembe yamoto, ya pfungo lokoma la kwa Yehova." 
Leviticus2:3 Ndipo cotsalira ca nsembe yaufa cikhale ca Aroni ndi ana ace; ndico copatulikitsa ca nsembe zamoto za Yehova. 
Leviticus2:4 Ndipo ukabwera naco copereka ndico nsembe yaufa, yophika mumcembo, cizikhala ca timitanda ta ufa wosalala topanda cotupitsa tosanganiza ndi mafuta, kapena timitanda taphanthi topanda cotupitsa todzoza ndi mafuta." 
Leviticus2:5 Ndipo nsembe yaufa yako ikakhala yokazinga m'ciwaya, ikhale ya ufa wosalala wopanda cotupitsa, wosanganiza ndi mafuta." 
Leviticus2:6 Uphwanye, nuthirepo mafuta; ndiyo nsembe yaufa." 
Leviticus2:7 Ndipo copereka cako cikakhala nsembe yaufa ya mumphika, cikhale ca ufa wosalala ndi mafuta." 
Leviticus2:8 Ndipo ubwere nayo nsembe yaufa yopangika ndi izi kwa Yehova; ndipo atabwera naco kwa wansembe, iyeyo apite naco ku guwa la nsembe." 
Leviticus2:9 Ndipo wansembeyo atengeko cikumbutso pa nsembe yaufa, nacitenthe pa guwa la nsembe; ndico nsembe yamoto ya pfungo lokoma la kwa Yehova." 
Leviticus2:10 Ndipo cotsalira ca nsembe yaufa cikhale ca Aroni ndi ana ace; ndico copatulikitsa ca nsembe zamoto za Yehova. 
Leviticus2:11 Nsembe iri yonse yaufa, imene mubwera nayo kwa Yehova, isapangike ndi cotupitsa, pakuti musamatenthera Yehova nsembe yamoto yacotupitsa, kapena yauci." 
Leviticus2:12 Monga copereka ca zipatso zoyamba muzipereka izi: koma asazifukize pa guwa la nsembe zicite pfungo lokoma. 
Leviticus2:13 Ndipo copereka cako ciri conse ca nsembe yaufa uzicikoleretsa ndi mcere; usasowe mcere wa cipangano ca Mulungu wako pa nsembe yako yaufa; pa zopereka zako zonse uzipereka mcere. 
Leviticus2:14 Ndipo ukabwera nayo nsembe yaufa ya zipatso zoyamba kwa Yehova, uzibwera nayo nsembe yako ya zipatso zoyamba ikhale ya ngala zoyamba kuca, zoumika pamoto, zokonola." 
Leviticus2:15 Ndipo uthirepo mafuta, ndi kuikapo libona; ndiyo nsembe yaufa." 
Leviticus2:16 Ndipo wansembe atenthe cikumbutso cace, atatapa pa tirigu wace wokonola, ndi pa mafuta ace, ndi kutenga libano lace lonse; ndiyo nsembe yamoto ya kwa Yehova." 
Leviticus3:1 Ndipo copereka cace cikakhala nsembe yoyamika; akabwera nayo ng'ombe, kapena yaimuna kapena yaikazi, azibwera nayo yopanda cirema pamaso pa Yehova." 
Leviticus3:2 Ndipo aike dzanja lace pa mutu wa copereka cace, ndi kuipha pa cipata ca cihema cokomanako; ndipo ana a Aroni, ansembewo, awaze mwazi wace pa guwa la nsembe pozungulira." 
Leviticus3:3 Pamenepo abwere nayo nsembe yamoto ya kwa Yehova, yotengako ku nsembe yoyamika; acotse mafuta akukuta matumbo, ndi mafuta onse akukhala pamatumbo," 
Leviticus3:4 ndi imso ziwiri, ndi mafuta ali pomwepo okhala m'cuuno, ndi cokuta ca mphafa cofikira kuimso." 
Leviticus3:5 Ndipo ana a Aroni azitenthe pa guwa la nsembe, pa nsembe yopsereza, iri pa nkhuni zimene ziri pamoto; ndiyo nsembe yamoto, ya pfungo lokoma la kwa Yehova." 
Leviticus3:6 Ndipo copereka cace cikakhala nkhosa kapena mbuzi, kuti ikhale nsembe yoyamika ya kwa Yehova; ingakhale yaimuna kapena yaikazi, azibwera nayo yopanda cirema;" 
Leviticus3:7 akabwera nayo nkhosa kuti ikhale copereka cace, abwere nayo pamaso pa Yehova;" 
Leviticus3:8 naike dzanja lace pamutu pa copereka cace, naiphe patsogolo pa cihema cokomanako; ndipo ana a Aroni awaze mwazi wace pa guwa la nsembe pozungulira." 
Leviticus3:9 Pamenepo abwere nayo nsembe yamoto ya kwa Yehova; yotengako ku nsembe yoyamika; mafuta ace, mcira wamafuta wonse, ataucotsa kufupi ku pfupa lao msana; naicotse mafuta akukuta matumbo, ndi mafuta onse akukhala pamatumbo," 
Leviticus3:10 ndi imso ziwiri, ndi mafuta ali pomwepo, okhala m'cuuno, ndi cokuta ca mphafa cofikira kuimso." 
Leviticus3:11 Ndipo wansembe azitenthe pa guwa la nsembe; ndico cakudya ca nsembe yamoto ya kwa Mulungu. 
Leviticus3:12 Ndipo copereka cace cikakhala mbuzi, azibwera nayo pamaso pa Yehova;" 
Leviticus3:13 naike dzanja lace pamutu pace, naiphe pa khomo la cihema cokomanako; ndipo ana a Aroni awaze mwazi wace pa guwa la nsembe pozungulira." 
Leviticus3:14 Ndipo abwere naco copereka cace cotengako, ndico nsembe yamoto ya kwa Yehova; acotse mafuta akukuta matumbo, ndi mafuta onse akukhala pamatumbo," 
Leviticus3:15 ndi imso ziwiri, ndi mafuta ali pomwepo, okhala m'cuuno, ndi cokuta ca mphafa cofikira kuimso." 
Leviticus3:16 Ndipo wansembe atenthe izi pa guwa la nsembe; ndizo cakudya ca nsembe yamoto icite pfungo lokoma; mafuta onse nga Yehova. 
Leviticus3:17 Likhale lemba losatha m'mibadwo yanu m'nyumba zanu zonse, musamadya kapena mafuta kapena mwazi." 
Leviticus4:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Leviticus4:2 Lankhula ndi ana a Israyeli, ndi kuti, Munthu akacimwa, osati dala, pa cina ca zinthu ziri zonse aziletsa Mulungu, nakacitapo kanthu;" 
Leviticus4:3 akalakwa wansembe wodzozedwa ndi kuparamulira anthu; pamenepo azibwera nayo kwa Yehova ng'ombe yamphongo, yopanda cirema, cifukwa ca kucimwa kwace adakucita, ikhale nsembe yaucimo." 
Leviticus4:4 Ndipo adze nayo ng'ombeyo ku khomo la cihema cokomanako pamaso pa Yehova; naike dzanja lace pamutu pa ng'ombeyo, naiphe ng'ombeyo pamaso pa Yehova." 
Leviticus4:5 Ndipo wansembe wodzozedwayo atengeko mwazi wa ng'ombeyo, nabwerenao ku cihema cokomanako;" 
Leviticus4:6 ndipo wansembeyo abviike cala cace m'mwazimo, nawaze mwaziwo kasanu ndi kawiri pamaso pa Yehova cakuno ca nsaru yocinga, ya malo opatulika." 
Leviticus4:7 Ndipo wansembeyo atengeko mwazi, nauike pa nyanga za guwa la nsembe la cofukiza ca pfungo lokoma, lokhala m'cihema cokomanako pamaso pa Yehova; nathire mwazi wonse wa ng'ombeyo patsinde pa guwa la nsembe yopsereza, lokhala pa khomo la cihema cokomanako." 
Leviticus4:8 Ndipo acotse mafuta onse a ng'ombe ya nsembe yaucimo, acotse mafuta akukuta matumbo, ndi mafuta onse akukhala pamatumbo," 
Leviticus4:9 ndi imso ziwiri ndi mafuta ali pomwepo, okhala m'cuuno, ndi cokuta ca mphafa cofikira kuimso," 
Leviticus4:10 umo azikacotsera pa ng'ombe ya nsembe yoyamika; ndipo wansembe azitenthe pa guwa la nsembe yopsereza. 
Leviticus4:11 Naturutse cikopa ca ng'ombeyo, ndi nyama yace yonse, pamodzi ndi mutu wace, ndi miyendo yace, ndi matumbo ace, ndi cipwidza cace," 
Leviticus4:12 inde ng'ombe yonse, kunja kwa cigono, kumka nayo kumalo koyera, kumene atayako mapulusa, naitenthe pankhuni ndi moto; aitenthe potayira mapulusa." 
Leviticus4:13 Ndipo khamu lonse la Israyeli likalakwa osati dala, ndipo cikabisika cinthuci pamaso pa msonkhano, litacita cina ca zinthu ziri zonse aziletsa Yehova, ndi kuparamula;" 
Leviticus4:14 kukadziwika kucimwa adacimwako, pamenepo msonkhano uzibwera nayo ng'ombe yamphongo, ikhale nsembe yaucimo, ndipo udze nayo ku khomo la cihema cokomanako." 
Leviticus4:15 Ndipo akuru a khamulo aike manja ao pamutu pa ng'ombeyo, pamaso pa Yehova; naiphe ng'ombeyo pamaso pa Yehova." 
Leviticus4:16 Ndipo wansembe wodzozedwayo adze nao mwazi wina wa ng'ombeyo ku cihema cokomanako; 
Leviticus4:17 nabviike cala cace m'mwazi wa nsembewo, nauwaze kasanu ndi kawiri pamaso pa Yehova, cakuno ca nsaru yocinga." 
Leviticus4:18 Naike mwazi wina pa nyanga za guwa la nsembe, lokhala pamaso pa Yehova, lokhala m'cihema cokomanako; nathire mwazi wonse patsinde pa guwa la nsembe yopsereza, lokhala pa khomo la cihema cokomanako." 
Leviticus4:19 Ndipo acotse mafuta ace onse, nawatenthe pa guwa la nsembe." 
Leviticus4:20 Atero nayo ng'ombeyo; monga umo anacitira ng'ombe ya nsembe yaucimo; ndipo wansembe awacitire cowatetezera, ndipo adzakhululukidwa." 
Leviticus4:21 Ndipo aturutse ng'ombeyo kunja kwa cigono, ndi kuitentha monga anatenthera ng'ombe yoyamba ija; ndiyo nsembe yaucimo ya kwa msonkhano." 
Leviticus4:22 Akacimwa mkuru, osati dala, pa cina ca zinthu ziti zonse aziletsa Yehova Mulungu wace, naparamula;" 
Leviticus4:23 akamdziwitsa kucimwa kwace adacimwako, azidza naco copereka cace, ndico tonde wopanda cirema;" 
Leviticus4:24 naike dzanja lace pamutu pa mbuziyo, naiphe pamalo pophera nsembe yopsereza pamaso pa Yehova; ndiyo nsembe yaucimo." 
Leviticus4:25 Ndipo wansembe atengeko mwazi wa nsembe yaucimo ndi cala cace, nauike pa nyanga za guwa la nsembe yopsereza, ndi kuthira mwazi wace patsinde pa guwa la nsembe yopsereza." 
Leviticus4:26 Ndipo atenthe mafuta ace onse pa guwa la nsembe, monga mafuta a nsembe yoyamika; ndipo wansembe amcitire comtetezera, ndipo adzakhululukidwa." 
Leviticus4:27 Ndipo akacimwa wina wa anthu a m'dziko, osati dala, pa cina ca zinthu ziri zonse aziletsa Yehova, naparamula;" 
Leviticus4:28 akamdziwitsa kucimwa kwace adacimwako, azidza naco copereka cace mbuzi yaikazi, yopanda cirema, cifukwa ca kucimwa kwace adakucita." 
Leviticus4:29 Aike dzanja lace pamutu pa nsembe yaucimo, naiphe nsembe yaucimo pamalo pa nsembe yopsereza." 
Leviticus4:30 Ndipo wansembe atengeko mwazi ndi cala cace, nauike pa nyanga za guwa la nsembe yopsereza, ndi kuthira mwazi wace wonse patsinde pa guwa la nsembe." 
Leviticus4:31 Nacotse mafuta ace onse, monga umo amacotsera mafuta pa nsembe yoyamika; ndipo wansembeyo awatenthe pa guwa la nsembe akhale pfungo lokoma la kwa Yehova; ndi wansembe amcitire comtetezera, ndipo adzakhululukidwa." 
Leviticus4:32 Ndipo akadza nayo nkhosa, ndiyo copereka cace, ikhale nsembe yaucimo, azidza nayo yaikazi, yopanda cirema." 
Leviticus4:33 Naike dzanja lace pa mutu wa nsembe yaucimo, ndi kuipha ikhale nsembe yaucimo pamalo pophera nsembe yopsereza." 
Leviticus4:34 Ndipo wansembe atengeko mwazi wa nsembe yaucimo ndi cala cace, nauike pa nyanga za guwa la nsembe yopsereza, ndi kuthira mwazi wace wonse patsinde pa guwa la nsembe;" 
Leviticus4:35 nawacotse mafuta ace onse, monga umo amacotsera mafuta a nkhosa pa nsembe yoyamika; ndipo wansembeyo atenthe, awa pa guwa la nsembe, monga umo amacitira nsembe zamoto za Yehova; ndipo wansembeyo amcitire comtetezera pa kucimwa kwace adakucimwira, ndipo adzakhululukidwa." 
Leviticus5:1 Ndipo akacimwa munthu, wakuti adamva mau akuwalumbiritsa, ndiye mboni, kapena wakuona, kapena wakudziwa, koma osaulula, azisenza mphulupulu yace;" 
Leviticus5:2 kapena munthu akakhudza ciri conse codetsa kapena mtembo wa nyama yodetsa, kapena mtembo wa coweta codetsa, kapena mtembo wa cokwawa codetsa, kungakhale kudambisikira, ali wodetsedwa, ndi woparamula." 
Leviticus5:3 Kapena akakhudza codetsa ca munthu, ndico codetsa ciri conse akakhala codetsedwa naco, ndipo cidambisikira; koma pocizindikira akhala woparamula:" 
Leviticus5:4 kapena munthu akalumbira ndi milomo yace osalingirira kucita coipa, kapena kucita cabwino, ciri conse munthu akalumbira osalingirira, ndipo cidambisikira; koma pocizindikira akhala woparamula cimodzi ca izi:" 
Leviticus5:5 ndipo kudzali, ataparamula cimodzi ca izi, aziulula cimene adacimwa naco;" 
Leviticus5:6 nadze nayo nsembe yoparamula kwa Yehova cifukwa ca kulakwa kwace adacimwira, ndiyo msoti wa nkhosa, kapena msoti wa mbuzi, ukhale nsembe yaucimo; ndipo wansembe amcitire comtetezera cifukwa ca kucimwa kwace." 
Leviticus5:7 Ndipo cuma cace cikapanda kufikira nkhosa, wocimwayo adze nayo kwa Yehova nsembe yace yoparamula, njiwa ziwiri, kapena maunda awiri; imodzi ikhale ya nsembe yaucimo, ndi yina ya nsembe yopsereza." 
Leviticus5:8 Ndipo adze nazo kwa wansembe, ndiye ayambe kubwera nayo ija ya kwa nsembe yaucimo, napotole mutu wace pakhosi pace, osaucotsa;" 
Leviticus5:9 nawazeko mwazi wa nsembe yaucimo pa mbali ya guwa la nsembe; ndi mwazi wotsalira aukamulire patsinde pa guwa la nsembe; ndiyo nsembe yaucimo. 
Leviticus5:10 Ndipo aikonze inzace ikhale nsembe yopsereza, manga mwa lemba lace; ndipo wansembe amcitire comtetezera cifukwa ca kucimwa adacimwira, ndipo adzakhululukidwa." 
Leviticus5:11 Koma cuma cace cikapanda kufikira njiwa ziwiri kapena maunda awiri, wocimwayo azidza naco copereka cace limodzi la magawo khumi la efa la ufa wosalala, likhale la nsembe yaucima; asamaikapo mafuta, kapena kuikapo libona ai; pakuti ndico nsembe yaucimo." 
Leviticus5:12 Ndipo adze naco kwa wansembe, ndi wansembeyo atengeko wodzala manja ukhale cikumbutso cace, nacitenthe pa guwa la nsembe monga umo amacitira nsembe zamoto za Yehova; ndiyo nsembe yaucimo." 
Leviticus5:13 Ndipo wansembe amcitire comtetezera cifukwa ca kucimwa kwace adacimwira cimodzi ca izi, ndipo adzakhululukidwa; ndipo cotsalira cikhale ca wansembe, monga umo amacitira copereka caufaco." 
Leviticus5:14 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati,"
