Leviticus22:20 Musamabwera nayo yokhala ndi cirema; popeza siidzalandirikira inu. 
Leviticus22:21 Ndipo munthu akabwera nayo nsembe yoyamika kwa Yehova, ya pa cowinda cacikuru, kapena ya pa copereka caufulu, ya ng'ombe kapena nkhosa, ikhale yangwiro kuti ilandirike; ikhale yopanda cirema." 
Leviticus22:22 Musamabwera nazo kwa Yehova yakhungu, kapenayodukamwendokapena yopunduka, kapena yapfundo, kapena yausemwe, kapena ya usemwe waukuru, musamazipereka kwa Yehova nsembe zamoto pa guwa la nsembe." 
Leviticus22:23 Ng'ombe kapena nkhosa yokula kapena yocepa ciwalo, ikhale nsembe yaufulu; koma pa cowinda siidzalandirika." 
Leviticus22:24 Nyama yofula, kapena copwanya kapena cosansantha, kapena cotudzula, kapena codula, musamabwera nazo kwa Yehova; inde musamacicita ici m'dziko mwanu." 
Leviticus22:25 Ndipo musamazilandira izi ku dzanja la mlendo ndi kubwera nazo zikhale cakudya ca Mulungu wanu; popeza ziri nako kubvunda kwao; ziri ndi cirema; sizidzalandirikira inu. 
Leviticus22:26 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti, Zikamabadwa ng'ombe kapena nkhosa, kapena mbuzi, zikhale ndi mace masiku asanu ndi awiri;" 
Leviticus22:27 kuyambira tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu ndi m'tsogolo mwace, idzalandirika ngati copereka nsembe yamoto ya Yehova." 
Leviticus22:28 Koma musamaipha ng'ombe kapena nkhosa pamodzi ndi mwana wace tsiku limodzimodzi. 
Leviticus22:29 Ndipo mukamaphera Yehova nsembe yoyamika, muiphere kuti mulandirike." 
Leviticus22:30 Idyedwe tsiku lomwelo; musamasiyako kufikira m'mawa; Ine ndine Yehova. 
Leviticus22:31 Potero muwasunge malamulo anga, ndi kuwacita; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Leviticus22:32 Musamaipsa dzina langa loyera; koma ndikhale woyera pakati pa ana a Israyeli; Ine ndine Yehova wakukupatulani," 
Leviticus22:33 amene ndinakuturutsani m'dziko la Aigupto, kuti ndikhale Mulungu wanu; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Leviticus23:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus23:2 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, nuti nao, Nyengo zoikika za Yehova zimene muzilalikira zikhale masonkhano opatulika, ndizo nyengo zanga zoikika." 
Leviticus23:3 Masiku asanu ndi limodzi azigwira nchito; koma lacisanu ndi ciwiri ndilo Sabata lakupumula, msonkhano wopatulika; musamagwira nchito konse; ndilo sabata la Yehova m'nyumba zanu zonse." 
Leviticus23:4 Izi ndi nyengo zoikika za Yehova, masonkhano opatulika, zimene muzilalikira pa nyengo zoikika zao." 
Leviticus23:5 Mwezi woyamba, tsiku lakhumi ndi cinai la mweziwo, madzulo, pali Paskha wa Yehova." 
Leviticus23:6 Ndipo tsiku lakhumi ndi cisanu la mwezi womwewo ndilo madyerero a mkate wopanda cotupitsa a Yehova; masiku asanu ndi awiri muzidya mkate wopanda cotupitsa. 
Leviticus23:7 Tsiku lace loyamba mukhale nao msonkhano wopatulika; musamagwira nchito ya masiku ena. 
Leviticus23:8 Koma mubwere nayo kwa Yehova nsembe yamoto masiku asanu ndi awiri; pa tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri pakhale msonkhano wopatulika; musamacita nchito ya masiku ena. 
Leviticus23:9 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Leviticus23:10 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, nuti nao, Mutakalowa m'dziko limene ndikupatsani, ndi kuceka dzinthu zace, pamenepo muzidza nao mtolo wa zipatso zoyamba za masika anu kwa wansembe;" 
Leviticus23:11 ndipo iye aweyule mtolowo pamaso pa Yehova, ulandirikire inu, tsiku lotsata sabata wansembe aweyule." 
Leviticus23:12 Ndipo tsiku loweyula mtolowo, ukonze mwana wa nkhosa wopanda cirema, wa caka cimodzi, akhale nsembe yopsereza ya Yehova." 
Leviticus23:13 Ndipo nsembe yaufa yace ikhale awiri a magawo khumi a ufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ndiyo nsembe yamoto ya Yehova, icite pfungo lokoma; ndi nsembe yace yothira ikhale yavinyo, limodzi la magawo anai la hini." 
Leviticus23:14 Musamadya mkate, kapena tirigu wokazinga, kapena ngala zaziwisi, kufikira tsiku lomweli, kufikira mutadza naco copereka ca Mulungu wanu; ndilo lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yanu m'nyumba zanu zonse." 
Leviticus23:15 Ndipo mudziwerengere kuyambira tsiku lotsata Sabata, kuyambira tsikuli mudadza nao mtolo wa nsembe yoweyula; pakhale masabata asanu ndi awiri amphumphu;" 
Leviticus23:16 muwerenge masiku makumi asanu kufikira tsiku lotsata sabata lacisanu ndi ciwiri; pamenepo mubwere nayo kwa Yehova nsembe ya ufa watsopano. 
Leviticus23:17 Muturuke nayo m'zinyumba zanu mikate iwiri ya nsembe yoweyula, ikhale ya awiri a magawo khumi a efa; ikhale ya ufa wosalala, yopanga ndi cotupitsa, zipatso zoyamba za Yehova." 
Leviticus23:18 Ndipo mubwere nao pamodzi ndi mikate, ana a nkhosa asanu ndi awiri, opanda cirema a caka cimodzi, ndi ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, ndi nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri; zikhale nsembe yopsereza ya Yehova, pamodzi ndi nsembe yao yaufa, ndi nsembe zao zothira, ndizo nsembe yamoto ya pfungo lokoma la Yehova." 
Leviticus23:19 Mukonzenso mwana wa mbuzi mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo, ndi ana a nkhosa awiri a caka cimodzi akhale nsembe yoyamika." 
Leviticus23:20 Ndi wansembe awaweyule, pamodzi ndi mkate wa zipatso zoyamba, nsembe yoweyula pamaso pa Yehova, pamodzi ndi ana a nkhosa awiriwo; zikhale zopatulikira Yehova, kuti zikhale za wansembe." 
Leviticus23:21 Ndipo mulalikire tsiku lomwelo; kuti mukhale nao msonkhano wopatulika; musamagwira nchito ya masiku ena; ndilo lemba losatha m'nyumba zanu zonse, mwa mibadwo yanu yonse." 
Leviticus23:22 Ndipo pakukolola dzinthu za m'dziko mwanu, usamakololetsa m'mphepete mwa munda wako, nusamakunkha khunkha; uzisiyire wosauka ndi mlendo; Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako." 
Leviticus23:23 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus23:24 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, ndi kuti, Mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri, tsiku loyamba la mweziwo, muzipumula, ndiko cikumbutso ca kuliza malipenga, msonkhano wopatulika." 
Leviticus23:25 Musamagwira nchito ya masiku ena; mubwere nayo nsembe yamoto ya Yehova. 
Leviticus23:26 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus23:27 Komatu, tsiku lakhumi la mwezi uwu wacisanu ndi ciwiri, ndilo tsiku la citetezero; mukhale nao msonkhano wopatulika, ndipo mudzicepetse; ndi kubwera nayo nsembe yamoto kwa Yehova." 
Leviticus23:28 Musamagwira nchito iri yonse tsiku limenelo; pakuti ndilo tsiku la citetezero, kucita cotetezera inu pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus23:29 Pakuti munthu ali yense wosadzicepetsa tsiku limenelo, amsadze kwa anthu a mtundu wace." 
Leviticus23:30 Ndi munthu ali yense wakugwira nchito iri yonse tsiku limenelo, ndidzaononga munthuyo pakati pa anthu a mtundu wace." 
Leviticus23:31 Musamagwira nchito iri yonse; ndilo lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yanu, m'nyumba zanu zoo nse." 
Leviticus23:32 Likhale ndi inu Sabata lakupumula; ndipo mudzicepetse; tsiku lacisanu ndi cinai madzulo, kuyambira madzulo kufikira madzulo musunge Sabata lanu." 
Leviticus23:33 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus23:34 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, kuti, Tsiku lakhumi ndi cisanu la mwezi uno wacisanu ndi ciwiri pali madyerero a misasa a Yehova, masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
Leviticus23:35 Tsiku loyamba likhale msonkhano wopatulika, musamagwira nchito ya masiku ena." 
Leviticus23:36 Masiku asanu ndi awiri mubwere nayo nsembe yamoto kwa Yehova; tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu mukhale nao msonkhano wopatulika; ndipo mubwere nayo nsembe yamoto kwa Yehova; ndilo lotsirizira; musamagwira nchito ya masiku ena. 
Leviticus23:37 Izi ndi nyengo zoikika za Yehova, zimene muzilalikira zikhale masonkhano opatulika, kukabwera nayo nsembe yamoto kwa Yehova, nsembe yopsereza, ndi nsembe yaufa, nsembe yophera, ndi nsembe yothira, yonse pa tsiku lace lace;" 
Leviticus23:38 pamodzi ndi masabata a Yehova, ndi pamodzi ndi mphatso zanu, ndi pamodzi ndi zoo winda zanu zonse, ndi pamodzi ndi zopereka zaufulu zanu, zimene muzipereka kwa Yehova." 
Leviticus23:39 Koma tsiku lakhumi ndi cisanu la mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri, mutatuta zipatso za m'dziko, muzisunga madyerero a Yehova masiku asanu ndi awiri; tsiku loyamba mupumule, ndi tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu mupumule." 
Leviticus23:40 Ndipo tsiku loyambali mudzitengere nthambi za mitengo yokoma, nsomo za kanjedza, ndi nthambi za mitengo yobvalira, ndi misondodzi ya kumtsinje; ndipo mukondwere pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
Leviticus23:41 Ndipo muwasunge madyerero a Yehova masiku asanu ndi awiri m'caka; ndilo lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yanu; musunge mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri. 
Leviticus23:42 Mukhale m'misasa masiku asanu ndi awiri; onse obadwa m'dziko mwa Israyeli akhale m'misasa; 
Leviticus23:43 kuti mibadwo yanu ikadziwe lruti ndinakhalitsa ana a Israyeli m'misasa, pamene ndinawaturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto; Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus23:44 Ndipo Mose anafotokozera ana a Israyeli nyengo zoikika za Yehova. 
Leviticus24:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus24:2 Uza ana a Israyeli, kuti akutengere mafuta a azitona oyera opera akuunikira, kuti aziwalitsa nyali nthawi zonse." 
Leviticus24:3 Aroni aikonze kunja kwa nsaru yocinga ya mboni, m'cihema cokomanako, kuyambira madzulo kufikira m'mawa, pamaso pa Yehova nthawi zonse; likhale lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yanu." 
Leviticus24:4 Akonze nyalizo pa coikapo nyali coona pamaso pa Yehova nthawi zonse. 
Leviticus24:5 Ndipo uzitenga ufa wosalala, ndi kuphika timitanda khumi ndi tiwiri; awiri a magawo khumi a efa afikane kamtanda kamodzi," 
Leviticus24:6 Ndipo utiike m'mizere iwiri, tisanu ndi kamodzi mzere umodzi, pa gome loyera, pamaso pa Yehova." 
Leviticus24:7 Nuike libano loona ku mzere uli wonse, kuti likhale kumkate ngati cokumbutsa, nsembe yamoto ya Yehova." 
Leviticus24:8 Nthawi zonse tsiku la Sabata aukonze pamaso pa Yehova, cifukwa ca ana a Israyeli, ndilo pangano losatha." 
Leviticus24:9 Ndipo ukhale wa Aroni ndi ana ace, audye pamalo popatulika; pakuti auyese wopatulikitsa wocokera ku nsembe zamoto za Yehova; ndilo lemba losatha." 
Leviticus24:10 Ndipo mwana wamwamuna wa mkazi M-israyeli, atate wace ndiye M-aigupto, anaturuka mwa ana a Israyeli; ndi mwana wamwamuna wa mkazi M-israyeliyo analimbana naye munthu M-israyeli kucigono;" 
Leviticus24:11 ndipo mwana wamwamuna wa mkazi M-israyeli anacitira DZINA mwano, natemberera; ndipo anadza naye kwa Mose. Dzina la mai wace ndiye Selomiti, mwana wa Dibri, wa pfuko la Dani." 
Leviticus24:12 Ndipo anamsunga m'kaidi, kuti awafotokozere m'mene anenere Yehova." 
Leviticus24:13 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Leviticus24:14 Turuka naye wotembererayo kunja kwa cigono; ndipo onse adamumva aike manja ao pamutu pace, ndi khamu lonse limponye miyala afe." 
Leviticus24:15 Ndipo unene ndi ana a Israyeli, ndi kuti, Ali yense wotemberera Mulungu wace azisenza kucimwa kwace." 
Leviticus24:16 Ndi iye wakucitira mwano dzina la Yehova, amuphe ndithu; khamu lonse limponye miyala ndithu; mlendo ndi wobadwa m'dziko yemwe akacitira dzina la Yehova mwano, awaphe." 
Leviticus24:17 Munthu akakantha munthu mnzace ali yense kuti afe, amuphe ndithu." 
Leviticus24:18 Munthu akakantha nyama kuti ife, ambwezere yina; moyo kulipa moyo." 
Leviticus24:19 Munthu akacititsa mnansi wace cirema, monga umo anacitira momwemo amcitire iye;" 
Leviticus24:20 kutyola kulipa kutyola, diso kulipa diso, dzino kulipa dzino; monga umo anacitira munthu cirema, momwemo amcitire iye." 
Leviticus24:21 Iye wakukantha nyama kuti ife, ambwezere yina; iye wakupha munthu, amuphe." 
Leviticus24:22 Ciweruzo canu cifanefane ndi mlendo ndi wobadwa m'dziko; pakuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu. 
Leviticus24:23 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi ana a Israyeli, ndipo anaturutsa wotembererayo kunja kwa cigono, namponya miyala. Ndipo ana a Israyeli anacita monga Yehova adauza Mose." 
Leviticus25:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'phiri la Sinai, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus25:2 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, nuti nao, Mutakalowa m'dziko limene ndikupatsani, dzikoli lizisungira Yehova Sabata." 
Leviticus25:3 Zaka zisanu ndi cimodzi ubzale m'munda mwako, ndi zaka zisanu ndi cimodzi udzombole mphesa zako, ndi kuceka zipatso zace;" 
Leviticus25:4 koma caka cacisanu ndi ciwiri cikhale sabata lakupumula la dziko, sabata la Yehova; usamabzala m'munda mwako, usamadzombola mipesa yako." 
Leviticus25:5 Zophuka zokha zofikira masika usamazichera, ndi mphesa za mipesa yako yosadzombola usaziceka; cikhale caka copumula dziko." 
Leviticus25:6 Ndipo sabata la dzikoli likhale kwa inu la cakudya; kwa iwe, ndi mnyamata wako, ndi mdzakazi wako, ndi wolembedwa nchito yako, ndi mlendo wako wakugonera kwanu;" 
Leviticus25:7 ndi ng'ombe zako, ndi nyama ziri m'dziko lako; zipatso zace zonse zikhale cakudya cao." 
Leviticus25:8 Ndipo uziwerengera masabata a zaka asanu ndi awiri, zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri kasanu ndi kawiri; kotero kuti zaka za masabata a zaka asanu ndi awiri, zifikire zaka makumi anai kudza zisanu ndi zinai." 
Leviticus25:9 Pamenepo uzitumizira lipenga lomveka m'mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri, tsiku lakhumi la mweziwo; tsiku la citetezero mutumizire lipenga lifikire m'dziko lanu lonse." 
Leviticus25:10 Ndipo mucipatule caka ca makumi asanu, ndi kulalikira kwa onse okhala m'dzikomo kuti akhale aufulu; muciyese caka coliza lipenga; ndipo mubwerere munthu ali yense ku zace zace, ndipo mubwerere yense ku banja lace." 
Leviticus25:11 Muciyese caka ca makomi asanuco coliza lipenga, musamabzala, kapena kuceka zophuka zokha m'mwemo; kapenakuceka mphesa zace za mipesa yosadzombola." 
Leviticus25:12 Popeza ndico caka coliza lipenga; muciyese copatulika, mudye zipatso zace kunja kwa munda." 
Leviticus25:13 Caka coliza lipenga ici mubwerere nonse ku zace zace. 
Leviticus25:14 Ndipo ukagulitsa kanthu kwa mnansi wako, kapena kugula kanthu ka mnansi wako, musamasautsana;" 
Leviticus25:15 monga mwa kuwerenga kwace kwa zaka, citapita coliza lipenga, uzigula kwa mnansi wako, ndi monga mwa kuwerenga kwa zaka za zipatso azigulitsa." 
Leviticus25:16 Monga mwa kucuruka kwa zaka zace uonjeze mtengo wace, ndi monga mwa kucepa kwa zaka zace ucepse mtengo wace; pakuti akugulitsa powerenga masiku ace." 
Leviticus25:17 Musamasautsana, koma uope Mulungu wako; popeza Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus25:18 M'mwemo mucite malemba anga, ndi kusunga maweruzo anga, ndi kuwacita; ndipo mudzakhala m'dzikomo okhazikika." 
Leviticus25:19 Dziko lidzaperekanso zipatso zace, ndipo mudzadya ndi kukhuta, ndi k'ukhalamo okhazikika." 
Leviticus25:20 Ndipo mukadzati, Tidzadyanji caka cacisanu ndi ciwiri? taonani, sitidzabzala, sitidzakolola dzinthu;" 
Leviticus25:21 pamenepo ndidzauza dalitso langa litsike pa inu caka cacisanu ndi cimodzi, ndipo cidzapatsa zipatso zofikira zaka zitatu." 
Leviticus25:22 Ndipo mubzale caka cacisanu ndi citatu, ndi kudya zipatso zasundwe; kufikira caka cacisanu ndi cinai, mpaka zitacha zipatso zace mudzadya zasundwe." 
Leviticus25:23 Ndipo asaligulitse dziko cigulitsire; popeza dzikoli ndi langa; pakuti inu ndinu alendo akugonera ndi Ine. 
Leviticus25:24 Potero muzilola liomboledwe dziko lonse muli nalo. 
Leviticus25:25 Mbale wako akasaukira cuma, nakagulitsa cace cace, pamenepo mombolo wace, mbale wace weni weni azidza, naombole cimene mbale wace anagulitsaco." 
Leviticus25:26 Ndipo munthu akasowa mombolo, koma dzanja lace lacionetsa, nacipeza cofikira kuciombola;" 
Leviticus25:27 pamenepo awerenge zaka za kugulitsa kwace, nabwezere wosulayo zotsalirapo, nabwerere iye ku dziko lace." 
Leviticus25:28 Koma dzanja lace likapanda kupeza zofikira za kumbwezera, pamenepo cogulitsaco cikhale m'dzanja lace la iye adacigulayo, kufikira caka coliza lipenga; koma caka coliza lipenga cituruke, nabwerere iye ku dziko lace." 
Leviticus25:29 Munthu akagulitsa nyumba yogonamo, m'mudzi wa m'linga, aiombole cisanathe caka coigulitsa; kufikira kutha caka akhoza kuombola." 
Leviticus25:30 Ndipo akapanda kuiombola kufikira kutha kwace kwa caka camphumphu, nyumba iri m'mudzi wa m'lingayi idzakhala yace ya iye adaigula yosamcokeranso mwa mibadwo yace; siidzaturuka caka coliza lipenga." 
Leviticus25:31 Koma nyumba za m'midzi yopanda linga aziyese monga minda ya m'dziko; ziomboledwe, zituruke m'caka coliza lipenga." 
Leviticus25:32 Kunena za midzi ya Alevi, nyumba za m'midzi yao yao, Alevi akhoza kuziombola nthawi zonse." 
Leviticus25:33 Ndipo munthu akagula kwa Mlevi, nyumba yogulayo yokhala m'mudzi wace wace, ituruke m'caka coliza lipenga, popeza nyumba za m'midzi ya Alevi ndizo zao zao mwa ana a Israyeli." 
Leviticus25:34 Koma dambo la podyera pao siligulika; popeza ndilo lao lao kosatha. 
Leviticus25:35 Ndipo mbale wako akasaukira cuma, ndi dzanja lace lisowa; iwe uzimgwiriziza; akhale nawe monga mlendo wakugonera kwanu." 
Leviticus25:36 Usamambwezetsa phindu, kapena cioniezero; koma uope Mulungu wako; kuti mbale wako akhale nawe." 
Leviticus25:37 Musamampatsa ndarama zako polira phindu, kapena kumpatsa zakudya kuti aonjezerepo pocibwezera." 
Leviticus25:38 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene ndinakuturutsani m'dziko la Aigupto, kukupatsani dziko la Kanani, kuti ndikhale Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus25:39 Ndipo mbale wako akasaukira cuma, ndi kudzigulitsa kwa iwe; usamamgwiritsa nchito monga kapolo;" 
Leviticus25:40 azikhala nawe ngati wolipidwa nchito, ngati munthu wokhala nawe; akutumikire kufikira caka coliza lipenga." 
Leviticus25:41 Pamenepo azituruka kukucokera, iye ndi ana ace omwe, nabwerere ku mbumba yace; abwerere ku dziko lao lao la makolo ace." 
Leviticus25:42 Pakuti iwo ndiwo atumiki anga, amene ndinawaturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto; asamawagulitsa monga amagulitsa kapolo." 
Leviticus25:43 Usamamweruza momzunza; koma uope Mulungu wako. 
Leviticus25:44 Kunena za kapolo wako wamwamuna, kapena wamkazi amene ukhala nao; azikhala a amitundu akuzungulira inu, kwa iwowa muzigula akapolo amuna ndi akazi." 
Leviticus25:45 Muwagulenso ana a alendo akukhala mwa inu, a iwowa ndi a mabanja ao akukhala nanu, amene anabadwa m'dziko lanu; ndipo adzakhala anu anu." 
Leviticus25:46 Ndipo muwayese colowa ca ana anu akudza m'mbuyo, akhale ao ao; muwayese akapolo kosatha; koma za abale anu, ana a Israyeli, musamalamulirana mozunza." 
Leviticus25:47 Ndipo mlendo wakugonera kwanu akalemera cuma, ndi mbale wako wakukhala naye akasauka, nadzigulitsa kwa mlendo wakugonera kwanu, kapena kwa pfuko la banja la mlendo;" 
Leviticus25:48 atatha kudzigulitsa, aomboledwe; wina wa abale ace amuombole;" 
Leviticus25:49 kapena mbale wa atate wace, kapena mwana wa mbale wa atate wace amuombole, kapena mbale wace ali yense wa banja lace amuombole; kapena akalemera cuma yekha adziombole yekha." 
Leviticus25:50 Ndipo awerengere amene anamgulayo kuyambira caka adadzigulitsa kwa iye kufikira caka coliza lipenga; ndipo mtengo wace ukhale monga mwa kuwerenga kwa zaka; amuyesere monga masiku a munthu wolipidwa. 
Leviticus25:51 Zikamtsalira zaka zambiri, monga mwa izi abwezere ndarama zakumuombola zocokera ku ndalama zomgulazo." 
Leviticus25:52 Ndipo zikamtsalira zaka pang'ono kufikira caka coliza lipenga amwerengere; monga mwa zaka zace abwezere mtengo wace wakumuombola. 
Leviticus25:53 Akhale naye monga wolipidwa caka ndi caka; asamamlamulira momzunza pamaso pako," 
Leviticus25:54 Ndipo akapanda kumuombola motero, azituruka caka coliza lipenga, iye ndi ana ace omwe." 
Leviticus25:55 Pakuti ana a Israyeli ndi atumiki anga; iwo ndiwo atumiki anga amene ndinawaturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto; Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu. 
Leviticus26:1 Musamadzipangira mafano, kapena kudziutsira mafano osema, kapena coimiritsa, kapena kuika mwala wozokota m'dziko mwanu kuugwadira umene; popeza Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Leviticus26:2 Musunge masabata anga, ndi kucitira ulemu malo anga opatulika; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Leviticus26:3 Mukamayenda m'malemba anga, ndi kusunga malamulo anga, ndi kuwacita;" 
Leviticus26:4 ndidzakupatsani mvula m'nyengo zace, ndi dziko lidzapereka zipatso zace, ndi mitengo ya m'minda idzabala zipatso zace." 
Leviticus26:5 Ndipo nyengo yopuntha tirigu idzafikira nyengo yochera mphesa, ndi nyengo yochera mphesa idzafikira nyengo zobzala; ndipo mudzakhuta naco cakudya canu, ndi kukhala m'dziko mwanu okhazikika." 
Leviticus26:6 Ndipo ndidzapatsa mtendere m'dzikomo, kuti mudzagone pansi, wopanda wina wakukuopsani; ndidzaletsanso zirombo zisakhale m'dzikomo, lupanga lomwe silidzapita m'dziko mwanu." 
Leviticus26:7 Mudzapitikitsa adani anu, ndipo adzagwa pamaso panu ndi lupanga," 
Leviticus26:8 Asanu ainu adzapitikitsa zana limodzi, ndi zana limodzi la inu adzapitikitsa zikwi khumi; ndi adani anu adzagwa pamaso panu ndi lupanga." 
Leviticus26:9 Ndipo ndidzatembenukira kwa inu, ndi kukubalitsani, ndi kukucurukitsani; ndipo ndidzakhazika cipangano canga ndinapangana nanuco." 
Leviticus26:10 Ndipo mudzadya za sundwe wakale ndi kuturutsa zakale cifukwa ca zatsopano. 
Leviticus26:11 Ndidzamanga kacisi wanga pakati pa inu, ndipo moyo wanga sudzanyansidwa nanu." 
Leviticus26:12 Ndipo ndidzayendayenda pakati pa inu, ndi kukhala Mulungu wanu ndi inu mudzakhala anthu anga." 
Leviticus26:13 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene ndinakuturutsani m'dziko la Aigupto, kuti musakhale akapolo ao; ndipo ndinatyola mitengo ya magoli anu, ndi kukuyendetsani coweramuka." 
Leviticus26:14 Koma mukapanda kundimvera Ine, osacita malamulo awa onse;" 
Leviticus26:15 ndipo mukakaniza malemba anga, ndi moyo wanu ukanyansidwa nao maweruzo anga, kotero kuti simudzacita malamulo anga onse, koma kutyola cipangano canga;" 
Leviticus26:16 ndidzacitira inu icinso; ndidzakuikirani zoopsa, nthendayoondetsayam'cifuwa ndi malungo, zakulanda maso ndi mphamvu, ndi kuzunza moyo; ndipo mudzabzala mbeu zanu cabe, pope za adani anu adzazidya." 
Leviticus26:17 Ndipt nkhope yanga idzatsutsana nanu kuti adani anu adzakukanthani, ndipt akudana ndi inu adzacita ufumu Pl inu ndipo mudzathawa wopanda wakukulondolani." 
Leviticus26:18 Ndipo muka panda kundimvera, zingakhale izi ndidzaonjeza kukulangani kasanu nd kawiri cifukwa ca zocimwa zanu." 
Leviticus26:19 Popeza ndidzatyola mphamvu yam yodzikuza; ndi kusandutsa thambo lanu likhale ngati citsulo ndi dziko lanu ngati mkuwa; 
Leviticus26:20 ndipo mudzacita nayo mphamvu yanu cabe; ndi nthaka yanu siidzapereka zipatse zace, ndi mitengo ya m'dziko siidzabala zobala zace." 
Leviticus26:21 Ndipo mukayenda motsutsana nane, osalola kumvera Ine; ndidzakuonjezerani miliri kasanu ndi kawiri, monga mwa zocimwa zanu." 
Leviticus26:22 Popeza ndidzatumiza cirombo ca kuthengo pakati pa inu, ndipo cidzalanda ana anu, ndi kuononga zoweta zanu nicidzacepetsa inu kuti mukhale pang'ono; ndi njira zanu zidzakhala zakufa." 
Leviticus26:23 Ndipo mukapanda kulangika nazo ndi kubwera kwa Ine, mukayenda motsutsana ndi Ine;" 
Leviticus26:24 Inenso ndidzayenda motsutsana ndi inu; ndipo ndidzakukanthani Inedi kasanu ndi kawiri cifukwa ca zoipa zanu. 
Leviticus26:25 Ndipo ndidzadzetsa kwa inu lupanga lakucita cilango ca cipangano; kotero kuti mudzasonkhanidwa m'midzi mwanu; ndipo ndidzatumiza mliri pakati pa inu; ndipo mudzaperekedwa m'manja mwa mdani. 
Leviticus26:26 Pamene ndityola mcirikizo wanu wa mkate, akazi khumi adzaphika mkate wanu mu mcembo umodzi, nadzabweza mkate wanu ndi kuuyesa; ndipo mudzadya, koma osakhuta." 
Leviticus26:27 Ndipo mukapanda kundimvera Ine, cingakhale ici, ndi kuyenda motsutsana nane;" 
Leviticus26:28 Ine ndidzayenda nanu motsutsana mwa kukuzazirani, ndi kukulangani Inedi kasanu ndi kawiri cifukwa ca zocimwa zanu." 
Leviticus26:29 Ndipo mudzadya nyama ya ana anu amuna; inde nyama ya ana anu akazi mudzaidya. 
Leviticus26:30 Ndipo ndidzaononga malo amsanje anu, ndi kulikha zoimiritsa zanu za dzuwa, ndi kuponya mitembo yanu pa mitembo ya mafano anu; ndi moyo wanga udzanyansidwa nanu." 
Leviticus26:31 Ndipo ndidzasandutsa midzi yanu bwinja, ndi kupasula malo anu opatulika, wosanunkhiza Ine za pfungo lanu lokoma." 
Leviticus26:32 Inde, ndidzapasula dzikoli, ndipo adani anu akukhala m'mwemo adzadabwa nako." 
Leviticus26:33 Ndipo ndidzabalalitsa inu mwa amitundu, ndi kusolola lupanga kukutsatani; ndi dziko lanu lidzakhala lopasuka, ndi midzi yanu idzakhala bwinja." 
Leviticus26:34 Pamenepo dzikoli lidzakondwera nao masabata ace, masiku onse a kupasuka kwace, pokhala inu m'dziko la adani anu; pamenepo dziko lidzapumula, ndi kukondwera nao masabata ace." 
Leviticus26:35 Masiku onse a kupasuka kwace lipumula; ndiko mpumulo udalisowa m'masabata anu, pokhala inu pamenepo." 
Leviticus26:36 Kunena za iwo akutsalira, ndidzalonga kukomoka kumtima kwao m'maiko a adani ao; ndi liu la tsamba lotengeka ndi mphepo lidzawapitikitsa; ndipo adzathawa monga amathawa lupanga; ndipo adzagwa wopanda wakuwalondola." 
Leviticus26:37 Ndipo adzakhumudwitsana monga pothawa lupanga, wopanda wakuwalondola; ndipo mudzakhala opanda mphamvu yakuima pamaso pa adani anu." 
Leviticus26:38 Ndipo mudzatayika mwa amitundu, ndi dziko la adani anu lidzakudyani." 
Leviticus26:39 Ndipo otsala mwa inu adzazunzika m'moyo ndi mphulupulu zao m'maiko a adani anu; ndiponso ndi mphulupulu za makolo ao adzazunzika m'moyo. 
Leviticus26:40 Pamenepo adzabvomereza mphulupulu zao, ndi mphulupulu za makolo ao, pocita zosakhulupirika pa Ine; ndiponso popeza anayenda motsutsana ndi Ine," 
Leviticus26:41 Inenso ndinayenda motsutsana nao, ndi kuwatengera ku dziko la adani ao. Ngati tsono mtima wao wosadulidwa udzicepetsa, ndipo abvomereza kulanga kwa mphulupulu zao;" 
Leviticus26:42 pamenepo ndidzakumbukila pangano langa ndi Yakobo; ndiponso pangano langa ndi Isake, ndiponso pangano langa ndi Abrahamu ndidzakumbukila; ndipo ndidzakumbukila dzikoli." 
Leviticus26:43 Dziko lomwe lidzasiyidwa nao, ndi kukondwera ndi masabata ace, pokhala lopasuka, iwowa palibe; ndipo iwo adzabvomereza kulanga kwa mphulupulu zao; popeza, inde popeza anakaniza maweruzo anga, ndi moyo wao unanyansidwa nao malemba anga." 
Leviticus26:44 Ndiponso pali icinso: pokhala iwo m'dziko la adani ao sindidzawakaniza, kapena kunyansidwa nao, kuwaononga konse, ndi kutyola pangano langa ndinapangana nao; popeza Ine ndine Yehova Muhmgu wao." 
Leviticus26:45 Koma cifukwa ca iwo ndidzawakumbukila pangano la makolo ao, amene ndinawaturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto pamaso pa amitundu, kuti ndikhale Mulungu wao; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Leviticus26:46 Awa ndi malemba ndi maweruzo ndi malamulo amene Yehova anaika pakati pa iye ndi ana a Israyeli m'phiri la Sinai, ndi dzanja la Mose." 
Leviticus27:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Leviticus27:2 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, nuti nao, Pamene munthu acita cowinda ca padera, anthuwo azikhala a Yehova monga mwa kuyesa kwako." 
Leviticus27:3 Ukayesa wamwamuna wa zaka makumi awiri kufikira wina wa zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi, uziwayesera a masekeli makumi asanu a siliva, monga mwa sekeli wa malo opatulika." 
Leviticus27:4 Koma akakhala wamkazi, umuyesere wa masekeli makumi atatu." 
Leviticus27:5 Akakhala munthu wa zaka zisanu kufikira wina wa zaka makumi awiri uwayesere, wamwamuna wa masekeli makumi awiri, ndi wamkazi wa masekeli khumi." 
Leviticus27:6 Akakhala mwana wa mwezi umodzi kufikira zaka zisanu, uziwayesera wamwamuna wa masekeli asanu a siliva, ndi wamkazi wa masekeli atatu a siliva." 
Leviticus27:7 Akakhala munthu wa zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi ndi mphambu, akakhala wamwamuna, umuyesere wa masekeli khumi ndi asanu, akakhala wamkazi wa masekeli khumi." 
Leviticus27:8 Koma cuma cace cikapanda kufikira kuyesa kwako, amuike pamaso pa wansembe, kuti wansembeyo amuyese; ndipo wansembeyo amuyese, monga akhoza iye amene anawinda." 
Leviticus27:9 Ndipo cikakhala ca nyama imene anthu amabwera nayo ikhale copereka ca Yehova, zonse zotere munthu akazipereka kwa Yehova zikhale zopatulika." 
Leviticus27:10 Asaisinthe, yokoma m'malo mwa yoipa, kapena yoipa m'malo mwa yokoma; ndipo akasinthadi nyama m'malo mwa inzace, pamenepo iyo ndi yosinthikayo zikhale zopatulika." 
Leviticus27:11 Ndipo cikakhala ca nyama yodetsa, imene sabwera nayo ikhale copereka ca Yehova, aike nyamayi pamaso pa wansembe;" 
Leviticus27:12 ndipo wansembeyo aiyese mtengo wace, ingakhale yokoma kapena yoipa; monga uiyesa wansembewe, momwemo." 
Leviticus27:13 Ndipo akaiombola ndithu, pamenepo aonjezepo limodzi la magawo asanu la mtengo wace." 
Leviticus27:14 Munthu akapatula nyumba yace ikhale yopatulika kwa Yehova, wansembe aziiyesa mtengo wace, ingakhale yokoma kapena yoipa; monga wansembeyo aiyesa, ikhale momwemo." 
Leviticus27:15 Ndipo iye wakuipatula akaombola nyumba yace, aonjezepo limodzi la magawo asanu la ndalama za kuyesa kwako, ndipo idzakhala yace." 
Leviticus27:16 Munthu akapatulirako Yehova munda wace wace, uziuyesa monga mwa mbeu zace zikakhala; homeri wa barie uuyese wa masekeli makumi asanu a siliva." 
Leviticus27:17 Akapatula munda wace kuyambira caka coliza lipenga, mundawo ukhale monga momwe unauyesera." 
Leviticus27:18 Akaupatula munda wace citapita caka coliza lipenga, wansembe azimwerengera ndalama monga mwa zaka zotsalira kufikira caka coliza lipenga, nazicepsako pa kuyesa kwako." 
Leviticus27:19 Ndipo wakupacula mundayo akauomboladi, aonjezeko limodzi la magawo asanu la ndalama za kuyesa kwako, ndipo uzikhalitsa wace." 
Leviticus27:20 Koma akapanda kuombola mundawo, kapena atagulitsa mundawo kwa munthu wina, suomboledwanso;" 
Leviticus27:21 koma poturuka m'caka coliza lipenga, mundawo ukhale wopatulikira Yehova, ngati munda woperekedwa ciperekere kwa Mulungu; ukhale wace wace wa wansembe." 
Leviticus27:22 Ndipo akapatulira Yehova munda woti adaugula, wosati wogawako ku munda wace wace;" 
Leviticus27:23 pamenepo wansembeyo amwerengere mtengo wace wa kuyesa kwako kufikira caka coliza lipenga; ndipo apereke kuyesa kwako tsiku lomwelo, cikhale cinthu copatulikira Yehova," 
Leviticus27:24 Caka coliza lipenga mundawo ubwerere kwa iye amene adaugulitsa, kwa iye amene dzikoli ndi lace lace." 
Leviticus27:25 Ndipo kuyesa kwako konse kukhale monga mwa sekeli wa malo opatulika; sekeli ndi magera makumi awiri. 
Leviticus27:26 Komatu woyamba kubadwa mwa nyama akhale wobadwa woyamba wa Yehova, munthu asampatule; ingakhale ng'ombe ingakhale nkhosa, ndiye wa Yehova." 
Leviticus27:27 Koma akakhala wa nyama zodetsa, azimuombola monga mwa kuyesa kwako, naonjezepo limodzi la magawo asanu la mtengo wace; ndipo akapanda kumuombola, amgulitse monga mwa kuyesa kwako." 
Leviticus27:28 Koma asacigulitse kapena kuciombola cinthu coperekedwa ciperekere kwa Mulungu, cimene munthu acipereka ciperekere kwa: Yehova, cotengako ku zonse ali nazo, ngakhale munthu, kapena nyama, kapena munda wace wace; ciri conse coperekedwa ciperekere kwa Mulungu neopatulikitsa." 
Leviticus27:29 Asamuombole munthu woperekedwa ciperekere kwa Mulungu; amuphe ndithu. 
Leviticus27:30 Limodzi mwa magawo khumi la zonse m'dziko, la mbeu zace za dziko, la zipatso za mtengo, ndilo la Yehova; likhale lopatulikira Yehova." 
Leviticus27:31 Koma munthu akaombolatu kanthu ka limodzi la magawo khumiwo aonjezeko limodzi la magawo asanu. 
Leviticus27:32 Ndipo limodzi la magawo khumi lonse la ng'ombe, kapena la nkhosa, kapena la mbuzi, ziri zonse zimapita pansi pa ndodo, limodzi la magawo khumi likhale lopatulikira Yehova." 
Leviticus27:33 Asafunse ngati yabwino kapena yoipa, kapena kuisintha; koma akaisinthatu, pamenepo iyo ndi yosinthikayo zikhale zopatulika zonse ziwiri; asamaiombola." 
Leviticus27:34 Awa ndi malamulo, amene Yehova anauza Mose, awauze ana a Israyeli, m'phiri la Sinai." 
Numbers1:1 NDIPO Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'cipululu ca Sinai, m'cihema cokomanako, tsiku loyamba la mwezi waciwiri, caka caciwiri ataturuka m'dziko la Aigupto, ndi kuti," 
Numbers1:2 Werenga khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba ya makolo ao ndi kuwerenga maina ao, amuna onse mmodzi mmodzi." 
Numbers1:3 Iwe ndi Aroni muwawerenge monga mwa magulu ao, onse m'Israyeli akuturuka kunkhondo, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu," 
Numbers1:4 Ndipo pamodzi ndi inu pakhale munthu mmodzi wa mapfuko onse; yense mkuru wa nyumba ya kholo lace. 
Numbers1:5 Ndipo maina a amuna amene aime nanu ndi awa: wa Rubeni, Elizuri mwana wa Sedeuri." 
Numbers1:6 Wa Simeoni, Selumiyeli mwana wa Zurisadai." 
Numbers1:7 Wa Yuda, Nahesoni mwana wa Aminadabu." 
Numbers1:8 Wa Isakara, Netaneli mwana wa Zuwara." 
Numbers1:9 Wa Zebuloni, Eliyabu mwana wa Heloni." 
Numbers1:10 Wa ana a Yosefe: wa Efraimu, Elisama mwana wa Amihudi; wa Manase, Gamaliyeli mwana wa Pedazuri." 
Numbers1:11 Wa Benjamini, Abidana mwana wa Gideoni." 
Numbers1:12 Wa Dani, Ahiyezeri mwana wa Amisadai." 
Numbers1:13 Wa Aseri, Pagiyeli mwana wa Okirani." 
Numbers1:14 Wa Gadi, Eliyasafe mwana wa Deyueli." 
Numbers1:15 Wa Nafitali, Ahira mwana wa Enani." 
Numbers1:16 Iwo ndiwo oitanidwa a khamu, akalonga a mapfuko a makolo ao; ndiwo akuru a zikwizo za Israyeli." 
Numbers1:17 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anatenga anthu awa, onenedwa maina ao;" 
Numbers1:18 nasonkhanitsa khamu lonse tsiku loyamba la mwezi waciwiri, ndipo iwo anawakumbira magwero ao kuchula mabanja ao, ndi nyumba za makolo ao, ndi kuwerenga maina kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu mmodzi mmodzi." 
Numbers1:19 Monga Yehova anauza Mose, momwemo anawawerenga m'cipululu ca Sinai." 
Numbers1:20 Ndipo ana a Rubeni, mwana woyamba wa Israyeli, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina mmodzi mmodzi, amuna onse kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akuturukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:21 owerengedwa ao a pfuko la Rubeni, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zisanu ndi cimodzi kudza mazana asanu." 
Numbers1:22 A ana a Simeoni, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, owerengedwa ao, powerenga maina mmodzi mmodzi, amuna onse kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akuturukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:23 owerengedwa ao a pfuko la Simeoni, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zisanu ndi zinai kudza mazana atatu." 
Numbers1:24 A ana a Gadi, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akuturukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:25 owerengedwa ao a pfuko la Gadi, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zisanu kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu." 
Numbers1:26 A ana a Yuda, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makomi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akuturukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:27 owerengedwa ao a pfuko la Yuda, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu zinai kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi." 
Numbers1:28 A ana a Isakara, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akuturukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:29 owerengedwa ao a pfuko la lsakara, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zinai kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers1:30 A ana a Zebuloni, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akuturukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:31 owerengedwa ao a pfuko la Zebuloni, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers1:32 A ana a Yosefe, ndiwo a ana a Efraimu, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akuturukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:33 owerengedwa ao a pfuko la Efraimu, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu mazana asanu." 
Numbers1:34 A ana a Manase, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akuturukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:35 owerengedwa ao a pfuko la Manase, ndiwo zikwi makumi atatu mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana awiri." 
Numbers1:36 A ana a Benjamini, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akuturukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:37 owerengedwa ao a pfuko la Benjamini, ndiwo zikwi makumi atatu mphambu zisanu kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers1:38 A ana a Dani, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akuturukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:39 owerengedwa ao a pfuko la Dani, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana asanu ndi awiri." 
Numbers1:40 A ana a Aseri, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akuturukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:41 owerengedwa ao a pfuko la Aseri, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu cimodzi kudza mazana asanu." 
Numbers1:42 A ana a Nafitali, kubadwa kwao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, powerenga maina, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akuturukira kunkhondo;" 
Numbers1:43 owerengedwa ao a pfuko la Nafitali, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zitatu kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers1:44 Iwo ndiwo amene anawerengedwa, amene Mose anawerenga pamodzi ndi Aroni, ndi akalonga a Israyeli, ndiwo amuna khumi ndi awiri; yense kunenera nyumba ya kholo lace." 
Numbers1:45 Potero owerengedwa onse a ana a Israyeli monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, onse akuturukira kunkhondo m'Israyeli;" 
Numbers1:46 inde owerengedwa onse ndiwo zikwi mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu zitatu kudza mazana asanu ndi makumi asanu. 
Numbers1:47 Koma Alevi monga mwa pfuko la makolo ao sanawerengedwa mwa iwo. 
Numbers1:48 Popeza Yehova adalankhula ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Numbers1:49 Pfuko la Levi lokha usaliwerenge, kapena kuona kufikira kwao mwa ana a Israyeli;" 
Numbers1:50 koma iwe, uike Alevi asunge kacisi wa mboni, ndi zipangizo zace zonse, ndi zonse ali nazo; azinyamula kacisi, ndi zipangizo zace zonse; namtumikire, namange mahema ao pozungulira pa kacisi." 
Numbers1:51 Ndipo akati amuke naye kacisiyo, Aleviamgwetse, ndipo akati ammange, Alevi amuimike; ndipo mlendo akayandikizako amuphe," 
Numbers1:52 Ndipo ana a Israyeli amange mahema ao, yense ku cigono cace, ndi yense ku mbendera yace, monga mwa makamu ao." 
Numbers1:53 Koma Alevi amange mahema ao pozungulira pa kacisi wa mboni, kuti mkwiyo ungagwere khamu la ana a Israyeli; ndipo Alevi azidikira kacisi wa mboni." 
Numbers1:54 Momwemo ana a Israyeli anacita monga mwa zonse Yehova adauza Mosel anacita momwemo. 
Numbers2:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, nati," 
Numbers2:2 Ana a Israyeli azimanga mahema ao yense ku mbendera yace, ya cizindikilo ca nyumba ya kholo lace; amange mahema ao popenyana ndi cihema cokomanako pozungulira." 
Numbers2:3 Ndipo iwo akumanga mahema ao ku m'mawa koturuka dzuwa ndiwo a mbendera ya cigono ca Yuda, monga mwa makamu ao; ndipo kalonga wa ana a Yuda ndiye Nahesoni mwana wa Aminadabu." 
Numbers2:4 Ndipo khamu lace, ndi owerengedwa ao, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri, mphambu zinai, kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi." 
Numbers2:5 Ndipo iwo akumanga mahema ao poyandikizana naye ndiwo a pfuko la Isakara; ndipo kalonga wa ana a Isakara ndiye Netandi mwana wa Zuwara. 
Numbers2:6 Ndipo khamu lace, ndi owerengedwa ace, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zinai kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers2:7 Ndi pfuko la Zebuloni: kalonga wa ana a Zebuloni ndiye Eliyabu mwana wa Heloni. 
Numbers2:8 Ndi khamu lace, ndi owerengedwa ace, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers2:9 Owerengedwa onse a cigono ca Yuda ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu kudza zisanu ndi cimodzi mphambu mazana anai, monga mwa makamu ao, Ndiwo azitsogolera ulendo." 
Numbers2:10 Mbendera ya cigono ca Rubeni ikhale kumwera monga mwa makamu ao; ndipo kalonga wa ana a Rubeni ndiye Elizuri mwana wa Sedeuri. 
Numbers2:11 Ndi khamu lace, ndi olembedwa ace, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zisanu ndi cimodzi kudza mazana asanu." 
Numbers2:12 Ndipo iwo akumanga mahema ao poyandikizana naye ndiwo a pfuko la Simeoni; ndi kalonga wa ana a Simeoni ndiye Selumiyeli mwana wa Surisadai. 
Numbers2:13 Ndi khamu lace ndi owerengedwa ace, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zisanu ndi zinai kudza mazana atatu." 
Numbers2:14 Ndi pfuko la Gadi; kalonga wa ana a Gadi ndiye Eliyasafe mwana wa Reueli. 
Numbers2:15 Ndi khamu lace, ndi owerengedwa ace, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zisanu kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu." 
Numbers2:16 Owerengedwa onse a cigono ca Rubeni ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu makumi asanu ndi cimodzi kudza mazana anai mphambu makumi asanu, monga mwa makamu ao. Ndiwo azitsatana nao otsogolerawo." 
Numbers2:17 Pamenepo khamu la Alevi azimuka naco cihema cokomanako, pakati pa makamu; monga amamanga mahema ao, momwemo azimuka ulendo wao, munthu yense pamalo pace, monga mwa mbendera zao." 
Numbers2:18 Mbendera ya cigono ca Efraimu izikhala kumadzulo monga mwa makamu ao; ndipo kalonga wa ana a Efraimu ndiye Elisama mwana wa Amihudi. 
Numbers2:19 Ndi khamu lace, ndi owerengedwa ace, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai kudza mazana asanu." 
Numbers2:20 Ndipo oyandikizana naye ndiwo a pfuko la Manase; ndi kalonga wa ana a Manase ndiye Gamaliyeli mwana wa Pedazuri. 
Numbers2:21 Ndi khamu lace, ndi owerengedwa ace, ndiwo zikwi makumi atatu mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana awiri." 
Numbers2:22 Ndi pfuko la Benjamini: kalonga wa ana a Benjamini ndiye Abidana mwana wa Gideoni. 
Numbers2:23 Ndi khamu lace, ndi owerengedwa ace, ndiwo zikwi makumi atatu mphambu zisanu kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers2:24 Owerengedwa onse a cigono ca Efraimu ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu kudza zana limodzi, monga mwa makamu ao. Iwo ndiwo aziyenda gulu lacitatu paulendo." 
Numbers2:25 Mbendera ya cigono ca Dani izikhala kumpoto monga mwa makamu ao; ndi kalonga wa ana a Dani ndiye Ahiyezeri mwana wa Amisadai. 
Numbers2:26 Ndi khamu lace, ndi owerengedwa ace, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana asanu ndi awiri." 
Numbers2:27 Ndipo iwo akumanga mahema ao poyandikizana naye ndiwo a pfuko la Aseri; ndi kalonga wa ana a Aseri ndiye Pagiyeli mwana wa Okirani. 
Numbers2:28 Ndi khamu lace, ndi owerengedwa ace, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu cimodzi kudza mazana asanu." 
Numbers2:29 Ndi pfuko la Nafitali: ndi kalonga wa ana a Nafitali ndiye Ahira mwana wa Enani. 
Numbers2:30 Ndi khamu lace, ndi owerengedwa ace, ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zitatu kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers2:31 Owerengedwa onse a cigono ca Dani ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi mphambu makumi asanu kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi Hmodzi. Iwo ndiwo aziyenda m'mbuyo paulendo, monga mwa mbendera zao." 
Numbers2:32 Amenewo ndiwo anawerengedwa a ana a Israyeli monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao; owerengedwa onse a m'zigono, monga mwa makamu ao, ndiwo zikwi makumi khumi kasanu ndi kamodzi mphambu zitatu kudza mazana asanu ndi makumi asanu." 
Numbers2:33 Koma sanawerenga Alevi mwa ana a Israyeli; monga Yehova adauza Mose. 
Numbers2:34 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anacita monga mwa zonse Yehova adauza Mose, momwemo anamanga mahema ao pa mbendera zao, momwemonso anayenda paulendo, yense monga mwa mabanja ace, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ace." 
Numbers3:1 Mibadwo ya Aroni ndi Mose, tsiku lija Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'phiri la Sinai, ndi iyo." 
Numbers3:2 Ndipo maina ao a ana amuna a Aroni ndi awa: Woyamba Nadabu, ndi Abihu, Eleazara, ndi Itamara." 
Numbers3:3 Awa ndi maina a ana amuna a Aroni, ansembe odzozedwawo, amene anawadzaza manja ao acite nchito ya nsembe." 
Numbers3:4 Koma Nadabu ndi Abihu anafa pamaso pa Yehova muja anabwera nao moto wacilendo pamaso pa Yehova, m'cipululu ca Sinai, ndipo analibe ana; koma Eleazara ndi Itamara anacita Debito ya nsembe pamaso pa atate wao Aroni." 
Numbers3:5 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers3:6 Sendera nalo kuno pfuko la Levi, ndi kuwaika pamaso pa Aroni wansembe, kuti amtumikire." 
Numbers3:7 Ndipo azisunga udikiro wace, ndi udikiro wa khamu lonse pa khomo la cihema cokomanako, kucita nchito ya kacisi." 
Numbers3:8 Ndipo asunge zipangizo zonse za cihema cokomanako, ndi udikiro wa ana a Israyeli, kuicita nchito ya kacisi." 
Numbers3:9 Ndipo uzipereka Alevi kwa Aroni ndi kwa ana ace amuna; apatsidwa kwa iye ndithu, ocokera kwa ana a Israyeli." 
Numbers3:10 Koma uike Aroni ndi ana ace amuna, azisunga nchito yao ya nsembe; ndi mlendo wakusendera pafupi amuphe." 
Numbers3:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers3:12 Ndipo taonani, Ine ndatenga Alevi kuwacotsa pakati pa ana a Israyeli m'malo mwa ana ovamba onse, oyamba kubadwa mwa ana a Israyeli; ndipo Aleviwo ndi anga." 
Numbers3:13 Pakuti ana oyamba onse ndi anga; tsiku lija ndinakantha ana oyamba onse m'dziko la Aigupto ndinadzipatulira ana oyamba onse m'Israyeli, kuyambira munthu kufikira coweta; ndiwo anga; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Numbers3:14 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'cipululu ca Sinai, nati," 
Numbers3:15 Werenga ana a Levi monga mwa nyumba ya makolo ao, monga mwa mabanja ao; uwawerenge mwamuna yense wa mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu." 
Numbers3:16 Ndipo Mose anawawerenga monga mwa mau a Yehova, monga adamuuza." 
Numbers3:17 Ndipo ana a Levi maina ao ndi awa: Gerisoni, ndi Kohati ndi Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Ndi ana a Gerisoni maina ao ndi awa, monga mwa mabanja ao: Libini, ndi Simei." 
Numbers3:19 Ndi ana a Kohati monga mwa mabanja ao: Amiramu ndi lzara, Hebroni ndi Uziyeli." 
Numbers3:20 Ndi ana a Merari monga mwa mabanja ao: Mali ndi Musi. Awa ndi mabanja a Alevi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao. 
Numbers3:21 Banja la Libini, ndi mabanja a Simei, ndiwo a Gerisoni; ndiwo mabanja a Gerisoni." 
Numbers3:22 Owerengedwa ao, powawerenga amuna onse, kuyambira mwana wa mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu, owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu." 
Numbers3:23 Mabanja a Agerisoni azimanga mahema ao pambuyo pa kacisi kumadzulo. 
Numbers3:24 Ndipo kalonga wa nyumba ya makolo a Agerisoni ndiye Eliyasafe mwana wa Layeli. 
Numbers3:25 Ndipo udikiro wa ana a Gerisoni m'cihema cokomanako ndiwo kacisi, ndi cihema, cophimba cace, ndi nsaru yotsekera pa khomo la cihema cokomanako," 
Numbers3:26 ndi nsaru zocinga za kubwalo, ndi nsaru yotsekera pa cipata ca pabwalo, lokhala kukacisi, ndi ku guwa la nsembe pozungulira, ndi zingwe zace za ku nchito zace zonse." 
Numbers3:27 Banja la Aamiramu, ndi banja la Aizara, ndi banja la Ahebroni, ndi banja la Auziyeli ndiwo a Kohati; ndiwo mabanja a Akohati." 
Numbers3:28 Powawerenga amuna onse, kuyambira a mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi zitatu mphambu mazana asanu ndi limodzi, akusunga udikiro wa pa malo opatulika." 
Numbers3:29 Mabanja a ana a Kohati azimanga mahema ao pa mbali ya kacisi ya kumwera. 
Numbers3:30 Ndipo kalonga wa nyumba ya makolo ao ya mabanja a Akohati ndiye Elizafana mwana wa Uziyeli. 
Numbers3:31 Ndipoudikirowaondiwo likasa, ndi gome, ndi coikapo nyali, ndimagome a nsembe, ndi zipangizo za malo opatulika zimene acita nazo, ndi nsaru yocinga, ndi nchito zace zonse." 
Numbers3:32 Ndipo kalonga wa akalonga a Alevi ndiye Eleazara mwana wa Aroni wansembeyo; ndiye aziyang'anira osunga udikiro wa pa malo opatulika. 
Numbers3:33 Banja la Amali, ndi banja la Amusi ndiwo a Merari; ndiwo mabanja a Merari." 
Numbers3:34 Ndipo owerengedwa ao, powerenga amuna onse, kuyambira a mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu, ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi cimodzi kudza mazana awiri." 
Numbers3:35 Ndi kalonga wa nyumba ya makolo ya mabanja a Merari ndiye Zuriyeli mwana wa Abiyaili; azimanga mahema ao pa mbali ya kacisi ya kumpoto. 
Numbers3:36 Ndipo coyang'anira iwo, udikiro wao wa ana a Merari ndiwo matabwa a kacisi, ndi mitanda yace, ndi mizati ndi nsanamira zace, ndi makamwa ace, ndi zipangizo zace zonse, ndi nchito zace zonse;" 
Numbers3:37 ndi nsici za pabwalo pozungulira, ndi makamwa ace, ndi ziciri zace, ndi zingwe zace." 
Numbers3:38 Ndipo amene adamanga mahema ao pa khomo la kacisi, kum'mawa, pa khomo la cihema cokomanako koturukira dzuwa, ndiwo Mose ndi Aroni, ndi ana ace amuna, akusunga udikiro wa malo opatulika, ndiwo udikiro wa ana a Israyeli; koma mlendo wakuyandikizako amuphe," 
Numbers3:39 Owerengedwa onse a Alevi, adawawerenga Mose ndi Aroni, powauza Yehova, monga mwa mabanja ao, amuna onse kuyambira a mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu, ndiwo zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri." 
Numbers3:40 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Werenga amuna oyamba kubadwa onse a ana a Israyeli kuyambira a mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu nuone ciwerengo ca maina ao." 
Numbers3:41 Ndipo unditengere Ine Alevi (ine ndine Yehova) m'malo mwa oyamba kubadwa onse mwa ana a Israyeli; ndi ng'ombe za Alevi m'malo mwa zoyamba kubadwa zonse mwa ng'ombe za ana a Israyeli. 
Numbers3:42 Ndipo Mose anawawerenga, monga Yehova adamuuza, oyamba kubadwa onse mwa ana a Israyeli." 
Numbers3:43 Ndipo amuna onse oyamba kubadwa, powerenga maina, kuyambira a mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu, owerengedwa ao, ndiwo zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu atatu." 
Numbers3:44 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers3:45 Landira Alevi m'malo mwa oyamba kubadwa onse mwa ana a Israyeli, ndi ng'ombe za Alevi m'malo mwa ng'ombe zao; ndipo Alevi azikhala anga; Ine ndine Yehova." 
Numbers3:46 Kunena za mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza atatuwo oyamba kubadwa a ana a Israyeli, akuposa Alevi, akaomboledwe," 
Numbers3:47 ulandire masekeli asanu pa munthu mmodzi; uwalandire pa muyeso wa sekeli wa malo opatulika (sekeli ndiwo magera makumi awiri); 
Numbers3:48 nupereke ndarama zimene akuposawo anaomboledwa nazo kwa Aroni ndi kwa ana ace amuna. 
Numbers3:49 Pamenepo Mose analandira ndarama zaom bola nazo kwa iwo akuposa aja adawaombola Alevi; 
Numbers3:50 analandira ndaramazo kwa oyamba kubadwa a ana a Israyeli; masekeli cikwi cimodzi mphambu mazana atatu kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu asanu, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika." 
Numbers3:51 Ndipo Mose anapatsa Aroni ndi ana ace ndarama zaom bola nazo monga mwa mau a Yehova, monga Yehova adauza Mose." 
Numbers4:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, nati," 
Numbers4:2 Werengani ana a Kohati pakati pa ana a Levi, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao," 
Numbers4:3 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu, kufikira zaka makumi asanu, onse akulowa utumikiwu, kuti agwire nchito ya cihema cokomanako." 
Numbers4:4 Nchito ya ana a Kohati m'cihema cokomanako ndi iyi, kunena za zinthu zopatulikitsa:" 
Numbers4:5 akati amuke a m'cigono, Aroni ndi ana ace amuna azilowa, natsitse nsaru yocinga, ndi kuphimba nayo likasa la mboni," 
Numbers4:6 ndi kuikapo cophimba ca zikopa za akatumbu; ndi kuyalapo nsaru yamadzi yeni yeni, ndi kupisako mphiko zace." 
Numbers4:7 Ndi pa gome la mkate waonekera ayale nsaru yamadzi, naikepo mbale zace, ndi zipande, ndi mitsuko, ndi zikho zakuthira nazo; mkate wa cikhalire uzikhalaponso." 
Numbers4:8 Ndipo ayale pa izi nsaru yofiira, ndi kuliphimba ndi cophimba ca zikopa za akatumbu, ndi kupisako mphiko zace." 
Numbers4:9 Ndipo atenge nsaru yamadzi, ndi kuphimba coikapo nyali younikira, ndi nyali zace, ndi mbano zace, ndi zaolera zace, ndi zotengera zace zonse za mafuta zogwira nazo nchito yace." 
Numbers4:10 Ndipo acimange ndi cipangizo zace zonse m'cophimba ca zikopa za akatumbu, ndi kuziika pa conyamulira." 
Numbers4:11 Ndipo pa guwa la nsembe lagolidi aziyala nsaru yamadzi, naliphimbe ndi cophimba ca zikopa za akatumbu, ndi kupisako mphiko zace." 
Numbers4:12 Natenge zipangizo zace zonse za utumiki, zimene atumikira nazo m'malo opatulika, nazimange m'nsaru yamadzi, ndi kuziphimba ndi cophimba ca zikopa za akatumbu, ndi kuziika paconyamulira." 
Numbers4:13 Ndipo azicotsa mapulusa pa guwa la nsembe, ndi kuyala pa ilo nsaru yofiirira." 
Numbers4:14 Naikepo zipangizo zace zonse, zimene atumikira nazo pamenepo, mbale za zofukiza, mitungo, ndi zaolera, ndi mbale zowazira, zipangizo zonse za guwa la nsembe; nayalepo cophimba ca zikopa za akatumbu, ndi kupisako mphiko zace." 
Numbers4:15 Atatha Aroni ndi ana ace amuna kuphimba malo opatulika, ndi zipangizo zace zonse za malo opatulika, pofuna kumuka am'cigono; atatero, ana a Kohati adze kuzinyamula; koma asakhudze zopatulikazo, kuti angafe. Zinthu izi ndizo akatundu a ana a Kohati m'cihema cokomanako." 
Numbers4:16 Ndipo zoyang'anira Eleazara, mwana wa Aroni wansembe, ndizo mafuta a nyaliyo, ndi cofukiza ca pfungo lokoma, ndi nsembe yaufa kosalekeza, ndi mafuta odzoza, udikiro wa kacisi wonse, ndi zonse ziri m'mwemo, malo opatulika, ndi zipangizo zace." 
Numbers4:17 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, Dati," 
Numbers4:18 Musamasadza pfuko la mabanja a Kohati kuwacotsa pakati pa Alevi; 
Numbers4:19 koma muzitero nao kuti akhale ndi moyo, osafa ai, poyandikiza iwo zopatulikitsazo; Aroni ndi ana ace amuna alowe, namuikire munthu yense nchito yace ndi katundu wace." 
Numbers4:20 Koma asalowe kukaona zopatulikazo pozikulunga, kuti angafe." 
Numbers4:21 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers4:22 Werenganso ana a Gerisoni, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Numbers4:23 Uwawerenge kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu, kufikira a zaka makumi asanu; onse akulowa kutumikira utumikiwo, kucita nchitoyi m'cihema cokomanako." 
Numbers4:24 Nchito ya mabanja a Agerisoni, pogwira nchito ndi kusenza katundu ndi iyi;" 
Numbers4:25 azinyamula nsaru zophimba za kacisi, ndi cihema cokomanako, cophimba cace, ndi cophimba ca zikopa za akatumbu ciri pamwamba pace, ndi nsaru yotsekera pa khomo la cihema cokomanako;" 
Numbers4:26 ndi nsaru zocingira za pabwalo, ndi nsaru yotsekera ku cipata ca pabwalo liri pakacisi ndi pa guwa la nsembe pozungulira, ndi zingwe zao, ndi zipangizo zonse za Debito zao, ndi zonse acita nazo; m'menemo muli nchito zao." 
Numbers4:27 Nchito yonse ya ana a Agerisoni, kunena za akatundu ao ndi nchito zao zonse, ikhale monga adzanena Aroni ndi ana ace amuna; ndipo muwaike adikire akatundu ao onse." 
Numbers4:28 Iyi ndi nchito ya mabanja a ana a Gerisoni m'cihema cokomanako; ndipo Itamara mwana wa Aroni wansembe ayang'anire udikiro wao. 
Numbers4:29 Kunena za ana a Merari, Uwawerenge monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao." 
Numbers4:30 Uwawerenge kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu, onse akulowa utumikiwu, kucita nchito ya cihema cokomanako." 
Numbers4:31 Ndipo udikiro wa akatundu ao, monga mwa nchito zao zonse m'cihema cokomanako ndi ici: matabwa a kacisi, ndi mitanda yace, ndi mizati ndi nsanamira zace, ndi makamwa ace;" 
Numbers4:32 ndi nsici za kubwalo kozungulira, ndi makamwa ace, ndi ziciri zace, ndi zingwe zace, pamodzi ndi zipangizo zace zonse, ndi nchito yace yonse; ndipo muziwerenga zipangizo za udikiro wa akatundu ao ndi kuwaehula maina ao." 
Numbers4:33 Iyi ndi nchito ya mabanja a ana a Merari, monga mwa nchito zao zonse m'cihema cokomanako, mowauza Itamara mwana wa Aroni wansembe." 
Numbers4:34 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni ndi akalonga a khamu anawerenga ana a Akohati monga mwa mabanja ao, ndi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao," 
Numbers4:35 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu, onse akulowa utumikiwu, kuti agwire Debito m'cihema cokomanako;" 
Numbers4:36 ndipo owerengedwa ao monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu. 
Numbers4:37 Awa ndi owerengedwa a mabanja a Akohati, onse akutumikira m'cihema cokomanako, amene Mose ndi Aroni anawawerenga monga mwa mau a Yehova mwa dzanja la Mose." 
Numbers4:38 Ndipo ana owerengedwa a Gerisoni, monga mwa mabanja ao, ndi monga mwa nyu mba za makolo ao," 
Numbers4:39 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu, onse akulowa utumikiwu, kuti agwire nchito m'cihema cokomanako," 
Numbers4:40 owerengedwa ao, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, ndiwo zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi limodzi kudza makumi atatu." 
Numbers4:41 Amenewo ndiwo owerengedwa a mabanja a ana a Gerisoni, onse akutumikira m'cihema cokomanako, adawawerenga Mose ndi Aroni monga mwa mau a Yehova." 
Numbers4:42 Ndipo owerengedwa a mabanja a ana a Merari, monga mwa mabanja ao, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao," 
Numbers4:43 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu, onse akulowa utumikiwu kuti agwire nchito m'cihema cokomanako," 
Numbers4:44 owerengedwa ao monga mwa mabanja ao, ndiwo zikwi zitatu ndi mazana awiri." 
Numbers4:45 Amenewo ndiwo owerengedwa a mabanja a ana a Merari, amene Mose ndi Aroni anawawerenga monga mwa mau a Yehova mwa dzanja la Mose." 
Numbers4:46 Owerengedwa onse a Alevi, amene Mose ndi Aroni ndi akalonga a Israyeli anawawerengera, monga mwa mabanja ao, ndi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao," 
Numbers4:47 kuyambira a zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu kufikira a zaka makumi asanu, onse akulowa kugwira nchito ya utumikiwu, ndiyo nchito ya akatundu m'cihema cokomanako;" 
Numbers4:48 owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi zitatu kudza mazana asanu mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu. 
Numbers4:49 Anawawerenga monga mwa mau a Yehova ndi dzanja la Mose, onse monga mwa nchito zao, ndi monga mwa akatundu ao; anawawerenga monga momwe Yehova adauza Mose." 
Numbers5:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Numbers5:2 Uza ana a Israyeli kuti aziturutsa m'cigono akhate onse, ndi onse akukhala nako kukha, ndi onse odetsedwa cifukwa ca akufa;" 
Numbers5:3 muwaturutse amuna ndi akazi muwaturutsire kunja kwa cigono, kuti angadetse cigono cao, cimene ndikhala m'kati mwacemo." 
Numbers5:4 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anacita cotero, nawaturutsira kunja kwa cigono; monga Yehova adanena ndi Mose momwemo ana a Israyeli anacita." 
Numbers5:5 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers5:6 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, ndi kuti, Mwamuna kapena mkazi akacita cimo liri lonse amacita anthu, kucita mosakhulupirika pa Yehova, nakaparamuladi;" 
Numbers5:7 azibvomereza cimo lace adalicita; nabwezere coparamulaco monsemo, naonjezeko limodzi la magawo asanu, ndi kucipereka kwa iye adamparamulayo." 
Numbers5:8 Koma munthuyo akapanda kukhala nayo nkhoswe imene akaibwezere coparamulaco, coparamula acibwezera Yehovaco cikhale ca wansembe; pamodzi ndi nkhosa yamphongo ya cotetezerapo, imene amcitire nayo comtetezera." 
Numbers5:9 Ndipo nsembe zokweza zonse za zinthu zopatulika za ana a Israyeli, zimene abwera nazo kwa wansembe zisanduka zace." 
Numbers5:10 Zopatulika za munthu ali yense ndi zace: ziti zonse munthu ali yense akapatsa wansembe, zasanduka zace." 
Numbers5:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers5:12 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, nuti nao, Mkazi wa mwini akapatukira mwamuna wace, nakamcitira mosakhulupirika," 
Numbers5:13 ndi munthu akagona naye, koma kumbisikira maso a mwamuna wace, ndikumng'unira; nadetsedwa mkaziyo, koma palibe mboni yomtsutsa, kapena sanamgwira alimkucita;" 
Numbers5:14 ndipo ukamgwira mwamuna mtima wansanje, kuti acitire nsanje mkazi wace, popeza wadetsedwa; kapena ukamgwira mtima wansanje, kuti amcitire mkazi wace nsanje angakhale sanadetsedwa;" 
Numbers5:15 pamenepo mwamunayo azidza naye mkazi wace kwa wansembe, nadze naco copereka cace, limodzi la magawo khumi la efa wa ufa wabarele; asathirepo mafuta, kapena kuikapo libano; popeza ndiyo nsembe yaufa yansanje, nsembe yaufa yacikumbutso, yakukumbutsa mphulupulu." 
Numbers5:16 Ndipo wansembe abwere naye, namuike pamaso pa Yehova;" 
Numbers5:17 natenge madzi opatulika m'mbale yadothi wansembeyo, natengeko pfumbi liri pansi m'kacisi, wansembeyo nalithire m'madzimo." 
Numbers5:18 Pamenepo wansembeyo aike mkaziyo pamaso pa Mulungu, nabvula mutu wa mkaziyo, naike nsembe yaufa yacikumbutso m'manja mwace, ndiyo nsembe yaufa yansanje; ndipo m'manja mwace mwa wansembe muzikhala madzi owawa akudzetsa temberero." 
Numbers5:19 Ndipo wansembe amlumbiritse, nanene kwa mkazi, Ngati sanagona nawe munthu mmodzi yense, ngati sunapatukira kucidetso, pokhala ndiwe wa mwamuna wako, upulumuke ku madzi owawa awa akudzetsa temberero." 
Numbers5:20 Koma iwe, ngati wapatukira mwamuna wako, ngati wadetsedwa, kuti wagona nawe munthu, wosati mwamuna wako;" 
Numbers5:21 pamenepo wansembe alumbiritse mkazi lumbiro lakutemberera, ndi wansembe anene kwa mkazi, Yehova akuike ukhale temberero ndi lumbiro pakati pa anthu a mtundu wako, pakuondetsa Yehova m'cuuno mwako, ndi kukutupitsa mbulu;" 
Numbers5:22 ndipo madzi awa akudzetsa temberero adzalowa m'matumbo mwako, nadzakutupitsa mbulu ndi kuondetsa m'cuuno mwako; ndipo mkaziyo aziti, Amen, Amen." 
Numbers5:23 Ndipo wansembe alembere matemberero awa m'buku, ndi kuwafafaniza ndi madzi owawawa." 
Numbers5:24 Ndipo amwetse mkaziyo madzi owawa akudzetsa temberero; ndi madzi odzetsa temberero adzalowa mwa iye nadzamwawira. 
Numbers5:25 Ndipo wansembe atenge nsembe yaufa m'manja mwa mkazi, naweyule nsembe yaufa pamaso pa Yehova, nabwere nayo ku guwa la nsembe." 
Numbers5:26 Wansembe atengekonso nsembe yaufa wodzala manja, cikumbutso cace, nacitenthe pa guwa la nsembe; ndipo atatero amwetse mkazi madziwo." 
Numbers5:27 Ndipo atammwetsa madziwo, kudzatero, ngati wadetsedwa, nacita mosakhulupitika pa mwamuna wace, madzi odzetsa tembererowo adzalowa mwa iye nadzamwawira, nadzamtupitsa mbulu, ndi m'cuuno mwace mudzaonda; ndi mkaziyo adzakhala temberero pakati pa anthu a mtundu wace." 
Numbers5:28 Koma ngati mkazi sanadetsedwa, nakhala woyera, pamenepo adzapulumuka, nadzaima." 
Numbers5:29 Ici ndi cilamulo ca nsanje, pamene mkazi, pokhala naye mwamuna wace, ampatukira nadetsedwa;" 
Numbers5:30 kapena pamene mtima wansanje umgwira mwamuna, ndipo acitira mkazi wace nsanje; pamenepo aziika mkazi pamaso pa Yehova, ndipo wansembe amcitire cilamulo ici conse." 
Numbers5:31 Mwamunayo ndiye wosacita mphulupulu, koma mkazi uyo asenze mphulupulu yace." 
Numbers6:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers6:2 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, nuti nao, Mwamuna kapena mkazi akadzipatulira kulonieza cowinda ca Mnaziri, kudzipatulira kwa Yehova;" 
Numbers6:3 azisala vinyo ndi kacasu; asamwe vinyo wosasa, kapena kacasu wosasa, kapena cakumwa conse ca mphesa, asamwe; asadye mphesa zaziwisi kapena zouma." 
Numbers6:4 Masiku onse a kusala kwace asadye kanthu kopangika ndi mphesa, kuyambira nthanga zace kufikira khungu lace," 
Numbers6:5 Masiku onse a cowinda cace cakusala, lumo lisapite pamutu pace; kufikira adatha masikuwo adadzipatulira kwa Yehova, azikhala wopatulika; aleke nzera za tsitsi lace zimeretu." 
Numbers6:6 Masiku onse akudzipatulira kwa Yehova asayandikize mtembo. 
Numbers6:7 Asadzidetse ndi atate wace, kapena mai wace, mbale wace, kapena mlongo wace, akafa iwowa; popeza cowindira Mulungu wace ciri pamutu pace." 
Numbers6:8 Masiku onse a kusala kwace akhala wopatulikira kwa Yehova. 
Numbers6:9 Munthu akafa cikomo pali iye, ndipo akadetsa mutu wace wowinda; pamenepo azimeta mutu wace tsiku la kumyeretsa kwace, tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri aumete." 
Numbers6:10 Ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi citato adze nazo njiwa ziwiri, kapena maunda awiri, kwa wansembe, ku khomo la cihema cokomanako;" 
Numbers6:11 ndipo wansembe akonze imodzi nsembe yaucimo, ndi yina nsembe yopsereza, namtetezere popeza anacimwa nao mtembowo; ndipo apatulire mutu wace tsiku lomwelo." 
Numbers6:12 Ndipo awapatulire Yehova masiku a kusala kwace, nadze nayo nkhosa yamphongo ya caka cimodzi ikhale nsembe yoparamula; koma masiku adapitawa azikhala cabe, popeza anadetsa kusala kwace." 
Numbers6:13 Ndipo cilamulo ca Mnaziri, atatha masiku a kusala kwace ndi ici: azidza naye ku khomo la cihema cokomanako;" 
Numbers6:14 pamenepo abwere naco copereka cace kwa Yehova, nkhosa yamphongo ya caka cimodzi yopanda cirema, ikhale nsembe yopsereza, ndi nkhosa yamsoti yopanda cirema ikhale nsembe yaucimo, ndi nkhosa yamphongo yopanda cirema ikhale nsembe yoyamika;" 
Numbers6:15 ndi mtanga wa mkate wopanda cotupitsa, timitanda ta ufa wosalala tosanganiza ndi mafuta, ndi timitanda taphanthi todzoza ndi mafuta, ndi nsembe yao yaufa, ndi nsembe zao zothira." 
Numbers6:16 Ndipo wansembe azibwera nazo pamaso pa Yehova, nakonze nsembe yace yaucimo, ndi nsembe yace yopsereza;" 
Numbers6:17 naphe nkhosa yamphongo yoyamika ya Yehova, pamodzi ndi mtanga wa mkate wopanda cotupitsa; wansembe akonzenso nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe yace yothira." 
Numbers6:18 Pamenepo Mnaziriyo amete mutu wace wa kusala kwace pa khomo la cihema cokomanako, natenge tsitsi la pa mutu wace wa kusala, naliike pamoto wokhala pansi pa nsembe yoyamika." 
Numbers6:19 Ndipo wansembe atenge mwendo wamwamba wophika wa nkhosa yamphongo, ndi kamtanda kamodzi kopanda cotupitsa ka m'mtanga, ndi kamtanda kaphanthi kopanda cotupitsa kamodzi, ndi kuziika m'manja mwa Mnaziri, atameta kusala kwace;" 
Numbers6:20 ndipo wansembe aziweyula nsembe yoweyula pamaso pa Yehova; ici ncopatulikira wansembe, pamodzi ndi nganga ya nsembe yoweyula, pamodzi ndi mwendo wa nsembe yokweza; ndipo atatero Mnaziri amwe vinyo." 
Numbers6:21 Ici ndi cilamulo ca Mnaziri wakuwinda, ndi ca copereka cace ca Yehova cifukwa ca kusala kwace, pamodzi naco cimene dzanja lace likacipeza; azicita monga mwa cowinda cace anaciwinda, mwa cilamulo ca kusala." 
Numbers6:22 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Numbers6:23 Nena ndi Aroni ndi ana ace, ndi kuti, Uzidalitsa ana a Israyeli motero; uziti nao," 
Numbers6:24 Yehova akudalitse iwe, nakusunge;" 
Numbers6:25 Yehova awalitse nkhope yace pa iwe, nakucitire cisomo;" 
Numbers6:26 Yehova akweze nkhope yace pa iwe, nakupatse mtendere." 
Numbers6:27 Potero aike dzina langa pa ana a Israyeli; ndipo ndidzawadalitsa. 
Numbers7:1 Ndipo kunali kuti tsiku lomwe Mose anatsiriza kumuutsa kacisi, namdzoza ndi kumpatula, ndi zipangizo zace zonse, ndi guwa la nsembe, ndi zipangizo zace zonse, nazidzoza ndi kuzipatula;" 
Numbers7:2 akalonga a Israyeli, akuru a nyumba za makolo ao, anapereka nsembe, ndiwo akalonga a mapfuko akuyang'anira owerengedwa;" 
Numbers7:3 anadza naco copereka cao pamaso pa Yehova, magareta ophimbika asanu ndi mmodzi, ndi ng'ombe khumi ndi ziwfri; akalonga awiri anapereka gareta mmodzi, ndi kalonga mmodzi ng'ombe imodzi; nabwera nazo pakhomo pa kacisi." 
Numbers7:4 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Numbers7:5 Uzilandira kwa iwo, kuti zikhale zakucitira nchito ya cihema cokomanako; nuzipereke kwa Alevi, yense monga mwa nchito yace." 
Numbers7:6 Ndipo Mose analandira magareta ndi ng'ombe, nazipereka kwa Alevi." 
Numbers7:7 Anapatsa ana a Gerisoni magareta awiri ndi ng'ombe zinai, monga mwa nchito yao;" 
Numbers7:8 napatsa ana a Merari magareta anai ndi ng'ombe zisanu ndi zitatu, monga mwa nchito yao; wakuziyang'anira ndiye Itamara mwana wa Aroni wansembe." 
Numbers7:9 Koma sanapatsa ana a Kohati kanthu; popeza nchito yao ndiyo ya zinthu zopatulika, zimene amazisenza pa mapewa ao." 
Numbers7:10 Ndipo akalonga anabwera nazo za kupereka ciperekere guwa la nsembe tsiku lodzozedwa ili; inde akalongawo anabwera naco copereka cao pa guwa la nsembelo. 
Numbers7:11 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, Akalonga onse, yense pa tsiku lace, apereke zopereka zao za kupereka ciperekere guwa la nsembe." 
Numbers7:12 Wakubwera naco copereka cace tsiku loyamba ndiye Nahesoni mwana wa Aminadabu, wa pfuko la Yuda:" 
Numbers7:13 copereka cace ndico mbizi imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwace ndiko masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwirizo zodzala ndi ufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta ukhale nsembeyaufa;" 
Numbers7:14 cipande cimodzi cagolidi ca masekeli khumi, codzala ndi cofukiza;" 
Numbers7:15 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi wa caka cimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:16 ronde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; 
Numbers7:17 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, ana a nkhosa: asanu a caka cimodzi; ndico copereka ca Nahesoni mwana wa Aminadabu." 
Numbers7:18 Tsiku laciwiri Netaneli mwana wa Zuwara, kalonga wa Isakara, anabwera naco cace:" 
Numbers7:19 anabwera naco copereka cace mbizi imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwace masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:20 cipande cimodzi cagolidi ca masekeli khumi, codzala ndi cofukiza;" 
Numbers7:21 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi wa caka cimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:22 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; 
Numbers7:23 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, ana a nkhosa asanu a caka cimodzi; ndico copereka ca Netaneli mwana wa Zuwara." 
Numbers7:24 Tsiku lacitatu kalonga wa ana a Zebuloni, ndiye Eliyabu mwana wa Heloni:" 
Numbers7:25 copereka cace ndico mbizi imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwace masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:26 cipande cimodzi cagolidi ca masekeli khumi, codzala ndi cofukiza;" 
Numbers7:27 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi wa caka cimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:28 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; 
Numbers7:29 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, ana a nkhosa asanu a caka cimodzi; ndico copereka ca Eliyabu mwana wa Heloni." 
Numbers7:30 Tsiku lacinai Elizuri, mwana wa Sedeuri, kalonga wa ana a Rubeni:" 
Numbers7:31 copereka cace ndico mbizi imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwace masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika, zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:32 cipande cimodzi cagolidi ca masekeli khumi, codzala ndi cofukiza;" 
Numbers7:33 ng'ombe yamphongo Imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi wa caka cimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:34 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; 
Numbers7:35 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, ana a nkhosa asanu a caka cimodzi; ndico copereka ca Elizuri mwana wa Sedeuri." 
Numbers7:36 Tsiku lacisanu kalonga wa ana a Simeoni, ndiye Selumiyeli, mwana wa Zurisadai:" 
Numbers7:37 copereka cace ndico mbizi imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwace masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:38 cipande cimodzi cagolidi ca masekeli khumi, codzala ndi cofukiza;" 
Numbers7:39 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi wa caka cimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:40 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; 
Numbers7:41 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, ana a nkhosa asanu a caka cimodzi; ndico copereka ca Selumiyeli mwana wa Zurisadai." 
Numbers7:42 Tsiku lacisanu ndi cimodzi, kalonga wa ana a Gadi, Eliyasafe mwana wa Deyueli:" 
Numbers7:43 copereka cace ndico mbizi imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwace masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu; mbale yowazira Imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:44 cipande cimodzi cagolidi ca masekeli khumi, codzala ndi cofukiza;" 
Numbers7:45 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi wa caka cimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:46 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; 
Numbers7:47 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, ana a nkhosa asanu a caka cimodzi; ndico copereka ca Eliyasafe mwana wa Deyueli." 
Numbers7:48 Tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri kalonga wa ana a Efraimu Elisama mwana wa Amihudi: 
Numbers7:49 copereka cace mbizi Imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwace masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:50 cipande cimodzi cagolidi ca masekeli khumi, codzala ndi cofukiza;" 
Numbers7:51 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi wa caka cimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:52 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; 
Numbers7:53 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa za mphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, ana a nkhosa asanu a caka cimodzi; ndico copereka ca Elisama mwana wa Amihudi." 
Numbers7:54 Tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu kalonga wa ana a Manase ndiye Gamaliyeli mwana wa Pedazuri: 
Numbers7:55 copereka cace ndico mbizi imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwace masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:56 cipande cimodzi cagolidi ca masekeli khumi, codzala ndi cofukiza;" 
Numbers7:57 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi wa caka cimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:58 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; 
Numbers7:59 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, ana a nkhosa asanu a caka cimodzi; ndico copereka ca Gamaliyeli mwana wa Pedazuri." 
Numbers7:60 Tsiku lacisanu ndi cinai kalonga wa ana a Benjamini, ndiye Abidana mwana wa Gideoni:" 
Numbers7:61 copereka cace ndico mbizi imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwace masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:62 cipande cimodzi cagolidi ca masekeli khumi, codzala ndi cofukiza;" 
Numbers7:63 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi wa caka cimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:64 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; 
Numbers7:65 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, ana a nkhosa asanu a caka cimodzi; ndico copereka ca Abidana mwana wa Gideoni." 
Numbers7:66 Tsiku lakhumi kalonga wa ana a Dani, ndiye Ahiyezeri mwana wa Amisadai:" 
Numbers7:67 copereka cace ndico mbizi imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwace masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:68 cipande cimodzi cagolidi ca masekeli khumi, codzala ndi cofukiza;" 
Numbers7:69 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi wa caka cimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:70 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; 
Numbers7:71 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, ana a nkhosa asanu a caka cimodzi; ndico copereka ca Ahiyezeri mwana wa Amisadai." 
Numbers7:72 Tsiku la khumi ndi limodzi kalonga wa ana a Aseri, ndiye Pagiyeli mwana wa Okirani;" 
Numbers7:73 copereka cace ndico mbizi imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwace masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:74 cipande cimodzi cagolidi ca masekeli khumi, codzala ndi cofukiza;" 
Numbers7:75 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi wa caka cimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:76 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; 
Numbers7:77 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, ana a nkhosa asanu a caka cimodzi; ndico copereka ca Pagiyeli mwana wa Okirani." 
Numbers7:78 Tsiku lakhumi ndi ciwiri kalonga wa ana a Nafitali, ndiye Ahira mwana wa Enani:" 
Numbers7:79 copereka cace ndico mbizi imodzi yasiliva, kulemera kwace masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, mbale yowazira imodzi yasiliva ya masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; zonse ziwiri zodzala ndi ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa;" 
Numbers7:80 cipande cimodzi cagolidi ca masekeli khumi, codzala ndi cofukiza;" 
Numbers7:81 ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi wa caka cimodzi, zikhale nsembe yopsereza;" 
Numbers7:82 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; 
Numbers7:83 ndi nsembe yoyamika, ng'ombe ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo zisanu, atonde asanu, ana a nkhosa asanu a caka cimodzi; ici ndi copereka ca Ahira mwana wa Enani." 
Numbers7:84 Uku ndi kupereka ciperekere guwa la nsembe, ndi akalonga a Israyeli, tsiku la kudzoza kwace: mbizi zasiliva khumi ndi ziwiri, mbale zowazira zasiliva khumi ndi ziwiri, zipande zagolidi khumi ndi ziwiri;" 
Numbers7:85 mbizi yasiliva yonse masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi atatu, ndi mbale yowazira yonse masekeli makumi asanu ndi awiri; siliva wonse wa zotengerazo ndizo masekeli zikwi ziwiri ndi mazana anai, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika." 
Numbers7:86 Zipande zagolidi ndizo khumi ndi ziwiri, zodzala ndi cofukiza, cipande conse masekeli khumi, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika; golidi wonse wa zipandezo ndiwo masekeli zana limodzi ndi makumi awiri;" 
Numbers7:87 ng'ombe zonse za nsembe yopsereza ndizo ng'ombe khumi ndi ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo khumi ndi ziwiri, ana a nkhosa a caka cimodzi khumi ndi awiri, pamodzi ndi nsembe yao yaufa; ndi atonde a nsembe zaucimo khumi ndi awiri;" 
Numbers7:88 ndi ng'ombe zonse za nsembe yoyamika ndizo ng'ombe makumi awiri ndi zinai, nkhosa zamphongo makumi asanu ndi limodzi, atonde makumi asanu ndi limodzi, ana a nkhosa a caka cimodzi makumi asanu ndi limodzi. Uku ndi kupereka ciperekere, litadzozedwa guwa la nsembe." 
Numbers7:89 Ndipo polowa Mose ku cihema cokomanako, kunena ndi iye, anamva Mau akunena naye ocokera ku cotetezerapo ciri pa likasa la mboni, ocokera pakati pa akerubi awiriwo; ndipo iye ananena naye." 
Numbers8:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers8:2 Nena kwa Aroni, nuti naye, Pamene uyatsa nyalizo, nyali manu ndi ziwirizo ziwale pandunji pace pa coikapo nyalico." 
Numbers8:3 Ndipo Aroni anacita cotero; anayatsa nyalizo kuti ziwale pandunji pace pa coikapo nyali, monga Yehova adauza Mose." 
Numbers8:4 Ndipo mapangidwe ace a coikapo nyali ndiwo golidi wosula; kuyambira tsinde lace kufikira maluwa ace anacisula; monga mwa maonekedwe ace Yehova anaonetsa Mose, momwemo anacipanga coikapo nyali." 
Numbers8:5 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers8:6 Uwatenge Alevi pakati pa ana a Israyeli, nuwayeretse." 
Numbers8:7 Ndipo utere nao kuwayeretsa: uwawaze madzi akucotsa zoipa, ndipo apititse lumo pa thupi lao lonse, natsuke zobvala zao, nadziyeretse." 
Numbers8:8 Pamenepo atenge ng'ombe yamphongo ndi nsembe yace yaufa, ufa wosanganiza ndi mafuta; utengenso ng'ombe yamphongo yina ikhale nsembe yaucimo." 
Numbers8:9 Ndipo ubwere nao Alevi pakhomo pa cihema cokomanako; nuwasonkhanitse khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli; 
Numbers8:10 nubwere nao Alevi pamaso pa Yehova; ndi ana a Israyeli aike manja ao pa Alevi; 
Numbers8:11 ndi Aroni apereke Alevi ngati nsembe yoweyula pamaso pa Yehova, yocokera kwa ana a Israyeli, kuti akhale akucita nchito ya Yehova," 
Numbers8:12 Ndipo Alevi aike manja ao pa mitu ya ng'ombezo; pamenepo ukonze imodzi ikhale nsembe yaucimo, ndi inzace, nsembe yopsereza za Yehova, kucita cotetezera Alevi." 
Numbers8:13 Ndipo uimike Alevi pamaso pa Aroni, ndi pamaso pa ana ace, ndi kuwapereka ngati nsembe yoweyula kwa Yehova." 
Numbers8:14 Momwemo upatule Alevi mwa ana a Israyeli; kuti Alevi akhale anga. 
Numbers8:15 Ndipo atatero alowe Alevi kucita Debito ya cihema cokomanako; ndipo uwayeretse, ndi kuwapereka ngati nsembe yoweyula." 
Numbers8:16 Pakuti aperekedwa konse kwa Ine ocokera mwa ana a Israyeli; ndadzitengera iwo m'malo mwa onse akutsegula m'mimba, ndiwo oyamba kubadwa a ana a Israyeli." 
Numbers8:17 Pakuti a oyamba kubadwa onse mwa ana a Israyeli ndi anga, mwa anthu ndi zoweta; tsiku lija ndinakantha oyamba kubadwa onse m'dziko la Aigupto, ndinadzipatulira iwo akhale anga." 
Numbers8:18 Ndipo ndatenga Alevi m'malo mwa oyamba kubadwa onse mwa ana a Israyeli. 
Numbers8:19 Ndipo ndapereka Alevi akhale mphatso ya kwa Aroni ndi ana ace amuna yocokera mwa ana a Israyeli, kucita nchito ya ana a Israyeli, m'cihema cokomanako ndi kucita cotetezera ana a Israyeli; kuti pasakhale mliri pakati pa ana a Israyeli, pakuyandikiza ana a Israyeli ku malo opatulika." 
Numbers8:20 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni ndi khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli anacitira Alevi monga mwa zonse Yehova adauza Mose kunena za Alevi; momwemo ana a lsrayeli anawacitira.
