Numbers8:21 Ndipo Alevi anadziyeretsa, natsuka zobvala zao; ndi Aroni anawapereka ngati nsembe yoweyula pamaso pa Yehova; ndi Aroni anawacitira cotetezera kuwayeretsa." 
Numbers8:22 Ndipo atatero, Alevi analowa kucita Debito yao m'cihema cokomanako pamaso pa Aroni, ndi pamaso pa ana ace amuna; monga Yehova anauza Mose kunena za Alevi, momwemo anawacitira." 
Numbers8:23 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers8:24 Ici ndi ca Alevi: kuyambira ali wa zaka makumi awiri ndi zisanu ndi mphambu azilowa kutumikira utumikiwu mu nchito ya cihema cokomanako; 
Numbers8:25 ndipo kuyambira zaka makumi asanu azileka kutumikira utumikiwu, osacitanso nchitoyi;" 
Numbers8:26 koma atumikire pamodzi ndi abale ao m'cihema cokomanako, kusunga udikirowo, koma osagwira nchito. Utere nao Alevi kunena za udikiro wao." 
Numbers9:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'cipululu ca Sinai, mwezi woyamba wa caka caciwiri ataturuka m'dziko la Aigupto, ndi kuti," 
Numbers9:2 Ana a Israyeli acite Paskha pa nyengo yoikidwa. 
Numbers9:3 Tsiku lakhumi ndi cinai la mweziwo, madzulo, muziucita, pa nyengo yace yoikidwa; muucite monga mwa malemba ace onse, ndi maweruzo ace onse." 
Numbers9:4 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi ana a Israyeli, kuti acite Paskha." 
Numbers9:5 Ndipo anacita Paskha mwezi woyamba, tsiku lakhumi ndi cinai la mweziwo, madzulo, m'cipululu ca Sinai; monga mwa zonse Yehova adauza Mose, momwemo ana a Israyeli anacita." 
Numbers9:6 Pamenepo panali amuna, anadetsedwa ndi mtembo wa munthu, ndipo sanakhoza kucita Paskha tsiku lomwelo; m'mwemo anafika pamaso pa Mose ndi pamaso pa Aroni tsiku lomwelo;" 
Numbers9:7 nanena naye amunawa, Tadetsedwa ife ndi mtembo wa munthu; atiletseranji, kuti tisabwere naco copereka ca Yehova pa nyengo yace yoikidwa, pakati pa ana a Israyeli?" 
Numbers9:8 Ndipo Mose ananena nao, Baimani; ndimve couza Yehova za inu." 
Numbers9:9 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers9:10 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, ndi kuti, Angakhale munthu wa inu kapena wa mibadwo yanu, adetsedwa, cifukwa ca mtembo, kapena pokhala paulendo, koma azicitira Yehova Paskha." 
Numbers9:11 Mwezi waciwiri, tsiku lace lakhumi ndi cinai, madzulo, aucite; audye ndi mkate wopanda cotupitsa ndi msuzi wowawa." 
Numbers9:12 Asasiyeko kufikira m'mawa, kapena kuthyolapo pfupa; aucite monga mwa lemba lonse la Paskha." 
Numbers9:13 Munthu akakhala woyera, wosakhala paulendo, koma akaleka kucita Paskha, amsadze munthuyo kwa anthu a mtundu wace; popeza sanabwera naco copereka ca Yehova pa nyengo yace yoikidwa, munthuyu asenze kucimwa kwace." 
Numbers9:14 Ndipo mlendo akakhala mwa inu, nakacitira Yehova Paskha, azicita monga mwa lemba la Paskha, ndi monga mwa ciweruzo cace; lemba likhale limodzi kwa inu, ndi kwa mlendo, ndi kwa wobadwa m'dziko." 
Numbers9:15 Ndipo tsiku loutsa kacisi mtambo unaphimba kacisi, ndiwo cihema cokomanako; ndipo madzulo padaoneka pakacisi ngati moto, kufikira m'mawa." 
Numbers9:16 Kudatero kosalekeza; mtambo umaciphimba, ndimoto umaoneka usiku," 
Numbers9:17 Ndipo pokwera mtambo kucokera kucihema, utatero ana a Israyeli amayenda ulendo wao; ndipo pamalo pokhala mtambo, pamenepo ana a Israyeli amamanga mahema ao." 
Numbers9:18 Pakuwauza Yehova ana a Israyeli amayenda ulendo, powauza Yehova amamanga mahema ao; masiku onse mtambo ukakhala pamwamba pa kacisi amakhala m'cigono." 
Numbers9:19 Ndipo pakukhalitsa mtambo masiku ambiri pamwamba pa kacisi, pamenepo ana a Israyeli anasunga udikiro wa Yehova osayenda ulendo." 
Numbers9:20 Ndipo pokhala mtambo pamwamba pa kacisi masiku pang'ono; pamenepo anakhala m'cigono monga awauza Yehova, nayendanso ulendo monga anauza Yehova." 
Numbers9:21 Koma mtambo ukakhala kuyambira madzulo kufikira m'mawa; pokwera mtambo m'mawa, ayenda ulendo; ngakhale msana ngakhale usiku, pokwera mtambo, ayenda ulendo." 
Numbers9:22 Ngakhale masiku awiri, kapena mwezi, kapena masiku ambiri, pokhalitsa mtambo pamwamba pa kacisi ndi kukhalapo, ana a Israyeli anakhala m'cigono, osayenda ulendo; koma pakukwera uwu, anayenda ulendo." 
Numbers9:23 Powauza Yehova amanga mahema, powauza Yehova ayenda ulendo; anasunga udikiro wa Yehova powauza Yehova mwa dzanja la Mose." 
Numbers10:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers10:2 Dzipangire malipenga awiri asiliva; uwasule mapangidwe ace; ucite nao poitana khamu, ndi poyendetsa a m'zigono." 
Numbers10:3 Akaliza, khamu lonse lisonkhane kuli iwe ku khomo la cihema cokomanako," 
Numbers10:4 Akaliza limodzi, pamenepo akalonga, akuru a zikwi a m'Israyeli, azisonkhana kuli iwe." 
Numbers10:5 Mukaliza cokweza, ayende a m'zigono za kum'mawa." 
Numbers10:6 Mukalizanso cokweza, a m'zigono za kumwela ayende; alize cokweza pakumuka." 
Numbers10:7 Pomemeza msonkhano mulize, wosati cokweza ai." 
Numbers10:8 Ana amuna a Aroni, ansembe, ndiwo aziliza malipenga; ndipo akhale kwa inu lemba losatha ku mibadwo yanu." 
Numbers10:9 Ndipo pamene mupita kunkhondo m'dziko lanu kucita nkhondo pa mdani wakusautsa inu, mulize cokweza ndi malipenga; ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakumbukila inu, nadzakupulumutsani kwa adani anu." 
Numbers10:10 Momwemo tsiku lakukondwera inu, ndi nyengo zoikidwa zanu, ndi poyamba miyezi yanu, muziliza malipenga pa nsembe zanu zopsereza, ndi pa nsembe zanu zoyamika; ndipo akhale kwa inu cikumbutso pamaso pa Mulungu wanu; Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Numbers10:11 Ndipo kunacitika, caka caciwiri, mwezi waciwiri, tsiku la makumi awiri la mweziwo, kuti mtambo unakwera kucokera kwa kacisi wa mboni." 
Numbers10:12 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anayenda monga mwa maulendo ao, kucokera m'cipululu ca Sinai; ndi mtambo unakhala m'cipululu ca Parana." 
Numbers10:13 Potero anayamba ulendo wao monga mwa mau a Yehova ndi dzanja la Mose. 
Numbers10:14 Ndipo anayamba kuyenda a mbendera ya cigono ca ana a Yuda monga mwa magulu ao; woyang'anira gulu lace ndiye Nahesoni mwana wa Aminadabu. 
Numbers10:15 Ndi pa gulu la pfuko la ana a Isakara panali Netaneli mwana wa Zuwara. 
Numbers10:16 Ndi pa gulu la pfuko la ana a Zebuloni panali Eliyabu mwana wa Heloni. 
Numbers10:17 Ndipo anagwetsa kacisi; ndi ana a Gerisoni, ndi ana a Merari, akunyamula kacisi, anamuka naye." 
Numbers10:18 Ndi a mbendera ya cigono ca Rubeni, anayenda monga mwa magulu ao; ndipo pa gulu lace anayang'anira Elizuri mwana wa Sedeuri." 
Numbers10:19 Ndi pa gulu la pfuko la ana a Simeoni anayang'anira Selumiyeli mwana wa Zurisadai. 
Numbers10:20 Ndi pa gulu la pfuko la ana a Gadi anayang'anira Eliyasafe mwana wa Deyueli. 
Numbers10:21 Pamenepo Akohati anayenda, ndi kunyamula zopatulika, ndi enawo anautsiratu kacisi asanafike iwowa." 
Numbers10:22 Ndipo anayenda a mbendera ya cigono ca ana a Efraimu, monga mwa magulu ao; ndi pa gulu lace anayang'anira Elizama mwana wa Amihudi." 
Numbers10:23 Ndi pa gulu la pfuko la ana a Manase anayang'anira Gamaliyeli mwana wa Pedazuri. 
Numbers10:24 Ndi pa gulu la pfuko la ana a Benjamini anayang'anira Abidana mwana wa Gideoni. 
Numbers10:25 Pamenepo anayenda a mbendera ya cigono ca ana a Dani, ndiwo a m'mbuyombuyo a zigono zonse, monga mwa magulu ao; ndi pa gulu lace anayang'anira Ahiyezeri mwana wa Amisadai." 
Numbers10:26 Ndi pa gulu la pfuko la ana a Aseri anayang'anira Pagiyeli mwana wa Okirani. 
Numbers10:27 Ndi pa gulu la pfuko la ana a Nafitali anayang'anira Ahira mwana wa Enani. 
Numbers10:28 Potero maulendo a ana a Israyeli anakhala monga mwa magulu ao; nayenda ulendowao. 
Numbers10:29 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Hobabu mwana wa Reueli Mmidyani mpongozi wa Mose, Ife tirikuyenda kumka ku malo amene Yehova anati, Ndidzakupatsani awa; umuke nafe, tidzakucitira zokoma; popeza Yehova wanenera Israyeli zokoma." 
Numbers10:30 Koma anati kwa iye, Sindidzamuka nanu; koma ndipita ku dziko langa, ndi kwa abale anga." 
Numbers10:31 Koma anati, Usatisiyetu; popeza udziwa poyenera kumanga ife m'cipululu, ndipo udzakhala maso athu." 
Numbers10:32 Ndipo kudzatero, ukamuka nafe, inde, kudzali kuti zokoma ziri zonse Yehova aticitira ife, zomwezo tidzakucitira iwe." 
Numbers10:33 Ndipo anayenda kucokera ku phiri la Yehova ulendo wa masiku atatu; ndipo likasa la cipangano ca Yehova, linawatsogolera ulendo wa masiku atatu kuwafunira popumulira." 
Numbers10:34 Ndipo mtambo wa Yehova unali pamwamba pao msana, pakuyenda iwo kucokera kucigono." 
Numbers10:35 Ndipo kunali pakucoka kumka nalo likasa, Mose anati, Ukani Yehova, abalalike adani anu; akuda Inu athawe pamaso panu." 
Numbers10:36 Ndi pakupumula ili anati, Bwerani Yehova kwa zikwi zikwi za Israyeli." 
Numbers11:1 Ndipo anthu anaipa, namadandaula m'makutu a Yehova; ndipo pamene Yehova anamva anapsa mtima; ndi mota wa Yehova unayaka pakati pao, nunyeketsa ku cilekezero ca cigono." 
Numbers11:2 Pamenepo anthu anapfuulira kwa Mose; ndi Mose anapemphera kwa Yehova, ndi motowo unazimika." 
Numbers11:3 Ndipo anacha malowo dzina lace Tabera; popeza moto wa Yehova udayaka pakati pao. 
Numbers11:4 Ndipo anthu osokonezeka ali pakati pao anagwidwa naco cilakolako; ndi ana a Israyeli omwe analiranso, nati, Adzatipatsa nyama ndani?" 
Numbers11:5 Tikumbukira nsomba tinazidya m'Aigupto cabe, mankaka, ndi mavwendi, ndi anyesi a mitundu itatu;" 
Numbers11:6 koma tsopano moyo wathu waphwa; tiribe kanthu pamaso pathu koma mana awa. 
Numbers11:7 Ndipo mana ananga zipatso zampasa, ndi maonekedwe ace ngati maonekedwe a bedola." 
Numbers11:8 Anthu amamka, nawaola, nawapera ndi mphero, kapena kuwasinja mumtondo, nawaphika m'mphika, nawaumba timitanda; ndi powalawa anali ngati timitanda tokazinga ndi mafuta." 
Numbers11:9 Ndipo pakugwa mame pacigono usiku, mana anagwapo." 
Numbers11:10 Ndipo Mose anamva anthu alikulira m'mabanja ao, yense pakhomo pa hema wace; ndipo Yehova anapsa mtima ndithu, ndipo kudamuipira Mose." 
Numbers11:11 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Yehova, Munacitiranji coipa mtumiki wanu? ndalekeranii kupeza ufulu pamaso panu, kuti muika pa ine katundu wa anthu awa onse?" 
Numbers11:12 Kodi ndinaima nao anthu awa onse? kodi ndinawabala, kuti munene nane, Uwayangate ngati mlezi afukata khanda, kumka nao ku dzikolo mudalumbirira makolo ao?" 
Numbers11:13 Ndidzaiona kuti nyama yakuwapatsa anthu awa onse? pakuti amalirira ine, ndi kuti, Tipatseni nyama, tidye." 
Numbers11:14 Sinditha kuwasenza anthu awa onse ndekha, pakuti andilemera ine." 
Numbers11:15 Ndipo ngati mundicitira cotero, mundiphetu tsopano apa, ngati ndapeza ufulu pamaso panu, ndisayang'ane tsoka langa." 
Numbers11:16 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Undisonkhanitsire amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri mwa akuru a Israyeli, amene uwadziwa kuti ndiwo akuru a anthu, ndi akapitao ao; nubwere nao ku cihema cokomanako, kuti aimeko pamodzi ndi iwe." 
Numbers11:17 Pamenepo ndidzatsika ndi kulankhula nawe komweko; ndipo ndidzatengako mzimu uti pa iwe, ndi kuika pa iwowa; adzakuthandiza kusenza katundu wa anthu awa, kuti usasenze wekha." 
Numbers11:18 Ndipo unene ndi anthu, Mudzipatuliretu, mawa mudzadya nyama; popeza mwalira m'makutu a Yehova, ndi kuti, Adzatipatsa nyama ndani? popeza tinakhala bwino m'Aigupto, Potero Yehova adzakupatsani nyama, ndipo mudzadya." 
Numbers11:19 Simudzadya tsiku limodzi, kapena masiku awiri, kapena masiku asanu, kapena masiku khumi, kapena masiku makumi awiri;" 
Numbers11:20 koma mwezi wamphumphu, kufikira ibwera m'mphuno mwako, ndi kuti ufukidwa nayo, pakuti mwakaniza Yehova wakukhala pakati pa inu, ndi kulira pamaso pace, ndi kuti, Tinaturukiranji m'Aigupto?" 
Numbers11:21 Ndipo Mose anati, Anthu amene ndiri pakati pao, ndiwo zikwi mazana asanu ndi limodzi oyenda pansi, ndipo Inu mwanena, Ndidzawapatsa nyama, kuti adye mwezi wamphumphu." 
Numbers11:22 Kodi adzawaphera magulu a nkhosa ndi ng'ombe, kuwakwanira? kapena kodi nsomba zonse za m'nyanja zidzawasonkhanira pamodzi, kuwakwanira?" 
Numbers11:23 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Kodi dzanja la Mulungu lafupikira? tsopano udzapenya ngati mau anga adzakucitikira kapena iai." 
Numbers11:24 Ndipo Mose anaturuka, nauza anthu mau a Yehova; nasonkhanitsa akuru a anthu makumi asanu ndi awiri, nawaimika pozungulira pa cihema." 
Numbers11:25 Ndipo Yehova anatsika mumtambo, nanena nave, natengako mzimu uli pa iye, nauika pa akuru makumi asanu ndi awiri; ndipo kunali kuti pokhala mzimu pa iwowa, ananenera; koma osabwerezanso." 
Numbers11:26 Koma amuna awiri anatsalira m'cigono, dzina la wina ndiye Elidadi, dzina la mnzace ndiye Medadi; ndipo mzimuwo unakhala pa iwo; iwo ndiwo mwa oitanidwawo, koma sanaturuka kumka kucihema; ndipo ananenera m'cigono." 
Numbers11:27 Ndipo anathamanga anyamata, nauza Mose, nati, Elidadi ndi Medadi alikunenera m'cigono." 
Numbers11:28 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, mtumiki wa Mose kuyambira ubwana wace, anayankha nati, Mose, mfumu yanga, aletseni." 
Numbers11:29 Koma Mose anati kwa iye, Kodi ucita nsanje nao cifukwa ca ine? Mwenzi anthu onse a Yehova atakhala aneneri! mwenzi Yehova atawaikira mzimu wace!" 
Numbers11:30 Ndipo Mose ndi akulu onse a Israyeli anasonkhana kucigono. 
Numbers11:31 Ndipo kudacokera mphepo kwa Yehova, nidza nazo zinziri zocokera kunyanja, nizitula kucigono, ulendo wa tsiku limodzi dera lino, ndi ulendo wa tsiku limodzi dera lina, pozungulira pa cigono, ndipo zinabisa nthaka ngati muyeso wa mikono iwiri." 
Numbers11:32 Ndipo anthu anauka tsiku lonselo, ndi usiku wace wonse, ndi mawa lace lonse, nakusa zinzirizo; wokusa pang'ono anakusa zodzaza mahomeri khumi; ndipo anadziyanikira izi pozungulira pa cigono." 
Numbers11:33 Nyamayi ikali pakati pa mano, asanaitafune, Mulungu anapsa mtima pa anthuwa, ndipo Yehova anawakantha anthu ndi kukantha kwakukuru ndithu." 
Numbers11:34 Ndipo anacha malowo dzina lace Kibiroti Hatava; popeza pamenepo anaika anthu osusuka. 
Numbers11:35 Kucokera ku Kibiroti Hatava anthuwo anayenda kumka ku Hazeroti; nakhala ku Hazeroti. 
Numbers12:1 Ndipo Miriamu ndi Aroni anatsutsana naye Mose cifukwa ca mkazi mtundu wace Mkusi amene adamtenga; popeza adatenga mkazi Mkusi. 
Numbers12:2 Ndipo anati, Kodi Yehova wanena ndi Mose yekha? sananenanso ndi ife nanga? Ndipo Yehova anamva." 
Numbers12:3 Koma munthuyu Mose ndiye wofatsa woposa anthu onse a pa dziko lapansi. 
Numbers12:4 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, ndi Aroni, ndi Miriamu modzidzimutsa, Turukani inu atatu kudza ku cihema cokomanako. Pamenepo anaturuka atatuwo." 
Numbers12:5 Ndipo Yehova anatsika mumtambo njo, naima pa khomo la cihema, naitana Aroni ndi Miriamu; naturuka onse awiri." 
Numbers12:6 Ndipo anati, Tamvani tsono mau anga; pakakhala mneneri pakati pa inu, Ine Yehova ndidzizindikiritsa kwa iye m'masomphenya, ndinena naye m'kulota." 
Numbers12:7 Satero mtumiki wanga Mose; ndiye wokhulupirika m'nyumba mwanga monse. 
Numbers12:8 Ndimanena naye pakamwa ndi pakamwa, maonekera, osati mophiphiritsa; ndipo amapenyerera maonekedwe a Yehova; potero munalekeranji kuopa kutsutsana naye mtumiki wanga, Mose." 
Numbers12:9 Pamenepo Mulungu anawapsera mtima iwo; nawacokera iye. 
Numbers12:10 Ndipo mtambo unacoka pacihema; ndipo taonani, Miriamu anali wakhate, wa mbu ngati cipale cofewa; ndipo Aroni anapenya Miriamu, taonani, anali wakhate." 
Numbers12:11 Ndipo Aroni anati kwa Mose, Mfumu yanga, musatiikiretu kucimwa kumene tapusa nako, ndi kucimwa nako." 
Numbers12:12 Asakhaletu iye ngati wakufa, amene dera lina la mnofu wace watha poturuka iye m'mimba mwa mace." 
Numbers12:13 Ndipo Mose anapfuulira kwa Yehova, ndi kuti, Mciritsenitu, Mulungu," 
Numbers12:14 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Atate wace akadamlabvulira malobvu pankhope pace sakadacita manyazi masiku asanu ndi awiri? ambindikiritse kunja kwa cigono masiku asanu ndi awiri; ndipo atatero amlandirenso." 
Numbers12:15 Pamenepo anambindikiritsa Miriamu kunja kwa cigono masiku asanu ndi awiri; ndipo anthu sanayenda ulendo kufikira atamlandiranso Miriamu. 
Numbers12:16 Ndipo atatero anthuwo anamka ulendo wao kucokera ku Hazeroti, namanga mahema ao m'cipululu ca Parana." 
Numbers13:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers13:2 Udzitumire amuna, kuti azonde dziko la Kanani, limene ndirikupatsa ana a Israyeli; utumize munthu mmodzi wa pfuko liri lonse la makolo ao, yense kalonga pakati pa anzace." 
Numbers13:3 Ndipo Mose anawatumiza kucokera ku cipululu ca Parana monga mwa mau a Yehova; amuna onsewa ndiwo akuru a ana a Israyeli. 
Numbers13:4 Maina ao ndi awa: wa pfuko la Rubeni, Samuwa mwana wa Zakuri." 
Numbers13:5 Wa pfuko la Simeoni, Safati mwana wa Hori." 
Numbers13:6 Wa pfuko la Yuda, Kalebi mwana wa Yefune." 
Numbers13:7 Wa pfuko la Isakara, Igali mwana wa Yosefe." 
Numbers13:8 Wa pfuko la Efraimu, Hoseya mwana wa Nuni." 
Numbers13:9 Wa pfuko la Benjamini, Paliti mwana wa Rafu." 
Numbers13:10 Wa pfuko la Zebuloni, Gadiyeli mwana wa Sodi." 
Numbers13:11 Wa pfuko la Yosefe, wa pfuko la Manase, Gadi mwana wa Susi." 
Numbers13:12 Wa pfuko la Dani, Amiyeli mwana wa Gemali." 
Numbers13:13 Wa pfuko la Aseri, Setri mwana wa Mikayeli." 
Numbers13:14 Wa pfuko la Nafitali, Nabi mwana wa Vopisi." 
Numbers13:15 Wa pfuko la Gadi, Geyuelimwana wa Maki." 
Numbers13:16 Awandi maina a amunawo Mose anawatumira azonde dziko. Ndipo Mose anamucha Hoseya mwana wa Nuni Yoswa. 
Numbers13:17 Potero Mose anawatuma azonde dziko la Kanani, nanena nao, Kwerani uko kumwela, nimukwere kumapiri;" 
Numbers13:18 mukaone dziko umo liriri; ndi anthu akukhala m'mwemo, ngati ali amphamvu kapena ofok a, ngati acepa kapena acuruka;" 
Numbers13:19 ndi umo liriri dzikoli lokhalamo iwo, ngati lokoma, kapena loipa; ndi umo iriri midziyo akhalamo iwo, ngati akhala poyera kapena m'malinga;" 
Numbers13:20 ndi umo iriri nthaka, ngati yopatsa, kapena yosuka, ngati pali mitengo, kapena palibe, Ndipo limbikani mtima, nimubwere nazo zipatso za m'dzikomo. Koma nyengoyi ndiyo nyengo yoyamba kupsa mphesa." 
Numbers13:21 Pamenepo anakwerako, nazonda dziko kuyambira cipululu ca Zini kufikira Rehobo, polowa ku Hamati." 
Numbers13:22 Ndipo anakwera njira ya kumwela nafika ku Hebroni; ndi apa panali Ahimani, Sesai, ndi Talmai, ana a Anaki. (Koma atamanga Hebroni zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri ndipo anamanga Zoani m'Aigupto.)" 
Numbers13:23 Ndipo anadza ku cigwa ca Esikolo, nacekako tsango limodzi la mphesa, nalisenza awiri mopika; anabwera nazonso makangaza ndi nkhuyu." 
Numbers13:24 Malowa anawacha cigwa ca Esikolo, cifukwa ca tsangolo ana a lsrayeli analicekako." 
Numbers13:25 Pamenepo anabwerera atazonda dziko, atatha masiku makumi anai." 
Numbers13:26 Ndipo anamuka, nadza kwa Mose, ndi Aroni, ndi khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli, ku cipululu ca Parana ku Kadesi; ndipo anabwezera mau iwowa, ndi khamu lonse, nawaonetsa zipatso za dzikoli." 
Numbers13:27 Ndipo anafotokozera, nati, Tinakafika ku dziko limene munatitumirako, ndilo ndithu a moyenda mkaka ndi uci ngati madzi; ndi zipatso zace siizi." 
Numbers13:28 Komatu anthu okhala m'dzikomo ngamphamvu; ndi midziyo nja malinga, yaikuru ndithu: ndipo tinaonakonso ana a Anaki." 
Numbers13:29 Aamaleke akhala m'dziko la kumwera; ndi Ahiti, ndi Ayebusi, ndi Aamori, akhala ku mapiri, ndi Akanani akhala kunyanja, ndi m'mphepete mwa Yordano." 
Numbers13:30 Koma Kalebi anatontholetsa anthu pamaso pa Mose, nati, Tikwere ndithu ndi kulilandira lathu lathu; popeza tikhozadi kucita kumene." 
Numbers13:31 Koma anthu adakwera nayewo anati, Sitikhoza kuwakwerera anthuwo; popeza atiposa mphamvu," 
Numbers13:32 Ndipo anaipsira ana a Israyeli mbiri ya dziko adalizonda, nati, Dzikoli tapitamo kulizonda, ndilo dziko lakutheramo anthu okhalamo; ndi anthu onse tidaona pakati pace ndiwo anthu atali misinkhu." 
Numbers13:33 Tinaonakonso Anefili, ana a Anaki, obadwa ndi Anefili; ndipo tinaoneka m'maso mwathu ngati zinsidzi; momwemonso tinaoneka m'maso mwao." 
Numbers14:1 Pamenepo khamu lonse linakweza mau ao, napfuula; ndipo anthuwo analira usikuwo." 
Numbers14:2 Ndipo ana onse a Israyeli anadandaulira Mose ndi Aroni; ndi khamu lonse linanena nao, Mwenzi tikadafa m'dziko la Aigupto; kapena mwenzi tikadafa m'cipululu muno!" 
Numbers14:3 Ndipo Yehova atitengeranii kudza nafe kudziko kuno, kuti tigwe nalo lupanga? Akazi athu ndi makanda athu adzakhala cakudya cao; kodi sikuli bwino tibwerere ku Aigupto?" 
Numbers14:4 Ndipo anati wina ndi mnzace, Tiike mtsogoleri, tibwerere ku Aigupto." 
Numbers14:5 Pamenepo Mose ndi Aroni anagwa nkhope pansi pamaso pa msonkhano wonse wa khamu la ana a Israyeli. 
Numbers14:6 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndi Kalebi mwana wa Yefune, ndiwo a iwo aja adazonda dzikolo, anang'amba zobvala zao;" 
Numbers14:7 nanena ndi khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli, nati, Dziko tapitamo kulizonda, ndilo dziko lokometsetsa ndithu." 
Numbers14:8 Yehova akakondwera nafe, adzatilowetsa m'dzikomo, ndi kutipatsa ilo; ndilo dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uci ngati madzi." 
Numbers14:9 Cokhaci musamapikisana naye Yehova, musamaopa anthu a m'dzikomo; pakuti ndiwo mkate wathu; mthunzi wao wawacokera, ndipo Yehova ali nafe; musamawaopa." 
Numbers14:10 Koma khamu lonse lidati liwaponye miyala, Ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unaoneka m'cihema cokomanako kwa ana onse a Israyeli." 
Numbers14:11 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Anthu awa adzaleka liti kundinyoza? ndipo adzayamba liti kundikhulupirira, cinkana zizindikilo zonse ndinazicita pakati pao?" 
Numbers14:12 Ndidzawakantha ndi mliri, ndi kuwacotsera colowa cao, ndipo ndidzakusandutsa iwe mtundu wa anthu waukuru ndi wamphamvu koposa iwowa." 
Numbers14:13 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Yehova, Pamenepo Aaigupto adzamva; popeza munakweza anthu awa ndi mphamvu yanu kuwacotsa pakati pao;" 
Numbers14:14 ndipo adzawauza okhala m'dziko muno; adamva kuti inu Yehova muli pakati pa anthu awa; pakuti muoneka mopenyana, Yehova, ndi mtambo wanu umaima pamwamba pao, ndipo muwatsogolera, ndi mtambo njo msana, ndi moto njo usiku." 
Numbers14:15 Ndipo mukapha anthu awa ngati munthu mmodzi, pamenepo amitundu amene adamva mbiri yanu adzanena, ndi kuti," 
Numbers14:16 Popeza Yehova sanakhoza kuwalowetsa anthu awa m'dziko limene anawalumbirira, cifukwa cace anawapha m'cipululu." 
Numbers14:17 Ndipo tsopano, ikuletu mphamvu ya Mbuye wanga, monga mudanena, ndi kuti," 
Numbers14:18 Yehova ndiye wolekereza, ndi wa cifundo cocuruka, wokhululukira mphulupulu ndi kulakwa, koma wosamasula woparamula; wakuwalanga ana cifukwa ca mphulupulu ya atate ao, kufikira mbadwo wacitatu ndi wacinai." 
Numbers14:19 Khululukiranitu mphulupulu ya anthu awa, monga mwa cifundo canu cacikuru, ndi monga mudalekerera anthu awa, kuyambira Aigupto kufikira tsopano." 
Numbers14:20 Ndipo Yehova anati, Ndakhululukira monga mwa mau ako:" 
Numbers14:21 koma ndithu, pali Ine, dziko lonse lapansi lidzadzazidwa ndi ulemerero wa Yehova;" 
Numbers14:22 popeza anthu onse awa amene adaona ulemerero wanga, ndi zizindikilo zanga, ndidazicita m'Aigupto ndi m'cipululu, koma anandiyesa Ine kakhumi aka, osamvera mau anga;" 
Numbers14:23 sadzaona dzikoli ndidalumbirira makolo ao, ngakhale mmodzi wa iwo akundinyoza Ine, sadzaliona;" 
Numbers14:24 koma mtumiki wanga Kalebi, popeza anali nao mzimu wina, nanditsata monsemo, ndidzamlowetsa iyeyu m'dziko muja analowamo; ndi mbeu zace zidzakhala nalo." 
Numbers14:25 Koma Aamaleki ndi Akanani akhala m'cigwamo; tembenukani mawa, nimumke ulendo wanu kucipululu, njira ya ku Nyanja Yofiira." 
Numbers14:26 Ndipo Yehova ananena kwa Mose ndi Aroni, nati," 
Numbers14:27 Ndileke khamu loipa ili lakudandaula pa Ine kufikira liti? Ndidamva madandaulo a ana a Israyeli, amene amandidandaulira." 
Numbers14:28 Nunene nao, Pali Ine, ati Yehova, ndidzacitira inu ndithu monga mwanena m'makutu mwanga;" 
Numbers14:29 mitembo yanu idzagwa m'cipululu muno; ndi owerengedwa anu onse, monga mwa kuwerenga kwanu konse, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, akudandaula pa Ine;" 
Numbers14:30 simudzalowa inu m'dzikolo, ndinakwezapo dzanja langa kukukhalitsani m'mwemo, koma Kalebi mwana wa Yefune, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni ndiwo." 
Numbers14:31 Koma makanda anu, amene munanena za iwowa kuti adzakhala cakudya, amenewo ndidzavalowetsa, ndipo adzadziwa dzikolo mudalikana." 
Numbers14:32 Koma inu, mitembo yanu idzagwa m'cipululu muno." 
Numbers14:33 Ndipo ana anu adzakhala oyendayenda m'cipululu zaka makumi anai, nadzasenza kupulukira kwanu, kufikira mitembo yanu yatha m'cipululu." 
Numbers14:34 Monga mwa kuwerenga kwa masiku amene munazonda dziko, masiku makumi anai, tsiku limodzi kuwerenga caka cimodzi, mudzasenza mphulupulu zanu, zaka makumi anai, ndipo mudzadziwa kuti ndaleka lonjezano langa." 
Numbers14:35 Ine Yehova ndanena, ndidzacitira ndithu ici khamu ili lonse loipa lakusonkhana kutsutsana nane; adzatha m'cipululu muno, nadzafamo." 
Numbers14:36 Ndipo amunawo, amene Mose anawatumiza kukazonda dziko, amene anabwera nadandaulitsa khamu lonse pa iye, poipsa mbiri ya dziko," 
Numbers14:37 amuna amene anaipsa mbiri ya dziko, anafa ndi mliri pamaso pa Yehova." 
Numbers14:38 Koma Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndi Kalebi mwana wa Yefune, anakhala ndi moyo mwa amuna aja adamukawo kukazonda dziko." 
Numbers14:39 Ndipo Mose anauza ana a Israyeli mao onse awa; ndipo anthu anamva cisoni cambiri. 
Numbers14:40 Ndipo anauka mamawa, nakwera pamwamba pa, phiri, nati, Tiri pano, tidzakwera kumka ku malo amene Yehova ananena; popeza tacimwa." 
Numbers14:41 Ndipo Mose anati, Mutero cifukwa ninji kulakwira mau a Yehova, popeza simudzapindula nako?" 
Numbers14:42 Musakwereko, pakuti Yehova sali pakati pa inu; kuti angakukantheni adani anu." 
Numbers14:43 Pakuti Aamaleki ndi Akanani ali komweko patsogolo panu, ndipo mudzagwa ndi lupanga; popeza mwabwerera m'mbuyo osatsata Yehova, cifukwa cace Yehova sadzakhala nanu." 
Numbers14:44 Koma anakwera pamwamba pa phiri modzikuza; koma likasa la cipangano la Yehova, ndi Mose, sanacoka kucigono." 
Numbers14:45 Pamenepo anatsika Aamaleki, ndi Akanani, akukhala m'phirimo nawakantha, nawapha kufikira ku Horima." 
Numbers15:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose nati," 
Numbers15:2 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, nuti nao, Mukakalowa m'dziko lokakhalamo inu, limene ndirikupatsa inu," 
Numbers15:3 ndipo mukakonzera Yehova nsembe yamoto, nsembe yopsereza, kapena yophera, pocita cowinda ca padera, kapena nsembe yaufulu, kapena nsembe ya pa nyengo zanu zoikika, kumcitira Yehova pfungo lokoma, la ng'ombe kapena nkhosa;" 
Numbers15:4 pamenepo iye wobwera naco copereka cace kwa Yehova, azibwera nayo nsembe yaufa, limodzi la magawo khumi la ufa wosalala, wosanganiza ndi limodzi la magawo anai la bini la mafuta;" 
Numbers15:5 ndipo uzikonzera nsembe yopsereza kapena yophera, vinyo wa nsembe yothira, limodzi la magawo anai la bini, ukhale wa mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi." 
Numbers15:6 Kapena ukonzere nkhosa yamphongo nsembe yaufa, awiri mwa magawo khumi a ufa wosalala, wosanganiza ndi mafuta, limodzi la magawo atatu la bini." 
Numbers15:7 Ndipo ubwere naye vinyo wa nsembe yothira, limodzi la magawo atatu la bini, acitire Yehova pfungo lokoma." 
Numbers15:8 Ndipo pamene mukonza ng'ombe ikhale nsembe yopsereza, kapena yophera, kucita cowinda ca padera, kapena ikhale nsembe yoyamika ya Yehova;" 
Numbers15:9 abwere nayo, pamodzi ndi ng'ombeyo, nsembe ya ufa wosalala, atatu mwa magawo khumi wosanganiza ndi mafuta, limodzi la magawo awiri la bini." 
Numbers15:10 Ndipo ubwere naye vinyo wa nsembe yothira limodzi la magawo awiri la hini, ndiye nsembe yamoto ya pfungo: lokoma, ya Yehova." 
Numbers15:11 Kudzatero ndi ng'ombe iri yonse, kapena nkhosa yamphongo iri yonse, kapena mwana wa nkhosa ali yense, kapena mwana wa mbuzi ali yense." 
Numbers15:12 Monga mwa kuwerenga kwace kwa izi muzikonza, muzitero ndi yonse monga mwa kuwerenga kwace." 
Numbers15:13 Onse akubadwa m'dzikomo acite izi momwemo, pobwera nayo kwa Yehova nsembe yamoto ya pfungo lokoma." 
Numbers15:14 Ndipo akakhala nanu mlendo, kapena ali yense wakukhala pakati pa inu mwa mibadwo yanu, nakacitira Yehova nsembe yamoto ya pfungo lokoma; monga mucita inu, momwemo iyenso," 
Numbers15:15 Kunena za khamu, pakhale lemba limodzi kwa inu, ndi kwa mlendo wakukhala kwanu, ndilo lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yanu; monga mukhala inu, momwemo mlendo pamaso pa Yehova." 
Numbers15:16 Pakhale cilamulo cimodzi ndi ciweruzo cimodzi kwa inu ndi kwa mlendo wakukhala kwanu. 
Numbers15:17 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers15:18 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, nuti nao, Pamene mulowa m'dziko limene ndirikukulowetsani," 
Numbers15:19 kudzali, pakudya inu mkate wa m'dzikolo, muzikwezera Yehova nsembe yokweza." 
Numbers15:20 Pa mtanda wanu woyamba muperekeko kamtanda, kakhale nsembe yokweza; monga mumacitira nsembe yokweza ya popuntha tirigu, momwemo muzikakweza." 
Numbers15:21 Muzipatsa Yehova nsembe yokweza yoitenga ku mtanda wanu woyamba, mwa mibadwo yanu." 
Numbers15:22 Ndipo pamene mulakwa, osacita mau awa onse amene Yehova ananena ndi Mose;" 
Numbers15:23 ndizo zonse Yehova anakuuzani ndi dzanja la Mose, kuyambira tsikulo Yehova anauza, ndi kunkabe m'mibadwo yanu;" 
Numbers15:24 pamenepo kudzali, ngati anacicita osati dala, osacidziwa khamulo, khamu lonse lipereke ng'ombe yamphongo ikhale nsembe yopsereza, ya pfungo lokoma ya Yehova, pamodzi ndi nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe yace yothira, monga mwa ciweruzo cace; ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo." 
Numbers15:25 Ndipo wansembe azicita cotetezera khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli, ndipo adzakhululukidwa; popeza sanacita dala, ndipo anadza naco copereka cao, nsembe yamoto kwa Yehova, ndi nsembe yao yaucimo pamaso pa Yehova, cifukwa ca kulakwa osati dala." 
Numbers15:26 Ndipo khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli, adzakhululukidwa, ndi mlendo yemwe wakukhala pakati pao; popeza khamu lonse linacicita osati dala." 
Numbers15:27 Ndipo akacimwa munthu mmodzi osati dala, abwere nayo mbuzi yamsoti ya caka cimodzi, ikhale nsembe yaucimo." 
Numbers15:28 Ndipo wansembe acite comtetezera munthu wakulakwa, osalakwa dala pamaso pa Yehova, kumcita comtetezeraj ndipo adzakhululukidwa." 
Numbers15:29 Kunena za wobadwa m'dziko mwa ana a Israyeli, ndi mlendo wakukhala pakati pao, mukhale naco cilamulo cimodzi kwa iye wakucita kanthu kosati dala." 
Numbers15:30 Koma munthu wakucita kanthu dala, ngakhale wobadwa m'dziko kapena mlendo, yemweyo acitira Yehova mwano; ndipo munthuyo amsadze pakati pa anthu a mtundu wace." 
Numbers15:31 Popeza ananyoza mau a Yehova, nathyola lamulo lace; munthuyu amsadze konse; mphulupulu yace ikhale pa iye." 
Numbers15:32 Ndipo pokhala ana a Israyeli m'cipululu, anapeza munthu wakufuna nkhuni tsiku la Sabata." 
Numbers15:33 Ndipo amene adampezawo alinkufuna nkhuni anabwera naye kwa Mose ndi Aroni, ndi kwa khamu lonse." 
Numbers15:34 Ndipo anathanga wamsunga, popeza sicinanenedwa coyenera kumcitira iye." 
Numbers15:35 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Amuphe munthuyu ndithu; khamu lonse limponye miyala kunja kwa cigono." 
Numbers15:36 Pamenepo khamu lonse linamturutsa kunja kwa cigono, ndi kumponya miyala, ndipo anafa; monga Yehova adauza Mose." 
Numbers15:37 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers15:38 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, nuwauze kuti adziombere mphonje m'mphepete mwa zobvala zao, mwa mibadwo yao, naike pamphonje m'mphepetemo thonje lamadzi." 
Numbers15:39 Ndipo cikhale kwa inu mphonje, yakuti muziyang'anirako, ndi kukumbukila malamulo onse a Yehova, ndi kuwacita, ndi kuti musamazondazonda kutsata za m'mtima mwanu, ndi za m'maso mwanu zimene mumatsata ndi cigololo;" 
Numbers15:40 kuti mukumbukile ndi kucita malamulo anga onse, ndi kukhala wopatulikira Mulungu wanu." 
Numbers15:41 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu, wakukuturutsani m'dziko la Aigupto, kuti ndikhale Mulungu wanu; Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Numbers16:1 Koma Kora, mwana wa Izara, mwana wa Kohati, mwana wa Levi, anatenga Datani ndi Abiramu, ana a Eliyabu, ndi Oni mwana wa Peleti, ana a Rubeni;" 
Numbers16:2 ndipo anauka pamaso pa Mose, pamodzi ndi amuna: mazana awiri mphambu makumi asanu a ana a Israyeli, ndiwo akalonga a khamulo, oitanidwa a msonkhano, amuna omveka." 
Numbers16:3 Ndipo anasonkhana motsutsana pa Mose ndi Aroni, nanena nao, Mukula mphamvu inu, pakuti khamu lonse nlopatulika, onsewa, ndipo Yehova ali pakati pao; mudzikuza bwanji pa msonkhano wa Yehova?" 
Numbers16:4 Pamene Mose anamva ici anagwa nkhope yace pansi; 
Numbers16:5 nanena ndi Kora ndi khamu lace lonse, ndi kuti, M'mawa Yehova adzatizindikiritsa anthu ace ndi ayani, wopatulika ndani, amene adzamsendeza pafupi pa iye; ndi iye amene anamsankha adzamsendeza pafupi pa iye." 
Numbers16:6 Citani ici; dzitengereni mbale za zofukiza, Kora, ndi khamu lace lonse;" 
Numbers16:7 nimuikemo moto, muikenso cofukiza pamenepo, pamaso pa Yehova, mawa; ndipo kudzali kuti amene Yehova amsankha, wopatulika ndiye; mwakula mphamvu, inu ana a Levi." 
Numbers16:8 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi Kora, Tamvani tsono, inu ana a Levi;" 
Numbers16:9 kodi muciyesa cinthu cacing'ono, kuti Mulungu wa Israyeli anakusiyanitsani ku khamu la Israyeli, kukusendezani pafupi pa iye, kucita nchito ya kacisi wa Yehova, ndi kuima pamaso pa khamu kuwatumikira;" 
Numbers16:10 ndi kuti anakusendeza iwe, ndi abale ako onse, ana a Levi, pamodzi ndi iwe? ndipo kodi mufunanso nchito ya nsembe?" 
Numbers16:11 Cifukwa cace, iwe ndi khamu lonse mwasonkhana kutsutsana ndi Yehova; ndipo Aroniyo ndani, kuti mudandaule pa iye?" 
Numbers16:12 Ndipo Mose anatuma kukaitaniza Datani ndi Abiramu, ana a Eliyabu; koma anati, Sitifikako:" 
Numbers16:13 kodi ndi cinthu cacing'ono kuti watikweza kuticotsa m'dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uci ngati madzi, kutipha m'cipululu; koma udziyesanso ndithu kalonga wa ife?" 
Numbers16:14 Ndiponso sunatilowetsa m'dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uci ngati madzi, kapena kutipatsa colowa ca minda, ndi minda yamphesa; kodi udzakolowola amuna awa maso ao? Sitifikako." 
Numbers16:15 Pamenepo Mose adapsa mtima, ndipo anati kwa Yehova, Musasamalira copereka cao; siodinalanda buru wao mmodzi, kapena kucitira coipa mmodzi wa iwowa." 
Numbers16:16 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Kora, Iwe ndi khamu lako lonse mukhale pamaso pa Yehova mawa, iwe ndi iwowa, ndi Aroni;" 
Numbers16:17 nimutenge munthu yense mbale yace yofukizamo, nimuike cofukiza m'mwemo, nimubwere nazo, yense mbale yace yofukizamo pamaso pa Yehova, mbale zofukizamo mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu; ndi iwe, ndi Aroni, yense mbale yace yofukizamo." 
Numbers16:18 Potero munthu yense anatenga mbale yace yofukizamo, naikamo moto, naikapo cofukiza, naima pa khomo la cihema cokomanako pamodzi ndi Mose ndi Aroni." 
Numbers16:19 Ndipo Kora anasonkhanitsa khamu lonse mopikisana nao ku khomo la cihema cokomanako; ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unaoneka kwa khamu lonse. 
Numbers16:20 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, nati," 
Numbers16:21 Dzipatu, leni pakati pa khamu lino, kuti ndi wathe m'kamphindi." 
Numbers16:22 Ndipo anagwa nkhope zao pansi, nati, Mulungu, ndinu Mulungu wa mizimu ya anthu onse, walakwa munthu mmodzi, ndipo kodi mukwiya nalo khamu lonse?" 
Numbers16:23 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers16:24 Nena ndi khamulo, ndi kuti, Kwerani kucoka pozungulira mahema a Kora, Datani, ndi Abiramu." 
Numbers16:25 Ndipo Mose anauka namuka kwa Datani ndi Abiramu; ndi akuru a Israyeli anamtsata. 
Numbers16:26 Ndipo ananena ndi khamulo, nati, Cokanitu ku mahema a anthu awa oipa, musamakhudza kanthu kao kali konse, mungaonongeke m'zocimwa zao zonse." 
Numbers16:27 Potero anakwera kucokera pozungulira mahema a Kora, Datani, ndi Abiramu, ndipo Datani ndi Abiramu anaturuka, naima pakhomo pa mahema ao, ndi akazi ao, ndi ana ao amuna, ndi makanda ao." 
Numbers16:28 Ndipo Mose anati, Ndi ici mudzadziwa kuti Yehova wanditumiza ine kucita nchito izi zonse, ndi kuti sizifuma m'mtima mwanga mwanga." 
Numbers16:29 Akafa anthu awa monga amafa anthu onse, kapena akasungika monga amasungika anthu onse, Yehova sananditumiza ine." 
Numbers16:30 Koma Yehova akalenga cinthu catsopano, ndi nthaka ikayasama pakamwa pace, nikawameza ndi zonse ali nazo, nakatsikira iwo kumanda ali ndi moyo; pamenepo mudzadziwa kuti anthu awa anyoza Mulungu." 
Numbers16:31 Ndipo kunali, pakutha iye kunena mau awa onse, nthaka inang'ambika pansi pao;" 
Numbers16:32 ndi dziko linayasama pakamwa pace ndi kuwameza, iwo ndi mabanja ao, ndi amuna ao onse akutsata Kora, ndi akatundu ao onse." 
Numbers16:33 Comweco iwowa, ndi onse anali nao, anatsikira kumanda ali ndi moyo, ndi dziko linasunama pa iwo, ndipo anaonongeka pakati pa msonkhano." 
Numbers16:34 Ndipo Aisrayeli onse akukhala pozinga pao anathawa pakumva kupfuula kwao; pakuti anati, Lingatimeze dziko ifenso." 
Numbers16:35 Ndipo mota unaturuka kwa Yehova, ndi kunyeketsa amuna mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu aja akubwera naco cofukiza." 
Numbers16:36 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers16:37 Nena ndi Eleazara mwana wa Aroni wansembe, kuti aphule mbale zofukiza pakati pa moto, nutaye makalawo uko kutali; pakuti ziri zopatulika;" 
Numbers16:38 mbale zofukizazo za iwo amene adacimwira moyo wao wao, ndipo azisule zaphanthiphanthi, zikhale cibvundikilo ca guwa la nsembe; popeza anabwera nazo pamaso pa Yehova, cifukwa cace zikhala zopatulika; ndipo zidzakhala cizindikilo kwa ana a Israyeli." 
Numbers16:39 Ndipo Eleazara wansembe anatenga mbale zofukiza zamkuwa, zimene anthu opsererawo adabwera nazo; ndipo anazisula zaphanthiphanthi zikhale cibvundikilo ca guwala nsembe;" 
Numbers16:40 cikhale cikumbutso kwa ana a Israyeli, kuti mlendo, wosati wa mbeu ya Aroni, asasendere kucita cofukiza pamaso pa Yehova; angakhale monga Kora ndi khamu lace; monga Yehova adanena naye ndi dzanja la Mose." 
Numbers16:41 Koma m'mawa mwace khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli anadandaula pa Mose ndi Aroni, nati, Mwapha anthu a Yehova, inu." 
Numbers16:42 Ndipo kunali, posonkhanidwa khamulo kutsutsana nao Mose ndi Aroni, kuti anaceukira cihema cokomanako; taonani, mtambo unaciphimba, ndi ulemerero wa Yehova unaoneka." 
Numbers16:43 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anadza kukhomo kwa cihema cokomanako. 
Numbers16:44 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers16:45 Kwerani kucoka pakati pa khamu lino, kuti ndiwathe m'kamphindi. Pamenepo adagwa nkhope zao pansi." 
Numbers16:46 Ndipo Mose anati kwa Aroni, Tenga mbale yako yofukiza, nuikemo mota wa ku guwa la nsembe, nuikepo cofukiza, nufulumire kumuka ku khamulo, nuwacitire cowatetezera; pakuti waturuka mkwiyo pamaso pa Yehova; wayamba mliri." 
Numbers16:47 Ndipo Aroni anatenga monga Mose adanena, nathamanga kulowa pakati pa msonkhano; ndipo taonani, udayamba mliri pakati pa anthu; ndipo anaikapo cofukiza nawacitira anthu cowatetezera." 
Numbers16:48 Ndipo anaima pakati pa akufa ndi amoyo; ndi mliri unaleka. 
Numbers16:49 Koma akufa nao mliri ndiwo zikwi khumi ndi zinai mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri, osawerenga aja adafera cija ca Kora." 
Numbers16:50 Ndipo Aroni anabwera kwa Mose ku khomo la cihema cokomanako; ndi mliri unaleka. 
Numbers17:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers17:2 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, nulandire kwa yense ndodo, banja liri onse la makolo ndodo imodzi, mafuko ao onse monga mwa mabanja a makolo ao azipereka ndodo, zikhale khumi ndi ziwiri; nulembe dzina la yense pa ndodo yace." 
Numbers17:3 Ndipo ulembe dzina la Aroni pa ndodo ya Levi; pakuti pakhale ndodo imodzi pa mkuru yense wa nyumba za makolo ao. 
Numbers17:4 Ndipo uziike m'cihema cokomanako, cakuno ca mboni, kumene ndikomana ndi inu." 
Numbers17:5 Ndipo kudzali, kuti ndodo ya munthu ndimsankheyo, idzaphuka; ndipo ndidzadziletsera madandaulo a ana a Israyeli amene adandaula nao pa inu." 
Numbers17:6 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi ana a Israyeli, ndipo akalonga ao onse anapereka, yense ndodo imodzi, monga mwa mabanja a makolo ao, ndodo khumi ndi ziwiri; ndi ndodo ya Aroni inakhala pakati pa ndodo zao." 
Numbers17:7 Ndipo Mose anaika ndodozo pamaso pa Yehova m'cihema ca mboni. 
Numbers17:8 Ndipo kunali m'mawa mwace, kuti Mose analowa m'cihema ca mboni; ndipo taonani, ndodo ya Aroni, ya pa banja la Levi, inaphuka, nionetsa timaani, nicita maluwa, nipatsa akatungurume." 
Numbers17:9 Ndipo Mose anaturutsa ndodo zonse kuzicotsa pamaso pa Yehova, azione ana onse a Israyeli; ndipo anapenya, natenga yense ndodo yace." 
Numbers17:10 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Bweza ndodo ya Aroni kulika cakuno ca mboni, isungike ikhale cizindikilo ca pa ana opikisana; kuti unelitsirizire madandaulo ao, kuti ungafe." 
Numbers17:11 Ndipo Mose anacita monga Yehova adamuuza, momwemo anacita." 
Numbers17:12 Pamenepo ana a Israyeli ananena ndi Mose, nati, Taonani, tikufa, tionongeka, tionongeka tonse." 
Numbers17:13 Yense wakuyandikiza kacisi wa Yehova amwalira; kodi tidzatha nkufa? 
Numbers18:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Aroni, Iwe ndi ana ako amuna ndi banja la kholo lako pamodzi ndi iwe muzisenza mphulupulu ya malo opatulika; ndipo iwe ndi ana ako amuna pamodzi ndi iwe musenze mphulupulu ya nchito yanu ya nsembe." 
Numbers18:2 Ndiponso abale ako, pfuko la Alevi, pfuko la kholo lako, uwayandikizitse pamodzi ndi iwe, kuti aphatikane ndi iwe, ndi kukutumikira; koma iwe ndi ana ako pamodzi ndi iwe mukhale ku khomo la cihema ca mboni." 
Numbers18:3 Ndipo asunge udikiro wako, ndi udikiro wa cihema conse; koma asayandikize zipangizo za malo opatulika, ndi guwa la nsembe, kuti mungafe, iwo ndi inu." 
Numbers18:4 Koma aziphatikana nawe, nazisunga udikiro wa cihema cokomanako, kucita nchito yonse ya cihema; koma mlendo asayandikize inu." 
Numbers18:5 Ndipo musunge udikiro wa malo opatulika, ndi udikiro wa guwa la nsembe; kuti pasakhalenso mkwiyo pa ana a Israyeli." 
Numbers18:6 Ndipo Ine, taonani, ndinatenga abale anu Alevi kuwacotsa pakati pa ana a Israyeli; ndiwo mphatso yanu, yopatsidwa kwa Yehova, kucita nchito ya cihema cokomanako." 
Numbers18:7 Ndipo iwe ndi ana ako amuna pamodzi ndi iwe mucite nchito yanu ya nsembe, pa zonse za ku guwa la nsembe, ndi za m'kati mwa nsaru yocinga; ndipo mutumikire; ndikupatsani nchito yanu ya nsembe, utumiki wopatsika kwaulere; koma mlendo wakuyandikiza amuphe." 
Numbers18:8 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Aroni, Ndipo taona, Ine ndakupatsa udikiro wa nsembe zanga zokweza, ndizo zopatulika zonse za ana a Israyeli; cifukwa ca kudzozedwaku ndazipereka kwa iwe, ndi kwa ana ako amuna, likhale lemba losatha." 
Numbers18:9 Izi ndi zako pa zinthu zopatulikitsa, zosafika kumoto; zopereka: zao zonse, ndi nsembe zao zonse zaufa, ndi nsembe zao zonse zaucimo, ndi nsembe zao zonse zoparamula, zimene Andibwezera Ine, zikhale zopatulikitsa za iwe ndi za ana ako amuna." 
Numbers18:10 Muzizidya izi monga zopatulikitsa; mwamuna yense adyeko; uziyese zopatulika. 
Numbers18:11 Zako ndi izinso: nsembe yokweza ya mphatso yao, ndi nsembe zoweyula zonse za ana a Israyeli; ndazipereka kwa iwe, ndi kwa ana ako amuna ndi kwa ana ako akazi pamodzi ndi iwe, likhale lemba losatha; oyera onse a m'banja lako adyeko." 
Numbers18:12 Mafuta onse okometsetsa, ndi vinyo watsopano, ndi tirigu yense wokometsetsa, zipatso zao zoyamba zimene aziperekako kwa Yehova, ndazipereka kwa iwe." 
Numbers18:13 Zipatso zoyamba zonse ziri m'dziko mwao, zimene amadza nazo kwa Yehova, zikhale zako; oyera onse a m'banja lako adyeko." 
Numbers18:14 Ziri zonse zoperekedwa ciperekere m'Israyeli ndi zako. 
Numbers18:15 Ziri zonse zoyambira kubadwa mwa zamoyo zonse zimene abwera nazo kwa Yehova, mwa anthu ndi mwa nyama, ndi zako; koma munthu woyamba kubadwa uzimuombola ndithu; ndi nyama yodetsa yoyamba kubadwa uziiombola." 
Numbers18:16 Ndipo zimene ziti zidzaomboledwa uziombole kuyambira za rowezi umodzi, monga mwa kuyesa kwako, pa ndarama za masekeli asanu, kuyesa sekeli wa malo opatulika, ndiwo magera makumi awiri." 
Numbers18:17 Koma ng'ombe yoyamba kubadwa, kapena nkhosa yoyamba kubadwa, kapena mbuzi yoyamba kubadwa, usaziombola; ndizo zopatulika; uwace mwazi wace pa guwa la nserobe, ndi kufukiza mafuta ao, nsembe yamoto ya pfungo lokoma kwa Yehova." 
Numbers18:18 Ndipo nyama yace ndi yako, ndiyo nganga ya nsembe yoweyula ndi mwendo wathako wa kulamanja, ndizo zako." 
Numbers18:19 Nsembe zokweza zonse za zinthu zopatulika, zimene ana a Israyeli azikweza kwa Yehova, ndazipereka kwa iwe, ndi kwa ana ako amuna ndi kwa ana ako akazi pamodzi ndi iwe, likhale lemba losatha; ndilo pangano lamcere losatha, pamaso pa Yehova, kwa iwe ndi mbeu zako pamodzi ndi iwe." 
Numbers18:20 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Aroni, Ulibe colowa m'dziko lao, ulibe gawo pakati pao; Ine ndine gawo lako ndi colowa cako pakati pa ana a Israyeli." 
Numbers18:21 Ndipo taonani, ndawaninkha ana a Levi limodzi la magawo khumi mwa zonse m'Israyeli, likhale colowa cao, mphotho ya pa nchito yao alikuicita, nchito ya cihema cokomanako." 
Numbers18:22 Ndipo kuyambira tsopano ana a Israyeli asayandikize cihema cokomanako, angamasenze ucimo kuti angafe." 
Numbers18:23 Koma Alevi azicita nchito ya cihema cokomanako, iwo ndiwo azisenza mphulupulu yao; ndilo lemba losatha mwa mibadwo yanu; ndipo asakhale naco colowa pakati pa ana a Israyeli." 
Numbers18:24 Popeza ndapatsa Alevi limodzi la magawo khumi, la ana a Israyeli, limene apereka nsembe, yokweza kwa Yehova, likhale colowa cao; cifukwa cace ndanena nao, Asadzakhale naco colowa mwa ana a Israyeli." 
Numbers18:25 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndil Mose, nati," 
Numbers18:26 Unenenso ndi Alevi, nuti nao, Pamene mulandira kwa ana a Israyeli, limodzi la magawo khumi limene ndakupatsani likhale colowa canu cocokera kwao, muziperekako nsembe yokweza ya Yehova, limodzi la magawo khumi la limodzi la magawo khumi." 
Numbers18:27 Ndipo akuyesereninso nsembe yanu yokweza monga tirigu wa padwale, monga mopondera mphesa modzala." 
Numbers18:28 Momweno inunso muzipereka kwa Yehova nsembe yokweza yocokera ku magawo anu onse a magawo khumi, a zonse muzilandira kwa ana a Israyeli; ndipo muperekeko nsembe yokweza ya Yehova kwa Aroni wansembe." 
Numbers18:29 Mupereke nsembe zokweza zonse za Yehova kuzitenga ku mphatso zanu zonse, kusankhako zokometsetsa ndizo zopatulika zace." 
Numbers18:30 Cifukwa cace unene nao, Pamene mukwezako zokometsetsa zace, zidzayesedwanso kwa Alevi ngati zipatso za padwale, ndi zipatso za mopondera mphesa," 
Numbers18:31 Ndipo muzidye pamalo ponse, inu ndi a pabanja panu; popeza ndizo mphotho yanu mwa nchito yanu m'cihema cokomanako." 
Numbers18:32 Ndipo simudzasenzapo ucimo, mutakwezako zokometsetsa zace; ndipo musamaipsa zinthu zopatulika za ana a Israyeli, kuti mungafe." 
Numbers19:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, nati," 
Numbers19:2 Ili ndi lemba la cilamulo Yehova adalamuliraci, ndi kuti, Nena ndi ana a Israyeli kuti azikutengera ng'ombe ramsoti yofiira, yangwiro yopanda enema, yosamanga m'goli;" 
Numbers19:3 ndipo muipereke kwa Eleazara wansembe, naiturutse iye kunja kwa cigono, ndipo wina aiphe pamaso pace." 
Numbers19:4 Ndipo Eleazara wansembe atengeko mwazi wace ndi cala cace, nawazeko mwazi wace kasanu ndi kawiri pakhomo pa cihema cokomanako." 
Numbers19:5 Pamenepo atenthe ng'ombe yamsotiyo pamaso pace; atenthe cikopa cace ndi nyama yace, ndi mwazi wace, pamodzi ndi cipwidza cace." 
Numbers19:6 Ndipo wansembe atenge mtengo wamkungudza, ndi hisope, ndi ubweya wofiira, naziponye pakati pa mota irikupsererapo ng'ombe yamsoti." 
Numbers19:7 Pamenepo wansembe atsuke zobvala zace, nasambe thupi lace ndi madzi; ndipo atatero alowenso kucigono; koma wansembeyo adzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo." 
Numbers19:8 Ndipo iye wakutentha ng'ombeyo atsuke zobvala zace, nasambe thupi lace ndi madzi, nadzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo." 
Numbers19:9 Ndipo munthu woyera aole mapulusa a ng'ombe ya msotiyo, nawaike kunja kwa cigono, m'malo moyera: ndipo awasungire khamu la ana a lsrayeli akhale a madzi akusiyanitsa; ndiwo nsembe yaucimo." 
Numbers19:10 Ndipo wakuola mapulusayo a ng'ombe ya msoti atsuke zobvala zace, nadzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo; ndipo likhale lemba losatha kwa ana a Israyeli, ndi kwa mlendo wakukhala pakati pao." 
Numbers19:11 Iye wakukhudza mtembo wa munthu ali yense adzakhala wodetsedwa masiku asanu ndi awiri; 
Numbers19:12 iyeyo adziyeretse nao tsiku lacitatu, ndi pa tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri adzakhala woyera; koma akapanda kudziyeretsa tsiku lacitatu, sadzakhala woyera tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri." 
Numbers19:13 Ali yense wakukhudza mtembo wa munthu ali yense wakufa, osadziyeretsa, aipsa kacisi wa Yehova; amsadze munthuyo kwa Israyeli; popeza sanamwaza madzi akusiyanitsa; ndiye wodetsedwa; kudetsedwa kwace kukali pa iye." 
Numbers19:14 Cilamulo ndi ici: Munthu akafa m'hema, yense wakulowa m'hemamo, ndi yense wakukhala m'hemamo, adzakhala wodetsedwa masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
Numbers19:15 Ndi zotengera zonse zobvundukuka, zopanda cibvundikilo comangikapo, ziri zodetsedwa." 
Numbers19:16 Ndipo ali yense wakukhudza munthu wophedwa ndi lupanga, kapena mtembo, kapena pfupa la munthu, kapena manda, pathengo poyera, adzakhala wodetsedwa masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
Numbers19:17 Ndipo atengereko wodetsedwayo mapulusa akupsererawo a nsembe yaucimo, nathirepo m'cotengera madzi oyenda;" 
Numbers19:18 ndi munthu woyera atenge hisope, nambviike m'madzimo, ndi kuwawaza pahema ndi pa zotengera zonse, ndi pa anthu anali pomwepo, ndi pa iye wakukhudza pfupa, kapena wophedwa, kapena wakufa, kapena Manda." 
Numbers19:19 Ndipo woyerayo awaze pa wodetsedwayo tsiku lacitatu, ndi tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri; ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri amyeretse; ndipo atsuke zobvala zace, nasambe m'madzi, nadzakhala woyera madzulo." 
Numbers19:20 Koma munthu wakukhala wodetsedwa, koma wosadziyeretsa, azimsadza munthuyo pakati pa msonkhano, popeza waipsa malo opatulika a Yehova; sanamwaza madzi akusiyanitsa; ndiye wodetsedwa." 
Numbers19:21 Ndipo likhale kwa iwo lemba losatha; kuti iye wakuwaza madzi akusiyanitsa azitsuka zobvala zace; ndi iye wakukhudza madzi akusiyanitsa adzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo. 
Numbers19:22 Ndipo ciri conse munthu wodetsedwa acikhudza cidzakhala codetsedwa; ndi munthu wakucikhudza adzakhala wodetsedwa kufikira madzulo. 
Numbers20:1 Ndipo ana a Israyeli, ndilo khamu lonse, analowa m'cipululu ca Zini mwezi woyamba; ndipo anthu anakhala m'Kadesi; kumeneko anafa Miriamu, naikidwakomweko." 
Numbers20:2 Ndipo khamulo linasowa madzi; pamenepo anasonkhana kutsutsana nao Mose ndi Aroni. 
Numbers20:3 Ndipo anthu anatsutsana ndi Mose, nanena, nati, Mwenzi titangomwalira muja abale athu anamwalira pamaso pa Yehova!" 
Numbers20:4 Mwalowa nao bwanji msonkhano wa Yehova m'cipululu muno, kuti tifere mommuno, ife ndi zoweta zathu?" 
Numbers20:5 Ndipo munatikwezeranji kutiturutsa m'Aigupto, kutilowetsa m'malo oipa ano? Si malo a mbeu awa, kapena mkuyu, kapena mpesa kapena makangaza; ngakhale madzi akumwa palibe." 
Numbers20:6 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anacoka pamaso pa msonkhano kumka ku khomo la cihema cokomanako, nagwa nkhope zao pansi; ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unaonekera iwo." 
Numbers20:7 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers20:8 Tenga ndodoyo, nusonkhanitse khamulo; iwe ndi Aroni mbale wako, munene ndi thanthwe pamaso pao, kuti liwapatse madzi; potero uwaturutsire madzi m'thanthwe, ndi kumwetsa khamu la anthu ndi zoweta zao." 
Numbers20:9 Ndipo Mose anatenga ndodoyo kuicotsa pamaso pa Yehova, monga iye anamuuza iye." 
Numbers20:10 Ndipo Mose ndi Aroni anasonkhanitsa msonkhano pathanthwe, nanena nao iye, Tamvanitu, opikisana naye inu; kodi tikuturutsireni madzi m'thanthwe umu?" 
Numbers20:11 Ndipo Mose anasamula dzanja lace, napanda thanthwe kawiri ndi ndodo; ndipo madzi anaturukamo ocuruka, ndi khamulo linamwa, ndi zoweta zao zomwe." 
Numbers20:12 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni, Popeza simunandikhulupirira Ine, kundipatula Ine pamaso pa ana a Israyeli, cifukwa cace simudzalowetsa msonkhano uwu m'dziko ndinawapatsali." 
Numbers20:13 Awa ndi madzi a Meriba; popeza ana a Israyeli anatsutsana ndi Yehova, ndipo anapatulidwa mwa iwowa." 
Numbers20:14 Pamenepo Mose anatumiza amithenga ocokera ku Kadesi kumuka kwa mfumu ya Edomu, ndi kuti, Atero mbale wanu Israyeli, Mudziwa zowawa zonse zinatigwera;" 
Numbers20:15 kuti makolo athu anatsikira kumka ku Aigupto, ndipo tinakhala m'Aigupto masiku ambiri; ndipo Aaigupto anacitira zoipa ife, ndi makolo athu." 
Numbers20:16 Pamenepo tinapfuulira kwa Yehova, ndipo anamva mau athu, natuma mthenga, natiturutsa m'Aigupto; ndipo, taonani, tiri m'Kadesi, ndiwo mudzi wa malekezero a malire anu." 
Numbers20:17 Tipitetu pakati pa dziko lanu; sitidzapitira pamunda, kapena munda wampesa, sitidzamwa madzi a m'zitsime; tidzatsata mseu wacifumu; sitidzapatukira kulamanja kapena kulamanzere, mpaka titapitirira malire anu." 
Numbers20:18 Koma Edomu ananena naye, Usapitire pakati pa ine, kuti ndingaturuke kukomana nawe ndi lupanga." 
Numbers20:19 Ndipo ana a Israyeli ananena naye, Tidzatsata mseu; ndipo tikakamwa madzi ako, ine ndi zoweta zanga, pamenepo ndidzapatsa mtengo wace; sindifuna kanthu kena koma kungopitapo mwa njira." 
Numbers20:20 Koma anati, Usapitirepo. Ndipo Edomu anaturukira kukumana naye ndi anthu ambiri, ndi dzanja lamphamvu." 
Numbers20:21 Potero Edomu anakana kulola Israyeli kupitira pa malire ace; cifukwa cace Aisrayeli anampatukira. 
Numbers20:22 Ndipo anayenda ulendo kucokera ku Kadesi; ndi ana a Israyeli, ndilo khamu lonse, anadza ku phiri la Hori." 
Numbers20:23 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Aroni m'phiri la Hori, pa malire a dziko la Edomu, ndi kuti," 
Numbers20:24 Aroni adzaitanidwa kumka kwa anthu a mtundu wace; pakuti sadzalowa m'dziko limene ndapatsa ana a Israyeli, popeza munapikisana ndi mau anga ku madzi a Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Tenga Aroni ndi Eleazara mwana wace, nukwere nao m'phiri la Hori;" 
Numbers20:26 nubvule Aroni zobvala zace, numbveke Eleazara mwana wace; ndipo Aroni adzaitanidwa kumka kwa anthu a mtundu wace, nadzafa komweko." 
Numbers20:27 Pamenepo Mose anacita monga adamuuza; ndipo anakwera m'phiri la Hori pamaso pa khamu lonse. 
Numbers20:28 Ndipo Mose anabvula Aroni zobvala zace, nabveka Eleazara mwana wace; ndipo Aroni anafa pomwepo pamwamba pa phiri, Pamenepo Mose ndi Eleazara anatsika m'phirimo." 
Numbers20:29 Pamene khamu lonse linaona kuti Aroni adamwalira, anamlira Aroni masiku makumi atatu, ndiyo mbumba yonse ya Israyeli." 
Numbers21:1 Pamene Mkanani, mfumu ya Aradi, wokhala kumwela, anamva kuti Israyeli anadzera njira ya azondi, anathira nkhondo pa Israyeli, nagwira ena akhale ansinga." 
Numbers21:2 Ndipo Israyeli analonjeza cowinda kwa Yehova, nati, Mukadzaperekatu anthu awa m'dzanja langa, ndidzaononga midzi yao konse." 
Numbers21:3 Ndipo Yehova anamvera mau a Israyeli, napereka Akanani; ndipo anawaononga konse ndi midzi yao yomwe; nacha dzina lace la malowo Horima." 
Numbers21:4 Ndipo anayenda ulendo kucokera ku phiri la Hori, nadzera njira ya Nyanja Yofiira, kupaza ku dziko la Edomu; ndi mtima wa anthu unada cifukwa ca njirayo." 
Numbers21:5 Ndipo anthu ananena motsutsana ndi Mulungu, ndi Mose, ndi kuti, Mwatikwezeranji kuticotsa ku Aigupto kuti tifere m'cipululu? pakuti mkate ndi madzi palibe, ndi mtima wathu walema nao mkate wacabe uwu." 
Numbers21:6 Pamenepo Yehova anatumiza njoka zamoto pakati pa anthu, ndipo zinaluma anthu; nafapo anthu ambiri a Israyeli." 
Numbers21:7 Ndipo anthu anadza kwa Mose, nati, Tacimwa, popeza tinanena motsutsana ndi Yehova, ndi inu; pempherani kwa Yehova kuti aticotsere njokazi. Ndipo Mose anawapempherera anthu." 
Numbers21:8 Pamenepo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Upange njoka yamoto; nulike pa mtengowace; ndipo kudzali, kuti onse olumwa, akuipenya njokayo, adzakhala ndi moyo." 
Numbers21:9 Ndipo Mose anapanga njoka yamkuwa, naiika pamtengo; ndipo kunali, njoka itamluma munthu ali yense, nakapenyetsetsa iye pa njoka yamkuwa, nakhala ndi moyo." 
Numbers21:10 Pamenepo ana a Israyeli anayenda ulendo, namanga mahema m'Oboti." 
Numbers21:11 Ndipo anacoka ku Oboti, namanga mahema ku Iyebarimu, m'cipululu cakuno ca Moabu, koturukira dzuwa." 
Numbers21:12 Pocokapo anayenda ulendo, namanga mahema m'cigwa ca Zaredi." 
Numbers21:13 Atacokako anayenda ulendo, namanga mahema tsidya tina la Arinoni, wokhala m'cipululu, wogwera ku malire a Aamori; popeza Arinoni ndiwo malire a Moabu, pakati pa Moabu ndi Aamori." 
Numbers21:14 Cifukwa cace, ananena m'buku la Nkhondo za Yehova, Vahebi m'Sufa, Ndi miyendo ya Arinoni;" 
Numbers21:15 Ndi zigwa za miyendoyo Zakutsikira kwao kwa Ari, Ndi kuyandikizana ndi malire a Moabu." 
Numbers21:16 Ndipo atacokapo anamuka ku Been, ndico citsime cimene Yehova anacinena kwa Mose, Sonkhanitsa anthu, ndipo ndidzawapatsa madzi." 
Numbers21:17 Pamenepo Israyeli anayimba nyimbo iyi: Tumphuka citsime iwe; mucithirire mang'ombe; 
Numbers21:18 Citsime adakumba mafumu, Adacikonza omveka a anthu; Atanena mlamuli, ndi ndodo zao. Ndipo atacoka kucipululu anamuka ku Matana;" 
Numbers21:19 atacoka ku Matana ku Nahaliyeli; atacoka ku Nahaliyeli ku Bamoti; 
Numbers21:20 atacoka ku Bamoti ku cigwa ciri m'dziko la Moabu, ku mutu wa Pisiga, popenyana ndicipululu." 
Numbers21:21 Ndipo Israyeli anatuma amithenga kwa Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, ndi kuti," 
Numbers21:22 Ndipitire pakati pa dziko lako; sitidzapatuka kulowa m'munda, kapena m'munda wampesa, sitidzamwako madzi a m'zitsime; tidzatsata mseu wacifumu, kufikira tapitirira malire ako." 
Numbers21:23 Ndipo Sihoni sanalola Israyeli apitire m'malire ace; koma Sihoni anamemeza anthu ace onse, nadzakomana naye Israyeli m'cipululu, nafika ku Jahazi, nathira nkhondo pa Israyeli." 
Numbers21:24 Ndipo Israyeli anamkantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, nalanda dziko lace likhale lao lao, kuyambira Arinoni kufikira Yaboki, kufikira ana ai Amoni; popeza malire a ana a Amoni ndiwo olimba." 
Numbers21:25 Ndipo Israyeli analanda midzi iyi yonse; nakhala Israyeli m'midzi yonse ya Aamori; m'Hesiboni ndi miraga yace yonse. 
Numbers21:26 Popeza Hesiboni ndiwo mudzi wa Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, imene idathira nkhondo pa mfumu idafayo ya Moabu, nilanda dziko lace m'dzanja lace kufikira Arinoni." 
Numbers21:27 Cifukwa cace iwo akunena mophiphiritsa akuti, Idzani ku Hesiboni, Mudzi wa Sihoni umangike, nukhazikike:" 
Numbers21:28 Popeza moto unaturuka m'Hesiboni, Cirangali ca mota m'mudzi wa Sihoni; Catha Ari wa Moabu, Eni misanje ya Arinoni." 
Numbers21:29 Tsoka kwa iwe, Moabu! Mwaonongeka, anthu a Kemosi inu, Anapereka ana ace amuna opulumuka, Ndi ana ace akazi akhale ansinga, Kwa Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori." 
Numbers21:30 Tinawagwetsa; Hesiboni waonongeka kufikira ku Diboni, Ndipo tinawapululutsa kufikira ku Nofa, Ndiwo wakufikira ku Medeba." 
Numbers21:31 Comweco Israyeli anakhala m'dziko la Aamori. 
Numbers21:32 Ndipo Mose anatumiza anthu akazonde Yazere, nalanda miraga yace, napitikitsa Aamori a komweko." 
Numbers21:33 Ndipo anatembenuka nakwera kudzera njira ya ku Basanu; ndipo Ogi mfumu ya ku Basana anaturuka kukumana nao, iye ndi anthu ace onse, kudzacita nao nkhondo ku Edreyi." 
Numbers21:34 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Usamuopa; popeza ndampereka m'manja mwako, iye ndi anthu ace onse, ndi dziko lace; umcitire monga umo unacitira Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori anakhalayo ku Hesiboni." 
Numbers21:35 Ndipo anamkantha iye, ndi ana ace amuna ndi anthu ace onse, kufikira sanatsala ndi mmodzi yense; nalanda dziko lace likhale lao lao." 
Numbers22:1 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anayenda ulendo, namanga mahema m'zigwa za Moabu, tsidya la Yordano ku Yeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Ndipo Balaki mwana wa Zipori anaona zonse Israyeli anacitira Aamori. 
Numbers22:3 Ndipo Moabu anacita mantha akuru ndi anthuwo, popeza anacuruka; nada mtima Moabu cifukwa ca ana a Israyeli." 
Numbers22:4 Ndipo Moabu anati kwa akuru a Midyani, Tsopano msonkhano uwu udzanyambita zonse ziri pozinga pathu, monga ng'ombe zinyambita msipu wa kubusa. Ndipo Balaki mwana wa Zipori anali mfumu ya Moabu masiku amenewo." 
Numbers22:5 Ndipo anatuma amithenga kwa Balamu mwana wa Beori, ku Petori, wokhala kumtsinje, wa dziko la anthu a mtundu wace, kuti amuitane, ndi kuti, Taonani, anaturuka anthu m'dziko la Aigupto; taonani, aphimba nkhope ya dziko, nakhala popenyana ndi ine." 
Numbers22:6 Ndipo tsopano, idzatu, nunditembererere anthu awa; popeza andiposa mphamvu; kapena ndidzawalaka, kuti tiwakanthe, ndi kuti ndiwapitikitse m'dziko; pakuti ndidziwa kuti iye amene umdalitsa adalitsika, ndi iye amene umtemberera atemberereka." 
Numbers22:7 Ndipo akuru a Moabu ndi akuru a Midyani anamuka ndi mphotho za maula m'dzanja lao; anadza kwa Balamu, nanena naye mau a Balaki." 
Numbers22:8 Ndipo ananena nao, Mugone kuno usiku uno, ndidzakubwezerani mau, monga Yehova adzanena ndi ine; pamenepo mafumu a Moabu anagona ndi Balamu." 
Numbers22:9 Ndipo Mulungu anadza kwa Balamu, nati, Anthu awa ali ndi iwe ndiwo ayani?" 
Numbers22:10 Ndipo Balamu anati kwa Mulungu, Balaki mwana wa Zipori mfumu ya Moabu, anatumiza kwa ine, ndi kuti," 
Numbers22:11 Taonani, anthu awa adaturuka m'Aigupto aphimba nkhope ya dziko, idzatu unditembererere awa; kapena ndidzakhoza kulimbana nao nkhondo, ndi kuwapitikitsa." 
Numbers22:12 Koma Mulungu anati kwa Balamu, Usapita nao; usatemberera anthuwa; pakuti adalitsika." 
Numbers22:13 Ndipo Balamu anauka m'mawa, nati kwa akalonga a Balaki, Mukani ku dziko lanu; popeza Yehova andikaniza kuti ndisapite nanu," 
Numbers22:14 Pamenepo akalonga a Moabu ananyamuka, nafika kwa Balaki, nati, Alikukana Balamu kudza nafe." 
Numbers22:15 Koma Balaki anaonjeza kutumanso akalonga, ocuruka, ndi omveka koposa awa." 
Numbers22:16 Ndipo anadza kwa Balamu, nati kwa iye, Atero Balaki mwana wa Zipori, Pasakhaletu cinthu cakukuletsa kudza kwa ine;" 
Numbers22:17 popeza ndidzakucitira ulemu waukuru, ndipo zonse unena ndi ine ndidzacita; cifukwa cace idzatu, unditembererere anthu awa." 
Numbers22:18 Ndipo Balamu, anayankha nati kwa anyamata a Balaki, Cinkana Balaki andipatsa nyumba yace yodzala ndi siliva ndi golidi, sindikhoza kutumpha mau a Yehova Mulungu wanga, kucepsako kapena kuonjezako." 
Numbers22:19 Ndikupemphani, tsono, khalani pano inu usiku uno womwe; kuti ndidziwe comwe Yehova adzanenanso nane." 
Numbers22:20 Ndipo Mulungu anadza kwa Balamu usiku, nanena naye, Akadza kukuitana anthuwa, nyamuka, kumka nao, koma mau okha okha ndinena ndi iwe, ndiwo ukacite." 
Numbers22:21 Pamenepo Balamu anauka m'mawa namanga buru wace, namuka nao akalonga a ku Moabu." 
Numbers22:22 Koma anapsa mtima Mulungu cifukwa ca kupita iye, ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anadziika m'njira wotsutsana naye, Ndipo anali wokwera pa buru wace, ndi anyamata ace awiri anali naye," 
Numbers22:23 Ndipo buruyo anaona mthenga wa Yehova alikuima m'njira, ndi lupanga lace ku dzanja lace; ndi buru anapatuka m'njira, nalowa kuthengo; ndipo Balamu anampanda buru kumbwezera kunjira." 
Numbers22:24 Pamenepo mthenga wa Yehova anaima m'njira yopapatiza ya minda yampesa; mbali yina kuli linga, mbali yina linga." 
Numbers22:25 Ndipo buru anaona mthenga wa Yehova, nadzikankhira kulinga, nakanikiza phazi la Balamu kulinga; ndipo anampandanso." 
Numbers22:26 Pamenepo mthenga wa Yehova anapitiriranso, naima popapatiza, popanda popatukira kulamanja kapena kulamanzere." 
Numbers22:27 Ndipo buru wace anaona mthenga wa Yehova, nagona pansi, Balamu ali pamsana pace; ndipo Balamu adapsa mtima, nampanda buru ndi ndodo." 
Numbers22:28 Ndipo Yehova anatsegula pakamwa pace pa buru, nati uyu kwa Balamu, Ndakucitanji, kuti wandipanda katatu tsopano?" 
Numbers22:29 Pamenepo Balamu anati kwa buru, Cifukwa wandipeputsa; mukadakhala lupanga m'dzanja langa tsopano, ndikadakupha iwe." 
Numbers22:30 Ndipo buru anati kwa Balamu, Si ndine buru wako amene umayenda wokwera pa ine ciyambire ndiri wako kufikira lero lino? Kodi ndikakucitira cotere ndi kale lonse? Ndipo anati, Iai." 
Numbers22:31 Pamenepo Yehova anapenyetsa maso a Balamu, naona iye mthenga wa Yehova alikuima m'njira, lupanga losolola liri kudzanja, ndipo anawerama mutu wace, nagwa nkhope yace pansi." 
Numbers22:32 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova ananena naye, Wapandiranji buru wako katatu tsopano? taona, ndaturuka kuti nditsutsane nawe popeza njira iyi ikugwetsa camtu pamaso panga;" 
Numbers22:33 koma buru anandiona, nandipatukira nthawi izi zitatu pondiona; akadapanda kundipatukira, ndikadakupha iwe ndithu, ndi kumsunga iye wamoyo." 
Numbers22:34 Pamenepo Balamu anati kwa mthenga wa Yehova, Ndacimwa, popeza sindinadziwa kuti munaima mondiletsa m'njira; ndipo tsopano, ngati cikuipirani, ndibwerera." 
Numbers22:35 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anati kwa Balamu, Pita nao anthuwa; koma mau okha okha ndinena ndi iwe, ndiwo ukanene, Potero Balamu anamuka nao akalonga a Balaki." 
Numbers22:36 Pamene Balaki anamva kuti wafika Balamu, anamturukira kukakomana naye ku mudzi wa Moabu, wokhala m'mphepete mwa Arinoni, ndiwo ku malekezero a malire ace." 
Numbers22:37 Ndipo Balaki anati kwa Balamu, Kodi sindinatumiza kwa iwe ndithu kukakuitana? Unalekeranji kudza kwa ine? sindikhoza kodi kukucitira ulemu?" 
Numbers22:38 Ndipo Balamu anati kwa Balaki, Taonani, ndafika kwa inu; ngati ndiri nayo mphamvu konse tsopano kunena kanthu? mau amene Mulungu aike m'kamwa mwanga ndiwo ndidzanena." 
Numbers22:39 Ndipo Balamu anamuka ndi Balaki, nafika iwo ku Kiriyati Huzoti." 
Numbers22:40 Pamenepo Balaki anapha ng'ombe ndi nkhosa, natumizira Balamu, ndi akalonga okhala naye." 
Numbers22:41 Ndipo kunali kuti m'mawa, Balaki anatenga Balamu, nakwera nave ku misanje ya Baala, ndi kumeneko anaona malekezero a anthuwo." 
Numbers23:1 Ndipo Balamu anati kwa Balaki, Ndimangireni kuno maguwa a nsembe asanu ndi awiri, nimundikonzere kuno ng'ombe zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi nkhosa zamphongo zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
Numbers23:2 Ndipo Balaki anacita monga Balamu ananena; ndipo Balaki ndi Balamu anapereka pa guwa la nsembe liri lonse ng'ombe ndi nkhosa yamphongo. 
Numbers23:3 Ndipo Balamu anati kwa Balaki, Imani pa nsembe yopsereza yanu, ndipite ine, kapena Yehova akadza kukomana ndi ine; ndipo cimene akandionetsa ine ndidzakufotokozerani. Ndipo anapita pamsanje poyera," 
Numbers23:4 Pamenepo Mulungu anakomana ndi Balamu; ndipo ananena ndi iye, Ndakonza maguwa a nsembe asanu ndi awiri, ndipo ndapereka ng'ombe ndi nkhosa yamphongo pa guwa la nsembe liri lonse." 
Numbers23:5 Ndipo Yehova anaika mau m'kamwa mwa Balamu, nati, Bwerera kwa Balaki, nukanene cakuti cakuti." 
Numbers23:6 Ndipo anabwerera kwa iye, ndipo, taonani, analikuima pa nsembe yopsereza yace, iye ndi akalonga onse a Moabu." 
Numbers23:7 Ndipo ananena fanizo lace, nati, Ku Aramu ananditenga Balaki, Mfumu ya Moabu ananditenga ku mapiri a kum'mawa; Idza, udzanditembererere Yakobo. Idza, nudzanyoze Israyeli." 
Numbers23:8 Ndidzatemberera bwanji amene Mulungu sanamtemberera? Ndidzanyoza bwanji, amene Yehova sanamnyoza?" 
Numbers23:9 Pakuti, pokhala pamwamba pa matanthwe ndimpenya, Pokhala pa zitunda ndimuyang'ana; Taonani, ndiwo anthu akukhala paokha. Osadziwerengera pakati pa amitundu ena," 
Numbers23:10 Adzawerenga ndani pfumbi la Yakobo, Kapena kuwerenga limodzi la magawo anai la Israyeli? Ndipo ine ndife monga amafa aongoka mtima, Citsiriziro canga cifanane naco cace!" 
Numbers23:11 Pamenepo Balaki anati kwa Balamu, Wandicitiranji? Ndinakutenga utemberere adani anga, ndipo taona, wawadalitsa ndithu." 
Numbers23:12 Ndipo anayankha nati, Cimene aciika m'kamwa mwanga Yehova, sindiyenera kodi kunena ici?" 
Numbers23:13 Ndipo Balaki anati naye, Tiyetu, upite nane kumalo kwina, kumene ukawaona; udzaona malekezero ao okha, osawaona onse; ndipo pokhala pamenepo ukanditembererere iwo." 
Numbers23:14 Ndipo anamuka naye ku thengo la Zofimu, pamwamba pa Pisiga, namangako maguwa a nsembe asanu ndi awiri, napereka ng'ombe ndi nkhosa pa guwa la nsembe liri lonse." 
Numbers23:15 Ndipo anati kwa Balaki, Imani pano pa nsembe yopsereza yanu, ndipite ine ndikakomane ndi iye uko." 
Numbers23:16 Ndipo Yehova anakomana naye Balamu, naika mau m'kamwa mwace, nati, Bwerera kwa Balaki, nukanene cakuti cakuti." 
Numbers23:17 Ndipo anadza kuli iye, ndipo taona, analikuima pa nsembe yace yopsereza, ndi akalonga a Moabu pamodzi naye. Ndipo Balaki anati kwa iye, Wanenanji Yehova?" 
Numbers23:18 Ndipo ananena fanizo lace, nati, Ukani, Balaki, imvani; Ndimvereni, mwana wa Zipori;" 
Numbers23:19 Mulungu sindiye munthu, kuti aname; Kapena mwana wa munthu, kuti aleke; Kodi anena, osacita?" 
Numbers23:20 Kapena kulankhula, osacitsimikiza? Taonani, ndalandira mau akudalitsa, Popeza iye wadalitsa, sinditha kusintha." 
Numbers23:21 Sayang'anira mphulupulu iri m'Yakobo, Kapena sapenya kupulukira kuli m'lsrayeli. Yehova Mulungu wace ali ndi iye, Ndi mpfuu wa mfumu uli pakati pao," 
Numbers23:22 Mulungu awaturutsa m'Aigupto; Mphamvu yace ikunga ya njati. 
Numbers23:23 Pakuti palibe nyanga pakati pa Yakobo, Kapena ula mwa Israyeli; Pa nyengo yace adzanena kwa Yakobo ndi Israyeli, Cimene Mulungu acita." 
Numbers23:24 Taonani, anthuwo auka ngati mkango waukazi, Nadzitukumula ngati mkango waumuna: Sugonansokufikira utadya nyama yogwira, Utamwa mwazi wa zophedwa." 
Numbers23:25 Ndipo Balaki anati kwa Balamu, Usawatemberera konse, kapena kuwadalitsa konse." 
Numbers23:26 Koma Balamu anayankha nati kwa Balaki, Sindinakuuzani ndi kuti, Ciri conse acinena Yehova, comweco ndizicita?" 
Numbers23:27 Ndipo Balaki anati kwa Balamu, Tiyetu, ndimuke nawe kumalo kwina; kapena kudzakomera pamaso pa Mulungu kuti unditembererere iwo pokhala kumeneko." 
Numbers23:28 Ndipo Balaki anamka naye Balamu pamwamba pa Peori, popenyana ndi cipululu." 
Numbers23:29 Ndipo Balamu anati kwa Balaki, Mundimangire pano maguwa a nsembe asanu ndi awiri, nimundikonzere pano ng'ombe zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi nkhosa zamphongo zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
Numbers23:30 Ndipo Balaki anacita monga adanena Balamu, napereka ng'ombe ndi nkhosa yamphongo pa guwa la nsembe liri laose." 
Numbers24:1 Pamene Balamu anaona kuti kudakomera pamaso pa Yehova kudalitsa Israyeli, sanamuka, monga nthawi zija zina, ku nyanga zolodzera, koma anayang'ana nkhope yace kucipululu." 
Numbers24:2 Ndipo Balamu anakweza maso ace, naona Israyeli alikukhala monga mwa mafuko ao; ndipo mzimu wa Mulungu unadza pa iye." 
Numbers24:3 Pamenepo ananena fanizo lace, nati, Balamu mwana wa Beori anenetsa, Ndi munthuyo anatsinzina maso anenetsa;" 
Numbers24:4 Wakumva mau a Mulungu anenetsa, Wakuona masomphenya a Wamphamvuyonse, Wakugwa pansi maso ace openyuka:" 
Numbers24:5 Ha! mahema ako ngokoma, Yakobo; Zokhalamo zako, Israyeli!" 
Numbers24:6 Ziyalika monga zigwa, Monga minda m'mphepete mwanyanja, Monga khonje waoka Yehova, Monga mikungudza m'mphepete mwa madzi." 
Numbers24:7 Madzi adzayenda naturuka m'zotungira zace, Ndi mbeu zace zidzakhala ku madzi ambiri, Ndi mfumu yace idzamveka koposa Agagi, Ndi ufumu wace udzamveketsa." 
Numbers24:8 Mulungu amturutsa m'Aigupto; Ali nayo mphamvu yonga ya njati; Adzawadya amitundu, ndiwo adani ace. Nadzaphwanya mafupa ao, Ndi kuwapyoza ndi mibvi yace." 
Numbers24:9 Anaunthama, nagona pansi ngati mkango, Ngati mkango waukazi; adzamuutsa ndani? Wodalitsika ali yense wakudalitsa iwe, Wotemberereka ali yense wakutemberera iwe." 
Numbers24:10 Pamenepo Balaki anapsa mtima pa Balamu, naomba m'manja; ndipo Balaki anati kwa Balamu, Ndinakuitana kutemberera adani ansa, ndipo unawadalitsa ndithu katatu tsopano." 
Numbers24:11 Cifukwa cace thawira ku malo ako tsopano; ndikadakucitira ulemu waukuru; koma, taona, Yehova wakuletsera ulemu." 
Numbers24:12 Ndipo Balamu anati kwa Balaki, Kodi sindinauzanso amithenga anu amene munawatumiza kwa ine, ndi kuti," 
Numbers24:13 Cinkana Balaki akandipatsa nyumba yace yodzala ndi siliva ndi golidi, sindikhoza kutumpha mau a Yehova, kucita cokoma kapena coipa ine mwini wace; conena Yehova ndico ndidzanena ine?" 
Numbers24:14 Ndipo tsopano, taonani, ndimuka kwa anthu a mtundu wanga; tiyeni, ndidzakulangizani, ndi kukuuzani zimene anthu awa adzacitira anthu anu, masiku otsiriza." 
Numbers24:15 Ndipo ananena fanizo lace, nati, Balamu mwana wa Beori anenetsa, Ndi munthu wotsinzina masoyo anenetsa;" 
Numbers24:16 Anenetsa wakumva mau a Mulungu, Ndi kudziwa nzeru ya Wam'mwambamwamba, Wakuona masomphenya a Wamphamvuyonse, Wakugwa pansi wopenyuka maso;" 
Numbers24:17 Ndimuona, koma tsopano ai; Ndimpenya, koma si pafupi ai; Idzaturuka nyenyezi m'Yakobo, Ndi ndodo yacifumu idzauka m'Israyeli, Nidzakantha malire a Moabu, Nidzapasula ana onse a Seti," 
Numbers24:18 Ndi Edomu adzakhala ace ace, Seiri lomwe lidzakhala lace lace, ndiwo adani ace;" 
Numbers24:19 Koma Israyeli adzacita zamphamvu. Ndipo wina woturuka m'Yakobo adzacita ufumu; Nadzapasula otsalira m'mudzi. 
Numbers24:20 Ndipo anayang'ana ku Amaleki, nanena fanizo lace, nati, Amaleki ndiye woyamba wa amitundu; Koma citsiriziro cace, adzaonongeka ku nthawi zonse." 
Numbers24:21 Ndipo anayang'ana Akeni, nanena fanizo lace, nati, Kwanu nkokhazikika, Wamanga cisa cako m'thanthwe." 
Numbers24:22 Koma Kaini adzaonongeka, Kufikira Asuri adzakumanga nsinga." 
Numbers24:23 Ndipo ananena fanizo lace, nati, Ha! adzakhala ndi moyo ndani pakucita ici Mulungu?" 
Numbers24:24 Koma zombo zidzafika kucokera ku doko la Kitimu, Ndipo adzasautsa Asuri, nadzasautsa Ebere, Koma iyenso adzaonongeka." 
Numbers24:25 Ndipo Balamu anauka, namuka nabwerera kumalo kwace; ndi Balaki yemwe anamka njira yace." 
Numbers25:1 Ndipo Israyeli anakhala m'Sitimu, ndipo anthu anayamba kucita cigololo ndi ana akazi a Moabu;" 
Numbers25:2 popeza anaitana anthuwo adze ku nsembe za milungu yao; ndipo anthuwo anadya, nagwadira milungu yao." 
Numbers25:3 Pamene Israyeli anaphatikana ndi Baala Peori, Mulungu anapsa mtima pa Israyeli." 
Numbers25:4 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Gwira akuru onse a anthu nuwapacikire Yehova, pali dzuwa poyera, kuti mkwiyo waukali wa Yehova ucoke kwa Israyeli." 
Numbers25:5 Ndipo Mose anati kwa oweruza a Israyeli, Iphani, yense anthu ace adapatikanawo ndi Baala-Peori." 
Numbers25:6 Ndipo, taonani, anadza wina wa ana a Israyeli, nabwera naye mkazi Mmidyani kudza naye kwa abale ace, pamaso pa Mose, ndi pamaso pa khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli, pakulira iwo pa khomo la cihema cokomanako." 
Numbers25:7 Pamene Pinehasi mwana wa Eleazara, mwana wa Aroni wansembe, anaciona, anauka pakati pa khamu, natenga nthungo m'dzanja lace;" 
Numbers25:8 natsata munthu M-israyeli m'hema, nawamoza onse awiri, munthu M-israyeli ndi mkaziyo m'mimba mwace. Pamenepo mliri unaletseka kwa ana a Israyeli." 
Numbers25:9 Ndipo akufa nao mliri ndiwo zikwi makumi awiri ndi zinai. 
Numbers25:10 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers25:11 Pinehasi mwana wa Eleazara, mwana wa Aroni wansembe, wabweza kuzaza kwanga pa ana a Israyeli, popeza anacita nsanje ndi nsanje yanga pakati pao, kotero kuti sindinawatha ana a Israyeli m'nsanje yanga." 
Numbers25:12 Cifukwa cace nena, Taonani, ndimpatsa iye pangano langa la mtendere;" 
Numbers25:13 ndipo lidzakhala kwa iye, ndi kwa mbeu zace zakumtsata pangano la unsembe wosatha, popeza anacita nsanje cifukwa ca Mulungu wace, anawacitira ana a Israyeli cowatetezera." 
Numbers25:14 Koma dzina la M-israyeli adamuphayo, ndiye amene adamupha pamodzi ndi mkazi Mmidyani, ndiye Zimiri mwana wa Salu, mfumu ya nyumba va makolo mwa Asimeoni." 
Numbers25:15 Ndi dzina la mkazi Mmidyani adamuphayo ndiye Kozibi mwana wamkazi wa Zuri; ndiye mkuru wa anthu a nyumba ya makolo m'Midyani. 
Numbers25:16 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Numbers25:17 Sautsa Amidyani ndi kuwakantha; 
Numbers25:18 popeza akusautsani ndi manyengo ao amene anakunyengani nao; m'cija ca Peori, ndi ca Kozibi, mwana wamkazi wa kalonga wa ku Midyani, mlongo wao, amene adamupha tsiku la mliri, m'cija ca Peori." 
Numbers26:1 Ndipo kunali, utatha mliriwo, Yehova ananena ndi Mose ndi Eleazara mwana wa Aroni wansembe, nati," 
Numbers26:2 Werenga khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, onse akuturukira kunkhondo m'Israyeli." 
Numbers26:3 Pamenepo Mose ndi Eleazara wansembe ananena nao m'zidikha za Moabu pa Yordano kufupi ku Yeriko, ndi kuti," 
Numbers26:4 Awawerenge kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu; monga Yehova anawauza Mose ndi ana a Israyeli, amene adaturuka m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Numbers26:5 Rubeni, ndiye woyamba kubadwa wa Israyeli; ana amuna a Rubeni ndiwo: Hanoki, ndiye kholo la banja la Ahanoki; Palu, ndiye kholo la banja la Apalu;" 
Numbers26:6 Hezeroni, ndiye kholo la banja la Ahezeroni; Karimi, ndiye kholo la banja la Akarimi." 
Numbers26:7 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Arubeni; owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zitatu kudza mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu makumi atatu," 
Numbers26:8 Mwana wamwamuna wa Palu ndiye Eliyabu. 
Numbers26:9 Ndi ana a Eliyabu: Nemueli, ndi Datani ndi Abiramu. Iwo ndiwo Datani ndi Abiramu omwe aja oitanidwa a khamu, amene anatsutsana ndi Mose ndi Aroni mu msonkhano wa Kora, mula anatsutsana ndi Yehova;" 
Numbers26:10 ndipo dziko linayasama pakamwa pace, ndi kuwameza pamodzi ndi Kora, pakufa msonkhano uja; muja mote unaononga amuna mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu, nakhala iwo cizindikilo." 
Numbers26:11 Koma sanafa ana amuna a Kora. 
Numbers26:12 Ana amuna a Simeoni monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Nemueli, ndiye kholo la banja la Anemueli; Yamini, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayamini; Yakini, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayakini;" 
Numbers26:13 Zera, ndiye kholo la banja la Azera; Sauli, ndiye kholo la banja la Asauli." 
Numbers26:14 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Asimeoni, zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwirikudzamazana awiri." 
Numbers26:15 Ana amuna a Gadi monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Zefoni, ndiye kholo la banja la Azefoni; Hagi, ndiye kholo la banja la Ahagi; Suni, ndiye kholo la banja la Asuni;" 
Numbers26:16 Ozini, ndiye kholo la banja la Aozini; Eri, ndiye kholo la banja la Aeri;" 
Numbers26:17 Arodi, ndiye kholo la banja la Aarodi; Areli, ndiye kholo la banja la Aareli." 
Numbers26:18 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a ana a Gadi, monga mwa owerengedwa ao, zikwi makumi anai ndi mazana asanu." 
Numbers26:19 Ana amuna a Yuda, ndiwo Eri ndi Onani; ndipo Eri ndi Onani anamwalira m'dziko la Kanani." 
Numbers26:20 Ndipo ana a Yuda monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Sela, ndiye kholo la banja la Asela; Perezi, ndiye kholo la banja la Aperezi; Zera, ndiye kholo la banja la Azera." 
Numbers26:21 Ndipo ana a Perezi ndiwo: Hezeroni, ndiye kholo la banja la Ahezeroni; Hamuli, ndiye kholo la banja la Ahamuli." 
Numbers26:22 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Yuda monga mwa owerengedwa ao, zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu zisanu ndi cimodzi kudza mazana asanu." 
Numbers26:23 Ana amuna a Isakara monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Tola, ndiye kholo la banja la Atola; Puva, ndiye kholo la banja la Apuni;" 
Numbers26:24 Yasubi, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayasubi; Simironi, ndiye kholo la banja la Asimironi." 
Numbers26:25 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Isakara monga mwa owerengedwa ao; zikwi makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu zinai kudza mazana atatu. 
Numbers26:26 Ana amuna a Zebuloni monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Seredi, ndiye kholo la banja la Aseredi; Eloni, ndiye kholo la banja la Aeloni; Yahaliyeli, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayahaliyeli." 
Numbers26:27 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Zebuloni monga mwa owerengedwa ao, zikwi makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu mazana asanu." 
Numbers26:28 Ana amuna a Yosefe monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Manase ndi Efraimu. 
Numbers26:29 Ana a Manase ndiwo: Makiri, ndiye kholo la banja la Amakiri; ndipo Makiri anabala Gileadi; ndiye kholo la banja la Agileadi," 
Numbers26:30 Ana a Gileadi ndiwo: Yezeri, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayezeri; Heleki, ndiye kholo la banja la Aheleki;" 
Numbers26:31 ndi Asiriyeli, ndiye kholo la banja la Aasiriyeli; ndi Sekemu, ndiye kholo la banja la Asekemu;" 
Numbers26:32 ndi Semida, ndiye kholo la banja la Asemida; ndi Heferi, ndiye kholo la banja la Aheferi." 
Numbers26:33 Ndipo Tselofekadi mwana wa Heferi analibe ana amuna, koma ana akazi ndiwo; ndipo maina a ana akazi a Tselofekadi ndiwo Mala ndi Nowa, Hogila, Milika ndi Tiriza." 
Numbers26:34 Iwo ndiwo mabanja ao a Manase; ndipo owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana asanu ndi awiri. 
Numbers26:35 Ana amuna a Efraimu monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Sutela, ndiye kholo la banja la Asutela; Bekeri, ndiye kholo la banja la Abekeri; Tahana, ndiye kholo la banja la Atahana." 
Numbers26:36 Ndipo mwana wamwamuna wa Sutela ndiye Erani, ndiye kholo la banja la Aerani." 
Numbers26:37 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a ana a Efraimu monga mwa owerengedwa ao, ndiwo zikwi makumi atatu mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana asanu. Iwo ndiwo ana amuna a Yosefe monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Numbers26:38 Ana amuna a Benjamini monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Bela, ndiye kholo la banja la Abela; Asibeli, ndiye kholo la banja la Aasibeli; Ahiramu, ndiye kholo la banja la Aahiramu;" 
Numbers26:39 Sufamu ndiye kholo la banja la Asufamu; Hufamu, ndiye kholo la banja la Ahufamu." 
Numbers26:40 Ndipo ana amuna a Bela ndiwo Aridi ndi Namani; Aridi, ndiye kholo la banja la Aaridi; Namani, ndiye kholo la banja la Anamani." 
Numbers26:41 Iwo ndiwo ana a Benjamini monga mwa mabanja ao; ndipo owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zisanu kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi.
