Numbers26:42 Mwana wamwamuna wa Dani monga mwa mabanja ace ndiye Suhamu, ndiye kholo la banja la Asuhamu. Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Dani monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Numbers26:43 Mabanja aose a Asuhamu monga mwa owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu zinai kudza mazana anai. 
Numbers26:44 Ana amuna a Aseri monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Yimna, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayimna; Yisivi, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayisivi; Beriya, ndiye kholo la banja la Aberiya." 
Numbers26:45 Ana a Beriya ndiwo: Heberi, ndiye kholo la banja la Aheberi; Malikiyeli, ndiye kholo la banja la Amalikiyeli." 
Numbers26:46 Ndipo dzina la mwana wamkazi wa Aseri ndiye Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a ana amuna a Aseri monga mwa owerengedwa ao, zikwi makumi asanu mphambu zitatu kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers26:48 Ana amuna a Nafitali monga mwa mabanja ao ndiwo: Yazeli, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayazeli; Guni, ndiye kholo la banja la Aguni;" 
Numbers26:49 Yezeri, ndiye kholo la banja la Ayezeri; Silemu, ndiye kholo la banja la Asilemu." 
Numbers26:50 Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Nafitali, monga mwa mabanja ao; ndipo owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zisanu kudza mazana anai." 
Numbers26:51 Iwo ndiwo owerengedwa ao a ana a Israyeli, zikwi mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu cimodzi kudza mazana asanu ndi awiri mphambu makumi atatu." 
Numbers26:52 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, ndi kuti," 
Numbers26:53 Dziko ligawikire iwowa monga mwa kuwerenga kwa maina, likhale colowa cao." 
Numbers26:54 Ocurukawo, uwacurukitsire colowa cao; ocepawo uwacepetsere colowa cao; ampatse yense colowa cace monga mwa owerengedwa ace." 
Numbers26:55 Koma aligawe ndi kucita maere; colowa cao cikhale monga mwa maina a mafuko a makolo ao," 
Numbers26:56 Agawire ocuruka ndi ocepa colowa cao monga mwa kucita maere. 
Numbers26:57 Ndipo awa ndi owerengedwa ao a Alevi monga mwa mabanja ao: Gerisoni, ndiye kholo la banja la Agerisoni; Kohati, ndiye kholo la banja la Akohati; Merari, ndiye kholo la banja la Amerari." 
Numbers26:58 Awa ndi mabanja a Alevi: banja la Alibini, banja la Ahebroni, banja la Amali, banja la Amusi, banja la Akohati. Ndipo Kohati anabala Amiramu." 
Numbers26:59 Ndipo dzina lace la mkazi wace wa Amiramu ndiye Yokebedi, mwana wamkazi wa Levi, wobadwira Levi m'Aigupto; ndipo iye anambalira Amiramu Aroni ndi Mose, ndi Miriamu mlongo wao." 
Numbers26:60 Ndipo Nadabu ndi Abihu, Eleazara ndi ltamara anabadwira Aroni." 
Numbers26:61 Koma Nadabu ndi Abihu adafa, muja anabwera nao moto wacilendo pamaso pa Yehova." 
Numbers26:62 Ndipo owerengedwa ao ndiwo zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zitatu, mwamuna yense wa mwezi umodzi ndi mphambu; popeza sanawerengedwa pakati pa ana a Israyeli; cifukwa sanawapatsa colowa mwa ana a Israyeli." 
Numbers26:63 Iwo ndiwo amene anawerengedwa ndi Mose ndi Eleazara wansembe, amene anawerenga ana a Israyeli m'zidikha za Moabu ku Yordano pafupi pa Yeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Koma pakati pao panalibe mmodzi wa iwo amene anawerengedwa ndi Mose ndi Aroni wansembe, amene anawerenga ana a Israyeli m'cipululu ca Sinai." 
Numbers26:65 Popeza Yehova adanena za iwowa, Adzafatu m'cipululu. Ndipo sanatsalira mmodzi wa iwowa koma Kalebi mwana wa Yefune, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni." 
Numbers27:1 Pamenepo anayandikiza ana akazi a Tselofekadi mwana wa Heferi, ndiye mwana wa Gileadi, ndiye mwana wa Makiri, ndiye mwana wamwamuna wa Manase, wa mabanja a Manase mwana wa Yosefe; ndipo maina a ana ace akazi ndiwo, Mala, Nowa, Hogila ndi Milika ndi Tiriza." 
Numbers27:2 Ndipo anaima pamaso pa Mose, ndi pamaso pa Eleazara wansembe, ndi pamaso pa akalonga, ndi khamu lonse, pakhomo pa cihema cokomanako, ndi kuti," 
Numbers27:3 Atate wathu adamwalira m'cipululu, ndipo sanakhala iye pakati pa msonkhano wa iwo akusonkhana kutsutsana ndi Yehova, mu msonkhano wa Kora; koma anafera zoipa zace zace; ndipo analibe ana amuna." 
Numbers27:4 Licotsedwerenji dzina la atate wathu pakati pa banja lace, popeza alibe mwana wamwamuna? Tipatseni dziko lathu lathu pakati pa abale a atate wathu." 
Numbers27:5 Ndipo Mose anapita nao mlandu wao pamaso pa Yehova. 
Numbers27:6 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers27:7 Ana akazi a Tselofekadi anena zaona; uwapatse ndithu colowa cikhale cao cao pakati pa abale a atate wao; nuwalandiritse colowa ca atate wao. 
Numbers27:8 Ndipo unene ndi ana a Israyeli, ndi kuti, Akafa munthu wamwamuna wopanda mwana wamwamuna, colowa cace acilandire mwana wace wamkazi." 
Numbers27:9 Ndipo akapanda kukhala naye mwana wamkazi, mupatse abale ace colowa cace." 
Numbers27:10 Ndipo akapanda kukhala nao abale, mupatse abale a atate wace colowa cace." 
Numbers27:11 Ndipo akapanda abale a atate wace, mupatse wa cibale cace woyandikizana naye wa pfuko lace colowa cace, likhale lace lace; ndipo likhale kwa ana a Israyeli lemba monga Yehova wamuuza Mose." 
Numbers27:12 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Kwera m'phiri ili la Abarimu, nupenye dziko limene ndapatsa ana a Israyeli," 
Numbers27:13 Utaliona iwenso udzaitanidwa kumka kwa anthu a mtundu wako, monga anaitanidwa Aroni mbale wako;" 
Numbers27:14 popeza munapikisana nao mau anga m'cipululu ca Zini, potsutsana nane khamulo, osandipatula Ine pa madziwo pamaso pao. Ndiwo madzi a Meriba m'Kadesi, m'cipululu ca Zini." 
Numbers27:15 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi Yehova, nati," 
Numbers27:16 Yehova, Mulungu wa mizimu ya anthu onse, aike munthu pa khamulo," 
Numbers27:17 wakuturuka pamaso pao, ndi kulowa pamaso pao, wakuwaturutsa ndi kuwalowetsa; kuti khamu la Ambuye lisakhale ngati nkhosa zopanda mbusa." 
Numbers27:18 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Utenge Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndiye munthu mwa iye muli mzimu, nuike dzanja lako pa iye;" 
Numbers27:19 numuimike pamaso pa Eleazara wansembe, ndi pamaso pa khamu lonse; numlangize pamaso pao." 
Numbers27:20 Ndipo umuikirepo ulemerero wako, kuti khamu lonse la ana a Israyeli ammvere." 
Numbers27:21 Ndipo aime pamaso pa Eleazara wansembe, amene amfunsire monga mwa ciweruzo ca Urimu pamaso pa Yehova; ponena iye azituruka, ndi ponena iye azilowa, ndi iye ndi ana onse a Israyeli pamodzi naye, ndiwo khamu lonse." 
Numbers27:22 Ndipo Mose anacita monga Yehova adamuuza; natenga Yoswa namuimitsa pamaso pa Eleazara wansembe, ndi pamaso pa khamu lonse;" 
Numbers27:23 namuikira manja ace, namlangiza monga Yehova adanena ndi dzanja la Mose." 
Numbers28:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers28:2 Uza ana a Israyeli, nuti nao, Muzisamalira kubwera naco kwa Ine copereka canga, cakudya canga ca nsembe zanga zamoto, ca pfungo lokoma, pa nyengo yace yoikika." 
Numbers28:3 Ndipo unene nao, Nsembe yamoto imene muzibwera nayo kwa Yehova ndiyi: ana a nkhosa awiri a caka cimodzi opanda cirema, tsiku ndi tsiku, nsembe yamoto yosalekeza." 
Numbers28:4 Mwana wa nkhosa mmodziyo umpereke m'mawa, ndi mwana wa nkhosa winayo umpereke madzulo;" 
Numbers28:5 ndi limodzi la magawo khumi la efa wa ufa wosalala ukhale nsembe yaufa, wosanganiza ndi limodzi la magawo anai la bini wa mafuta opera." 
Numbers28:6 Ndiyo nsembe yopsereza kosalekeza, yoikika ku phiri la Sinai, icite pfungo lokoma, nsembe yamoto ya Yehova." 
Numbers28:7 Ndi nsembe yace yothira ya mwana wa nkhosa mmodziyo ndiyo limodzi la magawo anai la bini; m'malo opatulika uthirire Yehova nsembe yothira ya cakumwa colimba. 
Numbers28:8 Ndi mwana wa nkhosa winayo umpereke madzulo; monga nsembe yaufa ya m'mawa, ndi nsembe yothira yace, umpereke; ndiyo nsembe yamoto ya pfungo lokoma la Yehova." 
Numbers28:9 Ndipo dzuwa la Sabata ana a nkhosa awiri a caka cimodzi, opanda cirema, ndi awiri a magawo khumi a efa wa ufa wosalala, ukhale nsembe yaufa, wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ndi nsembe yace yothira;" 
Numbers28:10 ndiyo nsembe yopsereza ya dzuwa la Sabata liri lonse, pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yace yothira." 
Numbers28:11 Ndipo poyamba miyezi yanu muzibwera nayo nsembe yopsereza ya Yehova: ng'ombe zamphongo ziwiri, ndi nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, ndi ana a nkhosa asanu ndi awiri a caka cimodzi opanda cirema;" 
Numbers28:12 ndi atatu a magawo khumi a efa wa ufa wosalala, ukhale nsembe yaufa, wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ndiwo wa ng'ombe iri yonse; ndi awiri a magawo khumi a ufa wosalala, ukhale nsembe yaufa, wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ndiwo wa nkhosa yamphongo imodziyo;" 
Numbers28:13 ndi limodzi la magawo khumi la ufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta, ukhale nsembe yaufa, ndiwo wa mwana wa nkhosa yense; ndiyo nsembe yopsereza ya pfungo lokoma, nsembe yamoto ya. Yehova." 
Numbers28:14 Ndipo nsembe zace zothira ndizo: limodzi la magawo khumi la bini wa vinyo ndiwo wa ng'ombe imodzi, ndi limodzi la magawo atatu la hini likhale la nkhosa yamphongo, ndi limodzi la magawo anai a hini likhale la mwana wa nkhosa; ndiyo nsembe yopsereza ya mwezi uli wonse kunena miyezi yonse ya caka." 
Numbers28:15 Ndi tonde mmodzi, akhale nsembe yaucimo ya Yehova; aikonze pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yace yothira." 
Numbers28:16 Ndipo mwezi woyamba, tsiku lakhumi ndi cinai la mwezi, pali paskha wa Yehova." 
Numbers28:17 Ndipo tsiku lakhumi ndi cisanu la mwezi uwu pali madyerero; masiku asanu ndi awiri azidya mkate wopanda cotupitsa. 
Numbers28:18 Tsiku loyamba pali kusonkhana kopatulika; musamacita nchito ya masiku ena; 
Numbers28:19 koma mubwere nayo nsembe yamoto, nsembe yopsereza ya Yehova; ng'ombe ziwiri zamphongo, ndi nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, ndi ana a nkhosa asanu ndi awiri a caka cimodzi; akhale kwa inu opanda cirema;" 
Numbers28:20 ndi nsembe yao ya ufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta; mupereke atatu a magawo khumi akhale a ng'ombe, ndi awiri a magawo khumi akhale a nkhosa yamphongo;" 
Numbers28:21 upereke limodzi la magawo khumi likhale la mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi; uzitero ndi ana a nkhosa asanu ndi awiri; 
Numbers28:22 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo, yakutetezera inu." 
Numbers28:23 Mupereke izi pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza ya m'mawa, ndiyo ya nsembe yopsereza kosalekeza." 
Numbers28:24 Momwemo mupereke cakudya ca nsembe yamoto ca pfungo lokoma la Yehova, tsiku ndi tsiku, masiku asanu ndi awiri, cakupereka pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yace yothira." 
Numbers28:25 Ndipo tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri mukhale nako kusonkhana kopatulika; musamacita nchito ya masiku ena. 
Numbers28:26 Momwemonso tsiku la zipatso zoyamba, pobwera nayo nsembe ya ufa watsopano kwa Yehova, m'madyerero anu a masabata, muzikhala nako kusonkhana kopatulika; musamacita nchito ya masiku ena." 
Numbers28:27 Pamenepo muzipereka nsembe yopsereza ya pfungo lokoma kwa Yehova; ng'ombe zamphongo ziwiri, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, ana a nkhosa asanu ndi awiri a caka cimodzi;" 
Numbers28:28 ndi nsembe yace ya ufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta, atatu a magawo khumi akhale a ng'ombe imodzi, awiri a magawo khumi akhale a nkhosa yamphongo imodzi," 
Numbers28:29 limodzi la magawo khumi likhale la mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi, momwemo ndi ana a nkhosa asanu ndi awiri;" 
Numbers28:30 tonde mmodzi wakutetezera inu. 
Numbers28:31 Mupereke izi pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yace yaufa, zikhale kwa inu zopanda cirema, ndi nsembe zace zothira." 
Numbers29:1 Ndipo mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri, tsiku loyamba la mweziwo, muzikhala nako kusonkhana kopatulika; musamacita nchito ya masiku ena; likukhalireni inu tsiku lakuliza malipenga." 
Numbers29:2 Pamenepo muzipereka nsembeyopsereza ya pfungo lokoma kwa Yehova; ng'ombe imodzi yamphongo, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, ana a nkhosa asanu ndi awiri a caka cimodzi opanda cirema;" 
Numbers29:3 ndi nsembe yao yaufa, ufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta, atatu a magawo khumi akhale a ng'ombeyo, awiri a magawo khumi akhale a nkhosa yamphongo," 
Numbers29:4 ndi limodzi la magawo khumi likhale la mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi, momwemo ndi ana a nkhosa asanu ndi awiri;" 
Numbers29:5 ndi tonde mmodzi wa nsembe yaucimo, yakutetezera inu;" 
Numbers29:6 pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza ya pamwezi, ndi nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe zace zothira, monga mwa lemba lace, zikhale za pfungo lokoma, nsembe yamoto ya Yehova." 
Numbers29:7 Ndipo tsiku la khumi la mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri uwu muzikhala nako kusonkhana kopatulika; pamenepo mudzicepetse; musamagwira nchito; 
Numbers29:8 koma mubwere nayo nsembe yopsereza kwa Yehova, ya pfungo lokoma; ng'ombe yamphongo imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, ana a nkhosa asanu ndi awiri a caka cimodzi; akhale kwa inu opanda cirema;" 
Numbers29:9 ndi nsembe yao ya ufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta, atatu a magawo khumi akhale a ng'ombe, awiri a magawo khumi akhale a nkhosa yamphongo imodziyo;" 
Numbers29:10 limodzi la magawo khumi likhale la mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi, momwemo ndi ana a nkhosa asanu ndi awiri;" 
Numbers29:11 tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo, pamodzi ndi nsembe yaucimo yotetezera, ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe zace zothira." 
Numbers29:12 Ndipo tsiku lakhumi ndi cisanu la mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri muzikhala nako kusonkhana kopatulika; musamacita nchito ya masiku ena, koma mucitire Yehova madyerero masiku asanu ndi awiri;" 
Numbers29:13 ndipo mubwere nayo nsembe yopsereza, ndiyo nsembe yamoto, ya pfungo lokoma kwa Yehova: ng'ombe zamphongo khumi ndi zitatu, nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri, ana a nkhosa khumi ndi anai, a caka cimodzi, akhale opanda cirema;" 
Numbers29:14 ndi nsembe yace yaufa wosalala wosanganiza ndi mafuta, atatu a magawo khumi akhale a ng'ombe imodzi, momwemo nazo ng'ombe khumi ndi zitatuzo, awiri a magawo khumi akhale a nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, momwemo nazo nkhosa zamphongo ziwirizo;" 
Numbers29:15 ndi limodzi la magawo khumi likhale la mwana wa nkhosa mmodzi, momwemo nao ana a nkhosa khumi ndi anai;" 
Numbers29:16 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe yace yothira." 
Numbers29:17 Ndipo tsiku laciwiri muzibwera nazo ng'ombe zamphongo khumi ndi ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri, ana a nkhosa khumi ndi anai a caka cimodzi, opanda cirema;" 
Numbers29:18 ndi nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe zace zothira, za ng'ombe, za nkhosa zamphongo, ndi za ana a nkhosa, monga mwa kuwerenga kwace, ndi kutsata lemba lace;" 
Numbers29:19 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe zace zothira." 
Numbers29:20 Ndi tsiku lacitatu ng'ombe khumi ndi imodzi, nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri, ana a nkhosa khumi ndi anai a caka cimodzi opanda cirema;" 
Numbers29:21 ndi nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe zace zothira za ng'ombe, za nkhosa zamphongo, ndi za ana a nkhosa monga mwa kuwerenga kwace, ndi kutsata lemba lace;" 
Numbers29:22 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe yace yothira." 
Numbers29:23 Ndi tsiku lacinai ng'ombe khumi, nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri, ana a nkhosa khumi ndi anai, a caka cimodzi, opanda cirema;" 
Numbers29:24 nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe zace zothira za ng'ombe, za nkhosa zamphongo, ndi za ana a nkhosa, monga mwa kuwerenga kwace, ndi kutsata lemba lace;" 
Numbers29:25 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe yace yothira." 
Numbers29:26 Ndi tsiku lacisanu ng'ombe zisanu ndi zinai, nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri, ana a nkhosa khumi ndi anai, a caka cimodzi, opanda cirema;" 
Numbers29:27 ndi nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe zace zothira, za ng'ombe, za nkhosa zamphongo, ndi za ana a nkhosa, monga mwa kuwerenga kwace, ndi kutsata lemba lace;" 
Numbers29:28 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe yace yothira." 
Numbers29:29 Ndi tsiku lacisanu ndi cimodzi ng'ombe zisanu ndi zitatu, nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri, ana a nkhosa khumi ndi anai, a caka cimodzi, opanda cirema;" 
Numbers29:30 ndi nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe zace zothira, za ng'ombe, za nkhosa zamphongo, ndi za ana a nkhosa, monga mwa kuwerenga kwace, ndi kutsata lemba lace;" 
Numbers29:31 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe yace yothira." 
Numbers29:32 Ndi tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri ng'ombe zisanu ndi ziwiri, nkhosa zamphongo ziwiri, ana a nkhosa khumi ndi anai, a caka cimodzi, opanda cirema;" 
Numbers29:33 ndi nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe zace zothira, za ng'ombe, za nkhosa yamphongo, ndi za ana a nkhosa, monga mwa kuwerenga kwace, ndi kutsata lemba lace;" 
Numbers29:34 ndi tonde mmodzi akhale nsembe yaucimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe yace yothira." 
Numbers29:35 Tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu muzikhala nalo tsiku loletsa; musamacita nchito ya masiku ena; 
Numbers29:36 koma mubwere nayo nsembe yopsereza ndiyo nsembe yamoto, ya pfungo lokoma kwa Yehova: ng'ombe imodzi, nkhosa yamphongo imodzi, ana a nkhosa asanu ndi awiri, a caka cimodzi, opanda cirema;" 
Numbers29:37 nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe zace zothira za ng'ombe, za nkhosa zamphongo, ndi za ana a nkhosa, monga mwa kuwerenga kwace, ndi kutsata lemba lace;" 
Numbers29:38 ndi tonde mmodzi wa nsembe yaucimo; pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yosalekeza, ndi nsembe yace yaufa, ndi nsembe yace yothira." 
Numbers29:39 Izi muzikonzera Yehova mu nyengo zanu zoikika, pamodzi ndi zowinda zanu, ndi zopereka zanu zaufuru, za nsembe zanu zopsereza, ndi za nsembe zanu zaufa, ndi za nsembe zanu zothira, ndi za nsembe zanu zoyamika." 
Numbers29:40 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi ana a Israyeli monga mwa zonse Yehova adamuuza Mose. 
Numbers30:1 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi akuru a mapfuko a ana a Israyeli, nati, Cinthu anacilamulira Yehova ndi ici:" 
Numbers30:2 Munthu akacitira Yehovacowinda, kapena akalumbira lumbiro ndi kumangira moyo wace codziletsa, asaipse mau ace; azicita monga mwa zonse zoturuka m'kamwa mwace." 
Numbers30:3 Ndipo mkazi akacitira Yehova cowinda, nakadzimanga naco codziletsa, pokhala ali m'nyumba ya atate wace, m'unamwali;" 
Numbers30:4 ndipo atate wace akamva cowinda cace, ndi codziletsa cace anamanga moyo wace naco, koma wakhala naye cete atate wace; pamenepo zowinda zace zonse zidzakhazikika, ndi codziletsa ciri: conse wamanga naco moyo wace cidzakhazikika." 
Numbers30:5 Koma atate wace akamletsa tsiku lakumva iye; zowinda zace zonse, ndi zodziletsa zace zonse anamanga nazo moyo wace, sizidzakhazikika; ndipo Yehova adzamkhululukira, popeza atate wace anamletsa." 
Numbers30:6 Ndipo akakwatibwa naye mwamuna, pokhala ali nazo zowinda zace, kapena zonena zopanda pace za milomo yace, zimene anamanga nazo moyo wace;" 
Numbers30:7 nakazimva mwamuna wace, nakakhala naye cete tsiku lakuzimva iye; pamenepo zowinda zace zidzakhazikika, ndi zodziletsa anamanga nazo moyo wace zidzakhazikika." 
Numbers30:8 Kama mwamuna wace akamletsa tsiku lakumva iye; pamenepo adzafafaniza cowinda cace anali naco, ndi zonena zopanda pace za milomo yace, zimene anamanga nazo moyo wace; ndipo Yehova adzamkhululukira." 
Numbers30:9 Koma cowinda ca mkazi wamasiye, kapena mkazi wocotsedwa, ziti zonse anamanga nazo moyo wace zidzamkhazikikira." 
Numbers30:10 Ndipo ngati anawinda m'nyumba ya mwamuna wace, kapena anamanga moyo wace ndi codziletsa ndi kulumbirapo," 
Numbers30:11 ndipo mwanuna wace anamva, koma anakhala naye cete osamletsa, pamenepo zowinda zace zonse zidzakhazikika, ndi zodziletsa zonse anamanga nazo moyo wace zidzakhazikika." 
Numbers30:12 Koma ngati mwamuna wace anazifafanizadi tsiku lakuzimva iye, zonse zoturuka m'milomo yace kunena za zowinda zace, kapena za codziletsa ca moyo wace sizidzakhazikika; mwamuna wace anazifafaniza; ndipo Yehova adzamkhululukira Iye." 
Numbers30:13 Cowinda ciri conse, ndi columbira ciri conse codziletsa cakucepetsa naco moyo, mwamuna wace acikhazikira, kapena mwamuna wace acifafaniza." 
Numbers30:14 Koma mwamuna wace akakhala naye cete tsiku ndi tsiku; pamenepo akhazikira zowinda zace zonse, kapena zodziletsa zace zonse, ziri pa iye; wazikhazikitsa, popeza anakhala naye cete tsikuli anazimva iye." 
Numbers30:15 Koma akazifafaniza atatha kuzimva; pamenepo adzasenza mphulupulu yace. 
Numbers30:16 Awa ndi malemba amene Yehova analamulira Mose, a pakati pa mwamuna ndi mkazi wace, pakati pa atate ndi mwana wace wamkazi, akali namwali, m'nyumba ya atate wace." 
Numbers31:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers31:2 Abwezereni cilango Amidyani cifukwa ca ana a Israyeli; utatero udzaitanidwa kumka kwa anthu a mtundu wako. 
Numbers31:3 Ndipo Mose ananena ndi anthu, nati, Adzikonzere ena mwa inu zida za nkhondo, alimbane nao Amidyani, kuwabwezera Amidyani cilango ca Yehova." 
Numbers31:4 Muwatume kunkhondo a pfuko limodzi, cikwi cimodzi, a pfuko limodzi cikwi cimodzi, atere mafuko onse a Israyeli." 
Numbers31:5 Ndipo anapereka mwa zikwi za Israyeli, a pfuko limodzi cikwi cimodzi, anthu zikwi khumi ndi ziwiri okonzekeratu ndi zankhondo." 
Numbers31:6 Ndipo Mose anawatuma a pfuko limodzi cikwi cimodzi, kunkhondo, iwowa ndi Pinehasi mwana wa Eleazara wansembe, kunkhondo, ndi zipangizo zopatulika, ndi malipenga oliza m'dzanja lace." 
Numbers31:7 Ndipo anawathira nkhondo Amidyani, monga Yehova adamuuza Mose; nawapha amuna onse." 
Numbers31:8 Ndipo anapha mafumu a Amidyani pamodzi ndi ophedwa ao ena; ndiwo Evi, ndi Rekamu, ndi Zuri, ndi Huri, ndi Reba, mafumu asanu a Amidyani; namupha Balamu mwana wa Beori ndi lupanga." 
Numbers31:9 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anagwira akazi a Amidyani, ndi ana ang'ono, nafunkha ng'ombe zao zonse, ndi zoweta zao zonse, ndi cuma cao conse." 
Numbers31:10 Ndipo anatentha ndi moto midzi yao yonse yokhalamo iwo, ndi zigono zao zonse." 
Numbers31:11 Ndipo anapita nazo zofunkha zonse, ndi zakunkhondo zonse, ndizo anthu ndi nyama." 
Numbers31:12 Ndipo anadza nao andende, ndi zakunkhondo, ndi zofunkha, kwa Mose, ndi kwa Eleazara wansembe, ndi kwa khamu la ana a Israyeli, kucigono, ku zidikha za Moabu, ziri ku Yordano pafupi pa Yeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Ndipo Mose, ndi Eleazara wansembe, ndi akalonga onse a khamulo, anaturuka kukomana nao kunja kwa cigono." 
Numbers31:14 Ndipo Mose anakwiya nao akazembe a nkhondoyi, atsogoleri a zikwi, atsogoleri a mazana, akufuma kunkhondo adaithira." 
Numbers31:15 Ndipo Mose ananena nao, Kodi mwasunga ndi moyo akazi onse?" 
Numbers31:16 Taonani, awa analakwitsa ana a Israyeli pa Yehova nilica Peoricija, monga adawapangira Balamu; kotero kuti kunali mliri m'khamu la Yehova." 
Numbers31:17 Ndipo tsono iphani amuna onse mwa anawo, iphaninso akazi onse akudziwa mwamuna mogona naye." 
Numbers31:18 Koma ana akazi onse osadziwa mwamuna mogona naye, asungeru ndi moyo akhale anu." 
Numbers31:19 Ndipo mukhale m'misasa kunja kwa cigono masiku asanu ndi awiri; ali yense adapha munthu, ndi ali yense wakukhudza wophedwa, mudziyeretse tsiku lacitatu ndi lacisanu ndi ciwiri, inu ndi andende anu." 
Numbers31:20 Muyeretse zobvala zanu zonse, zipangizo zonse zacikopa, ndi zaomba zonse za ubweya wa mbuzi, ndi zipangizo zonse zamtengo." 
Numbers31:21 Ndipo Eleazara wansembe ananena ndi ankhondo adapita kunkhondowo, Lemba la cilamuloco Yehova analamulira Mose ndi ili:" 
Numbers31:22 Golidi, ndi siliva, mkuwa, citsulo, ndolo ndi mtobvu zokha," 
Numbers31:23 zonse zakulola moto, mupititse m'moto, ndipo zidzakhala zoyera; koma muziyeretsenso ndi madzi akusiyanitsa. Koma zonse zosalola moto, muzipititse m'madzi." 
Numbers31:24 Ndipo muzitsuke zobvala zanu tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri, kuti mukhale oyera; ndipo mutatero mulowe m'cigono." 
Numbers31:25 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers31:26 Werengani zakunkhondo, ndizo anthu, ndi zoweta, iwe; ndi Eleazara wansembe, ndi akuru a nyumba za makolo za khamulo;" 
Numbers31:27 nugawe zakunkhondo pawiri; pakati pa othira nkhondo amene anaturuka kunkhondo, ndi khamu lonse." 
Numbers31:28 Ndipo usonkhetse anthu ankhondo akuturuka kunkhondo apereke kwa Yehova; munthu mmodzi mwa anthu mazana asanu, mwa ng'ombe, mwa aburu, mwa nkhosa ndi mbuzi, momwemo." 
Numbers31:29 Uzitenge ku gawo lao, ndi kuzipereka kwa Eleazara wansembe, zikhale nsembe yokweza ya Yehova." 
Numbers31:30 Ndipo ku gawo la ana a Israyeli utenge munthu mmodzi mwa anthu makumi asanu, mwa ng'ombe, mwa aburu, mwa nkhosa ndi mbuzi, mwa zoweta zonse, momwemo; nuzipereke kwa Alevi, akusunga udikiro wa kacisi wa Yehova." 
Numbers31:31 Ndipo Mose ndi Eleazara wansembe anacita monga Yehova anamuuza Mose. 
Numbers31:32 Ndipo zakunkhondo, zotsalira zofunkha zonse adazifunkha ankhondowa, ndizo nkhosa zikwi mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza zisanu," 
Numbers31:33 ndi ng'ombe zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu ziwiri," 
Numbers31:34 ndi aburu zikwi makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu cimodzi," 
Numbers31:35 ndi anthu, ndiwo akazi osadziwa mwamuna mogona naye, onse pamodzi zikwi makumi atatu ndi ziwiri." 
Numbers31:36 Ndipo limodzi la magawo awiri, ndilo gawo la iwo adaturuka kunkhondo, linafikira nkhosa zikwi mazana atatu mphambu makumi atatu kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu." 
Numbers31:37 Ndi msonkho wa Yehova wankhosa ndiwo mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu zisanu. 
Numbers31:38 Ndipo ng'ombe zidafikira zikwi makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi cimodzi; pamenepo msonkho wa Yehova ndiwo makumi asanu ndi awiri mphambu ziwiri. 
Numbers31:39 Ndipo aburu anafikira zikwi makumi atatu ndi mazana asanu; pamenepo msonkho wa Yehova ndiwo makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu mmodzi. 
Numbers31:40 Ndipo anthu anafikira zikwi khumi ndi zisanu ndi cimodzi; pamenepo msonkho wa Yehova ndiwo anthu makumi atatu mphambu awiri. 
Numbers31:41 Ndipo Mose anapereka zamsonkhozo, ndizo nsembe yokweza ya Yehova, kwa Eleazara wansembe, monga Yehova adamuuza Mose." 
Numbers31:42 Ndipo kunena za gawo la ana a Israyeli, limene Mose adalicotsa kwa anthu ocita nkhondowo," 
Numbers31:43 (ndipo gawo la khamulo ndilo nkhosa zikwi mazana atatu mphambu makumi atatu kudza zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu," 
Numbers31:44 ndi ng'ombe zikwi makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi cimodzi," 
Numbers31:45 ndi aburu zikwi makumi atatu ndi mazana asanu," 
Numbers31:46 ndi anthu zikwi khumi ndi zisanu ndi cimodzi,)" 
Numbers31:47 mwa gawolo la ana a Israyeli Mose anatenga munthu mmodzi mwa makumi asanu, ndi zoweta momwemo, nazipereka kwa Alevi, akusunga udikiro wa kacisi wa Yehova; monga Yehova adamuuza Mose." 
Numbers31:48 Pamenepo akazembe a pa ankhondo zikwi, atsogoleri a zikwi, ndi atsogoleri a mazana, anayandikiza kwa Mose;" 
Numbers31:49 nati kwa Mose, Atumiki anu anawerenga ankhondo tinali nao, ndipo sanasowa munthu mmodzi wa ife." 
Numbers31:50 Ndipo tabwera naco copereka ca Yehova, yense cimene anacipeza, zokometsera zagolidi, unyolo, zikwinjiri, mphete zosindikizira, nsapule, ndi mkanda, kucita cotetezera moyo wathu pamaso pa Yehova." 
Numbers31:51 Ndipo Mose ndi Eleazara wansembe analandira golidiyo kwa iwowo, ndizo zokometsera zonse zokonzeka." 
Numbers31:52 Ndipo golidi yense wa nsembe yokweza ya Yehova amene anapereka kwa Yehova, wofuma kwa atsogoleri a zikwi, ndi atsogoleri a mazana, ndiwo masekeli zikwi khumi ndi zisanu ndi cimodzi mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu." 
Numbers31:53 Popeza wankhondo yense anadzifunkhira yekha. 
Numbers31:54 Ndipo Mose ndi Eleazara wansembe analandira golidi kwa akuru a zikwi ndi a mazana, nalowa naye ku cihema cokomanako, cikumbutso ca ana a Israyeli pamaso pa Yehova." 
Numbers32:1 Koma ana a Rubeni ndi ana a Gadi anali nazo zoweta zambirimbiri; ndipo anapenyerera dziko la Yazeri, ndi dziko la Gileadi, ndipo taonani, malowo ndiwo malo a zoweta." 
Numbers32:2 Pamenepo ana a Gadi ndi ana a Rubeni anadza nanena ndi Mose, ndi Eleazara wansembe, ndi akalonga a khamulo, nati," 
Numbers32:3 Ataroti, ndi Diboni, ndi Yazeri, ndi Nimra, ndi Heseboni, ndi Eleyali, ndi Sebamu, ndi Nebo, ndi Beoni," 
Numbers32:4 dzikoli Yehova analikantha pamaso pa khamu la Israyeli, ndilo dziko la zoweta ndipo anyamata anu ali nazo zoweta." 
Numbers32:5 Ndipo anati, Ngati tapeza ufulu pamaso panu, mupatse anyamata anu dziko ili likhale lao lao; tisaoloke Yordano." 
Numbers32:6 Ndipo Mose anati kwa ana a Gadi ndi ana a Rubeni, Kodi abale anu apite kunkhondo, ndi inu mukhale pansi kuno?" 
Numbers32:7 Ndipo mufoketseranji mtima wa ana a Israyeli kuti asaoloke ndi kulowa dzikoli Yehova anawapatsa? 
Numbers32:8 Anatero makolo anu, muja ndinawatumiza acoke ku Kadesi Barinea kukaona dziko." 
Numbers32:9 Popeza atakwera kumka ku cigwa ca Esikolo, naona dziko, anafoketsa mtima wa ana a Israyeli, kuti asalowe dzikoli Yehova adawapatsa." 
Numbers32:10 Ndipo Yehova anapsa mtima tsiku lija, nalumbira iye, nati," 
Numbers32:11 Anthu adakwerawo kuturuka m'Aigupto, kuyambira wa zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu sadzaona dziko limene ndinalumbirira Abrahamu, ndi Isake, ndi Yakobo; popeza sananditsata Ine ndi mtima wonse;" 
Numbers32:12 koma Kalebi mwana wa Yefune, Mkenizi, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni ndiwo; popeza anatsata Yehova ndi mtima wonse." 
Numbers32:13 Ndipo Yehova anapsa mtima pa Israyeli, nawayendetsa-yendetsa m'cipululu zaka makumi anai, kufikira utatha mbadwo wonsewo udacita coipa pamaso pa Yehova." 
Numbers32:14 Ndipo taonani, mwauka m'malo mwa makolo anu, gulu la anthu ocimwa, kuonjezanso mkwiyo waukali wa Yehova pa Israyeli," 
Numbers32:15 Pakuti mukabwerera m'mbuyo kusamtsata iye, adzawasiyanso m'cipululu, ndipo mudzaononga anthu awa onse." 
Numbers32:16 Ndipo anayandikiza, nati, Tidzamangira zoweta zathu makola kuno, ndi ana athu midzi; koma ife tidzakhala okonzeka ndi kufulumira pamaso pa ana a Israyeli, kufikira tidawafikitsa kumalo kwao;" 
Numbers32:17 ndi ang'ono athu adzakhala m'midzi ya malinga cifukwa ca okhala m'dzikomo. 
Numbers32:18 Sitidzabwerera kwathu, kufikira ana a Israyeli atalandira yense colowa cace." 
Numbers32:19 Pakuti sitidzalandira pamodzi nao tsidya la Yordano, ndi m'tsogolo mwace; popeza colowa cathu tacilandira tsidya lino la Yordano kum'mawa." 
Numbers32:20 Ndipo Mose anati nao, Ngati mudzacita ici, ndi kudzikonza kunkhondo pamaso pa Yehova," 
Numbers32:21 ndi kuoloka Yordano pamaso pa Yehova okonzeka onse mwa inu, kufikira atapitikitsa adani ace pamaso pace," 
Numbers32:22 ndi dziko lagonjera Yehova; mutatero mudzabwerere, ndi kukhala osacimwira Yehova ndi Israyeli; ndipo dziko ili lidzakhala lanu lanu pamaso pa Yehova." 
Numbers32:23 Koma mukapanda kutero, taonani, mwacimwira Yehova; ndipo zindikirani kuti cimo lanu lidzakupezani." 
Numbers32:24 Dzimangireni midzi ya ana anu, ndi makola a zoweta zanu; ndipo muzicite zoturuka m'kamwa mwanu." 
Numbers32:25 Ndipo ana a Gadi ndi ana a Rubeni ananena ndi Mose, nati, Anyamata anu adzacita monga mbuyanga alamulira." 
Numbers32:26 Ana athu, akazi athu, zoweta zathu, ndi ng'ombe zathu zonse, zidzakhala komweko m'midzi ya ku Gileadi;" 
Numbers32:27 koma anyamata anu adzaoloka, yense wokonzekera ndi zankhondo pamaso pa Yehova kunkhondo, monga wanena mbuyanga." 
Numbers32:28 Pamenepo Mose anamuuza Eleazara wansembe, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndi akuru a makolo a mapfuko a ana a Israyeli za iwo." 
Numbers32:29 Ndipo Mose anati kwa iwo, Ngati ana a Gadi ndi ana a Rubeni aoloka nanu Yordano, yense wokonzekera ndi zankhondo pamaso pa Yehova, ndi dziko lagonjera inu; pamenepo muwapatse dziko la Gileadi likhale lao lao;" 
Numbers32:30 koma akapanda kuoloka nanu okonzeka, akhale nao maiko ao ao pakati pa inu m'dziko la Kanani." 
Numbers32:31 Ndipo ana a Gadi ndi ana a Rubeni anayankha, nati, Monga Yehova anati kwa anyamata anu momwemo tidzacita." 
Numbers32:32 Tidzaoloka okonzeka pamaso pa Yehova ku dziko la Kanani, koma colowa cathu cathu cikhale tsidya lino la Yordano." 
Numbers32:33 Ndipo Mose anawapatsa, ndiwo ana a Gadi, ndi ana a Rubeni ndi pfuko la hafu la Manase mwana wa Yosefe, dziko la Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, ndi dziko la Ogi mfumu ya Basana, dzikoli ndi midzi yace m'malire mwao, ndiyo midzi ya dziko lozungulirako," 
Numbers32:34 Ndipo ana a Gadi anamanga Diboni, ndi Ataroti, ndi Aroeri;" 
Numbers32:35 Ataroti Sofani, Yazeri, ndi Yogebeha;" 
Numbers32:36 ndi Beti Nimira, ndi Beti Harani: midzi ya m'malinga, ndi makola a zoweta." 
Numbers32:37 Ndipo ana a Rubeni anamanga Hesiboni, ndi Eleyali, ndi Kiriyataimu;" 
Numbers32:38 ndi Nebo, ndi Baala Meoni (nasintha maina ao), ndi Sibima; ndipo anaicha midzi adaimanga ndi maina ena." 
Numbers32:39 Ndipo ana a Makiri mwana wa Manase anamka ku Gileadi, naulanda, napitikitsa Aamori anali m'mwemo." 
Numbers32:40 Ndipo Mose anapatsa Makiri mwana wa Manase Gileadi; ndipo anakhala m'menemo. 
Numbers32:41 Ndipo Yairi mwana wa Manase anamka nalanda midzi yao, naicha Havoti Yairi. Ndipo Noba anamka nalanda Kenati, ndi miraga yace, naucha Noba, dzina lace." 
Numbers33:1 Maulendo a ana a Israyeli amene anaturuka m'dziko la Aigupto monga mwa makamu ao, ndi dzanja la Mose ndi Aroni, ndi awa." 
Numbers33:2 Ndipo Mose analembera maturukidwe ao monga mwa maulendo ao, monga mwa mau a Yehova; ndipo maulendo ao ndi awa monga mwa maturukidwe ao." 
Numbers33:3 Ndipo anacokera ku Ramese mwezi woyamba, tsiku lakhumi ndi cisanu la mwezi woyamba; atacita Paskha m'mawa mwace ana a Israyeli, anaturuka ndi dzanja lokwezeka pamaso pa Aaigupto onse," 
Numbers33:4 pamene Aaigupto ailalikuika oyamba kubadwa ao onse, amene Yehova adawakantha; Yehova adaweruzanso milungu yao." 
Numbers33:5 Ndipo ana a Israyeli macokera ku Ramese, nayenda namanga ku Sukoti." 
Numbers33:6 Nacokera ku Sukoti, nayenda namanga m'Etamu, ndiko ku malekezero a cipululu." 
Numbers33:7 Ndipo anacokera ku Etamu, nayenda nabwerera ku Pihahiroti, ndiko kutsogolo kwace kwa Baala Zefoni; namanga iwo patsogolo pa Migidoli." 
Numbers33:8 Ndipo anacokera ku Pihahiroti, naoloka pakati pa nyanja nalowa m'cipululu; nayenda ulendo wa masiku atatu m'cipululu ca Etamu, namanga m'Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Ndipo anacokera ku Mara, nayenda nafika ku Elimu, ku Elimu ndiko kuli akasupe khumi ndi awiri a madzi, ndi akanjedza makumi asanu ndi awiri; namanga iwo komweko." 
Numbers33:10 Ndipo anacokera ku Elimu, nayenda namanga ku Nyanja Yofiira." 
Numbers33:11 Nacokera ku Nyanja Yofiira, nayenda namanga m'cipululu ca Sini." 
Numbers33:12 Nacokera ku cipululu ca Sini, nayenda namanga m'Dofika." 
Numbers33:13 Nacokera ku Dofika, nayenda namanga m'Alusi." 
Numbers33:14 Nacokera ku Alusi, nayenda namanga m'Refidimu; kumeneko kunalibe madzi kuti anthu amwe." 
Numbers33:15 Ndipo anacokera ku Refidimu, nayenda namanga m'cipululu ca Sinai." 
Numbers33:16 Nacokera ku cipululu ca Sinai, nayenda namanga m'Kibiroti Hatava." 
Numbers33:17 Nacokera ku Kibiroti Hatava, nayenda namanga m'Hazeroti." 
Numbers33:18 Nacokera ku Hazeroti, nayenda namanga m'Ritima." 
Numbers33:19 Nacokera ku Ritima, nayenda namanga m'Rimoni Perezi." 
Numbers33:20 Nacokera ku Rimoni Perezi, nayenda namanga m'Libina." 
Numbers33:21 Nacokera ku Libina, nayenda namanga m'Risa." 
Numbers33:22 Nacokera ku Risa, nayenda namanga m'Kehelata." 
Numbers33:23 Nacokera ku Kehelata, nayenda namanga m'phiri la Saferi." 
Numbers33:24 Nacokera ku phiri la Saferi, nayenda namanga n'Harada." 
Numbers33:25 Nacokera ku Harada, nayenda namanga m'Makeloti." 
Numbers33:26 Nacokera ku Makeloti, nayenda namanga m'Tahata." 
Numbers33:27 Nacokera ku Tahata, nayenda namanga m'Tara." 
Numbers33:28 Nacokera ku Tara, nayenda namanga m'Mitika." 
Numbers33:29 Nacokera ku Mitika, nayenda namanga m'Hasimona." 
Numbers33:30 Nacokera ku Hasimona, nayenda namanga m'Moseroto." 
Numbers33:31 Nacokera ku Moseroto, nayenda namanga m'Bene Yaakana." 
Numbers33:32 Nacokera ku Bene Yaakana, nayenda namanga m'Hori Hagidigadi." 
Numbers33:33 Nacokera ku Hori Hagidigadi, nayenda namanga m'Yotibata." 
Numbers33:34 Nacokera ku Yotibata, nayenda namanga m'Abirona." 
Numbers33:35 Nacokera ku Abirona, nayenda namanga m'Ezioni Geberi." 
Numbers33:36 Nacokera ku Ezioni Geberi, nayenda namanga m'cipululu ca Zini (ndiko Kadesi)." 
Numbers33:37 Nacokera ku Kadesi, nayenda namanga m'phiri la Hori, ku malekezero a dziko la Edomu." 
Numbers33:38 Ndipo Aroni wansembe anakwera m'phiri la Hori pa mau a Yehova, nafa komweko, ataturuka ana a Israyeli m'dziko la Aigupto zaka makumi anai, mwezi wacisanu, tsiku loyamba la mwezi." 
Numbers33:39 Ndipo Aroni ndiye wa zaka zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri kudza zitatu pakufa iye m'phiri la Hori. 
Numbers33:40 Ndipo Mkanani, mfumu ya Aradi, wakukhala kumwela m'dziko la Kanani, anamva za kudza kwao kwa ana a Israyeli." 
Numbers33:41 Ndipo anacokera ku phiri la Hori, nayenda namanga m'Tsalimona." 
Numbers33:42 Nacokera ku Tsalimona, nayenda namanga m'Punoni." 
Numbers33:43 Nacokera ku Punoni, nayenda namanga m'Oboti." 
Numbers33:44 Nacokera ku Oboti, nayenda namanga m'iye Abarimu, m'malire a Moabu." 
Numbers33:45 Nacokera ku lyimu, nayenda namanga m'Diboni Gadi." 
Numbers33:46 Nacokera ku Diboni Gadi, nayenda namanga m'Alimoni Diblataimu." 
Numbers33:47 Nacokera ku Alimoni Diblataimu, nayenda namanga m'mapiri a Abarimu, cakuno ca Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Nacokera ku mapiri a Abarimu, nayenda namanga m'zidikhaza Moabu pa Yordano ku Yeriko," 
Numbers33:49 Ndipo anamanga pa Yordano, kuyambira ku Beti Yesimoti kufikira ku Abeli Sitimu m'zidikha za Moabu." 
Numbers33:50 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'zidikha za Moabu pa YordaBaku Yeriko, nati," 
Numbers33:51 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli, nuti nao, Mutaoloka Yordano kulowa m'dziko la Kanani," 
Numbers33:52 mupitikitse onse okhala m'dzikopamaso panu, ndi kuononga mafano ao onse a miyala, ndi kuononga mafano ao onse oyenga, ndi kupasula misanje yao yonse;" 
Numbers33:53 ndipo mulande dziko, ndi kukhala m'mwemo, pakuti ndinakupatsani inu dzikoli likhale lanu lanu." 
Numbers33:54 Ndipo mulandire dzikoli ndi kucita maere monga mwa mabanja anu; colowa cao cicurukire ocurukawo, colowa cao cicepere ocepawo; kumene maere amgwera munthu, kumeneko nkwace; mulandire colowa canu monga mwa mapfuko a makolo anu." 
Numbers33:55 Koma mukapanda kupitikitsa okhala m'dziko pamaso panu, pamenepo iwo amene muwalola atsale adzakhala ngati zotwikira m'maso mwanu, ndi minga m'mbali zanu, nadzakubvutani m'dziko limene mukhalamo." 
Numbers33:56 Ndipo kudzakhala kuti monga ndinayesa kucitira iwowa, ndidzakucitirani inu." 
Numbers34:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers34:2 Uza ana Israyeli, nunene nao, Mutalowa a m'dziko la Kanani, ndilo dziko logwera inu, likhale colowa canu, dziko ija Kanani monga mwa malire ace," 
Numbers34:3 dera lanu la kumwela lidzakhala locokera ku cipululu ca Zini, kutsata m'mphepete mwa Edomu, ndi malire anu a kumwela adzakhala ocokera ku malekezero a Nyanja ya Mcere kum'mawa;" 
Numbers34:4 ndi malire anu adzapinda kucokera kumwela kumka pokwera Akrabimu, ndi kupitirira ku Zini; ndi kuturuka kwace adzacokera kumwela ku Kadesi Barinea, nadzaturuka kumka ku Hazara Adara, ndi kupita kumka ku Azimoni;" 
Numbers34:5 ndipo malirewo adzapinda ku Azimoni kumka ku mtsinje wa Aigupto, ndi kuturuka kwao adzaturuka kunyanja." 
Numbers34:6 Kunena za malire a kumadzulo, nyanja yaikuru ndiyo malire anu; ndiyo malire anu a kumadzulo." 
Numbers34:7 Malire anu a kumpoto ndiwo: kuyambira ku nyanja yaikuru mulinge ku phiri la Hori: 
Numbers34:8 kucokera ku phiri la Hori mulinge polowera Hamati; ndipo kuturuka kwace kwa malire kudzakhala ku Zedadi. 
Numbers34:9 Ndipo malirewo adzaturuka kumka ku Zifironi, ndi kuturuka kwace kudzakhala ku Hazara Enani; ndiwo malire anu a kumpoto." 
Numbers34:10 Ndipo mudzilembere malire a kum'mawa ocokera ku Hazara Enani kumka ku Sefamu; 
Numbers34:11 ndi malire adzatsika ku Sefamu kumka ku Ribala, kum'mawa kwa Ayina; ndipo malire adzatsika, nadzafikira mbali ya nyanja ya Kinereti kum'mawa," 
Numbers34:12 ndi malire adzatsika ku Yordano, ndi kuturuka kwace kudzakhala ku Nyanja ya Mcere; ili ndili dziko lanu monga mwa malire ace polizinga." 
Numbers34:13 Ndipo Mose anauza ana a Israyeli, nati, Ili ndi dzikoli mudzalandira ndi kucita maere, limene Yehova analamulira awapatse mapfuko asanu ndi anai ndi hafu;" 
Numbers34:14 popeza pfuko la ana a Rubeni monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, ndi pfuko la ana a Gadi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, adalandira, ndi pfuko la hafu la Manase lalandira colowa cao;" 
Numbers34:15 mapfuko awiriwa ndi hafu adalandira colowa cao tsidya lija la Yordano ku Yeriko, kum'mawa, koturukira dzuwa." 
Numbers34:16 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers34:17 Maina a amunawo adzakugawirani dziko likhale colowa canu, ndi awa: Eleazara wansembe, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni." 
Numbers34:18 Muwatengenso akalonga, kalonga mmodzi ku pfuko limodzi, agawe dziko likhale colowa cao." 
Numbers34:19 Maina a amunawo ndiwo: wa pfuko la Yuda, Kalebi mwana wa Yefune." 
Numbers34:20 Wa pfuko la ana a Simeoni, Semuyeli mwana wa Amihudi." 
Numbers34:21 Wa pfuko la Benjamini, Elidadi mwana wa Kisiloni." 
Numbers34:22 Wa pfuko la ana a Dani, kalonga Buki mwana wa Yogili." 
Numbers34:23 Wa ana a Yosefe; wa pfuko la ana a Manase, kalonga Haniyeli mwana wa Efodi." 
Numbers34:24 Wa pfuko la ana a Efraimu, kalonga Kemuyeli mwana wa Sipitana." 
Numbers34:25 Wa pfuko la ana a Zebuloni, kalonga Elisafana mwana wa Paranaki." 
Numbers34:26 Wa pfuko la ana a Isakara, kalonga Palitiyeli mwana wa Azana." 
Numbers34:27 Wa pfuko la ana a Aseri, kalonga Ahihudi mwana wa Selomi." 
Numbers34:28 Wa pfuko la ana a Nafitali, kalonga Pedaheli mwana wa Amihudi." 
Numbers34:29 Iwo ndiwo amene Yehova analamulira agawire ana a Israyeli colowa cao m'dziko la Kanani. 
Numbers35:1 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose m'zidikha za Moabu, pa Yordano, ku Yeriko, ndi kuti," 
Numbers35:2 Uza ana a Israyeli, kuti apatseko Alevi colowa cao cao, midzi yokhalamo; muwapatsenso Alevi mabusa akuzungulira midzi." 
Numbers35:3 Ndipo midzi ndiyo yokhalamo iwowa; ndi mabusa akhale a ng'ombe zao, ndi zoweta zao, inde nyama zao zonse." 
Numbers35:4 Ndipo mabusa a midziyo, imene muipereke kwa Alevi ndiwo a mikono cikwi cimodzi kuyambira kulinga kufikira kunja." 
Numbers35:5 Ndipo muyese kunja kwa mudzi, mbali ya kum'mawa mikono zikwi ziwiri, ndi mbali ya kumwela mikono zikwi ziwiri, ndi mbali ya kumadzulo mikono zikwi ziwiri, ndi mbali ya kumpoto mikono zikwi ziwiri; ndi mudziwo pakati; ndiwo mabusa a kumidzi." 
Numbers35:6 Ndipo midziyo muipereke kwa Alevi ndiyd midzi ija isanu ndi umodzi yopulumukirako; imene muipereke kuti wakupha mnzace athawireko; ndipo pamodzi ndi iyi muperekenso midzi makumi anai ndi iwiri. 
Numbers35:7 Midzi yonse muipereke kwa Alevi ndiyo midzi makumi anai ndi isanu ndi itatu, iyo pamodzi ndi mabusa ao." 
Numbers35:8 Ndipo kunena za midziyo muiperekeyo yao yao ya ana a Israyeli, okhala nayo yambiri mutengeko yambiri; okhala nayo pang'ono mutengeko pang'ono; onse operekako midzi yao kwa Alevi monga mwa colowa cao adacilandira." 
Numbers35:9 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose, nati," 
Numbers35:10 Nenandi ana a Israyeli, nuti nao, Pakuoloka inu Yordano kulowa m'dziko la Kanani," 
Numbers35:11 muikire midzi ikukhalireni midzi yopulumukirako; kuti wakupha mnzace wosati dala athawireko. 
Numbers35:12 Ndipo midziyo ikukhalireni yakupulumuka wolipsa; kuti wakupha mnzace asafe, kufikira ataima pamaso pa msonkhano amweruze." 
Numbers35:13 Ndipo midziyo muipereke ikukhalireni midzi isanu ndi umodzi yopulumukirako. 
Numbers35:14 Mupereke midzi itatu tsidya lino la Yordano, ndi midzi itatu mupereke m'dziko la Kanani, ndiyo yopulumukirako." 
Numbers35:15 Midzi isanu ndi umodzi imene ndiyo yopulumukirako ana a Israyeli, ndi mlendo, ndi wokhala pakati pao; kuti ali yense adamupha munthu osati dala athawireko." 
Numbers35:16 Koma akamkantha ndi cipangizo cacitsulo, kuti wafa, ndiye wakupha munthu; wakupha munthu nayenso amuphe ndithu." 
Numbers35:17 Kapena akamkantha m'dzanja muli mwala, wakufetsa munthu, ndipo wafa, ndiye wakupha munthu; wakupha munthu nayenso amuphe ndithu." 
Numbers35:18 Kapena akamkantha m'dzanja muli cipangizo camtengo, cakufetsa munthu, ndipo wafa, ndiye wakupha munthu; wakupha munthu nayenso amuphe ndithu." 
Numbers35:19 Wolipsa mwazi mwini wace aphe wakupha munthuyo; pakumkumika amuphe," 
Numbers35:20 Ndipo akampyoza momkwiyira, kapena kumponyera kanthu momlalira, kuti wafa;" 
Numbers35:21 kapena kumpanda ndi dzanja lace momuda, kuti wafa, womkanthayo nayenso amuphe ndithu; ndiye wakupha munthu; wolipsa mwazi aphe wakupha munthuyo pomkumika." 
Numbers35:22 Koma akampyoza modzidzimuka, osamuda, kapena kumponyera kanthu osamialira," 
Numbers35:23 kapena kumponyera mwala wakufetsa munthu, osamuona, namgwetsera uwu, kuti wafa, koma sindiye mdani wace, kapena womfunira coipa;" 
Numbers35:24 pamenepo msonkhano uziweruza pakati pa wokantha mnzaceyo ndi wolipsa mwaziyo monga mwa maweruzo awa; 
Numbers35:25 ndipo msonkhano umlanditse wakupha munthu m'dzanja la wolipsa mwazi, ndi msonkhanowo umbwezere ku mudzi wace wopulumukirako, kumene adathawirako; ndipo azikhalamo kufikira atafa mkulu wa ansembe wodzozedwa ndi mafuta opatulika." 
Numbers35:26 Koma wakupha munthu akaturuka nthawi iri yonse kulumpha malire a mudzi wace wopulumukirako kumene anathawirako; 
Numbers35:27 nakampeza wolipsa mwazi kunja kwa malire a mudzi wace wothawirako, ndipo wolipsa mwazi akapha wakupha munthu, alibe kucimwira mwazi;" 
Numbers35:28 popeza wakupha munthu akadakhala m'mudzi wace wopulumukirako kufikira atafa mkulu wa ansembe; koma atafa mkulu wa ansembe wakupha munthuyo abwere ku dziko lace lace. 
Numbers35:29 Ndipo izi zikhale kwa inu lemba la ciweruzo mwa mibadwo yanu, m'nyumba zanu zonse." 
Numbers35:30 Ali yense wakantha munthu, wakupha munthuyo aziphedwa pakamwa pa mboni; koma mboni ya munthu mmodzi isafikire kuti munthu afe." 
Numbers35:31 Musamalandira dipo lakuombola moyo wa iye adapha munthu, naparamula imfa; koma aziphedwa ndithu." 
Numbers35:32 Musamalandira dipo lakuombola iye amene adathawira ku mudzi wace wopulumukirako, kuti abwerenso kukhala m'dziko, kufikira atafa wansembe." 
Numbers35:33 Ndipo musamaipsa dziko muli m'mwemo; popeza mwazi uipsa dziko; pakuti kulibe kutetezera dziko cifukwa ca mwazi anaukhetsa m'mwemo, koma ndi mwazi wa iye anaukhetsa ndiwo." 
Numbers35:34 Usamadetsa dziko ukhala m'mwemo, limene ndikhalitsa pakati pace; popeza Ine Yehova ndikhalitsa pakati pa ana a Israyeli." 
Numbers36:1 Ndipo akuru a makolo a mabanja a ana a Gileadi, mwana wa Makiri, mwana wa Manase, wa mabanja a ana a Yosefe, anayandikiza, nanena pamaso pa Mose, ndi pamaso pa akalonga, ndiwo akuru a makolo a ana a Israyeli;" 
Numbers36:2 nati, Yehova analamulira mbuye wanga mupatse ana a Israyeli dzikoli mocita maere likhale colowa cao; ndipo Yehova analamulira mbuye wathu mupatse ana ace akazi colowa ca Tselofekadi mbale wathu." 
Numbers36:3 Ndipo akakwatibwa nao ana amuna a mapfuko ena a ana a Israyeli, acicotse colowa cao ku colowa ca makolo athu, nacionjeze ku colowa ca pfuko limene adzakhalako; cotero acicotse ku maere a colowa cathu." 
Numbers36:4 Ndipo pofika caka coliza ca ana a Israyeli adzaphatikiza colowa cao ku colowa ca pfuko limene akhalako; cotero adzacotsa colowa cao ku colowa ca pfuko la makolo athu. 
Numbers36:5 Ndipo Mose analamulira ana a Israyeli monga mwa mau a Yehova, nati, Pfuko la ana a Yosefe linena zaona." 
Numbers36:6 Colamulira Yehova za ana akazi a Tselofekadi ndi ici, kuti, Akwatibwe nao amene afuna eni ace; komatu akwatibwe nao a banja la pfuko la makolo ao okha okha." 
Numbers36:7 Motero colowa ca ana a Israyeli sicidzamka m'pfuko m'pfuko; popeza ana a Israyeli adzamamatira yense ku colowa ca pfuko la makolo ace. 
Numbers36:8 Ndipo mwana wamkazi yense wa mapfuko a ana a Israyeli, wakukhala naco colowa, akwatibwe ndi wina wa banja la pfuko la kholo lace, kuti ana a Israyeli akhale naco yense colowa ca makolo ace." 
Numbers36:9 Motero colowa ca ana a Israyeli sicidzamka m'pfuko m'pfuko, pakuti mapfuko a ana a Israyeli adzamamatira lonse ku colowa cace cace." 
Numbers36:10 Monga Yehova adalamulira Mose, momwemo ana akazi a Tselofekadi anacita;" 
Numbers36:11 popeza Mala, Tiriza, ndi Hogila, ndi Milika, ndi Nowa, ana akazi a Tselofekadi, anakwatibwa ndi ana amuna a abale a atate wao." 
Numbers36:12 Anakwatibwa mwa mabanja a ana a Manase mwana wa Yosefe; ndipo colowa cao dnakhala m'pfuko la banja la atate wao. 
Numbers36:13 Awa ndi malamulo ndi maweruzo, amene Yehova analamulira ana a Israyeli ndi dzanja la Mose m'zidikha za Moabu pa Yordano ku Yeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 AWA ndi mau amene Mose ananena kwa Israyeli wonse, tsidya la Yordano m'cipululu, m'cidikha ca pandunji pa Sufu, pakati pa Parani, ndi Tofeli, ndi Labani, ndi Hazeroti, ndi Di Zahabi." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Ulendo wace wocokera ku Horebe wofikira ku Kadesi Barinea, wodzera njira ya phiri la Seiri, ndiwo wa masiku khumi ndi limodzi." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Ndipo kunali, caka ca makumi anai, mwezi wakhumi ndi umodzi, tsiku loyamba la mweziwo, Mose ananena ndi ana a Israyeli, monga mwa zonse Yehova adamlamulira awauze;" 
Deuteronomy1:4 atakantha Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, wakukhala m'Hesiboni, ndi Ogi mfumu ya Basana, wakukhala m'Asitaroti, ku Edrei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Tsidya lija la Yordano, m'dziko la Moabu, Mose anayamba kufotokozera cilamulo ici, ndi kuti." 
Deuteronomy1:6 Yehova Mulungu wathu ananena ndi ife m'Horebe, ndi kuti, Yakwanira nthawi yokhala inu m'phiri muno;" 
Deuteronomy1:7 bwererani, yendani ulendo wanu ndi kumuka ku mapiri a Aamori, ndi koyandikizana nao, kucidikha, kumapiri, ndi kunsi ndi kumwela, ndi kumphepete kwa nyanja, dziko la Akanani, ndi Lebano, kufikira nyanja yaikuru Firate." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Taonani, ndakupatsani dzikoli pamaso panu, lowani landirani dziko limene Yehova analumbirira makolo anu, Abrahamu, Isake, ndi Yakobo, kuti ili ndidzawapatsa iwo ndi mbeu zao pambuyo pao." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Ndipo muja ndinanena ndi inu, ndi kuti, Sinditha ine kukunyamulani ndekha;" 
Deuteronomy1:10 Yehova Mulungu wanu anakucurukitsani, ndipo taonani, lero mucuruka ngati nyenyezi za kumwamba." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu, acurukitsire ciwerengero canu calero ndi cikwi cimodzi, nakudalitseni monga iye ananena nanu!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Ndikasenza bwanji ndekha kupsinya kwanu, ndi katundu wanu, ndi kulimbana kwanu?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Dzifunireni amuna anzeru, ndi ozindikira bwino, ndi odziwika mwa mafuko anu, ndipo ndidzawaika akhale akuru anu." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Pamenepo munandiyankha ndi kuti, Mau mwanenawa ndi abwino kuwacita." 
Deuteronomy1:15 Potero ndinatenga akuru a mapfuko anu, amuna anzeru, ndi odziwika, ndi kuwaika akhale akuru anu, atsogoleri a zikwi, ndi atsogoleri a mazana, ndi atsogoleri a makumi asanu, ndi atsogoleri a makumi, ndi akapitao, a mapfuko anu." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Ndipo ndinauza oweruza anu muja, ndi kuti, Mverani milandu ya pakati pa abale anu, ndi kuweruza kolungama pakati pa munthu ndi mbale wace, ndi mlendo wokhala naye." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Musamasamalira munthu poweruza mlandu; ang'ono ndi akuru muwamvere m'modzimodzi; musamaopa nkhope ya munthu; popeza ciweruzo nca Mulungu; ndipo mlandu ukakulakani mubwere nao kwa ine, ndidzaumva." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Ndipo ndinakuuzani muja zonse muyenera kuzicita. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Pamenepo tinayenda ulendo kucokera ku Horebe, ndi kubzyola m'cipululu cacikuru ndi coopsa ciija conse munacionaci, pa njira ya ku mapiri a Aamori, monga Yehova Mulungu wathu anatiuza; ndipo tinadza ku Kadesi Barinea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ndipo ndinati kwa inu, Mwafikira mapiri a Aamori, amene Yehova Mulungu wathu atipatsa." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Taonani, Yehova Mulungu wanu wapatsa dzikoli pamaso panu; kwerakoni, landirani, monga Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu, wanena ndi inu; musamacita mantha, musamatenga nkhawa." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Ndipo munayandikiza kwa ine inu nonse, ndi kuti, Titumize amuna atitsogolere, kuti akatizondere dziko ndi kutibwezera mau akunena za njira ya kukwera nayo ife pomka komweko, ndi za midzi yoti tidzafikako." 
Deuteronomy1:23 Ndipo cinandikomera cinthu ici; ndipo ndinatenga amuna khumi ndi awiri ainu, pfuko limodzi mwamuna mmodzi;" 
Deuteronomy1:24 amenewa anatembenuka nakwera kumapiri nalowa ku cigwa ca Esikolo, nacizonda." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Ndipo anatengako zipatso za dzikoli m'manja mwao, natsikira nazo kwa ife, natibwezera mau ndi kuti, Dzikoli Yehova Mulungu wathu atipatsa ndi labwino." 
Deuteronomy1:26 Koma simunafuna kukwerako, ndipo munapikisana nao mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Ndipo munadandaula m'mahema mwanu, ndi kuti, Popeza anatida Yehova, iye anatiturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto, kutipereka m'manja mwa Aamori, ationonge." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Tikwere kuti? abale athu atimyukitsa mitima yathu, ndi kuti, Anthuwo ndiwo akulu ndi atali akuposa ife; midzi ndi yaikulu ndi ya malinga ofikira m'mwamba: tinaonakonso ana a Anaki." 
Deuteronomy1:29 Pamenepo ndinati kwa inu, Musamaopsedwa, musamacita mantha nao." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Yehova Mulungu wanu wakutsogolera inu, iye adzathirira inu nkhondo, monga mwa zonse anakucitirani m'Aigupto pamaso panu;" 
Deuteronomy1:31 ndi kucipululu, kumene munapenya kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu anakunyamulani, monga anyamula mwana wace wamwamuna, m'njira monse munayendamo, kufikira mutalowa m'malo muno." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Koma m'cinthu ici simunakhulupirira Yehova Mulungu wanu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 amene anakutsogolerani m'njira, kukufunirani malo akumanga mahema anu ndi mota usiku, kukuonetserani njira yoyendamo inu, ndi mumtambo usana." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Ndipo Yehova anamva mau a kunena kwanu, nakwiya, nalumbira, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy1:35 Palibe mmodzi wa anthu awa a mbadwo uno woipa adzaona dziko lokomalo ndinalumbira kupatsa makolo anuli. 
Deuteronomy1:36 Koma Kalebi mwana wa Yefune, iye adzaliona; ndidzampatsa iye dziko limene anapondapo, ndi ana ace; popeza analimbika ndi kutsata Yehova." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Yehova anakwiya ndi inenso cifukwa ca inu, ndi kuti, lwenso sudzalowamo." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, wakuima pamaso pako, iye adzalowamo; umlimbitse mtima; popeza iye adzalandiritsa Israyeli." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Ndipo ana anu amene mudanena, Adzakhala ogulidwa, ndi ana anu osadziwa cabwino kapena coipa ndi pano, iwo adzalowamo, ndidzawapatsa iwo ili, adzalilandira ndi iwo." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Koma inu, bwererani, mukani ulendo wanu kucipululu, njira ya ku Nyanja Yofiira." 
Deuteronomy1:41 Pamenepo munayankha ndi kunena ndi ine, Tacimwira Yehova, tidzakwera ndi kuthira mkhondo monga mwa zonse Yehova Mulungu wathu atiuza. Ndipo munadzimangira munthu yense zida zace za nkhondo, nimunakonzeka kukwera kumka kumapiri." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Koma Yehova anati kwa ine, Nena nao, Musakwerako, kapena kuthira nkhondo; popeza sindiri pakati panu; angakukantheni adani anu." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Pamene ndinanena ndi inu simunamvera; koma munatsutsana nao mau a Yehova ndi kucita modzikuza, nimunakwera kumka kumapiri." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Ndipo Aamori, akukhala m'mapiri muja, anaturuka kukomana ndi inu, nakupitikitsani, monga zimacita njuci, nakukanthani m'Seiri, kufikira ku Horima." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Ndipo munabwerera ndi kulira pamaso pa Yehova; koma Yehova sanamvera mau anu, kapena kukucherani khutu." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Potero munakhala m'Kadesi masiku ambiri, monga mwa masiku munakhalako." 
Deuteronomy2:1 Pamenepo tinabwerera, ndi kuyenda kumka kucipululu, kutsata njira ya Nyanja Yofiira, monga Yehova adanena ndi ine; ndipo tinapaza phiri la Seiri masiku ambiri." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi ine, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy2:3 Yakwanira nthawi yakupaza inu phiri ili; tembenukani kumka kumpoto," 
Deuteronomy2:4 Ndipo uuze anthu, ndi kuti, Mukapite kubzyola malire a abale anu, ana a Bsau okhala m'Seiri; ndipo adzakuopani; mucenjere ndithu;" 
Deuteronomy2:5 musalimbana nao; popeza sindikupatsakoni dziko lao, pangakhale popondapo phazi lanu ai pakuti ndapatsa Bsau phiri la Seiri likhale lace lace." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Mugulane nao cakudya ndi ndarama, kuti mudye; mugulane naonso madzi kuti mumwe." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu anakudalitsani mu nchito zonse za manja anu; anadziwa kuyenda kwanu m'cipululu ici cacikuru; zaka izi makumi anai Yehova Mulungu wanu anakhala ndi inu; simunasowa kanthu. 
Deuteronomy2:8 Potero tinapitirira abale athu, ana a Bsau okhala m'Seiri, njira ya cidikha, ku Elati ndi ku Ezioni Geberi." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Pamenepo tinatembenuka ndi kudzera njira ya cipululu ca Moabu. Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Usabvuta Moabu, kapena kuutsana naye nkhondo; popeza sindidzakupatsako dziko lace likhale lako lako; pakuti ndinapatsa ana a Loti Ari likhale lao lao." 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Aemi anakhalamo kale, ndiwo anthu akuru, ndi ambiri, ndi atalitali, ngati Aanaki." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Anawayesa iwonso Arefai, monga Aanaki; koma Amoabu awacha Aemi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Ndipo Ahori anakhala m'Seiri kale, koma ana a Esau analanda dziko lao, nawaononga pamaso pao, nakhala m'malo mwao; monga Israyeli anacitira dziko lace lace, limene Yehova anampatsa.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 Ukani tsopano, olokani mtsinje wa Zeredi. Ndipo tinaoloka mtsinje wa Zeredi." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Ndipo masiku amene tinayenda kucokera ku Kadesi Barinea, kufikira tidaoloka mtsinje wa Zeredi, ndiwo zaka makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu; kufikira utatha mbadwo wonse wa amuna ankhondo m'cigono, monga Yehova adawalumbirira." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Komanso dzanja la Yehova linatsutsana nao, kuwaononga m'cigono, kufikira adawatha." 
Deuteronomy2:16 Ndipo kunali, atatha kufa amuna onse ankhondo mwa anthu," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Yehova ananena ndi ine, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy2:18 Lero lomwe utumphe malire a Moabu, ndiwo Ari." 
Deuteronomy2:19 Ndipo pamene uyandikiza popenyana ndi ana a Amoni, usawabvuta, kapena kuutsana nao; popeza sindidzakupatsako dziko la ana a Amoni likhale lako lako; popeza ndinapatsa ana a Loti ili likhale lao lao." 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Ilinso aliyesa dziko la Arefai; Arefai anakhalamo kale; koma Aamoni awacha Azamzumi; 
Deuteronomy2:21 ndiwo anthu akuru, ndi ambiri, ndi atalitali, monga Aanaki; koma Yehova anawaononga pamaso pao; ndipo analanda dziko lao, nakhala m'malo mwao;" 
Deuteronomy2:22 monga iye anacitira ana a Bsau, akukhala m'Seiri, pamene anaononga Ahori pamaso pao; ndipo analanda dziko lao, nakhala m'malo mwao kufikira lero lomwe." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Kunena za Aavi akukhala m'midzi kufikira ku Gaza, Akafitori, akufuma ku Kafitori, anawaononga, nakhala m'malo mwao.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 Uka, yenda ulendo wako, ndi kuoloka mtsinje wa Arinoni; taonani, ndapereka Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni, M-amori, ndi dziko lace m'dzanja lako; yamba kulilandira, ndi kuutsana naye nkhondo." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Tsiku lino ndiyamba kuopsetsa nawe ndi kucititsa mantha nawe anthu a pansi pa thambo lonse, amene adzamva mbiri yako, nadzanjenjemera, nadzawawidwa cifukwa ca iwe." 
Deuteronomy2:26 Ndipo ndinatuma amithenga ocokera ku cipululu ca Kedemoti kwa Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni ndi mau a mtendere, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy2:27 Ndipitire m'dziko mwako; ndidzatsata mseu, osapatuka ine ku dzanja lamanja kapena kulamanzere," 
Deuteronomy2:28 Undigulitse cakudya ndi ndarama, kuti ndidye; ndi kundipatsa madzi kwa ndarama, kuti ndimwe; cokhaci ndipitire coyenda pansi;" 
Deuteronomy2:29 monga anandicitira ana a Esau akukhala m'Seiri, ndi Amoabu akukhala m'Ari; kufikira nditaoloka Yordano kulowa dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wathu atipatsa." 
Deuteronomy2:30 Koma Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni sanatilola kupitira kwao; popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu anaumitsa mzimu wace, nalimbitsa mtima wace, kuti ampereke m'dzanja lanu, monga lero lino." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Taona, ndayamba kupereka Sihoni ndi dziko lace pamaso pako; yamba kulandira dziko lace likhale lako lako." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Pamenepo Sihoni anaturuka kukomana nafe, iye ndi anthu ace onse, kugwirana nafe nkhondo ku Yahaza." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wathu anampereka iye pamaso pathu; ndipo tinamkantha, iye ndi ana ace amuna ndi anthu ace onse." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Ndipo muja tinalanda midzi yace yonse; ndipo tinaononga konse midzi yonse, amuna ndi akazi ndi ana; sitinasiyapo ndi mmodzi yense." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Zoweta zokha tinadzifunkhira, pamodzi ndi zofunkha za midzi tidailanda." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Kuyambira ku Aroeri, ndiko kumphepete kwa mtsinje wa Arinoni, ndi ku mudzi wokhala kumtsinje kufikira ku Gileadi, kunalibe mudzi wakutitalikira malinga ace; Yehova Mulungu wathu anapereka yonse pamaso pathu." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Ku dziko la ana a Amoni lokha simunayandikiza; dera lonse la mtsinje wa Yaboki, ndi midzi ya kumapiri, ndi kwina kuli konse Yehova Mulungu wathu anatiletsa." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Pamenepo tinatembenuka, ndi kubwera kumka njira ya ku Basana; ndipo Ogi mfumu ya Basana anaturuka kukomana nafe, kugwirana nafe nkhondo, iye ndi anthu ace onse, ku Edrei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Usamuopa; popeza ndampereka iye ndi anthu ace onse, ndi dziko lace, m'dzanja lako; umcitire monga umo unacitira Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, amene anakhala m'Hesiboni." 
Deuteronomy3:3 Potero Yehova Mulungu wathu anaperekanso m'manja mwathu Ogi mfumu ya Basana, ndi anthu ace onse, ndipo tinamkantha kufikira sanamtsalira ndi mmodzi yense." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Ndipo muja tinalanda midzi yace yonse; kunalibe mudzi sitinaulanda m'manja mwao, midzi makumi asanu ndi limodzi, dera lonse la Arigobi, dziko la Ogi m'Basana." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Yonseyi ndiyo midzi yozinga ndi malinga atali, zitseko, ndi mipiringidzo; pamodzi ndi midzi yambirimbiri yopanda malinga." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Ndipo tinaiononga konse, monga umo tinacitira Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni, ndi kuononga konse midzi yonse, amuna, akazi ndi ana." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Koma zoweta zonse ndi zofunkha za m'midzi, tinadzifunkhira tokha." 
Deuteronomy3:8 Ndipo muja tinalanda dziko m'manja mwa mafumu awiri a Aamori okhala tsidya lija la Yordano, kuyambira mtsinje wa Arinoni kufikira phiri la Herimoni;" 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Asidoni alicha Herimoni Sirioni, koma Aamori alicha Seniri);" 
Deuteronomy3:10 midzi yonse ya kucidikha, ndi Gileadi lonse, ndi Basana lonse kufikira ku Saleka ndi Edrei, midzi ya dziko la Ogi m'Basana." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Pakuti Ogi mfumu ya Basana anatsala yekha wa iwo otsalira Arefai; taonani, kama wace ndiye kama wacitsulo; sukhala kodi m'Raba wa ana a Amoni? utali wace mikono isanu ndi inai, kupingasa kwace mikono inai, kuyesa mkono wa munthu.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 Ndipo dziko ili tinalilanda muja; kuyambira ku Aroeri, wa ku mtsinje wa Arinoni, ndi dera lina la ku mapiri a Gileadi, ndi midzi yace, ndinapatsa Arubeni ndi Agadi." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Ndi cotsalira ca Gileadi, ndi Basana lonse, dziko la Ogi, ndinapatsa pfuko la hafu la Manase; dziko lonse la Arigobi, pamodzi ndi Basana. (Ndilo lochedwa dziko la Arefai." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Yairi mwana wa Manase analanda dziko lonse la Arigobi, kufikira malire a Agesuri ndi Amaakati; nalicha dzina lace, Basana Haroti Yairi, kufikira lero lino.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 Ndipo ndinampatsa Makiri Gileadi. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Koma ndinapatsa Arubeni ndi Agadi kuyambira ku Gileadi kufikira ku mtsinje wa Arinoni, pakati pa cigwa ndi malire ace, kufikira mtsinje wa Yaboki, ndiwo malire a ana a Amoni;" 
Deuteronomy3:17 ndi cidikha, ndi Yordano ndi malire ace, kuyambira ku Kinerete kufikira ku nyanja ya kucidikha, ndiyo Nyanja ya Mcere, patsinde pa Pisiga, kum'mawa." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Ndipo ndinauza inu muja, ndi kuti, Yehova Mulungu wanu wakupatsani dziko ili likhale lanu lanu, muoloke, amuna onse amphamvu obvala zida zao, pamaso pa abale anu ana a Israyeli." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Koma akazi anu, ndi ana anu, ndi zoweta zanu, (ndidziwa muli nazo zoweta zambiri), zikhale m'midzi yanu imene ndinakupatsani;" 
Deuteronomy3:20 kufikira Yehova atapumulitsa abale anu, monga anapumulitsa inu, nalandira iwonso dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu awapatsa tsidya lila la Yordano; pamenepo mudzabwerera munthu yense ku colowa cace, cimene ndinakupatsani." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Ndipo ndinauza Yoswa muja, ndi kuti, Maso ako anapenya zonse Yehova Mulungu wanu anawacitira mafumu awa awiri; momwemo Yehova adzacitira maufumu onse kumene muolokerako." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Musawaopa popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndiye agwirira inu nkhondo." 
Deuteronomy3:23 Ndipo ndinapempha cifundo kwa Yehova nthawi yomwe ija, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy3:24 Ambuye Yehova, mwayamba Inu kuonetsera mtumiki wanu ukulu wanu, ndi dzanja lanu lamphamvu; pakuti Mulungu ndani m'mwamba kapena pa dziko lapansi wakucita monga mwa nchito zanu, ndi monga mwa mphamvu zanu?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Ndioloketu, ndilione dziko lokomali liri tsidya la Yordano, mapiri okoma aja, ndi Lebano." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Koma Yehova anakwiya ndi ine, cifukwa ca inu, sanandimvera ine; ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Cikukwanire, usaonjezenso kunena ndi Ine za cinthuci." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Kwera kumwamba ku Pisiga, nukweze maso ako kumadzulo, ndi kumpoto, ndi kumwela, ndi kum'mawa, nuyang'ane ndi maso ako; popeza sudzaoloka Yordano uyo." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Koma langiza Yoswa, dioloketu numlimbitse mtima, ndi kumkhwimitsa, pakuti adzaoloka pamaso pa anthu awa, nadzawalandiritsa dziko ulionali likhale lao lao." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Potero tinakhala m'cigwamo pandunji pa Beti Peori. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Ndipo tsopano, Israyeli, dioloketu tamverani malemba ndi maweruzo, amene ndikuphunzitsani muwacite; kuti mukhale ndi moyo, ndi kulowa, ndi kulandira dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu akupatsani." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Musamaonjeza pa mau amene ndikuuzani, kapena kucotsapo, kuti musunge malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene ndikuuzani." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Maso anu anapenya cocita Yehova cifuwa ca Baala Peori; pakuti amuna onse amene anatsata Baala Peori, Yehova Mulungu wanu anawaononga pakati panu." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Koma inu amene munamamatira Yehova Mulungu wanu muli ndi moyo nonsenu lero lomwe. 
Deuteronomy4:5 Taonani, ndinakuphunzitsani malemba ndi maweruzo, monga Yehova Mulungu wanga anandiuza ine, kuti muzicita cotero pakati pa dziko limene mumkako kulilandira likhale lanu Lanu." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Cifukwa cace asungeni, aciteni; pakuti ici ndi nzeru zanu ndi cidziwitso canu pamaso pa mitundu ya anthu akumva malemba ndi kuti, Ndithu mtundu waukuru uwu, ndiwo anthu anzeru ndi akuzindikira." 
Deuteronomy4:7 Pakuti dioloketu mtundu waukuru wa anthu ndi uti, wakukhala ndi Mulungu pafupi pao monga amakhala Yehova Mulungu wathu, pamene pali ponse timaitanira iye?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Ndipo mtundu waukuru wa anthu ndi uti, wakukhala nao malemba ndi maweruzo olungama, akunga cilamulo ici conse ndiciika pamaso panu lero lino?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 Cokhaci, dzicenjerani nokha, ndi kusunga moyo wanu mwacangu, kuti mungaiwale zinthuzi adaziona maso anu, ndi kuti zisacoke kumtima kwanu masiku onse a moyo wanu; koma muzidziwitsa ana anu ndi zidzukulu zanu." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Tsikuli munaima pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu m'Horebe muja Yehova anati kwa ine, Ndisonkhanitsire anthu, ndidzawamvetsa mau anga, kuti aphunzire kundiopa Ine masiku ao onse akukhala ndi moyo pa dziko lapansi, ndi kuti aphunzitse ana ao." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Ndipo munayandikiza ndi kuima patsinde pa phiri; ndi phizilo linayaka mota kufikira pakati pa thambo; kunali mdima, ndi mtambo, inde mdima bii." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Pamenepo Yehova ananena ndi inu ali pakati pa moto; munamva kunena kwa mau, osaona maonekedwe, koma kunenako." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Pamenepo anakufotokozerani cipangano cace, cimene anakulamulirani kucicita, ndiwo Mau Khumi; nawalemba pa magome awiri amiyala." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Ndipo Yehova anandilamulira muja ndikuphunzitseni malemba ndi maweruzo, kuti mukawacite m'dziko limene muolokerako kulilandira likhale lanu lanu." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Potero dzicenjerani nao moyo wanu ndithu; popeza simunapenya mafanidwe konse tsikuli Yehova ananena ndi inu m'Horebe, ali pakati pa moto;" 
Deuteronomy4:16 kuti mungadziipse, ndi kudzipangira fano losema, lakunga cifaniziro ciri conse, mafanidwe a mwamuna kapena mkazi;" 
Deuteronomy4:17 mafanidwe a nyama iri yonse iri pa dziko lapansi, mafanidwe a mbalame iri yonse yamapiko yakuuluka m'mlengalenga," 
Deuteronomy4:18 mafanidwe a cinthu ciri conse cokwawa pansi, mafanidwe a nsomba iri yonse yokhala m'madzi pansi pa dziko;" 
Deuteronomy4:19 ndi kuti mungakweze maso anu kupenya kumwamba, ndipo poona dzuwa ndi mwezi ndi nyenyezi, khamu lonse la kumwamba, munganyengedwe ndi kuzigwadira, ndi kuzitumikira, zimene Yehova Mulungu wanu anagawira mitundu yonse ya anthu pansi pa thambo lonse." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Koma Yehova anakutengani, nakuturutsani m'ng'anjo yamoto, m'Aigupto, mukhale kwa iye anthu a colowa cace, monga mukhala lero lino." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Yehova anakwiyanso nane cifukwa ca mau anu, nalumbira kuti sindidzaoloka Yordano ine, ndi kuti sindidzalowa m'dziko lokomali Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani likhale colowa canu;" 
Deuteronomy4:22 pakuti ndidzafa m'dziko muno, osaoloka Yordano; koma inu mudzaoloka, ndi kulandira dziko ili lokoma likhale lanu lanu." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Dzicenjerani, mungaiwale cipangano ca Yehova Mulungu wanu, cimene anapangana nanu, ndi kuti mungadzipangire fano losema, cifaniziro ca kanthu kali konse Yehova Mulungu wanu anakuletsani." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye moto wonyeketsa, ndi Mulungu wansanje." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Mutakabala ana, ndi zidzukulu, ndipo mutakakhala nthawi yaikuru m'dzikomo, ndi kudziipsa, ndi kupanga fano losema, m'cifaniziro ca kanthu kali konse, ndi kucita coipa pamaso pa Yehova, kuutsa mkwiyo wace:" 
Deuteronomy4:26 ndiitana kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zicite mboni pa inu lero lino, kuti mudzaonongeka msangatu kucotsedwa ku dziko limene muolokera Yordano kulilandira likhale lanu lanu; masiku anu sadzacuruka pamenepo, koma mudzaonongeka konse." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Ndipo Yehova adzakubalalitsani mwa mitundu ya anthu, nimudzatsala pang'ono mwa amitundu, kumene Yehova adzakutsogolerani kwao." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Ndipo kumeneko mudzatumikira milungu, nchito ya manja a anthu, mtengo ndi mwala, yosapenya, kapena kumva, kapena kudya, kapena kununkhiza." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Koma mukafuna Yehova Mulungu wanu kumeneko, mudzampeza, ngati mumfunafuna ndi mtima wanu wonse ndi moyo wanu wonse." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Mukakhala nao msauko, zikakugwerani zonsezi, masiku otsiriza mudzabwerera kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi kumvera mau ace;" 
Deuteronomy4:31 popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye Mulungu wacifundo; sadzakusiyani, kapena kukuonongani, kapena kuiwala cipangano ca makolo anu cimene analumbirira iwo." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Pakuti, funsiranitu, masiku adapitawo, musanakhale inu, kuyambira tsikuli Mulungu analenga munthu pa dziko lapansi, ndi kuyambira malekezero ena a thambo kufikira malekezero anzace a thambo, ngati cinthu cacikuru conga ici cinamveka, kapena kucitika?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Kodi pali mtundu wa anthu udamva a Malungu akunena pakati pa moto, monga mudamva inu, ndi kukhala ndi moyo?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Kapena kodi anayesa Mulungu kumuka ndi kudzitengera mtundu mwa mtundu wina wa anthu, ndi mayesero, ndi zizindikilo, ndi zozizwa, ndi nkhondo, ndi mwa dzanja lamphamvu, ndi mkono wotambasuka, ndi mwa zoopsa zazikuru, monga mwa zonse Yehova Mulungu wanu anakucitirani m'Aigupto pamaso panu?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Inu munaciona ici, kuti mudziwe kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu; palibe wina wopanda iye." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Anakumvetsani mau ace kucokera kumwamba, kuti akuphunzitseni; ndipo pa dziko lapansi anakuonetsani moto wace waukuru; nimunamva mau ace pakati pa moto." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Ndipo popeza anakonda makolo anu, anasankha mbeu zao zakuwatsata, nakuturutsani pamaso pace ndi mphamvu yace yaikuru, m'Aigupto;" 
Deuteronomy4:38 kupitikitsa amitundu akuru ndi amphamvu oposa inu pamaso panu, kukulowetsani ndi kukupatsani dziko lao likhale colowa canu, monga lero lino." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Potero dziwani lero tino nimukumbukire m'mtima mwanu, kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu, m'thambo la kumwamba ndi pa dziko lapansi; palibe wina." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Muzisunga malemba ace, ndi malamulo ace, amene ndikuzuzani lero lino, kuti cikukomereni inu ndi ana anu akukutsatani, ndi kuti masiku anu acuruke pa dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani likhale lanu kosatha." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Pamenepo Mose anapatula midzi itatu tsidya lija la Yordano loturuka dzuwa; 
Deuteronomy4:42 kuti athawireko wakupha munthu, osamupha mnansi wace dala, osamkwiyira ndi kale lonse; ndi kuti, akathawira ku umodzi wa midzi iyi, akhale ndi moyo:" 
Deuteronomy4:43 ndiyo Bezere, m'cipululu, m'dziko lacidikha, ndiwo wa Anrubeni; ndi Ramoti m'Gileadi, ndiwo wa Agadi; ndi Golani, m'Basana, ndiwo wa Amanase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Ndipo ici ndi cilamulo Mose anaciika pamaso pa ana a Israyeli; 
Deuteronomy4:45 izi ndi mboni, ndi malemba, ndi maweruzo, Mose anazinena kwa ana a Israyeli, poturuka iwo m'Aigupto;" 
Deuteronomy4:46 tsidya lija la Yordano, m'cigwa ca pandunji pa Beti Peori, m'dziko la Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, wakukhala m'Hesiboni, amene Mose ndi ana a Israyeli anamkantha, poturuka iwo m'Aigupto;" 
Deuteronomy4:47 ndipo analanda dziko lace, ndi dziko la Ogi mfumu ya Basana, mafumu awiri a Aamori, akukhala tsidya lija la Yordano loturuka dzuwa;" 
Deuteronomy4:48 kuyambira ku Aroeri, ndiwo m'mphepete mwa mtsinje wa Arinoni, kufikira phiri la Sioni (ndilo Herimoni)," 
Deuteronomy4:49 ndi cidikha conse tsidya lija la Yordana kum'mawa, kufikira nyanja ya kucidikha, pa tsinde lace la Pisiga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Ndipo Mose anaitana Israyeli wonse, nanena nao, Tamverani, Israyeli, malemba ndi maweruzo ndinenawa m'makutu mwanu lero, kuti muwaphunzire, ndi kusamalira kuwacita." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Yehova Mulungu wathu anapangana nafe cipangano m'Horebe. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Yehova sanacita cipangano ici ndi makolo athu, koma ndi ife, ife amene tiri ndi moyo tonsefe pane lero." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Yehova ananena ndi inu popenyana maso m'phirimo, ali pakati pa moto," 
Deuteronomy5:5 (ndinalinkufma pakati pa Yehova ndi inu muja, kukulalikirani mau a Yehova; popeza munacita mantha cifukwa ca moto, osakwera m'phirimo) ndi kuti:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako amene ndinakuturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto, m'nyumba ya akapolo." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Usakhale nayo milungu yina koma Ine ndekha. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Usadzipangire iwe wekha fano losema, kapena cifaniziro ciri conse ca zinthu za m'thambo la kumwamba, kapena za m'dziko lapansi, kapena za m'madzi a pansi pa dziko;" 
Deuteronomy5:9 usazipembedzere izo, usazitumikire izo; cifukwa Ine Yehova Mulungu wako ndine Mulungu wansanje, wakulanga ana cifukwa ca atate wao, kufikira mbadwo wacitatu ndi wacinai wa iwo amene akudana ndi Ine;" 
Deuteronomy5:10 ndi kucitira cifundo anthu zikwi, a iwo amene akondana ndi Ine nasunga malamulo anga." 
Deuteronomy5:11 Usaehuledzinala Yehova Mulungu wako pacabe; cifukwa Yehova sadzamuyesa iye wosacimwa amene achula pacabe dzina lacelo. 
Deuteronomy5:12 Samalira tsiku la Sabata likhale lopatulika, monga Yehova Mulungu wako anakulamulira." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Masiku asanu ndi limodzi uzigwiritsa nchito, ndi kucita nchito zako zonse;" 
Deuteronomy5:14 koma tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri ndilo Sabata la Yehova Mulungu wako; usamagwira nchito iri yonse, iwe, kapena mwana wako wamwamuna, kapena mwana wako wamkazi, kapena wanchito wako wamwamuna, kapena wanchito wako wamkazi, kapena ng'ombe yako, kapena buru wako, kapena zoweta zako ziri zonse, kapena mlendo wokhala m'mudzi mwako; kuti wanchito wako wamwamuna ndi wanchito wako wamkazi apumule monga iwe mwini." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Ndipo uzikumbukilakuti unali kapolo m'dziko la Aigupto, ndi kuti Yehova Mulungu wako anakuturutsako ndi dzanja lamphamvu ndi mkono wotambasuka; cifukwa cace Yehova Mulungu wako anakulamulira kusunga tsiku la Sabata." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Lemekeza atate wako ndi amako, monga Yehova Mulungu wako anakulamulira; kuti masiku ako acuruke, ndi kuti cikukomere, m'dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wako akupatsa iwe." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Usaphe. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Usacite cigololo. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Usabe. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Usamnamizire mnzako. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Usasirire mkazi wace wa mnzako; usakhumbe nyumba yace ya mnzako, munda wace, kapena wanchito wace wamwamuna, kapena wanchito wace wamkazi, ng'ombe yace, kapena buru wace, kapena kanthu kali konse ka mnzako." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Yehova ananena mau awa kwa msonkhano wanu wonse, m'phirimo ali pakati pa moto, pamtambo, pamdima bii, ndi mau akuru; osaonjezapo kanthu. Ndipo anawalembera pa magome awiri amiyala, nandipatsa awa." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Ndipo kunali, pamene munamva liu loturuka pakati pa mdima, potentha phiri ndi moto, munayandikiza kwa ine, ndiwo mafumu onse a mapfuko anu ndi akuru anu;" 
Deuteronomy5:24 ndipo munati, Taonani, Yehova Mulungu wathu anationetsa ulemerero wace, ndi ukuru wace, ndipo tidamva liu lace ali pakati pa mote; tapenya lero lino kuti Mulungu anena ndi munthu, ndipo akhala ndi moyo." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Ndipo tsopano tiferenji? popeza mote waukuru uwu udzatitha. Tikaonjeza kumva mau a Yehova Mulungu wathu, tidzafa." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Pakuti ndaniyo, wa zamoyo zonse adamva mau a Mulungu wamoyo wakunena ali pakati pa moto, monga ife, nakhala ndi moyo?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Yandikizani inu, ndi kumva zonse Yehova Mulungu wathu adzati; ndipo inu munene ndi ife zonse zimene Yehova Mulungu wathu adzanena ndi inu; ndipo ife tidzazimva ndi kuzicita." 
Deuteronomy5:28 Ndipo Yehova anamva mau a kunena kwanu, pamene munanena ndi ine; ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Ndidamva mau a kunena kwao kwa anthu awa, amene ananena ndi iwe; cokoma cokha cokha adanenaci." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Ha! mwenzi akadakhala nao mtima wotere wakundiopa Ine, ndi kusunga malamulo anga masiku onse, kuti ciwakomere iwo ndi ana ao nthawi zonse!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Muka, nuti nao, Bwererani ku mahema anu." 
Deuteronomy5:31 Koma iwe, uime kuno ndi Ine, ndinene ndi iwe malamulo onse, ndi malemba, ndi maweruzo, amene uziwaphunzitsa, kuti awacite m'dziko limene ndiwapatsa likhale lao lao." 
Deuteronomy5:32 Potero muzisamalira kucita monga Yehova Mulungu wanu anakulamulirani; musamapatuka kulamanzere kapena kulamanja. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Muziyenda m'njira yonse imene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakulamulirani, kuti mukakhale ndi moyo, ndi kuti cikukomereni, ndi kuti masiku anu acuruke m'dziko limene mudzakhala nalo lanu lanu." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Ndipo awa ndi malamulo, malemba, ndi maweruzo, amene Yehova Mulungu wanu analamulira kukuphunzitsani, kuti muziwacita m'dziko limene muolokerako kulilandira;" 
Deuteronomy6:2 kuti muope Yehova Mulungu wanu, kusunga malemba ace onse ndi malamulo ace, amene ndikuuzani inu ndi ana anu, ndi zidzukulu zanu, masiku onse a moyo wanu, ndi kuti masiku anu acuruke." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Potero imvani, Israyeli, musamalire kuwacita, kuti cikukomereni ndi kuti mucuruke cicurukire, monga Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu anena ndi inu, m'dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uci ngati madzi." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Imvani, Israyeli; Yehova Mulungu wathu, Yehova ndiye mmodzi;" 
Deuteronomy6:5 ndipo muzikonda Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi mtima wanu wonse, ndi moyo wanu wonse, ndi mphamvu yanu yonse." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Ndipo mau awa ndikuuzanilero, azikhala pamtima panu;" 
Deuteronomy6:7 ndipo muziwaphunzitsa mwacangu kwa ana anu, ndi kuwalankhula awa pokhala pansi m'nyumba zanu, ndi poyenda inu panjira, ndi pogona inu pansi, ndi pouka inu." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Ndipo muziwamanga padzanja panu ngati cizindikilo, ndipo akhale ngati capamphumi pakati pa maso anu." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Ndipo muziwalembera pa mphuthu za nyumba zanu, ndi pa zipata zanu." 
Deuteronomy6:10 Ndipo kudzakhala, Yehova Mulungu wanu atakulowetsani m'dziko limene analumbirira makolo anu, Abrahamu, Isake, ndi Yakobo, kuti adzakupatsani ili; midzi yaikuru ndi yokoma, imene simunaimanga;" 
Deuteronomy6:11 ndi nyumba zodzala nazo zokoma ziri zonse, zimene simunazidzaza, ndi zitsime zosema, zimene simunazisema, minda yampesa, ndi minda yaazitona, zimene simunazioka, ndipo mutakadya ndi kukhuta;" 
Deuteronomy6:12 pamenepo mudzicenjere mungaiwale Yehova, amene anakuturutsani m'dziko la Aigupto, m'nyumba ya akapolo," 
Deuteronomy6:13 Muziopa Yehova Mulungu wanu; ndi kutumikira Iyeyu; ndipo polumbira muzichula dzina lace. 
Deuteronomy6:14 Musamatsata milungu yina, milungu yina ya mitundu ya anthu akuzinga inu;" 
Deuteronomy6:15 pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ali pakati panu, ndiye Mulungu wansanje; kuti ungapse mtima wa Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kukuonongani, kukucotsani pankhope pa dziko lapansi." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Musamayesa Yehova Mulungu wanu, monga munamyesa m'Masa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Muzisunga mwacangu malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi mboni zace, ndi malemba ace, amene anakulamulirani." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Ndipo muzicita zolunjika ndi zokoma pamaso pa Yehova; kuti cikukomereni, ndi kuti mulowe kukalandira dziko lokomali Yehova analumbirira makolo anu," 
Deuteronomy6:19 kuingitsa adani anu onse pamaso panu, monga Yehova adanena."
