Deuteronomy28:9 Yehova adzakukhazikirani yekha mtundu wa anthu wopatulika, monga anakulumbirirani; ngati mudzasunga malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kuyenda m'njira zace." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Ndipo anthu onse a pa dziko lapansi adzaona kuti akuchulani dzina la Yehova; nadzakuopani. 
Deuteronomy28:11 Ndipo Yehova adzakucurukitsirani zokoma, m'zipatso za thupi lanu, ndi m'zipatso za zoweta zanu, ndi m'zipatso za nthaka yanu, m'dziko limene Yehova analumbirira makolo anu kuti adzakupatsani ilo," 
Deuteronomy28:12 Yehova adzakutsegulirani cuma cace cokoma, ndico thambo la kumwamba, kupatsa dziko lanu mvula m'nyengo yace, ndi kudalitsa nchito zonae za dzanja lanu; ndipo mudza kongoletsa amitundu ambiri, osakongola nokha." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Ndipo Yehova adzakuyesani mutu, si mcira ai; ndipo mudzakhala wa pamwamba pokha, si wapansi ai; ngati mudzamvera malamulo a Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene ndikuuzani lero, kuwasunga ndi kuwacita;" 
Deuteronomy28:14 osapatukira mau ali onse ndikuuzani lero, kulamanja, kapena kulamanzere, kutsata milungu yina kuitumikira." 
Deuteronomy28:15 Koma kudzali, mukapanda kumvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu, kusamalira kucita malamulo ace onse ndi malemba ace amene ndikuuzani lero, kuti matemberero awa onse adzakugwerani ndi kukupezani," 
Deuteronomy28:16 Mudzakhala otembereredwa m'mudzi, ndi otembereredwa pabwalo." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Zidzakhala zotembereredwa mtanga wanu ndi coumbiramo mkate wanu. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Zidzakhala zotembereredwa zipatso za thupi lanu, ndi zipatso za nthaka yanu, zoswana za ng'ombe zanu, ndi zoswana za nkhosa zanu." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Mudzakhala otembereredwa polowa inu, ndi otembereredwa poturuka inu." 
Deuteronomy28:20 Yehova adzakutumizirani temberero, cisokonezeko, ndi kudzudzula monsemo mukaturutsa dzanja lanu kucita kanthu, kufikira mwaonongeka, kufikira mwatayika rosanga, cifukwa ca zocita inu zoipa, zimene wandisiya nazo," 
Deuteronomy28:21 Yehova adzakumamatiritsani mliri kufikira akakuthani kukucotsani kudziko, kumene mupitako kulilandira." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Yehova adzakukanthani ndi nthenda yoondetsa ya cifuwa, ndi malungo, ndi cibayo, ndi kutentha thupi, ndi lupanga, cinsikwi ndi cinoni; ndipo zidzakutsatani kufikira mwatayika." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Ndipo thambo lanu la pamwamba pamutu panu lidzakhala ngati mkuwa, ndi dziko liri pansi panu ngati citsulo." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Yehova adzasanduliza mvula ya dziko lanu ikhale pfumbi ndi phulusa; zidzakutsikirani kucokera kumwamba, kufikira mwaonongeka." 
Deuteronomy28:25 Yehova adzalola adani anu akukantheni; mudzawaturukira njira imodzi, koma mudzawathawa pamaso pao njira zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndipo mudzagwedezeka pakati pa maufumu onse a dziko lapansi." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Ndipo mitembo yanu idzakhalacakudya ca mbalame zonse za m'mlengalenga, ndi zirombo zonse za pa dziko lapansi, ndipo palibe wakuziingitsa." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Yehova adzakukanthani ndi zirombo za ku Aigupto, ndi nthenda yoturuka mudzi, ndi cipere, ndi mphere, osacira nazo." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Yehova adzakukanthani ndi misala, ndi khungu, ndi kuzizwa mumtima;" 
Deuteronomy28:29 ndipo mudzafufuza usana, monga wakhungu amafufuza mumdima, ndipo simudzapindula nazo njira zanu; koma mudzakhala wopsinjika, nadzakuberani masiku onse, wopanda wina wakukupulumutsani." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Mudzaparana ubwenzi ndi mkazi, koma mwamuna wina adzagona naye; mudzamanga nyumba, osakhala m'mwemo; mudzanka munda wamphesa, osalawa zipatso zace." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Adzapha ng'ombe yanu pamaso panu, osadyako inu; adzalanda buru wanu molimbana pamaso panu, osakubwezerani; adzapereka nkhosa zanu kwa adani anu, wopanda wina wakukupulumutsani." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Adzapereka ana anu amuna ndi akazi kwa anthu a mtundu wina, ndipo m'maso mwanu mudzada ndi kupenyerera, powalirira tsiku lonse; koma mulibe mphamvu m'dzanja lanu." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Mtundu wa anthu umene simudziwa udzadya zipatso za nthaka yanu ndi nchito zanu zonse; ndipo mudzakhala wopsinjika ndi wophwanyika masiku onse; 
Deuteronomy28:34 nimudzakhala oyeruka cifukwa comwe muciona ndi maso anu," 
Deuteronomy28:35 Yehova adzakukanthani ndi cironda coipa cosacira naco kumaondo, ndi kumiyendo, kuyambira pansi pa phazi lanu kufikira pamwamba pa mutu panu." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Yehova adzamukitsa inu, ndi mfumu yanu imene mudzadziikira, kwa mtundu wa anthu umene simudziwa, inu kapena makolo anu; ndipo mudzatumikirako milungu yina ya mitengo ndi miyala." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Ndipo mudzakhala codabwitsa, ndi nkhani, ndi nthanthi, mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu amene Yehova akutsogoleraniko." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Mudzaturuka nazo mbeu zambiri kumunda, koma mudzakolola pang'ono; popeza dzombe lidzazitha." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Mudzanka m'minda yamphesa ndi kuilima, koma osamwa vinyo wace, kapena kuchera mphesa zace, popeza citsenda cidzaidya." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Mudzakhala nayo mitengo yaazitona m'malire anu onset osadzola mafuta; popeza zipatso za mitengo yaazitona zidzapululuka. 
Deuteronomy28:41 Mudzabala ana amuna ndi akazi, osakhala nao, popeza adzalowa ukapolo." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Mitengo yanu yonse ndi zipatso za nthaka yanu zidzakhala zao zao za dzombe. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Mlendo wokhala pakati panu adzakulira-kulira inu, koma inu mudzacepera-cepera." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Iye adzakukongoletsani, osamkongoletsa ndinu; iye adzakhala mutu, koma inu ndinu mcira." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Ndipo matemberero awa onse adzakugwerani, nadzakulondolani, ndi kukupezani, kufikira mwaonongeka, popeza simunamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu, kusunga malamulo ace ndi malemba ace amene anakulamulirani;" 
Deuteronomy28:46 ndipo zidzakukhalirani inu ndi mbeu zanu ngati cizindikilo ndi cozizwa, nthawi zonse." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Popeza simunatumikira Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi cimwemwe ndi mokondwera mtima, cifukwa ca kucuruka zinthu zonse;" 
Deuteronomy28:48 cifukwa cace mudzatumikira adani anu amene Yehova adzakutumizirani, ndi njala, ndi ludzu, ndi usiwa, ndi kusowa zinthu zonse; ndipo adzaika goli lacitsulo pakhosi panu, kufikira atakuonongani." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Yehova adzakutengerani mtundu wa anthu wocokera kutali ku malekezero a dziko lapansi, monga iuluka mphungu; mtundu wa anthu amene simunamva malankhulidwe ao;" 
Deuteronomy28:50 mtundu wa anthu wa nkhope yaukali, wosamalira nkhope ya wokalamba, wosamcitira cifundo mwana;" 
Deuteronomy28:51 ndipo adzadya zipatso za ng'ombe zanu, ndi zipatso za nthaka yanu, kufikira mwaonongeka; osakusiyirani tirigu, vinyo, kapena mafuta, zoswana ng'ombe zanu, zoswana nkhosa zanu, kufikira atakuonongani." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Ndipo adzakuzingani m'midzi mwanu monse, kufikira adagwa malinga anu atali ndi olimba, amene munawakhulupirira, m'dziko lanu lonse; inde, adzakuzingani m'midzi mwanu monse, m'dziko lanu lonse limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Ndipo mudzadya cipatso ca thupi lanu, nyama ya ana anu amuna ndi akazi amene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakupatsani; pakukumangirani tsasa ndi kukupsinjani adani anu." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Mwamuna wololopoka nkhongono ndi wanyonga pakati pa inu diso lace lidzaipira mbale wace, ndi mkazi wa pa mtima wace, ndi ana ace otsalira;" 
Deuteronomy28:55 osapatsako mmodzi yense wa iwowa nyama ya ana ace alinkudyayo, popeza sikamtsalira kanthu; pakukumangirani tsasa ndi kukupsinjani mdani wanu m'midzi mwanu monse." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Mkazi wololopoka nkhongono ndi wanyonga pakati pa inu, wosayesa kuponda pansi ndi phazi lace popeza ndiye wanyonga, ndi wololopoka nkhongono, diso lace lidzamuipira mwamuna wa pamtima pace, ndi mwana wace wamwamuna ndi wamkazi;" 
Deuteronomy28:57 ndico dfukwa ca matenda akuturuka pakati pa mapazi ace, ndi ana ace adzawabala; popeza adzawadya m'tseri posowa zinthu zonse; pakukumangirani tsasa ndi kukupsinjani mdaniwanu m'midzi mwanu." 
Deuteronomy28:58 Mukapanda kusamalira kucita mau onse a cilamulo ici olembedwa m'buku ili, kuopa dzina ili la ulemerero ndi loopsa, ndilo YEHOVA MULUNGU ANU;" 
Deuteronomy28:59 Yehova adzacita miliri yanu ndi ya ana anu ikhale yodabwiza, miliri yaikuru ndi yokhalitsa, ndi nthenda zoipa ndi zokhalitsa." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Ndipo adzakubwezerani nthenda zonse za Aigupto, zimene munaziopa; ndipo zidzakumamatirani inu." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Ndiponso nthenda zonse ndi miliri yonse zosalembedwa m'buku la cilamulo ici, Yehova adzakutengerani izi, kufikira mwaonongeka." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Ndipo mudzatsala anthu pang'ono, mungakhale mukacuruka ngati nyenyezi za m'mwamba; popeza simunamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Ndipo kudzali kuti, monga Yehova anakondwera nanu kukucitirani zabwino, ndi kukucurukitsani; momwemo Yehova adzakondwera nanu kutayikitsa ndi kuononga inu, ndipo adzakuzulani kudziko kumene mulowako kulilandira." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Ndipo Yehova adzakubalalitsani mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu, kuyambira malekezero a dziko lapansi kufikira malekezero a dziko lapansi; ndipo kumeneko mudzatumikira milungu yina, imene simunaidziwa, inu ndi makolo anu, yamitengo ndi yamiyala." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Ndipo mwa a mitundu iyi simudzapumula, inde sipadzakhala popumulira phazi lanu; koma Yehova adzakupatsani kumeneko mtima wonjenjemera, m'maso mwanu mudzada, mudzafa ndi kulefuka mtima." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Ndipo moyo wanu udzakhala wanjiranjira pamaso panu, ndipo mudzacita mantha usiku ndi usana, osakhazika mtima za moyo wanu." 
Deuteronomy28:67 M'mawa mudzati, Mwenzi atafika madzulo! ndi madzulo mudzati, Mwenzi utafika m'mawa! cifukwa ca mantha a m'mtima mwanu amene mudzaopa nao, ndi cifukwa ca zopenya maso anu zimene mudzazipenya." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Ndipo Yehova adzakubwezerani ku Aigupto ndi ngalawa, pa njira imene ndinati kwa inu, kuti, Simudzaionanso; ndipo kumeneko mudzadzigulitsa kwa adani anu mukhale akapolo ndi adzakazi; koma palibe wogulainu." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Awa ndi mau a cipangano cimene Yehova analamulira Mose acicite ndi ana a Israyeli m'dziko la Moabu, pamodzi ndi cipanganoco anacita nao m'Horebe." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Ndipo Mose anaitana Israyeli wonse, nati nao, Munapenya inu zonse zimene Yehova anacitira Farao, ndi anyamata ace onse, ndi dziko lace lonse, pamaso panu m'dziko la Aigupto;" 
Deuteronomy29:3 mayesero akuruwa maso anu anawapenya, zizindikilozo, ndi zozizwa zazikuru zija;" 
Deuteronomy29:4 koma Yehova sanakupatsani mtima wakudziwa, ndi maso akupenya, ndi makutu akumva, kufikira lero lino." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Ndipo ndinakutsogolerani zaka makumi anai m'cipululu; zobvala zanu sizinatha pathupi panu, ndi nsapato zanu sizinatha pa phazi lanu." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Simunadya mkate, simunamwa vinyo kapena cakumwa colimba; kuti mudziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Ndipo pamene munafika pamalo pano, Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni, ndi Ogi mfumu ya Basana, anaturuka kudzakomana nafe kunkhondo, ndipo tinawakantha;" 
Deuteronomy29:8 ndipo tinalanda dziko lao, ndi kulipereka likhale colowa cao ca Arubeni, ndi Agadi, ndi pfuko la hafu la Manase." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Cifukwa cace sungani mau a cipangano ici ndi kuwacita, kuti mucite mwanzeru m'zonse muzicita." 
Deuteronomy29:10 Muimirira inu nonse lero lino pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu; mafumu anu, mapfuko anu, akuru anu, ndi akapitao anu, amuna onse a Israyeli;" 
Deuteronomy29:11 makanda anu, akazi anu, ndi mlendo wanu wakukhala pakati pa zigono zanu, kuyambira wotema nkhuni kufikira wotunga madzi;" 
Deuteronomy29:12 kuti mulowe cipangano ca Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi lumbiriro lace, limene Yehova Mulungu wanu acita ndi inu lero lino;" 
Deuteronomy29:13 kuti adzikhazikire inu, mtundu wace wa anthu lero lino, ndi kuti akhale kwa inu Mulungu, monga ananena ndi inu, ndi monga analumbirira makolo anu, Abrahamu, Isake, ndi Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Koma sindicita cipangano ici ndi lumbiro ili ndi inu nokha; 
Deuteronomy29:15 komanso ndi iye wakuimirira pano nafe lero lino pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wathu, ndiponso ndi iye wosakhala pano nafe lero lino." 
Deuteronomy29:16 Pakuti mudziwa cikhalidwe cathu m'dziko la Aigupto, ndi kuti tinapyola pakati pa amitundu amene munawapyola;" 
Deuteronomy29:17 ndipo munapenya zonyansa zao, ndi mafano ao, mtengo ndi mwala, siliva ndi golidi, zokhala pakati pao;" 
Deuteronomy29:18 kuti angakhale pakati pa inu mwamuna, kapena mkazi, kapena banja, kapena pfuko, mtima wao watembenuka kusiyana naye Yehova Mulungu wathu lero lino, kuti apite ndi kutumikira milungu ya amitundu aja; kuti ungakhale pakati pa inu muzu wakubala ndulu ndi cowawa." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Ndipo kungakhale, akamva mau a lumbiro ili adzadzidalitsa m'mtima mwace, ndi kuti, Ndidzakhala nao mtendere, ndingakhale ndiyenda nao mtima wanga wopulukira, kuledzera nditamva ludzu;" 
Deuteronomy29:20 Yehova sadzamkhululukira, koma pamenepo mkwiyo wa Yehova ndi nsanje yace zidzamfukira munthuyo; ndipo temberero lonse lolembedwa m'buku ili lidzamkhalira; ndipo Yehova adzafafaniza dzina lace pansi pa thambo." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Ndipo Yehova adzamsiyanitsa ndi mafuko onse a Israyeli ndi kumcitira coipa, monga mwa matemberero onse a cipangano colembedwa m'buku ili la cilamulo." 
Deuteronomy29:22 Ndipo mbadwo ukudza, ana anu akuuka mutafa inu, ndi mlendo wocokera ku dziko lakutali, adzati, pakuona iwo miliri ya dziko ili, ndi nthendazi; Yehova awadwalitsa nazo," 
Deuteronomy29:23 ndi kuti lidapsa dziko lace lonse ndi sulfure, ndi mcere, kuti sabzalamo, kapena siliphukitsa kanthu kapena sumerapo msipu, monga kupasula kwace kwa Sodomu ndi Gomora, Adima, ndi Zeboimu, imene Yehova anaipasula m'mkwiyo wace ndi ukali wace;" 
Deuteronomy29:24 inde amitundu onse adzati, Yehova anacitira dziko ili cotero cifukwa ninji? nciani kupsa mtima kwakukuru kumene?" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Pamenepo adzati, Popeza analeka cipangano ca Yehova, Mulungu wa makolo ao, cimene anacita nao pakuwaturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto;" 
Deuteronomy29:26 napita natumikira milungu yina, naigwadira, milungu imene sanaidziwa, imene sanawagawira;" 
Deuteronomy29:27 cifukwa cace Mulungu anapsera mtima dziko ili kulitengera temberero lonse lolembedwa m'buku ili. 
Deuteronomy29:28 Ndipo Yehova anawazula m'nthaka mwao mokwiya ndi mozaza, ndi m'ukali waukuru, nawaponya m'dziko lina, monga lero lino." 
Deuteronomy29:29 Zinsinsi nza Yehova Mulungu wathu; koma zobvumbuluka nza ife ndi ana athu kosatha, kuti ticite mau onse a cilamulo ici." 
Deuteronomy30:1 Ndipo kudzakhala, zikakugwerani zonsezi, mdalitso ndi temberero, ndinaikazi pamaso panu, ndipo mukazikumbukila mumtima mwanu mwa amitundu onse, amene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakupitikitsiraniko;" 
Deuteronomy30:2 nimukabwerera kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kumvera mali ace, monga mwa zonse ndikuuzani lero lino, inu ndi ana anu, ndi mtima wanu wonse, ndi moyo wanu wonse;" 
Deuteronomy30:3 pamenepo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzaucotsa ukapolo wanu, ndi kukucitirani cifundo; nadzabwera ndi kukumemezani mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu, kumene Yehova Mulungu wanu anakubalalitsiraniko." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Otayika anu akakhala ku malekezero a thambo, Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakumemezani kumeneko, nadzakutenganiko;" 
Deuteronomy30:5 ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakulowetsani m'dziko lidakhala lao lao la makolo anu, nilidzakhala lanu lanu; ndipo adzakucitirani zokoma, ndi kukucurukitsani koposa makolo anu." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakudulani mtima wanu ndi mtima wa mbeu zanu, kuti mukonde Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi mtima wanu wonse, ndi moyo wanu wonse, kuti mukhale ndi moyo." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzaika matemberero awa onse pa adani anu, ndi iwo akukwiya ndi inu, amene anakulondolani." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Pamenepo mutembenuke ndi kumvera mau a Yehova, ndi kucita malamulo ace onse amene ndikuuzani lero lino." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakucurukitsirani nchito zonse za dzanja lanu, zipatso za thupi lanu, ndi zipatso za zoweta zanu, ndi zipatso za nthaka yanu, zikukomereni; popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakondweranso kukucitirani zokoma; monga anakondwera ndi makolo anu;" 
Deuteronomy30:10 ngati mudzamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu, kuwasunga malamulo ace ndi malemba ace olembedwa m'buku la cilamulo ici; ngati mudzabwerera kudza kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu ndi mtima wanu wonse, ndi moyo wanu wonse." 
Deuteronomy30:11 Pakuti lamulo ili ndikuuzani lero lino, silikulakani kulizindikira, kapena silikhala kutali." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Silikhala m'mwamba, kuti mukati, Adzatikwerera m'mwamba ndani, ndi kubwera nalo kwa ife, ndi kutimvetsa ili, kuti tilicite?" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Ndipo silikhala tsidya la nyanja, kuti mukati, Adzatiolokera ndani tsidya la nyanja, ndi kutitengera ili, ndi kutimvetsa ili, kuti tilicite?" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Pakuti mauwa ali pafupifupi ndi inu, m'kamwa mwanu, ndi m'mtima mwanu, kuwacita." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Tapenyani, ndaika pamaso panu lero lino moyo ndi zokoma, imfa ndi zoipa;" 
Deuteronomy30:16 popeza ndikuuzani lero kukonda Yehova Mulungu wanu, kuyenda m'njira zace, ndi kusunga malamulo ace ndi malemba ace ndi maweruzo ace, kuti mukakhale ndi moyo ndi kucuruka, ndi kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu akakudalitseni m'dziko limene mulowako kulilandira." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Koma mukatembenukira mtima wanu, osamvera inu, nimukaceteka, ndi kugwadira milungu yina ndi kuitumikira;" 
Deuteronomy30:18 ndikulalikirani inu lero, kuti mudzatayika ndithu, masiku anu sadzacuruka m'dziko limene muolokera Yordano kulowamo kulilandira." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Ndicititsa mboni lero kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zitsutse inu; ndaika pamaso panu moyo ndi imfa, mdalitso ndi temberero; potero, sankhani moyo, kuti mukhale ndi moyo, inu ndi mbeu zanu;" 
Deuteronomy30:20 kukonda Yehova Mulungu wanu, kumvera mau ace, ndi kummamatira iye, tr pakuti iye ndiye moyo wanu, ndi masiku anu ocuruka; kuti mukhale m'dziko limene Yehova analumbirira makolo anu, Abrahamu, Isake, ndi Yakobo, kuwapatsa ili." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Ndipo Mose anamuka nanena mau awa kwa Israyeli wonse," 
Deuteronomy31:2 nati nao, Ndine munthu wa zaka zana ndi makumi awiri lero lino; sindikhozanso kuturuka ndi kulowa ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Sudzaoloka Yordano uyu." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye adzaoloka pamaso panu, iye ndiye adzaononga amitundu awo pamaso panu, ndipo mudzawalandira. Yoswa ndiye adzakutsogolerani pooloka, monga ananena Yehova." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Ndipo Yehova adzawacitira monga anacitira Sihoni ndi Ogi, mafumu a Aamori, ndi dziko lao limene analiononga." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Yehova akadzawapereka pamaso panu, muziwacitira monga mwa lamulo lonse ndakuuzani." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Khalani amphamvu, limbikani mitima, musamacita mantha, kapena kuopsedwa cifukwa ca iwowa; popeza Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye amene amuka nanu; iye sadzakusowani, kapena irukusiyani." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Ndipo Mose anaitana Yoswa, nati naye pamaso pa Israyeli wonse, Khala wamphamvu, nulimbe mtima; pakuti udzalowa nao anthu awa m'dziko limene Yehova analumbirira makolo ao kuwapatsa ilo; ndipo iwe udzawalandiritsa ilo." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Ndipo Yehova, iye ndiye amene akutsogolera; iye adzakhala ndi iwe, iye sadzakusowa kapena kukusiya; usamacita mantha, usamatenga nkhawa." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Ndipo Mose analembera cilamulo ici, nacipereka kwa ansembe, ana a Levi, akunyamula likasa la cipangano la Yehova, ndi kwa akuru onse a Israyeli," 
Deuteronomy31:10 Ndipo Mose anawauza, ndi kuti, Pakutha pace pa zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri, pa nyengo yoikika ya m'caka cakulekerera, pa madyerero a misasa;" 
Deuteronomy31:11 pakufika Israyeli wonse kuoneka pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanu, m'malo amene adzasankha, muzilalikira cilamulo ici pamaso pa Israyeli wonse, m'makutu mwao." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Sonkhanitsan; anthu, amuna ndi akazi ndi ana ang'ono, ndi mlendo wokhala m'midzi mwanu, kuti amve, ndi kuti aphunzire kuopa Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kusamalira kucita mau onse a cilamulo ici;" 
Deuteronomy31:13 ndi kuti ana ao osadziwa amve, oaphunzire kuopa Yehova Mulungu wanu, masiku onse akukhala ndi moyo inu kudziko kumene muolokera Yordano kulilandira likhale lanu lanu." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Taona, ayandikira masiku ako akuti uyenera kufa; kaitane Yoswa, nimuoneke m'cihema cokomanako, kuti ndimlangize. Namuka Mose ndi Yoswa, naoneka m'cihema cokomanako." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Ndipo Yehova anaoneka m'cihema, m'mtambo njo; ndipo mtambo njo unaima pa khomo la cihema." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Mose, Taona, udzagona tulo ndi makolo ako; ndi anthu awa adzauka, oadzatsata ndi cigololo milungu yacilendo ya dziko limene analowa pakati pace, nadzanditava Ine, ndi kutyola cipangano canga ndinapangana naoco." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Pamenepo ndidzawapsera mtima tsiku ilo, ndipo ndidzawataya, ndi kuwabisira nkhope yanga, ndipo adzathedwa, ndi zoipa ndi zobvuta zambiri zidzawafikira; kotero kuti adzati tsiku lija, Sizitifikira kodi zoipa izi popeza Mulungu wathu sakhala pakati pa ife?" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Koma Ine ndidzabisatu nkhope yanga tsiku lija cifukwa ca zoipa zonse adazicita; popeza anadzitembenukira milungu yina. 
Deuteronomy31:19 Ndipo tsopano mudzilemberere nyimbo iyi, ndi kuphunzitsa ana a Israyeli iyi: mulike m'kamwa mwao, kuti nyimbo iyi indicitire mboni yotsutsa ana a Israyeli." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Pakuti nditakalowetsa awa m'dziko limene ndinalumbirira makolo ao, moyenda mkaka ndi uci ngati madzi; ndipo atadya nakhuta, nanenepa, pamenepo adzatembenukira milungu yina, ndi kuitumikira, ndi kundipeputsa Ine, ndi kutyola cipangano canga." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Ndipo kudzakhala, zitawafikira zoipa ndi zobvuta zambiri, nyimbo iyi idzacita mboni pamaso pao; popeza siidzaiwalika m'kamwa mwa mbeu zao; popeza ndidziwa zolingirira zao azicita lero lino, ndisanawalowetse m'dziko limene ndinalumbira." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Potero Mose analembera nyimboyi tsiku lomweli, naiphunzitsa ana a Israyeli." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Ndipo anauza Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, nati, Khala wamphamvu, nulimbe mtima; pakuti udzalowa nao ana a Israyeli m'dziko limene ndinawalumbirira: ndipo Ine ndidzakhala ndi iwe." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Ndipo kunali, Mose atatha kulembera mau a cilamulo ici m'buku, kufikira atalembera onse," 
Deuteronomy31:25 Mose anauza Alevi akunyamula likasa la cipangano la Yehova, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy31:26 Landirani buku ili la cilamulo, nimuliike pambali pa likasa la cipangano la Yehova Mulungu wanu, likhale komweko mboni yakutsutsa inu." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Pakuti ndidziwa kupikisana kwanu, ndi kupulukira kwanu; taonani, pokhala ndikali ndi moyo pamodzi ndi inu lero, mwapikisana ndi Yehova: koposa kotani nanga nditamwalira ine!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Ndisonkhanitsire akuru onse a mapfuko anu, ndi akapitao anu, kuti ndinene mau awa m'makutu mwao, ndi kucititsa mboni kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zitsutse iwo." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Pakuti ndidziwa kuti nditamwalira ine mudzadziipsa ndithu, ndi kupatuka m'njira imene ndinakuuzani; ndipo cidzakugwerani coipa masiku otsiriza; popeza mudzacita coipa pamaso pa Yehova, kuutsa mkwiyo wace ndi nchito za manja anu." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Ndipo Mose ananena mau a nyimbo iyi m'makutu mwa msonkhano wonse wa Israyeli, kufikira adatha." 
Deuteronomy32:1 Kumwamba kuchere khutu, ndipo ndidzanena; Ndi dziko lapansi limve mau a m'kamwa mwanga;" 
Deuteronomy32:2 Ciphunzitso canga cikhale ngati mvula; Maneno anga agwe ngati mame; Ngati mvula yowaza pamsipu, Ndi monga madontho a mvula pazitsamba." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Pakuti ndidzalalika dzina la Yehova; Nenani kuti Mulungu wathu ndi wamkulu. 
Deuteronomy32:4 Thanthwe, nchito yace ndi yangwiro; Pakuti njira zace zonse ndi ciweruzo; Mulungu wokhulupirika ndi wopanda cisalungamo; Iye ndiye wolungama ndi wolunjika," 
Deuteronomy32:5 Anamcitira zobvunda si ndiwo ana ace, cirema ncao; Iwo ndiwo mbadwo wopulukira ndi wokhotakhota." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Kodi mubwezera Yehova cotero, Anthu inu opusa ndi opanda nzeru? Kodi si ndiye Atate wanu, Mbuyewanu; Anakulengani, nakukhazikitsani?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Kumbukirani masiku akale, Zindikirani zaka za mibadwo yambiri; Funsani atate wanu, adzakufotokozerani; Akuru anu, adzakuuzani." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Pamene Wam'mwambamwamba anagawira amitundu colowacao, Pamene anagawa ana a anthu, Anaika malire a mitundu ya anthu, Monga mwa kuwerenga kwao kwa ana a Israyeli," 
Deuteronomy32:9 Pakuti gawo la Yehova ndilo anthu ace; Yakobo ndiye muyeso wa colowacace. 
Deuteronomy32:10 Anampeza m'dziko la mabwinja, ndi m'cipululu colira copanda kanthu; Anamzinga, anamlangiza, Anamsunga ngati kamwana lea m'diso;" 
Deuteronomy32:11 Monga mphungu ikasula cisa cace, Nikapakapa pa ana ace, Iye anayala mapiko ace, nawalandira, Nawanyamula pa mapiko ace;" 
Deuteronomy32:12 Yehova yekha anamtsogolera, Ndipo palibe mulungu wacilendo naye." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Anamuyendetsa pa misanje ya dziko lapansi, Ndipo anadya zipatso za m'minda; Namyamwitsa uci wa m'thanthwe, Ndi mafutam'mwala wansangalabwe;" 
Deuteronomy32:14 Mafuta a mkaka wang'ombe, ndi mkaka wankhosa, Ndi mafuta a ana a nkhosa, Ndi nkhosa zamphongo za mtundu wa ku Basana, ndi atonde, Ndi imso zonenepa zatirigu; Ndipo munamwa vinyo, mwazi wamphesa," 
Deuteronomy32:15 Koma Yesuruni anasanduka wonenepa, natazira; Wasanduka wonenepa, wakula, wakuta ndi mafuta; Pamenepo anasiya Mulungu amene anamlenga, Napeputsa thanthwe la cipulumutso cace." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Anamcititsa nsanje ndi milungu yacilendo, Anautsa mkwiyo wace ndi zonyansa." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Anaziphera nsembe ziwanda, si ndizo Mulungu ai; Milungu yosadziwa iwo, Yatsopano yofuma pafupi, Imene makolo anu sanaiopa," 
Deuteronomy32:18 Mwaleka Thanthwe limene linakubalani, Mwaiwala Mulungu amene anakulengani." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Ndipo Yehova anaciona, nawanyoza, Pakuipidwa nao ana ace amuna, ndi akazi." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Ndipo iye anati, Ndidzawabisira nkhope yanga, Ndidzaona kutsiriza kwao; Popeza iwo ndiwo mbadwo wopulukira, Ana osakhulupirika iwo." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Anautsa nsanje yanga ndi cinthu cosati Mulungu; Anautsa mkwiyo wanga om zopanda pace zao. Ndidzautsa nsanje yao ndi iwo osakhala mtundu wa anthu; Ndidzautsa mkwiyo wao ndi mtundu wa anthu opusa. 
Deuteronomy32:22 Pakuti wayaka moto mu mkwiyo wanga, Utentha kumanda kunsi Ukutha dziko lapansi ndi zipatso zace Nuyatsa maziko a mapiri," 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ndidzawaunjikira zoipa; Ndidzawathera nubvi yanga. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Adzaonda nayo njala Adzanyekeka ndi makala a moto, cionongeko cowawa; Ndipo ndidzawatumizira mana a zirombo, Ndi ululu wa zokwawa m'pfumbi." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Pabwalo lupanga lidzalanda, Ndi m'zipinda mantha; Lidzaononga mnyamata ndi namwali, Woyamwa pamodzi ndi munthu waimvi." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Ndinati, Ndikadawauzira ndithu, Ndikadafafaniza cikumbukiro cao mwa anthu;" 
Deuteronomy32:27 Ndikadapanda kuopa mkwiyo wapamdani, Angayese molakwa outsana nao, Anganene, Lakwezeka dzanja lathu, Ndipo Yehova sanacita ici conse." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Popeza iwo ndiwo mtundu wa anthu wosowa uphungu konse, Ndipo alibe cidziwitso." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Akadakhala nazo nzeru, akadazindikira ici, Akadasamalira citsirizo cao!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Mmodzi akadapitikitsa zikwi, Awiri akadathawitsa zikwi khumi, Akadapanda kuwagulitsa Thanthwelao, Akadapanda kuwapereka Yehova." 
Deuteronomy32:31 Popeza thanthwe lao nlosanga Thanthwe lathu, Oweruza a pamenepo ndiwo adani athu." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Pakuti mpesa wao ndiwo wa ku Sodomu, Ndi wa m'minda ya ku Gomora; Mphesa zao ndizo mphesa zandulu, Matsangwi ao ngowawa." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Vinyo wao ndiwo ululu wa zinjoka, Ndi ululu waukali wa mphiri." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Kodi sicisungika ndi Ine, Colembedwa cizindikilo mwa cuma canga ceni ceni?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Kubwezera cilango nkwanga, kubwezera komwe, Pa nyengo ya kuterereka phazi lao; Pakuti tsiku la tsoka lao layandika, Ndi zinthu zowakonzeratu zifulomira kudza." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Popeza Yehova adzaweruza anthuace, Nadzacitira nsoni anthu ace; Pakuona iye kuti mphamvu yao yatha, Wosatsala womangika kapena waufulu," 
Deuteronomy32:37 Pamenepo adzati, Iri kuti milunguyao, Thanthwe limene anathawirako?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Imene inadya mafuta a nsembe zao zophera, Nimwa vinyo wa nsembe yao yothira? Iuke nikuthandizeni, Ikhale pobisalapo panu." 
Deuteronomy32:39 Tapenyani tsopano kuti Ine ndine iye, Ndipo palibe mulungu koma Ine; Ndipha Ine, ndikhalitsanso ndi mayo: Ndikantha, ndicizanso Ine; Ndipo palibe wakulanditsa m'dzanja langa." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Pakuti ndikweza dzanja langa kuloza kumwamba, Ndipo nditi, Pali moyo wanga kosatha," 
Deuteronomy32:41 Ndikanola lupanga langa lonyezimira, Ndi dzanja langa likagwira ciweruzo; Ndidzabwezera cilango ondiukira, Ndi kulanga ondida." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Mibvi yanga ndiiledzeretsa nao mwazi, Ndi lupanga langa lidzalusira nyama; Ndi mwazi wa ophedwa ndi ogwidwa, Ndi mutu wacitsitsi wa mdani," 
Deuteronomy32:43 Kondwerani, amitundu inu, ndi anthu ace; Adzalipsira mwazi wa atumiki ace, Adzabwezera cilango akumuukira, Nadzafafanizira zoipa dziko lace, ndi anthu ace." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Ndipo anadza Mose nanena mau onse a nyimbo iyi m'makutu mwa anthu, iye, ndi Hoseya mwana wa Nuni." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Ndipo Mose anatha kunena mau awa onse kwa Israyeli wonse; 
Deuteronomy32:46 nati nao, Ikani mitima yanu pa mau onse ndikucitirani nao mboni lero; kuti muuze ana anu asamalire kuwacita mau onse a cilamulo ici." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Pakuti sicikhala kwa inu cinthu copanda pace, popeza ndico moyo wanu, ndipo mwa cinthu ici mudzacurukitsa masiku anu m'dziko limene muolokera Yordano, kulilandira." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Mose tsiku lomweli, ndi kuti," 
Deuteronomy32:49 Kwera m'phiri muno mwa Abarimu, phiri la Nebo, lokhala m'dziko la Moabu, popenyana ndi Yeriko; nupenye dziko la Kanani, limene ndipereka kwa ana a Israyeli likhale lao lao;" 
Deuteronomy32:50 nufe m'phiri m'mene ukweramo, nuitanidwe kumka kwa anthu a mtundu wako; monga Aroni mbale wako anafa m'phiri la Hori, naitanidwa kumka kwa anthu a mtundu wace;" 
Deuteronomy32:51 popeza munandilakwira pakati pa ana a Israyeli ku madzi a Meriba wa Kadesi m'cipululu ca Zini, popeza simunandipatula Ine pakati pa ana a Israyeli," 
Deuteronomy32:52 Pakuti udzapenya dzikoli pandunji pako; koma osalowako ku dziko limene ndipatsa ana a Israyeli. 
Deuteronomy33:1 Ndipo mdalitso, Mose munthu wa Mulungu anadalitsa nao ana a Israyeli asanafe, ndi uwu." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Ndipo anati, Yehova anafuma ku Sinai, Nawaturukiraku Seiri; Anaoneka wowala pa phiri la Parana, Anafumira kwa opatulika zikwi zikwi; Ku dzanja lamanja lace kudawakhalira lamulo lamoto." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Inde akonda mitundu ya anthu; Opatulidwa ace onse ali m'dzanjamwanu; Ndipo akhala pansi ku mapazi anu; Yense adzalandirako mau anu. 
Deuteronomy33:4 Mose anatiuza cilamulo, Colowa ca msonkhano wa Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Ndipo iye anali mfumu m'Yesuruni, Pakusonkhana mafumu a anthu, Pamodzi ndi mapfuko a Israyeli." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Rubeni akhale ndi moyo, asafe, Koma amuna ace akhale owerengeka." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Za Yuda ndi izi; ndipo anati, Imvani, Yehova, mau a Yuda, Ndipo mumfikitse kwa anthu ace; Manja ace amfikire; Ndipo mukhale inu thandizo lace pa iwo akumuukira." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Ndipo za Levi anati, Tumimu ndi Urimu wanu zikhala ndi wokondedwa wanu, Amene mudamuyesa m'Masa, Amene mudalimbana naye ku madzi a Meriba;" 
Deuteronomy33:9 Amene anati za atate wace ndi amai wace, Sindinamuone; Sanazindikira abale ace, Sanadziwa ana ace omwe; Popeza anasamalira mau anu, Nasunga cipangano canu." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Adzaphunzitsa Yakobo maweruzo anu, Ndi Israyeli cilamulo canu; Adzaika cofukiza pamaso panu, Ndi nsembe yopsereza yamphumphu pa guwa la nsembe lanu." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Dalitsani, Yehova, mphamvu yace, Nimulandire nchito ya manja ace; Akantheni m'cuuno iwo akumuukira, Ndi iwo akumuda, kuti asaukenso." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Za Benjamini anati, Wokondedwa wa Yehova adzakhala ndi iye mokhazikika; Amphimba tsiku lonse, Inde akhalitsa pakati pa mapewa ace." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Ndipo za Yosefe anati, Yehova adalitse dziko lace; Ndi zinthu zofunikatu za m'mwamba, ndi mame, Ndi madzi okhala pansipo;" 
Deuteronomy33:14 Ndi zipatso zofunikatu za dzuwa, Ndi zomera zofunikatu za mwezi," 
Deuteronomy33:15 Ndi zinthu zoposa za mapiri akale, Ndi zinthu zofunikatu za zitunda zosatha," 
Deuteronomy33:16 Ndi zinthu zofunikatu za dziko lapansi, ndi kudzala kwace, Ndi cibvomerezo ca iye anakhala m'citsambayo; Mdalitso ufike pa mutu wa Yosefe, Ndi pakati pa mutu wace wa iye wokhala padera ndi abale ace." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Woyamba kubadwa wa ng'ombe yace, ulemerero ndi wace; Nyanga zace ndizo nyanga zanjati; Adzatunga nazo mitundu ya anthu pamodzi, kufikira malekezero a dziko lapansi. Iwo ndiwo zikwi khumi za Efraimu, Iwo ndiwo zikwi za Manase." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Ndi za Zebuloni anati, Kondwera, Zebuloni, ndi kuturukakwako; Ndi Isakara, m'mahema mwako." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Adzaitana mitundu ya anthu afike kuphiri; Apo adzaphera nsembe za cilungamo; Popeza adzayamwa zocuruka za m'nyanja, Ndi cuma cobisika mumcenga." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Ndi za Gadi anati, Wodala iye amene akuza Gadi; Akhala ngati mkango waukazi, Namwetula dzanja, ndi pakati pa mutu pomwe." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Ndipo anadzisankhira gawo loyamba, Popeza kumeneko kudasungika gawo la wolamulira; Ndipo anadza ndi mafumu a anthu, Anacita cilungamo ca Yehova, Ndi maweruzo ace ndi Israyeli." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Ndi za Dani anati, Dani ndiye mwana wa mkango, Wakutumpha moturuka m'Basana." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Za Nafitali anati, Nafitali, wokhuta nazo zomkondweretsa, Wodzala ndi mdalitso wa Yehova; Landira kumadzulo ndi kumwela." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Ndi za Aseri anati, Aseri adalitsidwe mwa anawo; Akhale wobvomerezeka mwa abale ace, Abviike phazi lace m'mafuta." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Nsapato zako zikhale za citsulo ndi mkuwa; Ndipo monga masiku ako momwemo mphamvu yako. 
Deuteronomy33:26 Palibe wina ngati Mulungu, Yesuruni iwe, Wakuyenda wokwera pathambo, kukuthandiza, Ndi pa mitambo m'ukulu wace." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Mulungu wamuyaya ndiye mokhaliramo mwako; Ndi pansipo pali manja osatha. Ndipo aingitsa mdani pamaso pako, Nati, Ononga." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Ndipo Israyeli akhala mokhazikika pa yekha; Kasupe wa Yakobo; Akhala m'dziko la tirigu ndi vinyo; Inde thambo lace likukha mame. 
Deuteronomy33:29 Wodala iwe, Israyeli; Akunga iwe ndani, mtundu wa anthu opulumutsidwa ndi Yehova, Ndiye cikopa ca thandizo lako, Iye amene akhala lupanga la ukulu wako! Ndi adani ako adzakugonjera; Ndipo udzaponda pa misanje yao." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Ndipo Mose anakwera kucokera ku zidikha za Moabu, kumka ku phiri la Nebo, pamwamba pa Pisiga, popenyana ndi Yeriko. Ndipo Yehova anamuonetsa dziko lonse la Gileadi, kufikira ku Dani;" 
Deuteronomy34:2 ndi Nafitali lonse, ndi dziko la Efraimu, ndi Manase, ndi dziko lonse la Yuda, kufikira nyanja ya m'tsogolo;" 
Deuteronomy34:3 ndi kumwela, ndi cidikha eli cigwa ca Yeriko, mudzi wa migwalangwa, kufikira ku Zoari." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye, Si ili dziko ndinalumbirira Abrahamu, Isake, ndi Yakobo, ndi kuti, Ndidzalipereka kwa mbeu zako. Ndinakuonetsa ili m'maso, koma sudzaolokako." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Ndipo Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anamwalirako m'dziko la Moabu, monga mwa mau a Yehova." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Ndipo iye anamuika m'cigwa m'dziko la Moabu popenyana ndi Beti-peori; koma palibe munthu wakudziwa kumanda kwace kufikira lero lino. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Ndipo zaka zace za Mose ndizo zana limodzi ndi makumi awiri, pakumwalira iye; diso lace silinacita mdima, ndi mphamvu yace siidaleka." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Ndipo ana a Israyeli analira Mose m'zidikha za Moabu masiku makumi atatu; potero anatha masiku akulira maliro a Mose. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni anadzala ndi mzimu wanzeru; popeza Mose adamuikira manja ace; ndi ana a Israyeli anamvera iye, nacita monga Yehova adauza Mose." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Ndipo sanaukanso mnereri m'lsrayeli ngati Mose, amene Yehova anadziwana naye popenyana maso;" 
Deuteronomy34:11 kunena za zizindikilo ndi zozizwa zonse zimene Yehova anamtumiza kuzicita m'dziko la Aigupto kwa Farao, ndi anyamata ace onse, ndi dziko lace lonse;" 
Deuteronomy34:12 ndi kunena za dzanja la mphamvu lonse, ndi coopsa cacikuru conse, cimene Mose anacita pamaso pa Israyeli wonse." 
Joshua1:1 NDIPO atafa Mose mtumiki wa Yehova, Yehova anati kwa Yoswa mwana wa Nuni mnyamata wa Mose," 
Joshua1:2 Mose mtumiki wanga wafa; tauka tsono, nuoloke Yordano uyu, iwe ndi anthu awa onse, kulowa m'dzikomo ndirikuwapatsa, ndiwo ana a Israyeli." 
Joshua1:3 Pali ponse phazi lanu lidzapondapo ndinakupatsani, monga ndinanena ndi Mose." 
Joshua1:4 Kuyambira cipululu, ndi Lebano uyu, kufikira mtsinje waukulu mtsinje wa Firate, dziko lonse la Ahiti, ndi kufikira nyanja yaikuru ku malowero a dzuwa, ndiwo malire anu." 
Joshua1:5 Palibe munthu adzatha kuima pamaso pako masiku onse a moyo wako; monga ndinakhala ndi Mose momwemo ndidzakhala ndi iwe; sindidzakusowa, sindidzakusiya." 
Joshua1:6 Khala wamphamvu, nulimbike mtima, pakuti udzagawira anthu awa dzikoli likhale colowa cao, ndilo limene ndinalumbirira makolo ao kuwapatsa." 
Joshua1:7 Komatu khala wamphamvu, nulimbike mtima kwambiri, kuti usamalire kucita monga mwa cilamulo conse anakulamuliraco Mose mtumiki wanga; usacipambukire ku dzanja lamanja kapena kulamanzere, kuti ukacite mwanzeru kuli konse umukako." 
Joshua1:8 Buku ili la cilamulo lisacoke pakamwa pako; koma ulingiriremo usana ndi usiku, kuti usamalire kucita monga mwa zonse zolembedwamo; popeza ukatero udzakometsa njira yako, nudzacita mwanzeru." 
Joshua1:9 Kodi sindinakulamulira iwe? Khala wamphamvu, nulimbike mtima, usaope, kapena kutenga nkhawa, pakuti Yehova Mulungu wako ali ndi iwe kuli konse umukako." 
Joshua1:10 Pamenepo Yoswa analamulira akapitao a anthu, ndi kuti," 
Joshua1:11 Pitani pakati pa cigono, nimulamulire anthu, ndi kuti, Mudzikonzeretu kamba, pakuti asanapite masiku atatu mudzaoloka Yordano uyu, kulowa ndi kulandira dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani, likhale lanu lanu." 
Joshua1:12 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa Arubeni, ndi Agadi, ndi pfuko la Manase logawika pakati, ndi kuti," 
Joshua1:13 Kumbukilani mau amene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anakulamulirani inu, kuti, Yehova Mulungu wanu akupatsani mpumulo, nadzakupatsani dziko lino." 
Joshua1:14 Akazi anu, ana anu, ndi zoweta zanu zikhale m'dzikoli anakuninkhani Mose, tsidya lino la Yordano; koma inu muoloke okonzeka kunkhondo pamaso pa abale anu, ngwazi zonse, ndi kuwathandiza;" 
Joshua1:15 mpaka Yehova atapatsa abale anu mpumulo, monga umo anakuninkhirani inu, naonso alandira dzikolo awaninkha Yehova Mulungu wanu; pamenepo mubwerere ku dziko lanu lanu, ndi kukhala nalo, limene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anakupatsani tsidya lino la Yordano la kum'mawa," 
Joshua1:16 Ndipo anamyankha Yoswa, nati, Zonse mwatilamulira tidzacita, ndipo kuli konse mutitumako tidzamuka." 
Joshua1:17 Monga momwe tinamvera mau onse a Mose momwemo tidzamvera inu; komatu akhale ndi inu Yehova Mulungu wanu monga anakhala ndi Mose. 
Joshua1:18 Ali yense wakupikisana ndi inu, osamvera mau anu muli monse mukamlamulira, aphedwe; komatu khalani wamphamvu, nimulimbike mtima." 
Joshua2:1 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ali ku Sitimu, anatuma amuna awiri mosadziwika kukazonda, ndi kuti, Mukani, mulipenye dzikolo, ndi ku Yeriko. Ndipo anamuka nalowa m'nyumba ya mkazi wadama, dzina lace Rahabi, nagona momwemo." 
Joshua2:2 Ndipo wina anaiuza mfumu ya Yeriko, kuti, Taonani, usiku uno alowa muno amuna a ana a Israyeli, kulizonda dziko." 
Joshua2:3 Ndipo mfumu ya Yeriko inatuma wina kwa Rahabi, ndi kuti, Turutsa amunawo anafika kwanu, amene analowa m'nyumba mwako; popeza anadzera kulizonda dziko lonse." 
Joshua2:4 Koma mkaziyo anatenga amuna awiriwo, nawabisa; natero, Inde, amunawo anandifikira; koma sindinadziwa uko afuma;" 
Joshua2:5 ndipo m'mene akadati atseke pacipata, kutada, anaturuka amunawo; uko anamuka amunawo osakudziwa ine; muwalondole msanga, pakuti mudzawapeza." 
Joshua2:6 Koma adawakweretsa patsindwi, nawabisa ndi mitengo yanthamza yoyanika patsindwi." 
Joshua2:7 Ndipo amunawo anawalondola pa njira ya ku Yordano yomka kudooko; ndipo ataturuka akuwalondola, anatseka pacipata." 
Joshua2:8 Koma asanagone iwo, anawakwerera patsindwi iye," 
Joshua2:9 nati kwa amunawo, Ndidziwa kuti Yehova wakupatsani dzikoli, ndi kuti kuopsa kwanu kwatigwera, ndi kuti okhala m'dziko onse asungunuka pamaso panu." 
Joshua2:10 Popeza tidamva kuti Yehova anaphwetsa madzi a m'Nyanja Yofiira pamaso panu, muja mudaruruka m'Aigupto; ndi cija munacitira mafumu awiri a Aamori okhala tsidya la Yordano, ndiwo Sihoni ndi Ogi, amene mudawaononga konse." 
Joshua2:11 Ndipo titamva ici mitima yathu inasungunuka; anahbenso mtima ndi mmodzi yense, cifukwa ca inu; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndiye Mulungu wa m'mwamba umo, ndi pa dziko lapansi." 
Joshua2:12 Ndipo tsopano, mundilumbiriretu kwa Yehova, popeza ndakucitirani cifundo, kuti inunso mudzacitira cifundo a m'nyumba ya atate wanga ndi kundipatsa cizindikilo coona," 
Joshua2:13 kuti mudzawasunga ndi moyo atate wanga ndi mai wanga, ndi alongo anga ndi abale anga, ndi zonse ali nazo, ndi kupulumutsa miyoyo yathu kuimfa." 
Joshua2:14 Ndipo amunawo anati kwa iye, Moyo wathu ndiwo moyo wanu, mukapanda kuulula codzera ife; ndipo kudzakhala kuti, pakutipatsa ife dziko ili Yehova, tidzakucitira cifundo ndi coonadi." 
Joshua2:15 Pamenepo anawatsitsa pazenera ndi cingwe; popeza nyumba yace lnali pa linga La mudzi, nakhala iye palingapo." 
Joshua2:16 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mukani kuphiri, olondola angakupezeni; mubisale kumeneko masiku atatu, mpaka atabwerera olondolawo, pamenepo muyende ulendo wanu." 
Joshua2:17 Ndipo amunawo anati kwa iye, Sitidzacimwira lumbiro lako ili watilumbiritsali." 
Joshua2:18 Taona, tikadzalowa m'dzikomo ife, uzimanga cingwe ici cofiira pazenera pamene watitsitsira; ndipo udzasonkhanitsa m'nyumbamo atate wako ndi mai wako nui abale ako ndi a m'nyumba onse a atate wako." 
Joshua2:19 Ndipo kudzakhala kuti ali yense akadzaturuka pa khomo la nyumba yako kubwalo, imfa imeneyi ndi yace, tiribe kuparamula ife; koma ali yense adzakhala ndi iwe m'nyumba, likamfikira dzanja, imfa imeneyi ndi yathu." 
Joshua2:20 Koma ukaulula codzera ifeco tidzamasukira lumbiro lako watilumbiritsali. 
Joshua2:21 Nati iye, Momwemo, monga mwa mau anu. Ndipo anawauza amuke, iwo namuka; namanga iye cingwe cofiiraco pazenera." 
Joshua2:22 Ndipo anayenda iwo, nafika kuphiri, nakhalako masiku atatu mpaka atabwerera olondolawo; popeza olondolawo anawafunafuna panjira ponse, osawapeza." 
Joshua2:23 Pamenepo amuna awiriwo anabwerera, natsika m'phirimo naoloka, nafika kwa Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, namfotokozera zonse zidawagwera." 
Joshua2:24 Ndipo anati kwa Yoswa, Zoonadi, Yehova wapereka dziko lonse m'manja mwathu; ndiponso nzika zonse zasungunuka pamaso pathu." 
Joshua3:1 Ndipo Yoswa analawirira mamawa, kucoka ku Sitimu, nafika ku Yordano, iye ndi ana onse a Israyeli; nagona komweko, asanaoloke." 
Joshua3:2 Ndipo kunali atapita masiku atatu, akapitao anapita pakati pa cigono;" 
Joshua3:3 nalamulira anthu, ndi kuti, Mukadzaona likasa la cipangano la Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi ansembe Aleviwo atalisenza, pamenepo mucoke kwanu ndi kulitsata." 
Joshua3:4 Koma pakhale dera pakati pa inu ndi ilo, monga mikono zikwi ziwiri poliyesa; musaliyandikire, kuti mudziwe njira imene muziyendamo; popeza simunapita njirayi kufikira lero." 
Joshua3:5 Ndipo Yoswa ananena kwa anthu, Mudzipatule, pakuti mawa Yehova adzacita zodabwiza pakati pa inu." 
Joshua3:6 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa ansembe, Senzani likasa la cipangano, nimuoloke pamaso pa anthu. Nasenza iwo likasa la cipangano, natsogolera anthu." 
Joshua3:7 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Lero lino ndidzayamba kukukuza pamaso pa Aisrayeli onse, kuti adziwe, kuti monga momwe ndinakhalira ndi Mose, momwemo ndidzakhala ndi iwe." 
Joshua3:8 Ndipo uzilamulira ansembe akunyamula likasa la cipangano, ndi kuti, Pamene mufika kumphepete kwa madzi a Yordano muziima m'Yordano." 
Joshua3:9 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa ana a Israyeli, Idzani kuno, mumve mau a Yehova Molungu wanu." 
Joshua3:10 Nati Yoswa, Ndi ici mudzadziwa kuti Mulungu wamoyo ali pakati pa inu, ndi kuti adzapitikitsa ndithu pamaso panu Akanani, ndi Ahiti, ndi Ahivi, ndi Aperizi, ndi Agirigasi, ndi Aamori, ndi Ayebusi." 
Joshua3:11 Taonani, likasa la cipangano La Ambuye wa dziko lonse lapansi lioloka Yordano pamaso panu," 
Joshua3:12 Ndipo tsono, mudzitengere amuna khumi ndi awiri mwa mapfuko a Israyeli, pfuko limodzi mwamuna mmodzi." 
Joshua3:13 Ndipo kudzakhala, akaima mapazi a ansembe akusenza likasa la Yehova Ambuye wa dziko lonse, m'madzi a Yordano, adzadulidwa madziwo, ndiwo madzi ocokera kumagwero, nadzaima mulu umodzi." 
Joshua3:14 Ndipo kunali pocoka anthu ku mahema ao kukaoloka Yordano, ansembe anasenza likasa la cipangano pamaso pa anthu." 
Joshua3:15 Ndipo pamene iwo akusenza likasa anafika ku Yordano, nathibika m'mphepete mwa madzi mapazi a ansembe akusenza likasa, pakuti Yordano asefuka m'magombe ace onse, nyengo yonse ya masika," 
Joshua3:16 pamenepo madzi ocokera kumagwero anaima, nauka ngati mulu, kutalitu ku Adamu, ndiwo mudzi wa ku mbali ya Zaretani; koma madzi akutsikira kumka ku nyanja ya cidikha, ndiyo Nyanja ya Mcere, anadulidwa konse; ndipo anthu anaoloka pandunji pa Yeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Ndipo ansembe akulisenza likasa la cipangano la Yehova, anaima pouma pakati pa Yordano, ndi Aisrayeli onse anaoloka pouma mpaka mtundu wonse unatha kuoloka Yordano." 
Joshua4:1 Ndipo kunali, utatha kuoloka Yordano mtundu wonse, Yehova ananena ndi Yoswa, nati," 
Joshua4:2 Mudzitengere mwa anthu, amuna khumi ndi awiri, pfuko limodzi mwamuna mmodzi;" 
Joshua4:3 ndipo muwalamulire iwo ndi kuti, Mudzitengere pano pakati pa Yordano, poimapo mapazi a ansembe, miyala khumi ndi iwiri, ndi kuoloka nayo, ndi kulika m'mogona m'mene mugonamo usiku uno." 
Joshua4:4 Pamenepo Yoswa anaitana amuna khumi ndi awiriwo amene anawaikiratu mwa ana a Israyeli, pfuko limodzi mwamuna mmodzi;" 
Joshua4:5 nanena nao Yoswa, Olokani, kutsogolera likasa la Yehova Mulungu wanu pakati pa Yordano, nimudzisenzere yense mwala paphewa pace, monga mwa kuwerenga kwa mapfuko a ana a Israyeli;" 
Joshua4:6 kuti ici cikhale cizindikilo pakati pa inu. Akakufunsani ana anu m'tsogolomo, ndi kuti, Miyala iyi nja ciani ndi inu?" 
Joshua4:7 munene nao, Cifukwa madzi a Yordano anadulidwa patsogolo pa likasa la cipangano ca Yehova; muja lidaoloka Yordano, madzi a Yordano anadulidwa; ndipo miyala iyi idzakhala cikumbutso ca ana a Israyeli cikhalire." 
Joshua4:8 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anacita monga Yoswa anawalamulira, nasenza miyala khumi ndi iwiri pakati pa Yordano, monga Yehova adalankhula ndi Yoswa, monga mwa kuwerenga kwa mapfuko a ana a Israyeli; ndipo anaoloka nayo kumka kogona, naiika komweko." 
Joshua4:9 Ndipo Yoswa anaimika miyala khumi ndi iwiri pakati pa Yordano, poimapo mapazi a ansembe akusenza likasa la cipangano; ikhala komweko kufikira lero lino." 
Joshua4:10 Pakuti ansembe akusenza likasa anaima pakati pa Yordano, mpaka zitatha zonse Yehova adazilamulira Yoswa anene kwa anthu, monga mwa zonse Mose adalamulira Yoswa; ndipo anthu anafulumira kuoloka." 
Joshua4:11 Ndipo kunali, atatha kuoloka anthu onse, likasa la Yehova linaoloka, ndi ansembe, pamaso pa anthu." 
Joshua4:12 Ndipo ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi gawo lija la pfuko la Manase anaoloka ndi zida zao pamaso pa ana a Israyeli, monga Mose adanena nao;" 
Joshua4:13 ngati zikwi makumi anai ankhondo okonzeka anaoloka pamaso pa Yehova kuthira nkhondo ku zidikha za Yeriko. 
Joshua4:14 Tsiku lomwelo Yehova anakulitsa Yoswa pamaso pa Aisrayeli onse; ndipo anamuopa monga anaopa Mose, masiku onse amoyowace." 
Joshua4:15 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa," 
Joshua4:16 Lamulira ansembe akusenza likasa la umboni, kuti akwere kuturuka m'Yordano." 
Joshua4:17 Pamenepo Yoswa analamulira ansembe, ndi kuti, Kwerani kuturuka m'Yordano." 
Joshua4:18 Ndipo kunali, atakwera ansembe akusenza likasa la cipangano la Yehova, kuturuka pakati pa Yordano, nakwera pamtunda mapazi a ansembe, madzi a m'Yordano anabwera m'njira mwace, nasefuka m'magombe ace onse monga kale." 
Joshua4:19 Ndipo anthu anakwera kuturuka m'Yordano tsiku lakhumi la mwezi woyamba, namanga misasa ku Giligala, mbali ya ku m'mawa kwa Yeriko." 
Joshua4:20 Ndipo Yoswa anaimika ku Giligala miyala ija khumi ndi iwiri adaitenga m'Yordano. 
Joshua4:21 Ndipo anati kwa ana a Israyeli, Ana anu akadzafunsa atate ao masiku akudza, ndi kuti, Miyala iyi nja ciani?" 
Joshua4:22 pamenepo muzidziwitsa ana anu, ndi kuti, Israyeli anaoloka Yordano uyu pouma." 
Joshua4:23 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu anaphwetsa madzi a Yordano pamaso panu, mpaka mutaoloka; monga Yehova Mulungu wanu anacitira Nyanja Yofiira, imene anaiphwetsa pamaso pathu, mpaka titaoloka;" 
Joshua4:24 kuti mitundu yonse ya pa dziko lapansi idziwe dzanja la Yehova, kuti ndilo lamphamvu; kuti lope Yehova Mulungu wanu masiku onse." 
Joshua5:1 Ndipo kunali, pamene mafumu onse a Aamori okhala tsidya la kumadzulo la Yordano, ndi mafumu onse a Akanani okhala ku Nyanja ya Mcere anamvakuti Yehova anaphwetsa madzi a Yordano pamaso pa ana a Israyeli mpaka titaoloka, mtima wao unasungunuka, analibenso moyo cifukwa ca ana a Israyeli." 
Joshua5:2 Nthawi imeneyo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Udzisemere mipeni yamiyala, nudulenso ana a Israyeli kaciwiri." 
Joshua5:3 Ndipo Yoswa anadzisemera mipeni yamiyala nadula ana a Israyeli pa Gibeya Naraloti. 
Joshua5:4 Koma cifukwa cakuti Yoswa anawadula ndi ici: anthu onse oturuka m'Aigupto, anthu amuna, ndiwo amuna onse ankhondo, adafa m'cipululu panjira, ataturuka m'Aigupto." 
Joshua5:5 Pakuti anthu onse anaturukawo anadulidwa; koma anthu onse obadwa m'cipululu panjira poturuka m'Aigupto sanadulidwa. 
Joshua5:6 Pakuti ana a Israyeli anayenda m'cipululu zaka makumi anai, mpaka mtundu wonse wa amuna ankhondo oturuka m'Aigupto udatha, cifukwa ca kusamvera mau a Yehova; ndiwo amene Yehova anawalumbirira kuti sadzawaonetsa dziko limene Yehova analumbirira makolo ao kudzatipatsa, ndilo dziko moyenda mkaka ndi uci." 
Joshua5:7 Koma ana ao amuna amene anawautsa m'malo mwao, iwowa Yoswa anawadula; popeza anakhala osadulidwa, pakuti sanawadula panjira." 
Joshua5:8 Ndipo kunali, atatha kudula mtundu wonse, anakhala m'malo mwao m'cigono mpaka adacira." 
Joshua5:9 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Lero Uno ndakukunkhunizirani mtonzo wa Aigupto, Cifukwa cace dzina la malowo analicha Giligala kufikira lero lino." 
Joshua5:10 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anamanga misasa ku Giligala; nacita Paskha tsiku lakhumi ndi cinai la mwezi, madzulo, m'zidikha za Yeriko." 
Joshua5:11 Ndipo m'mawa mwace atatha Paskha, anadya tirigu wakhwimbi wa m'dziko, mikate yopanda cotupitsa ndi tirigu wokazinga tsiku lomwe lija." 
Joshua5:12 Koma m'mawa mwace mana analeka, atadya iwo tirigu wakhwimbi wa m'dziko; ndipo ana a Israyeli analibenso mana; koma anadya zipatso za dziko la Kanani caka comwe cija." 
Joshua5:13 Ndipo kunali, pokhala Yoswa ku Yeriko, anakweza maso ace, napenya, ndipo taona, panaima muthu pandunji pace ndi lupanga lace losolola m'dzanja lace; namuka Yoswa kuli iye, nati iye, Ubvomerezana ndi ife kapena ndi aelani athu?" 
Joshua5:14 Nati, lai, koma ndadza ine, kazembe wa ankhondo a Yehova. Pamenepo Yoswa anagwa nkhope yace pansi, napembedza, nati kwa iye, Anenanji Ambuyanga kwa mtumiki wace?" 
Joshua5:15 Ndipo kazembe wa ankhondo a Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Bvula nsapato yako pa phazi lako; pakuti malo upondapo mpopatulika. Nacita Yoswa comweco." 
Joshua6:1 Koma ku Yeriko anatseka pazipata, natsekedwa cifukwa ca ana a Israyeli, panalibe woturuka, panalibenso wolowa." 
Joshua6:2 Ndipo Yehova ananena kwa Yoswa, Taona, ndapereka m'dzanja lako Yeriko ndi mfumu yace, ndi ngwazi zace." 
Joshua6:3 Ndipo muzizungulira mudzi Inu nonse ankhondo, kuuzungulira mudzi kamodzi. Muzitero masiku asanu ndi limodzi." 
Joshua6:4 Ndipo ansembe asanu ndi awiri azinyamula mphalasa zisanu ndi ziwiri zanyanga: za nkhosa zamphongo, natsogolere nazo likasa; koma tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri muzizungulira mudziwo kasanu ndi kawirio ndi ansembe aziliza mphalasazo." 
Joshua6:5 Ndipo kudzakhala kuti akaliza cilizire ndi nyanga ya nkhosa yamphongo, nimumva kulira kwa mphalasa, anthu onse apfuule mpfuu yaikuru; ndipo linga la mudziwo lidzagwa pomwepo, ndi anthu adzakwera ndi kulowamo yense kumaso kwace." 
Joshua6:6 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni anaitana ansembe, nanena nao, Senzani likasa la cipangano, ndi ansembe asanu ndi awiri anyamule mphalasa zisanu ndi ziwiri zanyanga za nkhosa zamphongo, kutsogolera nazo likasa la Yehova." 
Joshua6:7 Nati kwa anthu, Pitani, muzizungulira mudzi, ndi ankhondo ndi zida zao atsogolere likasa la Yehova." 
Joshua6:8 Ndipo atanena kwa anthu Yoswa, ansembe asanu ndi awiri akunyamula mphalasa zisanu ndi ziwiri zanyanga za nkhosa zamphongo pamaso pa Yehova, anapita naliza mphalasazo; ndipo likasa la cipangano ca Yehova linawatsata." 
Joshua6:9 Ndipo okonzeka kunkhondo anatsogolera ansembe akuliza mphalasa, koma akudza m'mbuyo anatsata likasa, ansembe ali ciombere poyenda iwo." 
Joshua6:10 Ndipo Yoswa analamulira anthu, ndi kuti, Musamapfuula, kapena kumveketsa mau anu, asaturuke konse mau m'kamwa mwanu, mpaka tsiku lakunena nanu ine, Pfuulani; pamenepo muzipfuula." 
Joshua6:11 Ndipo anazungulitsa likasa la Yehova mudzi, kuzungulira kamodzi; pamenepo analowa kucigono, nagona m'mwemo." 
Joshua6:12 Ndipo Yoswa analawira mamawa, ndi ansembe anasenza likasa la Yehova." 
Joshua6:13 Ndipo ansembe asanu ndi awiri, akunyamula mphalasa zisanu ndi ziwiri zanyanga za nkhosa zamphongo ndi kutsogolera nazo likasa la Yehova, anayenda ciyendere naliza mphalasazo; ndi okonzeka kunkhondowo anawatsogolera, ndi akudza m'mbuyo anatsata likasa la Yehova, ansembe ali ciombere poyenda iwo." 
Joshua6:14 Ndipo tsiku laciwiri anazungulira mudzi kamodzi, nabwera kucigono; anatero masiku asanu ndi limodzi." 
Joshua6:15 Ndipo kunali, tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri analawira mamawa, mbandakuca, nazungulira mudzi mommuja kasanu ndi kawiri; koma tsiku lijalo anazungulira mudzi kasanu ndi kawiri." 
Joshua6:16 Ndipo kunali, pa nthawi yacisanu ndi ciwiri, pamene ansembe analiza mphalasa, Yoswa anati kwa anthu, Pfuulani; pakuti Yehova wakupatsani mudziwo." 
Joshua6:17 Koma mudziwo udzaperekedwa kwa Yehova ndi kuonongeka konse, uwu ndi zonse ziri m'mwemo; Rahabi yekha wadamayo adzakhala ndi moyo, iye ndi onse ali naye m'nyumba, cifukwa anabisa mithenga tinawatumawo." 
Joshua6:18 Ndipo inu, musakhudze coperekedwaco, mungadziononge konse, potapa coperekedwaco; ndi kuononga konse cigono ca Israyeli ndi kucisautsa." 
Joshua6:19 Koma siliva yense, ndi golidi yense, ndi zotengera za mkuwa ndi citsulo zikhala copatulikira Yehova; zilowe m'mosungira cuma ca Yehova." 
Joshua6:20 Ndipo anthu anapfuula, naliza mphalasa ansembe; ndipo kunali, pamene anthu anamva kulira kwa mphalasa, anapfuula anthu ndi mpfuu yaikuru, niligwa linga pomwepo; nakwera anthu kulowa m'mudzi, yense kumaso kwace; nalanda mudziwo." 
Joshua6:21 Ndipo anapereka kuziononga ndi lupanga lakuthwa zonse za m'mudzi, amuna ndi akazi omwe, ana ndi nkhalamba zomwe, kudza ng'ombe, ndi nkhosa, ndi aburu, ndi lupanga lakuthwa." 
Joshua6:22 Ndipo Yoswa ananena kwa amuna awiri anazonda dzikowo, Lowani m'nyumba ya mkazi wadamayo, ndi kuturutsamo mkaziyo ndi zonse ali nazo, monga munamlumbirira iye." 
Joshua6:23 Pamenepo anyamata ozondawo analowa, naturutsa Rahabi, ndi atate wace ndi mai wace ndi abale ace, ndi onse anali nao; anaturutsanso acibale ace onse; nawaika kunja kwa cigono ca Israyeli." 
Joshua6:24 Ndipo anatentha mudzi ndi moto, ndi zonse zinali m'mwemo; koma siliva ndi golidi ndi zotengera zamkuwa ndi zacitsulo anaziika m'mosungira cuma ca nyumba ya Yehova." 
Joshua6:25 Koma Rahabi, mkazi wadamayo ndi banja la atate wace, ndi onse anali nao, Yoswa anawasunga ndi moyo; ndipo anakhala pakati pa Israyeli mpaka lero tino; cifukwa anabisa mithenga imene Yoswa anaituma kuzonda Yeriko." 
Joshua6:26 Ndipo Yoswa anawalumbirira nyengo ija, ndi kuti, Wotembereredwa pamaso pa Yehova munthu amene adzauka ndi kumanga mudzi uwu wa Yeriko; adzamanga kuzika kwace ndi kutayapo mwana wace woyamba, nadzaimika zitseko zace ndi kutayapo mwana wace wotsirizira." 
Joshua6:27 Potero Yehova anakhala ndi Yoswa; ndi mbiri yace inabuka m'dziko lonse. 
Joshua7:1 Koma ana a Israyeli analakwa ndi coperekedwaco; popeza Akani mwana wa Karimi, mwana wa Zabidi, mwana wa Zera, wa pfuko la Yuda, anatapa coperekedwaco; ndi mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira ana a Israyeli." 
Joshua7:2 Ndipo Yoswa anatuma amuna kucokera ku Yeriko apite ku Ai, ndiwo pafupi pa Beti-aveni, kum'mawa kwa Beteli; nanena nao, Kwerani ndi kukazonda dziko. Nakwera amunawo, nazonda Ai." 
Joshua7:3 Ndipo anabwera kwa Yoswa, nati kwa iye, Asakwere anthu onse; koma akwere amuna ngati zikwi ziwiri kapena zitatu kukantha Ai; musalemetsa anthu onse kumkako, pakuti a komweko ndi owerengeka;" 
Joshua7:4 Potero mwa anthu anakwerako amuna monga zikwi zitatu; koma anathawa pamaso pa amuna a ku Ai. 
Joshua7:5 Ndipo amuna a ku Ai anawakantha amuna, ngati makumi atatu mphambu asanu ndi mmodzi; nawapitikitsa kuyambira pacipata mpaka ku Sebarimu, nawakantha potsika; ndi mitima ya anthu inasungunuka inga madzi." 
Joshua7:6 Ndipo Yoswa anang'amba zobvala zace, nagwa nkhope yace pansi, ku likasa la Yehova, mpaka madzulo, iye ndi akulu akulu a Israyeli, nathira pfumbi pamitu pao." 
Joshua7:7 Ndipo Yoswa anati, Ha! Ambuye, Yehova, mwaolotseranji anthu awa pa Yordano, kutipereka ife m'dzanja la Aamori, kutiononga ife? mwenzi titalola ndi kukhala tsidya lija la Yordano!" 
Joshua7:8 Ndidzanenanji, Ambuye, Israyeli atabwerera m'mbuyo pamaso pa adani ao?" 
Joshua7:9 Akadzamva ici Akanani ndi okhala m'dziko onse, adzatizinga ndi kuduliratu dzina lathu pa dziko lapansi; ndipo mudzacitiranji dzina lanu lalikuru?" 
Joshua7:10 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Tauka, wagweranji pankhope pako cotere?" 
Joshua7:11 Israyeli wacimwa, nalakwiranso cipangano canga, ndinawalamuliraco; natengakonso coperekedwaco; anabanso, nanyenganso, naciika pakati pa akatundu ao." 
Joshua7:12 Mwa ici ana a Israyeli sangathe kuima pamaso pa adani ao, awafulatira adani ao, pakuti aperekedwa aonongeke. Sindidzakhalanso nanu mukapanda kuononga coperekedwaco, kucicotsa pakati pa inu." 
Joshua7:13 Tauka, patula anthu, nuti, Mudzipatulire mawa; pakuti atero Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, Pali coperekedwa cionongeke pakati pako, Israyeli iwe; sukhoza kuima pamaso pa adani ako, mpaka mutacotsa coperekedwaco pakati panu." 
Joshua7:14 Koma m'mawa adzakuyandikitsani, pfuko ndi pfuko; ndipo kudzali kuti pfukoli Yehova aliulula lidzayandikira mwa zibale zace; ndi cibale Yehova aciulula cidzayandikira monga mwa a nyumba ace; ndi a m'nyumbawo Yehova awaulula adzayandikira mmodzi mmodzi." 
Joshua7:15 Ndipo kudzali kuti iye wogwidwa ali naco coperekedwaco adzatenthedwa ndi moto, iye ndi zonse ali nazo cifukwa analakwira cipangano ca Yehova, ndi cifukwa anacita copusa m'Israyeli." 
Joshua7:16 Ndipo Yoswa analawira mamawa, nayandikizitsa Israyeli, pfuko ndi pfuko; ndi pfuko la Yuda linagwidwa;" 
Joshua7:17 nayandikizitsa zibale za Yuda, nagwira cibale ca Azari; nayandikizitsa cibale ca Azari, mmodzi mmodzi, nagwidwa Zabidi;" 
Joshua7:18 nayandikizitsa a m'nyumba yace mmodzi mmodzi; ndipo Akani, mwana wa Karimu, mwanu wa Zabidi, mwana wa Zera, wa pfuko la Yuda anagwidwa." 
Joshua7:19 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa Akani, Mwana wanga, ucitiretu ulemu Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, numlemekeze iye; nundiuze tsopano, wacitanji? usandibisire." 
Joshua7:20 Ndipo Akani anayankha Yoswa nati, Zoonadi, ndacimwira Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, ndacita zakuti zakuti;" 
Joshua7:21 pamene ndinaona pazofunkha maraya abwino a ku Babulo, ndi masekeli mazana awiri a siliva, ndi cikute cagolidi, kulemera kwace masekeli makumi asanu, ndinazikhumbira ndi kuzitenga; ndipo taonani, ndazibisa m'nthaka pakati pa hema wanga, ndi siliva pansi pacepo." 
Joshua7:22 Pamenepo Yoswa anatuma mithenga, iwo nathamangira kuhema; ndipo taonani, zidabisika m'hema mwace ndi siliva pansi pace." 
Joshua7:23 Ndipo anazicotsa pakati pa hema, nabwera nazo kwa Yoswa ndi kwa ana onse a Israyeli, nazitula pamaso pa Yehova." 
Joshua7:24 Ndipo Yoswa, ndi Aisrayeli onse naye, anatenga Akani mwana wa Zera, ndi siliva, ndi marayawo, ndi cikute cagolidi, ndi ana ace amuna ndi akazi, ndi ng'ombe zace, ndi aburu ace, ndi nkhosa zace, ndi hema wace ndi zace zonse; nakwera nazo ku cigwa ca Akori." 
Joshua7:25 Ndipo Yoswa anati, Watisautsiranji? Yehova adzakusautsa lero lino. Ndipo, Aisrayeli onse anamponya miyala, nawatentha ndi moto, nawaponya miyala." 
Joshua7:26 Ndipo anamuuniikira mulu waukuru wamiyala, wokhalako kufikira lero lino; ndipo Yehova anatembenuka kusiya mkwiyo wace waukuru. Cifukwa cace anacha dzina lace la malowo, Cigwa ca Akori, mpaka lero lino." 
Joshua8:1 Pamenepo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Usaope, kapena kutenga nkhawa, tenga anthu onse a nkhondo apite nawe, ndipo tauka, kwera ku Ai; taona, ndapereka m'dzanja lako mfumu ya ku Ai, ndi anthu ace ndi mudzi wace ndi dziko lace;" 
Joshua8:2 ndipo uzimcitira Ai ndi mfumu yace monga umo unamcitira Yeriko ndi mfumu yace; koma zofunkha zace ndi ng'ombe zace mudzifunkhire nokha; udziikire anthu aja lire kukhonde kwa mudzi. 
Joshua8:3 Pamenepo anauka Yoswa, ndi anthu onse a nkhondo, kuti akwere ku Ai; ndipo Yoswa anasankha amuna zikwi makumi atatu, ndiwo ngwazi, nawatumiza apite usiku," 
Joshua8:4 nawalamulira ndi kuti, Taonani, muzikhala olalira kukhonde kwa mudzi; musakhalira kutali ndi mudzi, koma mukhale okonzekeratu nonse;" 
Joshua8:5 ndipo ine, ndi anthu onse ali nane, tidzayandikira mudzi; ndipo kudzali, pamene aturuka kudzakomana nafe, monga poyamba paja, tidzathawa pamaso pao;" 
Joshua8:6 ndipo adzaturuka kutitsata mpaka tidawakokera asiyane ndi mudzi; pakuti adzanena, Atithawa pamaso pathu monga poyamba pala; nafenso tidzathawa pamaso pao;" 
Joshua8:7 pamenepo muziuka m'molalira ndi kulowa m'mudzi; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu adzaupereka m'manja mwanu. 
Joshua8:8 Ndipo kudzali, mutagwira mudzi, muzitentha mudziwo ndi moto; muzicita monga mwa mau a Yehova; taonani, ndakulamulirani." 
Joshua8:9 Ndipo Yoswa anawatuma, namuka iwo kulowa m'molalira, nakhala pakati pa Beteli ndi Ai, kumadzulo kwa Ai; koma Yoswa anakhala mwa anthu usiku uja." 
Joshua8:10 Ndipo Yoswa analawira mamawa, nayesa anthu, nakwera, iye ndi akuru a Israyeli, pamaso pa anthu a ku Ai." 
Joshua8:11 Ndi anthu onse a nkhondo okhala naye anakwera, nayandikira nafika pamaso pa mudzi, namanga misasa kumpoto kwa Ai; koma pakati pa iye ndi Ai panali cigwa." 
Joshua8:12 Ndipo anatenga amuna ngati zikwi zisanu, nawaika m'molalira pakati pa Beteli ndi Ai, kumadzulo kwa mudzi." 
Joshua8:13 Momwemo anaika anthu, khamu lonse lokhala kumpoto kwa mudzi, ndi olalira ao kumadzulo kwa mudzi, ndipo usiku uja Yoswa analowa pakati pa cigwa," 
Joshua8:14 Ndipo kunali, pamene mfumu ya ku Ai anaciona, anafulumira iwo, nalawira mamawa, naturuka amuna a m'mudzi kuthirana ndi Israyeli, iye ndi anthu ace onse, poikidwiratu patsogolo pa cidikha; popeza sanadziwa kuti amlalira kukhonde kwa mudzi." 
Joshua8:15 Ndipo Yoswa ndi Aisrayeli onse anaoneka ngati a ku Ai alikuwathyola, nathawira njira ya kucipululu." 
Joshua8:16 Pamenepo anthu onse okhala m'mudzi, anaitanidwa awapitikitse, nampitikitsa Yoswa, nakokedwa kusiyana ndi mudzi." 
Joshua8:17 Ndipo sanatsala mwamuna mmodzi yense m'Ai kapena m'Beteli osaturukira kwa Israyeli; nasiya mudzi wapululu, napitikitsa Israyeli." 
Joshua8:18 Pamenepo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Tambasula nthungo iri m'dzanja lako iloze ku Ai, pakuti ndidzaupereka m'dzanja lako. Ndipo Yoswa anatambasula nthungoyo inali m'dzanja lace kuloza mudzi." 
Joshua8:19 Nauka msanga olalirawo m'mbuto mwao, nathamanga pamene anatambasula dzanja lace, nalowa m'mudzi, naugwira; nafulumira nayatsa mudziwo." 
Joshua8:20 Pamene amuna a ku Ai anaceuka, anapenya, ndipo taonani, utsi wa mudzi unakwera kumwamba; nasowa mphamvu iwo kuthawa cakuno kapena cauko; ndi anthu othawira kucipululu anatembenukira owapitikitsa." 
Joshua8:21 Ndipo pakupenya Yoswa ndi Israyeli yense kuti olalirawo adagwira mudzi, ndi kuti utsi wa mudzi unakwera, anabwerera, nawapha amuna a ku Ai." 
Joshua8:22 A kumudzinso anawaturukira; potero anakhala pakati pa Israyeli, ena mbali yina, ena mbali yina; ndipo anawakantha, mpaka sanatsala kapena kupulumuka wa iwo ndi mmodzi yense." 
Joshua8:23 Koma mfumu ya ku Ai anamgwira wamoyo, nadza naye kwa Yoswa." 
Joshua8:24 Ndipo kunali, atatha Israyeli kupha nzika zonse za ku Ai, kuthengo, kucipululu kumene anawapitikitsira, natha onse kugwa ndi lupanga lakuthwa mpaka adathedwa onse, Aisrayeli onse anabwerera ku Ai, naukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa." 
Joshua8:25 Ndipo onse amene adagwa tsiku lija, amuna ndi akazi, ndiwo zikwi khumi ndi ziwiri, anthu onse a ku Ai." 
Joshua8:26 Popeza Yoswa sanabweza dzanja lace limene anatambasula nalo nthungo, mpaka ataononga konse nzika zonse za ku Ai." 
Joshua8:27 Koma ng'ombe ndi zofunkha za mudzi uwu Israyeli anadzifunkhira monga mwa mau a Yehova amene analamulira Yoswa. 
Joshua8:28 Ndipo Yoswa anatentha Ai, nausandutsa muunda ku nthawi yonse, bwinja kufikira lero lino." 
Joshua8:29 Ndipo mfumu ya ku Ai, anampacika pamtengo mpaka madzulo; koma polowa dzuwa Yoswa analamulira kuti atsitse mtembo wace pamtengo; ndipo anauponya polowera pa cipata ca mudzi; nauniikako mulu waukuru wamiyala, mpaka lero lino." 
Joshua8:30 Pomwepo Yoswa anamangira Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli guwa la nsembe m'phiri la Ebala," 
Joshua8:31 monga Mose mtumiki wa Mulungu adalamulira ana a Israyeli, monga mulembedwa m'buku la cilamulo ca Mose, guwa la nsembe la miyala yosasema, yoti palibe munthu anakwezapo citsulo; ndipo anafukizirapo Yehova nsembe zopsereza, naphera nsembe zoyamika." 
Joshua8:32 Ndipo analembapo pa miyalayi citsanzo ca cilamulo ca Mose, cimene analembera pamaso pa ana a Israyeli." 
Joshua8:33 Ndipo Aisrayeli onse, ndi akuru ao, ndi akapitao ao, ndi oweruza ao anaima cakuno ndi cauko ca likasa, pamaso pa ansembe Alevi, akusenza likasa la cipangano la Yehova, mbadwa ndi alendo omwe; ena a iwo pandunji pa phiri la Gerizimu, ndi ena pandunji pa phiri la Ebala; monga Mose, mtumiki wa Yehova, adalamulira poyamba pala kuti adalitse anthu a Israyeli," 
Joshua8:34 Atatero, anawerenga mau onse a cilamulo, dalitso ndi temberero, monga mwa zonse zolembedwa m'buku la cilamulo." 
Joshua8:35 Panalibe mau amodzi a zonse adazilamulira Mose osawerenga Yoswa pamaso pa msonkhano wonse wa Israyeli, ndi akazi ndi ang'ono, ndi alendo akuyenda pakati pao." 
Joshua9:1 Yoswa anyengedwa ndi Agibeoni napangana nao. Ndipo kunali, pakumva ici mafumu onse a tsidya ilo la Yordano, kumapiri ndi kucidikha, ndi ku madoko onse a nyanja yaikuru, pandunji pa Lebano: Ahiti ndi Aamori, Akanani, Aperizi, Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi;" 
Joshua9:2 anasonkhana kuponyana ndi Yoswa ndi Israyeli, ndi mtima umodzi." 
Joshua9:3 Koma pamene nzika za Gibeoni zinamva zimene Yoswa adacitira Yeriko ndi Ai," 
Joshua9:4 zinacita momcenierera, nizimuka nizioneka ngati mithenga, nizitenga matumba akale pa aburu ao, ndi matumba a vinyo akale ndi ong'ambika ndi omangamanga;" 
Joshua9:5 ndi nsapato zakale za zigamba pa mapazi ao, nizibvala nsanza; ndi mikate yonse ya kamba wao inali youma ndi yoyanga nkhungu." 
Joshua9:6 Ndipo zinamuka kwa Yoswa kumisasa ku Giligala, niziti kwa iye ndi kwa amuna a Israyeli, Tacokera dziko lakutali, cifukwa cace mupangane nafe." 
Joshua9:7 Ndipo amuna a Israyeli anati kwa Ahivi, Kapena mulimkukhala pakati pa ife, ndipo tipanganenji ndi inu?" 
Joshua9:8 Koma anati kwa Yoswa, Ndife akapolo anu. Pamenepo Yoswa anati kwa iwo, Ndinu ayani? ndipo mufuma kuti" 
Joshua9:9 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Akapolo anu afumira dziko la kutalitali, cifukwa lea dzina la Yehova Mulungu wanu; pakuti tidamva mbiri yace, ndi zonse anacita m'Aigupto," 
Joshua9:10 ndi zonse anacitira mafumu awiri a Aamori okhala tsidya lija la Yordano, Sihoni mfumu ya ku Hesiboni, ndi Ogi mfumu ya ku Basana wokhala ku Asitorotu." 
Joshua9:11 Ndipo akuru athu ndi nzika zonse za m'dziko mwathu zidanena nafe ndi kuti, Mutenge m'dzanja lanu kamba wa paulendo, kakomane naoni, nimunene nao, Ndife akapolo anu; ndipo tsopano mupangane nafe." 
Joshua9:12 Mkate wathu uwu tinadzitengera kamba m'nyumba zathu, ukali wamoto, tsiku loturuka Ife kudza kwanu kuno; koma tsopano, taonani, uli wouma ndi woyaoga nkhungu;" 
Joshua9:13 ndi matumba a vinyo awa tinawadzaza akali atsopano; ndipo taonani, ang'ambika; ndi malaya athu awa ndi nsapato zathu zatha, cifukwa ca ulendo wocokera kutali ndithu." 
Joshua9:14 Pamenepo amunawo analandirako kamba wao, osafunsira pakamwa pa Yehova." 
Joshua9:15 Ndipo Yoswa anacitirana nao mtendere, napangana nao, akhale amoyo; ndi akalonga a msonkhano anawalumbirira," 
Joshua9:16 Ndipo kunali, atatha kupangana nao masiku atatu, anamva kuti ndiwo anansi ao, ndi kuti kwao ndi pakati pao," 
Joshua9:17 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anayenda ulendo, nafika ku midzi yap tsiku lacitatu. Koma midzi yao ndiyo Gibeoni, ndi Cefira, ndi Beerotu ndi KiriyatuYearimu." 
Joshua9:18 Ndipo ana a Israyeli sanawakantha, pakuti akalonga a msonkhano adawalumbirira kwa Yehova, Mulungu wa Israyeli. Ndipo msonkhano wonse unadandaula pa akalonga," 
Joshua9:19 Koma akalonga onse ananena kwa msonkhano wonse, Tinawalumbirira kwa Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, m'mwemo sitikhoza kuwacitira kanthu." 
Joshua9:20 Tidzawacitira ici, ndi kuwasunga amoyo; ungatigwere mkwiyo cifukwa ca lumbirolo tidawalumbirira." 
Joshua9:21 Ndipo akalonga ananena nao, Akhale ndi moyo; ndipo anasanduka akutema nkhuni, ndi otungira madzi msonkhano wonse; monga akalonga adanena nao." 
Joshua9:22 Ndipo Yoswa anawaitana, nanena nao, kuti, Mwatinyenga cifukwa ninji, ndi kuti, Tikhala kutaritari ndi inu, pokhala kwanu kuli pakati pa ife?" 
Joshua9:23 Ndipo tsopano mukhale otembereredwa, palibe mmodzi wa inu adzamasuka wosakhala kapolo, ndi kutemera nkhuni, ndi kutungira madzi nyumba ya Mulungu wanga." 
Joshua9:24 Ndipo anamyankha Yoswa nati, Popeza anatiuzitsa akapolo anu kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu analamulira mtumiki wace Mose kukupatsani dziko lonseli, ndi kupasula nzika zonse za m'dziko pamaso panu; potero tinaopera kwambiri moyo wathu pamaso panu, ndipo tinacita cinthuci." 
Joshua9:25 Ndipo tsopano, taonani, tiri m'dzanja lanu; monga muyesa cokoma ndi coyenera kuticitira ife, citani." 
Joshua9:26 Pamenepo anawacitira cotero, nawalanditsa m'dzanja la ana a Israyeli, angawaphe." 
Joshua9:27 Ndipo tsiku lija Yoswa anawasandutsa akutema nkhuni, ndi otungira madzi msonkhanowo, ndi guwa la nsembe la Yehova, mpaka lero lino, pamalopo akadzasankha." 
Joshua10:1 Ndipo kunali, pamene Adoni-Zedeki mfumu ya Yerusalemu anamva kuti Yoswa adalanda Ai, ndi kumuononga konse; nacitira Ai ndi mfumu yace monga adacitira Yeriko ndi mfumu yace; ndi kuti nzika za Gibeoni zinacitirana mtendere ndi Israyeli, nizikhala pakati pao;" 
Joshua10:2 anaopa kwambiri, popeza Gibeoni ndi mudzi waukuru, monga wina wa midzi yacifumu, popezanso unaposa Ai kukula kwace, ndi amuna ace onse ndiwo amphamvu." 
Joshua10:3 Cifukwa cace Adoni-Zedeki anatuma kwa Hohamu, mfumu ya Hebroni, ndi kwa Piraniu mfumu ya Yarimutu, ndi kwa Yafiya mfumu ya Lakisi, ndi kwa Dibri mfumu va Egiloni, ndi kuti," 
Joshua10:4 Kwerani kwanga kuno, ndi kundithandiza kuti tikanthe Gibeoni, pakuti unacitirana mtendere ndi Yoswa ndi ana a Israyeli." 
Joshua10:5 Pamenepo mafumu asanu a Aamori, ndiwo mfumu ya ku Yerusalemu, mfumu ya ku Hebroni, mfumu ya ku Yarimutu, mfumu ya ku Lakisi, mfumu ya ku Egiloni anasonkhana, nakwera iwo ndi makamu ao onse namanga misasa pa Gibeoni, nauthira nkhondo." 
Joshua10:6 Ndipo amuna a ku Gibeoni anatumira Yoswa mau kucigono ku Giligala, ndi kuti, Musalekerere akapolo anu; mutikwerere msanga, ndi kutipulumutsa, ndi kutithandiza; pakuti mafumu onse a Aamori, akukhala kumapiri atisonkhanira." 
Joshua10:7 Pamenepo Yoswa anakwera kucokera ku Giligala, iye ndi anthu onse a nkhondo pamodzi naye, ndi ngwazi yose." 
Joshua10:8 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Yoswa, Usawaope, pakuti ndawapereka m'dzanja lako; palibe mmodzi wa iwo adzaima pamaso pako." 
Joshua10:9 Ndipo Yoswa anawadzidzimukitsa; popeza anakwera kucokera ku Giligala usiku wonse. 
Joshua10:10 Ndipo Yehova anawamwaza pamaso pa Israyeli, ndipo anawakantha makanthidwe akuru ku Gibeoni, nawapitikitsa pa njira yokwera ya Betihoroni, nawakantha mpaka Azeka, ndi mpaka Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 Ndipo kunali, pakuthawa iwo pamaso pa Israyeli, potsikira pa Betihoroni, Yehova anawagwetsera miyala yaikuru yocokera kumwamba mpaka pa Azeka, nafa iwo; akufa ndi miyala yamatalala anacuruka ndi iwo amene ana a Israyeli anawapha ndi lupanga." 
Joshua10:12 Pomwepo Yoswa ananena kwa Yehova tsiku limene Yehova anapereka Aamori pamaso pa ana a Israyeli; ndipo anati pamaso pa Israyeli, Dzuwa iwe, linda, pa Gibeoni, Ndi Mwezi iwe, m'cigwa ca Aialo." 
Joshua10:13 Ndipo dzuwa linalinda, ndi mwezi unaima Mpaka anthu adabwezera cilango adani ao. Kodi ici sicilembedwa m'buku la Yasari? Ndipo dzuwa linakhala pakati pa thambo, losafulumira kulowa ngati tsiku lamphumphu." 
Joshua10:14 Ndipo panalibe tsiku lotere kale lonse kapena m'tsogolomo, lakuti Yehova anamvera mau a munthu; pakuti Yehova anathirira Israyeli nkhondo." 
Joshua10:15 Pamenepo Yoswa anabwerera, ndi Aisrayeli onse pamodzi naye, ku cigono ca ku Giligala." 
Joshua10:16 Ndipo mafumu awa asanu anathawa, nabisala m'phanga la ku Makeda," 
Joshua10:17 Ndipo anauza Yoswa ndi kuti, Mafumu asanuwa apezeka obisala m'phanga la ku Makeda." 
Joshua10:18 Ndipo Yoswa anati, Kunkhunizirani miyala yaikuru kukamwa kwa phanga, ndi kuikapo anthu, awasunge;" 
Joshua10:19 koma inu musaime, pitikitsani adani anu, ndi kukantha a m'mbuyo mwao; musawalole alowe m'midzi mwao; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu anawapereka m'dzanja lanu." 
Joshua10:20 Ndipo kunali, Yoswa ndi ana a Israyeli atatha kuwakantha, makanthidwe akurukuru mpaka atatha psiti, ndipo otsala a iwo atalowa m'midzi ya malinga," 
Joshua10:21 anthu onse anabwerera kucigono kwa Yoswa pa Makeda ndi mtendere. Palibe munthu anacitira cipongwe mmodzi yense wa ana a Israyeli. 
Joshua10:22 Pamenepo Yoswa anati, Tsegula pakamwa pa phanga ndi kunditurutsira m'phanga mafumu asanuwo." 
Joshua10:23 Ndipo anatero, naturutsira m'phanga mafumu asanuwo, mfumu ya ku Yerusalemu, mfumu ya ku Hebroni, mfumu ya ku Yarimutu, mfumu ya ku Lakisi, mfumu ya ku Egiloni." 
Joshua10:24 Ndipo kunali, ataturutsira Yoswa mafumu awa, Yoswa anaitana amuna onse a Israyeli, ndipo anati kwa akazembe a anthu a nkhondo amene anamuka naye, Yandikirani, pondani pa makosi a mafumu awa. Nayandikira iwo, naponda pa makosi ao." 
Joshua10:25 Pamenepo Yoswa ananena nao, Musaope, musatenge nkhawa; khalani amphamvu, nimulimbike mtima; pakuti Yehova adzatero ndi adani: anu onse amene mugwirana nao: nkhondo." 
Joshua10:26 Ndipo atatero, Yoswa anawakantha nawapha, nawapacika pa mitengo isanu; nalikupacikidwa pa mitengo mpaka madzulo." 
Joshua10:27 Ndipo kunali, nthawi yakulowa dzuwa, Yoswa analamulira kuti awatsitse kumitengo; ndipo anawataya m'phanga m'mene adabisala; naika miyala yaikuru pakamwa pa phanga, mpaka lero lomwe lino." 
Joshua10:28 Ndipo Yoswa anagwira Makeda tsiku lomwe lija ndi kuukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, ndi mfumu yace yom we; anawaononga konse, ndi amoyo onse anali m'mwemo, osasiyapo ndi mmodzi yense, nacitira mfumu ya ku Makeda monga anacitira mfumu ya ku Yeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Pamenepo Yoswa ndi Aisrayeli onse naye anapitirira kucokera ku Makeda kumka ku Libina, nathira nkhondo pa Libina;" 
Joshua10:30 ndipo Yehova anapereka uwunso, ndi mfumu yace m'dzanja la Israyeli; ndipo anaukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, ndi amoyo onse anali m'mwemo, osasiyamo ndi mmodzi yense; namcitira mfumu yace monga anacitira mfumu ya ku Yeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Ndipo Yoswa, ndi Aisrayeli onse naye, anapitirira kucokera ku Libina kumka ku Lakisi; namanga misasa, nathira nkhondo pa uwo;" 
Joshua10:32 napereka Yehova Lakisi m'dzanja la Israyeli, ndipo anaulanda tsiku laciwiri, naukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, ndi amoyo onse anali m'mwemo monga mwa zonse anacitira Libina." 
Joshua10:33 Pamenepo Horamu mfumu ya Gezere anakwera kudzathandiza Lakisi; ndipo Yoswa anamkantha iye ndi anthu ace mpaka sanamsiyira ndi mmodzi yense. 
Joshua10:34 Ndipo Yoswa, ndi Aisrayeli onse naye, anapitirira kucokera ku Lakisi mpaka ku Egiloni; namanga nrisasa, nathira nkhondo." 
Joshua10:35 Naulanda tsiku lomwelo, naukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, nawaononga konse amoyo onse anali m'mwemo tsiku lomwelo, monga mwa zonse anacitira Lakisi." 
Joshua10:36 Ndipo Yoswa ndi Aisrayeli onse naye anakwera kucokera ku Egiloni mpaka ku Hebroni, nauthira nkhondo;" 
Joshua10:37 naulanda, naukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, ndi mfumu yace ndi midzi yace yonse, ndi amoyo onse anali m'mwemo, osasiyapo ndi mmodzi yense, monga mwa zonse anacitira Egiloni; koma anauononga konse, ndi amoyo onse anali m'mwemo." 
Joshua10:38 Pamenepo Yoswa, ndi Aisrayeli onse naye, anabwerera kudza ku Dibiri, nauthira nkhondo," 
Joshua10:39 naulanda, ndi mfumu yace ndi midzi yace yonse; naikantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, naononga konse amoyo onse anali m'mwemo; sanasiya ndi mmodzi yense; monga anacitira Hebroni momwemo anacitira Dibiri ndi mfumu yace, monganso anacitira Libina ndi mfumu yace." 
Joshua10:40 Motero Yoswa anakantha dziko lonse, la kumapiri, la kumwela, la kucidikha, la kuzigwa, ndi mafumu ao onse; sanasiyapo ndi mmodzi yense; koma anaononga psiti zonse zampweya, monga Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli adalamulira." 
Joshua10:41 Ndipo Yoswa anawakantha kuyambira Kadesi-Barinea mpaka ku Gaza, ndi dziko lonse la Goseni mpaka ku Gibeoni." 
Joshua10:42 Ndipo Yoswa anagwira mafwnu awa onse ndi dziko lao nthawi yomweyi; cifukwa Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli anathirira Israyeli nkhondo. 
Joshua10:43 Pamenepo Yoswa ndi Aisrayeli onse naye, anabwerera kucigono ku Giligala." 
Joshua11:1 Ndipo kunali, pamene Yabini mfumu ya ku Hazoro anacimva, anatwna kwa Yabobu mfumu ya ku Madoni, ndi kwa mfumu ya ku Simironi, ndi kwa mfumu ya ku Akasafu," 
Joshua11:2 ndi kwa mafwnu akukhala kumpoto kumapiri, ndi kucigwa kwumwela kwa Kineroto, ndi kucidikha, ndi ku mitunda ya Doro kwnadzulo;" 
Joshua11:3 kwa Akanani kwn'mawa ndi kumadzulo, ndi kwa Aamori ndi Ahiti, ndi Aperizi ndi Ayebusi kumapiri, ndi kwa Ahivi kunsi kwa Herimoni, m'dziko la Mizipa." 
Joshua11:4 Ndipo anaturuka, iwo ndi makamu ao onse nao, anthu ambiri, kucuruka kwao ngati mcenga uli m'mphepete mwa nyanja; ndi akavalo ndi magareta ambirimbiri." 
Joshua11:5 Ndipo mafwnu awa onse anasonkhana, nadza namanga pamodzi ku madzi a Meromu, kumthira Israyeli nkhondo." 
Joshua11:6 Koma Yehova anati kwa Yoswa, Usaope cifukwa ca iwowa; pakuti mawa, dzuwa lino ndidzawapereka onse ophedwa pamaso pa Israyeli; uziwadula mitsindo akavalo ao, ndi kutentha agareta ao ndi moto." 
Joshua11:7 Ndipo Yoswa, ndi anthu onse a nkhondo naye, anawadzera modzidzimutsa ku madzi a Meromu, nawagwera." 
Joshua11:8 Ndipo Yehova anawapereka m'dzanja la Israyeli, ndipo anawakantha, nawapitikitsa mpaka ku Zidoni waukulu, ndi ku MiseripotuMaimu, ndi ku cigwa ca Mizepe kum'mawa; nawakantha mpaka sanawasiyira ndi mmodzi yense." 
Joshua11:9 Ndipo Yoswa anawacitira monga Yehova adamuuza: nadula akavalo ao mitsindo, natentha magareta ao ndi moto." 
Joshua11:10 Ndipo Yoswa anabwerera m'mbuyo nthawi imeneyi nalanda Hazori nakantha mfumu yace ndi lupanga; pakuti kale Hazori unali waukuru wa maufumu aja onse. 
Joshua11:11 Ndipo anakantha amoyo onse anali m'mwemo, ndi lupanga lakuthwa, ndi kuwaononga konse, osasiyapo ndi mmodzi yense wakupuma mpweya; ndipo anatentha Hazori ndi moto." 
Joshua11:12 Ndipo Yoswa analanda midzi yonse ya mafumu awa, ndi mafumu ao omwe nawakantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, nawaononga konse; monga Mose mtumiki wa Yehova adalamulira." 
Joshua11:13 Koma midzi yonse yomangidwa pa zitunda zao Israyeli sanaitentha, koma wa Hazori wokha; wnenewu Yoswa anautentha." 
Joshua11:14 Ndi zofunkha zonse za midzi iyi ndi ng'ombe ana a Israyeli anadzifunkhira; koma anakantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa anthu onse mpaka adawaononga osasiyapo ndi mmodzi yense wopuma mpweya. 
Joshua11:15 Monga Yehova adalamulira Mose mtumiki wace, momwemo Mose analamulira Yoswa; momwemonso anacita Yoswa; sanacotsapo mau amodzi pa zonse Yehova adalamulira Mose." 
Joshua11:16 Motero Yoswa analanda dziko lonselo, la kumapiri, ndi la kumwera, ndi dziko lonse la Goseni, ndi dziko la kucidikha, ndi la kucigwa; ndi la kwnapiri la Israyeli, ndi la ku cidikha cace;" 
Joshua11:17 kuyambira phiri la Halaki lokwera kumka ku Seiri, mpaka Baala-gadi m'cigwa ca Lebano patsinde pa phiri la Herimoni; nagwira mafwnu ao onse, nawakantha, nawapha."
