Joshua11:18 Yoswa anathira nkhondo mafwnu awa onse nthawi yaikuru. 
Joshua11:19 Palibe mudzi wakupangana mtendere ndi ana a Israyeli, koma Ahivi okhala m'Gibeoni; anaigwira yonse ndi nkhondo." 
Joshua11:20 Pakuti cidadzera kwa Yehova kulimbitsa mitima yao kuti athirane nao Aisrayeli nkhondo kuti iye awaononge konse, kuti asawacitire cifundo koma awaononge, monga Yehova adalamulira Mose." 
Joshua11:21 Ndipo Yoswa anadza nthawi yomweyo, napasula Aanaki kuwacotsa kumapiri, ku Hebroni, ku Dibiri, ku Anabi, ndi ku mapiri onse a Yuda, ndi ku mapiri onse a Israyeli; Yoswa anawaononga konse, ndi midzi yao yomwe." 
Joshua11:22 Panalibe Aanaki otsala m'dziko la ana a Israyeli; koma m'Gaza, ndi m'Gati ndi m'Asidodo anatsalamo ena." 
Joshua11:23 Motero Yoswa analanda dziko lonse monga mwa zonse Yehova adazinena kwa Mose; ndipo Yoswa analipereka kwa Israyeli, likhale lao lao, pfuko liri lonse gawo lace. Ndipo dziko linapumula nkhondo." 
Joshua12:1 Ndipo awa ndi mafumu a dzikolo amene ana a Israyeli anwakantha, nalanda dziko lao tsidya la Yordano kum'mawa, kuyambira cigwa ca Arimoni, mpaka phiri la Herimoni, ndi cidikha conse ca kum'mawa;" 
Joshua12:2 Sihoni mfumu ya Aaroori wokhala m'Hesiboni, wocita ufumu kuyambira ku Aroeri ndiwo m'mphepete mwa cigwa ca Arinoni, ndi pakati pa cigwa ndi pa Gileadi wogawika pakati, kufikira mtsinje wa Yaboki, ndiwo malire a ana a Amoni;" 
Joshua12:3 ndi pacidikha mpaka nyanja ya Kineroti kum'mawa, ndi mpaka nyanja ya kucidikha, ndiyo Nyanja ya Mcere kum'mawa, njira ya Beti-Yesimoti; ndi kumwela pansi pa matsikiro a Pisiga." 
Joshua12:4 Nalandanso malire a Ogi mfumu ya Basana wotsala wa Arefai, wokhala ku Asitarotu ndi ku Edrei," 
Joshua12:5 nacita ufumu m'phiri la Herimoni, ndi m'Saleka, ndi m'Basana lonse, mpaka malire a Agesuri, ndi a Maakati, ndi Gileadi wogawika pakati, malire a Sihoni mfumu ya ku Hesiboni." 
Joshua12:6 Mose mtumiki wa Yehova ndi ana a Israyeli anawakantha; ndi Mose mtumiki wa Yehova analipereka kwa Arubeni, ndi Agadi ndi pfuko la Manase logawika pakati, likhale colowacao." 
Joshua12:7 Ndipo awa ndi mafumu a dzikolo amene Yoswa ndi ana a Israyeli anawakantha tsidya lija la Yordano kumadzulo, kuyambira Baala-gadi m'cigwa ca Lebano mpaka phiri la Halaki lokwera kumka ku Seiri; ndipo Yoswa analipereka kwa mapfuko a Israyeli, likhale lao lao, monga mwa magawo ao;" 
Joshua12:8 kumapiri ndi kucigwa, ndi kucidikha, ndi kumatsikiro, ndi kucipululu, ndi kumwela: Ahiti, Aamori, ndi Akanani, Aperizi, Ahivi ndi Ayebusi:" 
Joshua12:9 mfumu ya ku Yeriko, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Ai, ndiwo m'mbali mwa Beteli, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:10 mfumu ya ku Yerusalemu, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Hebroni, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Yarimutu, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:11 mfumu ya ku Lakisi, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:12 mfumu ya ku Egiloni, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Gezere, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:13 mfumu ya ku Dibiri, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Gederi, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:14 mfumu ya ku Horima, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Haradi, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:15 mfumu ya ku Libina, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Adulamu, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:16 mfumu ya ku Makeda, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Beteli, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:17 mfumu ya ku Tapuwa, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Heferi, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:18 mfumu ya ku Afeki, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Lasaroni, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:19 mfumu ya ku Madoni, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Hazori, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:20 mfumu ya ku Simironi-meroni, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Akasafu, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:21 mfumu ya ku Taanaki, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Megido, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:22 mfumu ya ku Kadesi, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Yokineamu ku Karimeli, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:23 mfumuya ku Doro, mpaka ponyamuka pa Doro, imodzi; mfumu ya ku Goimu m'Giligala, imodzi;" 
Joshua12:24 mfumu ya ku Tiriza, imodzi. Mafumu awa onse ndiwo makumi atatu ndi imodzi." 
Joshua13:1 Ndipo Yoswa anakalamba, wa zaka zambiri; ndipo Yehova ananena naye, Wakalamba, wa zaka zambiri, ndipo latsala dziko lalikurukuru, alilandire colowa cao," 
Joshua13:2 Dziko lotsala ndilo: malire onse a Afilisti, ndi Agesuri onse," 
Joshua13:3 kuyambira Sihoro wokhala cakuno ca Aigupto mpaka malire a Ekironu kumpoto, loyesedwa la Akanani; akalonga asanu a Afilisti, a ku Gaza, ndi a ku Asidodi, a ku Asekelo, a ku Giti, ndi a ku Ekiro, ndi Ahivi;" 
Joshua13:4 kumwela dziko lonse la Akanani, ndi Meara ndiwo wa Asidoni, mpaka ku Afeka, mpaka ku malire a Aaroori;" 
Joshua13:5 ndi dziko la Agebili, ndi Lebano lonse kum'mawa, kuyambira Baala-gadi pa tsinde la phiri la Herimoni, mpaka polowera pace pa Hamati;" 
Joshua13:6 nzika zonse za kumapiri kuyambira Lebano, mpaka Misirepotumaimu, Asidoni onse; ndidzawainga pamaso pa ana a Israyeli, koma limeneli uwagawire Aisrayeli, likhale colowa cao, monga ndinakulamulira." 
Joshua13:7 Ndipo tsopano uwagawire mapfuko asanu ndi anai, ndi pfuko la Manase logawika pakati, dziko ili likhale colowa cao." 
Joshua13:8 Pamodzi ndi iye Arubeni ndi Agadi analandira colowa cao, cimene Mose adawapatsa tsidya ilo la Yordano kum'mawa, monga Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anawapatsa;" 
Joshua13:9 kuyambira pa Aroeri, wokhala m'mphepete mwa cigwa ca Arinoni, ndi mudzi uti pakati pa cigwa, ndi cidikha conse ca Medeba mpaka ku Diboni;" 
Joshua13:10 ndi midzi yonse ya Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, wakucita ufumu m'Hesiboni, mpaka malire a ana a Amoni;" 
Joshua13:11 ndi Gileadi, ndi malire a Agesuri, ndi Amaakati, ndi phiri lonse la Herimoni, ndi Basana ionse mpaka ku Saleka;" 
Joshua13:12 ufumu wonse wa Ogi m'Basana, wakucita ufumu m'Asitarotu, ndi m'Edrei (yemweyo anatsala pa otsala a Arefai); pakuti Mose anakantha awa, nawainga." 
Joshua13:13 Koma ana a Israyeli sanainga Agesuri kapena Amaakati; koma Gesuri, ndi Maakati amakhala pakati pa Israyeli, mpaka lero lino." 
Joshua13:14 Koma pfuko la Levi sanalipatsa colowa; nsembe za Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, zocitika ndi moto, ndizo colowa cace, monga iye adanena naye." 
Joshua13:15 Ndipo Mose anapatsira pfuko la ana a Rubeni monga mwa mabanja ao. 
Joshua13:16 Malire ao anayambira ku Aroeri wokhala m'mphepete mwa cigwa ca Arinoni, ndi mudzi uli pakati pa cigwa ndi cidikha conse ca ku Medeba;" 
Joshua13:17 Hesiboni ndi midzi yace yonse yokhala pacidikha; Diboni, ndi Bamoto-baala ndi Betibaala-Meoni;" 
Joshua13:18 ndi Yahaza ndi Kedemotu, ndi Mefaata;" 
Joshua13:19 ndi Kinyataimu, ndi Sibima, ndi Zeretisahara, m'phiri la kucigwa;" 
Joshua13:20 ndi Beti-peori, ndi matsikiro a Pisiga, ndi Beti-yesimotu;" 
Joshua13:21 ndi midzi yonse ya kucidikha, ndi ufumu wonse wa Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, wocita ufumu m'Hesiboni, amene Mose anamkantha pamodzi ndi akalonga a Midyani, Evi, ndi Rekemu, ndi Zuri, ndi Huri ndi Reba, akalonga a Sihoni, nzika za m'dziko." 
Joshua13:22 Ana a Israyeli anaphanso ndi lupanga Balamu mwana wa Beori, mlauli uja, pamodzi ndi ena adawaphawo." 
Joshua13:23 Ndipo malire a ana a Rubeni ndiwo Yordano ndi malire ace. Ndico colandira ca ana a Rubeni monga mwa mabanja ao, midzi yace ndi miraga yace." 
Joshua13:24 Ndipo Mose anapatsira pfuko la Gadi, ana a Gadi, monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua13:25 Ndipo malire ao ndiwo Yazeri, ndi midzi yonse ya Gileadi, ndi dziko la ana a Amoni logawika pakati, mpaka ku Aroeri, wokhala cakuno ca Raba;" 
Joshua13:26 ndi kuyambira Hesiboni mpaka Ramati-Mizipe, ndi Betonimu; ndi kuyambira Mahanaimu mpaka malire a Dibiri;" 
Joshua13:27 ndipo m'cigwa Betiharamu, ndi Beti-nimra, ndi Sukoti, ndi Zafoni, cotsala ca ufumu wa Sihoni mfumu ya Hesiboni, Yoidano ndi malire ace, mpaka malekezero a nyanja ya Kinereti, tsidya lija la Yordano kum'mawa." 
Joshua13:28 Ici ndi colowa ca ana a Gadi, monga mwa mabanja ao, midzi yace ndi miraga yace." 
Joshua13:29 Mose anaperekanso colowa kwa pfuko la Manase logawika pakati, ndico ca pfuko la Manase logawika pakati monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua13:30 Ndipo malire ao anayambira ku Mahanaimu, Basana lonse, ufumu wonse wa Ogi mfumu ya ku Basana, ndi midzi yonse ya Yairi, yokhala m'Basana, midzi makumi asanu ndi limodzi;" 
Joshua13:31 ndi Gileadi logawika pakati, ndi Asitarotu ndi Edrei, midzi ya ufumu wa Ogi m'Basana, inali ya ana a Makiri mwana wa Manase, ndiwo ana a Makiri ogawika pakati, monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua13:32 Izi ndi zolowazi Mose anazigawira m'zidikha za Moabu, tsidya ilo la Yordano ku Yeriko, kum'mawa." 
Joshua13:33 Koma pfuko la Levi, Mose analibe kulipatsa colowa: Yehova Mulungu wa lsrayeli, ndiye colowa cao, monga ananena nao." 
Joshua14:1 Ndipo awa ndi maiko ana a Israyeli anawalanda m'dziko la Kanani, amene Eleazare wansembe, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndi akulu a nyumba za atate a mapfuko a ana a Israyeli, anawagawira." 
Joshua14:2 Kulandira kwao kunacitika ndi kulota maere, monga Yehova adalamulira mwa dzanja la Mose, kunena za mapfuko asanu ndi anai ndi pfuko logawika pakati." 
Joshua14:3 Pakuti Mose adapatsa mapfuko awiri, ndi pfuko logawika pakati, colowa tsidya ito la Yordano; koma sanapatsa Alevi colowa pakati pao," 
Joshua14:4 Pakuti ana a Yosefe ndiwo mapfuko awiri, Manase ndi Efraimu; ndipo sanawagawira Alevi kanthu m'dziko, koma midzi yokhalamo ndi dziko lozungulirako likhale la zoweta zao ndi cuma cao." 
Joshua14:5 Monga Yehova analamulira Mose, momwemo ana a Israyeli anacita, nagawana dziko." 
Joshua14:6 Pamenepo ana a Yuda anadza kwa Yoswa ku Giligala; ndi Kalebe mwana wa Yefune Mkenizi ananena naye, Mudziwa cimene Yehova adanena kwa Mose munthu wa Mulungu za ine ndi za inu m'KadesiBarinea." 
Joshua14:7 Ndinali ine wa zaka makumi anai muja Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anandituma kucokera ku Kadesi-Barinea, kukazonda dziko; ndipo ndinambwezera mau, monga momwe anakhala mumtima mwanga." 
Joshua14:8 Koma abale anga amene anakwera nane anasungunutsa mitima ya anthu; koma ine ndinamtsata Yehova Mulungu wanga ndi mtima wanga wonse. 
Joshua14:9 Ndipo Mose analumbira tsiku lomwelo ndi kuti, Zedi, dzikoli phazi lako lapondapo lidzakhala colowa cako, ndi ca ana ako kosalekeza, cifukwa unatsata Yehova Mulungu wanga ndi mtima wonse." 
Joshua14:10 Ndipo tsopano, taonani, Yehova anandisunga ndi moyo, monga ananena, zaka izi mak umi anai ndi zisanu kuyambira nthawi ija Yehova ananena kwa Mose mau awa, poyenda Israyeli m'cipululu; ndipo tsopano taonani, ndine wa zaka makumi asanu ndi atatu, kudza zisanu lero lino." 
Joshua14:11 Koma lero lino ndiri wamphamvu monga tsiku lija anandituma Mose; monga mphamvu yanga pamene paja, momwemo mphamvu yanga tsopano, kugwira nkhondo, ndi kuturuka ndi kulowa." 
Joshua14:12 Ndipo tsopano, ndipatseni phiri ili limene Yehova ananenera tsiku lija; pakuti udamva tsiku lijalo kuti Aanaki anali komweko, ndi midzi yaikuru ndi yamalinga; kapena Yehova adzakhala ndi ine, kuti ndiwaingitse monga ananena Yehova." 
Joshua14:13 Pamenepo Yoswa anamdalitsa, napatsa Kalebe mwana wa Yefune Hebroni likhale colowa cace." 
Joshua14:14 Cifukwa cace Hebroni likhala colowa cace ca Kalebe mwana wa Yefune Mkenizi mpaka lero lino; popeza anatsata Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli ndi mtima wonse. 
Joshua14:15 Koma kale dzina la Hebroni linali mudzi wa Ariba, ndiye munthu wamkuru pakati pa Aanaki. Ndipo dziko linapumula nkhondo." 
Joshua15:1 Ndipo gawo la pfuko la ana a Yuda monga mwa mabanja ao linafikira malire a Edomu, ku cipululu ca Zini kumwera, ku malekezero a kumwera." 
Joshua15:2 Ndi malire ao a kumwera, anayambira ku malekezero a Nyanja ya Mcere, ku nyondo yoloza kumwera;" 
Joshua15:3 naturuka kumwela kwa cikweza ca Akarabi, napitirira ku Zini, nakwera kumwera kwa Kadesi-Barinea, napitirira ku Hezironi, nakwera ku Adara, nazungulira ku Karika;" 
Joshua15:4 napitirira ku Azimoni, naturuka ku mtsinje wa Aigupto; ndi malekezero a malirewa anali ku Nyanja Yaikuru; awa ndi malire anu a kumwera." 
Joshua15:5 Ndi malire a kum'mawa ndiwo Nyanja ya Mcere, mpaka mathiriro ace a Yordano. Ndi malire a kumpoto anayambira nyondo ya nyanja ku mathiriro a Yordano;" 
Joshua15:6 nakwera malire kumka ku Beti-hogila, napitirira kumpoto kwa Beti-araba; nakwera malire kumka ku mwala wa Bohani mwana wa Rubeni;" 
Joshua15:7 nakwera malire kumka ku Dibiri, kucokera ku cigwa ca Akori, ndi kumpoto kupenyera Giligala ndiko kundunji kwa cikweza ca Adumi, ndiko kumwela kwa mtsinje; napitirira malire kumka ku madzi a Enisemesi, ndi maturukiro ace anali ku Eni-rogeli;" 
Joshua15:8 nakwera malire kumka ku cigwa ca mwana wa Hinomu, kumbali kwa Ayebusi, kumwela, ndiko Yerusalemu; nakwera malire kumka kumwamba kwa phiri lokhala patsogolo pa cigwa ca Hinomu kumadzulo, ndilo ku mathero ace a cigwa ca Refai kumpoto," 
Joshua15:9 Ndipo analemba malire kuyambira pamwamba pa phiri mpaka citsime ca madzi ca Nefitoa, naturukira malire ku midzi ya phiri la Efroni; ndipo analemba malire kumka ku Baala, ndiwo Kiriyati-Yearimu." 
Joshua15:10 Ndipo malire anazungulira kuyambira ku Baala kumka kumadzulo, ku phiri la Seiri, napitirira kumbali kwa phiri la Yearimu kumpoto, ndilo Kesaloni, natsikira ku Beti-semesi, napitirira ku Timina;" 
Joshua15:11 naturuka malire kumka ku mbali ya Ekroni kumpoto; ndipo analemba malire kumka ku Sikeroni, napitirira ku phiri la Baala, naturuka ku Yabindi; ndipo maturukiro a malire anali kunyanja." 
Joshua15:12 Ndi malire a kumadzulo anali ku Nyanja Yaikuru ndiwo malire ace. Awa ndi malire a ana a Yuda pozungulira monga mwa mabanja ao. 
Joshua15:13 Koma Yoswa anampatsa Kalebe mwana wa Yefune gawo mwa ana a Yuda, monga Yehova adamlamulira, ndiwo mudzi wa Ariba, ndiye atate wa Anaki, ndiwo Hebroni." 
Joshua15:14 Ndipo Kalebe anaingitsako ana amuna atatu a Anaki, ndiwo Sesai, ndi Ahimani, ndi Talimai, ana a Anaki." 
Joshua15:15 Nakwera komweko kumka kwa nzika za Dibiri; koma kale dzina la Dibiri ndilo Kiriyati-Seferi. 
Joshua15:16 Ndipo Kalebe anati, iye amene akantha Kiriyati-Seferi, naulanda, yemweyo ndidzampatsa Akisa mwana wanga akhale mkazi wace." 
Joshua15:17 Ndipo Otiniyeli mwana wa Kenazi, mbale wace wa Kalebe, anaulanda; ndipo anampatsa Akisa mwana wace akhale mkazi wace." 
Joshua15:18 Ndipo kunali, m'mene anamdzera, anamkangamiza mwamuna wace kuti apemphe atate wace ampatse munda; ndipo anatsika pa buru; pamenepo Kalebe ananena naye, Ufunanji?" 
Joshua15:19 Nati iye, Mundipatse dalitso; popeza mwandipatsa dziko la kumwela, ndipatseninso zitsime za madzi. Pamenepo anampatsa zitsime za kumtunda, ndi zitsime za kunsi." 
Joshua15:20 Ici ndi colowa ca pfuko la ana a Yuda monga mwa mabanja ao. 
Joshua15:21 Ndipo midzi ya ku malekezero a pfuko la ana a Yuda ku malire a Edomu, kumwela ndiwo, Kabizeeli ndi Ederi, ndi Yaguri;" 
Joshua15:22 ndi Kina ndi Dimona, ndi Adada;" 
Joshua15:23 ndi Kedesi, ndi Hazori, ndi ltinani;" 
Joshua15:24 Zifi ndi Telemu ndi Bealoti; 
Joshua15:25 ndi Hazorihadata, ndi Kerioti-hezirondi, ndiwo Hazori;" 
Joshua15:26 Amamu ndi Sema ndi Moloda; 
Joshua15:27 ndi Hazara-gada, ndi Hesimoni, ndi Beti-peleti;" 
Joshua15:28 ndi Hazara-suala, ndi Beereseba, ndi Bizioti;" 
Joshua15:29 Baala, ndi lyimu, ndi Ezemu;" 
Joshua15:30 ndi Elitoladi, ndi Kesili ndi Horima;" 
Joshua15:31 ndi Zikilaga, ndi Madimana ndi Sanasana;" 
Joshua15:32 ndi Lebaoti, ndi Siliimu, ndi Aini ndi Rimoni; midzi yonse ndiyo makumi awiri kudza isanu ndi inai; pamodzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua15:33 Ku cigwa, Esitaoli, ndi Zora ndi Asina;" 
Joshua15:34 ndi Zoona, ndi Eniganimu, Tapua, ndi Enamu;" 
Joshua15:35 Yarimutu, ndi Adulamu, Soko, ndi Azeka;" 
Joshua15:36 ndi Saaraimu, ndi Aditaimu, ndi Gedera, ndi Gederotaimu; midzi khumi ndi inai pamodzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua15:37 Zenani, ndi Hadasa, ndi Migidala-gadi;" 
Joshua15:38 ndi Dilani, ndi Mizipe, ndi Yokiteeli;" 
Joshua15:39 Lakisi ndi Bozikatu ndi Egiloni; 
Joshua15:40 ndi Kaboni, ndi Lamasi, ndi, Kitilisi;" 
Joshua15:41 ndi Gaderotu, Beti-dagoni, ndi Naama, ndi Makeda; midzi khumi ndi isanu ndi umodzi pamodzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua15:42 Libina ndi Eteri ndi Asana; 
Joshua15:43 ndi Ifita ndi Asina ndi Nezibi; 
Joshua15:44 ndi Kehila ndi Akisibu, ndi Maresa; midzi isanu ndi inai pamodzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua15:45 Ekroni pamodzi ndi midzi yace ndi miraga yao; 
Joshua15:46 kuyambira ku Ekroni mpaka kunyanja, yonse ya ku mbali ya Asidodo, pamodzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua15:47 Asidodo, midzi yace ndi miraga yace; Gaza, midzi yace ndi miraga yace; mpaka mtsinje wa Aigupto, ndi nyanja yaikuru ndi malire ace." 
Joshua15:48 Ndi kumapiri Samiri, ndi Yatiri, om Soko;" 
Joshua15:49 ndi Dana, ndi Kiriyatisana, ndiwo Dibiri;" 
Joshua15:50 ndi Anabi, ndi Esitemo, ndi Animu;" 
Joshua15:51 ndi Goseni, ndi Holoni, ndi Gilo; midzi khumi ndi umodzi pamodzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua15:52 Arabu, ndi Duma, ndi Esana;" 
Joshua15:53 ndi Yanimu, ndi Beti-tapua, ndi Apeka;" 
Joshua15:54 ndi Humita, ndi Kiriyatiariba, ndiwo Hebroni, ndi Ziori; midzi isanu ndi inai pamodzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua15:55 Maoni, Karimeli, ndi Zifu, ndi Yuta;" 
Joshua15:56 ndi Yesireeli, ndi Yokideamu, ndi Zoona;" 
Joshua15:57 Kaini, Gibea ndi Timina; midzi khumi pamodzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua15:58 Haluli, Beti-zuru, ndi Gedori," 
Joshua15:59 ndi Maaratu, ndi Bete-anotu, ndi Elitekoni; midzi isanu ndi umodzi pamodzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriyata-Baala, ndiwo KiriyatiYearimu ndi Raba; midzi iwiri pamodzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua15:61 M'cipululu, Beti-araba, Midini, ndi Sekaka;" 
Joshua15:62 ndi Nibisani, ndi Mudzi wa Mcere, ndi En-gedi; midzi isanu ndi umodzi pamodzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua15:63 Koma ana a Yuda sanakhoza kuingitsa Ayebusi, nzika za Yerusalemu: m'mwemo Ayebusi anakhala pamodzi ndi ana a Yuda, ku Yerusalemu, mpaka lero lino." 
Joshua16:1 Ndipo gawo La ana a Yosefe linaturuka kucokera ku Yordano ku Yeriko, ku madzi a Yeriko kum'mawa, kucipululu, nakwera kucokera ku Yeriko kumka kumapiri ku Beteli;" 
Joshua16:2 naturuka ku Beteli kumka ku Luzi, napitirira kumka ku malire a Aariki, ku Atarotu;" 
Joshua16:3 natsikira kumadzulo kumka ku malire a Ayafeleti, ku malire a Beti-horoni wa kunsi, ndi ku Gezeri; ndi maturukiro ace anali kunyanja." 
Joshua16:4 Motero ana a Yosefe, Manase ndi Efraimu analandira colowa cao," 
Joshua16:5 Ndipo malire a ana a Efraimu, monga mwa mabanja ao, ndiwo: malire a colowa cao kum'mawa ndiwo Atarotu-Adara, mpaka Betihoroni wa kumtunda;" 
Joshua16:6 naturuka malire kumadzulo ku Mikametatu kumpoto; nazungulira malire kum'mawa kumka ku Taanatu-silo, naupitirira kum'mawa kwace kwa Yanoa:" 
Joshua16:7 natsika kucokera ku Yanoa, kumka ku Atarotu, ndi ku Naara, nafika ku Yeriko, naturuka ku Yordano." 
Joshua16:8 Kuyambira ku Tapua malire anamuka kumadzulo ku mtsinje wa Kana; ndi maturukiro ace anali kunyanja. Ici ndi colowa ca pfuko la ana a Efraimu monga mwa mabanja ao; 
Joshua16:9 pamodzi ndi midzi adaipatulira ana a Efraimu pakati pa colowa ca ana a Manase, midzi yonse pamodzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua16:10 Ndipo a sanaingitsa Akanani akukhala m'Gezeri; koma Akanani anakhala pakati pa Efraimu, kufikira lero lino, nawasonkhera msonkho." 
Joshua17:1 Gawo la pfuko la Manase ndi ili: pakuti anali woyamba wa Yosefe. Makiri mwana woyamba wa Manase, atate wa Gileadi, popeza ndiye munthu wa nkhondo, anakhala nayo Gileadi ndi Basana." 
Joshua17:2 Ndipo maere anagwera ana ena otsala a Manase monga mwa mabanja ao; ana a Abiezere ndi ana a Heleki, ndi ana a Asiriyeli, ndi ana a Sekemu ndi ana a Hefere, ndi ana a Semida; awa ndi ana amuna a Manase mwana wa Yosefe, monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua17:3 Koma Tselofekadi, mwana wa Hefere, mwana wa Gileadi, mwana wa Makiri, mwana wa Manase, analibe ana amuna koma ana akazi ndiwo; ndipo maina a ana ace akazi ndiwo: Mala, ndi Nowa, Hogila, Milika ndi Tiriza." 
Joshua17:4 Ndipo anayandikira pamaso pa Eleazare wansembe, ndi pamaso pa Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndi pamaso pa akalonga, ndi kuti, Yehova analamulira Mose atipatse colowa pakati pa abale athu; cifukwa cace anawapatsa monga mwa lamulo La Yehova, colowa pakati pa abale a atate wao." 
Joshua17:5 Ndipo anamgwera Manase magawo khumi, osawerenga dziko la Gileadi ndi Basana lokhala tsidya lija la Yordano:" 
Joshua17:6 popeza ana akazi a Manase adalandira colowa pakati pa ana ace amuna; ndi dziko la Gileadi linakhala la ana a Manase otsala. 
Joshua17:7 Ndipo malire a Manase anayambira ku Aseri, kumka ku Mika-metatu, wokhala cakuno ca Sekemu; namuka malire ku dzanja lamanja kwa nzika za Enitapua." 
Joshua17:8 Dziko la Tapua linali la Manase; koma Tapua mpaka malire a Manase linakhala la ana a Efraimu. 
Joshua17:9 Natsikira malire ku mtsinje wa Kana, kumwera kwa mtsinje; midzi iyi inakhala ya Efraimu pakati pa midzi ya Manase; ndi malire a Manase anali kumpoto kwa mtsinje; ndimaturukiro ace anali kunyanja;" 
Joshua17:10 kumwera nkwa Efraimu ndi kumpoto nkwa Manase, ndi malire ace ndi nyanja; ndi kumpoto anakomana ndi Aseri, ndi kum'mawa anakomana ndi Isakara." 
Joshua17:11 Ndipo m'Isakara ndi m'Aseri Manase anali nao Betiseani ndi midzi yace, ndi Ibleamu ndi midzi yace, ndi nzika za Doro ndi midzi yace, ndi nzika za Eni-doro ndi midzi yace, ndi nzika za Taanaki ndi midzi yace, ndi nzika za Megido ndi midzi yace; dziko la mapiri atatu." 
Joshua17:12 Koma ana a Manase sanatha kuingitsa a m'midzi aja, popeza Akananjanafuna kukhala m'dziko lija." 
Joshua17:13 Ndipo kunali pamene ana a lsrayeli atakula mphamvu anasonkhetsa Akanani osawaingitsa onse. 
Joshua17:14 Pamenepo ana a Yosefe ananena ndi Yoswa, ndi kuti, Watipatsiranji colowa cathu camaere cimodzi ndi gawo limodzi, popeza ife ndife anthu aunyinji, pakuti Yehova anatidalitsa ndi pano pomwe?" 
Joshua17:15 Ndipo Yoswa ananena nao, Ngati muli anthu aunyinji, kwerani kuli mitengoko, ndi kudziswera minda m'dziko la Aperizi ndi la Arefai; akakuceperani malo ku phiri la Efraimu." 
Joshua17:16 Ndipo ana a Yosefe anati, Kuphiriko sikudzatifikira; ndipo Akananionse akukhala m'dziko la cigwa ali nao magareta acitsulo, iwo akukhala m'Bete-Seani, ndi midzi yace ndi iwo omwe akukhala m'cigwa ca Yezereli." 
Joshua17:17 Ndipo Yoswa ananena kwa iwo a m'nyumba ya Yosefe, kwa Efraimu ndi Manase, ndi kuti, Inu ndinu anthu aunyinji, muli nayo mphamvu yaikuru; simudzakhala nalo gawo limodzi lokha;" 
Joshua17:18 koma kuphiriko kudzakhala kwanu pakuti pangakhale mpa mitengo, mudzisweretu minda, ndi maturukiro ace adzakhala anu; pakuti mudzaingitsa Akanani angakhale ali nao magareta acitsulo, angakhale ali amphamvu." 
Joshua18:1 Ndipo msonkhano wonse wa ana a Israyeli unasonkhana ku Silo, nuutsa komweko cihema cokomanako; ndipo dziko linawagoniera." 
Joshua18:2 Ndipo anatsala mwa ana a Israyeli mapfuko asanu ndi awiri osawagawira colowa cao. 
Joshua18:3 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa ana a Israyeli, Mucedwa mpaka liti kulowa ndi kulandira dziko limene Yehova Mulungu wa makolo anu anakupatsani?" 
Joshua18:4 Mudzifunire amuna, pfuko liri lonse amuna atatu; kuti ndiwatume, anyamuke, nayendeyende iwo pakati pa dziko, nalilembe monga mwa colowa cao; nabwereoso kwa ine." 
Joshua18:5 Ndipo adzaligawa magawo asanu ndi awiri; Yuda adzakhala m'malire ace kumwela, ndi a m'nyumba ya Yosefe adzakhala m'malire mwao kumpoto." 
Joshua18:6 Ndipo muzilemba dziko likhale magawo asanu ndi awiri, ndi kubwera nao kuno kwa ine malembo ace; ndipo ndidzakuloterani maere pane pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Joshua18:7 Pakuti Alevi alibe gawo pakati pa inu; pakuti unsembe wa Yehova ndiwo colowa cao. Koma Gadi, ndi Rubeni, ndi pfuko la Manase logawika pakati adalandira colowa cao tsidya lija la Yordano kum'mawa, cimene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova adawapatsa." 
Joshua18:8 Ndipo amunawo ananyamuka, namuka; ndipo Yoswa analamulira opita kulemba dzikowo, ndi kuti, Mukani, muyendeyende pakati pa dziko, ndi kulilemba, oimubwerenso kwa ine, ndipo ndidzakuloterani maere pane pamaso pa Yehova pa Silo." 
Joshua18:9 Namuka amunawo, napitapita pakati pa dziko, nalilemba m'buku, nayesa midzi yace, magawo asanu, nabwera kwa Yoswa ku cigono ku Silo." 
Joshua18:10 Ndipo Yoswa anawalotera maere ku Silo pamaso pa Yehova; ndi apo Yoswa anawagawira ana a Israyeli dziko, monga mwa magawo ao." 
Joshua18:11 Ndipo maere a ana a Benjamini anakwera monga mwa mabanja ao; ndi malire a gawo lao anaturuka pakati pa ana a Yuda ndi ana a Yosefe. 
Joshua18:12 Ndipo malire ao a kumpoto anacokera ku Yordano; ndi malire anakwera ku mbali ya Yeriko kumpoto, nakwera pakati pa mapiri kumadzulo; ndi maturukiro ace anali ku cipululu ca Beti-aveni." 
Joshua18:13 Ndipo malire anapitirirapo kumka ku Luzi, ku mbali ya Luzi, momwemo ndi Beteli, kumwela; ndi malire anatsikira kumka ku Atarotu-adara, ku phiri lokhala kumwela kwa Betihoroni wa kunsi." 
Joshua18:14 Ndipo malire analembedwa nazungulira ku mbali ya kumadzulo kumka kumwela, kucokera ku phiri pokhala patsogolo pa Beti-horoni, kumwela kwace; ndi maturukiro ace anali ku Kiriyatibaala, womwewo ndi Kiriyati-Yearimu, mudzi wa ana a Yuda; ndiyo mbali ya kumadzulo." 
Joshua18:15 Ndipo mbali ya kumwela inayambira polekezera Kiriyati-Yearimu; naturuka malire kumka kumadzulo, naturuka kumka ku citsime ca madzi a Nefitoa;" 
Joshua18:16 natsikira malire kumka polekezera phiri lokhala patsogolo pa cigwa ca mwana wa Hinomu, ndico ca m'cigwa ca Refai kumpoto; natsikira ku cigwa ca Hinomu, ku mbali ya Ayebusi kumwela, natsikira ku Enirogeli;" 
Joshua18:17 nalembedwa kumka kumpoto, naturuka ku Eni-semesi, naturuka ku Gelilotu, ndiwo pandunji pokwerera pa Adumi; natsikira ku mwala wa Bohani mwana wa Rubeni;" 
Joshua18:18 napitirira ku mbali ya pandunji pa Araba kumpoto, natsikira kumka ku Araba;" 
Joshua18:19 napitirira malire kumka ku mbali ya Beti-hogila kumpoto; ndi maturukiro ace a malire anali ku nyondo ya kumpoto ya Nyanja ya Mcere; pa kulekezera kwa kumwela kwa Yordano; ndiwo malire a kumwera. 
Joshua18:20 Ndipo malireace mbali ya kum'mawa ndiwo Yordano, ndico colowa ca ana a Benjamini, kunena za malire ace pozungulira pace, monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua18:21 Koma midzi ya pfuko la ana a Benjamini monga mwa mabanja ao ndiyo Yeriko, ndi Beti-hogila, ndi Emekikozizi;" 
Joshua18:22 ndi Beti-araba, ndi Zemaraimu, ndi Beteli;" 
Joshua18:23 ndi Arimu ndi Para, ndi Ofira;" 
Joshua18:24 ndi Kefaraamoni, ndi Ofini, ndi Geba; midzi khumi ndi iwiri pamodzi ndi miraga yao;" 
Joshua18:25 Gibeoni ndi Rama, ndi Beeroti;" 
Joshua18:26 ndi Mizipe, ndi Kefira, ndi Moza;" 
Joshua18:27 ndi Rekemu, ndi Iripeeli ndi Tarala;" 
Joshua18:28 ndi Zela, Elefi, ndi Yebusi, womwewo ndi Yerusalemu, Gibeati ndi Kiriyati; midzi khumi ndi inai pamodzi ndi miraga yace, Ndico colowa ca ana a Benjamini monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua19:1 Ndipo maere aciwiri anamturukira Simeoni, pfuko la ana a Simeoni monga mwa mabanja ao; ndi colowa cao cinali pakati pa colowa ca ana a Yuda." 
Joshua19:2 Ndipo anali naco colowa cao Beeri-seba, kapena Seba, ndi Molada;" 
Joshua19:3 ndi Hazarasuala, ndi Bala, ndi Ezemu;" 
Joshua19:4 ndi Elitoladi, ndi Betuli, ndi Horimu;" 
Joshua19:5 ndi Zikilaga, ndi Beti-malikabotu, ndi Hazari-susa:" 
Joshua19:6 ndi Beti-lebaotu, ndi Saruheni; midzi khumi ndi itatu ndi miraga yao;" 
Joshua19:7 Aini, Rimoni ndi Eteri ndi Asana; midzi inai ndi miraga yao;" 
Joshua19:8 ndi miraga yonse yozungulira midzi iyi mpaka Baalata-beeri ndiwo Rama kumwera. Ndico colowa ca pfuko la ana a Simeoni, monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua19:9 M'gawo la ana a Yuda muli colowa ca ana a Simeoni; popeza gawo la ana a Yuda linawacurukira; cifukwa cace ana a Simeoni anali naco colowa pakati pa colowa coo. 
Joshua19:10 Ndipo maere acitatu anakwecera ana a Zebuloni monga mwa mabanja ao; ndi malire a colowa cao anafikira ku Saridi; 
Joshua19:11 nakwera malire ao kumka kumadzulo ndi ku Marala nafikira ku Dabeseti, nafikira ku mtsinje wa patsogolo pa Yokineamu;" 
Joshua19:12 ndi kucokera ku Saridi anazungulira kumka kum'mawa kumaturukira dzuwa, mpaka malire a Kisilotu-tabori; naturuka kumka ku Daberati, nakwera ku Yafia;" 
Joshua19:13 ndi pocoka pamenepo anapitirira kumka kum'mawa ku Gati-heferi, ku Etikazini; naturuka ku Remoni umene ulembedwa mpaka ku Nea," 
Joshua19:14 nauzungulira malire kumpoto, kumka ku Hanatoni; ndi maturukiro ace anali ku cigwa ca Ifita-eli;" 
Joshua19:15 ndi Kata, ndi Nahalala ndi Simironi, ndi Idala ndi Betelehemu: midzi khumi ndi iwiri ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua19:16 Ici ndi colowa ca ana a Zebuloni monga mwa mabanja ao, midzi iyi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua19:17 Maere acinai anamturukira Isakara, kunena za ana a Isakara monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua19:18 Ndi malire ao anali ku Yezireeli, ndi Kesulotu, ndi Sunemu;" 
Joshua19:19 ndi Hafaraimu, ndi Sioni, ndi Anaharati;" 
Joshua19:20 ndi Rabiti ndi Kisioni, ndi Ebezi;" 
Joshua19:21 ndi Remeti ndi Eni-ganaimu ndi Eni-hada, ndi Beti-Pazezi;" 
Joshua19:22 ndi malire anafikira ku Tabori, ndi Sahazuma, ndi Betesemesi; ndi maturukiro a malire ao anali ku Yordano; midzi khumi ndi isanu ndi umodzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua19:23 Ici ndi colowa ca pfuko la ana a Isakara, monga mwa mabanja ao, midzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua19:24 Ndipo maece acisanu analiturukira pfuko la ana a Aseri monga mwa mabanja ao. 
Joshua19:25 Ndi malire ao ndiwo Helikati, ndi Hali, ndi Beteni ndi Akisafu;" 
Joshua19:26 ndi Alameleki, ndi Amadi, ndi Misali; nafikira ku Karimeli kumadzulo ndi ku Sihorilibinati;" 
Joshua19:27 nazungulira koturukira dzuwa ku Beti-dagoni, nafikira ku Zebuloni ndi ku cigwa ca Ifita-eli, kumpoto ku Beti-emeki, ndi Nehieli; naturukira ku Kabulu kulamanzere," 
Joshua19:28 ndi Ebroni, ndi Rehobo, ndi Hamoni, ndi Kana, mpaka ku Sidoni wamkuru;" 
Joshua19:29 nazungulira malice kumka ku Rama, ndi ku mudzi wa linga la Turo; nazungulira malire kumka ku Hosa; ndi maturukiro ace anali kunyanja, kucokera ku Hebeli mpaka ku Akizibu;" 
Joshua19:30 Uma womwe ndi Afeki, ndi Rehobo; midzi makumi awiri mphambu iwiri ndi miraga yao," 
Joshua19:31 Ici ndi colowa ca pfuko la ana a Aseri monga mwa mabanja ao, midzi iyi ndi miragayao." 
Joshua19:32 Maere acisanu ndi cimodzi anaturukira ana a Nafitali, ana a Nafitali monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua19:33 Ndipo malire ao anayambira ku Helefi, ku thundu wa ku Zaanani, ndi Adaminekebi, ndi Yabineeli, mpaka ku Lakumu; ndi maturukiro ace anali ku Yordano;" 
Joshua19:34 nazungulira malire kumka kumadzulo ku Azinotu-tabori, naturukira komweko kumka ku Hukoku; nafikira ku Zebuloni kumwera, nafikira ku Aseri kumadzulo, ndi ku Yuda pa Yordano kum'mawa." 
Joshua19:35 Ndipo midzi yamalinga ndiyo Zidimu, Zeri, ndi Hamati, Rakati, ndi Kinereti;" 
Joshua19:36 ndi Adama, ndi Rama, ndi Hazori;" 
Joshua19:37 ndi Kedesi, ndi Edrei, ndi Eni-hazori;" 
Joshua19:38 ndi Ironi, ndi Migidala-eli, Horemu, ndi Betianati, ndi Beti-semesi; midzi khumi ndi isanu ndi inai, ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua19:39 Ici ndi colowa ca pfuko la ana a Nafitali, monga mwa mabanja ao, midzi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua19:40 Maere acisanu ndi ciwiri anaturukira pfuko la ana a Dani, monga mwa mabanja ao." 
Joshua19:41 Ndipo malire a colowa cao anali Zora, ndi Esitaoli ndi Iri-semesi;" 
Joshua19:42 Saalabini, ndi Aijaloni ndi ltila;" 
Joshua19:43 ndi Eloni ndi Timna ndi Ekroni; 
Joshua19:44 ndi Eliteke, ndi Gibetoni, ndi Baalati;" 
Joshua19:45 ndi Yehudi, ndi Bene-beraki, ndi Gatirimoni;" 
Joshua19:46 ndi Me-jarikoni, ndi Rakoni, ndi malire pandunji pajapo." 
Joshua19:47 Koma malire a ana a Dani anaturuka kupitirira iwowa; pakuti ana a Dani anakwera nathira nkhondo ku Lesemu, naulanda naukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, naulandira, nakhala m'mwemo, naucha Lesemu, Dani; ndilo dzina la Dani atate wao." 
Joshua19:48 Ici ndi colowa ca pfuko la ana a Dani, monga mwa mabanja ao, midzi iyi ndi miraga yao." 
Joshua19:49 Ndipo atatha kuligawa dziko likhale colowa cao monga mwa malire ace, ana a Israyeli anapatsa Yoswa mwana wa Nuni colowa pakati pao;" 
Joshua19:50 monga mwa lamulo la Yehova anampatsa mudzi umene anawapempha, ndiwo Timinatisera, ku mapiri a Efraimu; ndipo anamangamudziwonakhala m'mwemo." 
Joshua19:51 Izi ndizo zolowa anazigawa Eleazare wansembe, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndi akulu a nyumba za atate a mapfuko a ana a Israyeli, zikhale zao zao, ndi kulota maere ku Silo pamaso pa Yehova ku khomo la cihema cokomanako. Momwemo anatha kuligawa dziko." 
Joshua20:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yoswa," 
Joshua20:2 Nena ndi ana a Israyeli ndi kuti, Mudziikire midzi yopulumukirako, monga ndinanena kwa inu mwa dzanja la Mose," 
Joshua20:3 kuti athawireko wakupha munthu osamupha dala, osadziwa; ndipo idzakhalira inu yopulumukirako, kumpulumuka wolipsa mwazi." 
Joshua20:4 Munthu akathawira umodzi wa midzi iyi, aziima polowera pa cipata ca mudziwo, nafotokozere mlandu wace m'makutu a akuru a mudziwo; pamenepo azimlandira kumudzi kwao, ndi kumpatsa malo, kuti akhale pakati pao." 
Joshua20:5 Ndipo akamlondola wolipsa mwazi, asampereke m'dzanja lace wakupha mnzaceyo; pakuti anakantha mnansi wace mosadziwa, osamuda kale." 
Joshua20:6 Ndipo azikhala m'mudzimo mpaka adzaima pamaso pa msonkhano anene mlandu wace, mpaka atafa mkulu wansembe wa m'masiku omwewo; pamenepo wakupha mnzace azibwerera ndi kufika kumudzi kwace, ndi nyumba yace, kumudzi kumene adathawako." 
Joshua20:7 Ndipo anapatula Kedesi m'Galileya ku mapiri a Nafitali, ndi Sekemu ku mapiri a Efraimu, ndi mudzi wa Ariba ndiwo Hebroni ku mapiri a Yuda." 
Joshua20:8 Ndipo tsidya lija la Yordano kum'mawa kwa Yeriko, anaika Bezeri m'cipululu, kucidikha, wa pfuko la Rubeni, ndi Ramoti m'Gileadi wa ofuko la Gadi, ndi Golani m'Basana wa pfuko la Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Iyi ndi midzi yoikidwira ana onse a Israyeli, ndi mlendo wakukhala pakati pao, kuti athawireko ali yense wakupha munthu, ndi kuti asafe ndi dzanja la wolipsa mwazi, asanaime pamaso pa msonkhano." 
Joshua21:1 Pamenepo akuru a nyumba za atate a Alevi anayandikira kwa Eleazare wansembe, ndi kwa Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, ndi kwa akuru a nyumba za atate a mapfuko a ana a Israyeli;" 
Joshua21:2 nanena nao ku Silo m'dziko la Kanani, ndi kuti Yehova analamulira mwa dzanja la Mose kuti atipatse midzi yokhalamo ife, ndi mabusa a zoweta zathu." 
Joshua21:3 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anapatsa Alevi, kutapa pa colowa cao, monga mwa lamulo la Yehova, midzi iyi ndi mabusa ao." 
Joshua21:4 Ndipo maere anaturukira mabanja a Akohati; ndipo molota maere ana a Aroni wansembe, ndiwo Alevi, analandira motapa pa pfuko la Yuda, ndi pa pfuko la Simeoni, ndi pa pfuko la Benjamini, midzi khumi ndi itatu." 
Joshua21:5 Ndipo ana otsala a Kohati analandira molota maere motapa pa mabanja a pfuko la Efraimu, ndi pa pfuko La Dani, ndi pa pfuko La Manase logawika pakati, midzi khumi." 
Joshua21:6 Ndipo ana a Gerisoni analandira molota maere motapa pa mabanja a pfuko la Isakara, ndi pa pfuko la Aseri, ndi pa pfuko la Nafitali, ndi pa pfuko la Manase logawika pakati m'Basana, midzi khumi ndi itatu." 
Joshua21:7 Ana a Merari, monga mwa mabanja ao, analandira motapa pa pfuko la Rubeni, ndi pa pfuko la Gadi, ndi pa pfuko la Zebuloni midzi khumi ndi iwiri." 
Joshua21:8 Motero ana a Israyeli anapatsa Alevi midzi iyi ndi mabusa ao, molota maere, monga Yehova adalamulira mwa dzanja la Mose." 
Joshua21:9 Ndipo anapatsa motapa pa pfuko la ana a Yuda, ndi pa pfuko la ana a Simeoni, midzi iyi yochulidwa maina ao;" 
Joshua21:10 kuti ikhale ya ana a Aroni a mabanja a Akohati, a ana a Levi, pakuti maere oyamba adaturukira iwowa." 
Joshua21:11 Ndipo anawapatsa mudzi wa Ariba, ndiye atate wa Anoki, womwewo ndi Hebroni, ku mapiri a Yuda, ndi mabusa ace ozungulirapo." 
Joshua21:12 Koma minda ya mudzi ndi miraga yace anapatsa Kalebe mwana wa Yefune, ikhale yace." 
Joshua21:13 Ndipo kwa ana a Aroni wansembe anapatsa Hebroni ndi mabusa ace, ndiwo mudzi wopulumukirako wakupha mnzace, ndi Libina ndi mabusa ace;" 
Joshua21:14 ndi Yatiri ndi mabusa ace, ndi Esitimoa ndi mabusa ace;" 
Joshua21:15 ndi Holoni ndi mabusa ace, ndi Debiri ndi mabusa ace;" 
Joshua21:16 ndi Aini ndi mabusa ace, ndi Yuta ndi mabusa ace, ndi Betisemesi ndi mabusa ace; midzi isanu ndi inai yotapira mapfuko awiri aja." 
Joshua21:17 Ndipo motapira pfuko La Benjamini, Gibeoni ndi mabusa ace, Geba ndi mabusa ace," 
Joshua21:18 Anatotu ndi mabusa ace, ndi Alimoni ndi mabusa ace; midzi inai." 
Joshua21:19 Miclzi yonse ya ana a Aroni, ansembe, ndiyo khumi ndi itatu, ndi mabusa ao." 
Joshua21:20 Ndipo mabanja a ana a Kohati, Aleviwo, otsala a ana a Kohati, analandira midzi ya maere ao motapira pa pfuko la Efraimu." 
Joshua21:21 Ndipo anawapatsa Sekemu ndi mabusa ace ku mapiri a Efraimu, ndiwo mudzi wopulumukirako wakupha mnzaceyo, ndi Gezeri ndi mabusa ace;" 
Joshua21:22 ndi Kibizaimu ndi mabusa ace, Betihoroni ndi mabusa ace; midzi inai." 
Joshua21:23 Ndipo motapira m'pfuko La Dani, Eliteke ndi mabusa ace, Gibetoni ndi mabusa ace;" 
Joshua21:24 Aijaloni ndi mabusa ace, Gati-rimoni ndi mabusa ace; midzi inai." 
Joshua21:25 Ndipo motapira pa pfukola Manaselogawika pakati, Taanaki ndi mabusa ace, ndi Gati-rimoni ndi mabusa ace; midzi iwiri." 
Joshua21:26 Midzi yonse ya mabanja a ana otsala a Kohati ndiyo khumi ndi mabusa ao. 
Joshua21:27 Ndipo anapatsa ana a Gerisoni, a mabanja a Alevi, motapira pa pfuko la Manase logawika pakati, Golani m'Basana ndi mabusa ace, ndiwo mudzi wopulumukirako wakupha mnzaceyo; ndi Beesitera ndi mabusa ace; midzi iwiri." 
Joshua21:28 Ndipo motapira pa pfuko la Isakara, Kisioni ndi mabusa ace, Daberati ndi mabusa ace;" 
Joshua21:29 Yarimutu ndi mabusa ace, Eniganimu ndi mabusa ace; midzi inai." 
Joshua21:30 Ndipo motapira pa pfuko La Aseri, Misali ndi mabusa ace, Abidoni ndi mabusa ace;" 
Joshua21:31 Helikati ndi mabusa ace, ndi Rehobo ndi mabusa ace; midzi inai." 
Joshua21:32 Ndipo motapira pa pfuko la Nafitali, Kedesi m'Galileya ndi mabusa ace, ndiwo mudzi wopulumukirako wakupha mnzaceyo, ndi Hamotidori ndi mabusa ace, ndi Karitani ndi mabusa ace, midzi itatu." 
Joshua21:33 Midzi yonse ya Agerisoni monga mwa mabanja ao ndiyo midzi khumi ndi itatu ndi mabusa ao. 
Joshua21:34 Ndipo anapatsa kwa mabanja a ana a Merari, otsala a Alevi, motapira pa pfuko la Zebuloni, Yokineamu ndi mabusa ace, ndi Karita ndi mabusa ace," 
Joshua21:35 Dimna ndi mabusa ace, Nahalala ndi mabusa ace; midzi inai." 
Joshua21:36 Ndipo motapira pa pfuko la Rubeni, Bezeri ndi mabusa ace, ndi Yahazi ndi mabusa ace," 
Joshua21:37 Kedimotu ndi mabusa ace, ndi Mefati ndi mabusa ace; midzi inai." 
Joshua21:38 Ndipo motapira m'pfuko la Gadi, Ramoti m'Gileadi ndi mabusa ace ndiwo mudzi wopulumukirako wakupha mnzaceyo, ndi Mahanaimu ndi mabusa ace;" 
Joshua21:39 Hesiboni ndi mabusa ace. Yazeri ndi mabusa ace: yonse pamodzi midzi inai. 
Joshua21:40 Yonseyi ndiyo midzi ya ana a Merari monga mwa mabanja ao, ndiwo otsala a mabanja a Alevi; ndipo gawo lao ndilo midzi khumi ndi iwiri." 
Joshua21:41 Midzi yonse ya Alevi, pakati pa colowa ca ana a Israyeli ndiyo midzi makumi anai kudza isanu ndi itatu, ndi mabusa ao." 
Joshua21:42 Midzi iyi yonse inali nao mabusa ao pozungulira pao: inatero midzi iyi yonse. 
Joshua21:43 Motero Yehova anawapatsa Israyeli dziko lonse adalumbiralo kuwapatsa makolo ao: ndipo analilandira lao lao, nakhala m'mwemo." 
Joshua21:44 Ndipo Yehova anawapatsa mpumulo pozungulira ponse, monga mwa zonse adalumbirira makolo ao; ndipo pamaso pao sipanaima munthu mmodzi wa adani ao onse; Yehova anapereka adani ao onse m'manja mwao." 
Joshua21:45 Sikadasowa kanthu konse ka zinthu zokoma zonse Yehova adazinenera nyumba ya Israyeli; zidacitika zonse. 
Joshua22:1 Pamenepo Yoswa anaitana Arubeni ndi Agadi, ndi pfuko la Manase logawika pakati," 
Joshua22:2 nanena nao, Mwasunga inu zonsezo anakulamulirani Mosemtumiki wa Yehova; mwamveranso mau anga m'zonse ndinakulamulirani inu;" 
Joshua22:3 simunasiya abale anu masiku awa ambiri mpaka lero lino, koma mwasunga cisungire lamulola Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Joshua22:4 Ndipo tsopano Yehova Mulungu wanu wapumitsa abale anu, monga adanena nao; potero bwererani tsopano, mu kani ku mahema anu, ku dziko la colowa canu cimene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anakuninkhani tsidya lija la Yordano." 
Joshua22:5 Koma samalirani bwino kuti mucite cilangizo ndi cilamulo zimene Mose mtumiki wa Yehova anakulamulirani kukonda Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kuyenda m'njira zace zonse ndi kusunga malamulo ace, ndi kumuumirira iye, ndi kumtumikira iye ndi mtima wanu wonse ndi moyo wanu wonse." 
Joshua22:6 Momwemo Yoswa anawadalitsa, nawauza amuke; ndipo anamuka ku mahema ao." 
Joshua22:7 Ndipo gawo limodzi la pfuko la Manase, Mose anawapatsa colowa m'Basana; koma gawo lina Yoswa anawaninkha colowa pakati pa abale ao tsidya lija la Yordano kumadzulo. Ndiponso pamene Yoswa anawauza amuke ku mahema ao, anawadalitsa;" 
Joshua22:8 nanena nao ndi kuti, Bwererani naco cuma cambiri ku mahema anu, ndi zoweta zambirimbiri, ndi siliva, ndi golidi, ndi mkuwa, ndi citsulo, ndi maraya ambirimbiri; mugawane nao abale anu zofunkha kwa adani anu." 
Joshua22:9 Ndipo ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi pfuko la Manase logawika pakati anabwerera, nacoka kwa ana a Israyeli ku Silo, ndiwo wa m'dziko la Kanani kumka ku dziko la Gileadi, ku dziko lao lao, limene anakhala eni ace, monga mwa lamulo la Yehova, mwa dzanja la Mose." 
Joshua22:10 Ndipo pamene anafikira mbali ya ku Yordano, ndilo la m'dziko la Kanani, ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi pfuko la Manase logawika pakati anamanga ku Yordano guwa la nsembe, guwa lalikuru maonekedwe ace." 
Joshua22:11 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anamva anthu akuti, Taonani ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi pfuko la Manase logawika pakati anamanga guwa la nsembe pandunji pa dziko la Kanani, ku mbali ya ku Yordano, ku mbali ya ana a Israyeli." 
Joshua22:12 Pamene ana a Israyeli anamva ici msonkhano wonse wa ana a Israyeli anasonkhana ku Silo, kuti awakwerere kuwathira nkhondo." 
Joshua22:13 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anatumiza kwa ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi pfuko la Manase logawika pakati, ku dziko la Gileadi, Pinehasi mwana wa Eleazare wansembe," 
Joshua22:14 ndi akalonga khumi naye; nyumba imodzi ya atate kalonga mmodzi, kotero ndi mapfuko onse a Israyeli; yense wa iwowa ndiye mkuru wa nyumba ya atate ao mwa mabanja a Israyeli." 
Joshua22:15 M'mene anafika kwa ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi pfuko la Manase logawika pakati, ku dziko la Gileadi, ananena nao ndi kuti," 
Joshua22:16 Utero msonkhano wonse wa Yehova, Colakwa ici nciani mwalakwira naco Mulungu wa Israyeli, ndi kumtembenukira Yehova lero line kusamtsatanso, popeza munadzimangira guwa la nsembe kupikisana ndi Yehova lero lino?" 
Joshua22:17 Kodi mphulupulu ya ku Peori iticepera, imene sitinadziyeretsera mpaka lero lino, ungakhale mliri unadzera msonkhano wa Yehova," 
Joshua22:18 kuti mubwerera lero line kusatsata Yehova? ndipo kudzakhala kuti popeza lero mupikisana ndi Yehova, mawa adzakwiyira msonkhano wonse wa Israyeli." 
Joshua22:19 Koma mukayesa dziko La colowa canu ncodetsa, olokani kulowa m'dziko lacolowaca Yehova m'mene cihemaca Yehovacikhalamo, nimukhale naco colowa pakati pa ife; koma musapikisana ndi Yehova kapena kupikisana nafe, ndi kudzimangira nokha guwa la nsembe, pamodzi ndi guwa la nsembe la Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Joshua22:20 Kodi Akani mwana wa Zera sanalakwa m'coperekedwaco, ndipo mkwiyo unagwera msonkhano wonse wa Israyeli? osangoonongeka yekha munthuyo mu mphulupulu yace." 
Joshua22:21 Pamenepo ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi pfuko la Manase logawika pakati anayankha, nanena ndi akuru a mabanja a Israyeli," 
Joshua22:22 Yehova Cauta Mulungu, Yehova Cauta Mulungu, iye adziwa, ndi Israyeli adzadziwa; ngati mopikisana, ngati molakwira Yehova," 
Joshua22:23 tadzimangira guwa la nsembe, kubwerera kusamtsata Yehova, musatipulumutsa lero lino; kapena ngati kufukizapo nsembe yopsereza, kapena nsembe yaufa, kapena kuperekapo nsembe zoyamika, acifunse Yehova mwini wace;" 
Joshua22:24 ndipo ngati ife sitinacita ici cifukwa ca kuopa mlandu, ndi kuti, Masiku akudzawo ana anu akadzanena ndi ana athu, ndi kuti, Muli ciani inu kwa Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli?" 
Joshua22:25 pakuti Yehova anaika Yordano ukhale malire pakati pa ife ndi inu, ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi; mulibe gawo ndi Yehova; motero ana anu adzaleketsa ana athu asaope. Yehova." 
Joshua22:26 Cifukwa cace tinati, Tiyeni tikonzeretu zotimangira guwa la nsembe, si kufukizapo nsembe yopsereza ai, kapena nsembe yophera ai;" 
Joshua22:27 koma lidzakhala mboni pakati pa ife ndi inu; ndi pakati pa mibadwo yathu ya m'tsogolo, kuti tikacita nchito ya Yehova pamaso pace ndi nsembe zathu zopsereza, ndi zophera, ndi zoyamika; kuti ana anu asanene ndi ana athu m'tsogolomo, Mulibe gawo ndi Yehova." 
Joshua22:28 Cifukwa cace tinati, Kudzali, akadzatero kwa ife, kapena kwa mibadwo yathu m'tsogolomo, kuti tidzati, Tapenyani, citsanzo ca guwa la nsembe la Yehova, comanga makolo athu, si kufukizapo nsembe yopsereza ai, kapena nsembe yophera ai, koma ndilo mboni pakati pa ife ndi inu." 
Joshua22:29 Sikungatheke kuti tipikisane ndi Yehova ndi kubwerera lero kusatsata Yehova, kumanga guwa la nsembe la kufukizapo nsembe yopsereza, la nsembe yaufa, kapena yophera, pamodzi ndi guwa la nsembe la Yehova Mulungu wathu lokhala pakhomo pa cihema cace." 
Joshua22:30 Pamene Pinehasi wansembe, ndi akalonga a msonkhano ndi akuru a mabanja a Israyeli okhala naye anamva mau adawanena ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi ana a Manase, anawakomera pamaso pao." 
Joshua22:31 Ndipo Pinehasi, mwana wa Eleazare wansembe ananena ndi ana a Rubeni, ndi ana a Gadi, ndi ana a Manase, Lero lino tidziwa kuti Yehova ali pakati pa ife, pakuti simunalakwira naco Yehova; tsopano mwalanditsa ana a Israyeli m'dzanja la Yehova." 
Joshua22:32 Ndipo Pinehasi mwana wa Eleazare wansembe, ndi akalonga anabwerera kucokera kwa ana a Rubeni, ndi kwa ana a Gadi, m'dziko la Gileadi, kudza ku dziko La Kanani kwa ana a Israyeli, nawabwezera mau." 
Joshua22:33 Ndipo mauwo anakomera ana a Israyeli pamaso pao; ndi ana a Israyeli analemekeza Mulungu, osanenanso za kuwakwerera ndi kuwathira nkhondo, kuliononga dziko lokhalamo ana a Rubeni ndi ana a Gadi." 
Joshua22:34 Ndipo ana a Rubeni ndi: ana a Gadi analicha guwa la nsembelo: Ndilo mboni pakati pa ife kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu. 
Joshua23:1 Ndipo atapita masiku ambiri, Yehova atapumulitsa Israyeli kwa adani ao onse akuwazungulira, ndipo Yoswa adakalamba nakhala wa zaka zambiri;" 
Joshua23:2 Yoswa anaitana Aisrayeli onse, akulu akulu ao, ndi akuru ao, ndi oweruza ao, ndi akapitao ao, nanena nao, Ndakalamba, ndine wa zaka zambiri;" 
Joshua23:3 ndipo munapenya zonse Yehova Mulungu anacitira mitundu iyi yonse ya anthu cifukwa ca inu; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye anakuthirirani nkhondo. 
Joshua23:4 Taonani, ndakugawirani mitundu ya anthu iyi yotsala ikhale colowa ca mapfuko anu, kuyambira ku Yordano, ndi mitundu yonse ya anthu ndinaipasula, mpaka ku nyanja yaikuru ku malowero a dzuwa." 
Joshua23:5 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu Iyeyu adzawapitikitsa pamaso panu, ndi kulanda dziko lao kuwacotsa pamaso panu, ndipo mudzalandira dziko lao likhale colowa canu; monga Yehova Mulungu wanu ananena ndi inu." 
Joshua23:6 Koma mulimbike mtima kwambiri kusunga ndi kucita zonse zolembedwa m'buku la cilamulo ca Mose, osacipambukira kulamanja kapena kulamanzere;" 
Joshua23:7 osalowa pakati pa amitundu awa otsala mwa inu; kapena kuchula dzina la milungu yao; osalumbiritsa nalo, kapena kuitumikira, kapena kuigwadira;" 
Joshua23:8 koma muumirire Yehova Mulungu wanu, monga munacita mpaka lero lino." 
Joshua23:9 Pakuti Yehova anaingitsa pamaso panu mitundu yaikuru ndi yamphamvu; koma inu, palibe munthu anaima pamaso panu mpaka lero lino." 
Joshua23:10 Munthu mmodzi wa inu adzapitikitsa anthu cikwi cimodzi; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wanu ndiye amathirira inu nkhondo monga ananena ndi inu. 
Joshua23:11 Potero mudzisamalire ndithu kuti mukonde Yehova Mulungu wanu. 
Joshua23:12 Koma, mukadzabwereram'mbuyo pang'ono pokha ndi kuumirira otsala a mitundu awa, ndiwo akutsala pakati pa inu, ndi kukwatitsana nao, ndi kulowana nao, naonso kulowana nanu;" 
Joshua23:13 dziwani ndithu kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu sadzalandanso dziko la amitundu awa kuwacotsa pamaso panu; koma adzakhala kwa inu deka ndi msampha ndi mkwapulo m'nthiti mwanu, ndi minga m'maso mwanu, mpaka mudzatayika m'dziko lokoma ili anakupatsani Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Joshua23:14 Ndipo taonani, lero lino ndirikumuka njira ya dziko lonse lapansi; ndipo mudziwa m'mitima yanu yonse, ndi m'moyo mwa inu nonse, kuti pa mau okoma onse Yehova Mulungu wanu anawanena za inu sanagwa padera mau amodzi; onse anacitikira inu, sanasowapo mau amodzi." 
Joshua23:15 Ndipo kudzakhala kuti monga zakugwerani zokoma zonse anakunenerani Yehova Mulungu wanu, momwemo Yehova adzakutengerani zoipa zonse mpaka atakuonongani kukucotsani m'dziko lokoma ili anakupatsani Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Joshua23:16 Mukalakwira cipangano ca Yehova Mulungu wanu cimene analamulira inu ndi kumuka ndi kutumikira milungu yina ndi kuigwadira, mkwiyo wa Mulungu udzayakira inu, nimudzatayika msanga m'dziko lokomali anakupatsani." 
Joshua24:1 Ndipo Yoswa anasonkhanitsa mapfuko onse a Israyeli ku Sekemu, naitana akulu akulu a Israyeli ndi akuru ao, ndi oweruza ao, ndi akapitao ao; ndipo anadzilangiza pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Joshua24:2 Ndipo Yoswa ananena ndi anthu onse, Atero Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, Kale lija makolo anu anakhala tsidya lija la mtsinje, ndiye Tera, atate wa Abrahamu ndi atate wa Nahori; natumikira milungu yina iwowa." 
Joshua24:3 Ndipo ndinamtenga kholo lanu Abrahamu tsidya lija la mtsinje, ndi kumuyendetsa m'dziko lonse la Kanani ndi kucurukitsa mbeu zace ndi kumpatsa Isake," 
Joshua24:4 Ndi kwa Isake ndinapatsa Yakobo ndi Esau, ndipo ndinampatsa Esau phiri la Seiri likhale lace lace; koma Yakobo ndi ana ace anatsikira kumka ku Aigupto." 
Joshua24:5 Pamenepo ndinatuma Mose ndi Aroni, ndipo ndinasautsa Aigupto, monga ndinacita pakati pace; ndipo nditatero ndinakuturutsani." 
Joshua24:6 Ndipo ndinaturutsa atate anu m'Aigupto; ndipo munadzakunyanja; koma Aaigupto analondola atate anu ndi magareta ndi apakavalo mpaka ku Nyanja Yofiira. 
Joshua24:7 Ndipo pamene anapfuula kwa Yehova, anaika mdima pakati pa inu ndi Aaigupto nawatengera nyanja, nawamiza; ndi maso anu anapenya cocita Ine m'Aigupto; ndipo munakhala m'cipululu masiku ambiri." 
Joshua24:8 Pamenepo ndinakulowetsani inu m'dziko la Aamori okhala tsidya lija la Yordano; nagwirana nanu iwowa; ndipo ndinawapereka m'dzanja lanu, nimunalandira dziko lao likhale lanu lanu; ndipo ndinawaononga pamaso panu." 
Joshua24:9 Pamenepo Balaki mwana wa Zipori, mfumu ya Moabu, anauka naponyana ndi Israyeli; natuma naitana Balamu mwana wa Beori atemberere inu;" 
Joshua24:10 koma sindinafuna kumvera Balamu, potero anakudalitsani cidalitsire, ndipo ndinakulanelitsani m'dzanja lace." 
Joshua24:11 Pamenepo munaoloka Yordano, ndi kufika ku Yeriko; ndi eni ace a ku Yeriko anaponyana nanu nkhondo, Aamori, ndi Aperizi, ndi Akanani, ndi Ahiti, ndi Agirigasi, Ahivi ndi Ayebusi; ndipo ndinawapereka m'dzanja lanu." 
Joshua24:12 Ndipo ndinatuma mabvu atsogolere inu, amene anawaingitsa pamaso panu, ndiwo mafumu awiri a Aamori; osati ndi lupanga lako, kapena ndi uta wako ai." 
Joshua24:13 Ndipo ndinakupatsani dziko limene simunagwiramo nchito, ndi midzi simunaimanga, ndipo mukhala m'mwemo; mukudya za m'minda yamphesa, ndi minda yaazitona imene simunaioka." 
Joshua24:14 Ndipo tsopano, opani Yehova ndi kumtumikira ndi mtima wangwiro ndi woona; nimucotse milungu imene makolo anu anaitumikira tsidya lija la mtsinje, ndi m'Aigupto; nimutumikire Yehova." 
Joshua24:15 Ndipo ngati kutumikira Yehova kukuipirani mudzisankhire lero amene mudzamtumikira, kapena milungu imene anaitumikira makolo anu okhala tsidya lija la mtsinje, kapena milungu ya Aamori amene mukhala m'dziko lao; koma ine, ndi a m'nyumba yanga, tidzatumikira Yehova." 
Joshua24:16 Ndipo anthu anayankha, nati, Sikungatheke kuti timsiye Yehova, ndi kutumikira milungu yina;" 
Joshua24:17 pakuti Yehova Mulungu wathu ndi iye amene anatikweza kutiturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto ku nyumba ya akapolo, nacita zodabwiza zazikuruzo pamaso pathu, natisunga m'njira monse tidayendamo, ndi pakati pa anthu onse amene tinapita pakati pao;" 
Joshua24:18 ndipo Yehova anaingitsa pamaso pathu anthu awa onse, ngakhale Aamori okhala m'dzikomo; cifukwa cace ifenso tidzatumikira Yehova, pakuti ndiye Mulungu wathu." 
Joshua24:19 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa anthu, Simukhoza inu kutumikira Yehova pakuti ndiye Mulungu woyera, ndi Mulungu wansanje; sadzalekerera zolakwa zanu, kapena zocimwa zanu." 
Joshua24:20 Mukasiya Yehova, ndi kutumikira milungu yacilendo, adzatembenuka ndi kukucitirani coipa, ndi kukuthani, angakhale anakucitirani cokoma." 
Joshua24:21 Ndipo anthu anati kwa Yoswa, Iaitu, koma tidzatumikira Yehova." 
Joshua24:22 Ndipo Yoswa ananena ndi anthu, Inu mwadzicitira mboni inu nokha kuti mwadzisankhira Yehova kumtumikira iye. Ndipo anati, Ndife mboni." 
Joshua24:23 Ndipo tsopano, cotsani milungu yacilendo iri pakati pa inu, ndi kulozetsa mitima yanu kwa Yehova, Mulungu wa Israyeli." 
Joshua24:24 Ndipo anthu anati kwa Yoswa, Tidzamtumikira Yehova Mulungu wathu ndi kumvera mau ace." 
Joshua24:25 Motero Yoswa anacita pangano ndi anthu tsiku lija, nawaikira lemba ndi ciweruzo m'Sekemu." 
Joshua24:26 Ndipo Yoswa analembera mau awa m'buku la cilamulo ca Mulungu; natenga mwala waukuru, nauimitsa apo patsinde pa thundu wokhala pa malo opatulika a Yehova." 
Joshua24:27 Ndipo Yoswa anati kwa anthu onse, Taonani, mwala uwu udzakhala mboni yotitsutsa; pakuti udamva mau onse a Yehova amene ananena kwa ife; ndipo udzakhala mboni yotsutsa inu, mungakanize Mulungu wanu." 
Joshua24:28 Pamenepo Yoswa anauza anthu amuke, yense ku colowa cace." 
Joshua24:29 Ndipo kunali, zitatha izi, Yoswa mwana wa Nuni mtumiki wa Yehova, adafa, wa zaka zana ndi khumi." 
Joshua24:30 Ndipo anamuika m'malire a colowa cace m'Timinati-sera, ndiwo ku mapiri a Efraimu kumpoto kwa phiri la Gaasi." 
Joshua24:31 Ndipo Israyeli anatumikira Yehova masiku onse a Yoswa, ndi masiku onse a akulu akulu otsala atafa Yoswa, amene anadziwa nchito yonse ya Yehova anaicitira Israyeli." 
Joshua24:32 Ndipo mafupa a Yosefe amene ana a Israyeli anakwera nao kucokera ku Aigupto anawaika ku Sekemu, pa kadziko kamene adakagula Yakobo kwa ana a Hamori atate wa Sekemu ndi kuwapatsa ndalama zana; ndipo anakhala colowa ca ana a Yosefe." 
Joshua24:33 Eleazarenso mwana wa Aroni anafa; ndipo anamuika pa phiri la Pinehasi mwana wace, limene adampatsa ku mapiri a Efraimu." 
Judges1:1 NDIPO atafa Yoswa, ana a Israyeli anafunsira kwa Yehova ndi kuti, Adzayamba ndani kutikwerera pa Akanani kuwathira nkhondo?" 
Judges1:2 Ndipo Yehova anati, Akwere Yuda; taonani, ndapereka dzikoli m'dzanja lace." 
Judges1:3 Ndipo Yuda ananena ndi Simeoni mkuru wace, Kwera nane ku gawo langa kuti tiwathire nkhondo Akanani; ndipo inenso ndidzamuka nawe ku gawo lako. Namuka naye Simeoni." 
Judges1:4 Ndipo Yuda atakwera, Yehova anapereka Akanani ndi Aperizi m'dzanja lao, ndipo anakantha a iwowa anthu zikwi khumi." 
Judges1:5 Ndipo anapeza Adoni-bezeki m'Bezeki, namthira nkhondo nakantha Akanani ndi Aperizi." 
Judges1:6 Koma Adoni-bezeki anathawa; ndipo anampitikitsa, namgwira, namdula zala zazikuru za m'manja ndi za m'mapazi." 
Judges1:7 Pamenepo anati Adoni-bezeki, Mafumu makumi asanu ndi awiri odulidwa zala zazikuru za m'manja ndi m'mapazi anaola kakudya kao pansi pa gome panga; monga ndinacita ine, momwemo Mulungu wandibwezera. Ndipo anadza naye ku Yerusalemu, nafa iye komweko." 
Judges1:8 Ndipo ana a Yuda anacita nkhondo pa Yerusalemu, naulanda, naukantha ndi lupanga lakuthwa, natentha mudzi ndi moto." 
Judges1:9 Ndipo atatero ana a Yuda anatsika kuthirana nao nkhondo Akanani akukhala kumapiri, ndi kumwela ndi kucidikha." 
Judges1:10 Ndipo Yuda anamuka kwa Akanani akukhala m'Hebroni; koma kale dzina la Hebroni ndilo mudzi wa Ariba; ndipo anakantha Sesai, ndi Ahimani, ndi Talimai." 
Judges1:11 Pocoka pamenepo anamuka kwa nzika za ku Dibiri, koma kale dzina la Dibiri ndilo mudzi wa Seferi." 
Judges1:12 Ndipo Kalebe anati, iye amene akantha mudzi wa Seferi, naulanda, yemweyo ndidzampatsa Akisa mwana wanga wamkazi akhale mkazi wace." 
Judges1:13 Ndipo Otiniyeli, mwana wa Kenazi mng'ono wa Kalebi anaulanda, ndipo anampatsa Akisa mwana wace wamkazi akhale mkazi wace." 
Judges1:14 Ndipo kunali, m'mene anamdzera, anamkakamiza mwamuna wace kuti apemphe atate wace ampatse munda; natsika pa buru wace; ndipo Kalebe ananena naye, Ufunanji?" 
Judges1:15 Ndipo anati kwa Iye, Mundipatse dalitso; popeza mwandipatsa dziko lakumwela, ndipatsenso zitsime za madzi. Pamenepo Kalebe anampatsa zitsime za kumtunda ndi zitsime za kunsi." 
Judges1:16 Ndipo ana a Mkeni mlamu wace wa Mose, anakwera kuturuka m'mudzi wa m'migwalangwa pamodzi ndi ana a Yuda, nalowa m'cipululu ca Yuda cokhala kumwela kwa Aradi; namuka iwo nakhala ndi anthuwo." 
Judges1:17 Ndipo Yuda anamuka ndi Simeoni mkuru wace, nakantha Akanani akukhala m'Zefati, nauononga konse. Koma dzina la mudziwo analicha Horima." 
Judges1:18 Yuda analandanso Gaza ndi malire ace, ndi Asikeloni ndi malire ace, ndi Ekroni ndi malire ace." 
Judges1:19 Ndipo Yehova anali ndi Yuda, iye nawaingitsa a kumapiri, osaingitsanzika za kucigwa, popeza zinali nao magareta acitsulo." 
Judges1:20 Ndipo anapatsa Kalebe Hebroni monga Mose adanena; iye nawaingitsa komweko ana amuna atatu a Anaki. 
Judges1:21 Koma ana a Benjamini sanaingitsa Ayebusi okhala m'Yerusalemu; koma Ayebusi anakhala m'Yerusalemu pamodzi ndi ana a Benjamini, mpaka lero lino." 
Judges1:22 Ndipo anakwera iwo a m'nyumba ya Yosefe naonso kumka ku Beteli; ndipo Yehova anakhala nao. 
Judges1:23 Ndipo iwo a m'nyumba ya Yosefe anatumiza ozonda ku Beteli. Koma kale dzina la mudziwo ndilo Luzi. 
Judges1:24 Ndipo alonda anaona munthu alikuturuka m'mudzi, nanena naye, Utionetsetu nolowera m'mudzi, ndipo tidzakucitira cifundo." 
Judges1:25 Nawaonetsa polowera m'mudzi iye, naukantha mudzi iwowa ndi lupanga lakuthwa; koma analola munthuyo ndi banja lace lonse amuke." 
Judges1:26 Ndipo munthuyo anamuka ku dziko la Ahiti, namanga mudzi, naucha dzina lace Luzi; ndilo dzina lace mpaka lero lino." 
Judges1:27 Koma Manase sanaingitsa a ku Betiseani ndi midzi yace kapena a Taanaki ndi midzi yace, kapena nzika za ku Dori ndi midzi yace, kapena nzika za ku Ibleamu ndi midzi yace, kapena nzika za ku Megido ndi midzi yace; koma Akanani anakhumba kukhala m'dziko muja." 
Judges1:28 Ndipo kunali, atakula mphamvu Israyeli, anasonkhetsa Akanani, osawaingitsa onse." 
Judges1:29 Ndipo Efraimu sanaingitsa Akanani okhala m'Gezeri; koma Akanani anakhala m'Gezeri pakati pao," 
Judges1:30 Zebuloni sanaingitsa nzika za ku Kitroni, kapena nzika za ku Nahaloli; koma Akanaru anakhala pakati pao, nawasonkhera." 
Judges1:31 Aseri sanaingitsa nzika za ku Ako, kapena nzika za ku Sidoni, kapena a Akalabu, kapena a Akisibu, kapena a Heliba, kapena a Afiki, kapena a Rehobo;" 
Judges1:32 koma Aseri anakhala pakati pa Akanani nzika za kudziko; pakuti sanawaingitsa. 
Judges1:33 Nafitali sanaingitsa nzika za ku Beti-semesi, kapena nzika za ku Beri-anati; koma anakhala pakati pa Akanani, nzika za kudziko; koma nzika za ku Beti-semesi, ndi a ku Beti-anati zinawasonkhera." 
Judges1:34 Ndipo Aamori anakankha ana a Dani akhale kumapiri pakuti sanawalola atsikire kucigwa; 
Judges1:35 Aamori anakhumbanso kukhala ku phiri la Heresi, ku Ajaloni, ndi ku Saalibimu; koma dzanja la a m'nyumba ya Yosefe linawalaka, nakhala iwo akupereka msonkho." 
Judges1:36 Ndipo malire a Aamori anayambira pokwerera pa Akrabimu, pathanthwe, ndi pokwererapo." 
Judges2:1 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anakwera kucokera ku Giligala kumka ku Bokimu. Ndipo anati, Ndinakukweretsani kucokera ku Aigupto, ndi kulowetsa inu m'dziko limene ndinalumbirira makolo anu; ndipo ndinati, Sindidzathyola cipangano canga nanu ku nthawi yonse;" 
Judges2:2 ndipo inu, musamacita pangano ndi nzika za m'dziko ili; muzigamula maguwa ao a nsembe. Koma simunamvera mau anga; mwacicita ici cifukwa ninji?" 
Judges2:3 Cifukwa cacenso ndinati, Sindidzawapitikitsa kuwacotsa pamaso panu; koma adzakhala ngati minga m'nthiti zanu, ndi milungu yao idzakhalira inu msampha." 
Judges2:4 Ndipo kunali, pamene mthenga wa Yehova ananena mau awa kwa ana onse a Israyeli, anthuwo anakweza mau ao, nalira misozi." 
Judges2:5 Potero analicha dzina la malowo Bokimu: namphera Yehova nsembe pomwepo. 
Judges2:6 Pamene Yoswa atawalola anthu amuke, ana a Israyeli anamuka, yense ku colowa cace, dziko likhale lao lao." 
Judges2:7 Ndipo anthuwo anatumikira Yehova masiku onse a Yoswa ndi masiku onse a akulu akulu otsala atafa Yoswa, amene adaona nchito yaikuru yonse ya Yehova anaicitira Israyeli." 
Judges2:8 Ndipo Yoswa mwana wa Nuni, mtumiki wa Yehova anafa wa zaka zace zana ndi khumi." 
Judges2:9 Ndipo anamuika m'malire a colowa cace m'Timinatiheresi, ku mapiri a Efraimu, kumpoto kwa phiri la Gaasi." 
Judges2:10 Ndiponso mbadwo uwu wonse unasonkhanidwa kuikidwa kwa makolo ao; nuuka mbadwo wina pambuyo pao; wosadziwa Yehova kapena nchitoyi adaicitira Israyeli," 
Judges2:11 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anacita coipa pamaso pa Yehova, natumikira Abaala;" 
Judges2:12 nasiya Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao, amene adawaturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto, natsata milungu yina, milungu ya mitundu ya anthu okhala pozungulira pao, naigwadira; nautsa mkwiyo wa Yehova." 
Judges2:13 Ndipo anasiya Yehova, natumikira Baala ndi Asitaroti." 
Judges2:14 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Israyeli, ndipo anawapereka m'manja a ofunkha kuti awafunkhe; nawagulitsa m'dzanja la adani ao akuwazungulira osakhozanso iwowo kuima pamaso pa adani ao." 
Judges2:15 Kuli konse anaturuka, dzanja la Yehova linawakhalira moipa, monga Yehova adanena, ndi monga Yehova adawalumbirira; nasautsika kwambiri iwowa." 
Judges2:16 Ndipo Yehova anautsa oweruza, amene anawapulumutsa m'dzanja la iwo akuwafunkha." 
Judges2:17 Koma sanamvera angakhale oweruza ao, pakuti anamuka kupembedza milungu yina, naigwadira; anapambuka msanga m'njira yoyendamo makolo ao, pomvera malamulo a Yehova; sanatero iwowa." 
Judges2:18 Ndipo pamene Yehova anawaukitsira oweruza, Yehova anakhala naye woweruzayo, nawapulumutsa m'dzanja la adani ao masiku onse a woweruzayo; pakuti Yehova anagwidwa cisoni pa kubuula kwao cifukwa ca iwo akuwapsinja ndi kuwatsendereza." 
Judges2:19 Koma kunali atafa woweruzayo anabwerera m'mbuyo, naposa makolo ao ndi kucita moipitsa, ndi kutsata milungu yina kuitumikira ndi kuigwadira, sanaleka kanthu ka macitidwe ao kapena ka njira yao yacheni." 
Judges2:20 Ndipo mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Israyeli; nati Iye, Popezamtundu uwu unalakwira cipangano canga cunene ndinalamulira makolo ao, osamvera mau ansa;" 
Judges2:21 lnenso sindionjeza kuingitsa pamaso pao a mitundu yina imene Yoswa adaisiya pakufa iyeyu; 
Judges2:22 kuti ndiyese nayo Israyeli ngati adzasunga njira ya Yehova kuyendamo monga anaisunga makolo ao, kapena iai." 
Judges2:23 Motero Yehova analeka mitundu iyi osaiingitsa msanga, ndipo sadaipereka m'dzanja la yoswa." 
Judges3:1 Ndipo iyo ndiyo mitundu ya anthu anaisiyapo Yehova kuyesa nayo Israyeli, ndiwo onse amene sanadziwa nkhondo zonse za Kanani;" 
Judges3:2 cifukwa cace ndico cokha cakuti adziwitse mibadwo ya ana a Israyeli ndi kuwaphunzitsa nkhondo, ngakhale iwo okha okha osaidziwa konse kale;" 
Judges3:3 anasiya mafumu asanu a Afilisti ndi Akanani onse, ndi Asidoni, ndi Ahivi okhala m'phiri la Lebano, kuyambira phiri la Baalaherimoni mpaka polowera ku Hamati." 
Judges3:4 Amenewo anakhala coyesera Israyeli kuti Yehova adziwe ngati adzamvere malamulo ace, amene analamulira makolo ao mwa dzanja la Mose." 
Judges3:5 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anakhala pakati pa Akanani, Ahiti, ndi Aamori, ndi Aperizi, ndi Ahivi, ndi Ayebusi;" 
Judges3:6 nakwatira ana akazi a iwowa, napereka ana ao akazi kwa ana amuna a iwowa natumikira milungu yao." 
Judges3:7 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anacita coipa pamaso pa Yehova, naiwala Yehova Mulungu wao, natumikira Abaala ndi zifanizo." 
Judges3:8 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Mulungu unayakira Israyeli ndipo anawagulitsa m'dzanja la KusaniRisataimu, mfumu ya Mesopotamiya; ndi ana a Israyeli anatumikira Kusani-Risataimu zaka zisanu ndi zitatu." 
Judges3:9 Ndipo pamene ana a Israyeli anapfuula kwa Yehova, Yehova anaukitsira ana a Israyeli mpulumutsi amene anawapulumutsa, ndiye Otiniyeli mwana wa'Kenazi, mng'ono wace wa Kalebe." 
Judges3:10 Ndipo unamdzera mzimu wa Yehova, iye naweruza Israyeli, naturuka kunkhondo; napereka Yehova Kusani-Risataimu mfumu ya Mesapotamiya m'dzanja lace; ndi dzanja lace linamlaka Kusani-Risataimu." 
Judges3:11 Pamenepo dziko linapumula zaka makumi anai; ndi Otiniveli mwana wa Kenazi anafa. 
Judges3:12 Koma ana a Israyeli anaonjezanso kucita coipa pamaso pa Yehova; pamenepo Yehova analimbitsa Egiloni mfumu ya Moabu pa Israyeli, popeza anacita coipa pamaso pa Yehova." 
Judges3:13 Ndipo anadzisonkanitsira ana a Amoni ndi a Amaleki, namuka nakantha Israyeli, nalanda mudzi wa m'migwalangwa nakhalamo." 
Judges3:14 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anatumildra Egiloni mfumu ya Moabu zaka khumi ndi zisanu ndi zitatu. 
Judges3:15 Koma pamene ana a Israyeli anapfuula kwa Yehova, Yehova anawaukitsira mpulumutsi, Ehudi mwana wa Gera, Mbenjamini, munthu wamanzere, ndipo ana a Israyeli anatumiza mtulo m'dzanja lace Ikwa Egiloni mfumu ya Moabu." 
Judges3:16 Ndipo Ehudi anadzisulira lupanga lakuthwa konse konse utali wace mkono; nalimangirira pansi pa zobvala zace pa ncafu ya kulamanja. 
Judges3:17 Ndipo anapereka mtulo kwa Egiloni, mfumu ya Moabu; koma Egiloni ndiye munthu wonenepa ndithu." 
Judges3:18 Ndipo atatha kupereka mtulowo, anauza anthu onyamula mtulo acoke." 
Judges3:19 Koma iye mwini anabwerera pa mafano osema ali ku Giligala, nati, Ndiri nao mau acinsinsi kwa inu, mfumu. Nati iye, Khalani cete. Ndipo anaturuka onse akuimapo." 
Judges3:20 Ndipo Ehudi anamdzera alikukhala pa yekha m'cipinda cosanja copitidwa mphepo, Nati Ehudi, Ndiri nao mau a Mulungu akukuuzani. Nauka iye pa mpando wace." 
Judges3:21 Ndipo Ehudi anaturutsa dzanja lace lamanzere nagwira lupanga ku ncafu ya kulamanja nampyoza m'mimba mwace; 
Judges3:22 ndi cigumbu cace cinalowa kutsata mpeni wace; ndi mafuta anaphimba mpeniwo, pakuti sanasolola lupanga m'mimba mwace; nilituruka kumbuyo." 
Judges3:23 Pamenepo Ehudi anaturuka kukhonde namtsekera pamakomo pa cipinda cosanja nafungulira. 
Judges3:24 Ndipo ataturuka iye, anadza aka polo ace; napenya, ndipo taonani pamakomo pa cipinda cosanja mpofungulira; nati iwo, Angophimba mapazi m'cipinda cace cosanja copitidwa mphepo." 
Judges3:25 Ndipo analindirira mpaka anacita manyazi; koma taonani, sanatsegula pamakomo pa cipinda cosanja. Pamenepo anatenga mfungulo natsegula; ndipo taonani, mbuye wao wagwa pansi, wafa." 
Judges3:26 Ndipo Ehudi anapulumuka pakucedwa iwo, napitirira pa mafano osema, napulumuka kufikira Seira." 
Judges3:27 Ndipo kunali, pakufika iye anaomba lipenga ku mapiri a Efraimu; ndi ana a Israyeli anatsika naye kucokera kumapiri, nawatsogolera iye." 
Judges3:28 Ndipo ananena nao, Nditsateni ine, pakuti Yehova wapereka adani anu Amoabu m'manja mwanu. Ndipo anatsika ndi kumtsata, natsekereza Amoabu madooko a Yordano, osalola mmodzi aoloke." 
Judges3:29 Ndipo anakantha Amoabu nyengo ija anthu zikwi khumi, onsewa anthu amoyo, ndi ngwazi; ndipo sanapulumuka ndi mmodzi yense." 
Judges3:30 Motero anagonjetsa Moabu tsiku lija pansi pa dzanja la Israyeli. Ndipo dziko linapumulazaka makumi asanu ndi atatu. 
Judges3:31 Atapita iye kunali Samagara, mwana wa Anati amene anakantha Afilisti mazana asanu ndi limodzi ndi mtoso wa ng'ombe; nayenso anapulumutsa Israyeli." 
Judges4:1 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anaonjeza kucita coipa pamaso pa Yehova, atafa Ehudi." 
Judges4:2 Ndipo Yehova anawagulitsa m'dzanja la Yabini mfumu ya Kanani, wocita ufumu ku Hazori; kazembe wace wa nkhondo ndiye Sisera, wokhala ku Haroseti wa amitundu." 
Judges4:3 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anapfuula kwa Yehova; pakuti anali nao magareta acitsulo mazana asanu ndi anai; napsinja ana a Israyeli kolimba zaka makumi awiri. 
Judges4:4 Ndipo Debora, mneneri wamkazi, ndiye mkazi wace wa Lapidoti, anaweruza Israyeli nyengo ija," 
Judges4:5 Ndipo anakhala patsinde pa mgwalangwa wa Debora pakati pa Rama ndi Beteli ku mapiri a Efraimu; ndi ana a Israyeli anakwera kwa iye awaweruze. 
Judges4:6 Ndipo anatuma, naitana Baraki mwana wa Abinoamu, acoke m'Kedesi-Nafitali; nanena naye, Kodi Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli sanalamulira ndi kuti, Muka, nuluniike ku phiri la Tabori, nuwatenge, apite nawe anthu zikwi khumi a ana a Nafitali ndi ana a Zebuloni?" 
Judges4:7 Ndipo ndidzamkoka Sisera, kazembe wa nkhondo ya Yabini, akudzere ku mtsinje wa Kisoni, ndi magareta ace, ndi aunyinji ace; ndipo ndidzampereka m'dzanja lako." 
Judges4:8 Ndipo Baraki anati kwa iye, Ukamuka nane, ndidzamuka; ukapanda kumuka nane, sindimuka." 
Judges4:9 Nati iye, Kumuka ndidzamuka nawe, koma ulendo umukawo, sudzacita nao ulemu; pakuti: Yehova adzagulitsa Sisera m'dzanja la mkazi, Motero Debora anauka namuka ndi Baraki ku Kedesi." 
Judges4:10 Ndipo Baraki anaitana Zebuloni ndi Nafitali asonkhane ku Kedesi; iye nakwera ndi anthu zikwi khumi akumtsata; Deboranso anakwera kumka naye. 
Judges4:11 Ndipo Heberi Mkeni anadzisiyanitsa ndi Akeni, ndi ana a Hobabu mlamu wace wa Mose, namanga mahema ace mpaka thundu wa m'Zaananimu, ndiwo wa ku Kedesi." 
Judges4:12 Ndipo anauza Sisera kuti Baraki mwana wa Abinoamu wakwera ku phiri la Tabori. 
Judges4:13 Pamenepo Sisera anasonkhanitsa magareta ace onse ndiwo magareta mazana asanu ndi anai acitsulo, ndi anthu onse okhala naye, kuyambira Haroseti wa amitundu mpaka mtsinje wa Kisoni." 
Judges4:14 Ndipo Debora anati kwa Baraki, Nyamuka; pakuti ili ndi tsikuli Yehova wapereka Sisera m'dzanja lako; sanaturuka kodi Yehova pamaso pako? Potero Baraki anatsika ku phiri la Tabori ndi amuna zikwi khumi akumtsata." 
Judges4:15 Ndipo Ambuye anaononga Sisera, ndi magareta onse ndi gulu lankhondo lonse, adi lupanga lakuthwa pamaso pa Baraki; koma Sisera anatsika pagareta nathawa coyenda pansi." 
Judges4:16 Koma Baraki anatsata magareta ndi gululo mpaka Haroseti wa amitundu; ndi gulu lonse lankhondo la Sisera linagwa ndi lupanga lakuthwa, sanatsala munthu ndi mmodzi yense." 
Judges4:17 Koma Sisera anathawira coyenda pansi ku hema wa Yaeli mkazi wa Heberi Mkeni; pakuti panali mtendere pakati pa Yabini mfumu ya Hazori, ndi nyumba ya Heberi Mkeni." 
Judges4:18 Ndipo Yaeli anaturuka kukomana ndi Sisera, nanena naye, Pambuka, mbuye wanga, pambukira kwa ine kuno; usaope. Ndipo anapambukira kwa iye kulowa m'hema, nampfunda ndi cimbwi." 
Judges4:19 Pamenepo ananena naye, Ndipatsetu madzi pang'ono ndimwe; popeza ndine waludzu. Ndipo anatsegula thumba la mkaka, nampatsa amwe, nampfunda." 
Judges4:20 Ndipo Sisera ananena naye, Taima pakhomo pa hema, ndipo kudzali, akadza munthu, akakufunsa akati, Pali munthu pano kodi? Uziti, Palibe." 
Judges4:21 Pamenepo Yaeli mkazi wa Heberi anatenga ciciri ca hema, natenga nyundo m'dzanja lace namdzera monyang'ama, nakhomera ciciri cilowe m'litsipa mwace; nicinapyoza kulowa m'nthaka; popeza anali m'tulo tofa nato ndi kulema; nafa." 
Judges4:22 Ndipo taonani, pomlondola Sisera Barakiyo, Yaeli anaturuka kukomana naye, Dati kwa iye, Idza kuno, ndidzakuonetsa munthu umfunayo, Potero anamdzera, ndipo taonani, Sisera wagwa, wafa, ndi ciciri m'litsipa mwace." 
Judges4:23 Momwemo Mulungu anagonjetsa tsiku lija Yabini mfumu ya Kanani pamaso pa ana a Israyeli. 
Judges4:24 Ndipo dzanja la ana a Israyeli linamkabe ndi kulimbika pa Yabini mfumu ya Kanani mpaka adamuononga Yabini mfumu ya Kanani. 
Judges5:1 Ndipo Debora ndi Baraki mwana wa Abinoamu anayimba tsiku lomwelo ndi kuti," 
Judges5:2 Lemekezani Yehova Pakuti atsogoleri m'Israyeli anatsogolera, Pakuti anthu anadzipereka mwaufulu." 
Judges5:3 Imvani mafumu inu; cherani makutu, akalonga inu; Ndidzayimbira ine Yehova, inetu; Ndidzamuyimbira nyimbo, Yehova, Mulungu wa Israyeli," 
Judges5:4 Yehova, muja mudaturuka m'Seiri, Muja mudayenda kucokera ku thengo la Edomu, Dziko linanjenjemera, thambo lomwe linakha, Inde mitambo inakha madzi." 
Judges5:5 Mapiri anagwedezeka pamaso pa Yehova, Sinai ili pamaso pa Yehova, Mulungu wa Israyeli." 
Judges5:6 Masiku a Samagara, mwana wa Anati, Masiku a Yaeli maulendo adalekeka Ndi apanjira anayenda mopazapaza," 
Judges5:7 Miraga idalekeka m'Israyeli, idalekeka. Mpaka ndinauka ine Debora, Ndinauka ine amai wa Israyeli." 
Judges5:8 Anasankha milungu yatsopano, Pamenepo nkhondo inaoneka kuzipata. Ngati cikopa kapena nthungo zidaoneka Mwa zikwi makumi anai a Israyeli?" 
Judges5:9 Mtima wanga ubvomerezana nao olamulira a m'Israyeli, Amene anadzipereka mwaufulu mwaanthu. Lemekezani Yehova." 
Judges5:10 Inu akuyenda okwera pa aburu oyera, Inu akukhala poweruzira, Ndi inu akuyenda m'njira, fotokozerani." 
Judges5:11 Posamveka phokoso la amauta potunga madzi, Pomwepo adzafotokozera zolungama anazicita Yehova, Zolungama anazicita m'miraga yace, m'lsrayeli. Pamenepo anthu a Yehova anatsikira kuzipata." 
Judges5:12 Galamuka, Debora, galamuka, Galamuka, galamuka, unene nyimbo; Uka, Baraki, manga nsinga ndende zako, mwana wa Abinoamu, iwe." 
Judges5:13 Pamenepo omveka otsala anatsika ndi anthu; Yehova ananditsikira pakati pa acamuna. 
Judges5:14 Anafika Aefraimu amene adika mizu m'Amaleki; Benjamini anakutsata iwe pakati pa anthu ako. Ku Makiri kudacokera olamulira, Ndi ku Zebuloni iwo akutenga ndodo ya mtsogoleri." 
Judges5:15 Akalonga a Isakara anali ndi Debora; Monga Isakara momwemo Baraki, Anawatuma m'cigwa namka coyenda pansi. Pa mitsinje ya Rubeni panali zotsimikiza mtima zazikuru." 
Judges5:16 Wakhaliranji pakati pa makola, Kumvera kulira kwa zoweta? Ku timitsinje ta Rubeni kunali zotsimikiza mtima zazikuru." 
Judges5:17 Gileadi anakhala tsidya lija la Yordano; Ndi Dani, akhaliranji mzombo? Aseri anakhala pansi m'mphepete mwa nyanja, Nakhalitsa pa nyondo yace ya nyanja." 
Judges5:18 Zebuloni ndiwo anthu anataya moyo wao mpaka imfa, Nafitali yemwe poponyana pamisanje." 
Judges5:19 Anadza mafumu, nathira nkhondo Pamen'epo anathira nkhondo mafumu a Kanani. M'Taanaki, ku madzi a Megido; Osatengako phindu la ndarama." 
Judges5:20 Nyenyezi zinathira nkhondo yocokera kumwamba, M'mipita mwao zinathirana ndi Sisera." 
Judges5:21 Mtsinje wa Kisoni unawakokolola, Mtsinje uja wakale, mtsinje wa Kisoni. Yenda mwamphamvu, moyo wangawe." 
Judges5:22 Pamenepo ziboda za akavalo zinaguguda, Ndi kutumphatumpha, kurumphatumpha kwa anthu ace eni mphamvu," 
Judges5:23 Mutemberere Merozi, ati mthenga wa Yehova, Mutemberere citemberere nzika zace; Pakuti sanadzathandiza Yehova, Kumthandiza Yehova pa acamuna." 
Judges5:24 Wodalitsika, woposa akazi, akhale Yaeli Mkazi wa Heberi Mkeni. Akhale wodalitsika woposa akazi a m'hema." 
Judges5:25 Mwamunayo anapempha madzi, anampatsa mkaka, Anamtengera mafuta a mkaka m'cotengera ca mfulu." 
Judges5:26 Dzanja lace analitambasulira kuciciri, Ndi dzanja lace lamanja ku nyundo ya anchito, Nakhomera Sisera, nakantha mutu wace, Inde, anaphwanya napyoza m'litsipa mwace." 
Judges5:27 Pa mapazi ace anabzong'onyoka, anagwa, anagona; Pa mapazi ace anabzong'onyoka, anagwa; Pobzong'onyokapo, pamenepo wagwa wafa." 
Judges5:28 Anapenyerera ali pazenera, napfuula Mace wa Sisera, pa made ace, Acedweranji gareta wace? Zizengerezeranji njinga za magareta ace?" 
Judges5:29 Akazi anzace omveka anzeru anamyankha; Koma anadziyankhira yekha mau," 
Judges5:30 Kodi sanapeza, sanagawa zofunkha? Namwali, anamwali awiri kwa munthu ali yense. Cofunkha ca nsaru za mawanga mawanga kwa Sisera; Cofunkha ca nsaru za mawanga mawanga, za maluwa, Nsaru za mawanga mawanga, za maluwa konse konse, kwa cofunkha ca khosi lace." 
Judges5:31 Adani anu onse, Yehova, atayike momwemo. Koma iwo akukonda Inu akhale ngati dzuwa loturuka mu mphamvu yace. Ndipo dziko linapumula zaka makumi anai." 
Judges6:1 Koma ana a Israyeli anacita coipa pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo Yehova anawapereka m'dzanja la Midyani zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri. 
Judges6:2 Pamene dzanja la Midyani linalaka Israyeli, ana a Israyeli anadzikonzera ming'ang'ala ya m'mapiri, ndi mapanga, ndi malinga cifukwa ca Midyani." 
Judges6:3 Ndipo kunali, akabzala Israyeli, amakwera Amidyani, ndi Amaleki, ndi ana a kum'mawa, inde amawakwerera;" 
Judges6:4 nawamangira misasa, namaononga zipatso za m'dziko mpaka ufika ku Gaza, osawasiyira cocirira njala m'Israyeli, ngakhale nkhosa, kapena ng'ombe, kapena buru." 
Judges6:5 Pakuti anakwera nazo zoweta zao ndi mahema ao, analowa ngati dzombe kucuruka kwao; iwowa ndi ngamila zao zomwe nzosawerengeka; ndipo analowa m'dziko kuliononga." 
Judges6:6 Ndipo Israyeli anafoka kwambiri cifukwa ca Midyani; ndipo ana a Israyeli anapfuula kwa Yehova. 
Judges6:7 Ndipo kunali, pamene ana a Israyeli anapfuula kwa Yehova cifukwa ca Midyani," 
Judges6:8 Yehova anatuma munthu mneneri kwa ana a Israyeli, nanena nao, Atero Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, Ine ndinakukwezani kucokera m'Aigupto, ndi kukuturutsani m'nyumba ya ukapolo;" 
Judges6:9 ndipo ndinakulanditsani m'dzanja la Aaigupto, ndi m'dzanja la onse akupsinja inu, ndi kuwaingitsa pamaso panu, ndi kukupatsani dziko lao;" 
Judges6:10 ndipo ndinati kwa inu, Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu; musamaopa milungu ya Aamori amene mukhala m'dziko lao; koma simunamvera mau anga." 
Judges6:11 Pamenepo anadza mthenga wa Yehova, nakhala patsinde pa thundu wokhala m'Ofira, wa Yoasi M-abieziri; ndi mwana wace Gideoni analikuomba tirigu m'mopondera mphesa, awabisire Amidyani." 
Judges6:12 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anamuonekera, nati kwa iye, Yehova ali nawe, ngwazi iwe, wamphamvu iwe." 
Judges6:13 Ndipo Gideoni ananena naye, Mbuye wanga, ngati Yehova ali nafe catigwera ife bwanji conseci? ndipo ziti kuti zodabwiza zace zonse zimene makolo athu anatiwerengera, ndi kuti, Sanatikweza kodi Yehova kucokera m'Aigupto? Koma tsopano Yehova watitaya natipereka m'dzanja la Midyani." 
Judges6:14 Pamenepo Yehova anamtembenukira, nati, Muka nayo mphamvu yako iyi, nupulumutse Israyeli m'dzanja la Midyani, Sindinakutuma ndi Ine kodi?" 
Judges6:15 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Ha! Mbuye, ndidzapulumutsa Israyeli ndi ciani? Taonani, banja langa liri loluluka m'Manase, ndipo ine ndine wamng'ono m'nyumba ya atate wanga." 
Judges6:16 Ndipo Yehova ananena naye, Popeza Ine ndidzakhala nawe udzakantha Amidyani ngati munthu mmodzi." 
Judges6:17 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Ngati mundikomera mtima mundionetse cizindikilo tsopano cakuti ndi Inu wakunena nane." 
Judges6:18 Musacoke pano, ndikupemphani, mpaka ndikudzerani ndi kuturutsa copereka canga ndi kuciika pamaso panu. Ndipo anati, Ndidzalinda mpaka ubwera." 
Judges6:19 Ndipo Gideoni analowa, nakonza kambuzi ndi mikate yopanda cotupitsa ya muyeso wa ufa; nyamayi anaiika m'licero, ndi msuzi anauthira mumbale, naturuka nazo kwa iye ali patsinde pa thundu, nazipereka." 
Judges6:20 Koma mthenga wa Mulungu ananena naye, Tenga nyamayi ndi mikate yopanda cotupitsa ndi kuziika pathanthwe pano ndi kutsanula msuzi. Ndipo anatero." 
Judges6:21 Pamenepo mthenga wa Yehova anatambasula nsonga ya ndodo inali m'dzanja lace, nakhudza nyamayi ndi mikate yopanda cotupitsa; ndipo unaturuka moto m'thanthwe nunyeketsa nyama ndi mikate yopanda cotupitsa; ndi mthenga wa Yehova anakanganuka pamaso pace." 
Judges6:22 Pamenepo Gideoni anaona kuti ndiye mthenga wa Yehova, nati Gideoni, Tsoka ine, Yehova Mulungu! popeza ndaona mthenga wa Yehova maso ndi maso." 
Judges6:23 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye, Mtendere ukhale ndi iwe, usaope, sudzafa." 
Judges6:24 Pamenepo Gideoni anammangira Yehova guwa la nsembe pomwepo; nalicha Yehova-ndiyemtendere; likali m'Ofira wa Abieziri ndi pano pomwe. 
Judges6:25 Ndipo kunali, usiku womwe uja Yehova ananena naye, Tenga ng'ombe ya atate wako, ndiyo ng'ombe yaciwiri ya zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri, nugamule guwa la nsembe la Baala ndilo la atate wako, nulikhe cifanizo ciri pomwepo;" 
Judges6:26 numangire Yehova Mulungu wako guwa la nsembe pamwamba pa lingali, monga kuyenera; nutenge ng'ombe yaciwiriyo, nufukize nsembe yopsereza; nkhuni zace uyese cifanizo walikhaco." 
Judges6:27 Pamenepo Gideoni anatenga amuna khumi mwa anyamata ace, nacita monga Yehova adanena naye; ndipo kunali, popeza anaopa a ku nyumba ya atate wace, ndi amuna a ku mudziwo, sanacicita msana, koma usiku." 
Judges6:28 Ndipo pakuuka mamawa amuna a ku mudziwo, taonani, guwa la nsembe la Baala litagamuka, ndi cifanizo cinali pomwepo citalikhidwa ndi ng'ombe yaciwiri yoperekedwa pa guwa la nsembe adalimanga." 
Judges6:29 Nanenana wina ndi mnzace, Wacita ici ndani? Ndipo atafunafuna nafunsafunsa, anati, Gideoni, mwana wa Yoasi wacita ici." 
Judges6:30 Pamenepo amuna a ku mudziwo anati kwa Yoasi, Umturutse mwana wako kuti afe; pakuti anagamula guwa la nsembe la Baala, pakutinso analikha cifanizo cinali pomwepo." 
Judges6:31 Koma Yoasi anati kwa onse akumuimirira, Kodi inu mumnenera Baala mlandu? Kapena kodi mudzampulumutsa iye? iye amene amnenera mlandu aphedwe kukali m'mawa; akakhala mulungu adzinenere yekha mlandu, popeza wina wamgamulira guwa lace la nsembe."
