1Samuel18:6 Ndipo kunali pakudza iwo, pamene Davide anabwera atapha Afilistiwo, anthu akazi anaturuka m'midzi yonse ya Israyeli, ndi kuyimba ndi kubvina, kuti akakomane ndi mfumu Sauli, ndi malingaka, ndi cimwemwe, ndi zoyimbira." 
1Samuel18:7 Ndipo akazi anathirirana mang'ombe m'kuyimba kwao, nati, Sauli anapha zikwi zace, Koma Davide zikwi zace zankhani." 
1Samuel18:8 Koma Sauli anakwiya ndithu, ndi kunenaku kunamuipira; nati, Kwa Davide anawereogera zikwi zankhani, koma kwa ine zikwi zokha; cimperewera ncianioso, koma ufumu wokha?" 
1Samuel18:9 Ndipo kuyambira tsiku lomwelo ndi m'tsogolo mwace, Sauli anakhala maso pa Davide." 
1Samuel18:10 Ndipo kunali m'mawa mwace, mzimu woipa wocokera kwa Mulungu unamgwira Sauli mwamphamvu, iye nalankhula moyaruka m'nyumba yace; koma Davide anayimba ndi dzanja lace, monga amacita tsiku ndi tsiku; koma m'dzanja la Sauli munali mkondo." 
1Samuel18:11 Ndipo Sauli anaponya mkondowo; pakuti anati, Ndidzapyoza Davide ndi kumphatikiza ndi khoma. Ndipo Davide analewa kawiri kucoka pamaso pace." 
1Samuel18:12 Ndipo Sauli anaopa Davide, cifukwa Yehova anali naye, koma adamcokera Sauli." 
1Samuel18:13 Cifukwa cace Sauli anamcotsa kuti asakhale naye, namuika akhale mtsogoleri wace wa anthu cikwi cimodzi; ndipo iye anatsogolera anthu kuturuka ndi kubwera nao." 
1Samuel18:14 Ndipo Davide anakhala wocenjera m'mayendedwe ace onse; ndipo Yehova anali naye. 
1Samuel18:15 Ndipo pamene Sauli anaona kuti analikukhala wocenjera ndithu anamuopa. 
1Samuel18:16 Koma Aisrayeli onse ndi Ayuda onse anamkonda Davide pakuti anawatsogolera kuturuka ndi kulowa nao. 
1Samuel18:17 Ndipo Sauli anati kwa Davide, Ona, mwana wanga wamkazi wamkuru, dzina lace Merabi, iyeyo ndidzakupatsa akhale mkazi wako; koma undikhalire ngwazi, nuponye nkhondo za Yehova. Pakuti Sauli anati, Dzanja langa lisamkhudze, koma dzanja la Afilisti ndilo." 
1Samuel18:18 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Sauli, Ine ndine yani, ndi moyo wanga uli wotani, kapena banja la atate wanga liri lotani m'Israyeli, kuti ine ndidzakhala mkamwini wa mfumu?" 
1Samuel18:19 Koma kunali nthawi imene akadapatsa Merabi mwana wamkazi wa Sauli kwa Davide, iye anapatsidwa kwa Adrieli Mholati kukhala mkazi wace." 
1Samuel18:20 Ndipo Mikala mwana wamkazi wa Sauli anakonda Davide; ndipo pakumva Sauli, anakondwera nako." 
1Samuel18:21 Nati Sauli, Ndidzampatsa iye, kuti amkhalire msampha, ndi kuti dzanja la Afilisti limgwere. Cifukwa cace Sauli ananena ndi Davide, Lero udzakhala mkamwini wanga kaciwiri." 
1Samuel18:22 Ndipo Sauli analamulira anyamata ace, nati, Mulankhule naye Davide m'tseri, ndi kuti, Taonani mfumu akondwera nanu, ndi anyamata ace onse akukondani; cifukwa cace tsono, khalani mkamwini wa mfumu." 
1Samuel18:23 Ndipo anyamata a Sauli analankhula mau awa m'makutu a Davide. Nati Davide, Kodi muciyesera cinthu copepuka kukhala mkamwini wa mfumu, popeza ndiri munthu wosauka, ndi wopeputsidwa." 
1Samuel18:24 Ndipo anyamata a Sauli anamuuza, kuti, Anatero Davide." 
1Samuel18:25 Nati Sauli, Mudzatero kwa Davide, kuti mfumu safuna colowolera cina, koma nsonga za makungu zana limodzi za Afilisti, kuti abwezere cilango adani a mfumu. Koma Sauli anaganizira kupha Davide ndi dzanja la Afilisti." 
1Samuel18:26 Ndipo pamene anyamata ace anauza Davide mau awa, kudamkomera Davide kukhala mkamwini wa mfumu." 
1Samuel18:27 Ndipo asanathe masikuwo, ananyamuka Davide, ndi anthu ace, nakaphako Afilisti mazana awiri, ndipo Davide anatenga nsonga za makungu ao nazipatsa mofikira kwa mfumu, kuti akhale mkamwini wa mfumu. Ndipo Sauli anampatsa Mikala mwana wace wamkazi akhale mkazi wace." 
1Samuel18:28 Ndipo Sauli anaona, nadziwa kuti Yehova ali ndi Davide; ndi kuti Mikala mwana wa Sauli anamkonda Davide." 
1Samuel18:29 Sauli nayamba kumuopa Davide kopambana; ndi Sauli anali mdani wa Davide masiku onse. 
1Samuel18:30 Pomwepo mafumu a Afilisti anaturuka; ndipo nthawi zonse anaturuka iwo, Davide anali wocenjera koposa anyamata onse a Sauli, comweco dzina lace linatamidwa kwambiri." 
1Samuel19:1 Ndipo Sauli analankhula kwa Jonatani mwana wace, ndi anyamata ace onse kuti amuphe Davide." 
1Samuel19:2 Koma Jonatani mwana wa Sauli anakondwera kwambiri ndi Davide. Ndipo Jonatani anauza Davide, nati, Sauli atate wanga alikufuna kukupha; cifukwa cace tsono ucenjere m'mawa, mukhale m'malo mosadziwika, nubisale;" 
1Samuel19:3 ndipo ine ndidzaturuka ndi kuima pa mbali ya atate wanga kumunda kumene kuli iwe, ndipo ndidzalankhula ndi atate wanga za iwe; ndipo ndikaona kanthu ndidzakudziwitsa." 
1Samuel19:4 Ndipo Jonatani analankhula ndi atate wace mobvomereza Davide, nanena naye, Mfumu asacimwire mnyamata wace Davide; cifukwa iyeyo sanacimwira inu, ndipo nchito zace anakucitirani zinali zabwino ndithu;" 
1Samuel19:5 popeza iye anataya moyo wace nakantha Mfilistiyo, ndipo Yehova anacitira Aisrayeli onse cipulumutso cacikuru, inu munaciona, nimnnakondwera; tsono mudzacimwiranji mwazi wosalakwa, ndi kumupha Davide popanda cifukwa?" 
1Samuel19:6 Ndipo Sauli anamvera mau a Jonatani; nalumbira, Pali Yehova, sadzaphedwa iye." 
1Samuel19:7 Pamenepo Jonatani anaitana Davide, namuuza zonsezi. Ndipo Jonatani anafika naye Davide kwa Sauli, iye nakhalanso pamaso pace monga kale." 
1Samuel19:8 Ndipo kunalinso nkhondo; ndipo Davide anaturuka, nakamenyana ndi Afilisti, nawapha ndi maphedwe akuru, ndipo iwo anamthawa iye." 
1Samuel19:9 Ndipo mzimu woipa wocokera kwa Yehova unali pa Sauli, pakukhala iye m'nyumba mwace, ndi mkondo wace m'dzanja lace; ndipo Davide anayimba ndi dzanja lace." 
1Samuel19:10 Ndipo Sauli anayesa kupyoza Davide kumphatikiza kukhoma ndi mkondowo; koma iye anadzilanditsa kucoka pamaso pa Sauli; ndipo analasa khoma; ndipo Davide anathawa napulumuka usiku uja. 
1Samuel19:11 Ndipo Sauli anatumiza mithenga ku nyumba ya Davide imdikire, ndi kumupha m'mawa; koma Mikala mkazi wa Davide anamuuza, nati, Ukapanda kupulumutsa moyo wako usiku uno, udzaphedwa ndithu m'mawa." 
1Samuel19:12 Comweco Mikala anamtsitsira Davide pazenera, namuka iye, nathawa, napulumuka." 
1Samuel19:13 Ndipo Mikala anatenga cifanizo naciika pakama, naika mtsamiro wa ubweya wa mbuzi kumutu kwace, nacipfunda zopfunda." 
1Samuel19:14 Ndipo pamene Sauli anatumiza mithenga kuti ikamgwire Davide, anati, iye alikudwala." 
1Samuel19:15 Ndipo Sauli anatumiza mithengayo kuti ikaone Davide, nati, Mumtengere iye pa kama wace, kuti ndidzamuphe." 
1Samuel19:16 Ndipopakulowamithengayo, onani, pakama pali cifanizo ndi mtsamiro wa ubweya wa mbuzi kumutu kwace." 
1Samuel19:17 Nati Sauli kwa Mikala, Wandinyengeranii comweci, ndi kulola mdani wanga apulumuke? Ndipo Mikala anayankha Sauli, iye anati kwa ine, Undilole ndipite, ndingakuphe." 
1Samuel19:18 Comweco anathawa Davide, napulumuka, nafika kwa Samueli: ku Rama, namuuza zonse Sauli anamcitira. Ndipo iye ndi Samueli anakhala ku Nayoti." 
1Samuel19:19 Ndipo wina anauza Sauli, kuti, Onani Davide ali ku Nayoti m'Rama." 
1Samuel19:20 Ndipo Sauli anatumiza mithenga kuti igwire Davide, ndipo pamene inaona gulu la aneneri alikunenera, ndi Samueli mkuru wao alikuimapo, mzimu wa Mulungu unagwera-mithenga ya Sauli, ninenera iyonso." 
1Samuel19:21 Ndipo pamene anauza Sauli, iye anatumiza mithenga yina; koma iyonso inanenera. Ndipo Sauli anatumiza mithenga kacitatu, nayonso inanenera." 
1Samuel19:22 Pamenepo iyenso anamuka ku Rama, nafika ku citsime cacikuru ciri ku Seku, nafunsa Dati, Samueli ndi Davide ali kuti? Ndipo wina anati, Taonani, ali ku Nayoti m'Rama." 
1Samuel19:23 Ndipo anapita komweko ku Nayoti m'Rama; ndi mzimu wa Mulungu unamgwera iyenso; ndipo anapitirira, nanenera, mpaka anafika ku Nayoti m'Rama." 
1Samuel19:24 Ndiponso anabvula zobvala zace, naneneranso pamaso pa Samueli nagona wamarisece usana womwe wonse, ndi usiku womwe wonse. Cifukwa cace amati, Kodi Saulinso ali pakati pa aneneri?" 
1Samuel20:1 Ndipo Davide anathawa ku Nayoti m'Rama, nadzanena pamaso pa Jonatani, Ndacitanji ine? kuipa kwanga kuli kotani? ndi chimo langa la pamaso pa atate wanu ndi ciani, kuti amafuna moyo wanga?" 
1Samuel20:2 Namyankha, Usatero iai, sudzafa; ona, atate, wanga sacita kanthu kakakuru kapena kakang'ono wosandidziwitsa ine; atate wanga adzandibisiranji cinthu cimeneci? Si kutero ai." 
1Samuel20:3 Ndipo Davide analumbiranso nati, Atate wako adziwatu kuti wandikomera mtima; nati, Jonatani asadziwe ici, kuti angamve cisoni; koma pali Yehova, ndiponso pali moyo wako, pakati pa ine ndi imfa pali ngati phazilimodzi." 
1Samuel20:4 Ndipo Jonatani anati kwa Davide, Ciri conse mtima wako unena, ndidzakucitira." 
1Samuel20:5 Nati Davide kwa Jonatani, Onani, mawa mwezi ukhala, ndipo ine ndiyenera kupita kukadya kwa mfumu, wosatsala; koma undilole ndikabisale kuthengo, kufikira tsiku lacitatu madzulo ace." 
1Samuel20:6 Atate wako akandifuna pang'ono ponse, unene kuti, Davide anandiumirira ndimlole athamangire kwao ku Betelehemu, pakuti kumeneko kuli nsembe ya pacaka ya banja lao lonse." 
1Samuel20:7 Tsono akati, Cabwino; kapolo wako adzakhala ndi mtendere; koma akapsa mtima, uzindikirepo kuti anatsimikiza mtima kundicitira coipa." 
1Samuel20:8 Cifukwa cace ucitire kapolo wako zokoma mtima; popeza wamcititsa kapolo wako kupangana nawe pangano la kwa Yehova; koma ngati mwa ine muli coipa ciri conse, undiphe wekha; udzapita nane bwanji kwa atate wako?" 
1Samuel20:9 Ndipo Jonatani anati, lai ndi pang'ono ponse; ine ndikadziwa konse kuti atate wanga anatsimikiza mtima kukucitira coipa, sindidzadziwitsa iwe kodi?" 
1Samuel20:10 Tsono Davide anati kwa Jonatani, Adzandiuza ndani ngati atate wako alankhulira iwe mokalipa?" 
1Samuel20:11 Nati Jonatani kwa Davide, Tiyeni timuke kuthengo. Namuka onse awiri kuthengoko." 
1Samuel20:12 Ndipo Jonatani anati kwa Davide, Yehova, Mulungu wa Israyeli, akhale mboni; nditaphera mwambi atate wanga mawa dzuwa lino, kapena mkuca, onani, pakakhala kanthu kabwino kakucitira Davide, sindidzakutumira mthenga ndi kukuululira kodi?" 
1Samuel20:13 Mulungu alange Jonatani, ndi kuonjezapo, ngati atate wanga akondwera kukucitira coipa, ine osakuululira, ndi kukucotsa kuti upite mumtendere; ndipo Yehova akhale nawe, monga anakhala naye atate wanga." 
1Samuel20:14 Ndipo undionetsere cifundo ca Yehova, si pokhala ine ndi moyo pokha, kuti ndingafe;" 
1Samuel20:15 komanso usaleke kucitira cifundo a m'nyumba yanga nthawi zonse; mungakhale m'tsogolomo Yehova atathera adani onse a Da vide pa dziko lapansi. 
1Samuel20:16 Comweco Jonatani anapangana pangano ndi nyumba ya Davide, ndipo Yehova anakwaniritsa izi polanga adani a Davide." 
1Samuel20:17 Ndipo Jonatani anamlumbiritsa Davide kaciwiri, cifukwa anamkonda; popeza anamkonda monga anakonda moyo wa iye yekha." 
1Samuel20:18 Tsono Jonatani ananena kwa Davide, Mawa mwezi ukhala; ndipo adzakufuna, popeza udzasoweka pamalo pako." 
1Samuel20:19 Ndipo atapita masiku atatu, utsike msanga, nufike kumene unabisala tsiku la mrandu uja, nukhale pa mwala wa Ezeri." 
1Samuel20:20 Ndipo ine ndidzaponya mibvi itatu pambali pace, monga ngati ndirikuponya pacandamali." 
1Samuel20:21 Ndipo taona, ndidzatumiza mnyamatayo, ndi kuti, Kafune mibviyo, Ndikamuuza mwanayo, kuti, Taona mibvi iri cakuno; uitole nubwere, popeza pali mtendere kwa iwe, palibe kanthu, pali Yehova." 
1Samuel20:22 Koma ndikati kwa mnyamatayo, Ona mibvi iri kutsogoloko; pamenepo unyamuke ulendo wako; popeza Yehova wakuuza umuke." 
1Samuel20:23 Ndipo za cija tinakambirana iwe ndi ine, taona, Yehova ali pakati pa ife nthawi zonse." 
1Samuel20:24 Comweco Davide anabisala kuthengo; ndipo pakukhala mwezi, mfumu inakhala pansi kudya." 
1Samuel20:25 Mfumu nikhala pa mpando wace, monga adafocita nthawi zina, pa mpando wa pafupi pa khoma. Ndipo Jonatani anaimirira, ndi Abineri anakhala pa mbali ya Sauli; koma Davide anasoweka pamalo pace." 
1Samuel20:26 Koma Sauli sananena kanthu tsiku lomwelo; cifukwa anaganizira, Kanthu kanamgwera iye, ali wodetsedwa; indedi ali wodetsedwa." 
1Samuel20:27 Ndipo kunali tsiku laciwiri mwezi utakhala, Davide adasowekanso pamalo pace; ndipo Sauli anati kwa Jonatani mwana wace, Mwana wa Jese walekeranji kubwera kudya dzulo ndi lero lomwe?" 
1Samuel20:28 Ndipo Jonatani anayankha Sauli, Davide anandiumiriza ndimlole amuke ku Betelehemu;" 
1Samuel20:29 nati, Ndiloleni, ndimuke; cifukwa banja lathu lipereka nsembe m'mudzimo; ndi mbale wanga anandiuzitsa ndifikeko; tsono ngati wandikomera mtima undilole ndicoke, ndikaone abale anga. Cifukwa ca ici safika ku gome la mfumu." 
1Samuel20:30 Pamenepo Sauli anapsa mtima ndi Jonatani, nanena naye, Iwe mwana wa mkazi wa matsutso ndi wopikisana, sindidziwa kodi kuti wasankha mwana wa Jeseyo kudzinyaza wekha, ndi usiwa wa mai wako yemwe?" 
1Samuel20:31 Popeza nthawi yonse mwana wa Jeseyo akhala ndi moyo padziko, koma sudzakhazikika iwe, kapena ufumu wako. Cifukwa cace tumiza tsopano numtengere kuno kwa ine, popeza adzafa ndithu," 
1Samuel20:32 Ndipo Jonatani anayankha Sauli atate wace, nanena, Aphedwe cifukwa ninji? anacitanji?" 
1Samuel20:33 Ndipo Sauli anamponyera mkondo kuti amgwaze; momwemo Jonatani anazindikira kuti atate wace anatsimikiza mtima kupha Davide. 
1Samuel20:34 Pamenepo Jonatani anauka pagome wolunda ndithu, osadya kanthu tsiku laciwiri la mwezi, pakuti mtima wace unali ndi cisoni cifukwa ca Davide, popeza atate wace anamcititsa manyazi." 
1Samuel20:35 Ndipo m'mawa, Jonatani ananka kuthengoko pa nthawi imene anapangana ndi Davide, ali ndi kamnayamata." 
1Samuel20:36 Ndipo anauza mnyamata waceyo, Thamanga uzikatola mibvi Imene ndidzaponya; ndipo analikuthamanga mnyamatayu, iye anaponya mubvi kuutumphitsa iye." 
1Samuel20:37 Ndipo mnyamatayo atafika pa malo a mubvi umene Jonatani anauponya, Jonatani anapfuulira mnyamatayo, nati, Mubviwo suli m'tsogolo mwako kodi?" 
1Samuel20:38 Ndipo Jonatani anapfuulira mnyamatayo, nati, Yendesa, fulumira, usaima. Ndi mnyamata wa Jonatani anatola mibvi, nafika kwa mbuye wace." 
1Samuel20:39 Koma mnyamatayo sanadziwa kanthu; Davide ndi Jonatani okha anadziwa za mranduwoo. 
1Samuel20:40 Ndipo Jonatani anapatsa mnyamata wace zida zace, nanena naye, Muka, tenga izi kunka nazo kumudzi." 
1Samuel20:41 Pomwepo pocoka mnyamatayo, Davide anauka cakumwera, nagwa nkhope yace pansi, nawerama katatu; ndipo iwowa anapsompsonana, nalirirana, kufikira Davide analiritsa." 
1Samuel20:42 Ndipo Jonatani ananena kwa Davide, Muka mumtendere, popeza tonsefe tinalumbira m'dzina la Yehova, kuti, Yehova adzakhala pakati pa ine ndi iwe, ndi pakati pa mbeu yanga ndi mbeu yako, nthawi zamuyaya." 
1Samuel20:43 Ndipo iye ananyamuka nacoka; koma Jonatani anamuka kumudzi. 
1Samuel21:1 Ndipo Davide anafika ku Nobi kwa! Ahimeleki wansembeyo; ndipo Ahimeleki anadza kukomana ndi Davide alikunjenjemera, nanena naye, Muli nokha bwanji, palibe munthu wina nanu?" 
1Samuel21:2 Nati Davide kwa Ahimeleki wansembeyo, Mfumu inandilamulira nchito, ninena nane, Asadziwe munthu ali yense kanthu za nchito imene ndakutumira ndi kukulamulira; ndipo ndawapanga anyamatawo ku malo akuti." 
1Samuel21:3 Cifukwa cace tsono muli ndi ciani? mundipatse m'dzanja langa mikate isanu, kapena ciri conse muli naco." 
1Samuel21:4 Ndipo wansembeyo anayankha Davide nati, Ndiribe mkate wacabe, koma ulipo mkate wopatulika; pokhapo ngati anyamatawo anadzisunga kupewa akazi." 
1Samuel21:5 Ndipo Davide anayankha wansembeyo, nati naye, Zoonadi tinafulatira akazi monga masiku atatu; cicokere ine, zotengera za anayamatawo zinali zopatulika ungakhale unali ulendo wacabe; koposa kotani nanga zotengera zao zikhala zoyera lero?" 
1Samuel21:6 Comweco wansembeyo anampatsa mkate wopatulika, popeza panalibe mkate wina, koma mkate woonekera, umene adaucotsa pamaso pa Yehova, kuti akaike mkate wotentha tsiku lomwelo anacotsa winawo." 
1Samuel21:7 Tsono munthu wina wa anyamata a Sauli anali komweko, tsiku lija, anacedwetsedwa pamaso pa Yehova; dzina lace ndiye Doegi wa ku Edomu, kapitao wa abusa a Sauli." 
1Samuel21:8 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi Ahimeleki, Nanga pano m'dzanja mwanu mulibe mkondo kapena lupanga kodi? cifukwa ine sindinatenge lupanga langa kapena zida zanga, popeza mrandu wa mfumu ukuti ndifulumire." 
1Samuel21:9 Nati wansembeyo, Lupanga la Goliate Mfilisti munamuphayo m'cigwa ca Ela, onani-liripo lokulunga m'nsaru, kumbuyo kwa efodi; mukafuna kutenga limenelo, tengani; popeza pano palibe lina, Ndipo Davide anati, Palibe lina lotere longa lijalo, ndipatseni." 
1Samuel21:10 Ndipo Davide ananyamuka, nathawa tsiku lomwelo cifukwa ca kuopa Sauli, namuka kwa Akisi mfumu ya ku Gati." 
1Samuel21:11 Ndipo anyamata a Akisi ananena naye, Uyu si Davide mfumu ya dzikolo kodi? Sanathirirana mang'ombe za iye kodi m'magule ao, ndi kuti, Sauli anapha zikwi zace, Koma Davide zikwi zace zankhani?" 
1Samuel21:12 Ndipo Davide anasunga mau awa mumtima mwace, naopa kwambiri Akisi mfumu ya Gati." 
1Samuel21:13 Nasanduliza makhalidwe ace pamaso pao, nadzionetsera m'manja mwao ngati wamisala, nangolembalemba pa zitseko za cipata, nakhetsa dobvu lace pa ndebvu yace." 
1Samuel21:14 Tsono Akisi ananena ndi anyamata ace, Taonani, mupenya kuti munthuyo ngwa misala; mwabwera naye kwa ine cifukwa ninji?" 
1Samuel21:15 Kodi ndisowa anthu amisala kuti mwabwera ndi uyu kuti akhale wamisala pamaso panga? Kodi uyu adzalowa m'nyumba mwanga? 
1Samuel22:1 Motero Davide anacoka kumeneko, napulumukira ku phanga la ku Adulamu; ndipo pamene abale ace ndi banja lonse la atate wace anamva, iwo anatsikira kumeneko kwa iye." 
1Samuel22:2 Ndipo yense wosautsidwa, ndi yense wa ngongole, ndi yense wowawidwa mtima, anaunjikana kwa iye; iye nakhala mtsogoleri wao; ndipo anali nao anthu ngati mazana anai." 
1Samuel22:3 Ndipo Davide anacoka kumeneko kunka ku Mizipa wa ku Moabu; nati kwa mfumu ya Moabu, Mulole atate wanga ndi mai wanga aturuke nakhale nanu, kufikira ndidziwa cimene Mulungu adzandidtira." 
1Samuel22:4 Ndipo anawatenga kumka nao pamaso pa mfumu ya Moabu; ndipo iwo anakhala naye nthawi yonse Davide anali ku lingalo. 
1Samuel22:5 Ndipo mneneri Gadi anati kwa Davide, Musamakhala m'lingamo; cokani, mulowe m'dziko la Yuda. Potero Davide anacokako, nafika ku nkhalango ya Hereti." 
1Samuel22:6 Pakumva Sauli kuti anadziwika Davide, ndi anthu ace akukhala naye, Sauti analikukhala m'Gibeya, patsinde pa mtengo wa kumsanje, m'dzanja lace munali mkondo wace, ndi anyamata ace onse anaimirira pali iye." 
1Samuel22:7 Ndipo Sauli anati kwa anyamata ace akuima comzinga, Imvani tsopano, inu a Benjamini; kodi mwana wa Jese adzakupatsani inu nonse minda, ndi minda yamphesa, kodi adzakuikani mukhale atsogoleri a zikwi ndi a mazana;" 
1Samuel22:8 kuti inu nonse munapangana dwembu pa ine, ndipo palibe wina wakundiululira kuti mwana wanga anapangana pangano ndi mwana wa Jese, ndipo palibe wilia wa inu wakundidtira cifundo kapena kundidziwitsa kuti mwana wanga anafulumiza mnyamata wanga kundilalira monga lero lomwe?" 
1Samuel22:9 Pamenepo Doegi wa ku Edomu, anaimirira ndi anyamata a Sauli, nayankha, nati, Ine ndinamuona mwana wa Jeseyo alikufika ku Nobi, kwa Ahimeleki mwana wa Ahitubu." 
1Samuel22:10 Ndipo iye anamfunsira kwa Yehova, nampatsa cakudya, nampatsanso lupanga la Gotiate Mfilistiyo." 
1Samuel22:11 Pamenepo mfumu anatuma mthenga kukaitana Ahimeleki wansembeyo, mwana wa Ahitubu, ndi banja lonse la atate wace, ansembe a ku Nobi; ndipo iwo onse anafika kwa mfumu." 
1Samuel22:12 Ndipo Sauli anati, Imva tsopano iwe mwana wa Ahitubu. Nayankha iye, Ndine, mbuye wanga." 
1Samuel22:13 Ndipo Sauli anati kwa iye, Munapangana dwembu pa ine bwanji, iwe ndi mwana wa Jese, kuti unampatsa iye mkate, ndi lupanga, ndi kumfunsira kwa Mulungu kuti iye andiukire, kundilalira, monga lero lomwe?" 
1Samuel22:14 Ndipo Ahimeleki anayankha mfumu, nati, Ndipo ndani mwa anyamata anu onse ali wokhulupirika ngati Davide amene, mkamwini wa mfumu; wakuyenda mu uphungu wanu, nalemekezeka m'nyumba mwanu?" 
1Samuel22:15 Kodi ndayamba lero kumfunsira kwa Mulungu? Musatero iai; mfumu asanenera mnyamata wace kanthu, kapena nyumba yonse ya atate wanga; popeza ine mnyamata wanu sindidziwa kanthu ka izi zonse, ndi pang'ono ponse." 
1Samuel22:16 Ndipo mfumu inati, Ukufa ndithu Ahimeleki, iwe ndi banja lonse la atate wako." 
1Samuel22:17 Mfumu niuza asilikari akuima comzinga iye, Potolokani, iphani ansembe a Yehova; cifukwa agwirizana ndi Davide, ndipo anadziwa kuti alinkuthawa, koma sanandiululira. Koma anayamata a mfumu sanafuna kutambalitsa manja ao kupha ansembe a Yehova." 
1Samuel22:18 Pamenepo mfumu inati kwa Doegi, Potoloka iwe nuwaphe ansembewo. Ndipo Doegi wa ku Edomu anapotoloka, nagwera ansembewo, napha tsikulo makumi asanu ndi atatu mphambu asanu akubvala efodi wabafuta." 
1Samuel22:19 Ndipo anakantha Nobi ndiwo mudzi wa ansembe ndi lupanga lakuthwa, anthu amuna ndi akazi, ana ndi makanda, ng'ombe ndi aburu, ndi nkhosa, ndi lupanga lakuthwa." 
1Samuel22:20 Ndipo mmodzi wa ana a Ahimeleki, mwana wa Ahitubu, dzina lace ndiye Abyatara, anapulumuka, nathawira kwa Davide." 
1Samuel22:21 Ndipo Abyatara anadziwitsa Davide kuti Sauli anapha ansembe a Yehova. 
1Samuel22:22 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Abyatara, Tsiku lija Doegi wa ku Edomu anali kumeneko, ndinadziwiratu kuti adzauzadi Sauli; ine ndinafetsa anthu onse a nyumba ya atate wako." 
1Samuel22:23 Ukhale ndi ine, usaopa; popeza iye wakufuna moyo wanga afuna moyo wako; koma ndi ine udzakhala mosungika." 
1Samuel23:1 Tsono anauza Davide, kuti, Onani Afilisti alikuponyana ndi Keila, nafunkha za m'madwale." 
1Samuel23:2 Cifukwa cace Davide anafunsira kwa Yehova, nati, Ndimuke kodi kukakantha Afilisti aja? Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Davide, Muka, nukanthe Afilisti, ndi kupulumutsa Keila." 
1Samuel23:3 Ndipo anyamata a Davide ananena naye, Taonani, ife tikhalira m'mantha ku Yuda kuno; koposa kotani nanga tikafika ku Keila kuponyana ndi makamu a nkhondo a Afilisti." 
1Samuel23:4 Tsono Davide anafunsiranso kwa Yehova. Ndipo Yehova anamyankha iye, nati, Nyamuka, nutsikire ku Keila; pakuti ndidzapereka Afilisti m'dzanja lako." 
1Samuel23:5 Comweco Davide ndi anthu ace anamuka ku Keila, naponyana ndi Afilisti, natenga ng'ombe zao, nawapha ndi kuwapulula kwambiri Motero Davide analanditsa okhala m'Keila." 
1Samuel23:6 Ndipo kunali kuti Abyatara mwana wa Ahimeleki pakuthawira kwa Davide ku Keila, anatsika ali ndi efodi m'dzanja lace." 
1Samuel23:7 Ndipo anthu anauza Sauli kuti Davide wafika ku Keila. Ndipo Sauli anati, Mulungu wampereka m'dzanja langa; pakuti atsekerezeka, popeza analowa m'mudzi wa zitseko ndi mipiringidzo." 
1Samuel23:8 Ndipo Sauli anamemeza anthu onse kunkhondo, kuti atsikire ku Keila, kumangira misasa Davide ndi anthu ace." 
1Samuel23:9 Ndipo Davide anadziwa kuti Sauli analikulingalira zomcitira zoipa; nati kwa Abyatara wansembe, Bwera kuno ndi efodi." 
1Samuel23:10 Nati Davide, Yehova, Mulungu wa Israyeli, mnyamata wanu wamva zoona kuti Sauli afuna kudza ku Keila, kuononga mudziwo cifukwa ca ine." 
1Samuel23:11 Kodi amuna a ku Keila adzandipereka m'dzanja lace? Kodi Sauli adzatsikira ndithu, monga mnyamata wanu wamva? Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, ndikupemphani, muuze mnyamata wanu. Ndipo Yehova anati, Adzatsika." 
1Samuel23:12 Tsono Davide anati, Kodi amuna a ku Keila adzandipereka ine ndi anyamata anga m'dzanja la Sauli? Ndipo Yehova anati, Adzakupereka." 
1Samuel23:13 Potero Davide ndi anyamata ace, ndiwo monga ngati mazana asanu ndi limodzi, ananyamuka, naturuka ku Keila, nayendayenda kuli konse adakhoza kuyendako. Ndipo anauza Sauli kuti Davide wapulumuka ku Keila; iye naleka kumtsata." 
1Samuel23:14 Ndipo Davide anakhala m'cipululu m'ngaka, nakhala m'dziko la mapiri m'cipululu ca Zifi. Ndipo Sauli anamfunafuna masiku onse, koma Mulungu sadampereka m'dzanja lace." 
1Samuel23:15 Ndipo Davide anaona kuti Sauli adaturuka kudzafuna moyo wace; Davide nakhala m'cipululu ca Ziti m'nkhalango. 
1Samuel23:16 Ndipo Jonatani mwana wa Sauli ananyamuka, napita kwa Davide kunkhalangoko, namlimbitsa dzanja lace mwa Mulungu." 
1Samuel23:17 Ndipo iye ananena naye, Usaopa; cifukwa dzanja la Sauli atate wanga silidzakupeza; iwe udzakhala mfumu ya Israyeli, ndipo ine ndidzakhala wotsatana nawe, icinso Sauli atate wanga acidziwa." 
1Samuel23:18 Ndipo awiriwo anapangana pangano pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo Davide anakhala kunkhalango, koma Jonatani anapita ku nyumba yace." 
1Samuel23:19 Ndipo a ku Zifi anakwera kwa Sauli ku Gibeya, nati, Davide salikubisala kwathu kodi, m'ngaka za m'nkhalango, m'phiri la Hakila. Umene Uri kumwera kwa cipululu?" 
1Samuel23:20 Cifukwa cace mfumu, tsikani, monga umo mukhumbire m'mtima mwanu kutsika; ndipo kudzakhala kwathu kumpereka iye m'dzanja la mfumu." 
1Samuel23:21 Sauli nati, Mudalitsike inu kwa Yehova; cifukwa munandicitira ine cifundo." 
1Samuel23:22 Mukanitu kuti mukadziwitse ndithu, ndi kudziwa ndi kuona mbuto m'mene akhalitsa, ndi amene adamuona m'menemo; cifukwa anandiuza kuti iye acita mocenjera ndithu." 
1Samuel23:23 Cifukwa cace yang'anirani, ndi kudziwa ngaka zonse alikubisalamo iye, nimubwere kwa ine ndi mau otsimikizika, pomwepo ndidzamuka nanu; ndipo akakhala m'dzikomo, ndidzampwaira pakati pa mabanja onse a Yuda." 
1Samuel23:24 Ndipo iwo ananyamuka, namuka ku Zifi asanapiteko Sauli; koma Davide ndi anthu ace anali ku cipululu ca Maoni, m'cigwa ca kumwera kwa cipululu." 
1Samuel23:25 Ndipo Sauli ndi anthu ace anamuka kukamfuna. Koma wina anauza Davide; cifukwa cace anatsikira kuthanthweko, nakhala m'cipululu ca Maoni. Ndipo pamene Sauli anamva ici, iye anamlondola Davide m'cipululu ca Maoni." 
1Samuel23:26 Ndipo Sauli anamuka mbali yina ya phiri, Davide ndi anthu ace kutseri kwace; ndipo Davide anafulumira kuthawa, cifukwa ca kuopa Sauli; popeza Sauli ndi anthu ace anazinga Davide ndi anthu ace kwete kuti awagwire." 
1Samuel23:27 Koma mthenga unafika kwa Sauli ndi kuti, Mufulumire kubwerera; popeza nkhondo yobvumbulukira ya Afilisti yalowa m'dziko." 
1Samuel23:28 Comweco Sauli anabwerera polondola Davide, nakakomana ndi Afilisti; cifukwa cace anachula dzina lace la malo aja, Thanthwe lolekanitsa." 
1Samuel23:29 Ndipo Davide anakwera kucokera kumeneko, nakhalam'ngaka za Engedi." 
1Samuel24:1 Ndipo kunali, pakubwerera Sauli potsata Afilisti, anamuuza, kuti, Taonani, Davide ali ku cipululu ca Engedi." 
1Samuel24:2 Tsono Sauli anatenga anthu zikwi zitatu osankhika pakati pa Aisrayeli onse, namuka kukafuna Davide ndi anthu ace m'matanthwe a zinkhoma." 
1Samuel24:3 Ndipo panjira anafika ku makola a nkhosa, kumene kunali phanga; ndipo Sauli analowa kuti akapfunde mapazi ace. Ndipo Davide ndi anyamata ace analikukhala m'kati mwa phangamo," 
1Samuel24:4 Ndipo anyamata a Davide ananena naye, Onani, lero ndilo tsiku limene Yehova anati kwa inu, Onani, Ine ndidzapereka mdani wako m'dzanja lako, kuti ukamcitira iye cokukomera. Ndipo Davide ananyamuka, nadula mkawo wa mwinjiro wa Sauli mobisika." 
1Samuel24:5 Ndipo kunali m'tsogolo mwace kuti a mtima wa Davide unamtsutsa cifukwa adadula mkawo wa mwinjiro wa Sauli. 
1Samuel24:6 Nati kwa anyamata ace, Mulungu andiletse kucitira ici mbuye wanga, wodzozedwa wa Yehova, kumsamulira dzanja langa, popeza iye ndiye wodzozedwa wa Yehova." 
1Samuel24:7 Comweco Davide analetsa anyamata ace ndi mau awa, osawaloleza kuukira Sauli. Ndipo Sauli ananyamuka, naturuka m'phangamo, namuka njira yace." 
1Samuel24:8 Bwino lace Davide yemwe ananyamuka, naturuka m'phangamo, napfuulira Sauli, nati, Mbuye wanga, mfumu. Ndipo pakuceuka Sauli, Davide anaweramira nkhope yace pansi, namgwadira." 
1Samuel24:9 Davide nanena ndi Sauli, Bwanji mulikusamalira mau a anthu akuti, Onani, Davide afuna kukucitirani coipa." 
1Samuel24:10 Onani, lero lomwe maso anu anapenya kuti Yehova anakuperekani inu lero m'dzanja langa m'phangamo, ndipo ena anandiuza ndikupheni; koma ndinakulekani, ndi kuti, Sindidzatukulira mbuye wanga dzanja langa; cifukwa iye ndiye wodzozedwa wa Yehova." 
1Samuel24:11 Ndiponso atate wanga, penyani, inde penyani mkawo wa mwinjiro wanu m'dzanja langa; popeza ndinadula mkawo wa mwinjiro wanu, osakuphani, mudziwe, nimuone kuti mulibe coipa kapena kulakwa m'dzanja langa, ndipo sindinakucimwirani, cinkana inu musaka moyo wanga kuti muugwire," 
1Samuel24:12 Yehova aweruze pakati pa ine ndi inu; ndipo Yehova adzandibwezera cilango kwa inu; koma dzanja langa silidzakhala pa inu. 
1Samuel24:13 Monga umanena mwambi wa makolo, kuti, Ucimo uturukira mwa ocimwa; koma dzanja langa silidzakhala pa inu." 
1Samuel24:14 Nanga mfumu ya Israyeli inaturukira yani; inu mulikupitikitsa yani? Garu wakufa, kapena nsabwe." 
1Samuel24:15 Cifukwa cace Yehova akhale woweruza, naweruze pakati pa ine ndi inu, nayang'anire, oandigwirire moyo, oandipulumutse m'dzanja lanu." 
1Samuel24:16 Ndipo kunali, pakutsiriza Davide kulankhula mau awa kwa Sauli, Sauli anati, Ndiwo mau ako kodi, mwana wanga Davide? Sauli nakweza mau ace, nalira misozi." 
1Samuel24:17 Nati kwa Davide, Iwe ndiwe wolungama woposa ine; popeza unandibwezera zabwino, koma ine ndinakubwezera zoipa." 
1Samuel24:18 Ndipo unatsimikiza lero lino kuti wandicitira zabwino cifukwa sunandipha pamene Yehova anandipereka m'dzanja lako. 
1Samuel24:19 Pakuti munthu akapeza mdani wace, adzamleka kodi kuti acoke bwino? Cifukwa cace Yehova akubwezere zabwino pa ici unandicitira ine lero lomwe." 
1Samuel24:20 Ndipo tsono taona ndidziwa kuti udzakhala mfumu ndithu, ndi kuti ufumu wa Israyeli udzakhazikika m'dzanja lako." 
1Samuel24:21 Cifukwa cace tsono undilumbirire ndi Yehova, kuti sudzatha mbeu yanga nditamuka ine, ndi kuti sudzaononga dzina langa m'nyumba ya atate wanga." 
1Samuel24:22 Ndipo Davide analumbirira Sauli. Sauli namuka kwao; koma Davide ndi anthu ace anakwera kumka kungaka. 
1Samuel25:1 Ndipo Samueli anamwalira; ndi Aisrayeli onse anaunjikana pamodzi nalira maliro ace, namuika m'nyumba yace ku Rama. Davide nanyamuka, natsikira ku cipululu ca Parana." 
1Samuel25:2 Ndipo panali munthu ku Maoni, amene katundu wace anali ku Karimeli; iyeyu anali womveka ndithu, anali nazo nkhosa zikwi zitatu, ndi mbuzi cikwi cimodzi; ndipo analikusenga nkhosa zace ku Karimeli." 
1Samuel25:3 Tsono dzina la munthuyo ndiye Nabala, ndi dzina la mkazi wace ndiye Abigayeli; ndiye mkazi wa nzeru yabwino, ndi wa nkhope yokongola; koma mwamunayo anali waphunzo ndi woipa macitidwe ace; ndipo iye anali wa banja la Kalebi." 
1Samuel25:4 Ndipo Davide anamva kucipululu kuti Nabala alinkusenga nkhosa zace. 
1Samuel25:5 Davide natuma anyamata khumi, nanena kwa anyamatawo, Mukwere ku Karimeli, mumuke kwa Nabala ndi kundilankhulira iye;" 
1Samuel25:6 ndipo muzitero kwa wodalayo, Mtendere ukhale pa inu, mtendere ukhalenso pa nyumba yanu, ndi mtendere ukhale pa zonse muli nazo." 
1Samuel25:7 Ndipo tsono ndamva kuti muli nao osenga nkhosa; abusa anu amene anali ndi ife, sitinawacititsa manyazi, ndipo panalibe kanthu kao kadasowa, nthawi yonse anakhala iwo ku Karimeli." 
1Samuel25:8 Mufunse anyamata anu, adzakuuzani; cifukwa cace muwakomere mtima anyamata awa, pakuti tirikufika tsiku labwino; mupatse ciri conse muli naco m'dzanja lanu, kwa anyamata anu, ndi kwa mwana wanu Davide." 
1Samuel25:9 Ndipo pakufika anyamata a Davide, analankhula ndi Nabala monga mau aja onse m'dzina la Davide, naleka." 
1Samuel25:10 Koma Nabala anayankha anyamata a Davide nati, Davide ndani? ndi mwana walese ndani? Makono ano pali anyamata ambiri akungotaya ambuye ao." 
1Samuel25:11 Kodi ndidzatenga mkate wanga, ndi madzi anga, ndi nyama imene ndinaphera osenga nkhosa anga, ndi kuzipatsa anthu amene sindidziwa kumene afumira?" 
1Samuel25:12 Comweco anyamata a Davide anatembenukira ku njira yao, nabwerera, nadza namuuza monga mwa mau onse awa." 
1Samuel25:13 Ndipo Davide anati kwa anthu ace, Munthu yense wa inu amangirire lupanga lace. Namangirira munthu yense lupanga lace; ndi Davide yemwe anamangirira lupanga lace; ndipo anakwera kumtsata Davide monga anthu mazana anai, koma mazana awiri anadika akatundu." 
1Samuel25:14 Koma mnyamata wina anauza Abigayeli, mkazi wa Nabala, kuti, Onani, Davide anatumiza mithenga akucokera kucipululu kulankhula mbuye wathu; koma iye anawakalipira." 
1Samuel25:15 Koma anthu aja anaticitira zabwino ndithu, sanaticititsa manyazi, ndi panalibe kanthu kadatisowa, nthawi zonse tinali kuyenderana nao kubusa kuja;" 
1Samuel25:16 iwo anatikhalira ngati linga usana ndi usiku, nthawi yonse tinali nao ndi kusunga nkhosazo." 
1Samuel25:17 Cifukwa cace tsono mudziwe ndi kulingalira cimene mudzacita; popeza anatsimikiza mtima kucitira coipa mbuye wathu, ndi nyumba yace yonse; popeza iye ali woipa, ndipo munthu sakhoza kulankhula naye." 
1Samuel25:18 Pomwepo Abigayeli anafulumira, natenga mikate mazana awiri, ndi zikopa ziwiri za vinyo, nkhosa zisanu zoocaoca, ndi miyeso isanu ya tirigu wokazinga, ndi ncinci za mphesa zouma zana limodzi, ndi ncinci za nkhuyu mazana awiri, naziika pa aburu." 
1Samuel25:19 Nati kwa anyamataace, Nditsogolereni; onani ndidza m'mbuvo mwanu. Koma sanauza mwamuna wace Nabala." 
1Samuel25:20 Ndipo kudatero pakuberekeka iye pa buru wace, natsikira pa malo obisika a m'phirilo, onani, Davide ndi anthu ace analikutsikira kwa iye; iye nakomana nao." 
1Samuel25:21 Koma Davide adanena, Zoonadi ndasunga cabe zace zonse za kaja kanali nazo m'cipululu, sikadasowa kanthu ka zace zonse; ndipo iye anandibwezera zoipa m'malo mwa zabwino." 
1Samuel25:22 Mulungu alange adani a Davide, ndi kuonjezerapo, ngati ndisiyapo kufikira kuunika kwa m'mawa, kanthu konse ka iye, kangakhale kamwana kamphongo." 
1Samuel25:23 Ndipo Abigayeli pakuona Davide, anafulumira kutsika pa bum, nagwa pamaso pa Davide nkhope yace pansi, namgwadira," 
1Samuel25:24 Ndipo atagwadira pa mapazi ace anati, Pa ine, mbuye wanga, pa ine pakhale ucimowo; ndipo mulole mdzakazi wanu alankhule m'makutu anu, nimumvere mau a mdzakazi wanu." 
1Samuel25:25 Mbuye wanga, musasamalire munthu uyu woipa, ndiye Nabala; cifukwa monga dzina lace momwemo iye; dzina lace ndiye Nabala, ndipo ali nako kupusa; koma ine mdzakazi wanu sindinaona anyamata a mbuye wanga, amene munawatumiza." 
1Samuel25:26 Cifukwa cace tsono, mbuye wanga, pali Yehova, ndipo pali moyo wanu, popeza Yehova anakuletsani kuti mungakhetse mwazi, ndi kudzibwezera cilango ndi dzanja la inu nokha, cifukwa cace adani anu, ndi iwo akufuna kucitira mbuye wanga coipa, akhale ngati Nabala." 
1Samuel25:27 Ndipo mphatso iyi mdzakazi wanu ndatengera mbuye wanga, ipatsidwe kwa anyamata akutsata mbuye wanga." 
1Samuel25:28 Mukhululukire kulakwa kwa mdzakazi wanu; pakuti Yehova adzapatsadi mbuye wanga banja lokhazikika, pakuti mbuyanga amaponya nkhondo za Yehova; ndipo mwa inu simudzapezeka coipa masiku anu onse." 
1Samuel25:29 Ngakhale anauka anthu kukulondolani, ndi kufuna moyo wanu, koma moyo wa mbuye wanga udzamangika m'phukusi la amoyo lakukhala ndi Yehova Mulungu wanu; koma iye adzaponya miyoyo ya adani anu kuwataya monga coturuka m'coponyera mwala." 
1Samuel25:30 Ndipo kudzali, pamene Yehova anacitira mbuye wanga monga mwa zabwino zonse adalankhula za inu, ndipo adadzaika inu mukhale kalonga wa Israyeli;" 
1Samuel25:31 mudzakhala opanda cakudodoma naco, kapena cakusauka naco mtima wa mbuye wanga, cakuti munakhetsa mwazi wopanda cifukwa, kapena kuti mbuye wanga anabwezera cilango; ndipo Yehova akadzacitira mbuye wanga zabwino, pamenepo mukumbukile mdzakazi wanu." 
1Samuel25:32 Ndipa Davide anati kwa Abigayeli, Alemekezedwe Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, amene anakutumiza lero kudzandicingamira ine;" 
1Samuel25:33 ndipo, kudalitsike kucenjera kwako, nudalitsike iwe, pakuti unandiletsa kusakhetsa mwazi, ndi kusabwezera cilango ndi dzanja la ine ndekha." 
1Samuel25:34 Pakuti ndithu, Pali Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, amene anandiletsa lero kusapweteka iwe, ukadapanda kufulumira kubwera kundicingamira, zoonadi sindikadasiyira Nabala kufikira kutaca kanthu konse, ngakhale mwana wamwamunammodzi." 
1Samuel25:35 Comweco Davide analandira m'dzanja lace zimene iye anamtengera; nanena naye, Ukwere kwanu mumtendere; ona, ndamvera mau ako, ndabvomereza nkhope yako." 
1Samuel25:36 Ndipo Abigayeli anafika kwa Nabala; ndipo, onani, anali ndi madyerero m'nyumba mwace, monga madyerero a mfumu; ndi mtima wa Nabala unasekera kwambiri m'kati mwace, pakuti analedzera kwambiri; m'mwemo uyo sadamuuza kanthu konse, kufikira kutaca." 
1Samuel25:37 Tsono m'mawa vinyo atamcokera Nabala, mkazi wace anamuuza zimenezi; ndipo mtima wace unamyuka m'kati mwace, iye nasanduka ngati mwala." 
1Samuel25:38 Ndipo kunali, atapita masiku khumi, Yehova anamkantha Nabala, nafa." 
1Samuel25:39 Ndipo pamene Davide anamva kuti Nabala adamwalira, iye anati, Alemekezedwe Yehova, amene anaweruza mrandu wa mtonzo wanga wocokera ku dzanja la Nabala, naletsa mnyamata wace pa coipa; ndipo Yehova anabwezera pamutu pa Nabala coipa cace. Ndipo Davide anatumiza wokamfunsira Abigayeli, zakuti amtengere akhale mkazi wace." 
1Samuel25:40 Ndipo anyamata a Davide pakufika kwa Abigayeli ku Karimeli, analankhula naye, nati, Davide anatitumiza kwa inu, kukutengani, mukhale mkazi wace." 
1Samuel25:41 Ndipo iye ananyamuka, nawerama nkhope yace pansi, nati, Onani, mdzakazi wanu ali kapolo wakusambitsa mapazi a anyamata a mbuye wanga." 
1Samuel25:42 Ndipo Abigayeli anafulumira nanyamuka, nakwera pa bum, pamodzi ndi anamwali ace asanu akumtsata; natsatira mithenga ya Davide, nakhala mkazi wace." 
1Samuel25:43 Davide anatenganso Ahinoamu wa ku Yezreeli, ndipo onse awiri anakhala akazi ace." 
1Samuel25:44 Pakuti Sauli anapatsa Mikala, mwana wace, mkazi wa Davide, kwa Paliti mwana wa Loisi, wa ku Galimu." 
1Samuel26:1 Ndipo Azifi anafika kwa Sauli ku Gibeya, nati, Kodi Davide sali kubisala m'phiri la Hagila, kupenya kucipululu!" 
1Samuel26:2 Ndipo Sauli ananyamuka, natsikira ku cipululu ca Zifi, ndi anthu zikwi zitatu a Israyeli osankhika, kukafuna Davide m'cipululu ca Zifi." 
1Samuel26:3 Sauli namanga zithando m'phiri la Hagila kupenya kucipululu kunjira, Koma Davide anakhala kucipululu, naona kuti Sauli alikumfuna kucipululu komweko." 
1Samuel26:4 Cifukwa cace Davide anatumiza ozonda, nazindikira kuti Sauli anabwera ndithu," 
1Samuel26:5 Ndipo Davide ananyamuka nafika pamalo pala Sauli anamangapo; ndipo Davide adaona pogona Sauli, ndi Abineri mwana wa Neri kazembe wa khamu lace; ndipo Sauli anagona pakati pa linga la magareta, ndipo anthu adamanga zithando pomzinga pace." 
1Samuel26:6 Pamenepo Davide anayankha nati kwa Ahimeleki Mhiti, ndi Abisai mwana wa Zeruya, mbale wace wa Yoabu, nati, Adzatsikira nane ndani kumisasako kwa Sauli? Nati Abisai, Nditsika nanu ndine." 
1Samuel26:7 Comweco Davide ndi Abisai anafika kwa anthuwo usiku; ndipo onani, Sauli anagona tulo m'kati mwa linga la magareta, ndi mkondo wace wozika kumutu kwace; ndi Abineri ndi anthuwo anagona pomzinga iye." 
1Samuel26:8 Ndipo Abisai anati kwa Davide, Lero Mulungu wapereka mdani wanu m'dzanja lanu; ndiloleni ndimpyoze ndi mkondo, kamodzi kokha, sindidzampyoza kawiri." 
1Samuel26:9 Koma Davide ananena ndi Abisai, Usamuononge, ndani adzasamula dzanja lace pa wodzozedwa wa Mulungu, ndi kukhala wosacimwa?" 
1Samuel26:10 Nati Davide, Pali Yehova, Yehova adzamkantha iye; kapena tsiku la imfa yace lidzafika; kapena adzatsikira kunkhondo, nadzafako." 
1Samuel26:11 Yehova andiletse ine kusamula dzanja langa pa wodzozedwa wa Yehova; koma utenge mkondowo uli kumutu kwace, ndi cikho ca madzi, ndipo tiyeni, timuke." 
1Samuel26:12 Comweco Davide anatenga mkondowo, ndi cikho ca madzi ku mutu wa Sauli nacoka iwowa, osawaona munthu, kapena kuzidziwa, kapena kugalamuka; pakuti onse anati m'tulo; popeza tulo tatikuru tocokera kwa Yehova tinawagwira onse." 
1Samuel26:13 Ndipo Davide anaolokera kutsidya, naima patali pamwamba pa phiri; pakati pao panati danga lalikuru;" 
1Samuel26:14 ndipo Davide anaitana anthuwo, ndi Abineri mwana wa Neri, nati, Suyankha kodi Abineri? Tsono Abineri anayankha, nati, Ndiwe yani amene uitana mfumuyo?" 
1Samuel26:15 Davide nati kwa Abineri, Si ndiwe mwamuna weni weni kodi? ndani mwa Aisrayeli afanafana ndi iwe? Unalekeranji tsono kudikira mbuye wako, mfumuyo? pakuti anafika wina kudzaononga mfumu, mbuye wako." 
1Samuel26:16 Ici unacicita siciri cabwino. Pali Yehova, muyenera kufa inu, cifukwa simunadikira mbuye wanu, wodzozedwa wa Yehova. Ndipo tsono, penyani mkondo wa mfumu ndi cikho ca madzi zinali kumutu kwace ziri kuti?" 
1Samuel26:17 Ndipo Sauli anazindikira mau ace a Davide, nati, Ndi mau ako awa, mwana wanga Davide? Nati Davide, Ndi mau anga mfumu, mbuye wanga." 
1Samuel26:18 Nati iye, Cifukwa ninji mbuye wanga amalondola mnyamata wace? pakuti ndacitanji? kapena m'dzanja langa muli coipa cotani?" 
1Samuel26:19 Cifukwa cace mbuye wanga mfumu amvere mau a kapolo wace. Ngati ndi Yehova anakuutsirani inu kutsutsana ndi ine, alandire copereka; koma ngati ndi ana a anthu, atembereredwe pamaso pa Yehova, pakuti anandipitikitsa lero kuti ndisalandireko colowa ca Yehova, ndi kuti, Muka, utumikire milungu yina." 
1Samuel26:20 Cifukwa cace tsono, mwazi wanga usagwe pansi kutati ndi Yehova; pakuti mfumu ya Israyeli yaturuka kudzafuna nsabwe, monga munthu wosaka nkhwali pamapiri." 
1Samuel26:21 Pamenepo Sauli anati, Ndinacimwa; bwera, mwana wanga Davide; pakuti sindidzakucitiranso coipa, popeza moyo wanga unati wa mtengo wapatali pamaso pako lero; ona, ndinapusa ndi kulakwa kwakukuru." 
1Samuel26:22 Davide nayankha, nati, Tapenyani lmkondo wa mfumu Abwere mnyamata wina kuutenga." 
1Samuel26:23 Ndipo Yehova adzabwezera munthu yense cilungamo cace ndi cikhulupiriko cace, popeza Yehova anakuperekani lero m'dzanja langa, koma sindinalola kutukulira dzanja langa pa wodzozedwa wa Yehova," 
1Samuel26:24 Ndipo onani, monga lero ndinasamalira ndithu moyo wanu, momwemo usamaliridwe ndithu moyo wanga pamaso pa Yehova, ndipo iye andipulumutse ku masautso onse." 
1Samuel26:25 Pomwepo Sauli anati kwa Davide, Udalitsike iwe, mwana wanga Davide; udzacita ndithu camphamvu, nudzapambana. Comweco Davide anamuka, ndipo Sauli anabwera kwao." 
1Samuel27:1 Ndipo Davide ananena mumtima mwace, Tsiku tina Sauli adzandipha; palibe cina condikomera koma kuti ndithawire ku dziko la Afilisti; ndipo Sauli adzakhala kakasi cifukwa ca ine, osandifunanso m'malire onse a Israyeli, momwemo ndidzapulumuka m'dzanja lace." 
1Samuel27:2 Ndipo Davide ananyamuka, naoloka pamodzi ndi anthu mazana asanu ndi limodzi amene anali naye, nafika kwa Akisi mwana wa Maoki, mfumu ya ku Gati." 
1Samuel27:3 Ndipo Davide anakhala ndi Akisi ku Gati, iye ndi anthu ace, munthu yense ndi a pabanja pace, inde Davide ndi akazi ace awiri, Ahinoamu wa ku Jezreeli, ndi Abigayeli wa ku Karimeli, mkazi wa Nabala." 
1Samuel27:4 Ndipo anauza Sauli kuti Davide anathawira ku Gati; ndipo iye sanamfunanso. 
1Samuel27:5 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Akisi, Ngati mwandikomera mtima, andipatse malo kumudzi kwina kumiraga, kuti ndikakhale kumeneko; pakuti mnyamata wanu adzakhala bwanji m'mudzi wacifumu pamodzi ndi inu?" 
1Samuel27:6 Ndipo Akisi anampatsa Zikilaga tsiku lomweli; cifukwa cace Zikilaga ndi wa mafumu a Yuda kufikira lero lomwe. 
1Samuel27:7 Ndipo kuwerenga kwace kwa masiku Davide anakhala ku dziko la Afilisti ndiko caka cimodzi ndi miyezi inai. 
1Samuel27:8 Ndipo Davide ndi anthu ace anakwera, nathira nkhondo yobvumbulukira pa Agesuri, ndi Agirezi, ndi Aamaleki; pakuti awa ndiwo anthu akale a m'dziko lija, njira ya ku Suri kufikira ku dziko la Aigupto." 
1Samuel27:9 Ndipo Davide anapasula dzikolo, sanasunga ndi moyo mwamuna kapena wamkazi; natenga nkhosa, ndi ng'ombe, ndi aburu, ndi ngamila, ndi zobvala; nabwera nafika kwa Akisi." 
1Samuel27:10 Ndipo Akisi anati, Wapooyana nkhondo ndi yani lero? Nati Davide, Ndi a kumwera kwa Ayuda, ndi a kumwera kwa Ayerameli, ndi a kumwera kwa Akeni." 
1Samuel27:11 Ndipo Davide sadasunga wamoyo mwamuna kapena mkazi, kubwera nao ku Gati; popeza adati, Kuti angatiulule, ndi kuti, Davide anatero, ndi makhalidwe ace ndi otere, masiku onse akukhala ku dziko la Afilisti." 
1Samuel27:12 Ndipo Akisi anakhulupirira Davide, nati Anadziipitsa ndithu pakati pa anthu a Israyeli, cifukwa cace iye adzakhala mnyamata wanga cikhalire." 
1Samuel28:1 Ndipo kunali masiku aja, Afilisti anasonkhanitsa pamodzi makamu ao onse kunkhondo, kuti akaponyane ndi Aisrayeli. Ndipo Akisi ananena ndi Davide, Dziwa kuti zoonadi, udzaturuka nane ndi nkhondo, iwe ndi anthu ako." 
1Samuel28:2 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Akisi, Potero mudzadziwe cimene mnyamata wanu adzacita. Ndipo Akisi anati kwa Davide, Cifukwa cace ndidzakuika iwe ukhale wondisungira moyo wanga masiku onse." 
1Samuel28:3 M'menemo Samueli ndipo atafa, ndipo Aisrayeli onse atalira maliro ace, namuika m'Rama, m'mudzi mwao. Ndipo Sauli anacotsa m'dzikomo obwebweta onse, ndi aula onse." 
1Samuel28:4 Ndipo Afilisti anasonkhana, nadza namanga misasa ku Sunemu; ndipo Sauli anasonkhanitsa Aisrayeli onse, namanga iwo ku Giliboa." 
1Samuel28:5 Ndipo pamene Sauli anaona khamu la Afilisti, anaopa, ndi mtima wace unanjenjemera kwakukuru." 
1Samuel28:6 Ndipo pamene Sauli anafunsira kwa Yehova, Yehova sanamyankha ngakhale ndi maloto, kapena ndi Urimu, kapena ndi aneneri." 
1Samuel28:7 Tsono Sauli anati kwa anyamata ace, Mundifunire mkazi wobwebweta, kuti ndimuke kwa iye ndi kumfunsira. Ndipo anyamata ace anati kwa iye, Onani ku Endori kuli mkazi wobwebweta." 
1Samuel28:8 Ndipo Sauli anadzizimbaitsa nabvala zobvala zina, nanka iye pamodzi ndi anthu ena awiri, nafika kwa mkaziyo usiku; nati iye, Undilotere ndi mzimu wobwebwetawo, nundiukitsire ali yense ndidzakuchulira dzina lace." 
1Samuel28:9 Ndipo mkaziyo ananena naye, Onani, mudziwa cimene anacita Sauli, kuti analikha m'dzikomo obwebweta onse, ndi aula; cifukwa ninji tsono mulikuchera moyo wanga msampha, kundifetsa." 
1Samuel28:10 Ndipo Sauli anamlumbirira kwa Yehova, nati, Pali Yehova, palibe cilango cidzakugwera cifukwa ca cinthu ici." 
1Samuel28:11 Pomwepo mkaziyo anati, Ndikuukitsireni yani? Nati iye, Undiukitsire Samueli." 
1Samuel28:12 Ndipo mkaziyo pakuona Samueli, anapfuula ndi mau akuru; ndi mkaziyo analankhula ndi Sauli, nati, Munandinyengeranji? popeza inu ndinu Sauli." 
1Samuel28:13 Ndipo mfumuvo inanena naye, Usaope, kodi ulikuona ciani? Mkaziyo nanena ndi Sauli, Ndirikuona milungu irikukwera kuturuka m'kati mwa dziko." 
1Samuel28:14 Ndipo ananena naye, Makhalidwe ace ndi otani? nati iye, Nkhalamba irikukwera yobvala mwinjiro. Pamenepo Sauli anazindikira kuti ndi Samueli, naweramitsa nkhope yace pansi, namgwadira." 
1Samuel28:15 Ndipo Samueli ananena ndi Sauli, Wandibvutiranji kundikweretsa kuno? Sauli nayankha, Ndirikusautsika kwambiri, pakuti Afilisti aponyana nkhondo ndi ine, ndipo Mulungu anandicokera, osandiyankhanso, kapena ndi aneneri, kapena ndi maloto; cifukwa cace ndakuitanani, kuti mundidziwitse cimene ndiyenera kucita." 
1Samuel28:16 Ndip'o Samueli ananena naye, Ndipo undifunsiranji ine, popeza Yehova anakucokera, nasandulika mdani wako?" 
1Samuel28:17 Ndipo Yehova yekha wacita monga ananena pakamwa panga; ndipo Yehova wang'amba ufumuwo, kuucotsa m'dzanja lako, ndi kuupatsa mnansi wako, ndiye Davide." 
1Samuel28:18 Cifukwa sunamvera mau a Yehova, ndi kukwaniritsa mkwiyo wace woopsa pa Ameleki, cifukwa cace Yehova wakucitira cinthu ici lero." 
1Samuel28:19 Ndiponso Yehova adzapereka Israyeli pamodzi ndi iwe m'dzanja la Afilisti; ndipo mawa iwe ndi ana ako mudzakhala kuli ine; Yehova adzaperekanso khamu la Aisrayeli m'dzanja la Afilisti. 
1Samuel28:20 Pomwepo Sauli anagwa pansi tantha, naopa kwakukuru, cifukwa ca mau a Samueli; ndipo analibe mphamvu; pakuti tsiku lonse ndi usiku wace wonse anakhala osadya kanthu." 
1Samuel28:21 Ndipo mkaziyo anafika kwa Sauli, naona kuti ali wobvutika kwambiri, nanena naye, Onani, mdzakazi wanu anamvera mau anu, ndipo ndinataya moyo wanga, ndi kumvera mau anu munalankhula ndi ine." 
1Samuel28:22 Cifukwa cace tsono, mumverenso mau a mdzakazi wanu, nimundilole kuika kakudya pamaso panu; ndipo mudye, kuti mukhale ndi mphamvu pakumuka." 
1Samuel28:23 Koma iye anakana, nati, Sindifuna kudya. Koma anyamata ace, pamodzi ndi mkaziyo anamkangamiza; iyenamvera mau ao. Comweco anauka pansi, nakhala pakama." 
1Samuel28:24 Ndipo mkaziyo anali ndi mwana wa ng'ombe wonenepa m'nyumbamo; ndipo anafulumira, namupha, natenga ufa naukanyanga mkate wopanda cotupitsa;" 
1Samuel28:25 nabwera nazo kwa Sauli ndi kwa anyamata ace; nadya iwowa. Atatero ananyamuka, nacoka usiku womwewo." 
1Samuel29:1 Tsono Afilisti anasonkhanitsa makamu ao onse ku Afeki; ndipo Aisrayeli anamanga ku citsime ca m'Jezreeli. 
1Samuel29:2 Ndipo akalonga a Afilisti ananyamuka ndi mazana ao ndi zikwi zao; ndipo Davide ndi anthu ace ananyamuka ndi a pambuyo pamodzi ndi Akisi. 
1Samuel29:3 Ndipo akalonga a Afilisti anati, Ahebri awa acitanji pano? Ndipo Akisi ananena kwa akalonga a Afilisti, Uyu si Davide uja mnyamata wa Sauli, mfumu ya Israyeli, amene wakhala nane masiku awa kapena zaka izi, ndipo sindinapeza kulakwa mwa iye, kuyambira tsiku lija anaphatikana nane kufikira lero." 
1Samuel29:4 Koma akalonga a Afilisti anapsa naye mtima; nanena naye akalonga a Afilisti, Bwezani munthuyu, abwerere kumalo kwace kumene munamuikako, asatsikire nafe kunkhondo, kuti kunkhondoko angasanduke mdani wathu; pakuti uyu adzadziyanjanitsa ninji ndi mfumu yace? Si ndi mitu ya anthu awa?" 
1Samuel29:5 Uyu si Davide kodi amene anamthirirana mang'ombe m'magulu ao, kuti, Sauli anapha zikwi zace, Koma Davide zikwi zace zankhani?" 
1Samuel29:6 Ndipo Akisi anaitana Davide, nanena naye, Pali Yehova, wakhala woongoka mtima, ndipo kuturuka kwako ndi kubwera kwako pamodzi ndi ine m'gulumo kundikomera; pakuti sindinaona coipa mwa iwe kuyambira tsiku la kufika kwako kufikira lero; koma akalongawo sakukomera mtima." 
1Samuel29:7 Cifukwa cace, bwerera, numuke mumtendere, kuti angaipidwe mtima nawe akalonga a Afilisti." 
1Samuel29:8 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi Akisi, Koma ndinacitanji? Ndipo munapeza ciani mu mnyamata wanu nthawi yonse ndiri pamaso panu kufikira lero, kuti sindingapite kukaponyana nkhondo ndi adani a mbuye wanga mfumu?" 
1Samuel29:9 Ndipo Akisi anayankha nanena ndi Davide, Ndidziwa kuti pamaso panga uli wabwino, ngati mthenga wa Mulungu; koma akalonga a Afilisti anena, iye asamuke nafe kunkhondoko." 
1Samuel29:10 Cifukwa cace ulawirire m'mawa pamodzi ndi anyamata a mbuye wako amene anabwera nawe; ndipo mutauka m'mawa, mumuke kutaca." 
1Samuel29:11 Comweco Davide analawirira, iye ndi anthu ace, kuti amuke m'mawa ndi kubwera ku dziko la Afilisti. Ndipo Afilisti anakwera ku Jezreeli." 
1Samuel30:1 Ndipo kunali, pakufika Davide ndi anthu ace ku Zikilaga tsiku lacitatu, Aamaleki adaponya nkhondo yobvumbulukira kumwera, ndi ku Zikilaga, nathyola Zikilaga nautentha ndi moto;" 
1Samuel30:2 nagwira akazi ndi onse anali m'mwemo, akuru ndi ang'ono; sanapha mmodzi, koma anawatenga, namuka." 
1Samuel30:3 Ndipo pamene Davide ndi anthu ace anafika kumudziko, onani, unatenthedwa ndi moto; ndi akazi ao ndi ana ao amuna ndi akazi anatengedwa ukapolo." 
1Samuel30:4 Ndipo Davide ndi anthu amene anali naye anakweza mau ao, nalira misozi, kufikira analibe mphamvu yakuliranso." 
1Samuel30:5 Ndipo akazi awiri a Davide anatengedwa ukapolo, Ahinoamu wa ku Jezreeli ndi Abigayeli mkazi wa Nabala wa ku Karimeli." 
1Samuel30:6 Ndipo Davide anadololoka kwambiri, pakuti anthu ananena za kumponya iye miyala, pakuti mtima wao wa anthu onse unali ndi cisoni, yense cifukwa ca ana ace amuna ndi akazi. Koma Davide anadzilimbikitsa mwa Yehova Mulungu wace." 
1Samuel30:7 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi Abyatara wansembeyo, mwana wa Ahimeleki, Unditengere kuno efodi. Abyatara nabwera ndi efodi kwa Davide." 
1Samuel30:8 Ndipo Davide anafunsira kwa Yehova, nati, Ndikalondola khamulo ndidzalipeza kodi? Ndipo anamyankha kuti, Lonriola, pakuti zoonadi udzawapeza, ndi kulanditsa zonse." 
1Samuel30:9 Comweco Davide anamuka, iye ndi anthu mazana asanu ndi limodzi anali naye, nafika kukamtsinje Besori, pamenepo anatsala ena." 
1Samuel30:10 Ndipo Davide anawalondola, iye ndi anthu mazana anai; koma anthu mazana awiri anatsala m'mbuyo, cifukwa analema, osakhoza kuoloka kamtsinje Besori." 
1Samuel30:11 Ndipo ena anapeza M-aigupto kuthengo, nabwera naye kwa Davide, nampatsa cakudya, nadya iye; nampatsanso madzi kumwa;" 
1Samuel30:12 nampatsanso cigamphu ca ncinci ya nkhuyu ndi ncinci ziwiri za mphesa; ndipo atadya, moyo wace unabweranso mwa iye; pakuti adagona masiku atatu ndi usiku wao, osadya cakudya, osamwa madzi." 
1Samuel30:13 Pamenepo Davide ananena naye, Ndiwe wa yani? ufumira kuti? Nati iye, Ndiri mnyamata wa ku Aigupto, kapolo wa M-amaleki; mbuye wanga anandisiya, cifukwa ndinayambodwala apita masiku atatu." 
1Samuel30:14 Tinathira nkhondo kumwera kwa Akereti ndi ku dziko lija la Ayuda, ndi kumwera kwa Kalebi; ndipo tinatentha mudzi wa Zikilaga ndi moto." 
1Samuel30:15 Ndipo Davide ananena naye, Kodi udzanditsogolera kufikira ku khamulo? Nati iye, Mundilumbirire kwa Mulungu, kuti simudzandipha, kapena kundipereka m'dzanja la mbuye wanga, ndipo ndidzatsika nanu kuli khamu limene." 
1Samuel30:16 Ndipo pamene anatsika naye, onani, iwo anabalalika apo ponse, analinkudya, ndi kumwa, ndi kudyerera, cifukwa ca cofunkha zambiri anazitenga ku dziko la Afilisti, ndi ku dziko la Yuda." 
1Samuel30:17 Ndipo Davide anawakantha kuyambira madzulo kufikira usiku wa mawa wace; ndipo panalibe munthu mmodzi wa iwowa anapulumuka, koma anyamata mazana anai oberekeka pa ngamila, nathawa." 
1Samuel30:18 Ndipo Davide analanditsa zonse anazitenga Aamaleki, napulumutsa akazi ace awiri." 
1Samuel30:19 Ndipo sikanasoweka kanthu, kakang'ono kapena kakakuru, ana amuna kapena ana akazi, kapena cuma kapena dna ciri conse ca zija anazitenga iwowa; Davide anabwera nazo zonse." 
1Samuel30:20 Ndipo Davide anatenga nkhosa zonse ndi ng'ombe zonse, zimene anazipitikitsa patsogolo pa zoweta zao zao, nati, Izi ndi zofunkha za Davide." 
1Samuel30:21 Ndipo Davide anafika kuli anthu mazana awiri amene analema osakhoza kutsata Davide, amenenso anawakhalitsa kukamtsinje Besori; ndipo iwowa anaturuka kucingamira Davide, ndi amene anali naye; ndipo pakuyandikira Davide anawafunsa ngati ali bwanji." 
1Samuel30:22 Pamenepo anthu oipa onse, ndi opanda pace a iwo amene anapita ndi Davide anayankha nati, Popeza sadamuka nafe sitidzawapatsa kanthu ka zofunkha tidazilanditsa, koma kwa munthu yense mkazi wace ndi ana ace, kuti acoke nao namuke." 
1Samuel30:23 Davide nati, Simudzatero, abale anga inu, ndi zimene anatipatsa ife Yehova, amene anatisunga, napereka m'dzanja lathu khamu lija linadza kumenyana nafe." 
1Samuel30:24 Ndipo ndani adzabvomerezana nanu mrandu uwu? Pakuti monga gawo lace la iye wakumuka kunkhondoko, momwemo lidzakhala gawo lace la iye wakukhala ndi akatundu, adzagawana cimodzimodzi." 
1Samuel30:25 Ndipo kuyambira tsiku lija kufikira lero lomwe anaika ici, cikhale lemba ndi ciweruzo pa Aisrayeli." 
1Samuel30:26 Ndipo pamene Davide anafika ku Zikilaga, anatumizako za zofunkhazo kwa akuru a Yuda, ndiwo abwenzi ace, nati, Siyi mphatso yanu ya zofunkha za adani a Yehova." 
1Samuel30:27 Anatumiza kwa iwo a ku Beteli, ndi kwa iwo a ku Ramoti wa kumwela, ndi kwa iwo a ku Yatiri;" 
1Samuel30:28 ndi kwa iwo a ku Aroeri, ndi kwa iwo a ku Sifimoti, ndi kwa iwo a ku Estimoa;" 
1Samuel30:29 ndi kwa iwo a ku Rakala, ndi kwa iwo a m'midzi ya Ayerameli, ndi kwa iwo a m'midzi ya Akeni;" 
1Samuel30:30 ndi kwa iwo a ku Horima, ndi kwa iwo a ku Korasani, ndi kwa iwo a ku Ataki;" 
1Samuel30:31 ndi kwa iwo a ku Hebroni, ndi kumalo konse kumene Davide ndi anthu ace adafoyendayenda." 
1Samuel31:1 Ndipo Afilisti anaponyana ndi Aisrayeli; Aisrayeli nathawa pamaso pa Afilisti, nagwa olasidwa m'phiri la Giliboa." 
1Samuel31:2 Ndipo Afilisti anapitikitsa, osawaleka Sauli ndi ana ace; ndipo Afilisti anapha Jonatani, ndi Abinadabu, ndi Malikisua, ana a Sauli." 
1Samuel31:3 Ndipo nkhondoyo inamkulira Sauli kwambiri, oponya mibvi nampeza; ndipo iye anasautsika kwakukuru cifukwa ca oponya mibviyo." 
1Samuel31:4 Tsono Sauli ananena ndi wonyamula zida zace, Solola lupanga lako, undipyoze nalo; kuti osadulidwa awa angabwere ndi kundipyoza, ndi kundiseka, Koma woo nyamula zida zace anakana; cifukwa anaopa ndithu. Cifukwa cace Sauli anatenga lupanga lace naligwera." 
1Samuel31:5 Ndipo pakuona kuti Sauli anafa, wonyamula zida zace yemwe, anagwera lupanga lace, nafera limodzi ndi iye." 
1Samuel31:6 Comweco adamwalira pamodzi Sauli ndi ana ace atatu, ndi wonyamula zida zace, ndi anthu ace onse, tsiku lomwe lija." 
1Samuel31:7 Ndipo pamene Aisrayeli akukhala tsidya lina la cigwa, ndi iwo akukhala tsidya la Yordano, anaona kuti Aisrayeli alikuthawa, ndi kuti Sauli ndi ana ace anafa, iwowa anasiya midzi yao, nathawa; ndipo Afilisti anadza nakhala m'menemo." 
1Samuel31:8 Ndipo kunali m'mawa mwace, pakubwera Afilisti kubvula akufawo, anapeza Sauli ndi ana ace atatu ali akufa m'phiri la Giliboa." 
1Samuel31:9 Ndipo anadula mutu wace, natenga zida zace, natumiza m'dziko lonse la Afilisti mithenga yolalikira ku nyumba ya milungu yao, ndi kwa anthu." 
1Samuel31:10 Ndipo anaika zida zace m'nyumba ya Asitarote; napacika mtembo wace ku linga la ku Betisani. 
1Samuel31:11 Koma pamene a ku Jabezi Gileadi anamva zimene Afilisti anamcitira Sauli," 
1Samuel31:12 ngwazi zonse zinanyamuka ndi kucezera usiku kuyenda, natenga mtembo wa Sauli, ndi mitembo ya ana ace, pa linga la Betisani; nafika ku Jabezi Gileadi naitentha kumeneko." 
1Samuel31:13 Natenga mafupa ao nawaika patsinde pa mtengo uli m'Jabezi, nasala kudya masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
2Samuel1:1 NDIPO kunali atamwalira Sauli, pamene Davide anabwera atawapha Aamaleki, ndipo Davide atakhala ku Zikilaga masiku awiri;" 
2Samuel1:2 pa tsiku lacitatu, onani, munthu anaturuka ku zithando za Sauli, ali ndi zobvala zace zong'ambika, ndi dothi pamutu pace; ndipo kunatero kuti iye, pofika kwa Davide, anagwa pansi namgwadira." 
2Samuel1:3 Ndipo Davide ananena naye, Ufumira kuti iwe? iye nanena naye, Ndapulumuka ku zithando za Israyeti." 
2Samuel1:4 Ndipo Davide ananena naye, Kunaonekanji? undiuze. Nayankha iye, Anthu anathawa kunkhondo, ndipo ambiri anagwa nafa; ndipo Sauli ndi Jonatani mwana wace anafanso." 
2Samuel1:5 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi mnyamata wakumuuza, Udziwa bwang kuti Sauli ndi Jonatani mwana wace anafa?" 
2Samuel1:6 Mnyamata wakumuuzayo nati, Pamene ndinangoyenda pa phiri la Giliboa, ndinaona, Sauli alikuyedzamira nthungo yace, ndi magareta ndi apakavalo anamyandikiza." 
2Samuel1:7 Ndipo iye pakuceukira m'mbuyo mwace anandiona, nanditana. Ndipo ndinayankha, Ndine." 
2Samuel1:8 Nanena, Ndiwe yani? Ndipo ndinayankha kuti, Ndine M-amaleki." 
2Samuel1:9 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Uime pa ine nundiphe, cifukwa kuwawa mtima kwandigwera ine, popeza ndikali moyobe." 
2Samuel1:10 M'mwemo ndinakhala pambali pace ndi kumtsiriza cifukwa ndinadziwa kuti sangakhalenso ndi moyo wace, atagwa. Ndipo ndinatenga korona wa pamutu pace, ndi cigwinjiri ca pa mkono wace, ndabwera nazo kuno kwa mbuye wanga." 
2Samuel1:11 Pomwepo Davide anagwira zobvala zace nazing'amba; nateronso anthu onse okhala naye. 
2Samuel1:12 Nabuma, nalira misozi, nasala kudya kufikira madzulo, cifukwa ca Sauli ndi mwana wace Jonatani, ndi anthu a Yehova, ndi banja la Israyeli, cifukwa adagwa ndi lupanga." 
2Samuel1:13 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi mnyamata wakumuuzayo, Kwanu nkuti? Nayankha, Ine ndine mwana wa mlendo, M-amaleki." 
2Samuel1:14 Ndipo Davide ananena naye, Bwanji sunaopa kusamula dzanja lako kuononga wodzozedwa wa Yehova?" 
2Samuel1:15 Davide naitana wina wa anyamatawo, nati, Sendera numkanthe, Ndipo anamkantha, nafa iye." 
2Samuel1:16 Koma asanafe, Davide adanena naye, Wadziphetsa ndi mtima wako; cifukwa pakamwa pako padacita umboni wakukutsutsa ndi kuti, Ine ndinapha wodzozedwa wa Yehova." 
2Samuel1:17 Ndipo Davide analirira Sauli ndi Jonatani mwana wace ndi nyimbo iyi ya maliro; 
2Samuel1:18 nawauza aphunzitse ana Ayuda nyimbo iyi ya Uta, onani inalembedwa m'buku la Jasari:-" 
2Samuel1:19 Ulemerero wako, Israyeli, unaphedwa pa misanje yako. Ha! adagwa amphamvu" 
2Samuel1:20 Usacinene ku Gati, Usacibukitse m'makwalala a Asikeloni, Kuti ana akazi a Afilisti angasekere, Kuti ana akazi a osadulidwawo angapfuule mokondwera." 
2Samuel1:21 Mapiri inu a Giliboa, Pa inu pasakhale mame kapena mvula, kapena minda yakutengako zopereka. Pakuti kumeneko zikopa za amphamvu zinatayika koipa, Cikopa ca Sauli, monga ca wosadzozedwa ndi mafuta." 
2Samuel1:22 Uta wa Jonatani sunabwerera, Ndipo lupanga la Sauli silinabwecera cabe, Pa mwazi wa ophedwa, pa mafuta a amphamvuwo." 
2Samuel1:23 Sauli ndi Jonatani anali okoma ndi okondweretsa m'miyoyo yao, Ndipo m'imfa yao sanasiyana; Anali nalo liwiro loposa ciombankanga, Anali amphamvu koposa mikango." 
2Samuel1:24 Ana akazi inu a Israyeli, mulirire Sauli, Amene anakubvekani ndi zofira zokometsetsa, Amene anaika zokometsetsa zagolidi pa zobvala zanu." 
2Samuel1:25 Ha! amphamvuwo anagwa pakati pa nkhondo! Jonatani anaphedwa pamisanje pako. 
2Samuel1:26 Ndipsinjika mtima cifukwa ca iwe, mbale wanga Jonatani; Wandikomera kwambiri; Cikondi cako, ndinadabwa naco, Cinaposa cikondi ca anthu akazi." 
2Samuel1:27 Ha! amphamvuwo anagwa, Ndi zida za nkhondo zinaonengeka," 
2Samuel2:1 Ndipo zitatha izi Davide anafunsira kwa Yehova nati, Kodi ndikwere kunka m'mudzi wina wa Yuda? Ndipo Yehova ananena naye, Kwera. Davide nanena naye, Ndikwere kuti? Ndipo anati, Ku Hebroni." 
2Samuel2:2 Comweco Davide anakwera kunka kumeneko pamodzi ndi akazi ace awiri, ndiwo Ahingamu Mjezreeli, ndi Abigayeli mkazi wa Nabala wa ku Karimeli." 
2Samuel2:3 Ndipo Davide anakwera nao anyamata ace okhala naye, munthu yense ndi banja lace; iwowa nakhala m'midzi ya Hebroni." 
2Samuel2:4 Ndipo anthu Ayuda anabwera namdzoza Davide pomwepo akhale mfumu ya nyumba ya Yuda. Ndipo wina anauza Davide kuti, Anthu a ku Jabezi Gileadi ndiwo amene anamuika Sauli." 
2Samuel2:5 Pamenepo Davide anatumiza mithenga kwa anthu a ku Jabezi Gileadi, nanena nao, Mudalitsike ndi Yehova inu, popeza munacitira cokoma ici mbuye wanu Sauli, ndi kumuika." 
2Samuel2:6 Ndipo tsopano Yehova acitire inu cokoma ndi coonadi; inenso ndidzakubwezerani cokoma ici, popeza munacita cinthuci." 
2Samuel2:7 Cifukwa cace tsono manja anu alimbike, nimucite camuna; pakuti Sauli mbuye wanu wafa, ndi a nyumba ya Yuda anandidzoza ndikhale mfumu yao." 
2Samuel2:8 Koma Abineri, mwana wa Neri, kazembe wa khamu la ankhondo a Sauli anatenga Isiboseti mwana wa Sauli, namuolotsa nanka naye ku Mahanaimu;" 
2Samuel2:9 namlonga ufumu wa pa Gileadi ndi Aasuri ndi Jezreeli ndi Efraimu ndi Benjamini ndi Aisrayeli onse. 
2Samuel2:10 Ndipo Isiboseti mwana wa Sauli anali ndi zaka makumi anai pakuyamba iye kukhala mfumu ya Israyeli, nacita ufumu zaka ziwiri. Koma a nyumba ya Yuda anatsata Davide." 
2Samuel2:11 Ndipo Davide anali mfumu ya nyumba ya Yuda ku Hebroni zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri kudza miyezi isanu ndi umodzi. 
2Samuel2:12 Ndipo Abineri mwana wa Neri ndi anyamata a Isiboseti mwana wa Sauli anaturuka ku Mahanaimu kunka ku Gibeoni. 
2Samuel2:13 Ndi Yoabu mwana wa Zeruya, ndi anyamata a Davide anaturuka nakomana nao pa thamanda la Gibeoni; nakhala pansi, ena tsidya lino, ndi ena tsidya lija la thamandalo." 
2Samuel2:14 Ndipo Abineri ananena ndi Yoabu, Aimirire anyamata nasewere pamaso pathu. Nati Yoabu, Aimirire." 
2Samuel2:15 Pomwepo iwo anaimirira naoloka owerengedwa, khumi ndi awiri a kwa Benjamini, ndi Isiboseti mwana wa Sauli, ndi khumi ndi awiri a anyamata a Davide." 
2Samuel2:16 Ndipo anagwirana munthu yense kugwira mutu wa mnzace, nagwaza ndi lupanga lace m'nthiti mwa mnzaceo Comweco anagwa limodzi; cifukwa cace malo aja anachedwa Dera la Mipeni la ku Gibeoni." 
2Samuel2:17 Ndipo tsikulo nkhondo inakula ndithu. Ndi Abineri ndi anthu a Israyeli anathawa pamaso pa anyamata a Davide. 
2Samuel2:18 Ndipo analipo ana atatu a Zeruya, ndiwo Yoabu, Abisai ndi Asaheli. Ndipo Asaheli anali waliwiro ngati nyama ya kuthengo." 
2Samuel2:19 Ndipo Asaheli anapitikitsa Abineri. Ndipo m'kuthamanga kwace sanapambukira kulamanja, kapena kulamanzere, pakutsata Abineri." 
2Samuel2:20 Pomwepo Abineri anaceuka nati, Kodi ndi iwe Asaheli? iye nayankha, Ndine." 
2Samuel2:21 Ndipo Abineri ananena naye, Patuka iwe kulamanja kapena kulamanzere kwako nudzigwirire wina wa anyamatawo, nutenge zida zace. Koma Asaheli anakana kupambuka pakumtsata iye." 
2Samuel2:22 Ndipo Abineri anabwereza kunena kwa Asaheli, Pambuka pakunditsata ine. Ndidzakukanthiranji kukugwetsa pansi? ndikatero ndidzaweramutsanso bwanji nkhope yanga kwa mbale wako Yoabu?" 
2Samuel2:23 Koma iye anakana kupambuka; cifukwa cace Abineri anamkantha ndi khali la mkondo m'mimba mwace, ndi khalilo linaturuka kumbuyo kwace. Ndipo anagwako, nafera pomwepo, Ndipo onse akufika kumalo kumene Asaheli anagwa, namwalirapo, anaima pomwepo." 
2Samuel2:24 Koma Yoabu ndi Abisai anampitikitsa Abineri; ndipo dzuwa linawalowera pofika ku citunda ca Ama, cakuno ca Giya, pa njira ya ku cipululu ca Gibeoni." 
2Samuel2:25 Ndipo ana a Benjamini anaunjikana pamodzi kutsata Abinen, nakhala gulu limodzi, naima pamwamba pa citunda." 
2Samuel2:26 Pomwepo Abineri anaitana Yoabu nati, Kodi lupanga lidzaononga cionongere? sudziwa kodi kuti kutha kwace kudzakhala udani ndithu? Tsono udzakhalanso nthawi yanji osauza anthu kubwerera pakutsata abale ao?" 
2Samuel2:27 Yoabu nati, Pali Mulungu, iwe ukadapandakunena, anthu akadabalalika m'mawa osatsata yense mbale wace." 
2Samuel2:28 Comweco Yoabu anaomba Gpenga, anthu onse naima, naleka kupitikitsa Aisrayeli, osaponyana naonso." 
2Samuel2:29 Ndipo Abineri ndi anthu ace anacezera usiku wonse kupyola cidikha, naoloka Yordano, napyola Bitroni lonse nafika ku Mahanaimu." 
2Samuel2:30 Ndipo Yoabu anabwerera pakutsata Abineri. Ndipo pamene anasonkhanitsa pamodzi anthu onse anasowa anthu a Davide khumi ndi asanu ndi anai ndi Asaheli. 
2Samuel2:31 Koma anyamata a Davide anakantha anthu a Benjamini ndi a Abineri, namwalira mazana atatu mphambu makumi asanu ndi limodzi." 
2Samuel2:32 Ndipo ananyamula Asaheli namuika m'manda a atate wace ali ku Betelehemu. Ndipo Yoabu ndi anthu ace anacezera kuyenda usiku wonse, ndipo kudawacera ku Hebroni." 
2Samuel3:1 Ndipo panali nkhondo nthawi yaitali pakati pa nyumba ya Sauli ndi nyumba ya Davide. Koma Davide analimba cilimbire, ndi nyumba ya Sauli inafoka cifokere." 
2Samuel3:2 Ndipo ana a Davide anabadwira ku Hebroni. Mwana woyamba ndiye Amnoni, wa Ahinoamu wa ku Jezreeli;" 
2Samuel3:3 waciwiri Kileabu, wa Abigayeli mkazi wa Nabala wa ku Karimeli; ndi wacitatu Abisalomu mwana wa Maaka mwana wamkazi wa Talimai mfumu ya ku Gesuri;" 
2Samuel3:4 ndi wacinai Adoniya mwana wa Hagiti; ndi wacisanu Sefatiya mwana wa Abitali; 
2Samuel3:5 ndi wacisanu ndi cimodzi Itireamu wa Egila mkazi wa Davide. Awa anambadwira Davide ku Hebroni. 
2Samuel3:6 Ndipo panali, pokhala nkhondo pakati pa nyumba ya Sauli ndi nyumba ya Davide, Abineri analimbikira nyumba ya Sauli." 
2Samuel3:7 Ndipo Sauli adali ndi mkazi wamng'ono, dzina lace ndiye Rizipa, mwana wa Aya. Ndipo Isiboseti anati kwa Abineri, Unalowana bwanji ndi mkazi wamng'ono wa atate wanga?" 
2Samuel3:8 Pomwepo Abineri anapsa mtima kwambiri pa mau a Isiboseti, nati, Ndine mutu wa gam wa Yuda kodi? Lero lino ndirikucitira zokoma nyumba ya Sauli atate wanu, ndi abale ace, ndi abwenzi ace, ndipo sindinakuperekani m'dzanja la Davide, koma mundinenera lero lino za kulakwa naye mkazi uyu." 
2Samuel3:9 Mulungu alange Abineri, naonjezepo, ndikapanda kumcitira Davide monga Yehova anamlumbirira;" 
2Samuel3:10 kucotsa ufumu ku nyumba ya Sauli ndi kukhazika mpando wadfumu wa Davide pa Israyeli ndi pa Yuda, kuyambira ku Dani kufikira ku Beereseba." 
2Samuel3:11 Ndipo iye sanakhoza kuyankha Abineri mau amodzi cifukwa ca kumuopa iye. 
2Samuel3:12 Ndipo Abineri anatuma mithenga imnenere kwa Davide, nati, Dziko nla yani? natinso, Mupangane nane pangano lanu, ndipo onani, ndidzagwirizana nanu ndi kukopa Aisrayeli onse atsate inu." 
2Samuel3:13 Nati iye, Cabwino, ndidzapangana nawe; koma ndikuikira cinthu cimodzi, ndico kuti, sudzaona nkhope yanga, koma utsogole wabwera naye Mikala mwana wamkazi wa Sauli, pamene ubwera kudzaona nkhope yanga." 
2Samuel3:14 Ndipo Davide anatumiza mithenga kwa Isiboseti mwana wa Sauli, nati, Undipatse mkazi wanga Mikala amene ndinadzitomera ndi nsonga za makungu za Afilisti zana limodzi." 
2Samuel3:15 Pomwepo Isiboseti anatumiza namcotsera kwa mwamuna wace, kwa Palitieli mwana wa Laisi." 
2Samuel3:16 Ndipo mwamuna waceyo anapita naye, nanka nalira, namtsata kufikira ku Baburimu. Pomwepo Abineri ananena naye, Coka, bwerera; ndipo anabwerera." 
2Samuel3:17 Ndipo Abineri analankhula nao akuru a Israyeli nanena nao, Inu munayamba kale kufuna Davide akhale mfumu yanu;" 
2Samuel3:18 citani tsono, popeza Yehova analankhula za Davide, kuti, a Ndi dzanja la Davide mnyamata wanga ndidzapulumutsa anthu anga Aisrayeli ku dzanja la Afilisti, ndi ku dzanja la adani ao onse." 
2Samuel3:19 Ndipo Abineri analankhulanso m'kumva kwa Abenjamini; Abineri anamukanso ku Hebroni kulankhula m'makutu a Davide zonse zakukomera Aisrayeli ndi a nyumba yonse ya Benjamini. 
2Samuel3:20 Abineri nafika kwa Davide ku Hebroni, ali ndi anthu makumi awiri. Ndipo Davide anawakonzera Abineri ndi anthu okhala naye madyerero." 
2Samuel3:21 Pomwepo Abined anati kwa Davide, Ndidzanyamuka ndi kupita ndi kusonkhanitsira mfumu mbuye wanga Aisrayeli onse, kuti adzapangane nanu pangano, ndi kuti mukhale mfumu pa zonse mtima wanu uzikhumba. Comweco Davide analawirana ndi Abineri, namuka iye mumtendere." 
2Samuel3:22 Ndipo taonani, anyamata a Davide ndi Yoabu anabwera kucokera ku nkhondo yobvumbulukira, nakhala nazo zofunkha zambiri. Koma Abineri sanali ku Hebroni kwa Davide, cifukwa adalawirana naye ndipo adamuka mumtendere." 
2Samuel3:23 Tsono pofika Yoabu ndi khamu lonse anali nalo, ena anamfotokozera Yoabu nati, Abineri mwana wa Neri anabwera kwa mfumu, amene analawirana naye, namuka iye mumtendereo" 
2Samuel3:24 Pomwepo Yoabu anadza kwa mfumu, nati, Mwacitanji? Taonani, Abineri anadza kwa inu, cifukwa ninji tsono munalawirana naye kuti acokedi." 
2Samuel3:25 Mumdziwa Abineri mwana wa Neri kuti anadza kuti akunyengeni, ndi kuti adziwe kuturuka kwanu ndi kulowa kwanu, ndi kuti adziwe zonse mulikucita inu." 
2Samuel3:26 Ndipo Yoabu anaturuka kwa Davide, natumizira Abineri mithenga, amene anambweza ku citsime ca Sira. Koma Davide sanacidziwa." 
2Samuel3:27 Pofikanso Abineri ku Hebroni, Yoabu anampambutsa kupita nave pakati pa cipata kulankhula naye poduka mphepo; namgwaza pomwepo m'mimba, nafa, cifukwa ca mwazi wa Asaheli mbale wace." 
2Samuel3:28 Ndipo pambuyo pace, pakucimva Davide, anati, Ine ndi ufumu wanga tikhala osacimwira mwazi wa Abineri mwana wa Neri, nthawi zonse, pamaso pa Yehova;" 
2Samuel3:29 cilango cigwere pa mutu wa Yoabu ndi pa nyumba yonse ya atate wace; ndipo kusasoweke ku nyumba ya Yoabu munthu wakukhala nayo nthenda yakukha, kapena wakhate, kapena woyenda ndi ndodo, kapena wakugwa ndi lupanga, kapena wakusowa cakudya." 
2Samuel3:30 Motero Yoabu ndi Abisai mbale wace adapha Abineri, popeza iye adapha mbale wao Asaheli ku Gibeoni, kunkhondo." 
2Samuel3:31 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Yoabu ndi kwa anthu onse okhala naye, Ng'ambani zobvala zanu, ndi kudzimangira ziguduli m'cuuno, nimulire Abineri. Ndipo mfumu Davide anatsata cithatha." 
2Samuel3:32 Ndipo anaika Abineri ku Hebroni; ndi mfumu inakweza mau ace nilira ku manda a Abineri, nalira anthu onse." 
2Samuel3:33 Ndipo mfumu inanenera Abineri nyimbo iyi ya maliro, niti, Kodi Abineri anayenera kufa ngati citsiru?" 
2Samuel3:34 Manja anu sanamangidwa, mapazi anu sanalongedwa m'zigologolo; Monga munthu wakugwa ndi anthu oipa momwemo mudagwa inu. Ndipo anthu onse anamliranso." 
2Samuel3:35 Ndipo anthu onse anadza kudzadyetsa Davide cakudya kukali msana; koma Davide analumbira nati, Mulungu andilange naonjezepo, ngati ndilawa mkate kapena kanthu kena, lisanalowe dzuwa." 
2Samuel3:36 Ndipo anthu onse anacisamalira, ndipo cinawakomera; ziri zonse adazicita mfumu zidakomera anthu onse." 
2Samuel3:37 Momwemo anthu onse ndi Aisrayeli onse anazindikira tsiku lija kuti sikunafumira kwa mfumu kupha Abineri mwana wa Neri. 
2Samuel3:38 Ndipo mfumu inati kwa anyamata ace, Simudziwa kodi kuti kalonga, ndi munthu womveka, wagwa lero m'Israyeli?" 
2Samuel3:39 Ndipo ndikali wofoka ine lero, cinkana ndinadzozedwa mfumu; ndipo amuna awa ana a Zeruya andikakalira mtima; Yehova abwezere wocita coipa monga mwa coipa cace." 
2Samuel4:1 Ndipo pamene Isiboseti mwana wa Sauli, anamva kuti Abineri adakafera ku Hebroni, manja ace anafoka, ndi Aisrayeli onse anabvutika." 
2Samuel4:2 Ndipo Isiboseti, mwana wa Sauli anali nao amuna awiri, ndiwo atsogoleri a magulu; wina dzina lace Baana, ndi dzina la mnzace ndiye Rekabu, ndiwo ana a Rimoni wa ku Beeroti, wa ana a Benjamini, pakuti Beeroti womwe unawerengedwa wa Benjamini;" 
2Samuel4:3 ndi Abeeroti anathawira ku Gitaimu; kumeneko amakhalira kufikira lero lino. 
2Samuel4:4 Ndipo Jonatani mwana wa Sauli, anali ndi mwana wamwamuna wopunduka mapazi, Iyeyu anali wa zaka zisanu muja inamveka mbiri ya Sauli ndi Jonatani yocokera ku Jezreeli; ndipo mlezi wace adamnyamula nathawa; ndipo kunali pofulumira kuthawa, iye anagwa nakhala wopunduka. Dzina lace ndiye Mefiboseti." 
2Samuel4:5 Ndipo Rekabu ndi Baana ana a Rimoni wa ku Beeroti, anamuka, nafika ku nyumba ya Isiboseti potentha dzuwa popumula iye usana." 
2Samuel4:6 Ndipo iwo analowanso kufikira m'kati mwa nyumba, monga ngati anadzatenga tirigu; namgwaza m'mimba mwace; ndi Rekabu ndi Baana mbale wace anathawa." 
2Samuel4:7 Koma polowa iwo m'nyumbamo iye ali cigonere pakama pace m'cipindamo, anamkantha, namupha namdula mutu wace, nautenga namuka njira ya kucidikha usiku wonse," 
2Samuel4:8 Ndipo anabwera nao mutu wa Isiboseti kwa Davide ku Hebroni, nanena ndi mfumu, Taonani mutu wa Isiboseti mwana wa Sauli, mdani wanu amene anafuna moyo wanu; Yehova anabwezerera cilango mbuye wanga mfumu lero lino kwa Sauli ndi mbeu yace." 
2Samuel4:9 Ndipo Davide anayankha Rekabu ndi Baana mbale wace, ana a Rimoni wa ku Beeroti, nanena nao, Pali Yehova amene anaombola moyo wanga m'masautso onse," 
2Samuel4:10 muja munthu wina anandiuza kuti, Onani Sauli wamwalira, ndi kulingalira kuti alikubwera nao uthenga wabwino, ndinamgwira ndi kumupha ku Zikilaga, ndiyo mphotho yace ndinampatsa cifukwa ca uthenga wace." 
2Samuel4:11 Koposa kotani nanga, pamene anthu oipa anapha munthu wolungama pa kama wace m'nyumba yace yace, ndidzafunsira mwazi wace ku dzanja lanu tsopano, ndi kukucotsani ku dziko lapansi?" 
2Samuel4:12 Ndipo Davide analamulira anyamata ace, iwo nawapha, nawapacika m'mbali mwa thamanda ku Hebroni atawadula manja ndi mapazi ao. Koma mutu wa Isiboseti anautenga nauika m'manda a Abineri ku Hebroni." 
2Samuel5:1 Pomwepo mafuko onse a Israyeli anabwera kwa Davide ku Hebroni, nalankhula nati, Taonani, ife ndife pfupa lanu ndi mnofu wanu." 
2Samuel5:2 Masiku anapitawo, pamene Sauli anali mfumu yathu, inu ndinu amene munatsogolera Aisrayeli kuturuka nao ndi kubwera nao; ndipo Yehova ananena nanu, Uzidyetsa anthu anga Israyeli, ndi kukhala mtsogoleri wa Israyeli," 
2Samuel5:3 Comweco akuru onse a Israyeli anadza kwa mfumu ku Hebroni; ndipo mfumu Davide anapangana nao pangano ku Hebroni pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo anamdzoza Davide mfumu ya Israyeli. 
2Samuel5:4 Davide anali ndi zaka makumi atatu polowa iye ufumu wace, nakhala mfumu zaka makumi anai." 
2Samuel5:5 Ku Hebroni anacita ufumu pa Yuda zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri kudza miyezi isanu ndi umodzi; ndi ku Yerusalemu anacita ufumu pa Aisrayelionse ndi Ayuda omwe zaka makumi atatu mphambu zitatu. 
2Samuel5:6 Ndipo mfumu ndi anthu ace anamuka ku Yerusalemu kuyambana nao Ajebusi, nzika za dziko; ndiwo ananena kwa Davide ndi kuti, Sudzalowa muno, koma akhungu ndi opunduka adzakupitikitsa; ndiko kunena kuti, Davide sakhoza kulowa muno." 
2Samuel5:7 Cinkana anatero Davide anathyola linga la Ziyoni, lomwelo ndilo mudzi wa Davide." 
2Samuel5:8 Ndipo tsiku lija Davide anati, Ali yense akakantha Ajebusi, aponye m'madzi opuala ndi akhungu amene moyo wa Davide udana nao. Cifukwa cace akuti, Akhungu ndi opuala sangalowe m'nyumbamo." 
2Samuel5:9 Ndipo Davide anakhala m'linga mula, nalicha mudzi wa Davide. Davide namanga linga pozinga ponse kuyambira ku Milo ndi m'kati momwe." 
2Samuel5:10 Ndipo Davide anakula cikulire cifukwa Yehova Mulungu wa makamu anali naye. 
2Samuel5:11 Ndipo Hiramu mfumu ya Turo anatumiza mithenga kwa Davide ndi mitengo yamkungudza, ndi amisiri a matabwa, ndi omanga nyumba; iwo nammangira Davide nyumba." 
2Samuel5:12 Ndipo Davide anazindikira kuti Yehova anamkhazikitsa mfumu ya Israyeli, ndi kuti anakulitsa ufumu wace cifukwa ca anthu ace Israyeli." 
2Samuel5:13 Ndipo Davide anadzitengera akazi ang'ono ena ndi akazi a ulemu ena a ku Yerusalemu, atafikako kucokera ku Hebroni; ndipo anambadwira Davide ana amuna ndi akazi." 
2Samuel5:14 Maina a iwo anambadwira m'Yerusalemu ndi awa: Samua, ndi Sobabu, ndi Natani, ndi Solomo," 
2Samuel5:15 ndi Ibara ndi Elisua, ndi Nefegi ndi Yafiya;" 
2Samuel5:16 ndi Elisama ndi Eliada ndi Elifeleti. 
2Samuel5:17 Koma pamene Afilisti anamva kuti adamdzoza Davide mfumu ya Israyeli, Afilisti onse anakwera kukafuna Davide; ndipo Davide anacimva natsikira kungaka kuja." 
2Samuel5:18 Tsono Afilisti anafika natanda m'cigwa ca Refaimu. 
2Samuel5:19 Ndipo Davide anafunsira kwa Yehova nati, Kodi ndimuke kuyambana nao Afilistiwo? Mudzawapereka m'dzanja langa kodi? Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Davide, Pita, pakuti zoonadi ndidzapereka Afilisti m'dzanja lako." 
2Samuel5:20 Ndipo Davide anafika ku Baalaperazimu, nawakantha kumeneko Davideyo; nati, Yehova wathyola adani anga pamaso panga ngati madzi okamulira. Cifukwa cace analicha dzina la malowo Baalaperazimu." 
2Samuel5:21 Ndipo iwo anasiya kumeneko mafano ao; Davide ndi anyamata ace nawacotsa. 
2Samuel5:22 Ndipo Afilisti anakweranso kaciwiri, natanda m'cigwa ca Refaimu." 
2Samuel5:23 Ndipo pamene Davide anafunsira kwa Yehova, iye anati, Usamuke, koma ukawazungulire kumbuyo kuti ukawaturukire pandunji pa mkandankhuku." 
2Samuel5:24 Ndipo kudzali, pakumva iwe kuwayula ku nsonga za mkandankhuku, pomwepo fulumiratu, pakuti pamenepo Yehova waturuka pamaso pako kukakantha khamu la Afilisti." 
2Samuel5:25 Ndipo Davide anatero, monga Yehova anamlamulira, nakantha Afilisti kuyambira ku Geba kufikira ku Gezeri." 
2Samuel6:1 Pambuyo pace Davide anamemezanso osankhika onse a m'Israyeli, anthu zikwi makumiatatu." 
2Samuel6:2 Ndipo Davide ananyamuka, namuka nao anthu onse anali naye, nacokera ku Baale-Yuda natengako likasa la Mulungu, limene amachula nalo Dzinalo Dzina la Yehova wa makamu, wokhala pakati pa Akerubi." 
2Samuel6:3 Ndipo iwo ananyamulira likasa la Mulungu pa gareta watsopano, ataliturutsa m'nyumba ya Abinadabu, iri pacitunda, ndipo Uza ndi Ahio ana a Abinadabu anayendetsa ng'ombe za pa gareta watsopanoyo." 
2Samuel6:4 Poturuka nalo tsono pamodzi ndi likasa la Mulungu m'nyumba ya Abinadabu iri pacitunda, Ahio anatsogolera likasalo." 
2Samuel6:5 Ndipo Davide ndi a nyumba yonse ya Israyeli anasewera pamaso pa Yehova, ndi zoyimbira za mitundu mitundu za mlombwa, ndi azeze, ndi zisakasa ndi malingaka, ndi masece, ndi nsanje." 
2Samuel6:6 Ndipo pofika iwo ku dwale la Nakoni, Uza anatambasula dzanja lace, nacirikiza likasa la Mulungu; cifukwa ng'ombe zikadapulumuka." 
2Samuel6:7 Pomwepo mkwiyo wa Yehova udayaka pa Uza, ndipo Mulungu anamkantha pomwepo, cifukwa ca kusalingiriraku; nafa iye pomwepo pa likasa la Mulungu." 
2Samuel6:8 Ndipo kudaipira Davide, cifukwa Yehova anacita cipasulo ndi Uza; nacha-malowo Cipasulo ca Uza, kufikira lero lino." 
2Samuel6:9 Ndipo Davide anaopa Yehova tsiku lomwelo; nati, Ngati likasa la Yehova lidzafika kwa ine?" 
2Samuel6:10 Momwemo Davide sanafuna kudzitengera likasa la Yehova lidze ku mudzi wa Davide; koma Davide analipambutsira ku nyumba ya Obedi-Edomu Mgiti. 
2Samuel6:11 Ndipo a likasa la Yehova linakhala m'nyumba ya Obedi-Edomu Mgiti miyezi itatu; ndipo Yehova anadalitsa Obedi-Edomu ndi banja lace lonse. 
2Samuel6:12 Pamenepo anthu anauza mfumu Davide, kuti Yehova wadalitsa banja la Obedi-Edomu ndi zace zonse, cifukwa ca likasa la Mulungu. Comweco Davide anamuka nakatenga likasa la Mulungu ku nyumba ya Obedi-Edomu, nakwera nalo ku mudzi wa Davide, ali ndi cimwemwe." 
2Samuel6:13 Ndipo kunali, pamene akunyamula likasa la Yehova atayenda mapazi asanu ndi limodzi, iye anapha nsembe ng'ombe ndi conenepa cina." 
2Samuel6:14 Ndipo Davide anabvina ndi mphamvu yace yonse pamaso pa Yehova; Davide nadzimangirira efodi wabafuta. 
2Samuel6:15 Comweco Davide ndi a nyumba yonse ya Israyeli anakwera nalo likasa la Yehova, ndi cimwemwe ndi kulira kwa malipenga,"
