2Kings22:20 Cifukwa cace, taona, ndidzakusonkhanitsa ukhale ndi makolo ako, nudzatengedwa ulowe m'manda mwako mumtendere; ndipo sudzaona m'maso mwako coipa conse ndidzacifikitsira malo ano. Ndipo anambwezera mfumu mau." 
2Kings23:1 Pamenepo mfumu inatumiza anthu, namsonkhanitsira akulu onse a Yuda ndi a m'Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:2 Nikwera mfumu kumka ku nyumba ya Yehova, ndi amuna onse a Yuda, ndi onse okhala m'Yerusalemu pamodzi nave, ndi ansembe, ndi aneneri, ndi anthu onse ang'ono ndi akulu; nawerenga iye m'makutu mwao mau onse a m'buku la cipangano adalipeza m'nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Kings23:3 Niima mfumu paciunda, nicita pangano pamaso pa Yehova, kutsata Yehova, ndi kusunga malamulo ace, ndi mboni zace, ndi malemba ace, ndi mtima wonse ndi moyo wonse, kukhazikitsa mau a cipangano colembedwa m'buku ili; ndipo anthu onse anaimiririra panganoli." 
2Kings23:4 Ndipo mfumu inalamulira Hilikiya mkulu wa ansembe, ndi ansembe a gawo laciwiri, ndi olindira pakhomo, aturutse m'Kacisi wa Yehova zipangizo adazipangira Baala, ndi cifanizo cija, ndi khamu lonse la kuthambo; nazitentha kunja kwa Yerusalemu ku thengo la ku Kidroni, natenga phulusa lace kumka nalo ku Beteli." 
2Kings23:5 Naletsa ansembe opembedza mafano, amene mafumu a Yuda anawaika afukize zonunkhira pa misanje m'midzi ya Yuda, ndi pamalo pozinga Yerusalemu; wo omwe ofukizira zonunkhira Baala, ndi dzuwa, ndi mwezi, ndi nthanda, ndi khamu lonse la kuthambo." 
2Kings23:6 Naturutsa cifanizoco m'nyumba ya Yehova kunja kwa Yerusalemu ku mtsinje wa Kidroni; nacitenthera ku mtsinje wa Kidroni, nacipera cikhale pfumbi, naliwaza pfumbi lace pa manda a ana a anthu." 
2Kings23:7 Nagamula nyumba za anyamata adama okhala ku nyumba ya Yehova, kumene akazi anaomba nsaru zolenjeka za cifanizoco." 
2Kings23:8 Naturutsa ansembe onse m'midzi ya Yuda, nawaipitsira misanje, imene ansembe adafukizapo zonunkhira, kuyambira Geba kufikira Beereseba; napasula misanje ya kuzipata, yokhala polowera pa cipata ca Yoswa kazembe wa mudzi, yokhala ku dzanja lako lamanzere kwa cipata ca mudzi." 
2Kings23:9 Koma ansembe a misanje sanakwera kudza ku guwa la nsembe la Yehova ku Yerusalemu; koma anadya mkate wopanda cotupitsa pakati pa abale ao. 
2Kings23:10 Anawaipitsiranso Tofeti, wokhala m'cigwa ca ana a Hinomu; kuti asapitirize mmodzi yense mwana wace wamwamuna kapena wamkazi pamoto kwa Moleki." 
2Kings23:11 Nacotsanso akavalo amene mafumu a Yuda adapereka kwa dzuwa, polowera nyumba ya Yehova, ku cipinda ca Natani Meleki mdindoyo, cokhala kukhonde; natentha magareta a dzuwa ndi moto." 
2Kings23:12 Ndi maguwa a nsembe anali patsindwi pa cipinda cosanja ca Ahazi adawapanga mafumu a Yuda, ndi maguwa a nsembe adawapanga Manase m'mabwalo awiri a nyumba ya Yehova, mfumu inawagumula, niwacotsa komweko, nitaya pfumbi lao ku mtsinje wa Kidroni." 
2Kings23:13 Ndipo mfumu inawaipitsira misanje yokhala kum'mawa kwa Yerusalemu, ndiyo ya ku dzanja lamanja la phiri la cionongeko, imene Solomo mfumu ya Israyeli adaimangira Asitoreti conyansa ca Asidoni, ndi Kemosi conyansa ca Moabu, ndi Milikomu conyansa ca ana a Amoni." 
2Kings23:14 Nathyolathyola zoimiritsa, nalikha zifanizo, nadzaza pamalo pao ndi mafupa a anthu." 
2Kings23:15 Anagumulanso guwa la nsembe linali ku Beteli, ndi msanje adaumanga Yerobiamu mwana wa Nebati wolakwitsa Israyeli uja; guwa la nsembelo, ndi msanje womwe anagumula; natentha msanje, naupondereza ukhale pfumbi, natentha cifanizoco." 
2Kings23:16 Ndipo potembenuka Yosiya anaona manda okhalako kuphiri, natumiza anthu naturutsa mafupa kumanda, nawatentha pa guwa la nsembe, kuliipitsa, monga mwa mau a Yehova anawalalikira munthu wa Mulungu wolalikira izi." 
2Kings23:17 Anatinso, Cizindikilo ici ndiciona nciani? Namuuza anthu a m'mudziwo, Ndico manda a munthu wa Mulungu anafuma ku Yuda, nalalikira izi mwazicitira guwa la nsembe la ku Beteli." 
2Kings23:18 Nati iye, Mlekeni, munthu asakhudze mafupa ace. Naleka iwo mafupa ace akhale pamodzi ndi mafupa a mneneri uja anaturuka m'Samariya." 
2Kings23:19 Ndi nyumba zonse zoo mwe za ku misanje yokhala m'midzi ya Samariya, adazimanga mafumu a Israyeli kuutsa nazo mkwiyo wa Yehova, Yosiya anazicotsa, nazicitira monga mwa nchito zonse adazicita ku Beteli." 
2Kings23:20 Ndipo anapha ansembe onse a misanje okhalako pa maguwa a nsembe, natentha-mafupa a anthu pamenepo, nabwerera kumka ku Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:21 Ndipo mfumu inalamulira anthu onse, kuti, Mcitireni Yehova Mulungu wanu Paskha, monga mulembedwa m'buku ili la cipangano," 
2Kings23:22 Zedi silinacitika Paskha lotere ciyambire masiku a oweruza anaweruza Israyeli, ngakhale m'masiku a mafumu a Israyeli, kapena mafumu a Yuda;" 
2Kings23:23 koma Paskha ili analicitira Yehova m'Yerusalemu, Yosiya atakhala mfumu zaka khumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu." 
2Kings23:24 Ndiponso obwebweta, ndi openda, ndi aterafi, ndi mafano, ndi zonyansa zonse zidaoneka m'dziko la Yuda ndi m'Yerusalemu, Yosiya anazicotsa; kuti alimbitse mau a cilamulo olembedwa m'buku adalipeza Hilikiya wansembe m'nyumba ya Yehova." 
2Kings23:25 Ndipo asanabadwe iye panalibe mfumu wolingana naye, imene inatembenukira kwa Yehova ndi mtima wace wonse, ndi moyo wace wonse, ndi mphamvu yace yonse, monga mwa cilamulo conse ca Mose; atafa iyeyu sanaukanso wina wolingana naye." 
2Kings23:26 Koma Yehova sanakululuka mkwiyo wace waukuru waukali umene adapsa mtima nao pa Yuda, cifukwa ca zoputa zonse Manase adaputa nazo mkwiyo wace." 
2Kings23:27 Nati Yehova, Ndidzacotsa Yudanso pamaso panga, monga umo ndinacotsera Israyeli; ndipo ndidzataya mudzi uwu ndidausankha, ndiwo Yerusalemu, ndi nyumba ndidainena, Dzina langa lidzakhala komweko." 
2Kings23:28 Macitidwe ena tsono a Yosiya, ndi zonse anazicita, sizilembedwa kodi m'buku la macitidwe a mafumu a Yuda?" 
2Kings23:29 Masiku ace Farao-Neko mfumu ya Aigupto anakwerera mfumu ya Asuri ku mtsinje wa Firate; Ddipo mfumu Yosiya anaturuka kuponyana naye, koma anapha Yosiya ku Megido, atamuona." 
2Kings23:30 Ndipo anyamata ace anamtengera wakufa m'gareta, nabwera naye ku Yerusalemu kucokera ku Megido, namuika m'manda ace ace. Ndipo anthu a m'dziko anatenga Yoahazi mwana wa Yosiya, namdzoza, namlonga ufumu m'malo mwa atate wace. Yoahazi, Yoyakimu ndi Yoyakini mafumu oipa a Yuda." 
2Kings23:31 Yoahazi anali wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu zitatu polowa ufumu wace, nakhala mfumu miyezi itatu m'Yerusalemu ndi dzina la mace ndiye Hamutali mwana wa Yeremiya wa ku Libina." 
2Kings23:32 Nacita iye coipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga umo monse adacita makolo ace." 
2Kings23:33 Ndipo Faraoneko anammanga m'Ribila, m'dziko la Hamati; kuti asacite ufumu m'Yerusalemu; nasonkhetsa dzikoli msonkho wa matalente zana limodzi la siliva, ndi talente limodzi la golidi." 
2Kings23:34 Ndipo Farao-Neko analonga ufumu Eliyakimu mwana wa Yosiya, m'malo mwa Yosiya atate wace, nasanduliza dzina lace likhale Yoyakimu; koma anapita naye Yoahazi, nafika iye m'Aigupto, nafa komweko." 
2Kings23:35 Ndipo Yoyakimu anapereka siliva ndi golidi kwa Farao, koma anasonkhetsa dzikoli lipereke ndalamazi; monga mwa lamulo la Farao anasonkhetsa anthu a m'dziko siliva ndi golidi, yense monga mwa kuyesedwa kwace, kuzipereka kwa Farao-Neko." 
2Kings23:36 Yoyakimu anali wa zaka makumi awiri ndi zisanu polowa ufumu wace, nakhala mfumu zaka khumi ndi cimodzi m'Yerusalemu; ndi dzina la mace ndiye Zebida mwana wa Pedaya wa Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Nacita iye coipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga mwa zonse adazicita makolo ace." 
2Kings24:1 Masiku ace Nebukadinezara mfumu ya ku Babulo anakwerako, Yoyakimu nagwira mwendo wace zaka zitatu; pamenepo anatembenuka nampandukira." 
2Kings24:2 Ndipo Yehova anamtumizira magulu a Akasidi, ndi magulu a Aaramu, ndi magulu a Amoabu, ndi magulu a ana a Amoni, nawatumiza pa Yuda kuliononga, monga mwa mau a Yehova: adawanena ndi dzanja la atumiki ace aneneriwo." 
2Kings24:3 Zedi ici cinadzera Yuda mwa lamulo la Yehova, kuwacotsa pamaso pace, cifukwa ca zolakwa za Manase, monga mwa zonse anazicita;" 
2Kings24:4 ndiponso cifukwa ca mwazi wosacimwa adaukhetsa; popeza anadzaza Yerusalemu ndi mwazi wosacimwa; ndipo Yehova sanafuna kukhululukira. 
2Kings24:5 Macitidwe ena tsono a Yoyakimu, ndi zonse anazicita, sizilembedwa kodi m'buku la macitidwe a mafumu a Yuda?" 
2Kings24:6 Nagona Yoyakimu ndi makolo ace, ndipo Yoyakini mwana wace anakhala mfumu m'malo mwace." 
2Kings24:7 Koma mfumu ya Aigupto sinabwerezanso kuturuka m'dziko lace, pakuti mfumu ya Babulo idalanda kuyambira ku mtsinje wa Aigupto kufikira ku mtsinje Firate, ndilo lonse anali nalo mfumu ya Aigupto." 
2Kings24:8 Yoyakini anali wa zaka khumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu polowa iye ufumu wace, nakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu miyezi itatu; ndi dzina la mace ndiye Nehusita mwana wa Elinatani wa ku Yerusalemu." 
2Kings24:9 Nacita iye coipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga umo monse adacita atate wace." 
2Kings24:10 Nthawi ija anyamata a Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babulo anakwerera Yerusalemu, naumangira mudziwo misasa." 
2Kings24:11 Nafika Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babulo kumudzi, ataumangira misasa anyamata ace," 
2Kings24:12 ndipo Yoyakini mfumu ya Yuda anaturukira kwa mfumu ya Babulo, iye ndi mace, ndi anyamata ace, ndi akalonga ace, ndi adindo ace; mfumu ya Babulo nimtenga caka cacisanu ndi citatu ca ufumu wace." 
2Kings24:13 Naturutsa kucotsa komweko cuma conse ca nyumba ya Yehova, ndi cuma ca nyumba ya mfumu, naduladula zipangizo zonse zagolidi adazipanga Solomo mfumu ya Israyeli m'Kacisi wa Yehova, monga Yehova adanena." 
2Kings24:14 Nacoka nao a m'Yerusalemu onse, ndi akalonga onse, ndi ngwazi zonse, ndiwo andende zikwi khumi, ndi amisiri onse, ndi osula onse; sanatsala ndi mmodzi yense, koma anthu osauka okha okha a m'dziko." 
2Kings24:15 Nacoka naye Yoyakini kumka naye ku Babulo, ndi mace wa mfumu, ndi akazi a mfumu, ndi adindo ace, ndi omveka a m'dziko; anacoka nao andende ku Yerusalemu kumka nao ku Babulo." 
2Kings24:16 Ndi anthu amphamvu onse, ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi amisiri, ndi osula cikwi cimodzi, onsewo acamuna oyenera nkhondo, omwewo mfumu ya Babulo anadza nao andende ku Babulo." 
2Kings24:17 Ndipo mfumu ya Babulo analonga Mataniya mbale wa atate wace akhale mfumu m'malo mwace, nasanduliza dzina lace likhale Zedekiya." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekiya anali wa zaka makumi awiri mphambu cimodzi polowa ufumu wace, nakhala mfumu zaka khumi ndi cimodzi m'Yerusalemu; ndi dzina la mace ndiye Hamutala mwana wa Yeremiya wa ku Libina." 
2Kings24:19 Nacita iye coipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga mwa zonse adacita Yoyakimu." 
2Kings24:20 Pakuti mwa mkwiyo wa Yehova zonse zidacitika m'Yerusalemu ndi m'Yuda, mpaka adawataya pamaso pace; ndipo Zedekiya anapandukira mfumu ya Babulo." 
2Kings25:1 Ndipo kunali caka cacisanu ndi cinai ca ufumu wace, mwezi wakhumi, tsiku lakhumi la mwezi, Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babulo, iye ndi khamu lace lonse anadzera Yerusalemu, naumangira misasa, naumangira timalinga mouzinga." 
2Kings25:2 Ndipo mudziwo unazingidwa ndi timalinga mpaka caka cakhumi ndi cimodzi ca mfumu Zedekiya. 
2Kings25:3 Tsiku lacisanu ndi cinai la mwezi wacinai njala idakula m'mudzimo, panalibe cakudya kwa anthu a m'dzikomo." 
2Kings25:4 Pamenepo linga la mudziwo linagamulidwa, nathawira ankhondo onse usiku, njira ya ku cipata ca pakati pa makoma awiri, iri ku munda wa mfumu; Akasidi tsono anali pamudzi pouzinga; nimuka mfumu pa njira ya kucidikha." 
2Kings25:5 Koma nkhondo ya Akastdi inalondola mfumu, niipeza m'zidikha za Yeriko; koma nkhondo yace yonse inambalalikira." 
2Kings25:6 Ndipo anaigwira mfumu, nakwera nayo kwa mfumu ya Babulo ku Ribila, naweruza mlandu wace." 
2Kings25:7 Napha ana a Zedekiya pamaso pace, namkolowola Zedekiya maso ace, nammanga ndi maunyolo amkuwa, namuka nave ku Babulo." 
2Kings25:8 Ndipo mwezi wacisanu, tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri la mweziwo, ndico caka cakhumi mphambu cisanu ndi cinai ca mfumu Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babulo, Nebuzaradani mkuru wa olindirira, ndiye mnyamata wa mfumu ya Babulo, anadza ku Yerusalemu," 
2Kings25:9 natentha nyumba ya Yehova, ndi nyumba ya mfumu, ndi nyumba zonse za m'Yerusalemu; ndi nyumba zonse zazikuru anazitentha ndi moto." 
2Kings25:10 Ndi khamu lonse la Akasidi linali ndi mkuru wa olindirira linagumula linga la Yerusalemu louzinga. 
2Kings25:11 Ndi anthu otsalira m'mudzi, ndi opanduka akuthawira kwa mfumu ya Babulo, ndi aunyinji otsalira, Nebuzaradani mkuru wa olindirira anamuka nao andende." 
2Kings25:12 Koma mkuru wa olindirira anasiya osaukadi a m'dziko akhale osunga minda yampesa, ndi alimi," 
2Kings25:13 Ndipo zoimiritsa zamkuwa zinali m'nyumba ya Yehova, ndi maphaka ace, ndi thawale lamkuwa, zinali m'nyumba ya Yehova, Akasidi anazithyolathyola, natenga mkuwa wace kumka nao ku Babulo." 
2Kings25:14 Nacotsanso miphika, ndi zoolera, ndi zozimira nyali, ndi zipande, ndi zipangizo zonse zamkuwa zimene anatumikira nazo." 
2Kings25:15 Ndi zoparira moto, ndi mbale zowazira za golidi yekha yekha, ndi zasiliva yekha yekha, mkuru wa asilikari anazicotsa." 
2Kings25:16 Nsanamira ziwiri, thawale limodzi, ndi maphakawo adazipangira nyumba ya Yehova Solomo, mkuwa wa zipangizo izi zonse sanakhoza kuyesa kulemera kwace." 
2Kings25:17 Msinkhu wace wa nsanamira imodzi ndiwo mikono khumi mphambu isanu ndi itatu, ndi pamwamba pace mutu wamkuwa; ndi msinkhu wace wa mutuwo ndiwo mikono itatu, ndi ukonde, ndi makangaza pamutu pouzinga, zonse zamkuwa; ndi nsanamira inzace inali nazo zomwezo pamodzi ndi ukonde." 
2Kings25:18 Ndipo mkuru wa olindirira anatenga Seraya wansembe wamkulu, ndi Zefaniya wansembe waciwiri, ndi olindira pakhomo atatu;" 
2Kings25:19 natenga m'mudzimo mdindo woikidwa woyang'anira ankhondo; ndi anthu asanu a iwo openya nkhope ya mfumu opezeka m'mudzimo; ndi mlembi, kazembe wa nkhondo wolembera anthu a m'dziko; ndi anthu a m'dziko makumi asanu ndi limodzi opezeka m'mudzimo." 
2Kings25:20 Ndipo Nebuzaradani mkuru wa olindirira anawatenga, napita nao kwa mfumu ya Babulo ku Ribila." 
2Kings25:21 Niwakantha mfumu ya Babulo, niwaphera ku Ribila m'dziko la Hamati. Motero anamuka nao Ayuda andende kuwacotsa m'dziko lao." 
2Kings25:22 Koma kunena za anthu otsalira m'dziko la Yuda, amene adawasiya Nebukadinezara mfumu ya Babulo, iyeyu anamuika Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu mwana wa Safani akhale wowalamulira." 
2Kings25:23 Ndipo pamene anamva akazembe onse a makamu, iwo ndi anthu ao, kuti mfumu ya Babulo adaika Gedaliya wowalamulira, anadza kwa Gedaliya ku Mizipa, ndiwo Ismayeli mwana wa Netaniya, ndi Yohanana mwana wa Kareya, ndi Seraya mwana wa Tanumeti wa ku Netofa, ndi Yazaniya mwana wa Mmakati, iwo ndi anthu ao omwe." 
2Kings25:24 Nawalumbirira Gedaliya iwo ndi anthu ao, nanena nao, Musamaopa anyamata a Akasidi; khalani m'dziko; tumikirani mfumu ya Babulo, ndipo kudzakukomerani." 
2Kings25:25 Koma kunali mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri anadza Ismayeli mwana wa Netaniya mwana wa Elisama, wa mbumba yacifumu, ndi anthu khumi pamodzi naye, nakantha Gedaliya; nafa iye, ndi Ayuda, ndi Akasidi okhala naye ku Mizipa." 
2Kings25:26 Pamenepo ananyamuka anthu onse ang'ono ndi akuru, ndi akazembe a makamu, nadza ku Aigupto; pakuti anaopa Akasidi." 
2Kings25:27 Ndipo kunali caka ca makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri ca kumtenga ndende Yoyakini mfumu ya Yuda, mwezi wakhumi ndi ziwiri, tsiku la makumi awiri mphambu asanu ndi awiri la mwezi, Evili Merodaki mfumu ya Babulo anamuweramutsa mutu wace wa Yoyakini mfumu ya Yuda aturuke m'kaidi, caka colowa iye ufumu wace;" 
2Kings25:28 nakamba naye zokoma, namkweza mpando wace waulemu upose mipando ya mafumu anali pamodzi naye m'Babulo." 
2Kings25:29 Nasintha zobvala zace za m'kaidi, namadya iye mkate pamaso pace masiku onse a moyo wace." 
2Kings25:30 Ndi kunena za cakudya cace, panali cakudya cosalekeza copatsidwa kwa iye ndi mfumu, tsiku Uri lonse gawo lace, masiku onse a moyo wace." 
1Chronicles1:1 ADAMU, Seti, Enosi," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani, Mahalaheli, Yaredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoki, Metusela, Lameki," 
1Chronicles1:4 Nowa, Semu, Hamu, ndi Yafeti." 
1Chronicles1:5 Ana a Yafeti: Gomeri, ndi Magogi, ndi Madai, ndi Yavani, ndi Tubala, ndi Meseki, ndi Tirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Ndi ana a Gomeri: Asikenazi, Difati, ndi Togarima." 
1Chronicles1:7 Ndi ana a Yavani: Elisa, ndi Tarisisa, Kitimu, ndi Rodanimu." 
1Chronicles1:8 Ana a Hamu: Kusi, ndi Mizraimu, Puti, ndi Kanani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Ndi ana a Kusi: Seba, ndi Havila, ndi Sabita, ndi Rama, ndi Sabteka. Ndi ana a Rama: Seba, ndi Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Ndi Kusi anabala Nimmdi; iye anayamba kukhala wamphamvu pa dziko. 
1Chronicles1:11 Ndi Mizraimu anabala Aludi, ndi Aanami, ndi Alehabi, ndi Anaftuki," 
1Chronicles1:12 ndi Apatrusi, ndi Akasluki, (kumene anafuma Afilisti), ndi Akafitori." 
1Chronicles1:13 Ndi Kanani anabala Zidoni mwana wace woyamba, ndi Heti," 
1Chronicles1:14 ndi Ayebusi, ndi Aamori, ndi Agirigasi," 
1Chronicles1:15 ndi Ahivi, ndi Aariki, ndi Asini," 
1Chronicles1:16 ndi Aarivadi, ndi Azemari, ndi Ahamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Ana a Semu: Elamu, ndi Asuri, ndi Aripakisadi, ndi Ludi, ndi Aramu, ndi Uzi, ndi Huli, ndi Geteri, ndi Meseki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Ndi Aripakisadi anabala Sela; ndi Sela anabala Eberi. 
1Chronicles1:19 Ndi Eberi anabala ana amuna awiri, dzina la winayo ndiye Pelegi, popeza masiku ace dziko linagawanika; ndi dzina la mbale wace ndiye Yokitani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Ndipo Yokitani anabala Almodadi, ndi Selefi, ndi Hazaramaveti, ndi Yera;" 
1Chronicles1:21 ndi Hadoramu, ndi Uzali, ndi Dikila;" 
1Chronicles1:22 ndi Ebala, ndi Abimaele, ndi Seba," 
1Chronicles1:23 ndi Ofiri, ndi Havila, ndi Yobabi. Awa onse ndiwo ana a Yokitani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Semu, Aripakisadi, Sela;" 
1Chronicles1:25 Eberi, Pelegi, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugi, Nahori, Tera;" 
1Chronicles1:27 Abramu, (ndiye Abrahamu)." 
1Chronicles1:28 Ana a Abrahamu: Isake, ndi Ismayeli." 
1Chronicles1:29 Mibadwo yao ndi awa; woyamba wa Ismayeli Nebayoti; ndi Kedara ndi Adibeli, ndi Mibisamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misma, ndi Duma Masa," 
1Chronicles1:31 Hadada, ndi Tema, Nafisi, ndi Kedema. Awa ndi ana a Ismayeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Ndi ana a Ketura mkazi wamng'ono wa Abrahamu anabala Zimiramu, ndi Yokisani, ndi Medani, ndi Midyani, ndi Isibaki, ndi Sua. Ndi ana a Yokisani: Seba, ndi Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Ndi ana a Midyani: Efa, ndi Eferi, ndi Hanoki, ndi Abida, ndi Elidaa. Awa onse ndiwo ana a Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Ndipo Abrahamu anabala Isake. Ana a Isake: Esau, ndi Israyeli." 
1Chronicles1:35 Ana a Esau: Elifazi, Reueli, ndi Yeuzi, ndi Yolamu, ndi Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Ana a Elifazi: Teani, ndi Omara, Zefi, ndi Gatamu, Kenazi, ndi Timna, ndi Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Ana a Reueli: Nahati, Zera, Sama, ndi Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Ndi ana a Seiri: Lotani, ndi Sobala, ndi Zibeoni, ndi Ana, ndi Disoni, ndi Ezeri, ndi Disani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Ndi ana a Lotani: Hori, ndi Homamu; ndipo Timna ndiye mlongo wace wa Lotani." 
1Chronicles1:40 Ana a Sobala: Abiani, ndi Manahati, ndi Ebala, Sefi, ndi Oramu. Ndi ana a Zibeoni: Aiya ndi Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Mwana wa Ana: Disoni. Ndi ana a Disoni: Hamirani, ndi Esibani, ndi Itrani, ndi Kerani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Ana a Ezeri: Bilani, ndi Zavani, ndi Yakani. Ana a Disani: Uzi, ndi Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Mafumu tsono akucita ufumu m'dziko la Edomu, pakalibe mfumu wakucita ufumu pa ana a Israyeli, ndiwo Bela mwana wa Beori; ndi dzina la mudzi wace ndilo Dinaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Ndipo anafa Bela; ndi Yobabi mwana wa Zera wa ku Bozra anakhala mfumu m'malo mwace. 
1Chronicles1:45 Namwalira Yobabi; ndi Husamu wa ku dziko la Atemani anakhala mfumu m'malo mwace. 
1Chronicles1:46 Namwalira Husamu; ndi Hadada mwana wa Bedadi, amene anakantha Midyani ku thengo la Moabu, anakhala mfumu m'malo mwace; ndi dzina la mudzi wace ndi Aviti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Namwalira Hadada; ndi Samla wa ku Masereka anakhala mfumu m'malo mwace. 
1Chronicles1:48 Namwalira Samla: ndi Sauli wa ku Rehoboti ku nyanja anakhala mfumu m'malo mwace. 
1Chronicles1:49 Namwalira Sauli; ndi Baalahanani mwana wa Akiboro anakhala mfumu m'malo mwace. 
1Chronicles1:50 Namwalira Baalahanani; ndi Hadada anakhala mfumu m'malo mwace; ndipo dzina la mudzi wace ndi Pai; ndi dzina la mkazi wace ndiye Mehetabele mwana wamkazi wa Matradi mwana wamkazi wa Mezahabu. 
1Chronicles1:51 Namwalira Hadada. Ndipo mafumu a Edomu ndiwo mfumu Timna, mfumu Aliya, mfumu Yeteti;" 
1Chronicles1:52 mfumu Oholibama, mfumu Bla, mfumu Pimoni;" 
1Chronicles1:53 mfumu Kenazi, mfumu Temani, mfumu Mizibara;" 
1Chronicles1:54 mfumu Magadieli, mfumu Iramu. Awa ndi mafumu a Edomu." 
1Chronicles2:1 Ana a Israyeli ndi awa: Rubeni, Simeoni, Levi, ndi Yuda, Isakara, ndi Zebuluni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dani, Yosefe, ndi Benjamini, Nafitali, Gadi, ndi Aseri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Ana a Yuda ndiwo Eri, ndi Onani, ndi Sela; Batisua Mkanani anambalira atatu amenewa. Koma Eri mwana woyamba wa Yuda anali woipa pamaso pa Yehova, ndi iye anamupha." 
1Chronicles2:4 Ndi Tamari mpongozi wace anambalira Perezi ndi Zera. Ana amuna onse a Yuda ndiwo asanu. 
1Chronicles2:5 Ana a Perezi: Hezironi, ndi Hamuli." 
1Chronicles2:6 Ndi ana a Zera: Zimri, ndi Etani, ndi Hemani, ndi Kalikoli, ndi Dara; onse pamodzi ndi asanu." 
1Chronicles2:7 Ndi ana a Karmi: Akari wobvuta Israyeliyo, amene analakwira coperekedwa ciperekereco." 
1Chronicles2:8 Ndi mwana wa Etani: Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Ndi ana a Hezironi anambadwirawo: Yerameli, ndi Ramu, ndi Kelubai." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ndi Ramu anabala Aminadabu; ndi Aminadabu anabala Nasoni kalonga wa ana a Yuda; 
1Chronicles2:11 ndi Nasoni anabala Salima, ndi Salima anabala Boazi," 
1Chronicles2:12 ndi Boazi anabala Obedi, ndi Obedi anabala Jese," 
1Chronicles2:13 ndi Jese anabala mwana wace wamwamuna woyamba Eliabu, ndi Abinadabu waciwiri, ndi Simeya wacitatu," 
1Chronicles2:14 Netaneli wacinai, Radai wacisanu," 
1Chronicles2:15 Ozemu wacisanu ndi cimodzi, Davide wacisanu ndi ciwiri;" 
1Chronicles2:16 ndi alongo ao ndiwo Zeruya ndi Abigaili. Ndi ana a Zeruya: Abisai ndi Yoabu, ndi Asaheli; atatu." 
1Chronicles2:17 Ndi Abigaili anabala Amasa; ndi atate wa Amasa ndiye Yeteri M-ismayeli. 
1Chronicles2:18 Ndi Kalebi mwana wa Hezroni anabala ana ndi Azuba mkazi wace, ndi Yerioti; ndipo ana ace ndiwo Yeseri, ndi Sobabu, ndi Aridoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Namwalira Azuba, ndi Kalebi anadzitengera Efrati, amene anambalira Huri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Ndi Huri anabala Uri, ndi Uri anabala Bezaleli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Ndipo pambuyo pace Hezroni analowa kwa mwana wamkazi wa Makiri atate wa Gileadi, amene anamtenga akhale mkazi wace, pokhala wa zaka makumi asanu ndi Gmodzi mwamunayo; ndipo mkaziyo anambalira Segubu." 
1Chronicles2:22 Ndi Segubu anabala Yairi, amene anali nayo midzi makumi awiri mphambu itatu m'dziko la Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Ndi Gesuri ndi Aramu analanda midzi ya Yairi, pamodzi ndi Kenati ndi miraga yace; ndiyo midzi makumi asanu ndi limodzi. Iwo onse ndiwo ana a Makiri atate wa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Ndipo atafa Hezroni m'Kalebi-Efrata, Abiya mkazi wa Hezroni anambalira Asini atate wa Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Ndi ana a Yerameli mwana woyamba wa Hezroni ndiwo: woyamba Ramu, ndi Buna, ndi Oreni, ndi Ozemu, ndi Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Ndipo Yerameli anali naye mkazi wina dzina lace ndiye Atara, ndiye mace wa Onamu." 
1Chronicles2:27 Ndipo ana a Ramu mwana woyamba wa Yerameli ndiwo Maazi, ndi Yamini, ndi Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Ndi ana a Onamu ndiwo Samai, ndi Yada; ndi ana a Samai: Nadabu, ndi Abisuri." 
1Chronicles2:29 Ndipo dzina la mkazi wa Abisuri ndiye Abihaili; ndipo anambalira Abani, ndi Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Ndi ana a Nadabu: Seledi ndi Apaimu; koma Seledi anamwalira wopanda ana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Ndi mwana wa Apaimu: lsi. Ndi mwana wa lsi: Sesani. Ndi mwana wa Sesani: Alai. 
1Chronicles2:32 Ndi ana a Yada mbale wa Samai: Yeteri, ndi Yonatani; namwalira: Yeteri wopanda ana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Ndi ana a, Yonatani: Peleti, ndi Zaza. Ndiwo ana a Yerameli." 
1Chronicles2:34 Ndipo Sesani analibe ana amuna, koma ana akazi. Ndi Sesani anali naye mnyamata M-aigupto dzina lace ndiye Yara." 
1Chronicles2:35 Ndipo Sesani anampatsa Yara mnyamata wace mwana wace wamkazi akhale mkazi wace, ndipo anambalira Atai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Ndipo Atai anabala Natani, ndi Natani anabala Zabadi," 
1Chronicles2:37 ndi Zabadi anabala Efilali, ndi Efilali anabala Obedi," 
1Chronicles2:38 ndi Obedi anabala Yehu, ndi Yehu anabala Azariya," 
1Chronicles2:39 ndi Azariya anabala Helezi, ndi Helezi anabala Eleasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 ndi Eleasa anabala Sismai, ndi Sismai anabala Salumu," 
1Chronicles2:41 ndi Salumu anabala Yekamiya, ndi Yekamiya anabala Elisama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Ndi ana a Kalebi mbale wa Yerameli ndiwo Mesa mwana wace woyamba, ndiye atate wa Zifi; ndi ana a Maresa atate wa Hebroni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Ndi ana a Hebroni: Kora, ndi Tapuwa, ndi Rekemu, ndi Sema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Ndi Sema anabala Rahamu atate wa Yorikeamu, ndi Rekemu anabala Samai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Ndi mwana wa Samai ndiye Maoni; ndipo Maoni ndiye atate wa Betizuri. 
1Chronicles2:46 Ndi Efa mkazi wamng'ono wa Kalebi anabala Harani, ndi Moza, ndi Gazezi; ndi Harani anabala Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Ndi ana a Yadai: Regemu, ndi Yotamu, ndi Gesam, ndi Peleti, ndi Efa, ndi Safa." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maka mkazi wamng'ono wa Kalebi anabala Seberi, ndi Tirana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Iyeyu anabalanso Safa atate wa Madimana, Seva atate wa Makibena, ndi atate wa Gibeya; ndi mwana wamkazi wa Kalebi ndiye Akisa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Ana a Kalebi ndi awa: mwana wa Huri, mwana woyamba wa Efrata, Sobali atate wa Kiriate Yearimu." 
1Chronicles2:51 Salma atate wa Betelehemu, Harefi atate wa Betigaderi." 
1Chronicles2:52 Ndipo Sobali atate wa Kiriati-Yearimu anali ndi ana: Haroe, ndi Hazi Hamenukoti." 
1Chronicles2:53 Ndi mabanja a Kiriati-Yearimu: Aitiri, ndi Aputi, ndi Asumati, ndi Amisrai; Aforati ndi Aestaoli anafuma kwa iwowa." 
1Chronicles2:54 Ana a Salma: Betelehemu, ndi Anetofati, Atroti Beti Yoabu, ndi Hazi Hamanahati, ndi Azori." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ndi mabanja a alembi okhala ku Yabezi: Atirati, Asimeati, Asukati. Iwo ndiwo Akeni ofuma ku Hamati, kholo la nyumba ya Rekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 Ana Davide tsono ombadwira ku Hebroni: woyamba a Amnoni wa Ahinoamu wa ku Yezreeli, waciwiri Danieli wa Abigaili wa ku Karimeli," 
1Chronicles3:1 Ana Davide tsono ombadwira ku Hebroni: woyamba a Amnoni wa Ahinoamu wa ku Yezreeli, waciwiri Danieli wa Abigaili wa ku Karimeli," 
1Chronicles3:2 wacitatu Abisalomu mwana wa Maaka mwana wamkazi wa Talimai mfumu ya Gesuri, wacinai Adoniya mwana wa Hagiti," 
1Chronicles3:3 wacisanu Sefatiya wa Abitali, wacisanu ndi cimodzi Itreamu wa mkazi wace Egila," 
1Chronicles3:4 Anambadwira asanu ndi mmodzi m'Hebroni; ndi pomwepo anakhala mfumu zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi miyezi isanu ndi iwiri; ndi m'Yerusalemu anakhala mfumu zaka makumi atatu mphambu zitatu." 
1Chronicles3:5 Ndipo ombadwira m'Yerusalemu ndi awa: Simeya, ndi Sobabu, ndi Natani, ndi Solomo, anai a Batisuwa mwana wamkazi wa Amieli;" 
1Chronicles3:6 ndi Ibara, ndi Elisama, ndi Elifeleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 ndi Noga, ndi Nefegi, ndi Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 ndi Elisama, ndi Eliada, ndi Elifeleti, asanu ndi anai." 
1Chronicles3:9 Onsewa ndiwo ana a Davide, pamodzi ndi ana a akazi ang'ono; ndipo Tamara ndiye mlongo wao." 
1Chronicles3:10 Ndipo mwana wa Solomo ndiye Rehabiamu, Abiya mwana wace, Asa mwana wace, Yeo hosafati mwana wace," 
1Chronicles3:11 Yoramu mwana wace, Ahaziya mwana wace, Yoasi mwana wace," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amaziya mwana wace, Azariya mwana wace, Yotamu mwana wace," 
1Chronicles3:13 Ahazi mwana wace, Hezekiya mwana wace, Manase mwana wace," 
1Chronicles3:14 Amoni mwana wace, Yosiya mwana wace." 
1Chronicles3:15 Ndi ana a Yosiya: woyamba Yohanana, waciwiri Yehoyakimu, wacitatu Zedekiya, wacinai Salumu." 
1Chronicles3:16 Ndi ana a Yehoyakimu: Yekoniya mwana wace, Zedekiya mwana wace." 
1Chronicles3:17 Ndi mwana wa Yekoniya: Asiri, Sealitiyeli mwana wace," 
1Chronicles3:18 ndi Malikiramu, ndi Pedaya, ndi Senazara, Yekamiya, Hosama, Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Ndi ana a Pedaya: Zerubabeli, ndi Simei; ndi ana a Zerubabeli: Mesulamu, ndi Hananiya; ndipo Selomiti ndiye mlongo wao," 
1Chronicles3:20 ndi Hasuba, ndi Oheli, ndi Berekiya, ndi Hasadiya, ndi Yusabi-hesedi; asanu." 
1Chronicles3:21 Ndi ana a Hananiya: Pelatiya, ndi Yesaya, ana a Refaya, ana a Arinani, ana a Obadiya, ana a Sekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Ndi mwana wa Sekaniya: Semaya; ndi ana a Semaya: Hatusi, ndi Igali, ndi Bariya, ndi Neariya, ndi Safati; asanu ndi mmodzi." 
1Chronicles3:23 Ndi ana a Neariya: Eliunai, ndi Hizikiya, ndi Azrikamu, atatu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Ndi ana a Eliunai: Hodavia, ndi Eliasibu, ndi Pelaya, ndi Akubu, ndi Yohanana, ndi Delaya, ndi Anani, asanu ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles4:1 Ana a Yuda: Perezi, Hezroni, ndi Karmi, ndi Huri, ndi Sobala." 
1Chronicles4:2 Ndipo Reaya mwana wa Sobala anabala Yahati; ndi Yahati anabala Ahumai, ndi Lahadi. Iwo ndiwo mabanja a Azorati." 
1Chronicles4:3 Iwo ndiwo a atate wa Etamu: Yezreeli, ndi Isma, ndi Idibasi; ndipo dzina la mlongo wao ndiye Hazeleleponi," 
1Chronicles4:4 ndi Penueli atate wa Gedoro, ndi Ezeri atate wa Husa. Awa ndi ana a Huri woyamba wa Efrata atate wa Betelehemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ndipo Asuri atate wa Tekowa anali nao akazi awiri: Hela, ndi Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Ndi Naara anambalira Ahuzamu, ndi Heferi, ndi Temeni, ndi Hahastario Iwo ndiwo ana a Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Ndi ana a Hela ndiwo Zereti, lzara, ndi Etinani." 
1Chronicles4:8 Ndipo Hakozi anabala Anubu, ndi Zobeba, ndi mabanja a Ahareli mwana wa Harumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Ndipo Yabezi analemekezedwa koposa abale ace; ndi mace anamucha dzina lace Yabezi, ndi kuti, Popeza ndambala mwaululu." 
1Chronicles4:10 Ndipo Yabezi anaitana kwa Mulungu wa Israyeli, ndi kuti, Mundidalitse ndithu, ndi kukulitsa malire anga; ndi dzanja lanu likhale ndi ine, nimundisunge, kuti coipa cisandibvute. Ndipo Mulungu anafikitsa copempha iye." 
1Chronicles4:11 Ndipo Kelubu mbale wa Sua anabala Mehiri, ndiye atate wa Esitoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Ndi Esitoni anabala Betirafa, ndi Paseya, ndi Tehina atate wa Irinahasi. Awa ndi anthu a Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Ndi ana a Kenazi: Otiniyeli, ndi Seraya; ndi mwana wa Otmiyeh: Hatati." 
1Chronicles4:14 Ndipo Meonotai anabala Ofra; ndi Seraya anabala Yoabu atate wa Geharasimu; popeza iwo ndiwo amisiri. 
1Chronicles4:15 Ndi ana a Kalebi mwana wa Yefune: Iru, Ela, ndi Naamu; ndi ana a Ela, ndi Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Ndi ana a Yehaleleli: Ziti, ndi Zifa, Tiriya, ndi Asareli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ndi ana a Ezra: Yeteri, ndi Meredi, ndi Eferi, ndi Yaloni; ndipo anabala Miriamu, ndi Samai, ndi Isba atate wa Esitemowa." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ndi ana a Ezra: Yeteri, ndi Meredi, ndi Eferi, ndi Yaloni; ndipo anabala Miriamu, ndi Samai, ndi Isba atate wa Esitemowa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Ndi mkazi wace Myuda anabala Yeredi atate wa Gedoro, ndi Heberi atate wa Soko, ndi Yekutiyeli atate wa Zanowa. Ndipo awa ndi ana a Bitiya mwana wamkazi wa Farao, amene Meredi anamtenga." 
1Chronicles4:19 Ndi ana a mkazi wa Hodiya, mlongo wace wa Nahamu, ndiwo atate a Kula Mgarimi ndi Esitemowa Mmaaka." 
1Chronicles4:20 Ndi ana a Simoni; Amnoni, ndi Rina, Benehanana, ndi Tiloni. Ndi ana a lsi: Zoheti, ndi Benzoheti." 
1Chronicles4:21 Ana a Sela mwana wa Yuda: Eri atate wa Leka, ndi Laada atate wa Maresa, ndi mabanja a nyumba ya iwo oomba bafuta wa thonje losansitsa a nyumba ya Asibeya," 
1Chronicles4:22 ndi Yokimu, ndi amuna a Kozeba, ndi Yoasi, ndi Sarafa wolamulira m'Moabu, ndi Yasubilehemu; koma mau awa ndiwo a kale lomwe." 
1Chronicles4:23 Iwo ndiwo oumba mbiya, ndi okhala m'Netaimu, ndi m'Gedera; anakhala komweko ndi mfumu m'nchito yace." 
1Chronicles4:24 Ana a Simeoni: Nemueli, ndi Yamini, Yaribi, Zera, Sauli," 
1Chronicles4:25 Salumu mwana wace, Mibsamu mwana wace, Misma mwana wace." 
1Chronicles4:26 Ndi ana a Misma: Hamueli mwana wace, Zakuri mwana wace, Simei mwana wace." 
1Chronicles4:27 Ndipo Simei anali nao ana amuna khumi mphambu asanu ndi mmodzi, ndi ana akazi asanu ndi mmodzi; koma abale ace analibe ana ambiri, ndi banja lao lonse silinacurukitsa ngati ana a Yuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Ndipo anakhala ku Beereseba, ndi Molada, ndi Hazarasuala," 
1Chronicles4:29 ndi ku Bila, ndi ku Ezemu, ndi ku Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 ndi ku Betueli, ndi ku Horima, ndi ku Zikilaga," 
1Chronicles4:31 ndi ku Betimarikaboti, ndi ku Hazarasusimu, ndi ku Betibiri, ndi ku Saraimu. Iyi ndi midzi yao, mpaka ufumu wa Davide, pamodzi ndi miraga yao." 
1Chronicles4:32 Etamu, ndi Aini, Rimoni, ndi Tokeni, ndi Asani, midzi isanu;" 
1Chronicles4:33 ndi miraga yao yonse pozungulira pace pa midzi yomweyi, mpaka Baala. Apo ndi pokhala pao ndipo ali nao mawerengedwe a maina ao." 
1Chronicles4:34 Ndi Mesobabu, ndi Yamleki, ndi Yosa mwana wa Amaziya," 
1Chronicles4:35 ndi Yoeli, ndi Yehu mwana wa Yosibiya, mwana wa Seraya, mwana wa Asieli;" 
1Chronicles4:36 ndi Eliunai, ndi Yaakoba, ndi Yesohaya, ndi Asaya, ndi Adieli, ndi Yesimieli, ndi Benaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 ndi Ziza mwana wa Sifi, mwana wa Aloni, mwana wa Yedaya, mwana wa Simri, mwana wa Semaya;" 
1Chronicles4:38 awa ochedwa maina ndiwo akalonga m'mabanja ao, ndi nyumba za makolo ao zinacuruka kwambiri." 
1Chronicles4:39 Ndipo anamuka mpaka polowera ku Gedoro kum'mawa kwa cigwa, kufunafuna podyetsa zoweta zao." 
1Chronicles4:40 Ndipo anapeza podyetsa ponenepetsa ndi pabwino, ndipo dzikoli ndi lacitando ndi lndikha ndi losungikamo, pakuti okhalako kale ndiwo a Hamu." 
1Chronicles4:41 Iwo tsono olembedwa maina anadza masiku a Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda, nakantha mahema ao ndi zokhalamo zao, naziononga konse mpaka lero, nakhala m'malo mwao; popeza panali podyetsa zoweta zao pamenepo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ndipo ena a iwowa a ana a Simeoni, amuna mazana asanu, anamka ku phiri la Seiri; akuwatsogolera ndiwo Pelatiya, ndi Neariya, ndi Refaya, ndi Uzieli; ana a lsi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Nakantha otsala a Aamaleki adapulumukawo, nakhala komweko mpaka lero lino." 
1Chronicles5:1 Ndipo ana a Rubeni mwana woyamba wa Israyeli, (pakuti ndiye mwana woyamba; koma popeza anaipsa kama wa atate wace ukulu wace unapatsidwa kwa ana a Yosefe mwana wa Israyeli, koma m'buku la cibadwidwe asayesedwe monga mwa ukulu wace." 
1Chronicles5:2 Pakuti Yuda anakula mphamvu mwa abale ace, ndi mtsogoleri anafuma kwa iyeyu, koma ukulu ngwa Yosefe);" 
1Chronicles5:3 ana a Rubeni mwana woyamba wa Israyeli: Hanoki, ndi Palu, Hezroni, ndi Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Ana a Yoeli: Semaya mwana wace, Gogi mwana wace, Simei mwana wace," 
1Chronicles5:5 Mika mwana wace, Reaya mwana wace, Baala mwana wace," 
1Chronicles5:6 Beera mwana wace, amene Tigilati Pilesere wa ku Asuri anamtenga ndende; ndiye kalonga wa Arubeni." 
1Chronicles5:7 Ndi abale ace monga mwa mabanja ao, powerenga cibadwidwe ca mibadwo yao: akuru ndiwo Yeyeli, ndi Zekariya," 
1Chronicles5:8 ndi Bela mwana wa Azazi, mwana wa Sema, mwana wa Yoeli, wokhala ku Aroeri, ndi kufikira ku Nebo ndi Baala-meoni;" 
1Chronicles5:9 ndi kum'mawa anakhala mpaka polowera kucipululu kuyambira mtsinje wa Firate; pakuti zoweta zao zinacuruka m'dziko la Gileadi. 
1Chronicles5:10 Ndipo masiku a Sauli anagwirana nkhondo ndi Ahagiri, amene adagwa ndi dzanja lao; ndipo anakhala m'mahema mwao kum'mawa konse kwa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ndi ana a Gadi anakhala pandunji pao m'dziko la Basana mpaka Saleka: 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoeli mkuru wao, ndi Safamu waciwiri, ndi Yanai, ndi Safati m'Basana;" 
1Chronicles5:13 ndi abale ao a; nyumba za makolo ao: Mikaeli, ndi Mesulamu, ndi Seba, ndi Yorai, ndi Yakani, ndi Ziya, ndi Eberi; asanu ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles5:14 Awa ndi ana a Abihaili, mwana wa Huri, mwana wa Yarowa, mwana wa Gileadi, mwana wa Mikaeli, mwana wa Yesisai, mwana wa Yado, mwana wa Buzi," 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi mwana wa Abdieli, mwana wa Guni, ndiye mkulu wa nyumba za makolo ao." 
1Chronicles5:16 Ndipo anakhala m'Gileadi m'Basana, ndi m'midzi yace, ndi podyetsa pace ponse pa Saroni, mpaka malire ao." 
1Chronicles5:17 Onsewo anawerengedwa monga mwa mabuku a cibadwidwe cao, masiku a Yotamu mfumu ya Yuda, ndi m'masiku a Yerobiamu mfumu ya Israyeli." 
1Chronicles5:18 Ana a Rubeni, ndi a Gadi, ndi limodzi la magawo awiri a pfuko la Manase, ngwazi, amuna akugwira cikopa ndi lupanga, ndi kuponya mibvi, ozerewera nkhondo, ndiwo zikwi makumi anai mphambu zinai mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi akuturuka kunkhondo." 
1Chronicles5:19 Ndipo anagwirana nkhondo ndi Ahagari, ndi Yet uri, ndi Nafisi, ndi Nodabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Ndipo anathandizidwa polimbana nao; ndi Ahagari anaperekedwa m'dzanja lao, ndi onse anali nao; pakuti anapfuulira kwa Mulungu pomenyana nao, ndipo anapembedzeka nao, popeza anamkhulupirira iye." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ndipo analanda zoweta zao, ngamila zao zikwi makumi asanu, ndi nkhosa zikwi mazana awiri ndi makumi asanu, ndi aburu zikwi ziwiri, ndi amuna zikwi zana limodzi." 
1Chronicles5:22 Pakuti adagwa, nafa ambiri, popeza nkhondoyi nja Mulungu. Ndipo anakhala m'malo mwao mpaka anatengedwa ndende." 
1Chronicles5:23 Ndi ana a limodzi la magawo awiri a pfuko la Manase anakhala m'dziko; anacuruka kuyambira Basana kufikira Baala Herimoni, ndi Seniri, ndi phiri la Herimoni." 
1Chronicles5:24 Ndipo akuru a nyumba za makolo ao ndi awa: Eferi, ndi lsi, ndi Elieli, ndi Azrieli, ndi Yeremiya, ndi Hodaviya, ndi Yadieli, anthu amphamvu ndithu, anthu omveka, akulu a nyumba za makolo ao." 
1Chronicles5:25 Koma analakwira Mulungu wa makolo ao, nacita cigololo, ndi kutsata milungu ya mitundu ya anthu a m'dziko, amene Mulungu adaononga pamaso pao." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ndipo Mulungu wa Israyeli anautsa mzimu wa Puli mfumu ya Asuri, ndi mzimu wa Tigilati Pilesere mfumu ya Asuri, ndiye anawatenga ndende; ndiwo Arubeni, ndi Agadi, ndi pfuko la Manase logawika pakati, nafika nao ku Hala, ndi Habori, ndi Hara ndi ku mtsinje wa Gozani, mpaka lero lino." 
1Chronicles6:1 Ana a Levi: Gerisomu, Kohati, ndi Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Ndi ana a Kohati: Amramu, Izara, ndi Hebroni, ndi Uzieli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Ndi ana a Amramu: Aroni, ndi Mose, ndi Miriamu. Ndi ana a Aroni: Nadabu, ndi Abihu, Eleazara, ndi Itamara." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleazara anabala Pinehasi, Pinehasi anabala Abisua," 
1Chronicles6:5 ndi Abisua anabala Buki, ndi Buki anabala Uzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 ndi Uzi anabala Zerahiya, ndi Zerahiya anabala Merayoti," 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayoti anabala Amariya, ndi Amariya anabala Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:8 ndi Ahitubu anabala Zadoki, ndi Zadoki anabala Ahimaazi," 
1Chronicles6:9 ndi Ahimaazi anabala Azariya, ndi Azariya anabala Yohanani," 
1Chronicles6:10 ndi Yohanani anabala Azariya (ndiye amene anacita nchito ya nsembe m'nyumba anaimanga Solomo m'Yerusalemu)," 
1Chronicles6:11 ndi Azariya anabala Amariya, ndi Amariya anabala Ahitubu," 
1Chronicles6:12 ndi Ahitubu anabala Zadoki, ndi Zadoki anabala Salumu," 
1Chronicles6:13 ndi Salumu anabala Hilikiya, ndi Hilikiya anabala Azariya," 
1Chronicles6:14 ndi Azariya anabala Seraya, ndi Seraya anabala Yehozadaki," 
1Chronicles6:15 ndi Yehozadaki analowa undende muja Yehova anatenga ndende Yuda ndi Yerusalemu ndi dzanja la Nebukadinezara. 
1Chronicles6:16 Ana a Levi: Gerisomu, Kohati ndi Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Ndipo maina a ana a Gerisomu ndi awa: Libni, ndi Simei." 
1Chronicles6:18 Ndipo ana a Kohati ndiwo Amramu, ndi lzara, ndi Hebroni, ndi Uzieli." 
1Chronicles6:19 Ana a Merari: Mali ndi Musi. Ndi mabanja a Alevi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao ndi awa. 
1Chronicles6:20 Wa Gerisomu: Libni mwana wace, Yahati mwana wace, Zina mwana wace," 
1Chronicles6:21 Yowa mwana wace, Ido mwana wace, Zera mwana wace, Yeaterai mwana wace." 
1Chronicles6:22 Ana a Kohati: Aminadabu mwana wace, Kora mwana wace, Asiri mwana wace," 
1Chronicles6:23 Elikana mwana wace, ndi Ebiasafu mwana wace, ndi Asiri mwana wace," 
1Chronicles6:24 Tahati mwana wace, Urieli mwana ware, Uziya mwana wace, ndi Sauli mwana wace." 
1Chronicles6:25 Ndi ana a Elikana: Amasai, ndi Ahimoti." 
1Chronicles6:26 Elikana: ana a Elikana Zofai mwana wace, ndi Nahati mwana wace," 
1Chronicles6:27 Eliabu mwana wace, Yerohamu mwana wace, Elikana mwana wace." 
1Chronicles6:28 Ndi ana a Samueli: woyamba Yoeli, ndi waciwiri Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:29 Ana a Merari: Mali, Libni mwana wace, Simei mwana wace, Uza mwana wace," 
1Chronicles6:30 Simeya mwana wace, Hagiya mwana wace, Asaya mwana wace." 
1Chronicles6:31 Ndipo iwo aja Davide anawaimika a udindo wa nyimbo m'nyumba ya Yehova, litafikira kupumula likasalo, ndi awa." 
1Chronicles6:32 Ndipo anatumikira ndi kuyimba pakhomo pa kacisi wa cihema cokomanako mpaka Solomo adamanga nyumba ya Yehova m'Yerusalemu, naimirira m'utumiki wao monga mwa malongosoledwe ao." 
1Chronicles6:33 Ndipo oimirirawo, ndi ana ao, ndi awa: a ana a Akohati, Hemani woyimbayo, mwana wa Yoeli, mwana wa Samueli," 
1Chronicles6:34 mwana wa Elikana, mwana wa Yerohamu, mwana wa Elieli, mwana wa Towa," 
1Chronicles6:35 mwana wa Zufi, mwana wa Elikana, mwana wa Mahati, mwana wa Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 mwana wa Elikana, mwana wa Yoeli, mwana wa Azariya, mwana wa Zefaniya," 
1Chronicles6:37 mwana wa Tahati, mwana wa Asiri, mwana wa Abiasafu, mwana wa Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 mwana wa Izara, mwana wa Kohati, mwana wa Levi, mwana wa Israyeli." 
1Chronicles6:39 Ndi mbale wace Asafu wokhala ku dzanja lace lamanja, ndiye Asafu mwana wa Berekiya, mwana wa Simeya," 
1Chronicles6:40 mwana wa Mikaeli, mwana wa Baaseya, mwana wa Malikiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 mwana wa Etini, mwana wa Zera, mwana wa Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 mwana wal Edani, mwana wa Zima, mwana wa Simeyi," 
1Chronicles6:43 mwana wa Yabati, mwana wa Gerisomu, mwana wa Levi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Ndi ku dzanja lamanzere abale ao ana a Merari: Etani mwana wa Kisi, mwana wa Abidi, mwana wa Maluki," 
1Chronicles6:45 mwana wa Hasabiya, mwana wa Amaziya, mwana wa Hilikiya," 
1Chronicles6:46 mwana wa Amzi, mwana wa Bani, mwana wa Semeri," 
1Chronicles6:47 mwana wa Mali, mwana wa Musi, mwana wa Merari, mwana wa Levi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Ndi abale ao Alevi anaikidwa acite za utumiki ziti zonse za kacisi wa nyumba ya Mulungu. 
1Chronicles6:49 Koma Aroni ndi ana ace adafofukiza pa guwa la nsembe yopsereza, ndi pa guwa la nsembe yofukiza, cifukwa ca nchito yonse ya malo opatulikitsa, ndi kucitira Israyeli cowatetezera, monga mwa zonse Mose mtumiki wa Mulungu adawauza." 
1Chronicles6:50 Ndipo ana a Aroni ndiwo Eleazara mwana wace, Pinehasi mwana wace, Abisua mwana wace," 
1Chronicles6:51 Buki mwana wace, Uzi mwana wace, Zerobiya mwana wace," 
1Chronicles6:52 Merayoti mwana wace, Amariya mwana wace, Ahitubu mwana wace," 
1Chronicles6:53 Zadoki mwana wace, Ahimaazi mwana wace." 
1Chronicles6:54 Pokhala pao tsono monga mwa madera ao m'malire mwao ndi awa: kwa ana a Aroni a mabanja a Akobati, pakuti maere oyamba adagwera iwowa," 
1Chronicles6:55 kwa iwo anapereka Hebroni m'dziko la Yuda, ndi podyetsa pace pozungulira pace;" 
1Chronicles6:56 koma minda ya mudzi ndi miraga yace anapatsa Kalebi mwana wa Yefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Ndi kwa ana a Aroni anapereka midzi yopulumukirako: Hebroni, ndi Libina ndi mabusa ace, ndi Yatiri, ndi Esitemowa ndi mabusa ace," 
1Chronicles6:58 ndi Hileni ndi mabusa ace, ndi Debiri ndi mabusa ace," 
1Chronicles6:59 ndi Asani ndi mabusa ace, ndi Betesemesi ndi mabusa ace;" 
1Chronicles6:60 ndi ku pfuko la Benjamini Geba ndi mabusa ace, ndi Alemeti ndi mabusa ace, ndi Anatoti ndi mabusa ace. Midzi yao yonse mwa mabanja ao ndiyo midzi khumi ndi itatu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Ndipo otsala a ana a Kohati analandira mwa maere, motapa pa mabanja a pfuko, pa pfuko la Manase logawika pakati, midzi khumi." 
1Chronicles6:62 Ndi kwa ana a Gerisomu monga mwa mabanja ao, motapa pa pfuko la Isakara, ndi pa pfuko la Aseri, ndi pa pfuko la Nafitali, ndi pa pfuko la Manase m'Basana, midzi khumi ndi itatu." 
1Chronicles6:63 Ana a Merari analandira mwa maere monga mwa mabanja ao, motapa pa pfuko la Rubeni, ndi pa pfuko la Gadi, ndi pa pfuko la Zebuluni, midzi khumi ndi iwiri." 
1Chronicles6:64 Ndipo ana a Israyeli anapatsa Alevi midzi ndi mabusa ao. 
1Chronicles6:65 Ndipo anapatsa mwamaere, motapa pa pfuko la ana a Yuda, ndi pa pfuko la Simeoni, ndi pa pfuko la ana a Benjamini, midzi iyi yochulidwa maina ao." 
1Chronicles6:66 Ndi mabanja ena a ana a Kohati anali nayo midzi ya malire ao, yotapa pa pfuko la Efraimu." 
1Chronicles6:67 Ndipo anawapatsa midzi yopulumukiramo: Sekemu ndi mabusa ace ku mapiri a Efraimu, Gezeri ndi mabusa ace," 
1Chronicles6:68 ndi Yokimeamu ndi mabusa ace, ndi Betihoroni ndi mabusa ace," 
1Chronicles6:69 ndi Ayaloni ndi mabusa ace, ndi Gatirimoni ndi mabusa ace," 
1Chronicles6:70 ndi motapa pa pfuko la Manase logawika pakati, Aneri ndi mabusa ace, ndi Bileamu ndi mabusa ace, kwa otsala a mabanja a ana a Kohati." 
1Chronicles6:71 Ana a Gerisomu analandira motapa pa mabanja a pfuko la Manase logawika pakati, Golani m'Basana ndi mabusa ace, ndi Asitaroti ndi mabusa ace;" 
1Chronicles6:72 ndi motapa pa pfuko la Isakara, Kedesi ndi mabusa ace, Daberati ndi mabusa ace," 
1Chronicles6:73 ndi Ramoti ndi mabusa ace, ndi Anemu ndi mabusa ace;" 
1Chronicles6:74 ndi motapa pa pfuko la Aseri, Masala ndi mabusa ace, ndi Abidoni ndi mabusa ace," 
1Chronicles6:75 ndi Hukoki ndi mabusa ace, ndi Rehobu ndi mabusa ace;" 
1Chronicles6:76 ndi motapa pa pfuko la Nafitali, Kadesi m'Galileya ndi mabusa ace, ndi Hamoni ndi mabusa ace, ndi Kiriyataimu ndi mabusa ace." 
1Chronicles6:77 Otsala a Alevi analandira, motapa pa pfuko la Zebuluni, Rimono ndi mabusa ace, Tabora ndi mabusa ace;" 
1Chronicles6:78 ndi tsidya lija la Yordano kum'mawa kwa Yordano analandira, motapa pa pfuko la Rubeni, Bezeri m'cipululu ndi mabusa ace, ndi Yaza ndi mabusa ace," 
1Chronicles6:79 ndi Kedemoti ndi mabusa ace, ndi Mefati ndi mabusa ace;" 
1Chronicles6:80 ndi motapa m'pfuko la Gadi, Ramoti m'Gileadi ndi mabusa ace, ndi Mahanaimu ndi mabusa ace," 
1Chronicles6:81 ndi Hezboni ndi mabusa ace, ndi Yazeri ndi mabusa ace." 
1Chronicles7:1 Ana a Isakara ndiwo Tola, ndi Pua, Yasubu ndi Simironi; anai." 
1Chronicles7:2 Ndi ana a Tola: Uzi, ndi Repaya, ndi Yerieli, ndi Yamai, ndi Ibsamu, ndi Semueli, akuru a nyumba za makolo; ao ndiwo a Tola, ngwazi zamphamvu, m'mibadwo yao; kuwerenga kwao masiku a Davide ndiko zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi." 
1Chronicles7:3 Ndi mwana wa Uzi: Izrahiya; ndi ana a Izrahiya: Mikaeli, ndi Obadiya, ndi Yoeli, ndi Isiya; onse asanuwa ndiwo akuru." 
1Chronicles7:4 Ndi pamodzi nao mwa mibadwo yao, mwa nyumba za makolo ao, panali magulu a nkhondo zikwi makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi cimodzi, popeza anacuruka akazi ao ndi ana ao." 
1Chronicles7:5 Ndi abale ao mwa mabanja onse a Isakara, ngwazi zamphamvu, oyesedwa mwa cibadwidwe cao, onsewa ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi zitatu mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
1Chronicles7:6 Ana a Benjamini ndiwo Bela, ndi Bekeri, ndi Yedyaeli, atatu." 
1Chronicles7:7 Ndi ana a Bela: Ezboni, ndi Uzi, ndi Uzieli, ndi Yerimoti, ndi hi, asanu; akuru a nyumba za makolo ao, ngwazi zamphamvu, owerengedwa m'mabuku a cibadwidwe zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri kudza makumi atatu ndi anai." 
1Chronicles7:8 Ndi ana a Bekeri: Zemira, ndi Yoasi, ndi Eliezeri, ndi Eliunai, ndi Omri, ndi Yeremoti, ndi Abiya, ndi Anatoti, ndi Alemeti. Onsewa ndiwo ana a Bekeri." 
1Chronicles7:9 Ndipo anayesedwa mwa cibadwidwe cao, mwa mibadwo yao, akulu a nyumba za makolo ao, ngwazi zamphamvu zikwi makumi awiri mphambu mazana awiri." 
1Chronicles7:10 Ndi mwana wa Yedyaeli: Bilani; ndi ana a Bilani: Yeusi, ndi Benjamini, ndi Ehudi, ndi Kenana, ndi Zetani, ndi Tarasisi, ndi Ahisabara." 
1Chronicles7:11 Onsewa ndiwo ana a Yedyaeli; ndiwo akuru a nyumba za makolo ao, ngwazi zamphamvu zikwi khumi mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri kudza mazana awiri akuturuka kugulu kunkhondo." 
1Chronicles7:12 Sufimu yemwe ndi Hupimu ana a Iri, ndi Husimu mwana wa Aheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Ana a Nafuali: Yazieli, ndi Guni, ndi Yezeri, ndi Salumu, ana a Bila." 
1Chronicles7:14 Ana a Manase ndiwo Asrieli amene mkazi wace anambala, Koma mkazi wace wamng'ono Maramu anabala Makiri atate wa Gileadi;" 
1Chronicles7:15 ndi Makiri anadzitengera mkazi, mlongo wace wa Hupimu ndi Supimu, dzina lace ndiye Maaka. Ndipo dzina la mwana waciwiri wa Manase ndiye Tselofekadi. Ndi Tselofekadi anali ndi ana akazi." 
1Chronicles7:16 Ndi Maaka mkazi wa Makiri anabala mwana, namucha dzina lace Peresi, ndi dzina la mbale wace ndiye Seresi, ndi ana ace ndiwo Ulamu, ndi Rakemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ndi mwana wa Ulamu: Bedani; ndiwo ana a Gileadi mwana wa Makiri mwana wa Manase. 
1Chronicles7:18 Ndi mlongo wace Hamoleketi anabala Isodi, ndi Abiezeri, ndi Mala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Ndi ana a Semida ndiwo Ahiani, ndi Sekemu, ndi Liki, ndi Aniamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Ndi ana a Efraimu: Sutera, ndi Beredi mwana wace, ndi Tahati mwana wace, ndi Ekada mwana wace, ndi Tahati mwana wace," 
1Chronicles7:21 ndi Zabadi mwana wace, ndi Sutela mwana wace, ndi Ezeri, ndi Eleadi, amene anthu a Gadi obadwa m'dziko anamupha, popeza anatsikira kukalanda zoweta zao." 
1Chronicles7:22 Ndipo Efraimu atate wao, anacita maliro masiku ambiri, ndi abale ace anadza kudzamtonthoza mtima." 
1Chronicles7:23 Ndipo analowa kwa mkazi wace, naima iye, nabala mwana, namucha dzina lace Beriya, popeza m'nyumba mwace mudaipa." 
1Chronicles7:24 Ndipo mwana wace wamkazi ndiye Seera, amene anamanga Beti-horoni wa kunsi, ndi Beti-horoni wa kumtunda, ndi Uzeniseera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Ndipo Refa anali mwana wace, ndi Resefe, ndi Tela mwana wace, ndi Tahani mwana wace," 
1Chronicles7:26 Ladana mwana wace, Amihudi mwana wace, Elisamu mwana wace," 
1Chronicles7:27 Nuni mwana wace, Yoswa mwana wace." 
1Chronicles7:28 Ndipo dziko lao, ndi pokhala pao ndizo Beteli ndi miraga yace, ndi kum'mawa Narani, ndi kumadzulo Gezeri ndi miraga yace, ndi Sekemu ndi miraga yace, mpaka Aza ndi miraga yace;" 
1Chronicles7:29 ndi kumalire a ana a Manase; Beteseani ndi miraga yace, Taanaki ndi miraga yace, Megido ndi miraga yace, Dora ndi miraga yace. M'menemo anakhala ana a Yosefe mwana wa Israyeli." 
1Chronicles7:30 Ana a Aseri: Imna, ndi Isva, ndi Isvi, ndi Beriya, ndi Sera mlongo wao." 
1Chronicles7:31 Ndi ana a Beriya: Heberi, ndi Malikieli, ndiye atate wa Birizaiti." 
1Chronicles7:32 Ndi Heberi anabala Yafteti, ndi Someri, ndi Hotamu, ndi Suwa mlongo wao." 
1Chronicles7:33 Ndi ana a Yafteti: Pasaki, ndi Bimali, ndi Asvati. Awa ndi ana a Yafteti." 
1Chronicles7:34 Ndi ana a Semeri: Ahi, ndi Roga, Yehuba, ndi Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Ndi ana a Helemu mbale wace: Zofa, ndi Imna, ndi Selesi, ndi Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Ana a Zofa: Suwa, ndi Harineferi, ndi Sauli, ndi Beri, ndi Imra," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezeri, ndi Hndi, ndi Sama, ndi Silisa, ndi Itirani, ndi Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Ndi ana a Yeteri: Yefune, ndi Pisipa, ndi Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ndi ana a Ula: Ara, ndi Hanieli, ndi Rizya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Awa onse ndiwo ana a Aseri, akuru a nyumba za makolo ao, ngwazi zosankhika ndi zamphamvu, akuru mwa akalonga. Oyesedwa mwa cibadwidwe cao otumikira kunkhondo ndiwo amuna zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zisanu ndi cimodzi." 
1Chronicles8:1 Ndipo Benjamini anabala Bela mwana wace vyoyamba, Asibeli waciwiri, ndi Ahara wacitatu," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha wacinai, ndi Rafa wacisanu." 
1Chronicles8:3 Ndi Bela anali ndi ana: Adara, ndi Gera, ndi Abihudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 ndi Abisuwa, ndi Namani, ndi Ahowa," 
1Chronicles8:5 ndi Gera, ndi Sefufani, ndi Huramu." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ndi ana a Ehudi ndi awa: ndiwo akuru a nyumba za makolo ao a iwo okhala ku Geba, ndipo anawatenga ndende kumka ku Manahati," 
1Chronicles8:7 natenga ndende Namani, ndi Ahiya, ndi Gera, ndipo, anabala Uza, ndi Ahihudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Ndipo Saharaimu anabala ana ku dziko la Moabu, atacotsa akazi ace Husimu ndi Baara." 
1Chronicles8:9 Ndipo Hodesi mkazi wace anambalira Yohabu, ndi Zibiya, ndi Mesa, ndi Malikamu," 
1Chronicles8:10 ndi Yeuzi, ndi Sakiya, ndi Mirima. Awa ndi ana ace akurua nyumbazamakolo ao." 
1Chronicles8:11 Ndi Husimu anambalira Abitubu, ndi Elipaala." 
1Chronicles8:12 Ndi ana a Elipaala: Eberi, ndi Misamu, ndi Semedi, amene anamanga Ono, ndi Ludi ndi miraga yace," 
1Chronicles8:13 ndi Beriya, ndi Sema; ndiwo akuru a nyumba za makolo a iwo okhala m'Ayaloni, amene anathawitsa okhala m'Gati;" 
1Chronicles8:14 ndi Ahio, Sasaki, ndi Yeremoti," 
1Chronicles8:15 ndi Zebadiya, ndi Aradi, ndi Ederi," 
1Chronicles8:16 ndi Mikaeli, ndi Isipa, ndi Yoha, ana a Beriya;" 
1Chronicles8:17 ndi Zebadiya, ndi Mesulamu, ndi Hiziki, ndi Heberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 ndi Ismerai, ndi Izliya, ndi Yobabu, ana a Elipaala;" 
1Chronicles8:19 ndi Yakimu, ndi Zikiri, ndi Zabidi," 
1Chronicles8:20 ndi Elianai, ndi Ziletai, ndi Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:21 ndi Adaya, ndi Beraya, ndi Simirati, ana a Simei;" 
1Chronicles8:22 ndi Isipani, ndi Eberi, ndi Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:23 ndi Abidoni, ndi Zikiri, ndi Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 ndi Hananiya, ndi Elamu, ndi Antotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 ndi Ifideya, ndi Penueli, ana a Sasaki;" 
1Chronicles8:26 ndi Samserai, ndi Sehariya, ndi Ataliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 ndi Yaaresiya ndi Eliya, ndi Zikiri, ana a Yerohamu." 
1Chronicles8:28 Awa ndi akuru a nyumba za makolo mwa mibadwo yao, ndiwo akuru anakhala m'Yerusalemu awa." 
1Chronicles8:29 Ndipo m'Gibeoni anakhala atate a Gibeoni, dzina la mkazi wace ndiye Maaka;" 
1Chronicles8:30 ndi mwana wace woyamba ndiye Abidoni, opondana naye ndi Zuri, ndi Kisi, ndi Baala, ndi Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 ndi Gedoro, ndi Ahiyo, ndi Zekeri." 
1Chronicles8:32 Ndipo Mikiloti anabala Simeya. Ndi iwonso anakhala pamodzi ndi abale ao m'Yerusalemu, popenyana ndi abale ao." 
1Chronicles8:33 Ndipo Neri anabala Kisi, ndi Kisi anabala Sauli, ndi Sauli anabala Yonatani, ndi Malikisuwa, ndi Abinadabu, ndi Esibaala." 
1Chronicles8:34 Ndi mwana wa Yonatani ndiye Meri-baala; ndi Meri-baala anabala Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Ndi ana a Mika: Pitoni, ndi Meleki, ndi Tareya, ndi Ahazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ndi Ahazi anabala Yehoada, ndi Yehoada anabala Alemeti, ndi Azimaveti, ndi Zimri; ndi Zimri anabala Moza;" 
1Chronicles8:37 ndi Moza anabala Bineya, mwana wace ndiye Rafa, mwana wace Eleasa, mwana wace Azeli;" 
1Chronicles8:38 ndipo Azeli anali nao ana asanu ndi mmodzi, maina ao ndiwo Azrikamu, Bokeru, ndi Ismayeli, ndi Seariya, ndi Obadiya, ndi Hanani. Onsewa ndiwo ana a Azeli." 
1Chronicles8:39 Ndi ana a Ezeki mbale wace: Ulamu mwana wace woyamba, Yeusi waciwiri, ndi Elifeleti wacitatu." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ndipo ana a Ulamu ndiwo ngwazi zamphamvu, ndiwo oponya mibvi, nakhala nao ana ambiri ndi zidzukulu zana limodzi. Onsewa ndiwo a ana a Benjamini." 
1Chronicles9:1 Ndipo Aisrayeli onse anawerengedwa mwa cibadwidwe cao; ndipo taonani, alembedwa m'buku la mafumu a Israyeli; ndipo Yuda anatengedwa ndende kumka ku Babulo cifukwa ca kulakwa kwao." 
1Chronicles9:2 Okhala m'dziko oyamba tsono, akukhala mwao mwao m'roidzi mwao, ndiwo Israyeli, ansembe, Alevi, ndi Anetini." 
1Chronicles9:3 Ndipo m'Yerusalemu munakhala a ana a Yuda, ndi a ana a Benjamini, ndi a ana a Efraimu ndi Manase:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Utai mwana wa Amihudi, mwana wa Omri, mwana wa Imri, mwana wa Bani, wa ana a Perezi mwana wa Yuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Ndipo a Asiloni: Asaya woyamba, ndi ana ace." 
1Chronicles9:6 Ndi a ana a Zera: Yeueli ndi abale ao mazana asanu ndi limodzi mphambu makumi asanu ndi anai. 
1Chronicles9:7 Ndi a ana a Benjamini: Salu mwana wa Mesulamu, mwana wa Hodavia, mwana wa Hasenuwa;" 
1Chronicles9:8 ndi Ibineya mwana wa Yerohamu, ndi Ela mwana wa Uzi, mwana-wa Mikiri, ndi Mesulamu mwana wa Sefatiya, mwana wa Reueli, mwana wa Ibniya," 
1Chronicles9:9 ndi abale ao monga mwa mibadwo yao mazana asanu ndi anai mphambu makumi asanu kudza asanu ndi mmodzi. Onsewa ndiwo akuru a nyumba za makolo ao m'nyumba za makolo ao. 
1Chronicles9:10 Ndi a ansembe: Yedaya, ndi Yehoyaribu, ndi Yakini," 
1Chronicles9:11 ndi Azariya mwana wa Hilikiya, mwana wa Mesulamu, mwana wa Zadoki, mwana wa Merayoti, mwana wa Ahitubu, mtsogoleri wa m'nyumba ya Mulungu;" 
1Chronicles9:12 ndi Adaya mwana wa Yerohamu, mwana wa Pasuri, mwana wa Malikiya, ndi Maasai mwana wa Adieli, mwana wa Yazera, mwana wa Mesulamu, mwana wa Mesilemiti, mwana wa Imeri," 
1Chronicles9:13 ndi abale ao, akuru a nyumba za makolo ao cikwi cimodzi mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi asanu ndi limodzi, anthu odziwitsitsa Debito ya utumiki wa nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles9:14 Ndi a Alevi: Semaya mwana wal Hasubu, mwana wa Azrikamu, mwana wa Hasabiya, a ana a Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 ndi Bakabakara, Heresi, ndi Galala, ndi Mataniya mwana wa Mika, mwana wa Zikiri, mwana wa Asafu;" 
1Chronicles9:16 ndi Obadiya mwana wa Semaya, mwana wa Galala, mwana wa Yedutuni, ndi Berekiya mwana wa Asa, mwana wa Elikana, wokhala m'midzi ya Anetofati." 
1Chronicles9:17 Ndi odikira pakhomo: Salumu, ndi Akubu, ndi Talimoni, ndi Ahimani ndi abate ao; Salumu ndi mkuru wao," 
1Chronicles9:18 amene adadikira pa cipata ca mfumu kum'mawa mpaka pomwepo, ndiwo odikira pakhomo a tsasa la ana a Levi." 
1Chronicles9:19 Ndipo Salumu mwana wa Kore, mwana wa Ebiasafu; mwana wa Kora, ndi abale ace a nyumba ya atate wace; Akora anayang'anira nchito ya utumiki, osunga zipata za kacisi monga makolo ao; anakhala m'cigono ca Yehova osunga polowera;" 
1Chronicles9:20 ndi a Pinehasi mwana wa Eleazara anali mtsogoleri wao kale, ndipo Yehova anali naye." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekariya mwana wa Meselemiya anali wodikira pakhomo pa cihema cokomanako. 
1Chronicles9:22 Iwo onse osankhidwa akhale odikira kuzipata ndiwo mazana awiri mphambu khumi ndi awiri. Iwo anawerengedwa monga mwa cibadwidwe cao, m'midzi mwao, amene Davide ndi Samueli mlauli anawaika m'udindo wao." 
1Chronicles9:23 Momwemo iwo ndi ana ao anayang'anira zipata za ku nyumba ya Yehova, ndiyo nyumba ya kacisi, m'udikiro wao." 
1Chronicles9:24 Pa mbali zinai panali odikira kum'mawa, kumadzulo, kumpoto, ndi kumwela." 
1Chronicles9:25 Ndi abale ao m'midzi mwao akafikafika, atapita masiku asanu ndi awiri masabata onse, kuti akhale nao;" 
1Chronicles9:26 pakuti odikira anai akuru, ndiwo Alevi, anali m'udindo wao, nayang'anira zipinda ndi mosungiramo cuma m'nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles9:27 Ndipo amagona usiku m'zipinda zozinga nyumba ya Mulungu, popeza udikiro wace ndi wao; kuitsegula m'mawa ndi m'mawa ndi kwaonso." 
1Chronicles9:28 Ndi ena a iwo anayang'anira zipangizo za utumikiwo, pakuti analowa nazo ataziwerenga, naturuka nazo ataziwerenga." 
1Chronicles9:29 Ndi ena a iwo anaikidwa ayang'anire zipangizo ziti zonse, ndi zipangizo zonse za malo opatulika, ndi ufa wosalala, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta, ndi libano, ndi zonunkhira." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ndi ana ena a, ansembe anasanganiza cisanganizo ca zonunkhira," 
1Chronicles9:31 Ndi Matitiya wina wa Alevi, ndiye mwana woyamba wa Salumu Mkora, anaikidwa ayang'anire zokazingidwa m'ziwaya." 
1Chronicles9:32 Ndi ena a abale ao, a ana a Akohati, anayang'anira mkate woonekera, kuukonza masabata onse." 
1Chronicles9:33 Ndipo awa ndi oyimba akuru a nyumba za makolo a Alevi, okhala m'zipinda, omasuka ku nchito zina; pakuti anali nayo nchito yao usana ndi usiku." 
1Chronicles9:34 Awa ndi akuru a nyumba za makolo a Alevi mwa mibadwo yao, ndiwo akuru; anakhala ku Yerusalemu awa." 
1Chronicles9:35 Ndipo m'Gibeoni munakhala atate wa Gibeoni Yeieli, dzina la mkazi wace ndiye Maaka;" 
1Chronicles9:36 ndi mwana wace woyamba ndiye Abidoni, opandana naye ndi Zuri, ndi Kisi, ndi Baala, ndi Neri, ndi Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 ndi Gedoro, ndi Ahiya, ndi Zekariya, ndi Mikiloti." 
1Chronicles9:38 Ndi Mikiloti anabala Simeamu. Ndipo iwonso anakhala pamodzi ndi abale ao m'Yerusalemu, pandunji pa abale ao." 
1Chronicles9:39 Ndipo Neri anabala Kisi, ndi Kisi anabala Sauli, ndi Sauli anabala Yonatani, ndi Malikisuwa, ndi Abinadabu, ndi Esbaala." 
1Chronicles9:40 Ndipo mwana wa Yonatani ndiye Meribaala; ndi Meribaala anabala Mika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Ndi ana a Mika: Pitoni, ndi Meleki, ndi Tareya, ndi Ahazi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ndi Ahazi anabala Yara, ndi Yara anabala Ameleti, ndi Azmaveti, ndi Zimri; ndi Zimri anabala Moza," 
1Chronicles9:43 ndi Moza anabala Bineya, ndi Refaya mwana wace, Eleasa mwana wace; Azeli mwana wace;" 
1Chronicles9:44 ndi Azeli anali nao ana asanu ndi mmodzi, maina ao ndi awa; Azrikamu, Bokeru, ndi Ismayeli, ndi Seariya, ndi Obadiya, ndi Hanani; awa ndi ana a Azeli." 
1Chronicles10:1 Afilisti tsono analimbana nkhondo ndi Israyeli; ndipo amuna a Israyeli anathawa pamaso pa Afilisti, nagwa ophedwa pa phiri la Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Ndipo Afilisti anaumirira kutsata Sauli ndi ana ace, ndi Afilistiwo anawapha Yonatani, ndi Abinadabu, ndi Malikisuwa, ana a Sauli." 
1Chronicles10:3 Ndi nkhondoyi inamkulira Sauli, ndi amauta anampeza; ndipo anatenga nkhawa cifukwa ca amauta." 
1Chronicles10:4 Pamenepo Sauli anati kwa wonyamula zida zace, Solola lupanga lako, nundipyoze nalo, angafike osadulidwa awa ndi kundiseka, Koma wonyamula zida zace anakana, popeza anaopa kwambiri. Pomwepo Sauli anatenga lupanga lace, naligwera." 
1Chronicles10:5 Ndipo pamene wonyamula zida zace anaona kuti Sauli wafa, anagwera nayenso lupanga lace, nafa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Momwemo anafa Sauli, ndi ana ace atatu; ndi nyumba yace yonse idafa pamodzi." 
1Chronicles10:7 Ndipo pamene amuna onse a Israyeli okhala m'cigwamo anaona kuti anathawa, ndi kuti Sauli ndi ana ace adafa, anasiya midzi yao, nathawa; nadza Afilisti, nakhala m'menemo." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ndipo m'mawa mwace anafika Afilisti kubvula za ophedwa, napeza Sauli ndi ana ace adagwa pa phiri la Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Ndipo anambvula natenga mutu wace, ndi zida zace, natumiza ku dziko la Afilisti pozungulirapo, kulalika m'mafano ao ndi mwa anthu." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ndipo anaika zida zace m'nyumba ya milungu yao, napacika mutu wace m'nyumba ya Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Ndipo onse a Yabesi Gileadi, atamva zonse Afilisti adacitira Sauli," 
1Chronicles10:12 anauka ngwazi zonse, nacotsa mtembo wa Sauli, ndi mitembo ya ana ace, nabwera nayo ku Yabesi, naika mafupa ao patsinde pa mtengo wathundu ku Yabesi, nasala masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles10:13 Momwemo Sauli anafa, cifukwa ca kulakwa kwace analakwira Yehova, kulakwira mau a Yehova amene sanawasunga; ndiponso cifukwa ca kufunsira wobwebweta, kufunsirako," 
1Chronicles10:14 osafunsira kwa Yehova; cifukwa cace anamupha, napambutsira ufumu kwa Davide mwana wa Jese." 
1Chronicles11:1 Pamenepo Aisrayeli onse anasonkhana kwa Davide ku Hebroni, ndi kuti, Taonani, ife ndife pfupa lanu, ndi mnofu wanu." 
1Chronicles11:2 Ngakhale kale lomwe, pokhala mfumu Sauliyo, woturuka ndi kulowa nao Aisrayeli ndinu; ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanu anati kwa inu, Uzidyetsa anthu anga Aisrayeli, nukhale mtsogoleri wa anthu anga Israyeli." 
1Chronicles11:3 Akuru onse omwe a Israyeli anadza kwa mfumu ku Hebroni; ndipo Davide anapangana nao pangano ku Hebroni pamaso pa Yehova; ndipo anamdzoza Davide akhale mfumu ya Israyeli monga mwa mau a Yehova, ndi lizanja la Samueli." 
1Chronicles11:4 Namuka Davide ndi Aisrayeli onse naye ku Yerusalemu, ndiwo Yebusi; ndipo Ayebusi nzika za m'dziko zinali komweko." 
1Chronicles11:5 Ndipo nzika za m'Yebusi zinati kwa Davide, Sungalowe muno. Koma Davide analanda linga la Ziyoni, ndiwo mudzi wa Davide." 
1Chronicles11:6 Nati Davide, Ali yense woyamba kukantha Ayebusi, yemweyo adzakhala mkulu ndi mtsogoleri. Nayamba kukwerako Yoabu mwana wa Zeruya, nakhala mkuru iyeyu." 
1Chronicles11:7 Ndipo Davide anakhala m'lingamo; cifukwa cace analicha mudzi wa Davide. 
1Chronicles11:8 Ndipo anamanga mudzi pozungulira pace, kuyambira ku Milo ndi pozungulira pace; ndi Yoabu anakonzanso potsala pa mudzi." 
1Chronicles11:9 Ndipo Davide anakula-kulabe, pakuti Yehova wa makamu anali naye." 
1Chronicles11:10 Akuru a amphamvu aja Davide anali nao akulimbika pamodzi naye m'ufumu wace, pamodzi ndi Aisrayeli onse, kumlonga ufumu, monga mwa mau a Yehova akunena za Israyeli, ndi awa." 
1Chronicles11:11 Kuwerenga kwa amphamvu aja Davide anali nao ndi uku: Yasobeamu mwana wa Mhakimoni, mkuru wa makumi atatu aja, anasamulira mazana atatu mkondo wace, nawapha nthawi imodzi." 
1Chronicles11:12 Ndi pambuyo pace Eleazara mwana wa Dodo M-ahohi, ndiye mmodzi wa atatu aja amphamvu." 
1Chronicles11:13 Anali pamodzi ndi Da vide ku Pasidamimu muja; Afilisti anasonkhanako kunkhondo kumene kunali munda wodzala ndi barele; ndipo anthu anathawa pamaso pa Afilisti. 
1Chronicles11:14 Koma anadziimika pakati pa munda, naulanditsa, nakantha Afilisti; m'mwemo anawapulumutsa Yehova ndi cipulumutso cacikuru." 
1Chronicles11:15 Ndipo atatu a akuru makumi atatu anatsikira kuthanthwe kwa Davide, ku phanga la Adulamu; ndi nkhondo ya Afilisti idamanga misasa m'cigwa ca Refaimu." 
1Chronicles11:16 Pamenepo Davide anali m'linga, ndi boma la askari linali ku Betelehemu." 
1Chronicles11:17 Ndipo Davide analakalaka, nati, Ha! mwenzi wina atandimwetsa madzi a m'citsime ca ku Betelehemu ciri kucipata," 
1Chronicles11:18 Napyola atatuwo misasa ya Afilish natunga madzi ku citsime ca ku Betelehemu ciri kucipata, nabwera nao kwa Davide; koma Davide anakana kumwako, koma anawathirira kwa Yehova;" 
1Chronicles11:19 nati, Pali Mulungu wanga, kukhale kutali kwa ine kucita ici. Ngati ndidzamwa mwazi wa anthu awa? Akadataya moyo wao, inde akadataya moyo wao, pakukatenga madziwa. M'mwemo sanafuna kuwamwa. Izi anazicita atatu amphamvuwa." 
1Chronicles11:20 Ndipo Abisai mbale wa Yoabu, ndiye wamkuru wa atatuwa; pakuti anasamulira mazana atatu mkondo wace, nawapha, namveka dzina pakati pa atatuwa." 
1Chronicles11:21 Mwa atatuwa iye anali waulemu woposa awiriwa, nasanduka mkuru wao; koma sanafikana nao atatu oyamba aja." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada, mwana wa ngwazi ya ku Kabzeeli, wocita zazikuru, anapha ana awiri a Ariyeli wa ku Moabu; anatsikanso, napha mkango m'kati mwa dzenje nyengo ya cipale cofewa." 
1Chronicles11:23 Anaphanso M-aigupto munthu wamkuru, msinkhu wace mikono isanu, ndi m'dzanja la M-aigupto munali mkondo ngati mtanda woombera nsaru; ndipo anamtsikira ndi ndodo, nakwatula mkondo m'dzanja la M-aigupto, namupha ndi mkondo wace womwe." 
1Chronicles11:24 Izi anazicita Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada, namveka dzina mwa atatu amphamvuwo." 
1Chronicles11:25 Taonani, anali wa ulemu woposa makumi atatuwo, koma sanafikana atatu oyamba aja; ndipo Davide anamuika mkuru wa olindirira ace." 
1Chronicles11:26 Ndipo amphamvuwo a magulu a nkhondo ndiwo Asaheli mbale wa Yoabu, Elanani mwana wa Dodo wa ku Betelehemu," 
1Chronicles11:27 Samoti Mharori, Helezi Mpeloni," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira mwana wa Ikesi wa ku Tekoi, Abiezeri wa ku Anatoti," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai Mhusati, liai M-ahohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai Mnetofati, Heledi mwana wa Bana Mnetofati," 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai mwana wa Ribai wa Gibeya wa ana a Benjamini, Benaya Mpiratoni," 
1Chronicles11:32 Horai wa ku mitsinje ya Gaasi, Abiyeli M-ariba," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azmaveti Mbaharumi, Eliaba Mshaliboni;" 
1Chronicles11:34 ana a Hasemu Mgizoni; Yonatani mwana wa Sage Mharari," 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiamu mwana wa Sakari Mharari, Elifali mwana wa Uri," 
1Chronicles11:36 Heferi Mmekerati, Ahiya Mpeloni," 
1Chronicles11:37 Hezro wa ku Karimeli, Naarai mwana wa Ezbai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Yoeli mbale wa Natani, Mibari mwana wa Hagiri," 
1Chronicles11:39 Zeleki M-amoni, Naharai Mberoti wonyamula zida za Yoabu mwana wa Zeruya," 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira M-itiri, Garebi M-itiri," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uriya Mhiti, Zabadi mwana wa Alai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina mwana wa Siza Mrubeni mkuru wa Arubeni, ndi makumi atatu pamodzi naye," 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanani mwana wa Maaka, ndi Yosafati Mmitini," 
1Chronicles11:44 Uziya M-asterati, Sama ndi Yeieli ana a Hotamu wa ku Aroeri," 
1Chronicles11:45 Yedyaeli mwana wa Simri, ndi Yoha mbale wace Mtizi," 
1Chronicles11:46 Elieli Mmahavi, ndi Yeribai ndi Yosaviya ana a Elinaamu, ndi Itima Mmoabu," 
1Chronicles11:47 Elieli, ndi Obedi, ndi Yasiyeli Mmezobai." 
1Chronicles12:1 Anadzawo kwa Davide ku Zikilaga, akali citsekedwere cifukwa ca Sauli mwana wa Kisi, ndi awa; ndiwo mwa amphamvuwo omthandiza kunkhondo." 
1Chronicles12:2 Anakoka mauta; naponya miyala, naponya mibvi ndi uta ndi dzanja lamanja ndi lamanzere lomwe; ndiwo a abale ace a Sauli, Abenjamini." 
1Chronicles12:3 Mkuru wao ndiye Ahiezeri, ndi Yoasi, ana a Semaa wa ku Gibeya; ndi Yezieli, ndi Peleti, ana a Azmaveti; ndi Beraka, ndi Yehu wa ku Anatoti," 
1Chronicles12:4 ndi Ismaya wa ku Gibeoni, wamphamvu mwa makumi atatuwo ndi woyang'anira makumi atatuwo, ndi Yeremiya, ndi Yahazieli, ndi Yohanani, ndi Yozabadi wa ku Gedera," 
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzai, ndi Yerimoti, ndi Bealiya, ndi Semariya, ndi Sefatiya wa ku Harupi," 
1Chronicles12:6 Elikana, ndi Isiya, ndi Azereli, ndi Yoezeri, ndi Yasobeamu ndiwo Akora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 ndi Yoda, ndi Zebadiya, ana a Yerohamu wa ku Gedoro." 
1Chronicles12:8 Ndi Agadi ena anapambukira kwa Davide ku liogala m'cipululu, ngwazi zamphamvu zozerewera nkhondo, zogwira cikopa ndi mkondo; nkhope zao zikunga nkhope za mikango, ndi liwiro lao longa la ngoma kumapiri:" 
1Chronicles12:9 Ezeri mkuru wao, waciwiri Obadiya, wacitatu Eliabu," 
1Chronicles12:10 wacinai Misimana, wacisanu Yeremiya," 
1Chronicles12:11 wacisanu ndi cimodzi Atai, wacisanu ndi ciwiri Elieli," 
1Chronicles12:12 wacisanu ndi citatu Yohanani, wacisanu ndi cinai Elzabadi," 
1Chronicles12:13 wakhumi Yeremiya, wakhumi ndi cimodzi Makibanai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Awa a ana a Gadi, anali atsogoleri a nkhondo; wamng'ono wa iwo anayang'anira zana limodzi, ndi wamkuru wa iwo anayang'anira cikwi cimodzi." 
1Chronicles12:15 Awa ndi omwe aja anaoloka Yordano mwezi woyamba, atadzala kusefukira magombe ace onse; nathawitsa onse okhala m'zigwa kum'mawa ndi kumadzulo." 
1Chronicles12:16 Ndipo anadza ena a ana a Benjamini ndi Yuda kulinga kwa Davide. 
1Chronicles12:17 Ndipo Davide anaturuka kukomana nao, nayankha, nanena nao, Ngati mwandidzera mwamtendere kundithandiza, mtima wanga udzalumikizana nanu; koma ngati mwafika kundipereka kwa adani anga, popeza m'manja mwanga mulibe ciwawa, Mulungu wa makolo athu acione ndi kucilanga." 
1Chronicles12:18 Pamenepo mzimu unabvala Amasai, ndiye wamkuru wa makumi atatuwo, nati iye, Ndife anu, Davide, tibvomerezana nanu mwana wa Jese inu: mtendere, mtendere ukhale ndi inu, ndi mtendere ukhale ndi athandizi anu; pakuti Mulungu wanu akuthandizani. Ndipo Davide anawalandira, nawaika akuru a magulu." 
1Chronicles12:19 Ena a Manase omwe anapambukira kwa Davide, muja iye anadza ndi Afilisti koponyana nkhondo ndi Sauli, koma sanawathandiza; popeza akalonga a Afilisti, atacita upo, anamuuza acoke, ndi kuti, Adzapambukira kwa mbuye wace Sauli ndi kutisandulikira." 
1Chronicles12:20 Pomuka iye ku Zikilaga anapambukira kwa iye a Manase: Adina, ndi Yozabadi, ndi Yedyaeli, ndi Mikaeli, ndi Yozabadi, ndi Elihu, ndi Ziletai, akuru a zikwi a ku Manase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Ndipo anathandiza Davide aponyane nalo gulu la acifwamba, pakuti onse ndiwo ngwazi zamphamvu, nakhala atsogoleri m'khamu la nkhondo." 
1Chronicles12:22 Pakuti nthawi yomweyo anadza kwa Davide kumthandiza, mpaka kunali nkhondo yaikuru; ngati nkhondo ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles12:23 Ndipo kuwerenga kwa akuru okonzekeratu kunkhondo, anadzawo kwa Davide ku Hebroni, kupambukitsa ufumu wa Sauli ukhale wace, monga mwa mau a Yehova, ndi: uku." 
1Chronicles12:24 Ana a Yuda akunyamula zikopa ndi mikondo ndiwo zikwi zisanu ndi cimodzi mphambu mazana asanu ndi atatu, okonzekeratu kunkhondo." 
1Chronicles12:25 A ana a Simeoni ngwazi zamphamvu za nkhondo zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri mphambu zana liimodzi. 
1Chronicles12:26 A ana a Levi zikwi zinai mphambu mazana asanu ndi limodzi. 
1Chronicles12:27 Ndipo Yehoyada, ndiye mtsogoleri wa Aaroni, ndi pamodzi nave zikwi zitatu mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles12:28 ndi Zadoki, ndiye mnyamata, ngwazi yamphamvu, ndi a nyumba ya kholo lace, akuru makumi awiri mphambu awfri." 
1Chronicles12:29 Ndi a ana a Benjamini, abale a Sauli, zikwi zitatu; pakuti mpaka pomwepo ocuruka a iwowa anaumirira nyumba ya Sauli." 
1Chronicles12:30 Ndi a ana a Efraimu zikwi makumi awiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi atatu, ngwazi zamphamvu, anthu omveka m'nyumba za makolo ao." 
1Chronicles12:31 Ndipo a pfuko la Manase logawika pakati zikwi khumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu, ochulidwa maina ao kuti adzalonge Davide mfumu." 
1Chronicles12:32 Ndi a ana a Isakara, anthu akuzindikira nyengo, akudziwa zoyenera Israyeli kuzicita, akuru ao ndiwo mazana awiri; ndi abale ao onse anapenyerera pakamwa pao." 
1Chronicles12:33 A Zebuloni akuturuka kukhamu, opangira nkhondo, monga mwa zida ziri zonse za nkhondo, zikwi makumi asanu, akusunga malongosoledwe a nkhondo ndi mtima wosatekeseka." 
1Chronicles12:34 Ndi a Nafitali atsogoleri cikwi cimodzi, ndi pamodzi nao ogwira zikopa ndi mikondo zikwi makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
1Chronicles12:35 Ndi a Adani akupangira nkhondo zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi. 
1Chronicles12:36 Ndi a Aseri akuturuka kukhamu, akupangira nkhondo, zikwi makumi anai." 
1Chronicles12:37 Ndi tsidya lga la Yordano a Arubeni, ndi Agadi, ndi pfuko la: Manase logawika pakati, ndi zida: ziri zonse za khamu kucita nazo nkhondo, zikwi zana limodzi ndi makumi awiri." 
1Chronicles12:38 Onsewa, ndiwo anthu a nkhondo akusunga malongosoledwe a nkhondo, anadza ku Hebroni ndi mtima wangwiro kudzamlonga Davide mfumu ya Aisraeli onse; ndi onse otsala a Israyeli omwe anali a mtima umodzi kumlonga Davide ufumu." 
1Chronicles12:39 Ndipo anali komweko kwa Davide masiku atatu kudya ndi kumwa, popeza abale ao-anazikonzeratu." 
1Chronicles12:40 Ndiponso akuyandikizana nao mpaka Isakara ndi Zebuloni ndi Nafitali anabwera nao mkate osenzetsa aburu, ndi ngamira, ndi nyuru, ndi ng'ombe, zakudya zaufa, ndi ncinci zankhuyu, ndi ncinci zamphesa, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta, ndi ng'ombe, ndi nkhosa zocuruka; pakuti munali cimwemwe m'Israyeli." 
1Chronicles13:1 Ndipo Davide anafunsana ndi akuru a zikwi ndi a mazana, inde atsogoleri ali onse." 
1Chronicles13:2 Ndipo Davide anati kwa msonkhano wonse wa Israyeli, Cikakomera inu, ndipo cikacokera kwa Yehova Mulungu wathu, titumize konse kuti abale athu otsala m'dziko lonse la Israyeli, ndi ansembe ndi Alevi okhala nao m'midzi yao yokhala napa podyetsa, kuti asonkhane kwa ife;" 
1Chronicles13:3 ndipo tibwere nalo kwa ife likasa la Mulungu wathu, pakuti sitinafunako masiku a Sauli." 
1Chronicles13:4 Ndipo a msonkhano onse anati kuti adzacita; pakuti cidayenera cinthuci pamaso pa anthu onse. 
1Chronicles13:5 M'mwemo Davide anamemeza Aisrayeli onse kuyambira Sihori wa ku Aigupto mpaka polowera ku Hamati, kutenga likasa la Mulungu ku Kiriati-Yearimu." 
1Chronicles13:6 Ndipo Davide ndi Aisrayeli onse pamodzi naye anakwera kumka ku Baala, ndiko ku Kiriati-Yearimu wa m'Yuda, kukwera nalo kucokera komweko likasa la Mulungu Yehova wakukhala pa akerubi, kumene aitanirako Dzina." 
1Chronicles13:7 Ndipo anatengera likasa la Mulungu pa gareta watsopano kucokera ku nyumba ya Abinadabu; ndi Uza ndi Ahiyo anayendetsa ng'ombe za pa garetayo," 
1Chronicles13:8 Ndipo Davide ndi Aisrayeli onse anasewera pamaso pa Mulungu ndi mphamvu yao yonse; ndi nyimbo, ndi azeze, ndi zisakasa, ndi malingaka, ndi nsanje, ndi malipenga," 
1Chronicles13:9 Ndipo pamene anafika ku dwale la Kidoni, Uza anatambasula dzanja lace kulicirikiza likasa, pakuti ng'ombe zikadapulumuka." 
1Chronicles13:10 Ndi mkwiyo wa Yehova unayakira Uza, namkantha, cifukwa anatambasulira likasa dzanja lace, nafa komweko pamaso pa Mulungu." 
1Chronicles13:11 Ndipo kudaipira Davide kuti Yehova adacita cipasulo ndi Uza; motero anacha malowo Perezi Uza, mpaka lero lino." 
1Chronicles13:12 Ndipo Davide anaopa Mulungu tsikulo, ndi kuti, Ndidzafika nalo bwanji likasa la Mulungu kwathu?" 
1Chronicles13:13 M'mwemo Davide sanafika nalo likasa kwao ku mudzi wa Davide, koma analipambutsira ku nyumba ya Obedi Edomu wa ku Giti." 
1Chronicles13:14 Ndi likasa la Mulungu linakhala ndi banja la Obedi Edomu m'nyumba mwace miyezi itatu; ndipo Yehova anadalitsa nyumba ya Obedi Edomu, ndi zonse anali nazo." 
1Chronicles14:1 Ndipo Hiramu mfumu ya Turo anatumiza mithenga kwa Davide, ndi mikungudza, ndi amisiri omanga miyala, ndi amatabwa, kuti ammangire nyumba." 
1Chronicles14:2 Ndipo Davide anazindikira kuti Yehova adamkhazikitsa mfumu ya Israyeli; pakuti ufumu wace unakwezekadi, cifukwa ca anthu ace Israyeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 Ndipo Davide anatenga akazi ena ku Yerusalemu, nabala Davide ana amuna ndi akazi ena." 
1Chronicles14:4 Maina a ana anali nao m'Yerusalemu ndi awa: Samna, ndi Sobabu Natani, ndi Solomo," 
1Chronicles14:5 ndi Ibara, ndi Elisua, ndi Elipeleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 ndi Noga, ndi Nefegi, ndi Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 ndi Elisama, ndi Beliyada, ndi Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles14:8 Pamene Afilisti anamva kuti anamdzoza Davide akhale mfumu ya Aisrayeli onse, Afilisti onse anakwera kufunafuna Davide; ndipo Davide anamva, nawaturukira." 
1Chronicles14:9 Afilisti tsono anafika, nafalikira m'cigwa ca Refaimu." 
1Chronicles14:10 Ndipo Davide anafunsira kwa Mulungu, kun, Ndikwere kodi kuyambana ndi Afilisti? mudzawapereka m'dzanja langa kodi? Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye, Kwera, pakuti ndidzawapereka m'dzanja lako." 
1Chronicles14:11 Atafika tsono ku Baala Perazimu, Davide anawakantha komweko; nati Davide, Mulungu anapasula adani anga ndi dzanja langa, ngati pokhamulira madzi. Cifukwa cace analicha dzina la malowo Baala Perazimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Ndipo anasiyako milungu yao; nalamula Davide, ndipo anaitentha ndi moto." 
1Chronicles14:13 Ndipo Afilisti anabwerezanso, nafalikira m'cigwamo." 
1Chronicles14:14 Ndipo Davide anafunsiranso kwa Mulungu, nanena Mulungu naye, Usakwera kuwatsata, uwazungulire, nuwadzere pandunji pa mitengo ya mkandankhuku." 
1Chronicles14:15 Ndipo kudzali, pakumva iwe kuwayula kunsonga kwa mitengo ya mkandankhuku, pamenepo uturukire kunkhondo; pakuti Mulungu waturukira pamaso pako kukantha gulu la Afilisti." 
1Chronicles14:16 Nacita Davide monga Yehova adamuuza, nakantha gulu la Afilisti kuyambira ku Gibeoni kufikira ku Gezeri." 
1Chronicles14:17 Ndipo mbiri ya Davide inabuka m'maiko onse, nafikitsira Yehova kuopsa kwace pa amitundu onse." 
1Chronicles15:1 Ndipo Davide anadzimangira nyumba m'mudzi mwace, nakonzeratu malo likasa la Mulungu, naliutsira hema." 
1Chronicles15:2 Pamenepo Davide anati, Sayenera ena kusenza likasa la Mulungu koma Alevi ndiwo; pakuti Yehova anawasankha iwo kusenza likasa la Mulungu, ndi kumtumikira iye kosatha." 
1Chronicles15:3 Ndipo Davide anasonkhanitsira Aisrayeli onse ku Yerusalemu, akwere nalo likasa la Yehova kumalo kwace adalikonzera." 
1Chronicles15:4 Ndipo Davide anasonkhanitsa ana a Aroni ndi Alevi; 
1Chronicles15:5 a ana a Kohati, Urieli mkuru wao, ndi abale ace zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri;" 
1Chronicles15:6 a ana a Merari, Adaya mkuru wao, ndi abale ace mazana awiri mphambu makumi awiri;" 
1Chronicles15:7 a ana a Gerisomu, Yoeli mkuru wao, ndi abale ace zana limodzi mphambu makumi atatu;" 
1Chronicles15:8 a ana a Elizafana, Semaya mkuru wao, ndi abale ace mazana awiri;" 
1Chronicles15:9 a ana a Hebroni, Elieli mkuru wao, ndi abale ace makumi asanu ndi atatu;" 
1Chronicles15:10 a ana a Uzieli, Aminadabu mkuru wao, ndi abale ace zana limodzi mphambu khumi ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles15:11 Ndipo anaitana Zadoki ndi Abyatara ansembe, ndi Alevi Urieli, Asaya, ndi Yoeli, Semaya, ndi Elieli, ndi Aminadabu, nanena nao," 
1Chronicles15:12 Inu ndinu akuru a nyumba za makolo a Alevi, mudzipatule inu ndi abale anu omwe, kuti mukatenge ndi kukwera nalo likasa la Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli ku malo ndalikonzera." 
1Chronicles15:13 Pakuti, cifukwa ca kusalinyamula inu poyamba paja, Yehova Mulungu wathu anacita cotipasula, popeza sitinamfunafuma Iye monga mwa ciweruzo." 
1Chronicles15:14 Momwemo ansembe ndi Alevi anadzipatula kuti akwere nalo likasa la Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli. 
1Chronicles15:15 Ndipo ana a Alevi anasenza likasa la Mulungu pa mapewa ao, mphiko ziri m'mwemo, monga Mose anawauza, monga mwa mau a Yehova." 
1Chronicles15:16 Ndipo Davide ananena ndi mkuru wa Alevi kuti aike abale ao oyimbawo ndi zoyimbira, zisakasa, ndi azeze, ndi nsanje, azimveketse ndi kukweza mau ao ndi cimwemwe." 
1Chronicles15:17 Ndipo Alevi anaika Hemani mwana wa Yoeli, ndi a abale ace Asafu mwana wa Berekiya, ndi a ana a Merari, abale ao, Etani mwana wa Kusaya;"
