1Chronicles15:18 ndi pamodzi nao abale ao a kulongosola kwaciwiri, Zekariya, Beni, ndi Yaazieli, ndi Semiramoti, ndi Yehieli, ndi Uni, Bliabu, ndi Benaya, ndi Maaseya, ndi Matitiya, ndi Blifelehu, ndi Mikineya, ndi Obedi Bdomu, ndi Yeieli, ndikirawo." 
1Chronicles15:19 Oyimba tsono: Hemani, Asafu, ndi Btani, anayimba ndi nsanje zamkuwa;" 
1Chronicles15:20 ndi Zekariya, ndi Azieli, ndi Semiramod, ndi Yehieli, ndi Uni, ndi Bliabu, ndi Maaseya, ndi Benaya, ndi zisakasa kuyimbira mwa Alimoti;" 
1Chronicles15:21 ndi Matitiya, ndi Elifelehu, ndi Mikeya, ndi Obedi Edomu, ndi Yeieli, ndi Azaziya, ndi azeze akuyimbira mwa Seminiti, kutsogolera mayimbidwe." 
1Chronicles15:22 Ndi Kenaniya mkuru wa Alevi anayang'anira kusenzako; anawalangiza za kusenza, pakuti anali waluso." 
1Chronicles15:23 Ndi Berekiya ndi Elikana anali odikira likasa. 
1Chronicles15:24 Ndi Sebaniya, ndi Yosafati, ndi Netaneli, ndi Amasai, ndi Zekariya, ndi Benaya, ndi Eliezere, ansembe, analiza malipenga ku likasa la Mulungu; ndi Obedi Edomu ndi Yehiya anali odikira a likasa." 
1Chronicles15:25 Momwemo Davide, ndi akuru akuru a Israyeli, ndi atsogoleri a zikwi, anamuka kukwera nalo likasa la cipangano la Yehova, kucokera ku nyumba ya Obedi Edomu mokondwera." 
1Chronicles15:26 Ndipo popeza Mulungu anathandiza Alevi akusenza likasa la cipangano la Yehova, iwo anapha nsembe ng'ombe zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi nkhosa zamphongo zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
1Chronicles15:27 Ndipo Davide anabvala maraya abafuta, ndi Alevi onse akunyamula likasa, ndi oyimba, ndi Kenaniya woyang'anira kusenzaku, pamodzi ndi oyimba; Davide anabvalanso efodi wabafuta." 
1Chronicles15:28 Momwemo Aisrayeli onse anakwera nalo likasa la cipangano la Yehova ndi kupfuula, ndi kumveka kwa lipenga, ndi mphalasa, ndi nsanje zomveketsa, ndi zisakasa, ndi azeze." 
1Chronicles15:29 Ndipo polowa likasa la cipangano la Yehova m'mudzi wa Davide, Mikala mwana wamkazi wa Sauli anasuzumira pazenera, naona mfumu Davide alikutumphatumpha ndi kusewera; ndipo anampeputsa mumtima mwace." 
1Chronicles16:1 Ndipo analowa nalo likasa la Mulungu, nalgka pakati pa hemalo Davide adaliutsira; ndipo anapereka nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zoyamika pamaso pa Mulungu." 
1Chronicles16:2 Ndipo atatha Davide kupereka nsembe zopsereza ndi nsembe zoyamika, anadalitsa anthu m'dzina la Yehova." 
1Chronicles16:3 Nagwira ali yense wa Israyeli, wamwamuna ndi wamkazi, yense mtanda wa mkate, ndi nthuli ya nyama, ndi ncinci ya mphesa zouma." 
1Chronicles16:4 Ndipo anaika Alevi ena atumikire ku likasa la Yehova, nalalikire, nayamike, nalemekeze Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafu ndiye mkuru wao, ndi otsatana naye Zekariya, Yeieli, ndi Semiramoti, ndi Yehieli, ndi Matitiya, ndi Eliabu, ndi Benaya, ndi Obedi Edomu, ndi Yeieli, ndi zisakasa ndi azeze; koma Asafu ndi nsanje zomvekatu;" 
1Chronicles16:6 ndi Benaya ndi Yahazieli ansembe ndi malipenga kosalekeza, ku likasa la cipangano la Mulungu." 
1Chronicles16:7 Tsiku limenelo tsono Davide anayamba kuwapatsa nyimbo ya kuyamika nayo Yehova; ocita ndiwo Asafu ndi abale ace. 
1Chronicles16:8 Yamikani Yehova, itanani dzina lace; Bukitsani mwa mitundu ya anthu zocita iye." 
1Chronicles16:9 Myimbireni, myimbireni zomlemekeza; Fotokozerani zodabwiza zace zonse." 
1Chronicles16:10 Mudzitamandire ndi dzina lace lopatulika; Mitima yao ya iwo ofuna Yehova ikondwere. 
1Chronicles16:11 Funsirani kwa Yehova ndi mphamvu yace; Funani nkhope yace nthawi zonse. 
1Chronicles16:12 Kumbukilani zodabwiza zace adazicita, Zizindikilo zace, ndi maweruzo a pakamwa pace;" 
1Chronicles16:13 Inu mbeu ya Israyeli mtumiki wace, Inu ana a Yakobo, osankhika ace." 
1Chronicles16:14 Iye ndiye Yehova Mulungu wathu; Maweruzo ace akhala pa dziko lonse lapansi," 
1Chronicles16:15 Kumbukilani cipangano cace kosatha, Mauwo anawalamulira mibadwo zikwi;" 
1Chronicles16:16 Cipanganoco anapangana ndi Abrahamu, Ndi lumbiro lace ndi Isake;" 
1Chronicles16:17 Ndipo anacitsimikizirakwa Yakobo cikhale malemba, Cikhale cipangano cosatha kwa Israyeli;" 
1Chronicles16:18 Ndi kunena kuti, Ndidzakupatsa iwe dziko la Kanani, Gawo la colandira cako;" 
1Chronicles16:19 Pokhala inu anthu owerengeka, Inde anthu pang'ono, ndi alendo m'mwemo;" 
1Chronicles16:20 Nayendayenda kucokera mtundu wina kufikira mtundu wina, Kucokera ufumu wina kufikira anthu ena." 
1Chronicles16:21 Sanalola munthu awasautse; Ndipo anadzudzula mafumu cifukwa ca iwowa; 
1Chronicles16:22 Ndi kuti, Musamakhudza odzozedwa anga, Musamacitira coipa aneneri anga," 
1Chronicles16:23 Myimbireni Yehova, inu dziko lonse lapansi, Lalikirani cipulumutso cace tsiku ndi tsiku," 
1Chronicles16:24 Fotokozerani ulemerero wace mwa amitundu, Zodabwiza zace mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu." 
1Chronicles16:25 Pakuti Yehova ali wamkuru, nayenera kulemekezedwa kwakukulu; Ayenera amuope koposa milungu yonse." 
1Chronicles16:26 Pakuti milungu ya mitundu ya anthu ndiyo mafano; Koma Yehova analenga zakumwamba. 
1Chronicles16:27 Pamaso pace pali ulemu ndi ukulu, M'malo mwace muli mphamvu ndi cimwemwe." 
1Chronicles16:28 Mcitireni Yehova, inu mafuko a mitundu ya anthu, Mcitireni Yehova ulemerero ndi mphamvu." 
1Chronicles16:29 Mcitireni Yehova ulemerero wa dzina lace; Bwerani naco copereka, ndipo fikani pamaso pace; Lambirani Yehova m'ciyero cokometsetsa," 
1Chronicles16:30 Njenjemerani pamaso pace, inu dziko lonse lapansi, Dziko lokhalamo anthu lomwe lakhazikika, kuti silingagwedezeke." 
1Chronicles16:31 Kukondwerere kumwamba, ndi dziko lapansi lisekerere; Anene mwa amitundu, Yehova acita ufumu." 
1Chronicles16:32 Nyanja ikukume m'kudzala kwace, Munda ukondwerere, ndi zonse ziri m'mwemo;" 
1Chronicles16:33 Pamenepo mitengo yonse ya kunkhalango idzapfuula mokondwera pamaso pa Yehova; Pakuti akudza kudzaweruza dziko lapansi," 
1Chronicles16:34 Yamikani Yehova; pakuti iye ndiye wabwino; Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
1Chronicles16:35 Nimunene, Tipulumutseni, Mulungu wa cipulumutso cathu; Mutisokolotse ndi kutilanditsa kwa amitundu, Kuti tiyamike dzina lanu loyera, Ndi kudzitamandira naco cilemekezo canu." 
1Chronicles16:36 Alemekezedwe Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, Kuyambira kosayamba kufikira kosatha. Ndipo anthu onse anati, Amen! nalemekeza Yehova." 
1Chronicles16:37 Ndipo anasiyako ku likasa la cipangano la Yehova Asafu ndi abale ace, atumikire kulikasa kosalekeza, monga umo mudzafunika tsiku ndi tsiku;" 
1Chronicles16:38 ndi Obedi Edomu, ndi abale ace makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu asanu ndi atatu; ndi Obedi Edomu mwana wa Yedutuni ndi Hosa akhale odikira;" 
1Chronicles16:39 ndi Zadoki wansembe, ndi abale ace ansembe, ku kacisi wa Yehova, pa msanje unali ku Gibeoni;" 
1Chronicles16:40 kupereka nsembe zopsereza kwa Yehova pa guwa la nsembe zopsereza, kosalekeza, m'mawa ndi madzulo, monga mwa zonse zilembedwa m'cilamulo ca Yehova adacilamulira Israyeli;" 
1Chronicles16:41 ndi pamodzi nao Hemani, ndi Yedutuni, ndi osankhika otsalawo, ochulidwa maina, kuyamika Yehova; pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha;" 
1Chronicles16:42 ndi pamodzi nao Hemani, ndi Yedutuni, ndi malipenga ndi nsanje za iwo akumveketsadi, ndi zoyimbira nyimbo za Mulungu; ndi ana a Yedutuni anakhala kucipata." 
1Chronicles16:43 Ndipo anacoka anthu onse, yense ku nyumba yace, nabwera Davide kudalitsa nyumba yace." 
1Chronicles17:1 Ndipo pokhala Davide m'nyumba mwace, Davideyo anati kwa Natani mneneri, Taona, ndikhala ine m'nyumba yamikungudza, koma Gkasa la cipangano likhala m'nsaru zocinga." 
1Chronicles17:2 Ndipo Natani anati kwa Davide, Mucite zonse ziri m'mtima mwanu; pakuti Mulungu ali nanu." 
1Chronicles17:3 Ndipo usiku womwewo mau a Mulungu anadzera Natani, ndi kuti," 
1Chronicles17:4 Kauze Davide mtumiki wanga, Atero Yehova, Usandimangire nyumba yokhalamo;" 
1Chronicles17:5 pakuti sindinakhala m'nyumba kuyambira tsiku tija ndinakwera naye Israyeli, kufikira lero Gno; koma wa m'hema m'hema Ine, ndi wa m'kacisi m'kacisi," 
1Chronicles17:6 Pali ponse ndinayenda nao Aisrayeli onse ndinanena kodi mau ndi woweruza ali yense wa Israyeli, amene ndinamuuza adyetse anthu anga, ndi kuti, Mwalekeranji kundimangira nyumba yamikungudza?" 
1Chronicles17:7 Cifukwa cace tsono, uzitero naye mtumiki wanga Davide, Atero Ambuye wa makamu, Ndinakutenga kubusa potsata iwe nkhosa, kuti ukhale mtsogoleri wa anthu anga Israyeli;" 
1Chronicles17:8 ndipo ndakhala ndi iwe kuli konse unamukako, ndi kuononga adani ako onse pamaso pako; ndipo ndakubukitsira dzina lakunga dzina la akuru okhala padziko." 
1Chronicles17:9 Ndipo ndaikira anthu anga Israyeli malo, ndi kuwaoka, kuti akhale m'malo mwao osasunthikanso; ndi ana osalungama sadzawapululanso monga poyamba paja;" 
1Chronicles17:10 ndi kuyambira kuja ndinaika oweruza ayang'anire anthu anga Israyeli; ndipo ndagonjetsa adani ako onse. Ndikuuzanso kuti Yehova adzakumangira banja. 
1Chronicles17:11 Ndipo kudzacitika, atakwanira masiku ako kuti uzipita kukhala ndi makolo ako, ndidzaukitsa mbeu yako pambuyo pako, ndiye wa ana ako; ndipo ndidzakhazikitsa ufumu wace." 
1Chronicles17:12 Iye adzandimangira nyumba; ndipo ndidzakhazikitsa mpando wacifumu wace kosatha. 
1Chronicles17:13 Ndidzakhala atate wace, ndi iye adzakhala mwana wanga; ndipo sindidzamcotsera cifundo canga monga muja ndinacotsera iye amene anakhala usanakhale iwe;" 
1Chronicles17:14 koma ndidzamkhazikitsa m'nyumba mwanga, ndi m'ufumu wanga kosatha; ndi mpando wa cifumu wace udzakhazikika kosatha." 
1Chronicles17:15 Monga mwa mau awa onse, ndi monga mwa masomphenya awa onse, momwemo Natani analankhula ndi Davide." 
1Chronicles17:16 Pamenepo mfumu Davide analowa nakhala pamaso pa Yehova, nati, Ndine yani, Yehova Mulungu, ndi nyumba yanga njotani kuti mwandifikitsa mpaka pano?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Ndipo ici ncacing'ono pamaso panu, Mulungu, koma mwanena za nyumba ya mtumiki wanu nthawi yam'tsogolo ndithu, ndipo mwandiyesera ngati munthu womveka, Yehova Mulungu." 
1Chronicles17:18 Anenenjinso Davide kwa Inu za ulemu wocitikira mtumiki wanu? pakuti mudziwa mtumiki wanu. 
1Chronicles17:19 Yehova, cifukwa ca mtumiki wanu, ndi monga mwa mtima wanu, mwacita ukulu uwu wonse, kundidziwitsa zazikuru izi zonse." 
1Chronicles17:20 Yehova, palibe wina wonga inu, palibenso Mulungu wina koma Inu; monga mwa zonse tazimva m'makutu mwathu." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ndiwo ayani akunga anthu anu Israyeli, mtundu wa pa wokha wa pa dziko lapansi, amene Mulungu anakadziombolera mtundu wa anthu, kudzibukitsira dzina, mwa zazikuru ndi zoopsa, pakupitikitsa amitundu pamaso pa anthu anu amene munawaombola m'Aigupto?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Pakuti anthu anu Israyeli mudawayesa anthu anu anu kosatha; ndipo Inu, Yehova, munayamba kukhala Mulungu wao." 
1Chronicles17:23 Ndipo tsopano, Yehova, akhazikike kosalekeza mau mudanenawa za mtumiki wanu, ndi za nyumba yace, nimucite monga mwanena." 
1Chronicles17:24 Inde likhazikike dzina lanu, likulitsidwe kosalekeza, ndi kuti, Yehova wa makamu ndiye Mulungu wa Israyeli; akhalira Israyeli Mulungu; ndi nyumba ya Davide mtumiki wanu ikhazikika pamaso panu." 
1Chronicles17:25 Pakuti Inu, Mulungu wanga, mwaululira mtumiki wanu kuti mudzammangira banja; momwemo mtumiki wanu waona mtima wakupemphera pamaso panu." 
1Chronicles17:26 Ndipo tsopano, Yehova, Inu ndinu Mulungu, ndipo mwanenera mtumiki wanu cokoma ici;" 
1Chronicles17:27 cakukomerani kudalitsa nyumba ya mtumiki wanu, kuti ikhalebe kosatha pamaso panu; pakuti Inu Yehova mwadalitsa, ndipo idzadalitsika kosatha." 
1Chronicles18:1 Ndipo zitatha izi, Davide anakantha Afilisti, nawagonjetsa, nalanda Gati ndi midzi yace m'manja a Afilisti." 
1Chronicles18:2 Anakanthanso Moabu; ndi Amoabu anakhala anthu a Davide, nabwera nazo mphatso," 
1Chronicles18:3 Ndipo Davide anakantha Hadarezeri mfumu ya Zoba ku Hamati, pomuka iye kukhazikitsa ulamuliro wace ku mtsinje wa Firate." 
1Chronicles18:4 Ndipo Davide analanda magareta ace cikwi cimodzi, ndi apakavalo zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi oyenda pansi zikwi makumi awiri; Davide anadula mitsita akavalo onse okoka magareta, koma anasungako ofikira magareta zana limodzi." 
1Chronicles18:5 Ndipo Aaramu a ku Damasiko anadza kudzathandiza Hadarezeri mfumu ya Zoba; koma Davide anakantha Aaramu amuna zikwi makumi awiri mphambu ziwiri. 
1Chronicles18:6 Ndipo Davide anaika asilikari a boma m'Aramu wa Damasiko; ndi Aaramu anasanduka anthu a Davide, nabwera nazo mphatso, Ndipo Yehova anasunga Davide kuli konse anamukako." 
1Chronicles18:7 Natenga Davide zikopa zagolidi zinali pa anyamata a Hadarezeri, nabwera nazo ku Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles18:8 Ndi ku Tibati, ndi ku Kuni, midzi ya Hadarezeri, Davide anatenga mkuwa wambiri, ndiwo umene Solomo anayenga nao thawale lamkuwa, ndi nsanamira, ndi zipangizo zamkuwa." 
1Chronicles18:9 Ndipo pakumva Tou, mfumu ya ku Hamati, kuti Davide adakantha khamu lonse la Hadarezeri mfumu ya ku Zoba," 
1Chronicles18:10 anatumiza Hadoramu mwana wace kwa Davide, kumlankhula ndi kumdalitsa, popeza adayambana ndi Hadarezeri, namkantha; pakuti Hadarezeri adacita nkhondo ndi Tou; ndipo anali nazo zipangizo za mitundu mitundu za golidi ndi siliva ndi mkuwa." 
1Chronicles18:11 Izi zomwe mfumu Davide anazipatulira Yehova, pamodzi ndi siliva ndi golidi adazitenga kwa amitundu onse, kwa Edomu, ndi kwa Moabu, ndi kwa ana a Amoni, ndi kwa Afilisti, ndi kwa Amaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Ndipo Abisai mwana wa Zeruya anakantha Aedomu m'Cigwa ca Mcere zikwi khumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu. 
1Chronicles18:13 Ndipo anaika asilikari a boma m'Edomu; ndi Aedomu onse anasanduka anthu a Davide. Ndipo Yehova anasunga Davide kuli konse anamukako. 
1Chronicles18:14 Ndipo Davide anakhala mfumu ya Aisrayeli onse, naweruza anthu ace onse, nawacitira cilungamo." 
1Chronicles18:15 Ndipo Yoabu mwana wa Zeruya anayang'anira khamu la nkhondo, ndi Yehosafati mwana wa Ahiludi anali wolemba mbiri." 
1Chronicles18:16 Ndi Zadoki mwana wa Ahitubu, ndi Abimeleki mwana wa Abyatara, anali ansembe, ndi Savisa anali mlembi," 
1Chronicles18:17 ndi Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada anayang'anira Akereti ndi Apeleti; koma ana a Davide ndiwo oyamba ku dzanja la mfumu. 
1Chronicles19:1 Ndipo zitatha izi, Nahasi mfumu ya ana a Amoni anamwalira, ndi mwana wace anakhala mfumu m'malo mwace." 
1Chronicles19:2 Ndipo Davide anati, Ndidzamcitira zokoma mtima Hanuni mwana wa Nahasi, popeza atate wace anandicitira ine zokoma mtima. Momwemo Davide anatuma mithenga imtonthoze mtima pa atate wace. Pofika anyamata ace a Davide ku dziko la ana a Amoni kwa Hanuni kumtonthoza mtima," 
1Chronicles19:3 akalonga a ana a Amoni anati kwa Hanuni, Davide ali kucitira atate wanu ulemu kodi, popeza anakutumizirani otonthoza? sakudzerani kodi anyamata ace kufunafuna, ndi kugubuduza, ndi kuzonda dziko?" 
1Chronicles19:4 Ndipo Hanuni anatenga anyamata a Davide, nawameta, nadula malaya ao pakati kufikira m'matako, nawaleka acoke." 
1Chronicles19:5 Pamenepo anamuka ena, namuuza Davide za amunawa. Natumiza iye kukomana nao, pakuti amunawa anacita manyazi kwambiri. Ndipo mfumu inati, Balindani ku Yeriko mpaka zamera ndebvu zanu; zitamera mubwere." 
1Chronicles19:6 Ndipo pamene ana a Amoni anaona kuti anadzinunkhitsa kwa Davide, Hanuni ndi ana a Amoni anatumiza matalente cikwi cimodzi a siliva, kudzilembera magareta ndi apakavalo ku Mesopotamiya, ndi ku Aramu-maaka, ndi ku Zoba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Momwemo anadzilembera magareta zikwi makumi atatu mphambu ziwiri, ndi mfumu ya Maaka ndi anthu ace; nadza iwo, namanga misasa cakuno ca Medeba. Ana a Amoni omwe anasonkhana m'midzi mwao, nadza kunkhondo." 
1Chronicles19:8 Pamene Davide anamva ici anatuma Yoabu ndi gulu lonse la anthu amphamvu. 
1Chronicles19:9 Ndipo ana a Amoni anaturuka, nandandalitsa nkhondo ku cipata ca mudzi, ndi mafumu adadzawo anali pa okha kuthengo." 
1Chronicles19:10 Pakuona Yoabu tsono kuti nkhondo inamdzera kumaso ndi kumbuyo, anasankha amuna osankhika onse a Israyeli, nawanika ayambane ndi Aaramu." 
1Chronicles19:11 Ndipo anthu otsala anawapereka m'dzanja la Abisai mbale wace; ndipo anadzinika avambane ndi ana a Amoni. 
1Chronicles19:12 Ndipo anati, Akandilaka Aaramu, udzandilanditsa ndiwe; koma akakulaka ana a Amoni, ndidzakulanditsa ndine." 
1Chronicles19:13 Limbika mtima, tilimbikire anthu athu, ndi midzi ya Mulungu wathu; ndipo Yehova acite comkomera." 
1Chronicles19:14 Pamenepo Yoabu ndi anthu anali naye anayandikira pamaso pa Aaramu kulimbana nao, ndipo anawathawa." 
1Chronicles19:15 Ndipo pakuona ana a Amoni kuti adathawa Aaramu, iwo omwe anathawa pamaso pa Abisai mbale wace, nalowa m'mudzi. Pamenepo Yoabu anadza ku Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles19:16 Ndipo pakuona Aaramu kuti Israyeli anawakantha, anatumiza mithenga, naturuka nao Aaramu akukhala tsidya lija la mtsinjewo; ndi Sofaki kazembe wa khamu la Hadarezeri anawatsogolera." 
1Chronicles19:17 Ndipo anamuuza Davide; namemeza iye Aisrayeli onse, naoloka Yordano, nawadzera, nanika nkhondo ayambane nao. Atandandalitsa nkhondo Davide kuyambana ndi Aaramu, anaponyana naye." 
1Chronicles19:18 Ndipo Aaramu anathawa pamaso pa Israyeli; ndipo Davide anapha Aaramu apamagareta zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi oyenda pansi zikwi makumi anai; napha Sofaki kazembe wa khamulo." 
1Chronicles19:19 Ndipo pakuona anyamata a Hadarezeri kuti Israyeli anawakantha, anapangana mtendere ndi Davide, namtumikira; ndi Aaramu anakana kuthandizanso ana a Amoni." 
1Chronicles20:1 Ndipo kunali, pofikanso caka, nyengo yakuturuka mafumu, Yoabu anatsogolera khamu lamphamvu, napasula dziko la ana a Amoni, nadza, naumangira misasa Raba. Koma Davide anakhala ku Yerusalemu. Ndipo Yoabu anakantha Raba, naupasula." 
1Chronicles20:2 Ndipo Davide anatenga korona wa mfumu yao kumcotsa pamutu pace, napeza kulemera kwace talente wa golidi; panalinso miyala ya mtengo wace pamenepo; ndipo anamuika pamutu pa Davide, naturutsa zankhondo za m'mudzimo zambiri ndithu." 
1Chronicles20:3 Naturutsanso anthu anali m'mwemo, nawaceka ndi mipeni ya mana mano, ndi zipangizo zocekera zacitsulo, ndi nkhwangwa. Anatero Davide ndi midzi yonse ya ana a Amoni. Ndipo Davide ndi anthu onse anabwera ku Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles20:4 Ndipo zitatha izi, inauka nkhondo ku Gezeri ndi Afilisti; pamenepo Sibekai Mhusati anapha Sipai wa ana a cimphona; ndipo anawagonjetsa." 
1Chronicles20:5 Ndipo panalinso nkhondo ndi Afgisti; ndi Elihanani mwana wa Yairi anapha Lami mbale wa Goliati Mgiti, amene luti la mkondo wace linanga mtanda woombera nsaru." 
1Chronicles20:6 Ndipo panalinso nkhondo ku Gati; kumeneko kunali munthu wa msinkhu waukuru, amene zala zace za kumanja ndi kumapazi ndizo makumi awiri mphambu zinai; zisanu ndi cimodzi ku dzanja liri lonse, ndi zisanu ndi cimodzi ku phazi liri lonse; nayenso anabadwa mwa cimphonaco." 
1Chronicles20:7 Ndipo potonza Israyeli iyeyu Yonatani mwana wa Simeya mbale wace wa Davide anamkantha. 
1Chronicles20:8 Awa anabadwa mwa cimphonaco ku Gati, koma anagwa ndi dzanja la Davide ndi la anyamata ace." 
1Chronicles21:1 Pamenepo Satana anaukira Israyeli, nasonkhezera Davide awerenge Israyeli." 
1Chronicles21:2 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Yoabu ndi kwa akuru a anthu, Kawerengeni Israyeli kuyambira ku Beereseba kufikira ku Dani; nimundibwezere mau, kuti ndidziwe ciwerengo cao." 
1Chronicles21:3 Nati Yoabu, Yehova aonjezere pa anthu ace monga ali kazana; koma, mbuyanga mfumu, sali onse anyamata akapolo a mbuyanga? nanga afuniranji cinthuci mbuyanga, adzaparamulitsa Israyeli bwanji?" 
1Chronicles21:4 Koma mau a mfumu anamlaka Yoabu. Naturuka Yoabu, nakayendayenda mwa Aisrayeli onse, nadza ku Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles21:5 Ndipo Yoabu anapereka kwa Davide ciwerengo ca anthu owerengedwa. Ndipo Aisrayeli onse anali zikwi mazana khumi ndi limodzi osolola lupanga, ndi Yuda anali zikwi mazana anai mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri akusolola lupanga," 
1Chronicles21:6 Koma sanawerenga Alevi ndi Abenjamini pakati pao; pakuti mau a mfumu anamnyansira Yoabu. 
1Chronicles21:7 Ndipo Mulungu anaipidwa naco cinthuci, cifukwa cace iye anakantha Israyeli." 
1Chronicles21:8 Pamenepo Davide anati kwa Mulungu, Ndacimwa kwakukuru ndi kucita cinthu ici; koma tsopano, mucotse mphulupulu ya kapolo wanu, pakuti ndacita kopusa ndithu." 
1Chronicles21:9 Ndipo Yehova ananena ndi Gadi mlauli wa Davide, ndi kuti," 
1Chronicles21:10 Kanene kwa Davide kuti, Atero Yehova, Ndikuikira zitatu; dzisankhireko cimodzi ndikucitire ici." 
1Chronicles21:11 Nadza Gadi kwa Davide, nanena naye, Atero Yehova, Dzitengereko;" 
1Chronicles21:12 kapena zaka zitatu za njala; kapena miyezi itatu ya kuthedwa pamaso pa adani ako, ndi kuti lupanga la adani ako likupeze; kapena masiku atatu lupanga la Yehova, ndilo mliri m'dzikomo, ndi mthenga wakuononga wa Yehova mwa malire onse a Israyeli, Ulingirire tsono, ndimbwezere mau anji iye amene anandituma ine?" 
1Chronicles21:13 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Gadi, Ndipsinjika kwambiri; ndigwere m'dzanja la Yehova, pakuti zifundo zace zicurukadi; koma ndisagwere m'dzanja la munthu." 
1Chronicles21:14 Momwemo Yehova anatumiza mliri pa Israyeli; ndipo adagwapo amuna zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri a Israyeli. 
1Chronicles21:15 Ndipo Mulungu anatuma mthenga ku Yerusalemu kuuononga; ndipo poti auononge, Yehova anapenya, naleka coipaci; nati kwa mthenga wakuononga, Cakwanira, bweza dzanja lako tsopano. Ndi mthenga wa Yehova anaima pa dwale la Orinani Myebusi," 
1Chronicles21:16 Ndipo Davide anakweza maso ace, naona mthenga wa Yehova alikuima pakati pa dziko ndi thambo, ali nalo lupanga losolola m'dzanja lace, lotambasukira pa Yerusalemu. Pamenepo Davide ndi akuru obvala ziguduli anagwa nkhope zao pansi." 
1Chronicles21:17 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Mulungu, Si ndine nanga ndalamulira kuti awerenge anthu? Inde, ndine amene ndacimwa ndi kucita coipa ndithu; koma nkhosa izi zinacitanji? dzanja lanu, Yehova Mulungu wanga, Gnditsutse ine ndi nyumba ya atate wanga, koma Gsatsutse anthu anu ndi kuwacitira mliri." 
1Chronicles21:18 Pamenepo mthenga wa Yehova anauza Gadi kuti anene ndi Davide, akwere Davideyo kuutsira Yehova guwa la nsembe pa dwale la Orinani Myebusi," 
1Chronicles21:19 Ndipo Davide anakwera monga mwa mau a Gadi adawanena m'dzina la Yehova. 
1Chronicles21:20 Poceuka Orinani anaona wamthengayo; ndi ana ace amuna anai anali naye anabisala. Koma Orinani analikupuntha tirigu. 
1Chronicles21:21 Ndipo pofika Davide kwa Orinani, Orinaniyo anapenyetsa, naona Davide, naturuka kudwale, nawerama kwa Davide, nkhope yace pansi." 
1Chronicles21:22 Davide tsono anati kwa Orinani, Ndipatse padwale pano kuti ndimangepo guwa la nsembe la Yehova; undipatse gi pa mtengo wace wonse, kuti mliri ulekeke pa anthu." 
1Chronicles21:23 Ndipo Orinani anati kwa Davide, Mulitenge, ndi mbuye wanga mfumu icite comkomera m'maso mwace; taonani, ndikupatsani ng'ombe za nsembe zopsereza; ndi zipangizo zopunthira zikhale nkhuni, ndi tirigu wa nsembe yaufa; ndizipereka zonse." 
1Chronicles21:24 Koma mfumu Davide anati kwa Orinani, lai, koma ndidzaligula pa mtengo wace wonse; pakuti sindidzatengera Yehova ciri cako, kapena kupereka nsembe yopsereza yopanda mtengo wace." 
1Chronicles21:25 Momwemo Davide anapatsa Orinani cogulira malowa golidi wa masekeli mazana asanu ndi limodzi kulemera kwace. 
1Chronicles21:26 Ndipo Davide anamangira Yehova guwa la nsembe komweko; napereka nsembe zopsereza, ndi nsembe zoyamika, naitana kwa Yehova; ndipo anamyankha ali m'Mwamba ndi mota pa guwa la nsembe yopsereza." 
1Chronicles21:27 Ndipo Yehova anauza wamthenga kuti abweze lupanga lace m'cimace. 
1Chronicles21:28 Nthawi yomweyi, pakuona Davide kuti Yehova anambvomereza pa dwale la Orinani Myebusi, anaphera nsembe pomwepo." 
1Chronicles21:29 Pakuti kacisi wa Yehova amene Mose anapanga m'cipululu, ndi guwa la nsembe yopsereza, zinali pa msanje wa ku Gibeoni nthawi yomweyi." 
1Chronicles21:30 Kama Davide sanathe kumuka kukhomo kwace kufunsira kwa Mulungu, pakuti anaopa lupanga la mthenga wa Yehova." 
1Chronicles22:1 Ndipo Davide anati, Pano padzakhala nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu, ndi pano padzakhala guwa la nsembe yopsereza la Israyeli." 
1Chronicles22:2 Ndipo Davide anati asonkhanitse alendo okhala m'dziko la Israyeli; iye naika osema miyala afukule miyala, aiseme kuti amange nayo nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Chronicles22:3 Nakonzeratu Davide citsulo cocuruka ca misomali ya ku zitseko za zipata, ndi ya kuphatikizitsa; ndi mkuwa wocuruka wosauyesa kulemera kwace;" 
1Chronicles22:4 ndi mitengo yamikungudza yosaiwerenga; pakuti Asidoni ndi Aturo anabwera nayo kwa Davide mitengo yamikungudza yocuruka," 
1Chronicles22:5 Ndipo Davide anati, Solomo mwana wanga ndiye mnyamata ndi wosakwima, ndi nyumba imene adzaimangira Yehova ikhale yaikuru yopambana, yomveka ndi ya ulemerero mwa maiko onse; ndiikonzeretu mirimo. Momwemo Davide anakonzeratu mocuruka asanamwalire." 
1Chronicles22:6 Pamenepo iye anaitana Solomo mwana wace, namlangiza ammangire Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli nyumba." 
1Chronicles22:7 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Solomo mwana wace, Kunena za ine, kumtima kwanga kudati, ndilimangire dzina la Yehova Mulungu wanga nyumba." 
1Chronicles22:8 Koma mau a Yehova anandidzera, kuti, Wakhetsa mwazi wocuruka, popeza wacita nkhondo zazikuru; sudzamangira dzina langa nyumba, popeza wakhetsa pansi mwazi wambiri pamaso panga;" 
1Chronicles22:9 taona, udzabala mwana, ndiye adzakhala munthu wa phe; ndipo nelidzampumulitsira adani ace onse pozungulirapo, pakuti dzina lace lidzakhala Solomo; ndipo ndidzapatsa Israyeli mtendere ndi bata masiku ace;" 
1Chronicles22:10 iyeyu adzamangira dzina langa nyumba; iye adzakhala mwana wanga, ndi Ine ndidzakhala Atate wace; ndipo ndidzakhazikitsa mpando wacifumu wa ufumu wace pa Israyeli kosalekeza." 
1Chronicles22:11 Tsono, mwana wanga, Yehova akhale nawe; nulemerere, numange nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wako monga ananena za iwe." 
1Chronicles22:12 Cokhaci, Yehova akupatse nzeru ndi luntha, nakulangize za Israyeli, kuti usunge cilamulo ca Yehova Mulungu wako," 
1Chronicles22:13 Momwemo udzalemerera, ukasamalira kucita malemba ndi maweruzo amene Yehova analangiza Mose za Israyeli; limbikatu, nulimbike mtima, usaope, usade mtima." 
1Chronicles22:14 Taona tsono, m'kuzunzika kwanga ndinakonzeratu nyumba ya Yehova matalente zikwi zana limodzi a golidi, ndi matalente zikwi zikwi a siliva, ndi mkuwa, ndi citsulo, osayesa kulemera kwace, pakuti zidacurukaeli; mitengo yomwe ndi miyala ndakonzeratu; nuonjezereko." 
1Chronicles22:15 Uli naonso anchito ocuruka ofukula miyala, ndi amisiri a miyala ndi a mitengo, ndi amuna onse aluso akucita nchito ziri zonse;" 
1Chronicles22:16 golidi, ndi siliva, ndi mkuwa, ndi citsulo, nzosawerengeka; nyamuka, nucite, Yehova akhale nawe." 
1Chronicles22:17 Davide analangizanso akalonga a Israyeli athanelize Solomo mwana wace, ndi kuti," 
1Chronicles22:18 Kodi Yehova Mulungu wanu sali nanu? sanakupumulitsani pambali ponse? pakuti anapereka nzika za m'dziko m'dzanja mwanga, ndi dziko lagonjetsedwa pamaso pa Yehova, ndi pamaso pa anthu ace." 
1Chronicles22:19 Perekani tsono mtima ndi moyo wanu kufunafuna Yehova Mulungu wanu; ndipo nyamukani ndi kumanga malo opatulika a Yehova Mulungu, kuti abwere nalo likasa la cipangano la Yehova, ndi zipangizo zopatulika za Mulungu, ku nyumba imene idzamangidwira dzina la Yehova." 
1Chronicles23:1 Atakalamba tsono Davide ndi kucuruka masiku, iye analonga mwana wace Solomo akhale mfumu ya Israyeli." 
1Chronicles23:2 Ndipo anasonkhanitsa akuru onse a Israyeli, ndi ansembe ndi Alevi." 
1Chronicles23:3 Ndipo anawerengedwa Alevi oyambira zaka makumi atatu ndi mphambu, ndipo ciwerengo cao kuwawerenga mmodzi mmodzi ndico amuna zikwi makumi atatu mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu." 
1Chronicles23:4 A iwowa zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai anayang'anira nchito ya nyumba ya Yehova, ndi zikwi zisanu ndi cimodzi ndiwo akapitao ndi oweruza," 
1Chronicles23:5 ndi zikwi zinai odikira; ndi zikwi zinai analemekeza Yehova ndi zoyimbira zimene ndinazipanga, anati Davide, kuti alemekeze nazo." 
1Chronicles23:6 Ndipo Davide anawagawa magawo monga mwa ana a Levi: Gerisomu, Kohati, ndi Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 A Agerisomu: Ladani ndi Simeyi," 
1Chronicles23:8 Ana a Ladani: wamkuru ndi Yehieli, ndi Zethamu, ndi Yoeli; atatu." 
1Chronicles23:9 Ana a Simeyi: Selomoti, ndi Hazieli, ndi Hanani; atatu. Ndiwo akuru a nyumba za makolo a Ladani." 
1Chronicles23:10 Ndi ana a Simeyi: Yahati, Zina, ndi Yeusi, ndi Beriya. Awa anai ndiwo ana a Simeyi." 
1Chronicles23:11 Wamkuru wa iwo ndi Yahati, mnzace ndi Ziza; koma Yeusi ndi Beriya analibe ana ambiri, potero anakhala nyumba ya kholo yowerengedwa pamodzi." 
1Chronicles23:12 Ana a Kohati: Amiramu, Izara, Hebroni, ndi Uzieli; anai." 
1Chronicles23:13 Ana a Amiramu: Aroni, ndi Mose; ndipo Aroni anasankhidwa kuti apatule zopatulikitsa, iye ndi ana ace, kosalekeza, kufukiza pamaso pa Yehova, kumtumikira, ndi kudalitsa m'dzina lace kosatha." 
1Chronicles23:14 Kunena za Mose munthu wa Mulunguyo, ana ace anaehulidwa mwa pfuko la Levi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Ana a Mose: Gerisomu, ndi Eliezeri." 
1Chronicles23:16 Ana a Gerisomu: wamkuru ndi Sebuyeli. 
1Chronicles23:17 Ndi ana a Eliezeri: wamkuru ndi Rehabiya. Ndipo Eliezeri analibe ana ena, koma ana a Rehabiya anacuruka kwambiri." 
1Chronicles23:18 Ana a Izara: wamkuru ndiye Selomiti. 
1Chronicles23:19 Ana a Hebroni: wamkuru ndi Yeriya, waciwiri ndi Amariya, wacitatu ndi Yehazieli, wacinai ndi Yekameamu," 
1Chronicles23:20 Ana a Uzieli: wamkuru ndi Mika, waciwiri ndi Isiya." 
1Chronicles23:21 Ana a Merari: Mali ndi Musi. Ndi ana a Mali: Eleazara ndi Kisi. 
1Chronicles23:22 Nafa Eleazara wopanda ana amuna, koma ana akazi ndiwo; ndi asuweni ao ana a Kisi anawatenga akhale akazi ao." 
1Chronicles23:23 Ana a Musi: Mali, ndi Ederi, ndi Yeremoti; atatu." 
1Chronicles23:24 Awa ndi ana a Levi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, ndiwo akuru a nyumba za makolo a iwo owerengedwa mwa ciwerengo ca maina mmodzi mmodzi, akugwira nchito ya utumiki wa nyumba ya Yehova, kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu." 
1Chronicles23:25 Pakuti Davide anati, Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli wapumulitsa anthu ace; ndipo akhala m'Yerusalemu kosatha;" 
1Chronicles23:26 ndiponso Alevi asasenzenso kacisi ndi zipangizo zace zonse za utumiki wace. 
1Chronicles23:27 Pakuti monga mwa mau ace otsiriza a Davide, ana a Levi anawerengedwa kuyambira a zaka makumi awiri ndi mphambu." 
1Chronicles23:28 Pakuti nchito yao ndiyo kuimirira ana a Aroni, atumikire m'nyumba ya Yehova, m'mabwalo, ndi kuzipinda, ndi kuyeretsa zopatulika zonse; inde nchito za utumiki wa nyumba ya Mulungu;" 
1Chronicles23:29 ya mkate woonekera womwe, ndi ya ufa wosalala wa nsembe yaufa, ndi ya timitanda taphanthiphanthi topanda cotupitsa, ndi ya ciwaya, ndi yakukazinga, ndi ya miyeso iri yonse;" 
1Chronicles23:30 ndi kuimirira m'mawa ndi m'mawa kuyamika ndi kulemekeza Yehova, momwemonso madzulo;" 
1Chronicles23:31 ndi kupereka nsembe zopsereza zonse kwa Yehova, za masabata, za pokhala mwezi, za nyengo zoikika, kuwerenga kwace monga mwa lemba lace, kosalekeza pamaso pa Yehova;" 
1Chronicles23:32 ndi kuti asunge udikiro wa cihema cokomanako, ndi udikiro wa malo opatulika ndi udikiro wa ana a Aroni abale ao, potumikira nyumba ya Yehova." 
1Chronicles24:1 Ndipo magawidwe a ana a Aroni ndi awa. Ana a Aroni: Nadabu, ndi Abihu, Eleazara, ndi Itamara." 
1Chronicles24:2 Koma Nadabu ndi Abihu anafa, atate wao akali ndi moyo, opanda ana; momwemo Eleazara ndi ltamara anacita nchito ya nsembe." 
1Chronicles24:3 Ndipo Davide pamodzi ndi Zadoki wa ana a Eleazara, ndi Ahimeleke wa ana a Itamara, anawagawa, monga mwa malongosoledwe ao m'utumiki wao." 
1Chronicles24:4 Ndipo anapeza kuti amuna akuru a ana a Eleazara anacuruka, a ana a Itamara anacepa; nawagawa motero: pa ana a Eleazara panali khumi mphambu asanu ndi mmodzi, akuru a nyumba za makolo; ndi pa ana a Itamara, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, panali asanu ndi atatu." 
1Chronicles24:5 Ndipo anawagawa ndi maere, awa ndi aja; pakuti panali akalonga a malo opatulika, ndi akalonga a kwa Mulungu, a ana a Eleazara ndi a ana a Itamara omwe." 
1Chronicles24:6 Ndi Semaya mwana wa Netaneli mlembi, ndiye wa Alevi, anawalembera pamaso pa mfumu; ndi akalonga, ndi Zadoki wansembe, ndi Ahimeleke mwana wa Abyatara, a akuru a nyumba za makolo a ansembe ndi Alevi, anatenga nyumba imodzi ya kholo lace ya Eleazara, ndi imodzi ya Itamara." 
1Chronicles24:7 Ndipo maere oyamba anamgwera Yehoyaribu, waciwiri Yedaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 wacitatu Harimu, wacinai Seorimu," 
1Chronicles24:9 wacisanu Malikiya, wacisanu ndi cimodzi Miyamini," 
1Chronicles24:10 wacisanu ndi ciwiri Hakozi, wacisanu ndi citatu Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 wacisanu ndi cinai Yesuwa, wakhumi Sekaniya," 
1Chronicles24:12 wakhumi ndi cimodzi Eliyasibu, wakhumi ndi ciwiri Yakimu," 
1Chronicles24:13 wakhumi ndi citatu Hupa, wakhumi ndi cinai Yesebeabu," 
1Chronicles24:14 wakhumi ndi cisanu Biliga, wakhumi ndi cisanu ndi cimodzi Imeri," 
1Chronicles24:15 wakhumi ndi cisanu ndi ciwiri Heziri, wakhumi ndi cisanu ndi citatu Hapizezi," 
1Chronicles24:16 wakhumi ndi cisanu ndi cinai Petahiya, wa makumi awiri Yehezikeli," 
1Chronicles24:17 wa makumi awiri ndi cimodzi Yakini, wa makumi awiri ndi ciwiri Gamuli," 
1Chronicles24:18 wa makumi awiri ndi citatu Delaya, wa makumi awiri ndi cinai Miziya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Awa ndi malongosoledwe ao m'utumiki wao kulowa m'nyumba ya Yehova, monga mwa ciweruzo adawapatsa Aroni atate wao, monga Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli anamlamulira." 
1Chronicles24:20 Ndipo wa ana otsala a Levi: wa ana a Amiramu, Subaeli; wa ana a Subaeli, Yedeya." 
1Chronicles24:21 Wa Rehabiya: wa ana a Rehabiya, mkuru ndi Isiya." 
1Chronicles24:22 Wa Aizari: Selomoti; wa ana a Selomoti, Yahati." 
1Chronicles24:23 Ndi wa ana a Hebroni: mkuru ndi Yeriya, waciwiri Amariya, wacitatu Yahazieli, wacinai Yekameamu." 
1Chronicles24:24 Wa ana a Uziyeli, Mika; wa ana a Mika, Samiri." 
1Chronicles24:25 Mbale wa Mika, Isiya; a ana a Isiya, Zekariya," 
1Chronicles24:26 Ana a Merari: Mali ndi Musi; mwana wa Yaziya, Beno." 
1Chronicles24:27 Ana a Merari: wa Yaziya, Beno, ndi Sohamu, ndi Sakuri, ndi Ibri." 
1Chronicles24:28 Wa Mali: Eleazara, ndiye wopanda ana." 
1Chronicles24:29 Wa Kisi: mwana wa Kisi, Yerameli." 
1Chronicles24:30 Ndi ana a Musi: Mali, ndi Ederi, ndi Yerimoti, Awa ndi ana a Alevi monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao." 
1Chronicles24:31 Awanso anacita maere monga abale ao ana a Aroni, pamaso pa Davide mfumu, ndi Zadoki, ndi Ahimeleki, ndi akuru a nyumba za makolo za ansembe ndi Alevi; mkuru wa nyumba za makolo monga mng'ono wace." 
1Chronicles25:1 Ndipo Davide ndi akazembe a gulu la nkhondo anapatulira utumikiwo ena a ana a Asafu, ndi a Hemani, ndi a Yedutuni, anenere ndi azeze, ndi zisakasa, ndi nsanje; ndi ciwerengo ca anchito monga mwa kutumikira kwao ndko:" 
1Chronicles25:2 a ana a Asafu: Zakuri, ndi Yosefe, ndi Netaniya, ndi Asarela, ana a Asafu; mwa cilangizo ca Asafu, wakunenera mwa cilangizo ca mfumu." 
1Chronicles25:3 A Yedntuni, ana a Yedutuni: Gedaliya, ndi Zeri, ndi Yesaya, Hasabiya, ndi Matitiya, asanu ndi mmodzi; mwa cilangizo ca atate wao Yedutuni, ndiye wakunenera ndi kuyamika ndi kulemekeza Yehova ndi zeze." 
1Chronicles25:4 A Hemani, ana a Hemani: Bukiya, Mataniya, Uziyeli, Sebuyeli, ndi Yerimoti, Hananiya, Hanani, Eliyata, Gidaliti, ndi Romamti-Ezeri, Yosibekasa, Maloti, Hotiri, Mahazioti;" 
1Chronicles25:5 awa onse ndiwo ana a Hemani mlauli wa mfumu m'mau a Mulungu, kuti akweze mphamvu yace. Ndipo Mulungu anapatsa Hemani ana amuna khumi ndi anai, ndi ana akazi atatu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Onsewa anawalangiza ndi atate wao ayimbe m'nyumba ya Yehova ndi nsanje, zisakasa ndi azeze; atumikire nazo m'nyumba ya Mulungu; ndipo Asafu, Yedutuni, ndi Hemani, anawalangiza ndi mfumu." 
1Chronicles25:7 Ndipo ciwerengo cao, pamodzi ndi abale ao ophunzitsidwa ayimbire Yehova, onse anthetemya, ndiwo mazana awiri mphambu makumi asanu ndi atatu." 
1Chronicles25:8 Ndipo anacita maere pa udikiro wao, analingana onse, ang'ono ndi akuru, mphunzitsi ndi wophunzira." 
1Chronicles25:9 Maere oyamba tsono anagwera a banja la Asafu ndiye Yosefe; waciwiri Gedaliya, iye ndi abale ace, ndi ana ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:10 wacitatu Zakuri, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:11 wacinai Izri, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:12 wacisanu Netaniya, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:13 wacisanu ndi cimodzi Bukiya, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:14 wacisanu ndi ciwiri Yesarela: ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri; 
1Chronicles25:15 wacisanu ndi citatu Yesaya, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:16 wacisanu ndi cinai Mataniya, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri:" 
1Chronicles25:17 wakhumi Simeyi, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:18 wakhumi ndi cimodzi Azareli, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:19 wakhumi ndi ciwiri Hasabiya, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:20 wakhumi ndi citatu Subaeli, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:21 wakhumi ndi cinai Matitiya, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:22 wakhumi ndi cisanu Yeremoti, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:23 wakhumi ndi cisanu ndi cimodzi Hananiya, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:24 wakhumi ndi cisanu ndi ciwiri Yosibekasa, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:25 wakhumi ndi cisanu ndi citatu Hanani, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:26 wakhumi ndi cisanu ndi cinai Maloti, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:27 wa makumi awiri Eliyata, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:28 wa makumi awiri ndi cimodzi Hotiri, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:29 wa makumi awiri ndi ciwiri Gidaliti, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:30 wa makumi awiri ndi citatu Mahazioti, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri;" 
1Chronicles25:31 wa makumi awiri ndi cinai RomamtiEzeri, ana ace ndi abale ace khumi ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles26:1 A magawidwe a odikira a Akora: Meselemiya mwana wa Kore wa ana a Asafu. 
1Chronicles26:2 Ndipo Meselemiya anali ndi ana, woyamba Zekariya, waciwiri Yedyaeli, wacitatu Zebadiya, wacinai Yatiniyeli," 
1Chronicles26:3 wacisanu Elamu, wacisanu ndi cimodzi Yohanana, wacisanu ndi ciwiri Elihunai." 
1Chronicles26:4 Ndipo Obedi Edomu anali nao ana, woyamba Semaya, waciwiri Yozabadi, wacitatu Yowa, wacinai Sakara, wacisanu Netaneli," 
1Chronicles26:5 wacisanu ndi cimodzi Amiyeli, wacisanu ndi ciwiri Isakara, wacisanu ndi citatu Peuletai; pakuti Mulungu adamdalitsa." 
1Chronicles26:6 Kwa Semaya mwana wace yemwe kunabadwa ana, akulamulira nyumba ya atate wao; pakuti anali ngwazi zamphamvu." 
1Chronicles26:7 Ana a Semaya: Otini, ndi Refaeli, ndi Obedi, Elzabadi, amene abale ao ndiwo odziwa mphamvu, Elihu, ndi Semakiya." 
1Chronicles26:8 Onsewa ndiwo a ana a Obedi Edomu; iwo ndi ana ao, ndi abale ao, anthu odziwa mphamvu yakutumikira, makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu awiri a Obedi Edomu." 
1Chronicles26:9 Ndi Meselemiya anali ndi ana, ndi abale odziwa mphamvu khumi mphambu asanu ndi atatu." 
1Chronicles26:10 Hosa yemwe wa ana a Merari anali ndi ana, wamkuru ndi Simri; pakuti ngakhale sanali wobadwa woyamba, atate wace anamuyesa wamkuru;" 
1Chronicles26:11 waciwiri Hilikiya, wacitatu Tebaliya, wacinai Zekariya; ana ndi abale onse a Hosa ndiwo khumi ndi atatu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Mwa iwowa munali magawidwe a odikira, mwa akulu a amuna akucita udikiro wao, monga abale ao, kutumikira m'nyumba ya Yehova." 
1Chronicles26:13 Ndipo anacita maere ang'ono ndi akuru, monga mwa nyumba za makolo ao, kucitira zipata zonse." 
1Chronicles26:14 Ndi maere a kum'mawa anagwera Selemiya. Ndipo anacitira maere Zekariya mwana wace, phungu wanzeru, ndi maere anamgwera kumpoto;" 
1Chronicles26:15 Obedi Edomu kumwela, ndi ana ace nyumba ya akatundu." 
1Chronicles26:16 Supimu ndi Hosa kumadzulo, ku cipata ca Saleketi, ku mseu wokwerapo, udikiro pandunji pa udikiro." 
1Chronicles26:17 Kum'mawa kunali Alevi asanu ndi mmodzi, kumpoto anai tsiku ndi tsiku, kumwela anai tsiku ndi tsiku, ndi a nyumba ya akatundu awiri ndi awiri." 
1Chronicles26:18 Ku Parabara kumadzulo anai kumseu, ndi awiri ku Parabara." 
1Chronicles26:19 Awa ndi magawidwe a odikira; a ana a Akora, ndi a ana a Merari." 
1Chronicles26:20 Ndipo wa Alevi, Ahiya anayang'anira cuma ca nyumba ya Mulungu, ndi cuma ca zopatulika." 
1Chronicles26:21 Ana a Ladani: ana a Ladani a Agerisoni, akuru a nyumba za makolo a Ladani Mgerisoni, Yehieli." 
1Chronicles26:22 Ana a Yehieli: Zetamu ndi Yoeli mbale wace, oyang'anira cuma ca nyumba ya Yehova." 
1Chronicles26:23 A Amirami, a Aizari, a Ahebroni, a Auziyeli;" 
1Chronicles26:24 ndi Sebueli mwana wa Gerisomu, mwana wa Mose, ndiye mkuru woyang'anira zuma." 
1Chronicles26:25 Ndi abale ace a Eliezeri: Rehabiya mwana wace, ndi Yesava mwana wace ndi Yorramu mwana wace, ndi Zikiri mwana wace, ndi Selomoti mwana wace." 
1Chronicles26:26 Selomoti amene ndi abale ace anayang'anira cuma conse ca zinthu zopatulika, zimene Davide mfumu ndi akuru a nyumba za akulu, akuru a zikwi ndi mazana, adazipatula." 
1Chronicles26:27 Kutenga pa zofunkha kunkhondo, anapatulako kukonzera nyumba ya Yehova." 
1Chronicles26:28 Ndipo zonse adazipatula Samueli mlauli, ndi Sauli mwana wa Kisi, ndi Abineri mwana wa Neri, ndi Yoabu mwana wa Zeruya; ali yense anapatula kanthu kali konse, anazisunga Selomoti ndi abale ace." 
1Chronicles26:29 A Aizara: Kenaniya ndi ana ace anacita nchito ya pabwalo ya Israyeli, akapitao ndi oweruza mirandu." 
1Chronicles26:30 A Ahebroni: Hasabiya ndi abale ace odziwa mphamvu cikwi cimodzi mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri anayang'anira Israyeli tsidya lino la Yordano kumadzulo, kuyang'anira nchito yonse ya Yehova, ndi kutumikira mfumu." 
1Chronicles26:31 Yeriya ndiye mkuru wa Ahebroni, wa Ahebroni monga mwa mibadwo ya nyumba za makolo. Caka ca makumi anai ca ufumu wa Davide anafunafuna, napeza mwa iwowa ngwazi zamphamvu ku Yazeri wa ku Gileadi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Ndi abale ace ngwazi ndiwo zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana asanu ndi awiri, akuru a nyumba za makolo, amene mfumu Davide anaika akhale oyang'anira a Arubeni, ndi Agadi, ndi pfuko la Manase logawika pakati, pa zinthu zonse za Mulungu ndi zinthu za mfumu." 
1Chronicles27:1 Ndipo ana a Israyeli monga mwa ciwerengo cao, kunena za akuru a nyumba za makolo ao, ndi akazembe a zikwi, ndi a mazana, ndi akapitao ao akutumikira mfumu mu nchito iri yonse ya magawidwe, akulowa ndi kuturuka mwezi ndi mwezi, miyezi yonse ya caka, cigawo ciri conse nca amuna zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai." 
1Chronicles27:2 Woyang'anira cigawo coyamba ca mwezi, woyamba ndiye Yasobeamu mwana wa Zabidiyeli; m'cigawo mwace munali zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai." 
1Chronicles27:3 Ndiye wa ana a Perezi, mkuru wa akazembe onse a khamu mwezi woyamba." 
1Chronicles27:4 Woyang'anira cigawo ca mwezi waciwiri ndiye Dodai M-ahohi ndi cigawo cace; ndi Mikiloti mtsogoleri, ndi m'cigawo cace munali zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai." 
1Chronicles27:5 Kazembe wacitatu wa khamu wa mwezi wacitatu ndiye Benaya mwana wa Yehoyada wansembe wamkuru; ndi m'cigawo mwacemunalinso zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:6 Benaya ameneyo ndiye wamphamvu uja wa makumi atatu aja, woyang'anira makumi atatu aja; woyang'anira cigawo cace ndi Amizabadi mwana wace." 
1Chronicles27:7 Wacinai wa mwezi wacinai ndiye Asebeli mbale wa Yoabu, ndi pambuyo pace Zebadiya mwana wace; ndi m'cigawo mwace munali zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai." 
1Chronicles27:8 Kazembe wacisanu wa mwezi wacisanu ndiye Samuti M-izra; ndi m'cigawo mwace zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:9 Wacisanu ndi cimodzi wa mwezi wacisanu ndi cimodzi ndiye Ira mwana wa Ikesi Mtekoi; ndi m'cigawo mwace zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:10 Wacisanu ndi ciwiri wa mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri ndiye Helezi Mpeloni wa ana a Efraimu; ndi m'cigawo mwace zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:11 Wacisanu ndi citatu wa mwezi wacisanu ndi citatu ndiye Sibekai Mhusati wa Afera; ndi m'cigawo mwace zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:12 Wacisanu ndi cinai wa mwezi wacisanu ndi cinai ndiye Abiezeri M-anatoti wa Abenjamini; ndi m'cigawo mwace zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:13 Wakhumi wa mwezi wakhumi ndiye Maharai Mnetofati wa Azera; ndi m'cigawo mwace zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:14 Wakhumi ndi cimodzi wa mwezi wakhumi ndi cimodzi ndiye Benaya Mpiratoni wa ana a Efraimu; ndi m'cigawo mwace zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:15 Wakhumi ndi ciwiri wa mwezi wakhumi ndi ciwiri ndiye Heledai Mnetofati wa Otiniyeli; ndi m'cigawo mwace zikwi makumi awiri mphambu zinai. 
1Chronicles27:16 Koma oyang'anira mafuko a lsrayeli ndi awa: wa Arubeni mtsogoleri wao ndiye Eliezeri mwana wa Zikiri; wa Asimeoni, Sefatiya mwana wa Maaka;" 
1Chronicles27:17 wa Alevi, Hasabiya mwana wa Kemueli; wa Aroni, Zadoki;" 
1Chronicles27:18 wa Yuda, Elihu mbale wina wa Davide; wa Isakara, Omri mwana wa Mikaeli;" 
1Chronicles27:19 wa Zebuluni, Isimaya mwana wa Obadiya; wa Nafitali, Yeremoti mwana wa Azrieli;" 
1Chronicles27:20 wa ana a Efraimu, Hoseya mwana wa Azaziya; wa pfuko la Manase logawika pakati, Yoeli mwana wa Pedaya;" 
1Chronicles27:21 wa pfuko la Manase logawika pakati m'Gileadi, Ido mwana wa Zekariya; wa Benjamini, Yasiyeli mwana wa Abineri;" 
1Chronicles27:22 wa Dani, Azareli mwana wa Yerohamu. Awa ndi akazembe a mapfuko a Israyeli." 
1Chronicles27:23 Koma Davide sanawerenga iwo a zaka makumi awiri ndi ocepapo, pakuti Yehova adati kuti adzacurukitsa Israyeli ngati nyenyezi za kuthambo." 
1Chronicles27:24 Yoabu mwana wa Zeruya anayamba kuwerenga, koma sanatsiriza; ndi mkwiyo unagwera Israyeli cifukwa ca ici, ndipo ciwerengo cao sicinalembedwa m'buku la mbiri ya mfumu Davide." 
1Chronicles27:25 Ndipo woyang'anira cuma ca mfumu ndiye Azimaveti mwana wa Adiyeli, ndi woyang'anira wa cuma ca m'minda, m'mizinda ndi m'miraga, ndi nyumba za nsanja, ndiye Yonatani mwana wa Uziya;" 
1Chronicles27:26 ndi woyang'anira iwo akugwira nchito ya m'munda yakulima nthaka ndiye Ezri mwana wa Kelubi; 
1Chronicles27:27 ndi woyang'anira minda yamphesa ndiye Simeyi Mramati; ndi woyang'anira zipatso za minda yamphesa zisungike mosungiramo vinyo ndiye Zabidi Msifimi; 
1Chronicles27:28 ndi woyang'anira mitengo yaazitona, ndi yamikuyu yokhala kuzidikha kunsi, ndiye Baala Hanani Mgederi; ndi woyang'anira zosungiramo mafuta ndiye Yoasi;" 
1Chronicles27:29 ndi woyang'anira ng'ombe zakudya m'Saroni ndiye Sitirai Msaroni; ndi woyang'anira ng'ombe za m'zigwa ndiye Safabi mwana wa Adilai; 
1Chronicles27:30 ndi woyang'anira ngamira ndiye Obili M-israyeli; ndi woyang'anira aburu ndiye Yedeya Mmeronoti; 
1Chronicles27:31 ndi woyang'anira zoweta zazing'ono ndiye Yazizi Mhagiri, Onsewa ndiwo akuru a zolemera zace za Davide." 
1Chronicles27:32 Ndipo Yonatani atate wace wina wa Davide anali phungu, munthu wanzeru ndi mlembi; ndi Yehieli mwana wa Hakimoni anakhala ndi ana a mfumu;" 
1Chronicles27:33 ndi Ahitofeli anali phungu wa mfumu, ndi Husai M-ariki anali bwenzi la mfumu;" 
1Chronicles27:34 ndi wotsatana ndi Ahitofeli, Yehoyada mwana wa Benaya, ndi Abyatara; koma kazembe wa nkhondo ya mfumu ndiye Yoabu." 
1Chronicles28:1 Pamenepo Davide anasonkhanitsa ku Yerusalemu akalonga Israyeli, a akalonga a mapfuko, ndi akuru a zigawo zakutumikira mfumu, ndi akulu a zikwi, ndi akuru a mazana, ndi akuru a zolemera zonse, ndi zoweta zonse za mfumu, ndi ana ace; pamodzi ndi akapitao ndi anthu amphamvu, ndiwo ngwazi zamphamvu onsewo." 
1Chronicles28:2 Ndipo mfumu Davide anaima ciriri, nati, Mundimvere ine, abale anga ndi anthu anga, ine kumtima kwanga ndinafuna kulimangira likasa la cipangano la Yehova, ndi popondapo mapazi a Mulungu wathu nyumba yopumulira, ndipo ndidakonzeratu za nyumbayi." 
1Chronicles28:3 Koma Mulungu anati kwa ine, Sudzamangira dzina langa nyumba, popeza ndiwe munthu wa nkhondo wokhetsa mwazi." 
1Chronicles28:4 Komatu Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli anasankha ine m'nyumba yonse ya atate wanga, ndikhale mfumu ya Israyeli kosatha; pakuti anasankhiratu Yuda akhale mtsogoleri, ndi m'nyumba ya Yuda nyumba ya atate wanga, ndi mwa ana a atate wanga ndinamkomera ndine, andilonge ufumu wa Israyeli yense;" 
1Chronicles28:5 ndi mwa ana anga onse (pakuti Yehova wandipatsa ana amuna ambiri), anasankha Solomo mwana wanga akhale pa mpando wacifumu wa ufumu wa Yehova kuweruza Israyeli." 
1Chronicles28:6 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Solomo mwana wako ndiye adzandimangira nyumba yanga ndi mabwalo anga; pakuti ndamsankha akhale mwana wanga, ndipo Ine ndidzakhala atate wace." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ndipo ndidzakhazikitsa ufumu wace kosatha, akalimbika kucita malamulo anga ndi maweruzo anga monga lero lino." 
1Chronicles28:8 Ndipo tsopano, pamaso pa Aisrayeli onse, khamu la Yehova, ndi m'makutu a Mulungu wathu, sungani, nimufunefune malamulo onse a Yehova Mulungu wanu, kuti mukhale nalo lanu lanu dziko lokoma ili, ndi kulisiyira ana anu pambuyo panu colowa cao kosalekeza." 
1Chronicles28:9 Ndipo iwe Solomo mwana wanga, umdziwe Mulungu wa atate wako, umtumikire ndi mtima wangwiro ndi moyo waufulu; pakuti Yehova asanthula mitima yonse, nazindikira zolingirira zonse za maganizo; ukamfunafuna iye udzampeza, koma ukamsiya iye adzakusiya kosatha." 
1Chronicles28:10 Cenjera tsono, pakuti Yehova anakusankha iwe umange nyumba ya malo opatulika; limbika, nucite." 
1Chronicles28:11 Pamenepo Davide anapatsa Solomo mwana wace cifaniziro ca likole la kacisi, ndi ca nyumba zace, ndi ca zosungiramo cuma zace, ndi ca zipinda zosanjikizana zace, ndi ca zipinda zace za m'katimo, ndi ca kacisi wotetezerapo;" 
1Chronicles28:12 ndi cifaniziro ca zonse anali nazo mwa mzimu, ca mabwalo a nyumba ya Yehova, ndi ca zipinda zonse pozungulirapo, ca zosungiramo cuma za nyumba ya Mulungu, ndi ca zosungiramo cuma za zinthu zopatulika;" 
1Chronicles28:13 ndi ca magawidwe a ansembe ndi Alevi, ndi ca nchito zonse za utumiki wa nyumba ya Yehova, ndi ca zipangizo za utumiki wa nyumba ya Yehova;" 
1Chronicles28:14 ca golidi woyesedwa kulemera kwace wa zipangizo zagolidi, wa zipangizo zonse za nchito ya mtundu uli wonse; ca siliva wa zipangizo zasiliva woyesedwa kulemera kwace, wa zipangizo za nchito ya mitundu mitundu;" 
1Chronicles28:15 mwa kulemera kwacenso ca zoikapo nyali zagolidi, ndi nyali zace zagolidi, mwa kulemera kwace ca coikapo nyali ciri conse, ndi nyali zace; ndi ca zoikapo nyali zasiliva, siliva woyesedwa kulemera kwace wa coikapo nyali ciri conse, ndi nyali zace, monga mwa coikapo nyali ciri conse;" 
1Chronicles28:16 ndi golidi woyesedwa kulemera kwace wa magome a makate woonekera, wa gome liri lonse; ndi siliva wa magome asiliva," 
1Chronicles28:17 ndi mitengo, ndi mbale zowazira, ndi zikho za golidi woona, ndi ca mitsuko yace yagolidi, woyesedwa kulemera kwace mtsuko uli wonse; ndi ca mitsuko yasiliva woyesedwa kulemera kwace mtsuko uli wonse;" 
1Chronicles28:18 ndi ca guwa la nsembe lofukizapo la golidi woyengetsa woyesedwa kulemera kwace, ndi cifaniziro ca gareta wa akerubi agolidi akufunyulula mapiko ao ndi kuphimba likasa la cipangano la Yehova." 
1Chronicles28:19 Conseci, anati Davide, anandidziwitsa ndi kucilemba kucokera kwa dzanja la Yehova; ndizo nchito zonse za cifaniziro ici." 
1Chronicles28:20 Ndipo Davide anati kwa Solomo mwana wace, Limbika, nulimbe mtima, nucicite; usaopa, kapena kutenga nkhawa; pakuti Yehova Mulungu, ndiye Mulungu wanga, ali nawe; sadzakusowa kapena kukutaya mpaka zitatha nchito zonse za utumiki wa nyumba ya Yehova." 
1Chronicles28:21 Ndipo taona, pali zigawo za ansembe ndi Alevi, za utumiki wonse wa nyumba ya Mulungu; ndipo pamodzi nawe mu nchito iri yonse pali onse ofuna eni ace aluso, acite za utumiki uli wonse; akuru omwe ndi anthu onse adzacita monga umo udzanenamo." 
1Chronicles29:1 Mfumu Davide ananenanso kwa khamu lonse, Mulungu wasankha mwana wanga Solomo yekha, ndiye mnyamata ndi wosakhwima; ndipo nchitoyi ndi yaikuru, pakuti cinyumbaci siciri ca munthu, koma ca Yehova Mulungu." 
1Chronicles29:2 Ndi mphamvu yanga yonse tsono ndakonzeratu nyumba ya Mulungu wanga, golidi wa zija zagolidi ndi siliva wa zija zasiliva, ndi mkuwa wa zija zamkuwa, citsulo ca zija zacitsulo, ndi mtengo wa zija zamtengo, miyala yaberulo, ndi miyala yoikika, miyala yokometsera, ndi ya mawanga mawanga, ndi miyala ya mtengo wace ya mitundu mitundu ndi miyala yansangalabwe yocuruka." 
1Chronicles29:3 Ndiponso popeza ndikondwera nayo nyumba ya Mulungu wanga, cuma cangacanga ca golidi ndi siliva ndiri naco ndicipereka ku nyumba ya Mulungu wanga, moenjezera ndi zonse ndazikonzeratu nyumba yopatulikayo;" 
1Chronicles29:4 ndico matalente zikwi zitatu za golidi, golidi wa Ofiri; ndi matalente zikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri a siliva woyengetsa, kumamatiza nazo makoma a nyumbazi;" 
1Chronicles29:5 golidi wa zija zagolidi, ndi siliva wa zija zasiliva, ndi za nchito ziri zonse akuzipanga manja a amisiri. Ndani uyo afuna mwini kudzipatulira kwa Yehova lero line?" 
1Chronicles29:6 Pamenepo akuru a nyumba za makolo, ndi akuru a mafuko a Israyeli, ndi akuru a zikwi ndi a mazana pamodzi ndi iwo oyang'anira nchito ya mfumu, anapereka mwaufulu," 
1Chronicles29:7 napereka ku utumiki wa nyumba ya Mulungu golidi matalente zikwi zisanu, ndi madariki zikwi khumi; ndi siliva matalente zikwi khumi, ndi mkuwa matalente zikwi khumi mphambu zisanu ndi zitatu, ndi citsulo matalente zikwi zana limodzi." 
1Chronicles29:8 Ndipo amene anali nayo miyala ya mtengo wace anaipereka ku cuma ca nyumba ya Yehova, mwa dzanja la Yehieli Mgerisoni." 
1Chronicles29:9 Ndipo anthu anakondwera popeza anapereka mwaufulu; pakuti ndi mtima wangwiro anapereka mwaufulu kwa Yehova; mfumu Davide yemwe anakondwera ndi cimwemwe cacikuru. 
1Chronicles29:10 Motero Davide analemekeza Yehova pamaso pa khamu lonse, nati Davide, Wolemekezedwa Inu, Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, Atate wathu ku nthawi zomka muyaya." 
1Chronicles29:11 Ukulu, ndi mphamvu, ndi ulemerero, ndi kulakika, ndi cifumu ndi zanu, Yehova; pakuti zonse zam'mwamba ndi pa dziko lap ansi ndi zanu; ufumu ndi wanu, Yehova; ndipo mwakwezeka mutu wa pa zonse." 
1Chronicles29:12 Zolemera ndi ulemu zifuma kwanu, ndipo mucita ufumu pa zonse, ndi m'dzanja mwanu muli mphamvu yaikuru; kukuza ndi kupatsa onse mphamvu kuli m'dzanja lanu." 
1Chronicles29:13 Motero tsono, Mulungu wathu, tikuyamikani ndi kulemekeza dzina lanu lokoma." 
1Chronicles29:14 Kama ndine yani, ndi anthu anga ndiwo ayani, kuti tidzakhoza kupereka mwaufulu motere? popeza zonsezi zifuma kwanu; takupatsani zofuma ku dzanja lanu." 
1Chronicles29:15 Pakuti ife ndife alendo pamaso panu, ndi ogonera, monga makolo athu onse; masiku athu a padziko akunga mthunzi, ndipo palibe kukhalitsa." 
1Chronicles29:16 Yehova Mulungu wathu, zounjikika izi zonse tazikonzeratu kukumangirani Inu nyumba ya dzina lanu loyera zifuma ku dzanja lanu, zonsezi ndi zanu." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ndidziwanso, Mulungu wanga, kuti muyesa mtima, nimukondwera nako kuongoka. Kama ine, ndi mtima wanga woongoka ndapereka zonsezi mwaufulu; ndipo tsopano ndaona mokondwera anthu anu okhala pompano, napereka kwa Inu mwaufulu." 
1Chronicles29:18 Yehova Mulungu wa Abrahamu, wa Isake, ndi wa Israyeli makolo athu, musungitse ici kosatha m'cilingaliro ca maganizo a mtima wa anthu anu, nimulunjikitse mitima yao kwanu," 
1Chronicles29:19 nimupatse Solomo mwana wanga mtima wangwiro kusunga malamulo anu, mboni zanu, ndi malemba anu, ndi kucita izi zonse, ndi kumanga cinyumbaci cimene ndakonzeratu mirimo yace," 
1Chronicles29:20 Ndipo Davide anati kwa khamu lonse, Mulemekeze tsono Yehova Mulungu wanu. Ndi khamu lonse linalemekeza Yehova Mulungu wa makolo ao, nawerama, nalambira Yehova, ndi mfumu." 
1Chronicles29:21 Ndipo anamphera Yehova nsembe, napereka nsembe zopsereza kwa Yehova m'mawa mwace mwa tsiku lija, ndizo ng'ombe cikwi cimodzi, nkhosa zamphongo cikwi cimodzi, ndi ana a nkhosa cikwi cimodzi, pamodzi ndi nsembe zao zothira, ndi nsembe zocuruka za Aisrayeli onse:" 
1Chronicles29:22 nadya namwa pamaso pa Mulungu tsiku lomwelo ndi cimwemwe cacikuru. Ndipo analonga ufumu Solomo mwana wa Davide kaciwiri, namdzozera Yehova akhale kalonga, ndi Zadoki akhale wansembe." 
1Chronicles29:23 Momwemo Solomo anakhala pa mpando wacifumu wa Yehova, ndiye mfumu m'malo mwa Davide atate wace, nalemerera, nammvera iye Aisrayeli onse." 
1Chronicles29:24 Ndi akuru onse, ndi amuna amphamvu onse, ndi ana amuna onse omwe a mfumu Davide, anagonjeratu kwa Solomo mfumu." 
1Chronicles29:25 Ndipo Yehova anakuza Solomo kwakukuru pamaso pa Aisrayeli onse, nampatsa ulemerero wacifumu, wakuti, asanakhale iyeyu, panalibe mfumu ya Israyeli inali nao wotero." 
1Chronicles29:26 Momwemo Davide mwana wa Jese adakhala mfumu ya Aisrayeli onse. 
1Chronicles29:27 Ndipo nthawi yoti anakhala mfumu ya Israyeli ndiyo zaka makumi anai; zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri anakhala mfumu m'Hebroni, ndi zaka makumi atatu anakhala mfumu m'Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles29:28 Nafa atakalamba bwino, wocuruka masiku, zolemera, ndi ulemerero; ndi Solomo mwana wace anakhala mfumu m'malo mwaceo" 
1Chronicles29:29 Zocita mfumu Davide tsono, zoyamba ndi zotsiriza, taonani, zalembedwa m'buku la mau a Samueli mlauli, ndi m'buku la mau a Natani mneneri, ndi m'buku la mau a Gadi mlauli;" 
1Chronicles29:30 pamodzi ndi za ufumu wace wonse, ndi mphamvu yace, ndi za nthawizo zidampitira iye, ndi Israyeli, ndimaufumu onse a maiko." 
2Chronicles1:1 NDIPO Solomo mwana wa Davide analimbikitsidwa m'ufumu wace, ndipo Yehova Mulungu wace anali naye, namkuza kwakukuru." 
2Chronicles1:2 Ndipo Solomo analankhula ndi Aisrayeli onse, ndi akuru a zikwi ndi a mazana, ndi kwa oweruza, ndi kwa kalonga ali yense wa Israyeli, akuru a nyumba za makolo." 
2Chronicles1:3 Ndipo Solomo ndi khamu lonse pamodzi naye anamuka ku msanje wa ku Gibeoni; pakuti kumeneko kunali cihema cokomanako ca Mulungu adacimanga Mose mtumiki wa Yehova m'cipululu. 
2Chronicles1:4 Koma likasa la Mulungu Davide adakwera nalo kucokera ku Kiriyati Yearimu kumka kumene Davide adalikonzeratu malo; pakuti adaliutsiratu hema ku Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles1:5 Guwa la nsembe lomwe lamkuwa, adalipanga Bezaleli mwana wa Uri mwana wa Huri linali komweko, ku khomo la kacisi wa Yehova; ndipo Solomo ndi khamulo anafunako." 
2Chronicles1:6 Nakwerako Solomo ku guwa la nsembe pamaso pa Yehova linali ku cihema cokomanako, napereka pamenepo nsembe zopsereza cikwi cimodzi." 
2Chronicles1:7 Usiku womwewo Mulungu anaonekera kwa Solomo, nati kwa iye, Pempha comwe ndikupatse." 
2Chronicles1:8 Nati Solomo kwa Mulungu, Mwacitira Davide atate wanga zokoma zambiri, ndipo mwandiika mfumu m'malo mwace." 
2Chronicles1:9 Tsopano, Yehova Mulungu, likhazikike lonjezano lanu la kwa Davide atate wanga; pakuti mwandiika mfumu ya anthu akucuruka ngati pfumbi lapansi." 
2Chronicles1:10 Mundipatse tsono nzeru ndi cidziwitso, kuti ndituruke ndi kulowa pamaso pa anthu awa; pakuti angathe ndani kuweruza anthu anu awa ambiri?" 
2Chronicles1:11 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Solomo, Popeza cinali mumtima mwako ici, osapempha cuma, akatundu, kapena ulemu, kapena moyo wa iwo akudana nawe, osapemphanso masiku ambiri; koma wadzipemphera nzeru ndi cidziwitso, kuti uweruze anthu anga amene ndakuika ukhale mfumu yao," 
2Chronicles1:12 nzeru ndi cidziwitso zipatsidwa kwa iwe, ndidzakupatsanso cuma, ndi akatundu, ndi ulemu, zotere zonga sanakhala nazo mafumu akale usanakhale iwe, ndi akudza pambuyo pako sadzakhala nazo zotero." 
2Chronicles1:13 Momwemo Solomo anadza ku Yerusalemu kucokera ku msanje uli ku Gibeoni, ku khomo la cihema cokomanako; ndipo anacita ufumu pa Israyeli." 
2Chronicles1:14 Ndipo Solomo anasonkhanitsa magareta ndi apakavalo, nakhala nao magareta cikwi cimodzi mphambu mazana anai, ndi apakavalo zikwi khumi ndi ziwiri; nawaika m'midzi ya magareta ndi kwa mfumu ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles1:15 Ndipo mfumu inatero kuti siliva ndi golidi zikhale m'Yerusalemu ngati miyala, ndi kuti mikungudza icuruke ngati mikuyu yokhala kucidikha." 
2Chronicles1:16 Ndi akavalo amene Solomo anali nao anafuma ku Aigupto; amalonda a mfumu anawalandira magulu magulu, gulu liri lonse mtengo wace." 
2Chronicles1:17 Ndipo anatenga naturuka nalo gareta ku Aigupto mtengo wace masekeli a siliva mazana asanu ndi limodzi, ndi kavalo mtengo wace zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu; momwemo anawaturutsira mafumu onse a Ahiti, ndi mafumu a Aramu, ndi dzanja lao." 
2Chronicles2:1 Ndipo a Solomo anati alimangire dzina la Yehova nyumba, ndiponso nyumba ya ufumu wace." 
2Chronicles2:2 Nawerenga Solomo amuna zikwi khumi mphambu makumi asanu ndi limodzi osenza mirimo, ndi amuna zikwi makumi asanu ndi atatu otema mitengo m'mapiri, ndi zikwi zitatu mphambu mazana asanu ndi limodzi kuwayang'anira." 
2Chronicles2:3 Ndipo Solomo anatumiza kwa Huramu mfumu ya Turo, ndi kuti, Monga momwe munacitira Davide atate wanga, ndi kumtumizira mikungudza yommangira nyumba yokhalamo, mundicitire ine momwemo." 
2Chronicles2:4 Taonani, nditi ndilimangire dzina la Yehova Mulungu wanga nyumba, kumpatulira iyo, ndi kufukiza pamaso pace zonunkhira za pfungo lokoma, ndiyo ya mkate woonekera wacikhalire, ndi ya nsembe zopsereza, m'mawa ndi madzulo, pamasabata, ndi pokhala mwezi, ndi pa madyerero oikika a Yehova Mulungu wathu. Ndiwo macitidwe osatha m'Israyeli." 
2Chronicles2:5 Ndipo nyumba nditi ndimangeyi ndi yaikuru; pakuti Mulungu wathu ndiye wamkuru woposa milungu yonse. 
2Chronicles2:6 Koma ali nayo mphamvu ndani yakummangira Iye nyumba, popeza thambo lam'mwambamwamba silimfikira? ndine yani ine tsono, kuti ndimmangire nyumba, koma kumfukizira cofukiza ndiko?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Ndipo tsono munditumizire munthu wa luso lakucita ndi golidi, ndi siliva, ndi mkuwa, ndi citsulo, ndi thonje lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi lamadzi, wakudziwa kuzokota zozokota ziri zonse, akhale ndi amuna aluso okhala ndi ine m'Yuda ndi m'Yerusalemu, amene Davide atate wanga anawakonzeratu." 
2Chronicles2:8 Munditumizirenso mitengo yamikungudza, ndi yamlombwa, ndi yambawa, ya ku Lebano; pakuti ndidziwa kuti anyamata anu adziwa kutema mitengo m'Lebano; ndipo taonani, anyamata anga adzakhala ndi anyamata anu," 
2Chronicles2:9 ndiko kundikonzera mitengo yambirimbiri; pakuti nyumbayi nditi ndiimange idzakhala yaikuru ndi yodabwitsa. 
2Chronicles2:10 Ndipo taonani, ndidzawapatsa anyamata anu otema akulikha mitengo miyeso ya tirigu wopuntha zikwi makumi awiri, ndi miyeso ya barele zikwi makumi awiri, ndi mitsuko yaikuru ya vinyo zikwi makumi awiri, ndi mitsuko yaikufu ya mafuta zikwi makumi awiri." 
2Chronicles2:11 Ndipo Huramu mfumu ya Turo anayankha ndi kulembera, natumiza kalatayo kwa Solomo, ndi kuti, Powakonda anthu ace Yehova anakulongani mfumu yao." 
2Chronicles2:12 Huramu anatinso, Alemekezedwe Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, amene analenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, nampatsa mfumu Davide mwana waluso, wodziwa nzeru ndi waluntha, ammangire Yehova nyumba, ndiponso nyumba ya ufumu wace." 
2Chronicles2:13 Ndipo tsono ndatumiza munthu waluso wokhala Ralo, luntha, Huramu Abi," 
2Chronicles2:14 ndiye mwana wa munthu wamkazi wa ana akazi a Dani, ndipo atate wace ndiye munthu wa ku Turo, wodziwa kucita ndi golidi, ndi siliva, ndi mkuwa, ndi citsulo, ndi mwala, ndi mitengo, ndi thonje lofiirira, ndi lamadzi, ndi bafuta la thonje losansitsa ndi lofiira, ndi kuzokota mazokotedwe ali onse, ndi kulingirira copanga ciri conse; kuti ampatse pokhala pamodzi ndi aluso anu, ndi aluso a mbuye wanga Davide atate wanu." 
2Chronicles2:15 Ndipo tsono tirigu ndi barele, mafuta ndi vinyo, mbuye wanga wanenazi, azitumize kwa anyamata ace;" 
2Chronicles2:16 ndipo ife tidzatema mitengo ku Lebano monga mwa kusowa kwanu konse; ndipo tidzabwera nayo kwa inu yoyandamitsa paphaka kufikira ku Yopa; ndipo inu mudzakwera nayo ku Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles2:17 Ndipo Solomo anawerenga alendo Onse okhala m'dziko la Israyeli, monga mwa mawerengedwe aja atate wace Davide adawawerenga nao, nawapeza afikira zikwi zana limodzi mphambu makumi asanu kudza zitatu ndi mazana asanu ndi limodzi." 
2Chronicles2:18 Ndipo anaika zikwi makumi asanu ndi awiri za iwowa asenze mirimo, ndi zikwi makumi asanu ndi atatu ateme m'mapiri, ndi akapitao zikwi zitatu mphambu mazana asanu ndilimodzi agwiritse anthu nchito." 
2Chronicles3:1 Pamenepo Solomo anayamba kumanga nyumba ya Yehova ku Yerusalemu, m'phiri la Moriya, kumene Mulungu anaonekera kwa Davide atate wace, pamalo pamene Davide anakonzeratu pa dwale la Orinani Myebusi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Nayamba kumanga tsiku laciwiri la mwezi waciwiri, caka cacinai ca ufumu wace." 
2Chronicles3:3 Ndipo maziko adawaika Solomo akumangapo nyumba ya Mulungu ndi awa: utali wace, kuyesa mikono monga mwa muyeso wakale, ndiwo mikono makumi asanu ndi limodzi, ndi kupingasa kwace mikono makumi awiri." 
2Chronicles3:4 Ndi likole linali kukhomo kwa nyumba, m'litali mwace monga mwa kupingasa kwa nyumba munali mikono makumi awiri, ndi msinkhu wace zana limodzi mphambu makumr awiri; ndipo analikuta m'katimo ndi golidi woona." 
2Chronicles3:5 M'nyumba yaikuru tsono anacinga ndi mitengo yamlombwa, imene anaikuta ndi golidi wabwino, nalembapo ngati migwalangwa ndi maunyolo." 
2Chronicles3:6 Ndipo anakuta nyumba ndi miyala ya mtengo wace; ndi golidi wace ndiye golidi wa Parivaimu. 
2Chronicles3:7 Anamamatizanso kacisi, mitanda, ziundo, ndi makoma ace, ndi zitseko zace, ndi golidi; nalemba akerubi pamakoma." 
2Chronicles3:8 Ndipo anamanga malo opatulikitsa, m'litali mwace monga mwa kupingasa kwa nyumba mikono makumi awiri, ndi kupingasa kwace mikono makumi awiri; naikuta ndi golidi wabwino wakufikira matalente mazana asanu ndi limodzi." 
2Chronicles3:9 Ndi kulemera kwace kwa misomali ndiko masekeli makumi asanu a golidi. Ndipo anazikuta ndi golidi zipinda zosanjikizana. 
2Chronicles3:10 Ndipo m'malo opatulikitsa anapanga akerubi awiri, anacita osema, nawakuta ndi golidi." 
2Chronicles3:11 Ndi mapiko a akerubi m'litali mwace ndimo mikono makumi awiri; phiko la kerubi mmodzi mikono isanu, lojima khoma la nyumba; ndi phiko linzace mikono isanu, lokhudzana nalo phiko la kerubi wina." 
2Chronicles3:12 Ndi phiko la kerubi wina mikono isanu lojima khoma la nyumba, ndi phiko linzace mikono isanu lolumikizana ndi phiko la kerubi wina." 
2Chronicles3:13 Mapiko a akerubi awa anafunyululika mikono makumi awiri; ndipo anaima ndi mapazi ao, ndi, nkhope zao zinaloza kukhomo." 
2Chronicles3:14 Ndipo anaomba nsaru yocinga ya thonje lamadzi, ndi lofiirira, ndi lofiira, ndi bafuta wa thonje losansitsa, naomberamo akerubi." 
2Chronicles3:15 Ndipo anapanga ku khomo la nyumba nsanamira ziwiri za mikono makumi atatu mphambu ziwiri; ndi mutu unakhala pamwamba pa iri yonse ndiwo mikono isanu. 
2Chronicles3:16 Napanga maunyolo onga a m'moneneramo, nawamanga pa mitu ya nsanamirazi, napanga makangaza zana limodzi, nawamanga pamaunyolo." 
2Chronicles3:17 Ndipo anaimiritsa nsanamirazo pakhomo pa Kacisi; imodzi ku dzanja lamanja, ndi inzace ku dzanja lamanzere; nalicha dzina la iyi ya ku dzanja lamanja Yakini, ndi dzina la iyi ya ku dzanja lamanzere Boazi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Anapanganso guwa la nsembe lamkuwa, m'litali mwace mikono makumi awiri, ndi kupingasa kwace mikono makumi awiri, ndi msinkhu wace mikono khumi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Anayenganso thawale losungunula la mikono khumi kukamwa, lozunguniza, ndi msinkhu wace mikono isanu; ndi cingweca mikono makumi atatu cinalizunguniza." 
2Chronicles4:3 Ndi pansi pace panali mafanziro a ng'ombe zakulizinga khumi ku mkono umodzi, zakuzinga thawalelo pozungulira pace. Ng'ombezo zinali m'mizere iwiri, zinayengeka poyengedwa thawalelo." 
2Chronicles4:4 Linasanjikika pa ng'ombe khumi ndi ziwiri, zitatu zinapenya kumpoto, ndi zitatu zinapenya kumadzulo, ndi zitatu zinapenya kumwela, ndi zitatu zinapenya kum'mawa; ndi thawale linasanjikika pamwamba pao, ndi nkholo zao zinayang'anana." 
2Chronicles4:5 Ndi kucindikira kwace kunanga cikhato, ndi mlomo wace unasadamuka ngati mlomo wa comwera, ngati luwa la kakombo; analowamo madzi a mitsuko yaikuru zikwi zitatu." 
2Chronicles4:6 Anapanganso mbiya zamphwamphwa khumi, naika zisanu ku dzanja lamanja, ndi zisanu ku dzanja lamanzere, kutsukiramo; za nsembe yopsereza anazitsuka m'menemo; koma thawale ndi la ansembe kusambiramo." 
2Chronicles4:7 Ndipo anapanga zoikapo nyali khumi zagolidi, monga mwa ciweruzo cace; naziika m'Kacisi, zisanu ku dzanja lamanja, ndi zisanu ku dzanja lamanzere." 
2Chronicles4:8 Anapanganso magome khumi, nawaika m'Kacisi, asanu ku dzanja lamanja, ndi asanu ku dzanja lamanzere. Napanga mbale zowazira zana limodzi zagolidi." 
2Chronicles4:9 Anamanganso bwalo la ansembe, ndi bwalo lalikuru, ndi zitseko za kubwalo, nakuta zitseko zace ndi mkuwa." 
2Chronicles4:10 Ndipo anaika thawalelo ku dzanja lamanja la nyumba kum'mawa cakumwela. 
2Chronicles4:11 Ndipo Huramu anapanga miphika, ndi zoolera zace, ndi mbale zowazira zace. Natsiriza Huramu nchito adaicitira mfumu Solomo m'nyumba ya Mulungu:" 
2Chronicles4:12 nsanamira ziwiri, ndi zikhozo, ndi mitu iwiri inali pamwamba pa nsanamirazo, ndi maukonde awiri akukuta zikho ziwiri za mitu iri pamwamba pa nsanamirazo," 
2Chronicles4:13 ndi makangaza mazana anai a maukonde awiri wa; mizere iwiri ya makangaza ya ukonde uli wonse, akukuta zikho ziwiri za mitu, inali pa nsanamirazo." 
2Chronicles4:14 Anapanganso maphaka, napanga mbiya zamphwamphwa khumi pamwamba pa maphaka;" 
2Chronicles4:15 thawale limodzi ndi ng'ombe khumi ndi ziwiri pansi pace. 
2Chronicles4:16 Miphika yomwe, ndi zoolera, ndi mitungo, ndi zipangizo zace zonse, Huramu Abi anazipangira mfumu Solomo, kuzipangira nyumba ya Yehova, za mkuwa wonyezimira." 
2Chronicles4:17 Mfumuyi inaziyenga pa cidikha ca ku Yordano, m'dothi ladongo, pakati pa Sukoti ndi Zereda." 
2Chronicles4:18 Ndipo Solomo anazipanga zipangizo izi zonse zocurukadi, pakuti kulemera kwace kwa mkuwa sikunayeseka." 
2Chronicles4:19 Solomo anapanganso zipangizo zonse zinali m'nyumba ya Mulungu, guwa la nsembe lagolidi lomwe, ndi magome oikapo mkate woonekera;" 
2Chronicles4:20 ndi zoikapo nyali ndi nyali zace za golidi woona, zakuunikira monga mwa cilangizo cace cakuno ca moneneramo;" 
2Chronicles4:21 ndi maluwa, ndi nyali, ndi mbano zagolidi, ndiwo golidi wangwiro;" 
2Chronicles4:22 ndi zozimira nyali, ndi mbale zowazira, ndi zipande, ndi mbale za zofukiza za golidi woona; ndi kunena za polowera m'nyumba, zitseko zace za m'katimo za malo opatulikitsa, ndi zitseko za nyumbayi, ndiyo Kacisi, zinali zagolidi." 
2Chronicles5:1 Momwemo zidatha nchito zonse Solomo adazicitira nyumba ya Yehova. Ndipo Solomo anabwera nazo zopatulika zija za atate wace Davide; naziika siliva, ndi golidi, ndi zipangizo zonse m'cuma ca nyumba ya Mulungu. Kuperekedwa kwa Kacisi." 
2Chronicles5:2 Pamenepo Solomo anasonkhanitsira akulu akulu a Israyeli, ndi akuru onse a mafuko, ndi akalonga a nyumba za makolo a ana a Israyeli, ku Yerusalemu, kukatenga likasa la cipangano ca Yehova ku mudzi wa Davide ndiwo Zioni." 
2Chronicles5:3 Ndipo amuna onse a Israyeli anasonkhana kwa mfumu kumadyerero anacitikawo, m'mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri." 
2Chronicles5:4 Nadza akulu akulu onse a Israyeli, nanyamula likasalo Alevi." 
2Chronicles5:5 Ndipo anakwera nalo likasa, ndi cihema cokomanako, ndi zipangizo zonse zopatulika zinali m'cihemamo; izizo ansembe Alevi anakwera nazo." 
2Chronicles5:6 Ndi mfumu Solomo ndi khamu lonse la Israyeli losonkhana kwa iye anali kulikasa, naphera nsembe, nkhosa ndi ng'ombe zosawerengeka kucuruka kwace." 
2Chronicles5:7 Ndipo ansembe analowa nalo likasa la cipangano la Yehova kumalo kwace m'moneneramo mwa kacisi, m'malo opatulikitsa, pansi pa mapiko a akerubi." 
2Chronicles5:8 Pakuti akerubi anafunyulula mapiko ao pa malo a likasa, ndi akerubi anaphimba likasa ndi mphiko zace pamwamba pace." 
2Chronicles5:9 Ndipo zinatalikitsa mphikozo, kuti nsonga za mphiko zidaoneka kulikasa cakuno ca moneneramo, koma sizinaoneka kubwalo; ndipo ziri komweko mpaka lero lino." 
2Chronicles5:10 Munalibe kanthu kena m'likasa, koma magome awiri Mose anawaika m'mwemo ku Horebu, muja Yehova anacita cipangano ndi ana a Israyeli poturuka iwo m'Aigupto." 
2Chronicles5:11 Ndipo ansembe anaturuka m'malo opatulika, pakuti ansembe onse anali komwe adadzipatula, osasunga magawidwe ao;" 
2Chronicles5:12 Alevi omwe akuyimba, onsewo ndiwo Asafu, Hemani, Yedutuni, ndi ana ao, ndi abale ao obvala bafuta, ali nazo nsanje, ndi zisakasa, ndi azeze, anaima kum'mawa kwa guwa la nsembe, ndi pamodzi nao ansembe zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri akuomba malipenga." 
2Chronicles5:13 Ndipo kunali, pakucita limodzi amalipenga ndi oyimba, kumveketsa mau amodzi akulemekeza ndi kuyamika Yehova, ndi pakukweza mau ao pamodzi ndi malipenga, ndi nsanje, ndi zoyimbira zina, ndi kulemekeza Yehova, ndi kuti, Pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino, pakuti cifundo cace cikhala cikhalire; pamenepo mtambo unadzaza nyumbayi, ndiyo nyumba ya Yehova;" 
2Chronicles5:14 ndipo ansembe sanakhoza kuimirira kutumikira cifukwa ca mtambowo; pakuti ulemerero wa Yehova unadzaza nyumba ya Mulungu. 
2Chronicles6:1 Pamenepo Solomo anati, Yehova anati kuti adzakhala mu mdima wandiweyani." 
2Chronicles6:2 Koma ndakumangirani nyumba yokhalamo, malo okhazikika okhalamo Inu nthawi yosatha." 
2Chronicles6:3 Ndipo mfumu inapotolokera nkhope yace, nidalitsa khamu lonse la Israyeli; ndi khamu lonse la Israyeli linaimirira." 
2Chronicles6:4 Nati iye, Alemekezedwe Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, wakunena m'kamwa mwace ndi Davide atate wanga, nakwaniritsa: ndi manja ace, ndi kuti," 
2Chronicles6:5 Kuyambira tsiku lakuturutsa Ine anthu anga m'dziko la Aigupto, sindinasankha mudzi uli wonse m'mafuko onse a Israyeli, kumangamo nyumba yokhalamo dzina langa, kapena kusankha munthu ali yense akhale kalonga wa anthu anga Israyeli;" 
2Chronicles6:6 koma ndinasankha Yerusalemu, kuti dzina langa likhale komweko; ndinasankhanso Davide akhale mfumu ya anthu anga Israyeli." 
2Chronicles6:7 Ndipo Davide atate wanga anafuna mumtima mwace kumangira dzina la Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli nyumba. 
2Chronicles6:8 Koma Yehova anati kwa Davide atate wanga, Popeza unafuna mumtima mwako kulimangira dzina langa nyumba, unacita bwino kuti unatero mumtima mwako;" 
2Chronicles6:9 koma sudzandimangira nyumba ndiwe, koma mwana wako wakudzaturuka m'cuuno mwako, Iyeyo adzalimangira dzina langa nyumbayi." 
2Chronicles6:10 Ndipo Yehova wakhazikitsa mau ace adanenawo, pakuti ndinauka ine m'malo mwa Davide atate wanga, ndipo ndikhala pa mpando wacifumu wa Israyeli monga analonjeza Yehova, ndipo ndamangira dzina la Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli nyumbayi." 
2Chronicles6:11 Ndipo ndalongamo likasa, muli cipangano ca Yehova, anacicita ndi ana a Israyeli." 
2Chronicles6:12 Ndipo Solomo anaima ku guwa la nsembe la Yehova pamaso pa khamu lonse la Israyeli, natambasula manja ace." 
2Chronicles6:13 Ndipo Solomo adapanga ciunda camkuwa, m'litali mwace mikono isanu, ndi kupingasa kwace mikono isanu, ndi msinkhu wace mikono itatu, naciika pakati pa bwalo; ndipo anaima pamenepo, nagwada pa maondo ace pamaso pa khamu lonse la Israyeli, natambasulira manja ace kumwamba;" 
2Chronicles6:14 nati, Yehova. Mulungu wa Israyeli, palibe Mulungu ngati Inu, m'mwamba, kapena pa dziko lapansi, wakusungira cipangano ndi cifundo akapolo anu akuyenda pamaso panu ndi mtima wao wonse;" 
2Chronicles6:15 inu amene mwasungira mtumiki wanu Davide atate wanga cija mudamlonjezaci: inde munanena ndi pakamwa panu, ndipo mwacita ndi dzanja lanu, monga momwe muli lero lino." 
2Chronicles6:16 Ndipo tsopano, Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, msungireni mtumiki wanu Davide cija mudamlonjezaco, ndi kuti, Sadzakusowa munthu pamaso panga wakukhala pa mpando wacifumu wa Israyeli; pokhapo ngati ana ako asamalira njira yao, kuti ayende m'cilamulo canga, monga umo unayendera iwe pamaso panga." 
2Chronicles6:17 Ndipo tsopano, Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, acitike mau anu amene munanena kwa Davide mtumiki wanu." 
2Chronicles6:18 Koma kodi nzoona kuti Mulungu akhala ndi anthu pa dziko lapansi? taonani, thambo, inde m'mwambamwamba, sizifikira inu, koposa kotani nanga nyumba iyi ndaimanga?" 
2Chronicles6:19 Cinkana citero, labadirani pemphero la kapolo wanu, ndi pembedzero lace, Yehova Mulungu wanga, kumvera kupfuula ndi kupempha kwace, kumene kapolo wanu apempha pamaso panu;" 
2Chronicles6:20 kuti maso anu atsegukire nyumba iyi usana ndi usiku, malo amene munanenerako kuti mudzaikako dzina lanu, kuti mumvere pemphero limene kapolo wanu adzapempha kuloza konkuno." 
2Chronicles6:21 Ndipo mverani mapembedzero a kapolo wanu ndi a anthu anu Israyeli, popemphera iwo kuloza konkuno; ndipo mumvere Inu m'Mwamba mokhala Inumo, ndipo pakumva Inu, mukhululikire." 
2Chronicles6:22 Munthu akacimwira mnansi wace, ndipo akamuikira lumbiro lakumlumbiritsa, ndipo akadzalumbira ku guwa lanu la nsembe, m'nyumba yino;" 
2Chronicles6:23 pamenepo mumvere m'Mwamba, nimucite ndi kuweruzira akapolo anu, kumtsutsa woipayo, ndi kumbwezera chimo lace, ndi kulungamitsa wolungamayo, kumbwezera monga mwa cilungamo cace." 
2Chronicles6:24 Ndipo anthu anu Israyeli akawakantha mdani cifukwa ca kukucimwirani, nakabwerera iwowa ndi kubvomereza dzina lanu, ndi kupemphera, ndi kupembedzera pamaso panu m'nyumba yino;" 
2Chronicles6:25 pamenepo mumvere Inu m'Mwamba, nimukhululukire chimo la anthu anu Israyeli, ndi kuwabwezera ku dziko limene munapatsa makolo ao." 
2Chronicles6:26 Mukatsekeka m'mwamba, mopanda mvula, cifukwa ca kukucimwirani; akapemphera iwo kuloza kumalo kuno, ndi kubvomereza dzina lanu, ndi kutembenuka kwa zoipa zao, pamene muwasautsa;" 
2Chronicles6:27 pamenepo mumvere Inu m'Mwamba, nimukhululukire chimo la akapolo anu, ndi la anthu anu Israyeli, mutawalangiza njira, yokoma ayenera kuyendamo, nimutumizire mvula dziko lanu limene munapatsa anthu anu likhale colowa cao." 
2Chronicles6:28 Mukakhala njala m'dzikomo, mukakhala mliri, mukakhala cinsikwi, kapena cinoni, dzombe, kapena kapuce; akawamangira misasa adani ao, m'dziko la midzi yao; mukakhala mliri uli wonse, kapena nthenda iri yonse;" 
2Chronicles6:29 pemphero ndi pembedzero liri lonse likacitika ndi munthu ali yense, kapena ndi anthu anu onse Aisrayeli, akadziwa yense cinthenda cace, ndi cisoni cace, nakatambasulira manja ace kuloza ku nyumba iyi;" 
2Chronicles6:30 pamenepo mumvere m'Mwamba mokhala Inumo, nimukhululukire, ndi kubwezera ali yense monga mwa njira zace zonse, monga mudziwa mtima wace; pakuti Inu, Inu nokha, mudziwa mitima ya ana a anthu;" 
2Chronicles6:31 kuti aope Inu, kuyenda m'njira zanu masiku onse akukhala iwo m'dziko limene munapatsa makolo athu." 
2Chronicles6:32 Ndiponso kunena za mlendo wosakhala wa anthu anu Israyeli, akafumira ku dziko lakutari cifukwa ca dzina lanu lalikuru, ndi dzanja lanu lamphamvu, ndi mkono wanu wotambasuka; akadza iwowa ndi kupemphera kuloza ku nyumba iyi;" 
2Chronicles6:33 pamenepo mumvere Inu m'Mwamba mokhala Inumo, nimumcitire mlendoyo monga mwa zonse akuitanirani; kuti mitundu yonse ya anthu a pa dziko lapansi adziwe dzina lanu, nakuopeni, monga amatero anthu anu Aisrayeli; ndi kuti adziwe kuti nyumba iyi ndamangayi ichedwa ndi dzina lanu." 
2Chronicles6:34 Akaturukira kunkhondo anthu anu kuyambana ndi adani ao, kutsata njira iri yonse muwatumiza; nakapemphera kwa Inu kuloza ku mudzi uwu munausankha, ndi nyumba iyi ndaimangira dzina lanu;" 
2Chronicles6:35 pamenepo mumvere m'Mwamba pemphero lao ndi pembedzero lao, ndi kulimbitsa mlandu wao." 
2Chronicles6:36 Akacimwira Inu (pakuti palibe munthu wosacimwa), nimukakwiya nao, ndi kuwapereka kwa adani, kuti awatenge andende kumka nao ku dziko lakutali, kapena lapafupi;" 
2Chronicles6:37 koma akalingirira m'mtima mwao kudziko kumene anawatengera andende, nakatembenuka, nakapembedzera Inu m'dziko la undende wao, ndi kuti, Tacimwa, tacita mphulupulu, tacita coipa;" 
2Chronicles6:38 akabwerera kwa Inu ndi mtima wao wonse, ndi moyo wao wonse, m'dziko la undende wao, kumene adawatengera andende; nakapemphera kuloza ku dziko lao limene munapatsa makolo ao, ndi mudzi mudausankha, ndi kunyumba ndamangira dzina lanuyi;" 
2Chronicles6:39 pamenepo mumvere Inu m'Mwamba mokhala Inumo pemphero lao ndi pembedzero lao, ndi kulimbitsa mlandu wao; nimukhululukire anthu anu amene anakucimwirani." 
2Chronicles6:40 Tsopano Mulungu wanga, maso anu akhale cipenyere, ndi makutu anu cimvere, pemphero locitika pamalo pano." 
2Chronicles6:41 Ndipo tsopano nyamukani, Yehova Mulungu, kudza kopumulira kwanu, Inu ndi likasa la mphamvu yanu; ansembe anu, Yehova Mulungu, abvale cipulumutso; ndi okondedwa anu akondwere nazo zabwino."
