Job33:14 Pakuti Mulungu alankhula kamodzi, Kapena kawiri, koma anthu sasamalira." 
Job33:15 M'kulota, m'masomphenya a usiku, Pakuwagwera anthu tulo tatikuru, Pogona mwacheru pakama," 
Job33:16 Pamenepo atsegula makutu a anthu, Nakomera cizindikilo cilangizo cao;" 
Job33:17 Kuti acotse munthu ku cimene akadacita, Ndi kubisira munthu kudzikuza kwace;" 
Job33:18 Kuti amletse angaonongeke, Ndi moyo wace ungatayike ndi lupanga." 
Job33:19 Alangidwanso ndi zowawa pakama pace, Ndi kulimbana kowawa kosapuma m'mafupa ace." 
Job33:20 M'mwemo mtima wace ucita mseru ndi mkate, Ndi moyo wace pa cakudya colongosoka." 
Job33:21 Mnofu wace udatha, kuti sungapenyeke; Ndi mafupa ace akusaoneka aturuka." 
Job33:22 Inde wasendera kufupi ku manda, Ndi moyo wace kwa akuononga." 
Job33:23 Akakhala kwa iye mthenga, Womasulira mau mmodzi mwa cikwi, Kuonetsera munthu comuyenera;" 
Job33:24 Pamenepo Mulungu amcitira cifundo, nati, Mlanditse, angatsikire kumanda, Ndampezera dipo." 
Job33:25 Mnofu wace udzakhala se, woposa wa mwana; Adzabwerera ku masiku a ubwana wace." 
Job33:26 Apembedza Mulungu, ndipo amkomera mtima; M'mwemo aona nkhope yace mokondwera; Ndipo ambwezera munthu cilungamo cace." 
Job33:27 Apenyerera anthu, ndi kuti, Ndinacimwa, ndaipsa coongokaco, Ndipo sindinapindula nako." 
Job33:28 Koma anandiombola ndingatsikire kumanda, Ndi moyo wanga udzaona kuunika." 
Job33:29 Taona, izi zonse azicita Mulungu Kawiri katatu ndi munthu," 
Job33:30 Kumbweza angalowe kumanda, Kuti kuunika kwa moyo kumuwalire." 
Job33:31 Cherani khutu, Yobu, mundimvere ine; Mukhale cete, ndipo ndidzanena ine." 
Job33:32 Ngati muli nao mau mundiyankhe. Nenani, pakuti ndifuna kukulungamitsani." 
Job33:33 Ngati mulibe mau, tamverani Ine; Mukhale cete, ndipo ndizakuphunzitsani nzeru." 
Job34:1 Ndipo Elihu anabwereza kunena, nati," 
Job34:2 Tamverani mau anga, inu anzeru; Mundicherere khutu inu akudziwa." 
Job34:3 Pakuti khutu liyesa mau, Monga m'kamwa mulawa cakudya." 
Job34:4 Tidzisankhire coyeneraco, Tidziwe mwa tokha cokomaco." 
Job34:5 Pakuti Yobu wanena, Ine ndine wolungama, Ndipo Mulungu wandicotsera coyenera ine." 
Job34:6 Kodi ndidzinamizire? Bala langa nlosapola, ngakhale sindinalakwa." 
Job34:7 Wakunga Yobu ndani, Wakumwa mwano ngati madzi?" 
Job34:8 Wakutsagana nao ocita mphulupulu, Nayendayenda nao anthu oipa." 
Job34:9 Pakuti anati, Munthu sapindula kanthu nako Kubvomerezana naye Mulu ngu." 
Job34:10 Cifukwa cace mundimvere ine, eni nzeru inu, Nkutali ndi Mulungu kucita coipa, Ndi Wamphamvuyonse kucita cosalungama." 
Job34:11 Pakuti ambwezera munthu monga mwa nchito yace, Napezetsa munthu ali yense monga mwa mayendedwe ace." 
Job34:12 Ndithu zoonadi, Mulungu sangacite coipa, Ndi Wamphamvuyonse sangaipse mlandu." 
Job34:13 Anamuikiza dziko lapansi ndani? Kapena anakonzeratu dziko lonse lokhalamo anthu ndani? 
Job34:14 Akadzikumbukila yekha mumtima mwace, Akadzisonkhanitsira yekha mzimu wace ndi mpweya wace," 
Job34:15 Zamoyo zonse zidzatsirizika pamodzi, Ndi munthu adzabwerera kupfumbi." 
Job34:16 Ngati tsono uli nako kuzindikira, tamvera ici, Cherera khutu kunena kwanga." 
Job34:17 Kodi munthu woipidwa naco ciweruzo adzalamulira? Ndipo kodi utsutsa wolungama ndi wamphamvuyo kuti ngwoipa? 
Job34:18 Kodi kuyenera kunena kwa mfumu, Wopanda pace iwe, Kapena kwa akalonga, Oipa inu?" 
Job34:19 Nanga kwa Iye wosasamalira nkhope za akalonga, Wosasiyanitsa pakati pa wolemera ndi wosauka? Pakuti onsewo ndiwo nchito ya manja ace." 
Job34:20 M'kamphindi akufa, ngakhale pakati pa usiku, Anthu agwedezeka, napita, Amphamvu acotsedwa opanda dzanja lakuwacotsa." 
Job34:21 Pakuti maso ace ali pa njira ya munthu ali yense, Napenya moponda mwace monse." 
Job34:22 Palibe mdima kapena mthunzi wa imfa, Kuti ocita zopanda pace abisaleko." 
Job34:23 Pakuti Mulungu alibe cifukwa ca kulingiriranso za munthu, Kuti afike kwa. Iye kudzaweruzidwa." 
Job34:24 Aphwanya eni mphamvu osaturutsa kubwalo mlandu wao, Naika ena m'malo mwao." 
Job34:25 Pakuti asamalira nchito zao, Nawagubuduza usiku kuti aphwanyike." 
Job34:26 Awakantha ngati oipa, Poyera pamaso pa anthu." 
Job34:27 Popeza anapambuka, naleka kumtsata, Osasamalira njira zace ziri zonse." 
Job34:28 M'mwemo anafikitsa kwa Iye kupfuula kwa osauka; Ndipo anamva Iye kupfuula kwa ozunzika. 
Job34:29 Iye akapatsa mpumulo adzamtsutsa ndani? Akabisa nkhope yace adzampenyerera ndani? Cikacitika pa mtundu wa anthu, kapena pa munthu, ncimodzimodzi;" 
Job34:30 Kuti munthu wonyoza Mulungu asacite ufumu, Ndi anthu asakodwe mumsampha," 
Job34:31 Pakuti pali wina kodi anati kwa Mulungu, Ndasenza kulanga kwanu, ndingakhale sindinalakwa?" 
Job34:32 Cimene sindiciona mundilangize ndi Inu, Ngati ndacita cosalungama sindidzabwerezanso." 
Job34:33 Kodi cilango ca Mulungu cikhale monga mucifuna inu, pakuti mucikana? Musankhe ndi inu, ine ai; M'mwemo monga mudziwa, nenani." 
Job34:34 Anthu ozindikira adzanena nane, Inde anthu anzeru onse akundimva adzati," 
Job34:35 Yobu alankhula wopanda kudziwa, Ndi mau ace alibe nzeru." 
Job34:36 Mwenzi nayesedwe Yobu kufikira kutha, Cifukwa ca kuyankha kwace monga anthu amphulupulu," 
Job34:37 Pakuti pa kucimwa kwace aonjeza kupikisana ndi Mulungu, Asansa manja pakati pa ife, Nacurukitsa maneno ace pa Mulungu." 
Job35:1 Ndipo Elihu anabwereza kunena, nati," 
Job35:2 Kodi muciyesa coyenera, Umo mukuti, Cilungamo canga ciposa ca Mulungu," 
Job35:3 Pakuti munena, Upindulanji naco? Posacimwa ndinapindula ciani cimene sindikadapindula pocimwa?" 
Job35:4 Ndidzakuyankhani, Ndi anzanu pamodzi ndi inu." 
Job35:5 Yang'anani kumwamba, nimuone, Tapenyani mitambo yokwera yakuposa inu." 
Job35:6 Ngati mwacimwa, mumcitira Iye ciani? Zikacuruka zolakwa zanu, mumcitira Iye ciani?" 
Job35:7 Mukakhala wolungama, mumninkhapo ciani? Kapena alandira ciani pa dzanja lanu?" 
Job35:8 Coipa canu cikhoza kuipira munthu wonga inu, Ndi cilungamo canu cikhoza kukomera wobadwa ndi munthu." 
Job35:9 Cifukwa ca kucuruka masautso anthu anapfuula, Apfuula cifukwa ca dzanja la amphamvu." 
Job35:10 Koma palibe anganene, Ali kuti Mulungu Mlengi wanga, Wakupatsa nyimbo usiku;" 
Job35:11 Wakutilangiza ife koposa nyama za padziko, Wakutipatsa nzeru zoposa mbalame za m'mlengalenga?" 
Job35:12 Apo apfuula, koma Iye sawayankha; Cifukwa ca kudzikuza kwa anthu oipa." 
Job35:13 Zedi Mulungu samvera zacabe, Ndi Wamphamvuyonse sazisamalira." 
Job35:14 Inde mungakhale munena, Sindimpenya, Mlanduwo uli pamaso pace, ndipo mumlindira." 
Job35:15 Ndipo tsopano popeza analibe kumzonda m'kukwiya kwace, Ndi kusamalitsa colakwa," 
Job35:16 Cifukwa cace Yobu anatsegula pakamwa pace mwacabe, Nacurukitsa mau opanda nzeru." 
Job36:1 Elihu nabwereza, nati," 
Job36:2 Mundilole pang'ono, ndidzakuuzani, Pakuti ndiri naonso mau akunenera Mulungu." 
Job36:3 Ndidzatenga nzeru zanga kutali, Ndidzabvomereza kuti Mlengi wanga ndi wolungama." 
Job36:4 Pakuti zoonadi, mau anga sali abodza, Wakudziwitsa mwangwiro ali nanu." 
Job36:5 Taonani, Mulungu ndiye mwini mphamvu, ndipo sapeputsa munthu; Mphamvu ya nzeru zace ndi yaikuru." 
Job36:6 Sasunga woipa akhale ndi moyo, Koma awaninkha ozunzikazowayenera iwo." 
Job36:7 Sawacotsera wolungama maso ace, Koma pamodzi ndi mafumu pa mpando wao Awakhazika cikhazikire, ndipo akwezeka." 
Job36:8 Ndipo akamangidwa m'nsinga, Nakakodwa ndi zingwe za mazunzo," 
Job36:9 Pamenepo awafotokozera nchito zao, Ndi zolakwa zao, kuti anacita modzikuza." 
Job36:10 Awatseguliranso m'khutu mwao kuti awalangize, Nawauza abwerere kuleka mphulupulu." 
Job36:11 Akamvera ndi kumtumikira, Adzatsiriza masiku ao modala, Ndi zaka zao mokondwera." 
Job36:12 Koma akapanda kumvera adzatayika ndi lupanga, Nadzatsirizika osadziwa kanthu." 
Job36:13 Koma iwo a mtima wakunyoza Mulungu, akundika mkwiyo, Akawamanga Iye, sapfuulira." 
Job36:14 Iwowa akufa akali biriwiri, Ndi moyo wao utayika ngati odetsedwa." 
Job36:15 Apulumutsa wozunzika mwa kuzunzika kwace, Nawatsegulira m'khutu mwao mwa kupsinjika kwao." 
Job36:16 Inde akadakukopani mucoke posaukira, Mulowe kucitando kopanda copsinja; Ndipo zoikidwa pagome panu zikadakhala zonona ndithu." 
Job36:17 Koma mukadzazidwa nazo zolingirira oipa, Zolingirirazo ndi ciweruzo zidzakugwiranibe," 
Job36:18 Pakuti mucenjere, mkwiyo ungakunyengeni mucite mnyozo; Ndipo usakusokeretseni ukulu wa dipoli." 
Job36:19 Cuma canu cidzafikira kodi, kuti simudzakhala wopsinjika, Kapena mphamvu yanu yonse yolimba?" 
Job36:20 Musakhumbe usiku, Umene anthu alikhidwe m'malo mwao." 
Job36:21 Cenjerani, musaluniike kumphulupulu; Pakuti mwaisankha iyi mutazunzidwa." 
Job36:22 Taonani, Mulungu acita mokwezeka mu mphamvu yace, Mphunzitsi wakunga Iye ndani?" 
Job36:23 Anamuikira njira yace ndani? Adzati ndani, Mwacita cosalungama?" 
Job36:24 Kumbukilani kuti mukuze nchito zace, Zimene anaziyimbira anthu." 
Job36:25 Anthu onse azipenyerera, Anthu aziyang'anira kutali." 
Job36:26 Taonani, Mulungu ndiye wamkuru, ndipo sitimdziwa; Ciwerengo ca zaka zace ncosasanthulika." 
Job36:27 Pakuti akweza madontho a mvula, Akhetsa mvula ya m'nkhungu yace" 
Job36:28 Imene mitambo itsanulira, Nibvumbitsira anthu mocuruka." 
Job36:29 Pali munthu kodi wodziwitsa mayalidwe a mitambo, Ndi kugunda kwa msasa wace?" 
Job36:30 Taonani, Iye ayala kuunika kwace pamenepo. Nabvundikira kunsi kwace kwa nyanja." 
Job36:31 Pakuti aweruza nazo mitundu ya anthu. Apatsa cakudya cocuruka. 
Job36:32 Akutidwa manja ace ndi mphezi, Nailamulira igwere pofunapo Iye." 
Job36:33 Kugunda kwace kulalikira za Iye, Zoweta zomwe zilota mtambo woyandikira." 
Job37:1 Pa icinso mtima wanga unienjemera, Nusunthika m'malo mwace." 
Job37:2 Mvetsetsani cibumo ca mau ace, Ndi kugunda koturuka m'kamwa mwace." 
Job37:3 Akumveketsa pansi pa thambo ponse, Nang'anipitsa mphezi yace ku malekezero a dziko lapansi." 
Job37:4 Mau abuma kuitsata, Agunda ndi mau a ukulu wace, Ndipo sailetsa atamveka mau ace," 
Job37:5 Mulungu agunda modabwitsa ndi mau ace, Acita zazikuru osazidziwa ife." 
Job37:6 Pakuti anena kwa cipale cofewa, Ugwe padziko. Momwemonso kwa mvula, Ndi kwa mbvumbi waukuru." 
Job37:7 Atsekereza mokhomera cizindikilo dzanja la munthu ali yense, Kuti anthu onse anawalenga adziwe." 
Job37:8 Pamenepo zirombo zilowa mobisalamo, Nizikhala m'ngaka mwao." 
Job37:9 M'cipinda mwace muturuka kabvumvulu, Ndi cisanu cifuma kumpoto." 
Job37:10 Mwa kupuma kwace apereka cipale, Ndi madzi acitando aundana." 
Job37:11 Asenzetsanso mtambo wakuda bii madzi, Afunyulula mtambo wokhalamo mphezi yace;" 
Job37:12 Ndipo utembenuka-tembenuka pakulangiza kwace, Kuti ucite ziri zonse aulamulira, Pa nkhope ya dziko lokhalamo anthu;" 
Job37:13 Ngati aufikitsira dziko lace kulidzudzula, Kapena kulicitira cifundo." 
Job37:14 Tamverani ici, Yobu. Taimani, mulingirire zodabwiza za Mulungu." 
Job37:15 Kodi mudziwa umo Mulungu azilangizira zimenezi, Nawalitsa mphezi ya m'mtambo mwace?" 
Job37:16 Kodi mudziwa madendekeredwe ace a mitambo, Zodabwiza za Iye wakudziwa mwangwiro?" 
Job37:17 Kodi mudziwa umo zobvala zanu zifundira, Pamene dziko liri thuu cifukwa ca mwela?" 
Job37:18 Kodi muyala thambo pamodzi ndi Iye, Ndilo lolimba ngati kalirole woyengeka?" 
Job37:19 Mutilangize cimene tidzanena ndi Iye; Sitidziwa kulongosola mau athu cifukwa ca mdima. 
Job37:20 Kodi munthu ayenera kumuuza kuti ndifuna kunena, Kapena kodi munthu adzakhumba kumezedwa?" 
Job37:21 Ndipo tsopano anthu sakhoza kupenyerera kuunika pakunyezimira kuthambo, Ndi mphepo yapita ndi kuuyeretsa," 
Job37:22 Kucokera kumpoto kudzera kuwala konyezimira, Mulungu ali nao ukulu woopsa." 
Job37:23 Kunena za Wamphamvuyonse, sitingamsanthule; ndiye wa mphamvu yoposa; Koma mwa ciweruzo ndi cilungamo cocuruka samasautsa." 
Job37:24 M'mwemo anthu amuopa, Iye sasamalira ali yense wanzeru mumtima." 
Job38:1 Pamenepo Yehova anayankha Yobu m'kabvumvulu, nati," 
Job38:2 Ndani uyu adetsa uphungu, Ndi mau opanda nzeru?" 
Job38:3 Udzimangire m'cuuno tsono ngati mwamuna; Ndikufunsa, undidziwitse." 
Job38:4 Unali kuti muja ndinaika maziko a dziko lapansi? Fotokoza ngati udziwa kuzindikira. 
Job38:5 Analemba malire ace ndani, papeza udziwa? Anayesapo cingwe cace ndani?" 
Job38:6 Maziko ace anakumbidwa pa ciani? Kapena anaika ndani mwala wace wa pangondya," 
Job38:7 Muja nyenyezi za m'mawa zinayimba limodzi mokondwera, Ndi ana onse a Mulungu anapfuula ndi cimwemwe?" 
Job38:8 Kapena anatseka nyanja ndani ndi zitseko, Muja idakamula ngati kuturuka m'mimba," 
Job38:9 Muja ndinayesa mtambo cobvala cace, Ndi mdima wa bii nsaru yace yakulunga," 
Job38:10 Ndi kuilembera malire anga, Ndi kuika mipikizo ndi zitseko," 
Job38:11 Ndi kuti, Ufike mpaka apa, osapitirirapo; Apa adzaletseka mafunde ako odzikuza?" 
Job38:12 Kodi walamulira m'mawa ciyambire masiku ako, Ndi kudziwitsa mbanda kuca malo ace;" 
Job38:13 Kuti agwire malekezero a dziko lapansi, Nakutumule oipa acokeko?" 
Job38:14 Lisandulika ngati dothi lonyata pansi pa cosindikiza, Ndi zonse zibuka ngati cobvala;" 
Job38:15 Ndi kuunika kwa oipa kuletsedwa kuti asakuone, Ndi dzanja losamulidwa lityoledwa." 
Job38:16 Kodi unalowa magwero a nyanja? Kodi unayendayenda pozama peni peni? 
Job38:17 Kodi zipata za imfa zinabvumbulukira iwe? Kapena kodi unaona zipata za mthunzi wa imfa? 
Job38:18 Kodi unazindikira citando ca dziko lapansi? Fotokozera, ngati ucidziwa conse." 
Job38:19 Iri kuti njira yomukira pokhala kuunika? Ndi mdima, pokhala pace pali kuti," 
Job38:20 Kuti upite nao ku malire ace, Kuti uzindikire miseu ya ku nyumba yace?" 
Job38:21 Udziwa, pakuti unabadwa pamenepo, Ndi masiku ako acuruka kuwerenga kwao." 
Job38:22 Kodi unalowa m'zosungiramo cipale cofewa? Kapena unapenya zosungiramo matalala," 
Job38:23 Amene ndiwasungira tsiku la nsautso, Tsiku lakulimbana nkhondo?" 
Job38:24 Njira iri kuti yomukira pogawikana kuunika, Kapena pomwazikira mphepo ya kum'mawa pa dziko lapansi?" 
Job38:25 Ndani anacikumbira mcera cimvula, Kapena njira ya bingu la mphezi," 
Job38:26 Kubvumbitsa mvula pa dziko lapanda anthu, Ku cipululu kosakhala munthu," 
Job38:27 Kukhutitsa thengo la kunkhwangwala, Ndi kuphukitsa msipu?" 
Job38:28 Kodi mvula iri naye atate? Kapena wabala ndani madontho amame? 
Job38:29 Cipale cinaturuka m'inimba ya yani? Ndi cisanu cocokera m'mwamba anacibala ndani? 
Job38:30 Madzi aundana ngati mwala, Ndi pamwamba pa nyanja yozama mpogwirana madzi." 
Job38:31 Kodi ungamange gulu la Nsangwe? Kapena kumasula zomangira za Akamwiniatsatana? 
Job38:32 Ungaturutse kodi nyenyezi m'nyengo zao monga mwa malongosoledwe ao? Kapena kutsogolera Mlalang'amba ndi ana ace? 
Job38:33 Kodi udziwa malemba a kuthambo? Ukhoza kukhazikitsa ufumu wao pa dziko lapansi? 
Job38:34 Kodi udziwa kukwezera mau ako kumitambo, Kuti madzi ocuruka akukute?" 
Job38:35 Kodi ukhoza kutumiza mphezi kuti zimuke, Ndi kunena nawe, Tiri pano?" 
Job38:36 Ndani analonga nzeru m'mitambomo? Ndani waninkha nyenyezi yotsotsoka luntha? 
Job38:37 Adziwa ndani kuwerenga mitambo mwanzeru, Ndi kutsanulira micenje ya kuthambo ndani," 
Job38:38 Pokandika pfumbi, Ndi kuundana zibuma pamodzi?" 
Job38:39 Kodi ukhoza kusakira mkango waukazi nyama? Ndi kukwaniritsa cakudya ca misona," 
Job38:40 Pamene ibwathama m'ngaka mwao, Nikhala mobisala kulaliramo?" 
Job38:41 Amkonzeratu khungubwi cakudya cace ndani, Pamene ana ace apfuulira kwa Mulungu, Nauluka-uluka osowa cakudya?" 
Job39:1 Kodi udziwa nyengo yakuswana zinkhoma? Kodi wapenyerera pakuswa nswala? 
Job39:2 Ukhoza kodi kuwerenga miyezi yakuzipitira, Kapena udziwa nyengo yoti ziswane?" 
Job39:3 Zithuntha, ziswa, Zitaya zowawa zao." 
Job39:4 Ana ao akhala ojinca, akulira kuthengo, Acoka osabwerera kwa amao." 
Job39:5 Ndani walola mbidzi ituruke yaufulu? Anaimasulira mbidzi nsinga zace ndani," 
Job39:6 Imene ndaciyesa cipululu nyumba yace, Ndi dziko lakhulo pokhala pace?" 
Job39:7 Aseka phokoso la kumudzi, Osamva kukuwa kwa wofulumiza nyama za m'goli." 
Job39:8 Poyenda ponse pamapiri mpa busa pace; Ilondola caciwisi ciri conse. 
Job39:9 Kodi njati idzabvomera kukutumikira, Idzakhala ku codyetseramo cako kodi?" 
Job39:10 Kodi ukhoza kumanga njati ndi lamba lace ilime m'mcera? Kapena idzakutsata kodi kufafaniza nthumbira m'zigwa? 
Job39:11 Udzaikhulupirira kodi, popeza mphamvu yace njaikuru? Udzaisiyira nchito yako kodi?" 
Job39:12 Kodi udzaitama kuti itute mbeu zako, Ndi kuzisonkhanitsira kudwale?" 
Job39:13 Phiko la nthiwatiwa likondwera, Koma mapiko ndi nthenga zace nzofatsa kodi?" 
Job39:14 Pakuti isiya mazira ace panthaka, Nimafunditsa m'pfumbi," 
Job39:15 Niiwala kuti phazi lingawaphwanye, Kapena cirombo cingawapondereze." 
Job39:16 Iumira mtima ana ace monga ngati sali ace; Idzilemetsa ndi nchito cabe, popeza iribe mantha;" 
Job39:17 Pakuti Mulungu anaimana nzeru, Ndipo sanaigawira luntha." 
Job39:18 Ikafika nthawi yace, iweramuka, Iseka kavalo ndi wa pamsana pace." 
Job39:19 Wampatsa kavalo mphamvu yace kodi? Wambveka pakhosi pace cenjerere cogwedezeka? 
Job39:20 Wamlumphitsa kodi ngati dzombe? Ulemerero wa kumina kwace ngwoopsa. 
Job39:21 Apalasa kucigwa, nakondwera nayo mphamvu yace; Aturuka kukomana nao eni zida." 
Job39:22 Aseka mantha osaopsedwa, Osabwerera kuthawa lupanga." 
Job39:23 Phodo likuti koco koco panthiti pace, Mkondo wonyezimira ndi nthungo yomwe." 
Job39:24 Ndi kunjenjemera kwaukali aimeza nthaka, Osaimitsika pomveka lipenga." 
Job39:25 Pomveka lipenga akuti, Hee! Anunkhiza nkhondo irikudza kutali Kugunda kwa akazembe ndi kuhahaza," 
Job39:26 Kodi kabawi auluka mwa nzeru zako, Natambasula mapiko ace kumka kumwera?" 
Job39:27 Kodi ciombankhanga cikwera m'mwamba pocilamulira iwe, Nicimanga cisanja cace m'mwamba?" 
Job39:28 Kwao nku thanthwe, cigona komweko, Pansonga pa thanthwe pokhazikikapo." 
Job39:29 Pokhala kumeneko ciyang'ana cakudya; Maso ace acipenyetsetsa ciri kutali," 
Job39:30 Ana ace akumwa mwazi, Ndipo pomwe pali ophedwa, apo pali ico." 
Job40:1 Ndipo Yehova anabwereza kwa Yobu, nati," 
Job40:2 Kodi wodzudzulayo atsutsane ndi Wamphamvuyonse? Wocita makani ndi Mulungu ayankhe. 
Job40:3 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha Yehova, nati," 
Job40:4 Taonani, ndakhululuka ine, ndidzakubwezerani mau otani? Ndigwira pakamwa." 
Job40:5 Ndalankhula kamodzi, koma sindidzayankha; Inde kawiri, koma sindionjezanso." 
Job40:6 Ndipo Yehova anamyankha Yobu m'kabvumvulu, nati," 
Job40:7 Dzimangire m'cuuno tsono ngati mwamuna; Ndidzakufunsa, undidziwitse." 
Job40:8 Cingakhale ciweruzo canga udzacityola kodi? Udzanditsutsa kuti ndiri woipa kodi, kuti ukhale wolungama ndiwe?" 
Job40:9 Kodi uli nalo dzanja ngati Ine Mulungu? Kapena ukhoza kugunda ndi mau ngati Ine? 
Job40:10 Udzikometsere tsono ndi ukulu ndi kukuzika, Nubvale ulemu ndi ulemerero." 
Job40:11 Tsanulira mkwiyo wako wosefuka, Nupenyerere ali yense wodzikuza ndi kumcepetsa," 
Job40:12 Upenyerere ali yense wodzikuza, numtsitse, Nupondereze oipa pomwe akhala." 
Job40:13 Uwakwirire pamodzi m'pfumbi, Uzimange nkhope zao pobisika." 
Job40:14 Pamenepo inenso ndidzakubvomereza, Kuti dzanja lako lako lamanja likupulumutsa." 
Job40:15 Tapenya tsono mvuu ndinaipanga pamodzi ndi iwe, Ikudya udzu ngati ng'ombe." 
Job40:16 Tapenya tsono, mphamvu yace iri m'cuuno mwace, Ndi kulimbalimba kwace kuli m'mitsempha ya m'mimba yace." 
Job40:17 Igwedeza mcira wace ngati mkungudza; Mitsempha ya ncafu zace ipotana. 
Job40:18 Mafupa ace akunga misiwe yamkuwa; Ziwalo zace zikunga zitsulo zamphumphu," 
Job40:19 Iyo ndiyo ciyambi ca macitidwe a Mulungu; Wakuilenga anaininkha lupanga lace. 
Job40:20 Pakuti mapiri aiphukitsira cakudya, Kumene zisewera nyama zonse za kuthengo," 
Job40:21 Igona pansi patsinde pa mitengo yamthunzi, Pobisala pabango ndi pathawale." 
Job40:22 Mitengo yamthunzi iiphimba ndi mthunzi wao, Misondodzi ya kumtsinje iizinga." 
Job40:23 Taona madzi a mumtsinje akakula, siinjenjemera; Ilimbika mtima, ngakhale Yordano atupa mpaka pakamwa pace," 
Job40:24 Ikakhala maso, munthu adzaigwira kodi? Kapena kuboola m'mphuno mwace iri m'khwekhwe?" 
Job41:1 Kodi ukhoza kukoka ng'ona ndi mbedza? Kapena kukanikiza kalandira wace ndi cingwe? 
Job41:2 Kodi ukhoza kumanga m'mphuno ndi mlulu? Kapena kuboola nsagwada wace ndi momba? 
Job41:3 Kodi idzacurukitsa mau akukupembedza? Kapena idzanena nawe mau ofatsa? 
Job41:4 Kodi idzapangana ndi iwe, Kuti uitenge ikhale kapolo wako wacikhalire?" 
Job41:5 Kodi udzasewera nayo ngati mbalame? Kapena udzaimangira anamwali ako kuti aiwete? 
Job41:6 Kodi opangana malonda adzaitsatsa? Adzaigawana eni malonda? 
Job41:7 Kodi udzadzaza khungu lace ndi nchetho, Kapena mutu wace ndi miomba?" 
Job41:8 Isanjike dzanja lako; Ukakumbukila nkhondoyi, sudzateronso." 
Job41:9 Taona, ciyembekezo cako ca pa iyo cipita pacabe. Kodi sadzatenga nkhawa munthu pakungoiona?" 
Job41:10 Palibe wolimba mtima kuti adzaiputa. Ndipo ndaniyo adzaima pamaso pa Ine? 
Job41:11 Ndaniyo anayamba kundipatsa Ine kuti ndimthokoze? Ziri zonse pansi pa thambo ponse ndi zanga. 
Job41:12 Sindikhala cete osachula ziwalo za ng'onayo, Ndi mbiri ya mphamvu yace, ndi makonzedwe ace okoma." 
Job41:13 Ndani adzasenda cobvala cace cakunja? Adzalowa ndani ku mizere iwiri ya mano ace? 
Job41:14 Adzatsegula ndani zitseko za pakamwa pace? Mano ace aopsa pozungulira pao. 
Job41:15 Maamba ace olimba ndiwo kudzitama kwace; Amangika pamodzi ngati okomeredwatu. 
Job41:16 Alumikizana lina ndi linzace, Mphepo yosalowa pakati pao." 
Job41:17 Amamatirana lina ndi linzace, Agwirana osagawanikana." 
Job41:18 Pakuyetsemula ing'anipitsa kuunika, Ndi maso ace akunga zikope za m'mawa." 
Job41:19 M'kamwa mwace muturuka miuni, Mbaliwali za moto zibukamo." 
Job41:20 M'mphuno mwace muturuka utsi, Ngati nkhali yobwadamuka ndi moto wa zinyatsi." 
Job41:21 Mpweya wace uyatsa makara, Ndi m'kamwa mwace muturuka lawi la moto." 
Job41:22 Kukhosi kwace kukhala mphamvu, Ndi mantha abvumbuluka patsogolo pace," 
Job41:23 Nyama yace yopsapsala igwirana Ikwima pathupi pace yosagwedezeka. 
Job41:24 Mtima wace ulimba ngati mwala, Inde ulimba ngati mwala wa mphero," 
Job41:25 Ikanyamuka, amphamvu acita mantha; Cifukwa ca kuopsedwa azimidwa nzeru." 
Job41:26 Munthu akaiyamba ndi lupanga, ligoma; Ngakhale nthungo, kapena mubvi, kapena mkondo." 
Job41:27 Citsulo iciyesa phesi, Ndi mkuwa ngati mtengo woola." 
Job41:28 Mubvi suithawitsa, Miyala ya pacoponyera iisandutsa ciputu," 
Job41:29 Zibonga ziyesedwa ciputu, Iseka kuthikuza kwace kwa nthungo," 
Job41:30 Kumimba kwace ikunga mapale akuthwa, Itasalala kuthope ngati copunthira." 
Job41:31 Icititsa nthubwinthubwi pozama ngati nkhali, Isanduliza nyanja ikunge mafuta." 
Job41:32 Icititsa mifunde yonyezimira pambuyo pace; Munthu akadati pozama pali ndi imvi. 
Job41:33 Pa dziko lapansi palibe cina colingana nayo, Colengedwa copanda mantha." 
Job41:34 Ipenya ciri conse codzikuza, Ndiyo mfumu ya zodzitama zonse." 
Job42:1 Pamenepo Yobu anayankha Mulungu, nati," 
Job42:2 Ndidziwa kuti mukhoza kucita zonse, Ndi kuti palibe coletsa colingirira canu ciri conse," 
Job42:3 Ndani uyu abisa uphungu wosadziwa kanthu? Cifukwa cace ndinafotokozera zimene sindinazizindikira, Zondidabwiza, zosazidziwa ine," 
Job42:4 Tamveranitu, ndidzanena ine, Ndidzakufunsani, mundidziwitse." 
Job42:5 Kumva ndidamva mbiri yanu, Koma tsopano ndikupenyani maso;" 
Job42:6 Cifukwa cace ndekha ndidzinyansa, ndi kulapa M'pfumbi ndi mapulusa." 
Job42:7 Kunali tsono atanena Yehova mau awa kwa Yobu, Yehova anati kwa Elifazi wa ku Temani, Mkwiyo wanga wakuyakira iwe ndi mabwenzi ako awiri, pakuti simunandinenera coyenera monga ananena mtumiki wanga Yobu." 
Job42:8 Ndipo tsono, mudzitengere ng'ombe zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndi nkhosa zamphongo zisanu ndi ziwiri, mumuke kwa mtumiki wanga Yobu, mudzifukizire nokha nsembe yopsereza; ndi mtumiki wanga Yobu adzapempherera inu, pakuti ndidzambvomereza iyeyu, kuti ndisacite nanu monga mwa kupusa kwanu; popeza simunandinenera coyenera monga ananena mtumiki Yobu." 
Job42:9 Namuka Elifazi wa ku Temani, ndi Bilidadi Msuki, ndi Zofara wa ku Naama, nacita monga Yehova adawauza; ndipo Yehova anabvomereza Yobu." 
Job42:10 Ndipo Yehova anacotsa ukapolo wa Yobu, pamene anapempherera mabwenzi ace; Yehova nacurukitsa zace zonse za Yobu mpaka kuziwirikiza." 
Job42:11 Pamenepo anamdzera abale ace onse, ndi alongo ace onse, ndi onse odziwana naye kale, nadya naye mkate m'nyumba yace, nampukusira mitu, namtonthoza pa zoipa zonse Yehova anamfikitsirazi; nampatsanso yense ndarama ndi mphete yagolidi." 
Job42:12 Ndipo Yehova anadalitsa citsiriziro ca Yobu koposa ciyambi cace, ndipo anali nazo nkhosa zikwi khumi ndi zinai, ndi ngamila zikwi zisanu ndi cimodzi, ndi ng'ombe zamagoli cikwi cimodzi, ndi aburu akazi cikwi cimodzi." 
Job42:13 Anali naonso ana amuna asanu ndi awiri ndi ana akazi atatu. 
Job42:14 Ndipo anamucha dzina la woyamba Yemima, ndi dzina la waciwiri Keziya, ndi dzina la wacitatu Kerenihapuki." 
Job42:15 Ndipo m'dziko monse simunapezeka akazi okongola ngati ana akazi a Yobu, nawapatsa colowa atate wao pamodzi ndi alongo ao." 
Job42:16 Ndipo zitatha izi, Yobu anakhala ndi moyo zaka zana limodzi mphambu makumi anai, naona ana ace ndi zidzukulu zace mibadwo inai." 
Job42:17 Namwalira Yobu, wokalamba ndi wa masiku ocuruka." 
Psalms1:1 WODALA munthuyo wosayenda mu uphungu wa oipa, Kapena wosaimirira m'njira ya ocimwa, Kapena wosakhala pansi pa bwalo la onyoza." 
Psalms1:2 Komatu m'cilamulo ca Yehova muli cikondwerero cace; Ndipo m'cilamulo cace amalingima usana ndi usiku. 
Psalms1:3 Ndiye akunga mtengo wooka pa mitsinje ya madzi; Wakupatsa cipatso cace pa nyengo yace, Tsamba lace lomwe losafota; Ndipo zonse azicita apindula nazo." 
Psalms1:4 Oipa satero ai; Koma akunga mungu wouluka ndi mphepo. 
Psalms1:5 Cifukwa cace oipa sadzaimirira pa mlanduwo, Kapena ocimwa mu msonkhano wa olungama." 
Psalms1:6 Pakuti Yehova adziwa mayendedwe a olungama; Koma mayendedwe a oipa adzatayika. 
Psalms2:1 Aphokoseranji amitundu. Nalingiriranji anthu zopanda pace? 
Psalms2:2 Adzikhazikitsa mafumu a dziko lapansi, Nacita upo akulu pamodzi, Kutsutsana naye Yehova, ndi Wodzozedwa wace, ndi kuti." 
Psalms2:3 Tidule zomangira zao, Titaye nsinga zao." 
Psalms2:4 Wokhala m'mwambayo adzaseka; Ambuye adzawanyoza. 
Psalms2:5 Pomwepo adzalankhula nao mu mkwiyo wace, Nadzawaopsa m'ukali wace:" 
Psalms2:6 Koma Ine ndadzoza mfumu yanga Pa Ziyoni, phiri langa loyera." 
Psalms2:7 Ndidzauza za citsimikizo: Yehova ananena ndi Ine, Iwe ndiwe Mwana wanga; Ine lero ndakubala." 
Psalms2:8 Undifunse, ndipo ndidzakupatsa amitundu akhale colowa cako, Ndi malekezero a dziko lapansi akhale ako ako." 
Psalms2:9 Udzawatyola ndi ndodo yacitsulo; Udzawaphwanya monga mbiya yawoumba. 
Psalms2:10 Tsono, mafumu inu, citani mwanzeru: Langikani, oweruza inu a dziko lapansi." 
Psalms2:11 Tumikirani Yehova ndi mantha, Ndipo kondwerani ndi cinthenthe." 
Psalms2:12 Mpsompsoneni Mwanayo, kuti angakwiye, ndipo mungatayike m'njira, Ukayaka pang'ono pokha mkwiyo wace. Odala onse akumkhulupirira Iye." 
Psalms3:1 Yehova! Ha! acuruka nanga akundisautsa ine! Akundiukira ine ndi ambiri. 
Psalms3:2 Ambiri amati kwa moyo wanga, Alibe cipulumutso mwa Mulungu." 
Psalms3:3 Ndipo Inu Yehova, ndinu cikopa canga; Ulemerero wanga, ndi wondiweramutsa mutu wanga." 
Psalms3:4 Ndipfuula kwa Yehova ndi mau anga, Ndipo andiyankha m'phiri lace loyera," 
Psalms3:5 Ndinagona ine pansi, ndinagona tulo; Ndinauka; pakuti Yehova anandicirikiza." 
Psalms3:6 Sindidzaopa unyinji wa anthu akundizinga ine. 
Psalms3:7 Ukani Yehova; ndipulumutseni, Mulungu wanga! Pakuti mwapanda adani anga onse patsaya; Mwawatyola mano oipawo." 
Psalms3:8 Cipulumutso nca Yehova; Dalitso lanu likhale pa anthu anu. 
Psalms4:1 Pakupfuula ine mundiyankhe, Mulungu wa cilungamo canga; Pondicepera mwandikulitsira malo: Ndicitireni cifundo, imvani pemphero langa." 
Psalms4:2 Amuna inu, ulemu wanga udzakhala wamanyazi kufikira liti? Mudzakonda zacabe, ndi kufunafuna bodza kufikira liti?" 
Psalms4:3 Koma dziwani kuti Yehova anadzipatulira yekha womkondayo Adzamva Yehova m'mene ndimpfuulira Iye," 
Psalms4:4 Citani cinthenthe, ndipo musacimwe: Nenani mumtima mwanu pakama panu, ndipo mukhale cete." 
Psalms4:5 Iphani nsembe za cilungamo, Ndipo mumkhulupirire Yehova." 
Psalms4:6 Ambiri amati, Adzationetsa cabwino ndani? Weramutsirani ife kuunika kwa nkhope yanu, Yehova." 
Psalms4:7 Mwapatsa cimwemwe mumtima mwanga, Cakuposa cao m'nyengo yakucuruka dzinthu zao ndi vinyo wao." 
Psalms4:8 Ndi mtendere ndidzagona pansi, pomwepo ndidzagona tulo; Cifukwa Inu, Yehova, mundikhalitsa ine, ndikhale bwino." 
Psalms5:1 Mverani mau anga, Yehova, Zindikirani kulingirira kwanga." 
Psalms5:2 Tamvetsani mau a kupfuula kwanga, Mfumu yanga, ndi Mulungu wanga: Pakuti kwa Inu ndimapemphera," 
Psalms5:3 M'mawa, Yehova, mudzamva mau anga; M'mawa, ndidzakukonzerani pemphero langa, ndipo ndidzadikira." 
Psalms5:4 Pakuti Inu sindinu Mulungu wakukondwera naco coipa Mphulupulu siikhala ndi Inu. 
Psalms5:5 Opusa sadzakhazikika pamaso panu: Mudana nao onse akucita zopanda pace. 
Psalms5:6 Mudzaononga iwo akunena bodza: Munthu wokhetsa mwazi ndi wacinyengo, Yehova anyansidwa naye." 
Psalms5:7 Koma ine, mwa kucuruka kwa cifundo canu ndidzalowa m'nyumba yanu: Ndidzagwada kuyang'ana Kacisi wanu woyera ndi kuopa Inu." 
Psalms5:8 Yehova, munditsogolere m'cilungamo canu, cifukwa ca akundizondawo; Mulungamitse njira yanu pamaso panga." 
Psalms5:9 Pakuti m'kamwa mwao mulibe mau okhazikika; M'kati mwao m'mosakaza; M'mero mwao ndi manda apululu: Lilime lao asyasyalika nalo. 
Psalms5:10 Muwayese otsutsika Mulungu; Agwe nao uphungu wao: M'kucuruka kwa zolakwa zao muwapitikitse; Pakuti anapikisana ndi Inu. 
Psalms5:11 Koma akondwere onse amene athawira kwa Inu, Apfuule mokondwera kosaleka, popeza muwafungatira; Nasekere mwa Inu iwo akukonda dzina lanu." 
Psalms5:12 Pakuti Inu, Yehova, mudzadalitsa wolungamayo; Mudzamcinjiriza naco cibvomerezo ngati cikopa." 
Psalms6:1 Yehova, musandidzudzule mu mkwiyo wanu, Ndipo musandilange m'ukali wanu." 
Psalms6:2 Mundicitire cifundo, Yehova; pakuti ndalefuka ine: Mundicize, Yehova; pakuti anthunthumira mafupa anga." 
Psalms6:3 Moyo wanganso wanthunthumira kwakukuru; Ndipo Inu, Yehova, kufikira liti?" 
Psalms6:4 Bwererani Yehova, landitsani moyo wanga; Ndipulumutseni cifukwa ca kukoma mtima kwanu." 
Psalms6:5 Pakuti muimfa m'mosakumbukila Inu: M'mandamo adzakuyamikani dani? 
Psalms6:6 Ndalema nako kuusa moyo kwanga; Ndiyandamitsa kama wanga usiku wonse; Mphasa yanga ndiolobza ndi misozi yanga. 
Psalms6:7 Lapuwala diso langa cifukwa ca cisoni; Lakalamba cifukwa ca onse akundisautsa. 
Psalms6:8 Cokani kwa ine, nonsenu akucita zopanda pace; Pakuti wamva Yehova mau a kulira kwanaa," 
Psalms6:9 Wamva Yehova kupemba kwanga; Yehova adzalandira pemphero langa. 
Psalms6:10 Adzacita manyazi, nadzanthunthumira kwakukuru adani anga onse; Adzabwerera, nadzacita manyazi modzidzimuka," 
Psalms7:1 Yehova Mulungu wanga, ndakhulupirira Inu: Mundipulumutse kwa onse akundilonda, nimundilanditse;" 
Psalms7:2 Kuti angamwetule moyo wanga ngati mkango, Ndi kuukadzula, wopanda wina wondilanditsa." 
Psalms7:3 Yehova Mulungu wanga, ngati ndacita ici; Ngati m'manja anga muli cosalungama;" 
Psalms7:4 Ngati ndambwezera coipa iye woyanjana ndine; (Inde, ndamlanditsa wondisautsa kopanda cifukwa);" 
Psalms7:5 Mdani alondole moyo wanga, naupeze; Naupondereze pansi moyo wanga, Naukhalitse ulemu wanga m'pfumbi." 
Psalms7:6 Ukani Yehova mu mkwiyo wanu, Nyamukani cifukwa ca ukali wa akundisautsa: Ndipo mugalamukire ine; mwalamulira ciweruzo." 
Psalms7:7 Ndipo ukuzingeni msonkhano wa anthu; Ndipo pamwamba pao mubwerere kumka kumwamba. 
Psalms7:8 Yehova aweruza anthu mlandu: Mundiweruze, Yehova, monga mwa cilungamo canga, ndi ungwiro wanga uli mwa ine." 
Psalms7:9 Ithe mphulupulu ya anthu oipa, ndikupemphani, koma wolungamayo mumkhazikitse: Pakuti woyesa mitima ndi imso ndiye Mulungu wolungama." 
Psalms7:10 Cikopa canga ciri ndi Mulungu, Wopulumutsa oongoka mtima." 
Psalms7:11 Mulungu ndiye Woweruza walungama, Ndiye Mulungu wakukwiya masiku onse." 
Psalms7:12 Akapanda kutembenuka munthu, Iye adzanola lupanga lace; Wakoka uta wace, naupiringidza." 
Psalms7:13 Ndipo anamkonzera zida za imfa; Mibvi yace aipanga ikhale yansakali," 
Psalms7:14 Taonani, ali m'cikuta ca zopanda pace; Anaima ndi cobvuta, nabala bodza." 
Psalms7:15 Anacita dzenje, nalikumba, Nagwa m'mbuna yomwe anaikumba." 
Psalms7:16 Cobvuta cace cidzambwerera mwini, Ndi ciwawa cace cidzamgwera pakati pamutu pace." 
Psalms7:17 Ndidzayamika Yehova monga mwa cilungamo cace; Ndipo ndidzayimbira Yehova Wam'mwambamwamba. 
Psalms8:1 Yehova, Ambuye wathu, Dzina lanu liposadi nanga pa dziko lonse lapansi! Inu amene munaika ulemerero wanu pa thambo la kumwamba." 
Psalms8:2 M'kamwa mwa makanda ndi oyamwamunakhazikitsamphamvu, Cifukwa ca otsutsana ndi Inu, Kuti muwaletse mdani ndi wobwezera cilango." 
Psalms8:3 Pakuona ine thambo la kumwamba lanu, nchito ya zala zanu, Mwezi ndi nyenyezi, zimene munazikhazika," 
Psalms8:4 Munthu ndani kuti mumkumbukila? Ndi mwana wa munthu kuti muceza naye? 
Psalms8:5 Pakuti munamcepsa pang'ono ndi Mulungu, Munambveka iye korona wa ulemerero ndi ulemu." 
Psalms8:6 Munamcititsa ufumu pa nchito za manja anu; Mudagonjetsa zonse pansi pa mapazi ace; 
Psalms8:7 Nkhosa ndi ng'ombe, zonsezo, Ndi nyama za kuthengo zomwe;" 
Psalms8:8 Mbalame za m'mlengalenga, ndi nsomba za m'nyanja. Zopita m'njira za m'nyanja." 
Psalms8:9 Yehova, Ambuye wathu, Dzina lanu liposadi nanga pa dziko lonse lapansi!" 
Psalms9:1 Ndidzayamika Yehova ndi mtima wanga wonse; Ndidzawerengera zodabwiza zanu zonse. 
Psalms9:2 Ndidzakondwerera ndi kusekera mwa Inu; Ndidzayimbira dzina lanu, Wam'mwambamwamba Inu." 
Psalms9:3 Pobwerera m'mbuyo adani anga, Akhumudwa naonongeka pankhope panu," 
Psalms9:4 Pakuti mwandiweruzira mlandu wanga; Mwakhala pa mpando wacifumu, Woweruza wolungama." 
Psalms9:5 Mwadzudzula amitundu, mwaononga woipayo, Mwafafaniza dzina lao ku nthawi Yomka muyaya." 
Psalms9:6 Adaniwo atha psiti, apululuka nthawi zonse; Ndipo midziyo mwaipasula, Cikumbukilo cao pamodzi catha." 
Psalms9:7 Koma Yehova akhala cikhalire: Anakonzeratu mpando wacifumu wace kuti aweruze. 
Psalms9:8 Ndipo Iyeyu adzaweruza dziko lapansi m'cilungamo, Nadzaweruza anthu molunjika." 
Psalms9:9 Ndipo Yehova adzakhala msanje kwa iye wokhalira mphanthi. Msanje m'nyengo za nsautso; 
Psalms9:10 Ndipo iwo akudziwa dzina lanu adzakhulupirira Inu; Pakuti, Inu Yehova, simunawasiya iwo akufuna Inu." 
Psalms9:11 Yimbirani zoyamika Yehova, wokhala ku Ziyoni; Lalikirani mwa anthu nchito zace." 
Psalms9:12 Pakuti Iye wofuna camwazi awakumbukila; Saiwala kulira kwa ozunzika. 
Psalms9:13 Ndicitireni cifundo, Yehova; Penyani kuzunzika kwanga kumene andicitira ondidawo, Inu wondinyamula kundicotsa ku zipata za imfa;" 
Psalms9:14 Kuti ndibukitse lemekezo lanu lonse; Pa bwalo la mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, Ndidzakondwera naco cipulumutso canu." 
Psalms9:15 Amitundu anagwa m'mbuna imene anaikumba: Lakodwa phazi lao muukonde anaucha. 
Psalms9:16 Anadziwika Yehova, anacita kuweruza: Woipayo anakodwa ndi nchito ya manja ace." 
Psalms9:17 Oipawo adzabwerera kumanda, Inde amitundu onse akuiwala Mulungu." 
Psalms9:18 Pakuti sadzaiwalika nthawi zonse waumphawi, Kapena ciyembekezo ca ozunzika sicidzaonongeka kosatha." 
Psalms9:19 Ukani, Yehova, asalimbike munthu; Amitundu aweruzidwe pankhope panu." 
Psalms9:20 Muwacititse mantha, Yehova; Adziwe amitundu kuti ali anthu." 
Psalms10:1 Muimiranji patari, Yehova? Mubisaliranji m'nyengo za nsautso?" 
Psalms10:2 Podzikuza woipa apsereza waumphawi; Agwe m'ciwembu anapanganaco. 
Psalms10:3 Pakuti woipa adzitamira cifuniro ca moyo wace, Adalitsa wosirira, koma anyoza Yehova." 
Psalms10:4 Woipa, monga mwa kudzikuza kwa nkhope yace, akuti, Sadzafunsira. Malingaliro ace onse akuti, Palibe Mulungu." 
Psalms10:5 Mayendedwe ace alimbika nthawi zonse; Maweruzo anu ali pamwamba posaona iye; Adani ace onse awanyodola. 
Psalms10:6 Ati mumtima mwace, Sindidzagwedezeka ine; Ku mibadwo mibadwo osagwa m'tsoka ine." 
Psalms10:7 M'kamwa mwace mwadzala kutemberera ndi manyengo ndi kucenjerera; Pansi pa lilime lace pali cibvutitso copanda pace. 
Psalms10:8 Akhala m'molalira midzi; Mobisalamo akupha munthu wosacimwa: Ambisira waumphawi nkhope yace," 
Psalms10:9 Alalira monga mkango m'ngaka mwace; Alalira kugwira wozunzika: Agwira wozunzika, pakumkola m'ukonde mwace." 
Psalms10:10 Aunthama, nawerama, Ndipo aumphawi agwa m'zala zace." 
Psalms10:11 Anena m'mtima mwace, Mulungu waiwala; Wabisa nkhope yace; sapenya nthawi zonse," 
Psalms10:12 Ukani, Yehova; samulani dzanja lanu, Mulungu; Musaiwale ozunzika." 
Psalms10:13 Woipa anyozeranii Mulungu, Anena m'mtima mwace, Simudzafunsira?" 
Psalms10:14 Mwapenya; pakuti mumayang'anira cibvutitso ndi cisoni kuti acipereke m'manja mwanu; Waumphawi adzipereka kwa Inu; Wamasiye mumakhala mthandizi wace. 
Psalms10:15 Thyolani mkono wa woipa; Ndipo wocimwa, mutsate coipa cace kufikira simucipezanso cina." 
Psalms10:16 Yehova ndiye Mfumu ku nthawi yamuyaya; Aonongeka amitundu m'dziko lace. 
Psalms10:17 Yehova, mwamva cikhumbo ca ozunzika: Mudzakhazikitsa mtima wao, mudzachereza khutu lanu:" 
Psalms10:18 Kuti muweruze mlandu wa amasiye ndi wokhalira mphanthi, Kuti munthu wa pa dziko lapansi angaonjeze kuopsa." 
Psalms11:1 Ndakhulupirira Yehova: Mutani nkunena kwa moyo wanga, Thawirani ku phiri lanu ngati mbalame?" 
Psalms11:2 Pakuti, onani, oipa akoka uta, Apiringidza mubvi wao pansinga, Kuwaponyera mumdima oongoka mtima." 
Psalms11:3 Akapasuka maziko, Wolungama angacitenji?" 
Psalms11:4 Yehova ali m'Kacisi wace woyera, Yehova, mpando wacifumu wace uli m'Mwamba; Apenyerera ndi maso ace, ayesa ana a anthu ndi zikope zace." 
Psalms11:5 Yehova ayesa wolungama mtima: Koma moyo wace umuda woipa ndi iye wakukonda ciwawa. 
Psalms11:6 Adzagwetsa pwata pwata misampha pa oipa; Moto ndi miyala yasuifure, ndi mphepo yoopsa zidzawagawikira m'cikho cao." 
Psalms11:7 Pakuti Yehova ndiye wolungama; akonda zolungama: Woongoka mtima adzapenya nkhope yace. 
Psalms12:1 Pulumutsani, Yehova; pakuti wofatsa wasowa; Pakuti okhulupirika acepa mwa ana a anthu." 
Psalms12:2 Amanena za bodza munthu yense ndi mnansi wace: Amanena ndi mlomo wotyasika, ndi mitima iwiri." 
Psalms12:3 Yehova adzadula milomo yonse yotyasika, Lilime lakudzitamandira:" 
Psalms12:4 Amene amati, Ndi lilime lathu tidzaposa; Milomo yathu nja ife eni; mbuye wa pa ife ndani?" 
Psalms12:5 Cifukwa ca kupasuka kwa ozunzika, cifukwa ca kuusa moyo kwa aumphawi, Ndiuka tsopano, ati Yehova; Ndidzamlonga mosungika muja alaka-lakamo." 
Psalms12:6 Mau a Yehova ndi mau oona; Ngati siliva woyenga m'ng'anjo yadothi, Yoiyeretsa kasanu ndi kawiri." 
Psalms12:7 Mudzawasunga, Yehova, Mudzawacinjirizira mbadwo uno ku nthawi zonse." 
Psalms12:8 Oipa amayenda mozungulira-zungulira, Potamanda iwo conyansa mwa ana a anthu." 
Psalms13:1 Mudzandiiwala ciiwalire, Yehova, kufikira liti? Mudzandibisira ine nkhope yanu kufikira liti?" 
Psalms13:2 Ndidzacita uphungu m'moyo mwanga kufikira liti, Pokhala ndi cisoni m'mtima mwanga tsiku lonse? Adzandiukira ine mdani wanga kufikira liti?" 
Psalms13:3 Penyani, ndiyankheni, Yehova Mulungu wanga: Penyetsani maso anga, kuti ndingagone tulo ta imfa;" 
Psalms13:4 Kuti anganene mdani wanga, Ndamlaka; Ndipo angakondwere otsutsana nane posunthika ine." 
Psalms13:5 Koma ine ndakhulupira pa cifundo canu; Mtima wanga udzakondwera naco cipulumutso canu: 
Psalms13:6 Ndidzayimbira Yehova, Pakuti anandicitira zokoma." 
Psalms14:1 Waucitsiru amati mumtima mwace, Kulibe Mulungu. Acita zobvunda, acita nchito zonyansa; Kulibe wakucita bwino." 
Psalms14:2 Yehova m'Mwamba anaweramira pa ana a anthu, Kuti aone ngati aliko wanzeru, Wakufuna Mulungu." 
Psalms14:3 Anapatuka onse; pamodzi anabvunda mtima; Palibe wakucita bwino ndi mmodzi yense. 
Psalms14:4 Kodi onse ocita zopanda pace sadziwa kanthu? Pakudya anthu anga monga akudya mkate, Ndipo saitana pa Yehova." 
Psalms14:5 Pamenepa anaopa-opatu: Pakuti Mulungu ali mu mbadwo wa wolungama. 
Psalms14:6 Munyazitsa uphungu wa wozunzika, Koma Yehova ndiye pothawira pace." 
Psalms14:7 Mwenzi cipulumutso ca Israyeli citacokera ku Ziyoni! Pakubweretsa Yehova anthu ace a m'nsinga, Pamenepo adzakondwera Yakobo, nadzasekera Israyeli." 
Psalms15:1 Yehova, ndani adzagonera m'cihema mwanu? Adzagonera ndani m'phiri lanu lopatulika?" 
Psalms15:2 Iye wakuyendayo mokwanira, nacita cilungamo, Nanena zoonadi mumtima mwace." 
Psalms15:3 Amene sasinjirira ndi lilime lace, Sacitira mnzace coipa, Ndipo satola msece pa mnansi wace." 
Psalms15:4 M'maso mwace munthu woonongeka anyozeka; Koma awacitira ulemu akuopa Yehova. Atalumbira kwa tsoka lace, sasintha ai." 
Psalms15:5 Ndarama zace sakongoletsa mofuna phindu lalikuru, Ndipo salandira cokometsera mlandu kutsutsa wosacimwa. Munthu wakucita izi sadzagwedezeka ku nthawi zonse," 
Psalms16:1 Ndisungeni ine, Mulungu: pakuti ndakhulupirira Inu." 
Psalms16:2 Ndinati kwa Yehova, Inu ndinu Ambuye wanga: Ndiribe cabwino cina coposa Inu." 
Psalms16:3 Za oyera mtima okhala pa dziko lapansi, Iwo ndiwo omveka mbiri, mwa iwowo muli cikondwero canga conse." 
Psalms16:4 Zidzacuruka zisoni zao za iwo otsata mulungu wina: Sindidzathira nsembe zao zamwazi, Ndipo sindidzachula maina ao pakamwa panga," 
Psalms16:5 Yehova ndiye gawo la colowa canga ndi cikho canga: Ndinu wondigwirira colandira canga," 
Psalms16:6 Zingwe zandigwera mondikondweretsa; Inde cosiyira cokoma ndiri naco. 
Psalms16:7 Ndidzadalitsa Yehova, amene anandicitira uphungu: Usikunso imso zanga zindilangiza." 
Psalms16:8 Ndaika Yehova patsogolo panga nthawi zonse: Popeza ali pa dzanja langa lamanja, sindidzagwedezeka." 
Psalms16:9 Cifukwa cace wasekera mtima wanga, nukondwera ulemu wanga; Mnofu wanganso udzakhala mokhazikika." 
Psalms16:10 Pakuti simudzasiya moyo wanga kumanda; Simudzalola wokondedwa wanu abvunde. 
Psalms16:11 Mudzandidziwitsa njira ya moyo: Pankhope panu pali cimwemwe cokwanira; M'dzanja lanu lamanja muli zokondweretsa zomka muyaya. 
Psalms17:1 Yehova, imvani cilungamo, mverani mpfuu wanga; Cherani khutu ku pemphero langa losaturuka m'milomo ya cinyengo," 
Psalms17:2 Pankhope panu paturuke ciweruzo canga; Maso anu apenyerere zolunjika," 
Psalms17:3 Mwayesera mtima wanga; mwandizonda usiku; Mwandisuntha, simupeza kanthu; Ndatsimikiza mtima kuti m'kamwa mwanga simudzalakwa." 
Psalms17:4 Za macitidwe a anthu, ndaceniera ndi mau a milomo yanu Ndingalowe njira za woononga." 
Psalms17:5 M'mayendedwe anga ndasunga mabande anu, Mapazi anga sanaterereka." 
Psalms17:6 Ine ndinakuitanani, pakuti mudzandiyankha, Mulungu: Cherani khutu lanu kwa ine, imvani mau anga." 
Psalms17:7 Onetsani cifundo canu codabwiza, Inu wakupulumutsa okhulupirira Inu Kwa iwo akuwaukira ndi dzanja lanu lamanja." 
Psalms17:8 Ndisungeni monga kamwana ka m'diso, Ndifungatireni mu mthunzi wa mapiko anu," 
Psalms17:9 Kundilanditsa kwa oipa amene andipasula, Adani a pa moyo wanga amene andizinga." 
Psalms17:10 Mafuta ao awatsekereza; M'kamwa mwao alankhula modzikuza. 
Psalms17:11 Tsopano anatizinga m'mayendedwe athu: Apenyetsetsa m'maso kuti atigwetse pansi. 
Psalms17:12 Afanana ndi mkango wofuna kumwetula, Ndi msona wa mkango wakukhala mobisalamo." 
Psalms17:13 Ukani Yehova, Mumtsekereze, mumgwetse: Landitsani moyo wanga kwa woipa ndi lupanga lanu;" 
Psalms17:14 Kwa anthu, ndi dzanja lanu, Yehova, Kwa anthu a dziko lapansi pano amene colowa cao ciri m'moyo uno, Ndipo mimba yao muidzaza ndi cuma canu cobisika: Akhuta mtima ndi ana, Nasiyira ana amakanda zocuruka zao." 
Psalms17:15 Koma ine ndidzapenyerera nkhope yanu m'cilungamo: Ndidzakhuta mtima ndi maonekedwe anu, pamene ndidzauka." 
Psalms18:1 Ndikukondani, Yehova, mphamvu yanga." 
Psalms18:2 Yehova ndiye thanthwe langa, ndi linga langa, ndi mpulumutsi wanga; Mulungu wanga, ngaka yanga, ndidzakhulupirira Iye; Cikopa canga, nyanga ya cipulumutso canga, msanje wanga." 
Psalms18:3 Ndidzaitanira Yehova, woyenera kutamandika: Ndipo adzandipulumutsa ine kwa adani anga." 
Psalms18:4 Zingwe za imfa zinandizinga, Ndipo mitsinje ya zopanda pace inandiopsa." 
Psalms18:5 Zingwe za manda zinandizinga: Misampha ya imfa inandifikira ine. 
Psalms18:6 M'kusauka kwanga ndinaitana Yehova, Ndipo ndinakuwira Mulungu wanga; Mau anga anawamva m'Kacisi mwace, Ndipo mkuwo wanga wa pankhope pace unalowa m'makutu mwace." 
Psalms18:7 Pamenepo linagwedezeka, ndi kutenthemera dziko lapansi. Ndi maziko a mapiri ananjenjemera Nagwedezeka, pakuti anakwiya iyeyo." 
Psalms18:8 Unakwera utsi woturuka m'mphuno mwace: Ndi moto wa m'kamwa mwace unanyeka: Nuyakitsa makara. 
Psalms18:9 Ndipo Iye anaweramitsa thambo, natsika; Ndipo pansi pa mapazi ace panali mdima bii." 
Psalms18:10 Ndipo anaberekeka pa kerubi, nauluka; Nauluka msanga pa mapiko a mphepo," 
Psalms18:11 Anaika mdima pobisala pace, hema wace womzinga; Mdima wa madzi, makongwa a kuthambo." 
Psalms18:12 Mwa kucezemira kunali pamaso pace makongwa anakanganuka, Matalala ndi makala amoto." 
Psalms18:13 Ndipo anagunda m'mwamba Yehova, Ndipo Wam'mwambamwamba anamvetsa liu lace; Matalala ndi makala amoto," 
Psalms18:14 Ndipo anatuma mibvi yace nawabalalitsa; Inde mphezi zaunyinji, nawamwaza." 
Psalms18:15 Ndipo zidaoneka zoyendamo madzi, Nafukuka maziko a dziko lapansi, Mwa kudzudzula kwanu, Yehova, Mwa mpumo wa mpweya wa m'mphuno mwanu." 
Psalms18:16 Anatuma kucokera m'mwamba, ananditenga; Anandibvuula m'madzi ambiri." 
Psalms18:17 Anandipulumutsa ine kwa mdani wanga wamphamvu, Ndi kwa iwo ondida ine, pakuti anandiposa mphamvu." 
Psalms18:18 Anandipeza ine tsiku la tsoka langa; Koma Yehova anali mcirikizo wanga. 
Psalms18:19 Ananditurutsanso andifikitse motakasuka; Anandilanditsa, pakuti anakondwera ndi ine." 
Psalms18:20 Yehova anandibwezera monga mwa cilungamo canga; Anandisudzula monga mwa kusisira kwa manja anga. 
Psalms18:21 Pakuti ndasunga njira za Yehova, Ndipo sindinacitira coipa kusiyana ndi Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms18:22 Pakuti maweruzo ace onse anali pamaso panga, Ndipo malemba ace sindinawacotsa kwa ine." 
Psalms18:23 Ndipo ndinakhala wangwiro ndi iye, Ndipo ndinadzisunga wosacita coipa canga." 
Psalms18:24 Ndimo anandisudzulira Yehova monga mwa cilungamo canga, Monga mwa kusisira kwa manja anga pamaso pace." 
Psalms18:25 Pa wacifundo mukhala wacifundo Pa mumthu wangwiro mukhala wangwiro; 
Psalms18:26 Pa woyera mtima mukhala woyera mtima; Pa wotsutsatsutsa mukhala wotsutsana naye. 
Psalms18:27 Pakuti Inu muwapulumutsa anthu aumphawi; Koma maso okweza muwatsitsa. 
Psalms18:28 Pakuti Inu muyatsa nyali yanga; Yehova, Mulungu wanga, aunikira mdima wanga." 
Psalms18:29 Pakuti mwa Inu ndipyola khamu la anthu; Ndipo mwa Mulungu wanga ndilumphira linga. 
Psalms18:30 Mulungu ndiyewangwiro m'njira zace; Mau a Yehova ngoyengeka; Ndiye cikopa ca onse okhulupirira Iye. 
Psalms18:31 Pakuti Mulungu ndani wosati Yehova? Ndipo thanthwe ndani wosati Mulungu wathu? 
Psalms18:32 Mulungu ndiye wondizingiza mphamvu m'cuuno, Nakonza njira yanga ikhale yangwiro." 
Psalms18:33 Alinganiza mapazi anga ngati a nswala: Nandiimitsa pamsanje panga. 
Psalms18:34 Aphunzitsa manja anga agwire nkhondo; Kuti walifuka uta wamkuwa ndi manja anga. 
Psalms18:35 Ndipo mwandipatsa cikopa ca cipulumutso canu: Ndipo dzanja lamanja lanu landigwiriziza, Ndipo cifatso canu candikuza ine." 
Psalms18:36 Mwandipondetsa patali patali, Sanaterereka mapazi anga." 
Psalms18:37 Ndidzalondola adani anga, ndi kuwapeza: Ndipo sindidzabwerera asanathe psiti." 
Psalms18:38 Ndidzawapyoza kuti sangakhoze kuuka: Adzagwa pansi pa mapazi anga," 
Psalms18:39 Pakuti mwaudizingiza mphamvu m'cuuno ku nkhondoyo: Mwandigonjetsera amene andiukira. 
Psalms18:40 Ndipo adani anga mwawalozetsa m'mbuyo kwa ine, Kuti ndipasule ondidawo." 
Psalms18:41 Anapfuula, koma panalibewopulumutsa; Ngakhale kwa Yehova, koma sanawabvomereza." 
Psalms18:42 Pamenepo ndinawapera ngati pfumbi la kumphepo; Ndinawakhuthula ngati matope a pabwalo. 
Psalms18:43 Mwandipulumutsa pa zolimbana nane za anthu; Mwandiika mutu wa amitundu; Mtundu wa anthu sindinaudziwa udzanditumikira. 
Psalms18:44 Pakumva m'khutu za ine adzandimvera: Alendo adzandigonjera monyenga. 
Psalms18:45 Alendo adzafota, Nadzaturuka monjenjemera m'ngaka mwao." 
Psalms18:46 Yehova ngwa moyo; ndipo lidalitsike thanthwe langa; Nakwezeke Mulungu wa cipulumutso canga: 
Psalms18:47 Ndiye Mulungu amene andibwe, zerera cilango, Nandigonjetsera mitundu ya anthu." 
Psalms18:48 Andipulumutsa kwa adani anga: Inde mundikweza pa iwo akundiukira ine: Mundikwatula kwa munthu waciwawa. 
Psalms18:49 Cifukwa cace Yehova ndidzakuyamikani mwa amitundu, Ndipo dzina lanu ndidzaliyimbira." 
Psalms18:50 Alanditsa mfumu yace ndi cipulumutso cacikuru: Nacitira cifundo wodzozedwa wace, Davide, ndi mbumba yace, ku nthawi zonse." 
Psalms19:1 Zakumwamba zimalalikira ulemerero wa Mulungu; Ndipo thambo lionetsa nchito ya manja ace. 
Psalms19:2 Usana ndi usana ucurukitsa mau, Ndipo usiku ndi usiku uonetsa nzeru." 
Psalms19:3 Palibe cilankhulidwe, palibe mau; Liu lao silimveka." 
Psalms19:4 Muyeso wao wapitirira pa dziko lonse lapansi, Ndipo mau ao ku malekezero a m'dziko muli anthu. Iye anaika hema la dzuwa m'menemo," 
Psalms19:5 Ndipo liri ngati mkwati wakuturuka m'cipinda mwace, Likondwera ngati ciphona kuthamanga m'njira." 
Psalms19:6 Kuturuka kwace lituruka kolekezera thambo, Ndipo kuzungulira kwace lifikira ku malekezero ace: Ndipo kulibe kanthu kobisalira kutentha kwace." 
Psalms19:7 Malamulo a Yehova ali angwiro, akubwezera moyo; Mboni za Yehova ziri zokhazikika, zakuwapatsa opusa nzeru;" 
Psalms19:8 Malangizo a Yehova ali olungama, akukondweretsa mtima: Malamulo a Yehova ali oyera, akupenyetsa maso." 
Psalms19:9 Kuopa Yehova kuli mbe, kwakukhalabe nthawi zonse: Maweruzo a Yehova ali oona, alungama konse konse." 
Psalms19:10 Ndizo zifunika koposa golidi, inde, golidi wambiri woyengetsa: Zizuna koposa uci ndi zakukha za zisa zace," 
Psalms19:11 Ndiponso kapolo wanu acenjezedwa nazo: M'kuzisunga izo muli mphotho yaikuru. 
Psalms19:12 Adziwitsa zolowereza zace ndani? Mundimasule kwa zolakwa zobisika. 
Psalms19:13 Ndiponso muletse kapolo wanu pa zodzitama; Zisacite ufumu pa ine: pamenepo ndidzakhala wangwiro, Ndi wosacimwa colakwa cacikuru." 
Psalms19:14 Mau a m'kamwa mwanga ndi maganizo a m'mtima wanga abvomerezeke pamaso panu, Yehova, thanthwe langa, ndi Mombolo wanga," 
Psalms20:1 Yehova akubvomereze tsiku la nsautso; Dzina la Mulungu wa Yakobo likuike pamsanje; 
Psalms20:2 Likutumizire thandizo loturuka m'malo oyera, Ndipo likugwirizize kucokera m'Ziyoni;" 
Psalms20:3 Likumbukile zopereka zako zonse, Lilandire nsembe yako yopsereza;" 
Psalms20:4 Likupatse ca mtima wako, Ndipo likwaniritse upo wako wonse." 
Psalms20:5 Tidzapfuula mokondwera mwa cipulumutso canu, Ndipo m'dzina la Mulungu wathu tidzakweza mbendera: Yehova akwaniritse mapempho ako onse." 
Psalms20:6 Tsopano ndidziwa kuti Yehova apulumutsa wodzozedwa wace; Adzambvomereza m'Mwamba mwace moyera Ndi mphamvu ya cipulumutso ca dzanja lace lamanja. 
Psalms20:7 Ena atama magareca, ndi ena akavalo: Koma ife tidzachula dzina la Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Psalms20:8 Iwowa anagonieka, nagwa: Koma ife tauka, ndipo takhala ciriri." 
Psalms20:9 Yehova, pulumutsani, Mfumuyo atibvomereze tsiku lakuitana ife." 
Psalms21:1 Yehova, adzasekera mfumu mu mphamvu yanu; Adzakondwera kwakukuru m'cipulumutso canu!" 
Psalms21:2 Mwampatsa iye cikhumbo ca mtimawace, Ndipo simunakana pempho la milomo yace." 
Psalms21:3 Pakuti mumkumika iye ndi madalitso okoma: Muika korona wa golidi woyengetsa pamutu pace. 
Psalms21:4 Anakupemphani moyo, mwampatsa iye; Mwamtalikitsira masiku ku nthawi za nthawi." 
Psalms21:5 Ulemerero wace ngwaukuru mwa cipulumutso canu: Mumcitira iye ulemu ndi ukulu. 
Psalms21:6 Pakuti mumuikira madalitso ku nthawi zonse; Mumkondweretsa ndi cimwemwe pankhope panu. 
Psalms21:7 Pakuti mfumu akhulupirira Yehova, Ndipo mwa cifundo ca Wam'mwambamwamba sadzagwedezeka iye," 
Psalms21:8 Dzanja lanu lidzapeza adani anu onse: Dzanja lanu lamanja lidzapeza iwo akuda Inu. 
Psalms21:9 Mudzawaika ngati ng'anjo yamoto pa nyengo ya mkwiyo wanu. Yehova adzawatha m'kukwiya kwace, Ndipo moto udzawanyeketsa." 
Psalms21:10 Mudzaziononga zobala zao kuzicotsa pa dziko lapansi, Ndi mbeu zao mwa ana a anthu." 
Psalms21:11 Pakuti anakupangirani coipa: Anapangana ciwembu, osakhoza kucicita." 
Psalms21:12 Pakuti mudzawabweza m'mbuyo, Popiringidza m'nsinga zanu pankhope pao," 
Psalms21:13 Kwezekani, Yehova, mu mphamvu yanu: Potero tidzayimba ndi kulemekeza cilimbiko canu." 
Psalms22:1 Mulungu wanga, Mulungu wanga, mwandisiyiranji ine? Mukhaliranji kutali kwa cipulumutso canga, ndi kwa mau a kubuula kwanga?" 
Psalms22:2 Mulungu wanga, ndiitana usana, koma simubvomereza; Ndipo usiku, sindikhala cete." 
Psalms22:3 Koma Inu ndinu woyera, Wakukhala m'malemekezo a Israyeli." 
Psalms22:4 Makolo athu anakhulupirira Inu: Anakhulupirira, ndipo munawalanditsa." 
Psalms22:5 Anapfuula kwa Inu, napulumutsidwa: Anakhulupita Inu, ndipo sanacita manyazi." 
Psalms22:6 Koma ine ndine nyongolotsi, si munthu ai: Cotonza ca anthu, ndi wonyozedwa ndi anthu." 
Psalms22:7 Onse akundipenya andiseka: Akwenzula, apukusa mutu, nati," 
Psalms22:8 Adadzitengera kwa Yehova; kuti adzampulumutsa, Amlanditse tsopano popeza akondwera naye." 
Psalms22:9 Pakuti Inu ndinu wondibadwitsa: Wondikhulupiritsa pokhala ine pa bere la mai wanga. 
Psalms22:10 Cibadwire ine anandisiyira Inu: Kuyambira kwa mai wanga Mulungu wanga ndinu. 
Psalms22:11 Musandikhalire kutali; pakuti nsautso iri pafupi: Pakuti palibe mthandizi. 
Psalms22:12 Ng'ombe zamphongo zambiri zandizinga: Mphongo zolimba za ku Basana zandizungulira," 
Psalms22:13 Andiyasamira m'kamwa mwao, Ngati mkango wozomola ndi wobangula." 
Psalms22:14 Ndathiridwa pansi monga madzi, Ndipo mafupa anga onse anaguluka: Mtima wanga ukunga sera; Wasungunuka m'kati mwa matumbo anga," 
Psalms22:15 Mphamvu yanga yauma ngati phale; Ndi lilime langa likangamira ku nsaya zanga; Ndipo mwandifikitsa ku pfumbi la imfa. 
Psalms22:16 Pakuti andizinga agaru: Msonkhano wa oipa wanditsekereza; Andiboola m'manja anga ndi m'mapazi anga. 
Psalms22:17 Ndikhoza kuwerenga mafupa anga onse; Iwo ayang'ana nandipenyetsetsa ine: 
Psalms22:18 Agawana zobvala zanga, Nalota maere pa malaya anga," 
Psalms22:19 Koma Inu, Yehova, musakhale kutari; Mphamvu yanga Inu, mufulumire kundithandiza." 
Psalms22:20 Landitsani moyo wanga kulupanga; Wokondedwa wanga ku mphamvu ya garu," 
Psalms22:21 Ndipulumutseni m'kamwa mwa mkango; Inde mwandiyankha ine ndiri pa nyanga za njati," 
Psalms22:22 Ndidzalalikira dzina lanu kwa abale anga: Pakati pa msonkhano ndidzakulemekezani. 
Psalms22:23 Inu akuopa Yehova, mumlemekeze; Inu nonse mbumba ya Yakobo, mumcitire ulemu; Ndipo mucite mantha ndi Iye, inu nonse mbumba ya Israyeli." 
Psalms22:24 Pakuti sanapeputsa ndipo sananyansidwa ndi zunzo la wozunzika; Ndipo sanambisira nkhope yace; Koma pompfuulira Iye, anamva." 
Psalms22:25 Lemekezo langa lidzakhala la Inu mu msonkhano waukuru: Zowinda zanga ndidzazicita pamaso pa iwo akumuopa Iye. 
Psalms22:26 Ozunzika adzadya nadzakhuta: Adzayamika Yehova iwo amene amfuna: Ukhale moyo mtima wako nthawi zonse. 
Psalms22:27 Malekezero onse a dziko lapansi adzakumbukila nadzatembenukira kwa Yehova: Ndipo mafuko onse a amitundu adzagwadira pamaso panu. 
Psalms22:28 Pakuti ufumuwo ngwa Yehova; Iye acita ufumu mwa amitundu. 
Psalms22:29 Onenepa onse a pa dziko lapansi adzadya nadzagwadira: Onse akutsikira kupfumbi adzawerama pamaso pace, Ndi iye amene sadziwa kusunga moyo wace." 
Psalms22:30 Mbumba ya anthu idzamtumikira; Kudzanenedwa za Ambuye ku mibadwo yakudza. 
Psalms22:31 Iwo adzadza nadzafotokozera cilungamo cace Kwa anthu akadzabadwa, kuti Iye anacicita." 
Psalms23:1 Yehova ndiye mbusa wanga; sindidzasowa. 
Psalms23:2 Andigonetsa ku busa lamsipu: Anditsogolera ku madzi ndikha. 
Psalms23:3 Atsitsimutsa moyo wanga; Anditsogolera m'mabande a cilungamo, cifukwa ca dzina lace." 
Psalms23:4 Inde, ndingakhale ndiyenda m'cigwa ca mthunzi wa Imfa, Sindidzaopa coipa; pakuti Inu muli ndi ine: Cibonga canu ndi ndodo yanu, izi zindisangalatsa ine," 
Psalms23:5 Mundiyalikira gome pamaso panga m'kuona kwa adani anga: Mwandidzoza mutu wanga mafuta; cikho canga cisefuka. 
Psalms23:6 Inde ukoma ndi cifundo zidzanditsata masiku onse a moyo wanga: Ndipo ndidzakhala m'nyumba ya Yehova masiku onse. 
Psalms24:1 Dziko lapansi nla Yehova ndi zodzala zace zomwe, Dziko lokhalamo anthu ndi iwo okhala m'mwemo." 
Psalms24:2 Pakuti Iye analimanga pazinyanja, Nalikhazika pamadzi." 
Psalms24:3 Adzakwera ndani m'phiri la Yehova? Nadzaima m'malo ace oyera ndani? 
Psalms24:4 Woyera m'manja, ndi woona m'mtima, ndiye; Iye amene sanakweza moyo wace kutsata zacabe, Ndipo salumbira monyenga," 
Psalms24:5 Iye adzalandira dalitso kwa Yehova, Ndi cilungamo kwa Mulungu wa cipulumutso cace." 
Psalms24:6 Uwu ndi mbadwo wa iwo akufuna Iye, Iwo akufuna nkhope yanu, Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Psalms24:7 Weramutsani mitu yanu, zipata inu; Ndipo kwezekani inu, zitseko zosatha: Kuti Mfumu ya ulemerero ilowe." 
Psalms24:8 Mfumu imene ya ulemerero ndani? Yehova wamphamvu ndi wolimba, Yehova wolimba kunkhondo." 
Psalms24:9 Weramutsani mitu yanu, zipata inu; Inde weramutsani, zitseko zosatha inu, Kuti Mfumu ya ulemerero ilowe." 
Psalms24:10 Mfumu imene ya ulemerero ndani? Yehova wa makamu makamu, Ndiye Mfumu ya ulemerero." 
Psalms25:1 Ndikweza moyo wanga kwa Inu, Yehova." 
Psalms25:2 Mulungu wanga, ndakhulupirira Inu, Ndisacite manyazi; Adani anga asandiseke ine." 
Psalms25:3 Inde, onse akuyembekezera Inu sadzacita manyazi Adzacita manyazi iwo amene acita monyenga kopanda cifukwa." 
Psalms25:4 Mundidziwitse njira zanu, Yehova; Mundiphunzitse mayendedwe anu." 
Psalms25:5 Munditsogolere m'coonadi canu, ndipo mundiphunzitse; Pakuti Inu ndinu Mulungu wa cipulumutso canga; Inu ndikuyembekezerani tsiku lonseli." 
Psalms25:6 Kumbukilani, Yehova, nsoni zanu ndi cifundo canu; Pakuti izi nza kale lonse," 
Psalms25:7 Musakumbukile zolakwa za ubwana wanga kapena zopikisana nanu: Mundikumbukile monga mwa cifundo canu, Cifukwa ca ubwino wanu, Yehova." 
Psalms25:8 Yehova ndiye wabwino ndi wolunjika mtima: Cifukwa cace adzaphunzitsa olawa za njira. 
Psalms25:9 Adzawatsogolera ofatsa m'ciweruzo: Ndipo adzaphunzitsa ofatsa njira yace. 
Psalms25:10 Mayendedwe onse a Yehova ndiwo cifundo ndi coonadi, Kwa iwo akusunga pangano lace ndi mboni zace." 
Psalms25:11 Cifukwa ca dzina lanu, Yehova, Ndikhululukireni kusakaza kwanga, pakuti ndiko kwakukuru." 
Psalms25:12 Munthuyo wakuopa Yehova ndani? Adzamlangiza iye njira adzasankheyo. 
Psalms25:13 Moyo wace udzakhala mokoma; Ndi mbumba zace zidzalandira dziko lapansi. 
Psalms25:14 Cinsinsi ca Yehova ciri kwa iwo akumuopa Iye; Ndipo adzawadziwitsa pangano lace. 
Psalms25:15 Maso anga alinga kwa Yehova kosaleka; Pakuti Iye adzaonjola mapazi anga m'ukonde. 
Psalms25:16 Ceukirani ine ndipo ndicitireni cifundo; Pakuti ndiri woungumma ndi wozunzika. 
Psalms25:17 Masautso a mtima wanga akula: Munditurutse m'zondipsinja. 
Psalms25:18 Penyani mazunzo anga ndi zabvuta zanga; Ndipo khululukirani zolakwa zanga zonse. 
Psalms25:19 Penyani adani anga, popeza acuruka; Ndipo andida ndi udani waciwawa." 
Psalms25:20 Sungani moyo wanga, ndilanditseni, Ndisakhale nao manyazi, pakuti ndakhulupirira Inu." 
Psalms25:21 Ungwiro ndi kuongoka mtima zindisunge, Pakuti ndayembekezera Inu." 
Psalms25:22 Ombolani Israyeli, Mulungu, M'masautso ace onse." 
Psalms26:1 Mundiweruze, Yehova, pakuti ndayenda m'ungwiro wanga: Ndipo ndakhulupirira Yehova, sindidzaterereka." 
Psalms26:2 Mundiyesere, Yehova, ndipo mundisunthe; Yeretsani imso zanga ndi mtima wanga." 
Psalms26:3 Pakuti cifundo canu ciri pamaso panga; Ndipo ndayenda m'coona canu. 
Psalms26:4 Sindinakhala pansi ndi anthu acabe; Kapena kutsagana nao anthu otyasika. 
Psalms26:5 Ndidana nao msonkhano wa ocimwa, Ndipo sindidzakhala nao pansi ocita zoipa." 
Psalms26:6 Ndidzasamba manja anga mosalakwa; Kuti ndizungulire guwa la nsembe lanu, Yehova:" 
Psalms26:7 Kuti ndimveketse mau a ciyamiko, Ndi kulalikira nchito zanu zonse zozizwa." 
Psalms26:8 Yehova, ndikonda cikhalidwe ca nyumba yanu, Ndi malo akukhalamo ulemerero wanu." 
Psalms26:9 Musandicotsere mzimu wanga pamodzi ndi olakwa, Kapena moyo wanga pamodzi ndi anthu okhetsa mwazi:" 
Psalms26:10 Amene m'manja mwao muli mphulupulu, Ndi dzanja lao lamanja ladzala ndi zokometsera mlandu." 
Psalms26:11 Koma ine, ndidzayenda m'ungwiro wanga; Mundiombole, ndipo ndicitireni cifundo." 
Psalms26:12 Phazi langa liponda pacidikha: M'masonkhano ndidzalemekeza Yehova. 
Psalms27:1 Yehova ndiye kuunika kwanga ndi cipulumutso canga; ndidzaopa yani? Yehova ndiye mphamvu ya moyo wanga; ndidzacita mantha ndi yani? 
Psalms27:2 Pondifika ine ocita zoipa kudzadya mnofu wanga, Inde akundisautsa ndi adani anga, anakhumudwa iwo nagwa." 
Psalms27:3 Lingakhale gulu la ankhondo limanga misasa kuti andithyole, Mtima wanga sungacite mantha: Ingakhale nkhondo ikandiukira, Nde pomweponso ndidzakhulupira," 
Psalms27:4 Cinthu cimodzi ndinacipempha kwa Yehova, ndidzacilondola ici: Kuti ndikhalitse m'nyumba ya Yehova masiku onse a moyo wanga, Kupenya kukongola kwace kwa Yehova ndi kufunsitsa m'Kacisi wace." 
Psalms27:5 Cifukwa kuti pa dzuwa la tsoka Iye adzandibisa mumsasa mwace: Adzandibisa m'tsenjezi mwa cihema cace; Pathanthwe adzandikweza. 
Psalms27:6 Ndipo tsopano mutu wanga udzakwezeka pamwamba pa adani anga akundizinga; Ndipo ndidzapereka m'cihema mwace nsembe za kupfuula mokondwera; Ndidzayimba, inde, ndidzayimbira Yehova zomlemekeza." 
Psalms27:7 Imvani, Yehova, liu langa popfuula ine: Mundicitirenso cifundo ndipo mundibvomereze." 
Psalms27:8 Pamene munati, Punani nkhope yanga; mtima wanga unati kwa Inu: Nkhope yanu, Yehova, ndidzaifuna." 
Psalms27:9 Musandibisire ine nkhope yanu; Musacotse kapolo wanu ndi kukwiya: Inu munakhala thandizo langa; Musanditaye, ndipo musandisiye Mulungu wa cipulumutso canga," 
Psalms27:10 Pakuti wandisiya atate wanga ndi amai wanga, Koma Yehova anditola." 
Psalms27:11 Mundiphunzitse njira yanu, Yehova, Munditsogolere pa njira yacidikha, Cifukwa ca adani anga," 
Psalms27:12 Musandipereke ku cifuniro ca akundisautsa; Cifukwa zinandiukira mboni zonama ndi iwo akupumira zaciwawa. 
Psalms27:13 Ndikadapanda kukhulupirira kuti ndikaone ubwino wa Yehova M'dziko la amoyo, ndikadatanil" 
Psalms27:14 Yembekeza Yehova: Limbika, ndipo Iye adzalimbitsa mtima wako; Inde, yembekeza Yehova." 
Psalms28:1 Kwa Inu, Yehova, ndidzapfuulira; Thanthwe langa, musandikhalire ngati wosamva: Pakuti ngati munditontholera ine, Ndidzafanana nao iwo akutsikira kumanda." 
Psalms28:2 Mverani mau a kupemba kwanga, pamene ndilirira Inu, Pamene ndikweza manja anga kuloza ponenera panu poyera." 
Psalms28:3 Musandikoke kundicotsa pamodzi ndi oipa, Ndi ocita zopanda pace; Amene alankhula zamtendere ndi anansi ao, Koma mumtima mwao muli coipa." 
Psalms28:4 Muwapatse monga mwa nchito zao, ndi monga mwa coipa cocita iwo: Muwapatse monga mwa macitidwe a manja ao; Muwabwezere zoyenera iwo." 
Psalms28:5 Pakuti sasamala nchito za Yehova, Kapena macitidwe a manja ace, Adzawapasula, osawamanganso." 
Psalms28:6 Wodalitsika Yehova, Pakuti adamva mau a kupemba kwanga." 
Psalms28:7 Yehova ndiye mphamvu yanga, ndi cikopa canga; Mtima wanga wakhulupirira Iye, ndipo anandithandiza: Cifukwa cace mtima wanga ukondwera kwakukuru; Ndipo ndidzamyamika nayo Nyimbo yanga." 
Psalms28:8 Yehova ndiye mphamvu yao, Inde mphamvu ya cipulumutso ca wodzozedwa wace." 
Psalms28:9 Pulumutsani anthu anu, ndi kudalitsa colandira canu: Muwawetenso, ndi kuwanyamula nthawi zonse." 
Psalms29:1 Perekani kwa Yehova, inu ana a amphamvu, Perekani kwa Yehova ulemerero ndi mphamvu." 
Psalms29:2 Perekani kwa Yehova ulemerero wa dzina lace: Gwadirani Yehova moyera ndi mokometsetsa. 
Psalms29:3 Liu la Yehova liri pamadzi; Mulungu wa ulemerero agunda, Ndiye Yehova pa madzi ambiri." 
Psalms29:4 Liu la Yehova ndi lamphamvu; Liu la Yehova ndi lalikurukuru. 
Psalms29:5 Liu la Yehova lithyola mitengo yamkungudza; Inde Yehova athyola mikungudza ya ku Lebano. 
Psalms29:6 Aitumphitsa monga mwana wa ng'ombe; Lebano ndi Sirio monga msona wa njati. 
Psalms29:7 Liu la Yehova ligawa malawi a moto. 
Psalms29:8 Liu la Yehova ligwedeza cipululu; Yehova agwedeza cipululu ca Kadese. 
Psalms29:9 Liu la Yehova liswetsa nyama zazikazi, Ndipo lipulula nkhalango: Ndipo m'Kacisi mwace zonse ziri m'mwemo zimati, Ulemerero:" 
Psalms29:10 Yehova anakhala pa Cigumula: Inde Yehova akhala mfumu ku nthawi yomka muyaya. 
Psalms29:11 Yehova adzapatsa anthu ace mphamvu: Yehova adzadalitsa anthu ace ndi mtendere. 
Psalms30:1 Ndidzakukwezani, Yehova; pakuti mwandinyamutsa, Ndipo simunandikondwetsera adani anga," 
Psalms30:2 Yehova, Mulungu wanga, Ndinapfuulira kwa Inu, ndipo munandiciritsa." 
Psalms30:3 Yehova munabweza moyo wanga kumanda: Munandisunga ndi moyo, kuti ndingatsikire kudzenje." 
Psalms30:4 Yimbirani Yehova, inu okondedwa ace, Ndipo yamikani pokumbukila ciyero cace." 
Psalms30:5 Pakuti mkwiyo wace ukhala kanthawi kokha; Koma kuyanja kwace moyo wonse: Kulira kucezera, Koma mamawa kuli kupfuula kukondwera." 
Psalms30:6 Ndipo ine, ndinanena m'phindu langa, Sindidzagwedezeka nthawi zonse." 
Psalms30:7 Inu, Yehova, munakhazikitsa phiri langa ndi kuyanja kwanu: Munabisa nkhope yanu; ndinaopa." 
Psalms30:8 Ndinapfuulira kwa Inu, Yehova; Kwa Yehova ndinapemba:" 
Psalms30:9 M'mwazi mwanga muli phindu lanji, potsikira ine kudzenje? Ngati pfumbi lidzayamika Inu? ngati lidzalalikira coonadi canu?" 
Psalms30:10 Mverani, Yehova, ndipo ndicitireni cifundo: Yehova, mundithandize ndi Inu." 
Psalms30:11 Munasanduliza kulira kwanga kukhale kusekera; Munandibvula ciguduli canga, ndipo munandibveka cikondwero:" 
Psalms30:12 Kuti ulemu wanga uyimbire Inu, wosakhala cete. Yehova Mulungu wanga, ndidzakuyamikani nthawi zonse." 
Psalms31:1 Ndakhulupirira Inu, Yehova, ndikhale wopanda manyazi nthawi zonse: Mwa cilungamo canu ndipulumutseni ine." 
Psalms31:2 Mundicherere khutu lanu; ndipulumutseni msanga: Mundikhalire ine thanthwe lolimba, nyumba yamalinga yakundisunga." 
Psalms31:3 Pakuti Inu ndinu thanthwe langa ndi linga langa; Ndipo cifukwa ca dzina lanu ndiyendetseni bwino, ndipo nditsogolereni." 
Psalms31:4 Mundionjole m'ukonde umene anandichera mobisika. Pakuti Inu ndinu mphamvu yanga. 
Psalms31:5 Ndipereka mzimu wanga m'dzanja lanu: Mwandiombola, Inu Yehova, Mulungu wa coonadi." 
Psalms31:6 Ndikwiya nao iwo akusamala zacabe zonama: Koma ndikhulupirira Yehova. 
Psalms31:7 Ndidzakondwera ndi kusangalala m'cifundo canu: Pakuti mudapenya zunzo langa; Ndipo mudadziwa mzimu wanga mu nsautso yanga: 
Psalms31:8 Ndipo simunandipereka m'dzanja la mdani; Munapondetsa mapazi anga pali malo. 
Psalms31:9 Mundicitire cifundo, Yehova, pakuti ndasautsika ine: Diso langa, mzimu wanga, ndi mimba yanga, zapuwala ndi mabvuto," 
Psalms31:10 Pakuti moyo wanga watha ndi cisoni, ndi zaka zanga zatha ndi kuusa moyo: Mphamvu yanga yafoka cifukwa ca kusakaza kwanga, ndi mafupa anga apuwala." 
Psalms31:11 Ndakhala cotonza cifukwa ca akundisautsa onse, Inde, koposa kwa anansi anga; ndipo anzanga andiyesa coopsa: Iwo akundipenya pabwalo anandithawa." 
Psalms31:12 Ndaiwalika m'mtima monga wakufa: Ndikhala monga cotengera cosweka. 
Psalms31:13 Pakuti ndamva ugogodi wa ambiri, Mantha andizinga: Pondipangira ciwembu, Anatsimikiza mtima kulanda moyo wanga." 
Psalms31:14 Koma ine ndakhulupirira Inu, Yehova: Ndinati, Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga," 
Psalms31:15 Nyengo zanga ziri m'manja mwanu: Mundilanditse m'manja a adani anga, ndi kwa iwo akundilondola ine." 
Psalms31:16 Walitsani nkhope yanu pa mtumiki wanu: Mundipulumutse ndi cifundo canu. 
Psalms31:17 Yehova, musandicititse manyazi; pakuti ndapfuulira kwa Inu: Oipa acite manyazi, atonthole m'manda." 
Psalms31:18 Ikhale yosalankhula milomo ya mabodza, Imene imalankhula mwacipongwe pa olungama mtima, Ndi kudzikuza ndi kunyoza." 
Psalms31:19 Ha! kukoma kwanu ndiko kwakukuru nanga, kumene munasungira iwo akuopa Inu, Kumene munacitira iwo akukhulupirira Inu, pamaso pa ana a anthu!" 
Psalms31:20 Pobisalira pamaso panu mudzawabisa kwa ciwembu ca munthu: Mudzawabisa iwo mumsasa kuti muwalanditse pa kutetana kwa malilime. 
Psalms31:21 Wolemekezeka Yehova: Pakuti anandicitira cifundo cace codabwiza m'mudzi walinga. 
Psalms31:22 Ndipo ine, pakutenga nkhawa, ndinati, Ndadulidwa kundicotsa pamaso panu: Komatu munamva mau a kupemba kwanga pamene ndinapfuulira kwa Inu." 
Psalms31:23 Kondani Yehova, Inu nonse okondedwa ace: Yehova asunga okhulupirika, Ndipo abwezera zocuruka iye wakucita zodzitama." 
Psalms31:24 Limbikani, ndipo Iye adzalimbitsa mtima wanu, Inu nonse akuyembekeza Yehova." 
Psalms32:1 Wodala munthuyo wokhululukidwa chimo lace; Wokwiriridwa coipa cace. 
Psalms32:2 Wodala munthuyu Yehova samwerengera mphulupulu zace; Ndimo mumzimu mwace mulibe cinyengo. 
Psalms32:3 Pamene ndinakhala cete mafupa anga anakalamba Ndi kubuula kwanga tsiku lonse. 
Psalms32:4 Cifukwa usana ndi usiku dzanja lanu linandilemera ine; Uwisi wanga unasandulika kuuma kwa malimwe. 
Psalms32:5 Ndinabvomera coipa canga kwa Inu; Ndipo mphulupulu yanga sindinaibisa. Ndinati, Ndidzaululira Yehova macimo anga; Ndipo munakhululukira coipa ca kulakwa kwanga." 
Psalms32:6 Cifukwa cace oyera mtima onse apemphere kwa Inu, Pa nthawi ya kupeza Inu: Indetu pakusefuka madzi akuru Sadzamfikira iye." 
Psalms32:7 Inu ndinu mobisalira mwanga; M'nsautso mudzandisunga; Mudzandizinga ndi Nyimbo za cipulumutso. 
Psalms32:8 Ine ndidzakulangiza ndi kuphunzitsa iwe za njira ukayendayo; Ndidzakupangira ndi diso langa lakuyang'ana iwe. 
Psalms32:9 Musakhale monga kavalo, kapena ngati buru, wopanda nzeru: Zomangira zao ndizo cam'kamwa ndi capamutu zakuwakokera, Pakuti ukapanda kutero sadzakuyandikiza." 
Psalms32:10 Zisoni zambiri zigwera woipa: Koma cifundo cidzamzinga iye wakukhulupirira Yehova. 
Psalms32:11 Sekerani mwa Yehova, ndimo kondwerani inu olungama mtima; Ndipo pfuulani mokondwera nonsenu oongoka mtima." 
Psalms33:1 Pfuulani mokondwera mwa Yehova, inu olungama mtima: Oongoka mtima ayenera kulemekeza." 
Psalms33:2 Yamikani Yehova ndi zeze: Myimbireni ndi cisakasa ca zingwe khumi. 
Psalms33:3 Mumyimbire Iye Nyimbo yatsopano; Muyimbe mwaluso kumveketsa mau. 
Psalms33:4 Pakuti mau a Yehova ali olunjika; Ndi nchito zace zonse zikhulupirika. 
Psalms33:5 Iye ndiye wakukonda cilungamo ndi ciweruzo: Dziko lapansi ladzala ndi cifundo ca Yehova. 
Psalms33:6 Zakumwamba zinalengedwa ndi mau a Yehova; Ndipo ndi mpweya wa m'kamwa mwace khamu lao lonse. 
Psalms33:7 Amaunjika madzi a m'nyanja monga mulu: Amakundika zakudya mosungiramo. 
Psalms33:8 Dziko lonse lapansi liope Yehova: Ponse pali anthu acite mantha cifukwa ca Iye," 
Psalms33:9 Pakuti ananena, ndipo cinacitidwa; Analamulira, ndipo cinakhazikika." 
Psalms33:10 Yehova aphwanya upo wa amitundu: Asandutsa cabe zolingirira za mitundu ya anthu. 
Psalms33:11 Ciweruzo ca Yehova cikhazikika cikhazikikire, Zolingirira za m'mtima mwace ku mibadwo mibadwo." 
Psalms33:12 Wodalitsika mtundu wa anthu umene Yehova ndiye Mulungu wao; Mtundu womwe anausankha ukhale colandira ca iye yekha. 
Psalms33:13 Yehova apenyerera m'mwamba; Aona ana onse a anthu. 
Psalms33:14 M'malo akhalamo Iye, amapenya pansi Pa onse akukhala m'dziko lapansi;" 
Psalms33:15 Iye amene akonza mitima ya iwo onse, Amene azindikira zocita zao zonse." 
Psalms33:16 Palibe mfumu yoti gulu lalikuru limpulumutsa: Mphamvu yaikuru siicilanditsa ciphona," 
Psalms33:17 Kavalo safikana kupulumuka naye: Cinkana mphamvu yace njaikuru sapulumutsa. 
Psalms33:18 Taonani, diso la Yehova liri pa iwo akumuopa Iye, Pa iwo akuyembekeza cifundo cace;" 
Psalms33:19 Kupulumutsa moyo wao kwa imfa, Ndi kuwasunga ndi moyo m'nyengo ya njala." 
Psalms33:20 Moyo wathu walindira Yehova: Iye ndiye thandizo lathu ndi cikopa cathu. 
Psalms33:21 Pakuti mtima wathu udzakondwera mwa Iye, Cifukwa takhulupirira dzina lace loyera." 
Psalms33:22 Yehova, cifundo canu cikhale pa ife, Monga takuyembekezani Inu." 
Psalms34:1 Ndidzalemekeza Yehova nyengo zonse; Kumlemekeza kwace kudzakhala m'kamwa mwanga kosalekeza. 
Psalms34:2 Moyo wanga udzatamanda Yehova; Ofatsa adzakumva nadzakondwera. 
Psalms34:3 Bukitsani pamodzi ndine ukuru wa Yehova, Ndipo tikweze dzina lace pamodzi." 
Psalms34:4 Ndinafuna Yehova ndipo anandibvomera, Nandlianditsa m'mantha anga Onse." 
Psalms34:5 Iwo anayang'ana Iye nasanguruka; Ndipo pankhope pao sipadzacita manyazi," 
Psalms34:6 Munthu uyu wozunzika anapfuula, ndipo Yehova anamumva, Nampulumutsa m'masautso ace onse." 
Psalms34:7 Mngelo wa Yehova azinga kuwacinjiriza iwo akuopa Iye, Nawalanditsa iwo." 
Psalms34:8 Talawani, ndipo onani kuti Yehova ndiye wabwino; Wodala munthuyo wakukhulupirira Iye." 
Psalms34:9 Opani Yehova, inu oyera mtima ace; Cifukwa iwo akumuopa Iye sasowa." 
Psalms34:10 Misona ya mkango isowa nimva njala: Koma iwo akufuna Yehova sadzasowa kanthu kabwino. 
Psalms34:11 Idzani ananu ndimvereni ine: Ndidzakulangizani zakumuopa Yehova. 
Psalms34:12 Munthu wokhumba moyo ndani, Wokonda masiku, kuti aone zabwino?" 
Psalms34:13 Uletse lilime lako lisachule zoipa, Ndipo milomo yako isalankhule cinyengo." 
Psalms34:14 Pfutuka pazoipa, nucite zabwino, Funa mtendere ndi kuulondola." 
Psalms34:15 Maso a Yehova ali pa olungama mtima, Ndipo makutu ace achereza kulira kwao." 
Psalms34:16 Nkhopeya Yehovaitsutsananao akucita zoipa, Kudula cikumbukilo cao pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms34:17 Iwowo anaitana, ndipo Yehova anawamva, Nawalanditsa ku masautso ao onse." 
Psalms34:18 Yehova ali pafupi ndi iwo a mtimawosweka, Apulumutsa iwo a mzimu wolapadi," 
Psalms34:19 Masautso a wolungama mtima acuruka: Koma Yehova amlanditsa mwa onsewa. 
Psalms34:20 Iye asunga mafupa ace onse: Silinatyoka limodzi lonse. 
Psalms34:21 Mphulupulu idzamupha woipa: Ndipo adzawatsutsa kumlandu iwo akudana naye wolungama. 
Psalms34:22 Yehova aombola moyo wa anyamata ace, Ndipo sadzawatsutsa kumlandu onse akukhulupirira Iye." 
Psalms35:1 Tsutsanani nao iwo akutsutsana nane, Yehova: Limbanani nao iwo akulimbana nane." 
Psalms35:2 Gwirani cikopa cocinjiriza, Ukani kundithandiza." 
Psalms35:3 Sololani nthungo, ndipo muwatsekerezere kunjira akundilondola: Nenani ndi moyo wanga, Cipulumutso cako ndine." 
Psalms35:4 Athe nzeru nacite manyazi iwo akufuna moyo wanga: Abwezedwe m'mbuyo nasokonezeke iwo akundipangira ciwembu. 
Psalms35:5 Akhale monga mungu kumphepo, Ndipo mngelo wa Yehova awapitikitse." 
Psalms35:6 Njira yao ikhale ya mdima ndi yoterera, Ndipo mngelo wa Yehova awalondole." 
Psalms35:7 Pakuti anandichera ukonde wao m'mbunamo kopanda cifukwa, Anakumbira moyo wanga dzenje kopanda cifukwa." 
Psalms35:8 Cimgwere modzidzimutsa cionongeko; Ndipo ukonde wace umene anaucha umkole yekha mwini: Agwemo, naonongeke m'mwemo." 
Psalms35:9 Ndipo moyo wanga udzakondwera mwa Yehova: Udzasekera mwa cipulumutso cace. 
Psalms35:10 Mafupa anga onse adzanena, Yehova, afanana ndi Inu ndani, Wakulanditsa wozunzika kwa iye amene amposa mphamvu, Ndi wozunzika ndi waumphawi kwa iye amfunkhira?" 
Psalms35:11 Mboni za ciwawa ziuka, Zindifunsa zosadziwa ine." 
Psalms35:12 Andibwezera coipa m'malo mwa cokoma, Inde, asaukitsa moyo wanga." 
Psalms35:13 Koma ine, pakudwala iwowa, cobvala canga ndi ciguduli: Ndinazunza moyo wanga ndi kusala; Ndipo pemphero langa linabwera ku cifuwa canga." 
Psalms35:14 Ndakhala ine monga ngad iye anali bwenzi langa, kapena mbale wanga: Polira ndinaweramira pansi, monga munthu wakulira maliro amai wace." 
Psalms35:15 Ndipo pakutsimphina ine anakondwera, nasonkhana pamodzi: Akundipanda anandisonkhanira; ndipo sindinacidziwa: Ananding'amba osaleka:" 
Psalms35:16 Pakati pa onyodola pamadyerero, Anandikukutira mano." 
Psalms35:17 Ambuye, mudzapenyerabe nthawi yanji? Bwezani moyo wanga kwa zakundiononga zao, Wanga wa wokha kwa misona ya mkango." 
Psalms35:18 Ndidzakuyamikanimumsonkhano waukuru: M'cikhamu ca anthu ndidzakulemekezani. 
Psalms35:19 Adani anga asandikondwerere ine monyenga; Okwiya nane kopanda cifukwa asanditsinzinire. 
Psalms35:20 Pakuti salankhula zamtendere: Koma apangira ciwembu odekha m'dziko. 
Psalms35:21 Ndipo andiyasamira m'kamwa mwao; Nati, Hede, Hede, diso lathu lidacipenya." 
Psalms35:22 Yehova, mudacipenya; musakhale cete: Ambuye, musakhale kutali ndi ine." 
Psalms35:23 Galamukani, ndipo khalani maso kundiweruzira mlandu wanga, Mulungu wanga ndi Ambuye wanga," 
Psalms35:24 Mundiweruze monga mwa cilungamo canu, Yehova Mulungu wanga; Ndipo asandisekerere ine." 
Psalms35:25 Asanene mumtima mwao, Hede, momwemo! Asanene, Tammeza iye." 
Psalms35:26 Acite manyazi, nadodome iwo akukondwera cifukwa ca coipa cidandigwera: Abvekeke ndi manyazi ndi kupunzika iwo akudzikuza pa ine." 
Psalms35:27 Apfuule mokondwera nasangalale iwo akukondwera naco cilungamo canga: Ndipo anene kosalekeza, Abuke Yehova, Amene akondwera ndi mtendere wa mtumiki wace." 
Psalms35:28 Ndipo lilime langa lilalikire cilungamo canu, Ndi lemekezo lanu tsiku lonse." 
Psalms36:1 Colakwa ca woipayo cimati m'kati mwa mtima wanga, Palibe kuopa Mulungu pamaso pace." 
Psalms36:2 Pakud adzidyoletsa yekha m'kuona kwace, Kuti anthu sadzacipeza coipa cace ndi kukwiya naco." 
Psalms36:3 Mau a pakamwa pace ndiwo opanda pace ndi onyenga: Waleka kuzindikira ndi kucita bwino. 
Psalms36:4 Alingirira zopanda pace pakama pace; Adziika panjira posad pabwino; Coipa saipidwa naco. 
Psalms36:5 Yehova, m'mwambamuli cifundo canu; Coonadi canu cifikira kuthambo." 
Psalms36:6 Cilungamo canu cikunga mapiri a Mulungu; Maweruzo anu akunga cozama cacikuru: Yehova, musunga munthu ndi nyama." 
Psalms36:7 Ha! cifundo canu, Mulungu, ncokondedwadi! Ndipo ana a anthu athawira ku mthunzi wa mapiko anu." 
Psalms36:8 Adzakhuta kwambiri ndi zonona za m'nyumba mwanu: Ndipo mudzawamwetsa mu mtsinje wa zokondweretsa zanu. 
Psalms36:9 Pakuti citsime ca moyo ciri ndi Inu: M'kuunika kwanu tidzaona kuunika. 
Psalms36:10 Tanimphitsani cifundo canu pa iwo akudziwa Inu; Ndi cilungamo canu pa oongoka mtima. 
Psalms36:11 Phazi la akudzikuza lisandifikire ine, Ndi dzanja la oipa lisandicotse." 
Psalms36:12 Pomwepo padagwera ocita zopanda pace: Anawalikha, ndipo sadzatha kuukanso." 
Psalms37:1 Usabvutike mtima cifukwa ca ocita zoipa, Usacite nsanje cifukwa ca ocita cosalungama." 
Psalms37:2 Pakuti adzawamweta msanga monga udzu, Ndipo adzafota monga msipu wauwisi." 
Psalms37:3 Khulupirira Yehova, ndipo cita cokoma; Khala m'dziko, ndipo tsata coonadi." 
Psalms37:4 Udzikondweretsenso mwa Yehova; Ndipo iye adzakupatsa zokhumba mtima wako. 
Psalms37:5 Pereka njira yako kwa Yehova; Khulupiriranso Iye, adzacicita." 
Psalms37:6 Ndipo adzaonetsa cilungamo cako monga kuunika, Ndi kuweruza kwako monga usana." 
Psalms37:7 Khala cete mwa Yehova, numlindirire Iye: Usabvutike mtima cifukwa ca iye wolemerera m'njira yace, Cifukwa ca munthu wakucita ciwembu." 
Psalms37:8 Leka kupsa mtima, nutaye mkwiyo: Usabvutike mtima ungacite coipa," 
Psalms37:9 Pakuti ocita zoipa adzadulidwa: Koma iwo akuyembekeza Yehova, iwowa adzalandira dziko lapansi." 
Psalms37:10 Katsala kanthawi ndipo woipa adzatha psiti: Inde, udzayang'anira mbuto yace, nudzapeza palibe." 
Psalms37:11 Koma ofatsa adzalandira dziko lapansi; Nadzakondwera nao mtendere wocuruka. 
Psalms37:12 Woipa apangira ciwembu wolungama, Namkukutira mano." 
Psalms37:13 Ambuye adzamseka: Popeza apenya kuti tsiku lace likudza. 
Psalms37:14 Oipa anasolola lupanga, nakoka uta wao; Alikhe ozunzika ndi aumphawi, Aphe amene ali oongoka m'njira:" 
Psalms37:15 Lupanga lao lidzalowa m'mtima mwao momwe, Ndipo mauta ao adzatyoledwa." 
Psalms37:16 Zocepa zace za wolungama zikoma Koposa kucuruka kwao kwa oipa ambiri. 
Psalms37:17 Pakuti manja a oipa adzatyoledwa: Koma Yehova acirikiza olungama. 
Psalms37:18 Yehova adziwa masiku a anthu angwiro: Ndipo cosiyira cao cidzakhala cosatha. 
Psalms37:19 Sadzacita manyazi m'nyengo yoipa: Ndipo m'masiku a njala adzakhuta. 
Psalms37:20 Pakuti oipa adzatayika, Ndipo adani ace a Yehova adzanga mafuta a ana a nkhosa: Adzanyeka, monga utsi adzakanganuka." 
Psalms37:21 Woipa akongola, wosabweza: Koma wolungama acitira cifundo, napereka." 
Psalms37:22 Pakuti iwo amene awadalitsa adzalandira dziko lapansi; Koma iwo amene awatemberera adzadulidwa. 
Psalms37:23 Yehova akhazikitsa mayendedwe a munthu; Ndipo akondwera nayo njira yace. 
Psalms37:24 Angakhale akagwa, satayikiratu: Pakuti Yehova agwira dzanja lace." 
Psalms37:25 Ndinali mwana ndipo ndakalamba: Ndipo sindinapenya wolungama wasiyidwa, Kapena mbumba zace zirinkupempha cakudya." 
Psalms37:26 Tsiku lonse acitira cifundo, nakongoletsa; Ndipo mbumba zace zidalitsidwa." 
Psalms37:27 Siyana naco coipa, nucite cokoma, Nukhale nthawi zonse."
