Psalms37:28 Pakuti Yehova akonda ciweruzo, Ndipo sataya okondedwa ace: Asungika kosatha: Koma adzadula mbumba za oipa." 
Psalms37:29 Olungama adzalandira dziko lapansi, Nadzakhala momwemo kosatha." 
Psalms37:30 Pakamwa pa wolungama palankhula zanzeru, Ndi lilime lace linena ciweruzo." 
Psalms37:31 Malamulo a Mulungu wace ali mumtima mwace; Pakuyenda pace sadzaterereka. 
Psalms37:32 Woipa aunguza wolungama, Nafuna kumupha." 
Psalms37:33 Yehova sadzamsiya m'dzanja lace: Ndipo sadzamtsutsa poweruzidwa iye. 
Psalms37:34 Yembekeza Yehova, nusunge njira yace, Ndipo Iye adzakukweza kuti ulandire dziko: Pakudutidwa oipa udzapenya," 
Psalms37:35 Ndapenya woipa, alikuopsa, Natasa monga mtengo wauwisi wanzika." 
Psalms37:36 Koma anapita ndipo taona, kwati zi: Ndipo ndinampwaira osampeza." 
Psalms37:37 Tapenya wangwiro, ndipo taona woongoka mtima! Pakuti ku matsiriziro ace a munthuyo kuti mtendere." 
Psalms37:38 Koma olakwa adzaonongeka pamodzi: Matsiriziro a oipa adzadutidwa. 
Psalms37:39 Koma cipulumutso ca olungama cidzera kwa Yehova, Iye ndiye mphamvu yao m'nyengo ya nsautso." 
Psalms37:40 Ndipo Yehova awathandiza, nawalanditsa: Awalanditsa kwa oipa nawapulumutsa, Cifukwa kuti anamkhulupirira Iye," 
Psalms38:1 Yehova, musandidzudzule ndi mkwiyo wanu: Ndipo musandilange moopsa m'mtima mwanu." 
Psalms38:2 Pakuti mibvi yanu yandilowa, Ndi dzanja lanu landigwera." 
Psalms38:3 Mumnofu mwanga mulibe camoyo cifukwa ca ukali wanu; Ndipo m'mafupa anga simuzizira, cifukwa ca colakwa canga." 
Psalms38:4 Pakuti mphulupulu zanga zapitirira pamutu panga: Ndathodwa nazo monga ndi katundu wolemera. 
Psalms38:5 Mabala anga anunkha, adaola, Cifukwa ca kupusa kwanga." 
Psalms38:6 Ndapindika, ndawerama kwakukuru; Ndimayenda woliralira tsiku lonse." 
Psalms38:7 Pakuti m'cuuno mwanga mutentha kwambiri; Palibe pamoyo m'mnofu mwanga," 
Psalms38:8 Ndafoka ine, ndipo ndacinjizidwa: Ndabangula cifukwa ca kumyuka mtima wanga." 
Psalms38:9 Ambuye, cikhumbo canga conse ciri pamaso panu; Ndipo kubuula kwanga sikubisika kwa Inu." 
Psalms38:10 Mtima wanga ugundagunda, mphamvu yanga yacoka: Ndipo kuunika kwa maso anga, ndi iko komwe kwandicokera." 
Psalms38:11 Ondikonda ndi anzanga apewa mliri wanga; Ndipo anansi anga aima patali. 
Psalms38:12 Ndipo andichera misampha iwo akufuna moyo wanga; Ndipo iwo akuyesa kundicitira coipa alankhula zoononga, Nalingirira zonyenga tsiku lonse." 
Psalms38:13 Koma ine, monga gonthi, sindimva; Ndipo monga munthu wosalankhula, sinditsegula pakamwa panga." 
Psalms38:14 Inde ndikunga munthu wosamva, Ndipo m'kamwa mwanga mulibe makani." 
Psalms38:15 Pakuti ndikuyembekezani Inu, Yehova; Inu mudzayankha, Ambuye Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms38:16 Pakuti ndinati, Asakondwerere ine: Pakuterereka phazi langa, asadzikuze pa ine." 
Psalms38:17 Ndafikana potsimphina; Ndipo cisoni canga ciri pamaso panga cikhalire. 
Psalms38:18 Pakuti ndidzafotokozera mphulupulu yanga; Nditenga nkhawa cifukwa ca chimo langa. 
Psalms38:19 Koma adani anga ali ndi moyo, nakhalandi mphamvu: Ndipo akundida kopanda cifukwa acuruka." 
Psalms38:20 Ndipo iwo akubwezera coipa pa cabwino Atsutsana nane, popeza nditsata cabwino." 
Psalms38:21 Musanditaye, Yehova: Mulungu wanga, musakhale kutali ndi ine." 
Psalms38:22 Fulumirani kundithandiza, Ambuye, cipulumutso canga." 
Psalms39:1 Ndinati, Ndidzasunga njira zanga, Kuti ndingacimwe ndi lilime langa: Ndidzasunga pakamwa panga ndi cam'kamwa, Pokhala woipa ali pamaso panga." 
Psalms39:2 Ndinatonthola osanena mau, ndinakhala cete osalawa cokoma; Ndipo cisoni canga cinabuka." 
Psalms39:3 Mtima wanga unatentha m'kati mwaine; Unayaka moto pakulingirira ine: Pamenepo ndinalankhula ndi lilime langa: 
Psalms39:4 Yehova, mundidziwitse cimariziro canga, Ndi mawerengedwe a masiku anga ndi angati; Ndidziwe malekezero anga," 
Psalms39:5 Onani, munaika masiku anga akhale monga kuyesa dzanja; Ndipo zaka zanga ziri ngati cabe pamaso panu: Indedi munthu ali yense angakhale wokhazikika, ali cabe konse." 
Psalms39:6 Indedi munthu ayenda ngati mthunzi: Indedi abvutika cabe: Asonkhanitsa cuma, ndipo sadziwa adzacilandira ndani?" 
Psalms39:7 Ndipo tsopano, Ambuye, ndilindira ciani? Ciyembekezo canga ciri pa Inu." 
Psalms39:8 Ndipulumutseni kwa zolakwa zangazonse: Musandiike ndikhale cotonza ca wopusa. 
Psalms39:9 Ndinakhala du, sindinatsegula pakamwa panga; Cifukwa inu mudacicita." 
Psalms39:10 Mundicotsere cobvutitsa canu; Pandithera ine cifukwa ca kulanga kwa dzanja lanu. 
Psalms39:11 Pamene mulanga munthu ndi zomdzudzula cifukwa ca mphulupulu, Mukanganula kukongola kwace monga mumacita ndi kadzoce: Indedi, munthu ali yense ali cabe." 
Psalms39:12 Imvani pemphero langa, Yehova, ndipo cherani khutu kulira kwanga; Musakhale cete pa misozi yanga: Pakuti ine ndine mlendo ndi Inu, Wosakhazikika, monga makolo anga onse." 
Psalms39:13 Ndiloleni, kuti nditsitsimuke, Ndisanamuke ndi kukhala kuli zi." 
Psalms40:1 Kuyembekeza ndayembekeza Yehova; Ndipo anandilola, namva kupfuula kwanga." 
Psalms40:2 Ndipo anandikweza kunditurutsa m'dzenje la citayiko, ndi m'thope la pacithaphwi; Nandipondetsa pathanthwe, nakhazika mayendedwe anga." 
Psalms40:3 Ndipo anapatsa Nyimbo yatsopano m'kamwa mwanga, cilemekezo ca kwa Mulungu wanga; Ambiri adzaciona, nadzaopa, Ndipo adzakhulupirira Yehova." 
Psalms40:4 Wodala munthuyo wakuyesa Yehova wokhulupirika; Wosasamala odzikuza, ndi opatukira kubodza." 
Psalms40:5 Inu, Yehova, Mulungu wanga, zodabwiza zanu mudazicita nzambiri, Ndipo zolingirira zanu za pa ife; Palibe wina wozifotokozera Inu; Ndikazisimba ndi kuzichula, Zindicurukira kuziwerenga." 
Psalms40:6 Nsembe ndi copereka simukondwera nazo; Mwanditsegula makutu: Nsembe yopsereza ndi yamacimo simunapempha. 
Psalms40:7 Pamenepo ndinati, Taonani, ndadza; M'buku mwalembedwa za Ine:" 
Psalms40:8 Kucita cikondwero canu kundikonda, Mulungu wanga; Ndipo malamulo anu ali m'kati mwamtima mwanga." 
Psalms40:9 Ndalalikira cilungamo mu msonkano waukuru; Onani, sindidzaletsa milomo yanga, Mudziwa ndinu Yehova." 
Psalms40:10 Cilungamo canu sindinacibisa m'kati mwamtima mwanga; Cikhulupiriko canu ndi cipulumutso canu ndinacinena; Cifundo canu ndi coonadi canu sindinacibisira msonkhano waukuru. 
Psalms40:11 Inu Yehova, simudzandikaniza nsoni zanu: Cifundo canu ndi coonadi canu zindisunge cisungire." 
Psalms40:12 Pakuti zoipa zosawerengeka zandizinga, Zocimwa zanga zandipeza kotero kuti sindikhoza kupenya; Ziposa tsitsi la mutu wanga, ndipo wandicokera mtima." 
Psalms40:13 Ndikupemphani, Yehova, ndilanditseni: Fulumirani kudzandithandiza, Yehova." 
Psalms40:14 Acite manyazi nadodome Iwo akulondola moyo wanga kuti auononge: Abwerere m'mbuyo, nacite manyazi iwo okondwera kundicitira coipa." 
Psalms40:15 Apululuke, mobwezera manyazi ao Amene anena nane, Hede, hede." 
Psalms40:16 Asekerere nakondwerere mwa Inu onse akufuna Inu: Iwo akukonda cipulumutso canu asaleke kunena, Abuke Yehova." 
Psalms40:17 Ndipo ine ndine wozunzika ndi waumphawi; Koma Ambuye andikumbukila ine: Inu ndinu mthandizi wanga, ndi mpulumutsi wanga: Musamacedwa, Mulungu wanga," 
Psalms41:1 Wodala iye amene asamalira wosauka: Tsiku la tsoka Yehova adzampulumutsa: 
Psalms41:2 Yehova adzamsunga, nadzamsunga ndi moyo, ndipo adzadalitsika pa dziko lapansi; Ndipo musampereke ku cifuniro ca adani ace." 
Psalms41:3 Yehova adzamgwiriziza pa kama wodwalira; Podwala iye mukonza pogona pace," 
Psalms41:4 Ndinati ine, Mundicitire cifundo, Yehova: Ciritsani mtima wanga; pakuti ndacimwira Inu." 
Psalms41:5 Adani anga andinenera coipa, ndi kuti, Adzafa liti, ndi kutayika dzina lace?" 
Psalms41:6 Ndipo akadza kundiona wina angonena bodza; Mumtima mwace adzisonkhera zopanda pace: Akamka nayenda namakanena: 
Psalms41:7 Onse akudana nane andinong'onezerana; Apangana condiipsa ine. 
Psalms41:8 Camgwera cinthu coopsa, ati; Popeza ali gonire sadzaukanso." 
Psalms41:9 Ngakhale bwenzi langa leni leni, amene ndamkhulupirira, ndiye amene adadyako mkate wanga, Anandikwezera cidendene cace." 
Psalms41:10 Koma Inu, Yehova, mundicitire cifundo, ndipo mundiutse, Kuti ndiwabwezere." 
Psalms41:11 Umo ndidziwa kuti mukondwera ndi ine, Popeza mdani wanga sandiseka." 
Psalms41:12 Ndipo ine, mundigwirizize m'ungwiro wanga, Ndipo mundiike pankhope panu ku nthawi yamuyaya." 
Psalms41:13 Wodalitsika Yehova, Mulungu wa Israyeli, Kucokera nthawi yosayamba kufikira nthawi yosatha. Amen, ndi Amen." 
Psalms42:1 Monga nswala ipuma wefuwefu kukhumba mitsinje; Motero moyo wanga upuma wefuwefu kukhumba Inu, Mulungu." 
Psalms42:2 Moyo wanga uli ndi ludzu la kwa Mulungu, la kwa Mulungu wamoyo: Ndikadze liti kuoneka pamaso pa Mulungu?" 
Psalms42:3 Misozi yanga yakhalangati cakudya canga, Usana ndi usiku; Pakunena iwo kwa ine dzuwa lonse, Mulungu wako ali kuti?" 
Psalms42:4 Ndizikumbukila izi ndipo nditsanulira moyo wanga m'kati mwa ine, Pakuti ndidafopita ndi unyinji wa anthu, Ndinawatsogolera ku nyumba ya Mulungu, ndi mau akuyimbitsa ndi kuyamika, Ndi unyinji wakusunga dzuwa lokondwera." 
Psalms42:5 Udziweramiranji moyo wanga iwe? Ndi kuzingwa m'kati mwanga? Yembekeza Mulungu, pakuti ndidzamyamikanso Cifukwa ca cipulumutso ca nkhope yace." 
Psalms42:6 Mulungu wanga, moyo wanga Udziweramira m'kati mwanga; Cifukwa cace ndikumbukila Inu m'dziko la Yordano, Ndi mu Ahermone, m'kaphiri ka Mizara." 
Psalms42:7 Madzi akuya aitanizana ndi madzi akuya, Pa mkokomo wa matiti anu: Mafunde onse a nyondonyondo anandimiza ine." 
Psalms42:8 Koma usana Yehova adzalamulira cifundo cace, Ndipo usiku Nyimbo yace idzakhala ndi ine. Inde pemphero la kwa Yehova wa moyowanga." 
Psalms42:9 Ndidzati kwa Mulungu, thanthwe langa, mwandiiwala cifukwa ninji? Ndimayenderanji wakulira Cifukwa ca kundipsinja mdaniyo?" 
Psalms42:10 Adani anga andinyoza ndi kundityola mafupa anga; Pakunena ndine dzuwa lonse, Mulungu wako ali kuti?" 
Psalms42:11 Udziweramiranji moyo wanga iwe? Ndi kuzingwa m'kati mwanga? Yembekeza Mulungu: pakuti ndidzamlemekeza tsopanonso, Ndiye cipulumutso ca nkhope yanga ndi Mulungu wanga," 
Psalms43:1 Mundiweruzire, Mulungu, ndipo mundinenere mlandu kwa anthu opanda cifundo: Mundilanditse kwa munthu wonyenga ndi wosalungama." 
Psalms43:2 Pakuti Inu ndinu Mulungu wa mphamvu yanga; mwanditayiranji? Ndimayenderanji woliralira cifukwa ca kundipsinja mdani? 
Psalms43:3 Tumizirani kuunika kwanu ndi coonadi canu zinditsogolere: Zindifikitse ku phiri lanu loyera, Kumene mukhala Inuko." 
Psalms43:4 Kuti ndipite kufikira guwa la nsembe la Mulungu, Kufikira Mulungu wa cimwemwe canga ceniceni: Ndi kuti ndikuyamikeni ndi zeze, Mulungu, Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms43:5 Udziweramiranji moyo wanga iwe? Ndi kuzingwa m'kati mwanga? Yembekeza Mulungu: pakuti ndidzamyamikanso, Ndiye cipulumutso ca nkhope yanga, ndi Mulungu wanga." 
Psalms44:1 Mulungu, tidamva m'makutu mwathu, makolo athu anatisimbira, Za nchitoyo mudaicita masiku ao, masiku akale." 
Psalms44:2 Inu munapitikitsa amitundu ndi dzanja lanu, koma iwowa munawaoka; Munasautsa mitundu ya anthu, ndipo munawaingitsa," 
Psalms44:3 Pakuti sanalanda dziko ndi lupanga lao, Ndipo mkono wao sunawapulumutsa: Koma dzanja lanu lamanja, ndi mkono wanu, ndi kuunika kwa nkhope yanu. Popeza munakondwera nao," 
Psalms44:4 Inu ndinu mfumu yanga, Mulungu: Lamulirani cipulumutso ca Yakobo." 
Psalms44:5 Mwa Inu tidzakankhira pansi otsutsana nafe: M'dzina lanu tidzapondereza akutiukira ife. 
Psalms44:6 Pakuti sinditama uta wanga, Ndipo lupanga langa silingandipulumutse." 
Psalms44:7 Koma Inu munatipulumutsa kwa iwo akutsutsana nafe, Ndipo akudana nafe, mudawacititsa manyazi." 
Psalms44:8 Mwa Mulungu tidzitamanda tsiku lonse, Ndipo dzina lanu tidzaliyamika kosatha." 
Psalms44:9 Koma mwatitaya, ndi kutinyazitsa; Ndipo simuturuka nao makamu a nkhondo athu." 
Psalms44:10 Mutibwereretsa kuthawa otisautsa: Ndipo akudana nafe adzifunkhira okha. 
Psalms44:11 Mwatipereka ngati nkhosa zoyenera kuzidya; Ndipo mwatibalalitsa mwa amitundu. 
Psalms44:12 Mugulitsa anthu anu kwacabe, Ndipo mtengo wace simupindula nao." 
Psalms44:13 Mutisandutsa cotonza kwa anzathu, Ndi coseketsa ndi colalatitsa iwo akutizinga." 
Psalms44:14 Mutiika tikhale onyozeka mwa amitundu, Ndi kuti anthu atipukusire mitu." 
Psalms44:15 Tsiku lonse cimpepulo canga cikhala pamaso panga, Ndipo manyazi a pankhope panga andikuta." 
Psalms44:16 Cifukwa ca mau a wotonza wocitira mwano; Cifukwa ca mdani ndi wobwezera cilango," 
Psalms44:17 Zonsezi zatigwera; koma sitinakuiwalani, Ndipo sitinacita monyenga m'pangano lanu." 
Psalms44:18 Mtima wathu sunabwerera m'mbuyo, Ndipo m'mayendedwe athu sitinapatuka m'njira yanu;" 
Psalms44:19 Mungakhale munatityola mokhala zirombo, Ndi kutiphimba nao mthunzi wa imfa." 
Psalms44:20 Tikadaiwala dzina la Mulungu wathu, Ndi kutambasulira manja athu kwa mulungu wacilendo;" 
Psalms44:21 Mulungu sakadasanthula ici kodi? Pakuti adziwa zinsinsi za mtima. 
Psalms44:22 Koma, cifukwa ca Inu, tiphedwa tsiku lonse; Tiyesedwa ngati nkhosa zakuzipha." 
Psalms44:23 Galamukani, mugoneranji, Ambuye? Ukani, musatitaye citayire." 
Psalms44:24 Mubisiranji nkhope yanu, Ndi kuiwala kuzunzika ndi kupsinjika kwathu?" 
Psalms44:25 Pakuti moyo wathu waweramira kupfumbi: Pamimba pathu pakangamira dziko lapansi. 
Psalms44:26 Ukani, tithandizeni, Tiomboleni mwa cifundo canu." 
Psalms45:1 Mtima wanga usefukira naco cinthu cokoma: Ndinena zopeka ine za mfumu: Lilime langa ndilo peni yofulumiza kulemba. 
Psalms45:2 Inu ndinu wokongola ndithu kuposa ana a anthu; Anakutsanulirani cisomo pa milomo yanu: Cifukwa cace Mulungu anakudalitsani kosatha. 
Psalms45:3 Dzimangireni lupanga lanu m'cuuno mwanu, wamphamvu inu, Ndi ulemerero wanu ndi ukulu wanu." 
Psalms45:4 Ndipo pindulani, m'ukulu wanu yendani, Kaamba ka coonadi ndi cifatso ndi cilungamo: Ndipo dzanja lanu lidzakuphunzitsani zoopsa." 
Psalms45:5 Mibvi yanu njakuthwa; Mitundu ya anthu igwa pansi pa Inu: Iwalasa mumtima adani a mfumu. 
Psalms45:6 Mpando wacifumu wanu, Mulungu, ukhala nthawi zonse zamkamuyaya: Ndodo yacifumu ya ufumu wanu ndiyo ndodo yolunjika." 
Psalms45:7 Mukonda cilungamo, ndipo mudana naco coipa: Cifukwa cace Mulungu, ndiye Mulungu wanu, wadzoza inu Ndi mafuta a cikondwerero kuposa anzanu." 
Psalms45:8 Zobvala zanu zonse nza mure, ndi khonje, ndi kasya; M'zinyumba za mfumu zomanga ndi minyanga ya njobvu mwatoruka zoyimba za zingwe zokukondweretsani." 
Psalms45:9 Mwa omveka anu muli ana akazi amafumu: Ku dzanja lamanja lanu aima mkazi wa mfumu wobvala golidi wa ku Ofiri. 
Psalms45:10 Tamvera, mwana wamkaziwe, taona, tachera khutu lako; Uiwalenso mtundu wako ndi nyumba ya atate wako;" 
Psalms45:11 Potero mfumuyo adzakhumba kukoma kwako: Pakuti ndiye mbuye wako; ndipo iwe umgwadire iye. 
Psalms45:12 Ndipo mwana wamkazi wa Turo adzafika nayo mphatso; Acuma a mwa anthu adzapempha kudziwika nanu. 
Psalms45:13 Mwana wamkazi wa mfumu ngwa ulemerero wonse m'kati mwa nyumba: Zobvala zace nza made agolidi. 
Psalms45:14 Adzamtsogolera kwa mfumu wabvala zamawanga-mawanga: Anamwali anzace omtsata adzafika nao kwa inu. 
Psalms45:15 Adzawatsogolera ndi cimwemwe ndi kusekerera: Adzalowa m'nyumba ya mfumu. 
Psalms45:16 M'malo mwa makolo ako mudzakhala ana ako, Udzawaika akhale mafumu m'dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms45:17 Ndidzawakumbutsa dzina lanu m'mibadwo mibadwo: Cifukwa cace mitundu ya anthu idzayamika Inu ku nthawi za nthawi. 
Psalms46:1 Mulungu ndiye pothawirapo pathu ndi mphamvu yathu, Thandizo lopezekeratu m'masautso." 
Psalms46:2 Cifukwa cace sitidzacita mantha, lingakhale lisandulika dziko lapansi, Angakhale mapiri asunthika, nakhala m'kati mwa nyanja;" 
Psalms46:3 Cinkana madzi ace akokoma, nacita thobvu, Nagwedezeka mapiri ndi kudzala kwace." 
Psalms46:4 Pali mtsinje, ngalande zace zidzakondweretsa mudzi wa Mulungu. Malo oyera okhalamo Wam'mwambamwamba," 
Psalms46:5 Mulungu ali m'kati mwace, sudzasunthika: Mulungu adzauthandiza mbanda kuca." 
Psalms46:6 Amitundu anapokosera; maufumu anagwedezeka: Ananena mau, dziko lapansi linasungunuka." 
Psalms46:7 Yehova wa makamu ali ndi ife; Mulungu wa Yakobo ndiye pamsanje pathu. 
Psalms46:8 Idzani, penyani nchito za Yehova, Amene acita zopululutsa pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms46:9 Aletsa nkhondo ku malekezero adziko lapansi; Athyola uta, nadula nthungo; Atentha magareta ndi moto." 
Psalms46:10 Khalani cete, ndipo dziwani kuti Ine ndine Mulungu: Ndidzabuka mwa amitundu, Ndidzabuka pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms46:11 Yehova wa makamu ali ndi ife, Mulungu wa Yakobo ndiye pamsanje pathu," 
Psalms47:1 Ombani m'manja, mitundu yonse ya anthu; Pfuulirani kwa Mulungu ndi liu la kuyimbitsa." 
Psalms47:2 Pakuti Yehova Wam'mwambamwamba ndiye woopsa; Ndiye mfumu yaikuru pa dziko lonse lapansi. 
Psalms47:3 Atigonjetsera anthu, Naika amitundu pansi pa mapazi athu." 
Psalms47:4 Atisankhira colowa cathu, Cokometsetsa ca Yakobo amene anamkonda." 
Psalms47:5 Mulungu wakwera ndi mpfuu, Yehova ndi liu la lipenga." 
Psalms47:6 Yimbirani Mulungu, yimbirani; Yimbirani Mfumu yathu, yimbirani." 
Psalms47:7 Pakuti Mulungu ndiye Mfumu ya dziko lonse lapansi; Yimbirani ndi cilangizo. 
Psalms47:8 Mulungu ndiye Mfumu ya amitundu: Mulungu akhala pa mpando wacifumu wace woyera. 
Psalms47:9 Akulu a anthu asonkhana Akhale anthu a Mulungu wa Abrahamu: Pakuti zikopa za dziko lapansi nza Mulungu; Akwezeka kwakukuru Iyeyo. 
Psalms48:1 Yehova ndiye wamkulu, ayenera kulemekezekadi, M'mudzi wa Mulungu wathu, m'phiri lace loyera." 
Psalms48:2 Phiri la Ziyoni, cikhalidwe cace ncokoma Ku mbali zace za kumpoto, Ndilo cimwemwe ca dziko lonse lapansi, Mudzi wa mfumu yaikuru." 
Psalms48:3 Mulungu adziwika m'zinyumba zace ngati msanje. 
Psalms48:4 Pakuti, taonani, mafumuwo anasonkhana, Anapitira pamodzi." 
Psalms48:5 Anapenya mudziwo, ndipo pamenepo anadabwa; Anaopsedwa, nathawako." 
Psalms48:6 Pomwepo anagwidwa nako kunthunthumira; Anamva cowawa, ngati wam'cikuta." 
Psalms48:7 Muswa zombo za ku Tarisi ndi mphepo ya kum'mawa. 
Psalms48:8 Monga tidamva, momwemo tidapenya M'mudzi wa Yehova wa makamu, m'mudzi wa Mulungu wathu: Mulungu adzaukhazikitsa ku nthawi yamuyaya." 
Psalms48:9 Tidalingalira za cifundo canu, Mulungu, M'kati mwa Kacisi wanu." 
Psalms48:10 Monga dzina lanu, Mulungu, Momwemo lemekezo lanu ku malekezero a dziko lapansi: M'dzanja lamanja lanu mudzala cilungamo." 
Psalms48:11 Likondwere phiri la Ziyoni, Asekere ana akazi a Yuda, Cifukwa ca maweruzo anu." 
Psalms48:12 Zungulirani Ziyoni, ndipo muuzinge; Werengani nsanja zace." 
Psalms48:13 Penyetsetsani malinga ace, Yesetsani zinyumba zace; Kuti mukaziwerengere mibadwo ikudza m'mbuyo." 
Psalms48:14 Pakuti Mulungu ameneyo ndiye Mulungu wathu ku nthawi za nthawi: Adzatitsogolera kufikira imfa. 
Psalms49:1 Dzamveni kuno, anthu inu nonse; Cherani khutu, inu nonse amakono," 
Psalms49:2 Awamba ndi omveka omwe, Acuma ndi aumphawi omwe." 
Psalms49:3 Pakamwa panga padzanena zanzeru; Ndipo cilingiriro ca mtima wanga cidzakhala ca cidziwitso. 
Psalms49:4 Ndidzachera khutu kufanizo: Ndidzafotokozera cophiphiritsa canga poyimbira. 
Psalms49:5 Ndidzaoperanji masiku oipa, Pondizinga amphulupulu onditsata kucidendene?" 
Psalms49:6 Iwo akutama kulemera kwao; Nadzitamandira pa kucuruka kwa cuma cao; 
Psalms49:7 Kuombola mbale sangadzamuombole, Kapena kumperekera dipo kwa Mulungu:" 
Psalms49:8 (Popeza ciombolo ca moyo wao nca mtengo wace wapatali, Ndipo cilekeke nthawi zonse)" 
Psalms49:9 Kuti akhale ndi moyo osafa, Osaona cibvundi." 
Psalms49:10 Pakuti aona anzeru amafa, Monga aonongekera wopusa, wodyerera momwemo, Nasiyira ena cuma cao." 
Psalms49:11 Mumtima mwao ayesa kuti nyumba zao zikhala cikhalire, Ndi mokhala iwo ku mibadwo mibadwo; Achapo dzina lao padziko pao." 
Psalms49:12 Koma munthu wa ulemu wace sakhalitsa: Afanana ndi nyama za kuthengo, afanana nazo." 
Psalms49:13 Njira yao yino ndiyo kupusa kwao: Koma akudza m'mbuyo abvomereza mau ao. 
Psalms49:14 Aikidwa m'manda ngati nkhosa; Mbusa wao ndi imfa: Ndipo m'mawa mwace oongoka mtima adzakhala mafumu ao; Ndipo maonekedwe ao adzanyekera kumanda, kuti pokhala pace padzasowa." 
Psalms49:15 Koma Mulungu adzaombola moyo wanga ku mphamvu ya manda: Pakuti adzandilandira ine. 
Psalms49:16 Usaope polemezedwa munthu, Pocuruka ulemu wa nyumba yace;" 
Psalms49:17 Pakuti pomwalira iye sadzamuka nako kanthu kali konse; Ulemu wace sutsika naye kumtsata m'mbuyo. 
Psalms49:18 Angakhale anadalitsa moyo wace pokhala ndi moyo, Ndipo anthu akulemekeza iwe, podzicitira wekha zokoma," 
Psalms49:19 Adzamuka ku mbadwo wa makolo ace; Sadzaona kuunika nthawi zonse. 
Psalms49:20 Munthu waulemu, koma wosadziwitsa, Afanana ndi nyama za kuthengo, afanana nazo." 
Psalms50:1 Mulungu wa milungu, Yehova, wanena, Aitana dziko lapansi kuyambira kuturuka kwa dzuwa kufikira kulowa kwace." 
Psalms50:2 Mulungu awalira m'Ziyoni, mokongola mwangwiro." 
Psalms50:3 Adzafika Mulungu wathu, ndipo sadzakhala cete: Moto udzanyeka pankhope pace, Ndipo pozungulira pace padzasokosera kwakukuru." 
Psalms50:4 Kumwamba adzaitana zakumwamba, Ndi dziko lapansi, kuti aweruze anthu ace:" 
Psalms50:5 Mundisonkhanitsire okondedwa anga; Amene anapangana ndi Ine ndi nsembe. 
Psalms50:6 Ndipo zakumwamba zionetsera cilungamo cace; Pakuti Mulungu mwini wace ndiye woweruza. 
Psalms50:7 Imvani, anthu anga, ndipo ndidzanena; Israyeli, ndipo ndidzacita mboni pa iwe: Ine Mulungu, ndine Mulungu wako." 
Psalms50:8 Sindikudzudzula iwe cifukwa ca nsembe zako; Popeza nsembe zako zopsereza ziri pamaso panga cikhalire. 
Psalms50:9 Sindidzatenga ng'ombe m'nyumbamwako, Kapena mbuzi m'makola mwako." 
Psalms50:10 Pakuti zamoyo zonse za kuthengo ndi zanga, Ndi ng'ombe za pa mapiri zikwi." 
Psalms50:11 Ndidziwa mbalame zonse za m'mapiri: Ndipo nyama za kuthengo ziri ndi Ine. 
Psalms50:12 Ndikamva njala, sindidzakuuza: Pakuti dziko lonse ndi langa, ndi kudzala kwace komwe." 
Psalms50:13 Kodi ndidzadya nyama ya ng'ombe, Kapena kumwa mwazi wa mbuzi?" 
Psalms50:14 Pereka kwa Mulungu nsembe yaciyamiko; Numcitire Wam'mwambamwamba cowinda cako: 
Psalms50:15 Ndipo undiitane tsiku la cisautso: Ndidzakulanditsa, ndipo iwe udzandilemekeza." 
Psalms50:16 Koma kwa woipa Mulungu anena, Uli nao ciani malemba anga kulalikira, Ndi kuchula pangano langa pakamwa pako?" 
Psalms50:17 Popeza udana naco cilangizo, Nufulatira mau anga." 
Psalms50:18 Pakuona mbala, ubvomerezana nayo, Nucita nao acigololo." 
Psalms50:19 Pakamwa pako mpocita zocimwa, Ndipo lilime lako likonza cinyengo." 
Psalms50:20 Ukhala, nuneneza mbale wako; Usinjirira mwana wa mai wako." 
Psalms50:21 Izi unazicita iwe, ndipo ndinakhala cete Ine; Unayesa kuti ndifanana nawe: Ndidzakudzudzula, ndi kucilongosola pamaso pako." 
Psalms50:22 Dziwitsani ici inu oiwala Mulungu, Kuti ndingakumwetuleni, ndipo mungasowepo mpulumutsi:" 
Psalms50:23 Wopereka nsembe yaciyamiko andilemekeza Ine; Ndipo kwa iye wosunga mayendedwe ace Ndidzamuonetsa cipulumutso ca Mulungu. 
Psalms51:1 Mundicitire ine cifundo, Mulungu, Monga mwa kukoma mtima kwanu; Monga mwa unyinji wa nsoni zokoma zanu Mufafanize macimo anga." 
Psalms51:2 Mubwereze kunditsuka mphulupulu yanga, Ndipo mundiyeretse kundicotsera coipa canga," 
Psalms51:3 Cifukwa ndazindikira macimo anga; Ndipo coipa canga ciri pamaso panga cikhalire: 
Psalms51:4 Pa Inu, Inu nokha, ndinacimwa, Ndipo ndinacicita coipaco pamaso panu: Kuti mukhale wolungama pakulankhula Inu, Mukhalenso woyera pa kuweruza kwanu." 
Psalms51:5 Onani, ndinabadwa m'mphulupulu: Ndipo mai wanga anandilandira m'zoipa." 
Psalms51:6 Onani, Inu mukondwera ndi zoonadi m'malo a m'katimo; Ndipo m'malo a m'tseri mudzandidziwitsa nzeru." 
Psalms51:7 Mundiyeretse ndi hisope ndipo ndidzayera; Munditsuke ndipo ndidzakhala wa mbu woposa matalala. 
Psalms51:8 Mundimvetse cimwemwe ndi kusekera: Kuti mafupawo munawatyola akondwere. 
Psalms51:9 Muzibisire nkhope yanu zolakwa zanga, Ndipo mufafanize mphulupulu zanga zonse." 
Psalms51:10 Mundilengere mtima woyera, Mulungu; Mukonze mzimu wokhazikika m'kati mwanga." 
Psalms51:11 Musanditaye kundicotsa pamaso panu; Musandicotsere Mzimu wanu Woyera. 
Psalms51:12 Mundibwezere cimwemwe ca cipulumutso canu; Ndipo mzimu wakulola undigwirizize. 
Psalms51:13 Pomwepo ndidzalangiza ocimwa njira zanu; Ndipo olakwa adzabwera kwa Inu. 
Psalms51:14 Mundilanditse ku mlandu wa mwazi, Mulungu, Ndinu Mulungu wa cipulumutso canga; Lilime langalidzakweza Nyimbo ya cilungamo canu." 
Psalms51:15 Ambuye, tsegulani pa milomo yanga; Ndipo pakamwa panga padzalalikira ulemekezo wanu." 
Psalms51:16 Pakuti simukondwera ndi nsembe, mwenzi nditapereka; Nsembe yopsereza simuikonda." 
Psalms51:17 Nsembe za Mulungu ndizo mzimu wosweka; Inu, Mulungu, simudzaupeputsa mtima wosweka ndi wolapa." 
Psalms51:18 Citirani Ziyoni cokoma monga mwa kukondwera kwanu; Mumange malinga a miyala a Yerusalemu. 
Psalms51:19 Pamenepo mudzakondwera nazo nsembe zacilungamo, Ndi nsembe yopsereza ndi yopsereza yathunthu: Pamenepo adzapereka Ng'ombe pa guwa lanu la nsembe." 
Psalms52:1 Udzitamandiranji ndi coipa, ciphonaiwe? Cifundo ca Mulungu cikhala tsiku lonse." 
Psalms52:2 Lilime lako likupanga zoipa; Likunga lumo lakuthwa, lakucita monyenga." 
Psalms52:3 Ukonda coipa koposa cokoma; Ndi bodza koposa kunena cilungamo. 
Psalms52:4 Ukonda mau onse akuononga, Lilime lacinyengo, iwe." 
Psalms52:5 Potero Mulungu adzakupasula ku nthawi zonse, Adzakucotsa nadzakukwatula m'hema mwako, Nadzakuzula, kukucotsa m'dziko la amoyo." 
Psalms52:6 Ndipo olungama adzaciona, nadzaopa, Nadzamseka, ndi kuti," 
Psalms52:7 Tapenyani, suyu munthuyu amene sanamuyesa Mulungu mphamvu yace; Amene anatama kucuruka kwa cuma cace, Nadzilimbitsa m'kuipsa kwace." 
Psalms52:8 Koma ine ndine ngati mtengo wauwisi waazitona m'nyumba ya Mulungu: Ndikhulupirira cifundo ca Mulungu ku nthawi za nthawi. 
Psalms52:9 Ndidzakuyamikani kosatha, popeza Inu munacicita ici: Ndipo ndidzayembekeza dzina lanu, pakuti ici ncokoma, pamaso pa okondedwa anu," 
Psalms53:1 Citsiru cimati mumtima mwace, Kulibe Mulungu. Acita zobvunda, acita cosalungama conyansa; Kulibe wakucita bwino." 
Psalms53:2 Mulungu m'mwamba anaweramira pa ana a anthu, Kuti aone ngati aliko wanzeru, Wakufuna Mulungu." 
Psalms53:3 Onse anabwerera; anabvunda mtima pamodzi; Palibe mmodzi wakucita bwino, nnena mmodzi." 
Psalms53:4 Kodi ocita zopanda pace sadziwa? Pomadya anthu anga monga akudya mkate; Ndipo saitana Mulungu. 
Psalms53:5 Pamenepo anaopa kwakukuru, popanda cifukwa ca kuopa: Pakuti Mulungu anamwaza mafupa a iwo akuzinga iwe; Unawacititsa manyazi, pakuti Mulungu anawakaniza." 
Psalms53:6 Ha, cipulumutso ca Israyeli cicokere m'Ziyoni! Pakubweretsa Mulungu anthu ace a m'ndende, Yakobo adzakondwera, Israyeli adzasekera." 
Psalms54:1 Ndipulumutseni, Mulungu, mwa dzina lanu, Ndipo mundiweruze ndi mphamvuyanu." 
Psalms54:2 Imvani pemphero langa, Mulungu; Cherani khutu mau a pakamwa panga." 
Psalms54:3 Pakuti alendo andiukira, Ndipo oopsa afunafuna moyo wanga; Sadziikira Mulungu pamaso pao." 
Psalms54:4 Taonani, Mulungu ndiye mthandizi wanga: Ambuye ndiye wacirikiza moyo wanga." 
Psalms54:5 Adzabwezera coipa adani anga: Aduleni m'coonadi canu. 
Psalms54:6 Ine mwini ndidzapereka nsembe kwa Inu: Ndidzayamika dzina lanu, Yehova, pakuti nlokoma." 
Psalms54:7 Pakuti anandilanditsa m'nsautso yonse; Ndipo ndapenya ndi diso langa ico ndakhumbira pa adani anga," 
Psalms55:1 Cherani khutu pemphero langa, Mulungu; Ndipo musadzibisa pa kupemba kwanga." 
Psalms55:2 Mveram, ndipo mundiyankhe: Ndiliralira m'kudandaula kwanga ndi kubuula;" 
Psalms55:3 Cifukwa ca mau a mdani, Cifukwa ca kundipsinja woipa; Pakuti andisenza zopanda pace, Ndipo adana nane mumkwiyo." 
Psalms55:4 Mtima wanga uwawa m'kati mwanga; Ndipo zoopsa za imfa zandigwera. 
Psalms55:5 Mantha ndi kunjenjemera zandidzera, Ndipo zoopsetsa zandikuta." 
Psalms55:6 Ndipo ndinati, Ha, wina akadandipatsa mapiko onga a njiwa Mwenzi nditauluka, ndi kukhaliratu." 
Psalms55:7 Onani, ndikadathawira kutari, Ndikadagona m'cipululu." 
Psalms55:8 Ndikadafulumira ndipulumuke Ku mphepo yolimba ndi namondwe. 
Psalms55:9 Aonongeni, Ambuye, gawani lilime lao: Pakuti ndaona ciwawa ndi ndeu m'mudzimo." 
Psalms55:10 Izizo ziuzungulira pa malinga ace usana ndi usiku; Ndipo m'kati mwace muli zapanda pace ndi cobvuta. 
Psalms55:11 M'kati mwace muli kusakaza: Ciwawa ndi cinyengo sizicoka m'makwalala ace. 
Psalms55:12 Pakuti si mdani amene ananditonzayo; Pakadatero ndikadacilola: Amene anadzikuza pa ine sindiye munthu wondida; Pakadatero ndikadambisalira: 
Psalms55:13 Koma ameneyo ndiwe, munthu woyenerana nane, Tsamwali wanga, wodziwana nane." 
Psalms55:14 Tinapangirana upo wokoma, Tinaperekeza khamu la anthu popita ku nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Psalms55:15 Imfa iwagwere modzidzimutsa, Atsikire kumanda ali amoyo: Pakuti m'mokhala mwao muli zoipa pakati pao," 
Psalms55:16 Koma ine ndidzapfuulira kwa Mulungu; Ndipo Yehova atizandipulumutsa. 
Psalms55:17 Madzulo, m'mawa, ndi msana ndidzadandaula, ndi kubuula, Ndipo adzamva mau anga." 
Psalms55:18 Anaombola moyo wanga ku nkhondo yondilaka, ndikhale mumtendere: Pakuti ndiwo ambiri okangana nane." 
Psalms55:19 Mulungu adzamva, nadzawasautsa, Ndiye wokhalabe ciyambire kale lomwe. Popeza iwowa sasinthika konse, Ndipo saopa Mulungu." 
Psalms55:20 Anaturutsa manja ace awagwire iwo akuyanjana naye: Anaipsa pangano lace. 
Psalms55:21 Pakamwa pace mposalala ngati mafuta amkaka, Koma mumtima mwace munali nkhondo: Mau ace ngofewa ngati mafuta oyenga, Koma anali malupanga osololasolola." 
Psalms55:22 Umsenze Yehova nkhawa zako, ndipo Iyeadzakugwiriziza: Nthawi zonse sadzalola wolungama agwedezeke." 
Psalms55:23 Koma Inu, Mulungu, mudzawatsitsira ku dzenje la cionongeko: Anthu okhetsa mwazi ndi acinyengo masiku ao sadzafikira nusu; Koma ine ndidzakhulupirira Inu." 
Psalms56:1 Mundicitire cifundo, Mulungu, pakuti anthu afuna kundimeza: Andipsinja pondithira nkhondo tsiku lonse." 
Psalms56:2 Adani anga afuna kundimeza tsiku lonse: Pakuti ambiri andithira nkhondo modzikuza. 
Psalms56:3 Tsiku lakuopa ine, Ndidzakhulupirira Inu." 
Psalms56:4 Mwa Mulungu ndidzalemekeza mau ace: Ndakhulupirira Mulungu, sindidzaopa; Anthu adzandicitanji?" 
Psalms56:5 Tsiku lonse atenderuza mau anga: Zolingirira zao zonse ziri pa ine kundicitira coipa. 
Psalms56:6 Amemezana, alalira, Achereza mapazi anga, Popeza alindira moyo wanga." 
Psalms56:7 Kodi adzapulumuka ndi zopanda pace? Gwetsani anthu mumkwiyo, Mulungu." 
Psalms56:8 Muwerenga kuthawathawa kwanga: Sungani misozi yanga m'nsupa yanu; Kodi siikhala m'buku mwanu? 
Psalms56:9 Pamenepo adani anga adzabwerera m'mbuyo tsiku lakuitana ine: Ici ndidziwa, kuti Mulungu abvomerezana nane." 
Psalms56:10 Mwa Mulungu ndidzalemekeza mau ace: Mwa Yehova ndidzalemekeza mau ace. 
Psalms56:11 Pa Mulungu ndakhulupirira, sindidzaopa; Munthu adzandicitanji?" 
Psalms56:12 Zowindira Inu Mulungu, ziri pa ine: Ndidzakucitirani zoyamika." 
Psalms56:13 Pakuti mwalanditsa moyo wanga kuimfa: Simunatero nao mapazi anga kuti ndingagwe? Kuti ndiyende pamaso pa Mulungu M'kuunika kwa amoyo. 
Psalms57:1 Mundicitire cifundo, Mulungu, mundicitire cifundo; Pakuti moyo wanga ukhulupirira Inu: Ndipo ndithawira ku mthunzi wa mapiko anu, Kufikira zosakazazo zidzapita." 
Psalms57:2 Ndidzapfuulira kwa Mulungu Wam'mwambamwamba; Ndiye Mulungu wonditsirizira zonse. 
Psalms57:3 Adzanditumizira m'mwamba, nadzandipulumutsa Ponditonza wofuna kundimeza; Mulungu adzatumiza cifundo cace ndi coonadi cace." 
Psalms57:4 Moyo wanga uli pakati pa mikango; Ndigona pakati pa oyaka moto, Ndiwo ana a anthu amene mano ao ali nthungo ndi mibvi, Ndipo lilime lao ndilio lupanga lakuthwa." 
Psalms57:5 Mukwezeke m'mwambamwa mba, Mulungu; Ulemerero wanu ukhale pamwamba pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms57:6 Anandichera ukonde apo ndiyenda; Moyo wanga wawerama: Anandikumbira mbuna patsogolo panga; Anagwa m'kati mwace iwo okha. 
Psalms57:7 Mtima wanga wakhazikika, Mulungu, ndakhazika mtima; Ndidzayimba, inde, ndidzayimba zolemekeza." 
Psalms57:8 Galamuka, ulemu wanga; galamukani cisakasa ndi zeze: Ndidzauka ndekha mamawa." 
Psalms57:9 Ndidzakuyamikirani mwa anthu, Ambuye: Ndidzakuyimbirani mwa mitundu." 
Psalms57:10 Pakuti cifundo canu ncacikuru kufikira m'mwamba, Ndi coonadi canu kufikira mitambo." 
Psalms57:11 Kwezekani m'mwambamwamba, Mulungu; Ulemerero wanu ukhale pamwamba m'dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms58:1 Kodi muli cete ndithu poyenera inu kunena zolungama? Muweruza ana a anthu molunjika kodi? 
Psalms58:2 Inde, mumtima mucita zosalungama; Pa dziko lapansi mugawira anthu ciwawa ca m'manja mwanu." 
Psalms58:3 Oipa acita cilendo cibadwire: Asokera kuyambira kubadwa kwao, nanena bodza." 
Psalms58:4 Ululu wao ukunga wa njoka; Akunga mphiri yogontha m'khutu, itseka m'khutu mwace." 
Psalms58:5 Imene simvera liu la oitana, Akucita matsenga mocenieratu," 
Psalms58:6 Tyolani mano ao m'kamwa mwao, Mulungu: Zulani zitsakano za misona ya mkango, Yehova." 
Psalms58:7 Apitetu ngati madzi oyenda; Popiringidza mibvi yace ikhale yodukaduka. 
Psalms58:8 Apite ngati nkhono yosungunuka; Asaone dzuwa monga mtayo," 
Psalms58:9 Miphika yanu isanagwire moto waminga, Adzaiuluza, yaiwisi ndi yoyaka." 
Psalms58:10 Wolungama adzakondwera pakuona kubwezera cilango: Adzasamba mapazi ace m'mwazi wa woipa. 
Psalms58:11 Ndipo anthu adzati, Indedi, pali mphotho kwa wolungama; Indedi, pali Mulungu wakuweruza pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms59:1 Ndilanditseni kwa adani anga, Mulungu wanga: Ndiikeni pamsanje kwa iwo akundiukira." 
Psalms59:2 Mundilanditse kwa ocita zopanda pace, Ndipo ndipulumutseni kwa anthu olira mwazi." 
Psalms59:3 Pakuti onani, alalira moyo wanga; Amphamvu andipangira ciwembu: Osacimwa, osalakwa ine, Yehova," 
Psalms59:4 Osawapatsa cifukwa ine, athamanga nadzikonza; Galamukani kukomana nane, ndipo penyani." 
Psalms59:5 Ndinu Yehova, Mulungu wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli, Ukani kukazonda amitundu onse: Musacitire cifundo mmodzi yense wakucita zopanda pace monyenga." 
Psalms59:6 Abwera madzulo, auwa ngati garu, Nazungulira mudzi." 
Psalms59:7 Onani abwetuka pakamwa pao; M'milomo mwao muli lupanga, Pakuti amati, Amva ndani?" 
Psalms59:8 Koma Inu, Yehova, mudzawaseka; Mudzalalatira amitundu onse." 
Psalms59:9 Inu, mphamvu yanga, ndidzakulindirani; Pakuti Mulungu ndiye msanje wanga." 
Psalms59:10 Mulungu wa cifundo canga adzandikumika: Adzandionetsa tsoka la adani anga. 
Psalms59:11 Musawapheretu, angaiwale anthu anga: Muwabalalitse mwa mphamvu yanu, ndipo muwagwetse, Ambuye, ndinu cikopa cathu." 
Psalms59:12 Pakamwa pao acimwa ndi mau onse a pa milomo yao, Potero akodwe m'kudzitamandira kwao, Ndiponso cifukwa ca kutemberera ndi bodza azilankhula." 
Psalms59:13 Muwathe mumkwiyo, muwagurule psiti: Ndipo adziwe kuti Mulungu ndiye woweruza m'Yakobo, Kufikira malekezero a dziko la pansi." 
Psalms59:14 Ndipo abwere madzulo, auwe ngati garu, Nazungulire mudzi." 
Psalms59:15 Ayendeyende ndi kufuna cakudya, Nacezere osakhuta." 
Psalms59:16 Koma ine, ndidzayimbira mphamvu yanu; Inde ndidzayimbitsa cifundo canu mamawa: Pakuti Inu mwakhala msanje wanga, Ndi pothawirapo ine tsiku la nsautso yanga." 
Psalms59:17 Ndidzayimbira zakukulemekezani Inu, mphamvu yanga: Pakuti Mulungu ndiye msanje wanga, Mulungu wa cifundo canga." 
Psalms60:1 Mwatitaya Mulungu, mwatipasula; Mwakwiya; tibwezereni." 
Psalms60:2 Mwagwedeza dziko, mwaling'amba: Konzani ming'alu yace; pakuti ligwedezeka." 
Psalms60:3 Mwaonetsa anthu anu zowawa: Mwatimwetsa vinyo wotinjenjemeretsa. 
Psalms60:4 Koma mwapatsa mbendera akuopa Inu, Aikweze cifukwa ca coonadi." 
Psalms60:5 Kuti okondedwa anu alanditsidwe, Pulumutsani ndi dzanja lanu lamanja, ndipo mutibvomereze." 
Psalms60:6 Mulungu walankhula m'ciyero cace; ndidzakondwerera: Ndidzagawa Sekemu, ndidzayesa muyeso cigwa ca Sukoti." 
Psalms60:7 Gileadi ndi wanga, Manasenso ndi wanga; Ndipo Efraimu ndi mphamvu ya mutu wanga; Yuda ndiye wolamulira wanga," 
Psalms60:8 Moabu ndiye mkhate wanga; Pa Edomu ndidzaponya nsapato yanga: Filistiya, pfuulatu cifukwa ca ine." 
Psalms60:9 Adzandifikitsa ndani m'mudzi wa m'linga? Adzanditsogolera ndani ku Edomu? 
Psalms60:10 Si ndinu, Mulungu, amene mwantaya? Osaturuka nao makamu athu, Mulungu." 
Psalms60:11 Tithandizeni kunsautso; Kuti cipulumutso ca munthu ndi cabe. 
Psalms60:12 Mwa Mulungu tidzacita molimbika mtima, Ndipo Iye adzapondereza otisautsa." 
Psalms61:1 Imvani mpfuu wanga, Mulungu; Mverani pemphero langa." 
Psalms61:2 Ku malekezero a dziko lapansi ndidzapfuulira kwa Inu, pomizika mtima wanga: Nditsogolereni ku thanthwe londiposa ine m'kutalika kwace." 
Psalms61:3 Pakuti munakhala pothawirapo panga; nsanja yolimba pathawa mdani ine. 
Psalms61:4 Ndidzagonera-gonerabe m'cihemamwanu; Ndidzathawira mobisalamo m'mapiko anu. 
Psalms61:5 Pakuti Inu, Mulungu, mudamva zowinda zanga; Munandipatsa colowa ca iwo akuopa dzina lanu." 
Psalms61:6 Mudzatalikitsa moyo wa mfumu: Zaka zace zidzafikira mibadwo mibadwo. 
Psalms61:7 Adzakhala nthawi zonse pamaso pa Mulungu; Mumpatse cifundo ndi coonadi zimsunge. 
Psalms61:8 Potero ndidzayimba zolemekeza dzina lanu ku nthawi zonse, Kuti ndicite zowinda zanga tsiku ndi tsiku." 
Psalms62:1 Moyo wanga ukhalira cete Mulungu yekha: Cipulumutso canga cifuma kwa Iye. 
Psalms62:2 Iye yekhayo ndiye thanthwe langa ndi cipulumutso canga; Msanje wanga, sindidzagwedezeka kwakukuru." 
Psalms62:3 Mudzambvumbvulukira munthu mpaka liti, Kumupha iye, nonsenu, Monga khoma lopendekeka, ndi mpanda woweyeseka?" 
Psalms62:4 Komatu amkhaliraupo kuti amkankhire pansi ulemu wace; Akondwera nao mabodza; Adalitsa ndi m'kamwa mwao, Koma atemberera mumtima." 
Psalms62:5 Moyo wanga, ukhalire cete Mulungu yekha; Pakuti ciyembekezo canga cifuma kwa Iye," 
Psalms62:6 Iye yekhayo ndiye thanthwe langa ndi cipulumutso canga, Msanje wanga, sindidzagwedezeka." 
Psalms62:7 Pa Mulungu pali cipulumutso canga ndi ulemerero wanga: Thanthwe la mphamvu yanga ndi pothawirapo panga mpa Mulungu. 
Psalms62:8 Khulupirani pa Iye nyengo zonse, anthu inu: Tsanulirani mitima yanu pamaso pace: Mulungu ndiye pothawirapo ife." 
Psalms62:9 Indetu, anthu acabe ndi mpweya, ndipo anthu akuru ndi bodza: Pakuwayesa apepuka; Onse pamodzi apepuka koposa mpweya," 
Psalms62:10 Musakhulupirire kusautsa, ndipo musatama cifwamba; Cikacuruka cuma musakhazikepo mitima yanu." 
Psalms62:11 Mulungu ananena kamodzi, ndinacimva kawiri: Kuti mphamvu ndi yace ya Mulungu:" 
Psalms62:12 Cifundonso ndi canu, Ambuye: Cifukwa Inu musudzula munthu ali yense monga mwa nchito yace." 
Psalms63:1 Inu Mulungu, ndinu Mulungu wanga; ndidzakufunani m'matanda kuca: Moyo wanga ukumva ludzu la kwa Inu, thupi langa lilirira Inu, M'dziko louma ndi lotopetsa, lopanda madzi." 
Psalms63:2 Kuti ndione mphamvu yanu ndi ulemerero wanu, Monga ndinakuonani m'malo oyera." 
Psalms63:3 Pakuti cifundo canu ciposa moyo makomedwe ace; Milomo yanga idzakulemekezani. 
Psalms63:4 Potero ndidzakuyamikani m'moyo mwanga; Ndidzakweza manja anga m'dzina lanu. 
Psalms63:5 Mudzakhutitsa moyo wanga ngati ndi mafuta ndi zonona; Ndipo pakamwa panga ndidzakulemekezani ndi milomo yakupfuula mokondwera; 
Psalms63:6 Pokumbukira Inu pa kama wanga, Ndi kulingalira za Inu maulonda a usiku." 
Psalms63:7 Pakuti munakhala mthandizi wanga; Ndipo ndidzapfuula mokondwera mu mthunzi wa mapiko anu. 
Psalms63:8 Moyo wanga uumirira Inu: Dzanja lamanja lanu lindigwiriziza. 
Psalms63:9 Koma iwo amene afuna moyo wanga kuti auononge, Adzalowa m'munsi mwace mwa dziko." 
Psalms63:10 Adzawapereka ku mphamvu ya lupanga; Iwo adzakhala gawo la ankhandwe. 
Psalms63:11 Koma mfumu idzakondwera mwa Mulungu; Yense wakulumbirira iye adzatamandira; Pakuti pakamwa pa iwo onena bodza padzatsekedwa. 
Psalms64:1 Imvani Yehova, mau anga, m'kudandaula kwanga; Sungani moyo wanga angandiopse mdani." 
Psalms64:2 Ndibiseni pa upo wacinsinsi wa ocita zoipa; Pa phokoso la ocita zopanda pace: 
Psalms64:3 Amene anola lilime lao ngati lupanga, Napiringidza mibvi yao, ndiyo mau akuwawitsa;" 
Psalms64:4 Kuponyera wangwiro mobisika: Amponyera modzidzimutsa, osaopa." 
Psalms64:5 Alimbikitsana m'cinthu coipa; Apangana za kuchera misampha mobisika; Akuti, Adzaiona ndani?" 
Psalms64:6 Afunafuna zosalungama; kusanthula, asanthuladi kutha; Cingakhale ca m'kati mwace mwa munthu, ndi mtima wozama." 
Psalms64:7 Koma Mulungu adzawaponyera mubvi; Adzalaswa modzidzimutsa," 
Psalms64:8 Adzawakhumudwitsa, lilime lao lidzawatsutsa; Onse akuwaona adzawathawa." 
Psalms64:9 Ndipo anthu onse adzacita mantha; Nadzabukitsa cocita Mulungu, Nadzasamalira nchito yace." 
Psalms64:10 Wolungama adzakondwera mwa Yehova, nadzakhulupirira Iye; Ndipo oongoka mtima onse adzalemekeza." 
Psalms65:1 M'Ziyoni akulemekezani Inu mwacete, Mulungu: Adzakucitirani Inu cowindaci." 
Psalms65:2 Wakumva pemphero Inu, Zamoyo zonse zidzadza kwa Inu." 
Psalms65:3 Mphulupulu zinandilaka; Koma mudzafafaniza zolakwa zathu. 
Psalms65:4 Wodala munthuyo mumsankha, ndi kumyandikizitsa, Akhale m'mabwalo anu: Tidzakhuta nazo zokoma za m'nyumba yanu, Za m'malo oyera a Kacisi wanu." 
Psalms65:5 Mudzatiyankha nazo zoopsa m'cilungamo, Mulungu wa cipulumutso cathu; Ndinu cikhulupiriko ca malekezero Onse a dziko lapansi, Ndi ca iwo okhala kutali kunyanja:" 
Psalms65:6 Ndinu amene mukhazikitsa mapiri ndi mphamvu yanu; Pozingidwa naco cilimbiko. 
Psalms65:7 Amene atontholetsa kukuntha kwa nyanja, kukuntha kwa mafunde ace, Ndi phokoso la mitundu ya anthu." 
Psalms65:8 Ndipo iwo akukhala kumalekezero adzacita mantha cifukwa ca zizindikilo zanu; Mukondweretsa apo paturukira dzuwa, ndi apo lilowera." 
Psalms65:9 Muceza nalo dziko lapansi, muhthirira, Mulilemeza kwambiri; Mtsinje wa Mulungu udzala nao madzi: Muwameretsera tirigu m'mene munakonzera nthaka." 
Psalms65:10 Mukhutitsa nthaka yace yolima; Mufafaniza nthumbira zace? Muiolowetsa ndi mbvumbi; Mudalitsa mmera wace. 
Psalms65:11 Mubveka cakaci ndi ukoma wanu; Ndipo mabande anu akukha zakuca. 
Psalms65:12 Akukha pa mabusa a m'cipululu; Ndipo mapiri azingika naco cimwemwe. 
Psalms65:13 Podyetsa mpodzaza ndi zoweta; Ndipo zigwa zakutidwa ndi tirigu; Zipfuula mokondwera, inde ziyimbira." 
Psalms66:1 Pfuulirani kwa Mulungu, dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms66:2 Yimbirani ulemerero wa dzina lace; Pomlemekeza mumcitire ulemerero. 
Psalms66:3 Nenani kwa Mulungu, Ha, nchito zanu nzoopsa nanga! Cifukwa ca mphamvu yanu yaikuru adani anu adzagonjera Inu," 
Psalms66:4 Dziko lonse lapansi lidzakugwadirani, Ndipo lidzakuyimbirani; Adzayimbira dzina lanu." 
Psalms66:5 Idzani, muone nchito za Mulungu; Zocitira Iye ana a anthu nzoopsa." 
Psalms66:6 Anasanduliza nyanja ikhale mtunda: Anaoloka mtsinje coponda pansi: Apo tinakondwera mwa Iye. 
Psalms66:7 Acita ufumu mwa mphamvu yace kosatha; Maso ace ayang'anira amitundu; Opikisana ndi Iye asadzikuze. 
Psalms66:8 Lemekezani Mulungu wathu, mitundu ya anthu inu, Ndipo mumveketse liu la cilemekezo cace:" 
Psalms66:9 Iye amene asunga moyo wathu tingafe, Osalola phazi lathu literereke." 
Psalms66:10 Pakati munatiyesera, Mulungu: Munatiyenga monga ayenga siliya." 
Psalms66:11 Munapita nafe kuukonde; Munatisenza cothodwetsa pamsana pathu. 
Psalms66:12 Munapititsa anthu oberekeka pamwamba pamitu pathu; Tinapyola moto ndi madzi; Koma munatifikitsa potitsitsimutsa. 
Psalms66:13 Ndidzalowa m'nyumba yanu ndi nsembe zopsereza, Ndidzakucitirani zowinda zanga," 
Psalms66:14 Zimene inazichula milomo yanga, Ndinazinena pakamwa panga pasautsika ine." 
Psalms66:15 Ndidzakufukizirani nsembe zapsereza zonona, Pamodzi ndi cofukiza ca mphongo za nkhosa; Ndidzakonza ng'ombe pamodzi ndi mbuzi." 
Psalms66:16 Idzani, imvani, inu nonse akuopa Mulungu, Ndipo ndidzafotokozera zonse anazicitira moyo wanga," 
Psalms66:17 Ndinampfuulira Iye pakamwa panga, Ndipo ndinamkuza ndi lilime langa," 
Psalms66:18 Ndikadasekera zopanda pace m'mtima mwanga, Ambuye sakadamvera:" 
Psalms66:19 Koma Mulungu anamvadi; Anamvera mau a pemphero langa," 
Psalms66:20 Wolemekezeka Mulungu, Amene sanandipatutsira ine pemphero langa, kapena cifundo cace." 
Psalms67:1 Aticitire cifundo Mulungu, ndi kutidalitsa, Atiwalitsire nkhope yace;" 
Psalms67:2 Kuti njira yanu idziwike pa dziko lapansi, Cipulumutso canu mwa amitundu onse." 
Psalms67:3 Anthu akuyamikeni, Mulungu; Anthu onse akuyamikeni." 
Psalms67:4 Anthu akondwere, napfuule makondwera; Pakuti mudzaweruza anthu malunjika, Ndipo mudzalangiza anthu pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms67:5 Anthu akuyamikeni, Mulungu; Anthu onse akuyamikeni." 
Psalms67:6 Dziko lapansi lapereka zipatso zace: Mulungu, Mulungu wathu adzatidalitsa." 
Psalms67:7 Mulungu adzatidalitsa; Ndipo malekezero onse a dziko lapansi adzamuopa Iye," 
Psalms68:1 Auke Mulungu, abalalike adani ace; Iwonso akumuda athawe pamaso pace." 
Psalms68:2 Muwacotse monga utsi ucotseka; Monga phula lisungunuka pamoto, Aonongeke oipa pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Psalms68:3 Koma olungama akondwere; atumphe ndi cimwemwe pamaso pa Mulungu; Ndipo asekere naco cikondwerero. 
Psalms68:4 Yimbirani Yehova, liyimbireni Nyimbo dzina lace; Undirani mseu Iye woberekekayo kucidikha; Dzina lace ndiye Yehova; ndipo tumphani ndi cimwemwe pamaso pace." 
Psalms68:5 Mulungu, mokhala mwace mayera, Ndiye Atate wa ana amasiye, ndi woweruza wa akazi amasiye." 
Psalms68:6 Mulungu amangitsira banjaanthu a pa okha; Aturutsa am'ndende alemerere; Koma opikisana naye akhala m'dziko lopanda madzi. 
Psalms68:7 Pakuturuka paja, Inu Mulungu, ndi kutsogolera anthu anu, Pakuyenda paja Inu m'cipululu;" 
Psalms68:8 Dziko lapansi linagwedezeka, Inde thambo linakhapamaso pa Mulungu; Sinai lomwe linagwedezeka pamaso pa Mulungu, Mulungu wa Israyeli." 
Psalms68:9 Inu, Mulungu, munabvumbitsa cimvula, Munatsitsimutsa colowa canu pamene cidathodwa." 
Psalms68:10 Gulu lanu linakhala m'dziko muja: Mwa ukoma wanu munalikonzera ozunzika, Mulungu." 
Psalms68:11 Ambuye anapatsa mau: Akazi akulalikira uthengawo ndiwo khamu lalikuru. 
Psalms68:12 Mafumu a magulu a ankhondo athawathawa: Ndipo mkazi amene akhala kwao agawa zofunkha. 
Psalms68:13 Pogona inu m'makola a zoweta, Mukhala ngati mapiko a njiwa okulira ndi siliva, Ndi nthenga zace zokulira ndi golidi woyenga wonyezimira." 
Psalms68:14 Pamene Wamphamvuyonse anabalalitsa mafumu m'dzikomo, Munayera ngati matalala m'Salimoni." 
Psalms68:15 Phiri la Basana ndilo phiri la Mulungu; Phiri la Basana ndilo phiri la mitu mitu. 
Psalms68:16 Mucitiranji nsanje mapiri inu a mitu mitu, Ndi phirilo Mulungu analikhumba, akhaleko? Inde, Yehova adzakhalabe komweko kosatha." 
Psalms68:17 Magareta a Mulungu ndiwo zikwi makumi awiri, inde zikwi zowirikiza-wirikiza: Ambuye ali pakati pao, monga m'Sinai, m'malo opatulika," 
Psalms68:18 Munakwera kumka kumwamba, munapita nao undende kuuyesa ndende; Munalandira zaufulu mwa anthu, Ngakhale mwa opikisana nanu, kuti Yehova Mulungu akakhale nao." 
Psalms68:19 Wolemekezeka Ambuye, tsiku ndi tsiku atisenzera katundu, Ndiye Mulungu wa cipulumutso cathu." 
Psalms68:20 Mulungu akhala kwa ife Mulungu wa cipulumutso; Ndipo Yehova Ambuye ali nazo zopulumutsira kuimfa. 
Psalms68:21 Indedi Mulungu adzaphwanya mutu wa adani ace, Pakati pa mutu pa iye woyendabe m'kutsutsika kwace." 
Psalms68:22 Ambuye anati, Ndidzawatenganso ku Basana, Ndidzawatenganso kozama kwa nyanja:" 
Psalms68:23 Kuti ubviike phazi lako m'mwazi, Kuti malilime a agaru ako alaweko adani ako." 
Psalms68:24 Anapenya mayendedwe anu, Mulungu, Mayendedwe a Mulungu wanga, Mfumu yanga, m'malo oyera." 
Psalms68:25 Oyimbira anatsogolera, oyimba zoyimba anatsata m'mbuyo, Pakatipo anamwali oyimba mangaka." 
Psalms68:26 Lemekezani Mulungu m'masonkhano, Ndiye Ambuye, inu a gwero la Israyeli." 
Psalms68:27 Apo pali Benjamini wamng'ono, wakuwacita ufumu, Akuru a Yuda, ndi a upo wao, Akulu a Zebuloni, akulu a Naftali." 
Psalms68:28 Mulungu wako analamulira mphamvu yako: Limbitsani, Mulungu, cimene munaticitira." 
Psalms68:29 Cifukwa ca Kacisi wanu wa m'Yerusalemu Mafumu adzabwera naco caufulu kukupatsani. 
Psalms68:30 Dzudzulani cirombo ca m'bango, Khamu la mphongo ndi zipfulula za anthu, Yense wakudzigonjera ndi ndarama zasiliva; Anabalalitsa mitundu ya anthu ya kukondwera nayo nkhondo." 
Psalms68:31 Akulu adzafumira ku Aigupto; Kushi adzafulumira kutambalitsa manja ace kwa Mulungu. 
Psalms68:32 Yimbirani Mulungu, maufumu a dziko lapansi inu; Yimbirani Ambuye zomlemekeza;" 
Psalms68:33 Kwa Iye wakuberekeka pamwambamwamba, oyambira kale lomwe; Taonani; amveketsa liu lace, ndilo liu lamphamvu." 
Psalms68:34 Bvomerezani kuti mphamvu nja Mulungu; Ukulu wace uli pa Israyeli, Ndi mphamvu yace m'mitambo." 
Psalms68:35 Inu Mulungu, ndinu woopsa m'malo oyera anu; Mulungu wa Israyeli ndiye amene apatsa anthu ace mphamvu ndi cilimbiko. Alemekezeke Mulungu." 
Psalms69:1 Ndipulumutseni Mulungu; Pakuti madzi afikira moyo wanga. 
Psalms69:2 Ndamira m'thope lozama, lopanda poponderapo; Ndalowa m'madzi ozama, ndipo cigumula candimiza." 
Psalms69:3 Ndalema ndi kupfuula kwanga; kum'mero kwauma gwa: M'maso mwanga mwada poyembekeza Mulungu wanga. 
Psalms69:4 Ondida kopanda cifukwa acuruka koposa tsitsi la pamutu panga; Ofuna kunditha, ndiwo adani anga monama, ali ndi mphamvu: Pamenepo andibwezetsa cosafunkha ine." 
Psalms69:5 Mulungu, mudziwa kupusa kwanga; Ndipo kutsutsika kwanga sikubisikira Inu." 
Psalms69:6 Iwo akuyembekeza Inu, Ambuve Yehova wa makamu, asacite manyazi cifukwa ca ine: Iwo ofuna Inu, Mulungu wa Israyeli, asapepulidwe cifukwa ca ine." 
Psalms69:7 Pakuti ndalola cotonza cifukwa ca Inu: Cimpepulo cakuta nkhope yanga," 
Psalms69:8 Abale anga andiyesa mlendo, Ndi ana a mai wanga andiyesa wa mtundu wina." 
Psalms69:9 Pakuti cangu ca pa nyumba yanu candidya; Ndi zotonza za iwo otonza Inu zandigwera ine. 
Psalms69:10 Ndipo ndinalira pa kusala kwa moyo wanga, Koma uku kunandikhalira cotonza." 
Psalms69:11 Ndipo cobvala canga ndinayesa ciguduli, Koma amandiphera mwambi." 
Psalms69:12 Okhala pacipata akamba za ine; Ndipo oledzera andiyimba. 
Psalms69:13 Koma ine, pemphero langa liri kwa Inu, Yehova, m'nyengo yolandirika; Mulungu, mwa cifundo canu cacikuru, Mundibvomereze ndi coonadi ca cipulumutso canu." 
Psalms69:14 Mundilanditse kuthope, ndisamiremo: Ndilanditseni kwa iwo akundida, ndi kwa madzi ozama." 
Psalms69:15 Cigumula cisandifotsere, Ndipo cakuya cisandimize; Ndipo asanditsekere pakamwa pace pa dzenje." 
Psalms69:16 Mundiyankhe Yehova; pakuti cifundo canu ncokoma; Munditembenukire monga mwa unyinji wa nsoni zokoma zanu. 
Psalms69:17 Ndipo musabisire nkhope yanu mtumiki wanu; Pakuti ndisautsika ine; mundiyankhe msanga. 
Psalms69:18 Yandikizani moyo wanga, ndi kuuombola; Ndipulumutseni cifukwa ca adani anga," 
Psalms69:19 Mudziwa cotonza canga, ndi manyazi anga, ndi cimpepulo canga: Akundisautsa ali pamaso panu," 
Psalms69:20 Cotonza candiswera mtima, ndipo ndidwala ine; Ndipo ndinayembekeza wina wondicitira cifundo, koma palibe; Ndinayembekeza onditonthoza mtima, osawapeza." 
Psalms69:21 Ndipo anandipatsa ndulu ikhale cakudya canga; Nandimwetsa vinyo wosasa pomva ludzu ine. 
Psalms69:22 Gome lao likhale msampha pamaso pao; Pokhala ndi mtendere iwo, likhale khwekhwe." 
Psalms69:23 M'maso mwao mude, kuti asapenye; Ndipo munjenjemeretse m'cuuno mwao kosalekeza." 
Psalms69:24 Muwatsanulire mkwiyo wanu, Ndipo moto wa ukali wanu uwagwere." 
Psalms69:25 Pokhala pao pakhale bwinja; M'mahema mwao musakhale munthu. 
Psalms69:26 Pakuti alondola amene Inu munampanda; Ndipo akambirana za zowawa zao za iwo amene munawalasa. 
Psalms69:27 Onjezani mphulupulu pa mphulupulu zao; Ndipo asafikire cilungamo canu. 
Psalms69:28 Afafanizidwe m'buku lamoyo, Ndipo asalembedwe pamodzi ndi olungama," 
Psalms69:29 Koma ine ndine wozunzika ndi womva zowawa; Cipulumutso canu, Mulungu, cindikweze pamsanje." 
Psalms69:30 Ndidzalemekeza dzina la Mulungu ndi kuliyimbira, Ndipo ndidzambukitsa ndi kumyamika." 
Psalms69:31 Ndipo cidzakomera Yehova koposa ng'ombe, Inde mphongo za nyanga ndi ziboda," 
Psalms69:32 Ofatsa anaciona, nakondwera: Ndipo inu, ofuna Mulungu, mtima wanu ukhale ndi moyo." 
Psalms69:33 Pakuti Yehova amvera aumphawi, Ndipo sapeputsa am'ndende ace." 
Psalms69:34 Zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zimlemekeze, Nyanja ndi zonse zoyenda m'mwemo;" 
Psalms69:35 Pakuti Mulungu adzapulumutsa Ziyoni, nadzamanga midzi ya Yuda; Ndipo iwo adzakhala komweko, likhale lao lao." 
Psalms69:36 Ndipo mbumba ya atumiki ace idzalilandira; Ndipo iwo akukonda dzina lace adzakhalam'mwemo. 
Psalms70:1 Fulumirani kundipulumutsa, Mulungu; Fulumirani kundithandiza, Yehova." 
Psalms70:2 Acite manyazi, nadodome Amene afuna moyo wanga: Abwezedwe m'mbuyo, napepulidwe. Amene akonda kundicitira coipa," 
Psalms70:3 Abwerere, kukhale mphotho ya manyazi ao Amene akuti, Hede, hede." 
Psalms70:4 Asekerere nakondwerere mwa Inu onse akufuna Inu; Nanene kosalekeza iwo akukonda cipulumutso canu, Abuke Mulungu." 
Psalms70:5 Koma ine ndine wozunzika ndi waumphawi; Mundifulumirire, Mulungu: Inu ndinu mthandizi wanga ndi mpulumutsi wanga; Musacedwe, Yehova." 
Psalms71:1 Ndikhulupirira Inu, Yehova: Ndisacite manyazi nthawi zonse." 
Psalms71:2 Ndikwatuleni m'cilungamo canu, ndi kundilanditsa: Ndicherereni khutu lanu ndi kundipulumutsa." 
Psalms71:3 Mundikhalire thanthwe lokhalamo, lopitako kosaleka; Mwalamulira kundipulumutsa; Popeza Inu ndinu thanthwe langa ndi linga langa," 
Psalms71:4 Ndilanditseni, Mulungu wanga, m'dzanja la woipa, M'dzanja la munthu wosalungama ndi waciwawa." 
Psalms71:5 Pakuti Inu ndinu ciyembekezo canga, Ambuye Yehova; Mwandikhalira wokhulupirika kuyambira ubwana wanga." 
Psalms71:6 Inu munandigwirizizakuyambira ndisanabadwe: Kuyambira pa thupi la mai wanga wondicitira zokoma ndinu; Ndidzakulemekezani kosalekeza. 
Psalms71:7 Ndikhala codabwiza kwa ambiri; Koma Inu ndinu pothawira panga polimba. 
Psalms71:8 M'kamwa mwanga mudzadzala lemekezo lanu, Ndi ulemu wanu tsiku lonse." 
Psalms71:9 Musanditaye mu ukalamba wanga; Musandisiye, pakutha mphamvu yanga." 
Psalms71:10 Pakuti adani anga alankhula za ine; Ndipo iwo akulalira moyo wanga apangana upo," 
Psalms71:11 Ndi kuti, Wamsiya Mulungu: Mlondoleni, mgwireni; popeza palibe wompulumutsa," 
Psalms71:12 Musandikhalire kutali, Mulungu; Fulumirani kundithandiza, Mulungu;" 
Psalms71:13 Adani a moyo wanga acite manyazi, nathawe; Cotonza ndi cimpepulo zikute ondifunira coipa," 
Psalms71:14 Koma ine ndidzayembekeza kosaleka, Ndipo ndidzaonjeza kukulemekezani." 
Psalms71:15 Pakamwa panga padzafotokozera cilungamo canu, Ndi cipulumutso canu tsiku lonse; Pakuti sindidziwa mawerengedwe ace." 
Psalms71:16 Ndidzamuka mu mphamvu ya Ambuye Yehova; Ndidzachula cilungamo canu, inde canu cokha." 
Psalms71:17 Mulungu, mwandiphunzitsa kuyambira ubwana wanga; Ndipo kufikira lero ndilalikira zodabwiza zanu." 
Psalms71:18 Poteronso pokalamba ine ndi kukhala nazo imvi musandisiye, Mulungu; Kufikira nditalalikira mbadwo uwu za dzanja lanu, Mphamvu yanu kwa onse akudza m'mbuyo." 
Psalms71:19 Cilungamo canunso, Mulungu, cifikira kuthambo; Inu amene munacita zazikuru, Akunga Inu ndani, Mulungu?" 
Psalms71:20 Inu, amene munationetsa nsautso zambiri ndi zoipa, Mudzatipatsanso moyo, Ndi kutitenganso munsi mwa dziko." 
Psalms71:21 Mundionjezere ukulu wanga, Ndipo munditembenukire kundisangalatsa," 
Psalms71:22 Ndiponso ndidzakuyamikani ndi cisakasa, Kubukitsa coonadi canu, Mulungu wanga; Ndidzakuyimbirani Nyimbo ndi zeze, Ndinu Woyerayo wa Israyeli." 
Psalms71:23 Milomo yanga idzapfuula mokondwera poyimbira Inu Nyimbo; Inde, moyo wanga umene munaombola." 
Psalms71:24 Lilime langa lomwe lidzalankhula za cilungamo canu tsiku lonse: Pakuti ofuna kundicitira coipa acita manyazi, nadodoma." 
Psalms72:1 Patsani mfumu maweruzo anu, Mulungu, Ndi mwana wa mfumu cilungamo canu." 
Psalms72:2 Potero adzanenera anthu anu mlandu ndi m'cilungamo, Ndi ozunzika anu ndi m'ciweruzo." 
Psalms72:3 Mapiri adzatengera anthu mtendere, Timapiri tomwe, m'cilungamo." 
Psalms72:4 Adzaweruza ozunzika a mwa anthu, Adzapulumutsa ana aumphawi, Nadzaphwanya wosautsa." 
Psalms72:5 Adzakuopani momwe likhalira dzuwa ndi mwezi, Kufikira mibadwo mibadwo." 
Psalms72:6 Adzanga mvula yakugwa pa udzu wosenga: Monga mvula yothirira dziko. 
Psalms72:7 Masiku ace wolungama adzakhazikika; Ndi mtendere wocuruka, kufikira sipadzakhala mwezi." 
Psalms72:8 Ndipo adzacita ufumu kucokera kunyanja kufikira kunyanja, Ndi kucokera ku Mtsinje kufikira malekezero a dziko lapansi." 
Psalms72:9 Okhala m'cipululu adzagwadira pamaso pace; Ndi adani ace adzaluma nthaka. 
Psalms72:10 Mafumu a ku Tarisi ndi ku Zisumbuzo adzabwera naco copereka; Mafumu a ku Sheba ndi Seba adzadza nazo mphatso," 
Psalms72:11 Inde mafumu onse adzamgwadira iye: Amitundu onse adzamtumikira. 
Psalms72:12 Pakuti adzapulumutsa waumphawi wopfuulayo; Ndi wozunzika amene alibe mthandizi. 
Psalms72:13 Adzacitira nsoni wosauka ndi waumphawi, Nadzapulumutsa moyo wa aumphawi," 
Psalms72:14 Adzaombola moyo wao ku cinyengo ndi ciwawa; Ndipo mwazi wao udzakhala wa mtengo pamaso pace: 
Psalms72:15 Ndipo iye adzakhala ndi moyo; ndipo adzampatsa golidi wa ku Sheba; Nadzampempherera kosalekeza; Adzamlemekeza tsiku lonse. 
Psalms72:16 M'dzikomo mudzakhala dzinthu dzocuruka pamwamba pa mapiri; Zipatso zace zidzati waa, ngati za ku Lebano: Ndipo iwo a m'mudzi adzaphuka ngati msipu wapansi." 
Psalms72:17 Dzina lace lidzakhala kosatha: Momwe likhalira dzuwa dzina lace lidzamvekera zidzukulu: Ndipo anthu adzadalitsidwa mwa Iye; Amitundu onse adzamucha wodala. 
Psalms72:18 Wolemekezeka Yehova Mulungu, Mulungu wa Israyeli, Amene acita zodabwiza yekhayo:" 
Psalms72:19 Ndipo dzina lace la ulemerero lidalitsike kosatha; Ndipo dziko lonse lapansi lidzale nao ulemerero wace. Amen, ndi Amen." 
Psalms73:1 Indedi Mulungu acitira Israyeli zabwino, Iwo a mtima wa mbe." 
Psalms73:2 Koma ine, ndikadagwa; Mapazi anga akadaterereka," 
Psalms73:3 Pakuti ndinacitira nsanje odzitamandira, Pakuona mtendere wa oipa," 
Psalms73:4 Pakuti palibe zomangira pakufa iwo: Ndi mphamvu yao niolimba," 
Psalms73:5 Sabvutika monga anthu ena; Sasautsika monga anthu ena. 
Psalms73:6 Cifukwa cace kudzikuza kunga unyolo pakhosi pao; Acibvala ciwawa ngati malaya. 
Psalms73:7 Kunenepa kwao kutuzulitsa maso ao: Malingaliro a mitima yao asefukira. 
Psalms73:8 Acita zaphwete nalankhula moipa za kusautsa: Alankhula modzitama. 
Psalms73:9 Pakamwa pao anena zam'mwamba, Ndipo lilime lao liyendayenda m'dziko lapansi." 
Psalms73:10 Cifukwa cace anthu ace amabwera kudza kuno: Ndipo cikho codzala ndi madzi acigugudiza. 
Psalms73:11 Namati, Akacidziwa bwanji Mulungu? Kodi Wam'mwambamwamba ali nayonzeru?" 
Psalms73:12 Tapenyani, oipa ndi awa; Ndipo pokhazikika cikhazikikire aonjezerapo pa cuma cao." 
Psalms73:13 Indedi, ndinayeretsa mtima wanga kwacabe, Ndipo ndinasamba m'manja mosalakwa;" 
Psalms73:14 Popeza andisautsa tsiku lonse, Nandilanga mamawa monse," 
Psalms73:15 Ndikadati, Ndidzafotokozera cotere, Taonani, ndikadacita cosakhulupirika ndi mbadwo wa ana ako." 
Psalms73:16 Pamene ndinayesa kudziwitsa ici, Ndinabvutika naco;" 
Psalms73:17 Mpaka ndinalowa m'zoyera za Mulungu, Ndi kulingalira citsiriziro cao." 
Psalms73:18 Indedi muwaika poterera: Muwagwetsa kuti muwaononge. 
Psalms73:19 Ha! m'kamphindi ayesedwa bwinja; Athedwa konse ndi zoopsya. 
Psalms73:20 Monga anthu atauka, apepula loto; Momwemo, Inu Ambuye, pakuuka mudzapeputsa cithunzithunzi cao." 
Psalms73:21 Pakuti mtima wanga udawawa, Ndipo ndinalaswa m'imso zanga;" 
Psalms73:22 Ndinali wam'thengo, wosadziwa kanthu; Ndinali ngati nyama pamaso panu." 
Psalms73:23 Koma ndikhala ndi Inu cikhalire: Mwandigwira dzanja langa la manja. 
Psalms73:24 Mudzanditsogolera ndi uphungu wanu, Ndipo mutatero, mudzandilandira m'ulemerero," 
Psalms73:25 Ndiri ndi yani Kumwamba, koma Inu? Ndipo Pa dziko lapansi palibe wina wondikonda koma Inu." 
Psalms73:26 Likatha thupi langa ndi mtima wanga: Mulungu ndiye thanthwe la mtima wanga, ndi colandira canga cosatha." 
Psalms73:27 Pakuti, taonani, iwo okhala patali ndi Inu adzaonongeka; Muononga onse akupembedza kwina, kosiyana ndi Inu." 
Psalms73:28 Koma ine, kundikomera kuyandikiza kwa Mulungu: Ndimuyesa Ambuye Yehova pathawirapo ine, Kuti ndifotokozere nchito zanu zonse," 
Psalms74:1 Mulungu, munatitayiranji citayire? Mkwiyo wanu ufukiranji pa nkhosa za kubusa kwanu?" 
Psalms74:2 Kumbukilani msonkhano wanu, umene munaugula kale, Umene munauombola ukhale pfuko la colandira canu; Phiri La Ziyoni limene mukhalamo." 
Psalms74:3 Nyamulani mapazi anu kukapenya mapasukidwe osatha, Zoipa zonse adazicita mdani m'malo opatulika." 
Psalms74:4 Otsutsana ndi Inu abangula pakati pa msonkhano wanu; Aika mbendera zao zikhale zizindikilo. 
Psalms74:5 Anaoneka ngati osamula nkhwangwa kunkhalango. 
Psalms74:6 Ndipo tsopano aphwanya zosemeka zace zonse Ndi nkhwangwa ndi nyundo," 
Psalms74:7 Anatentha malo anu opatulika; Anaipsa ndi kugwetsa pansi mokhalamo dzina lanu. 
Psalms74:8 Ananena mumtima mwao, Tiwapasule pamodzi; Anatentha zosonkhaniramo za Mulungu zonse, m'dzikomo." 
Psalms74:9 Sitiziona zizindikilo zathu; Palibenso mneneri; Ndipo mwa ife palibe wina wakudziwa mpaka liti. 
Psalms74:10 Wotsutsanayo adzatonza kufikira liti, Mulungu? Kodi mdani adzanyoza dzina lanu nthawi yonse?" 
Psalms74:11 Mubwezeranji dzanja lanu, ndilo dzanja lamanja lanu? Muliturutse ku cifuwa canu ndipo muwatheretu." 
Psalms74:12 Koma Mulungu ndiye mfumu yanga kuyambira kale, Wocita zakupulumutsa pakati pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms74:13 Mudagawa nyanja ndi mphamvu yanu; Mudaswa mitu ya zoopsa za m'madzi. 
Psalms74:14 Mudaphwanya mitu ya livyatanu; Mudampereka akhale cakudya ca iwo a m'cipululu. 
Psalms74:15 Mudagawa kasupe ndi mtsinje; Mudaphwetsa mitsinje yaikuru. 
Psalms74:16 Usana ndi wanu, usikunso ndi wanu: Munakonza kuunika ndi dzuwa." 
Psalms74:17 Munaika malekezero onse a dziko lapansi; Munalenga dzinja ndi malimwe. 
Psalms74:18 Mukumbukile ici, Yehova, mdaniyo anatonza, Ndipo anthu opusa ananyoza dzina lanu." 
Psalms74:19 Musapereke moyo wa njiwa yanu kwa cirombo; Musamaiwala moyo wa ozunzika anu nthawi yonse. 
Psalms74:20 Samalirani cipanganoco; Pakuti malo amdima a m'dziko adzala ndi zokhalamo ciwawa. 
Psalms74:21 Okhalira mphanthi asabwere nao manyazi; Wozunzika ndi waumphawi alemekeze dzina lanu. 
Psalms74:22 Nyamukani, Mulungu, mudzinenere mlandu nokha; Kumbukilani momwe akutonzani wopusa tsiku lonse." 
Psalms74:23 Musaiwale mau a iwo otsutsana ndi Inu; Kusokosera kwa iwo akuukirani Inu kumakweca kosaleka. 
Psalms75:1 Tikuyamikani Inu, Mulungu; Tiyamika, pakuti dzina lanu liri pafupi; Afotokozera zodabwiza zanu," 
Psalms75:2 Pakuona nyengo yace ndidzaweruza molunjika. 
Psalms75:3 Lasungunuka dziko lapansi, ndi onse okhalamo; Ndinacirika mizati yace." 
Psalms75:4 Ndinati kwa odzitamandira, Musamacita zodzitamandira; Ndi kwa oipa, Musamakweza nyanga;" 
Psalms75:5 Musamakwezetsa nyanga yanu; Musamalankhula ndi khosi louma. 
Psalms75:6 Pakuti kukuzaku sikucokera kum'mawa, Kapena kumadzulo, kapena kucipululu," 
Psalms75:7 Pakuti Mulungu ndiye woweruza; Acepsa wina, nakuza wina." 
Psalms75:8 Pakuti m'dzanja la Yehova muli cikho; Ndi vinyo wace acita thobvu; Cidzala ndi zosanganizira, ndipo atsanulako: Indedi, oipa onse a pa dziko lapansi adzamwa Nadzagugudiza nsenga zace." 
Psalms75:9 Koma ine ndidzalalikira kosalekeza, Ndidzayimbira zomlemekeza Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Psalms75:10 Ndipo ndidzatseteka nyanga zonse za oipa; Koma nyanga za wolungama zidzakwezeka. 
Psalms76:1 Mulungu adziwika mwa Yuda: Dzina lace limveka mwa Israyeli. 
Psalms76:2 Msasa wace unali m'Salemu, Ndipo pokhala Iye m'Ziyoni." 
Psalms76:3 Pomwepo anatyola mibvi ya paota; Cikopa, ndi lupanga, ndi nkhondo." 
Psalms76:4 Inu ndinu wakuunikira, ndi womveka wakuposa mapiri muli acifwamba." 
Psalms76:5 Olimba mtima cifunkhidwa cuma cao, agona tulo tao; Amuna onse amphamvu asowa manja ao." 
Psalms76:6 Pa kudzudzula kwanu, Mulungu wa Yakobo, Gareta ndi kavalo yemwe anagwa m'tulo." 
Psalms76:7 Inu ndinu woopsa; Ndipo utauka mkwiyo wanu adzakhala ciriri ndani pamaso panu? 
Psalms76:8 Mudamveketsa ciweruzo cocokera Kumwamba; Dziko lapansi linacita mantha, nilinakhala cete," 
Psalms76:9 Pakuuka Mulungu kuti aweruze, Kuti apulumutse ofatsa onse a pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms76:10 Indedi, kuzaza kwace kwa munthu kudzakulemekezani; Cotsalira ca kuzazaku mudzaciletsa." 
Psalms76:11 Windani ndipo citirani Yehova Mulungu wanu zowindazo; Onse akumzinga abwere naco copereka ca kwa Iye amene ayenera kumuopa. 
Psalms76:12 Iye adzadula mzimu wa akulu; Akhala woopsa kwa mafumu a pa dziko lapansi. 
Psalms77:1 Ndidzapfuulira kwa Mulungu ndi mau anga; Kwa Mulungu ndi mau anga, ndipo adzandicherezera khutu." 
Psalms77:2 Tsiku la nsautso yanga ndinafuna Ambuye: Dzanja langa linatambalika usiku, losaleka; Mtima wanga unakanakutonthozedwa." 
Psalms77:3 Ndikumbukila Mulungu ndipo ndibvutika; Ndilingalira ndipo mzimu wanga ukomoka. 
Psalms77:4 Mundikhalitsa maso; Ndigwidwa mtima wosanena kanthu. 
Psalms77:5 Ndinaganizira masiku akale, zaka zakalekale." 
Psalms77:6 Ndikumbukila Nyimbo yanga, usiku; Ndilingalira mumtima mwanga; Mzimu wanga unasanthula." 
Psalms77:7 Kodi Mulungu adzataya nthawi yonse? Osabwerezanso kukondwera nafe. 
Psalms77:8 Cifundo cace calekeka konse konse kodi? Lonjezano lace lidatha kodi ku mibadwo yonse? 
Psalms77:9 Kodi Mulungu waiwala kucita cifundo? Watsekereza kodi nsoni zokoma zace mumkwiyo? 
Psalms77:10 Ndipo ndinati, Cindilaka ici; Koma ndikumbukila zaka za dzanja lamanja la Wam'mwambamwamba." 
Psalms77:11 Ndidzakumbukila zimene adazicita Ambuye; Inde, ndidzakumbukila zodabwiza zanu zoyambira kale." 
Psalms77:12 Ndipo ndidzalingalira nchito yanu yonse, Ndi kulingalirabe zimene munazicita Inu." 
Psalms77:13 Mulungu, m'malo opatulika muli njira yanu; Mulungu wamkuru ndani monga Mulungu?" 
Psalms77:14 Inu ndinu Mulungu wakucita codabwiza; Munazindikiritsa mphamvu yanu mwa mitundu ya anthu. 
Psalms77:15 Munaombola anthu anu ndi mkonowanu, Ndiwo ana a Yakobo, ndi a Yosefe." 
Psalms77:16 Madziwo anakuonani Mulungu; Anakuonani madziwo; anacita mantha: Zozama zomwe zinanjenjemera," 
Psalms77:17 Makongwa anatsanula madzi; Thambo lidamvetsa liu lace; Mibvi yanu yomwe inaturukira. 
Psalms77:18 Liu la bingu lanu linatengezanatengezana; Mphezi zinaunikira ponse pali anthu; Dziko lapansi linanjenjemera ndi kugwedezeka. 
Psalms77:19 Njira yanu inali m'nyanja, Koyenda Inu nku madzi akulu, Ndipo mapazi anu sanadziwika." 
Psalms77:20 Munatsogolera anthu anu ngati gulu la nkhosa, Ndi dzanja la Mose ndi Aroni," 
Psalms78:1 Tamverani, anthu anga, cilamulo canga; Cherezani khutu lanu mau a pakamwa panga." 
Psalms78:2 Ndidzatsegula pakamwa panga mofanizira; Ndidzachula zinsinsi zoyambira kale; 
Psalms78:3 Zimene tinazimva, ndi kuzidziwa, Ndipo makolo athu anatifotokozera." 
Psalms78:4 Sitidzazibisira ana ao, Koma kufotokozera mbadwo ukudzawo zolemekeza za Yehova, Ndi mphamvu yace, ndi zodabwiza zace zimene anazicita." 
Psalms78:5 Anakhazika mboni mwa Yakobo, Naika cilamulo mwa Israyeli, Ndizo analamulira atate athu, Akazidziwitse ana ao;" 
Psalms78:6 Kuti mbadwo ukudzawo udziwe, ndiwo ana amene akadzabadwa; Amene adzaimirira nadzafotokozera ana ao:" 
Psalms78:7 Ndi kuti ciyembekezo cao cikhale kwa Mulungu, Osaiwala zocita Mulungu, Koma kusunga malamulo ace ndiko." 
Psalms78:8 Ndi kuti asange makolo ao, Ndiwo mbadwo woukirana ndi wopikisana ndi Mulungu; Mbadwo wosakonza mtima wao, Ndi mzimu wao sunakhazikika ndi Mulungu." 
Psalms78:9 Ana a Efraimu okhala nazo zida, oponya nao mauta, Anabwerera m'mbuyo tsiku la nkhondo." 
Psalms78:10 Sanasunga cipangano ca Mulungu, Nakana kuyenda m'cilamulo cace." 
Psalms78:11 Ndipo anaiwala zocita Iye, Ndi zodabwiza zace zimene anawaonetsa." 
Psalms78:12 Anacita codabwiza pamaso pa makolo ao, M'dziko la Aigupto ku cidikha ca Zoanu." 
Psalms78:13 Anagawa nyanja nawapititsapo; Naimitsa madziwo ngati khoma. 
Psalms78:14 Ndipo msana anawatsogolera ndi mtambo Ndi usiku wonse ndi kuunika kwa moto. 
Psalms78:15 Anang'alula thanthwe m'cipululu, Ndipo anawamwetsa kocuruka monga m'madzi ozama." 
Psalms78:16 Anaturukitsa mitsinje m'thanthwe, Inde anatsikitsa madzi ngati mitsinje." 
Psalms78:17 Koma anaonjeza kuincimwira Iye, Kupikisana ndi Wam'mwambamwamba m'cipululu." 
Psalms78:18 Ndipo anayesa Mulungu mumtimamwao Ndi kupempha cakudya monga mwa kulakalaka kwao. 
Psalms78:19 Ndipo analankhula motsutsana ndi Mulungu; Anati, Kodi Mulungu akhoza kutikonzera podyera m'cipululu?" 
Psalms78:20 Taonani, anapanda thanthwe, ndi madzi anayendako Ndi mitsinje inasefuka; Kodi adzakhozanso kupatsa mkate? Kodi adzafunira anthu ace nyama?" 
Psalms78:21 Cifukwa cace Yehova anamva, nakwiya; Ndipo anayatsa moto pa Yakobo, Ndiponso mkwiyo unakwera pa Israyeli;" 
Psalms78:22 Popeza sanakhulupirira Mulungu, Osatama cipulumutso cace." 
Psalms78:23 Koma analamulira mitambo iri m'mwamba, Natsegula m'makomo a kumwamba." 
Psalms78:24 Ndipo anawabvumbitsira mana, adye, Nawapatsa tirigu wa kumwamba." 
Psalms78:25 Yense anadya mkate wa omveka: Anawatumizira cakudya cofikira," 
Psalms78:26 Anaombetsa m'mwamba mphepo ya kum'mawa: Natsogoza mwela ndi mphamvu yace. 
Psalms78:27 Ndipo anawabvumbitsira nyama ngati pfumbi, Ndi mbalame zouluka ngati mcenga wa kunyanja:" 
Psalms78:28 Ndipo anazigwetsa pakati pa misasa yao, Pozungulira pokhala iwo." 
Psalms78:29 Potero anadya nakhuta kwambiri; Ndipo anawapatsa cokhumba iwo. 
Psalms78:30 Asanathe naco cokhumba cao, Cakudya cao ciri m'kamwa mwao," 
Psalms78:31 Pamenepo mkwiyo wa Mulungu unawaukira, Ndipo anapha mwa onenepa ao, Nagwetsa osankhika a Israyeli." 
Psalms78:32 Cingakhale ici conse anacimwanso, Osabvomereza zodabwiza zace." 
Psalms78:33 Potero anathera masiku ao ndi zopanda pace, Ndi zaka zao mwa mantha." 
Psalms78:34 Pamene anawapha ndipo anamfuna Iye; Nabwerera, nafunitsitsa Mulungu," 
Psalms78:35 Ndipo anakumbukila kuti Mulungu ndiye thanthwe lao, Ndi Mulungu Wam'mwambamwamba Mombolo wao." 
Psalms78:36 Koma anamsyasyalika pakamwa pao, Namnamiza ndi lilime lao." 
Psalms78:37 Popeza mtima wao sunakonzekera Iye, Ndipo sanakhazikika m'cipangano cace." 
Psalms78:38 Koma Iye pokhala ngwa cifundo, Anakhululukira coipa, osawaononga; Nabweza mkwiyo wace kawiri kawiri, Sanautsa ukali wace wonse." 
Psalms78:39 Ndipo anakumbukira kuti iwo ndiwo anthu; Mphepo yopita yosabweranso. 
Psalms78:40 Kawiri kawiri nanga anapikisana ndi Iye kucigwako, Nammvetsa cisoni m'cipululu." 
Psalms78:41 Pakuti anabwerera m'mbuyo, nayesa Mulungu, Nacepsa Woyerayo wa Israyeli." 
Psalms78:42 Sanakumbukila dzanja lace, Tsikuli anawaombola kwa msautsi." 
Psalms78:43 Amene anaika zizindikilo zace m'Aigupto, Ndi zodabwiza zace ku cidikha ca Zoanu;" 
Psalms78:44 Nasanduliza nyanja yao mwazi, Ndi mitsinje yao, kuti sangakhoze kumwa." 
Psalms78:45 Anawatumizira pakati pao mitambo ya nchenche zakuwatha; Ndi acule akuwaononga. 
Psalms78:46 Ndipo anapatsa mphuci dzinthu dzao, Ndi dzombe nchito yao." 
Psalms78:47 Anapha mphesa zao ndi matalala, Ndi mikuyu yao ndi cisanu." 
Psalms78:48 Naperekanso zoweta zao kwa matalala, Ndi ng'ombe zao kwa mphezi." 
Psalms78:49 Anawatumizira mkwiyo wace wotentha, Kuzaza, ndi kupsa mtima, ndi nsautso, Ndizo gulu la amithenga ocita zoipa." 
Psalms78:50 Analambulira mkwiyo wace njira; Sanalekerera moyo wao usafe, Koma anapereka moyo wao kumliri;" 
Psalms78:51 Ndipo anapha ana oyamba onse a mu Aigupto, Ndiwo oyamba a mphamvu yao m'mahema a Hamu:" 
Psalms78:52 Koma anaturutsa anthu ace ngati nkhosa, Nawatsogoza ngati gulu la zoweta m'cipululu." 
Psalms78:53 Ndipo anawatsogolera mokhulupirika, Kotero kuti sanaopa; Koma nyanja inamiza adani ao." 
Psalms78:54 Ndipo anawafikitsa ku malire a malo ace oyera, Ku phiri ili, dzanja lamanja lace lidaligula." 
Psalms78:55 Ndipo anapitikitsa amitundu pamaso pao, Nawagawira colowa cao, ndi muyeso, Nakhalitsa mafuko a Israyeli m'mahema mwao." 
Psalms78:56 Koma anamuyesa napikisana ndi Mulungu Wam'mwambamwamba, Osasunga mboni zace;" 
Psalms78:57 Koma anabwerera m'mbuyo, nacita zosakhulupirika monga makolo ao: Anapatuka ngati uta wolenda," 
Psalms78:58 Ndipo anautsa mtima wace ndi malo amsanje ao, Namcititsa nsanje ndi mafano osema." 
Psalms78:59 Pakumva ici Mulungu, anakwiya, Nanyozatu Israyeli;" 
Psalms78:60 Ndipo anacokera cokhalamo ca ku Silo, Cihemaco adacimanga mwa anthu;" 
Psalms78:61 Napereka mphamvu yace m'ukapolo, Ndi ulemerero wace m'dzanja la msautsi." 
Psalms78:62 Naperekanso anthu ace kwa lupanga; Nakwiya naco colandira cace. 
Psalms78:63 Moto unapsereza anyamata ao; Ndi anamwali ao sanalemekezeka. 
Psalms78:64 Ansembe ao anagwa ndi lupanga; Ndipo amasiye ao sanacita maliro. 
Psalms78:65 Pamenepo Ambuye anauka ngati wam'tulo; Ngati ciphona cakucita nthungululu ndi vinyo. 
Psalms78:66 Ndipo anapanda otsutsana naye kumbuyo; Nawapereka akhale otonzeka kosatha. 
Psalms78:67 Tero anakana hema wa Yosefe; Ndipo sanasankha pfuko la Efraimu; 
Psalms78:68 Koma anasankha pfuko la Yuda, Phiri la Ziyoni limene analikonda." 
Psalms78:69 Ndipo anamanga malo oyera ace ngati kaphiri, Monga dziko lapansi limene analikhazikitsa kosatha." 
Psalms78:70 Ndipo anasankha Davide mtumiki wace, Namtenga ku makola a nkhosa:" 
Psalms78:71 Anamtenga kuja anatsata zoyamwitsa, Awete Yakobo, anthu ace, ndi Israyeli, colandira cace." 
Psalms78:72 Potero anawaweta monga mwa mtima wace wangwiro; Nawatsogolera ndi luso la manja ace. 
Psalms79:1 Mulungu, akunja alowa m'colandira canu; Anaipsa Kacisi wanu woyera; Anacititsa Yerusalemu bwinja." 
Psalms79:2 Anapereka mitembo ya atumiki anu ikhale cakudya ca mbalame za mlengalenga, Nyama ya okondedwa anu anaipereka kwa zirombo za m'dziko." 
Psalms79:3 Anakhetsa mwazi wao ngati madzi pozungulira Yerusalemu; Ndipo panalibe wakuwaika. 
Psalms79:4 Takhala cotonza ca anansi athu, Ndi coseketsa ndi colalatitsa iwo akutizinga," 
Psalms79:5 Yehova, mudzakwiya nthawi zonse kufikira liti? Nidzatentha nsanje yanu ngati moto?" 
Psalms79:6 Thirirani mkwiyo wanu pa akunja osadziwa Inu, Ndi pa maufumu osaitana pa dzina lanu." 
Psalms79:7 Pakuti anathera Yakobo, Napasula pokhalira iye." 
Psalms79:8 Musakumbukile moritsutsa mphulupulu za makolo athu; Nsoni zokoma zanu zitikumike msanga: Pakuti tafoka kwambiri. 
Psalms79:9 Tithandizeni Mulungu wa cipulumutso cathu, Cifukwa ca ulemerero wa dzina lanu; Ndipo tilanditseni, ndi kutifafanizira zoipa zathu, Cifukwa ca dzina lanu." 
Psalms79:10 Anenerenji amitundu, Ali kuti Mulungu wao? Kubwezera cilango ca mwazi wa atumiki anu umene anaukhetsa Kudziwike pakati pa amitundu pamaso pathu," 
Psalms79:11 Kubuula kwa wandende kufike kuli Inu; Monga mwa mphamvu yanu yaikuru lolani ana a imfa atsale; 
Psalms79:12 Ndipo anansi athu amene anatonza Inu muwabwezere cotonza cao, Kasanu ndi kawiri kumtima kwao, Ambuye." 
Psalms79:13 Potero ife anthu anu ndi nkhosa za pabusa panu Tidzakuyamikani kosatha; Tidzafotokozera cilemekezo canu ku mibadwo mibadwo. 
Psalms80:1 Mbusa wa Israyeli, cherani khutu; Inu wakutsogolera Yosefe ngati nkhosa; Inu wokhala pa akerubi, walitsani." 
Psalms80:2 Utsani camuna canu pamaso pa Efraimu ndi Benjamini ndi Manase, Ndipo mutidzere kutipulumutsa." 
Psalms80:3 Mutibweze, Mulungu; Nimuwalitse nkhope yanu, ndipo tidzapulumuka." 
Psalms80:4 Yehova, Mulungu wa makamu, Mudzakwiyira pemphero la anthu anu kufikira liti?" 
Psalms80:5 Munawadyetsa mkate wa misozi, Ndipo munawamwetsa misozi yambiri." 
Psalms80:6 Mutiika kuti atilimbirane anzathu; Ndipo adani athu atiseka mwa iwo okha," 
Psalms80:7 Mulungu wa makamu, mutibweze; Nimuwalitse nkhope yanu, ndipo tidzapulumuka." 
Psalms80:8 Mudatenga mpesa kucokera ku Aigupto: Munapitikitsa amitundu ndi kuuoka uwu. 
Psalms80:9 Mudasoseratu pookapo, Idagwiritsa mizu yace, ndipo unadzaza dziko." 
Psalms80:10 Mthunzi wace unaphimba mapiri, Ndi nthambi zace zikunga mikungudza ya Mulungu." 
Psalms80:11 Unatambalitsa mphanda zace mpaka kunyanja, Ndi mitsitsi yace kufikira ku Mtsinje." 
Psalms80:12 Munapasuliranii maphambo ace, Kotero kuti onse akupita m'njira acherako?" 
Psalms80:13 Nguruwe zocokera kuthengo ziukumba, Ndi nyama za kucidikha ziudya," 
Psalms80:14 Bwererani, tikupemphani, Mulungu wa makamu; Suzumirani muli m'mwamba, nimupenye, ndi kuzonda mpesa uwu," 
Psalms80:15 Ndi tsinde limene dzanja lanu lamanja linaokae Ndi mphanda munadzilimbikitsira. 
Psalms80:16 Unapserera ndi moto, unadulidwa; Aonongeka pa kudzudzula kwa nkhope yanu." 
Psalms80:17 Dzanja lanu likhale pa munthu wa pa dzanja lamanja lanu; Pa mwana wa munthu amene munadzilimbikitsira. 
Psalms80:18 Potero sitidzabwerera m'mbuyo kukusiyani; Titsitsimutseni, ndipo tidzaitanira dzina lanu." 
Psalms80:19 Mutibweze, Yehova Mulungu wa makamu; Nimuwalitse nkhope yanu, ndipo tidzapulumuka." 
Psalms81:1 Yimbitsirani Mulungu ndiye mphamvu yathu; Pfuulirani kwa Mulungu wa Yakobo. 
Psalms81:2 Utsani Salimo, bwera nakoni kalingaka, Zeze wokondwetsa pamodzi ndi cisakasa." 
Psalms81:3 Ombani lipenga, pokhala mwezi, Utakula mwezi, tsiku la phwando lathu." 
Psalms81:4 Pakuti ici ndi colemba ca kwa Israyeli, Ciweruzo ca Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Psalms81:5 Anaciika cikhale mboni kwa Yosefe, Pakuturuka iye ku dziko la Aigupto: Komwe ndinamva cinenedwe cosadziwa ine." 
Psalms81:6 Ndinamcotsera katundu paphewa pace: Manja ace anamasuka kucotengera. 
Psalms81:7 Unaitana posautsika, ndipo ndinakulanditsa; Ndinakubvomereza mobisalika m'bingu; Ndinakuyesa ku madzi a Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 Tamvani, anthu anga, ndidzakucitirani mboni; Israyeli, ukadzandimvera!" 
Psalms81:9 Kwanu kusakhale mulungu wafuma kwina; Nusagwadire mulungu wacilendo. 
Psalms81:10 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako amene ndinakukweza kukucotsa ku dziko la Aigupto; Yasamitsa pakamwa pako ndipo ndidzalidzaza. 
Psalms81:11 Koma anthu anga sanamvera mau anga; Ndipo Israyeli sanandibvomera. 
Psalms81:12 Potero ndinawaperekera kuuma mtima kwao, Ayende monga mwa uphungu wao wao." 
Psalms81:13 Ha! akadandimvera anthu anga, Akadayenda m'njira zanga Israyeli!" 
Psalms81:14 Ndikadagonjetsa adani ao msanga, Ndikadabweza dzanja langa pa owasautsa." 
Psalms81:15 Akumuda Yehova akadamgonjera mungakhale monyenga: Koma nyengo yao ikadakhala yosatha," 
Psalms81:16 Akadawadyetsa naye tirigu wakometsetsa: Ndikadakukhutitsanso ndi uci wa m'thanthwe. 
Psalms82:1 Mulungu aima mu msonkhano wa Mulungu, Aweruza pakati pa milungu." 
Psalms82:2 Mudzaweruza mosalunjika kufikira liti, Ndi kusamalira nkhope ya oipa?" 
Psalms82:3 Weruzani osauka ndi amasiye; Weruzani molungama ozunzika ndi osowa. 
Psalms82:4 Pulumutsani osauka ndi aumphawi: Alanditseni m'dzanja la oipa," 
Psalms82:5 Sadziwa, ndipo sazindikira; Amayendayenda mumdima; Maziko onse a dziko lapansi agwedezeka." 
Psalms82:6 Ndinati Ine, Inu ndinu milungu, Ndi ana a Wam'mwambamwamba nonsenu." 
Psalms82:7 Komatu mudzafa monga anthu, Ndipo mudzagwa monga wina wa akulu." 
Psalms82:8 Ukani, Mulungu, weruzani dziko lapansi; Pakuti Inu mudzalandira amitundu onse." 
Psalms83:1 Mulungu musakhale cete; Musakhale du, osanena kanthu, Mulungu." 
Psalms83:2 Pakuti taonani, adani anu aphokosera: Ndipo okwiyira Inu aweramutsa mutu," 
Psalms83:3 Apangana mocenjerera pa anthu anu, Nakhalira upo pa obisika anu." 
Psalms83:4 Amati, Tiyeni tiwaononge asakhalenso mtundu wa anthu; Ndipo dzina la Israyeli lisakumbukikenso." 
Psalms83:5 Pakuti anakhalira upo ndi mtima umodzi; Anacita cipangano ca pa Inu: 
Psalms83:6 Mahema a Edomu ndi a Aismayeli; Moabu ndi Ahagara; 
Psalms83:7 Gebala ndi Amoni ndi Amaleki; Filistiya, pamodzi ndi iwo okhala m'Turo." 
Psalms83:8 Asuri anaphatikana nao; Anakhala dzanja la ana a Loti," 
Psalms83:9 Muwacitire monga munacitira Midyani; Ndi Sisera, ndi Jabini ku mtsinje wa Kisoni:" 
Psalms83:10 Amene anaonongeka ku Endoro; Anakhala ngati ndowe ya kumunda. 
Psalms83:11 Muwaike akulu ao ngati Orebu ndi Zeebu; Mafumu ao ngati Zeba ndi Zalimuna: 
Psalms83:12 Amene anati, Tilande Malo okhalamo Mulungu, akhale athu." 
Psalms83:13 Mulungu wanga, muwaike akhale ngati mungu; Ngati ziputu zomka ndi mphepo." 
Psalms83:14 Monga moto upsereza nkhalango, Ndi monga lawi liyatsa mapiri;" 
Psalms83:15 Momwemo muwatsate ndi namondwe, Nimuwaopse ndi kabvumvulu wanu." 
Psalms83:16 Acititseni manyazi pankhope pao; Kuti afune dzina lanu, Yehova." 
Psalms83:17 Acite manyazi, naopsedwe kosatha; Ndipo asokonezeke, naonongeke:" 
Psalms83:18 Kuti adziwe kuti inu nokha, dzina lanu ndinu Yehova, Ndinu Wam'mwambamwamba pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms84:1 Pokhala Inu mpotikonda ndithu, Yehova wa makamu!" 
Psalms84:2 Moyo wanga ulakalaka, inde ukomokanso ndi kufuna mabwalo a Yehova; Mtima wanga ndi thupi langa zipfuulira kwa Mulungu wamoyo." 
Psalms84:3 Mbawanso inapeza nyumba, Ndi namzeze cisa cace coikamo ana ace, Pa maguwa a nsembe anu, Yehova wa makamu, Mfumu yanga ndi Mulungu wanga," 
Psalms84:4 Odala iwo akugonera m'nyumba mwanu; Akulemekezani cilemekezere," 
Psalms84:5 Wodala munthu amene mphamvu yace iri mwa Inu; Mumtima mwace muli makwalala a ku Ziyoni,"
