Psalms84:6 Popyola cigwa ca kulira misozi aciyesa ca akasupe; Inde mvula: ya cizimalupsa icidzaza ndi madalitso. 
Psalms84:7 Apita mwamphamvu naonjezapo mphamvu, Aoneka pamaso pa Mulungu m'Ziyoni." 
Psalms84:8 Yehova Mulungu wa makamu, imvani pemphero langa: Cherani khutu, Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Psalms84:9 Onani, Mulungu, ndinu cikopa cathu; Ndipo penyani pa nkhope ya Wodzozedwa wanu." 
Psalms84:10 Pakuti tsiku limodzi m'mabwalo anu likoma koposa masiku ambirimbiri akukhala pena, Kukhala inewapakhomo m'nyumba ya Mulungu wanga, Kundikonda ine koposa kugonera m'mahema a coipa," 
Psalms84:11 Pakuti Yehova Mulungu ndiye dzuwa ndi cikopa; Yehova adzapatsa cifundo ndi ulemerero; Sadzakaniza cokoma iwo akuyenda angwiro," 
Psalms84:12 Yehova wa makamu, Wodala munthu wakukhulupirira Inu." 
Psalms85:1 Munacita zobvomereza dziko lanu, Yehova; Munabweza ukapolo wa Yakobo." 
Psalms85:2 Munacotsa mphulupulu ya anthu anu, Munafotsera zolakwa zao zonse." 
Psalms85:3 Munabweza kuzaza kwanu konse; Munabwerera ku mkwiyo wanu wotentha. 
Psalms85:4 Mutibweze, Mulungu wa cipulumutso cathu, Nimuletse udani wanu wa pa ife." 
Psalms85:5 Kodi mudzatikwiyira nthawi zonse? Kodi mudzakhala cikwiyire mibadwo mibadwo? 
Psalms85:6 Kodi simudzatipatsanso moyo, Kuti anthu anu akondwerere ndi Inu?" 
Psalms85:7 Tionetseni cifundo canu, Yehova, Tipatseni cipulumutso canu." 
Psalms85:8 Ndidzamva colankhula Mulungu Yehova; Pakuti adzalankhula zamtendere ndi anthu ace, ndi okondedwa ace; Koma asabwererenso kucita zapusa." 
Psalms85:9 Indedi cipulumutso cace ciri pafupi ndi iwo akumuopa Iye; Kuti m'dziko mwathu mukhale ulemu. 
Psalms85:10 Cifundo ndi coonadi zakomanizana; Cilungamo ndi mtendere zapsompsonana," 
Psalms85:11 Coonadi ciphukira m'dziko; Ndi cilungamo casuzumira ciri m'mwamba. 
Psalms85:12 Inde Yehova adzapereka zokoma; Ndipo dziko lathu lidzapereka zipatso zace. 
Psalms85:13 Cilungamo cidzamtsogolera; Nicidzamkonzera mapazi ace njira. 
Psalms86:1 Cherani khutu lanu Yehova, mundiyankhe; Pakuti ine ndine wozunzika ndi waumphawi." 
Psalms86:2 Sungani moyo wanga pakuti ine ndine wokondedwa wanu; Inu Mulungu wanga, pulumutsani mtumiki wanu wokhulupirira Inu." 
Psalms86:3 Mundicitire cifundo, Ambuye; Pakuti tsiku lonse ndiitana Inu." 
Psalms86:4 Kondwetsani moyo wa mtumiki wanu; Pakuti ndikwezera moyo wanga kwa Inu, Ambuye." 
Psalms86:5 Pakuti fnu, Ambuye, ndinu wabwino, ndi wokhululukira, Ndi wa cifundo cocurukira onse akuitana Inu." 
Psalms86:6 Cherani khutu pemphero langa, Yehova; Nimumvere mau a kupemba kwanga," 
Psalms86:7 Tsiku la msauko wanga ndidzaitana Inu; Popeza mudzandibvomereza. 
Psalms86:8 Pakati pa milungu palibe wina wonga Inu, Ambuye; Ndipo palibe nchito zonga zanu." 
Psalms86:9 Amitundu onse mudawalenga adzadza nadzagwada pamaso panu, Ambuye; Nadzalemekeza dzina lanu." 
Psalms86:10 Pakuti Inu ndinu wamkulu, ndi wakucita zodabwiza; Inu ndinu Mulungu, nokhanu." 
Psalms86:11 Mundionetse njira yanu, Yehova; ndidzayenda m'coonadi canu: Muumbe mtima wanga ukhale umodzi kuti uliope dzina lanu." 
Psalms86:12 Ndidzakuyamikani, Ambuye, Mulungu wanga, ndi mtima wanga wonse; Ndipo ndidzalemekeza dzina lanu nthawi zonse." 
Psalms86:13 Pakuti cifundo canu ca pa ine ncacikuru; Ndipo munalanditsa moyo wanga kunsi kwa manda. 
Psalms86:14 Mulungu, odzikuza andiukira, Ndi msonkhano wa anthu oopsa afuna moyo wanga, Ndipo sanaika Inu pamaso pao." 
Psalms86:15 Koma Inu, Ambuye, ndinu Mulungu wansoni ndi wacisomo, Wosapsa mtima msanga, ndi wocurukira cifundo ndi coonadi." 
Psalms86:16 Mundibwerere ine, ndi kundicitira cifundo; Mpatseni mtumiki wanu mphamvu yanu, Ndipo pulumutsani mwana wa mdzakazi wanu." 
Psalms86:17 Mundicitire cizindikilo coti cabwino; Kuti ondida acione, nacite manyazi, Popeza Inu, Yehova, munandithandiza ndi kundisangalatsa," 
Psalms87:1 Maziko ace ali m'mapiri oyera. 
Psalms87:2 Yehova akonda zipata za Ziyoni Koposa zokhalamo zonse za Yakobo. 
Psalms87:3 Mudzi wa Mulungu, inu, Akunenerani zakukulemekezani." 
Psalms87:4 Ndidzachula Rahabu ndi Babulo kwa iwo ondidziwa Ine; Taonani, Filistiya ndi Turo pamodzi ndi Kusi; Uyu anabadwa komweko." 
Psalms87:5 Ndipo adzanena za Ziyoni, Uyu ndi uyo anabadwa m'mwemo; Ndipo Wam'mwambamwamba ndiye aclzaukhazikitsa." 
Psalms87:6 Yehova adzawerenga, polembera mitundu ya anthu. Uyu anabadwa komweko." 
Psalms87:7 Ndipo oyimba ndi oomba omwe adzati, Akasupe ansa onse ali mwa inu." 
Psalms88:1 Yehova, Mulungu wa cipulumutso canga, Ndinapfuula pamaso panu usana ndi usiku," 
Psalms88:2 Pemphero langa lidze pamaso panu; Mundicherere khutu kukuwa kwanga: 
Psalms88:3 Pakuti mzimu wanga wadzala nao mabvuto, Ndi moyo wanga wayandikira kumanda." 
Psalms88:4 Anandiwerenga pamodzi nao otsikira kudzenje; Ndakhala ngati munthu wopanda mphamvu: 
Psalms88:5 Wotayika pakati pa akufa, Ngati ophedwa akugona m'manda, Amene simuwakumbukilanso; Ndipo anawadula kusiyana ndi dzanja lanu." 
Psalms88:6 Munandiika kunsi kwa dzenje, Kuti mdima, kozama." 
Psalms88:7 Mkwiyo wanu utsamira pa ine, Ndipo munandizunza ine ndi mafunde anu onse." 
Psalms88:8 Munandisiyanitsira wodziwana nane kutali; Munandiika ndiwakhalire conyansa: Ananditsekereza osakhoza kuturuka ine. 
Psalms88:9 Diso langa lapuwala cifukwa ca kuzunzika kwanga: Ndimaitana Inu, Yehova, tsiku lonse; Nditambalitsira manja anga kwa Inu." 
Psalms88:10 Kodi mudzacitira akufa zodabwiza? Kodi adzaukanso otisiyawo, ndi kukulemekezani?" 
Psalms88:11 Adzafotokozera cifundo canu kumanda kodi, Cikhulupiriko canu ku malo a cionongeko?" 
Psalms88:12 Zodabwiza zanu zidzadziwika mumdima kodi, Ndi cilungamo canu m'dziko la ciiwaliko?" 
Psalms88:13 Koma ndinapfuulira kwa Inu, Yehova, Ndipo pemphero langa likumika Inu mamawa." 
Psalms88:14 Yehova mutayiranji moyo wanga? Ndi kundibisira nkhope yanu? 
Psalms88:15 Wozunzika ine ndi wofuna kufa kuyambira ubwana wanga; Posenza zoopsa zanu, ndithedwa nzeru." 
Psalms88:16 Kuzaza kwanu kwandimiza; Zoopsa zanu zinandiononga," 
Psalms88:17 Zinandizungulira ngati madzi tsiku lonse; Zinandizinga pamodzi. 
Psalms88:18 Munandicotsera kutali wondikonda ndi bwenzi langa, Odziwana nane akhala kumdima." 
Psalms89:1 Ndidzayimbira zacifundo za Yehova nthawi yonse: Pakamwa panga ndidzadziwitsira cikhulupiriko canu ku mibadwo mibadwo. 
Psalms89:2 Pakuti ndinati, Cifundo adzacimanga kosaleka; Mudzakhazika cikhulupiriko canu m'Mwamba mweni mweni." 
Psalms89:3 Ndinacita cipangano ndi wosankhika wanga, Ndinalumbirira Davide mtumiki wanga:" 
Psalms89:4 Ndidzakhazika mbeu yako ku nthawi yonse, Ndipo ndidzamanga mpando wacifumu wako ku mibadwo mibadwo." 
Psalms89:5 Ndipo kumwamba kudzalemekeza zodabwiza zanu, Yehova; Cikhulupiriko canunso mu msonkhano wa oyera mtima." 
Psalms89:6 Pakuti kuli yani kuthambo timlinganize ndi Yehova? Afanana ndi Yehova ndani mwa ana a amphamvu? 
Psalms89:7 Ndiye Mulungu, ayenera kumuopa kwambiri m'upo wa oyera mtima, Ndiye wocititsa mantha koposa onse akumzinga." 
Psalms89:8 Yehova, Mulungu wa makamu, wamphamvu ndani wonga Inu, Yehova? Ndipo cikhulupiriko canu cikuzingani." 
Psalms89:9 Inu ndinu wakucita ufumu pa kudzikuza kwa nyanja; Pakuuka mafunde ace muwacititsa bata. 
Psalms89:10 Mudathyola Rahabu, monga munthu wophedwa; Munabalalitsa adani anu ndi mkono wa mphamvu yanu." 
Psalms89:11 Kumwamba ndi kwanu, dziko lapansi lomwe ndi lanu; Munakhazika dziko lokhalamo anthu ndi kudzala kwace." 
Psalms89:12 Munalenga kumpoto ndi kumwela; Tabora ndi Hermoni apfuula mokondwera m'dzina lanu. 
Psalms89:13 Muli nao mkono wanu wolimba; M'dzanja mwanu muli mphamvu, dzanja lamanja lanu nlokwezeka." 
Psalms89:14 Cilungamo ndi ciweruzo ndiwo maziko a mpando wacifumu wanu; Cifundo ndi coonadi zitsogolera pankhope panu. 
Psalms89:15 Odala anthu odziwa liu la lipenga; Ayenda m'kuunika kwa nkhope yanu, Yehova." 
Psalms89:16 Akondwera m'dzina lanu tsiku lonse; Ndipo akwezeka m'cilungamo canu. 
Psalms89:17 Popeza Inu ndinu ulemerero wa mphamvu yao; Ndipo potibvomereza Inu nyanga yathu idzakwezeka. 
Psalms89:18 Pakuti cikopa cathu cifuma kwa Yehova; Ndi mfumuyathu kwa Woyera wa Israyeli. 
Psalms89:19 Pamenepo munalankhula m'masompenya ndi okondedwa anu, Ndipo mudati, Ndasenza thandizo pa ciphona; Ndakweza wina wosankhika mwa anthu." 
Psalms89:20 Ndapeza Davide mtumiki wanga; Ndamdzoza mafuta anga oyera. 
Psalms89:21 Amene dzanja langa lidzakhazikika naye; Inde mkono wanga udzalimbitsa. 
Psalms89:22 Mdani sadzamuumira mtima; Ndi mwana wa cisalungamo sadzamzunza. 
Psalms89:23 Ndipo ndidzaphwanya omsautsa pamaso pace; Ndidzapandanso odana naye. 
Psalms89:24 Koma cikhulupiriko canga ndi cifundo canga zidzakhala naye; Ndipo nyanga yace idzakwezeka m'dzina langa. 
Psalms89:25 Ndipo ndidzaika dzanja lace panyanja, Ndi dzanja lamanja lace pamitsinje." 
Psalms89:26 Iye adzandichula, ndi kuti, Inu ndinu Atate wanga, Mulungu wanga, ndi thanthwe la cipulumutso canga." 
Psalms89:27 Inde ndidzamuyesa mwana wanga woyamba, Womveka wa mafumu a pa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms89:28 Ndidzamsungira cifundo canga ku nthawi yonse, Ndipo cipangano canga cidzalimbika pa iye." 
Psalms89:29 Ndidzakhalitsanso mbeu yace cikhalire, Ndi mpando wacifumu wace ngati masiku a m'mwamba." 
Psalms89:30 Ana ace akataya cilamulo canga, Osayenda m'maweruzo anga:" 
Psalms89:31 Nakaipsa malembo anga; Osasunga malamulo anga; 
Psalms89:32 Pamenepo ndidzazonda zolakwa zao ndi ndodo, Ndi mphulupulu zao ndi mikwingwirima." 
Psalms89:33 Koma sindidzamcotsera cifundo canga conse, Ndi cikhulupiriko canga sicidzamsowa." 
Psalms89:34 Sindidzaipsa cipangano canga, Kapena kusintha mau oturuka m'milomo yanga." 
Psalms89:35 Ndinalumbira kamodzi m'ciyero canga; Sindidzanamizira Davide; 
Psalms89:36 Mbeu yace idzakhala ku nthawi yonse, Ndi mpando wacifumu wace ngati dzuwa pamaso panga." 
Psalms89:37 Udzakhazikika ngati mwezi ku nthawi yonse, Ndi ngati mboni yokhulupirika kuthambo." 
Psalms89:38 Koma Inu munamtaya, nimunamkaniza, Munakwiya naye wodzozedwa wanu." 
Psalms89:39 Munakaniza cipangano ca mtumiki wanu; Munaipsa korona wace ndi kumponya pansi," 
Psalms89:40 Munapasula maguta ace onse; Munagumula malinga ace. 
Psalms89:41 Onse opita panjirapa amfunkhira: Akhala cotonza ca anansi ace. 
Psalms89:42 Munakweza dzanja lamanja la iwo omsautsa; Munakondweretsa adani ace onse. 
Psalms89:43 Munapinditsa kukamwa kwace kwa lupanga lace, Osamuimika kunkhondo." 
Psalms89:44 Munaleketsa kuwala kwace, Ndipo munagwetsa pansi mpando wacifumu wace." 
Psalms89:45 Munafupikitsa masiku a mnyamata wace; Munamkuta nao manyazi. 
Psalms89:46 Mudzabisala kosatha kufikira liti, Yehova; Ndi kuzaza kwanu kudzatentha ngati moto kufikira liti?" 
Psalms89:47 Kumbukilani kuti nthawi yanga njapafupi; Munalengeranji ana onse a anthu kwacabe? 
Psalms89:48 Munthu ndani amene adzakhalabe ndi moyo, osaona imfa? Amene adzapulumutsa moyo wace ku mphamvu ya manda?" 
Psalms89:49 Ciri kuti cifundo canu cakale, Ambuye, Munacilumbirira Davide pa cikhulupiriko canu?" 
Psalms89:50 Kumbukilani, Ambuye, cotonzera atumiki anu; Ndicisenza m'cifuwa mwanga cacokera ku mitundu yonse yaikuru ya anthu;" 
Psalms89:51 Cimene adani anu, Yehova, atonza naco; Cimene atonzera naco mayendedwe a wodzozedwa wanu." 
Psalms89:52 Wodalitsika Yehova ku nthawi yonse, Amen ndi Amen." 
Psalms90:1 Ambuye, Inu munatikhalira mokhalamo M'mibadwo mibadwo." 
Psalms90:2 Asanabadwe mapiri, Kapena musanalenge dziko lapansi, ndi lokhalamo anthu, Inde, kuyambira nthawi yosayamba kufikira nthawi yosatha, Inu ndinu Mulungu." 
Psalms90:3 Mubweza munthu akhale pfumbi; Nimuti, Bwererani inu, ana a anthu." 
Psalms90:4 Pakuti pamaso panu zaka zikwi Zikhala ngati dzulo, litapita, Ndi monga ulonda wa usiku." 
Psalms90:5 Muwatenga ngati ndi madzi akulu, akhala ngati tulo; Mamawa akhala ngati msipu waphuka." 
Psalms90:6 Mamawa uphuka bwino; Madzulo ausenga, nuuma." 
Psalms90:7 Pakuti tionongeka mu mkwiyo wanu; Ndipo m'kuzaza kwanu tiopsedwa. 
Psalms90:8 Munaika mphulupulu zathu pamaso panu, Ndi zoipa zathu zobisika pounikira nkhope yanu." 
Psalms90:9 Pakuti masiku athu onse apitirira m'ukali wanu; Titsiriza moyo wathu ngati lingaliro. 
Psalms90:10 Masiku a zaka zathu ndiwo zaka makumi asanu ndi awiri, Kapena tikakhala nayo mphamvudi zaka makumi asanu ndi atatu; Koma teronso kukula kwao kumati cibvuto ndi copanda pace; Pakuti kumapitako msanga ndipo tithawa ife tomwe." 
Psalms90:11 Adziwa mphamvu ya mkwiyo wanu ndani, Ndi ukali wanu monga ayenera kukuopani?" 
Psalms90:12 Mutidziwitse kuwerenga masiku athu motero, Kuti tikhale nao mtima wanzeru." 
Psalms90:13 Bwerani, Yehova; kufikira liti? Ndipo alekeni atumiki anu." 
Psalms90:14 Mutikhutitse naco cifundo canu m'mawa; Ndipo tidzapfuula mokondwera ndi kukondwera masiku athu onse. 
Psalms90:15 Tikondweretseni monga mwa masiku mudatizunzawa, Ndi zaka tidaona coipa." 
Psalms90:16 Cocita Inu cioneke kwa atumiki anu, Ndi ulemerero wanu pa ana ao." 
Psalms90:17 Ndipo cisomo cace ca Yehova Mulungu wathu cikhale pa ife; Ndipo mutikhazikitsire ife nchito ya manja athu; Inde, nchito ya manja athu muikhazikitse." 
Psalms91:1 Iye amene akhala pansi m'ngaka yace ya Wam'mwambamwamba Adzagonera mu mthunzi wa Wamphamvuyonse. 
Psalms91:2 Ndidzati kwa Yehova, Pothawirapo panga ndi linga langa; Mulungu wanga, amene ndimkhulupirira," 
Psalms91:3 Pakuti adzakuonjola ku msampha wa msodzi, Ku mliri wosakaza." 
Psalms91:4 Adzakufungatira ndi nthenga zace, Ndipo udzathawira kunsi kwa mapiko ace; Coonadi cace ndico cikopa cocinjiriza." 
Psalms91:5 Sudzaopa coopsa ca usiku, Kapena mubvi wopita usana;" 
Psalms91:6 Kapena mliri woyenda mumdima, Kapena cionongeko cakuthera usana." 
Psalms91:7 Pambali pako padzagwa cikwi, Ndi zikwi khumi pa dzanja lamanja lako; Sicidzakuyandikiza iwe." 
Psalms91:8 Koma udzapenya ndi maso ako, Nudzaona kubwezera cilango oipa." 
Psalms91:9 Popeza udati, Inu Yehova, ndinu pothawirapo panga Udaika Wam'mwambamwamba cokhalamo cako;" 
Psalms91:10 Palibe coipa cidzakugwera, Ndipo colanga sicidzayandikiza hema wako." 
Psalms91:11 Pakuti adzalamulira angelo ace za iwe, Akusunge m'njira zako zonse." 
Psalms91:12 Adzakunyamula pa manja ao, Ungagunde phazi lako pamwala." 
Psalms91:13 Udzaponda mkango ndi mphiri; Udzapondereza msona wa mkango ndi cinjoka: 
Psalms91:14 Popeza andikondadi ndidzampulumutsa; Ndidzamkweza m'mwamba, papeza adziwa dzina langa." 
Psalms91:15 Adzandipfuulira Ine ndipo ndidzamyankha; Kunsautso ndidzakhala naye pamodzi; Ndidzamlanditsa, ndi kumcitira ulemu." 
Psalms91:16 Ndidzamkhutitsa ndi masiku ambiri, Ndi kumuonetsera cipulumutso canga," 
Psalms92:1 Nkokoma kuyamika Yehova, Ndi kuyimbira nyimbo dzina lanu, Wam'mwambamwamba Inu:" 
Psalms92:2 Kuonetsera cifundo canu mamawa, Ndi cikhulupiriko canu usiku uli wonse." 
Psalms92:3 Pa coyimbira ca zingwe khumi ndi pacisakasa; Pazeze ndi kulira kwace. 
Psalms92:4 Popeza Inu, Yehova, munandikondweretsa ndi kucita kwanu, Ndidzapfuula mokondwera pa nchito ya manja anu." 
Psalms92:5 Ha! nchito zanu nzazikuru, Yehova, Zolingalira zanu nzozama ndithu." 
Psalms92:6 Munthu wopulukira sacidziwa; Ndi munthu wopusa sacizindikira ici; 
Psalms92:7 Cakuti pophuka oipa ngati msipu, Ndi popindula ocita zopanda pace; Citero kuti adzaonongeke kosatha:" 
Psalms92:8 Koma Inu, Yehova, muli m'mwamba ku nthawi yonse." 
Psalms92:9 Pakuti, taonani, adani anu, Yehova, Pakuti, taonani, adani anu adzatayika; Ocita zopanda pace onse adzamwazika." 
Psalms92:10 Koma munakweza nyanga yanga ngati ya njati; Anandidzoza mafuta atsopano. 
Psalms92:11 Diso langa lapenya cokhumba ine pa iwo ondilalira, M'makutu mwanga ndamva cokhumba ine pa iwo akucita zoipa akundiukira." 
Psalms92:12 Wolungama adzaphuka ngati mgwalangwa; Adzakula ngati mkungudza wa ku Lebano. 
Psalms92:13 Iwo ookedwa m'nyumba ya Yehova, Adzaphuka m'mabwalo a Mulungu wathu." 
Psalms92:14 Atakalamba adzapatsanso zipatso; Adzadzazidwa ndi madzi nadzakhala abiriwiri: 
Psalms92:15 Kulalikira kuti Yehova ngwolunjika; Iye ndiye thanthwe langa, ndipo mwa Iye mulibe cosalungama." 
Psalms93:1 Yehova acita ufumu; wadzibveka ndi ukulu; Wadzibveka Yehova, wadzimangirira mphamvu m'cuuno; Dziko lomwe lokhalamo anthu likhazikika, silidzagwedezeka." 
Psalms93:2 Mpando wacifumu wanu ukhazikika kuyambira kale lija; Inu ndinu wosayambira ndi kale, lomwe." 
Psalms93:3 Mitsinje ikweza, Yehova, Mitsinje ikweza mkokomo wao; Mitsinje ikweza mafunde ao." 
Psalms93:4 Yehova Wam'mwamba ndiye wamphamvu, Wakuposa mkokomo wa madzi ambiri, Ndi mafunde olimba a nyanja." 
Psalms93:5 Mboni zanu zibvomerezeka ndithu; Ciyero ciyenera nyumba yanu, Yehova, ku nthawi za muyaya." 
Psalms94:1 Mulungu wakubwezera cilango, Yehova, Mulungu wakubwezera cilango, muoneke wowala." 
Psalms94:2 Nyamukani, Inu woweruza wa dziko lapansi: Bwezerani odzikuza coyenera iwo." 
Psalms94:3 Oipa adzatumpha ndi cimwemwe kufikira liti, Yehova? Oipa adzatero kufikira liti?" 
Psalms94:4 Anena mau, alankhula zawawa; Adzitamandira onse ocita zopanda pace." 
Psalms94:5 Aphwanya anthu anu, Yehova, Nazunza colandira canu." 
Psalms94:6 Amapha wamasiye ndi mlendo, Nawapha ana amasiye." 
Psalms94:7 Ndipo amati, Yehova sacipenya, Ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo sacisamalira." 
Psalms94:8 Zindikirani, opulukira inu mwa anthu; Ndipo opusa inu, mudzacita mwanzeru liti?" 
Psalms94:9 Kodi Iye wakupanga khutu ngwosamva? Kodi Iye wakuumba diso ngwosapenya? 
Psalms94:10 Kodi Iye wakulangiza mitundu ya anthu, ndiye wosadzudzula? Si ndiye amene aphunzitsa munthu nzeru?" 
Psalms94:11 Yehova adziwa zolingalira za munthu, Kuti ziri zacabe." 
Psalms94:12 Wodala munthu amene mumlanga, Yehova; Ndi kumphunzitsa m'cilamulo canu;" 
Psalms94:13 Kuti mumpumitse masiku oipa; Kufikira atakumbira woipa mbuna. 
Psalms94:14 Pakuti Yehova sadzasiya anthu ace, Ndipo sadzataya colandira cace." 
Psalms94:15 Pakuti ciweruzo cidzabwera kumka kucilungamo: Ndipo oongoka mtima onse adzacitsata. 
Psalms94:16 Adzandiukira ndani kutsutsana nao ocita zoipa? Adzandilimbikira ndani kutsutsana nao ocita zopanda pace? 
Psalms94:17 Akadapanda kukhala thandizo langa Yehova, Moyo wanga ukadakhala kuli cete." 
Psalms94:18 Pamene ndinati, Litereka phazi langa, Cifundo canu, Mulungu, cinandicirikiza." 
Psalms94:19 Pondicurukira zolingalira zanga m'kati mwanga, Zotonthoza zanu zikondweretsa moyo wanga." 
Psalms94:20 Kodi uyenera kuyanjana ndi Inu mpando wacifumu wa kusakaza, Wakupanga cobvuta cikhale lamulo?" 
Psalms94:21 Asonkhana pamodzi pa moyo wa wolungama, Namtsutsa wa mwazi wosacimwa." 
Psalms94:22 Koma Yehova wakhala msanje wanga; Ndi Mulungu wanga thanthwe lothawirapo ine. 
Psalms94:23 Ndipo anawabwezera zopanda pace zao, Nadzawaononga m'coipa cao; Yehova Mulungu wathu adzawaononga." 
Psalms95:1 Tiyeni tiyimbire Yehova mokondwera; Tipfuule kwa thanthwe la cipulumutso cathu. 
Psalms95:2 Tidze naco ciyamiko pamaso pace, Timpfuulire Iye mokondwera ndi masalmo." 
Psalms95:3 Pakuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu wamkuru; Ndi mfumu yaikuru yoposa milungu yonse. 
Psalms95:4 Malo ozama a dziko lapansi ali m'dzanja lace; Cuma ca m'mapiri comwe ndi cace. 
Psalms95:5 Nyanja ndi yace, anailenga; Ndipo manja ace anaumba dziko louma." 
Psalms95:6 Tiyeni, tipembedze tiwerame; Tigwade pamaso pa Yehova, amene anatilenga:" 
Psalms95:7 Pakuti Iye ndiye Mulungu wathu, Ndipo ife ndife anthu a pabusa pace, ndi nkhosa za m'dzanja mwace. Lero, mukamva mau acel" 
Psalms95:8 Musaumitse mitima yanu, ngati ku Meriba, Ngati tsiku la ku Masa m'cipululu;" 
Psalms95:9 Pamene makolo anu anandisuntha, Anandiyesa, anapenyanso cocita Ine." 
Psalms95:10 Zaka makumi anai mbadwo uwu unandimvetsa cisoni, Ndipo ndinati, Iwo ndiwo anthu osokerera mtima, Ndipo sadziwa njira zanga." 
Psalms95:11 Cifukwa cace ndinalumbira mu mkwiyo wanga, Ngati adzalowa mpumulo wanga." 
Psalms96:1 Myimbireni Yehova nyimbo yatsopano; Myimbireni Yehova, inu, dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms96:2 Myimbireni Yehova, lemekezani dzina lace; Lalikirani cipulumutso cace tsiku ndi tsiku." 
Psalms96:3 Fotokozerani ulemerero wace mwa amitundu; Zodabwiza zace mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu. 
Psalms96:4 Pakuti Yehova ndi wamkulu, nayenera kulemekezedwa kwakukulu; Ayenera amuope koposa milungu yonse." 
Psalms96:5 Pakuti milungu yonse ya mitundu ya anthu ndiyo mafano: Koma Yehova analenga zakumwamba. 
Psalms96:6 Pamaso pace pali ulemu ndi ukulu: M'malo opatulika mwace muli mphamvu ndi zocititsa kaso. 
Psalms96:7 Mpatseni Yehova, inu, mafuko a mitundu ya anthu, Mpatseni Yehova ulemerero ndi mphamvu," 
Psalms96:8 Mpatseni Yehova ulemerero wa dzina lace; Bwerani naco copereka, ndipo fikani ku mabwalo ace." 
Psalms96:9 Gwadirani Yehova moyera ndi mokometsetsa: Njenjemerani pamaso pace, inu dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms96:10 Nenani mwa amitundu, Yehova acita ufumu; Dziko lokhalamo anthu lomwe likhazikika kuti silingagwedezeke; Adzaweruza mitundu ya anthu molunjika." 
Psalms96:11 Kumwamba kukondwere nilisekerere dziko lapansi; Nyanja ibume mwa kudzala kwace: 
Psalms96:12 Munda ukondwerere ndi zonse ziri m'mwemo; Pamenepo mitengo yonse ya kunkhalango idzapfuula mokondwera; 
Psalms96:13 Pamaso pa Yehova, pakuti akudza; Pakuti akudza kudzaweruza dziko lapansi: Adzaweruza dziko lokhalamo anthu ndi cilungamo, Ndi mitundu ya anthu ndi coonadi." 
Psalms97:1 Yehova acita ufumu; dziko lapansi likondwere; Zisumbu zambiri zikondwerere. 
Psalms97:2 Pomzinga pali mitambo ndi mdima; Cilungamo ndi ciweruzo ndizo zolimbitsa mpando wacifumu wace. 
Psalms97:3 Moto umtsogolera, Nupsereza otsutsana naye pozungulirapo," 
Psalms97:4 Mphezi zace zinaunikira dziko lokhalamo anthu; Dziko lapansi linaona nilinagwedezeka. 
Psalms97:5 Mapiri anasungunuka ngati sera pamaso pa Yehova, Pamaso pa Ambuye wa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms97:6 Kumwamba kulalikira cilungamo cace, Ndipo mitundu yonse ya anthu ipenya ulemerero wace." 
Psalms97:7 Onse akutumikira fano losema, Akudzitamandira nao mafano, acite manyazi: Mgwadireni Iye, milungu yonse inu." 
Psalms97:8 Ziyoni anamva nakondwera, Nasekerera ana akazi a Yuda; Cifukwa ca maweruzo anu, Yehova." 
Psalms97:9 Pakuti Inu, Yehova, ndinu Wam'mwambamwamba pa dziko lonse lapansi, Ndinu wokwezeka kwakukuru pamwamba pa milungu yonse yina." 
Psalms97:10 Inuokonda Yehova, danani naco coipa: Iye asunga moyo wa okondedwa ace; Awalanditsa m'manja mwa oipa." 
Psalms97:11 Kuunika kufesekera wolungama, Ndi cikondwerero oongoka mtima." 
Psalms97:12 Kondwerani mwa Yehova, olungama inu; Ndipo yamikani pokumbukila ciyero cace." 
Psalms98:1 Myimbireni Yehova nyimbo yatsopano; Popeza anacita zodabwiza: Dzanja lace lamanja, mkono wace woyera, zinamcitira cipulumutso," 
Psalms98:2 Yehova anawadziwitsira cipulumutso cace; Anaonetsera cilungamo cace pamaso pa amitundu. 
Psalms98:3 Anakumbukila cifundo cace ndi cikhulupiriko cace ku nyumba ya Israyeli; Malekezero onse a dziko lapansi anaona cipulumutso ca Mulungu wathu. 
Psalms98:4 Pfuulirani kwa Yehova, inu, dziko lonse lapansi; Kuwitsani ndi kupfuulira mokondwera; inde, yimbirani zomlemekeza." 
Psalms98:5 Myimbireni Yehova zomlemekeza ndizeze; Ndi zeze ndi mau a salmo. 
Psalms98:6 Pfuulani pamaso pa Mfumu Yehova, Ndi mbetete ndi liu la lipenga," 
Psalms98:7 Nyanja Ipfuule ndi kudzala kwace; Dziko lokhalamo anthu ndi iwo okhalamo; 
Psalms98:8 Mitsinje iombe manja; Mapiri apfuule pamodzi mokondwera; 
Psalms98:9 Pamaso pa Yehova, popeza akudza kudzaweruza dziko lapansi; Adzaweruza dziko lokhalamo anthu ndi cilungamo, Ndi mitundu ya anthu molunjika," 
Psalms99:1 Yehova ndiye mfumu; mitundu ya anthu injenjemere; Iye akhala pakati pa akerubi; dziko lapansi ligwedezeke. 
Psalms99:2 Yehova ndiye wamkuru m'Ziyoni; Ndipo akwezeka pamwamba pa mitundu yonse ya anthu. 
Psalms99:3 Alemekeze dzina lanu lalikuru ndi loopsa; Ili ndilo loyera. 
Psalms99:4 Ndipo mphamvu ya mfumu ikonda ciweruzo; Inu mukhazikitsa zolunjika, Mucita ciweruzo ndi cilungamo m'Yakobo." 
Psalms99:5 Mkwezeni Yehova Mulungu wathu, Ndipo padirani poponderapo mapasa ace: Iye ndiye Woyera." 
Psalms99:6 Mwa ansembe ace muli Mose ndi Aroni, Ndi Samueli mwa iwo akuitanira dzina lace; Anaitana kwa Yehova, ndipo Iye anawayankha." 
Psalms99:7 Iye analankhula nao mumtambo woti njo: Iwo anasunga mboni zace ndi malembawa anawapatsa," 
Psalms99:8 Munawayankha, Yehova Mulungu wathu: Munawakhalira Mulungu wakuwakhululukira, Mungakhale munabwezera cilango pa zocita zao." 
Psalms99:9 Mkwezeni Yehova Mulungu wathu, Ndipo gwadirani pa phiri lace loyera; Pakuti Yehova Mulungu wathu ndiye woyera." 
Psalms100:1 Pfuulirani kwa Yehova, inu, dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms100:2 Tumikirani Yehova ndi cikondwerero: Idzani pamaso pace ndi kumyimbira mokondwera," 
Psalms100:3 Dziwani kuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu; Iyeyu anatilenga, ndipo ife ndife ace; Ndife anthu ace ndi nkhosa za pabusa pace." 
Psalms100:4 Lowani ku zipata zace ndi ciyamiko, Ndi ku mabwalo ace ndi cilemekezo: Myamikeni; lilemekezeni dzina lace." 
Psalms100:5 Pakuti Yehova ndiye wabwino; cifundo cace cimamka muyaya; Ndi cikhulupiriko cace ku mibadwo mibadwo. 
Psalms101:1 Ndidzayimba za cifundo ndi ciweruzo; Ndidzayimba zakukulemekezani Inu, Yehova." 
Psalms101:2 Ndidzacita mwanzeru m'njira yangwiro; Mudzandidzera liti? Ndidzayenda m'nyumba mwanu ndi mtima wangwiro. 
Psalms101:3 Sindidzaika cinthu coipa pamaso panga; Cocita iwo akupatuka padera cindiipira; Sicidzandimamatira. 
Psalms101:4 Mtima wopulukira udzandicokera; Sindidzadziwana naye woipa. 
Psalms101:5 Wakuneneza mnzace m'tseri ndidzamdula; Wa maso odzikuza ndi mtima wodzitama sindidzamlola. 
Psalms101:6 Maso anga ayang'ana okhulupirika m'dziko, kuti akhale ndi Ine; Iye amene ayenda m'njira yangwiro, iyeyu adzanditumikira Ine." 
Psalms101:7 Wakucita cinyengo sadzakhala m'kati mwa nyumba yanga; Wakunena mabodza sadzakhazikika pamaso panga. 
Psalms101:8 Mamawa onse ndidzadula oipa onse a m'dziko; Kuduliratu onse akucita zopanda pace ku mudzi wa Yehova. 
Psalms102:1 Yehova, imvani pemphero langa, Ndipo mpfuu wanga ufikire Inu." 
Psalms102:2 Musandibisire nkhope yanu tsiku la nsautso yanga; Mundichereze khutu lanu; Tsiku limene ndiitana ine mundiyankhe msanga," 
Psalms102:3 Popeza masiku anga akanganuka ngati utsi, Ndi mafupa anga anyeka ngati nkhuni." 
Psalms102:4 Mtima wanga ukunga udzu wamweta, nufota; Popeza ndiiwala kudya mkate wanga." 
Psalms102:5 Cifukwa ca liu la kubuula kwanga Mnofu wanga umamatika ku mafupa anga. 
Psalms102:6 Ndikunga bvuwo m'cipululu; Ndikhala ngati kadzidzi wa kumabwinja. 
Psalms102:7 Ndidikira, ndikhala ngati mbawa Iri yokha pamwamba pa tsindwi." 
Psalms102:8 Adani anga anditonza tsiku lonse; Akundiyarukirawo alumbirira ine. 
Psalms102:9 Pakuti ndadya mapulusa ngati mkate, Ndi kusanganiza-comwera canga ndi misozi," 
Psalms102:10 Cifukwa ca ukali wanu ndi kuzaza kwanu; Popeza munandinyamula ndipo munandigwetsa. 
Psalms102:11 Masiku anga akunga mthunzi womka m'tali; Ndipo ine ndauma ngati udzu. 
Psalms102:12 Koma Inu, Yehova, mukhalabe ku nthawi yonse; Ndi cikumbukilo canu ku mibadwo mibadwo." 
Psalms102:13 Inu mudzauka, ndi kucitira nsoni Ziyoni; Popeza yafika nyengo yakumcitira cifundo, nyengo yoikika." 
Psalms102:14 Pakuti atumiki anu akondwera nayo miyala yace, Nacitira cifundo pfumbi lace." 
Psalms102:15 Pamenepo amitundu adzaopa dzina la Yehova, Ndi mafumu onse a dziko lapansi ulemerero wanu;" 
Psalms102:16 Pakuti Yehova anamanga Ziyoni, Anaoneka m'ulemerero wace;" 
Psalms102:17 Anasamalira pemphero la iwo akusowa konse, Osapepula pemphero lao." 
Psalms102:18 Ici adzacilembera mbadwo ukudza; Ndi mtundu wa anthu umene udalengedwa udzamlemekeza Yehova. 
Psalms102:19 Pakuti anapenya pansi ali kumwamba kuli malo ace opatulika; Yehova pokhala kumwamba anapenya dziko lapansi; 
Psalms102:20 Kuti amve kubuula kwa wandende; Namasule ana a imfa," 
Psalms102:21 Kuti anthu alalikire dzina la Yehova m'Ziyoni, Ndi cilemekezo cace m'Yerusalemu;" 
Psalms102:22 Posonkhana pamodzi mitundu ya anthu, Ndi maufumu kuti atumikire Yehova." 
Psalms102:23 Iye analanda mphamvu yanga panjira; Anacepsa masiku anga. 
Psalms102:24 Ndinati, Mulungu wanga, musandicotse pakati pa masiku anga: Zaka zanu zikhalira m'mibadwo mibadwo." 
Psalms102:25 Munakhazika dziko lapansi kalelo; Ndipo zakumwamba ndizo nchito ya manja anu. 
Psalms102:26 Zidzatha izi, koma Inu mukhala: Inde, zidzatha zonse ngati cabvala; Mudzazisintha ngati maraya, ndipo zidzasinthika:" 
Psalms102:27 Koma Inu ndinu yemweyo, Ndi zaka zanu sizifikira kutha." 
Psalms102:28 Ana a atumiki anu adzakhalitsa, Ndi mbeu zao zidzakhazikika pamaso panu." 
Psalms103:1 Lemekeza Yehova, moyo wanga; Ndi zonse za m'kati mwanga zilemekeze dzina lace loyera." 
Psalms103:2 Lemekeza Yehova, moyo wanga, Ndi kusaiwala zokoma zace zonse aticitirazi:" 
Psalms103:3 Amene akhululukira mphulupulu zako zonse; Naciritsa nthenda zako zonse; 
Psalms103:4 Amene aombola moyo wako ungaonongeke; Nakubveka korona wa cifundo ndi nsoni zokoma: 
Psalms103:5 Amene akhutitsa m'kamwa mwako ndi zabwino; Nabweza ubwana wako unge mphungu. 
Psalms103:6 Yehova acitira onse osautsidwa Cilungamo ndi ciweruzo. 
Psalms103:7 Analangiza Mose njira zace, Ndi ana a Israyeli macitidwe ace." 
Psalms103:8 Yehova ndiye wa nsoni zokoma ndi wacisomo, Wosakwiya msanga, ndi wa cifundo cocuruka." 
Psalms103:9 Sadzatsutsana nao nthawi zanse; Ndipo sadzasunga mkwiyo wace kosatha. 
Psalms103:10 Sanaticitira monga mwa zolakwa zathu, Kapena kutibwezera monga mwa mphulupulu zathu." 
Psalms103:11 Pakuti monga m'mwamba mutalikira ndi dziko lapansi, Motero cifundo cace cikulira iwo akumuopa Iye." 
Psalms103:12 Monga kum'mawa kutanimpha ndi kumadzulo, Momwemo anatisiyanitsira kutali zolakwa zathu." 
Psalms103:13 Monga atate acitira ana ace cifundo, Yehova acitira cifundo iwo akumuopa Iye." 
Psalms103:14 Popeza adziwa mapangidwe athu; Akumbukila kuti ife ndife pfumbi. 
Psalms103:15 Koma munthu, masiku ace akunga udzu; Aphuka monga duwa la kuthengo." 
Psalms103:16 Pakuti mphepo ikapitapo pakhala palibe: Ndi malo ace salidziwanso. 
Psalms103:17 Koma cifundo ca Yehova ndico coyambira nthawi yosayamba kufikira nthawi yosatha kwa iwo akumuopa Iye, Ndi cilungamo cace kufikira kwa ana a ana;" 
Psalms103:18 Kwa iwo akusunga cipangano cace, Ndi kwa iwo akukumbukila malangizo ace kuwacita." 
Psalms103:19 Yehova anakhazika mpando wacifumu wace Kumwamba; Ndi ufumu wace ucita mphamvu ponsepo," 
Psalms103:20 Lemekezani Yehova, inu angelo ace; A mphamvu zolimba, akucita mau ace, Akumvera liu la mau ace." 
Psalms103:21 Lemekezani Yehova, inu makamu ace onse; Inu atumiki ace akucita comkondweretsa Iye," 
Psalms103:22 Lemekezani Yehova, inu, nchito zace zonse, Ponse ponse pali ufumu wace: Lemekeza Yehova, moyo wanga iwe." 
Psalms104:1 Lemekeza Yehova, moyo wanga; Yehova, Mulungu wanga, Inu ndinu wamkurukuru;" 
Psalms104:2 Mubvala ulemu ndi cifumu. Amene mudzikuta nako kuunika monga ndi cobvala; Ndi kuyala thambo ngati nsaru yocinga; 
Psalms104:3 Amene alumikiza mitanda ya zipinda zace m'madzi; Naika makongwa akhale agareta ace; Nayenda pa mapiko a mphepo; 
Psalms104:4 Amene ayesa mphepo amithenga ace; Lawi la moto atumiki ace; 
Psalms104:5 Anakhazika dziko lapansi pa maziko ace, Silidzagwedezeka ku nthawi yonse." 
Psalms104:6 Mudalikuta ndi nyanja ngati ndi cobvala; Madzi anafikira pamwamba pa mapiri," 
Psalms104:7 Pa kudzudzula kwanu anathawa; Anathawa msanga liu la bingu lanu; 
Psalms104:8 Anakwera m'mapiri, anatsikira m'zigwa, Kufikira malo mudawakonzeratu." 
Psalms104:9 Munaika malire kuti asapitirireko; Kuti asabwererenso kuphimba dziko lapansi. 
Psalms104:10 Atumiza akasupe alowe m'makwawa; Ayenda pakati pa mapiri: 
Psalms104:11 Zimamwamo nyama zonse za kuthengo; Mbidzi zipherako ludzu lao. 
Psalms104:12 Mbalame za mlengalenga zifatsa pamenepo, Zimayimba pakati pa mitawi." 
Psalms104:13 Iye amwetsa mapiri mocokera m'zipinda zace: Dziko lakhuta zipatso za nchito zanu. 
Psalms104:14 Ameretsa msipu ziudye ng'ombe, Ndi zitsamba acite nazo munthu; Naturutse cakudya cocokera m'nthaka;" 
Psalms104:15 Ndi vinyo wokondweretsa mtima wa munthu, Ndi mafuta akunyezimiritsa nkhope yace, Ndi mkate wakulimbitsa mtima wa munthu." 
Psalms104:16 Mitengo ya Mulungu yadzala ndi madzi; Mikungudza ya ku Lebano imene anaioka; 
Psalms104:17 M'mwemo mbalame zimanga zisa zao; Pokhala cumba mpa mitengo ya mikungudza," 
Psalms104:18 Mapiri atali ndiwo ayenera zinkhoma; Pamatanthwe mpothawirapo mbira. 
Psalms104:19 Anaika mwezi nyengo zace; Dzuwa lidziwa polowera pace. 
Psalms104:20 Muika mdima ndipo pali usiku; Pamenepo zituruka zirombo zonse za m'thengo. 
Psalms104:21 Misona ya mkango ibangula potsata nyama yao, Nifuna cakudya cao kwa Mulungu." 
Psalms104:22 Poturuka dzuwa, zithawa, Zigona pansi m'ngaka mwao." 
Psalms104:23 Pamenepo munthu aturukira ku nchito yace, Nagwiritsa kufikira madzulo." 
Psalms104:24 Nchito zanu zicurukadi, Yehova! Munazicita zonse mwanzeru; Dziko lapansi lidzala naco cuma canu." 
Psalms104:25 Nyanja siyo, yaikuru ndi yacitando, M'mwemo muli zokwawa zosawerengeka; Zamoyo zazing'ono ndi zazikuru." 
Psalms104:26 M'mwemo muyenda zombo; Ndi livyatanu amene munamlenga aseweremo. 
Psalms104:27 Izi zonse zikulindirirani, Muzipatse cakudya cao pa nyengo yace." 
Psalms104:28 Cimene muzipatsa zigwira; Mufumbatula dzanja lanu, zikhuta zabwino." 
Psalms104:29 Mukabisa nkhope yanu, ziopsedwa; Mukalanda mpweya wao, zikufa, Nizibwerera kupfumbi kwao." 
Psalms104:30 Potumizira mzimu wanu, zilengedwa; Ndipo mukonzanso nkhope ya dziko lapansi." 
Psalms104:31 Ulemerero wa Yehova ukhale kosatha; Yehova akondwere mu nchito zace; 
Psalms104:32 Amene apenyerera pa dziko lapansi, ndipo linjenjemera; Akhudza mapiri, ndipo afuka." 
Psalms104:33 Ndidzayimbira Yehova m'moyo mwanga: Ndidzayimbira Mulungu wanga zomlemekeza pokhala ndiripo. 
Psalms104:34 Pomlingirira Iye pandikonde; Ndidzakondwera mwa Yehova. 
Psalms104:35 Ocimwa athedwe ku dziko lapansi, Ndi oipa asakhalenso. Yamika Yehova, moyo wanga. Haleluya." 
Psalms105:1 Yamikani Yehova, itanirani pa dzina lace; Bukitsani mwa mitundu ya anthu zocita Iye." 
Psalms105:2 Myimbireni, myimbireni zomlemekeza; Fotokozerani zodabwiza zace zonse." 
Psalms105:3 Mudzitamandire ndi dzina lace loyera: Mitima yao ya iwo ofunsira Yehova ikondwere. 
Psalms105:4 Funani Yehova, ndi mphamvu yace; Funsirani nkhope yace nthawi zonse." 
Psalms105:5 Kumbukilani zodabwiza zace adazicita; Zizindikilo zace ndi maweruzo a pakamwa pace; 
Psalms105:6 Inu mbeu za Abrahamu, mtumiki wace, Inu ana a Yakobo, osankhika ace." 
Psalms105:7 Iye ndiye Yehova, Mulungu wathu; Maweruzo ace akhala pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms105:8 Akumbukila cipangano cace kosatha, Mauwo anawalamulira mibadwo zikwi;" 
Psalms105:9 Cipanganoco anapangana ndi Abrahamu, Ndi lumbiro lace ndi Isake;" 
Psalms105:10 Ndipo anaciimikira Yakobo, cikhale malemba, Cikhale cipangano cosatha kwa Israyeli." 
Psalms105:11 Ndi kunena kuti, Ndidzakupatsa iwe dziko la Kanani, Gawo la colandira cako;" 
Psalms105:12 Pokhala iwo anthu owerengeka, Inde, anthu pang'ono, ndi alendo m'mwemo;" 
Psalms105:13 Nayendayenda kucokera mtundu wina kufikira mtundu wina, Kucokera ufumu wina kufikira anthu ena." 
Psalms105:14 Sanalola munthu awasautse; Ndipo anadzudzula mafumu cifukwa ca iwowa; 
Psalms105:15 Ndi kuti musamakhudza odzozedwa anga, Musamacitira coipa aneneri anga." 
Psalms105:16 Ndipo anaitana njala igwere dziko; Anatyola mcirikizo wonse wa mkate. 
Psalms105:17 Anawatsogozeratu munthu; Anamgulitsa Yosefe akhale kapolo: 
Psalms105:18 Anapweteka miyendo yace ndi matangadza; Anamgoneka m'unyolo; 
Psalms105:19 Kufikira nyengo yakucitika maneno ace; Mau a Yehova anamuyesa. 
Psalms105:20 Mfumuyo anatuma munthu nammasula; Woweruza mitundu ya anthu anamtsegulira. 
Psalms105:21 Anamuika akhale woyang'anira nyumba yace, Ndi woweruza wa pa zace zonse:" 
Psalms105:22 Amange nduna zace iye mwini, Alangize akulu ace adziwe nzeru." 
Psalms105:23 Pamenepo Israyeli analowa m'Aigupto; Ndi Yakobo anakhala mlendo m'dziko la Hamu. 
Psalms105:24 Ndipo anacurukitsatu mtundu wa anthu ace, Nawapatsa mphamvu yoposa owasautsa." 
Psalms105:25 Anasanduliza mitima yao, kuti adane nao anthu ace, Kuti acite monyenga ndi atumiki ace." 
Psalms105:26 Anatuma Mose mtumiki wace, Ndi Aroni amene adamsankha." 
Psalms105:27 Anaika pakati pao zizindikilo zace, Ndi zodabwiza m'dziko la Hamu." 
Psalms105:28 Anatumiza mdima ndipo kunada; Ndipo sanapikisana nao mau ace. 
Psalms105:29 Anasanduliza madzi ao akhale mwazi, Naphanso nsomba zao." 
Psalms105:30 Dziko lao linacuruka acule, M'zipinda zomwe za mafumu ao." 
Psalms105:31 Ananena, ndipo inadza mitambo ya nchenche, Ndi nsabwe kufikira m'malire ao onse." 
Psalms105:32 Anawapatsa mvula yamatalala, Lawi la moto m'dziko lao." 
Psalms105:33 Ndipo anapanda mipesa yao, ndi mikuyu yao; Natyola mitengo kufikira m'malire ao onse." 
Psalms105:34 Ananena, ndipo linadza dzombe Ndi mphuci, ndizo zosawerengeka," 
Psalms105:35 Ndipo zinadya zitsamba zonse za m'dziko mwao, Zinadyanso zipatso za m'nthaka mwao." 
Psalms105:36 Ndipo Iye anapha acisamba onse m'dziko mwao Coyambira ca mphamvu yao yonse. 
Psalms105:37 Ndipo anawaturutsa pamodzi ndi siliva ndi golidi: Ndi mwa mafuko ao munalibe mmodzi wokhumudwa. 
Psalms105:38 Aigupto anakondwera pakucoka iwo; Popeza kuopsa kwao kudawagwera. 
Psalms105:39 Anayala mtambo uwaphimbe; Ndi moto uunikire usiku," 
Psalms105:40 Anafunsa ndipo Iye anadzetsa zinziri. Nawakhuritsa mkate wakumwamba. 
Psalms105:41 Anatsegula pathanthwe, anaturukamo madzi; Nayenda pouma ngati mtsinje." 
Psalms105:42 Popeza anakumbukila mau ace oyera, Ndi Abrahamu mtumiki wace." 
Psalms105:43 Potero anaturutsa anthu ace ndi kusekerera, Osankhika ace ndi kupfuula mokondwera." 
Psalms105:44 Ndipo anawapatsa maiko a amitundu; Iwo ndipo analanda zipatso za nchito ya anthu: 
Psalms105:45 Kuti asamalire malemba ace, Nasunge malamulo ace. Haleluya." 
Psalms106:1 Haleluya. Yamikani Yehova; pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms106:2 Adzafotokoza ndani nchito zamphamvu za Yehova, Adzamveketsa ndani cilemekezo cace conse?" 
Psalms106:3 Odala iwo amene asunga ciweruzo, Iye amene acita cilungamo nthawi zonse." 
Psalms106:4 Mundikumbukile, Yehova, monga momwe mubvomerezana ndi anthu anu; Mundionetsa cipulumutso canu:" 
Psalms106:5 Kuti ndione cokomaco ca osankhika anu, Kuti ndikondwere naco cikondwerero ca anthu anu, Kuti ndidzitamandire pamodzi ndi colowa canu." 
Psalms106:6 Talakwa pamodzi ndi makolo athu; Tacita mphulupulu, tacita coipa." 
Psalms106:7 Makolo athu sanadziwitsa zodabwiza zanu m'Aigupto; Sanakumbukila zacifundo zanu zaunyinji; Koma anapikisana ndi Inu kunyanja, ku Nyanja Yofiira." 
Psalms106:8 Koma anawapulumutsa cifukwa ca dzina lace, Kuti adziwitse cimphamvu cace." 
Psalms106:9 Ndipo anadzudzula Nyanja Yofiira, niiphwa: Potero anawayendetsa mozama ngati m'cipululu." 
Psalms106:10 Ndipo anawapulumutsa m'dzanja la iye amene anawada, Nawaombola ku dzanja la mdani." 
Psalms106:11 Ndipo madziwo anamiza owasautsa; Sanatsala mmodzi yense. 
Psalms106:12 Pamenepo anabvomereza mau ace; Anayimbira comlemekeza. 
Psalms106:13 Koma anaiwala nchito zace msanga; Sanalindira uphungu wace: 
Psalms106:14 Popeza analaka-lakatu kucidikhako, Nayesa Mulungu m'cipululu." 
Psalms106:15 Ndipo anawapatsa copempha iwo; Koma anaondetsa mitima yao. 
Psalms106:16 Ndipo kumisasa anacita nao nsanje Mose Ndi Aroni woyerayo wa Yehova. 
Psalms106:17 Dziko lidayasama nilidameza Datani, Ndipo linafotsera gulu la Abiramu." 
Psalms106:18 Ndipo m'gulu mwao mudayaka moto; Lawi lace lidapsereza oipawo. 
Psalms106:19 Anapanga mwana wa ng'ombe ku Horebu, Nagwadira fano loyenga." 
Psalms106:20 M'mwemo anasintha ulemerero wao Ndi fanizo la ng'ombe Yakudya msipu. 
Psalms106:21 Anaiwala Mulungu mpulumutsi wao, Amene anacita zazikulu m'Aigupto;" 
Psalms106:22 Zodabwiza m'dziko la Hamu, Zoopsa ku Nyanja Yofiira." 
Psalms106:23 Potero Iye adati awaononge, Pakadapanda Mose wosankhika wace, kuima pamaso pace pagamukapo, Kubweza ukali wace ungawaononge," 
Psalms106:24 Anapeputsanso dziko lofunika, Osabvomereza mau ace;" 
Psalms106:25 Koma anadandaula m'mahema mwao, Osamvera mau a Yehova." 
Psalms106:26 Potero anawasamulira dzanja lace, Kuti awagwetse m'cipululu:" 
Psalms106:27 Kugwetsanso mbeu zao mwa amitundu, Ndi kuwabalalitsa m'maiko maiko." 
Psalms106:28 Ndipo anadzipatikiza ndi BaalaPeori, Nadyanso nsembe za akufa." 
Psalms106:29 Ndipo anamkwiyitsa nazo zocita zao; Kotero kuti mliri unawagwera. 
Psalms106:30 Pamenepo panauka Pinehasi, nacita cilango: Ndi mliriwo unaletseka." 
Psalms106:31 Ndipo adamuyesa iye wacilungamo, Ku mibadwo mibadwo ku nthawi zonse." 
Psalms106:32 Anautsanso mkwiyo wace ku madzi a Meriba, Ndipo kudaipira Mose cifukwa ca iwowa:" 
Psalms106:33 Pakuti anawawitsa mzimu wace, Ndipo analankhula zosayenera ndi milomo yace." 
Psalms106:34 Sanaononga mitunduyo ya anthu, Imene Mulungu adawauza;" 
Psalms106:35 Koma anasokonekerana nao amitundu, Naphunzira nchito zao:" 
Psalms106:36 Ndipo anatumikira mafano ao, Amene anawakhalira msampha:" 
Psalms106:37 Ndipo anapereka ana ao amuna ndi akazi nsembe ya kwa ziwanda," 
Psalms106:38 Nakhetsa mwazi wosacimwa, ndi wo mwazi wa ana ao amuna ndi akazi, Amene anawaperekera nsembe mafano a Kanani; M'mwemo analidetsa dziko ndi mwaziwo." 
Psalms106:39 Ndipo anadziipsa nazo nchito zao, Nacita cigololo nao macitidwe ao." 
Psalms106:40 Potero udayaka mkwiyo wa Yehova pa anthu ace, Nanyansidwa Iye ndi colowa cace." 
Psalms106:41 Ndipo anawapereka m'manja a amitundu; Ndipo odana nao anacita ufumu pa iwo. 
Psalms106:42 Adani ao anawasautsanso, Nawagonjetsa agwire mwendo wao." 
Psalms106:43 Iye anawalanditsa kawiri kawiri; Koma anapikisana ndi Iye mwa uphungu wao, Ndi mphulupulu zao zinawafoketsa," 
Psalms106:44 Koma anapenya nsautso yao, Pakumva kupfuula kwao:" 
Psalms106:45 Ndipo anawakumbukila cipangano cace, Naleza monga mwa kucuruka kwa cifundo cace." 
Psalms106:46 Ndipo anawacitira kuti apeze nsoni Pamaso pa onse amene adawamanga ndende. 
Psalms106:47 Tipulumutseni, Yehova, Mulungu wathu, Ndi kutisokolotsa kwa amitundu, Kuti tiyamike dzina lanu loyera, Ndi kudzitamandira naco cilemekezo canu." 
Psalms106:48 Wodala Yehova, Mulungu wa Israyeli, Kuyambira kosayamba kufikira kosatha. Ndi anthu onse anene, Amen. Haleluya," 
Psalms107:1 Yamikani Yehova pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino; Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms107:2 Atere oomboledwa a Yehova, Amene anawaombola m'dzanja la wosautsa;" 
Psalms107:3 Nawasokolotsa kumaiko, Kucokera kum'mawa ndi kumadzulo, Kumpoto ndi kunyanja." 
Psalms107:4 Anasokera m'cipululu, m'njira yopanda anthu; Osapeza mudzi wokhalamo." 
Psalms107:5 Anamva njala ndi ludzu, Moyo wao unakomoka m'kati mwao." 
Psalms107:6 Pamenepo anapfuulira kwa Yehova mumsauko mwao, Ndipo anawalanditsa m'kupsinjika kwao." 
Psalms107:7 Ndipo anawatsogolera pa njira yolunjika, Kuti amuke ku mudzi wokhalamo." 
Psalms107:8 Ayamike Yehova cifukwa ca cifundo cace, Ndi zodabwiza zace za kwa ana a anthu!" 
Psalms107:9 Pakuti akhutitsa mtima wolakalaka, Nadzaza mtima wanjala ndi zabwino." 
Psalms107:10 Iwo akukhala mumdima ndi mu mthunzi wa imfa, Omangika ndi kuzunzika ndi citsulo;" 
Psalms107:11 Popeza anapikisana nao mau a Mulungu, Napeputsa uphungu wa Wam'mwambamwamba;" 
Psalms107:12 Kotero kuti anagonjetsa mtima wao ndi cobvuta; Iwowa anakhumudwa koma panalibe mthandizi. 
Psalms107:13 Pamenepo anapfuulira kwa Yehova mumsauko mwao, Ndipo anawapulumutsa m'kupsinjika kwao." 
Psalms107:14 Anawaturutsa mumdima ndi mu mthunzi wa imfa, Nadula zomangira zao." 
Psalms107:15 Ayamike Yehova cifukwa ca cifundo cace, Ndi zodabwiza zace za kwa ana a anthu!" 
Psalms107:16 Popeza adaswa zitseko zamkuwa, Natyola mipiringidzo yacitsulo." 
Psalms107:17 Anthu opusa azunzika cifukwa ca zolakwa zao, Ndi cifukwa ca mphulupulu zao." 
Psalms107:18 Mtima wao unyansidwa naco cakudya ciri conse; Ndipo ayandikira zipata za imfa. 
Psalms107:19 Pamenepo apfuulira kwa Yehova m'kusauka kwao, Ndipo awapulumutsa m'kupsinjika kwao." 
Psalms107:20 Atumiza mau ace nawaciritsa, Nawapulumutsa ku cionongeko cao." 
Psalms107:21 Ayamike Yehova cifukwa ca cifundo cace, Ndi zodabwiza zace za kwa ana a anthu!" 
Psalms107:22 Ndipo apereke nsembe zaciyamiko, Nafotokozere nchito zace ndi kupfuula mokondwera." 
Psalms107:23 Iwo akutsikira kunyanja nalowa m'zombo, Akucita nchito zao pa madzi akuru;" 
Psalms107:24 Iwowa apenya nchito za Yehova, Ndi zodabwiza zace m'madzi ozama." 
Psalms107:25 Popeza anena, nautsa namondwe, Amene autsa mafunde ace." 
Psalms107:26 Akwera kuthambo, atsikira kozama; Mtima wao usungunuka naco coipaco." 
Psalms107:27 Adzandira napambanitsa miyendo ngati munthu woledzeta, Nathedwa nzeru konse." 
Psalms107:28 Pamenepo apfuulira kwa Yehova m'kusauka kwao, Ndipo awaturutsa m'kupsinjika kwao." 
Psalms107:29 Asanduliza namondwe akhale bata, Kotero kuti mafunde ace atonthole." 
Psalms107:30 Pamenepo akondwera, popeza pagwabata; Ndipo Iye awatsogolera kudooko afumko." 
Psalms107:31 Ayamike Yehova cifukwa ca cifundo cace, Ndi zodabwiza zace za kwa ana a anthu!" 
Psalms107:32 Amkwezenso mu msonkhano wa anthu, Namlemekeze pokhala akulu." 
Psalms107:33 Asanduliza mitsinje ikhale cipululu, Ndi akasupe a madzi akhale nthaka youma;" 
Psalms107:34 Dziko lazipatso, likhale lakhulo, Cifukwa ca coipa ca iwo okhalamo." 
Psalms107:35 Asanduliza cipululu cikhale tha wale, Ndi dziko louma likhale akasupe a madzi." 
Psalms107:36 Ndi apo akhalitsa anjala, Kuti amangeko mudzi wokhalamo anthu;" 
Psalms107:37 Nafese m'minda, naoke mipesa, Ndiyo vakubata zipatso zolemeza." 
Psalms107:38 Ndipo awadalitsa, kotero kuti, acuruka kwambiri; Osacepsanso zoweta zao." 
Psalms107:39 Koma acepanso, nawerama, Cifukwa ca cisautso, coipa ndi cisoni." 
Psalms107:40 Atsanulira cimpepulo pa akulu, Nawasokeretsa m'cipululu mopanda njira." 
Psalms107:41 Koma aika waumphawi pamsanje posazunzika, Nampatsa mabanja ngati gulu la nkhosa." 
Psalms107:42 Oongoka mtima adzaciona nadzasekera; Koma cosalungama conse citseka pakamwa pace. 
Psalms107:43 Wokhala nazo nzeru asamalire izi, Ndipo azindikire zacifundo za Yehova," 
Psalms108:1 Wakhazikika mtima wanga, Mulungu; Ndidzayimba, inde ndidzayimba zolemekeza, ndiko ulemerero wanga." 
Psalms108:2 Galamukani, cisakasa ndi zeze; Ndidzauka ndekha mamawa." 
Psalms108:3 Ndidzakuyamikani mwa mitundu ya anthu, Yehova: Ndipo ndidzayimba zakukulemekezani mwa anthu." 
Psalms108:4 Pakuti cifundo canu ncacikuru kupitirira kumwamba, Ndi coonadi canu kufikira mitambo." 
Psalms108:5 Kwezekani pamwamba pa thambo, Mulungu; Ndi ulemerero wanu pamwamba pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Psalms108:6 Kuti okondedwa anu alanditsidwe, Pulumutsani ndi dzanja lanu lamanja ndipo mutibvomereze." 
Psalms108:7 Mulungu analankhula m'ciyero cace; ndidzakondwerera: Ndidzagawa Sekemu; ndidzayesa muyeso cigwa ca Sukoti. 
Psalms108:8 Gileadi ndi wanga: Manase ndi wanga; Ndi Efraimu ndiye mphamvu ya mutu wanga; Yuda ndiye wolamulira wanga. 
Psalms108:9 Moabu ndiye mkhate wanga; Pa Edomu ndidzaponya nsapato yanga; Ndidzapfuulira Filistiya," 
Psalms108:10 Adzandifikitsa ndani m'mudzi wa m'linga? Adzanditsogolera ndani ku Edomu? 
Psalms108:11 Si ndinu Mulungu, amene mwatitaya Osaturuka nao magulu athu?" 
Psalms108:12 Tithandizeni mumsauko; Pakuti cipulumutso ca munthu ndi cabe. 
Psalms108:13 Mwa Mulungu tidzacita molimbika mtima: Ndipo Iye adzapondereza otisautsa. 
Psalms109:1 Mulungu wa cilemekezo canga, musakhale cete;" 
Psalms109:2 Pakuti pakamwa pa woipa ndi pakamwa pa cinyengo pananditsegukira; Anandilankhulira ndi m'kamwa mwa bodza. 
Psalms109:3 Ndipo anandizinga ndi mau a udani, Nalimbana nane kopanda cifukwa." 
Psalms109:4 M'malo mwa cikondi canga andibwezera udani; Koma ine, kupemphera ndiko." 
Psalms109:5 Ndipo anandisenza coipa m'malo mwa cokoma, Ndi udani m'malo mwa cikondi canga." 
Psalms109:6 Muike munthu woipa akhale mkuru wace; Ndi mdani aime pa dzanja lamanja lace. 
Psalms109:7 Ponenedwa mlandu wace aturuke wotsutsika; Ndi pemphero lace likhale ngati kucimwa. 
Psalms109:8 Masiku ace akhale owerengeka; Wina alandire udindo wace. 
Psalms109:9 Ana ace akhale amasiye, Ndi mkazi wace wamasiye." 
Psalms109:10 Ana ace akhale amcirakuyenda ndi opemphapempha; Afunefune zosowa zao kucokera m'mabwinja mwao. 
Psalms109:11 Wokongoletsa agwire zonse ali nazo; Ndi alendo alande za nchito yace. 
Psalms109:12 Pasakhale munthu wakumdtira cifundo; Kapena kucitira cokoma ana ace amasiye. 
Psalms109:13 Zidzukulu zace zidulidwe; Dzina lao lifafanizidwe mu mbadwo ukudza. 
Psalms109:14 Mphulupulu za makolo ace zikumbukike ndi Yehova; Ndi cimo la mai wace lisafafanizidwe. 
Psalms109:15 Zikhale pamaso pa Yehova cikhalire, Kuti adule cikumbukilo cao kucicotsera ku dziko lapansi." 
Psalms109:16 Cifukwa kuti sanakumbukila kucita cifundo, Koma analondola wozunzika ndi waumphawi, Ndi wosweka mtima, kuti awaphe." 
Psalms109:17 Inde, anakonda kutemberera, ndipo kudamdzera mwini; Sanakondwera nako kudalitsa, ndipo kudamkhalira kutali." 
Psalms109:18 Anabvalanso temberero ngati maraya, Ndipo lidamlowa m'kati mwace ngati madzi, Ndi ngati mafuta m'mafupa ace." 
Psalms109:19 Limkhalire ngati cobvala adzikuta naco, Ndi lamba limene adzimangirira nalo m'cuuno cimangirire," 
Psalms109:20 Ici cikhale mphotho ya otsutsana nane yowapatsa Yehova, Ndi ya iwo akunenera coipa moyo wanga." 
Psalms109:21 Koma Inu, Yehova Ambuye, mucite nane cifukwa ca dzina lanu; Ndilanditseni popeza cifundo canu ndi cabwino." 
Psalms109:22 Pakuti ine ndine wozunzika ndi waumphawi, Ndi mtima wanga walaswa m'kati mwanga." 
Psalms109:23 Ndamuka ngati mthunzi womka m'tali Ndiingidwa kwina ndi kwina ngati dzombe. 
Psalms109:24 Mabondo anga agwedezeka cifukwa ca kusala; Ndi mnofu wanga waonda posowa mafuta. 
Psalms109:25 Ndiwakhaliranso cotonza; Pakundiona apukusa mutu. 
Psalms109:26 Ndithandizeni Yehova, Mulungu wanga: Ndipulumutseni monga mwa cifundo canu;" 
Psalms109:27 Kuti adziwe kuti ici ndi dzanja lanu; Kuti Inu Yehova munacicita. 
Psalms109:28 Atemberere iwowa, koma mudalitse ndinu; Pakuuka iwowa adzacita manyazi, koma mtumiki wanu adzakondwera." 
Psalms109:29 Otsutsana nane abvale manyazi, Nadzikute naco cisokonezo cao ngati ndi copfunda." 
Psalms109:30 Ndidzayamika Yehova kwakukuru pakamwa panga; Ndi pakati pa anthu aunyinji ndidzamlemekeza. 
Psalms109:31 Popeza adzaima pa dzanja lamanja la waumphawi Kumpulumutsa kwa iwo akuweruza koipa moyo wace. 
Psalms110:1 Yehova ananena kwa Ambuye wanga, Khalani pa dzanja lamanja langa, Kufikira nditaika adani anu copondapo mapazi anu." 
Psalms110:2 Yehova adzatumiza ndodo ya mphamvu yanu kucokera ku Ziyoni; Citani ufumu pakati pa adani anu. 
Psalms110:3 Anthu anu adzadzipereka eni ace tsiku la camuna canu: M'moyera mokometsetsa, mobadwira tnatanda kuca, Muli nae mame a ubwana wanu." 
Psalms110:4 Yehova walamulira, ndipo sadzasintha, Inu ndinu wansembe kosatha Monga mwa cilongosoko ca Melikizedeke." 
Psalms110:5 Yehova pa dzanja lamanja lako Adzaphwanya mafumu tsiku la mkwiyo wace. 
Psalms110:6 Adzaweruza mwa amitundu, Adzadzaza dziko ndi mitembo; Adzaphwanya mitu m'maiko ambiri." 
Psalms110:7 Adzamwa ku mtsinje wa panjira; Cifukwa cace adzaweramutsa mutu wace. 
Psalms111:1 Haleluya. Ndidzayamika Yehova ndi mtima wonse, Mu upo wa oongoka mtima, ndi mumsonkhano." 
Psalms111:2 Nchito za Yehova nzazikuru, Zofunika ndi onse akukondwera nazo." 
Psalms111:3 Cocita Iye nca ulemu, ndi ukuru: Ndi cilungamo cace cikhalitsa kosatha." 
Psalms111:4 Anacita cokumbukitsa zodabwiza zace; Yehova ndiye wa cisomo ndi nsoni zokoma. 
Psalms111:5 Anapatsa akumuopa Iye cakudya; Adzakumbukila cipangano cace kosatha. 
Psalms111:6 Anaonetsera anthu ace mphamvu ya nchito zace, Pakuwapatsa colowa ca amitundu." 
Psalms111:7 Nchito za manja ace ndizo caonadi ndi ciweruzo; Malangizo ace onse ndiwo okhulupirika. 
Psalms111:8 Acirikizika ku nthawi za nthawi, Acitika m'coonadi ndi cilunjiko," 
Psalms111:9 Anatumizira anthu ace cipulumutso; Analamulira cipangano cace kosatha; Dzina lace ndilo loyera ndi loopedwa. 
Psalms111:10 Kumuopa Yehova ndiko ciyambi ca nzeru; Onse akucita cotero ali naco cidziwitso cokoma; Cilemekezo cace cikhalitsa kosatha. 
Psalms112:1 Haleluya. Wodala munthu wakuopa Yehova, Wakukondwera kwambiri ndi malamulo ace," 
Psalms112:2 Mbeu yace idzakhala yamphamvu pa dziko lapansi; Mbadwo wa oongoka mtima udzadalitsidwa. 
Psalms112:3 M'nyumba mwace mudzakhala akatundu ndi cuma: Ndi cilungamo cace cikhala cikhalire. 
Psalms112:4 Kuupika kuturukira oongoka mtima mumdima; Iye ndiye wacisomo; ndi wansoni ndi wolungama. 
Psalms112:5 Wodala munthu wakudtira cifundo, nakongoletsa; Adzalimbika nao mlandu wace poweruzidwa." 
Psalms112:6 Popeza sadzagwedezeka nthawi zonse: Wolunguna adzakumbukika ku nthawi yosatha. 
Psalms112:7 Sadzaopa mbiri yoipa; Mtima wace ngwokhazikika, wakhulupirira Yehova." 
Psalms112:8 Mtima wace ngwocirikizika, sadzacita mantha, Kufikira ataona cofuna iye pa iwo omsautsa." 
Psalms112:9 Anagawagawa, anapatsa aumphawi; Cilungamo cace cikhalitsa kosatha; Nyanga yace idzakwezeka ndi ulemu." 
Psalms112:10 Woipa adzaziona, nadzapsa mtima; Adzakukuta mano, nadzasungunuka; Cokhumba oipa cidzatayika." 
Psalms113:1 Haleluya; Lemekezani, inu atumiki a Yehova; Lemekezani dzina la Yehova," 
Psalms113:2 Lodala dzina la Yehova. Kuyambira tsopano kufikira kosatha. 
Psalms113:3 Citurukire dzuwa kufikira kulowa kwace Lilemekezedwe dzina la Yehova. 
Psalms113:4 Yehova akwezeka pamwamba pa amitundu onse, Ulemerero wace pamwambamwamba." 
Psalms113:5 Akunga Yehova Mulungu wathu ndani? Amene akhala pamwamba patali," 
Psalms113:6 Nadzicepetsa apenye Zam'mwamba ndi za pa dziko lapansi. 
Psalms113:7 Amene autsa wosauka lrumcotsa kupfumbi, Nakweza waumphawi kumcotsa kudzala." 
Psalms113:8 Kuti amkhalitse pamodzi ndi akulu, Pamodzi ndi akulu a anthu ace." 
Psalms113:9 Asungitsa nyumba mkazi wosaonamwana, Akhale mai wokondwera ndi ana. Haleluya." 
Psalms114:1 M'mene Israyeli anaturuka ku Aigupto, Nyumba ya Yakobo kwa anthu a cinenedwe cacilendo;" 
Psalms114:2 Yuda anakhala malo ace oyera, Israyeli ufumu wace." 
Psalms114:3 Nyanjayo inaona, nithawa; Yordano anabwerera m'mbuyo." 
Psalms114:4 Mapiri anatumphatumpha ngati nkhosa zamphongo, Timapiri ngati ana a nkhosa." 
Psalms114:5 Unathawanji nawe, nyanja iwe? Unabwerereranji m'mbuyo, Yordano iwe?" 
Psalms114:6 Munatumpha-tumphiranji ngati nkhosa zamphongo, mapiri inu? Ngati ana a nkhosa, zitunda inu?" 
Psalms114:7 Unjenjemere, dziko lapansi iwe, pamaso pa Ambuye, Pamaso pa Mulungu wa Yakobo;" 
Psalms114:8 Amene anasanduliza thanthwe likhale thawale lamadzi, Nsangalabwi ikhale kasupe wamadzi." 
Psalms115:1 Kwa ife ai, Yehova, kwa ife ai, Koma kwa dzina lanu patsani ulemerero, Cifukwa ca cifundo canu, ndi coonadi canu." 
Psalms115:2 Aneneranji amitundu, Ali kuti Mulungu wao?" 
Psalms115:3 Koma Mulungu wathu ndiye ali m'mwamba; Acita ciri conse cimkonda. 
Psalms115:4 Mafano ao ndiwo a siliva ndi golidi, Nchito za manja a anthu." 
Psalms115:5 Pakamwa ali napo, koma osalankhula; Maso ali nao, koma osapenya;" 
Psalms115:6 Makutu ali nao, koma osamva; Mphuno ali nazo, koma osanunkhiza;" 
Psalms115:7 Manja ali nao, koma osagwira; Mapazi ali nao, koma osayenda; Kapena sanena pammero pao," 
Psalms115:8 Adzafanana nao iwo akuwapanga; Ndi onse akuwakhulupirira," 
Psalms115:9 Israyeli, khulupirira Yehova: Ndiye mthandizi wao ndi cikopa cao." 
Psalms115:10 Nyumba ya Aroni, khulupirira Yehova: Ndiye mthandizi wao, ndi cikopa cao." 
Psalms115:11 Inu akuopa Yehova, khulupirirani Yehova; Ndiye mthandizi wao ndi cikopa cao." 
Psalms115:12 Yehova watikumbukila; adzatidalitsa: Adzadalitsa nyumba ya Israyeli; Adzadalitsa nyumba ya Aroni. 
Psalms115:13 Adzadalitsa iwo akuopa Yehova, Ang'ono ndi akuru." 
Psalms115:14 Yehova akuonjezereni dalitso, Inu ndi ana anu." 
Psalms115:15 Odalitsika inu a kwa Yehova, Wakulenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi." 
Psalms115:16 Kunena za kumwamba, kumwamba ndiko kwa Yehova; Koma dziko lapansi analipereka kwa ana a anthu." 
Psalms115:17 Akufa salemekeza Yehova, Kapena ali yense wakutsikira kuli cete:" 
Psalms115:18 Koma ife tidzalemekeza Yehova Kuyambira tsopano kufikira nthawi yonse. Haleluya. 
Psalms116:1 Ndimkonda, popeza Yehova amamva, Mau anga ndi kupemba kwanga." 
Psalms116:2 Popeza amandicherera khutu lace, Cifukwa cace ndidzaitanira Iye masiku anga onse." 
Psalms116:3 Zingwe za imfa zinandizinga, Ndi zowawa za manda zinandigwira: Ndinapeza nsautso ndi cisoni." 
Psalms116:4 Pamenepo ndinaitana dzina la Yehova; Ndikuti, Yehova ndikupemphani landitsani moyo wanga." 
Psalms116:5 Yehova ngwa cifundo ndi wolungama; Ndi Mulungu wathu ngwa nsoni. 
Psalms116:6 Yehova asunga opusa; Ndidafoka ine, koma anandipulumutsa," 
Psalms116:7 Ubwere moyo wanga ku mpumulo wako; Pakuti Yehova anakucitira cokoma. 
Psalms116:8 Pakuti munalanditsa moyo wanga kuimfa, Maso anga kumisozi, Mapazi anga, ndingagwe." 
Psalms116:9 Ndidzayenda pamaso pa Yehova M'dziko la amoyo. 
Psalms116:10 Ndinakhulupirira, cifukwa cace ndinalankhula; Ndinazunzika kwambiri." 
Psalms116:11 Pofulumizidwa mtima ndinati ine, Anthu Onse nga mabodza." 
Psalms116:12 Ndidzabwezera Yehova ciani Cifukwa ca zokoma zace zonse anandicitira? 
Psalms116:13 Ndidzanyamula cikho ca cipulumutso, Ndipo ndidzaitanira dzina la Yehova," 
Psalms116:14 Ndidzacitazowindazanga za kwa Yehova, Tsopano, pamaso pa anthu ace onse." 
Psalms116:15 Imfa ya okondedwa ace Nja mtengo wace pamaso pa Yehova. 
Psalms116:16 Ndiloleni, Yehova, indetu ndine mtumiki wanu; Ndine mtumiki wanu, mwana wa mdzakazi wanu; Mwandimasulira zondimanga," 
Psalms116:17 Ndidzapereka kwa Inu nsembe yaciyamiko, Ndipo ndidzaitanira dzina la Yehova." 
Psalms116:18 Ndidzacita zowinda zanga za kwa Yehova, Tsopano, pamaso pa anthu ace onse;" 
Psalms116:19 M'mabwalo a nyumba ya Yehova, Pakati pa inu, Yerusalemu. Haleluya." 
Psalms117:1 Lemekezani Yehova, amitundu onse; Myimbireni, anthu onse." 
Psalms117:2 Pakuti cifundo cace ca pa ife ndi cacikuru; Ndi coonadi ca Yehova ncosatha. Haleluya. 
Psalms118:1 Yamikani Yehova; pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino; Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms118:2 Anene tsono Israyeli, Kuti cifundo cace ncosatha." 
Psalms118:3 Anene tsono nyumba ya Aroni, Kuti cifundo cace ncosatha." 
Psalms118:4 Anene tsono iwo akuopa Yehova, Kuti cifundo cace ncosatha." 
Psalms118:5 M'mene ndinasautsika ndinaitanira pa Yehova; Anandiyankha Dandiika motakasuka Yehova. 
Psalms118:6 Yehova ndi wanga; sindidzaopa; Adzandicitanji munthu? 
Psalms118:7 Yehova ndi wanga, mwa iwo akundithandiza; M'mwemo ndidzaona cofuna ine pa iwo akundida," 
Psalms118:8 Kuthawira kwa Yehova nkokoma Koposa kukhulupirira munthu. 
Psalms118:9 Kuthawira kwa Yehova nkokoma Koposa kukhulupirira akulu," 
Psalms118:10 Amitundu onse adandizinga, Zedi, m'dzina la Yehova ndidzawaduladula." 
Psalms118:11 Adandizinga, inde, adandizinga: Indedi, m'dzinala Yehova ndidzawaduladula." 
Psalms118:12 Adandizinga ngati njuci; Anazima ngati moto waminga; Indedi, m'dzina la Yehova ndidzawaduladula." 
Psalms118:13 Kundikankha anandikankha ndikadagwa; Koma Yehova anandithandiza. 
Psalms118:14 Yehova ndiye mphamvu yanga ndi nyimbo yanga; Ndipo anakhala cipulumutso canga. 
Psalms118:15 M'mahema a olungama muli liu lakupfuula mokondwera ndi la cipulumutso: 
Psalms118:16 Dzanja lamanja la Yehova licita mwamphamvu. 
Psalms118:17 Sindidzafa koma ndidzakhala ndi moyo, Ndipo ndidzafotokozera nchito za Yehova." 
Psalms118:18 Kulanga anandilangadi Yehova: Koma sanandipereka kuimfa ai. 
Psalms118:19 Nditsegulireni zipata za cilungamo; Ndidzalowamo, ndidzayamika Yehova." 
Psalms118:20 Cipata ca Yehova ndi ici; Olungama adzalowamo. 
Psalms118:21 Ndidzakuyamikani, popeza munandiyankha, Ndipo munakhala cipulumutso canga," 
Psalms118:22 Mwala umene omangawo anaukana Wakhala mutu wa pangondya. 
Psalms118:23 Ici cidzera kwa Yehova; Ncodabwiza ici pamaso pathu. 
Psalms118:24 Tsiku ili ndilo adaliika Yehova; Tidzasekera ndi kukondwera m'mwemo. 
Psalms118:25 Tikupemphani, Yehova, tipulumutseni tsopano; Tikupemphani, Yehova, tipindulitseni tsopano." 
Psalms118:26 Wodala wakudzayo m'dzina la Yehova; Takudalitsani kocokera m'nyumba ya Yehova. 
Psalms118:27 Yehova ndiye Mulungu, amene anatiunikira; Mangani nsembe ndi zingwe, ku nyanga za guwa la nsembe." 
Psalms118:28 Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga, ndipo ndidzakuyamikani; Ndinu Mulungu wanga, ndidzakukwezani." 
Psalms118:29 Yamikani Yehova, pakuti Iye ndiye wabwino, Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha." 
Psalms119:1 Odala angwiro m'mayendedwe ao, Akuyenda m'cilamulo ca Yehova." 
Psalms119:2 Odala iwo akusunga mboni zace, Akumfuna ndi mtima wonse;" 
Psalms119:3 Inde, sacita cosalungama; Ayenda m'njira zace." 
Psalms119:4 Inu munatilamulira. Tisamalire malangizo anu ndi cangu," 
Psalms119:5 Ha! mwenzi zitakhazikika njira zanga Kuti ndisamalire malemba anu. 
Psalms119:6 Pamenepo sindidzacita manyazi, Pakupenyerera malamulo anu onse." 
Psalms119:7 Ndidzakuyanrikani ndi mtima woongoka, Pakuphunzira maweruzo anu olungama." 
Psalms119:8 Ndidzasamalira malemba anu: Musandisiye ndithu. 
Psalms119:9 Mnyamata adzayeretsa mayendedwe ace bwanji? Akawasamalira monga mwa mau anu. 
Psalms119:10 Ndinakufunani ndi mtima wanga wonse; Ndisasokere kusiyana nao malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:11 Ndinawabisa mau anu mumtima mwanga, Kuti ndisalakwire Inu." 
Psalms119:12 Inu ndinu wodala Yehova; Ndiphunzitseni malemba anu. 
Psalms119:13 Ndinafotokozera ndi milomo yanga Maweruzo onse a pakamwa panu," 
Psalms119:14 Ndinakondwera m'njira ya mboni zanu, Koposa ndi cuma conse," 
Psalms119:15 Ndidzalingirira pa malangizo anu, Ndi kupenyerera mayendedwe anu." 
Psalms119:16 Ndidzadzikondweretsa nao malemba anu; Sindidzaiwala mau anu," 
Psalms119:17 Mucitire cokoma mtumiki wanu kuti ndikhale ndi moyo; Ndipo ndidzasamalira mau anu. 
Psalms119:18 Munditsegulire maso, kuti ndipenye Zodabwiza za m'cilamulo canu." 
Psalms119:19 Ine ndine mlendo pa dziko lapansi; Musandibisire malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:20 Mtima wanga wasweka ndi kukhumba Maweruzo anu nyengo zonse. 
Psalms119:21 Munadzudzula odzikuza otembereredwa, Iwo akusokera kusiyana nao malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:22 Mundicotsere cotonza, ndi cimpepulo; Pakuti ndinasunga mboni zanu." 
Psalms119:23 Nduna zomwe zinakhala zondineneza; Koma mtumiki wanu analingirira malemba anu. 
Psalms119:24 Mboni zanu zomwe ndizo zondikondwetsa, Ndizo zondipangira nzeru." 
Psalms119:25 Moyo wanga umamatika ndi pfumbi; Mundipatse moyo monga mwa mau anu. 
Psalms119:26 Ndinafotokozera njira zanga, ndipo munandiyankha: Mundiphunzitse malemba anu." 
Psalms119:27 Mundizindikiritse njira ya malangizo anu; Kuti ndilingalire zodabwiza zanu. 
Psalms119:28 Moyo wanga wasungunuka ndi cisoni: Mundilimbitse monga mwa mau anu. 
Psalms119:29 Mundicotsere njira ya cinyengo; Nimundipatse mwacifundo cilamulo canu. 
Psalms119:30 Ndinasankha njira yokhulupirika; Ndinaika maweruzo anu pamaso, panga," 
Psalms119:31 Ndimamatika nazo mboni zanu; Musandicititse manyazi, Yehova." 
Psalms119:32 Ndidzathamangira njira ya malamulo anu, Mutakulitsa mtima wanga." 
Psalms119:33 Mundiphunzitse, Yehova, njira ya malemba anu; Ndidzaisunga kufikira kutha kwace." 
Psalms119:34 Mundizindikiritse, ndipo ndidzasunga malamulo anu; Ndidzawasamalira ndi mtima wanga wonse." 
Psalms119:35 Mundiyendetse mopita malamulo anu; Pakuti ndikondwera m'menemo. 
Psalms119:36 Lingitsani mtima wanga ku mboni zanu, Si ku cisiriro ai." 
Psalms119:37 Mucititse mlubza maso anga ndisapenye zacabe, Mundipatse moyo mu njira yanu." 
Psalms119:38 Limbitsirani mtumiki wanu mau anu, Ndiye wodzipereka kukuopani." 
Psalms119:39 Mundipatutsire cotonza canga ndiciopaco; Popeza maweruzo anu ndi okoma. 
Psalms119:40 Taonani, ndinalira malangizo anu; Mundipatse moyo mwa cilungamo canu." 
Psalms119:41 Ndipo cifundo canu cindidzere, Yehova, Ndi cipulumutso canu, monga mwa mau anu." 
Psalms119:42 Kuti ndikhale nao mau akuyankha wonditonza; Popeza ndikhulupirira mau anu. 
Psalms119:43 Ndipo musandicotsere ndithu mau a coonadi pakamwa panga; Pakuti ndinayembekeza maweruzo anu. 
Psalms119:44 Potero ndidzasamalira malamulo anu cisamalire Ku nthawi za nthawi. 
Psalms119:45 Ndipo ndidzayenda mwaufulu; Popeza ndinafuna malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:46 Ndidzalankhulanso za umboni wanu pamaso pa mafumu, Osacitapo manyazi." 
Psalms119:47 Ndipo ndidzadzikondweretsa nao malamulo anu, Amene ndiwakonda." 
Psalms119:48 Ndidzakwezanso manja anga ku malamulo anu, amene ndiwakonda; Ndipo ndidzalingalira pa malemba anu." 
Psalms119:49 Kumbukilani mau a kwa mtumiki wanu, Amene munandiyembekezetsa nao." 
Psalms119:50 Citonthozo canga m'kuzunzika kwanga ndi ici; Pakuti mau anu anandipatsa moyo. 
Psalms119:51 Odzikuza anandinyoza kwambiri: Koma sindinapatukanso naco cilamulo canu. 
Psalms119:52 Ndinakumbukila maweruzo anu kuyambira kale, Yehova, Ndipo ndinadzitonthoza." 
Psalms119:53 Ndinasumwa kwakukuru, Cifukwa ca oipa akusiya cilamulo canu." 
Psalms119:54 Malemba anu anakhala nyimbo zanga M'nyumba ya ulendo wanga," 
Psalms119:55 Usiku ndinakumbukila dzina lanu, Yehova, Ndipo ndinasamalira cilamulo canu." 
Psalms119:56 Ici ndinali naco, Popeza ndinasunga malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:57 Yehova ndiye gawo langa: Ndinati ndidzasunga mau anu. 
Psalms119:58 Ndinapemba pankhope panu ndi mtima wanga wonse: Mundicitire cifundo monga mwa mau anu. 
Psalms119:59 Ndinaganizira njira zanga, Ndipo ndinabweza mapazi anga atsate mboni zanu." 
Psalms119:60 Ndinafulumira, osacedwa, Kusamalira malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:61 Anandikulunga nazo zingwe za oipa; Koma sindinaiwala cilamulo canu. 
Psalms119:62 Pakati pa usiku ndidzauka kukuyamikani Cifukwa ca maweruzo anu olungama. 
Psalms119:63 Ine ndine wakuyanjana nao onse akukuopani, Ndi iwo akusamalira malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:64 Dziko lapansi lidzala naco cifundo canu, Yehova; Mundiphunzitse malemba anu." 
Psalms119:65 Munacitira mtumiki wanu cokoma, Yehova, Monga mwa mau anu." 
Psalms119:66 Mundiphunzitse cisiyanitso ndi nzeru; Pakuti ndinakhulupirira malamulo anu. 
Psalms119:67 Ndisanazunzidwe ndinasokera; Koma tsopano ndisamalira mau anu. 
Psalms119:68 Inu ndinu wabwino, ndi wakucita zabwino; Mundiphunzitse malemba anu." 
Psalms119:69 Odzikuza anandipangira bodza: Ndidzasunga malangizo anu ndi mtima wanga wonse. 
Psalms119:70 Mtima wao unona ngati mafuta; Koma ine ndikondwera naco cilamulo canu. 
Psalms119:71 Kundikomera kuti ndinazunzidwa; Kuti ndiphunzire malemba anu. 
Psalms119:72 Cilamulo ca pakamwa panu cindikomera Koposa golidi ndi siliva zikwi zikwi. 
Psalms119:73 Manja anu anandilenga nandiumba; Mundizindikiritse, kuti ndiphunzire malemba anu." 
Psalms119:74 Iwo amene akuopani adzandiona ine nadzakondwera; Popeza ndayembekezera mau anu; 
Psalms119:75 Ndidziwa kuti maweruzo anu ndiwo olungama, Yehova, Ndi kuti munandizunza ine mokhulupirika." 
Psalms119:76 Cifundo canu cikhaletu cakunditonthoza, ndikupemphani, Monga mwa mau anu kwa mtumiki wanu." 
Psalms119:77 Nsoni zokoma zanu zindidzere, kuti ndikhale ndi moyo; Popeza cilamulo canu cindikondweretsa." 
Psalms119:78 Odzikuza acite manyazi, popeza anandicitira monyenga ndi bodza: Koma ine ndidzalingalira malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:79 Iwo akuopa Inu abwere kwa ine, Ndipo adzadziwa mboni zanu." 
Psalms119:80 Mtima wanga ukhale wangwiro m'malemba anu; Kuti ndisacite manyazi. 
Psalms119:81 Moyo wanga unakomoka ndi kukhumba cipulumutso canu: Ndinayembekezera mau anu. 
Psalms119:82 Maso anga anatha mphamvu ndi kukhumba mau anu, Ndikuti, Mudzanditonthoza liti?" 
Psalms119:83 Popeza ndakhala ngati thumba lofukirira; Koma sindiiwala malemba anu. 
Psalms119:84 Masiku a mtumiki wanu ndiwo angati? Mudzaweruza liti iwo akundilondola koipa? 
Psalms119:85 Odzikuza anandikumbira mbuna, Ndiwo osasamalira cilamulo canu." 
Psalms119:86 Malamulo anu onse ngokhulupirika; Andilondola nalo bodza; ndithandizeni. 
Psalms119:87 Akadandithera pa dziko lapansi; Koma ine sindinasiya malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:88 Mundipatse moyo monga mwa cifundo canu; Ndipo ndidzasamalira mboni ya pakamwa panu," 
Psalms119:89 Mau anu aikika kumwamba, Kosatha, Yehova." 
Psalms119:90 Cikhulupiriko canu cifikira mibadwo mibadwo; Munakhazikitsa dziko lapansi, ndipo likhalitsa." 
Psalms119:91 Kunena za maweruzo anu alimbikira kufikira lero; Pakuti onsewa ndiwo atumiki anu. 
Psalms119:92 Cilamulo canu cikadapanda kukhala cikondweretso canga, Ndikadatayika m'kuzunzika kwanga." 
Psalms119:93 Sindidzaiwala malangizo anu nthawi zonse; Popeza munandipatsa nao moyo. 
Psalms119:94 Ine ndine wanu, ndipulumutseni Pakuti ndinafuna malangizo anu." 
Psalms119:95 Oipa anandilalira kundiononga; Koma ndizindikira mboni zanu. 
Psalms119:96 Ndinapenya malekezero ace a ungwiro wonse; Koma lamulo lanu ndi lotakasuka ndithu. 
Psalms119:97 Ha! Ndikondadi cilamulo canu; Ndilingiriramo ine tsiku lonse. 
Psalms119:98 Malamulo anu andipatsa nzeru yakuposa adani anga; Pakuti akhala nane cikhalire. 
Psalms119:99 Ndiri nayo nzeru yakuposa aphunzitsi anga onse; Pakuti ndilingalira mboni zanu. 
Psalms119:100 Ndizindikira koposa okalamba Popeza ndinasunga malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:101 Ndinaletsa mapazi anga njira iri yonse yoipa, Kuti ndisamalire mau anu." 
Psalms119:102 Sindinapatukana nao maweruzo anu; Pakuti Inu munandiphunzitsa. 
Psalms119:103 Mau anu azunadi powalawa ine! Koposa uci m'kamwa mwanga. 
Psalms119:104 Malangizo anu andizindikiritsa; Cifukwa cace ndidana nao mayendedwe onse acinyengo," 
Psalms119:105 Mau anu ndiwo nyali ya ku mapazi anga, Ndi kuunika kwa panjira panga," 
Psalms119:106 Ndinalumbira, ndipo ndinatsimikiza mtima, Kuti ndidzasamalira maweruzo anu olungama." 
Psalms119:107 Ndazunzika kwambiri: Ndipatseni moyo, Yehova, monga mwa mau anu." 
Psalms119:108 Landirani, Yehova, zopereka zaufulu za pakamwa panga, Ndipo ndiphunzitseni maweruzo anu." 
Psalms119:109 Moyo wanga ukhala m'dzanja langa cikhalire; Koma sindiiwala cilamulo canu. 
Psalms119:110 Oipa anandichera msampha; Koma sindinasokera m'malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:111 Ndinalandira mboni zanu zikhale colandira cosatha; Pakuti ndizo zokondweretsa mtima wanga. 
Psalms119:112 Ndinalingitsa mtima wanga ucite malemba anu, Kosatha, kufikira cimatiziro." 
Psalms119:113 Ndidana nao a mitima iwiri; Koma ndikonda cilamulo canu. 
Psalms119:114 Inu ndinu pobisalapo panga, ndi cikopa canga; Ndiyembekezera mau anu." 
Psalms119:115 Mundicokere ocita zoipa inu; Kuti ndisunge malamulo a Mulungu wanga. 
Psalms119:116 Mundicirikize monga mwa mau anu, kuti ndikhale ndi moyo; Ndipo ndisacite manyazi pa ciyembekezo canga." 
Psalms119:117 Mundigwirizize ndipo ndidzapulumutsidwa, Ndipo ndidzasamalira malemba anu cisamalire." 
Psalms119:118 Mupepulaonseakusokeram'malemba anu; Popeza cinyengo cao ndi bodza. 
Psalms119:119 Mucotsa oipa onse a pa dziko lapansi ngati mphala: Cifukwa cace ndikonda mboni zanu. 
Psalms119:120 Thupi langa linjenjemera ndi kuopa Inu; Ndipo ndicita mantha nao maweruzo anu. 
Psalms119:121 Ndinacita ciweruzo ndi cilungamo; Musandisiyira akundisautsa. 
Psalms119:122 Mumkhalire cikole mtumiki wanucimkomere; Odzikuza asandisautse. 
Psalms119:123 Maso anga anatha mphamvu pafuna cipulumutso canu, Ndi mau a cilungamo canu." 
Psalms119:124 Mucitire mtumiki wanu monga mwa cifundo canu, Ndipo ndiphunzitseni malemba anu," 
Psalms119:125 Ine ndine mtumiki wanu, ndizindikiritseni; Kuti ndidziwe mboni zanu." 
Psalms119:126 Yafika nyengo yakuti Yehova acite kanthu; Pakuti anaswa cilamulo canu. 
Psalms119:127 Cifukwa cace ndikonda malamulo anu Koposa golidi, Inde golidi woyengeka," 
Psalms119:128 Cifukwa cace ndiyesa ngolunjika malangizo anu onse akunena zonse; Koma ndidana nazo njira zonse zonyenga. 
Psalms119:129 Mboni zanu nzodabwiza; Cifukwa cace moyo wanga uzisunga," 
Psalms119:130 Potsegulira mau anu paunikira; Kuzindikiritsa opusa. 
Psalms119:131 Ndinatsegula pakamwa panga, ndi kupuma wefu wefu; Popeza ndinakhumba malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:132 Munditembenukire, ndi kundicitira cifundo, Monga mumatero nao akukonda dzina lanu." 
Psalms119:133 Kfiazikitsanimapaziangam'mau anu; Ndipo zisandigonjetse zopanda pace ziri zonse. 
Psalms119:134 Mundiombole ku nsautso ya munthu: Ndipo ndidzasamalira malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:135 Muwalitse nkhope yanu pa mtumiki wanu; Ndipo mundiphunzitse malemba anu. 
Psalms119:136 Maso anga atsitsa mitsinje ya madzi, Popeza sasamalira cilamulo canu." 
Psalms119:137 Inu ndinu wolungama, Yehova, Ndipo maweruzo anu ndiwo olunjika." 
Psalms119:138 Mboni zanuzo mudazilamulira Ziri zolungama ndi zokhulupirika ndithu. 
Psalms119:139 Cangu canga cinandithera, Popeza akundisautsa anaiwala mau anu." 
Psalms119:140 Mau anu ngoyera ndithu; Ndi mtumiki wanu awakonda. 
Psalms119:141 Wamng'ono ine, ndi wopepulidwa; Koma sindiiwala malemba anu." 
Psalms119:142 Cilungamo canu ndico cilungamo cosatha; Ndi cilamulo canu ndico coonadi. 
Psalms119:143 Kusautsika ndi kupsinjika kwandigwera; Koma malamulo anu ndiwo ondikondweretsa ine. 
Psalms119:144 Mboni zanu ndizo zolungama kosatha; Mundizindikiritse izi, ndipo ndidzakhala ndi moyo." 
Psalms119:145 Ndinaitana ndi mtima wanga wonse; mundiyankhe, Yehova; Ndidzasunga malemba anu." 
Psalms119:146 Ndinaitanira Inu; ndipulumutseni, Ndipo ndidzasamalira mboni zanu." 
Psalms119:147 Ndinapfuula kusanace: Ndinayembekezera mau anu. 
Psalms119:148 Maso anga anakumika malonda a usiku, Kuti ndilingirire mau anu." 
Psalms119:149 Imvani liu langa monga mwa cifundo canu; Mundipatse moyo monga mwa kuweruza kwanu, Yehova." 
Psalms119:150 Otsata zaciwembu andiyandikira; Akhala kutali ndi cilamulo canu. 
Psalms119:151 Inu muli pafupi, Yehova; Ndipo malamulo anu onse ndiwo coonadi," 
Psalms119:152 Kuyambira kale ndinadziwa mu mboni zanu, Kuti munazikhazika kosatha," 
Psalms119:153 Penyani kuzunzika kwanga, nimundilanditse; Pakuti sindiiwala cilamulo canu." 
Psalms119:154 Mundinenere mlandu wanga, nimundiombole; Mundipatse moyo monga mwa mau anu." 
Psalms119:155 Cipulumutso citalikira oipa; Popeza safuna malemba anu. 
Psalms119:156 Zacifundo zanu ndi zazikuru, Yehova; Mundipatse moyo monga mwa maweruzo anu." 
Psalms119:157 Ondilondola ndi ondisautsa ndiwoambiri; Koma sindinapatukana nazo mboni zanu. 
Psalms119:158 Ndinapenya ocita monyenga, ndipo ndinanyansidwa nao; Popeza sasamalira mau anu." 
Psalms119:159 Penyani kuti ndikonda malangizo anu; Mundipatse moyo, Yehova, monga mwa cifundo canu." 
Psalms119:160 Ciwerengero ca mau anu ndico coonadi; Ndi maweruzo anu olungama onse akhala kosatha. 
Psalms119:161 Nduna zinandilondola kopanda cifukwa; Koma mtima wanga ucita mantha nao mau anu. 
Psalms119:162 Ndikondwera nao mau anu, Ngati munthu wakupeza zofunkha zambiri." 
Psalms119:163 Ndidana nalo bodza ndi kunyansidwa nalo; Koma ndikonda cilamulo canu. 
Psalms119:164 Ndikulemekezani kasanu ndi kawiri, tsiku limodzi, Cifukwa ca maweruzo anu alungama." 
Psalms119:165 Akukonda cilamulo canu ali nao mtendere wambiri; Ndipo alibe cokhumudwitsa. 
Psalms119:166 Ndinayembekeza cipulumutso canu, Yehova, Ndipo ndinacita malamulo anu." 
Psalms119:167 Moyo wanga unasamalira mboni zanu; Ndipo ndizikonda kwambiri. 
Psalms119:168 Ndinasamalira malangizo anu ndi mboni zanu; Popeza njira zanga zonse ziri pamaso panu," 
Psalms119:169 Kupfuula kwanga kuyandikire pamaso pano, Yehova; Mundizindikiritse monga mwa mau anu." 
Psalms119:170 Kupemba kwanga kudze pamaso panu; Mundilanditse monga mwa mau anu. 
Psalms119:171 Milomo yanga iturutse cilemekezo; Popeza mundiphunzitsa malemba anu. 
Psalms119:172 Lilime langa liyimbire mau anu; Pakuti malamulo anu onse ndiwo olungama. 
Psalms119:173 Dzanja lanu likhale lakundithandiza Popezandinasankha malangizo anu. 
Psalms119:174 Ndinakhumba cipulumutso canu, Yehova; Ndipo cilamulo canu ndico condikondweretsa." 
Psalms119:175 Mzimu wanga ukhale ndi moyo, ndipo udzakulemekezani; Ndipo maweruzo anu andithandize." 
Psalms119:176 Ndinasocera ngati nkhosa yotayika; funani mtumiki wanu; Pakuti sindiiwala malamulo anu. 
Psalms120:1 Ndinapfuulira kwa Yehova mu msauko wanga, Ndipo anandibvomereza," 
Psalms120:2 Yehova, landitsani moyo wanga ku milomo ya mabodza, Ndi ku lilime lonyenga." 
Psalms120:3 Adzakuninkhanji, adzakuonjezeranji, Lilime lonyenga iwe?" 
Psalms120:4 Mibvi yakuthwa ya ciphona. Ndi makara tsanya. 
Psalms120:5 Tsoka ine, kuti ndiri mlendo m'Meseke, Kuti ndigonera m'mahema a Kedara!" 
Psalms120:6 Moyo wanga unakhalitsa nthawi Pamodzi ndi iye wakudana nao mtendere. 
Psalms120:7 Ine ndikuti, Mtendere; Koma polankhula ine, iwowa akuti, Nkhondo." 
Psalms121:1 Ndikweza maso anga kumapiri: Thandizo langa lidzera kuti? 
Psalms121:2 Thandizo langa lidzera kwa Yehova, Wakulenga zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi." 
Psalms121:3 Sadzalola phazi lako literereke: Iye amene akusunga sadzaodzera. 
Psalms121:4 Taonani, wakusunga Israyea Sadzaodzera kapena kugona." 
Psalms121:5 Yehova ndiye wakukusunga; Yehova ndiye mthunzi wako wa ku dzanja lako lamanja. 
Psalms121:6 Dzuwa silidzawamba usana, Mwezi sudzakupanda usiku." 
Psalms121:7 Yehova adzakusunga kukucotsera zoipa ziri zonse; Adzasunga moyo wako. 
Psalms121:8 Yehova adzasungira kuturuka kwako ndi kulowa kwako, Kuyambira tsopano kufikira nthawi zonse." 
Psalms122:1 Ndinakondwera m'mene ananena nane, Tiyeni ku nyumba ya Yehova." 
Psalms122:2 Mapazi athu alinkuima M'zipata zanu, Yerusalemu." 
Psalms122:3 Yerusalemu anamangidwa Ngati mudzi woundana bwino: 
Psalms122:4 Kumene akwerako mafuko, ndiwo mafuko a Yehova; Akhale mboni ya kwa Israyeli, Ayamike dzina la Yehova." 
Psalms122:5 Pakuti pamenepo anaika mipando ya ciweruzo, Mipando ya nyumba ya Davide." 
Psalms122:6 Mupempherere mtendere wa Yerusalemu; Akukonda inu adzaona phindu. 
Psalms122:7 M'linga mwako mukhale mtendere, M'nyumba za mafumu mukhale phindu." 
Psalms122:8 Cifukwa ca abale anga ndi mabwenzi anga, Ndidzanena tsopano, Mukhale mtendere mwa inu." 
Psalms122:9 Cifukwa ca nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wathu Ndidzakufunira zokoma," 
Psalms123:1 Ndikweza maso anga kwa Inu, Kwa Inu wakukhala kumwamba." 
Psalms123:2 Taonani, monga maso a anyamata ayang'anira dzanja la ambuye ao, Monga maso a adzakazi ayang'anira dzanja la mbuye wao wamkazi: Momwemo maso athu ayang'anira Yehova Mulungu wathu, Kufikira aticitira cifundo." 
Psalms123:3 Muticitire cifundo, Yehova, muticitire cifundo; Pakuti takhuta kwambiri ndi mnyozo." 
Psalms123:4 Moyo wathu wakhuta ndithu Ndi kuseka kwa iwo osasowa kanthu, Ndi mnyozo wa odzikuza." 
Psalms124:1 Akadapanda kukhala nafe Yehova, Anene tsono Israyeli;" 
Psalms124:2 Akadapanda kukhala nafe Yehova, Pakutiukira anthu:" 
Psalms124:3 Akadatimeza amoyo, Potipsera mtima wao." 
Psalms124:4 Akadatimiza madziwo, Mtsinje ukadapita pa moyo wathu;" 
Psalms124:5 Madzi odzikuza akadapita pa moyo wathu. 
Psalms124:6 Alemekezedwe Yehova, Amene sanatipereka kumano kwao tikhale cakudya cao." 
Psalms124:7 Moyo wathu unaonjoka ngati mbalame mu msampha wa msodzi; Msampha unatyoka ndi ife tinaonioka. 
Psalms124:8 Thandizo lathu liri m'dzina la Yehova, Wolenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi." 
Psalms125:1 Iwo akukhulupirira Yehova Akunga phiri la Ziyoni, losasunthika, likhazikika kosatha," 
Psalms125:2 Monga mapiri azinga Yerusalemu, Momwemo Yehova azinga anthu ace, Kuyambira tsopano kufikira nthawi zonse." 
Psalms125:3 Pakuti ndodo yacifumu ya coipa siidzapumula pa gawo la olungama; Kuti olungama asaturutse dzanja lao kucita cosalungama," 
Psalms125:4 Citirani cokoma, Yehova, iwo okhala okoma; Iwo okhala oongoka mumtima mwao." 
Psalms125:5 Koma iwo akupatuka kutsata njira zao zokhotakhota, Yehova adzawacotsa pamodzi ndi ocita zopanda pace. Mtendere ukhale pa Israyeli." 
Psalms126:1 Pobweza Yehova ukapolo wa Ziyoni, Tinakhala ngati anthu akulota." 
Psalms126:2 Pamenepo pakamwa pathu panadzala ndi kuseka, Ndi lilime lathu linapfuula mokondwera; Pamenepo anati mwa amitundu, Yehova anawacitira iwo zazikuru," 
Psalms126:3 Yehova anaticitira ife zazikuru; Potero tikhala okondwera. 
Psalms126:4 Bwezani ukapolo wathu, Yehova, Ngati mitsinje ya ku Mwera." 
Psalms126:5 Akubzala ndi misozi adzatuta ndi kupfuula mokondwera. 
Psalms126:6 Iye amene ayendayenda nalira, ponyamula mbeu yakufesa; Adzabweranso ndithu ndi kupfuula mokondwera, alikunyamula mitolo yace." 
Psalms127:1 Akapanda kumanga nyumba Yehova, Akuimanga agwiritsa nchito cabe; Akapanda kusunga mudzi Yehoya, Mlonda adikira cabe." 
Psalms127:2 Kuli cabe kwa inu Rulawirira mamawa ndi kusagonerapo madzulo, Kudya mkate wosautsa kuupeza; Kuli tero kuti izi apatsa okondedwa ace ngati m'tulo." 
Psalms127:3 Taonani ana ndiwo colandira ca kwa Yehova; Cipatso ca m'mimba ndico mphotho yace. 
Psalms127:4 Ana a ubwana wace wa munthu Akunga mibvi m'dzanja lace la ciphona. 
Psalms127:5 Wodala munthu amene anadzaza nayo phodo lace: Sadzacita manyazi iwo, Pakulankhula nao adani kucipata."
