Psalms128:1 Wodala yense wakuopa Yehova, Wakuyenda m'njira zace." 
Psalms128:2 Pakuti udzadya za nchito ya manja ako; Wodala iwe, ndipo kudzakukomera." 
Psalms128:3 Mkazi wako adzanga mpesa wopatsa m'mbali za nyumba yako; Ana ako adzanga timitengo ta azitona pozinga podyera pako. 
Psalms128:4 Taonani, m'mwemo adzadalitsika Munthu wakuopa Yehova." 
Psalms128:5 Yehova adzakudalitsa ali m'Ziyoni Ndipo udzaona zokoma za Yerusalemu masiku onse a moyo wako. 
Psalms128:6 Inde, udzaona zidzukulu zako. Mtendere ukhale ndi Israyeli." 
Psalms129:1 Anandisautsa kawiri kawiri kuyambira ubwana wanga, Anene tsono Israyeli;" 
Psalms129:2 Anandisautsa kawiri kawiri kuyambira ubwana wanga; Koma sanandilaka. 
Psalms129:3 Olima analima pamsana panga; Anatalikitsa mipere yao. 
Psalms129:4 Yehova ndiye wolungama; Anadulatu zingwe za oipa. 
Psalms129:5 Acite manyazi nabwerere m'mbuyo. Onse akudana naye Ziyoni. 
Psalms129:6 Akhale ngati udzu womera patsindwi, Wakufota asanauzule;" 
Psalms129:7 Umene womweta sadzaza nao dzanja lace, Kapena womanga mitolo sakupatira manja." 
Psalms129:8 Angakhale opitirirapo sanena, Dalitso la Mulungu likhale pa inu; Tikudalitsani m'dzina la Yehova." 
Psalms130:1 M'mozamamo ndinakupfuulirani, Yehova." 
Psalms130:2 Ambuye, imvani liu langa; Makutu anu akhale cimverere Mau a kupemba kwanga." 
Psalms130:3 Mukasunga mphulupulu, Yehova, Adzakhala ciriri ndani, Ambuye?" 
Psalms130:4 Koma kwa Inu kuli cikhululukiro, Kuti akuopeni." 
Psalms130:5 Ndilindira Yehova, moyo wanga ulindira, Ndiyembekeza mau ace." 
Psalms130:6 Moyo wanga uyang'anira Ambuye, Koposa alonda matanda kuca; Inde koposa alonda matanda kuca." 
Psalms130:7 Israyeli, uyembekezere Yehova; Cifukwa kwa Yehova kuli cifundo, Kwaonso kucurukira ciombolo." 
Psalms130:8 Ndipo adzaombola Israyeli Ku mphulupulu zace zonse. 
Psalms131:1 Yehova, mtima wanga sunadzikuza Ndi maso anga sanakwezeka; Ndipo sindinatsata zazikuru, Kapena zodabwiza zondiposa." 
Psalms131:2 Indedi, ndinalinganiza ndi kutontholetsa moyo wanga; Ngati mwana womletsa kuyamwa amace, Moyo wanga ndiri nao ngati mwana womletsa kuyamwa." 
Psalms131:3 Israyeli, uyembekezere Yehova, Kuyambira tsopano kufikira kosatha." 
Psalms132:1 Yehova, kumbukilani Davide Kuzunzika kwace konse;" 
Psalms132:2 Kuti analumbira Yehova, Nawindira Wamphamvuyo wa Yakobo, ndi kuti," 
Psalms132:3 Ngati ndidzalowa pakhomo pa nyumba yanga, Ngati ndidzakwera pa kama logonapo;" 
Psalms132:4 Ngati ndidzalola maso anga agone, Kapena zikope zanga ziodzere;" 
Psalms132:5 Kufikira nditapezera Yehova malo, Cokhalamo Wamphamvuyo wa Yakobo?" 
Psalms132:6 Taonani, tinacimva m'Efrata; Tinacipeza ku cidikha ca kunkhalango." 
Psalms132:7 Tidzalowa mokhalamo Iye; Tidzagwadira ku mpando wa mapazi ace. 
Psalms132:8 Ukani, Yehova, lowani ku mpumulo wanu; Inu ndi hema wa mphamvu yanu," 
Psalms132:9 Ansembe anu abvale cilungamo; Ndi okondedwa anu apfuule mokondwera. 
Psalms132:10 Cifukwa ca Davide mtumiki wanu Musabweze nkhope ya wodzozedwa wanu. 
Psalms132:11 Yehova analumbira Davide zoona; Sadzalibweza; ndi kuti, Wa iwo okhala zipatso za thupi lako ndidzaika pa mpando wacifumu wako." 
Psalms132:12 Ana ako akasunga cipangano canga Ndi mboni yanga imene ndidzawaphunzitsa, Ana aonso adzakhala pa mpando wanu ku nthawi zonse," 
Psalms132:13 Pakuti Yehova anasankha Ziyoni; Analikhumba likhale pokhala pace; ndi kuti," 
Psalms132:14 Pampumulo panga mpano posatha: Pano ndidzakhala; pakuti ndakhumbapo. 
Psalms132:15 Ndidzadalitsatu cakudya cace; Aumphawi ace ndidzawakhutitsa ndi mkate. 
Psalms132:16 Ndipo ansembe ace ndidzawabveka ndi cipulumutso: Ndi okondedwa ace adzapfuulitsa mokondwera. 
Psalms132:17 Apo ndidzaphukitsira Davide nyanga; Ndak onzeraru wodzozedwa wanga nyali. 
Psalms132:18 Ndidzawabvekaadani ace ndi manyazi Koma pa iyeyu korona wace adzambveka. 
Psalms133:1 Onani, nkokoma ndi kokondweretsa ndithu Kuti abale akhale pamodzi!" 
Psalms133:2 Ndiko ngati mafuta a mtengo wace pamutu, Akutsikira ku ndebvu, Inde ku ndebvu za Aroni; Akutsikira ku mkawo wa zobvala zace" 
Psalms133:3 Ngati mame a ku Hermoni, Akutsikira pa mapiri a Ziyoni: Pakuti pamenepo Yehova analamulira dalitsolo, Ndilo moyo womka muyaya," 
Psalms134:1 Taonani, lemekezani Yehova, atumiki a Yehova inu nonse, Akuimirira m'nyumba ya Yehova usiku," 
Psalms134:2 Kwezani manja anu ku malo oyera, Nimulemekeze Yehova." 
Psalms134:3 Yehova, ali m'Ziyoni, akudalitseni; Ndiye amene analenga kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi." 
Psalms135:1 Haleluya; Lemekezani dzina la Yehova; Lemekezani inu atumiki a Yehova: 
Psalms135:2 Inu akuimirira m'nyumba ya Yehova, M'mabwalo a nyumba ya Mulungu wathu." 
Psalms135:3 Lemekezani Yehova; pakuti Yehova ndiye wabwino; Muyimbire zolemekeza dzina lace; pakuti nkokondweretsa kutero. 
Psalms135:4 Pakuti Yehova anadzisankhira Yakobo, Israyeli, akhale cuma cace ceni ceni." 
Psalms135:5 Pakuti ndidziwa kuti Yehova ndi wamkuru, Ndi Ambuye wathu aposa milungu yonse." 
Psalms135:6 Ciri conse cimkonda Yehova acicita, Kumwamba ndi pa dziko lapansi, m'nyanja ndi mozama monse." 
Psalms135:7 Akweza mitambo icokere ku malekezero a dziko lapansi; Ang'animitsa mphezi zidzetse mvula; Aturutsa mphepo mosungira mwace. 
Psalms135:8 Anapanda oyamba a Aigupto, Kuyambira munthu kufikira zoweta." 
Psalms135:9 Anatumiza zizindikilo ndi zodabwiza pakati pako, Aigupto iwe, Pa Farao ndi pa omtumikira onse." 
Psalms135:10 Ndiye amene anapanda amitundu ambiri. Napha mafumu amphamvu; 
Psalms135:11 Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori, Ndi Ogi mfumu ya Basana, Ndi maufumu onse a Kanani:" 
Psalms135:12 Ndipo anapereka dziko lao likhale cosiyira, Cosiyira ca kwa Israyeli anthu ace." 
Psalms135:13 Dzina lanu, Yehova, likhala kosatha; Cikumbukilo canu, Yehova, kufikira mibadwo mibadwo." 
Psalms135:14 Pakuti Yehova adzaweruza anthu ace, Koma adzaleka atumiki ace." 
Psalms135:15 Mafano a amitundu ndiwo siliva ndi golidi, Nchito ya manja a anthu." 
Psalms135:16 Pakamwa ali napo koma osalankhula; Maso ali nao, koma osapenya;" 
Psalms135:17 Makutu ali nao, koma osamva; Inde, pakamwa pao palibe mpweya." 
Psalms135:18 Akuwapanga adzafanana nao; Inde, onse akuwakhulupirira." 
Psalms135:19 A nyumba ya Israyeli inu, lemekezani Yehova: A nyumba ya Aroni inu, lemekezani Yehova:" 
Psalms135:20 A nyumba ya Levi inu, lemekezani Yehova: Inu akuopa Yehova, lemekezani Yehova." 
Psalms135:21 Alemekezedwe Yehova kucokera m'Ziyoni, Amene akhala m'Yerusalemu. Haleluya," 
Psalms136:1 Yamikani Yehova pakuti ndiye wabwino: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:2 Yamikani Mulungu wa milungu: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:3 Yamikani Mbuye wa ambuye: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:4 Amene yekha acita zodabwiza zazikuru: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:5 Amene analenga zakumwamba mwanzeru: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:6 Amene anayala dziko lapansi pamwamba pa madzi: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:7 Amene analenga miuni yaikuru: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:8 Dzuwa liweruze usana: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:9 Mwezi ndi nyenyezi ziweruze usiku; Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:10 Iye amene anapandira Aaigupto ana ao oyamba: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:11 Naturutsa Israyeli pakati pao; Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:12 Ndi dzanja lamphamvu, ndi mkono wotambasuka: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha." 
Psalms136:13 Amene anagawa magawo Nyanja Yofiira: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:14 Napititsa Israyeli pakati pace; Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:15 Nakhutula Farao ndi khamu lace m'Nyanja Yofiira: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:16 Amene anatsogolera anthu ace m'cipululu: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:17 Amene anapanda mafumu akulu: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha," 
Psalms136:18 Ndipo anawapha mafumu omveka: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:19 Sihoni mfumu ya Aamori; Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:20 Ndi ogi mfumu ya Basana: Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:21 Ndipo anaperekadzikolaolikhale cosiyira; Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:22 Cosiyira ca kwa Israyeli mtumiki wace; Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:23 Amene anatikumbukila popepuka ife; Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:24 Natikwatula kwa otisautsa; Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:25 Ndiye wakupatsa nyama zonse cakudya; Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha. 
Psalms136:26 Yamikani Mulungu wa kumwamba, Pakuti cifundo cace ncosatha." 
Psalms137:1 Ku mitsinje ya ku Babulo, Kumeneko tinakhala pansi, inde tinalira, Pokumbukila Ziyoni." 
Psalms137:2 Pa msondodzi uli m'mwemo Tinapacika mazeze athu. 
Psalms137:3 Popeza pamenepo akutigwirawo anatifunsa nyimbo, Ndipo akutizunza anafuna tisekere, Ndi kuti, Mutiyimbire nyimbo imodzi ya ku Ziyoni." 
Psalms137:4 Tidati, Tidzayimba bwanji nyimbo ya Yehova M'dziko lacilendo?" 
Psalms137:5 Ndikakuiwalani, Yerusalemu, Dzanja lamanja langa liiwale luso lace." 
Psalms137:6 Lilime langa limamatike ku nsaya zanga, Ndikapanda kukumbukila inu; Ndikapanda kusankha Yerusalemu Koposa cimwemwe canga copambana." 
Psalms137:7 Yehova, kumbukilani ana a Edomu Tsiku la Yerusalemu; Amene adati, Gamulani, gamulani, Kufikira maziko ace." 
Psalms137:8 Mwana wamkazi wa ku Babulo, iwe amene udzapasulidwa; Wodala iye amene adzakubwezera cilango Monga umo unaticitira ife." 
Psalms137:9 Wodala iye amene adzagwira makanda ako, Ndi kuwaphwanya pathanthwe." 
Psalms138:1 Ndidzakuyamikani ndi mtima wangawonse; Ndidzayimba zakukulemekezani patsogolo pa milungu," 
Psalms138:2 Ndidzagwadira kuloza ku Kacisi wanu woyera, Ndi kuyamika dzina lanu, Cifukwa ca cifundo canu ndi coonadi canu; Popeza munakuzitsa mau anu koposa dzina lanu lonse." 
Psalms138:3 Tsiku loitana ine, munandiyankha, Munandilimbitsa ndi mphamvu m'moyo mwanga." 
Psalms138:4 Mafumu onse a pa dziko lapansi adzakuyamikani, Yehova, popeza adamva mau a pakamwa panu." 
Psalms138:5 Ndipo adzayimbira njira za Yehova; Pakuti ulemerero wa Yehova ndi waukuru. 
Psalms138:6 Angakhale Yehova ngwokwezeka, apenyanso wopepukayo; Koma wodzikuza amdziwira kutali." 
Psalms138:7 Ndingakhale ndiyenda pakati pa nsautso, mudzandipatsa moyo; Mudzatambasula dzanja lanu pa mkwiyo wa adani anu, Ndipo dzanja lanu lamanja lidzandipulumutsa." 
Psalms138:8 Yehova adzanditsirizira za kwa ine: Cifundo canu, Yehova, cifikira ku nthawi zonse: Musasiye nchito za manja anu." 
Psalms139:1 Munandisanthula, Yehova, nimundidziwa." 
Psalms139:2 Inumudziwakukhalakwangandi kuuka kwanga, Muzindikira lingaliro langa muli kutali." 
Psalms139:3 Muyesa popita ine ndi pogona ine, Ndi njira zanga zonse muzolowerana nazo." 
Psalms139:4 Pakuti asanafike mau pa lilime langa, Taonani, Yehova, muwadziwa onse." 
Psalms139:5 Munandizinga kumbuyo ndi kumaso, Nimunaika dzanja lanu pa ine." 
Psalms139:6 Kudziwa ici kundilaka ndi kundidabwiza: Kundikhalira patali, sindifikirako." 
Psalms139:7 Ndidzapita kuti kuzembera mzimu wanu? Kapena ndidzathawira kuti kuzembera nkhope yanu? 
Psalms139:8 Ndikakwera kumka kumwamba, muli komweko; Kapena ndikadziyalira ku Gehena, taonani, muli komweko." 
Psalms139:9 Ndikadzitengera mapiko a mbanda kuca, Ndi kukhala ku malekezero a nyanja;" 
Psalms139:10 Kungakhale komweko dzanja lanu lidzanditsogolera, Nilidzandigwira dzanja lanu lamanja." 
Psalms139:11 Ndipo ndikati, Koma mdima undiphimbe, Ndi kuunika kondizinga kukhale usiku:" 
Psalms139:12 Ungakhale mdima sudetsa pamaso panu, Koma usiku uwala ngati usana: Mdima ukunga kuunika." 
Psalms139:13 Pakuti Inu munalenga imso zanga; Munandiumba ndisanabadwe ine. 
Psalms139:14 Ndikuyamikani cifukwa kuti cipangidwe canga ncoopsa ndi codabwiza; Nchito zanu nzodabwiza; Moyo wanga ucidziwa ici bwino ndithu. 
Psalms139:15 Thupi langa silinabisikira Inu popangidwa ine mobisika, Poombedwa ine monga m'munsi mwace mwa dziko lapansi." 
Psalms139:16 Ndisanaumbidwe ine maso anu anandipenya, Ziwalo zanga zonse zinalembedwa m'buku mwanu, Masiku akuti ziumbidwe, Pakalibe cimodzi ca izo." 
Psalms139:17 Potero, Mulungu, ndiziyesa zolingalira zanu za mtengo wace ndithu! Mawerengedwe ace ndi ambirimbiri!" 
Psalms139:18 Ndikaziwerenga zicuruka koposa mcenga: Ndikauka ndikhalanso nanu. 
Psalms139:19 Indedi, mudzaomba woipa, Mulungu: Ndipo amuna inu nkhumba mwazi, cokani kwa ine." 
Psalms139:20 Popeza anena za Inu moipa, Ndi adani anu achula dzina lanu mwacabe." 
Psalms139:21 Kodi sindidana nao iwo akudana ndi Inu, Yehova? Ndipo kodi sindimva nao cisoni iwo akuukira Inu?" 
Psalms139:22 Ndidana nao ndi udani weni weni: Ndiwayesa adani. 
Psalms139:23 Mundisanthule, Mulungu, nimudziwe mtima wanga; Mundiyese nimudziwe zolingalira zanga." 
Psalms139:24 Ndipo mupenye ngati ndiri nao mayendedwe oipa, Nimunditsogolere pa njira yosatha." 
Psalms140:1 Ndilanditseni, Yehova, kwa munthu woipa; Ndisungeni kwa munthu waciwawa;" 
Psalms140:2 Amene adzipanga zoipa mumtima mwao; Masiku onse amemeza nkhondo. 
Psalms140:3 Anola lilime lao ngati njoka; Pansi pa milomo yao pali ululu wa mphiri. 
Psalms140:4 Ndilindireni Yehova, ndisalowe m'manja mwa woipa; Ndisungeni kwa munthu waciwawa; Kwa iwo akuti akankhe mapazi anga." 
Psalms140:5 Odzikuzaanandichera msampha, nandibisira zingwe; Anacha ukonde m'mphepete mwa njira; Anandichera makwekwe." 
Psalms140:6 Ndinati kwa Yehova, Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga; Mundicherere khutu mau a kupemba kwanga, Yehova." 
Psalms140:7 Yehova Ambuye, ndinu mphamvu ya cipulumutso canga, Munandiphimba mutu wanga tsiku lakulimbana nkhondo." 
Psalms140:8 Yehova, musampatse woipa zokhumba iye; Musamthandize zodzipanga zace; angadzikuze." 
Psalms140:9 Kunena za mutu wao wa iwo akundizinga, Coipa ca milomo yao ciwaphimbe." 
Psalms140:10 Makala amoto awagwere; Aponyedwe kumoto; M'maenje ozama, kuti asaukenso." 
Psalms140:11 Munthu wamlomo sadzakhazikika pa dziko lapansi; Coipa cidzamsaka munthu waciwawa kuti cimgwetse. 
Psalms140:12 Ndidziwa kuti Yehova adzanenera wozunzika mlandu, Ndi kuweruzira aumphawi," 
Psalms140:13 Indedi, olungama adzayamika dzina lanu; Oongoka mtima adzakhala pamaso panu," 
Psalms141:1 Yehova, ndaitana kwa Inu; ndifulumireni ine; Mundicherere khutu, pamene ndiitana kwa Inu." 
Psalms141:2 Pempherolanga liikike ngaticofukiza pamaso panu; Kukweza manja anga kuikike ngati nsembe ya madzulo. 
Psalms141:3 Muike mdindo pakamwa panga, Yehova; Sungani pakhomo pa milomo yanga." 
Psalms141:4 Mtima wanga usalinge ku cinthu coipa, Kucita nchito zoipa Ndi anthu akucita zopanda pace; Ndipo ndisadye zankhuli zao." 
Psalms141:5 Akandipanda munthu wolungama ndidzati ncifundo: Akandidzudzula, ndidzakuyesa mafuta a pamutu; Mutu wanga usakane: Pakuti pangakhale posautsidwa iwo ndidzawapempherera." 
Psalms141:6 Oweruza ao anagwetseka pambali pa thanthwe; Nadzamva mau anga kuti ndiwo okondweretsa. 
Psalms141:7 Mafupa athu amwazika pakamwa pa manda, Monga ngati akumba nanyimphula nthaka yapansi." 
Psalms141:8 Pakuti maso anga apenya kwanu, Yehova Ambuye; Ndithawira kwa Inu; musataye moyowanga." 
Psalms141:9 Mundisunge ndisagwe mumsampha anandicherawo, Ndisakodwe m'makwekwe a iwo ocita zopanda pace," 
Psalms141:10 Oipa agwe pamodzi m'maukonde ao, Kufikira nditapitirira ine." 
Psalms142:1 Ndipfuula nalo liu langa kwa Yehova; Ndi mau anga ndipemba kwa Yehova. 
Psalms142:2 Nditsanulirakudandaulakwanga pamaso pace; Ndionetsa msauko wanga pamaso pace. 
Psalms142:3 Pamene mzimu wanga unakomoka m'kati mwanga, munadziwa njira yanga. M'njira ndiyendamo anandichera msampha," 
Psalms142:4 Penyani ku dzanja lamanja ndipo muone; palibe wondidziwa; Pothawirapo pandisowa; palibe mmodzi wosamalira moyo wanga. 
Psalms142:5 Ndinapfuulira kwa inu, Yehova; Ndina, Inu ndinu pothawirapo panga, Gawo langa m'dziko la amoyo." 
Psalms142:6 Tamverani kupfuula kwanga; papeza ndisauka kwambiri; Ndilanditseni kwa iwo akundilondola; popeza andilaka. 
Psalms142:7 Turutsani moyo wanga m'ndende, kuti ndiyamike dzina lanu; Olungama adzandizinga; Pakuti mudzandicitira zokoma." 
Psalms143:1 Imvani pemphero langa, Yehova; ndicherere khutu kupemba kwanga; Ndiyankheni mwa cikhulupiriko canu, mwa cilungamo canu." 
Psalms143:2 Ndipo musaitane mlandu wa mtumiki wanu; Pakuti pamaso panu sipadzakhala wolungama wamoyo mmodzi yense. 
Psalms143:3 Pakuti mdani alondola moyo wanga; Apondereza pansr moyo wanga; Andikhalitsa mumdima monga iwo adafa kale lomwe. 
Psalms143:4 Potero mzimu wanga wakomoka mwa ine; Mtima wanga utenga nkhawa m'kati mwanga," 
Psalms143:5 Ndikumbukila masiku a kale lomwe; Zija mudazicita ndilingirirapo; Ndikamba pa ndekha za nchito ya manja anu. 
Psalms143:6 Nditambalitsira manja anga kwa Inu: Moyo wanga ulira Inu monga dziko lolira mvula. 
Psalms143:7 Fulumirani ndiyankheni, Yehova; mzimu wanga ukutha. Musandibisire nkhope yanu; Ndingafanane nao akutsikira kudzenje." 
Psalms143:8 Mundimvetse cifundo canu mamawa; Popeza ndikhulupirira Inu: Mundidziwitse njira ndiyendemo; Popeza ndikweza moyo wanga kwa Inu. 
Psalms143:9 Mundilanditse kwa adani anga, Yehova; Ndibisala mwa Inu." 
Psalms143:10 Mundiphunzitse cokonda Inu; popeza Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga; Mzimu wanu ndi wokoma; munditsogolere kucidikha. 
Psalms143:11 Mundipatse moyo, Yehova, cifukwa ca dzina lanu; Mwa cilungamo canu muturutse moyo wanga m'nsautso." 
Psalms143:12 Ndipo mwa cifundo canu mundidulire adani anga, Ndipo muononge onse akusautsa moyo wanga; Pakuti ine ndine mtumiki wanu." 
Psalms144:1 Wolemekezeka Yehova thanthwe langa, Wakuphunzitsa manja anga acite nkhondo, Zala zanga zigwirane nao:" 
Psalms144:2 Ndiye cifundo canga, ndi linga langa, Msanje wanga, ndi mpulumutsi wanga; Cikopa canga, ndi Iye amene ndimtama; Amene andigonjetsera anthu anga." 
Psalms144:3 Yehova, munthu ndani kuti mumdziwa? Mwana wa munthu kuti mumsamalira?" 
Psalms144:4 Munthu akunga mpweya; Masiku ace akunga mthunzi wopitirira. 
Psalms144:5 Weramutsani thambo lanu, Yehova, nimutsike: Khudzani mapiri ndipo adzafuka." 
Psalms144:6 Ng'animitsani mphezi, ndi kuwabalalitsa; Tumizani mibvi yanu, ndi kuwapitikitsa," 
Psalms144:7 Turutsani manja anu kucokera m'mwamba; Ndikwatuleni ndi kundilanditsa ku madzi akuru, Ku dzanja la alendo;" 
Psalms144:8 Amene pakamwa pao alankhula zacabe, Ndi dzanja lao lamanja ndilo dzanja lacinyengo." 
Psalms144:9 Ndidzakuyimbirani nyimbo yatsopano, Mulungu; Pa cisakasa ca zingwe khumi ndidzayimbira zakukulemekezani." 
Psalms144:10 Ndiye amene apatsa mafumu cipulumutso: Amene alanditsa Davide mtumiki wace ku lupanga loipa. 
Psalms144:11 Ndilanditseni ndi kundipulumutsa ku dzanja la alendo, Amene pakamwa pao alankhula zacabe, Ndi dzanja lao lamanja ndilo dzanja lacinyengo." 
Psalms144:12 Kuti ana athu amuna akhale ngati mmera udakula usanakhwime; Ana athu akazi ngati nsanamira za kungondya, zosema zikometsere nyumba ya mfumu." 
Psalms144:13 Kuti nkhokwe zathu zidzale, kutipatsa za mitundu mitundu; Ndi kuti nkhosa zathu ziswane zikwi zikwi, inde zikwi khumi kubusako." 
Psalms144:14 Kuti ng'ombe zathu zikhale zasenza katundu; Ndi kuti pasakhale kupasula linga kapena kuturukamo, Pasakhalenso kupfuula m'makwalala athu." 
Psalms144:15 Odala anthu akuona zotere; Odala anthu amene Mulungu wao ndi Yehova. 
Psalms145:1 Ndidzakukwezani Mulungu wanga, Mfumu; Ndipo ndidzalemekeza dzina lanu ku nthawi za nthawi." 
Psalms145:2 Masiku onse ndidzakuyamikani; Ndi kulemekeza dzina lanu ku nthawi za nthawi. 
Psalms145:3 Yehova ndi wamkulu, nayenera kulemekezedwa kwakukuru; Ndi ukulu wace ngwosasanthulika." 
Psalms145:4 Mbadwo wina udzalemekezera nchito zanu mbadwo unzace, Ndipo udzalalikira zamphamvu zanu." 
Psalms145:5 Ndidzalingalira ulemerero waukuru wa ulemu wanu, Ndi nchito zanu zodabwiza." 
Psalms145:6 Ndipo adzanenera mphamvu za nchito zanu zoopsa; Ndi ukulu wanu ndidzaufotokozera. 
Psalms145:7 Adzabukitsa cikumbukilo ca ubwino wanu waukuru, Nadzayimbira cilungamo canu." 
Psalms145:8 Yehova ndiye wacisomo, ndi wacifundo; Osakwiya msanga, ndi wa cifundo cacikuru." 
Psalms145:9 Yehova acitira cokoma onse; Ndi nsoni zokoma zace zigwera nchito zace zonse. 
Psalms145:10 Nchito zanu zonse zidzakuyamikani, Yehova; Ndi okondedwa anu adzakulemekezani." 
Psalms145:11 Adzanenera ulemerero wa ufumu wanu, Adzalankhulira mphamvu yanu;" 
Psalms145:12 Kudziwitsa ana a anthu zamphamvu zace, Ndi ulemerero waukuru wa ufumu wace." 
Psalms145:13 Ufumu wanu ndiwo ufumu womka muyaya, Ndi kuweruza kwanu kufikira mibadwo yonse yonse." 
Psalms145:14 Yehova agwiriziza onse akugwa, Naongoletsa onse owerama." 
Psalms145:15 Maso a onse ayembekeza Inu; Ndipo muwapatsa cakudya cao m'nyengo zao. 
Psalms145:16 Muniowetsa dzanja lanu, Nimukwaniritsira zamoyo zonse cokhumba cao." 
Psalms145:17 Yehova ali wolungama m'njira zace zonse, Ndi wacifundo m'nchito zace zonse." 
Psalms145:18 Yehova ali pafupi ndi onse akuitanira kwa Iye, Onse akuitanira kwa Iye m'coonadi." 
Psalms145:19 Adzacita cokhumba iwo akumuopa; Nadzamva kupfuula kwao, nadzawapulumutsa." 
Psalms145:20 Yehova asunga onse akukondana naye; Koma oipa onse adzawaononga. 
Psalms145:21 Pakamwa panga padzanena cilemekezo ca Yehova; Ndi zinthu zonse zilemekeze dzina lace loyera ku nthawi za nthawi. 
Psalms146:1 Haleluya; Ulemekeze Yehova, moyo wanga," 
Psalms146:2 Ndidzalemekeza Yehovam'moyo mwanga; Ndidzayimbira zomlemekeza Mulungu wanga pokhala ndi moyo ine. 
Psalms146:3 Musamakhulupirira zinduna, Kapena mwana wa munthu, amene mulibe cipulumutso mwa iye." 
Psalms146:4 Mpweya wace ucoka, abwerera kumka ku nthaka yace; Tsiku lomwelo zotsimikiza mtima zace zitayika." 
Psalms146:5 Wodala munthu amene akhala naye Mulungu wa Yakobo kuti amthandize, Ciyembekezo cace ciri pa Yehova, Mulungu wace;" 
Psalms146:6 Amene analenga zakumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, Nyanja ndi zonse ziri m'mwemo; Ndiye wakusunga coonadi kosatha:" 
Psalms146:7 Ndiye wakucitira ciweruzo osautsika; Ndiye wakupatsa anjala cakudya; Yehova amasula akaidi; 
Psalms146:8 Yehova apenyetsa osaona; Yehova aongoletsa onse owerama; Yehova akonda olungama; 
Psalms146:9 Yehova asunga alendo; Agwiriziza mwana wamasiye mkazi wamasiye; Koma akhotetsa njira ya oipa. 
Psalms146:10 Yehova adzacita ufumu kosatha, Mulungu wako, Ziyoni, ku mibadwo mibadwo. Haleluya." 
Psalms147:1 Haleluya; Pakuti kuyimbira zomlemekeza Mulungu wathu nkokoma; Pakuti cikondwetsa ici, cilemekezo ciyenera." 
Psalms147:2 Yehova amanga Yerusalemu; Asokolotsa otayika a Israyeli. 
Psalms147:3 Aciritsa osweka mtima, Namanga mabala ao." 
Psalms147:4 Awerenga nyenyezi momwe ziri; Azicha maina zonsezi. 
Psalms147:5 Ambuye wathu ndi wamkuru ndi wa mphamvu zambiri; Nzeru yace njosatha. 
Psalms147:6 Yehova agwiriziza ofatsa; Atsitsira oipa pansi. 
Psalms147:7 Yamikani Yehova ndi kuthira mang'ombe; Myimbireni Mulungu wathu zamlemekeza pazeze: 
Psalms147:8 Amene aphimba thambo ndi mitambo, Amene akonzera mvula nthaka, Amene aphukitsa msipu pamapiri." 
Psalms147:9 Amene apatsa zoweta cakudya cao, Ana a khungubwi alikulira." 
Psalms147:10 Mphamvu ya kavalo siimkonda: Sakondwera nayo miyendo ya munthu. 
Psalms147:11 Yehova akondwera nao akumuopa Iye, Iwo akuyembekeza cifundo cace." 
Psalms147:12 Yerusalemu, lemekezani Yehova; Ziyoni, lemekezani Mulungu wanu." 
Psalms147:13 Popeza analimbitsa mipiringidzo ya zitseko zanu: Anadalitsa ana anu m'kati mwanu. 
Psalms147:14 Ndiyeamene akhalitsamalireanu mumtendere; Akukhutitsani ndi tirigu wakuca bwino. 
Psalms147:15 Atumiza lamulo lace ku dziko lapansi; Mau ace athamanga liwiro. 
Psalms147:16 Apatsa cipale cofewa ngati ubweya; Awaza cisanu ngati phulusa. 
Psalms147:17 Aponya matalala ace ngati zidutsu: Adzaima ndani pa kuzizira kwace? 
Psalms147:18 Atumiza mau ace nazisungunula; Aombetsa mphepo yace, ayenda madzi ace." 
Psalms147:19 Aonetsa mau ace kwa Yakobo; Malemba ace, ndi maweruzo ace kwa Israyeli." 
Psalms147:20 Sanatero nao anthu amtundu wina; Ndipo za maweruzo ace, sanawadziwa. Haleluya." 
Psalms148:1 Haleluya. Lemekezani Yehova kocokera kumwamba; Mlemekezeni m'misanje. 
Psalms148:2 Mlemekezeni, angelo ace onse; Mlemekezeni, makamu ace onse." 
Psalms148:3 Mlemekezeni, dzuwa ndi mwezi; Mlemekezeni, nyenyezi zonse zaunikira." 
Psalms148:4 Mlemekezeni, m'mwambamwamba, Ndi madzi inu, a pamwamba pa thambo." 
Psalms148:5 Alemekeze dzina la Yehova; Popeza analamulira, ndipo zinalengedwa." 
Psalms148:6 Anazikhazikanso ku nthawi za nthawi; Anazipatsa cilamulo cosatumphika. 
Psalms148:7 Lemekezani Yehova kocokera ku dziko lapansi, Zinsomba inu, ndi malo ozama onse;" 
Psalms148:8 Moto ndi matalala, cipale cofewa ndi nkhungu; Mphepo ya namondwe, yakucita mau ace;" 
Psalms148:9 Mapiri ndi zitunda zonse; Mitengo yazipatso ndi yamikungudza yonse: 
Psalms148:10 Nyama za kuthengo ndi zoweta zonse; Zokwawa, ndi mbalame zakuuluka;" 
Psalms148:11 Mafumu a padziko ndi mitundu yonse ya anthu; Zinduna ndi oweruza onse a padziko; 
Psalms148:12 Anyamata ndiponso anamwali; Okalamba pamodzi ndi ana: 
Psalms148:13 Alemekeze dzina la Yehova; Pakuti dzina lace lokha ndi lokwezeka; Ulemerero wace uli pamwamba pa dziko lapansi ndi thambo. 
Psalms148:14 Ndipo anakweza nyanga ya anthu ace, Cilemekezo ca okondedwa ace onse; Ndiwo ana a Israyeli, anthu a pafupi pa Iye, Haleluya," 
Psalms149:1 Haleluya, Myimbireni Yehova nyimbo yatsopano, Ndi cilemekezo cace mu msonkhano wa okondedwa ace." 
Psalms149:2 Akondwere Israyeli mwa Iye amene anamlenga; Ana a Ziyoni asekere mwa Mfumu yao. 
Psalms149:3 Alemekeze dzina lace ndi kuthira mang'ombe; Amyimbire zomlemekeza ndi lingaka ndi zeze. 
Psalms149:4 Popeza Yehova akondwera nao anthu ace; Adzakometsa ofatsa ndi cipulumutso," 
Psalms149:5 Okondedwa ace atumphe mokondwera m'ulemu: Apfuule mokondwera pamakama pao," 
Psalms149:6 Nyimbo zakukweza Mulungu zikhale pakamwa pao, Ndi lupanga lakuthwa konse konse m'dzanja lao;" 
Psalms149:7 Kubwezera cilango akunja, Ndi kulanga mitundu ya anthu;" 
Psalms149:8 Kumanga mafumu ao ndi maunyolo, Ndi omveka ao ndi majerejede acitsulo;" 
Psalms149:9 Kuwacitira ciweruzo colembedwaco: Ulemu wa okondedwa ace onse ndi uwu. Haleluya. 
Psalms150:1 Haleluya, Lemekezani Mulungu m'malo ace oyera; Mlemekezeni m'thambo la mphamvu yace." 
Psalms150:2 Mlemekezeni cifukwa ca nchito zace zolimba; Mlemekezeni monga mwa ukulu wace waunjinji. 
Psalms150:3 Mlemekezeni ndi kulira kwa lipenga; Mlemekezeni ndi cisakasa ndi zeze. 
Psalms150:4 Mlemekezeni ndi lingaka ndi kuthira mang'ombe: Mlemekezeni ndi zoyimbira za zingwe ndi citoliro. 
Psalms150:5 Mlemekezeni ndi nsanje zomveka: Mlemekezeni ndi nsanje zoliritsa. 
Psalms150:6 Zonse zakupuma zilemekeze Yehova. Haleluya. 
Proverbs1:1 MIYAMBI ya Solomo mwana wa Davide, mfumu ya Israyeli." 
Proverbs1:2 Kudziwa nzeru ndi mwambo; Kuzindikira mau ozindikiritsa; 
Proverbs1:3 Kulandira mwambo wakusamalira macitidwe, Cilungamo, ciweruzo ndi zolunjika;" 
Proverbs1:4 Kucenjeza acibwana, Kuphunzitsa mnyamata kudziwa ndi kulingalira;" 
Proverbs1:5 Kuti wanzeru amve, naonjezere kuphunzira; Ndi kuti wozindikira afikire kuuphungu;" 
Proverbs1:6 Kuzindikira mwambi ndi tanthauzo lace, Mau a anzeru, ndi zophiphiritsa zao." 
Proverbs1:7 Kuopa Yehova ndiko ciyambi ca kudziwa; Opusa anyoza nzeru ndi mwambo. 
Proverbs1:8 Mwananga, tamva mwambo wa atate wako, Ndi kusasiya cilangizo ca amako" 
Proverbs1:9 Pakuti izi ndi korona wa cisomo pamtu pako, Ndi mkanda pakhosi pako." 
Proverbs1:10 Mwananga, akakukopa ocimwa usalole." 
Proverbs1:11 Akanena, Idza nafe, tibisalire mwazi, Tilalire osacimwa opanda cifukwa;" 
Proverbs1:12 Tiwameze ali ndi moyo ngati manda, Ali amphumphu, ngati akutsikira kudzenje;" 
Proverbs1:13 Tidzapeza cuma conse ca mtengo wace, Tidzadzaza nyumba zathu ndi zofunkha;" 
Proverbs1:14 Udzacita nafe maere, Tonse tidzakhala ndi cibeti cimodzi;" 
Proverbs1:15 Mwananga, usayende nao m'njira; Letsa phazi lako ku mayendedwe ao;" 
Proverbs1:16 Pakuti mapazi ao athamangira zoipa, Afulumira kukhetsa mwazi." 
Proverbs1:17 Pakuti kuchera msampha pamaso pa mbalame ndi cabe; 
Proverbs1:18 Ndipo awa abisalira mwazi wao wao, alalira miyoyo yao yao." 
Proverbs1:19 Mayendedwe a yense wopindula cuma monyenga ngotere; Cilanda moyo wa eni ace," 
Proverbs1:20 Nzeru ipfuula panja; Imveketsa mau ace pabwalo; 
Proverbs1:21 Iitana posonkhana anthu polowera pacipata; M'mudzi inena mau ace; 
Proverbs1:22 Kodi mudzakonda zacibwana kufikira liti, acibwana inu? Onyoza ndi kukonda kunyoza, Opusa ndi kuda nzeru?" 
Proverbs1:23 Tembenukani pamene ndikudzudzulani; Taonani, nditsanulira pa inu mzimu wanga, Ndikudziwitsani mau anga." 
Proverbs1:24 Cifukwa ndaitana, ndipo munakana; Ndatambasula dzanja langa, ndipo panalibe analabadira;" 
Proverbs1:25 Koma munapeputsa uphungu wangawonse, Ndi kukana kudzudzula kwanga." 
Proverbs1:26 Inetu ndidzacitiraciphwete tsoka lanu, Ndidzatonyola pakudza mantha anu;" 
Proverbs1:27 Pakudza mantha anu ngati mphepo yopasula, Ndi pofika tsoka lanu ngati kabvumvulu; Pakudza kwa inu bvuto ndi nsautso." 
Proverbs1:28 Pamenepo adzandiitana, koma sindidzabvomera; Adzandifunatu, osandipeza ai;" 
Proverbs1:29 Cifukwa anada nzeru, Sanafuna kuopa Yehova;" 
Proverbs1:30 Anakana uphungu wanga, Nanyoza kudzudzula kwanga konse;" 
Proverbs1:31 Momwemo adzadya zipatso za mayendedwe ao, Nadzakhuta zolingalira zao." 
Proverbs1:32 Pakuti kubwerera m'mbuyo kwa acibwana kudzawapha; Ndipo mphwai za opusa zidzawaononga. 
Proverbs1:33 Koma wondimvera ine adzakhala osatekeseka, Nadzakhala phe osaopa zoipa," 
Proverbs2:1 Mwananga, ukalandira mau anga, Ndi kusunga malamulo anga;" 
Proverbs2:2 Kucherera makutu ako kunzeru, Kulozetsa mtima wako kukuzindikira;" 
Proverbs2:3 Ukaitananso luntha, Ndi kupfuulira kuti ukazindikire;" 
Proverbs2:4 Ukaifunafuna ngati siliva, Ndi kuipwaira ngati cuma cobisika;" 
Proverbs2:5 Pompo udzazindikira kuopa Yehova Ndi kumdziwadi Mulungu. 
Proverbs2:6 Pakuti Yehova apatsa nzeru; Kudziwa ndi kuzindikira kuturuka m'kamwa mwace; 
Proverbs2:7 Iye asungira oongoka mtima nzeru yeniyeni; Ndiye cikopa ca oyenda molunjika; 
Proverbs2:8 Kuti acinjirize njira za ciweruzo, Nadikire khwalala la opatulidwa ace." 
Proverbs2:9 Pamenepo udzazindikira cilungamo ndi ciweruzo, Zolunjika ndi mayendedwe onse abwino." 
Proverbs2:10 Pakuti nzeru idzalowa m'mtima mwako, Moyo wako udzakondwera ndi kudziwa," 
Proverbs2:11 Kulingalira kudzakudikira, Kuzindikira kudzakucinjiriza;" 
Proverbs2:12 Kukupulumutsa ku njira yoipa, Kwa anthu onena zokhota;" 
Proverbs2:13 Akusiya mayendedwe olungama, Akayende m'njira za mdima;" 
Proverbs2:14 Omwe asangalala pocita zoipa, Nakondwera ndi zokhota zoipa;" 
Proverbs2:15 Amene apotoza njira zao, Nakhotetsa mayendedwe ao;" 
Proverbs2:16 Nzeru idzakupulumutsa kwa mkazi waciwerewere, Kwa mkazi wacilendo wosyasyalika ndi mau ace;" 
Proverbs2:17 Wosiya bwenzi la ubwana wace, Naiwala cipangano ca Mulungu wace;" 
Proverbs2:18 Nyumba yace itsikira kuimfa, Ndi mayendedwe ace kwa akufa;" 
Proverbs2:19 Onse akunka kwa iye sabweranso, Safika ku njira za moyo;" 
Proverbs2:20 Nzeru idzakuyendetsa m'njira ya anthu abwino, Kuti usunge mayendedwe a olungama." 
Proverbs2:21 Pakuti oongoka mtima adzakhala m'dziko, Angwiro nadzatsalamo." 
Proverbs2:22 Koma oipa adzalikhidwa m'dziko, Aciwembu adzazulidwamo." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwananga, usaiwale malamulo anga, Mtima wako usunge malangizo anga;" 
Proverbs3:2 Pakuti adzakuonjezera masiku ambiri, Ndi zaka za moyo ndi mtendere." 
Proverbs3:3 Cifundo ndi coonadi zisakusiye; Uzimange pakhosi pako; Uzilembe pamtima pako; 
Proverbs3:4 Motero udzapezakisomo ndi nzeru yabwino, Pamaso pa Mulungu ndi anthu." 
Proverbs3:5 Khulupirira Yehova ndi mtima wako wonse, Osacirikizika pa luntha lako;" 
Proverbs3:6 Umlemekeze m'njira zako zonse, Ndipo Iye adzaongola mayendedwe ako." 
Proverbs3:7 Usadziyese wekha wanzeru; Opa Yehova, nupatuke pazoipa;" 
Proverbs3:8 Mitsempha yako idzalandirapo moyo, Ndi mafupa ako uwisi." 
Proverbs3:9 Lemekeza Yehova ndi cuma cako, Ndi zinthu zako zonse zoyambirira kuca;" 
Proverbs3:10 Motero nkhokwe zako zidzangoti the, Mbiya zako zidzasefuka vinyo." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwananga, usapeputse mwambo wa Yehova, Ngakhale kutopa ndi kudzudzula kwace;" 
Proverbs3:12 Pakuti Yehova adzudzula omwe awakonda; Monga atate mwana amene akondwera naye. 
Proverbs3:13 Wodala ndi wopeza nzeru, Ndi woona luntha;" 
Proverbs3:14 Pakuti malonda a nzeru aposa malonda a siliva, Phindu lace liposa golidi woyengeka." 
Proverbs3:15 Mtengo wace uposa ngale; Ndipo zonse zikukondweretsa sizilingana naye. 
Proverbs3:16 Masiku ambiri ali m'dzanja lamanja lace; Cuma ndi ulemu m'dzanja lace lamanzere. 
Proverbs3:17 Njira zace ziri zokondweretsa, Mayendedwe ace onse ndiwo mtendere." 
Proverbs3:18 Ndiyo mtengo wa moyo wa akuigwira; Wakulumirira ngwodala. 
Proverbs3:19 Yehova anakhazika dziko ndi nzeru; Naika zamwamba ndi luntha. 
Proverbs3:20 Zakuya zinang'ambika ndi kudziwakwace; Thambo ligwetsa mame. 
Proverbs3:21 Mwananga, zisacokere ku maso ako; Sunga nzeru yeniyeni ndi kulingalira;" 
Proverbs3:22 Ndipo mtima wako udzatengapo moyo, Ndi khosi lako cisomo." 
Proverbs3:23 Pompo udzayenda m'njira yako osaopa, Osapunthwa phazi lako." 
Proverbs3:24 Ukagona, sudzacita mantha; Udzagona tulo tokondweretsa." 
Proverbs3:25 Usaope zoopsya zodzidzimutsa, Ngakhale zikadza zopasula oipa;" 
Proverbs3:26 Pakuti Yehova adzalimbitsa mtima wako, Nadzasunga phazi lako lingakodwe." 
Proverbs3:27 Oyenera kulandira zabwino usawamane; Pokhoza dzanja lako kuwacitira zabwino. 
Proverbs3:28 Usanene kwa mnzako, Ukabwerenso, Ndipo mawa ndidzakupatsa; Pokhala uli nako kanthu." 
Proverbs3:29 Usapangire mnzako ciwembu; Popeza akhala nawe pafupi osatekeseka. 
Proverbs3:30 Usakangane ndi munthu cabe, Ngati sanakucitira coipa," 
Proverbs3:31 Usacitire nsanje munthu waciwawa; Usasankhe njira yace iri yonse. 
Proverbs3:32 Pakuti wamphulupulu anyansa Yehova; Koma cinsinsi cace ciri ndi oongoka. 
Proverbs3:33 Mulungu atemberera za m'nyumba ya woipa; Koma adalitsa mokhalamo olungama. 
Proverbs3:34 Anyozadi akunyoza, Koma apatsa akufatsa cisomo." 
Proverbs3:35 Anzeru adzalandira ulemu colowa cao; Koma opusa adzakweza manyazi. 
Proverbs4:1 Ananu, mverani mwambo wa atate, Nimuchere makutu mukadziwe luntha;" 
Proverbs4:2 Pakuti ndikuphunzitsani zabwino; Musasiye cilangizo canga. 
Proverbs4:3 Pakuti ndinali mwana kwa atate wanga, Wokondedwa ndi mai, ndine ndekha, sanabala wina." 
Proverbs4:4 Atate nandiphunzitsa, nati kwa ine, Mtima wako uumirire mau anga; Sunga malamulo anga, nukhale ndi moyo." 
Proverbs4:5 Tenga nzeru, tenga luntha; Usaiwale, usapatuke pa mau a m'kamwa mwanga;" 
Proverbs4:6 Usasiye nzeru, ndipo Idzakusunga; Uikonde, idzakucinjiriza." 
Proverbs4:7 Nzeru ipambana, tatenga nzeru; M'kutenga kwako konseko utenge luntha." 
Proverbs4:8 Uilemekeze, ndipo idzakukweza; Idzakutengera ulemu pamene uifungatira." 
Proverbs4:9 Idzaika cisada ca cisomo pamtu pako; Idzakupatsa korona wokongola. 
Proverbs4:10 Tamvera mwananga, nulandire mau anga; Ndipo zaka za moyo wako zidzacuruka." 
Proverbs4:11 Ndakuphunzitsa m'njira ya nzeru, Ndakuyendetsa m'mayendedwe olungama." 
Proverbs4:12 Mapazi ako sadzaombana ulikuyenda; Ukathamanga, sudzapunthwa." 
Proverbs4:13 Gwira mwambo, osauleka; Uusunge; pakuti ndiwo moyo wako." 
Proverbs4:14 Usalowe m'mayendedwe ocimwa, Usayende m'njira ya oipa." 
Proverbs4:15 Pewapo, osapitamo; Patukapo, nupitirire." 
Proverbs4:16 Pakuti akapanda kucita zoipa, samagona; Ndipo akapanda kukhumudwitsa wina, tulo tao tiwacokera." 
Proverbs4:17 Pakuti amadya cakudya ca ucimo, Namwa vinyo wa cifwamba." 
Proverbs4:18 Koma mayendedwe a olungama akunga kuunika kwa mbanda kuca, Kunkabe kuwala kufikira usana woti mbe." 
Proverbs4:19 Njira ya oipa ikunga mdima; Sadziwa cimene ciwapunthwitsa," 
Proverbs4:20 Mwananga, tamvera mau anga; Cherera makutu ku zonena zanga." 
Proverbs4:21 Asacoke ku maso ako; Uwasunge m'kati mwa mtima wako. 
Proverbs4:22 Pakuti ali moyo kwa omwe awapeza, Nalamitsa thupi lao lonse." 
Proverbs4:23 Cinjiriza mtima wako koposa zonse uzisunga; Pakuti magwero a moyo aturukamo. 
Proverbs4:24 Tasiya m'kamwa mokhota, Uike patari milomo yopotoka." 
Proverbs4:25 Maso ako ayang'ane m'tsogolo, Zikope zako zipenye moongoka," 
Proverbs4:26 Sinkasinkha bwino mayendedwe a mapazi ako; Njira zako zonse zikonzeke. 
Proverbs4:27 Usapatuke ku dzanja lamanja kapena kulamanzere; Suntha phazi lako kusiya zoipa. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwananga, mvera nzeru yanga; Cherera makutu ku luntha langa;" 
Proverbs5:2 Ukasunge zolingalira, Milomo yako ilabadire zomwe udziwa." 
Proverbs5:3 Pakuti milomo ya mkazi waciwerewere ikukha uci; M'kamwa mwace muti see koposa mafuta. 
Proverbs5:4 Cimariziro cace ncowawa ngati civumulo, Ndi cakuthwa ngati lupanga lakuthwa konse konse." 
Proverbs5:5 Mayendedwe ace atsikira kuimfa; Mapazi ace aumirira kumanda; 
Proverbs5:6 Sasinkhasinkha bwino za njira ya moyo; Mayendedwe ace adzandira dzandi dzandi osadziwa iye. 
Proverbs5:7 Ndipo tsopano ana, mundimvere, Musapatuke ku mau a m'kamwa mwanga." 
Proverbs5:8 Siyanitsa njira yako kutari kwa iyeyo, Osayandikira ku khomo la nyumba yace;" 
Proverbs5:9 Kuti ungapereke ulemu wako kwa ena, Ndi zaka zako kwa ankhanza;" 
Proverbs5:10 Kuti mphamvu yako isakhutitse alendo, Ndi kuti usagwire nchito m'nyumba ya wacilendo;" 
Proverbs5:11 Ungalire pa cimariziro cako, Pothera nyama yako ndi thupi lako;" 
Proverbs5:12 Ndi kuti, Bwanji ndinada mwambo, Mtima wanga ndi kunyoza cidzudzulo;" 
Proverbs5:13 Ndipo sindinamvera mau a aphunzitsi anga; Ngakhale kucherera makutu kwa akundilanga mwambo! 
Proverbs5:14 Ndikadakhala m'zoipa zonse, M'kati mwa msonkhano ndi khamu la anthu." 
Proverbs5:15 Imwa madzi a m'citsime mwako, Ndi madzi oyenda a m'kasupe mwako." 
Proverbs5:16 Kodi magwero ako ayenera kumwazika kunja, Ndi mitsinje ya madzi m'makwalala?" 
Proverbs5:17 Ikhale ya iwe wekha, Si ya alendo okhala nawe ai." 
Proverbs5:18 Adalitsike kasupe wako; Ukondwere ndi mkazi wokula nayo. 
Proverbs5:19 Ngati mbawala yokonda ndi cinkhoma cacisomo, Maere ace akukwanire nthawi zonse; Ukodwe ndi cikondi cace osaleka." 
Proverbs5:20 Pakuti ukondwerenji, mwananga, ndi mkazi waciwerewere, Ndi kufungatira cifuwa ca mkazi wacilendo?" 
Proverbs5:21 Pakuti njira za munthu ziri pamaso pa Yehova, Asinkhasinkha za mayendedwe ace onse." 
Proverbs5:22 Zoipazacezacezidzagwira woipa; Adzamangidwa ndi zingwe za ucimo wace. 
Proverbs5:23 Adzafa posowa mwambo; Adzasocera popusa kwambiri. 
Proverbs6:1 Mwananga, ngati waperekera mnzako cikole, Ngati wapangana kulipirira mlendo," 
Proverbs6:2 Wakodwa ndi mau a m'kamwa mwako, Wagwidwa ndi mau a m'kamwa mwako." 
Proverbs6:3 Cita ici tsono; mwananga, nudzipulumutse; Popeza walowa m'dzanja la mnzako, Pita nudzicepetse, numdandaulire mnzako," 
Proverbs6:4 Usaone tulo m'maso mwako, Ngakhale kuodzera zikope zako." 
Proverbs6:5 Dzipulumutse wekha ngati mphoyo ku dzanja la msaki, Ndi mbalame ku dzanja la msodzi." 
Proverbs6:6 Pita kunyerere, wolesi iwe, Penya njira zao nucenjere;" 
Proverbs6:7 Ziribe mfumu, Ngakhale kapitao, ngakhale mkuru;" 
Proverbs6:8 Koma zitengeratu zakudya zao m'malimwe; Nizituta dzinthu zao m'masika. 
Proverbs6:9 Udzagona mpaka liti, wolesi iwe? Udzauka ku tulo tako liti?" 
Proverbs6:10 Tulo ta pang'ono, kuodzera pang'ono, Kungomanga manja pang'ono, ndi kugona;" 
Proverbs6:11 Ndipo umphawi wako udzafika ngati mbala, Ndi kusauka kwako ngati munthu wacikopa." 
Proverbs6:12 Munthu wopanda pace, mwamuna wamphulupulu; Amayenda ndi m'kamwa mokhota;" 
Proverbs6:13 Amatsinzinira ndi maso ace, napalasira ndi mapazi ace, Amalankhula ndi zala zace;" 
Proverbs6:14 Zopotoka ziri m'mtima mwace, amaganizira zoipa osaleka; Amapikisanitsa anthu." 
Proverbs6:15 Cifukwa cace tsoka lace lidzadza modzidzimuka; Adzasweka msanga msanga, palibe compulumutsa." 
Proverbs6:16 Ziripo zinthu zisanu ndi cimodzi Mulungu azida; Ngakhale zisanu ndi ziwiri zimnyansa: 
Proverbs6:17 Maso akunyada, lilime lonama, Ndi manja akupha anthu osacimwa;" 
Proverbs6:18 Mtima woganizira ziwembu zoipa, Mapazi akuthamangira mphulupulu mmangu mmangu;" 
Proverbs6:19 Mboni yonama yonong'ona mabodza, Ndi wopikisanitsa abale." 
Proverbs6:20 Mwananga, sunga malangizo a atate wako, Usasiye malamulo a mako;" 
Proverbs6:21 Uwamange pamtima pako osaleka; Uwalunze pakhosi pako. 
Proverbs6:22 Adzakutsogolera ulikuyenda, Ndi kukudikira uli m'tulo, Ndi kulankhula nawe utauka." 
Proverbs6:23 Pakuti malangizo ndi nyali, malamulo ndi kuunika; Ndi zidzudzulo za mwambo ndizo njira ya moyo;" 
Proverbs6:24 Zikucinjiriza kwa mkazi woipa, Ndi ku lilime losyasyalika la mkazi waciwerewere." 
Proverbs6:25 Asakucititse kaso m'mtima mwako, Asakukole ndi zikope zace." 
Proverbs6:26 Pakuti ukayamba ndi mkazi wadama, udzamariza ndi nyenyeswa; Ndipo mkazi wa mwini amasaka moyo wa mtengo wapatari." 
Proverbs6:27 Kodi mwamuna angatenge moto pa cifuwa cace, Osatentha zobvala zace?" 
Proverbs6:28 Pena kodi mwamuna angayende pa makala oyaka, Osapsya mapazi ace?" 
Proverbs6:29 Comweco wolowa kwa mkazi wa mnzace; Womkhudzayo sadzapulumuka cilango. 
Proverbs6:30 Anthu sanyoza mbala ikaba, Kuti ikhutitse mtima wace pomva njala;" 
Proverbs6:31 Koma ikapezedwa idzabwezera kasanu ndi kawiri; Idzapereka cuma conse ca m'nyumba yace. 
Proverbs6:32 Wocita cigololo ndi mkazi alibe nzeru; Wofuna kuononga moyo wace wace ndiye amatero. 
Proverbs6:33 Adzalasidwa nanyozedwa; Citonzo cace sicidzafafanizidwa. 
Proverbs6:34 Pakuti nsanje ndiyo ukali wa mwamuna, Ndipo sadzacitira cifundo tsiku lobwezera cilango." 
Proverbs6:35 Sadzalabadira ciombolo ciri conse, Sadzapembedzeka ngakhale ucurukitsa malipo," 
Proverbs7:1 Mwananga, sunga mau anga, Ukundike malangizo anga;" 
Proverbs7:2 Sunga malangizo anga, nukhale ndi moyo; Ndi malamulo anga ngati mwana wa diso lako." 
Proverbs7:3 Uwamange pa zala zako, Uwalembe pamtima pako;" 
Proverbs7:4 Nena kwa nzeru, Ndiwe mlongwanga; Nuche luntha mbale wako." 
Proverbs7:5 Kuti zikucinjirizire kwa mkazi waciwerewere, Kwa mlendo wamkazi wosyasyalika ndi mau ace." 
Proverbs7:6 Pakuti pa zenera la nyumba yanga Ndinapenyera pa made ace; Ndinaona pakati pa acibwana," 
Proverbs7:7 Ndinazindikira pakati pa ang'ono Mnyamata wopanda nzeru," 
Proverbs7:8 Alikupita pakhwalala pafupi ndi mphambano ya pa mkaziyo, Ndi kuyenda pa njira ya ku nyumba yace;" 
Proverbs7:9 Pa madzulo kuli sisiro, Pakati pa usiku pali mdima," 
Proverbs7:10 Ndipo taona, mkaziyo anamcingamira, Atabvala zadama wocenjera mtima," 
Proverbs7:11 Ali wolongolola ndi wosaweruzika, Mapazi ace samakhala m'nyumba mwace." 
Proverbs7:12 Mwina ali kumakwalala, mwina ali kumabwalo, Nabisalira pa mphambano zonse." 
Proverbs7:13 Ndipo anagwira mnyamatayo, nampsompsona; Nati kwa iye ndi nkhope yacipongwe," 
Proverbs7:14 Nsembe za mtendere ziri nane; Lero ndacita zowinda zanga. 
Proverbs7:15 Cifukwa cace ndaturuka kudzakucingamira, Kudzafunitsa nkhope yako, ndipo ndakupeza." 
Proverbs7:16 Ndayala zopfunda pakama panga, Nsaru zamangamanga za thonje la ku Aigupto," 
Proverbs7:17 Ndakapiza pamphasa panga mankhwala onunkhira A mvunja ndi cisiyo ndi mtanthanyerere. 
Proverbs7:18 Tiye tikondwere ndi cikondano mpaka mamawa; Tidzisangalatse ndi ciyanjano. 
Proverbs7:19 Pakuti mwamuna kulibe kwathu, Wapita ulendo wa kutari;" 
Proverbs7:20 Watenga thumba la ndalama m'dzanja lace, Tsiku lowala mwezi adzabwera kwathu." 
Proverbs7:21 Amkakamiza ndi kukoka kwa mau ace, Ampatutsa ndi kusyasyalika kwa milomo yace." 
Proverbs7:22 Mnyamatayo amtsata posacedwa, monga ng'ombe ipita kukaphedwa; Ndi monga unyolo umadza kulanga citsiru;" 
Proverbs7:23 Mpaka mubvi ukapyoza mphafa yace; Amtsata monga mbalame yotamangira msampha; Osadziwa kuti adzaononga moyo wace. 
Proverbs7:24 Ndipo tsopano, ananga, mundimvere ine, Labadirani mau a m'kamwa mwanga." 
Proverbs7:25 Mtima wako usapatukire ku njira ya mkaziyo, Usasocere m'mayendedwe ace." 
Proverbs7:26 Pakuti amagwetsa ambiri, atawalasa; Ndipo ophedwa ndi iye acurukadi." 
Proverbs7:27 Nyumba yace ndiyo njira ya kumanda, Yotsikira ku zipinda za imfa." 
Proverbs8:1 Kodi nzeru siitana, Luntha ndi kukweza mau ace?" 
Proverbs8:2 Iima pamwamba pa mtunda, Pa mphambano za makwalala;" 
Proverbs8:3 Pambali pa cipata polowera m'mudzi, Polowa anthu pa makomo ipfuula:" 
Proverbs8:4 Ndinu ndikuitanani, amuna, Mau anga ndilankhula kwa ana a anthu." 
Proverbs8:5 Acibwana inu, cenjerani, Opusa inu, khalani ndi mtima wozindikira;" 
Proverbs8:6 Imvani, pakuti ndikanena zoposa, Ndi zolungama potsegula pakamwa panga," 
Proverbs8:7 Pakuti m'kamwa mwanga mudzalankhula ntheradi, Zoipa zinyansa milomo yanga." 
Proverbs8:8 Mau onse a m'kamwa mwanga alungama; Mwa iwo mulibe zokhota ndi zopotoka. 
Proverbs8:9 Onsewo amveka ndi iye amene azindikira; Alungama kwa akupeza nzeru. 
Proverbs8:10 Landirani mwambo wanga, si siliva ai; Ndi nzeru kopambana ndi golidi wosankhika." 
Proverbs8:11 Pakuti nzeru iposa ngale, Ndi zonse tizifunitsa sizilingana nayo," 
Proverbs8:12 Ine Nzeru ndikhala m'kucenjera, ngati m'nyumba yanga; Ndimapeza kudziwa ndi zolingalira." 
Proverbs8:13 Kuopa Yehova ndiko kuda zoipa; Kunyada, ndi kudzikuza, ndi njira yoipa, ndi m'kamwa mokhota, ndizida." 
Proverbs8:14 Ndine mwini uphungu ndi kudziwitsa; Ndine luntha; ndiri ndi mphamvu. 
Proverbs8:15 Mwa ine mafumu alamulira; Akazembe naweruza molungama. 
Proverbs8:16 Mwa ine akalonga ayang'anira, Ndi akuru, ngakhale oweruza onse a m'dziko," 
Proverbs8:17 Akundikonda ndiwakonda; Akundifunafuna adzandipeza. 
Proverbs8:18 Katundu ndi ulemu ziri ndi ine, Cuma cosatha ndi cilungamo." 
Proverbs8:19 Cipatso canga ciposa golidi, ngakhale golidi woyengeka; Phindu langa liposa siliva wosankhika." 
Proverbs8:20 Ndimayenda m'njira ya cilungamo, Pakati pa mayendedwe a ciweruzo," 
Proverbs8:21 Kuti ndionetse cuma akundikonda, cikhale colowa cao, Ndi kudzaza mosungira mwao." 
Proverbs8:22 Mulungu anali nane poyamba njira yace, Asanalenge zace zakale." 
Proverbs8:23 Anandiimika cikhalire ciyambire, Dziko lisanalengedwe." 
Proverbs8:24 Pamene panalibe zozama ndinabadwa ine, Pamene panalibe akasupe odzala madzi." 
Proverbs8:25 Mapiri asanakhazikike, Zitunda zisanapangidwe, ndinabadwa;" 
Proverbs8:26 Asanalenge dziko, ndi thengo, Ngakhale ciyambi ca pfumbi la dziko." 
Proverbs8:27 Pamene anakhazika mlengalenga ndinali pompo; Pamene analemba pazozama kwete kwete; 
Proverbs8:28 Polimbitsa Iye thambo la kumwamba, Pokula akasupe a zozama." 
Proverbs8:29 Poikira nyanja malire ace, Kuti madzi asapitirire pa lamulo lace; Polemba maziko a dziko," 
Proverbs8:30 Ndinali pa mbali pace ngati mmisiri; Ndinamsekeretsa tsiku ndi tsiku, Ndi kukondwera pamaso pace nthawi zonse;" 
Proverbs8:31 Ndi kukondwera ndi dziko lace lokhalamo anthu, Ndi kusekerera ndi ana a anthu." 
Proverbs8:32 Ndipo tsopano, ananga, mundimvere ine, Ngodala akusunga njira zanga." 
Proverbs8:33 Imvani mwambo, mukhale anzeru osaukana." 
Proverbs8:34 Ngwodala amene andimvera, nadikira pa zitseko zanga tsiku ndi tsiku, Ndi kulinda pa mphuthu za makoma anga;" 
Proverbs8:35 Pakuti wondipeza ine apeza moyo; Yehova adzamkomera mnma. 
Proverbs8:36 Koma wondicimwira apweteka moyo wace; Onse akundida ine akonda imfa. 
Proverbs9:1 Nzeru yamanga nyumba yace, Yasema zoimiritsa zace zisanu ndi ziwiri;" 
Proverbs9:2 Yaphera nyama yace, nisanganiza vinyo wace, Nilongosolanso pa gome lace." 
Proverbs9:3 Yatuma anamwali ace, iitana Pa misanje ya m'mudzi." 
Proverbs9:4 Wacibwana yense apambukire kuno; Iti kwa yense wosowa nzeru," 
Proverbs9:5 Tiyeni, idyani cakudya canga; Nimumwe vinyo wanga ndamsanganiza." 
Proverbs9:6 Lekani, acibwana inu, nimukhale ndi moyo; Nimuyende m'njira ya nzeru." 
Proverbs9:7 Woweruza munthu wonyoza adzicititsa yekha manyazi; Yemwe adzudzula wocimwa angodetsa mbiri yace yace. 
Proverbs9:8 Usadzudzule wonyoza kuti angakude; Dzudzula wanzeru adzakukonda. 
Proverbs9:9 Ukacenjeza wanzeru adzakulitsa nzeru yace; Ukaphunzitsa wolungama adzaonjezera kuphunzira," 
Proverbs9:10 Ciyambi ca nzeru ndico kuopa Yehova; Kudziwa Woyerayo ndiko luntha; 
Proverbs9:11 Pakuti mwa ine masiku ako adzacuruka, Zaka za moyo wako zidzaonjezedwa." 
Proverbs9:12 Ukakhala wanzeru, si yako yako nzeruyo? Ndipo ukanyoza udzasauka wekha." 
Proverbs9:13 Utsiru umalongolola, Ngwa cibwana osadziwa kanthu." 
Proverbs9:14 Ukhala pa khomo la nyumba yace, Pampando pa misanje ya m'mudzi" 
Proverbs9:15 Kuti uitane akupita panjira, Amene angonkabe m'kuyenda kwao," 
Proverbs9:16 Wacibwana ndani? Apambukire kuno. Ati kwa yense wopanda nzeru," 
Proverbs9:17 Madzi akuba atsekemera, Ndi cakudya cobisika cikoma." 
Proverbs9:18 Ndipo mwamunayo sadziwa kuti akufa ali konko; Omwe acezetsa utsiru ali m'manda akuya. 
Proverbs10:1 Mwana wanzeru akondweretsa atate; Koma mwana wopusa amvetsa amace cisoni. 
Proverbs10:2 Cuma ca ucimo sicithangata: Koma cilungamo cipulumutsa kuimfa. 
Proverbs10:3 Yehova samvetsa njala moyo wa wolungama; Koma amainga cifuniro ca wocimwa. 
Proverbs10:4 Wocita ndi dzanja laulesi amasauka; Koma dzanja la akhama lilemeretsa. 
Proverbs10:5 Wokolola m'malimwe ndi mwana wanzeru; Koma wogona pakututa ndi mwana wocititsa manyazi. 
Proverbs10:6 Madalitso ali pamtu pa wolungama Koma m'kamwa mwa oipa mubisa ciwawa. 
Proverbs10:7 Amayesa wolungama wodala pamkumbukira; Koma dzina la oipa lidzabvunda. 
Proverbs10:8 Mwini mtima wanzeru amalandira malamulo; Koma citsiru colongolola cidzagwa. 
Proverbs10:9 Woyenda moongoka amayenda osatekeseka; Koma wokhotetsa njira zace adzadziwika. 
Proverbs10:10 Wotsinzinira acititsa cisoni; Koma wodzudzula momveka acita mtendere. 
Proverbs10:11 M'kamwa mwa wolungama ndi kasupe wa moyo; Koma m'kamwa mwa oipa mubisa ciwawa. 
Proverbs10:12 Udani upikisanitsa; Koma cikondi cikwirira zolakwa zonse. 
Proverbs10:13 Nzeru ipezedwa m'milomo ya wozindikira; Koma wopusa pamsana pace ntyole. 
Proverbs10:14 Anzeru akundika zomwe adziwa Koma m'kamwa mwa citsiru muononga tsopano lino. 
Proverbs10:15 Cuma ca wolemera ndi mudzi wace wolimba; Koma umphawi wao uononga osauka. 
Proverbs10:16 Nchito za wolungama zipatsa moyo; Koma phindu la oipa licimwitsa. 
Proverbs10:17 Wosunga mwambo ali m'njira ya moyo; Koma wosiya cidzudzulo asocera. 
Proverbs10:18 Wobisa udani ali ndi milomo yonama; Wonena ugogodi ndiye citsiru. 
Proverbs10:19 Pocuruka mau zolakwa sizisoweka; Koma wokhala cete acita mwanzeru. 
Proverbs10:20 Lilime la wolungama likunga siliva wosankhika; Koma mtima wa oipa uli wacabe. 
Proverbs10:21 Milomo ya wolungama imadyetsa ambiri; Koma zitsiru zimafa posowa nzeru. 
Proverbs10:22 Madalitso a Yehova alemeretsa, Saonjezerapo cisoni." 
Proverbs10:23 Masewero a citsiru ndiwo kucita zoipa; Koma masewero a wozindikira ndiwo nzeru. 
Proverbs10:24 Comwe woipa aciopa cidzamfikira; Koma comwe olungama acifuna cidzapatsidwa. 
Proverbs10:25 Monga kabvumvulu angopita, momwemo woipa kuti zi; Koma olungama ndiwo maziko osatha." 
Proverbs10:26 Ngati vinyo wowawa m'mano, ndi utsi m'maso, Momwemo wolesi kwa iwo amene amtuma." 
Proverbs10:27 Kuopa Yehova kutanimphitsa masiku; Koma zaka za oipa zidzafinimpha," 
Proverbs10:28 Ciyembekezo ca olungama ndico cimwemwe; Koma cidikiro ca oipa cidzaonongeka. 
Proverbs10:29 Njira ya Yehova ndi linga kwa woongoka mtima; Koma akucita zoipa adzaonongeka. 
Proverbs10:30 Wolungama sadzacotsedwa konse: Koma oipa sadzakhalabe m'dziko. 
Proverbs10:31 M'kamwa mwa wolungama mulankhula nzeru; Koma lilime lokhota lidzadulidwa. 
Proverbs10:32 Milomo ya wolungama idziwa zokondweretsa; Koma m'kamwa mwa oipa munena zokhota," 
Proverbs11:1 Muyeso wonyenga unyansa Yehova; Koma mulingo wamphumphu umsekeretsa. 
Proverbs11:2 Pakudza kudzikuza padzanso manyazi; Koma nzeru iri ndi odzicepetsa," 
Proverbs11:3 Kuongoka mtima kwa olungama kuwatsogolera; Koma kukhota kwa aciwembu kudzawaononga. 
Proverbs11:4 Cuma sicithandiza tsiku la mkwiyo; Koma cilungamo cipulumutsa kuimfa. 
Proverbs11:5 Cilungamo ca wangwiro cimaongola njira yace; Koma woipa adzagwa ndi zoipa zace. 
Proverbs11:6 Cilungamo ca oongoka mtima cidzawapulumutsa; Koma aciwembu adzagwidwa ndi mphulupulu yao. 
Proverbs11:7 Pomwalira woipa cidikiro cace cionongeka; Ciyembekezo ca ucimo cionongeka. 
Proverbs11:8 Wolungama apulumuka kubvuto; Woipa nalowa m'malo mwace. 
Proverbs11:9 Wonyoza Mulungu aononga mnzace ndi m'kamwa mwace; Koma olungama adzapulumuka pakudziwa," 
Proverbs11:10 Olungama akapeza bwino, mudzi usekera; Nupfuula pakuonongeka oipa." 
Proverbs11:11 Madalitso a olungama akuza mudzi; Koma m'kamwa mwa oipa muupasula. 
Proverbs11:12 Wopeputsa mnzace asowa nzeru; Koma wozindikira amatonthola. 
Proverbs11:13 Kazitape woyendayenda amawanditsa zinsinsi; Koma wokhulupirika mtima abisa mau. 
Proverbs11:14 Popanda upo wanzeru anthu amagwa; Koma pocuruka aphungu pali cipulumutso. 
Proverbs11:15 Woperekera mlendo cikole adzaphwetekwapo; Koma wakuda cikole akhala ndi mtendere. 
Proverbs11:16 Mkazi wodekha agwiritsa ulemu; Aukali nagwiritsa cuma. 
Proverbs11:17 Wacifundo acitira moyo wace zokoma; Koma wankhanza abvuta nyama yace. 
Proverbs11:18 Woipa alandira malipiro onyenga; Koma wofesa cilungamo aonadi mphotho," 
Proverbs11:19 Wolimbikira cilungamo alandira moyo; Koma wolondola zoipa adzipha yekha," 
Proverbs11:20 Okhota mtima anyansa Yehova; Koma angwiro m'njira zao amsekeretsa. 
Proverbs11:21 Zoonadi, wocimwa sadzapulumuka cilango; Koma mbeu ya olungama idzalanditsidwa." 
Proverbs11:22 Monga cipini cagolidi m'mphuno ya nkhumba, Momwemo mkazi wokongola wosasinkhasinkha bwino." 
Proverbs11:23 Cifuniro ca olungama cifikitsa zabwino zokha; Koma ciyembekezo ca oipa mkwiyo. 
Proverbs11:24 Alipo wogawira, nangolemerabe; Aliponso womana comwe ayenera kupatsa nangosauka." 
Proverbs11:25 Mtima wa mataya udzalemera; Wothirira madzi nayenso adzathiriridwa. 
Proverbs11:26 Womana tirigu anthu amtemberera; Koma madalitso adzakhala pamtu pa wogulitsa. 
Proverbs11:27 Wopwaira ubwino afunitsa cikondwerero; Koma zoipa zidzamfikira wozilondola. 
Proverbs11:28 Wokhulupmra cuma cace adzagwa; Koma olungama adzaphuka ngati tsamba. 
Proverbs11:29 Wobvuta banja lace adzalowa m'zomsautsa; Wopusa adzatumikira wanzeru. 
Proverbs11:30 Cipatso ca wolungama ndi mtengo wa moyo; Ndipo wokola mtima ali wanzeru. 
Proverbs11:31 Taonani, wolungama adzalandira mphotho kunja kuno; Koposa kotani woipa ndi wocimwa?" 
Proverbs12:1 Wokonda mwambo akonda kudziwa; Koma wakuda cidzudzulo apulukira. 
Proverbs12:2 Yehova akomera mtima munthu wabwino; Koma munthu wa ziwembu amtsutsa," 
Proverbs12:3 Munthu sadzakhazikika ndi udio, Muzu wa olungama sudzasunthidwa." 
Proverbs12:4 Mkazi wodekha ndiye korona wa mwamuna wace; Koma wocititsa manyazi akunga cobvunditsa mafupa a mwamunayo. 
Proverbs12:5 Maganizo a olungama ndi ciweruzo; Koma uphungu wa oipa unyenga. 
Proverbs12:6 Mau a oipa abisalira mwazi; Koma m'kamwa mwa olungama muwalanditsa. 
Proverbs12:7 Oipa amagwa kuli zi; Koma banja la olungama limaimabe. 
Proverbs12:8 Munthu amatamandidwa monga mwa nzeru yace; Koma wokhota mtima adzanyozedwa. 
Proverbs12:9 Wonyozedwa, amene ali ndi kapolo, Aposa wodzikuza, amene asowa zakudya." 
Proverbs12:10 Wolungama asamalira moyo wa coweta cace; Koma cifundo ca oipa ndi nkhanza. 
Proverbs12:11 Zakudyazikwanira wolima minda yace; Koma wotsata anthu opanda pace asowa nzeru. 
Proverbs12:12 Woipa akhumba cokodwa ndi amphulupulu; Koma muzu wa olungama umabala zipatso. 
Proverbs12:13 M'kulakwa kwa milomo muli msampha woipa; Koma wolungama amaturuka m'mabvuto. 
Proverbs12:14 Munthu amakhuta zabwino ndi zipatso za m'kamwa mwace; Zocita za manja ace zidzabwezedwa kwa iye. 
Proverbs12:15 Njira ya citsiru nlolungama pamaso pace pace; Koma wanzeru amamvera uphungu. 
Proverbs12:16 Mkwiyo wa citsiru udziwika posacedwa; Koma wanzeru amabisa manyazi. 
Proverbs12:17 Wolankhula ntheradi aonetsa cilungamo; Koma mboni yonama imanyenga. 
Proverbs12:18 Alipo wonena mwansontho ngati kupyoza kwa lupanga; Koma lilime la anzeru lilamitsa. 
Proverbs12:19 Mlomo wa ntheradi ukhazikika nthawi zonse; Koma lilime lonama likhala kamphindi. 
Proverbs12:20 Cinyengo ciri m'mitima ya oganizira zoipa; Koma aphungu a mtendere amakondwa. 
Proverbs12:21 Palibe bvuto lidzagwera wolungama; Koma amphulupulu adzadzazidwa ndi zoipa," 
Proverbs12:22 Milomo yonama inyansa Yehova; Koma ocita ntheradi amsekeretsa. 
Proverbs12:23 Munthu wanzeru abisa zomwe adziwa; Koma mtima wa opusa ulalikira utsiru. 
Proverbs12:24 Dzanja la akhama lidzalamulira; Koma wolesi adzakhala ngati kapolo," 
Proverbs12:25 Nkhawa iweramitsa mtima wa munthu; Koma mau abwino aukondweretsa. 
Proverbs12:26 Wolungama atsogolera mnzace; Koma njira ya oipa iwasokeretsa. 
Proverbs12:27 Wolesi samaocha nyama yace anaigwira; Koma wolungama amalandira cuma copambana ca anthu. 
Proverbs12:28 M'khwalala la cilungamo muli moyo; M'njira ya mayendedwe ace mulibe imfa. 
Proverbs13:1 Mwana wanzeru amamvera mwambo wa atate; Koma wonyoza samvera cidzudzulo. 
Proverbs13:2 Munthu adzadya zabwino ndi zipatso za m'kamwa mwace; Koma moyo wa aciwembu udzadya ciwawa. 
Proverbs13:3 Wogwira pakamwa pace asunga moyo wace; Koma woyasamula milomo yace adzaonongeka. 
Proverbs13:4 Moyo wa wolesi ukhumba osalandira kanthu; Koma moyo wa akhama udzalemera. 
Proverbs13:5 Wolungama ada mau onama; Koma woipa anyansa, nadzicititsa manyazi," 
Proverbs13:6 Cilungamo cicinjiriza woongoka m'njira; Koma udio ugwetsa wocimwa. 
Proverbs13:7 Alipo wodziyesa wolemera, koma alibe kanthu; Alipo wodziyesa wosauka, koma ali ndi cuma cambiri." 
Proverbs13:8 Ciombolo ca moyo wa munthu ndico cuma cace; Koma wosauka samva cidzudzulo. 
Proverbs13:9 Kuunika kwa olungama kukondwa; Koma nyali ya oipa idzazima. 
Proverbs13:10 Kudzikuza kupikisanitsa; Koma omwe anauzidwa uphungu ali ndi nzeru.

Proverbs13:13 Wonyoza mau adziononga yekha; Koma woopa malangizo adzalandira mphotho. 
Proverbs13:14 Malamulo a wanzeru ndiwo kasupe wa moyo, Apatutsa ku misampha ya imfa." 
Proverbs13:15 Nzeru yabwino ipatsa cisomo; Koma njira ya aciwembu iri makolokoto.

Proverbs14:1 Mkazi yense wanzeru amanga banja lace; Koma wopusa alipasula ndi manja ace.

Proverbs14:3 M'kamwa mwa citsiru muli ntyole ya kudzikuza; Koma milomo ya anzeru Idzawasunga. 
Proverbs14:4 Popanda zoweta modyera muti see; Koma mphamvu ya ng'ombe icurukitsa phindu. 
Proverbs14:5 Mboni yokhulupirika sidzanama; Koma mboni yonyenga imalankhula zonama. 
Proverbs14:6 Wonyoza afunafuna nzeru osaipeza; Koma wozindikira saona bvuto m'kuphunzira. 
Proverbs14:7 Pita pamaso pa munthu wopusa, Sudzazindikira milomo yakudziwa." 
Proverbs14:8 Nzeru ya wocenjera ndiyo yakuti azindikire njira yace; Koma utsiru wa opusa ndiwo cinyengo. 
Proverbs14:9 Zitsiru zinyoza kuparamula; Koma mwa oongoka mtima muli ciyanjano. 
Proverbs14:10 Mtima udziwa kuwawa kwace kwace; Mlendo sadudukira ndi cimwemwe cace. 
Proverbs14:11 Nyumba ya oipa idzapasuka; Koma hema wa oongoka mtima adzakula.

Proverbs14:13 Ngakhale m'kuseka mtima uwawa; Ndipo matsiriziro a ciphwete ndi cisoni.

Proverbs14:15 Wacibwana akhulupirira mau onse; Koma wocenjera asamalira mayendedwe ace. 
Proverbs14:16 Wanzeru amaopa nasiya zoipa; Koma wopusa amanyada osatekeseka. 
Proverbs14:17 Wokangaza kukwiya adzacita utsiru; Ndipo munthu wa ziwembu adzadedwa. 
Proverbs14:18 Acibwana amalandira colowa ca utsiru; Koma ocenjera amabvala nzeru ngati korona. 
Proverbs14:19 Oipa amagwadira abwino, Ndi ocimwa pa makomo a olungama." 
Proverbs14:20 Waumphawi adedwa ndi anzace omwe; Koma akukonda wolemera acuruka. 
Proverbs14:21 Wonyoza anzace acimwa; Koma wocitira osauka cifundo adala. 
Proverbs14:22 Kodi oganizira zoipa sasocera? Koma akuganizira zabwino adzalandira cifundo ndi ntheradi. 
Proverbs14:23 M'nchito zonse muli phindu; Koma kulankhula-lankhula kungopatsa umphawi. 
Proverbs14:24 Korona wa anzeru ndi cuma cao; Utsiru wa opusa ndiwo utsiru. 
Proverbs14:25 Mboni yoona imalanditsa miyoyo; Koma wolankhula zonama angonyenga. 
Proverbs14:26 Wakuopa Yehova akhulupirira kolimba; Ndipo ana ace adzakhala ndi pothawirapo. 
Proverbs14:27 Kuopa Yehova ndiko kasupe wa moyo, Kupatutsa ku misampha ya imfa." 
Proverbs14:28 Mu unyinji wa anthu muli ulemu wa mfumu; Koma popanda anthu kalonga aonongeka. 
Proverbs14:29 Wosakwiya msanga apambana kumvetsa; Koma wansontho akuza utsiru. 
Proverbs14:30 Mtima wabwino ndi moyo wa thupi; Koma nsanje ibvunditsa mafupa.

Proverbs14:33 Nzeru ikhalabe m'mtima wa wozindikira, Nidziwika pakati pa opusa." 
Proverbs14:34 Cilungamo cikuza mtundu wa anthu; Koma cimo licititsa pfuko manyazi.

Proverbs15:3 Maso a Yehova ali ponseponse, Nayang'anira oipa ndi abwino." 
Proverbs15:4 Kuciza lilime ndiko mtengo wa moyo; Koma likakhota liswa moyo. 
Proverbs15:5 Citsiru cipeputsa mwambo wa atate wace; Koma wosamalira cidzudzulo amacenjera. 
Proverbs15:6 M'nyumba ya wolungama muli katundu wambiri; Koma m'phindu la woipa muli bvuto," 
Proverbs15:7 Milomo ya anzeru iwanditsa nzeru, Koma mtima wa opusa suli wolungama." 
Proverbs15:8 Nsembe ya oipa inyansa Yehova; Koma pemphero la oongoka mtima limkondweretsa.

Proverbs15:12 Wonyoza sakonda kudzudzulidwa, Samapita kwa anzeru." 
Proverbs15:13 Mtima wokondwa usekeretsa nkhope; Koma moyo umasweka ndi zowawa za m'mtima. 
Proverbs15:14 Mtima wa wozindikira ufunitsa kudziwa; Koma m'kamwa mwa opusa mudya utsiru. 
Proverbs15:15 Masiku onse a wosauka ali oipa; Koma wokondwera mtima ali ndi phwando losatha. 
Proverbs15:16 Zapang'ono, ulikuopa Yehova, Zipambana ndi katundu wambiri pokhala phokoso," 
Proverbs15:17 Kudya masamba, pali cikondano, Kuposa ng'ombe yonenepa pali udani." 
Proverbs15:18 Munthu wozaza aputa makani; Koma wosakwiya msanga atonthoza makangano. 
Proverbs15:19 Mayendedwe a wolesi akunga Hnga laminga, Koma njira ya oongoka mtima iundidwa ngati mseu." 
Proverbs15:20 Mwana wanzeru akondweretsa atate wace; Koma munthu wopusa apeputsa amace. 
Proverbs15:21 Wosowa nzeru akondwera ndi utsiru; Koma munthu wozindikira aongola mayendedwe ace. 
Proverbs15:22 Zolingalira zizimidwa popanda upo Koma pocuruka aphungu zikhazikika. 
Proverbs15:23 Munthu akondwera ndi mayankhidwe a m'kamwa mwace; Ndi mau a pa nthawi yace kodi sali abwino? 
Proverbs15:24 Anzeru ayesa njira yamoyo yokwerakwera, Kuti apambuke kusiya kunsi kwa manda." 
Proverbs15:25 Yehova adzapasula nyumba ya wonyada; Koma adzalembera mkazi wamasiye malire ace," 
Proverbs15:26 Ziwembu zoipa zinyansa Yehova; Koma oyera mtima alankhula mau okondweretsa. 
Proverbs15:27 Wopindula monyenga abvuta nyumba yace; Koma wakuda mitulo adzakhala ndi moyo. 
Proverbs15:28 Mtima wa wolungama uganizira za mayankhidwe; Koma m'kamwa mwa ocimwa mutsanulira zoipa. 
Proverbs15:29 Yehova atarikira oipa; Koma pemphero la olungama alimvera. 
Proverbs15:30 Kuunika kwa maso kukondweretsa mtima; Ndipo pomveka zabwino mafupa amatenga uwisi. 
Proverbs15:31 Khutu lomvera cidzudzulo ca moyo Lidzakhalabe mwa anzeru. 
Proverbs15:32 Wokana mwambo apeputsa moyo wace; Koma wosamalira cidzudzulo amatenga nzeru. 
Proverbs15:33 Kuopa Yehova ndiko mwambo wanzeru; Ndipo cifatso citsogolera ulemu. 
Proverbs16:1 Malongosoledwe a mtima nga munthu; Koma mayankhidwe a lilime acokera kwa Yehova. 
Proverbs16:2 Njira zonse za munthu ziyera pamaso pace; Koma Yehova ayesa mizimu. 
Proverbs16:3 Pereka zocita zako kwa Yehova, Ndipo zolingalira zako zidzakhazikika." 
Proverbs16:4 Zonse Yehova anazipangaziri ndi zifukwa zao; Ngakhale amphulupulu kuti aone tsiku loipa," 
Proverbs16:5 Yense wonyada mtima anyansa Yehova; Zoonadi sadzapulumuka cilango. 
Proverbs16:6 Mphulupulu iomboledwa ndi cifundo ndi ntheradi; Apatuka pa zoipa poopa Yehova. 
Proverbs16:7 Njira za munthu zikakonda Yehova, Ayanjanitsana naye ngakhale adani ace." 
Proverbs16:8 Zapang'ono, pokhala cilungamo, Ziposa phindu lalikuru lopanda ciweruzo." 
Proverbs16:9 Mtima wa munthu ulingalira njira yace; Koma Yehova ayendetsa mapazi ace. 
Proverbs16:10 Mau a mlauli ali m'milomo ya mfumu; M'kamwa mwace simudzacita cetera poweruza. 
Proverbs16:11 Mwini muyeso ndi mulingo wolungama ndiye Yehova; Ndiyenso anapanga miyala yonse yoyesera ya m'thumba. 
Proverbs16:12 Kucita mphulupulu kunyansa mafumu; Pakuti mpando wao wakhazikika ndi cilungamo. 
Proverbs16:13 Milomo yolungama ikondweretsa mafumu; Wonena zoongoka amkonda. 
Proverbs16:14 Mkwiyo wa mfumu ndi mithenga ya imfa; Wanzeru adzaukhulula. 
Proverbs16:15 M'kuunika kwa nkhope ya mfumu muli moyo; Kukoma mtima kwace kunga mtambo wa mvula ya masika. 
Proverbs16:16 Kodi kulandira nzeru sikupambana ndi golidi, Kulandira luntha ndi kusankhika koposa siliva?" 
Proverbs16:17 Khwalala la oongoka mtima ndilo lakuti asiye zoipa; Wosunga njira yace acinjiriza moyo wace. 
Proverbs16:18 Kunyada kutsogolera kuonongeka Mtinia wodzikuza ndi kutsogolera kupunthwa. 
Proverbs16:19 Kufatsa mtima ndi osauka Kuposa kugawana zofunkha ndi onyada. 
Proverbs16:20 Wolabadira mau adzapeza bwino; Ndipo wokhulupirira Yehova adala. 
Proverbs16:21 Wanzeru mtima adzachedwa wocenjera; Ndipo kukoma kwa milomo kuyenjezera kuphunzira. 
Proverbs16:22 Nzeru ndi kasupe wa moyo kwa mwini wace; Koma mwambo wa zitsiru ndi utsiru. 
Proverbs16:23 Mtima wa wanzeru ucenjeza m'kamwa mwace, Nuphunzitsanso milomo yace." 
Proverbs16:24 Mau okoma ndiwo cisa ca uci, Otsekemera m'moyo ndi olamitsa mafupa." 
Proverbs16:25 Iripo njira yooneka kwa mwamuna ngati yoongoka, Koma matsiriziro ace ndi njira za imfa." 
Proverbs16:26 Wanchito adzigwirira yekha nchito; Pakuti m'kamwa mwace mumfulumiza. 
Proverbs16:27 Munthu wopanda pace akonzeratu zoipa; Ndipo m'milomo mwace muli moto wopsereza. 
Proverbs16:28 Munthu wokhota amautsa makani; Kazitape afetsa ubwenzi. 
Proverbs16:29 Munthu waciwawa akopa mnzace, Namuyendetsa m'njira yosakhala bwino." 
Proverbs16:30 Wotsinzina ndiye aganizira zakhota; Wosunama afikitsa zoipa. 
Proverbs16:31 Imvi ndiyo korona wa ulemu, Idzapezedwa m'njira ya cilungamo." 
Proverbs16:32 Wosakwiya msanga aposa wamphamvu; Wolamulira mtima wace naposa wolanda mudzi. 
Proverbs16:33 Maere aponyedwa pamfunga; Koma ndiye Yehova alongosola zonse.

Proverbs17:3 Siliva ali ndi mbiya yosungunulira, golidi ali ndi ng'anjo; Koma Yehova ayesa mitima."

Proverbs22:3 Wocenjera aona zoipa, nabisala; Koma acibwana angopitirira, nalipitsidwa." 
Proverbs22:4 Mphotho ya cifatso ndi kuopa, Yehova Ndiye cuma, ndi ulemu, ndi moyo."

Proverbs22:6 Phunzitsa mwana poyamba njira yace; Ndipo angakhale atakalamba sadzacokamo.

Proverbs22:14 M'kamwa mwa mkazi waciwerewere muli dzenje lakuya; Yemwe Yehova amkwiyira adzagwamo.

Proverbs22:16 Wotsendereza waumphawi kuti acurukitse cuma cace, Ndi wopatsa wolemera kanthu, angosauka." 
Proverbs22:17 Chera makutu ako, numvere mau a anzeru, Nulozetse mtima wako kukadziwa zanga." 
Proverbs22:18 Pakuti mauwo akondweretsa ngati uwasunga m'kati mwako, Ngati akhazikika pamodzi pa milomo yako." 
Proverbs22:19 Ndakudziwitsa amenewo lero, ngakhale iwedi, Kuti ukhulupirire Yehova." 
Proverbs22:20 Kodi sindinakulembera zoposa Za uphungu ndi nzeru; 
Proverbs22:21 Kuti ukadziwitse ntheradi yace ya mau oona, Nukabwere ndi mau oona kwa iwo amene anakutumiza?" 
Proverbs22:22 Usalande za waumphawi cifukwa ali waumphawi, Ngakhale kutsendereza wosauka kubwalo." 
Proverbs22:23 Pakuti Yehova adzanenera mlandu wao; Omwe akwatula zao Iye adzakwatula moyo wao. 
Proverbs22:24 Usayanjane ndi munthu wokwiya msanga; Ngakhale kupita ndi mwamuna waukali; 
Proverbs22:25 Kuti ungaphunzire mayendedwe ace, Ndi kutengera moyo wako msampha," 
Proverbs22:26 Usakhale wodulirana mpherere, Ngakhale kumperekera cikole ca ngongole zace." 
Proverbs22:27 Ngati ulibe cobwezera Kodi acotserenji kama lako pansi pako? 
Proverbs22:28 Usasunthe cidziwitso cakale ca m'malire, Cimene makolo ako anaciimika." 
Proverbs22:29 Kodi upenya munthu wofulumiza nchito zace? Adzaima pamaso pa mafumu, osaima pamaso pa anthu acabe." 
Proverbs23:1 Pamene ukhala ulinkudya ndi mkuru, Zikumbukira ameneyo ali pamaso pako;" 
Proverbs23:2 Nuike mpeni pakhosi pako, Ngati uli wadyera." 
Proverbs23:3 Usakhumbe zolongosoka zace; Pokhala zakudya zonyenga. 
Proverbs23:4 Usadzitopetse kuti ulemere; Leka nzeru yako yako. 
Proverbs23:5 Kodi upenyeranji cimene kulibe? Pakuti cuma cunera mapiko, Ngati mphungu youluka mumlengalenga." 
Proverbs23:6 Usadye zakudya zace za wa maso ankhwenzule, Ngakhale kukhumba zolongosoka zace;" 
Proverbs23:7 Pakuti monga asinkha m'kati mwace, ali wotere; Ati kwa iwe, Idya numwe; Koma mtima wace suli pa iwe." 
Proverbs23:8 Pakuti nthongo imene unaidya udzaisanza, Ndi kutaya mau ako okondweretsa." 
Proverbs23:9 Usalankhule m'makutu a wopusa; Pakuti adzapeputsa nzeru ya mau ako. 
Proverbs23:10 Usasunthe cidziwitso cakale ca m'malire; Ngakhale kulowa m'minda ya amasiye; 
Proverbs23:11 Pakuti Mombolo wao walimba; Adzawanenera mlandu wao pa iwe. 
Proverbs23:12 Lozetsa mtima wako kumwambo, Ndi makutu ako ku mau a nzeru." 
Proverbs23:13 Usamane mwana cilango; Pakuti ukammenya ndi ntyole safa ai. 
Proverbs23:14 Udzammenya ndi ntyole, Nudzapulumutsa moyo wace kunsi kwa manda." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwananga, mtima wako ukakhala wanzeru, Mtima wanga wa inedi udzakondwa;" 
Proverbs23:16 Imso zanga zidzasangalala, Polankhula milomo yako zoongoka." 
Proverbs23:17 Mtima wako usacitire nsanje akucimwawo; Koma opabe Yehova tsiku lonse; 
Proverbs23:18 Pakutitu padzakhala mphotho; Ndipo ciyembekezo cako sicidzalephereka. 
Proverbs23:19 Tamvera tsopano, mwananga, utenge nzeru, Ulunjikitse mtima wako m'njiramo." 
Proverbs23:20 Usakhale mwa akumwaimwa vinyo, Ndi ankhuli osusuka." 
Proverbs23:21 Pakuti wakumwaimwa ndi wosusukayo adzasauka; Ndipo kusinza kudzabveka munthu nsanza. 
Proverbs23:22 Tamvera atate wako anakubala, Usapeputse amako atakalamba." 
Proverbs23:23 Gula ntheradi, osaigulitsa; Nzeru, ndi mwambo, ndi luntha." 
Proverbs23:24 Atate wa wolungama adzasekeradi; Wobala mwana wanzeru adzakondwera naye. 
Proverbs23:25 Atate wako ndi amako akondwere, Amako wakukubala asekere." 
Proverbs23:26 Mwananga, undipatse mtima wako, Maso ako akondwere ndi njira zanga," 
Proverbs23:27 Pakuti mkazi wadama ndiye dzenje lakuya; Ndipo mkazi waciwerewere ndiye mbuna yopapatiza. 
Proverbs23:28 Pakuti abisalira ngati wacifwamba, Nacurukitsa anthu a ciwembu." 
Proverbs23:29 Ndani ali ndi cisoni? ndani asauka? ndani ali ndi makangano? Ndani ang'ung'udza? ndani alasidwa cabe? ndani afiira maso? 
Proverbs23:30 Ngamene acedwa pali vinyo, Napita kukafunafuna vinyo wosanganizidwa." 
Proverbs23:31 Usayang'ane pavinyo alikufiira. Alikung'azimira m'cikho. Namweka mosalala. 
Proverbs23:32 Pa citsiriziro cace aluma ngati njoka, Najompha ngati mamba." 
Proverbs23:33 Maso ako adzaona zacilendo, Mtima wako udzalankhula zokhota." 
Proverbs23:34 Udzafanana ndi wina wogona pakati pa nyanja, Pena wogona pa nsonga ya mlongoti wa ngalawa." 
Proverbs23:35 Udzati, Anandimenya, osaphwetekedwa ine; Anandikwapula, osamva ine; Ndidzauka nthawi yanji? Ndidzafuna-funanso vinyoyo." 
Proverbs24:1 Usacitire nsanje anthu oipa, Ngakhale kufuna kukhala nao;" 
Proverbs24:2 Pakuti mtima wao ulingalira za cionongeko; Milomo yao ilankhula za mphulupulu. 
Proverbs24:3 Nzeru imangitsa nyumba; Luntha liikhazikitsa. 
Proverbs24:4 Kudziwa kudzaza zipinda zace Ndi cuma conse cofunika ca mtengo wace. 
Proverbs24:5 Mwamuna wanzeru ngwamphamvu; Munthu wodziwa ankabe nalimba. 
Proverbs24:6 Pakuti udzaponya nkhondo yako ndi upo, Ndi kupulumuka pocuruka aphungu," 
Proverbs24:7 Nzeru itarikira citsiru; Satsegula pakamwa kubwalo. 
Proverbs24:8 Wolingalira zakucita zoipa Anthu adzamcha waciwembu. 
Proverbs24:9 Maganizo opusa ndiwo cimo; Wonyoza anyansa anthu. 
Proverbs24:10 Ukalefuka tsiku la tsoka Mphamvu yako icepa. 
Proverbs24:11 Omwe atengedwa kuti akafe, uwapulumutse; Omwe ati aphedwe, usaleke kuwalanditsa." 
Proverbs24:12 Ukanena, Taonani, sitinadziwa cimeneci; Kodi woyesa mitima sacizindikira ici? Ndi wosunga moyo wako kodi sacidziwa? Ndipo kodi sabwezera munthu yense monga mwa macitidwe ace?" 
Proverbs24:13 Mwananga, idya uci pakuti ngwabwino, Ndi cisa cace citsekemera m'kamwamwako;" 
Proverbs24:14 Potero udzadziwa kuti nzeru iri yotero m'moyo wako; Ngati waipeza padzakhala mphotho, Ndipo ciyembekezo cako sicidzalephereka." 
Proverbs24:15 Usabisalire, woipa iwe, pomanga wolungama; Usapasule popuma iyepo." 
Proverbs24:16 Pakuti wolungama amagwa kasanu ndi kawiri, nanyamukanso; Koma oipa akhumudwa pomfikira tsoka." 
Proverbs24:17 Usakondwere pakugwa mdani wako; Mtima wako usasekere pokhumudwa iye; 
Proverbs24:18 Kuti Yehova angaone kukondwa kwako, ndi kukuyesa koipa, Ndi kuleka kumkwiyira." 
Proverbs24:19 Usabvutike mtima cifukwa ca ocita zoipa; Ngakhale kucitira nsanje amphulupulu; 
Proverbs24:20 Pakuti woipayo sadzalandira mphotho; Nyali ya amphulupulu idzazima. 
Proverbs24:21 Mwananga, opa Yehova ndi mfumu yomwe, Osadudukira anthu osinthasintha." 
Proverbs24:22 Pakuti tsoka lao lidzaoneka modzidzimuka; Ndipo ndani adziwa cionongeko ca zaka zao? 
Proverbs24:23 Izinso ziri za anzeru. Poweruza cetera siliri labwino. 
Proverbs24:24 Wonenakwa woipa, Wolungama iwe; Magulu a anthu adzamtemberera, mitundu ya anthu idzamkwiyira," 
Proverbs24:25 Omwe amdzudzula adzasekera, Nadzadalitsika ndithu." 
Proverbs24:26 Wobwezera mau oongoka Apsompsona milomo. 
Proverbs24:27 Longosola nchito yako panjapo, nuikonzeretu kumunda; Pambuyo pace ndi kumanga nyumba yako." 
Proverbs24:28 Usacitire mnzako umboni womtsutsa opanda cifukwa; Kodi udzanyenga ndi milomo yako? 
Proverbs24:29 Usanene, Ndidzamcitira zomwezo anandicitira ine; Ndidzabwereza munthuyo monga mwa macitidwe ace." 
Proverbs24:30 Ndinapita pa munda wa wolesi, Polima mphesa munthu wosowa nzeru." 
Proverbs24:31 Taonani, ponsepo panamera minga, Ndi kuwirirapo khwisa; Chinga lace lamiyala ndi kupasuka." 
Proverbs24:32 Pamenepo ndinayang'ana ndi kuganizira, Ndinaona ndi kulandira mwambo." 
Proverbs24:33 Tulo tapang'ono, kungoodzera pang'ono, Kungomanga manja pang'ono m'kugona," 
Proverbs24:34 Ndipo umphawi wako udzafika ngati mbala; Ndi kusauka kwako ngati munthu wacikopa. 
Proverbs25:1 Iyinso ndiyo miyambo ya Solomo Imene anthu a Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda anailemba. 
Proverbs25:2 Kubisa kanthu ndi ulemerero wa Mulungu; Koma ulemerero wa mafumu ndi kusanthula kanthu. 
Proverbs25:3 Pamlengalenga patarika, ndi padziko pakuya, Koma mitima ya mafumu singasanthulike." 
Proverbs25:4 Cotsera siliva mphala yace, Mmisiri wa ng'anjo aturutsamo mbale;" 
Proverbs25:5 Cotsera woipa pamaso pa mfumu, Mpando wace udzakhazikika m'cilungamo." 
Proverbs25:6 Usadzitame pamaso pa mfumu, Ngakhale kuima m'malo mwa akuru;" 
Proverbs25:7 Pakuti kunena kwa iwe, Takwera kuno, Kupambana ndi kuti utsitsidwe pamaso pa kalonga, Amene maso ako anamuona." 
Proverbs25:8 Usaturuke mwansontho kukalimbana, Ungalephere pa kutha kwace, Atakucititsa mnzako manyazi." 
Proverbs25:9 Nena mlandu wako ndi mnzako, Osaulula zinsinsi za mwini;" 
Proverbs25:10 Kuti wakumva angakutonze, Mbiri yako yoipa ndi kusacoka." 
Proverbs25:11 Mau oyenera a pa nthawi yace Akunga zipatso zagolidi m'nsengwa zasiliva. 
Proverbs25:12 Monga phelele lagolidi ndi cipini cagolidi woyengeka, Momwemo wanzeru wodzudzula pa khutu lomvera." 
Proverbs25:13 Monga cisanu ca cipale cofewa pa nthawi ya masika, Momwemo mthenga wokhulupirika kwa amene anamtuma; Atsitsimutsa moyo wa ambuyace." 
Proverbs25:14 Monga mitambo ndi mphepo popanda mvula, Momwemo ndiye wodzikweza ndi zipatso zace monyenga." 
Proverbs25:15 Cipiriro cipembedza mkuru; Lilime lofatsa lityola pfupa," 
Proverbs25:16 Wapeza uci kodi? Idyapo wokwanira, Kuti ungakukole, nusanze." 
Proverbs25:17 Phazi lako lilowe m'nyumba ya mnzako kamodzi kamodzi; Kuti angatope nawe ndi kukuda. 
Proverbs25:18 Wocitira mnzace umboni wonama Ndiye cibonga, ndi lupanga, ndi mubvi wakuthwa." 
Proverbs25:19 Kukhulupirira munthu wa ciwembu tsiku latsoka Kunga dzino lotyoka ndi phazi loguluka. 
Proverbs25:20 Monga wobvula maraya tsiku lamphepo, Ngakhale kuthira vinyo wosasa m'soda, Momwemo woyimbira nyimbo munthu wacisoni." 
Proverbs25:21 Mdani wako akamva njala umdyetse, Akamva ludzu ummwetse madzi," 
Proverbs25:22 Pakuti udzaunjika makala amoto pamtu pace; Ndipo Yehova adzakupatsa mphotho," 
Proverbs25:23 Mphepo ya kumpoto ifikitsa mvula; Comweco lilime losinjirira likwiyitsa nkhope. 
Proverbs25:24 Kukhala pa ngondya ya tsindwi kufunika Kuposa kukhala m'nyumba ndi mkazi wolongolola. 
Proverbs25:25 Monga madzi ozizira kwa munthu wotopa, Momwemo mau abwino akucokera ku dziko lakutari." 
Proverbs25:26 Monga kasupe wopondedwa, ndi citsime cobvonongeka, Momwemo wolungama ngati akonjera woipa." 
Proverbs25:27 Kudya uci wambiri sikuli kwabwino; Comweco kufunafuna ulemu wako wako sikuli ulemu. 
Proverbs25:28 Wosalamulira mtima wace Akunga mudzi wopasuka wopanda linga," 
Proverbs26:1 Monga cipale cofewa m'malimwe, ndi mvula m'masika, Momwemo ulemu suyenera citsiru." 
Proverbs26:2 Monga mpheta irikuzungulira, ndi namzeze alikuuluka, Momwemo temberero la pacabe silifikira." 
Proverbs26:3 Cikoti ciyenera kavalo, ndi cam'kamwa ciyenera buru, Ndi ntyole iyenera pamsana pa zitsiru." 
Proverbs26:4 Usayankhe citsiru monga mwa utsiru wace, Kuti ungafanane naco iwe wekha." 
Proverbs26:5 Yankha citsiru monga mwa utsiru wace, Kuti asadziyese wanzeru." 
Proverbs26:6 Wotumiza mau ndi dzanja la citsiru Adula mapazi ace, namwa zompweteka." 
Proverbs26:7 Miyendo ya wopunduka iri yolobodoka, Momwemo mwambi m'kamwa mwa zitsiru." 
Proverbs26:8 Monga thumba la ngale m'mulu wa miyala, Momwemo wocitira citsiru ulemu." 
Proverbs26:9 Monga munga wolasa dzanja la woledzera, Momwemo mwambi m'kamwa mwa zitsiru." 
Proverbs26:10 Monga woponya mibvi ndi kulasa onse, Momwemo wolembera citsiru, ndi wolembera omwe alikupita panjira." 
Proverbs26:11 Monga garu abweranso ku masanzi ace, Momwemo citsiru cicitanso zopusa zace." 
Proverbs26:12 Kodi uona munthu wodziyesa wanzeru? Ngakhale citsiru cidzacenjera koma ameneyo ai. 
Proverbs26:13 Wolesi ati, Mkango uli panjira, Wobangulawo uli m'makwalala." 
Proverbs26:14 Monga citseko cikankhikira pa zitsulo za pamphuthu, Momwemo wolesi agubuduka pakama pace." 
Proverbs26:15 Wolesi alonga dzanja lace m'mbale; Kumtopetsa kulibweza kukamwa kwace. 
Proverbs26:16 Wolesi adziyesa wanzeru Koposa anthu asanu ndi awiri akuyankha mozindikira. 
Proverbs26:17 Wakungopita ndi kubvutika ndi ndeu yosakhala yace Akunga wogwira makutu a garu. 
Proverbs26:18 Monga woyaruka woponya nsakali, Mibvi, ndi imfa," 
Proverbs26:19 Momwemo wonyenga mnzace ndi kuti, Ndi kusewera kumeneku." 
Proverbs26:20 Posowa nkhuni moto ungozima; Ndi popanda kazitape makangano angoleka. 
Proverbs26:21 Monga makala ozizira pa makala akunyeka, ndi nkhuni pamoto; Momwemo munthu wamakangano autsa ndeu." 
Proverbs26:22 Mau a kazitape ndi zakudya zolongosoka Zitsikira m'kati mwa mimba. 
Proverbs26:23 Milomo yofunitsitsa ndi mtima woipa Ikunga mbale yadothi anaimata ndi mphala yasiliva. 
Proverbs26:24 Wakuda mnzace amanyenga ndi milomo yace; Koma akundika cinyengo m'kati mwace; 
Proverbs26:25 Pamene akometsa mau ace usamkhulupirire; Pakuti m'mtima mwace muli zonyansa zisanu ndi ziwiri. 
Proverbs26:26 Angakhale abisa udani wace pocenjera, Koma udio wace udzabvumbulutsidwa posonkhana anthu." 
Proverbs26:27 Wokumba dzenje adzagwamo, Wogubuduza mwala, udzabweranso pa iye mwini." 
Proverbs26:28 Lilime lonama lida omwewo linawasautsa; Ndipo m'kamwa mosyasyalika mungoononga. 
Proverbs27:1 Usanyadire zamawa, Popeza sudziwa tsiku lina lidzabala ciani?" 
Proverbs27:2 Wina akutame, si m'kamwamwako ai; Mlendo, si milomo ya iwe wekha." 
Proverbs27:3 Mwala ulemera, mcenga ndiwo katundu; Koma mkwiyo wa citsiru upambana kulemera kwace." 
Proverbs27:4 Kupweteka mtima nkwa nkhanza, mkwiyo usefuka; Koma ndani angalakike ndi nsanje?" 
Proverbs27:5 Cidzudzulo comveka ciposa cikondi cobisika. 
Proverbs27:6 Kulasa kwa bwenzi kulikokhulupirika; Koma mdani apsompsona kawiri kawiri. 
Proverbs27:7 Mtima wokhuta upondereza cisa ca uci; Koma wakumva njala ayesa zowawa zonse zotsekemera. 
Proverbs27:8 Monga mbalame yosocera ku cisa cace, Momwemo munthu wosocera ku malo ace." 
Proverbs27:9 Mafuta ndi zonunkhira zikondweretsa mtima, Ndi ubwino wa bwenzi uteronso pakupangira uphungu," 
Proverbs27:10 Mnzako, ndi mnzace wa atate wako, usawasiye; Usanke ku nyumba ya mbale wako tsiku la tsoka lako; Mnansi wapafupi aposa mbale wakutari." 
Proverbs27:11 Mwananga, khala wanzeru, nukondweretse mtima wanga; Kuti ndimuyankhe yemwe anditonza." 
Proverbs27:12 Wocenjera aona zoipa, nabisala; Koma acibwana angopitirira, nalipitsidwa." 
Proverbs27:13 Tenga maraya a woperekera mlendo cikole; Woperekera mkazi waciwerewere cikole umgwire mwini. 
Proverbs27:14 Yemwe adalitsa mnzace ndi mau akuru pouka mamawa, Anthu adzaciyesa cimeneco temberero." 
Proverbs27:15 Kudonthadontha tsiku lamvula, Ndi mkazi wolongolola ali amodzimodzi." 
Proverbs27:16 Wofuna kumletsayo afuna kuletsa mphepo; Dzanja lace lamanja lingogwira mafuta.
