Proverbs27:17 Citsulo cinola citsulo; Comweco munthu anola nkhope ya mnzace. 
Proverbs27:18 Wosunga mkuyu adzadya zipatso zace; Wosamalira ambuyace adzalemekezedwa. 
Proverbs27:19 Monga m'madzi nkhope zionana, Momwemo mitima ya anthu idziwana." 
Proverbs27:20 Kunsi kwa manda ndi kucionongeko sikukhuta; Ngakhale maso a munthu sakhutai. 
Proverbs27:21 Siliva asungunuka m'mbiya, Ndi golidi m'ng'anjo, Motero comwe munthu acitama adziwika naco." 
Proverbs27:22 Ungakhaleukonolacitsirum'mtondo ndi munsi, pamodzi ndi mphale, Koma utsiru wace sudzamcoka." 
Proverbs27:23 Udziwitsitse zoweta zako ziri bwanji, Samalira magulu ako;" 
Proverbs27:24 Pakuti cuma siciri cosatha; Kodi korona alipobe mpaka mibadwo mibadwo? 
Proverbs27:25 Amatuta maudzu, msipu uoneka, Achera masamba a kumapiri," 
Proverbs27:26 Ana a nkhosa akubveka, Atonde aombolera munda;" 
Proverbs27:27 Mkaka wa mbuzi udzakukwanira kudya; Ndi a pa banja lako ndi adzakazi ako. 
Proverbs28:1 Woipaathawapalibewomthamangitsa; Koma olungama alimba mtima ngati mkango. 
Proverbs28:2 Pocimwa dziko akalonga ace acuruka; Koma anthu ozindikira ndi odziwa alikhazikikitsa nthawi yaikuru. 
Proverbs28:3 Munthu waumphawi wotsendereza osauka Akunga mvula yamadzi yokokolola dzinthu. 
Proverbs28:4 Omwe asiya cilamulo atama oipa; Koma omwe asunga cilamulo akangana nao. 
Proverbs28:5 Oipa samvetsetsa ciweruzo; Koma omwe afuna Yehova amvetsetsa zonse. 
Proverbs28:6 Waumphawi woyenda mwangwiro Apambana ndi yemwe akhotetsa njira zace, angakhale alemera." 
Proverbs28:7 Wosunga cilamulo ndiye mwana wozindikira; Koma mnzao wa adyera acititsa atate wace manyazi. 
Proverbs28:8 Wocurukitsa cuma cace, pokongoletsa ndi phindu, Angokundikira yemwe acitira osauka cisoni." 
Proverbs28:9 Wopewetsa khutu lace kuti asamve cilamulo, Ngakhale pemphero lace linyansa." 
Proverbs28:10 Wosoceretsa oongoka mtima alowe m'njira yoipa, Adzagwa mwini m'dzenje lace; Koma angwiro adzalandira colowa cabwino." 
Proverbs28:11 Wolemera adziyesa wanzeru; Koma wosauka wozindikira aululitsa zace. 
Proverbs28:12 Posekera olungama pali ulemerero wambiri; Koma pouka oipa anthu amabisala. 
Proverbs28:13 Wobisa macimo ace sadzaona mwai; Koma wakuwabvomereza, nawasiya adzacitidwa cifundo." 
Proverbs28:14 Wodala munthu wakuopakosalekeza; Koma woumitsa mtima wace adzagwa m'zoipa. 
Proverbs28:15 Monga mkango wobangula ndi cirombo coyendayenda, Momwemo mfumu yoipa ya anthu osauka." 
Proverbs28:16 Kalonga wosowa nzeru apambana kusautsa; Koma yemwe ada cisiriro adzatanimphitsa moyo wace. 
Proverbs28:17 Woparamula mlandu wakupha munthu adzathawira kudzenje; Asamuletse. 
Proverbs28:18 Woyenda mwangwiro adzapulumuka; Koma wokhota m'mayendedwe ace adzagwa posacedwa. 
Proverbs28:19 Wolima munda wace zakudya zidzamkwanira; Koma wotsata anthu opanda pace umphawi udzamkwanira. 
Proverbs28:20 Munthu wokhulupirika ali ndi madalitso ambiri; Koma wokangaza kulemera sadzapulumuka cilango," 
Proverbs28:21 Cetera siliri labwino, Ngakhale kulakwa kuti ukadye kanthu." 
Proverbs28:22 Mwini diso lankhwenzule akangaza kulemera, Osadziwa kuti umphawi udzamfikira." 
Proverbs28:23 Adzamkomera mtima wodzudzula m'tsogolo mwace, Koposa wosyasyalika ndi lilime lace." 
Proverbs28:24 Wobera atate wace, pena amace, nati, Palibe kulakwa; Ndiye mnzace wa munthu wopasula." 
Proverbs28:25 Wodukidwa mtima aputa makangano; Koma wokhulupirira Yehova adzakula. 
Proverbs28:26 Wokhulupirira mtima wace wace ali wopusa; Koma woyenda mwanzeru adzapulumuka," 
Proverbs28:27 Wogawira aumphawi sadzasowa; Koma wophimba maso ace adzatembereredwa kwambiri. 
Proverbs28:28 Pouka oipa anthu amabisala; Koma pakufa amenewo olungama acuruka. 
Proverbs29:1 Yemwe aumitsa khosi atadzudzulidwa kwambiri, Adzasweka modzidzimuka, palibe comciritsa." 
Proverbs29:2 Pocuruka olungama anthu akondwa; Koma polamulira woipa anthu ausa moyo. 
Proverbs29:3 Mwamuna wokonda nzeru akondweretsa atate wace; Koma wotsagana ndi akazi adama amwaza cuma. 
Proverbs29:4 Mfumu akhazikitsa dziko ndi ciweruzo; Koma wosonkhetsa anthu mphatso alipululutsa. 
Proverbs29:5 Wosyasyalika mnzace Acherera mapazi ace ukonde. 
Proverbs29:6 M'kulakwa kwa woipa muli msampha; Koma wolungama ayimba, nakondwera." 
Proverbs29:7 Wolungama asamalira mlandu wa osauka; Koma woipa alibe nzeru yakuudziwa. 
Proverbs29:8 Anthu onyoza atentha mudzi; Koma anzeru alezetsa mkwiyo. 
Proverbs29:9 Munthu wanzeru akatsutsana ndi munthu wopusa, Ngakhale akwiya, ngakhale aseka, palibe mtendere." 
Proverbs29:10 Anthu ankhanza ada wangwiro; Koma oongoka mtima asamalira moyowace. 
Proverbs29:11 Citsiru cibvumbulutsa mkwiyo wace wonse; Koma wanzeru auletsa nautontholetsa. 
Proverbs29:12 Mkuru akamvera cinyengo, Atumuki ace onse ali oipa," 
Proverbs29:13 Waumphawi ndi wotsendereza akumana; Yehova apenyetsa maso a onse awiriwo. 
Proverbs29:14 Mfumu yolamulira osauka mwantheradi, Mpando wace udzakhazikika kufikira nthawi zonse." 
Proverbs29:15 Ntyole ndi cidzudzulo zipatsa nzeru; Koma mwana womlekerera acititsa amace manyazi. 
Proverbs29:16 Pocuruka oipa zolakwa zicuruka; Koma olungama adzaona kugwa kwao. 
Proverbs29:17 Langiza mwana wako, ndipo adzakupumitsa; Nadzasangalatsa moyo wako." 
Proverbs29:18 Popanda cibvumbulutso anthu amasauka; Koma wosunga cilamulo adalitsika. 
Proverbs29:19 Kapolo sangalangizidwe ndi mau, Pakuti azindikira koma osabvomera." 
Proverbs29:20 Kodi uona munthu wansontho m'mau ace? Ngakhale citsiru cidzacenjera, koma ameneyo ai." 
Proverbs29:21 Yemwe alera kapolo wace mwa ufulu kuyambira ubwana wace, Pambuyo pace adzadziyesa mwana wobala." 
Proverbs29:22 Mwamuna wamkwiyo aputa makangano; Waukali acuruka zolakwa. 
Proverbs29:23 Kudzikuza kwa munthu kudzamcepetsa; Koma wokhala ndi mtima wodzicepetsa adzalemekezedwa. 
Proverbs29:24 Woyenda ndi mbala ada moyo wace wace; Amva kulumbira, koma osaulula kanthu." 
Proverbs29:25 Kuopa anthu kuchera msampha; Koma wokhulupirira Yehova adzapulumuka," 
Proverbs29:26 Ambiri afunafuna ciyanjano ca mkuru; Koma ciweruzo ca munthu cicokera kwa Yehova. 
Proverbs29:27 Munthu woipa anyansa olungama; Ndipo woongoka m'njira anyansa wocimwa. 
Proverbs30:1 Mau a Aguri mwana wa Yake; uthenga. Munthuyo anati, Ndadzitopetsa, Mulungu; Ndadzitopetsa, Mulungu, ndathedwa;" 
Proverbs30:2 Pakuti ndipambana anthu onse kupulukira, Ndiribe luntha la munthu." 
Proverbs30:3 Sindinaphunzira nzeru Ngakhale kudziwa Woyerayo. 
Proverbs30:4 Ndani anakwera kumwamba natsikanso? Ndani wakundika nafumbata mphepo? Ndani wamanga madzi m'maraya ace? Ndani wakhazikitsa matsiriziro onse a dziko? Dzina lace ndani? dzina la mwanace ndani? kapena udziwa. 
Proverbs30:5 Mau onse a Mulungu ali oyengeka; Ndiye cikopa ca iwo amene amkhulupirira. 
Proverbs30:6 Usaoniezere kanthu pa mau ace, Angakudzudzule, nungatsutsidwe kuti ulikunama." 
Proverbs30:7 Zinthu ziwiri ndakupemphani, Musandimane izo ndisanamwalire:" 
Proverbs30:8 Mundicotsere kutari zacabe ndi mabodza; Musandipatse umphawi, ngakhale cuma, Mundidyetse zakudya zondiyenera;" 
Proverbs30:9 Ndingakhute ndi kukukanani, ndi kuti, Yehova ndani? Kapena ndingasauke ndi kuba, Ndi kuchula dzina la Mulungu wanga pacabe." 
Proverbs30:10 Usanamizire kapolo kwa mbuyace, Kuti angakutemberere nawe ndi kutsutsidwa." 
Proverbs30:11 Pali mbadwo wotemberera atate ao, Osadalitsa amao." 
Proverbs30:12 Pali mbadwo wodziyesa oyera, Koma osasamba litsilo lao." 
Proverbs30:13 Pali mbadwo wokwezatu maso ao, Zikope zao ndi kutukula." 
Proverbs30:14 Pali mbadwo mano ao akunga malupanga, zibwano zao zikunga mipeni; Kuti adye osauka kuwacotsa kudziko, ndi aumphawi kuwacotsa mwa anthu." 
Proverbs30:15 Msundu uli ndi ana akazi awiri ati, Patsa, patsa, Pali zinthu zitatu sizikhuta konse, Ngakhale zinai sizinena, Kwatha:" 
Proverbs30:16 Manda, ndi cumba, Dziko losakhuta madzi, Ndi moto wosanena, Kwatha." 
Proverbs30:17 Diso locitira atate wace ciphwete, ndi kunyoza kumvera amace, Makungubwi a kumtsinje adzalikolowola, ana a mphungu adzalidya," 
Proverbs30:18 Zinthu zitatu zindithetsa nzeru, Ngakhale zinai, sindizidziwa:" 
Proverbs30:19 Njira ya mphungu m'mlengalenga, Njira ya njoka pamwala, Njira ya ngalawa pakati pa nyanja. Njira ya mwamuna ndi namwali." 
Proverbs30:20 Comweco njira ya mkazi wacigololo; Adya, napukuta pakamwa, nati, Sindinacita zoipa," 
Proverbs30:21 Cifukwa ca zinthu zitatu dziko linthunthumira; Ngakhale cifukwa ca zinai silingathe kupirira nazo: 
Proverbs30:22 Cifukwa ca kapolo pamene ali mfumu; Ndi citsiru citakhuta zakudya; 
Proverbs30:23 Cifukwa ca mkazi wodedwa wokwatidwa; Ndi mdzakazi amene adzalandira colowa ca mbuyace. 
Proverbs30:24 Ziripo zinai ziri zazing'ono padziko; Koma zipambana kukhala zanzeru: 
Proverbs30:25 Nyerere ndi mtundu wosalimba, Koma zitengeratu zakudya zao m'malimwe." 
Proverbs30:26 Mbira ndi mtundu wopanda mphamvu, Koma ziika nyumba zao m'matanthwe." 
Proverbs30:27 Dzombe liribe mfumu, Koma lituruka lonse mabwalo mabwalo." 
Proverbs30:28 Buluzi ungamgwire m'manja, Koma ali m'nyumba za mafumu." 
Proverbs30:29 Pali zinthu zitatu ziyenda cinya cinya; Ngakhale zinai ziyenda mwaufulu: 
Proverbs30:30 Mkango umene uposa zirombo kulimba, Supambukira cinthu ciri conse;" 
Proverbs30:31 Kavalo wolimba m'cuuno, ndi tonde, Ndi mfumu yokhala ndi ankhondo ace." 
Proverbs30:32 Ngati wapusa podzikweza, Ngakhale kuganizira zoipa, tagwira pakamwa." 
Proverbs30:33 Pakuti potakasa mkaka, mafuta ayengekapo; Ndi popsinja mpfuno, mwazi uturukamo; Ndi potimbikira mkwiyo ndeu ionekamo." 
Proverbs31:1 Mau a Lemueli mfumu, uthenga umene amace anamphunzitsa." 
Proverbs31:2 Ciani mwananga, Ciani mwana wa mimba yanga? Ciani mwana wa zowinda zanga?" 
Proverbs31:3 Musapereke mphamvu yako kwa akazi, Ngakhale kuyenda m'njira yoononga mafumu." 
Proverbs31:4 Mafumu, Lemueli, mafumu sayenera kumwa vinyo; Akalonga sayenera kunena, Cakumwa caukali ciri kuti?" 
Proverbs31:5 Kuti angamwe, naiwale malamulo, Naweruze mokhota anthu onse osautsidwa." 
Proverbs31:6 Wofuna kufa umpatse cakumwa caukali, Ndi vinyo kwa owawa mtima;" 
Proverbs31:7 Amwe, narwale umphawi wace, Osakumbukiranso bvuto lace." 
Proverbs31:8 Tsegula pakamwa pako, ukanenere wosalankhula, Ndi mlandu wa amasiye onse." 
Proverbs31:9 Tsegula pakamwa pako, Nuweruze molungama, nunenere osauka ndi aumphawi." 
Proverbs31:10 Mkazi wangwiro ndani angampeze? Pakuti mtengo wace uposa ngale. 
Proverbs31:11 Mtima wa mwamuna wace umkhulupirira, Sadzasowa phindu." 
Proverbs31:12 Mkaziyo amcitira zabwino, si zoipa, Masiku onse a moyo wace." 
Proverbs31:13 Afuna ubweya ndi thonje, Nacita mofunitsa ndi manja ace." 
Proverbs31:14 Akunga zombo za malonda; Nakatenga zakudya zace kutari. 
Proverbs31:15 Aukanso kusanace, Napatsa banja lace zakudya, nagawira adzakazi ace nchito." 
Proverbs31:16 Asinkhasinkha za munda, naugula; Naoka mipesa ndi zipatso za manja ace." 
Proverbs31:17 Amanga m'cuuno mwace ndi mphamvu, Nalimbitsa mikono yace," 
Proverbs31:18 Azindikira kuti malonda ace ampindulira; Nyali yace sizima usiku. 
Proverbs31:19 Agwira njinga ya thonje ndi dzanja lace, Nafumbata mtengo wace." 
Proverbs31:20 Aolowera cikhato cace osauka; Natambasulira aumphawi manja ace. 
Proverbs31:21 Saopera banja lace cipale cofewa; Pakuti banja lace lonse libvala mlangali. 
Proverbs31:22 Adzipangira zimbwi zamaangamaanga; Nabvala bafuta ndi guta woti biriwiri. 
Proverbs31:23 Mwamuna wace adziwika kubwalo, Pokhala pakati pa akuru a dziko." 
Proverbs31:24 Asoka maraya abafuta, nawagulitsa; Napereka mipango kwa wogulitsa malonda." 
Proverbs31:25 Abvala mphamvu ndi ulemu; Nangoseka nthawi ya m'tsogolo. 
Proverbs31:26 Atsegula pakamwa pace ndi nzeru, Ndipo cilangizo ca cifundo ciri pa lilime lace." 
Proverbs31:27 Ayang'anira mayendedwe a banja lace, Sadya zakudya za ulesi." 
Proverbs31:28 Anace adzanyamuka, nadzamucha wodala; Mwamuna wace namtama, nati," 
Proverbs31:29 Ana akazi ambiri anacita mwangwiro, Koma iwe uposa onsewo." 
Proverbs31:30 Kukongola kungonyenga, maonekedwe okoma ndi cabe; Koma mkazi woopa Yehova adzatamandidwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Mumpatse zipatso za manja ace; Ndi nchito zace zimtame kubwalo. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 MAU a Mlaliki, mwana wa Davide, mfumu ya m'Yerusalemu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Zacabecabe, ati Mlaliki; zacabecabe zonse ndi cabe." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Kodi nchito zace zonse munthu asauka nazo zimpindulira ciani? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Mbadwo wina opita, mbadwo wina nufika; koma dziko lingokhalabe masiku onse," 
Ecclesiastes1:5 inde dzuwa lituruka, nililowa, nilifulumira komwe linaturukako." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Kulowa kumwela ndi kuzungulira: kumpoto zungulire zungulire imaomba mphepo; ibweranso monga mwa mazunguliridwe ace. 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Mitsinje yonse ithira m'nyanja, koma nyanja yosadzala; komwe imukira mitsinjeyo, komweko ibweranso." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Zinthu zonse zilemetsa; munthu sakhoza kuzifotokoza; maso sakhuta m'kuona, ndi makutu sakhuta m'kumva." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Comwe cinaoneka cidzaonekanso; ndi comwe cinacitidwa cidzacitidwanso; ndipo palibe kanthu katsopano pansi pano. 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Kodi pali kanthu unganene kuti, Taona katsopano aka? Kanalipo kale, kale lomwe tisanabadwe ife." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Zoyamba zija sizikumbukiridwa; ngakhale zomwe zirinkudzazo, omwe adzakhalabe m'tsogolomo, sadzazikumbukirai." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ine Mlaliki ndinali mfumu ya: Israyeli m'Yerusalemu. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ndipo ndinapereka mtima kufunafuna ndi nzeru, ndi kulondetsa zonse zimacitidwa pansi pa thambo; nchito yobvuta imeneyi Mulungu apatsa ana a anthu akasauke nayo." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ndaona nchito zonse zipangidwa kunja kuno; ndipo zonsezo ndi cabe ndi kungosautsa mtima. 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Cokhotakhota sicingaongokenso; ndipo coperewera sicingawerengedwe. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ndinalankhula ndi mtima wanga, ndi kuti, Taona, ndakuza ndi kudzienjezera nzeru koposa onse anakhala m'Yerusalemu ndisanabadwe ine; inde mtima wanga wapenyera kwambiri nzeru ndi cidziwitso." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ndipo ndinapereka mtima kudziwa nzeru ndi kudziwa misala ndi utsiru; ndinazindikira kuti icinso cingosautsa mtima. 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Pakuti m'nzeru yambiri muli cisoni cambiri; ndi yemwe aenjezera cidziwitso aenjezera zowawa. 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ndinati mumtima mwanga, Tiyetu, ndikuyese ndi cimwemwe; tapenya tsono zabwino; ndipo taona, icinso ndi cabe." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ndinati, Kuseka ndi misala; ndi cimwemwe kodi cicita ciani?" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ndinafuna mumtima mwanga kusangalatsa thupi langa ndi vinyo, mtima wanga ulikunditsogolera mwanzeru, ndi kugwira utsiru, kuti ndizindikire cabwinoco ca ana a anthu nciani cimene azicicita pansi pa thambo masiku onse a moyo wao." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ndinadzipangira zazikuru; ndinadzimangira nyumba; ndi kunka mipesa; 
Ecclesiastes2:5 ndinakonza mphanie ndi minda yanga, ndi kuokamo mitengo ya zipatso za mitundu mitundu;" 
Ecclesiastes2:6 ndinadzipangira ndekha matamanda a madzi akuthirira madzi m'nkhalango momeramo mitengo; 
Ecclesiastes2:7 ndinadzitengera akapolo ndi adzakazi, ndinali ndi akapolo anabadwa kwanga; ndinalemeranso pokhala nazo zoweta zazikuru ndi zazing'ono kupambana onse anakhala m'Yerusalemu ndisanabadwe ine;" 
Ecclesiastes2:8 ndinakundikanso siliva ndi golidi ndi cuma ca mafumu ndi madera a dziko; ndinaitanitsa amuna ndi akazi akuyimba ndi zokondweretsazo za ana a anthu, ndizo zoyimbira za mitundu mitundu." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ndinakula cikulire kupambana onse anali m'Yerusalemu ndisanabadwe ine; ndipo nzeru yanganso inakhala nanebe. 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ndipo ciri conse maso anga anacifuna sindinawamana; sindinakaniza mtima wanga cimwemwe ciri conse pakuti mtima wanga unakondwera ndi nchito zanga zonse; gawo langa la m'nchito zanga zonse ndi limeneli. 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Pamenepo ndinayang'ana zonse manja anga anazipanga, ndi nchito zonse ndinasauka pozigwira; ndipo taona, zonse zinali zacabecabe ndi kungosautsa mtima, ndipo kunalibe phindu kunja kuno." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ndipo ndinatembenuka kukayang'ana nzeru ndi misala ndi utsiru; pakuti yemwe angotsata mfumu angacite ciani? Si comwe cinacitidwa kale. 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Pamenepo ndinazindikira kuti nzeru ipambana utsiru kwambiri, monga kuunika kupambana mdima." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Wanzeru maso ace ali m'mutu wace, koma citsiru ciyenda mumdima; ndipo nanenso ndinazindikira kuti comwe ciwagwera onsewo ndi cimodzi." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Pamenepo ndinati mumtima mwanga, Comwe cigwera citsiru nanenso cindigwera; nanga bwanji ndinapambana kukhala wanzeru? Pamenepo ndinati mumtima mwanga kuti icinso ndi cabe." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Pakuti wanzerusaposa citsiru kukumbukidwa nthawi zonse; pakuti zonse zooneka kale zidzaiwalika m'tsogolomo, Ndipo wanzeru amwalira bwanji ngati citsirutu." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Cifukwa cace ndinada moyo; pakuti nchito azipanga kunja kuno zindisautsa; pakuti zonse ndi cabe ndi kungosautsa mtima. 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ndipo ndinada nchito zanga zonse ndinasauka nazo kunja kuno; pakuti ndidzamsiyira izo munthu wina amene adzanditsata. 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ndipo ndani adziwa ngati adzakhala wanzeru pena citsiru? Koma adzalamulira nchito zanga zonse ndinasauka nazo, ndi kuzigwira mwanzeru kunja kuno. Icinso ndi cabe." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ndipo ndinatembenuka ndi kukhululuka za nchito zanga zonse ndasauka nazo kunja kuno. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Pakuti pali munthu wina agwira nchito mwanzeru ndi modziwa nadzipinduliramo; koma adzapereka gawo lace kwa munthu amene sanagwirapo nchito. Icinso ndi cabe ndi coipa cacikuru. 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Pakuti munthu ali ndi ciani m'nchito zace zonse, ndi m'kusauka kwa mtima wace amasauka nazozo kunja kuno?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Pakuti masiku ace onse ndi zisoni, bvuto lace ndi kumliritsa; ngakhale usiku mtima wace supuma. Icinso ndi cabe." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Kodi si cabwino kuti munthu adye namwe, naonetse moyo wace, zabwino m'nchito yace? icinso ndinacizindikira kuti cicokera ku dzanja la Mulungu." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Pakuti ndani angadye ndi kufulumirako, koposa ine." 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Pakuti yemwe Mulungu amuyesa wabwino ampatsa nzeru ndi cidziwitso ndi cimwemwe; koma wocimwa amlawitsa bvuto la kusonkhanitsa ndi kukundika, kuti aperekere yemwe Mulungu amuyesa wabwino. Icinso ndi cabe ndi kungosautsa mtima." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Kanthu kali konse kali ndi nthawi yace ndi cofuna ciri conse ca pansi pa thambo ciri ndi mphindi yace; 
Ecclesiastes3:2 mphindi yakubadwa ndi mphindi yakumwalira; mphindi yakubzyala ndi mphindi yakuzula zobzyalazo; 
Ecclesiastes3:3 mphindi yakupha ndi mphindi yakuciza; mphindi yakupasula ndi mphindi yakumanga; 
Ecclesiastes3:4 mphindi yakugwa misozi ndi mphindi yakuseka; mphindi yakulira ndi mphindi yakubvina; 
Ecclesiastes3:5 mphindi yakutaya miyala ndi mphindi yakukundika miyala; mphindi yakufungatirana ndi mphindi yakuleka kufungatirana; 
Ecclesiastes3:6 mphindi yakufunafuna ndi mphindi yakumwazika; mphindi yakusunga ndi mphindi yakutaya; 
Ecclesiastes3:7 mphindi yakung'amba ndi mphindi yakusoka; mphindi yakutonthola ndi mphindi yakulankhula; 
Ecclesiastes3:8 mphindi yakukonda ndi mphindi yakudana; mphindi ya nkhondo ndi mphindi ya mtendere. 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Wogwira nchito aona phindu lanji m'comsautsaco? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ndaona bvuto limene Mulungu wapatsa ana a anthu kuti abvutidwe nalo. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Cinthu ciri conse anacikongoletsa pa mphindi yace; ndipo waika zamuyaya m'mitima yao ndipo palibe munthu angalondetse nchito Mulungu wazipanga ciyambire mpaka citsiriziro. 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ndidziwa kuti iwo alibe ubwino, koma kukondwa ndi kucita zabwino pokhala ndi moyo." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Ndiponso kuti munthu yense adye namwe naone zabwino m'nchito zace zonse; ndiwo mtulo wa Mulungu. 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ndidziwa kuti zonse Mulungu azicita zidzakhala kufikira nthawi zonse; sungaonjezepo kanthu, ngakhale kucotsapo; Mulungu nazicita kuti anthu akaope pamaso pace." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Cocomwe cinaoneka, cirikuonekabe; ndi comwe cidzaoneka cinacitidwa kale; Mulungu anasanthula zocitidwa kale." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Ndiponso ndinaona kunja kuno malo akuweruza, komweko kuli zaipa; ndi malo a cilungamo, komweko kuli zoipa." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ndinati mumtima wanga, Mulungu adzaweruza wolungama ndi woipa; pakuti pamenepo pali mphindi ya zofuna zonse ndi nchito zonse." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ndinati mumtima mwanga, kuti izi zicitika ndi ana a anthu, kuti Mulungu awayese ndi kuti akazindikire eni ace kuti ndiwo nyama za kuthengo." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Pakuti comwe cigwera ana a anthu cigweranso nyamazo; ngakhale cowagwera ncimodzimodzi; monga winayo angofa momwemo zinazo zifanso; inde onsewo ali ndi mpweya umodzi; ndipo munthu sapambana nyama pakuti zonse ndi cabe," 
Ecclesiastes3:20 onse apita ku malo amodzi; onse acokera m'pfumbi ndi onse abweranso kupfumbi. 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ndani adziwa mzimu wa ana a anthu wakwera kumwamba, ndi mzimu wa nyama wotsikira kunsi ku dziko?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 M'mwemo ndinazindikira kuti kulibe kanthu kabwino kopambana aka, kuti munthu akondwere ndi nchito zace; pakuti gawo lace ndi limeneli; pakuti ndani adzamfikitsa kuona comwe cidzacitidwa ataca iyeyo?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ndinabweranso tsono ndi kupenyera nsautso zonse zimacitidwa kunja kuno; ndipo taona, misozi ya otsenderezedwa, koma analibe wakuwatonthoza; ndipo akuwatsendereza anali ndi mphamvu koma iwowa analibe wakuwatonthoza." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ndipo ndinatama akufa atatha kufa kupambana amoyo omwe alipobe; 
Ecclesiastes4:3 inde yemwe sanabadwe konse aposa onse awiriwo popeza sanaone nchito yoipa yocitidwa kunja kuno. 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Ndiponso ndinapenyera mabvuto onse ndi nchito zonse zompindulira bwino, kuti cifukwa ca zimenezi anansi ace acitira munthu nsanje. Icinso ndi cabe ndi kungosautsa mtima." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Citsiru cimanga manja ace, nicidya nyama yace yace." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Dzanja limodzi lodzala pali mtendere liposa manja awiri oti tho pali bvuto ndi kungosautsa mtima. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Pamenepo ndinabwera ndi kupenyera zacabe kunja kuno. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Pali mmodzi palibe waciwiri; inde, alibe mwana ngakhale mbale; koma nchito yace yonse iribe citsiriziro, ngakhale diso lace silikhuta cuma. Samati, Ndigwira nchito ndi kumana moyo wanga zabwino cifukwa ca yani? Icinso ndi cabe, inde, bvuto lalikuru." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Awiri aposa mmodzi; pakuti ali ndi mphotho yabwino m'nchito zao. 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Pakuti akagwa, wina adzautsa mnzace; koma tsoka wakugwa wopanda womnyamutsa." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Ndiponso awiri akagona limodzi afunditsana; koma mmodzi pa yekha kodi adzafunditsidwa bwanji? 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Ndipo wina akamlaka mmodziyo, awiri adzacirimika; ndipo cingwe ca nkhosi zitatu siciduka msanga." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Mnyamata wosauka ndi wanzeru apambana mfumu yokalamba ndi yopusa, imene sifunanso kulangidwa mwambo." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Pakuti aturuka m'nyumba yandende kulowa ufumu; komanso yemwe abadwa m'dziko lace asauka. 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ndinapenyera anthu onse amoyo akuyenda kunja kuno, kuti anali ndi mwana, waciwiri, amene adzalowa m'malo mwace." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Anthu onse sawerengeka, ngakhale onsewo anawalamulira; koma amene akudza m'mbuyo sadzakondwera naye. Icinso ndi cabe nicisautsa mtima." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Samalira phazi lako popita ku nyumba ya Mulungu; pakuti kuyandikira kumvera kupambana kupereka nsembe za zitsiru; pakuti sizizindikira kuti zirikucimwa. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Usalankhule mwanthuku mtima wako, usafulumire kunena kanthu pamaso pa Mulungu; pakuti Mulungu ali kumwamba, iwe uli pansi; cifukwa cace mau ako akhale owerengeka." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Pakuti loto lafika mwakucuruka nchito; ndipo mau a citsiru mwakucuruka maneno. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Utawinda ciwindo kwa Mulungu, usacedwe kucicita; pakuti sakondwera ndi zitsiru; cita comwe unaciwindaco." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kusawinda kupambana kuwinda osacita," 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Usalole m'kamwa mwako mucimwitse thupi lako; usanene pamaso pa mthenga kuti, Ndinaphophonya; Mulungu akwiyire mau ako cifukwa ninji, naononge nchito ya manja ako?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Pakuti monga mu unyinji wa maloto muli zacabe motero mocuruka mau; koma dziopa Mulungu. 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ukaona anthu alikutsendereza aumphawi, ndi kucotsa cilungamo ndi ciweruzo mwaciwawa pa dera lina la dziko, usazizwepo; pakuti mkuru wopambana asamalira; ndipo alipo akuru ena oposa amenewo." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Phindutu la dziko lipindulira onse; ngakhale mfumu munda umthandiza. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Wokonda siliva sadzakhuta siliva; ngakhale wokonda cuma sadzakhuta phindu; icinso ndi cabe. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Pocuruka katundu, akudyapo acurukanso; nanga apindulira eni ace ciani, koma kungopenyera ndi maso ao?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Tulo ta munthu wogwira nchito ntabwino, ngakhale adya pang'ono ngakhale zambiri; koma kukhuta kwa wolemera sikumgonetsa tulo." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Pali coipa cobvuta ndaciona kunja kuno, ndico, cuma cirikupweteka eni ace pocikundika;" 
Ecclesiastes5:14 koma cumaco cionongeka pomgwera tsoka; ndipo akabala mwana, m'dzanja lace mulibe kanthu." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Monga anaturuka m'mimba ya amace, adzabweranso kupita wamarisece, monga anadza osatenga kanthu pa nchito zace, kakunyamula m'dzanja lace." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Icinso ndi coipa cowawa, cakuti adzangopita monse monga anadza; ndipo wodzisautsa cabe adzaona phindu lanji?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Inde masiku ace onse amadya mumdima, nizimcurukira cisoni ndi nthenda ndi mkwiyo." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Taonani, comwe ine ndapenyera kukoma ndi kuyenera munthu ndiko kudya, ndi kumwa, ndi kukondwera ndi nchito zace zonse asauka nazo kunja kuno, masiku onse a moyo wace umene Mulungu ampatsa; pokhala gawo lace limeneli." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Inde yemwe Mulungu wamlemeretsa nampatsa cuma, namninkhanso mphamvu ya kudyapo, ndi kulandira gawo lace ndi kukondwera ndi nchito zace; umenewu ndiwo mtulo wa Mulungu." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Pakuti sadzakumbukira masiku a moyo wace kwambiri; cifukwa Mulungu ambvomereza m'cimwemwe ca mtima wace. 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Pali coipa ndaciona kunja kuno cifalikira mwa anthu," 
Ecclesiastes6:2 munthu amene Mulungu wamlemeretsa nampatsa cuma ndi ulemu, mtima wace susowa kanthu kena ka zonse azifuna, koma Mulungu osampatsa mphamvu ya kudyapo, koma mlendo adyazo; ici ndi cabe ndi nthenda yoipa," 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Cinkana munthu akabala ana makumi khumi, nakhala ndi moyo zaka zambiri, masiku a zaka zace ndi kucuruka, koma mtima wace osakhuta zabwino, ndiponso alibe maliro; nditi, Nsenye iposa ameneyo;" 
Ecclesiastes6:4 pakuti ikudza mwacabe, nicoka mumdima, mdima nukwirira dzina lace." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Ngakhale dzuwa siliona ngakhale kulidziwa, imeneyi ipambana winayo kupuma;" 
Ecclesiastes6:6 akakhala ndi moyo zaka zikwi ziwiri, koma osakondwera; kodi onse sapita ku malo amodzi?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Nchito zace zonse munthu angogwirira m'kamwa mwace, koma mtima wace sukhuta." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Pakuti wanzeru ali ndi ciani coposa citsiru? Waumphawi wodziwa kuyenda pa maso pa amoyo ali ndi ciani? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kupenya kwa maso kuposa kukhumba kwa mtima; icinso ndi cabe ndi kungosautsa mtima. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Comwe cinalipo cachedwa dzina lace kale, cidziwika kuti ndiye munthu; sakhoza kulimbana ndi womposa mphamvu." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Pokhala zinthu zambiri zingocurukitsa zacabe, kodi anthu aona phindu lanji?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Pakuti ndani adziwa comwe ciri cabwino kwa munthu ali ndi moyo masiku onse a moyo wace wacabe umene autsiriza ngati mthunzi? pakuti ndani adzauza munthu cimene cidzaoneka m'tsogolo mwace kunja kuno? 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Mbiri yabwino iposa zonunkhira zabwino; ndi tsiku lakumwalira liposa tsiku lakubadwa. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kunka ku nyumba ya maliro kupambana kunka ku nyumba ya madyerero; pakuti kujako ndi matsiriziro a anthu onse; ndipo omwe ali ndi moyo adzakumbukirapo. 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Cisoni ciposa kuseka; pakuti nkhope yakugwa ikonza mtima. 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mtima wa anzeru uli m'nyumba ya maliro; koma mtima wa zitsiru uli m'nyumba ya kuseka. 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kumva cidzudzulo ca anzeru kupambana kumva nyimbo ya zitsiru. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Pakuti kuseka kwa citsiru kunga minga irikutetheka pansi pa mphika; icinso ndi cabe. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Indetu nsautso iyarutsa wanzeru; ndi mtulo uipitsa mtima. 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Citsiriziro ca kanthu ciposa ciyambi cace; wofatsa mtima apambana wodzikuza mtima. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Usakangaze mumtima mwako kukwiya; pakuti mkwiyo ugona m'cifuwa ca zitsiru. 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Usanene, Kodi bwanji masiku akale anapambana ano? Pakuti sulikufunsa mwanzeru pamenepo." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Nzeru iri yabwino pamodzi ndi colowa; akuona dzuwa apindula nayo. 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Pakuti nzeru icinjiriza monga ndalama zicinjiriza; koma kudziwa kupambana, cifukwa nzeru isunga moyo wa eni ace." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Tapenya nchito ya Mulungu; pakuti ndani akhoza kulungamitsa comwe iye anacikhotetsa? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Tsiku la mwai kondwera, koma tsiku la tsoka lingirira; Mulungu waika ici pambali pa cinzace, kuti anthu asapeze kanthu ka m'tsogolo mwao." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ndaona zonsezi masiku anga acabe; pali wolungama angofa m'cilungamo cace, ndipo pali woipa angokhalabe ndi moyo m'kuipa kwace." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Usapambanitse kukhala wolungama; usakhale wanzeru koposa; bwanji ufuna kudziononga wekha? 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Usapambanitse kuipa, ngakhale kupusa, uferenji nthawi yako isanafike?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Kuli kwabwino kugwira ici; indetu, usacotsepo dzanja lako pakuti yemwe aopa Mulungu adzaturuka monsemo." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Nzeru ilimbitsa wanzeru koposa akuru khumi akulamulira m'mudzi. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Pakuti kulibe wolungama pansi pano amene acita zabwino osacimwa. 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Mau onsetu onenedwa usawalabadire; kuti usamve kapolo wako alikukutemberera; 
Ecclesiastes7:22 pakuti kawiri kawiritu mtima wako udziwa kuti nawenso unatemberera ena. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ndayesa zonsezi ndi nzeru; ndinati, Ndidzakhala wanzeru, koma inanditarikira." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Cakutari ndi cakuyadi adzacipeza ndani? 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ndinapotoka ndi mtima wanga womwe kudziwa ndi kusanthula ndi kufunafuna nzeru ndi malongosoledwe a zinthu, ndi kudziwa kuti udio ndiwo utsiru, ndi kuti kupusa ndi misala;" 
Ecclesiastes7:26 ndipo ndinapeza kanthu kowawa koposa imfa, ndiko mkazi amene ndiye msampha, mtima wace ukunga maukonde, manja ace ndiwo matangadza; yemwe Mulungu amuyesa wabwino adzapulumuka kwa iye; koma wocimwa adzagwidwa naye." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Taonani, ici ndacipeza, ati Mlalikiyo, m'kuphatikiza cinthu cina ndi cinzace, ndikazindikire malongosoledwe ao;" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 comwe moyo wanga ucifuna cifunire, koma osacipezai ndi ici, mwamuna mmodzi mwa cikwi ndinampezadi, koma mkazitu mwa onsewo sindinampeza." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Taonani, ici cokha ndacipeza kuti Mulungu analenga anthu oongoka mtima; koma iwowo afunafuna malongosoledwe a mitundu mitundu." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ndani akunga wanzeru? Ndani adziwa tanthauzo la mau? Nzeru ya munthu iwalitsa nkhope yace, kuduwa kwa nkhope yace ndi kusanduka." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Nditi, Sunga mau a mfumu, makamaka m'kulumbira Mulungu." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Usakangaze kumcokera; usaumirire kanthu koipa; pakuti iyeyo amacita comwe cimkonda. 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Pakuti mau a mfumu ali ndi mphamvu; ndipo ndani anganene kwa iye, Kodi ucita ciani?" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Wosunga cilamulo sadzadziwa kanthu koipa; ndipo mtima wa munthu wanzeru udziwa nyengo ndi maweruzo; 
Ecclesiastes8:6 pakuti kanthu kali konse kali ndi nthawi yace ndi ciweruzo cace; popeza zoipa za munthu zimcurukira; 
Ecclesiastes8:7 pakuti sadziwa cimene cidzakhala; pakuti ndani angamuuze nthawi yakuti cidzacitidwa? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Kulibe munthu ali ndi mphamvu yolamulira mzimu ndi yakutsekereza mzimu; ngakhale mphamvu tsiku la imfa; munkhondo umo mulibe kumasuka; udio sudzapulumutsa akuzolowerana nao. 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Zonsezi ndaziona ndi kuyang'anitsa mtima wanga nchito zonse zicitidwa pansi pano; nthawi yakuti wina apweteka mnzace pomlamulira. 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ndipo ndinaona oipa alikuikidwa m'manda ndi kupita; ndipo omwe anacita zolungama anacokera ku malo opatulika a ku mudzi nawaiwala; icinso ndi cabe. 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Popeza sambwezera coipa cace posacedwa atamtsutsa munthu, ana a anthu atsimikizadi mitima yao kucita zoipa." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Angakhale wocimwa acita zoipa zambirimbiri, masiku ace ndi kucuruka, koma ndidziwitsadi kuti omwe aopa Mulungu naopa pamaso pace adzapeza bwino;" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 koma woipa sadzapeza bwino ngakhale kutanimphitsa masiku ace ngati mthunzi; cifukwa saopa pamaso pa Mulungu. 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Pali cinthu cacabe cimacitidwa pansi pano; cakuti alipo olungama amene aona zomwe ziyenera nchito za oipa, ndipo alipo oipa amene aona zomwe ziyenera nchito za olungama, Ndinati, Icinso ndi cabe." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Pompo ndinatama kusekaseka, pakuti munthu alibe kanthu kabwino pansi pano, koma kudya ndi kumwa, ndi kusekera; ndi kuti zimenezi zikhalebe naye m'bvuto lace masiku onse a moyo wace umene Mulungu wampatsa pansi pano." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Pompo ndinapereka mtima wanga kudziwa nzeru, ndi kupenya nchito zicitidwa pansi pano; kuti anthu saona tulo konse ndi maso ao ngakhale usana ngakhale usiku;" 
Ecclesiastes8:17 pamenepo ndinaona nchito zonse za Mulungu kuti anthu sangalondole nchito ziciddwa pansi pano; pakuti angakhale munthu ayesetsa kuzifunafuna koma sadzazipeza; indetu ngakhalenso wanzeru akati, ndidziwa, koma adzalephera kuzilondola." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Pakuti zonsezi ndinazisunga mumtima ndikalondoletu zonsezi; kuti olungama ndi anzeru ndi nchito zao ali m'manja a Mulungu; ngakhale kukonda ngakhale kudana anthu sadziwa; zonse ziri m'tsogolo mwao. 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Zonse zigwera onse cimodzimodzi; kanthu kamodzi kangogwera wolungama ndi woipa; ngakhale wabwino ndi woyera ndi wodetsedwa: ngakhale wopereka nsembe ndi wosapereka konse; wabwino alingana ndi wocimwa; wolumbira ndi woopa lumbiro. 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ici ndi coipa m'zonse zicitidwa pansi pano, cakuti kanthu kamodzi kagwera onse; indetu, mtimanso wa ana a anthu wadzala udio, ndipo misala iri m'mtima wao akali ndi moyo, ndi pamenepo apita kwa akufa." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Pakuti woyang'ana ndi amoyo onse ali naco ciyembekezo; pakuti garu wamoyo aposa mkango wakufa. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Pakuti amoyo adziwa kuti tidzafa; koma akufa sadziwa kanthu bi, sadzalandira mphotho; pakuti angoiwalika." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Cikondi cao ndi mdano wao ndi dumbo lao lomwe zatha tsopano; ndipo nthawi yamuyaya sagawa konse kanthu kali konse kacitidwa pansi pano. 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Tiye, idya zakudya zako mokondwa, numwe vinyo wako mosekera mtima; pakuti Mulungu wabvomerezeratu zocita zako." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Zobvala zako zikhale zoyera masiku onse; mutu wako usasowe mafuta. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Khalani mokondwa ndi mkazi umkonda masiku onse a moyo wako wacabe, umene Mulungu wakupatsa pansi pano masiku ako onse acabe; pakuti ilo ndi gawo lako la m'moyo ndi m'nchito zimene ubvutika nazo pansi pano." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ciri conse dzanja lako licipeza kucicita, ucicite ndi mphamvu yako; pakuti mulibe nchito ngakhale kulingirira ngakhale kudziwa, ngakhale nzeru, kumanda ulikupitako." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ndinabweranso ndi kuzindikira pansi pano kuti omwe atamanga msanga sapambana m'liwiro, ngakhale olimba sapambana m'nkhondo, ngakhale anzeru sapeza zakudya, ngakhale ozindikira bwino salemera, ngakhale odziwitsa sawakomera mtima; koma yense angoona zomgwera m'nthawi mwace." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Pakuti munthu sadziwatu mphindi yace; monga nsomba zigwidwa m'ukonde woipa, ndi mbalame zikodwa mumsampha, momwemo ana a anthu amagwidwa ndi nthawi ya tsoka, ngati msampha umene uwagwera modzidzimuka." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ndaonanso nzeru pansi pano motero, ndipo inandionekera yaikuru;" 
Ecclesiastes9:14 panali mudzi waung'ono muli anthu owerengeka; ndipo inadzako mfumu yaikuru, niizinga ndi nkhondo, nimangapo malinga akuru;" 
Ecclesiastes9:15 koma anapezedwamo mwamuna wanzeru wosauka, yemweyo napulumutsa mudziwo ndi nzeru yace; koma panalibe anthu anakumbukira wosauka ameneyo." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Pamenepo ndinati, Nzeru ipambana mphamvu; koma anyoza nzeru ya wosauka, osamvera mau ace." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mau a anzeru acete amveka koposa kupfuula kwa wolamulira mwa zitsiru. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Nzeru ipambana zida za nkhondo; koma wocimwa mmodzi aononga zabwino zambiri. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Nchenche zakufa zinunkhitsa moipa nizioletsa mafuta onunkhira a sing'anga; comweco kupusa kwapang'ono kuipitsa iye amene achuka cifukwa ca nzeru ndi ulemu. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Wanzeru, mtima wace uli ku dzanja lace lamanja; koma citsiru, mtima wace kulamanzere." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Inde, poyendanso citsiru panjira, nzeru yace imthera ndipo angoti kwa onse kuti, Ndine citsiru." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ngati mkuru akukwiyira, usasiye malo ako; cifukwa cifatso cipembedza utacimwa kwambiri." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Pali coipa ndaciona pansi pano, ngati kulakwa koyambira ndi mkuru;" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 utsiru ukhazikika pamwamba penipeni, ndipo olemera angokhala mwamanyazi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ndaona akapolo atakwera pa akavalo, ndi mafumu, alikuyenda pansi ngati akapolo." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Wokumba mbuna adzagwamo; ndipo woboola mpanda njoka idzamluma. 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Wosendeza miyala adzaphwetekedwa nayo; wowaza nkhuni nadzitema. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Citsulo cikakhala cosathwa, ndipo ukaleka kunola, uzipambana kulimbikira; koma nzeru ipindulira pocenjeza." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Njoka ikaluma isanalodzedwe, watsenga saona mphotho." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mau a m'kamwa mwa munthu wanzeru nga cisomo; koma milomo ya citsiru idzacimeza. 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Ciyambi ca mau a m'kamwa mwace ndi utsiru; ndipo cimariziro ca m'kamwa mwace ndi misala yoipa," 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Citsiru cicurukitsanso mau; koma munthu sadziwa cimene cidzaoneka; ndipo ndani angamuuze comwe cidzakhala m'tsogolo mwace? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Nchito ya zitsiru izitopetsa zonsezo, pakuti sicidziwa kunka kumudzi." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Tsoka kwa dzikowe, pamene mfumu yako ndiye mwana, ndipo akalonga ako adyera mamawa!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Mwai kwa dzikowe, pamene mfumu yako ndiye mwana wa aufulu, ndipo akalonga ako adya pa nthawi yoyenera akalimbe osati akaledzere ai." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Tsindwi litewa ndi mphwai za eni ace; nyumba nidontha ndi ulesi wa manja. 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Amaphikira zakudya kuti asekere, vinyo nakondweretsa moyo; ndipo ndalama zibvomera zonse." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Usatemberere mfumu ngakhale poganizira; usatemberere wolemera m'cipinda cogona iwemo; pakuti mbalame ya mlengalenga idzanyamula mauwo, ndipo couluka ndi mapiko cidzamveketsa zonenazo." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Ponya zakudya zako pamadzi; udzazipeza popita masiku ambiri. 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Gawira asanu ndi awiri ngakhale asanu ndi atatu; pakuti sudziwa coipa canji cidzaoneka pansi pano. 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Mitambo ikadzala mvula, itsanulira pansi; mtengo ukagwa kumwela pena kumpoto, pomwe unagwa mtengowo udzakhala pomwepo." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Woyang'ana mphepo sadzafesa; ndi wopenya mitambo sadzakolola. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Monga sudziwa njira ya mphepo, ngakhale makulidwe a mafupa m'mimba ya mkazi ali ndi pakati; momwemo sudziwa nchito za Mulungu amene acita zonse." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Mamawa fesa mbeu zako, madzulonso osapumitsa dzanja lako; pakuti sudziwa ziti zidzalola bwino ngakhale izizi, ngakhale izozo, kaya zonse ziwiri zidzakhala bwino." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Indetu kuunika nkokoma, maso napeza bwino m'kuona dzuwa." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Inde, munthu akakhala ndi moyo zaka zambiri, akondwere ndi zonsezo; koma akumbukire masiku amdima kuti adzacuruka. Zonse zirinkudza ziri zacabe." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Kondwera ndi unyamata wako, mnyamata iwe; mtima wako nukasangalale masiku a unyamata wako, nuyende m'njira za mtima wako, ndi monga maso ako aona; koma dziwitsa kuti Mulungu adzanena nawe mlandu wa zonsezi." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Cifukwa cace cotsani zopweteka m'mtima mwako, nulekanitse zoipa ndi thupi lako; pakuti ubwana ndi unyamata ngwa cabe." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Ukumbukirenso Mlengi wako masiku a unyamata wako, asanadze masiku oipa, ngakhale zisanayandikire zakazo zakuti udzati, Sindikondwera nazo;" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 ngakhale lisanade dzuwa, ndi kuunika, ndi mwezi, ndi nyenyezi, mitambo ndi kubweranso italeka mvula;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 tsikulo omwe asunga nyumba adzanthunthumira, amuna olimba nadzawerama, akupera nadzaleka poperewera, omwe ayang'ana pamazenera nadzadetsedwa;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 pa khomo lakunja padzatsekeka; potsika mau akupera, wina nanyamuka polira mbalame, ndipo akazi onse akuyimba sadzamveka bwino;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 inde, adzaopa za pamwamba, panjira padzakhala zoopsya; mciu nudzaphuka, dzombe ndi kukoka miyendo, zilakolako ndi kutha; pakuti munthu apita kwao kwamuyaya, akulira maliro nayendayenda panja;" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 cingwe casiliva cisanaduke, ngakhale mbale yagolidi isanasweke, ngakhale mtsuko usanaphwanyike kukasupe, ngakhale njinga yotungira madzi isanatyoke kucitsime;" 
Ecclesiastes12:7 pfumbi ndi kubwera pansi pomwe linali kale, mzimu ndi kubwera kwa Mulungu amene anaupereka." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Cabe zacabetu, ati Mlalikiyo; zonse ndi cabe." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Ndiponso pokhala wanzeru Mlalikiyo anaphunzitsabe anthu nzeru; inde, anachera makutu nafunafuna nalongosolamiyambiyambiri." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Mlalikiyo anasanthula akapeze mau okondweretsa, ndi zolemba zoongoka ngakhale mau oona." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Mau a anzeru akunga zisonga, omwe akundika mau amene mbusa mmodzi awapatsa mau ao akunga misomali yokhomedwa zolimba." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Pamodzi ndi izi, mwananga, tacenjezedwa; pakuti saleka kulemba mabuku ambiri; ndipo kuphunzira kwambiri kutopetsa thupi." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Mau atha; zonse zamveka zatha; opa Mulungu, musunge malamulo ace; pakuti coyenera anthu onse ndi ici." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Pakuti Mulungu adzanena mlandu wa zocita zonse, ndi zobisika zonse, ngakhale zabwino ngakhale zoipa." 
SongOfSongs1:1 NYIMBO yoposa, ndiyo ya Solomo." 
SongOfSongs1:2 Mnyamatayo andipsompsonetse ndi m'kamwa mwace; Pakuti cikondi cako ciposa vinyo. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Mafuta ako anunkhira bwino; Dzina lako likunga mafuta onunkhira otsanulidwa; Cifukwa cace anamwali akukonda. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Undikoke; tikuthamangire; Mfumu yandilowetsa m'zipinda zace: Tidzasangalala ndi kukondwera ndi iwe. Tidzachula cikondi cako koposa vinyo: Akukonda molungama. 
SongOfSongs1:5 Wakuda ine, koma wokongola, Ana akazinu a ku Yerusalemu, Ngati mahema a Kedara, Ngati nsaru zociriga za Solomo." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Musayang'ane pa ine, pakuti ndada, Pakuti dzuwa landidetsa. Ana amuna a amai anandikwiyira, Anandisungitsa minda yamipesa; Koma munda wanga wanga wamipesa sindinausunga." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ndiuze, iwe amene moyo wanga ukukonda, Umaweta kuti gulu lako? Umaligonetsa kuti pakati pa usana? Pakuti ndikhalirenji ngati wosocera Pambali pa magulu a anzako?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Ngati sudziwa, mkaziwe woposa kukongola, Dzituruka kukalondola bande la gululo, Nukawete ana a mbuzi zako pambali pa mahema a abusa." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ndakulinganiza, wokondedwa wanga mnyamatawe, Ngati akavalo a magareta a Farao." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Masaya ako akongola ndi nkhata zatsitsi, Ndi khosi lako ndi zinganga za mkanda wonyezimira." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Tidzakupangira nkhata zagolidi Ndi njumu zasiliva. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Pokhala mfumu podyera pace, Mphoka yanga inanunkhira." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Wokondedwa wanga mnyamatayo ali kwa ine ngati thumba la nipa, Logona pakati pa maere anga." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Wokondedwa wanga ali kwa ine ngati cipukutu ca maluwa ofiira M'minda yamipesa ya ku Engedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Taona, wakongolatu, bwenzi langa; namwaliwe taona, wakongola, Maso ako akunga a nkhunda." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Taona, wakongolatu, bwenzi langa, mnyamatawe, inde, wakongoletsa; Pogona pathu mpa msipu." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Mitanda ya nyumba zathu nja mikungudza, Ndi mapaso athu nga mlombwa." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ndine duwa lofiira la ku Saroni, Ngakhale kakombo wa kuzigwa." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Ngati kakombo pakati pa minga Momwemo wokondedwa wanga pakati pa ana akazi. 
SongOfSongs2:3 Ngati maula pakati pa mitengo ya m'nkhalango, Momwemo wokondedwa wanga pakati pa ana amuna. Ndinakondwa pakukhala pa mthunzi wace, Zipatso zace zinatsekemera m'kamwa mwanga." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Anandifikitsa ku nyumba ya vinyo, Mbendera yace yondizolimira inali cikondi." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Mundilimbikitse ndi mphesa zouma, munditonthoze mtima ndi maula, Pakuti ndadwala ndi cikondi." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Dzanja lace lamanzere anditsamiritse kumutu, Dzanja lace lamanja ndi kundifungatira." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Ndikulumbirirani, ana akazi inu a ku Yerusalemu, Pali mphoyo, ndi nswala za kuthengo, Kuti musautse, ngakhale kugalamutsa cikondi, Mpaka cikafuna mwini." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Mau a wokondedwa wanga mnyamatayo! Taona, adza, Alikulumpha pamapiri, alikujidimuka pazitunda." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Wokondedwa wanga akunga mphoyo, pena mwana wa mbawala: Taona, aima patseri pa khoma pathu, Apenyera pazenera, Nasuzumira pamade." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Wokondedwa wanga analankhula, nati kwa ine, Tauka, bwenzi langa, wokongola wanga, tiye." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Pakuti, taona, cisanu catha, Mvula yapita yaleka;" 
SongOfSongs2:12 Maluwa aoneka pansi; Nthawi yoyimba mbalame yafika, Mau a njiwa namveka m'dziko lathu;" 
SongOfSongs2:13 Mkuyu uchetsa nkhuyu zace zosakhwima, Mipesa niphuka, Inunkhira bwino. Tauka, bwenzi langa, wokongola wangawe, tiyetu." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Nkhunda yangawe, yokhala m'ming'alu ya thanthwe, mobisika motsetsereka, Ndipenye nkhope yako, ndimve manako; Pakuti mau ako ngokoma, nkhope yako ndi kukongola." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Mutigwirire ankhandwe, ngakhale ang'ono, amene akuononga minda yamipesa; Pakuti m'minda yathu yamipesa muphuka biriwiri." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Wokondedwa wanga ndi wa ine, ine ndine wace: Aweta zace pakati pa akakombo," 
SongOfSongs2:17 Mpaka dzuwa litapepa, mithunzi ndi kutanimpha, Bwera, bwenzi langawe, nukhale ngati mphoyo pena mwana wa mbawala Pa mapiri a mipata." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Usiku pamphasa panga ndinamfunafuna amene moyo wanga umkonda: Ndinamfunafuna, koma osampeza." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ndinati, Ndiuketu, ndiyendeyende m'mudzi, M'makwalala ndi m'mabwalo ace, Ndimfunefune amene moyo wanga umkonda: Ndimfunafuna, koma osampeza." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Alonda akuyendayenda m'mudzi anandipeza: Ndinati, Kodi munamuona amene moyo wanga umkonda?" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Nditawapitirira pang'ono, Ndinampeza amene moyo wanca umkonda: Ndinamgwiriziza, osamfumbatula, Mpaka nditamlowetsa m'nyumba ya amai, Ngakhale m'cipinda ca wondibala." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Ndikulumbirirani, ana akazi inu a ku Yerusalemu, Pali mphoyo, ndi nswala ya kuthengo, Kuti musautse, ngakhale kugalamutsa cikondi, Mpaka cikafuna mwini." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ndaniyu akwera kuturuka m'cipululu ngati utsi wa tolo, Wonunkhira ndi nipa ndi mtanthanyerere, Ndi zonunkhiritsa zonse za wogulitsa?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Taonani, ndi macila a Solomo; Pazingapo amuna amphamvu makumi asanu ndi limodzi, A mwa ngwazi za Israyeli." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Onsewo agwira lupanga, nazolowera nkhondo: Yense ali ndi lupanga lace pancafu pace, Cifukwa ca upandu wa usiku." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Solomo mfumu anadzipangira macila okhalamo tsonga Ndi matabwa a ku Lebano. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Anapanga timilongoti tace ndi siliva, Ca pansi pace ndi golidi, mpando wace ndi nsaru yakuda, Pakati pace panayalidwa za cikondi ca ana akazi a ku Yerusalemu." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Turukani, ana akazi inu a Ziyoni, mupenye Solomo mfumu, Ndi korona amace anambveka naye tsiku la ukwati wace, Ngakhale tsiku lakukondwera mtima wace." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Taona, wakongola, bwenzi langa, namwaliwe, taona, wakongola; Maso ako akunga a nkhunda patseri pa cophimba cako: Tsitsi lako likunga gulu la mbuzi, Zooneka pa phiri la Gileadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Mano ako akunga gulu la nkhosa zosengasenga, Zokwera kucokera kosamba; Yonse iri ndi ana awiri, Palibe imodzi yopoloza." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Milomo yako ikunga mbota yofiira, M'kamwa mwako ndi kukoma: Palitsipa pako pakunga phande la khangaza Patseri pa cophimba cako." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Khosi lako likunga nsanja ya Davide anaimangira zida, Apacikapo zikopa zikwi, Ngakhale zikopa zonse za amuna amphamvu," 
SongOfSongs4:5 Maere ako awiri akunga ana awiri a nswala obadwa limodzi, Akudya pakati pa akakombo." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Mpaka dzuwa litapepa, mithunzi ndi kutanimpha, Ndikamuka ku phiri la nipa, Ndi ku citunda ca mtanthanyerere." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Wakongola monse monse, wokondedwa wanga, namwaliwe, Mulibe cirema mwa iwe." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Idza nane kucokera ku Lebano, mkwatibwi, Kucokera nane ku Lebano: Unguza pamwamba pa Amana, Pa nsonga ya Seniri ndi Hermoni, Pa ngaka za mikango, Pa mapiri a anyalugwe." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Walanda mtima wanga, mlongwanga, mkwatibwi; Walanda mtima wanga ndi diso lako limodzi, Ndi cinganga cimodzi ca pakhosi pako," 
SongOfSongs4:10 Ha, cikondi cako ncokongola, mlongwanga, mkwatibwi! Kodi cikondi cako siciposa vinyo? Kununkhira kwa mphoka yako ndi kuposa zonunkhiritsa za mitundu mitundu!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 M'milomo yako, mkwatibwi, mukukha uci, Uci ndi mkaka ziri pansi pa lilime lako; Kununkhira kwa zobvala zako ndi kunga kununkhira kwa Lebano," 
SongOfSongs4:12 Mlongwanga, mkwatibwi ndiye munda wotsekedwa; Ngati kasupe wotsekedwa, ndi citsime copikiza." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Mphukira zako ndi munda wamakangaza, Ndi zipatso zofunika, bonongwe ndi mphoka," 
SongOfSongs4:14 Mphoka ndi cikasu, Nzimbe ndi ngaho, ndi mitengo yonse yamtanthanyerere; Nipa ndi khonje, ndi zonunkhiritsa zonse zomveka." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Ndiwe kasupe wa m'minda, Citsime ca madzi amoyo, Ndi mitsinje yoyenda yocokera ku Lebano." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Galamuka, mphepo ya kumpoto iwe, nudze, mphepo iwe ya kumwela; Nuombe pamunda panga, kuti zonunkhiritsa zace ziturukemo. Bwenzi langa mnyamatayo, alowe m'munda mwace, Nadye zipatso zace zofunika." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ndalowa m'munda mwanga, mlongwanga, mkwatibwi: Ndachera nipa yanga ndi zonunkhiritsa zanga; Ndadya uci wanga ndi cisa cace; Ndamwa vinyo wanga ndi mkaka wanga. Idyani, atsamwalinu, Imwani, mwetsani cikondi." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ndinagona tulo, koma mtima wanga unali maso: Ndi mau a bwenzi langa mnyamatayo agogoda, nati, Nditsegulire, mlongwanga, wokondedwa wanga, nkhunda yanga, wangwiro wanga: Pakuti pamtu panga padzala mame, Patsitsi panga pali madontho a usiku." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ndinayankha kuti, Ndabvula maraya anga, ndiwabvalenso bwanji? Ndatsuka mapazi anga; ndiwadetserenii?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Bwenzi langa analonga dzanja lace pazenera, Mtima wanga ndi kuguguda cifukwa ca iye," 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ndinauka ndikatsegulire bwenzi langa; Pamanja panga panakha nipa. Ndi pa zala zanga madzi a nipa, Pa zogwirira za mpikizo," 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ndinamtsegulira bwenzi langalo; Koma ndinampeza, bwenzi langa atacoka. Moyo wanga unalefuka polankhula iye: Ndinamfunafuna, osampeza; Ndinamuitana, koma sanandibvomera." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Alonda akuyenda m'mudzi anandipeza, Nandikantha, nanditema; Osunga maguta nandicotsera cophimba canga." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ndikulumbirirani, ana akazi inu a ku Yerusalemu, Mukapeza bwenzi langa, mudzamuuza ciani? Kuti ndadwala ndi cikondi." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Bwenzi lako aposa abwenzi ena bwanji, Mkaziwe woposa kukongola? Bwenzi lako aposa abwenzi ena bwanji, Kuti utilumbirira motero?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Wokondedwa wanga ali woyera ndi wofiira, Womveka mwa zikwi khumi." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Mutu wace ukunga golidi, woyengetsa, Tsitsi lace lopotana, ndi lakuda ngati khungubwi." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Ana a maso ace akunga nkhunda pambali pa mitsinje ya madzi; Otsukidwa ndi mkaka, okhala pa mitsinje yodzala." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Masaya ace akunga citipula cabzyalamo ndiwo, Ngati mitumbira yoyangapo masamba onunkhira: Milomo yace ikunga akakombo, pakukhapo madzi a nipa." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Manja ace akunga zing'anda zagolidi zoikamo zonyezimira zoti biriwiri: Thupi lace likunga copanga ca minyanga colemberapo masafiro. 
SongOfSongs5:15 Miyendo yace ikunga zoimiritsa za mwala wonyezimira, Zogwirika m'kamwa mwa golidi: Maonekedwe ace akunga Lebano, okometsetsa ngati mikungudza." 
SongOfSongs5:16 M'kamwa mwace muli mokoma: inde, ndiye wokondweretsa ndithu. Ameneyu ndi wokondedwa wanga, ameneyu ndi bwenzi langa, Ana akazi inu a ku Yerusalemu." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Bwenzi lako wapita kuti, Mkaziwe woposa kukongola? Bwenzi lako wapambukira kuti, Tikamfunefune pamodzi nawe?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Bwenzi langa watsikira kumunda kwace, Ku zitipula za mphoka, Kukadya kumunda kwace, ndi kuchera akakombo." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ndine wace wa wokondedwa wanga, wokondedwa wanganso ndiye wa ine; Aweta zace pakati pa akakombo." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Wakongola, bwenzi langa, namwaliwe ngati Tiriza, Wokoma ngati Yerusalemu, Woopsya ngati nkhondo ndi mbendera." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Undipambutsire maso ako, Pakuti andiopetsa. Tsitsi lako likunga gulu la mbuzi, Zigona pambali pa Gileadi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Mano ako akunga gulu la nkhosa zazikazi, Zikwera kucokera kosamba; Yonse iri ndi ana awiri, Palibe imodzi yopoloza." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Palitsipa pako pakunga phande la khangaza Patseri pa cophimba cako. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Alipo akazi akulu a mfumu makumi asanu ndi limodzi, Kudza akazi ang'ono makumi asanu ndi atatu, Ndi anamwali osawerengeka." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Nkhunda yanga, wangwiro wangayu, ndiye mmodzi; Ndiye wobadwa yekha wa amace; Ndiye wosankhika wa wombala. Ana akazi anamuona, namucha wodala; Ngakhale akazi akulu a mfumu, ndi akazi ang'ono namtamanda." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Nati, Ndaniyo aturuka ngati mbanda kuca, Wokongola ngati mwezi, Woyera ngati dzuwa, Woopsya ngati nkhondo ndi mbendera?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ndinatsikira ku munda wa ntedza, Kukapenya msipu wa m'cigwa, Kukapenya ngati pamipesa paphuka, Ngati pamakangaza patuwa maluwa." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ndisanazindikire, moyo wanga unandiimika Pakati pa magareta a anthu anga aufulu." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Anati, Bwera, bwera, Msulamiwe; Bwera, bwera, tiyang'ane pa iwe. Muyang'aniranji pa Msulami, Ngati pa masewero akuguba?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Ha, mapazi ako akongola m'zikwakwata, Mwana wamkaziwe wa mfumu! Pozinga m'cuuno mwako pakunga zonyezimira, Nchito ya manja a mmisiri waluso." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Pamcombo pako pakunga cikho coulungika, Cosasowamo vinyo wosanganika: Pamimba pako pakunga mulu wa tirigu Wozingidwa ndi akakombo." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Maere ako akunga ana awiri a nswala Anabadwa limodzi. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Khosi lako likunga nsanja yaminyanga; Maso ako akunga matawale a ku Hesiboni, A pa cipata ca Batirabimu; Mphuno yako ikunga nsanja ya ku Lebano Imene iloza ku Damasiko." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Mutu wako ukunga Karimeli, Ndi tsitsi la pamtu pako likunga nsaru yakuda; Mfumu yamangidwa ndi nkhata zace ngati wamsinga." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Ha, ndiwe wokongola ndi wofunika, Bwenziwe, m'zokondweretsa!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Msinkhu wakowu ukunga mlaza, Maere ako akunga matsango amphesa," 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ndinati, Ndikakwera pamlazapo, Ndikagwira nthambi zace: Maere ako ange ngati matsango amphesa, Ndi kununkhira kwa mpweya wako ngati maula;" 
SongOfSongs7:9 M'kamwa mwako munge ngati vinyo woposa, Womeza tseketeke bwenzi langa, Wolankhulitsa milomo ya ogona tulo." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ndine wa wokondedwa wanga mnyamatayo, Ndine amene andifunayo." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Tiye, bwenzi langa, tinke kuminda; Titsotse m'miraga." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Tilawire kunka ku minda yamipesa; Tiyang'ane ngati mpesa waphuka, kunje ndi kuonetsa zipatso, Makangaza ndi kutuwa maluwa ace; Pompo ndidzakupatsa cikondi canga," 
SongOfSongs7:13 Mandimu anunkhira, Ndi pamakomo pathu zipatso zabwino, za mitundu mitundu, zakale ndi zatsopano, Zimene ndakukundikira iwe, wokondedwa wanga." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Mwenzi utakhala ngati mlongwanga, Woyamwa pa bere la amai! Ndikadakupeza panja, ndikadakupsompsona; Osandinyoza munthu." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ndikadakutsogolera, kukulowetsa m'nyumba ya amai, Kuti andilange mwambo; Ndikadakumwetsa vinyo wokoleretsa, Ndi madzi a makangaza anga." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Dzanja lamanzere lace akadanditsamiritsa kumutu, Lamanja lace ndi kundifungatira." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Ndikulumbirirani, ana akazi inu a ku Yerusalemu, Muutsiranji, mugalamutsiranji cikondi, Cisanafune mwini." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ndaniyu acokera kucipululu, Alikutsamira bwenzi lace? Pa tsinde la muula ndinakugalamutsa mnyamatawe: Pomwepo amako anali mkusauka nawe, Pomwepo wakukubala anali m'pakati pa iwe." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Undilembe pamtima pako, mokhoma cizindikilo, nundikhomenso cizindikilo pamkono pako; Pakuti cikondi cilimba ngati imfa; Njiru imangouma ngati manda: Kung'anima kwace ndi kung'anima kwa moto, Ngati mphezi ya Yehova," 
SongOfSongs8:7 Madzi ambiri sangazimitse cikondi, Ngakhale mitsinje yodzala kucikokolola: Mwamuna akapereka katundu yense wa m'nyumba yace ngati sintho la cikondi, Akanyozedwa ndithu." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Tiri ndi mlongwathu wamng'ono, Alibe maere; Ticitirenji mlongwathu Tsiku lokhoma unkhoswe wace?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Ngati ndiye khoma, tidzamanga pa iye nsanja yasiliva: Ngati ndiye citseko tidzamtsekereza ndi matabwa amikungudza." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ndine khoma, maere anga akunga nsanja zace: Pamaso pa mnyamatayo ndinafanana ngati wopeza mtendere." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomo anali ndi munda wamipesa ku Baalahamoni; Nabwereka alimi mundawo; Yense ambwezere ndalama cikwi cifukwa ca zipatso zace. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Koma munda wanga wamipesa, uli pamaso panga ndiwo wangatu; Naco cikwico, Solomo iwe, Koma olima zipatso zace azilandira mazana awiri." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Namwaliwe wokhala m'minda, Anzake amvera mau ako: Nanenso undimvetse." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Dzifulumira, mnyamatawe wokondedwa wanga, Dzifanane ngati mphoyo pena mwana wa mbawala Pa mapiri a mphoka," 
Isaiah1:1 MASOMPHENYA a Yesaya mwana wa Amozi, amene iye anaona, onena za Yuda ndi Yerusalemu, masiku a Uziya, Yotamu, Ahazi, ndi Hezekiya, mafumu a Yuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Imvani, miyamba inu, chera makutu, iwe dziko lapansi, cifukwa Yehova wanena, Ndakulitsa ndipo ndalera ana, ndipo iwo anandipandukira Ine." 
Isaiah1:3 Ng'ombe idziwa mwini wace, ndi buru adziwa pomtsekereza: koma Israyeli sadziwa, anthu anga sazindikira." 
Isaiah1:4 Mtundu wocimwa inu, anthu olemedwa ndi mphulupulu, mbeu yakucita zoipa, ana amene acita moononga, iwo amsiya Yehova, iwo amnyoza Woyera wa Israyeli, iwo adana naye nabwerera m'mbuyo." 
Isaiah1:5 Nanga bwanji mukali cimenyedwere kuti inu mulikupandukirabe? Mutu wonse ulikudwala, ndi mtima wonse walefuka." 
Isaiah1:6 Kucokera pansi pa phazi kufikira kumutu m'menemo mulibe cangwiro; koma mabala, ndi mikwingwirima, ndi zironda; sizinapole, ngakhale kumangidwa, ngakhale kupakidwa mafuta." 
Isaiah1:7 Dziko lanu liri bwinja; midzi yanu yatenthedwa ndi moto; dziko lanu alendo alimkudya pamaso panu; ndipo liri labwinja monga lagubuduzidwa ndi alendo. 
Isaiah1:8 Ndipo mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni wasiyidwa ngati citando ca m'munda wamphesa, ngati cilindo ca m'munda wamankhaka, ngati mudzi wozingidwa ndi nkhondo." 
Isaiah1:9 Akadapanda Yehova wa makamu kutisiyira otsala ang'onong'ono ndithu, ife tikanakhala ngati Sodomu, ife tikadanga Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Imvani mau a Yehova inu olamulira a Sodomu, cherani makutu ku cilamulo ca Mulungu wathu, inu anthu a Gomora." 
Isaiah1:11 Nditani nazo nsembe zanu zocurukazo? ati Yehova; ndakhuta nazo nsembe zopsereza za nkhosa zamphongo ndi mafuta a nyama zonenepa; sindisekera ndi mwazi wa ng'ombe zamphongo, ngakhale wa ana a nkhosa, ngakhale wa atonde." 
Isaiah1:12 Pakudzaonekera inu pamaso pa Ine, ndani wafuna cimeneci m'dzanja lanu, kupondaponda m'mabwalo mwanga?" 
Isaiah1:13 Musadze nazonso, nsembe zacabecabe; nsembe zofukiza zindinyansa; tsiku lokhala mwezi ndi sabata, kumema masonkhano, sindingalole mphulupulu ndi masonkhano." 
Isaiah1:14 Masiku anu okhala mwezi ndi nthawi za mapwando anu mtima wanga uzida; zindibvuta Ine; ndalema ndi kupirira nazo. 
Isaiah1:15 Ndipo pamene mutambasula manja anu, ndidzakubisirani inu maso anga; inde pocurukitsa mapemphero anu Ine sindidzamva; manja anu adzala mwazi." 
Isaiah1:16 Sambani, dziyeretseni; cotsani macitidwe anu oipa pamaso panga; lekani kucita zoipa;" 
Isaiah1:17 phunzirani kucita zabwino; funani ciweruzo; thandizani osautsidwa, weruzirani ana amasiye, munenere akazi amasiye." 
Isaiah1:18 Tiyeni, tsono, tiweruzane, ati Yehova; ngakhale zoipa zanu ziri zofiira, zidzayera ngati matalala; ngakhale ziri zofiira ngati kapezi, zidzakhala ngati ubweya wa nkhosa, woti mbu." 
Isaiah1:19 Ngati inu muli ofuna ndi omvera, mudzadya zabwino za dziko," 
Isaiah1:20 koma ngati mukana ndi kupanduka, mudzathedwa ndi lupanga; cifukwa m'kamwa mwa Yehova mwatero." 
Isaiah1:21 Mudzi wokhulupirika wasanduka wadama! wodzala ciweruzowo! cilungamo cinakhalamo koma tsopano ambanda. 
Isaiah1:22 Siliva wako wasanduka mphala, vinyo wako wasanganizidwa ndi madzi." 
Isaiah1:23 Akuru ako apanduka, ali anzao a mbala; onse akonda mitulo, natsata zokometsera mirandu; iwo saweruzira amasiye; ngakhale mlandu wa mkazi wamasiye suwafika." 
Isaiah1:24 Cifukwa cace Yehova ati, Yehova wa makamu wamphamvu wa Israyeli, Ha! ndidzatonthoza mtima wanga pocotsa ondibvuta, ndi kubwezera cilango adani anga;" 
Isaiah1:25 ndipo ndidzaikanso dzanja langa pa iwe, ndi kukusungunula kukusiyanitsa iwe ndi mphala yako, ndipo ndidzacotsa seta wako wonse:" 
Isaiah1:26 ndidzabweza oweruza ako monga poyamba, ndi aphungu ako monga paciyambi; pambuyo pace udzachedwa Mudzi wolungama, mudzi wokhulupirika." 
Isaiah1:27 Ziyoni adzaomboledwa ndi ciweruzo, ndi otembenuka mtima ace ndi cilungamo." 
Isaiah1:28 Koma kupasula kwa olakwa ndi kwa ocimwa kudzakhala kumodzi, ndi iwo amene asiya Yehova adzathedwa." 
Isaiah1:29 Cifukwa adzakhala ndi manyazi, cifukwa ca mitengo yathundu munaikhumba, ndipo inu mudzagwa nkhope, cifukwa ca minda imene mwaisankha." 
Isaiah1:30 Cifukwa mudzakhala ngati mtengo wathundu, umene tsamba lace linyala, ngatinso munda wopanda madzi." 
Isaiah1:31 Ndimo wamphamvu adzakhala ngati cingwe cabwazi, ndi nchito yace ngati nthethe; ndipo zonse zidzayaka moto pamodzi, opanda wozimitsa." 
Isaiah2:1 Mau amene Yesaya mwana wa Amozi anaona, onena za Yuda ndi Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah2:2 Ndipo padzakhala masiku otsiriza, kuti phiri la nyumba ya Yehova lidzakhazikika pa nsonga ya mapiri, ndipo lidzakwezedwa pamwamba pa zitunda; mitundu yonse idzasonkhana kumeneko." 
Isaiah2:3 Ndipo anthu ambiri adzanka, nati, Tiyeni tikwere kunka ku phiri la Yehova, ku nyumba ya Mulungu wa Yakobo; ndipo Iye adzatiphunzitsa za njira zace, ndipo tidzayenda m'mayendedwe ace; cifukwa m'Ziyoni mudzaturuka cilamulo, ndi mau a Yehova kucokera m'Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah2:4 Iye adzaweruza pakati pa akunja, adzadzudzula mitundu yambiri ya anthu; ndipo iwo adzasula malupanga ao akhale zolimira, ndi nthungo zao zikhale anangwape; mtundu sudzanyamula lupanga kumenyana ndi mtundu wina, ndipo sadzaphunziranso nkhondo." 
Isaiah2:5 Inu a nyumba ya Yakobo, tiyeni, tiyende m'kuwala kwa Yehova." 
Isaiah2:6 Cifukwa inu mwasiya anthu anu a nyumba ya Yakobo, cifukwa kuti iwo adzazidwa ndi miyambo ya kum'mawa, ndipo ali olaula ngati Afilisti, naomba m'manja ndi ana a acilendo." 
Isaiah2:7 Dziko lao ladzala siliva ndi golidi, ngakhale cuma cao ncosawerengeka; dziko lao lidzalanso akavalo, ngakhale magareta ao ngosawerengeka." 
Isaiah2:8 Dziko lao ladzalanso mafano; iwo apembedza nchito ya manja ao ao, imene zala zao zao zinaipanga." 
Isaiah2:9 Munthu wacabe agwada pansi, ndi munthu wamkuru adzicepetsa, koma musawakhululukire." 
Isaiah2:10 Lowa m'phanga, bisala m'pfumbi, kucokera pa kuopsya kwa Yehova, ndi pa ulemerero wacifumu wace." 
Isaiah2:11 Maso a munthu akuyang'anira kumwamba adzatsitsidwa, ndi kudzikweza kwa anthu kudzaweramitsidwa pansi; ndipo Yehova yekha adzakwezedwa tsiku limenelo." 
Isaiah2:12 Cifukwa padzakhala tsiku la Yehova wa makamu pa zonse zonyada ndi zakudzikuza, ndi pa zonse zotukulidwa; ndipo zidzatsitsidwa;" 
Isaiah2:13 ndi pa mitengo yonse yamkungudza ya Lebano, yaitari ndi yotukulidwa, ndi pa mitengo yonse yathundu ya Basana;" 
Isaiah2:14 ndi pa mapiri onse atari, ndi pa zitunda zonse zotukulidwa;" 
Isaiah2:15 ndi pa nsanja zazitari zonse, ndi pa macemba onse;" 
Isaiah2:16 ndi pa ngalawa zonse za Tarisi, ndi pa zithunzithunzi zonse zokondweretsa." 
Isaiah2:17 Ndipo kudzikweza kwa munthu kudzaweramitsidwa pansi, kudzikuza kwa munthu kudzatsitsidwa; ndipo Yehova yekha adzakwezedwa tsiku limenelo." 
Isaiah2:18 Ndimo mafano adzapita psiti. 
Isaiah2:19 Anthu adzalowa m'mapanga a m'matanthwe, ndi m'maenje apansi, kuthawa kuopsya kwa Yehova, ndi ulemerero wacifumu wace, podzuka Iye kugwedeza dziko ndi mphamvu." 
Isaiah2:20 Tsiku limenelo munthu adzataya ku mfuko ndi ku mileme mafano ace asiliva ndi agolidi amene anthu anampangira iye awapembedze; 
Isaiah2:21 kuti akalowe m'mapanga a m'matanthwe, ndi m'mindala a m'miyala, kuthawa kuopsya kwa Yehova, ndi ulemerero wacifumu wace, podzuka Iye kugwedeza dziko ndi mphamvu," 
Isaiah2:22 Siyani munthu, amene mpweya wace uli m'mphuno mwace; cifukwa m'mene awerengedwamo ndi muti?" 
Isaiah3:1 Ndipo onani, Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu, wacotsa ku Yerusalemu ndi ku Yuda mcirikizo wocirikiza cakudya conse ndi madzi onse, zimene zinali mcirikizo;" 
Isaiah3:2 munthu wamphamvu, ndi munthu wankhondo; woweruza, ndi mneneri, ndi waula, ndi nkhalamba;" 
Isaiah3:3 kapitao wa makumi asanu, ndi munthu wolemekezeka, ndi mphungu, ndi mmisiri waluso, ndi wodziwa matsenga." 
Isaiah3:4 Ndipo ndidzapereka ana, kuti akhale akuru ao, mwacibwana adzawalamulira." 
Isaiah3:5 Ndi anthu adzabvutidwa, yense ndi wina, yense ndi mnansi wace; mwana adzadzinyaditsa yekha pa akuru, ndi onyozeka pa olemekezedwa." 
Isaiah3:6 Pamene mwamuna adzamgwira mbale wace m'nyumba ya atate wace, nadzati, Iwe uli ndi cobvala, khala wolamulira wathu, ndi kupasula kumeneku kukhale m'dzanja lako;" 
Isaiah3:7 tsiku limenelo adzakweza mau ace, kuti, Sindine wociritsa, cifukwa kuti m'nyumba mwanga mulibe cakudya kapena cobvala; inu simudzandiyesa ine wolamulira anthu." 
Isaiah3:8 Cifukwa kuti Yerusalemu wapasulidwa, ndi Yuda wagwa; cifukwa kuti lilume lao ndi macitidwe ao akana Yehova, kuti autse mkwiyo wa m'maso a ulemerero wace." 
Isaiah3:9 Maonekedwe a nkhope zao awacitira iwo mboni; ndipo amaonetsa ucimo wao monga Sodomu, saubisa. Tsoka kwa moyo wao! cifukwa iwo anadzicitira zoipa iwo okha." 
Isaiah3:10 Nenani za wolungama, kuti kudzamkomera iye; cifukwa oterowo adzadya zipatso za macitidwe ao." 
Isaiah3:11 Tsoka kwa woipa! kudzamuipira; cifukwa kuti mphotho ya manja ace idzapatsidwa kwa iye. 
Isaiah3:12 Anthu anga awabvuta ndi ana, awalamulira ndi akazi. Anthu anga inu, iwo amene akutsogolerani, ndiwo akucimwitsani, naononga njira zanu zoyendamo." 
Isaiah3:13 Yehova aimirira kuti atsutsane, naimiriranso kuti aweruze mitundu ya anthu." 
Isaiah3:14 Yehova adzalowa monenera mirandu ndi okalamba a anthu ace, ndi akuru ace: Ndinu amene mwadya munda wamphesa, zofunkha za waumphawi ziri m'nyumba zanu;" 
Isaiah3:15 muti bwanji inu, amene mupsinja anthu anga, ndi kupera nkhope ya wosauka? ati Ambuye Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah3:16 Komanso Yehova ati, Cifukwa kuti ana akazi a Ziyoni angodzikuza atakweza makosi ao, ndi maso ao adama nayenda nanyang'ama poyenda pao naliza zigwinjiri za mapazi ao;" 
Isaiah3:17 cifukwa cace Ambuye adzacita nkanambo pa liwombo la ana akazi a Ziyoni, ndipo Yehova adzabvundukula m'cuuno mwao." 
Isaiah3:18 Tsiku limenelo Ambuye adzacotsa zigwinjiri zao zokoma, ndi zitunga, ndi mphande;" 
Isaiah3:19 mbera, ndi makoza, ndi nsaru za pankhope;" 
Isaiah3:20 ndi zisada, ndi maunyolo a kumwendo, ndi mipango, ndi nsupa zonunkhira, ndi mphinjiri;" 
Isaiah3:21 mphete, ndi zipini;" 
Isaiah3:22 malaya a paphwando, ndi zopfunda, ndi zimbwi, ndi timatumba;" 
Isaiah3:23 akalirole, ndi nsaru zabafuta, ndi nduwira, ndi zophimba." 
Isaiah3:24 Ndipo padzakhala m'malo mwa zotsekemera mudzakhala zobvunda; ndi m'malo mwa lamba cingwe; ndipo m'malo mwa tsitsi labwino dazi; m'malo mwa cobvala ca pacifuwa mpango waciguduli; zipsera m'malo mwa ukoma. 
Isaiah3:25 Amuna ako adzagwa ndi lupanga, ndi wamphamvu wako m'nkhondo." 
Isaiah3:26 Ndipo zipata zace zidzalira maiko; ndipo iye adzakhala bwinja, nadzakhala pansi." 
Isaiah4:1 Ndipo akazi asanu ndi awiri adzagwira mwamuna mmodzi tsiku limenelo, nati, Ife tidzadya cakudya cathu cathu ndi kubvala zobvala zathu zathu; koma tichedwe dzina lako; cotsa citonzo cathu." 
Isaiah4:2 Tsiku limenelo mphukira ya Yehova idzakhala yokongola ndi ya ulemerero, cipatso ca nthaka cidzakhala cokometsetsa ndi cokongola, kwa iwo amene adzapulumuka a Israyeli." 
Isaiah4:3 Ndipo padzakhala, kuti iye amene asiyidwa m'Ziyoni, ndi iye amene atsala m'Yerusalemu, adzachedwa woyera; ngakhale yense amene walembedwa mwa amoyo m'Yerusalemu;" 
Isaiah4:4 pamene Ambuye adzasambitsa litsiro la ana akazi a Ziyoni, nadzatsuka mwazi wa Yerusalemu, kucokera pakatipo, ndi mzimu wa ciweruziro, ndi mzimu wakutentha." 
Isaiah4:5 Ndipo Yehova adzalenga pokhala ponse pa phiri la Ziyoni, ndi pa masonkhano ace, mtambo ndi utsi usana, ndi kung'azimira kwa malawi a moto usiku; cifukwa kuti pa ulemerero wonse padzayalidwa cophimba." 
Isaiah4:6 Ndipo padzakhala cihema ca mthunzi, nthawi ya usana yopewera kutentha, pothawira ndi pousa mvula ndi mphepo." 
Isaiah5:1 Ndiyimbire wokondedwa wanga nyimbo ya wokondedwa wanga ya munda wace wamphesa, Wokondedwa wanga anali ndi munda wamphesa m'citunda ca zipatso zambiri;" 
Isaiah5:2 ndipo iye anakumba mcerenje kuzungulira kwete, natolatola miyala pamenepo naokapo mpesa wosankhika, namangapo pakati pace nsanja, nasema mopondera mphesa, nayembekeza kuti udzabala mphesa, koma unangobala mphesa zosadya." 
Isaiah5:3 Ndipo tsopano, inu okhala m'Yerusalemu, ndi anthu a Yuda, weruzanitu mlandu wa ine ndi munda wanga wamphesa." 
Isaiah5:4 Ndikanacitanso ciani ndi munda wanga wamphesa, cimene sindinacite m'menemo; muja ndinayembekeza kuti udzabala mphesa, wabaliranji mphesa zosadya?" 
Isaiah5:5 Ndipo tsopano ndidzakuuzani cimene nditi ndicite ndi munda wanga wamphesa; ndidzacotsapo chinga lace, ndipo zidzadyedwa; ndidzagumula linga lace, ndipo zidzapondedwa pansi;" 
Isaiah5:6 ndipo ndidzaupasula; sudzadzomboleredwa kapena kulimidwa; koma padzamera lunguzi ndi minga; ndidzalamuliranso mitambo kuti isabvumbwepo mvula. 
Isaiah5:7 Cifukwa kuti munda wamphesa wa Yehova wa makamu ndiwo banja la Israyeli, ndi anthu a Yuda, mtengo wace womkondweretsa; Iye anayembekeza ciweruziro, koma onani kuphana; nayembekeza cilungamo, koma onani kupfuula." 
Isaiah5:8 Tsoka kwa iwo amene aphatikiza nyumba ndi nyumba, amene alumikiza munda ndi munda, kufikira padzapanda malo, ndipo inu mudzasiyidwa nokha pakati pa dziko!" 
Isaiah5:9 M'makutu anga, ati Yehova wa makamu, Zoonadi nyumba zambiri zidzakhala bwinja, ngakhale zazikuru ndi zokoma zopanda wokhalamo." 
Isaiah5:10 Cifukwa kuti munda wamphesa wa madera khumi udzangobala mbiya imodzi, ndi mbeu za nsengwa khumi zidzangobala nsengwa imodzi." 
Isaiah5:11 Tsoka kwa iwo amene adzuka m'mamawa kuti atsate zakumwa zaukali; amene acezera usiku kufikira vinyo awaledzeretsal 
Isaiah5:12 Ndipo zeze ndi mgoli, ndi lingaka ndi citoliro, ndi vinyo, ziri m'mapwando ao; koma iwo sapenyetsa nchito ya Yehova; ngakhale kuyang'ana pa macitidwe a manja ace." 
Isaiah5:13 Cifukwa cace anthu anga amuka m'nsinga, cifukwa ca kusowa nzeru; ndi amuna ao olemekezeka ali ndi njala, ndi khamu lao lauma kukhosi." 
Isaiah5:14 Ndipo manda akuza cilakolako cace, natsegula kukamwa kwace kosayeseka; ndi ulemerero wao, ndi unyinji wao, ndi phokoso lao, ndi iye amene akondwerera mwa iwo atsikira mommo." 
Isaiah5:15 Munthu wonyozeka waweramitsidwa, ndi munthu wochuka watsitsidwa, ndi maso a wodzikweza atsitsidwa;" 
Isaiah5:16 koma Yehova wa makamu wakwezedwa m'ciweruziro, ndipo Mulungu Woyera wayeretsedwa m'cilungamo." 
Isaiah5:17 Pamenepo ana a nkhosa adzadyapo ngati m'busa mwao, ndi malo a bwinja a zonenepa zacilendo zidzadyapo." 
Isaiah5:18 Tsoka kwa iwo amene akoka mphulupulu ndi zingwe zacabe, ndi cimo ngati ndi cingwe ca gareta;" 
Isaiah5:19 amene ati, Mlekeni iye akangaze, mlekeni iye afulumize nchito yace kuti ife tione; ndipo lekani uphungu wa Woyera wa Israyeli uyandikire, udze kuti tiudziwe!" 
Isaiah5:20 Tsoka kwa iwo amene ayesa zoipa zabwino, ndi zabwino zoipa; amene aika mdima m'malo mwa kuyera, ndi kuyera m'malo mwa mdima; amene aika zowawa m'malo mwa zotsekemera, ndi zotsekemera m'malo mwa zowawa!" 
Isaiah5:21 Tsoka kwa iwo amene adziyesera anzeru ndi ocenjera! 
Isaiah5:22 Tsoka kwa iwo amene ali a mphamvu yakumwa vinyo, ndi anthu olimba akusanganiza zakumwa zaukali;" 
Isaiah5:23 amene alungamitsa woipa pa cokometsera mlandu, nacotsera wolungama cilungamo cace!" 
Isaiah5:24 Cifukwa cace monga ngati lilime la moto likutha ciputu, ndi monga udzu wouma ugwa pansi m'malawi, momwemo muzu wao udzakhala monga wobvunda, maluwa ao adzauluka m'mwamba ngati pfumbi; cifukwa kuti iwo akana cilamulo ca Yehova wa makamu, nanyoza mau a Woyera wa Israyeli." 
Isaiah5:25 Cifukwa cace mkwiyo wa Yehova wayaka pa anthu ace, ndipo Iye watambasulira iwo dzanja lace, nawakantha, ndipo zitunda zinanthunthumira, ndi mitembo yao inali ngati zinyatsi pakati pa makwalala. Mwa izi zonse mkwiyo wace sunacoke, koma dzanja lace liri citambasulire." 
Isaiah5:26 Ndipo Iye adzakwezera a mitundu yakutari mbendera, nadzawayimbira mluzu, acokere ku malekezero a dziko; ndipo taonani, iwo adzadza ndi liwiro msanga msanga;" 
Isaiah5:27 palibe amene adzalema, kapena adzapunthwa mwa iwo, palibe amene adzaodzera kapena kugona tulo; ngakhale lamba la m'cuuno mwao silidzamasuka, kapena comangira ca nsapato zao sicidzaduka;" 
Isaiah5:28 amene mibvi yao ili yakuthwa, ndi mauta ao onse athifuka; ziboda za akavalo ao zidzayesedwa ngati mwala, ndi njinga zao ngati kabvumvulu;" 
Isaiah5:29 kubangula kwao kudzafana ndi mkango, iwo adzabangula ngati ana a mikango, inde iwo adzabangula, nadzagwira nyama, naicotsa bwino opanda wakupulumutsa." 
Isaiah5:30 Ndipo iwo adzawabangulira tsiku limenelo ngati kukokoma kwa nyanja; ndipo wina ayang'ana padziko, taonani mdima ndi nsautso, kuyera kwadetsedwanso m'mitambo yace." 
Isaiah6:1 Caka cimene mfumu Uziya anafa, ndinaona Ambuye atakhala pa mpando wacifumu wautari, ndi wotukulidwa, ndi zobvala zace zinadzala m'Kacisi." 
Isaiah6:2 Pamwamba pa Iye panaima aserafi; yense anali ndi mapiko asanu ndi limodzi; awiri anaphimba nao nkhope yace, awiri naphimba nao mapazi ace, awiri nauluka nao." 
Isaiah6:3 Ndipo wina anapfuula kwa mnzace, nati, Woyera, Woyera, Woyera, Yehova wa makamu; dziko lonse lapansi ladzala ulemerero wace." 
Isaiah6:4 Ndipo maziko a ziundo anasunthika ndi mau amene anapfuula, ndipo nyumba inadzazidwa ndi utsi." 
Isaiah6:5 Ndipo ine ndinati, Tsoka kwa ine! cifukwa ndathedwa; cifukwa ndiri munthu wa milomo yonyansa, ndikhala pakati pa anthu a milomo yonyansa; cifukwa kuti maso anga aona Mfumu, Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah6:6 Pompo anaulukira kwa ine mmodzi wa aserafi, ali nalo khala lamoto m'dzanja mwace, limene analicotsa ndi mbaniro pa guwa la nsembe;" 
Isaiah6:7 nakhudza nalo kukamwa kwanga nati, Taona ici cakhudza milomo yako; ndipo mphulupulu zako zacotsedwa, zocimwa zako zaomboledwa." 
Isaiah6:8 Ndipo ndinamva mau a Ambuye akuti, Ndidzatumiza yani, ndipo ndani adzatimukira ife? Ndipo ine ndinati, Ndine pano; munditumize ine." 
Isaiah6:9 Ndipo Iye anati, Kauze anthu awa, Imvani inu ndithu, koma osazindikira; yang'anani inu ndithu, koma osadziwitsa." 
Isaiah6:10 Nenepetsa mtima wa anthu awa, lemeretsa makutu ao, nutseke maso ao; angaone ndi maso ao, angamve ndi makutu ao, angazindikire ndi mtima wao, nakabwerenso, naciritsidwe." 
Isaiah6:11 Pompo ndinati ine, Ambuye mpaka liti? Ndipo anayankha, Mpaka midzi ikhala bwinja, yopanda wokhalamo, ndi nyumba zopanda munthu, ndi dziko likhala bwinja ndithu," 
Isaiah6:12 ndipo Yehova wasunthira anthu kutari, ndi mabwinja adzacuruka pakati pa dziko." 
Isaiah6:13 Ndipo likatsala limodzi la magawo khumi m'menemo, lidzadyedwanso; monga kacere, ndi monganso thundu, imene tsinde lace likhalabe ataigwetsa; cotero mbeu yopatulika ndiyo tsinde lace." 
Isaiah7:1 Ndipo panali masiku a Ahazi, mwana wa Yotamu, mwana wa Uziya, mfumu ya Yuda, kuti Rezini, mfumu ya Aramu, ndi Peka, mwana wa Remaliya, mfumu ya Israyeli, anakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu, kumenyana nao; koma sanathe kuupamnana." 
Isaiah7:2 Ndipo anauza a nyumba ya Davide, kuti Aramu wapangana ndi Efraimu. Ndipo mtima wace unagwedezeka, ndi mtima wa anthu ace, monga mitengo ya m'nkhalango igwedezeka ndi mphepo." 
Isaiah7:3 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Yesaya, Turuka tsopano kukacingamira Ahazi, iwe ndi Seariyasubu, mwana wamwamuna wako, pa mamariziro a mcerenje wa thamanda la pamtunda, ku khwalala la pa mwaniko wa wotsuka nsaru;" 
Isaiah7:4 nukati kwa iye, Cenjera, khala ulipo; usaope, mtima wako usalefuke, cifukwa ca zidutswa ziwirizi za miuni yofuka, cifukwa ca mkwiyo waukali wa Rezini ndi Aramu, ndi wa mwana wa Remaliya." 
Isaiah7:5 Cifukwa Aramu ndi Efraimu, ndi mwana wa Remaliya anapangana kukucitira zoipa, nati," 
Isaiah7:6 Tiyeni, tikwere, timenyane ndi Yuda, timbvute; tiyeni, tidzigumulire mpata, pamenepo tikhazike mfumu pakati pace, ngakhale mwana wamwamuna wa Tabeeli;" 
Isaiah7:7 atero Ambuye Yehova, Upo wao sudzaimai, sudzacitidwa." 
Isaiah7:8 Pakuti mutu wa Aramu ndi Damasiko, ndi mutu wa Damasiko ndi Rezini, zisadapite zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu zisanu Efraimu adzatyokatyoka, sadzakhalanso mtundu wa anthu;" 
Isaiah7:9 ndipo mutu wa Efraimu ndi Samariya, ndi mutu wa Samariya ndi mwana wa Remaliya, mukapanda kukhulupirira ndithu simudzakhazikika." 
Isaiah7:10 Ndipo Yehova ananenanso kwa Ahazi nati," 
Isaiah7:11 Udzipemphere wekha cizindikilo ca kwa Yehova Mulungu wako; pempha cam'mwakuya, kapena cam'mwamba." 
Isaiah7:12 Koma Ahazi anati, Sindipemphai ngakhale kumyesa Yehova." 
Isaiah7:13 Ndipo iye anati, Mverani inu tsopano, inu a nyumba ya Davide; kodi ndi kanthu kakang'ono kwa inu kutopetsa anthu, kuti inu mutopetsa Mulungu wanga?" 
Isaiah7:14 Cifukwa cace Ambuye mwini yekha adzakupatsani inu cizindikilo; taonani namwali adzaima, nadzabala mwana wamwamuna, nadzamucha dzina lace Imanueli." 
Isaiah7:15 Iye adzadya mafuta ndi uci, pamene adziwa kukana coipa ndi kusankha cabwino." 
Isaiah7:16 Popeza kuti asanadziwe mwanayo kukana coipa ndi kusankha cabwino, dziko limene mafumu ace awiri udana nao lidzasyidwa." 
Isaiah7:17 Yehova adzatengera pa iwe, ndi pa anthu ako, ndi pa nyumba ya atate wako, masiku, akuti sanadze oterewa kuyambira tsiku limene Efraimu analekana ndi Yuda; kunena mfumu ya Asuri." 
Isaiah7:18 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo kuti Yehova adzayimbira mluzu cimphanga ciri m'mbali ya kumtunda kwa nyanja za Aigupto, ndi njuci iri m'dziko la Asuri." 
Isaiah7:19 Ndipo zidzafika nizitera zonse m'zigwa zabwinja, ndi m'maenje a matanthwe, ndi paminga ponse, ndi pamabusa ponse." 
Isaiah7:20 Tsiku limenelo Ambuye adzameta mutu, ndi ubweya wa m'mapazi, ndi lumo lobwereka liri tsidya lija la Nyanja, kunena mfumu ya Asuri; ndilo lidzamarizanso ndebvu." 
Isaiah7:21 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo, kuti munthu adzaweta ng'ombe yaikazi yaing'ono, ndi nkhosa ziwiri;" 
Isaiah7:22 ndipo padzakhala, cifukwa ca kucuruka kwa mkaka umene zidzapatsa, iye adzadya mafuta; pakuti mafuta ndi uci adzadya yense wosiyidwa pakati pa dziko." 
Isaiah7:23 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo, kuti pali ponse panali mipesa cikwi cimodzi ya mtengo wace wa ndalama cikwi cimodzi, padzakhala lunguzi ndi minga." 
Isaiah7:24 Munthu adzafikako ndi mibvi ndi uta; pakuti dziko lonse lidzakhala la lunguzi ndi minga. 
Isaiah7:25 Ndipo zitunda zonse zinalimidwa ndi khasu, iwe sudzafikako cifukwa ca kuopa lunguzi ndi minga, koma pomwepo padzakhala potumizira ng'ombe ndi popondaponda nkhosa." 
Isaiah8:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Tenga iwe polembapo papakuru, nulembe pamenepo ndi malembedwe odziwika, Kangazakufunkha Fulumirakusakaza," 
Isaiah8:2 Ndipo ndidzadzitengera ine mboni zokhulupirika, Uriya wansembe, ndi Zekariya mwana wa Yeberekiya." 
Isaiah8:3 Ndipo ndinanka kwa mneneri wamkazi; ndipo iye anatenga pakati nabala mwana wamwamuna. Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Uche dzina lace, Kangazakufunkha Fulumirakusakaza." 
Isaiah8:4 Cifukwa kuti mwana asakhale ndi nzeru yakupfuula, Atate wanga, ndi Amai wanga, cuma ca Damasiko ndi cofunkha ca Samariya cidzalandidwa pamaso pa mfumu ya Asuri." 
Isaiah8:5 Ndipo Yehova ananena kwa ine kaciwirinso, nati," 
Isaiah8:6 Popeza anthu awa akana madzi a Silowa, amene ayenda pang'ono pang'ono, nakondwerera mwa Rezini ndi mwa mwana wa Remaliya;" 
Isaiah8:7 cifukwa cace, taonani, Ambuye atengera pa iwo madzi a Nyanja, olimba ndi ambiri, kunena mfumu ya Asuri ndi ulemerero wace wonse; ndipo iye adzadzala mphaluka zace zonse, nadzasefukira pamtunda ponse."
