Isaiah8:8 Ndipo iye adzapitapitakulowa m'Yuda; adzasefukira, napitirira; adzafikira m'khosi; ndi kutambasula kwa mapiko ace, kudzakwanira dziko lanu m'citando mwace, inu Imanueli." 
Isaiah8:9 Citani phokoso, anthu inu, koma mudzatyokatyoka; cherani khutu, inu nonse a maiko akutari; kwindani nokha, koma mudzatyokatyoka; kwindani nokha, koma mudzatyokatyoka." 
Isaiah8:10 Panganani upo, koma udzakhala cabe; nenani mau, koma sadzacitika; pakuti Mulungu ali pamodzi ndi ife." 
Isaiah8:11 Pakuti Yehova watero kwa ine ndi dzanja lolimba, nandilangiza ine kuti ndisayende m'njira ya anthu awa, nati," 
Isaiah8:12 Musacinene, Ciwembu; ciri conse cimene anthu awa adzacinena, Ciwembu; musaope monga kuopa kwao kapena musacite mantha." 
Isaiah8:13 Yehova wa makamu, Iye mudzamyeretsa; muope Iye, akucititseni mantha Iye." 
Isaiah8:14 Ndipo Iye adzakhala malo opatulika; koma mwala wopunthwitsa, ndi thanthwe lolakwitsa la nyumba zonse ziwiri za Israyeli, khwekhwe ndi msampha wa okhala m'Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah8:15 Ndipo ambiri adzapunthwapo, nagwa, natyoka, nakodwa, natengedwa." 
Isaiah8:16 Manga umboni, mata cizindikilo pacilamulo mwa aphunzi anga." 
Isaiah8:17 Ndipo ndidzalindira Yehova, amene wabisira a nyumba ya Yakobo nkhope yace, ndipo ndidzamyembekeza Iye," 
Isaiah8:18 Taonani, ine ndi ana amene Yehova wandipatsa ine, tiri zizindikilo ndi zodabwitsa mwa Israyeli, kucokera kwa Yehova wa makamu, amene akhala m'phiri la Ziyoni." 
Isaiah8:19 Ndipo pamene iwo adzati kwa iwe, Funa kwa olaula, ndi obwebweta, amene alira pyepye, nang'ung'udza; kodi anthu sadzafuna kwa Mulungu wao? Cifukwa ca amoyo, kodi adzafuna kwa akufa?" 
Isaiah8:20 Kucilamulo ndi kuumboni! ngati iwo sanena malinga ndi mau awa, ndithu sadzaona mbanda kuca." 
Isaiah8:21 Ndipo iwo adzapitirira obvutidwa ndi anjala, ndipo padzakhala kuti pokhala ndi njala iwo adzadziputa okha, ndi kutemberera mfumu yao, ndi Mulungu wao; ndi kugadamira nkhope zao kumwamba;" 
Isaiah8:22 nadzayang'ana padziko, koma taonani, nkhawa ndi mdima, kuziya kwa nsautso; ndi mdima woti bi udzaingitsidwa." 
Isaiah9:1 Koma kumene kunali nsautso sikudzakhala kuziya. Poyamba paja Mulungu ananyozetsa dziko la Zebuloni, ndi dziko la Naftali, koma potsiriza pace Iye analicitira ulemu, pa khwalala la kunyanja, patsidya pa Yordano, Galileya wa amitundu." 
Isaiah9:2 Anthu amene anayenda mumdima, aona kuwala kwakukuru; iwo amene anakhala m'dziko la mthunzi wa imfa, kuwala kwaturukira kwa iwo." 
Isaiah9:3 Inu mwacurukitsa mtundu, inu mwaenjezera kukondwa kwao; iwo akondwa pamaso panu monga akondwera m'masika, monga anthu akondwa pogawana zofunkha." 
Isaiah9:4 Pakuti gori la katundu wace, ndi mkunkhu wa paphewa pace, ndodo ya womsautsa, inu mwazityola monga tsiku la Midyani." 
Isaiah9:5 Pakuti zida zonse za mwamuna wobvala zida za nkhondo m'phokosomo, ndi zobvala zobvimvinika m'mwazi, zidzakhala zonyeka ngati nkhuni." 
Isaiah9:6 Pakuti kwa ife mwana wakhanda wabadwa, kwa ife mwana wamwamuna wapatsidwa; ndipo ulamuliro udzakhala pa phewa lace, ndipo adzamucha dzina lace Wodabwitsa, Wauphungu, Mulungu wamphamvu, Atate Wosatha, Kalonga wa mtendere." 
Isaiah9:7 Za kuenjezera ulamuliro wace, ndi za mtendere sizidzatha pa mpando wacifumu wa Davide, ndi pa ufumu wace, kuukhazikirsa, ndi kuucirikiza ndi ciweruziro ndi cilungamo kuyambira tsopano ndi kunkabe nthawi zonse. Cangu ca Yehova wa makamu cidzacita zimenezi." 
Isaiah9:8 Ambuye anatumiza mau kwa Yakobo, ndipo anatsikira pa Israyeli." 
Isaiah9:9 Ndipo anthu onse adzadziwa, ngakhale Efraimu ndi okhala m'Samariya, amene anena m'kunyada ndi m'kukula kwa mtima," 
Isaiah9:10 Njerwa zagwa, koma ife tidzamanga ndi miyala yosema; mikuyu yagwetsedwa, koma tidzaisinthanitsa ndi mikungudza." 
Isaiah9:11 Cifukwa cace Yehova adzamkwezera Rezini olimbana naye, nautsa adani ace;" 
Isaiah9:12 Aramu patsogolo ndi Afilisti pambuyo; ndipo iwo adzadya Israyeli ndi kukamwa koyasama. Mwa izi zonse mkwiyo wace sunacoke, koma dzanja lace liri citambasulire." 
Isaiah9:13 Koma anthu sanatembenukire kwa Iye amene anawamenya, ngakhale kufuna Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah9:14 Cifukwa cace Yehova adzadula mutu wa Israyeli ndi mcira wace; nthambi ya kanjedza ndi mlulu, tsiku limodzi." 
Isaiah9:15 Nkhalamba ndi wolemekezeka ndiye mutu, ndi mneneri wophunzitsa zonama ndiye mcira." 
Isaiah9:16 Pakuti iwo amene atsogolera anthuwa, ndiwo awasokeretsa; ndipo iwo amene atsogoleredwa nao aonongeka." 
Isaiah9:17 Cifukwa cace Ambuye sadzakondwera ndi anyamata ao, ngakhale kuwacitira cifundo amasiye ao ana ndi akazi; popeza yense ali wodetsa ndi wocimwa, m'kamwa monse mulankhula zopusa. Mwa izi zonse mkwiyo wace sunacoke, koma dzanja lace liri citambasulire." 
Isaiah9:18 Pakuti kucimwa kwayaka ngati moto kumariza lunguzi ndi minga, inde kuyaka m'nkhalango ya m'thengo, ndipo zifuka capamwamba, m'mitambo yautsi yocindikira." 
Isaiah9:19 M'kukwiya kwa Yehova wa makamu, dziko latenthedwa ndithu, anthunso ali ngati nkhuni; palibe munthu wocitira mbale wace cisoni." 
Isaiah9:20 Ndipo wina adzakwatula ndi dzanja lamanja, nakhala ndi njala; ndipo adzadya ndi dzanja lamanzere, osakhutai; iwo adzadya munthu yense nyama ya mkono wace wa iye mwini." 
Isaiah9:21 Manase adzadya Efraimu ndi Efraimu adzadya Manase, ndipo iwo pamodzi adzadyana ndi Yuda. Mwa izi zonse mkwiyo wace sunacoke, koma dzanja lace liri citambasulire." 
Isaiah10:1 Tsoka kwa iwo amene alamulira malamulo osalungama, ndi kwa alembi olemba mphulupulu;" 
Isaiah10:2 kuwapatulira osowa kuciweruziro, ndi kucotsera anthu anga aumphawi zoyenera zao, kuti alande za akazi amasiye, nafunkhire ana amasiye!" 
Isaiah10:3 Ndipo mudzacita ciani tsiku lakudza woyang'anira, ndi cipasuko cocokera kutari? mudzathawira kwa yani kufuna kuthangatidwa? mudzasiya kuti ulemerero wanu?" 
Isaiah10:4 Adzangoweramira pansi pa andende, ndipo adzagwa pansi pa ophedwa. Mwa izi zonse mkwiyo wace sunacoke, koma dzanja lace liri citambasulire." 
Isaiah10:5 Iwe Asuri cibonga ca mkwiyo wanga, ndodo m'dzanja lace muli ukali wanga!" 
Isaiah10:6 Ine ndidzamtumiza kumenyana ndi mtundu wosalemekeza, ndi pa anthu a mkwiyo wanga ndidzamlangiza, kuti afunkhe, agwire zolanda, awapondereze pansi, monga dothi la pamakwalala." 
Isaiah10:7 Koma iye safuna cotero, ndipo mtima wace suganizira cotero, koma mtima wace ulikufuna kusakaza, ndi kuduladula amitundu osawerengeka." 
Isaiah10:8 Popeza ati, Akalonga anga kodi sali onse mafumu?" 
Isaiah10:9 Kodi Kalino sali wonga ngati Karikemesi? kodi Hamati sali ngati Aripadi? kodi Samariya sali ngati Damasiko? 
Isaiah10:10 Popeza dzanja langa lapeza maufumu a mafano, mafano ao osema anapambana ndi iwo a ku Yerusalemu ndi ku Samariya;" 
Isaiah10:11 monga ndacitira Samariya ndi mafano ace, momwemo kodi sindidzacitira Yerusalemu ndi mafano ace?" 
Isaiah10:12 Cifukwa cace padzaoneka, kuti pamene Ambuye atatha nchito yace yonse pa phiri la Ziyoni ndi pa Yerusalemu, ndidzalanga zipatso za mtima wolimba wa mfumu ya Asuri, ndi ulemerero wa maso ace okwezedwa." 
Isaiah10:13 Popeza anati, Mwa mphamvu ya dzanja langa ndacita ici, ndi mwa nzeru yanga; pakuti ine ndiri wocenjera; ndacotsa malekezero a anthu, ndalanda cuma cao, ndagwetsa monga munthu wolimba mtima iwo okhala pa mipando yacifumu;" 
Isaiah10:14 dzanja langa lapeza monga cisa, cuma ca mitundu ya anthu, ndipo monga munthu asonkhanitsa mazira osiyidwa, ine ndasonkhanitsa dziko lonse lapansi, ndipo panalibe cogwedeza phiko, kapena cotsegula pakamwa, kapena colira pyepye." 
Isaiah10:15 Kodi nkhwangwa idzadzikweza yokha, pa iye amene adula nayo? kodi cocekera cidzadzikweza cokha pa iye amene acigwedeza, ngati cibonga ingamgwedeze iye amene ainyamula, ngati ndodo inganyamule kanthu popeza iri mtengo." 
Isaiah10:16 Cifukwa cace Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu, adzarumiza kuonda mwa onenepa ace; ndipo pansi pa ulemerero wace padzayaka kutentha, konga ngati kutentha kwa moto." 
Isaiah10:17 Ndipo kuwala kwa Israyeli kudzakhala moto, ndi Woyera wace adzakhala lawi; ndipo lidzatentha ndi kuthetsa minga yace ndi lunguzi wace tsiku limodzi." 
Isaiah10:18 Ndipo adzanyeketsa ulemerero wa m'nkhalango yace, ndi wa m'munda wace wopatsa bwino, moyo ndi thupi; ndipo padzakhala monga ngati pokomoka wonyamula mbendera." 
Isaiah10:19 Ndipo mitengo yotsala ya m'nkhalango yace idzakhala yowerengeka, kuti mwana ailembera." 
Isaiah10:20 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku lomwelo, kuti otsala a Israyeli, ndi iwo amene anapulumuka a nyumba ya Yakobo, sadzatsamiranso iye amene anawamenya; koma adzatsamira Yehova Woyera wa Israyeli, ntheradi." 
Isaiah10:21 Otsala adzabwera, otsala a Yakobo, kwa Mulungu wamphamvu." 
Isaiah10:22 Popeza ngakhale anthu anu Israyeli akunga mcenga wa kunyanja, otsala ao okha okha adzabwera; cionongeko catsimikizidwa, cilungamo cace cisefukira." 
Isaiah10:23 Pakuti Ambuye Yehova wa makamu adzacita cionongeko cotsimikizidwa pakati pa dziko lonse lapansi. 
Isaiah10:24 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye; Yehova wa makamu, Inu anthu anga okhala m'Ziyoni, musaope Asuri; ngakhale amenya inu ndi cibonga, kapena kukusamulira iwe ndodo yace, monga amacitira Aigupto." 
Isaiah10:25 Pakuti patsala kamphindi, ndipo ukali udzathedwa ndi mkwiyo wanga wakuwaononga." 
Isaiah10:26 Ndipo Yehova wa makamu adzamuutsira cikoti, monga m'kuphedwa kwa Midyani pa thanthwe la Orebu; ndipo cibonga cace cidzakhala pamwamba pa nyanja, ndipo adzaisamula monga anacitira Aigupto," 
Isaiah10:27 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku lomwelo, kuti katundu wace adzacoka pa phewa lako, ndi gori lace pakhosi pako; ndipo gori lidzathedwa cifukwa ca kudzoza mafuta." 
Isaiah10:28 Wafika ku Aiati, wapitirira kunka ku Migroni; pa Mikimasi asunga akatundu ace;" 
Isaiah10:29 wapita pampata; wagona pa Geba, Rama anthunthumira; Gibeya wa Sauli wathawa." 
Isaiah10:30 Pfuula ndi mau ako iwe mwana wamkazi wa Galimu! tamva, iwe Laisa! iwe Anatoti wosauka!" 
Isaiah10:31 Madimena ali wothawathawa; okhala m'Gebimu asonkhanakutiathawe. 
Isaiah10:32 Lero lomwe adzaima pa Nobu; agwedezera dzanja lace pa phiri la mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, phiri la Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah10:33 Taonani, Ambuye Yehova wa makamu adzasadza nthambi moopsya; ndipo zazitari msinkhu zidzadulidwa, ndipo zazitari zidzagwetsedwa." 
Isaiah10:34 Ndipo adzadula nkhalango za m'thengo ndi citsulo, ndipo Lebano adzagwa ndi wamphamvu." 
Isaiah11:1 Ndipo padzaturuka mphukira pa tsinde la Jese, ndi nthambi yoturuka m'mizu yace idzabala zipatso;" 
Isaiah11:2 ndipo mzimu wa Yehova udzambalira iye mzimu wanzeru ndi wakuzindikira, mzimu wa uphungu ndi mphamvu, mzimu wakudziwa ndi wakuopa Yehova;" 
Isaiah11:3 ndipo adzakondwera nako kumuopa Yehova, ndipo sadzaweruza monga apenya maso, sadzadzudzula mwamphekesera:" 
Isaiah11:4 koma ndi cilungamo adzaweruza aumphawi, nadzadzudzulira ofatsa a m'dziko moongoka; ndipo adzamenya dziko lapansi ndi cibonga ca kukamwa kwace, nadzapha oipa ndi mpweya wa milomo yace." 
Isaiah11:5 Ndipo cilungamo cidzakhala mpango wa m'cuuno mwace, ndi cikhulupiriko cidzakhala mpango wa pa zimpsyo zace." 
Isaiah11:6 Mmbulu udzakhala pamodzi ndi mwana wa nkhosa, ndipo nyalugwe adzagona pansi ndi mwana wa mbuzi; ndipo mwana wa ng'ombe ndi mwana wa mkango ndi coweta conenepa pamodzi; ndipo mwana wamng'ono adzazitsogolera." 
Isaiah11:7 Ndipo ng'ombe yaikazi ndi cirombo zidzadya pamodzi; ndipo ana ao ang'ono adzagona pansi; ndipo mkango udzadya udzu ngati ng'ombe. 
Isaiah11:8 Ndipo mwana wakuyamwa adzasewera pa una wa mamba, ndi mwana woleka kuyamwa adzaika dzanja lace m'pfunkha la mphiri." 
Isaiah11:9 Sizidzaipitsa, sizidzasakaza m'phiri langa lonse loyera, cifukwa kuti dziko lapansi lidzadzala ndi odziwa Yehova, monga mdazi adzaza nyanja." 
Isaiah11:10 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku lomwelo, kuti muzu wa Jese umene uima ngati mbendera ya mitundu ya anthu, amitundu adzafunafuna uwu; ndipo popuma pace padzakhala ulemerero." 
Isaiah11:11 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku lomwelo, kuti Ambuye adzabweza kaciwiri ndi dzanja lace anthu ace otsala ocokera ku Asuri, ndi ku Aigupto, ndi ku Patirosi, ndi ku Kusi, ndi ku Elamu, ndi ku Sinara, ndi ku Hamati, ndi ku zisumbu za m'nyanja yamcere." 
Isaiah11:12 Ndipo Iye adzaimika mbendera ya amitundu, ndipo adzasonkhanitsa oingitsidwa a Israyeli, namema obalalika a Yuda, kucokera ku madera anai a dziko lapansi." 
Isaiah11:13 Ndipo nsanje ya Efraimu idzacoka, ndi iwo amene abvuta Yuda adzadulidwa; Efraimu sacitira nsanje Yuda, ndi Yuda sacitira nsanje Efraimu." 
Isaiah11:14 Ndipo adzagudukira mapewa a Afilisti kumadzulo; pamodzi adzafunkha ana a kum'mawa; adzatambasula dzanja lao pa Edomu ndi pa Moabu; ndipo ana a Amoni adzawamvera. 
Isaiah11:15 Ndipo Yehova adzaononga ndithu bondo la nyanja ya Aigupto; ndipo ndi mphepo yace yopsereza adzagwedeza dzanja lace pa Nyanja, ndipo adzaimenya ikhale mphaluka zisanu ndi ziwiri, nadzaolotsa anthu pansi pouma." 
Isaiah11:16 Ndipo padzakhala khwalala la anthu ace otsala ocokera ku Asuri; monga lija la Israyeli tsiku lokwera iwo kuturuka m'dziko la Aigupto. 
Isaiah12:1 Tsiku lomwelo udzati, Ndikuyamikani inu Yehova; pakuti ngakhale munandikwiyira, mkwiyo wanu wacoka, ndipo mutonthoza mtima wanga." 
Isaiah12:2 Taonani, Mulungu ndiye cipulumutso canga; ndidzakhulupira, sindidzaopa; pakuti Yehova Mwini ndiye mphamvu yanga ndi nyimbo yanga, Iye ndiye cipulumutso canga." 
Isaiah12:3 Cifukwa cace mudzakondwera pakutunga madzi m'zitsime za cipulumutso. 
Isaiah12:4 Tsiku lomwelo mudzati, Muyamikire Yehova, bukitsani dzina lace, mulalikire macitidwe ace mwa mitundu ya anthu, munene kuti dzina lace lakwezedwa." 
Isaiah12:5 Muyimbire Yehova; pakuti wacita zaulemerero; cidziwike ici m'dziko lonse. 
Isaiah12:6 Tapfuula, takuwa iwe, wokhala m'Ziyoni, cifukwa Woyera wa Israyeli wa m'kati mwako ali wamkuru." 
Isaiah13:1 Katundu wa Babulo, imene anaiona Yesaya mwana wa Amozi." 
Isaiah13:2 Kwezani mbendera pa phiri loti se, kwezani mau kwa iwo, kodolani kuti alowe m'zipata za akuru." 
Isaiah13:3 Ine ndalamulira opatulidwa anga, inde, ndaitana amphamvu anga, acite mkwiyo wanga, okondwerera ndi ukuru wanga." 
Isaiah13:4 Mau a khamu m'mapiri, akunga amtundu waukuru wa anthu, mau a phokoso la maufumu a mitundu yosonkhanidwa! Yehova wa makamu asonkhanitsa khamu kunkhondo." 
Isaiah13:5 Acokera m'dziko lakutari, ku malekezero a thambo, ngakhale Yehova, ndi zida za mkwiyo wace, kuti aononge dziko lonse." 
Isaiah13:6 Kuwani inu; pakuti tsiku la Yehova liri pafupi; lidzafika monga cionongeko cocokera kwa Wamphamvuyonse. 
Isaiah13:7 Cifukwa cace manja onse adzafoka, ndi mitima yonse ya anthu idzasungunuka;" 
Isaiah13:8 ndipo adzaopa; zowawa ndi masauko zidzawagwira; ndipo adzamva zowawa, ngati mkazi wakubala; adzazizwa wina ndi wina; nkhope zao zidzanga malawi a moto." 
Isaiah13:9 Taonani tsiku la Yehova lidza, lankhanza, ndi mkwiyo ndi kukalipira kwaukali; kupasula dziko, ndi kudzaonongamo akucimwa psiti." 
Isaiah13:10 Cifukwa nyenyezi za kumwamba ndi makamu ao sizidzawala; dzuwa lidzada m'kuturuka kwace, ndipo mwezi sudzaonetsa kuwala kwace." 
Isaiah13:11 Ndipo ndidzalanga dziko lapansi, cifukwa ca kuipa kwao, ndi oipa cifukwa ca mphulupulu zao; ndipo ndidzaletsa kudzikuza kwa onyada, ndidzagwetsa kudzikweza kwa oopsya." 
Isaiah13:12 Ndipo ndidzacepsa anthu koposa golidi, ngakhale anthu koposa golidi weniweni wa ku Ofiri." 
Isaiah13:13 Cifukwa cace ndidzanthunthumiritsa miyamba, ndipo dziko lapansi lidzagwedezeka kucokera m'malo ace, m'mkwiyo wa Yehova wa makamu, tsiku la mkwiyo wace waukali." 
Isaiah13:14 Ndipo padzakhala kuti monga mbawala yothamangitsidwa, ndi monga nkhosa zosazisonkhanitsa anthu, adzatembenukira yense kwa anthu ace, nathawira yense ku dziko lace." 
Isaiah13:15 Onse opezedwa adzapyozedwa, ndi onse ogwidwa adzagwa ndi lupanga." 
Isaiah13:16 Makanda ao adzatswanyidwe pamaso pao; m'nyumba mwao mudzafunkhidwa, ndi akazi ao adzakakamizidwa." 
Isaiah13:17 Taonani, ndidzawautsira Amedi, amene sadzasamalira siliva, ngakhale golidi sadzakondwera naye." 
Isaiah13:18 Mauta ao adzatha anyamata; ndipo sadzacitira cisoni cipatso ca mimba; diso lao silidzaleka ana. 
Isaiah13:19 Ndipo Babulo, ulemerero wa maufumu, mudzi wokongolawo Akasidi anaunyadira, adzakhala monga momwe Mulungu anapasula Sodomu ndi Gomora." 
Isaiah13:20 Anthu sadzakhalamo konse, sadzakhalamo mbadwo ndi mbadwo; M-arabu sadzamanga hema wace pamenepo; abusa sadzagonetsa makamu ao kumeneko." 
Isaiah13:21 Koma zirombo za m'cipululu zidzagona pamenepo; nyumba zao zidzadzala ndi zakukuwa; ndipo nthiwatiwa zidzakhala pamenepo, ndipo atonde adzajidimuka pamenepo," 
Isaiah13:22 Ndipo mimbulu idzalira m'maboma ao, ndi ankhandwe m'manyumba ao abwino; ndi nthawi yace iyandikira, ndi masiku ace sadzacuruka." 
Isaiah14:1 Pakuti Ambuye adzamcitira cifundo Yakobo, ndipo adzasankhanso Israyeli, ndi kuwakhazikitsa m'dziko la kwao; ndipo acilendo adzadziphatika okha kwa iwo, nadzadzigumikiza ku nyumba ya Yakobo." 
Isaiah14:2 Ndipo mitundu ya anthu idzawatenga, ndi kuwafikitsa ku malo a kwao; ndipo a nyumba ya Israyeli adzakhala nao amitunduwo m'dziko la Yehova, ndi kuwayesa atumiki ndi adzakazi, ndipo amitunduwo adzatengedwa ndende, ndi amenewo anali ndende zao; ndipo Aisrayeli adzalamulira owabvuta." 
Isaiah14:3 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku loti Yehova adzakupumitsa cisoni cako, ndi nsautso yako, ndi nchito yako yobvuta, imene anakugwiritsa," 
Isaiah14:4 pamenepo udzayimbira mfumu ya ku Babulo nyimbo iyi yancinci, ndi kuti, Wobvuta wathadi! mudzi wagolidi wathadi!" 
Isaiah14:5 Yehova watyola mkunkhu wa woipa, ndodo yacifumu ya wolamulira." 
Isaiah14:6 Wokantha anthu mwaukali kuwakantha cikanthire, wolamulira amitundu mokwiya, angosautsidwa wopanda womlanditsa." 
Isaiah14:7 Dziko lonse lapuma, liri du; iwo ayamba kuyimba nyimbo," 
Isaiah14:8 Inde, milombwa ikondwera ndi iwe, ndi mikungudza ya Lebano, ndi kunena, Cigwetsere iwe pansi, palibe wokwera kudzatidula ife." 
Isaiah14:9 Kunsi kwa manda kugwedezeka, cifukwa ca iwe, kukucingamira podza pako; kukuutsira iwe mizimu, ngakhale onse akuru akuru a dziko lapansi; kukweza kucokera m'mipando yao mafumu onse a amitundu." 
Isaiah14:10 Onse adzabvomera, nadzati kwa iwe, Kodi iwe wakhalanso wopanda mphamvu ngati ife? kodi iwe wafanana nafe?" 
Isaiah14:11 Cifumu cako catsitsidwa kunsi ku manda, ndi phokoso la mingoli yako; mbozi zayalidwa pansi pa iwe, ndi mphukutu zakukuta." 
Isaiah14:12 Wagwadi kucokera kumwamba, iwe nthanda, mwana wa mbanda kuca! Wagwetsedwa pansi, iwe wolefula amitundu!" 
Isaiah14:13 Ndipo iwe unati mumtima mwako, Ndidzakwera kumwamba, ndidzakweza mpando wanga wacifumu pamwamba pa nyenyezi za Mulungu; ndidzakhala pamwamba pa phiri la khamu, m'malekezero a kumpoto;" 
Isaiah14:14 ndidzakwera pamwamba pa mitambo, ndidzafanana ndi Wam'mwambamwamba." 
Isaiah14:15 Koma udzatsitsidwa kunsi ku manda, ku malekezero a dzenje." 
Isaiah14:16 Iwo amene akuona iwe adzayang'anitsitsa iwe, nadzalingalira za iwe, ndi kuti, Kodi uyu ndi munthu amene ananthunthumiritsa dziko lapansi, amene anagwedeza maufumu;" 
Isaiah14:17 amene anapululutsa dziko, napasula midzi yace, amene sanamasula ndende zace, zinke kwao?" 
Isaiah14:18 Mafumu onse a amitundu, onsewo agona m'ulemerero yense kunyumba kwace." 
Isaiah14:19 Koma iwe watayidwa kunja kwa manda ako, ngati nthambi yonyansa, ngati cobvala ca ophedwa, opyozedwa ndi lupanga, otsikira ku miyala ya dzenje, monga ngati mtembo wopondedwa ndi phazi." 
Isaiah14:20 Iwe sudzaphatikizidwa pamodzi nao poikidwa, pakuti iwe waononga dziko lako, wapha anthu ako; mbeu ya ocita zoipa sidzachulidwa konse." 
Isaiah14:21 Konzani inu popherapo ana ace, cifukwa ca kuipa kwa atate ao; kuti iwo asadzauka ndi kukhala nalo dziko, ndi kudzaza dziko lapansi ndi midzi." 
Isaiah14:22 Ndipo Ine ndidzawaukira, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndi kuononga ku Babulo dzina ndi otsala, ndi mwana wamwamuna, ndi cidzukulu cacimuna, ati Yehova." 
Isaiah14:23 Ndidzayesapo pokhala nungu, ndi madziwe a madzi; ndipo ndidzasesapo ndi tsace la cionongeko, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah14:24 Yehova wa makamu walumbira, nati, Ndithu monga ndaganiza, cotero cidzacitidwa; ndipo monga ndapanga uphungu, cotero cidzakhala;" 
Isaiah14:25 kuti Ine ndidzatyola Asuri m'dziko langa, ndi pamwamba pa mapiri anga ndidzawapondereza; pomwepo gori lace lidzacoka pa iwo, ndi katundu wace adzacoka paphuzi pao." 
Isaiah14:26 Umenewu ndi uphungu wopangira dziko lonse; ndipo ili ndi dzanja lotambasulidwa pa amitundu onse. 
Isaiah14:27 Pakuti Yehova wa makamu wapanga uphungu, ndani adzauleketsa? ndi dzanja lace latambasulidwa, ndani adzalibweza?" 
Isaiah14:28 Caka cimene mfumu Ahazi anamwalira katundu amene analipo. 
Isaiah14:29 Usakondwere, lwe Filistia, wonsewe, potyoka ndodo inakumenya; pakuti m'muzu wa njoka mudzaturuka mphiri, ndimo cipatso cace cidzakhala njoka yamoto youluka." 
Isaiah14:30 Ndi oyamba kubadwa a osauka adzadya, aumphawi nadzagona pansi osatekeseka; ndipo ndidzapha muzu wako ndi njala, ndi otsala ako adzaphedwa." 
Isaiah14:31 Lira, cipata iwe; pfuula, mudzi iwe; wasungunuka, Filistia wonsewe, pakuti utsi ucokera kumpoto, ndipo palibe wosokera m'mizere yace." 
Isaiah14:32 Ndipo adzayankhanji amithenga a amitundu? Kuti Yehova wakhazikitsa Ziyoni, ndipo m'menemo anthu ace obvutidwa adzaona pobisalira." 
Isaiah15:1 Katundu wa Moabu. Pakuti usiku umodzi Ara wa ku Moabu wapasuka, nakhala cabe; usiku umodzi Kiri wa Moabu wapasuka, nakhala cabe." 
Isaiah15:2 Akwera kukacisi, ndi ku Dibo, kumisanje, kukalira; pa Nebo ndi pa Medeba a Moabu pali kulira; pamitu pao ponse pali dazi, ndebvu zonse zametedwa." 
Isaiah15:3 M'makwalala mwao adzimangira ciguduli m'cuuno, pamwamba pa nyumba zao, ndi m'malo a mabwalo ao, yense akuwa, naliritsa kwambiri." 
Isaiah15:4 Ndi Hesiboni apfuula zolimba, ndi Eliale; mau ao amveka, ngakhale ku Yahazi; cifukwa cace amuna ankhondo a Moabu apfuula zolimba; moyo wace wanthunthumira m'kati mwace." 
Isaiah15:5 Mtima wanga upfuula cifukwa ca Moabu: akuru ace athawira ku Zoari, ku Eglatiselisiya; pakuti pa cikweza ca Luhiti akwera alikulira, pakuti m'njira ya Horanaimu akweza mpfuu wa cionongeko." 
Isaiah15:6 Pakuti pa madzi a Nimirimi padzakhala mabwinja; papeza udzu wafota, msipu watha." 
Isaiah15:7 Cifukwa cace zocuruka adazipeza, ndi zosungidwa zao adzazitenga kunka nazo ku mtsinje wa mabango." 
Isaiah15:8 Pakuti kulira kwamveka kuzungulira malire a Moabu; kukuwa kwace kwafikira ku Eglaimu, ndi kukuwa kwace kwafikira ku Beerelimu." 
Isaiah15:9 Pakuti madzi a Dimoni adzala mwazi; pakuti ndidzatengera zina pa! Dimoni, mkango pa iye amene anapulumuka ku Moabu, ndi pa otsala am'dziko." 
Isaiah16:1 Tumizani inu ana a nkhosa kwa wolamulira wa dziko kucokera ku Sela kunka kucipululu, mpaka ku phiri la mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni." 
Isaiah16:2 Pakuti ana akazi a Moabu adzakhala pa madooko a Arinoni, ngati mbalame zoyendayenda, ngati cisa cofwancuka." 
Isaiah16:3 Citani uphungu, weruzani ciweruziro; yesa mthunzi wako monga usiku pakati pa usana; bisa opitikitsidwa, osaulula woyendayenda." 
Isaiah16:4 Opitikitsidwa a Moabu akhale ndi iwe, khala iwe comphimba pamaso pa wofunkha; pakuti kumpambapamba kwalekeka, kufunkha kwatha, opondereza atsirizika m'dziko." 
Isaiah16:5 Ndipo mpando wacifumu udzakhazikika m'cifundo, ndimo wina adzakhala pamenepo m'zoona, m'cihema ca Davide, nadzaweruza, nadzafunitsa ciweruziro, nadzafulumira kucita cilungamo." 
Isaiah16:6 Ife tinamva kunyada kwa Moabu, kuti iye ali wonyada ndithu; ngakhale kudzitama kwace, ndi kunyada kwace ndi mkwiyo wace; matukutuku ace ali acabe." 
Isaiah16:7 Cifukwa cace Moabu adzakuwa cifukwa ca Moabu, onse adzakuwa; cifukwa ca maziko a Kirihareseti mudzalira maliro, osautsidwa ndithu." 
Isaiah16:8 Pakuti minda ya ku Hesiboni yalefuka, ndi mpesa wa ku Sibimai; ambuye a mitundu atyolatyola mitengo yosankhika yace; iwo anafikira ngakhale ku Yazeri, nayendayenda m'cipululu; nthambi zace zinatasa, zinapitima panyanja." 
Isaiah16:9 Cifukwa cace ndidzalira ndi kulira kwa Yazeri, cifukwa ca mpesa wa Sibima, ndidzakukhathamiza ndi misozi yanga, iwe Hesiboni ndi Eleale; cifukwa kuti pa zipatso zako za malimwe, ndi pa masika ako, mpfuu wankhondo wagwera." 
Isaiah16:10 Ndipo cikondwero ndi msangalalo zacotsedwa m'munda wapatsa zipatso; ndi m'minda ya mipesa simudzakhala kuyimba, ngakhale phokoso losangalala; palibe woponda adzaponda vinyo m'moponderamo; ndaleketsa mpfuu wa masika amphesa." 
Isaiah16:11 Cifukwa cace m'mimba mwanga mulirira Moabu, ngati mngoli, ndi za m'mtima mwanga zilirira Kiriheresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Ndipo padzakhala kuti pamene Moabu adzadzionetsa yekha, ndi kudzitopetsa pamsanje, ndipo kufika ku malo ace oyera kudzapemphera, sadzapindulapo kanthu." 
Isaiah16:13 Awa ndi mau amene Yehova adanena za Moabu nthawi zapitazo. 
Isaiah16:14 Koma tsopano Yehova wanena, nati, Zisanapite zaka zitatu monga zaka za wolembedwa nchito, ulemerero wa Moabu udzakhala wonyozeka, ndi khamu lalikuru lace, ndi otsala adzakhala ang'ongong'ono ndi acabe." 
Isaiah17:1 Katundu wa Damasiko. Taonani, Damasiko wacotsedwa usakhalenso mudzi, ndimo udzangokhala muunda wopasudwa." 
Isaiah17:2 Midzi ya Aroeri yasiyidwa; idzakhala ya zoweta zogona pansi, opanda woziopsya." 
Isaiah17:3 Ku Efraimu sikudzakhalanso linga, ngakhale ufumu ku Damasiko, ngakhale otsala kwa Aramu; iwo adzakhala ngati ulemerero wa ana a Israyeli, ati Yehova wamakamu." 
Isaiah17:4 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo, kuti ulemerero wa Yakobo udzakhala wopyapyala, ndi kunenepa kwa thupi lace kudzaonda." 
Isaiah17:5 Ndipo padzakhala ngati wamasika alikumweta tirigu wosaceka, ndi dzanja lace lirikudula ngala; inde padzakhala ngati pamene wina akunkha ngala m'cigwa ca Refaimu." 
Isaiah17:6 Koma mudzasiyidwa m'menemo khunkha, monga ngati kugwedeza kwace kwa mtengo waazitona, zipatso ziwiri pena zitatu m'nsonga ya nthambi yosomphoka, zinai pena zisanu m'nthambi za kunthemba, za mtengo wobalitsa, ati Yehova, Mulungu wa Israyeli." 
Isaiah17:7 Tsiku limenelo munthu adzayang'ana kwa Mlengi wace, ndipo maso ace adzalemekeza Woyera wa Israyeli." 
Isaiah17:8 Ndipo iye sadzayang'ana pa maguwa a nsembe, nchito ya manja ace, ngakhale kulemekeza cimene anacipanga ndi zala zace, ngakhale zifanizo pena mafano a dzuwa." 
Isaiah17:9 Tsiku limenelo midzi yace yolimba idzakhala ngati mabwinja a m'nkhalango, ndi a pansonga pa phiri, osiyidwa pamaso pa ana a Israyeli; ndipo padzakhala bwinja." 
Isaiah17:10 Cifukwa iwe waiwala Mulungu wa cipulumutso cako, sunakumbukira thanthwe la mphamvu zako; cifukwa cace iwe waoka mitengo yokondweretsa, waokapo zipinjiri zacilendo;" 
Isaiah17:11 tsiku lako looka uzingapo mpanda, nuphukitsa mbeu zako m'mawa mwace; mulu wa masika udzaoneka tsiku lakulira ndi la cisoni cothetsa nzeru." 
Isaiah17:12 Ha, phokoso la mitundu yambiri ya anthu ambiri, amene apfuula ngati kukukuma kwa nyanja: ndi kuthamanga kwa amitundu, akuthamanga ngati kuthamangakwa madzi amphamvu!" 
Isaiah17:13 Mitundu ya anthu idzathamanga ngati kuthamanga kwa madzi ambirimbiri; koma Iye adzawadzudzula, ndipo iwo adzathawira patari, nadzapitikitsidwa monga mankhusu a pamapiri patsogolo pa mphepo, ndi monga pfumbi lokwetera patsogolo pa mkunthu wa mphepo." 
Isaiah17:14 Pa nthawi ya madzulo, taonani kuopsya; kusanace, iwo palibe. Ili ndi gawo la iwo amene atifunkha ndi ici ciwagwera omwe alanda zathu." 
Isaiah18:1 Ha, dziko lakukupuza mapiko, liri tsidya lija la nyanja za Etiopia;" 
Isaiah18:2 limene litumiza mithenga panyanja m'ngalawa zatnabungwa zoyenda m'madzi, ndi kuti, Mukani, inu mithenga yoyenda msanga msanga ku mtundu wa anthu atari ndi osalala, kwa mtundu woopsya cikhalire cao, mtundu umene uyesa dziko ndi kupondereza pansi, umene dziko lace nyanja ziligawa!" 
Isaiah18:3 Inunonseakukhala m'dziko lapansi, ndi inu akukhazikika pa dziko lapansi, potukulidwa cizindikiro pamwamba pa mapiri, mudzaona, ndi polizidwa lipenga mudzamva." 
Isaiah18:4 Pakuti Yehova watero kwa ine, Ine ndidzakhala cete, ndipo ndidzayang'ana mokhala cete, ndipo ndidzayang'ana mokhalamo Ine, monga kuwala kotentha kwa dzuwa, monga mtambo wa mame m'kutentha kwa masika." 
Isaiah18:5 Pakuti masika asanafike, kutatha kuphuka ndi posanduka duwa mphesa yofuna kucha, iye adzadzombolera tinthambi ndi mphopo, ndi nthambi zotasa adzazicotsa ndi kuzisadza." 
Isaiah18:6 Adzasiyira mbalame zakulusa za m'mapiri ndi zirombo za dziko nthambizo, ndipo mbalame zakulusa zidzakhalapo m'dzinja, ndi zirombo zonse za dziko zidzakhalapo m'malimwe." 
Isaiah18:7 Nthawi imeneyo mphatso idzaperekedwa kwa Yehova wa makamu, mtundu wa anthu atari ndi osalala, yocokera kwa mtundu woopsya cikhalire cao; mtundu umene uyesa dziko ndi kupondereza pansi, umene dziko lace nyanja ziligawa, ku malo a dzina la Yehova wa makamu, phiri la Ziyoni." 
Isaiah19:1 Katundu wa Aigupto. Taonani, Yehova wakwera pamwamba pa mtambo wothamanga, nadza ku Aigupto; ndi mafano a Aigupto adzagwedezeka pakufika kwace, ndi mtima wa Aigupto udzasungunuka pakati pace." 
Isaiah19:2 Ndipo ndidzapikisanitsa Aaigupto; ndipo adzamenyana wina ndi mbale wace, ndi wina ndi mnansi wace; mudzi kumenyana ndi mudzi, ndi ufumu kumenyana ndi ufumu." 
Isaiah19:3 Ndipo mzimu wa Aigupto adzakhala wacabe pakati pace; ndipo Ine ndidzaononga uphungu wace; ndimo iwo adzafunafuna mafano ndi anyanga, ndi alauli, ndi obwebweta." 
Isaiah19:4 Ndipo ndidzapereka Aigupto m'manja mwa mbuye wankharwe; ndi mfumu yaukali idzawalamulira, ati Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah19:5 Ndipo madzi adzaphwa m'nyanja yaikuru, ndipo nyanja yoyendamo madzi idzaphwa, niuma." 
Isaiah19:6 Ndipo nyanja zidzanunkha; mitsinje ya Aigupto idzacepa, niuma; bango ndi mlulu zidzafota." 
Isaiah19:7 Madambo ovandikana ndi Nile, pafupi ndi gombe la Nile, ndi zonse zobzyala pa Nile zidzauma, nizicotsedwa, zosakhalanso konse." 
Isaiah19:8 Asodzinso adzalira, ndi onse oponya mbedza m'Nile adzaliralira, ndi onse oponya makoka m'madzi, adzalefuka." 
Isaiah19:9 Komanso iwo amene agwira nchito yakupala bwazi, ndi iwo amene aomba nsaru yoyera, adzakhala ndi manyazi." 
Isaiah19:10 Ndipo maziko ace adzasweka, onse amene agwira nchito yolipidwa adzabvutidwa mtima." 
Isaiah19:11 Akalonga a Zoani apusa ndithu; uphungu wa aphungu anzeru a Farao wasanduka wopulukira; bwanji iwe unena kwa Farao, Ine ndine mwana wa anzeru, mwana wa mafumu akale?" 
Isaiah19:12 Nanga tsopano anzeru ali kuti? akuuze iwe tsopano; adziwe cimene Yehova wa makamu watsimikiza mtima kucitira Aigupto. 
Isaiah19:13 Akalonga a Zoani apusa, akalonga a Nofi anyengedwa; iwo asoceretsa Aigupto, amene ali mwala wa pangondya wa mapfuko ace." 
Isaiah19:14 Yehova wasanganiza mzimu wa kusaweruzika pakati pace; ndipo iwo asoceretsa Aigupto m'nchito zonse zace, monga mwamuna woledzera ayenda punzipunzi posanza pace." 
Isaiah19:15 Aigupto sadzakhala ndi nchito, imene mutu pena mcira, pena nthambi ya kanjedza, pena mlulu zidzaigwira." 
Isaiah19:16 Tsiku limenelo Aigupto adzanga akazi; ndipo adzanthunthumira ndi kuopa, cifukwa ca kugwedeza kwa dzanja la Yehova wa makamu, limene Iye agwedeza pamwamba pace." 
Isaiah19:17 Ndipo dziko la Yuda lidzaopsa Aigupto, yense wakulichula adzamtembenukira mwamantha, cifukwa ca uphungu wa Yehova wa makamu, aupanga pa dzikolo." 
Isaiah19:18 Tsiku limenelo padzakhala midzi isanu m'dziko la Aigupto yolankhula cinenero ca Kanani, ndi yolumbira, Pali Yehova wa makamu; wina udzachedwa, Mudzi wa cionongeko." 
Isaiah19:19 Tsiku limenelo padzakhala guwa la nsembe la Yehova pakati pa dziko la Aigupto, ndi coimiritsa ca Yehova m'malire ace." 
Isaiah19:20 Ndipo cidzakhala cizindikiro ndi mboni ya Yehova wa makamu m'dziko la Aigupto; pakuti iwo adzalirira kwa Yehova, cifukwa ca osautsa, ndipo Iye adzawatumizira mpulumutsi, ndi wamphamvu, nadzawapulumutsa." 
Isaiah19:21 Ndipo Yehova adzadziwika kwa Aigupto, ndipo Aaigupto adzadziwa Yehova tsiku limenelo; inde iwo adzapembedzera ndi nsembe ndi zopereka, nadzawindira Yehova ndi kucitadi." 
Isaiah19:22 Ndipo Yehova adzakantha Aigupto kukantha ndi kuciritsa; ndipo iwo adzabwerera kwa Yehova, ndipo Iye adzapembedzedwa ndi iwo, nadzawaciritsa." 
Isaiah19:23 Tsiku limenelo padzakhala khwalala locokera m'Aigupto kunka ku Asuri, ndipo M-asuri adzafika ku Aigupto, ndi M-aigupto adzafika ku Asuri, ndipo Aaigupto adzapembedzera pamodzi ndi Aasuri." 
Isaiah19:24 Tsiku limenelo Israyeli ndi Aigupto ndi Asuri atatuwa, adzakhala mdalitso pakati pa dziko lapansi;" 
Isaiah19:25 pakuti Yehova wa makamu wadalitsa iwo, ndi kuti, Odalitsika Aigupto anthu anga, ndi Asuri nchito ya manja anga, ndi Israyeli colowa canga." 
Isaiah20:1 Caka cimene kazembe wa ku Asuri anafika ku Asidodi, muja Sarigoni mfumu ya Asuri anamtumiza iye, ndipo iye anamenyana ndi Asidodi, naugonjetsa." 
Isaiah20:2 Nthawi imeneyo Yehova ananena ndi Yesaya, mwana wa Amozi, nati, Muka numasule ciguduli m'cuuno mwako, nucicotse, nubvule nsapato yako ku phazi lako. Ndipo iye anatero, nayenda marisece, ndi wopanda nsapato," 
Isaiah20:3 Ndipo Yehova anati, Monga mtumiki wanga Yesaya wayenda marisece ndi wopanda nsapato zaka zitatu, akhale cizindikilo ndi codabwitsa kwa Aigupto ndi kwa Etiopia;" 
Isaiah20:4 momwemo mfumu ya Asuri idzatsogolera kwina am'nsinga a Aigupto, ndi opitikitsidwa a Etiopia, ana ndi okalamba, amarisece ndi opanda nsapato, ndi matako osabvala, kuti acititse manyazi Aigupto." 
Isaiah20:5 Ndipo iwo adzakhala ndi mantha ndi manyazi, cifukwa ca Kusi, amene anawatama, ndi Aigupto, amene anawanyadira." 
Isaiah20:6 Ndipo wokhala m'mphepete mwa nyanja muno adzati tsiku limenelo, Taonani, kuyembekeza kwathu kuli kotero, kumene ife tinathawira atithangate kupulumutsidwa kwa mfumu ya Asuri, ndipo ife tidzapulumuka bwanji?" 
Isaiah21:1 Katundu wa cipululu ca kunyanja. Monga akabvumvulu a kumwela apitirira, kufumira kucipululu ku dziko loopsya." 
Isaiah21:2 Masomphenya obvuta aonetsedwa kwa ine; wogula malonda wonyenga amangonyenga, ndi wofunkha amangofunkha. Kwera Elamu iwe; zunguniza Media iwe; kuusa moyo kwace konse ndakutonthoza." 
Isaiah21:3 Cifukwa cace m'cuuno mwanga mwadzazidwa ndi zopota; zopweteka zandigwira ine monga zopweteka za mkazi pobala mwana; zowawa zindiweramitsa, makutu anga sangathe kumva; ndicita mantha sindingathe kuona." 
Isaiah21:4 Mtima wanga uguguda, mantha andiopsetsa ine; cizitezite cimene ndinacikhumba candisandukira kunthunthumira." 
Isaiah21:5 Iwo akonza pa gome lodyera, aika alonda, adya, namwa; ukani, akalonga inu, dzozani mafuta cikopa." 
Isaiah21:6 Pakuti Ambuye atero kwa ine, Muka, ika mlonda anene cimene aciona;" 
Isaiah21:7 ndipo pamene iye anaona khamu, amuna apakavalo awiri awiri, khamu la aburu, khamu la ngamila, iye adzamvetsera ndi khama mosamalitsa." 
Isaiah21:8 Ndipo iye anapfuulitsa ngati mkango, Ambuye inu, ine ndiimabe pamwamba pa nsanja nthawi ya usana, ndipo ndiikidwa mu ulonda wanga usiku wonse;" 
Isaiah21:9 ndipo taonani, kuno kulinkudza khamu la amuna, apaakavalo awiri awiri. Ndipo iye anayankha nati, Babulo wagwa, wagwa; ndi mafano onse osema a milungu yace asweka, nagwa pansi." 
Isaiah21:10 Kuomba kwanga nanga, ndi za pa dwale langa: cimene ine ndinacimva kwa Yehova wa makamu Mulungu wa Israyeli, ndanena kwa inu." 
Isaiah21:11 Katundu wa Duma. Wina aitana kwa ine kucokera ku Seiri, Mlonda, nthawi yanji ya usiku? Mlonda, nthawi yanji ya usiku?" 
Isaiah21:12 Mlonda anati, Kuli kuca, koma kukali usiku; mukafuna kufunsa, funsani, bwerani, idzani." 
Isaiah21:13 Katundu wa pa Arabiya. M'nkhalango ya m'Arabiya mudzagona, inu makamu oyendayenda a Dedani." 
Isaiah21:14 Mucingamire akumva ludzu ndi madzi; okhala m'dziko la Tema ananka kukomana ndi othawa ndi cakudya cao. 
Isaiah21:15 Pakuti iwo anathawa malupanga, malupanga osololedwa, ndi mauta-olifuka ndi nkhondo yobvuta." 
Isaiah21:16 Pakuti Ambuye ana tero kwa ine, Cisanapite caka malinga ndi zaka za wolembedwa nchito ulemerero wonse wa Kedara udzagoma;" 
Isaiah21:17 ndi otsala amauta, ngwazi za ana a Kedara zidzacepa, pakuti Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli wanena." 
Isaiah22:1 Katundu wa cigwa ca masomphenya. Mwatani kuti mwakwera nonsenu pamacindwi? 
Isaiah22:2 Iwe amene wadzala ndi zimpfuu, mudzi waphokoso, mudzi wokondwa; ophedwa ako, sanaphedwa ndi lupanga, sanafe m'nkhondo." 
Isaiah22:3 Olamulira ako onse athawa pamodzi, anamangidwa ndi amauta; opezedwa ako onse anamangidwa pamodzi, nathawira patari." 
Isaiah22:4 Comweco ndinati, Usandiyang'ane ine, ndilira ndi kuwawa mtima; usafulumire kunditonthoza ine, cifukwa ca kufunkhidwa kwa mwana wamkazi wa anthu anga," 
Isaiah22:5 Pakuti ndi tsiku laphokoso, ndi lopondereza pansi, ndi lothetsa nzeru, locokera kwa Ambuye Yehova wa makamu, m'cigwa ca masomphenya, kugumuka kwa malinga, ndi kupfuulira kumapiri." 
Isaiah22:6 Ndipo Elamu anatenga phodo, ndi magareta a anthu ndi apakavalo; ndipo Kiri anaonetsa zikopa." 
Isaiah22:7 Ndipo panali kuti zigwa zako zosankhika zinadzala magareta, ndi apakavalo anadzinika okha pacipata." 
Isaiah22:8 Ndipo Iye anacotsa cophimba ca Yuda; ndipo iwe unayang'ana tsiku limenelo pa zida za m'nyumba ya nkhalango. 
Isaiah22:9 Ndipo inu munaona kuti pa mudzi wa Davide panagumuka mipata yambiri; ndipo munasonkhanitsa pamodzi madzi a m'thamanda lakunsi. 
Isaiah22:10 Ndipo inu munawerenga nyumba za Yerusalemu, ndipo munagwetsa nyumba, kuti mumangire linga." 
Isaiah22:11 Inu munapanganso cosungamo madzi a thamanda lakale, pakati pa malinga awiri; koma inu simunamuyang'ane iye amene anacicita ico, ngakhale kusamalira iye amene analipanga kale." 
Isaiah22:12 Ndipo tsiku limenelo Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu, anaitana kulira, ndi kugwa misozi, ndi kumeta, ndi kubvala ciguduli m'cuuno;" 
Isaiah22:13 koma taonani, kukondwa, ndi kusekerera, ndi kupha ng'ombe, ndi kupha nkhosa, ndi kudya nyama, ndi kumwa vinyo; tiyeni tidye ndi kumwa, cifukwa mawa tidzafa." 
Isaiah22:14 Ndipo Yehova wa makamu wadzibvumbulutsa yekha m'makutu mwanga, Ndithu coipa cimeneci sicidzacotsedwa pa inu kufikira inu mudzafa, ati Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu." 
Isaiah22:15 Atero Ambuye Yehova wa makamu, Muka, pita iwe kwa kapitao uyu, kwa Sebina woyang'anira nyumba, ndi kuti," 
Isaiah22:16 Ucitanji iwe kuno, ndimo ndani ali nawe kuno, kuti iwe wagoba manda kuno, ndi kudzigobera manda pamwamba, ndi kudzisemera mogonamo m'thanthwe." 
Isaiah22:17 Taona Yehova adzakuponya iwe zolimba, monga mwamuna wamphamvu, inde adzakufumbata zolimba." 
Isaiah22:18 Iye ndithu adzakuzunguza, ndi kukuponyaponya ngati mpira m'dzido lalikuru; kumeneko iwe udzafa, ndipo kumeneko kudzakhala magareta a ulemerero wako, iwe wocititsa manyazi banja la mbuye wako." 
Isaiah22:19 Ndipo Ine ndidzakuturutsa iwe mu nchito yako, ndi kukutsitsa iwe pokhala pako." 
Isaiah22:20 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo, kuti ine ndidzaitana mtumiki wanga, Eliakimu mwana wa Hilikiya:" 
Isaiah22:21 ndipo ndidzambveka iye cobvala cako, ndi kumlimbikitsa ndi lamba lako, ndipo ndidzapereka ulamuliro wako m'dzanja lace; ndipo iye adzakhala atate wa okhala m'Yerusalemu ndi a nyumba ya Yuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Ndipo ndidzaika mfungulo wa nyumba ya Davide paphewa pace, ndipo iye adzatsegula, ndipo palibe wina adzatseka, iye adzatseka ndipo palibe wina adzatsegula." 
Isaiah22:23 Ndipo ndidzamkhomera iye ngati msomali polimba; ndipo iye adzakhala mpando wa ulemerero wa banja la atate wace. 
Isaiah22:24 Ndipo iwo adzapacika pa iye ulemerero wonse wa banja la atate wace, obadwa ndi ana, mbiya zonse zazing'ono, ngakhale zikho ndi aguda omwe." 
Isaiah22:25 Tsiku limenelo, ati Yehova wa makamu, msomali wokhomeredwa polimba udzasukusika; nudzaguluka, ndi kugwa, ndi katundu wopacikidwapo adzadulidwa; pakuti Yehova wanena." 
Isaiah23:1 Katundu wa Turo. Kuwani, inu ngalawa za Tarisi; cifukwa wapasudwa, kulibenso nyumba, kulibe polowera; kucokera ku dziko la Kitimo kwabvumbulutsidwa kwa iwo." 
Isaiah23:2 Khalani cete, inu okhala m'cisumbu; iwe amene anakudzazanso amalonda a ku Zidoni, opita m'nyanja." 
Isaiah23:3 Ndi pa nyanja zazikuru anapindula ndi mbeu za ku Sihori ndizo dzinthu za ku Nile; ndi kumeneko kunali msika wa amitundu. 
Isaiah23:4 Khala ndi manyazi, iwe Zidoni; cifukwa nyanja yanena, linga la kunyanja, ndi kuti, Ine sindinamve zowawa, kapena kubala, kapena kulera anyamata, kapena kulera anamwali." 
Isaiah23:5 Pofika mbiriyo ku Aigupto, iwo adzamva kuwawa kwambiri pa mbiri ya Turo." 
Isaiah23:6 Olokani inu, kunka ku Tarisi, kuwani, inu okhala m'cisumbu." 
Isaiah23:7 Kodi umene ndi mudzi wanu wokondwa, wacikhalire kale lomwe, umene mapazi ace anaunyamula kunka nao kutari kukhalako?" 
Isaiah23:8 Ndani wapanga uphungu uno pa Turo, mudzi umene upereka akorona, amalonda ace ali akalonga, ogulitsa ace ali olemekezeka pa dziko lapansi?" 
Isaiah23:9 Yehova wa makamu wapanga uphungu uwu, kuipitsa kunyada kwa ulemerero wonse, kupepula onse olemekezeka a m'dziko lapansi." 
Isaiah23:10 Pita pakati pa dziko lako monga Nile, iwe mwana wamkazi wa Tarisi; palibenso lamba." 
Isaiah23:11 Iye watambasula dzanja lace panyanja, wagwedeza maufumu; Yehova walamulira za amalonda, kupasula malinga ace." 
Isaiah23:12 Ndipo Iye anati, Iwe sudzakondwanso konse, iwe namwali wobvutidwa, mwanawamkazi wa Zidoni; uka, oloka kunka ku Kitimu; ngakhale kumeneko iwe sudzapumai." 
Isaiah23:13 Taonani, dziko la Akasidi; anthu awa sakhalanso; Asuri analiika ilo likhale la iwo okhala m'cipululu; iwo amanga nsanja zao, nagumula nyumba za mafumu ace; nalipasula." 
Isaiah23:14 Kuwani, inu ngalawa za Tarisi; pakuti linga lanu lapasulidwa." 
Isaiah23:15 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo, kuti Turo adzaiwalika zaka makumi asanu ndi awiri, malinga ndi masiku a mfumu imodzi; zitapita zaka makumi asanu ndi ziwirizo, cidzakhala kwa Turo monga m'nyimbo ya mkazi wadama." 
Isaiah23:16 Tenga mngoli, yendayenda m'mudzi, iwe mkazi wadama, amene unaiwalika; yimba zokoma, curukitsa nyimbo, kuti ukumbukiridwe." 
Isaiah23:17 Ndipo padzali, zitapita zaka makumi asanu ndi awirizo, kuti Yehova adzazonda Turo, ndipo iye adzabwerera ku mphotho yace, nadzacita dama ndi maufumu onse a dziko lapansi, okhala kunja kuno." 
Isaiah23:18 Malonda ace ndi mphotho yace zidzakhala zopatulikira Yehova; sizidzasungidwa kapena kuikidwa; cifukwa malonda ace adzakhala kwa iwo, amene akhala pamaso pa Yehova, kuti adye mokwana, nabvale caulemu." 
Isaiah24:1 Taonani, Yehova apululutsa dziko, nalipasula, nalitembenuza dodolido, nabalalitsa okhalamo ace." 
Isaiah24:2 Ndipo padzakhala monga ndi anthu, moteronso ndi ansembe; monga ndi mtumiki, moteronso ndi mbuyace; monga ndi mdzakazi, moteronso ndi mbuyace wamkazi; monga ndi wogula, moteronso ndi wogulitsa; monga ndi wobwereka, moteronso ndi wombwereka; monga ndi wotenga phindu, moteronso ndi wombwezera phindu kwa iye." 
Isaiah24:3 Dziko lidzapululuka konse, ndi kupasulidwa ndithu; pakuti Yehova ananena mau amenewa." 
Isaiah24:4 Dziko lilira nilifota, dziko lilefuka nilifota, anthu omveka a padziko alefuka." 
Isaiah24:5 Dzikonso laipitsidwa ndi okhalamo ace omwe, cifukwa iwo alakwa pamalamulo nasinthanitsa malemba, natyola cipangano ca nthawi zonse." 
Isaiah24:6 Cifukwa cace citemberero cadya dziko, ndi amene akhala m'menemo apezedwa ocimwa, cifukwa cace okhalamo a padziko atenthedwa, ndipo anthu owerengeka atsala." 
Isaiah24:7 Vinyo watsopano alira, mpesa ulefuka, mitima yonse yokondwa iusa moyo." 
Isaiah24:8 Kusangalala kwa mangaka kwalekeka, phokoso la iwo amene aserera litha, kukondwa kwa mngoli kwalekeka." 
Isaiah24:9 Iwo sadzamwa vinyo ndi kuyimba nyimbo; cakumwa caukali cidzawawa kwa iwo amene acimwa. 
Isaiah24:10 Mudzi wosokonezeka wagwetsedwa pansi; nyumba zonse zatsekedwa, kuti asalowemo munthu." 
Isaiah24:11 Muli mpfuu m'makwalala cifukwa ca vinyo; kukondwa konse kwadetsedwa, kusangalala kwa dziko kwatha." 
Isaiah24:12 M'mudzi mwatsala bwinja, ndi cipata camenyedwa ndi cipasuko." 
Isaiah24:13 Cifukwa cace padzakhala cotero pakati pa dziko mwa anthu, ngati kugwedeza kwa mtengo waazitona, ngati khunkha la mphesa, pakutha masika ace." 
Isaiah24:14 Amenewa adzakweza mau ao, nadzapfuula; cifukwa ca cifumu ca Yehova, iwo adzapfuula zolimba panyanja." 
Isaiah24:15 Cifukwa cace lemekezani inu Yehova kum'mawa, ngakhale dzina la Yehova, Mulungu wa Israyeli, m'zisumbu za m'nyanja." 
Isaiah24:16 Kucokera ku malekezero a dziko ife tamva nyimbo zolemekeza wolungama. Koma ine ndinati, Ndaonda ine, ndaonda ine, tsoka kwa ine! amalonda onyenga amangonyenga; inde ogulitsa onyenga apambana kunyenga." 
Isaiah24:17 Mantha ndi dzenje ndi msampha ziri pa iwe, wokhala m'dziko." 
Isaiah24:18 Ndipo padzali, kuti iye amene athawa mbiri yoopsya, adzagwa m'dzenje; ndi iye amene aturuka m'kati mwa dzenje, adzakodwa mumsampha, pakuti mazenera a kuthambo atsegudwa, ndi maziko a dziko agwedezeka." 
Isaiah24:19 Dziko lapansi lasweka ndithu, dziko lapansi lasungunukadi, dziko lapansi liri kugwedezeka kopambana." 
Isaiah24:20 Dziko lapansi lidzacita dzandi dzandi, ngati munthu woledzera, ndi kunjenjemera, ngati cilindo; ndi kulakwa kwace kudzalilemera, ndipo lidzagwa losaukanso." 
Isaiah24:21 Ndipo padzali tsiku limenelo, kuti Yehova adzazonda kumwamba khamu la kumwamba, ndi mafumu a dziko lapansi." 
Isaiah24:22 Ndipo iwo adzasonkhanitsidwa pamodzi, monga ndende zimasonkhanitsidwa m'dzenje, ndi kutsekeredwa m'kaidi, ndipo atapita masiku ambiri adzawazonda." 
Isaiah24:23 Pompo mwezi udzanyazitsidwa, ndi dzuwa lidzakhala ndi manyazi, pakuti Yehova wa makamu adzalamulira caulemerero m'phiri la Ziyoni, ndi m'Yerusalemu, ndi pamaso pa akuru akuru ace." 
Isaiah25:1 Yehova, Inu ndinu Mulungu wanga, ndidzakukuzani Inu, ndidzatamanda dzina lanu, cifukwa mwacita zinthu zodabwitsa, ngakhale: zauphungu zakale, mokhulupirika ndi m'zoonadi." 
Isaiah25:2 Cifukwa Inu mwasandutsa mudzi muunda; mudzi walinga bwinja; nyumba ya alendo kuti isakhale mudzi; sudzamangidwa konse. 
Isaiah25:3 Cifukwa cace anthu amphamvu adzakulemekezani Inu, mudzi wa mitundu yakuopsya udzakuopani Inu." 
Isaiah25:4 Cifukwa Inu mwakhala linga la aumphawi, linga la osowa m'kubvutidwa kwace, pobisalira cimphepo, mthunzi wa pa dzuwa, pamene kuomba kwa akuopsya kufanana ndi cimphepo cakuomba chemba." 
Isaiah25:5 Monga kutentha m'malo ouma, Inu mudzaletsa phokoso la alendo; nyimbo ya akuopsya idzaletseka, monga mthunzi uletsa dzuwa." 
Isaiah25:6 Ndipo m'phiri limendi Yehova wa makamu adzakonzera anthu ace onse phwando la zinthu zonona, phwando la vinyo wa pamitsokwe, la zinthu zonona za mafuta okha okha, la vinyo wansenga wokuntha bwino." 
Isaiah25:7 Ndipo Iye adzaononga m'phiri limeneli cophimba nkhope cobvundikira mitundu yonse ya anthu, ndi nsaru yokuta amitundu onse." 
Isaiah25:8 Iye wameza imfa ku nthawi yonse; ndipo Ambuye Mulungu adzapukuta misozi pa nkhope zonse; ndipo citonzo ca anthu ace adzacicotsa pa dziko lonse lapansi; cifukwa Yehova wanena. 
Isaiah25:9 Ndipo adzanena tsiku limenelo, Taonani, uyu ndiye Mulungu wathu; tamlindirira Iye, adzatipulumutsa; uyu ndiye Yehova, tamlindirira Iye, tidzakondwa ndikusekereram'cipulumutso cace." 
Isaiah25:10 Cifukwa m'phiri limeneli dzanja la Yehova lidzakhalamo, ndipo Moabu adzaponderezedwa pansi m'malo ace, monga maudzu aponderezedwa padzala." 
Isaiah25:11 Ndipo iye adzatambasula manja ace pakati pamenepo, monga wosambira atambasula manja ace posambira; koma Iye adzagwetsa pansi kunyada kwace, pamodzi ndi kunyenga kwa manja ace." 
Isaiah25:12 Ndipo linga la pamsanje la macemba ako Iye waligwetsa, naligonetsa pansi, nalifikitsa padothi, ngakhale papfumbi." 
Isaiah26:1 Tsiku limenelo adzayimba nyimbo imeneyi m'dziko la Yuda, Ife tiri ndi mudzi wolimba; Iye adzaikacipulumutso cikhale macemba ndi malinga." 
Isaiah26:2 Tsegulani pazipata, kuti mtundu wolungama, umene ucita zoonadi, ulowemo." 
Isaiah26:3 Inu mudzasunga mtima wokhazikika mu mtendere weni weni, cifukwa ukukhulupirirani Inu." 
Isaiah26:4 Khulupirirani Yehova nthawi zamuyaya, pakuti mwa Ambuye Yehova muli thanthwe lacikhalire." 
Isaiah26:5 Cifukwa Iye watsitsira pansi iwo amene anakhala pamwamba, mudzi wa pamsanje; Iye wautsitsa, wautsitsira pansi; waugwetsa pansi pa pfumbi." 
Isaiah26:6 Phazi lidzaupondereza pansi; ngakhale mapazi a aumphawi, ndi mapondedwe a osowa." 
Isaiah26:7 Njira ya wolungama iri njira yoongoka; Inu amene muli woongoka, mukonza njira ya wolungama." 
Isaiah26:8 Inde m'njira ya maweruziro anu, Yehova, ife talindira Inu; moyo wathu ukhumba dzina lanu, ndi cikumbukilo canu." 
Isaiah26:9 Ndi moyo wanga ndinakhumba Inu usiku; inde ndi mzimu wanga wa mwa ine ndidzafuna Inu mwakhama; pakuti pamene maweruziro anu ali pa dziko lapansi, okhala m'dziko lapansi adzaphunzira cilungamo." 
Isaiah26:10 Ungayanje woipa, koma sadzaphunzira cilungamo; m'dziko la macitidwe oongoka, iye adzangocimwa, sadzaona cifumu ca Yehova." 
Isaiah26:11 Yehova, dzanja lanu litukulidwa, koma iwo saona; koma iwo adzaona cangu canu ca kwa anthu, nadzakhala ndi manyazi; inde moto udzamariza adani anu." 
Isaiah26:12 Yehova, udzatikhazikitsira mtendere; pakuti mwatigwirira nchito zathu zonse." 
Isaiah26:13 Yehova Mulungu wathu, pamodzi ndi Inu ambuye ena adatilamulira ife; koma mwa Inu nokha tidzachula dzina lanu." 
Isaiah26:14 Iwo afa, atha, sadzakhalanso ndi moyo; ali mizimu, sadzauka; cifukwa cace Inu munawazonda, ndi kuwaononga, mwathetsa cikumbukiro cao conse." 
Isaiah26:15 Mwacurukitsa mtundu, Yehova, mwacurukitsa mtundu; Inu mwalemekezeka, mwakuza malire onse a dziko." 
Isaiah26:16 Yehova, iwo adza kwa Inu mobvutika, iwo anathira pemphero, muja munalikuwalanga." 
Isaiah26:17 Monga ngati mkazi wokhala ndi pakati, amene nthawi yace yakubala yayandikira, amva zopweteka, ndi kupfuula m'zowawa zace; momwemo takhala ife pamaso panu, Yehova." 
Isaiah26:18 Ife tinali ndi pakati, ife tinamva zopweteka, tafanana ngati tabala mphepo; sitinacite cipulumutso ciri conse pa dziko lapansi; ngakhale okhala m'dziko lapansi sanagwe." 
Isaiah26:19 Akufa anu adzakhala ndi moyo; mitembo yao idzauka. Ukani muyimbe, inu amene mukhala m'pfumbi; cifukwa mame ako akunga mame a pamasamba, ndipo dziko lapansi lidzaturutsa mizimu." 
Isaiah26:20 Idzani, anthu anga, lowani m'zipinda mwanu, nimutseke pamakomo panu; nimubisale kanthawi kufikira mkwiyo utapita." 
Isaiah26:21 Pakuti taonani, Yehova adza kucokera ku malo ace kudzazonda okhala pa dziko lapansi, cifukwa ca kuipa kwao; dziko lidzabvumbulutsa mwazi wace, ndipo silidzabvundikiranso ophedwa ace." 
Isaiah27:1 Tsiku limenelo Yehova ndi lupanga lace lolimba ndi lalikuru ndi lamphamvu adzalanga nangumi njoka yotamanga, ndi nangumi njoka yopindika-pindika; nadzapha cing'ona cimene ciri m'nyanja." 
Isaiah27:2 Tsiku limenelo: munda wa mphesa wavinyo, yimbani inu za uwo." 
Isaiah27:3 Ine Yehova ndiusunga uwo; ndidzauthirira madzi nthawi zonse; ndidzausunga usiku ndi usana, kuti angauipse." 
Isaiah27:4 Ndiribe ukali; ndani adzalimbanitsa lunguzi ndi minga ndi Ine kunkhondo? ndiziponde ndizitenthe pamodzi. 
Isaiah27:5 Kapena mlekeni, agwire mphamvu zanga, nacite nane mtendere; inde, acite nane mtendere." 
Isaiah27:6 M'mibadwo ikudzayo Yakobo adzamera mizu; Israyeli adzaphuka ndi kucita mphundu; ndipo iwo adzadzaza ndi zipatso pa dziko lonse lapansi. 
Isaiah27:7 Kodi Mulungu wakantha Yakobo, monga umo anawakanthira akumkanthawo? kapena kodi iye waphedwa malinga ndi kuphedwa kwa iwo amene anaphedwa ndi iye?" 
Isaiah27:8 Munalimbana naye pang'ono, pamene munamcotsa; wamcotsa iye kuomba kwace kolimba tsiku la mphepo yamlumbanyanja." 
Isaiah27:9 Cifukwa cace, mwa ici coipa ca Yakobo cidzafafanizidwa, ndipo ici ndi cipatso conse cakucotsa cimo lace; pamene iye adzayesa miyala yonse ya guwa la nsembe, ngati miyala yanjeresa yoswekasweka, zifanizo ndi mafano a dzuwa sizidzaukanso konse." 
Isaiah27:10 Pakuti mudzi wocingidwa uli pa wokha, mokhalamo mwa bwinja, ndi mosiyidwa ngati cipululu; mwana wa ng'ombe adzadya kumeneko, nadzagonako pansi, nadzamariza nthambi zace." 
Isaiah27:11 Ponyala nthambi zace zidzatyoledwa; akazi adzafika, nazitentha ndi moto, pakuti ali anthu opanda nzeru; cifukwa cace Iye amene anawalenga sadzawacitira cisoni, ndi Iye amene anawaumba sadzawakomera mtima." 
Isaiah27:12 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo, kuti Yehova adzaomba tirigu wace, kucokera madzi a nyanja, kufikira ku mtsinje wa Aigupto, ndipo mudzakunkhidwa mmodzi, inu ana a Israyeli." 
Isaiah27:13 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku limenelo, lipenga lalikuru lidzaombedwa; ndipo adzafika omwe akadatayika m'dziko la Asuri, ndi opitikitsidwa a m'dziko la Aigupto; ndipo adzapembedza Yehova m'phiri lopatulika la pa Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah28:1 Tsoka kwa korona wakunyada wa oledzera a Efraimu, ndi kwa duwa lakufota la ulemerero wace wokongola, limene liri pamutu paiwo, amene agwidwa ndi vinyo, m'cigwa ca nthaka yabwino." 
Isaiah28:2 Taonani, Ambuye ali ndi wina wamphamvu wolimba; ngati cimphepo ca matalala, mkuntho wakuononga, ngati namondwe wa madzi amphamvu osefukira, adzagwetsa pansi ndi dzanja lamphamvu." 
Isaiah28:3 Korona wakunyada wa oledzera a Efraimu adzaponderezedwa; 
Isaiah28:4 ndi duwa lakufota la ulemerero wace wokongola, limene liri pamutu pa cigwa ca nthaka yabwino, lidzakhala ngati nkhuyu yoyamba kuca malimwe asanafike; polona wakupenya imeneyo, amaidya iri m'dzanja lace." 
Isaiah28:5 Tsiku limenelo Yehova wa makamu adzakhala korona wa ulemerero, ndi korona wokongola kwa anthu ace otsala:" 
Isaiah28:6 ndipo adzakhala mzimu wa ciweruziro kwa oweruza mirandu, ndi mphamvu kwa iwo amene abweza nkhondo pacipata." 
Isaiah28:7 Koma iwonso adzandima ndi vinyo, nasocera ndi cakumwa caukali, wansembe ndi mneneri adzandima ndi cakumwa caukali, iwo amezedwa ndi vinyo, nasocera ndi cakumwa caukali, adzandima popenya, napunthwa poweruza." 
Isaiah28:8 Pakuti magome onse adzazidwa ndi masanzi ndi udio, palibe malo okonzeka." 
Isaiah28:9 Kodi Mulungu adzaphunzitsa yani nzeru? Kodi Iye adzamvetsa yani uthengawo? iwo amene aletsedwa kuyamwa, nacotsedwa pamabere?" 
Isaiah28:10 Pakuti pali langizo ndi langizo, langizo ndi langizo; lamulo ndi lamulo, lamulo ndi lamulo; kuno pang'ono, uko pang'ono." 
Isaiah28:11 Iai, koma ndi anthu a milomo yacilendo, ndi a lilume lina, Iye adzalankhula kwa anthu awa;" 
Isaiah28:12 amene ananena nao, Uku ndi kupuma, mupumitsa wolema, ndi apa ndi potsitsimutsa, koma iwo anakana kumva." 
Isaiah28:13 Cifukwa cace mau a Yehova adzakhala kwa iwo langizo ndi langizo, langizo ndi langizo; lamulo ndi lamulo, lamulo ndi lamulo; kuno pang'ono, uko pang'ono; kuti ayende ndi kugwa cambuyo, ndi kutyoka, ndi kukodwa mumsampha, ndi kugwidwa." 
Isaiah28:14 Cifukwa cace imvani mau a Yehova, inu amuna amnyozo, olamulira anthu awa a m'Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah28:15 Cifukwa inu munati, Ife tapangana pangano ndi imfa, tabvomerezana ndi kunsi kwa manda; pakuti mliri wosefukira sudzatifikira ife; pakuti tayesa mabodza pothawirapo pathu, ndi kubisala m'zonyenga;" 
Isaiah28:16 cifukwa cace Ambuye Yehova atero, Taonani, ndiika m'Ziyoni mwala wa maziko, mwala woyesedwa mwala wa pangondya, wa mtengo wace wokhazikika ndithu; wokhulupirira sadzafulumira." 
Isaiah28:17 Ndipo ndidzayesa ciweruziro cingwe coongolera, ndi cilungamo cingwe colungamitsira ciriri; ndipo matalala adzacotsa pothawirapo mabodza, ndi madzi adzasefukira mobisalamo." 
Isaiah28:18 Ndipo pangano lanu ndi imfa lidzathedwa, ndi kubvomerezana kwanu ndi kunsi kwa manda kudzalepereka; popita mliri woopsya udzakuponderezani pansi." 
Isaiah28:19 Nthawi zonse umapita, udzakutengani; cifukwa m'mawa ndi m'mawa udzapita, usana ndi usiku; ndipo kudzakhala kuopsya kokha, kumva mbiri yace." 
Isaiah28:20 Pakuti kama wafupika, munthu sangatambalale pamenepo; ndi copfunda cacepa, sicingamfikire." 
Isaiah28:21 Pakuti Yehova adzauka monga m'phiri la Perazimu, nadzakwiya monga m'cigwa ca Gibeoni; kuti agwire nchito yace, nchito yace yacilendo, ndi kuti acite cocita cace, cocita cace cacilendo." 
Isaiah28:22 Tsono musakhale amnyozo, kuti nsinga zanu zingalimbe; pakuti Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu, wandimvetsa za cionongeko cotsimikizidwa pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Isaiah28:23 Cherani inu makutu, imvani mau anga; mverani, imvani kulankhula kwanga." 
Isaiah28:24 Kodi mlimi amalimabe kuti abzale? kodi amacocolabe, ndi kuswa zibuma za nthaka?" 
Isaiah28:25 Atakonza tyatyatya pamwamba pace, kodi safesa ponse mawere, ndi kumwazamwaza citowe, nafesa tirigu m'mizere ndi barele m'malo ace osankhika, ndi mcewere m'maliremo?" 
Isaiah28:26 Pakuti Mulungu wace amlangiza bwino namphunzitsa. 
Isaiah28:27 Pakuti sapuntha mawere ndi copunthira cakuthwa, ngakhale kuzunguniza njinga ya gareta pacitowe; koma amakulunga mawere ndi munsi, naomba citowe ndi cibonga." 
Isaiah28:28 Tirigu wa mkate aperedwa; pakuti samampuntha osaleka; ngakhale kuyendetsapo njinga ya gareta wace, ngakhale kumphwanya ndi ziboda za akavalo ace sapera." 
Isaiah28:29 Icinso cifumira kwa Yehova wa makamu, uphungu wace uzizwitsa ndi nzeru yace impambana." 
Isaiah29:1 Eya Arieli, Arieli, mudzi umene Davide anamangapo zithando! oniezerani caka ndi caka; maphwando afikenso;" 
Isaiah29:2 pamenepo ndidzasautsa Arieli, ndipo padzakhala maliro ndi kulira; koma iye adzakhala kwa Ine monga Arieli." 
Isaiah29:3 Ndipo ndidzamanga zithando kuzungulira iwe ponse, ndipo ndidzamanga linga ndi kuunjika miulu yakumenyanirana ndi iwe." 
Isaiah29:4 Ndipo iwe udzagwetsedwa pansi, nudzanena uli pansi, ndi kulankhula kwako kudzakhala pansi koturuka m'pfumbi; ndi mau ako adzakhala ngati a wina amene ali ndi mzimu wobwebweta, kucokera pansi, ndi kulankhula kwako kudzakhala konong'ona kocokera m'pfumbi," 
Isaiah29:5 Koma khamu la acilendo ako lidzafanana ndi pfumbi losalala, ndi khamu la oopsya lidzakhala monga mungu wocokacoka; inde kudzaoneka modzidzimuka dzidzidzi." 
Isaiah29:6 Ndipo Yehova wa makamu adzamzonda ndi bingu, ndi cibvomezi, ndi mkokomo waukuru, kabvumvulu, ndi mkuntho, ndi lawi la moto wonyambita." 
Isaiah29:7 Ndipo khamu la mitundu yonse yomenyana ndi Arieli, ngakhale yonse yomenyana naye ndi linga lace, ndi kumsautsa idzafanana ndi loto, masomphenya a usiku." 
Isaiah29:8 Ndipo kudzafanana ndi munthu wanjala, pamene alota, ndipo, taonani, akudya; koma auka, ndipo m'kati mwace muli zi; kapena monga munthu waludzu pamene alota, ndipo, taonani, akumwa; koma auka ndipo taonani walefuka, ndipo m'kati mwace muli gwa; momwemo lidzakhala khamu la mitundu yonse yomenyana ndi phiri la Ziyoni." 
Isaiah29:9 Khalani ndi kudabwa; sangalalani ndi kukhala akhungu; iwo aledzera, koma si ndi vinyo, ali dzandi dzandi; koma si ndi cakumwa caukali." 
Isaiah29:10 Pakuti Yehova watsanulira pa inu mzimu wa tulo togonetsa, natseka maso anu, ndiwo aneneri; naphimba mitu yanu, ndiwo alauli." 
Isaiah29:11 Ndipo masomphenya onse akusandukirani mau a m'buku limatidwa ndi phula, limene anthu amapereka kwa wina wodziwa kuwerenga, nati, Werengani umu; koma ati, Sindingathe, cifukwa lamatidwa ndi phula;" 
Isaiah29:12 ndipo buku laperekedwa kwa wosadziwa kuwerenga, ndi kuti, Werengani umu; koma ati, Ine sindinaphunzira." 
Isaiah29:13 Ndipo Ambuye anati, Popeza anthu awa ayandikira ndi Ine ndi m'kamwa mwao, nandilemekeza ndi milomo yao, koma mtima wao uli kutari ndi Ine, ndi mantha ao akundiopa Ine, ndi lamulo la anthu analiphunzira;" 
Isaiah29:14 cifukwa cace, taonani, ndidzacitanso mwa anthu awa nchito yodabwitsa, ngakhale nchito yodabwitsa ndi yozizwitsa; ndipo nzeru ya anthu ao anzeru idzatha, ndi luntha la anthu ao ozindikira lidzabisika." 
Isaiah29:15 Tsoka kwa iwo amene afunitsa kubisira Yehova uphungu wao, ndi nchito zao ziri mumdima, ndipo amati Ndani ationa ife? ndani atidziwa ife?" 
Isaiah29:16 Ozolitsa inu! Kodi woumba adzayesedwa ngati dothi; kodi cinthu copangidwa cinganene za iye amene anacipanga, Iye sanandipanga ine konse; kapena kodi cinthu coumbidwa cinganene za iye amene anaciumba, Iye alibe nzeru?" 
Isaiah29:17 Kodi sikatsala kamphindi kakang'ono, ndipo Lebano adzasanduka munda wobalitsa, ndi munda wobalitsa udzayesedwa nkhalango?" 
Isaiah29:18 Ndipo tsiku limenelo gonthi adzam va mau a m'buku, ndi maso akhungu adzaona poturuka m'zoziya ndi mumdima." 
Isaiah29:19 Ofatsanso kukondwa kwao kudzacuruka mwa Yehova, ndi aumphawi a mwa anthu adzakondwerera mwa Woyera wa Israyeli." 
Isaiah29:20 Pakuti woopsya wagoma, ndi wonyoza watha, ndi onse odikira zolakwa alikhidwa;" 
Isaiah29:21 amene apalamulitsa munthu mlandu, namchera msampha iye amene adzudzula pacipata, nambweza wolungama ndi cinthu cacabe." 
Isaiah29:22 Cifukwa cace Yehova amene anaombola Abrahamu, atero za banja la Yakobo: Yakobo sadzakhala ndi manyazi tsopano, ngakhale nkhope yace tsopano sidzagwa." 
Isaiah29:23 Koma pamene iye aona ana ace, nchito ya manja anga, pakati pa iye, iwo adzayeretsa dzina langa; inde, iwo adzayeretsa Woyera wa Yakobo, nadzaopa Mulungu wa Israyeli." 
Isaiah29:24 Iwonso osocera mumzimu adzadziwa luntha, ndi iwo amene ang'ung'udza adzaphunzitsidwa." 
Isaiah30:1 Tsoka okhulupirira Aigupto. Tsoka kwa ana opanduka, ati Yehova, amene atenga uphungu koma si pa Ine; napangana pangano opanda mzimu wanga, kuti aonjezere cimo ndi cimo;" 
Isaiah30:2 amene ayenda kutsikira ku Aigupto, osafunsa kukamwa kwanga, kudzilimbitsa iwo okha ndi li mphamvu za Farao, ndi kukhulupirira mthunzi wa Aigupto" 
Isaiah30:3 Cifukwa cace mphamvu za Farao zidzakhala kwa inu manyazi, ndi kukhulupirira mthunzi wa Aigupto kudzakhala cisokonezo canu." 
Isaiah30:4 Pakuti akalonga ace ali pa Zaani, ndi mithenga yace yafika ku Hanesi." 
Isaiah30:5 Iwo onse adzakhala ndi manyazi, ndi anthu amene sangapindule nao kanthu, amene sakhala kwa iwo thangata, pena phindu, koma manyazi ndi citonzo." 
Isaiah30:6 Katundu wa zirombo za kumwera. M'dziko lobvuta ndi lopweteka, kumeneko kucokera mkango waukazi, ndi wamphongo, mphiri, ndi njoka youluka yamoto, iwo anyamula cuma cao pamsana pa aburu, ndi ang'ono zolemera zao pa malinundu a ngamila, kunka kwa anthu amene sadzapindula nao." 
Isaiah30:7 Pakuti thangata la Aigupto liri lacabe, lopanda pace; cifukwa cace ndamucha wonyada, wokhala cabe." 
Isaiah30:8 Tsopano pita, ukalembe mauwa pamaso pao pathabwa, nuwalembe m'buku, kuti akakhalebe ku nthawi yam'tsogolo, mboni ya masiku onse." 
Isaiah30:9 Pakuti ali anthu opanduka, ana onama, ana osafuna kumva cilamulo ca Yehova;" 
Isaiah30:10 amene amati kwa alauli, Mtima wanu usapenye; ndi kwa aneneri, Musanenere kwa ife zinthu zoona, munene kwa ife zinthu zamyadi, munenere zonyenga;" 
Isaiah30:11 cokani inu munjira, patukani m'bande, tiletsereni Woyera wa Israyeli pamaso pathu." 
Isaiah30:12 Cifukwa cace atero Woyera wa Israyeli, Popeza inu mwanyoza mau awa, nimukhulupirira nsautso ndi mphulupulu, ndi kukhala m'menemo;" 
Isaiah30:13 cifukwa cace kuipa kumeneku kudzakhala kwa inu monga pogumuka pofuna kugwa, monga potukuka m'khoma lalitari, kugumuka kwace kufika modzidzimutsa dzidzidzi." 
Isaiah30:14 Ndipo Iye adzagumulapo, monga mbiya ya woumba isweka, ndi kuiswaiswa osaileka; ndipo sipadzapezedwa m'zigamphu zace phale lopalira moto pacoso, ngakhale lotungira madzi padziwe." 
Isaiah30:15 Pakuti atero Ambuye, Yehova Woyera wa Israyeli, M'kubwera ndi m'kupuma inu mudzapulumutsidwa; m'kukhala cete ndi m'kukhulupirira mudzakhala mphamvu yanu; ndipo simunafuna." 
Isaiah30:16 Koma munati, Iai, pakuti tidzathawa pa akavalo; cifukwa cace inu mudzathawadi; ndipo ife tidzakwera pa akavalo aliwiro; cifukwa cace iwo amene akuthamangitsani, adzakhala aliwiro." 
Isaiah30:17 Cikwi cimodzi cidzathawa pakuwadzudzula mmodzi; pakukudzudzulani anthu asanu mudzathawa; kufikira inu mudzasiyidwa ngati mlongoti pamwamba pa phiri, ndi ngati mbendera pamwamba pa citundu." 
Isaiah30:18 Cifukwa cace Yehova adzadikira, kuti akukomereni mtima, ndipo cifukwa cace Iye adzakuzidwa, kuti akucitireni inu cifundo; pakuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu wa ciweruziro; odala ali onse amene amdikira Iye." 
Isaiah30:19 Pakuti anthu adzakhala m'Ziyoni pa Yerusalemu; iwe sudzaliranso, Iye ndithu adzakukomera mtima pakumveka kupfuula kwako; pakumva Iye adzayankha." 
Isaiah30:20 Ndipo ngakhale Ambuye adzakupatsani inu cakudya ca nsautso, ndi madzi a cipsinjo, koma aphunzitsi ako sadzabisikanso, koma maso ako adzaona aphunzitsi ako;" 
Isaiah30:21 ndipo makutu ako adzamva mau kumbuyo kwa iwe akuti, Njira ndi iyi, yendani inu m'menemo: potembenukira inu kulamanja, ndi potembenukira kulamanzere." 
Isaiah30:22 Ndipo mudzaipitsa cokuta ca mafano ako, osema asiliva, ndi comata ca mafano ako osungunula agolidi; udzawataya ngati kanthu konyansa, udzati kwa iwo, Cokani." 
Isaiah30:23 Ndipo Mulungu adzapatsa mvula ya mbeu yako, ukaibzale m'nthaka; ndi mkate ndiwo phindu la nthaka, ndipo tirigu wace adzaca bwino ndi kucuruka; tsiku limenelo ng'ombe zako zidzadya m'madambo akuru." 
Isaiah30:24 Momwemonso ng'ombe ndi ana a buru olima nthaka adzadya cakudya cocezera, cimene capetedwa ndi cokokolera ndi mkupizo." 
Isaiah30:25 Ndipo pamwamba pa mapiri akuru onse, ndipa zitunda zonse zazitaritari padzakhala mitsinje ndi micerenje ya madzi, tsiku lophana lalikuru, pamene nsanja zidzagwa." 
Isaiah30:26 Komanso kuwala kwace kwa mwezi kudzakhala ngati kuwala kwa dzuwa, ndi kuwala kwa dzuwa kudzakula monga madzuwa asanu ndi awiri, monga kuwala kwa masiku asanu ndi awiri, tsiku limenelo Yehova adzamanga bala la anthu ace, nadzapoletsa khana limene anawakantha ena." 
Isaiah30:27 Taonani, dzina la Yehova licokera kutari, mkwiyo wace uyaka, malawi ace ndi akuru; milomo yace iri yodzala ndi ukali, ndi lilime lace liri ngati moto wonyambita;" 
Isaiah30:28 ndi mpweya wace uli ngati mtsinje wosefukira, umene ufikira m'khosi, kupeta mitundu ya anthu ndi copetera ca cionongeko; ndi capakamwa calakwitsa, cidzakhala m'nsagwada za anthu." 
Isaiah30:29 Inu mudzakhala ndi nyimbo, monga usiku, podya phwando lopatulika; ndi mtima wokondwa, monga pomuka wina ndi citoliro, kufikira ku phiri la Yehova, ku thanthwe la Israyeli," 
Isaiah30:30 Ndipo Yehova adzamveketsa mau ace a ulemerero, ndipo adzaonetsa kumenya kwa dzanja lace, ndi mkwiyo wace waukali, ndi lawi la moto wonyambita, ndi kuomba kwa mphepo, ndi mkuntho ndi matalala." 
Isaiah30:31 Pakuti ndi mau a Yehova Asuri adzatyokatyoka, ndi ndodo yace adzammenya." 
Isaiah30:32 Ndipo nthawi zonse Yehova adze vakantha ndi ndodo yosankhikayo, padzamveka mangaka ndi zeze; ndi m'nkhondo zothunyana-thunyana, Iye adzamenyana nao." 
Isaiah30:33 Pakuti Tofeti wakonzedwa kale, inde cifukwa ca mfumu wakonzedweratu; Iye wazamitsapo, nakuzapo; mulu wacewo ndi moto ndi nkhuni zambiri; mpweya wa Yehova uuyatsa ngati mtsinje wasulfure." 
Isaiah31:1 Tsoka kwa iwo amene atsikira kunka ku Aigupto kukathandizidwa, natama akavalo; nakhulupirira magareta, pakuti ali ambiri, ndi okwera pa akavalo, pakuti ali a mphamvu zambiri; koma sayang'ana Woyera wa Israyeli, ngakhale kumfuna Yehova!" 
Isaiah31:2 Koma Iyenso ali wanzeru, nadzatengera coipa, ndipo sadzabwezanso mau ace, koma adzaukira banja la ocita zoipa, ndi amene athandiza iwo akugwira nchito yoipa." 
Isaiah31:3 Koma Aaigupto ndiwo anthu, si Mulungu; ndi akavalo ao ali nyama, si mzimu; ndipo pamene Yehova adzatambasula dzanja lace, wothandiza adzapunthwa, ndi wothandizidwa adzagwa, ndipo iwo onse awiri pamodzi adzalephera." 
Isaiah31:4 Pakuti Yehova atero kwa ine, Monga mkango, ndi mwana wa mkango wobangula pa nyama yace, sudzaopa mau a khamu la abusa oitanidwa kuupitikitsa, ngakhale kudzicepetsa wokha, cifukwa ca phokoso lao; motero Yehova wa makamu adzatsikira kumenyana nkhondo ku phiri la Ziyoni, ndi kucitunda kwace komwe." 
Isaiah31:5 Monga mbalame ziuluka, motero Yehova wamakamu adzacinjiriza Yerusalemu; Iye adzacinjirikiza ndi kuupulumutsa, adzapitirapo ndi kuusunga." 
Isaiah31:6 Bwerani kwa Iye amene mwampandukira kolimba, ana a Israyeli inu." 
Isaiah31:7 Pakuti tsiku limenelo iwo adzataya munthu yense mafano ace asiliva, ndi mafano ace agolidi amene manja anu anu anawapanga akucimwitseni inu." 
Isaiah31:8 Pamenepo Asuri adzagwa ndi lupanga losati la munthu; ndi lupanga losati la anthu lidzammariza iye; ndipo iye adzathawa lupanga, ndi anyamata ace adzalamba." 
Isaiah31:9 Ndipo mwala wace udzacoka, cifukwa ca mantha, ndi akalonga ace adzaopa mbendera, ati Yehova, amene moto wace uli m'Ziyoni, ndi ng'anjo yace m'Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah32:1 Taonani mfumu idzalamulira m'cilungamo, ndi akalonga adzalamulira m'ciweruzo." 
Isaiah32:2 Ndipo munthu adzakhala monga pobisalira mphepo, ndi pousira cimphepo; monga mitsinje yamadzi m'malo ouma, monga mthunzi wa thanthwe lalikuru m'dziko lotopetsa." 
Isaiah32:3 Ndipo maso a iwo amene aona sadzatsinzina, ndi makutu a iwo amene amva adzamvera." 
Isaiah32:4 Mtimanso wansontho udzadziwa nzeru, ndi lilume la acibwibwi lidzalankhula zomveka msanga." 
Isaiah32:5 Wopusa sadzayesedwanso woolowa manja, ngakhale wouma manja sadzayesedwa mfulu." 
Isaiah32:6 Pakuti wopusa adzanena zopusa, ndi mtima wace udzacita mphulupulu, kucita zoipitsa, ndi kunena za Yehova molakwira, kusowetsa konse mtima wanjala, ndi kulepheretsa cakumwa ca waludzu." 
Isaiah32:7 Zipangizonso za womana ziri zoipa; iye apangira ziwembu zakuononga waumphawi ndi mau onama, ngakhale pamene wosowa alankhula zoona." 
Isaiah32:8 Koma mfulu aganizira zaufulu, nakhazikika m'zaufulu zomwe." 
Isaiah32:9 Ukani, akazi inu, amene mulinkukhala phe, mumve mau anga; mu ana akazi osasamalira, cherani makutu pa kulankhula kwanga." 
Isaiah32:10 Pakutha caka, kudza masiku ena inu mudzabvutidwa, inu akazi osasamalira; pakuti masika a mphesa adzasoweka, sadzatuta konse." 
Isaiah32:11 Nthunthumirani, inu akazi, amene mulinkukhalaphe; bvutidwani, inu osasamalira, bvulani mukhale marisece, nimumange ciguduli m'cuuno mwanu." 
Isaiah32:12 Iwo adzadzimenya pazifuwa cifukwa ca minda yabwino, cifukwa ca mpesa wobalitsa." 
Isaiah32:13 Pa dziko la anthu anga padzafika minga ndi lunguzi; inde pa nyumba zonse zokondwa, m'mudzi wokondwerera;" 
Isaiah32:14 pakuti nyumba ya mfumu idzasiyidwa; mudzi wa anthu ambiri udzakhala bwinja; citunda ndi nsanja zidzakhala nkhwimba ku nthawi zonse, pokondwera mbidzi podyera zoweta;" 
Isaiah32:15 kufikira mzimu udzathiridwa pa ife kucokera kumwamba, ndi cipululu cidzasanduka munda wobalitsa, ndi munda wobalitsa udzayesedwa nkhalango." 
Isaiah32:16 Pamenepo ciweruzo cidzakhala m'cipululu, ndi cilungamo cidzakhala m'munda wobalitsa." 
Isaiah32:17 Ndi nchito ya cilungamo idzakhala mtendere; ndi zotsata cilungamo zidzakhala mtendere, ndi kukhulupirika ku nthawi zonse." 
Isaiah32:18 Ndipo anthu anga adzakhala m'malo a mtendere, ndi mokhala mokhulupirika ndi mopuma mwa phe." 
Isaiah32:19 Koma kudzagwa matalala m'kugwa kwace kwa nkhalango; ndipo mudzi udzagwetsedwa ndithu. 
Isaiah32:20 Odala muli inu, amene mubzala m'mbali mwa madzi monse, amene muyendetsa mapazi a ng'ombe ndi buru." 
Isaiah33:1 Tsoka kwa iwe amene usakaza, cinkana sunasakazidwa; nupangira ciwembu, cinkana sanakupangira iwe ciwembu! Utatha kusakaza, iwe udzasakazidwa; ndipo utatha kupangira ciwembu, iwo adzakupangira iwe ciwembu." 
Isaiah33:2 Inu Yehova, mutikomere ife mtima; ife talindira Inu; mukhale dzanja lathu m'mawa ndi m'mawa, cipulumutso cathunso m'nthawi ya mabvuto." 
Isaiah33:3 Pa mau a phokoso mitundu ya anthu yathawa; ponyamuka iwe amitundu abalalika," 
Isaiah33:4 Ndipo zofunkha zanu zidzasonkhanitsidwa, monga ziwala zisonkhana; monga madzombe atumpha, iwo adzatumpha pa izo." 
Isaiah33:5 Yehova wakwezedwa; pakuti akhala kumwamba; Iye wadzaza Ziyoni ndi ciweruzo ndi cilungamo. 
Isaiah33:6 Ndipo kudzakhala cilimbiko m'nthawi zako, cipulumutso cambiri, nzeru ndi kudziwa; kuopa kwa Yehova ndiko cumacace." 
Isaiah33:7 Taonani, olimba mtima ao angopfuula kunja, mithenga ya mtendere ilira kowawa." 
Isaiah33:8 Njira zamakwalala zikufa, kulibe woyendamo; Asuri watyola cipangano, wanyoza midzi, sasamalira anthu." 
Isaiah33:9 Dziko lilira maliro ndi kulefuka; Lebano ali ndi manyazi, nafota; Saroni afanana ndi cipululu; pa Basana ndi Karimeli papukutika." 
Isaiah33:10 Tsopano ndidzauka, ati Yehova; tsopano ndidzanyamuka, tsopano ndidzakwezedwa." 
Isaiah33:11 Inu mudzatenga pakati ndi mungu, mudzabala ziputu; mpweya wanu ndi moto umene udzakumarizani inu." 
Isaiah33:12 Ndipo mitundu ya anthu idzanga potentha miyala yanjeresa; monga minga yodulidwa, nitenthedwa ndi moto." 
Isaiah33:13 Imvani inu amene muli kutari, cimene ndacita ndi inuamene muli pafupi, bvomerezani mphamvu zanga," 
Isaiah33:14 Ocimwa a m'Ziyoni ali ndi mantha, kunthunthumira kwadzidzimutsa anthu opanda Mulungu. Ndani mwa ife adzakhala ndi moto Wakunyeketsa? ndani mwa ife adzakhala ndi zotentha zacikhalire?" 
Isaiah33:15 Iye amene ayenda molungama, nanena molunjika; iye amene anyoza phindu lonyenga, nasansa manja ace kusalandira zokometsera milandu, amene atseka makutu ace kusamva za mwazi, natsinzina maso ace kusayang'ana coipa;" 
Isaiah33:16 iye adzakhala pamsanje; malo ace ocinjikiza adzakhala malinga amiyala; cakudya cace cidzapatsidwa kwa iye; madzi ace adzakhala cikhalire. 
Isaiah33:17 Maso ako adzaona mfumu m'kukongola kwace; iwo adzaona dziko lakutari. 
Isaiah33:18 Mtima wako udzaganizira zoopsya; mlembi ali kuti? ali kuti iye amene anayesa msonkho? ali kuti iye amene anawerenga nsanja? 
Isaiah33:19 Iwe sudzaona anthu aukali, anthu a mau anthulu, amene iwe sungazindikire; a lilume lacibwibwi, limene iwe sungalimve." 
Isaiah33:20 Tayang'ana pa Ziyoni, mudzi wa mapwando athu; maso ako adzaona Yerusalemu malo a phe, cihema cimene sicidzasunthidwa, ziciri zace sizidzazulidwa konse, zingwe zace sizidzadulidwa." 
Isaiah33:21 Koma pamenepo Yehova adzakhala ndi ife m'cifumu, malo a nyanja zacitando ndi mitsinje; m'menemo ngalawa sizidzayenda ndi ngombo, ngakhale zombo zazikuru sizidzapita pamenepo." 
Isaiah33:22 Pakuti Yehova ndiye woweruza wathu, Yehova ndiye wotipatsa malamulo, Yehova ndiye mfumu yathu; Iye adzatipulumutsa." 
Isaiah33:23 Zingwe zako za ngalawa zamasulidwa; sizinathe kulimbitsa patsinde pa mlongoti wace, sizinathe kufutukula matanga; pamenepo ndipo colanda cacikulu, cofunkha cinagawanidwa; wopunduka nafumfula." 
Isaiah33:24 Ndipo wokhalamo sadzanena, Ine ndidwala; anthu okhala m'menemo, adzakhululukidwa mphulupulu zao." 
Isaiah34:1 Idzani pafupi, amitundu inu, kuti mumve; mverani anthu inu, dziko limve, ndi za mommo; dziko ndi zinthu zonse zoturukamo." 
Isaiah34:2 Pakuti Yehova akwiyira amitundu onse, nacitira ukali khamu lao lonse; Iye wawaononga psiti, wawapereka kukaphedwa," 
Isaiah34:3 Ophedwa aonso adzatayidwa kunja, ndipo kununkha kwa mitembo yao kudzamveka, ndipo mapiri adzasungunuka ndi mwazi wao." 
Isaiah34:4 Ndipo makamu onse a kumwamba adzasungunuka, ndi miyamba idzapindika pamodzi ngati mpukutu; makamu ao onse adzafota monga tsamba limafota pampesa ndi kugwa, ndi monga tsamba lifota pamkuyu." 
Isaiah34:5 Pakuti lupanga langa lakhuta kumwamba; taonani, lidzatsikira pa Edomu, ndi pa anthu amene ndawatemberera, kuti aweruzidwe." 
Isaiah34:6 Lupanga la Yehova lakhuta ndi mwazi, lanona ndi mafuta ndi mwazi wa ana a nkhosa, ndi mbuzi, ndi mafuta a imso ya nkhosa zamphongo; pakuti Yehova ali ndi nsembe m'Bozira, ndi ophedwa ambiri m'dziko la Edomu." 
Isaiah34:7 Ndipo njati zidzatsika ndi iwo, ndi ng'ombe zofula ndi zamphongo; ndi dziko lao lidzakhuta ndi mwazi, ndi pfumbi lao lidzanona ndi mafuta." 
Isaiah34:8 Pakuti liri tsiku la kubwezera la Yehova, caka cakubwezera cilango, mlandu wa Ziyoni." 
Isaiah34:9 Ndipo mitsinjeyo idzasanduka matope akuda, ndi pfumbilo lidzasanduka suifure, ndi dziko lacelo lidzasanduka matope oyaka moto." 
Isaiah34:10 Sadzazimikai usiku, ngakhale usana; utsi wace udzakwera nthawi zonse; m'mibadwo mibadwo lidzakhala labwinja, palibe amene adzapitapo nthawi za nthawi." 
Isaiah34:11 Koma bvuo ndi nungu zidzakhalamo, ndipo kadzidzi ndi khungubwi adzakhala m'menemo, ndipo Mulungu adzatambalika pamenepo cingwe coongolera ca cisokonezo, ndi cingwe colungamitsa ciriri cosatha kucita kanthu." 
Isaiah34:12 Iwo adzaitana mfulu zace zilowe m'ufumu, koma sizidzaonekako; ndi akalonga ace onse adzakhala cabe." 
Isaiah34:13 Ndipo minga idzamera m'nyumba zace zazikuru, khwisa ndi mitungwi m'malinga mwace; ndipo adzakhala malo a ankhandwe, ndi bwalo la nthiwatiwa." 
Isaiah34:14 Ndipo zirombo za m'cipululu zidzakomana ndi mimbulu, tonde adzaitana mnzace; inde mancici adzatera kumeneko, nadzapeza popumira." 
Isaiah34:15 Kumeneko njoka yotumpha idzapanga cisanja cace, niikira, niumatira, niswa mumthunzi mwace; inde kumeneko miimba idzasonkhana wonse ndi unzace." 
Isaiah34:16 Funani inu m'buku la Yehova, nimuwerenge; palibe umodzi wa iye udzasowa, palibe umodzi udzasowa unzace; pakuti pakamwa pa Yehova panena, ndipo mzimu wace wasonkhanitsa iwo." 
Isaiah34:17 Ndipo Iye wacita maere, cifukwa ca zirombozi, ndipo dzanja lace lazigawira dzikolo ndi cingwe, zidzakhala nalo nthawi zonse ku mibadwo mibadwo, zidzakhala m'menemo." 
Isaiah35:1 Cipululu ndi malo ouma adzakondwa; ndipo dziko loti se lidzasangalala ndi kuphuka ngati duwa. 
Isaiah35:2 Lidzaphuka mocuruka ndi kusangalala, ngakhale kukondwa ndi kuyimba; lidzapatsidwa ulemerero wa Lebano, ndi ukuru wa Karimeli ndi Saroni; anthuwo adzaona ulemerero wa Yehova, ukuru wace wa Mulungu wathu." 
Isaiah35:3 Limbitsani manja opanda mphamvu, ndi kulimbitsa maondo a gwedegwede." 
Isaiah35:4 Nenani kwa a mitima ya cinthenthe, Limbani, musaope; taonani, Mulungu wanu adza ndi kubwezera cilango, ndi mphotho ya Mulungu; Iye adzafika ndi kukupulumutsani." 
Isaiah35:5 Pamenepo maso a akhungu adzatsegudwa, ndi makutu a ogontha adzatsegulidwa." 
Isaiah35:6 Pamenepo wopunduka adzatumpha ngati nswala, ndi lilume la wosalankhula lidzayimba; pakuti m'cipululu madzi adzaturuka, ndi mitsinje m'dziko loti se." 
Isaiah35:7 Ndipo mcenga wong'azimira udzasanduka thamanda, ndi nthaka yopanda madzi idzasanduka zitsime zamadzi; m'malo a ankhandwe m'mene iwo anagona, mudzakhala udzu ndi mabango ndi milulu." 
Isaiah35:8 Ndipo kudzakhala khwalala kumeneko, ndi njira, ndipo idzachedwa njira yopatulika; audio sadzapita m'menemo; koma Iye adzakhala nao oyenda m'njira, ngakhale opusa, sadzasocera m'menemo." 
Isaiah35:9 Sikudzakhala mkango kumeneko, ngakhale cirombo colusa sicidzapondapo, pena kupezedwa pamenepo; koma akuomboledwa adzayenda m'menemo," 
Isaiah35:10 ndiro oomboledwa a Yehova adzabwera, nadzafika ku Ziyoni alikuyimba; kukondwa kosatha kudzakhala pa mitu yao; iwo adzakhala ndi kusekerera ndi kukondwa, ndipo cisoni ndi kuusa moyo kudzacoka." 
Isaiah36:1 Koma panali caka cakhumi ndi cinai ca mfumu Hezekiya, Sanakeribu, mfumu ya Asuri anadza, nathira nkhondo pa midzi ya malinga yonse ya Yuda, nailanda." 
Isaiah36:2 Ndipo mfumu ya Asuri inatumiza kazembe kucokera pa Lakisi, kunka ku Yerusalemu, kwa mfumu Hezekiya, ndi nkhondo yambiri. Ndipo iye anaima cifupi ndi mcerenje wa thamanda la kumtunda, m'khwalala la pa mwaniko wa wotsuka nsaru." 
Isaiah36:3 Ndipo anamturukira Eliakimu, mwana wa Hilikiya, amene anali wapanyumba, ndi Sebina, mlembi, ndi Yoaki, mwana wa Asafu, mkumbutsi." 
Isaiah36:4 Ndipo kazembeyo anati kwa iwo, Nenani inu tsopano kwa Hezekiya, Itero mfumu yaikuru, mfumu ya Asuri, Kodi cikhulupiriro ici ncotani, ucikhulupirira iwe?" 
Isaiah36:5 Ine nditi, Uphungu wako, ndi mphamvu zako za kunkhondo, zingokhala mau acabe; tsopano ukhulupirira yani, kuti wandipandukira ine?" 
Isaiah36:6 Taona, ukhulupirira ndodo yabango iyi yophwanyika, kunena Aigupto; imene munthu akaitsamira, idzalowa m'dzanja mwace, ndi kulipyoza; momwemo Farao, mfumu ya Aigupto, kwa onse amene amkhulupirira iye." 
Isaiah36:7 Koma ukanena kwa ine, Ife tikhulupirira Yehova Mulungu wathu; kodi si ndiye amene Hezekiya wacotsa misanje yace ndi maguwa ace a nsembe, nati kwa Yuda, ndi kwa Yerusalemu, Inu mudzapembedzera patsogolo pa suwa la nsembe ili?" 
Isaiah36:8 Cifukwa cace upereketu zikole kwa mbuyanga, mfumu ya Asuri, ndipo ine ndidzakupatsa iwe akavalo zikwi ziwiri, ngati iwe udzaona okwerapo." 
Isaiah36:9 Bwanji tsono iwe ungathe kubweza nkhope ya nduna mmodzi wamng'ono wa atumiki a mbuyanga, ndi kukhulupirira Aigupto, kuti adzakupatsa magareta ndi apakavalo?" 
Isaiah36:10 Ndipo ine tsopano, kodi ndafika opanda Yehova kudzamenyana ndi dziko ili, kudzalipasula? Yehova anati kwa ine, Kwera, ndi kumenyana ndi dziko ili, ndi kulipasula." 
Isaiah36:11 Ndipo Eliakimu, ndi Sebina, ndi Yoaki, anati kwa kazembeyo, Nenanitu kwa atumiki anu m'cinenero ca Aramu; pakuti ife ticimva; ndipo musanene kwa ife m'Ciyuda, m'makutu a anthu amene ali palinga." 
Isaiah36:12 Koma kazembeyo anati, Kodi mbuyanga ananditumiza ine kwa mbuyako ndi kwa iwe kunena mau amenewa? kodi iye sananditumiza ine kwa amuna okhala palinga, kuti adye ndowe zao zao, ndi kumwa madzi ao ao ndi inu?" 
Isaiah36:13 Pamenepo kazembeyo anaima, napfuula ndi mau akuru m'Ciyuda, nati, Imvani, inu, mau a mfumu yaikuru, mfumu ya Asuri." 
Isaiah36:14 Mfumu itere, Musaleke Hezekiya anyenge inu; pakuti iye sadzathai kukupulumutsani:"
