Isaiah60:21 Anthu ako adzakhalanso onse olungama; dzikolo lidzakhala colowa cao ku nthawi zonse, nthambi yooka Ine, nchito ya manja anga, kuti Ine ndikuzidwe." 
Isaiah60:22 Wamng'ono adzasanduka cikwi, ndi wocepa adzasanduka mtundu wamphamvu; Ine Yehova ndidzafulumiza ici m'nthawi yace." 
Isaiah61:1 Mzimu wa Ambuye Yehova uli pa ine; pakuti Yehova wandidzoza ine ndilalikire mau abwino kwa ofatsa; Iye wanditumiza ndikamange osweka mtima, ndikalalikire kwa am'nsinga mamasulidwe, ndi kwa omangidwakutsegulidwa kwa m'ndende;" 
Isaiah61:2 ndikalalikire caka cokomera Yehova, ndi tsiku lakubwezera la Mulungu wathu; ndikatonthoze mtima wa onse amene akulira maliro;" 
Isaiah61:3 ndikakonzere iwo amene alira maliro m'Ziyoni, ndi kuwapatsa cobvala kokometsa m'malo mwa phulusa, mafuta akukondwa m'malo mwa maliro, cobvala ca matamando m'malo mwa mzimu wopsinjika; kuti iwo achedwe mitengo ya cilungamo yakuioka Yehova, kuti Iye alemekezedwe." 
Isaiah61:4 Ndipo iwo adzamanga mabwinja akale, nadzamanga pa miunda yakale, nadzakonzanso midzi yopasuka, mabwinja a mibadwo yambiri." 
Isaiah61:5 Ndipo alendo adzaimirira ndi kudyetsa magulu ako, ndi anthu akunja adzakhala olima ako, ndi kukukonzera minda yamphesa." 
Isaiah61:6 Koma inu mudzachedwa ansembe a Yehova; anthu adzakuyesani inu atumiki a Mulungu wathu; inu mudzadya cuma ca amitundu, nimudzalowa mu ulemerero wao." 
Isaiah61:7 M'malo mwa manyazi anu, owirikiza; ndi citonzo iwo adzakondwera ndi gawo lao; cifukwa cace iwo adzakhala naco m'dziko mwao colowa cowirikiza, adzakhala naco cikondwerero cosatha." 
Isaiah61:8 Pakuti Ine Yehova ndikonda ciweruziro, ndida cifwamba ndi coipa; ndipo ndidzawapatsa mphotho yao m'zoonadi; ndipo ndidzapangana nao pangano losatha." 
Isaiah61:9 Ndipo ana ao adzadziwidwa mwa amitundu, ndi obadwa ao mwa anthu; onse amene awaona adzawazindikira kuti iwo ndiwo ana amene Yehova wadalitsa." 
Isaiah61:10 Ndidzakondwa kwambiri mwa Yehova, moyo wanga udzakondwerera mwa Mulungu wanga; pakuti Iye wandibveka ine ndi zobvala za cipulumutso, nandipfunda copfunda ca cilungamo, monga mkwati abvala nduwira, ndi monga mkwatibwi adzikometsa yekha ndi miyala yamtengo." 
Isaiah61:11 Pakuti monga dziko liphukitsa mphundu zace, ndi monga munda umeretsa zobzalamo, momwemo Ambuye Yehova adzaphukitsa cilungamo ndi matamando pamaso pa amitundu onse." 
Isaiah62:1 Cifukwa ca Ziyoni sindidzakhala cete, ndi cifukwa ca Yerusalemu sindidzapuma, kufikira cilungamo cace cidzaturuka monga kuyera, ndi cipulumutso cace monga nyali yoyaka." 
Isaiah62:2 Ndipo amitundu adzaona cilungamo cako, ndi mafumu onse ulemerero wako; ndipo udzachedwa dzina latsopano, limene m'kamwa mwa Yehova mudzachula." 
Isaiah62:3 Iwe udzakhalanso korona wokongola m'dzanja la Yehova, korona wacifumu m'dzanja la Mulungu wako." 
Isaiah62:4 Iwe sudzachedwanso Wosiyidwa; dziko lako silidzachedwanso Bwinja; koma iwe udzachedwa Hefiziba ndi dziko lako Beula; pakuti Yehova akondwera mwa iwe, ndipo dziko lako lidzakwatiwa." 
Isaiah62:5 Pakuti monga mnyamata akwatira namwali, momwemo ana ako amuna adzakukwama iwe; ndi monga mkwati akondwera ndi mkwatibwi, momwemo Mulungu wako adzakondwera nawe." 
Isaiah62:6 Ndaika alonda pa malinga ako, Yerusalemu; iwo sadzakhala cete usana pena usiku; inu akukumbutsa Yehova musakhale cete," 
Isaiah62:7 ndipo musamlole akhale cete, kufikira Iye atakhazikitsa naika Yerusalemu akhale tamando m'dziko lapansi." 
Isaiah62:8 Yehova analumbira pa dzanja lace lamanja, ndi mkono wace wamphamvu, Zoonadi, sindidzaperekanso tirigu wako akhale cakudya ca adani ako, ndipo alendo sadzamwa vinyo wako amene iwe unagwirira nchito;" 
Isaiah62:9 koma iwo amene adzakolola adzadya ndi kutamanda Yehova; ndi iwo amene adzamchera adzamumwa m'mabwalo a kacisi wanga. 
Isaiah62:10 Pitani, pitani pazipata; konzani njira ya anthu; undani, undani khwalala; cotsani miyala, kwezani mbendera ya anthu." 
Isaiah62:11 Taonani, Yehova walalikira kufikira malekezero a dziko lapansi. Nenani kwa mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, Taona cipulumutso cako cifika; taona mphotho yace ali nayo, ndi nchito yace iri pamaso pace." 
Isaiah62:12 Ndipo iwo adzawacha Anthu opatulika, Oomboledwa a Yehova; ndipo iwe udzachedwa Wofunidwa, Mudzi wosasiyidwa." 
Isaiah63:1 Ndani uyu alinkudza kucokera ku Edomu, ndi zobvala zonika zocokera ku Bozira? uyu wolemekezeka m'cobvala cace, nayenda mu ukuru wa mphamvu zace? Ndine amene ndilankhula m'colungama, wa mphamvu yakupulumutsa," 
Isaiah63:2 Cophimba cako cifiiriranji, ndi zobvala zako zifanana bwanji ndi woponda mopondera mphesa?" 
Isaiah63:3 Ndaponda ndekha mopondera mphesa, ndipo panalibe nane mmodzi wa mitundu ya anthu; inde ndinawaponda m'kukwiya kwanga, ndi kuwapondereza mu ukali wanga: ndi mwazi wa moyo wao unawazidwa pa zobvala zanga; ndipo ndadetsa copfunda canga conse." 
Isaiah63:4 Pakuti tsiku lakubwezera liri mumtima mwanga, ndi caka ca kuombola anthu anga cafika." 
Isaiah63:5 Ndipo ndinayang'ana, koma panalibe wothangata; ndipo ndinadabwa kuti panalibe wocirikiza; cifukwa cace mkono wanga wanga unanditengera cipulumutso, ndi ukali wanga unandicirikiza Ine." 
Isaiah63:6 Ndipo ndinapondereza anthu m'kukwiya kwanga, ndi kuwatswanya mu ukali wanga, ndi kutsanulira mwazi wa moyo wao." 
Isaiah63:7 Ndidzachula za cifundo cace ca Yehova, ndi matamando a Yehova, monga mwa zonse zimene Yehova wapereka kwa ife; ndi ubwino wace waukuru kwa banja la Israyeli, umene Iye wapereka kwa iwo, monga mwa cifundo cace, ndi monga mwa nchito zocuruka za cikondi cace." 
Isaiah63:8 Pakuti anati, Zoonadi iwo ndiwo anthu anga, ana amene sangacite monyenga; comweco Iye anali Mpulumutsi wao." 
Isaiah63:9 M'mazunzo ao onse Iye anazunzidwa, ndipo mthenga wakuimirira pamaso pace anawapulumutsa; m'kukonda kwace ndi m'cisoni cace Iye anawaombola, nawabereka nawanyamula masiku onse akale." 
Isaiah63:10 Koma iwo anapandukira ndi kumvetsa cisoni mzimu wace woyera, cifukwa cace Iye anasandulika mdani wao, nawathira nkhondo Iye yekha." 
Isaiah63:11 Pamenepo iwo anakumbukira masiku akale, Mose ndi anthu ace, nati, Ali kuti Iye amene anawaturutsa m'nyanja pamodzi ndi abusa a gulu lace? Ali kuti Iye amene anaika mzimu wace woyera pakati pao," 
Isaiah63:12 amene anayendetsa mkono wace waulemerero pa dzanja lamanja la Mose? amene anagawanitsa madzi pamaso pao, kuti adzitengere mbiri yosatha?" 
Isaiah63:13 amene anawatsogolera kupitira mwa kuya monga kavalo m'cipululu osapunthwa iwo? 
Isaiah63:14 Monga ng'ombe zotsikira kucigwa mzimu wa Yehova unawapumitsa; comweco inu munatsogolera anthu anu kudzitengera mbiri yaulemerero. 
Isaiah63:15 Tayang'anani kunsi, taonani pokhala panu poyera, ndi pa ulemerero wanu, cangu canu ndi nchito zanu zamphamvu ziri kuti? mwanditsekerezera zofunafuna za mtima wanu ndi cisoni canu." 
Isaiah63:16 Pakuti Inu ndinu Atate wathu, ngakhale Abrahamu satidziwa ife, ndi Israyeli satizindikira ife. Inu Yehova ndinu Atate wathu, Mombolo wathu wacikhalire ndi dzina lanu." 
Isaiah63:17 Yehova bwanji mwatisoceretsa kusiya njira zanu, ndi kuumitsa mitima yathu tisakuopeni? Bwerani, cifukwa ca atumiki anu, mafuko a colowa canu." 
Isaiah63:18 Anthu anu opatulika anakhala naco kanthawi kokha; adani athu apondereza kacisi wanu wopatulika. 
Isaiah63:19 Ife takhala ngati iwo amene simunawalamulira konse, ngati iwo amene sanachedwa dzina lanu." 
Isaiah64:1 Mwenzi mutang'amba kumwamba ndi kutsikira pansi, kuti mapiri agwedezeke pamaso panu;" 
Isaiah64:2 monga pamene moto uyatsa zitsamba, ndi moto uwiritsa madzi; kudziwitsa kwa amaliwongo anu dzina lanu, kuti amitundu anthunthumire pamaso panu," 
Isaiah64:3 Pamene Inu munacita zinthu zoopsya, zimene ife sitinayang'anira, Inu munatsika, mapiri anagwedezeka pamaso panu." 
Isaiah64:4 Pakuti kuyambira kale anthu sanamve pena kumvetsa ndi khutu, ngakhale diso silinaone Mulungu wina popanda Inu, amene amgwirira nchito iye amene amlindirira Iye." 
Isaiah64:5 Inu mukomana ndi iye amene akondwerera, nacita cilungamo, iwo amene akumbukira Inu m'njira zanu; taonani Inu munakwiya, ndipo ife tinacimwa; takhala momwemo nthawi yambiri, kodi tidzapulumutsidwa?" 
Isaiah64:6 Pakuti ife tonse takhala ngati wina amene ali wosakonzeka; ndi zolungama zathu zonse ziri ngati cobvala codetsedwa; ndipo ife tonse tifota monga tsamba, ndi zoipa zathu zitiuluza monga mphepo." 
Isaiah64:7 Ndipo palibe amene aitana dzina lanu, amene adzikangamiza yekha kugwiritsa Inu; pakuti Inu mwatibisira nkhope yanu, ndipo mwatinyeketsa ndi zoipa zathu." 
Isaiah64:8 Koma tsopano, Yehova, Inu ndinu Atate wathu; ife tiri dongo, ndipo Inu ndinu Muumbi wathu; ndipo ife tonse tiri nchito ya dzanja lanu." 
Isaiah64:9 Musakwiye kopambana, Yehova, musakumbukire zoipa nthawi zonse; taonani, yang'anani ife, tikupembedzani Inu, ife tonse tiri anthu anu." 
Isaiah64:10 Midzi yanu yopatulika yasanduka cipululu, Ziyoni wasanduka cipululu, Yerusalemu wasanduka bwinja." 
Isaiah64:11 Nyumba yathu yopatulika ndi yokongola, m'mene makolo athu anakutamandani Inu, yatenthedwa ndi moto; ndi zinthu zathu zonse zokondweretsa zapasuka." 
Isaiah64:12 Kodi mudzadziletsa pa zinthuzi, Yehova? Kodi Inu mudzakhala cete ndi kutibvutitsa ife zolimba?" 
Isaiah65:1 Iwo amene sanafunsa za Ine andifunafuna; ndi iwo amene sanandipwaira andipeza; ndinati, Taonani Ine, taonani Ine, kwa mtundu umene sunachula dzina langa." 
Isaiah65:2 Ndatambasulira manja anga tsiku lonse kwa anthu opanduka, amene ayenda m'njira mosati mwabwino, kutsata maganizo ao ao;" 
Isaiah65:3 anthu amene andiputa Ine kumaso kwanga nthawi zonse, apereka nsembe m'minda, nafukizira zonunkhira panjerwa;" 
Isaiah65:4 amene akhala pakati pa manda, ndi kugona m'malo am'tseri; amene adya nyama ya nkhumba, ndi msuzi wa zinthu zonyansa uli m'mbale zao;" 
Isaiah65:5 amene ati, Ima pa wekha, usadze cifupi ndi ine, pakuti ine ndiri woyera kupambana iwe; amenewa ndiwo utsi m'mphuno mwanga, moto woyaka tsiku lonse." 
Isaiah65:6 Taonani, calembedwa pamaso panga; sindidzakhala cete, koma ndidzabwezera, inde ndidzabwezera pa cifuwa cao," 
Isaiah65:7 zoipa zanu zanu pamodzi ndi zoipa za makolo anu, ati Yehova, amene anafukiza zonunkhira pamapiri, nandicitira mwano pazitunda; cifukwa cace Ine ndidzayesa nchito yao yakale ilowe pa cifuwa cao." 
Isaiah65:8 Atero Yehova, Monga vinyo watsopano apezedwa m'tsango, ndipo wina ati, Usaliononge, pakuti muli mdalitso m'menemo, momwemo ndidzacita cifukwa ca atumiki anga, kuti ndisawaononge onse." 
Isaiah65:9 Ndipo ndidzaturutsa mbeu mwa Yakobo, ndi mwa Yuda wolowa nyumba wa mapiri anga; ndipo osankhidwa anga adzalandira colowa cao, ndi atumiki anga adzakhala kumeneko." 
Isaiah65:10 Ndipo Saroni adzakhala podyetsera nkhosa, ndi cigwa ca Akori cidzakhala pogona zoweta kwa anthu anga amene andifuna Ine." 
Isaiah65:11 Koma inu amene mwasiya Yehova, amene mwaiwala phiri langa lopatulika, ndi kukonzera mlungu wamwai gome, ndi kudzazira mlungu waimfa zikho za vinyo wosanganiza;" 
Isaiah65:12 ndidzasankhiratu inu kulupanga, ndipo inu nonse mudzagwada ndi kuphedwa; pakuti pamene ndinaitana, inu simunayankhe; pamene ndinanena, simunamve; koma munacita coipa m'maso mwanga, ndi kusankha cimene Ine sindinakondwera naco." 
Isaiah65:13 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Taonani atumiki anga adzadya, koma inu mudzakhala ndi njala; taonani, atumiki anga adzamwa, koma inu mudzakhala ndi ludzu; taonani, atumiki anga adzasangalala, koma inu mudzakhala ndi manyazi;" 
Isaiah65:14 taonani, atumiki anga adzayimba ndi mtima wosangalala, koma inu mudzalira ndi mtima wacisoni; ndipo mudzapfuula cifukwa ca kusweka mzimu." 
Isaiah65:15 Ndipo mudzasiya dzina lanu likhale citemberero kwa osankhidwa anga, ndipo Ambuye Yehova adzakupha iwe, nadzacha atumiki ace dzina lina;" 
Isaiah65:16 comweco iye amene adzidalitsa yekha m'dziko lapansi, adzadzidalitsa yekha mwa Mulungu woona; ndipo iye amene alumbira m'dziko lapansi adzalumbira pa Mulungu woona; popeza zobvuta zoyamba zaiwalika, ndi popeza zabisalika kumaso kwanga." 
Isaiah65:17 Pakuti taonani, ndilenga kumwamba kwa tsopano ndi dziko lapansi latsopano; ndipo zinthu zakale sizidzakumbukika, pena kulowa mumtima." 
Isaiah65:18 Koma khalani inu okondwa ndi kusangalala ku nthawi zonse ndi ici ndicilenga; pakuti taonani, ndilenga Yerusalemu wosangalala, ndi anthu ace okondwa." 
Isaiah65:19 Ndipo ndidzasangalala m'Yerusalemu, ndi kukondwera mwa anthu anga; ndipo mau akulira sadzamvekanso mwa iye, pena mau akupfuula." 
Isaiah65:20 Sipadzakhalanso khanda la masiku, pena munthu wokalamba osakwanitsa masiku ace; pakuti mwana adzafa wa zaka zana limodzi; ndipo wocimwa pokhala wa zaka zana limodzi adzatembereredwa." 
Isaiah65:21 Ndipo iwo adzamanga nyumba ndi kukhalamo; ndipo iwo adzanka minda yamphesa, ndi kudya zipatso zace." 
Isaiah65:22 Iwo sadzamanga, ndi wina kukhalamo; iwo sadzanka, ndi wina kudya; pakuti monga masiku a mtengo adzakhalamasiku a anthu anga; ndi osankhidwa anga adzasangalala nthawi zambiri ndi nchito za manja ao." 
Isaiah65:23 Iwo sadzagwira nchito mwacabe, pena kubalira tsoka; pakuti iwo ndiwo mbeu ya odalitsidwa a Yehova, ndi obadwa ao adzakhala pamodzi ndi iwo." 
Isaiah65:24 Ndipo padzakhala kuti iwo asanaitane Ine, ndidzayankha; ndipo ali cilankhulire, Ine ndidzamva." 
Isaiah65:25 Mmbulu ndi mwana wa nkhosa zidzadyera pamodzi; ndi mkango udzadya udzu ngati ng'ombe; ndi pfumbi lidzakhala cakudya ca njoka; sizidzapwetekana, kapena kusakazana m'phiri langa lonse lopatulika, ati Yehova." 
Isaiah66:1 Atero Yehova, Kumwamba ndi mpando wanga wacifumu, ndi dziko lapansi ndi coikapo mapazi anga; mudzandimangira Ine nyumba yotani? ndi malo ondiyenera kupumamo ali kuti?" 
Isaiah66:2 Pakuti zonsezi mkono wanga wazilenga, momwemo zonsezi zinaoneka, ati Yehova; koma ndidzayang'anira munthu uyu amene ali waumphawi, ndi wa mzimu wosweka, nanthunthumira ndi mau anga." 
Isaiah66:3 Wakupha ng'ombe alingana ndi wakupha munthu; iye wapereka nsembe ya mwana wa nkhosa alingana ndi wotyola khosi la garu; wothira nsembe yaufa akunga wothira mwazi wa nkhumba; wofukiza conunkhira akunga wodalitsa fano; inde iwo asankha njira zao zao, ndipo moyo wao ukondwerera m'zonyansa zao;" 
Isaiah66:4 Inenso ndidzasankha zodzinyenga nazo, ndipo ndidzatengera mantha ao pa iwo; pakuti pamene ndinaitana, panalibe woyankha; pamene ndinalankhula, iwo sanamva konse; koma anacita coipa m'maso mwanga, ndi kusankha cimene ndisanakondwere naco." 
Isaiah66:5 Imvani mau a Yehova, inu amene munthunthumira ndi mau ace; abale anu amene akudani inu, amene anaponya inu kunja cifukwa ca dzina langa, iwo anati, Yehova alemekezedwe, kuti ife tione kusangalala kwanu; koma iwo adzakhala ndi manyazi." 
Isaiah66:6 Mau a phokoso acokera m'mudzi, mau ocokera m'Kacisi, mau a Yehova amene abwezera adani ace cilango." 
Isaiah66:7 Mkazi asanamve zowawa, anabala mwana; kupweteka kwace kusanadze, anabala mwana wamwamuna." 
Isaiah66:8 Ndani anamva kanthu kotereko? ndani anaona zinthu zoterezo? Kodi dziko lidzabadwa tsiku limodzi? Kodi mtundu udzabadwa modzidzimutsa? pakuti pamene Ziyoni anamva zowawa, pomwepo anabala ana ace." 
Isaiah66:9 Kodi Ine ndidzafikitsira mkazi nthawi yakutula osamtulitsa? ati Yehova; kodi Ine amene ndibalitsa ndidzatseka mimba? ati Mulungu wako. 
Isaiah66:10 Sangalalani inu pamodzi ndi Yerusalemu, ndipo kondwani cifukwa ca iye, inu nonse amene mumkonda; sangalalani kokondwa pamodzi ndi iye, inu nonse akumlira maliro;" 
Isaiah66:11 kuti mukayamwe ndi kukhuta ndi mabere a zitonthozo zace; kuti mukafinye mkaka ndi kukondwerera ndi unyinji wa ulemerero wace. 
Isaiah66:12 Pakuti atero Yehova, Taonani ndidzamfikitsira mtendere ngati mtsinje, ndi ulemerero wa amitundu ngati mtsinje wosefukira. Inu mudzayamwa, ndi kunyamulidwa pambali, ndi kululuzidwa pa maondo," 
Isaiah66:13 Monga munthu amene amace amtonthoza mtima, momwemo ndidzatonthoza mtima wanu; ndipo mudzatonthozedwa mtima m'Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah66:14 Ndipo mudzaciona, ndipo mtima wanu udzasangalala, ndipo mafupa anu adzakula ngati msipu; ndipo dzanja la Yehova lidzadziwika ndi atumiki ace, ndipo adzakwiyira adani ace." 
Isaiah66:15 Pakuti taonani, Yehova adzafika m'moto, ndi magareta ace adzafanana ndi kabvumvulu; kubwezera mkwiyo wace ndi ukali, ndi kudzudzula ndi malawi amoto," 
Isaiah66:16 Pakuti Yehova adzatsutsana ndi moto, ndi lupanga lace, ndi anthu onse; ndi ophedwa a Yehova adzakhala ambiri." 
Isaiah66:17 Iwo amene adzipatulitsa nadziyeretsa, kuti amuke kuminda tsatane tsatane, ndi kudya nyama ya nkhumba, ndi conyansa, ndi mbewa, adzathedwa pamodzi, ati Yehova." 
Isaiah66:18 Pakuti Ine ndidziwa nchito zao ndi maganizo ao; nthawi ikudza yakudzasonkhanitsa Ine a mitundu yonse ndi zinenedwe zonse, ndipo adzafika nadzaona ulemerero wanga." 
Isaiah66:19 Ndipo ndidzaika cizindikiro pakati pao, ndipo ndidzatumiza onse amene apulumuka mwa iwo kwa amitundu, kwa Tarisi, kwa Puli ndi kwa Aludi, okoka uta kwa Tubali ndi Yavana, ku zisumbu zakutari, amene sanamve mbiri yanga, ngakhale kuona ulemerero wanga; ndipo adzabukitsa ulemerero wanga pakati pa amitundu." 
Isaiah66:20 Ndipo iwo adzatenga abale anu onse mwa amitundu onse akhale nsembe ya kwa Yehova; adzabwera nao pa akavalo, ndi m'magareta, ndi m'macila, ndi pa nyuru, ndi pa ngamila, kudza ku phiri langa lopatulika ku Yerusalemu, ati Yehova, monga ana a Israyeli abwera nazo nsembe zao m'cotengera cokonzeka ku nyumba ya Yehova." 
Isaiah66:21 Ndipo ena a iwo ndidzawatenga akhale ansembe ndi Alevi, ati Yehova." 
Isaiah66:22 Pakuti monga m'mwamba mwatsopano ndi dziko lapansi latsopano limene ndidzalenga, lidzakhalabe pamaso pa Ine, ati Yehova, momwemo adzakhalabe ana anu ndi dzina lanu." 
Isaiah66:23 Ndipo kudzakhala kuti kuyambira pa mwezi wokhala kufikira ku unzace, ndi kuyambira pa Sabata lina kufikira ku linzace, anthu onse adzafika kudzapembedzera pamaso pa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Isaiah66:24 Ndipo iwo adzaturuka ndi kuyang'ana mitembo ya anthu amene andilakwira Ine, pakuti mbozi yao sidzafa, pena moto wao sudzazimidwa; ndipo iwo adzanyansa anthu onse." 
Jeremiah1:1 MAU a Yeremiya mwana wa Hilikiya, wa ansembe amene anali ku Anatoti m'dziko la Benjamini;" 
Jeremiah1:2 amene anamdzera mau a Yehova masiku a Yosiya mwana wace wa Amoni, mfumu ya Ayuda caka cakhumi ndi citatu ca ufumu wace." 
Jeremiah1:3 Anamdzeranso masiku a Yehoyakimu mwana wace wa Yosiya, mfumu ya Yuda, kufikira Zedekiya mwana wace wa Yosiya mfumu ya Yuda atatsiriza zaka khumi ndi cimodzi; kufikira a ku Yerusalemu anatengedwa ndende mwezi wacisanu." 
Jeremiah1:4 Ndipo anadza kwa ine mau a Yehova, kuti," 
Jeremiah1:5 Ndisanakulenge iwe m'mimba ndinakudziwa, ndipo usanabadwe ndinakupatula iwe; ndinakuika kuti ukhale mneneri wa mitundu ya anthu." 
Jeremiah1:6 Ndipo ndinati, Ha, Ambuye Mulungu! taonani, sindithai kunena pakuti ndiri mwana." 
Jeremiah1:7 Koma Yehova anati kwa ine, Usati, ndine mwana pakuti udzanka kwa yense amene ndidzakutumako iwe, nudzanena conse cimene ndidzakuuza." 
Jeremiah1:8 Usaope nkhope zao; cifukwa Ine ndiri ndi iwe kuti ndikulanditse iwe, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah1:9 Ndipo Yehova anaturutsa dzanja lace, na'khudza pakamwa panga; nati Yehova kwa ine, Taona ndaika mau anga m'kamwa mwako;" 
Jeremiah1:10 penyatu, lero ndakuika ulamulire mitundu ya anthu ndi maufumu, kuti uzule, upasule, uononge, ugwetse; umange, ubzyale." 
Jeremiah1:11 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa ine, kuti, Yeremiya, uona ciani? Ndipo ndinati, Ine ndiona ntyole ya katungurume." 
Jeremiah1:12 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Waona bwino pakuti Ine ndidzadikira mau anga kuwacita." 
Jeremiah1:13 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa ine nthawi yaciwiri, kuti, ona ciani? Ndipo ndinati, Ine ndiona mphika wogaduka; ndi pakamwa pace unafulatira kumpoto." 
Jeremiah1:14 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Kucokera kumpoto coipa cidzaturukira onse okhala m'dziko." 
Jeremiah1:15 Pakuti, taona, ndidzaitana mabanja onse a maufumu a kumpoto, ati Yehova; ndipo adzafika nadzaika yense mpando wacifumu wace pa zipata za Yerusalemu, ndi pa malinga onse ozinga pamenepo, ndi pa midzi yonse ya Yuda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ndipo ndidzanena nao za maweruzo anga akuweruzira zoipa zao zonse; popeza anandisiya Ine, nafukizira milungu yina, nagwadira nchito za manja ao." 
Jeremiah1:17 Koma iwe ukwinde m'cuuno mwako, nuuke, nunene kwa iwo zonse zimene ndikuuza iwe; usaope nkhope zao ndingakuopetse iwe pamaso pao." 
Jeremiah1:18 Cifukwa, taona, ndakuyesa iwe lero mudzi walinga, mzati wacitsulo, makoma amkuwa, pa dziko lonse, ndi pa mafumu a Yuda, ndi pa akuru ace, ndi pa ansembe ace, ndi pa anthu a m'dziko." 
Jeremiah1:19 Ndipo adzamenyana ndi iwe; koma sadzakuposa; cifukwa Ine ndiri ndi iwe, ati Yehova, kukulanditsa." 
Jeremiah2:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa ine, nati," 
Jeremiah2:2 Pita nupfuule n'makutu a Yerusalemu, kuti, Yehova atero, Ndikumbukira za iwe kukoma mtima kwa ubwana wako, cikondi ca matomedwe ako; muja unanditsata m'cipululu m'dziko losabzya lamo." 
Jeremiah2:3 Israyeli anali wopatulikira Yehova, zipatso zoundukula za zopindula zace; onse amene adzamudya iye adzayesedwa oparamula; coipa cidzawagwera, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah2:4 Tamvani mau a Yehova, iwe nyumba ya Yakobo, ndi inu mabanja onse a nyumba ya Israyeli;" 
Jeremiah2:5 atero Yehova, Atate anu apeza cosalungama canji mwa Ine, kuti andicokera kunka kutari, natsata zacabe, nasanduka acabe?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Osati, Ali kuti Yehova amene anatikweza kucokera ku dziko la Aigupto, natitsogolera m'cipululu, m'dziko loti se ndi la maenje, m'dziko la cirala ndi la mthunzi wa imfa, m'dziko losapitamo anthu, losamangamo anthu?" 
Jeremiah2:7 Ndipo ndinakulowetsani m'dziko la minda, kuti mudye zipatso zace, ndi zabwino zace; koma pamene munalowa, munaipitsa dziko langa, ndi kuyesa colandira canga conyansa." 
Jeremiah2:8 Ansembe sanati, Ali kuti Yehova? ndi iwo amene agwira malamulo sandidziwa Ine; ndi abusa omwe anandilakwira Ine, ndi aneneri ananenera mwa Baala, natsata zinthu zosapindula." 
Jeremiah2:9 Cifukwa cace ndidzatsutsananso nanu, ati Yehova, ndi ana a ana anu ndidzatsutsana nao." 
Jeremiah2:10 Pakuti pitani ku zisumbu za Kitimu nimuone; tumizani ku Kedara nimulingalire bwino; nimuone ngati cinalipo cotere. 
Jeremiah2:11 Kodi mtundu wa anthu unasintha milungu yao, imene siiri milungu? Koma anthu anga anasintha ulemerero wao ndi cosapindula." 
Jeremiah2:12 Muzizwe pamenepo, miyamba inu, muope kwambiri, mukhale ouma, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah2:13 Pakuti anthu anga anacita zoipa ziwiri; anandisiya Ine kasupe wa madzi amoyo, nadziboolera zitsime, zitsime zong'aluka, zosakhalamo madzi." 
Jeremiah2:14 Kodi Israyeli ndi mtumiki? kodi ndiye kapolo wobadwa m'nyumba? afunkhidwa bwanji? 
Jeremiah2:15 Ana a mikango anambangulira iye, nakweza mau; anapasula dziko lace, midzi yace yatenthedwa, mulibenso wokhalamo." 
Jeremiah2:16 Ananso a Nofi ndi a Tahapanesi, anaswa pakati pamtu pako." 
Jeremiah2:17 Kodi sunadzicitira ici iwe wekha popeza unasiya Yehova Mulungu wako, pamene anatsogolera iwe panjira?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Tsopano uli naco ciani m'njira ya ku Aigupto, kumwa madzi a Sihori? uli naco ciani m'njira ya ku Asuri, kumwa madzi a m'Nyanja?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Coipa cako cidzai kulanga iwe, mabwerero ako adzakudzudzula iwe; dziwa, nuone, kuti ici ndi coipa ndi cowawa, kuti wasiya Yehova Mulungu wako, ndi kuti kundiopa Ine sikuli mwa iwe, ati Yehova Mulungu wa makamu." 
Jeremiah2:20 Pakuti kale lomwe ndinatyola gori lako, ndi kudula zomangira zako; ndipo unati, Sindidzakutumikirani, pakuti pa zitunda zonse zazitari, ndi patsinde pa mitengo yonse yaiwisi unawerama, ndi kucita dama." 
Jeremiah2:21 Ndipo Ine ndinakuoka mpesa wangwiro, mbeu yoona; kodi bwanji wandisandukira Ine mbeu yopanda pace, ya mpesa wacilendo?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Pakuti ngakhale usamba ndi soda, ndi kudzitengera sopo wambiri, mphulupulu zako zidziwika pamaso panga, ati Yehova Mulungu." 
Jeremiah2:23 Bwanji uti, Sindinaipitsidwa, sindinatsata Abaala? Ona njira yako m'cigwa, dziwa cimene wacicita; ndiwe ngamila yothamanga yoyenda m'njira zace;" 
Jeremiah2:24 mbidzi yozolowera m'cipululu, yopumira mphepo pakufuna pace; pokomana nayo ndani adzaibweza? onse amene aifuna sadzadzilemetsa; adzaipeza m'mwezi wace." 
Jeremiah2:25 Kaniza phazi lako lisakhale losabvala nsapato, ndi m'mero mwako musakhale ndi ludzu; koma unati, Palibe ciyembekezo, iai; pakuti ndakonda alendo, ndipo ndidzatsata pambuyo pao." 
Jeremiah2:26 Monga mbala iri ndi manyazi pamene igwidwa, comweco nyumba ya Israyeli iri ndi manyazi; iwo, mafumu ao, akuru ao, ansembe ao, ndi aneneri ao;" 
Jeremiah2:27 amene ati kwa mtengo, Iwe ndiwe atate wanga; ndi kwa mwala, Wandibala; pakuti anandipatsa Ine mbuyo, si nkhope yao; koma m'nthawi ya kubvutidwa kwao adzati, Ukani, tipulumutseni." 
Jeremiah2:28 Koma iri kuti milungu yako imene wadzipangira? Iuke, ikupulumutse iwe m'nthawi ya kubvutidwa kwako; pakuti milungu yako ilingana ndi kucuruka kwa midzi yako, Yuda iwe." 
Jeremiah2:29 Cifukwa canji mudzatsutsana ndi Ine nonse? mwandilakwira Ine, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah2:30 Ndapanda ana anu mwacabe; sanamvera kulanga; lupanga lanu ladya aneneri anu, monga mkango wakuononga." 
Jeremiah2:31 Mbadwo inu, taonani mau a Yehova. Kodi ndakhala kwa Israyeli cipululu? Kapena dziko la mdima woti bii? Cifukwa ninji ati anthu anga, Tamasuka sitidzabweranso konse kwa Inu?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Kodi angathe namwali kuiwala zokometsera zace, kapena mkwatibwi zobvala zace? koma anthu anga andiiwala Ine masiku osawerengeka." 
Jeremiah2:33 Kodi sukonzadi njira yako kufunafuna cilakolako? cifukwa cace waphunzitsa akazi oipa njira zako. 
Jeremiah2:34 Ndiponso m'nsaru zako wapezeka mwazi wa miyoyo ya aumphawi osacimwa; sunawapeza pakuboola, koma ponsepo." 
Jeremiah2:35 Koma unati, Ndiri wosacimwa ndithu; mkwiyo wace wacoka pa ine. Taona, ndidzakuweruza iwe, cifukwa uti, Sindinacimwa." 
Jeremiah2:36 Bwanji uyendayenda kwambiri ndi kusintha njira yako? udzacitanso manyazi ndi Aigupto monga unacita manyazi ndi Asuri. 
Jeremiah2:37 Koma udzaturuka kwa iyenso, manja ako pamtu pako; pakuti Yehova wakana zokhulupirira zako, ndipo sudzapindula m'menemo." 
Jeremiah3:1 Amati, Ngati mwamuna acotsa mkazi wace, ndipo amcokera iye, nakhala mkazi wa wina, kodi adzabweranso kwa mkaziyo? dzikolo kodi silidzaipitsidwa? Koma iwe wacita dama ndi mabwenzi ambiri; koma bweranso kwa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah3:2 Kwezera maso ako ku mapiri oti se, nuone: sanagona ndi iwe kuti? Panjira wakhalira iwo, monga M-arabu m'cipululu; ndipo waipitsa dziko ndi zigololo zako, ndi zoipa zako." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ndipo mvula yakanidwa, ndipo panalibe mvula ya masika; ndipo unali ndi nkhope ya mkazi wadama, unakana manyazi." 
Jeremiah3:4 Kodi kuyambira tsopano sudzapfuulira kwa Ine, Atate wanga, wotsogolera ubwana wanga ndinu?" 
Jeremiah3:5 Kodi adzasunga mkwiyo wace ku nthawi zonse? Kodi adzakudikira mpaka cimariziro? Taona, wanena ndi kucita zoipa monga unatero." 
Jeremiah3:6 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine masiku a Yosiya mfumu, Kodi waona cimene wacicita Israyeli, wobwerera m'mbuyo? Wakwera pa mapiri atari onse, ndi patsinde pa mitengo yaiwisi yonse, ndi kucita dama pamenepo." 
Jeremiah3:7 Ndipo ndinati atacita zimenezo zonse, Adzabwera kwa Ine; koma sanabwere, ndipo mphwace wonyenga, Yuda, anaona." 
Jeremiah3:8 Ndipo ndinaona, kuti, ndingakhale ndikamcotsa Israyeli wobwerera m'mbuyo, ndi kumpatsa kalata wacilekaniro cifukwa ca kucita cigololo iye, mphwace Yuda wonyenga sanaope, koma iye yemwe ananka nacita dama." 
Jeremiah3:9 Ndipo kunali kuti mbiri ya dama lace inaipitsa dziko, ndipo anacita cigololo ndi miyala ndi mitengo." 
Jeremiah3:10 Ndipo zingakhale zonsezi mphwace wonyenga sanabwera kwa Ine ndi mtima wace wonse, koma monama, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah3:11 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Israyeli wobwerera anadzionetsa wolungama kopambana ndi Yuda wonyenga," 
Jeremiah3:12 Pita; nulalikire mau awa kuyang'ana kumpoto, ndi kuti, Bwera iwe Israyeli wobwerera, ati Yehova; sindidzakuyang'anira iwe ndi kukwiya; pakuti Ine ndiri wacifundo, ati Yehova, sindidzakhala nako kukwiya ku nthawi zonse." 
Jeremiah3:13 Koma bvomereza zoipa zako, kuti walakwira Yehova Mulungu wako, ndi kupatukira mwa alendo patsinde pa mitengo yaiwisi yonse, ndipo sunamvera mau anga, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah3:14 Bwerani, ananu obwerera, ati Yehova; pakuti Ine ndine mbuye wanu; ndipo ndidzakutengani inu mmodzi mmodzi wa pa mudzi uli wonse, ndi awiri awiri a pa banja liri lonse, ndi kukutengerani ku Ziyoni;" 
Jeremiah3:15 ndipo ndidzakupatsani inu abusa monga mwa mtima wanga, adzakudyetsani inu nzeru ndi luntha." 
Jeremiah3:16 Ndipo padzaoneka, pamene mudzakhala ambiri ndi kucuruka m'dzikomo masiku awo, ati Yehova, sadzatinso konse, Likasa la cipangano ca Yehova; silidzalowa m'mtima; sadzalikumbukira; sadzanka kukaliona, sadzacitanso konse." 
Jeremiah3:17 Pa nthawi yomweyo adzacha Yerusalemu mpando wa Yehova; ndipo mitundu yonse idzasonkhanidwa kumeneko, ku dzina la Yehova, ku Yerusalemu; ndipo sadzayendanso konse m'kuumirira kwa mtima wao woipa." 
Jeremiah3:18 Masiku omwewo nyumba ya Yuda idzayenderana ndi nyumba ya Israyeli, ndipo adzaturuka pamodzi ku dziko la kumpoto kunka ku dziko limene ndinapatsa makolo anu kuti alowemo." 
Jeremiah3:19 Koma Ine ndinati, Ndidzakuika iwe bwanji mwa ana, ndi kupatsa iwe dziko lokondweretsa, colowa cabwino ca makamu a mitundu ya anthu? ndipo ndinati mudzandicha Ine, Atate wanga; osatembenuka kuleka kunditsata Ine." 
Jeremiah3:20 Ndithu monga mkazi acokera mwamuna wace monyenga, comweco mwacita ndi Ine monyenga, inu nyumba ya Israyeli, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah3:21 Mau amveka pa mapiri oti se, kulira ndi kupempha kwa ana a Israyeli; pakuti anaipitsa njira yao, naiwala Yehova Mulungu wao." 
Jeremiah3:22 Bwerani, ana inu obwerera, ndidzaciritsa mabwerero anu. Taonani, tadza kwa Inu; pakuti ndinu Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Ndithu akhulupirira mwacabe cithandizo ca kuzitunda, ndi phokoso la kumapiri; ndithu mwa Yehova Mulungu wathu muli cipulumutso ca Israyeli," 
Jeremiah3:24 Ndipo cocititsa manyazi cinathetsa nchito za atate athu kuyambira ubwana wathu; nkhosa zao ndi zoweta zao, ana ao amuna ndi akazi." 
Jeremiah3:25 Tigone m'manyazi athu, kunyala kwathu kutipfunde ife; pakuti tamcimwira Yehova Mulungu wathu, ife ndi makolo athu, kuyambira ubwana wathu kufikira lero lomwe; ndipo sitidamvera mau a Yehova Mulunguwathu." 
Jeremiah4:1 Ngati udzabwera, Israyeli, ati Yehova, udzabwera kwa Ine; ndipo ngati udzacotsa zonyansa zako pamaso panga sudzacotsedwa." 
Jeremiah4:2 Ndipo udzalumbira, Pali Yehova m'zoonadi, m'ciweruziro, ndi m'cilungamo; ndipo mitundu ya anthu idzadzidalitsa mwa Iye, ndipo mwa Iye adzatamandira." 
Jeremiah4:3 Pakuti Yehova atero kwa anthu a Yuda ndi kwa Yerusalemu, Limani masala anu, musabzale paminga." 
Jeremiah4:4 Mudzidulire nokha kwa Yehova, cotsani khungu la mitima yanu, amuna inu a Yuda ndi okhala m'Yerusalemu; ukali wanga ungaturuke ngati moto, ungatenthe kuti sangathe kuuzima, cifukwa ca kuipa kwa macitidwe anu." 
Jeremiah4:5 Nenani m'Yuda, lalikirani m'Yerusalemu, ndi kuti, Ombani lipenga m'dzikomo; pfuulani, ndi kuti, Sonkhanani pamodzi, tilowe m'midzi ya malinga." 
Jeremiah4:6 Kwezani mbendera kuyang'ana ku Ziyoni; thawani kuti mupulumuke, musakhale; pakuti ndidza ndi coipa cocokera kumpoto ndi kuononga kwakukuru." 
Jeremiah4:7 Mkango wakwera kuturuka m'nkhalango mwace, ndipo woononga amitundu ali panjira, waturuka m'mbuto mwace kuti acititse dziko lako bwinja, kuti midzi yako ipasuke mulibenso wokhalamo." 
Jeremiah4:8 Pamenepo, bvalani ciguduli, lirani ndi kubuula; pakuti mkwiyo wakuopsya wa Yehova sunabwerera pa ife." 
Jeremiah4:9 Ndipo padzakhala tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova, kuti mtima wa mfumu udzatayika, ndi mitima ya akuru; ndipo ansembe adzazizwa, ndi aneneri adzadabwa." 
Jeremiah4:10 Ndipo ndinati, Ha, Yehova Mulungu! ndithu mwanyenga kwambiri anthu awa ndi Yerusalemu, ndi kuti, Mu'dzalandira mtendere; koma lupanga lafikira pamoyo." 
Jeremiah4:11 Pa nthawi yomweyo adzati kwa anthu awa ndi kwa Yerusalemu, Mphepo yotentha yocokera ku mapiri oti se m'cipululu yopita kwa mwana wamkazi wa anthu anga, yosaungula, yosayeretsa;" 
Jeremiah4:12 mphepo yolimba yocokera kumeneko idzandifika ine; tsopanonso ndidzaweruza iwo maweruzo. 
Jeremiah4:13 Taonani, adzadza ngati mitambo, ndi magareta ace ngati kabvumvulu; akavalo ace athamanga kopambana mphungu, Tsoka ife! pakuti tapasuka." 
Jeremiah4:14 Iwe Yerusalemu, utsuke mtima wako kucotsa zoipa kuti upulumuke. Maganizo ako acabe agona mwako masiku angati?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Pakuti mau anena m'Dani nalalikira nsautso m'phiri la Efraimu: 
Jeremiah4:16 Mukumbutse mitundu ya anthu; taonani, lalikirani Yerusalemu, kuti owazinga ndi nkhondo afumira ku dziko lakutari, nainenera midzi ya Yuda mau ao." 
Jeremiah4:17 Monga adindo a m'munda amzinga iye; cifukwa andipandukira Ine, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah4:18 Njira yako ndi nchito zako zinakucitira izi; ici ndico coipa cako ndithu; ciri cowawa ndithu, cifikira ku mtima wako." 
Jeremiah4:19 Matumbo anga, matumbo anga! ndipoteka pamtima panga peni peni; mtima wanga sukhala pansi m'kati mwanga; sindithai kutonthola; pakuti wamva, moyo wanga, mau a lipenga, mbiri ya nkhondo." 
Jeremiah4:20 Alalikira cipasuko cilalikire; pakuti dziko lonse lafunkhidwa; mahema anga afunkhidwa dzidzidzi, ndi nsaru zanga zocinga m'kamphindi." 
Jeremiah4:21 Kufikira liti ndidzaona mbendera, ndi kumva kulira kwa lipenga?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Pakuti anthu anga apusa, sandidziwa Ine; ali ana opulukira sazindikira; ali ocenjera kucita coipa koma kucita cabwino sakudziwa." 
Jeremiah4:23 Ndinaona dziko lapansi, ndi rpo taona, linali lopasuka lopanda kanthu; ndipo ndinaona kumwamba, kunalibe kuunika." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ndinaona mapiri, taona ananthunthumira; ndipo zitunda zonse zinagwedezeka." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ndinaona, ndipo taona, panalibe munthu, ndi mbalame zonse zakumwamba zinathawa." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ndinaona, ndipo taona, munda wazipatso unali cipululu, ndipo midzi yace yonse inapasuka pamaso pa Yehova, ndi pamaso pa mkwiyo wace woopsya." 
Jeremiah4:27 Pakuti Yehova atero, Dziko lonse lidzakhala bwinja koma sindidzatsirizitsa." 
Jeremiah4:28 Cifukwa cimeneco dziko lidzalira maliro, ndipo kumwamba kudzada; cifukwa ndanena, ndatsimikiza mtima, sindinatembenuka, sindidzabwerera pamenepo." 
Jeremiah4:29 Mudzi wonse uthawa m'phokoso la apakavalo ndi amauta; adzalowa m'nkhalango, adzakwera pamiyala; midzi yonse idzasiyidwa, ndipo simudzakhala munthu m'menemo." 
Jeremiah4:30 Nanga iwe, udzacita ciani pamene udzafunkhidwa? Ngakhale udzibveka ndi zofiira, ngakhale udzibveka ndi zokometsera zagolidi, ngakhale udzikuzira maso ako ndi kupaka, udzikometsera pacabe; mabwenzi adzakunyoza adzafuna moyo wako." 
Jeremiah4:31 Pakuti ndamva kubuula ngati kwa mkazi wobala, ndi msauko ngati wa mkazi wobala mwana wace woyamba, mau a mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni wakupuma mosiyiza, wakutambasula manja ace, ndi kuti, Tsoka ine tsopano! pakuti moyo wanga walefuka cifukwa ca ambanda." 
Jeremiah5:1 Thamangani inu kwina ndi kwina m'miseu ya Yerusalemu, taonanitu, dziwani, ndi kufunafuna m'mabwalo ace, kapena mukapeza munthu, kapena alipo wakucita zolungama, wakufuna coonadi; ndipo ndidzamkhululukira." 
Jeremiah5:2 Ndipo ngakhale ati, Pali Yehova; komatu alumbira monama." 
Jeremiah5:3 Yehova Inu, maso anu sali pacoonadi kodi? munawapanda iwo, koma sanaphwetekedwa mtima; munawatha iwo, koma akana kudzudzulidwa; alimbitsa nkhope zao koposa mwala; akana kubwera." 
Jeremiah5:4 Ndipo ine ndinati, Ndithu amenewo ali aumphawi; ali opusa; pakuti sadziwa njira ya Yehova, kapena ciweruzo ca Mulungu wao." 
Jeremiah5:5 Ine ndidzanka kwa akuru, ndidzanena ndi iwo; pakuti adziwa njira ya Yehova, ndi ciweruzo ca Mulungu wao. Koma awa anabvomerezana natyola gori, nadula zomangira zao." 
Jeremiah5:6 Cifukwa cace mkango woturuka m'nkhalango udzawapha, ndi mmbulu wa madzulo udzawafunkha, nyalugwe adzakhalira m'midzi mwao, onse amene aturukamo adzamwetulidwa; pakuti zolakwa ziri zambiri, ndi mabwerero ao acuruka." 
Jeremiah5:7 Bwanji ndidzakhululukira iwe? pamenepo ana ako andisiya Ine, nalumbira pa iyo yosati milungu; pamene ndinakhutitsa iwo, anacita cigololo, nasonkhana masonkhano m'nyumba za adama." 
Jeremiah5:8 Anali onga akavalo okhuta mamawa; yense wakumemesera mkazi wa mnansi wace. 
Jeremiah5:9 Kodi sindidzawalanga cifukwa ca zimenezi? ati Yehova; kodi moyo wanga sudzabwezera cilango mtundu woterewu? 
Jeremiah5:10 Kwerani pa makoma ace nimupasule; koma musatsirize konse; cotsani nthambi zace pakuti siziri za Yehova. 
Jeremiah5:11 Pakuti nyumba ya Israyeli ndi nyumba ya Yuda zinandicitira monyenga kwambiri, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah5:12 Akana Yehova, ndi kuti, Si ndiye; coipa sicidzatifika ife; sitidzaona kapena lupanga kapena njala;" 
Jeremiah5:13 ndipo aneneri adzasanduka mphepo, ndipo mwa iwo mulibe mau; comweco cidzacitidwa ndi iwo." 
Jeremiah5:14 Cifukwa cace Yehova Mulungu wa makamu atero, Cifukwa munena mau awa, taona, ndidzayesa mau anga akhale m'kamwa mwako ngati moto, anthu awa ndidzayesa nkhuni, ndipo udzawatha iwo." 
Jeremiah5:15 Taonani, ndidzatengera pa inu mtundu wa anthu akutari, inu nyumba ya Israyeli, ati Yehova; ndi mtundu wolimba, ndi mtundu wakalekale, mtundu umene cinenero cace simudziwa, ngakhale kumva zonena zao." 
Jeremiah5:16 Phodo lao liri ngati manda apululu, onsewo ndiwo olimba." 
Jeremiah5:17 Adzadya zokolola zako, ndi mkate wako, umene ana ako amuna ndi akazi ayenera kudya; adzadya nkhosa zako ndi zoweta zako; adzadya mphesa zako ndi nkhuyu zako; adzapasula ndi lupanga midzi yamalinga yako, imene ukhulupiriramo." 
Jeremiah5:18 Koma masiku onsewo, ati Yehova, sindidzatsirizitsa konse ndi iwe." 
Jeremiah5:19 Ndipo padzakhala: pamene mudzati, Cifukwa canji Yehova Mulungu wathu aticitira ife zonse izi? ndipo udzayankha kwa iwo, Monga ngati mwandisiya Ine, ndi kutumikira milungu yacilendo m'dziko lanu, momwemo mudzatumikira alendo m'dziko siliri lanu." 
Jeremiah5:20 Nenani ici m'nyumba ya Yakobo, lalikirani m'Yuda, kuti," 
Jeremiah5:21 Tamvanitu ici, inu anthu opusa, ndi opanda nzeru; ali ndi maso koma osaona, ali ndi makutu koma osamva;" 
Jeremiah5:22 Kodi simundiopa Ine? ati Yehova: simudzanthunthumira pamaso pa Ine, amene ndinaika mcenga cilekaniro ca nyanja, ndi lemba lamuyaya kuti isapitirirepo? ndipo ngakhale mafunde ace acita gabvigabvi, alephera; ngakhale akokoma, sangathe kupitirirapo." 
Jeremiah5:23 Koma anthu awa ali ndi mtima woukirana ndi wopikisana; anapanduka nacoka. 
Jeremiah5:24 Ndipo sanena m'mtima mwao, Tiopetu Yehova Mulungu wathu wopatsa mvula yoyamba ndi yamasika, m'nyengo yace; atisungira ife masabata olamulidwa a masika." 
Jeremiah5:25 Mphulupulu zanu zacotsa zimenezi, ndi zocimwa zanu zakukanitsani inu zinthu zabwino." 
Jeremiah5:26 Pakuti mwa anthu anga aoneka anthu oipa; adikira monga akucha misampha; acha khwekhwe, agwira anthu." 
Jeremiah5:27 Monga cikwere codzala ndi mbalame, comweco nyumba zao zadzala ndi cinyengo; cifukwa cace akula, alemera," 
Jeremiah5:28 Anenepa, anyezimira; inde apitiriza kucita zoipa; sanenera ana amasiye mlandu wao, kuti apindule; mlandu wa aumphawi saweruza." 
Jeremiah5:29 Sindidzawalanga kodi cifukwa ca zimenezi? ati Yehova; kodi moyo wanga sudzabwezera cilango mtundu wotere? 
Jeremiah5:30 Codabwitsa ndi coopsya caoneka m'dzikomo; 
Jeremiah5:31 aneneri anenera monyenga nathandiza ansembe pakulamulira kwao; ndipo anthu anga akonda zotere; ndipo mudzacita ciani pomarizira pace? 
Jeremiah6:1 Ananu a Benjamini, pulumukani pothawa pakati pa Yerusalemu, ombani lipenga m'Tekoa, kwezani cizindikiro m'Beti-hakeremu; pakuti caoneka coipa coturuka m'mpoto ndi kuononga kwakukulu." 
Jeremiah6:2 Ndidzacotsa mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni mkazi wokoma ndi wololopoka. 
Jeremiah6:3 Abusa ndi nkhosa zao adzadza kwa iye; adzamanga mahema ao pomzinga iye; adzadya yense pokhala pace. 
Jeremiah6:4 Lalikirani nkhondo yakumenyana ndi iye; ukani, tikwere pakati pa usana. Tsoka kwa ife! pakuti dzuwa lapendeka, mithunzi ya madzulo yatambasuka." 
Jeremiah6:5 Ukani, tiyende usiku, tipasule nyumba zace." 
Jeremiah6:6 Pakuti Yehova wa makamu atero, Dulani mitengo, unjikani nthumbira pomenyana ndi Yerusalemu; mudzi wakudzalangidwa ndi uwu; m'kati mwace modzala nsautso." 
Jeremiah6:7 Monga kasupe aturutsa madzi ace, camweco aturutsa zoipa zace; ciwawa ndi kufunkha zimveka m'kati mwace; pamaso panga masiku onse pali kulira ndi mabala." 
Jeremiah6:8 Ulangizidwe, Yerusalemu, ungakucokere moyo wanga, ndingakuyese iwe bwinja, dziko losakhalamo anthu." 
Jeremiah6:9 Yehova wa makamu atero, Adzakunkha otsalira a Israyeli monga mpesa; bweza dzanja lako monga wakuchera mphesa m'mitanga yace." 
Jeremiah6:10 Ndidzanena ndi yani, ndidzacita mboni kwa yani, kuti amve? Taona khutu lao liri losadulidwa, ndipo sangathe kumva; taona, mau a Yehova awatonzetsa iwo; sakondwera nao." 
Jeremiah6:11 Cifukwa cace ndadzala ndi ukali wa Yehova; ndalema ndi kudzikaniza; tsanulirani pa ana a pabwalo, ndi pa masonkhano a anyamata, pakuti ngakhale mwamuna ndi mkazi wace adzatengedwa, okalamba ndi iye amene acuruka masiku ace." 
Jeremiah6:12 Nyumba zao zidzasanduka za ena, pamodzi ndi minda yao ndi akazi ao; pakuti ndidzatambasula dzanja langa pa okhala m'dziko, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah6:13 Pakuti kuyambira wamng'ono kufikira wamkuru onse akhala akusirira; ndiponso kuyambira mneneri kufikira wansembe onse acita monyenga," 
Jeremiah6:14 Ndiponso apoletsa bala la anthu anga pang'onong'ono, ndi kuti, Mtendere, mtendere; koma palibe mtendere." 
Jeremiah6:15 Kodi anakhala ndi manyazi pamene anacita conyansa? lai, sanakhala konse ndi manyazi, sanathe kunyala; cifukwa cace adzagwa mwa iwo akugwa; panthawi pamene ndidzafika cwa iwo, aclzagwetsedwa, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah6:16 Yehova atero, Imani m'njira ndi kuona, funsani za mayendedwe akale, m'menemo muli njira yabwino, muyende m'menemo, ndipo mudzapeza mpumulo wa miyoyo yanu; koma anati, Sitidzayendamo." 
Jeremiah6:17 Ndipo ndinaika alonda oyang'anira inu, ndi kuti, Mverani mau a lipenga; koma anati, Sitidzamvera." 
Jeremiah6:18 Cifukwa cace tamverani, amitundu inu, dziwani, msonkhano inu, cimene ciri mwa iwo." 
Jeremiah6:19 Tamva, dziko lapansi iwe; taona, Ine ndidzatengera coipa pa anthu awa, cipatso ca maganizo ao, pakuti sanamvera mau anga, kapena cilamulo canga, koma wacikana." 
Jeremiah6:20 Cofukiza cindifumiranji ku Seba, ndi nzimbe ku dziko lakutari? nsembe zopsereza zanu sizindisekeretsa, nsembe zophera zanu sizindikondweretsa Ine." 
Jeremiah6:21 Cifukwa cace atero Yehova, Taona, ndidzaikira anthuwa zopunthwitsa; ndipo atate ndi ana adzakhumudwa nazo pamodzi; munthu ndi mnzace adzatayika." 
Jeremiah6:22 Yehova atero, Taona, mtundu wa anthu ucokera kumpoto; ndi mtundu waukuru adzaukitsidwa ku malekezero a dziko lapansi." 
Jeremiah6:23 Agwira uta ndi nthungo; ali ankharwe, alibe cifundo; mau ao aphokosera ngati nyanja, akwera pa akavalo; aguba monga anthu ofuna kumenyana nkhondo ndi iwe, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni." 
Jeremiah6:24 Tamva ife mbiri yace; manja athu alefuka, yatigwira nkhawa ndi zowawa ngati za mkazi wobala." 
Jeremiah6:25 Usaturukire kumunda, usayenda m'njira; pakuti lupanga la amaliwongo ndi mantha ali m'mbali zonse." 
Jeremiah6:26 Iwe mwana wamkazi wa anthu anga, udzibveke ndi ciguduli, ndi kubvimbvinika m'phulusa; ulire maliro ngati a mwana wamwamuna wa yekha, kulira kowawa koposa; pakuti wakufunkha adzatifikira ife motidzidzimutsa." 
Jeremiah6:27 Ndakuyesa iwe nsanja ndi linga mwa anthu anga, kuti udziwe ndi kuyesa njira yao." 
Jeremiah6:28 Onse ali opikisana ndithu, ayendayenda ndi maugogodi; ndiwo mkuwa ndi citsulo; onsewa acita mobvunda;" 
Jeremiah6:29 mbvukuto yatenthedwa ndi moto; mthobvu watha ndi moto wa ng'anjo; ayenga cabe; pakuti oipa sacotsedwa. 
Jeremiah6:30 Anthu adzawacha nthale ya siliva, pakuti Yehova wakana iwo." 
Jeremiah7:1 Mau amene anadza kwa Yeremiya kucokera kwa Yehova, kuti," 
Jeremiah7:2 Ima m'cipata ca nyumba ya Yehova, lalikira m'menemo mau awa, ndi kuti, Tamvani mau a Yehova, inu nonse a Yuda, amene alowa m'zipata izi kuti mugwadire Yehova." 
Jeremiah7:3 Yehova wa makamu atero, Mulungu wa Israyeli, Konzani njira zanu ndi macitidwe anu, ndipo ndidzakukhalitsani inu m'malo ano." 
Jeremiah7:4 Musakhulupirire mau onama, kuti, Kacisi wa Yehova, kacisi wa Yehova, kacisi wa Yehova ndi awa." 
Jeremiah7:5 Pakuti mukakonzatu njira zanu ndi macitidwe anu; ndi kuweruzatu milandu ya munthu ndi mnansi wace; 
Jeremiah7:6 ndi kuleka kutsendereza mlendo, ndi wamasiye, ndi mkazi wamasiye, osakhetsa mwazi wosacimwa m'malo muno, osatsata milungu yina ndi kudziipitsa nayo;" 
Jeremiah7:7 ndipo ndidzakukhazikani inu m'malo muno, m'dziko limene ndinapatsa makolo anu, kuyambira kale lomwe kufikira muyaya," 
Jeremiah7:8 Taonani, mukhulupirira mau onama, osapindulitsa." 
Jeremiah7:9 Kodi mudzapha, ndi kuba, ndi kucita cigololo, ndi kulumbira zonama, ndi kupereka nsembe kwa Baala, ndi kutsata milungu yina imene simunaidziwa," 
Jeremiah7:10 ndi kudza ndi kuima pamaso panga m'nyumba yino, imene ichedwa dzina langa, ndi kuti, Talanditsidwa; kuti mucite zonyansa izi?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Kodi nyumba yino, imene ichedwa dzina langa, ikhala phanga la okwatula pamaso panu? Taona, Ine ndaciona, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah7:12 Koma pitani tsopano ku malo anga amene anali m'Silo, m'mene ndinaikamo dzina langa poyamba paja, ndi kuona cimene ndinacitira cifukwa ca zoipa za anthu anga Israyeli." 
Jeremiah7:13 Ndipo tsopano, cifukwa munacita nchito zonsezi, ati Yehova, ndipo ndinanena kwa inu, ndi kuuka mamawa ndi kunena, koma simunamva; ndipo ndinakuitanani inu, koma simunayankha;" 
Jeremiah7:14 cifukwa cace ndidzaicitira nyumba iyi, imene ichedwa dzina langa, imene mukhulupirirayi, ndipo ndidzacitira malo amene ndinakupatsani inu ndi makolo anu, monga ndinacitira Silo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Ndipo ndidzakucotsani inu pamaso panga, monga ndinacotsa abale anu onse, mbeu zonse za Efraimu." 
Jeremiah7:16 Cifukwa cace iwe usapempherere anthu awa, usawakwezere iwo mpfuu kapena pemphero, usandipembedze; pakuti Ine sindidzakumvera iwe." 
Jeremiah7:17 Kodi suona iwe cimene acicita m'midzi ya Yuda ndi m'miseu ya Yerusalemu? 
Jeremiah7:18 Ana atola nkhuni, atate akoleza moto, akazi akanyanga ufa, kuti aumbe mikate ya mfumu yaikazi ya kumwamba, athirire milungu yina nsembe yothira, kuti autse mkwiyo wanga." 
Jeremiah7:19 Kodi autsa mkwiyo wanga? ati Yehova; kodi sadziutsira okha manyazi a nkhope zao? 
Jeremiah7:20 Cifukwa cace, ati Ambuye Mulungu, Taonani, mkwiyo wanga ndi ukali wanga udzathiridwa pa malo ano, pa anthu, ndi pa nyama, ndi pa mitengo ya m'munda, ndi pa zipatso zapansi; ndipo udzatentha osazima." 
Jeremiah7:21 Atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli; Ikani zopereka zopsereza zanu pa nsembe zophera zanu, nimudye nyama." 
Jeremiah7:22 Pakuti sindinanena kwa makolo anu, tsiku lija ndinawaturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto, ngakhale kuwauza nsembe zopsereza kapena zophera;" 
Jeremiah7:23 koma cinthu ici ndinawauza, kuti, Mverani mau anga, ndipo ndidzakhala Mulungu wanu, ndipo inu mudzakhala anthu anga; nimuyende m'njira yonse imene ndakuuzani inu, kuti cikukomereni." 
Jeremiah7:24 Koma sanamvera, sanachera khutu, koma anayenda m'upo ndi m'kuuma kwa mtima wao woipa, nabwerera cambuyo osayenda m'tsogolo." 
Jeremiah7:25 Ciyambire tsiku limene makolo anu anaturuka m'dziko la Aigupto kufikira lero lino, ndatumiza kwa inu atumiki anga onse, aneneri, tsiku ndi tsiku, kuuka mamawa ndi kuwatumiza iwo;" 
Jeremiah7:26 koma sanandimvera Ine, sanacherakhutu lao, koma anaumitsa khosi lao; anaipa koposa makolo ao." 
Jeremiah7:27 Ndipo uzinena kwa iwo mau awa onse, koma sadzakumvera iwe; ndipo udzawaitananso; koma sadzakuyankha iwe." 
Jeremiah7:28 Ndipo udzati kwa iwo, Umene ndi mtundu wosamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wao, wosalola kulangizidwa, coonadi catha, cadulidwa pakamwa pao." 
Jeremiah7:29 Senga tsitsi lako, iwe Yerusalemu, nulitaye, nukweze maliro pa mapiri oti se; pakuti Yehova wakana ndi kusiya mbadwo umene aukwiyira." 
Jeremiah7:30 Pakuti ana a Yuda anacita coipa pamaso panga, ati Yehova; naika zonyansa zao m'nyumba yochedwa dzina langa, kuti alipitse." 
Jeremiah7:31 Namanga akacisi a ku Tofeti, kuli m'cigwa ca mwana wa Hinomu, kuti atenthe m'moto ana ao amuna ndi akazi; cimene sindinauza iwo, sicinalowa m'mtima mwanga." 
Jeremiah7:32 Cifukwa cace, taonani, masiku alikudza, ati Yehova, ndipo sadzachedwanso Tofeti, kapena Cigwa ca mwana wa Hinomu, koma Cigwa ca Kuphera; pakuti adzataya m'Tofeti, kufikira malo akuikamo adzasowa." 
Jeremiah7:33 Ndipo mitembo ya anthu awa idzakhala zakudya za mbalame za mlengalenga, ndi za zirombo za dziko lapansi; palibe amene adzaziopsa." 
Jeremiah7:34 Ndipo ndidzaletsa m'midzi ya Yuda, ndi m'miseu ya Yerusalemu, mau akukondwa ndi mau akusekera, ndi mau a mkwati ndi mau a mkwatibwi; pakuti dziko lidzasanduka bwinja." 
Jeremiah8:1 Nthawi yomweyo, ati Yehova, adzaturutsa m'manda mwao mafupa a mafumu a Yuda, ndi mafupa a akuru ace, ndi mafupa a ansembe, ndi mafupa a aneneri, ndi mafupa a okhala m'Yerusalemu," 
Jeremiah8:2 ndipo udzawayanika padzuwa, ndi pamwezi, ndi pa khamu lonse la kuthambo, limene analikonda, ndi kulitumikira, ndi kulitsata, ndi kulifuna, ndi kuligwadira; sadzasonkhanidwa, sadzaikidwa; adzakhala ndowe panthaka." 
Jeremiah8:3 Ndipo otsala onse amene akutsala pa banja loipa ili adzasankha imfa koposa moyo, ndiwo amene atsala m'malo monse m'mene ndinawaingiramo, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Jeremiah8:4 Ndiponso udzati kwa iwo, Atero Yehova, Kodi adzagwa, osaukanso? Kodi wina adzacoka, osabweranso?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Bwanji abwerera anthu awa a Yerusalemu cibwererere? agwiritsa cinyengo, akana kubwera." 
Jeremiah8:6 Ndinachera khutu, ndinamva koma sananena bwino; panalibe munthu amene anatembenuka kusiya zoipa zace, ndi kuti, Ndacita ciani? yense anatembenukira njira yace, monga akavalo athamangira m'nkhondo." 
Jeremiah8:7 Inde, cumba ca mlengalenga cidziwa nyengo zace; ndipo njiwa ndi namzeze ndi cingaru ziyang'anira nyengo yakufika kwao; koma anthu anga sadziwa ciweruziro ca Yehova." 
Jeremiah8:8 Bwanji muti, Tiri ndi nzeru ife, ndi malamulo a Yehova ali ndi ife? Koma, taona, peni lonyenga la alembi lacita zonyenga," 
Jeremiah8:9 Anzeru ali ndi manyazi, athedwa nzeru nagwidwa; taonani, akana mau a Yehova; ali nayo nzeru yotani?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Cifukwa cace ndidzapereka akazi ao kwa ena, ndi minda yao kwa iwo adzalowamo; pakuti onse kuyambira wamng'ono kufikira wamkuru asirirasirira; kuyambira mneneri kufikira wansembe onse acita zonyenga." 
Jeremiah8:11 Ndipo analipoletsa pang'ono bala la mwana wamkazi wa anthu anga, ndi kuti, Mtendere, mtendere; posakhala mtendere." 
Jeremiah8:12 Kodi anakhala ndi manyazi pamene anacita zonyansa? iai, sanakhala ndi manyazi, sananyala; cifukwa cace adzagwa mwa iwo amene akugwa, nthawi ya kuyang'aniridwa kwao adzagwetsedwa, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah8:13 Kuwatha ndidzawathetsa iwo, ati Yehova, sipadzakhala mphesa pampesa, kapena nkhuyu pamkuyu, ndipo tsamba lidzafota, ndipo zinthu ndinawapatsa zidzawacokera." 
Jeremiah8:14 Tikhaliranji ife? tasonkhanani, tilowe m'midzi yamalinga, tikhale cete m'menemo; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wathu watikhalitsa ife cete, natipatsa ife madzi a ndulu timwe, pakuti tamcimwira Yehova." 
Jeremiah8:15 Tinayang'anira mtendere, koma panalibe zabwino; ndi nthawi ya moyo, ndipo taona kuopsedwa!" 
Jeremiah8:16 Kumina kwa akavalo ace kunamveka ku Dani; dziko lonse linanthunthumira pa kulira kwa akavalo acewo olimba; cifukwa afika, nadya dziko ndi zonse za momwemo; mudzi ndi amene akhalamo." 
Jeremiah8:17 Pakuti, taonani, ndidzatumiza pa inu njoka, mphiri, zosalola kuitanidwa; ndipo zidzakulumani inu, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah8:18 Ha, ndikadatonthoza mtima wanga kuletsa cisoni cace! mtima wanga walefuka m'kati mwa ine." 
Jeremiah8:19 Taonani, mau a kulira kwa mwana wamkazi wa anthu anga ocokera ku dziko lakutari: Kodi m'Ziyoni mulibe Yehova? Kodi mulibe Mfumu yace? Cifukwa canji andiputa Ine ndi mafano ao osema, ndi zacabe zacilendo?" 
Jeremiah8:20 Masika apita, mphakasa yatha, ndipo ife sitinapulumutsidwe." 
Jeremiah8:21 Bala la mwana wamkazi wa anthu anga ndaphwetekwa nalo; ndada mtima; kudabwa kwandigwira. 
Jeremiah8:22 Kodi mulibe bvunguti m'Gileadi? Kodi mulibe sing'anga m'menemo; analekeranji kucira mwana wamkazi wa anthu anga? 
Jeremiah9:1 Ha, mutu wanga ukadakhala madzi, ndi maso anga kasupe wa misozi, kuti usana ndi usiku ndilirire ophedwa a mwana wamkazi wa anthu anga!" 
Jeremiah9:2 Ha, ndikadakhala ndi cigono ca anthu aulendo m'cipululu; kuti ndisiye anthu anga, ndiwacokere, pakuti onse ali acigololo msonkhano wa anthu aciwembu." 
Jeremiah9:3 Ndipo apinda lilime lao ngati uta wao, liname; koma akula mphamvu m'dzikomo, koma si pacoonadi; pakuti alinkunkabe nacita zoipa, ndipo sandidziwa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah9:4 Mucenjere naye yense mnansi wace, musakhulupirire yense mbale wace; pakuti abale onse amanyenga, ndipo anansi onse adzayenda ndi maugogodi." 
Jeremiah9:5 Ndipo yense adzanyenga mnansi wace, osanena coonadi; aphunzitsa lilime lao kunena zonama; nadzithodwetsa kucita zoipa." 
Jeremiah9:6 Ukhala pakati pa manyengo m'manyengo; akana kundidziwa, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah9:7 Cifukwa cace atero Yehova wa makamu, Taonani, ndidzawasungunula, ndi kuwayesa, pakuti ndidzacitanji, cifukwa ca mwana wamkazi wa anthu anga?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Lilime lao ndi mubvi wakuphera; linena manyengo; wina anena mtendere ndi mnansi wace pakamwa pace, koma m'mtima mwace amlalira." 
Jeremiah9:9 Kodi sindidzawalanga cifukwa ca izi? ati Yehova; kodi moyo wanga sudzabwezera cilango mtundu wotere? 
Jeremiah9:10 Cifukwa ca mapiri ndidzagwa misozi ndi kulira, cifukwa ca mabusa a cipululu ndidzacita maliro, cifukwa apserera, kuti anthu sangathe kupitirirapo; ndiponso anthu sangathe kumva mau a ng'ombe zao; mbalame za mlengalenga ndi nyama zathawa, zapita." 
Jeremiah9:11 Ndipo ndidzayesa Yerusalemu miyulu, mbuto ya ankhandwe; ndipo ndidzayesa midzi ya Yuda bwinja, lopanda wokhalamo." 
Jeremiah9:12 Wanzeru ndani, kuti adziwe ici? ndani iye amene kamwa la Yehova lanena naye, kuti acilalikire? cifukwa cace dziko litha ndi kupserera monga cipululu, kuti anthu asapitemo?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Ndipo Yehova ati, Cifukwa asiya cilamulo canga ndinaciika pamaso pao, ndipo sanamvera mau anga, osayenda m'menemo;" 
Jeremiah9:14 koma anatsata kuuma kwa mtima wao, ndi Baala, monga makolo ao anawaphunzitsa;" 
Jeremiah9:15 cifukwa cace atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli, Taonani, ndidzadyetsa anthu awa civumulo, ndi kuwamwetsa madzi andulu." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ndidzawabalalitsanso mwa amitundu, amene iwo kapena makolo ao sanawadziwa; ndipo ndidzatumiza lupanga, liwatsate mpaka ndawatha." 
Jeremiah9:17 Atero Yehova wa makamu, Kumbukirani inu, ndi kuitana akazi akulira, adze; aitaneni akazi ocenjera, kuti adze;" 
Jeremiah9:18 afulumire, atikwezere ife mau a maliro, kuti maso athu agwe misozi, ndi zikope zathu ziyendetse madzi." 
Jeremiah9:19 Pakuti mau a kulira amveka m'Ziyoni, Tafunkhidwa, tanyazitsidwa, pakuti tasiya dziko, pakuti agwetsa zokhalamo zathu." 
Jeremiah9:20 Koma imvani mau a Yehova, akazi inu, khutu lanu lilandire mau a pakamwa pace, phunzitsani ana anu akazi kulira, ndi yense aphunzitse mnzace maliridwe ace." 
Jeremiah9:21 Pakuti imfa yakwera m'mazenera athu, yalowa m'nyumba mwathu; kucotsa ana kubwalo, ndi: anyamata kumiseu." 
Jeremiah9:22 Nenani, atero Yehova, Mitembo yathu idzagwa ngati ndowe pamunda, ndi monga cipukutu pambuyo pa wakusenga, palibe wocitola." 
Jeremiah9:23 Atero Yehova, wanzeru asadzitamandire m'nzeru zace, wamphamvu asadzitamandire m'mphamvu yace, wacuma asadzitamandire m'cuma cace;" 
Jeremiah9:24 koma wakudzitamandira adzitamandire adzikweze umo, kuti ali wakuzindikira, ndi kundidziwa Ine, kuti ndine Yehova wakucita zokoma mtima, ciweruziro, ndi cilungamo m'dziko lapansi, pakuti m'menemo ndikondwerera, ati. Yehova." 
Jeremiah9:25 Taonani, masiku alikudza, ati Yehova, kuti ndidzalanga onse odulidwa m'kusadulidwa kwao;" 
Jeremiah9:26 Aigupto, ndi Yuda, ndi Edomu, ndi ana a Amoni, ndi a Moabu, ndi onse ometa m'mphepete mwa tsitsi lao, okhala m'cipululu; pakuti amitundu onse ali osadulidwa, ndi nyumba ya Israyeli iri Yosadulidwa m'mtima." 
Jeremiah10:1 Tamvani mau amene Yehova anena kwa inu, nyumba ya Israyeli;" 
Jeremiah10:2 atero Yehova, a Musaphunzire njira ya amitundu, musaope zizindikiro za m'thambo; pakuti amitundu aziopa izo." 
Jeremiah10:3 Pakuti miyambo ya anthu iri yacabe, pakuti wina adula mtengo m'nkhalango, nchito ya manja a mmisiri ndinkhwangwa." 
Jeremiah10:4 Aukometsa ndi siliva ndi golidi; aucirikiza ndi misomali ndi nyundo, kuti usasunthike." 
Jeremiah10:5 Mafanowa akunga mtengo wakanjedza, wosemasema, koma osalankhula; ayenera awanyamule, pakuti sangathe kuyenda. Musawaope; pakuti sangathe kucita coipa, mulibenso mwa iwo kucita cabwino." 
Jeremiah10:6 Cifukwa palibe akunga Inu, Yehova; muli wamkuru, ndipo dzina lanu liri lalikuru ndi lamphamvu," 
Jeremiah10:7 Wosaopa Inu ndani, Mfumu ya amitundu? pakuti kukuopani ndi kwanu; pakuti mwa anzeru onse a amitundu, ndi m'maufumu ao onse, mulibe akunga Inu." 
Jeremiah10:8 Koma onse pamodzi apulukira ndi kupusa; mtengo ndiwo cilangizo, copanda pace." 
Jeremiah10:9 Abwera ndi siliva wa ku Tarisi, wosulasula wopyapyala ndi golidi wa ku Ufazi, nchito ya mmisiri ndi manja a woyenga; zobvala zao ndi nsaru ya madzi ndi yofiirira; zonsezi ndi nci ito za muomba." 
Jeremiah10:10 Koma Yehova ndiye Mulungu woona; ndiye Mulungu wamoyo, mfumu yamuyaya; pa mkwiyo wace dziko lapansi lidzanthunthumira, ndi amitundu sangapirire ukali wace." 
Jeremiah10:11 Muzitero nao, milungu imene sinalenga miyamba ndi dziko lapansi, iyo idzatha ku dziko lapansi, ndi pansi pa miyambayo." 
Jeremiah10:12 Iye analenga dziko lapansi ndi mphamvu yace, nakhazikitsa dziko lapansi ndi nzeru yace, nayala thambo ndi kuzindikira kwace;" 
Jeremiah10:13 polankhula Iye, pali unyinji wa madzi m'mwamba, ndipo akweretsa nkhungu ku malekezero a dziko lapansi, alenga mphezi idzetse mvula, naturutsa mphepo m'zosungira zace." 
Jeremiah10:14 Anthu onse ali opulukira ndi opanda nzeru; woyenga yense anyazitsidwa ndi fanizo lace losemasema; pakuti fanizo lace loyenga liri bodza, mulibe mpweya mwa iwo." 
Jeremiah10:15 Ndiwo cabe, ndiwo ciphamaso; pa nthawi ya kulangidwa kwao adzatha." 
Jeremiah10:16 Gawo la Yakobo silifanana ndi iwo; pakuti iye ndiye analenga zonse; Israyeli ndiye mtundu wa colowa cace; dzina lace ndi Yehova wa makamu. 
Jeremiah10:17 Nyamula katundu wako, iwe wokhala m'linga." 
Jeremiah10:18 Pakuti atero Yehova, Taonani, ndidzaponya kunja okhala m'dziko ili tsopanoli, ndi kuwasautsa, kuti azindikire." 
Jeremiah10:19 Tsoka ine, ndalaswa! bala langa lindipweteka; koma ine ndinati, Ndithu bvuto langa ndi ili, ndipirire nalo." 
Jeremiah10:20 Hema wanga waonongeka, zingwe zanga zonse zaduka; ana anga aturuka mwa ine, palibe iwo; palibenso amene adzamanga hema wanga, kapena kucinga nsaru zanga," 
Jeremiah10:21 Pakuti abusa apulukira, sanafunsire kwa Yehova; cifukwa cace sanapindula; zoweta zao zonse zabalalika." 
Jeremiah10:22 Mbiri yamveka, taonani ikudza, ndi phokoso lalikuru lituruka m'dziko la kumpoto, likacititse midzi ya Yuda bwinja, ndi mbuto ya nkhandwe." 
Jeremiah10:23 Inu Yehova, ndidziwa kuti njira ya munthu siri mwa iye mwini; sikuli kwa munthu woyenda kulongosola mapazi ace." 
Jeremiah10:24 Yehova, mundilangize, koma ndi ciweruzo; si m'mkwiyo wanu, mungandithe psiti." 
Jeremiah10:25 Tsanulirani ukali wanu pa amitundu osakudziwani Inu, ndi pa mabanja osaitana dzina lanu; pakuti anadya Yakobo, inde, anamudya namutha, napasula mokhalamo mwace." 
Jeremiah11:1 Mau amene anadza kwa Yeremiya kucokera kwa Yehova, kuti," 
Jeremiah11:2 Imvani mau a pangano ili, nenani kwa anthu a Yuda, ndi anthu a Yerusalemu;" 
Jeremiah11:3 ndi kunena kwa iwo, Atero Yehova, Mulungu wa Aisrayeli: Wotembereredwa ndi munthu wosamvera mau a pangano ili," 
Jeremiah11:4 limene ndinauza makolo anu tsiku lomwe ndinawaturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto, m'ng'anjo ya citsulo, kuti, Mverani mau anga, ndi kuwacita, monga mwa zonse zimene ndikuuzani inu; ndipo mudzakhala anthu anga, ndipo Ine ndidzakhala Mulungu wanu;" 
Jeremiah11:5 kuti ndikalimbikitse lumbiro limene ndinalumbirira makolo anu, ndiwapatse dziko mayenda mkaka ndi uci, monga lero lomwe. Ndipo ndinayankha, ndi kuti, Amen, Yehova." 
Jeremiah11:6 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Lalikira mau onsewa m'midzi ya Yuda, ndi m'miseu ya Yerusalemu, kuti, Tamvani mau a pangano ili, ndi kuwacita." 
Jeremiah11:7 Pakuti ndinatsimikizitsa kwa atate anu tsiku lomwe ndinawaturutsa iwo ku dziko la Aigupto, mpaka lero lomwe, kuuka mamawa ndi kutsimikiza, kuti, Mverani mau anga." 
Jeremiah11:8 Koma sanamvera, sanachera khutu lao, koma onse anayenda m'kuumirira kwa mtima wao woipa; cifukwa cace ndinatengera iwo mau onse a pangano ili, limene ndinauza iwo kuti acite, koma sanacita." 
Jeremiah11:9 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Ciwembu caoneka mwa anthu a Yuda, ndi mwa anthu okhala m'Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah11:10 Abwerera kucitanso zoipa za makolo ao, amene anakana kumva mau anga; ndipo atsata milungu yina kuti aitumikire; nyumba ya Israyeli ndi nyumba ya Yuda zaswa pangano langa limene ndinapangana ndi makolo ao." 
Jeremiah11:11 Cifukwa cace atero Yehova, Taonani, ndidzatengera pa iwo coipa, cimene sangathe kucipulumuka; ndipo adzandipfuulira Ine, koma sindidzamvera iwo." 
Jeremiah11:12 Ndipo midzi ya Yuda ndi okhala m'Yerusalemu adzapita nadzapfuulira kwa milungu imene anaifukizira; koma siidzawapulumutsa konse nthawi ya nsautso yao. 
Jeremiah11:13 Pakuti milungu yako ilingana ndi kucuruka kwa midzi yako, iwe Yuda; ndi maguwa a nsembe amene mwautsira camanyazi, alingana ndi kucuruka kwa miseu ya Yerusalemu, ndiwo maguwa akufukizirapo Baala." 
Jeremiah11:14 Cifukwa cace usawapempherere anthu awa, usawakwezere iwo mfuu, kapena pemphero, pakuti sindidzamva iwo nthawi imene andipfuulira Ine m'kusaukakwao." 
Jeremiah11:15 Wokondedwa wanga afunanji m'nyumba mwanga, popeza wacita coipa ndi ambiri, ndipo thupi lopatulika lakucokera iwe? pamene ucita coipa ukondwera naco." 
Jeremiah11:16 Yehova anacha dzina lako, Mtengo waazitona wauwisi, wokoma wa zipatso zabwino; ndi mau a phokoso lalikuru wayatsa moto pamenepo, ndipo nthambi zace zatyoka." 
Jeremiah11:17 Pakuti Yehova wa makamu, amene anakuoka iwe, wakunenera iwe coipa, cifukwa ca zoipa za nyumba ya Israyeli ndi nyumba ya Yuda, zimene anadzicitira okha pakuutsa mkwiyo wanga m'mene anafukizira Baala." 
Jeremiah11:18 Ndipo Yehova anandidziwitsa, ndipo ndinadziwa; ndipo wandisonyeza ine macitidwe ao." 
Jeremiah11:19 Koma ine ndinanga mwana wa nkhosa wofatsa wotengedwa kukaphedwa; ndipo sindinadziwa kuti anandicitira ine ciwembu, kuti, Tiononge mtengo ndi zipatso zace, timdule iye pa dziko la amoyo, kuti dzina lace lisakumbukikenso." 
Jeremiah11:20 Koma, Yehova wa makamu, amene aweruza molungama, pamene ayesa imso ndi mtima, ndikuoneni Inu mulikuwabwezera cilango, pakuti kwa Inu ndaulula mlandu wanga." 
Jeremiah11:21 Cifukwa cace atero Yehova za anthu a Anatoti, amene afuna moyo wanga, kuti, Usanenere m'dzina la Yehova, ungafe ndi mkono wathu;" 
Jeremiah11:22 cifukwa cace atero Yehova wa makamu, Taonani, ndidzalanga iwo; anyamata adzafa ndi lupanga; ana ao amuna ndi akazi adzafa ndi njala;" 
Jeremiah11:23 ndipo sadzakhala nao otsalira; pakuti ndidzatengera coipa pa anthu a ku Anatoti, caka ca kulangidwa kwao." 
Jeremiah12:1 Wolungama ndinu, Yehova, pamene nditsutsana nanu mlandu; pokhapo ndinenane nanu za maweruzo; cifukwa canji ipindula njira ya oipa? cifukwa canji akhala bwino onyengetsa?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Inu mwabzyala iwo, inde, anagwiritsatu mizu; amera, inde, abalatu zipatso; muli pafupi m'kamwa mwao, muli patari ndi imso zao." 
Jeremiah12:3 Koma inu, Yehova, mundidziwa ine; mundiona ine, muyesa mtima wanga ngati utani nanu; muwaturutse iwo monga nkhosa za kuphedwa, ndi kuwakonzeratu tsiku lakuphedwa." 
Jeremiah12:4 Dziko lidzalira masiku angati, nilifota therere la minda yonse? cifukwa ca zoipa za iwo okhalamo, zithedwa zinyama, ndi mbalame; pakuti iwo anati, Iye sadzaona citsiriziro cathu." 
Jeremiah12:5 Ngati wathamanga pamodzi ndi oyenda pansi, ndipo iwo anakulemetsa iwe, udzayesana nao akavalo bwanji? ndipo ngakhale ukhazikika m'dziko lamtendere, udzacita ciani m'kudzikuza kwa Yordano?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Pakuti ngakhale abale ako, ndi nyumba ya atate wako, ngakhale iwo anakunyenga iwe; ngakhale anakupfuulira iwe; usamvere iwo, ngakhale anena nawe mau abwino." 
Jeremiah12:7 Ndacokaku nyumba yanga, ndasiya colowa canga; ndapereka wokondedwa wa mtima wanga m'dzanja la adani." 
Jeremiah12:8 Colowa canga candisandukira mkango wa m'nkhalango; anatsutsana nane ndi mau ace; cifukwa cace ndinamuda. 
Jeremiah12:9 Colowa canga ciri kwa ine ngati mbalame yamawala-mawala yolusa? kodi mbalame zolusa zimzinga ndi kudana naye? mukani, musonkhanitse zirombo za m'thengo, mudze nazo zidye." 
Jeremiah12:10 Abusa ambiri aononga munda wanga wamphesa, apondereza gawo langa, pondikondweretsa apayesa cipululu copanda kanthu." 
Jeremiah12:11 Apayesa bwinja; pandilirira ine, pokhala bwinja; dziko lonse lasanduka bwinja; cifukwa palibe munthu wosamalira." 
Jeremiah12:12 Akufunkha afika pa mapiri oti se m'cipululu; pakuti lupanga la Yehova lilusa kuyambira pa mbali yina ya dziko kufikira ku mbali yina; palibe thupi lokhala ndi mtendere. 
Jeremiah12:13 Abzyala tirigu, asenga minga; adzipweteka, koma osapindula kanthu, mudzakhala ndi manyazi a zipatso zanu, cifukwa ca mkwiyo woopsya wa Yehova." 
Jeremiah12:14 Atero Yehova ponenera anansi anga onse oipa, amene akhudza colowa cimene ndalowetsamo anthu anga Israyeli; taonani, ndidzazula iwo m'dziko lao, ndipo ndidzazula nyumba ya Yuda pakati pao." 
Jeremiah12:15 Ndipo padzakhala kuti nditazula iwo, ndidzabwera, ndipo ndidzawacitira cisoni; ndipo ndidzabwezanso iwo, yense ku colowa cace, ndi yense ku dziko lace." 
Jeremiah12:16 Ndipo padzakhala kuti, ngati iwo adzaphunzira mwakhama njira za anthu anga, kulumbira ndi dzina langa, Pali Yehova; monga anaphunzitsa anthu anga kulumbira pali Baala; pamenepo ndidzamangitsa mudzi wao pakati pa anthu anga." 
Jeremiah12:17 Koma ngati sakumva, ndidzazula mtundu umene wa anthu, kuuzula ndi kuuononga, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah13:1 Atero Yehova kwa ine, Pita, udzigulire mpango wabafuta, nudzimangire m'cuuno mwako, usauike m'madzi." 
Jeremiah13:2 Ndipo ndinagula mpango monga mwa mau a Yehova, ndi kubvala m'cuuno mwanga." 
Jeremiah13:3 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa ine nthawi yaciwiri, kuti," 
Jeremiah13:4 Tenga mpango umene unaugula, umene uli m'cuuno mwako, nuuke, nupite ku Firate, nuubise m'menemo m'phanga la m'mwala." 
Jeremiah13:5 Ndipo ndinapita, ndinaubisa pa Firate, monga Yehova anandiuza ine." 
Jeremiah13:6 Ndipo panali atapita masiku ambiri, kuti Yehova anati kwa ine, Uka, pita ku Firate, nukatenge kumeneko mpango uja, ndinakuuza iwe ukaubise kumeneko." 
Jeremiah13:7 Ndipo ndinanka ku Firate, ndikumba, nditenga mpango m'malo m'mene ndinaubisamo; ndipo, taonani, mpango unaonongeka, wosayenera kanthu." 
Jeremiah13:8 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa ine, kuti," 
Jeremiah13:9 Yehova atero, Momwemo ndidzaononga kudzitama kwa Yuda, ndi kudzitama kwakukuru kwa Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah13:10 Anthu oipa awa, amene akana kumva mau anga, amene ayenda m'kuumirira kwa mtima wao, atsata milungu yina kuitumikira, ndi kuigwadira, adzakhala ngati mpango uwu, wosayenera kanthu." 
Jeremiah13:11 Pakuti monga mpango uthina m'cuuno ca munthu, comweco ndinathinitsa kwa Ine nyumba yonse ya Israyeli ndi nyumba yonse ya Yuda, ati Yehova, kuti akhale kwa Ine anthu, ndi dzina, ndi cilemekezo, ndi ulemerero; koma anakana kumva." 
Jeremiah13:12 Cifukwa cace uzinena ndi iwo mau awa: Atero Yehova, Mulungu wa Israyeli, Matumba onse adzadzazidwa ndi vinyo; ndipo adzati kwa iwe, Kodi sitidziwitsa bwino kuti matumba onse adzadzazidwa ndi vinyo?" 
Jeremiah13:13 Ndipo udzati kwa iwo, Atero Yehova, Taonani, ndidzadzaza ndi ciledzero onse okhala m'dziko muno, ngakhale mafumu onse amene akhala pa mpando wacifumu wa Davide, ndi ansembe, ndi aneneri, ndi onse okhala m'Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah13:14 Ndipo ndidzaphwanyanitsa wina ndi wina, atate ndi ana, ati Yehova; sindidzakhala ndi cisoni, sindidzapulumutsa, sindidzakhala ndi cifundo, cakuti ndisawaononge." 
Jeremiah13:15 Tamvani inu, Cherani khutu; musanyade, pakuti Yehova wanena." 
Jeremiah13:16 Lemekezani Yehova Mulungu wanu, kusanade, mapazi anu asanakhumudwe pa mapiri acizirezire; nimusanayembekeze kuunika, Ive asanasandutse kuunikaku mthunzi wa imfa, ndi kukuyesa mdima wa bii." 
Jeremiah13:17 Koma ngati simudzamva, moyo wanga udzalira m'tseri cifukwa ca kunyada kwanu; diso langa lidzalira kwambiri, lidzagwa misozi, cifukwa zoweta za Yehova zagwidwa m'nsinga." 
Jeremiah13:18 Nenani kwa mfumu ndi kwa amace wa mfumu, Dzicepetseni, khalani pansi; pakuti zapamtu zanu zagwa, korona wanu wokoma." 
Jeremiah13:19 Midzi ya ku Mwera yatsekedwa, palibe wotsegulira. Yuda wonse wacotsedwa m'ndende wonsewo, wacotsedwa m'nsinga." 
Jeremiah13:20 Tukulani maso anu, taonani iwo amene acokera kumpoto; ziri kuti zoweta zinapatsidwa kwa iwe, zoweta zako zokoma?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Udzanena ciani pamene adzaika abale ako akuru ako, pakuti iwe wekha wawalangiza iwo akukana iwe? kodi zowawa sizidzakugwira iwe monga mkazi wobala?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Ndipo ngati udzati m'mtima mwako, Zimenezi zandifikira ine cifukwa ninji? Cifukwa ca coipa cako cacikuru nsaru zako zoyesa mfula zasanduka mbudulira, ndi zithende zako zaphwetekwa." 
Jeremiah13:23 Kodi angathe Mkusi kusanduliza khungu lace, kapena nyalugwe maanga ace? pamenepo mungathe inunso kucita zabwino, inu amene muzolowera kucita zoipa," 
Jeremiah13:24 Cifukwa cace ndidzabalalitsa iwo, monga ziputu zakupita, ndi mphepo ya kucipululu." 
Jeremiah13:25 Ici ndi cagwera cako, gawo la muyeso wako wa kwa Ine, ati Yehova; cifukwa wandiiwala Ine, ndi kukhulupirira zonama." 
Jeremiah13:26 Cifukwa cace Ine ndidzaonetsa zotopola mikawo zako, pamaso pako, ndipo manyazi ako adzaoneka." 
Jeremiah13:27 Ndaona zonyansa zako, ndi zigololo zako, ndi zakumemesa zako, ndi cinyerinyeri ca dama lako, pamapiri ndi m'munda. Tsoka kwa iwe, Yerusalemu! Sudzayeretsedwa; kodi zidzatero mpaka liti?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Mau a Yehova amene anadza kwa Yeremiya onena za cirala. 
Jeremiah14:2 Yuda alira, ndipo zipata zace zilefuka, zikhala pansi zobvekedwa ndi zakuda; mpfuu wa Yerusalemu wakwera." 
Jeremiah14:3 Akuru ao atuma ang'ono ao kumadzi; afika kumaenje, osapeza madzi; abwera ndi mitsuko yao yopanda kanthu; ali ndi manyazi, athedwa nzeru, apfunda mitu yao." 
Jeremiah14:4 Cifukwa ca nthaka yocita ming'aru, pakuti panalibe mvula padziko, olima ali ndi manyazi, apfunda mitu yao." 
Jeremiah14:5 Inde, nswalanso ya m'thengo ibala nisiya ana ace, cifukwa mulibe maudzu." 
Jeremiah14:6 Mbidzi zinaima pamapiri oti se, zipumira mphepo wefuwefu ngati ankhandwe; maso ao alema, cifukwa palibe maudzu." 
Jeremiah14:7 Zingakhale zoipa zathu zititsutsa ife, citani Inu cifukwa ca dzina lanu, Yehova; pakuti zobwerera zathu zacuruka; takucimwirani Inu." 
Jeremiah14:8 Inu, ciyembekezo ca Israyeli, mpulumutsi wace nthawi ya msauko, bwanji mukhala ngati mlendo m'dziko, ngati woyendayenda amene apatuka usiku?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Bwanji mukhala ngati munthu wodabwa, ngati munthu wamphamvu wosatha kupulumutsa? koma Inu, Yehova, muli pakati pathu, tichedwa ndi dzina lanu; musatisiye." 
Jeremiah14:10 Atero Yehova kwa anthu awa, Comwecoakonda kusocerera; sanakaniza mapazi ao; cifukwa cace. Yehova sawalandira; tsopano adzakumbukira coipa cao, nadzalanga zocimwa zao." 
Jeremiah14:11 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Usapempherere anthu awa zabwino." 
Jeremiah14:12 Pamene asala cakudya, sindidzamva kupfuula kwao; ndipo pamene apereka nsembe yopsereza, ndi nsembe yaufa sindidzawalandira; koma ndidzawatha ndi lupanga, ndi cirala, ndi caola." 
Jeremiah14:13 Ndipo ndinati, Ha, Ambuye Yehova! taonani, aneneri ati kwa iwo, Simudzaona lupanga, simudzakhala ndi cirala; koma ndidzakupatsani mtendere weniweni mommuno." 
Jeremiah14:14 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Aneneri anenera zonama m'dzina langa; sindinatuma iwo, sindinauza iwo, sindinanena nao; anenera kwa inu masomphenya onama, ndi ula, ndi cinthu cacabe, ndi cinyengo ca mtima wao." 
Jeremiah14:15 Cifukwa cace atero Yehova za aneneri onenera m'dzina langa, ndipo sindinawatuma, koma ati, Lupanga ndi cirala sizidzakhala m'dziko muno; ndi lupanga ndi cirala aneneriwo adzathedwa." 
Jeremiah14:16 Ndipo anthu amene adzanenera kwa inu adzaponyedwa kunja m'miseu ya Yerusalemu cifukwa ca cirala ndi lupanga; ndipo adzasowa akuwaika, ndi akazi ao, ndi ana ao amuna ndi akazi; ndipo ndidzatsanulira pa iwo zoipa zao." 
Jeremiah14:17 Ndipo udzati kwa iwo mau awa, Maso anga agwe misozi usana ndi usiku, asaleke; pakuti namwali mwana wa anthu anga wasweka ndi kusweka kwakukuru, ndi bala lopweteka kwambiri." 
Jeremiah14:18 Ndikaturukira kumunda, taonani ophedwa ndi lupanga! ndikalowa m'mudzi, taonani odwala ndi njala pakuti mneneri ndi wansembe ayendayenda m'dziko osadziwa kanthu." 
Jeremiah14:19 Kodi mwakanadi Yuda? kodi mtima wanu wanyansidwa ndi Ziyoni? bwanji mwatipanda ife, ndipo tiribe kucira? Tinayembekeza mtendere, koma sizinafike zabwino; tinayembekeza nthawi yakucira, ndipo taonani mantha!" 
Jeremiah14:20 Tibvomereza, Yehova, cisalungamo cathu, ndi coipa ca makolo athu; pakuti takucimwirani Inu." 
Jeremiah14:21 Musatinyoze ife, cifukwa ca dzina lanu; musanyazitse mpando wacifumu wa ulemerero wanu; mukumbukire musasiye pangano lanu lopangana ndi ife." 
Jeremiah14:22 Mwa zacabe za mitundu ya anthu ziripo kodi, zimene zingathe kubvumbitsa mvula? Kodi si ndinu, Yehova, Mulungu wathu? ndipo tidzakudikirani Inu; pakuti munalenga zonse zimenezi." 
Jeremiah15:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Ngakhale Mose ndi Samueli akadaima pamaso panga, koma mtima wanga sukadasamalira anthu awa; muwacotse iwo pamaso panga, aturuke." 
Jeremiah15:2 Ndipo padzakhala, pamene adzati kwa iwe, Titurukire kuti? pamenepo uziti, Atero Yehova: Amene a kuimfa, anke kuimfa; amene a kulupanga, anke kulupanga; amene a kunjala, anke kunjala; ndi amene a kunsinga, anke kunsinga." 
Jeremiah15:3 Ndipo ndidzaika pa iwo mitundu inai, ati Yehova, lupanga lakupha, agaru akung'amba, mbalame za m'mlengalenga, ndi zirombo zapansi, zakulusa ndi kuononga." 
Jeremiah15:4 Ndipo ndidzawapereka akhale oopsetsa m'maufumu onse a dziko lapansi, cifukwa ca Manase mwana wa Hezekiya mfumu ya Yuda, cifukwa ca zija anacita m'Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah15:5 Pakuti ndani adzakucitira iwe cisoni, Yerusalemu? ndani adzakulirira iwe? ndani adzapatukira kudzafunsa za mkhalidwe wako?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Iwe wandikana Ine, ati Yehova, wabwerera m'mbuyo; cifukwa cace ndatambasulira dzanja langa pa iwe, ndi kukuononga iwe; ndatopa ndi kulekerera." 
Jeremiah15:7 Ndawakupa ndi mkupo m'zipata za dziko; ndacotsa ana ao, ndasakaza anthu anga; sanabwerere kuleka njira zao." 
Jeremiah15:8 Amasiye ao andicurukira Ine kopambana mcenga wa kunyanja; ndatengera wofunkha usana afunkhire mai wao wa anyamata; ndamgwetsera dzidzidzi kuwawa mtima ndi mantha. 
Jeremiah15:9 Mkazi amene anabala asanu ndi awiri walefuka; wapereka moyo; dzuwa lace lalowa usana ulipobe; wanyazitsidwa, wathedwa nzeru; otsala ao ndidzapereka kulupanga pamaso pa adani ao, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah15:10 Kalanga ine, amai, pakuti mwandibala ine munthu wandeu, munthu wakutetana nalo dziko lonse lapansi! sindinakongoletsa paphindu, anthu sanandikongoletsa paphindu; koma iwo onse anditemberera." 
Jeremiah15:11 Yehova anati, Ndithu ndidzakulimbitsira iwe zabwino; ndithu ndidzapembedzetsa mdani kwa iwe nthawi ya zoipa ndi nthawi yansautso." 
Jeremiah15:12 Kodi angathe munthu kutyola citsulo, citsulo ca kumpoto, ndi mkuwa?" 
Jeremiah15:13 Cuma cako ndi zosungidwa zako ndidzazipereka zifunkhidwe kopanda mtengo wace, icico cidzakugwera cifukwa ca zocimwa zako zonse, m'malire ako onse." 
Jeremiah15:14 Ndipo ndidzawapititsa iwo pamodzi ndi adani ako ku dziko limene sudziwa iwe; pakuti moto wayaka m'mkwiyo wanga, umene udzatentha inu." 
Jeremiah15:15 Inu Yehova, mudziwa; mundikumbukire ine, mundiyang'anire ine, mundibwezere cilango pa ondisautsa ine; musandicotse m'cipiriro canu; dziwani kuti cifukwa ca Inu ndanyozedwa." 
Jeremiah15:16 Mau anu anapezeka, ndipo ndinawadya; mau anu anakhala kwa ine cikondwero ndi cisangalalo ca mtima wanga; pakuti ndachedwa dzina lanu, Yehova Mulungu wa makamu." 
Jeremiah15:17 Sindinakhala m'msonkhano wa iwo amene asekera-sekera, ndi kusangalala; ndinakhala pandekha cifukwa ca dzanja lanu; pakuti mwandidzaza ndi mkwiyo." 
Jeremiah15:18 Kupweteka kwanga kuti cipwetekere bwanji, ndi bala langa losapoleka, likana kupola? kodi mudzakhala kwa ine ngati kamtsinje konyenga, ngati madzi omwerera?" 
Jeremiah15:19 Cifukwa cace atero Yehova, Ukabwerera pamenepo ndidzakubwezanso, kuti uime pamaso panga; ndipo ukasiyanitsa ca mtengo wace ndi conyansa, udzakhala ngati m'kamwa mwanga; ndipo adzabwerera kwa iwe, koma sudzabwerera kwa iwo." 
Jeremiah15:20 Ndidzakuyesa iwe linga lamkuwa la anthu awa; ndipe adzamenyana ndi iwe, koma iwo sadzakuposa iwe; pakuti Ine ndiri ndi iwe kuti ndikupulumutse ndi kukulanditsa iwe, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah15:21 Ndipo ndidzakulanditsa iwe m'dzanja la oipa, ndipo ndidzakuombola iwe m'dzanja la oopsya." 
Jeremiah16:1 Ndiponso mau a Mulungu anadza kwa ine, kuti," 
Jeremiah16:2 Usatenge mkazi, usakhale ndi ana amuna ndi akazi m'malo muno." 
Jeremiah16:3 Pakuti Yehova atero za ana amuna ndi za ana akazi akubadwa m'malo muno, ndi za amai anawabala iwo, ndi za atate ao anawabala iwo m'dziko muno:" 
Jeremiah16:4 Adzafa ndi imfa zanthenda; sadzaliridwa maliro, sadzaikidwa; adzakhala ngati ndowe panthaka; ndipo adzathedwa lupanga, ndi njala; ndipo mitembo yao idzakhala cakudya ca mbalame za kumlengalenga, ndi zirombo za dziko lapansi." 
Jeremiah16:5 Pakuti Yehova atero, Usalowe m'nyumba ya maliro, usanke kukacita maliro ao, kapena kuwalirira; pakuti ndacotsa mtendere wanga pa anthu awa, cifundo ndi nsoni zokoma, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah16:6 Akuru ndi ang'onong'ono adzafa m'dziko muno; sadzaikidwa, anthu sadzacita maliro ao, sadzadziceka, sadzadziyeseza adazi, cifukwa ca iwo;" 
Jeremiah16:7 anthu sadzawagawira mkate pamaliro, kuti atonthoze mitima yao cifukwa ca akufa, anthu sadzapatsa iwo cikho ca kutonthoza kuti acimwe cifukwa ca atate ao kapena mai wao." 
Jeremiah16:8 Usalowe m'nyumba ya madyerero kukhala nao, ndi kudya ndi kumwa." 
Jeremiah16:9 Pakuti atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli; Taonani, ndidzaletsa pano, pamaso panu masiku anu, mau akukondwerera ndi mau akusangalala, mau a mkwati ndi mau a mkwatibwi." 
Jeremiah16:10 Ndipo padzakhala, pamene udzaonetsa anthu awa mau awa onse, ndipo iwo adzati kwa iwe, Cifukwa cace nciani kuti Yehova watinenera ife coipa cacikuru ici? mphulupulu yathu ndi yanji? cimo lathu lanji limene tacimwira Yehova Mulungu wathu?" 
Jeremiah16:11 Pamenepo uziti kwa iwo, Cifukwa makolo anu anandisiya Ine, ati Yehova, natsata milungu yina, naitumikira, naigwadira, nandisiya Ine, osasunga cilamulo canga;" 
Jeremiah16:12 ndipo mwacita zoipa zopambana makolo anu; pakuti, taonani, muyenda yense potsata kuumirira kwa mtima wace woipa, kuti musandimvere Ine;" 
Jeremiah16:13 cifukwa cace ndidzakuturutsani inu m'dziko muno munke ku dziko limene simunadziwa, kapena inu kapena makolo anu; pamenepo mudzatumikira milungu yina usana ndi usiku, kumene sindidzacitira inu cifundo." 
Jeremiah16:14 Cifukwa cace, taonani, masiku adza, ati Yehova, kuti sadzanenanso, Pali Yehova, amene anakweza ana a Israyeli kuwaturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Jeremiah16:15 Koma, Pali Yehova, amene anakweza ana a Israyeli kucokera ku dziko la kumpoto, ndi ku maiko ena kumene anawapitikitsirako; ndipo ndidzawabwezanso ku dziko lao limene ndinapatsa makolo ao." 
Jeremiah16:16 Taonani, ndidzaitana akugwira nsomba ambiri, ati Yehova, ndipo adzawagwira iwo, pambuyo pace ndidzaitana osaka nyama ambiri, ndipo adzasaka iwo m'mapiri onse, ndi pa zitunda zonse, ndiponso m'mapanga a m'matanthwe." 
Jeremiah16:17 Pakuti maso anga ali pa njira zao zonse, sabisika pa nkhope yanga, mphulupulu yao siibisika pamaso panga," 
Jeremiah16:18 Poyamba ndibwezera mphulupulu yao ndi cimo lao cowirikiza; cifukwa anaipitsa dziko langa ndi mitembo ya zodetsedwa zao, nadzaza colowa canga ndi zonyansa zao." 
Jeremiah16:19 Inu Yehova, mphamvu yanga, ndi linga langa, pothawirapo panga tsiku la msauko, amitundu adzadza kwa Inu kucokera ku malekezero a dziko lapansi, ndipo adzati, Makolo athu analandira colowa ca bodza lokha, zopanda pace ndi zinthu zosapindula nazo." 
Jeremiah16:20 Kodi munthu adzadzipangira yekha milungu, imene siiri milungu?"
