Jeremiah36:2 Tenga buku lampukutu, nulembe m'menemo mau onse ndanena kwa iwe akunenera Israyeli, ndi akunenera Yuda, ndi akunenera amitundu onse, kuyambira tsiku ndinanena kwa iwe, kuyambira masiku a Yosiya, mpaka lero." 
Jeremiah36:3 Kapena nyumba ya Yuda idzamva coipa conse cimene nditi ndidzawacitire; kuti abwerere yense kuleka njira yace yoipa; kuti ndikhululukire mphulupulu yao ndi cimo lao. 
Jeremiah36:4 Ndipo Yeremiya anaitana Baruki mwana wa Neriya; ndipo Yeremiya analembetsa Baruki m'buku lampukutu mau onse a Yehova, amene ananena naye." 
Jeremiah36:5 Ndipo Yeremiya anauza Baruki, kuti, Ndaletsedwa sindithai kulowa m'nyumba ya Yehova;" 
Jeremiah36:6 koma pita iwe, nuwerenge mu mpukutu umene ndakulembetsa, mau a Yehova m'makutu a anthu m'nyumba ya Yehova tsiku lakusala kudya; ndiponso udzawawerenga m'makutu a Ayuda onse amene aturuka m'midzi yao." 
Jeremiah36:7 Kapena pembedzero lao lidzagwa pamaso pa Yehova, ndipo adzabwerera yense kuleka njira yace yoipa; pakuti mkwiyo ndi ukali umene Yehova wanenera anthu awa ndi waukuru." 
Jeremiah36:8 Ndipo Baruki mwana wa Neriya anacita monga mwa zonse anamuuza iye Yeremiya mneneri, nawerenga m'buku mau a Yehova m'nyumba ya Yehova." 
Jeremiah36:9 Ndipo panali caka cacisanu ca Yehoyakimu mwana wa Yosiya, mfumu ya Yuda, mwezi wacisanu ndi cinai, anthu onse a m'Yerusalemu, ndi anthu onse ocokera m'midziya Yuda kudzaku Yerusalemu, analalikira kusala kudya pamaso pa Yehova." 
Jeremiah36:10 Ndipo Baruki anawerenga m'buku mau a Yeremiya m'nyumba ya Yehova, m'cipinda ca Gemariya mwana wa Safani mlembi, m'bwalo la kumtunda, pa khomo la cipata catsopano ca nyumba ya Yehova, m'makutu a anthu onse." 
Jeremiah36:11 Pamene Mikaya mwana wa Hemariya, mwana wa Safani, anamva m'buku mau onse a Yehova," 
Jeremiah36:12 anatsikira ku nyumba ya mfumu, nalowa m'cipinda ca mlembi; ndipo, taonani, akuru onse analikukhalamo, Elisama mlembi, ndi Delaya mwana wa Semaya, ndi Elinatani mwana wa Akibori, ndi Gemariya mwana wa Safani, ndi Zedekiya mwana wa Hananiya, ndi akuru onse." 
Jeremiah36:13 Ndipo Makaya anafotokozera iwo mau onse amene anamva, pamene Baruki anawerenga buku m'makutu a anthu." 
Jeremiah36:14 Cifukwa cace akuru onse anatuma Yehudi mwana wa Nataniya, mwana wa Salamiya, mwana wa Kusa, kwa Baruki, kukanena, Tenga m'dzanja lako mpukutu wauwerenga m'makutu a anthu, nudze kuno. Ndipo Baruki mwana wa Neriya anatenga mpukutuwo m'dzanja lace, nadza kwa iwo." 
Jeremiah36:15 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Khala pansi tsopano, nuwerenge m'makutu athu. Ndipo Baruki anauwerenga m'makutu ao." 
Jeremiah36:16 Ndipo panali, pamene anamva mau onse, anaopa nayang'anana wina ndi mnzace, nati kwa Baruki, Tidzamfotokozeratu mfumu mau awa onse." 
Jeremiah36:17 Ndipo anamfunsa Baruki, kuti, Utifotokozeretu, Unalemba bwanji mau awa onse ponena iye?" 
Jeremiah36:18 Ndipo Baruki anayankha iwo, Pakamwa pace anandichulira ine mau awa onse, ndipo ndinawalemba ndi inki m'bukumo." 
Jeremiah36:19 Ndipo akuru anati kwa Baruki, Pita, nubisale iwe ndi Yeremiya; munthu yense asadziwe kumene muli." 
Jeremiah36:20 Ndipo analowa kwa mfumu kubwalo; ndipo anasunga buku m'cipinda ca Elisama mlembi; nafotokozera mau onse m'makutu a mfumu. 
Jeremiah36:21 Ndipo mfumu anatuma Yehudi atenge mpukutuwo; ndipo anautenga kuturuka nao m'cipinda ca Elisama mlembi, Ndipo Yehudi anauwerenga m'makutu a mfumu, ndi m'makutu a akuru onse amene anaima pambali pa mfumu." 
Jeremiah36:22 Ndipo mfumu anakhala m'nyumba ya nyengo yacisanu mwezi wacisanu ndi cinai; ndipo munali moto m'nkhumbaliro pamaso pace. 
Jeremiah36:23 Ndipo panali, pamene Yehudi anawerenga masamba atatu pena anai, mfumu inawadula ndi kampeni ka mlembi, niwaponya m'moto wa m'nkhumbaliromo, mpaka mpukutu wonse unatha kupsa ndi moto wa m'nkhumbaliromo." 
Jeremiah36:24 Ndipo sanaopa, sanang'ambe nsaru zao, kapena mfumu, kapena atumiki ace ali yense amene anamva mau onsewa." 
Jeremiah36:25 Tsononso Elinatani ndi Deliya ndi Gemariya anapembedzera mfumu kuti asatenthe mpukutuwo; koma anakana kumvera. 
Jeremiah36:26 Ndipo mfumu inauza Yeremeeli mwana wace wa mfumu, ndi Seraya mwana wa Azirieli, ndi Selemiya mwana wa Abidieli, kuti awagwire Baruki mlembi ndi Yeremiya mneneri; koma Yehova anawabisa." 
Jeremiah36:27 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa Yeremiya, mfumu itatentha mpukutuwo, ndi mau amene analemba Baruki ponena Yeremiya, kuti," 
Jeremiah36:28 Tenganso mpukutu wina, nulembe m'menemo mau oyamba aja anali mu mpukutu woyamba uja, umene Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda wautentha." 
Jeremiah36:29 Ndipo za Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda uziti, Yehova atero: Iwe watentha mpukutu uwu, ndi kuti, Bwanji walemba m'menemo, kuti, Mfumu ya ku Babulo idzadzadi nidzaononga dziko ili, nidzatha m'menemo anthu ndi nvama?" 
Jeremiah36:30 Cifukwa cace Yehova atero za Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda: Adzasowa wokhala pa mpando wacifumu wa Davide; ndipo mtembo wace udzaponyedwa usana kunja kuli dzuwa, ndi usiku kuli cisanu." 
Jeremiah36:31 Ndipo ndidzamlanga iye ndi mbeu zace ndi atumiki ace cifukwa ca mphulupulu zao; ndipo ndidzawatengera iwo, ndi okhala m'Yerusalemu, ndi anthu a Yuda, zoipa zonse ndawanenera iwo, koma sanamvera." 
Jeremiah36:32 Ndipo Yeremiya anatenga mpukutu wina, naupereka kwa Baruki mlembi, mwana wa Neriya; amene analemba m'menemo ponena Yeremiya mau onse a m'buku lija Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda analitentha m'moto; ndipo anaonjezapo mau ambiri oterewa." 
Jeremiah37:1 Ndipo Zedekiya mwana wa Yosiya anakhala mfumu m'malo a Koniya mwana wa Yehoyakimu, amene Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo inamlowetsa mfumu m'dziko la Yuda." 
Jeremiah37:2 Koma ngakhale iye, ngakhale atumiki ace, ngakhale anthu a padziko, sanamvere mau a Yehova, amene ananena mwa Yeremiya mneneri." 
Jeremiah37:3 Ndipo Zedekiya mfumu anatuma Yehukali mwana wa Selemiya, ndi Zefaniya mwana wa Maseya wansembe, kwa Yeremiya mneneri, kukanena, Mutipemphereretu kwa Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Jeremiah37:4 Ndipo Yeremiya analikuyendayenda mwa anthu; cifukwa asanamuike iye m'nyumba yandende. 
Jeremiah37:5 Ndipo nkhondo ya Farao inaturuka m'Aigupto; ndipo pamene Akasidi omangira misasa Yerusalemu anamva mbiri yao, anacoka ku Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah37:6 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa Yeremiya mneneri, kuti," 
Jeremiah37:7 Atero Yehova, Mulungu wa Israyeli: Muzitero kwa mfumu ya Yuda, imene inakutumani inu kwa Ine kuti mundifunse Ine: Taonani, nkhondo ya Farao, yakuturukira kudzathandiza inu, idzabwerera ku Aigupto ku dziko lao." 
Jeremiah37:8 Ndipo Akasidi adzabweranso, nadzamenyana ndi mudzi uwu; ndipo adzaulanda, nadzautentha ndi moto." 
Jeremiah37:9 Yehova atero: Musadzinyenge, kuti, Akasidi adzaticokera ndithu; pakuti sadzacoka." 
Jeremiah37:10 Pakuti ngakhale mukadakantha nkhondo yonse ya Akasidi akumenyana, nanu, ngakhale akadatsala olasidwa okha okha mwa iwo, koma iwowa akadauka yense m'hema wace ndi kutentha mudzi uwu ndi moto." 
Jeremiah37:11 Ndipo panali pamene nkhondo ya Akasidi inacoka ku Yerusalemu cifukwa ca nkhondo ya Farao," 
Jeremiah37:12 pamenepo Yeremiya anaturuka m'Yerusalemu kumuka ku dziko la Benjamini, kukalandira gawo lace kumeneko." 
Jeremiah37:13 Pokhala iye m'cipinda ca Benjamini, kapitao wa alonda anali kumeneko, dzina lace Iriya, mwana wa Selemiya, mwana wa Hananiya; ndipo iye anamgwira Yeremiya mneneri, nati, Ulinkupandukira kwa Akasidi." 
Jeremiah37:14 Ndipo anati Yeremiya, Kunama kumeneko; ine sindipandukira kwa Akasidi; koma sanamvera iye; ndipo Iriya anamgwira Yeremiya, nanka naye kwa akuru." 
Jeremiah37:15 Ndipo akuru anakwiyira Yeremiya, nampanda iye, namuika m'nyumba yandende m'nyumba ya Yonatani mlembi; pakuti anaiyesa ndende." 
Jeremiah37:16 Atafika Yeremiya ku nyumba yadzenje, ku tizipinda tace nakhalako Yeremiya masiku ambiri;" 
Jeremiah37:17 pamenepo Zedekiya mfumu inatuma, ndi kumtenga iye; ndipo mfumu inamfunsa iye m'tseri m'nyumba mwace, niti, Kodi alipo mau ocokera kwa Yehova? Ndipo Yeremiya, anati, Alipo, Anatinso, Mudzaperekedwa m'dzanja la mfumu ya ku Babulo." 
Jeremiah37:18 Ndipo Yeremiya anati kwa mfumu Zedekiya, Ndacimwira inu ciani, kapena atumiki anu, kapena anthu awa, kuti mwandiika m'nyumba yandende?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Tsopano ali kuti aneneri anu, amene ananenera inu, kuti, Mfumu ya ku Babulo sidzakudzerani inu, kapena dziko lino?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Tsopano tamvanitu, mbuyanga mfumu; pembedzero langa ligwe pamaso panu; kuti musandibwezere ku nyumba ya Yonatani mlembi, ndingafe kumeneko." 
Jeremiah37:21 Ndipo Zedekiya mfumu analamula, ndipo anamuika Yeremiya m'bwalo la kaidi, tsiku ndi tsiku, nampatsa mkate wofuma ku mseu wa oumba mikate, mpaka unatha mkate wonse wa m'mudzi. Ndipo Yeremiya anakhala m'bwalo la kaidi." 
Jeremiah38:1 Ndipo Sefatiya mwana wa Matani ndi Gedaliya mwana wa Pusuri, ndi Yukali mwana wa Selemiya, ndi Pasuri mwana wa Malikiya, anamva mau amene Yeremiya ananena ndi anthu onse, kuti," 
Jeremiah38:2 Yehova atero, Iye wakukhala m'mudziwu adzafa ndi lupanga, ndi njala, ndi caola; koma iye wakuturukira kunka kwa Akasidi adzakhala ndi moyo, ndipo adzakhala nao moyo wace ngati cofunkha, nadzakhala ndi moyo." 
Jeremiah38:3 Yehova atero, Mudziwu udzapatsidwatu m'dzanja la nkhondo ya mfumu ya ku Babulo, ndipo adzaulanda." 
Jeremiah38:4 Ndipo akuru anati kwa mfumu, Munthu uyu aphedwetu; cifukwa analopetsa manja a anthu a nkhondo otsala m'mudzi uno, ndi manja a anthu onse, pakunena kwa iwo mau otero; pakuti munthu uyu safuna mtendere wa anthu awa, koma nsautso yao." 
Jeremiah38:5 Ndipo mfumu Zedekiya anati, Taonani, ali m'manja mwanu; pakuti mfumu singathe kucita kanthu kotsutsana nanu." 
Jeremiah38:6 Ndipo anatenga Yeremiya, namponya iye m'dzenje la Malikiya mwana wace wa mfumu, limene linali m'bwalo la kaidi; ndipo anamtsitsa Yeremiya ndi zingwe, Koma m'dzenjemo munalibe madzi, koma thope; namira Yeremiya m'thopemo." 
Jeremiah38:7 Ndipo pamene Ebedi-Meleki Mkusi, mdindo, anamva kuti anamuika Yeremiya m'dzenje; mfumu irikukhala pa cipata ca Benjamini;" 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedi-Meleki anaturuka m'nyumba ya mfumu, nanena ndi mfumu, kuti," 
Jeremiah38:9 Mbuyanga mfumu, anthu awa anacita zoipa m'zonse anacitira Yeremiya mneneri, amene anamponya m'dzenje; ndipo afuna kufa m'menemo cifukwa ca njala; pakuti mulibe cakudya cina m'mudzimu." 
Jeremiah38:10 Ndipo mfumu inamuuza Ebedi-Meleki Mkusi, kuti, Tenga anthu makumi atatu, umkweze numturutse Yeremiya mneneri m'dzenjemo, asanafe." 
Jeremiah38:11 Ndipo Ebedi-Meleki anatenga anthuwo, nalowa nao m'nyumba ya mfumu ya pansi pa nyumba ya cuma, natenga m'menemo nsaru zakale zotaya ndi zansanza zobvunda, nazitsitsira ndi zingwe kwa Yeremiya m'dzenjemo." 
Jeremiah38:12 Ndipo Ebedi-Meleki Mkusi anati kwa Yeremiya, Kulungatu zingwe ndi nsaruzi zotaya zakale ndi zansanza ndi kuzikwapatira. Ndipo Yeremiya anacita comweco." 
Jeremiah38:13 Ndipo anamkweza Yeremiya ndi zingwe, namturutsa m'dzenjemo; ndipo Yeremiya anakhalabe m'bwalo la kaidi." 
Jeremiah38:14 Ndipo mfumu Zedekiya anatuma, natntenga Yeremiya mneneri nalowa naye m'khomo lacitatu la nyumba ya Yehova; ndipo mfumu inati kwa Yeremiya, Ndidzakufunsa iwe kanthu; usandibisire ine kanthu." 
Jeremiah38:15 Ndipo Yeremiya anati kwa Zedekiya, Ndikakufotokozerani, kodi simudzandipha ine? ndipo ndikakupangirani, simudzandimveta ine." 
Jeremiah38:16 Ndipo Zedekiya analumbira m'tseri kwa Yeremiya, kuti, Pali Yehova, amene anatilengera ife moyo uno, sindidzakupha iwe sindidzakupereka iwe m'manja mwa anthu awa amene afuna moyo wako." 
Jeremiah38:17 Ndipo Yeremiya anati kwa Zedekiya, Atero Yehova, Mulungu wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli: Ngati mudzaturukira kwa akuru a mfumu ya ku Babulo, mudzakhala ndi moyo, ndipo mudziwu sudzatenthedwa ndi moto; ndipo mudzakhala ndi moyo ndi banja lanu;" 
Jeremiah38:18 koma ngati simudzaturukira kwa akuru a mfumu ya ku Babulo, mudziwu udzaperekedwa m'dzanja la Akasidi, ndipo udzatenthedwa ndi moto, ndipo simudzapulumuka m'manja mwao." 
Jeremiah38:19 Ndipo mfumu Zedekiya anati kwa Yeremiya, Ine ndiopa Ayuda amene anandipandukira ine kunka kwa Akasidi, angandipereke ine m'manja mwao, angandiseke." 
Jeremiah38:20 Koma Yeremiya anati, Sadzakuperekani. Mveranitu mau a Yehova, amene ndinena ndi inu, comweco kudzakomera inu, ndipo moyo wanu udzakhalabe." 
Jeremiah38:21 Koma ngati mukana kuturuka, mau anandisonyeza Yehova ndi awa:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Taonani, akazi onse otsala m'nyumba ya mfumu ya Yuda adzaturutsidwa kunka kwa akuru a mfumu ya ku Babulo, ndipo akaziwo adzati, Oyanjana nanu anakunyengani, ndi kukuposani inu, mapazi anu amire m'thope, abwerera m'mbuyo." 
Jeremiah38:23 Ndipo adzaturutsira Akasidi akazi anu onse, ndi ana anu, ndipo simudzapulumuka m'manja ao, koma mudzagwidwa ndi dzanja la mfumu ya ku Babulo; ndipo mudzatenthetsa mudziwu ndi moto." 
Jeremiah38:24 Ndipo Zedekiya anati kwa Yeremiya, Anthu asadziwe mau amene, ndipo sudzafa." 
Jeremiah38:25 Koma akamva akuru kuti ndalankhula ndi iwe, nakafika kwa iwe, ndi kuti kwa iwe, Utifotokozere ife comwe wanena kwa mfumu; osatibisira ici, ndipo sitidzakupha iwe; ndiponso zomwe mfumu inanena kwa iwe;" 
Jeremiah38:26 pamenepo uziti kwa iwo, Ndinagwa ndi pembedzero langa pamaso pa mfumu, kuti asandibwezerenso ku nyumba ya Yonatani ndifere komweko." 
Jeremiah38:27 Ndipo akuru onse anadza kwa Yeremiya, namfunsa; ndipo iye ananena nao monga mwa mau onsewo anamuuza mfumu. Ndipo analeka kunena naye; pakuti sikunamveka mlandu." 
Jeremiah38:28 Ndipo Yeremiya anakhala m'bwalo la kaidi mpaka dzuwa lakugwidwa Yerusalemu. Ndipo anali komweko pogwidwa Yerusalemu. 
Jeremiah39:1 Caka cacisanu ndi cinai ca Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda, mwezi wakhumi, anadza Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo ndi nkhondo yace yonse, ndi kuumangira misasa." 
Jeremiah39:2 Caka cakhumi ndi cimodzi ca Zedekiya, mwezi wacinai, tsiku lacisanu ndi cinai, mudzi unabooledwa." 
Jeremiah39:3 Ndipo akuru onse a mfumu ya ku Babulo analowa, nakhala m'cipata capakati, Nerigalisarezara, Samgari Nebo, Sarisekimu, mkuru wa adindo, Nerigalisarezara mkuru wa alauli ndi akuru ena onse a mfumu ya ku Babulo." 
Jeremiah39:4 Ndipo panali pamene Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda ndi amuna onse a nkhondo anawaona, anathawa naturuka m'mudzi usiku, panjira pa munda wa mfumu, pa cipata ca pakati pa makoma awiri; ndipo iye anaturukira pa njira ya kucidikha." 
Jeremiah39:5 Koma nkhondo ya Akasidi inawalondola, nimpeza Zedekiya m'zidikha za Yeriko; ndipo atamgwira, anamtengera kwa Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo ku Ribila m'dziko la Hamati, ndipo iye ananena naye mlandu." 
Jeremiah39:6 Pamenepo mfumu ya ku Babulo inapha ana a Zedekiya ku Ribila pamaso pace; mfumu ya ku Babulo niphanso aufulu onse a Yuda. 
Jeremiah39:7 Ndipo anakolowola maso a Zedekiya, nammanga m'zigologolo, kunka naye ku Babulo." 
Jeremiah39:8 Ndipo Akasidi anatentha ndi moto nyumba ya mfumu, ndi nyumba za anthu, nagumula malinga a Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah39:9 Ndipo Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anatenga anthu otsalira m'mudzi, ndi othawa omwe, opandukira, ndi kumtsata ndi anthu otsalira nanka nao am'nsinga ku Babulo." 
Jeremiah39:10 Koma aumphawi a anthu, amene analibe kanthu, Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anawasiya m'dziko la Yuda, nawapatsa mipesa ndi minda nthawi yomweyo." 
Jeremiah39:11 Ndipo Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo anamuuza Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda, za Yeremiya, kuti," 
Jeremiah39:12 Umtenge, numyang'anire bwino, usamsautse, koma umcitire monga iye adzanena nawe." 
Jeremiah39:13 Ndipo Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anatumiza, ndi Nebusazibani, mkuru wa adindo Rabi-Sarisi, ndi Nerigalisarezari mkuru wa alauli, ndi akuru onse a mfumu ya ku Babulo;" 
Jeremiah39:14 iwonso anatumiza, namcotsa Yeremiya m'bwalo la kaidi, nampereka iye kwa Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu, mwana wa Safani, kuti anke naye kwao; momwemo iye anakhala ndi anthu." 
Jeremiah39:15 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa Yeremiya, potsekeredwa iye m'bwalo la kaidi, kuti," 
Jeremiah39:16 Pita, ukanene kwa Ebedi-Meleki Mkusi, kuti, Atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli: Taona, ndidzafikitsira mudzi uwu mau anga kuusautsa, osaucitira zabwino; ndipo adzacitidwa pamaso pako tsiku lomwelo." 
Jeremiah39:17 Koma ndidzakupulumutsa tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova: ndipo sudzaperekedwa m'manja a anthu amene uwaopa." 
Jeremiah39:18 Pakuti ndidzakupulumutsatu ndipo sudzagwa ndi lupanga, koma udzakhala nao moyo wako ngati cofunkha, pakuti wandikhulupirira Ine, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah40:1 Mau amene anadza kwa Yeremiya kucokera kwa Yehova, Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda atammasula pa Rama, pamene anamtenga iye womangidwa m'maunyolo pamodzi ndi am'nsinga onse a Yerusalemu ndi Yuda, amene anatengedwa am'nsinga kunka nao ku Babulo." 
Jeremiah40:2 Ndipo kapitao wa alonda anatenga Yeremiya, nati kwa iye, Yehova Mulungu wako ananenera coipa ici malo ano;" 
Jeremiah40:3 ndipo Yehova wacitengera, ndi kucita monga ananena, cifukwa mwacimwira Yehova, ndi kusamvera mau ace, cifukwa cace cinthu ici cakufikirani." 
Jeremiah40:4 Ndipo tsopano, taona, ndikumasula iwe lero maunyolo ali pa manja ako. Kukakukomera kudza nane ku Babulo, idza, ndipo ndidzakusamalira bwino; koma kukakuipira kudza nane ku Babulo, tsala; taona, dziko lonse liri pamaso pako; kuli konse ukuyesa kwabwino kapena koyenera kupitako, pita kumeneko." 
Jeremiah40:5 Tsono asanabwerere iye anati, Bweratu kwa Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu, mwana wa Safani, amene mfumu ya ku Babulo inamyesa wolamulira midzi ya Yuda, nukhale naye pakati pa anthu; kapena pita kuli konse ukuyesa koyenera kupitako. Ndipo kapitao wa alonda anampatsa iye phoso ndi mtulo, namleka amuke." 
Jeremiah40:6 Ndipo Yeremiya ananka kwa Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu ku Mizipa, nakhala kumeneko kwa anthu otsala m'dziko." 
Jeremiah40:7 Ndipo pamene akuru onse a makamu amene anali m'minda, iwo ndi anthu ao, anamva kuti mfumu ya ku Babulo adamuika Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu wolamulira dziko, nampatsira amuna, ndi akazi, ndi ana, ndi aumphawi a m'dzikomo, a iwo amene sanatengedwa ndende kunka nao ku Babulo;" 
Jeremiah40:8 pamenepo anadza kwa Gedaliya ku Mizipa, Ismayeli mwana wa Netaniya, ndi Yohanani ndi Yonatani ana a Kareya, ndi Saraya mwana wa Tanumeti, ndi ana a Efai wa ku Netofa, ndi Jezaniya mwana wa munthu wa ku Maaka, iwo ndi anthu ao." 
Jeremiah40:9 Ndipo Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu mwana wa Safani anawalumbirira iwo ndi anthu ao, kuti, Musaope kuwatumikira Akasidi; khalani m'dzikomu, mutumikire mfumu ya ku Babulo, ndipo kudzakukomerani." 
Jeremiah40:10 Koma ine, taonani, ndidzakhala pa Mizipa, ndiima pamaso pa Akasidi, amene adzadza kwa ife; koma inu, sonkhanitsani vinyo ndi zipatso zamalimwe ndi mafuta, muziike m'mbiya zanu, nimukhale m'midzi imene mwailanda." 
Jeremiah40:11 Comweco pamene Ayuda onse okhala m'Moabu ndi mwa ana a Amoni, ndi m'Edomu, ndi amene anali m'maiko monse, anamva kuti mfumu ya ku Babulo inasiya otsala a Yuda, ndi kuti inamuika Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu, mwana wa Safani wolamulira wao;" 
Jeremiah40:12 pamenepo Ayuda onse anabwerera kufumira ku malo onse kumene anawaingitsirako, nafika ku dziko la Yuda, kwa Gedaliya, ku Mizipa, nasonkhanitsa vinyo ndi zipatso zamalimwe zambiri." 
Jeremiah40:13 Ndiponso Yohanani mwana wa Kareya, ndi akazembe onse a nkhondo okhala m'minda, anadza kwa Gedaliya ku Mizipa," 
Jeremiah40:14 nati kwa iye, Kodi mudziwa kuti Baalisi mfumu ya ana a Amoni watumiza Ismayeli mwana wa Netaniya kuti akupheni inu? Koma Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu sanamvera iwo." 
Jeremiah40:15 Ndipo Yohanani mwana wa Kareya ananena kwa Gedaliya m'tseri, kuti, Ndimuketu, ndikaphe Ismayeli mwana wa Netaniya, anthu osadziwa; cifukwa canji adzakuphani inu, kuti Ayuda onse amene anakusonkhanira inu amwazike, ndi otsala a Yuda aonongeke?" 
Jeremiah40:16 Koma Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu anati kwa Yohanani mwana wa Kareya, Usacite ici; pakuti unamizira Ismayeli." 
Jeremiah41:1 Ndipo panali mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri, Ismayeli mwana wa Netaniya, mwana wa Elisama, wa mbeu ya mfumu, ndi kapitao wamkuru wa mfumu, ndi anthu khumi pamodzi ndi iye, anadza kwa Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu ku Mizipa; pamenepo anadya pamodzi m'Mizipa." 
Jeremiah41:2 Ndipo anauka Ismayeli mwana wa Netaniya, ndi anthu khumi okhala naye, namkantha Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu mwana wa Safani ndi lupanga, namupha iye, amene mfumu ya ku Babulo inamuika wolamulira dziko." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ismayeli naphanso Ayuda onse okhala naye Gedaliya pa Mizipa, ndi Akasidi amene anakomana nao komweko, amuna a nkhondo." 
Jeremiah41:4 Ndipo panali atapita masiku awiri atamupha Gedaliya, anthu osadziwa," 
Jeremiah41:5 anadza anthu ocokera ku Sekemu, ndi ku Silo, ndi ku Samariya, anthu makumi asanu ndi atatu, atameta ndebvu zao, atang'amba zobvala zao, atadzitematema, ana tenga nsembe zaufa ndi zonunkhira m'manja mwao, kunka nazo ku nyumba ya Yehova." 
Jeremiah41:6 Ndipo Ismayeli mwana wa Netaniya anaturuka m'Mizipa kukakomana nao, alinkuyenda ndi kulira misozi; ndipo panali, pamene anakomana nao, anati kwa iwo, Idzani kwa Gedaliya mwana wace wa Ahikamu." 
Jeremiah41:7 Ndipo panali, pamene analowa pakati pa mudzi, Ismayeli mwana, wa Netaniya anawapha, nawaponya pakati pa dzenje, iye ndi anthu okhala naye." 
Jeremiah41:8 Koma mwa iwo anaoneka anthu khumi amene anati kwa Ismayeli, Musatiphe ife; pakuti tiri ndi cuma cobisika m'mudzi, ca tirigu, ndi ca barele, ndi ca mafuta, ndi ca uci. Momwemo analeka, osawapha pakati pa abale ao." 
Jeremiah41:9 Ndipo dzenje moponyamo Ismayeli mitembo yonse ya anthu amene anawapha, cifukwa ca Gedaliya, ndilo analipanga mfumu Asa cifukwa ca kuopa Raasa mfumu ya Israyeli, lomwelo Ismayeli mwana wa Netaniya analidzaza ndi ophedwawo." 
Jeremiah41:10 Ndipo Ismayeli anatenga ndende otsala onse a anthu okhala m'Mizipa, ana akazi a mfumu, ndi-anthu onse amene anatsala m'Mizipa, amene Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anapatsira Gedaliya mwana wa Ahikamu; Ismayeli mwana wa Netaniya anawatenga ndende, napita kukaolokera kwa ana a Amoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Koma pamene Yohanani mwana wa Kareya, ndi akazembe Onse a nkhondo akhala naye, anamva zoipa zonse anazicita Ismayeli mwana wa Netaniya," 
Jeremiah41:12 anatenga anthu onse, nanka kukamenyana ndi Ismayeli mwana wa Netaniya, nampeza pa madzi ambiri a m'Gibeoni." 
Jeremiah41:13 Ndipo panali pamene anthu onse amene anali ndi Ismayeli anaona Yohanani mwana wa Kareya, ndi akazembe onse a nkhondo okhala naye, anasekera." 
Jeremiah41:14 Ndipo anthu onse amene Ismayeli anatenga ndende kuwacotsa m'Mizipa anatembenuka nabwera, nanka kwa Yohanani mwana wace wa Kareya," 
Jeremiah41:15 Koma Ismayeli mwana wace wa Netaniya anapulumuka Yohanani ndi anthu asanu ndi atatu, nanka kwa ana a Amoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Ndipo Yohanani mwana wace wa Kareya ndi akazembe onse a makamu amene anali naye, anatenga anthu onse otsala a ku Mizipa, amene anawabweza kwa Ismayeli mwana wace wa Netaniya atapha Gedaliya mwana wace wa Ahikamu, anthu a nkhondo, ndi akazi, ndi ana, ndi adindo, amene anawabwezanso ku Gibeoni;" 
Jeremiah41:17 ndipo anacoka, natsotsa m'Geruti-Kimamu, amene ali ku Betelehemu, kunka kulowa m'Aigupto," 
Jeremiah41:18 cifukwa ca Akasidi; pakuti anawaopa, cifukwa Ismayeli mwana wace wa Netaniya anapha Gedaliya mwana wace wa Akikamu, amene mfumu ya ku Babulo anamuika wolamulira m'dzikomo." 
Jeremiah42:1 Ndipo akazembe onse a nkhondo, ndi Yohanani mwana wace wa Kareya, ndi Jezaniya mwana wace wa Hosiya, ndi anthu onse kuyambira wamng'ono, kufikira wamkuru, anayandikira," 
Jeremiah42:2 nati kwa Yeremiya mneneri, Cipembedzero cathu cigwe pamaso panu, nimutipempherere ife kwa Ambuye Mulungu wanu, cifukwa ca otsala onsewa; pakuti tatsala ife owerengeka m'malo mwa ambiri, monga maso anu ationa ife;" 
Jeremiah42:3 kuti Yehova Mulungu wanu atisonyeze ife njira imene tiyendemo, ndi comwe ticite." 
Jeremiah42:4 Ndipo Yeremiya mneneri anati kwa iwo, Ndamva; taonani, ndidzapemphera kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu monga mwa mau anu; ndipo padzakhala kuti ciri conse Yehova adzakuyankhirani, ndidzakufotokozerani; sindidzakubisirani inu kanthu." 
Jeremiah42:5 Pamenepo iwo anati kwa Yeremiya, Yehova akhale mboni yoona ndi yokhulupirika pakati pa ife, ngati siticita monga mwa mau onse Yehova Mulungu wanu adzakutumizani nao kwa ife." 
Jeremiah42:6 Ngakhale ali abwino, ngakhale ali oipa, ife tidzamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wathu, kwa Iye amene tikutumizani inu; kuti kutikomere, pomvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wathu." 
Jeremiah42:7 Ndipo panali atapita masiku khumi, mau a Yehova anadza kwa Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah42:8 Ndipo anaitana Yohanani mwana wace wa Kareya, ndi akazembe onse a nkhondo okhala naye, ndi anthu onse kuyambira wamng'ono kufikira wamkuru," 
Jeremiah42:9 nati kwa iwo, Atero Yehova, Mulungu wa Israyeli, kwa Iye amene munandituma ine ndigwetse pembedzero lanu pamaso pace," 
Jeremiah42:10 Ngati mudzakhalabe m'dziko muno, ndidzamangitsa mudzi wanu, osakugumulani, ndidzakuokani inu, osakuzulani; pakuti ndagwidwa naco cisoni coipa cimene ndakucitirani inu." 
Jeremiah42:11 Musaope mfumu ya ku Babulo, amene mumuopa; musamuope, ati Yehova: pakuti Ine ndiri ndi inu kukupulumutsani, ndi kukulanditsani m'dzanja lace." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ndipo ndidzakucitirani inu cifundo, li kuti iye akucitireni inu cifundo, nakubwezereni inu ku dziko lanu." 
Jeremiah42:13 Koma mukati, Sitidzakhala m'dziko muno; osamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu;" 
Jeremiah42:14 ndi kuti, Iai; tidzanka ku Aigupto, kumene sitidzaona nkhondo, sitidzamva kulira kwa lipenga, sitidzamva njala yokhumba mkate; pamenepo tidzakhala;" 
Jeremiah42:15 cifukwa cace mumve mau a Yehova, Otsala inu a Yuda, atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli, Ngati mulozetsa nkhope zanu kuti mulowe m'Aigupto, kukakhala m'menemo;" 
Jeremiah42:16 pamenepo padzakhala, kuti lupanga limene muopa lidzakupezani m'menemo m'dziko la Aigupto, ndi njala, imene muiopa, idzakuumirirani kumeneko ku Aigupto; pamenepo mudzafa." 
Jeremiah42:17 Kudzatero ndi anthu onse akulozetsa nkhope zao anke ku Aigupto kuti akhale kumeneko; adzafa ndi lupanga, ndi njala, ndi caola; ndipo wa iwo sadzatsala kapena kupulumuka ku coipa cimene ndidzatengera pa iwo ngakhale mmodzi yense." 
Jeremiah42:18 Pakuti atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli: Monga mkwiyo wanga ndi ukali wanga wathiridwa kwa okhala m'Yerusalemu, momwemo ukali wanga udzathiridwa pa inu, pamene mudzalowa m'Aigupto; ndipo mudzakhala citukwano, ndi cizizwitso, ndi citemberero, ndi citonzo; ndipo simudzaonanso malo ano." 
Jeremiah42:19 Yehova wanena za inu, otsala inu a Yuda, Musalowe m'Aigupto; mudziwetu kuti ndakulangizani inu lero." 
Jeremiah42:20 Pakuti mwanyenga m'miyoyo yanu; pakuti mwandituma ine kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu, ndi kuti, Mutipempherere ife kwa Yehova Mulungu wathu; ndipo monga mwa zonse Yehova Mulungu wathu adzanena, momwemo mutifotokozere ife; ndipo tidzacita." 
Jeremiah42:21 Ndipo lero ndakufotokozerani, ndipo simunamva mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu m'cinthu ciri conse cimene Iye wanditumira ine naco kwa inu." 
Jeremiah42:22 Tsopano mudziwetu kuti mudzafa ndi lupanga, ndi njala ndi caola, komwe mufuna kukakhalako." 
Jeremiah43:1 Ndipo panali pamene Yeremiya anatha kunena kwa anthu onse mau onse a Yehova Mulungu wao, amene anamtuma iye nao Yehova Mulungu wao, mau onse amenewo," 
Jeremiah43:2 pamenepo ananena Azariya mwana wace wa Hosaya, ndi Yohanani mwana wace wa Kareya, ndi anthu onse odzikuza, nati kwa Yeremiya, Unena zonama; Yehova Mulungu wathu sanakutumiza iwe kudzanena, Musalowe m'Aigupto kukhala m'menemo;" 
Jeremiah43:3 koma Baruki mwana wace wa Neriya aticicizira inu, mutipereke m'dzanja la Akasidi, kuti atiphe ife, atitengere ife am'nsinga ku Babulo." 
Jeremiah43:4 Ndipo Yohanani mwana wace wa Kareya, ndi akazembe onse a nkhondo, ndi anthu onse sanamvera mau a Yehova, kuti akhale m'dziko la Yuda." 
Jeremiah43:5 Koma Yohanani mwana wace wa Kareya, ndi akazembe onse: a nkhondo, anatenga otsala onse a Yuda, amene anabwera ku mitundu yonse kumene anaingitsidwirako kuti akhale m'dziko la Yuda;" 
Jeremiah43:6 ndi amuna, ndi akazi, ndi ana, ndi ana akazi a mfumu, ndi anthu onse amene Nebuzaradani kapitao Wa alonda anasiya ndi Gedaliya mwana wace wa Ahikamu, mwana wace wa Safani, ndi Yeremiya mneneri, ndi Baruki mwana wace wa Neriya;" 
Jeremiah43:7 ndipo anadza nalowa m'dziko la Aigupto; pakuti sanamvera mau a Yehova; ndipo anadza mpaka ku Tapanesi. 
Jeremiah43:8 Ndipo anafika mau a Yehova kwa Yeremiya m'Tapanesi, kuti," 
Jeremiah43:9 Tenga miyala yaikuru m'dzanja lako, nuiyale ndi dothi pakati pa njerwa, za pa khomo la nyumba ya Farao m'Tapanesi pamaso pa anthu a Yuda;" 
Jeremiah43:10 ndi kuti kwa iwo, Atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli: Taonani Ine ndidzatuma ndidzatenga Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo, mtumiki wanga, ndi kuika mpando wace wacifumu pa miyalayi ndaiyala; ndipo iye adzaibvundikira ndi hema wacifumu wace." 
Jeremiah43:11 Ndipo iye adzafika, nadzakantha dziko la Aigupto; nadzapereka kuimfa iwo a kuimfa, ndi kundende iwo a kundende, ndi kulupanga iwo a kulupanga." 
Jeremiah43:12 Ndidzayatsa moto m'nyumba za milungu ya Aigupto; ndipo adzazitentha, nadzaitenga ndende; ndipo adzadzipfunda ndi dziko la Aigupto, monga mbusa abvala cobvala cace; nadzaturuka m'menemo ndi mtendere." 
Jeremiah43:13 Ndipo adzatyola mizati ya zoimiritsa za kacisi wa dzuwa, ali m'dziko la Aigupto; ndi nyumba za milungu ya Aigupto adzazitentha ndi moto." 
Jeremiah44:1 Mau amene anadza kwa Yeremiya onena za Ayuda onse amene anakhala m'dziko la Aigupto, okhala pa Migidoli, ndi pa Tapanesi, ndi pa Nofi, ndi m'dziko la Patirosi, akuti," 
Jeremiah44:2 Atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli: Mwaona coipa conse cimene ndatengera pa Yerusalemu, ndi pa midzi yonse ya Yuda; ndipo, taonani, lero lomwe iri bwinja, palibe munthu wokhalamo;" 
Jeremiah44:3 cifukwa ca coipa cao anacicita kuutsa naco mkwiyo wanga; pakuti anapita kukafukizira, ndi kutumikira milungu yina, Imene sanaidziwa, ngakhale iwo, ngakhale inu, ngakhale makolo anu." 
Jeremiah44:4 Koma ndinatuma kwa inu atumiki anga onse aneneri, ndinauka mamawa ndi kuwatuma, ndi kuti, Musacitetu conyansa ici ndidana naco." 
Jeremiah44:5 Koma sanamvera, sanachera khutu lao kuti atembenuke asiye coipa cao, osafukizira milungu yina." 
Jeremiah44:6 Cifukwa cace mkwiyo wanga ndi ukali wanga unathiridwa, nuyaka m'midzi ya Yuda ndi m'miseu ya Yerusalemu; ndipo yapasudwa nikhala bwinja, monga lero lomwe." 
Jeremiah44:7 Ndipo tsopano atero Yehova, Mulungu wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli: Cifukwa canji mucitira miyoyo yanu coipa ici, kudzisadzira nokha amuna ndi akazi, makanda ndi oyamwa, pakati pa Yuda, osakusiyirani mmodzi yense;" 
Jeremiah44:8 popeza muutsa mkwiyo wanga ndi nchito ya manja anu, pofukizira milungu yina m'dziko la Aigupto, kumene mwapita kukhalako; kuti mudulidwe, ndi kuti mukhale citemberero ndi citonzo mwa amitundu onse a dziko lapansi?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Kodi mwaiwala zoipa za makolo anu, ndi zoipa za mafumu a Yuda, ndi zoipa za akazi ao, ndi zoipa zanu, ndi za akazi anu, zimene anazicita m'dziko la Yuda, ndi m'miseu ya Yerusalemu?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Sanadzicepetse mpaka lero lomwe, sanaope, sanayende m'cilamulo canga, kapena m'malemba anga, amene ndinaika pamaso panu ndi pa makolo anu." 
Jeremiah44:11 Cifukwa cace atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli: Taonani, ndidzayang'anitsa nkhope yanga pa inu ndikucitireni inu coipa, ndidule Yuda lonse." 
Jeremiah44:12 Ndipo ndidzatengaotsala a Yuda, amene analozetsa nkhope zao alowe m'dziko la Aigupto akhale m'menemo, ndipo adzathedwa onse; m'dziko la Aigupto adzagwa, adzathedwa ndi lupanga ndi njala; adzafa kuyambira wamng'ono mpaka wamkuru, ndi lupanga ndi njala; ndipo adzakhala citukwano, ndi cizizwitso, ndi citemberero, ndi citonzo." 
Jeremiah44:13 Ndipo ndidzalanga iwo okhala m'dziko la Aigupto, monga ndinalanga Yerusalemu, ndi lupanga, ndi njala, ndi caola;" 
Jeremiah44:14 kuti otsala a Yuda, amene ananka ku dziko la Aigupto kukhala m'menemo, asapulumuke asatsale ndi mmodzi yense, kuti abwere ku dziko la Yuda, kumene afuna kubwera kuti akhale m'menemo; pakuti adzabwera koma adzapulumuka ndiwo." 
Jeremiah44:15 Ndipo amuna onse amene anadziwa kuti akazi ao anafukizira milungu yina, ndi akazi onse omwe anaimirirapo, msonkhano waukuru, anthu onse okhala m'dziko la Aigupto, m'Patirosi, anamyankha Yeremiya, kuti," 
Jeremiah44:16 Koma mau amene wanena ndi ife m'dzina la Yehova, sitidzakumvera iwe." 
Jeremiah44:17 Koma tidzacita ndithu mau onse anaturuka m'kamwa mwathu, kufukizira mfumu yaikazi ya kumwamba, ndi kumthirira iye nsembe zothira, monga momwe tikacitira ife, ndi atate athu, ndi mafumu athu ndi akuru athu, m'midzi ya Yuda, ndi m'miseu ya Yerusalemu, pakuti pamenepo tinali ndi cakudya cokwanira, tinakhala bwino, sitinaona coipa." 
Jeremiah44:18 Koma cilekere ife kufukizira mfumu yaikazi ya kumwamba, ndi kumthirira iye nsembe zothira, tasowa zonse, tathedwa ndi lupanga ndi caola." 
Jeremiah44:19 Ndipo pamene tinafukizira mfumu yaikazi ya kumwamba, ndi kumthirira nsembe zothira, kodi tinamuumbira iye mikate yakumpembedzera, ndi kumthirira nsembe zothira, opanda amuna athu?" 
Jeremiah44:20 Ndipo Yeremiya anati kwa anthu onse, kwa amuna, ndi kwa akazi, kwa anthu onse amene anambwezera mau amenewa, ndi kuti," 
Jeremiah44:21 Zofukizira zanu m'midzi ya Yuda, ndi m'miseu ya Yerusalemu, za inu ndi atate anu, mafumu anu ndi akuru anu, ndi anthu a m'dziko, kodi Yehova sanazikumbukira, kodi sizinalowa m'mtima mwace?" 
Jeremiah44:22 ndipo Yehova sanatha kupirirabe, cifukwa ca macitidwe anu oipa, ndi cifukwa ca zonyansa zimene munazicita; cifukwa cace dziko lanu likhala bwinja, ndi cizizwitso, ndi citemberero, lopanda wokhalamo, monga lero lomwe." 
Jeremiah44:23 Cifukwa mwafukiza, ndi cifukwa mwacimwira Yehova, osamvera mau a Yehova, osayenda m'cilamulo cace, ndi m'malemba ace, ndi m'mboni zace, cifukwa cace coipaci cakugwerani, monga lero lomwe." 
Jeremiah44:24 Ndiponso Yeremiya anati kwa anthu onse, ndi kwa akazi onse, Tamvani mau a Yehova, nonse Ayuda amene muli m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Jeremiah44:25 Atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli, Inu ndi akazi anu mwanena ndi m'kamwa mwanu, ndi kukwaniritsa ndi manja anu kuti, Tidzacita ndithu zowinda zathu taziwindira, kufukizira mfumu yaikazi ya kumwamba, ndi kumthirira iye nsembe zothira; khazikitsanitu zowinda zanu, citani zowinda zanu." 
Jeremiah44:26 Cifukwa cace tamvani mau a Yehova, nonse Ayuda okhala m'dziko la Aigupto: Taonani, ndalumbira, Pali dzina langa lalikuru, ati Yehova, kuti dzina langa silidzachulidwanso m'kamwa mwa munthu ali yense wa Yuda m'dziko la Aigupto, ndi kuti, Pali Yehova Mulungu." 
Jeremiah44:27 Taonani, ndiwayang'anira kuwacitira zoipa, si zabwino; ndipo amuna onse a Yuda okhala m'dziko la Aigupto adzathedwa ndi lupanga ndi njala, mpaka kutha kwao." 
Jeremiah44:28 Ndipo iwo amene adzapulumuka kulupanga adzabwera kuturuka ku dziko la Aigupto kulowa m'dziko la Yuda, owerengeka; ndipo otsala onse a Yuda, amene analowa m'dziko la Aigupto kuti akhale m'menemo, adzadziwa ngati adzatsimikizidwa mau a yani, kapena anga, kapena ao." 
Jeremiah44:29 Ndipo ici cidzakhala cizindikiro ca kwa inu, ati Yehova, cakuti Ine ndidzakulangani m'malo muno, kuti mudziwe kuti mau anga adzatsimikizidwatu akucitireni inu zoipa." 
Jeremiah44:30 Yehova atero: Taonani, ndidzapereka Farao Hofra mfumu ya Aigupto m'manja a adani ace, ndi m'manja a iwo akufuna moyo wace; monga ndinapereka Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda m'manja a Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo mdani wace, amene anafuna moyo wace." 
Jeremiah45:1 Mau amene ananena Yeremiya mneneri kwa Baruki mwana wace wa Neriya, pamene analemba mau awa m'buku ponena Yeremiya, caka cacinai ca Yehoyakimu mwana wace wa Yosiya, mfumu ya Yuda, ndi kuti," 
Jeremiah45:2 Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli atero kwa inu, Baruki:" 
Jeremiah45:3 Munati, Kalanga ine tsopano! pakuti Yehova waonjezera cisoni pa zowawa zanga; ndalema ndi kubuula kwanga, sindipeza kupuma," 
Jeremiah45:4 Uzitero naye, Yehova atero: Taonani, cimene ndamanga ndidzapasula, ndi cimene ndaoka ndidzazula; ndidzatero m'dziko lonseli." 
Jeremiah45:5 Kodi udzifunira wekha zinthu zazikuru? usazifune; pakuti, taona, ndidzatengera zoipa pa anthu onse, ati Yehova: koma moyo wako ndidzakupatsa iwe ngati cofunkha m'malo monse m'mene mupitamo." 
Jeremiah46:1 Mau a Yehova amene anadza kwa Yeremiya mneneri akunena za amitundu. 
Jeremiah46:2 Za Aigupto: kunena za nkhondo ya Farao-neko mfumu ya Aigupto, imene inali pa nyanja ya Firate m'Karikemisi, imene anaikantha Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo caka cacinai ca Yehoyakimu mwana wace wa Yosiya, mfumu ya Yuda." 
Jeremiah46:3 Konzani cikopa ndi lihawo, nimuyandikire kunkhondo." 
Jeremiah46:4 Mangani akavalo, bwerani, inu apakavalo, imani ndi zisoti zacitsulo; tuulani nthungo zanu, bvalani malaya acitsulo." 
Jeremiah46:5 Cifukwa canji ndaciona? aopa, abwerera; amphamvu ao agwetsedwa, athawadi, osaceukira m'mbuyo; mantha ali ponseponse, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah46:6 Waliwiro asathawe, wamphamvu asapulumuke; kumpoto pambali pa nyanja ya Firate wapunthwa nagwa." 
Jeremiah46:7 Ndani uyu amene auka ngati Nile, madzi ace ogabvira monga nyanja?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Aigupto auka ngati Nile, madzi ace agabvira ngati nyanja; ndipo ati, Ndidzauka, ndidzamiza dziko lapansi; ndidzaononga mudzi ndi okhalamo ace." 
Jeremiah46:9 Kwerani, inu akavalo; citani misala, inu magareta, aturuke amphamvu; Akusi ndi Aputi, ogwira cikopa; ndi Aludi, amene agwira ndi kukoka uta." 
Jeremiah46:10 Pakuti tsikulo ndi la Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu, tsiku lakubweza cilango, kuti abwezere cilango adani ace; ndipo lupanga lidzadya, lidzakhuta, nilidzamwetsa mwazi wao; pakuti Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu, ali ndi nsembe m'dziko la kumpoto pa nyanja ya Firate." 
Jeremiah46:11 Kwera ku Gileadi, tenga bvunguti, namwali iwe mwana wa Aigupto; wacurukitsa mankhwala cabe; palibe kucira kwako." 
Jeremiah46:12 Amitundu amva manyazi anu, dziko lapansi ladzala ndi kupfuula kwanu; pakuti amphamvu akhumudwitsana, agwa onse awiri pamodzi." 
Jeremiah46:13 Mau amene Yehova ananena kwa Yeremiya mneneri, kuti Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo adzafika adzakantha dziko la Aigupto." 
Jeremiah46:14 Nenani m'Aigupto, lalikirani m'Migidoli, lalikirani m'Nofi ndi Tapanesi; nimuti, Udziimike, nudzikonzere wekha; pakuti lupanga ladya pozungulira pako." 
Jeremiah46:15 Akulimba ako akokoledwa bwanji? sanaime, cifukwa Yehova anawathamangitsa," 
Jeremiah46:16 Anapunthwitsa ambiri, inde, anagwa wina pa mnzace, ndipo anati, Ukani, tinkenso kwa anthu athu, ku dziko la kubadwa kwathu, kucokera ku lupanga lobvutitsa." 
Jeremiah46:17 Ndipo anapfuula kumeneko, Farao mfumu ya Aigupto ndiye phokoso lokha; wapititsa nthawi yopangira," 
Jeremiah46:18 Pali Ine, ati Mfumu, dzina lace ndi Yehova wa makamu, ndithu monga Tabori mwa mapiri, monga Karimeli pambali pa nyanja, momwemo adzafika." 
Jeremiah46:19 Mwana wamkazi iwe wokhala m'Aigupto, dzikonzere kunka kundende; pakuti Nofi adzakhala bwinja, nadzapsya, mulibenso wokhalamo." 
Jeremiah46:20 Aigupto ndi ng'ombe ya msoti yosalala; cionongeko cituruka kumpoto cafika, cafika." 
Jeremiah46:21 Ndiponso olipidwa ace ali pakati pace onga ngati ana a ng'ombe a m'khola; pakuti iwonso abwerera, athawa pamodzi, sanaime; pakuti tsiku la tsoka lao linawafikira, ndi nthawi ya kuweruzidwa kwao." 
Jeremiah46:22 Mkokomo wace udzanga wa njoka yothawa; pakuti adzayenda ndi nkhondo, adzafika kumenyana naye ndi nkhwangwa, monga akutema mitengo." 
Jeremiah46:23 Adzatema nkhalango yace, ati Yehova, pokhala yosapitika; pakuti acuruka koposa dzombe, ali osawerengeka." 
Jeremiah46:24 Mwana wace wamkazi wa Aigupto adzacitidwa manyazi, adzaperekedwa m'manja a anthu a kumpoto." 
Jeremiah46:25 Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli, ati: Taonani, ndidzalanga Amoni wa No, ndi Farao, ndi Aigupto, pamodzi ndi milungu yace, ndi mafumu ace; ngakhale Farao, ndi iwo akumkhulupirira iye;" 
Jeremiah46:26 ndipo ndidzawapereka m'manja a iwo amene afuna moyo wao, ndi m'dzanja la Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo, ndi m'manja a atumiki ace; pambuyo pace adzakhalamo anthu, monga masiku akale, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah46:27 Koma usaope iwe, mtumiki wanga Yakobo, usacite mantha, iwe Israyeli: pakuti, taona, ndidzakupulumutsa iwe kucokera kutari, ndi mbeu yako ku dziko la undende wao, ndipo Yakobo adzabwera, nadzapumula m'mtendere, ndipo palibe amene adzamuopetsa iye," 
Jeremiah46:28 Usaope, iwe Yakobo mtumiki wanga, ati Yehova; pakuti Ine ndiri ndi iwe; pakuti Ine ndidzathetsa mitundu yonse kumene ndinakuingitsirako iwe, koma sindidzakuthetsa iwe; koma ndidzakulangiza ndi ciweruziro, ndipo sindidzakusiya konse wosalangidwa." 
Jeremiah47:1 Mau a Yehova amene anadza kwa Yeremiya mneneri onena za Afilisti, Farao asanakanthe Gaza." 
Jeremiah47:2 Yehova atero: Taonani, madzi adzakwera kuturuka kumpoto, nadzakhala mtsinje wosefuka, nadzasefukira padziko ndi pa zonse ziri m'mwemo, pamudzi ndi pa onse okhalamo; ndipo amuna adzalira, ndi onse okhala m'dziko adzakuwa." 
Jeremiah47:3 Pomveka migugu ya ziboda za olimba ane, pogumukira magareta ace, ndi pophokosera njinga zace, atate sadzaceukira ana ao cifukwa ca kulefuka kwa manja ao;" 
Jeremiah47:4 cifukwa ca tsiku lakudzafunkha Afilisti onse, kuphera Turo ndi Zidoni othangata onse akutsala; pakuti Yehova adzafunkha Afilisti, otsala a cisumbu ca Kafitori." 
Jeremiah47:5 Dazi lafikira a Gaza; Asikeloni wathedwa, otsala m'cidikha cao; udzadziceka masiku angati?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Iwe lupanga la Yehova, atsala masiku angati osakhala cete iwe? dzilonge wekha m'banzi lako; puma, nukhale cete." 
Jeremiah47:7 Udzakhala cete bwanji, popeza Yehova anakulangiza? za Asikeloni, ndi za m'mbali mwa nyanja, pamenepo analiika." 
Jeremiah48:1 Za Moabu Atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli: Tsoka Nebo! pakuti wapasuka; Kiriyataimu wacitidwa manyazi, wagwidwa; linga la pamtunda lacitidwa manyazi lapasudwa." 
Jeremiah48:2 Palibenso kutamanda Moabu; m'Hesiboni anamlingiririra zoipa, ndi kuti, Tiyeni, tiwathe asakhalenso mtundu waanthu. Iwenso, Madimeni, udzatontholetsedwa, lupanga lidzakulondola iwe." 
Jeremiah48:3 Mau amveka kucokera ku Horonaimu, kufunkha ndi kuononga kwakukuru!" 
Jeremiah48:4 Moabu waonongedwa; ang'ono ace amveketsa kulira. 
Jeremiah48:5 Pakuti adzakwera pa cikweza ca Luhiti ndi kulira kosaleka; pakuti pa citsiko ca Horonaimu amva kulira kowawa kwa cionongeko. 
Jeremiah48:6 Thawani, pulumutsani miyoyo yanu, mukhale amarisece m'cipululu," 
Jeremiah48:7 Pakuti, cifukwa wakhulupirira nchito zanu ndi cuma canu, iwenso udzagwidwa; ndipo Kemosi adza kundende, ansembe ace ndi akuru ace pamodzi." 
Jeremiah48:8 Ndipo wakufunkha adzafikira pa midzi yonse, sudzapulumuka mudzi uli wonse; cigwa comwe cidzasakazidwa, ndipo cidikha cidzaonongedwa; monga wanena Yehova." 
Jeremiah48:9 Patsani Moabu mapiko, kuti athawe apulumuke; midzi yace ikhale bwinja, lopanda wokhalamo." 
Jeremiah48:10 Atembereredwe iye amene agwira nchito ya Yehova monyenga, atembereredwe iye amene abweza lupanga lace kumwazi." 
Jeremiah48:11 Moabu wakhala m'mtendere kuyambira ubwana wace, wakhala pansenga, osatetekulidwa, sananke kundende; cifukwa cace makoleredwe ace alimobe mwa iye, pfungo lace silinasinthika." 
Jeremiah48:12 Cifukwa cace, taonani, masiku adza, ati Yehova, amene ndidzatuma kwa iye otsanula, amene adzamtsanula iye; adzataya za mbiya zace, nadzaswa zipanda zao." 
Jeremiah48:13 Ndipo Moabu adzacita manyazi cifukwa ca Kemosi, monga nyumba ya Israyeli inacita manyazi cifukwa ca Beteli amene anamkhulupirira," 
Jeremiah48:14 Muti bwanji, Tiri amphamvu, olimba mtima ankhondo?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Moabu wapasuka, akwera kulowa m'midzi yace, ndi anyamata ace osankhika atsikira kukaphedwa, ati Mfumu, dzina lace ndiye Yehova wa makamu." 
Jeremiah48:16 Tsoka la Moabu layandikira kudza, nsautso yace ifulumiratu." 
Jeremiah48:17 Inu nonse akumzungulira, mumcitire iye cisoni, inu nonse akudziwa dzina lace; muti, Cibonga colimba catyokatu, ndodo yokoma!" 
Jeremiah48:18 Iwe mwana wamkazi wokhala m'Diboni, utsike pa ulemerero wako, nukhale ndi ludzu; pakuti wakufunkha Moabu wakukwerera, iwe waononga malinga ako." 
Jeremiah48:19 Iwe wokhala m'Aroeri, ima panjira, nusuzumire umfunse iye amene athawa, ndi mkazi amene apulumuka; nuti, Cacitidwa ciani?" 
Jeremiah48:20 Moabu wacitidwa manyazi, pakuti watyoka; kuwa nulire, nunene m'Arinoni, kuti Moabu wapasuka." 
Jeremiah48:21 Ciweruzo cafika pa dziko lacidikha; pa Holoni, ndi pa Yaza, ndi pa Mefati;" 
Jeremiah48:22 ndi pa Diboni, ndi pa Nebo, ndi pa Beti-Dibilataimu;" 
Jeremiah48:23 ndi pa Kiriataimu, ndi pa Beti-Gamuli, ndi pa Beti-Meoni;" 
Jeremiah48:24 ndi pa Kerioti, ndi pa Bozira, ndi pa midzi yonse ya dziko la Moabu, yakutari kapena yakufupi." 
Jeremiah48:25 Nyanga ya Moabu yaduka, ndipo watyoka mkono wace, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah48:26 Umledzeretse iye; pakuti anadzikuza pokana Yehova; Moabu yemwe adzabvimvinika m'kusanza kwace, ndipo iye adzasekedwanso." 
Jeremiah48:27 Kodi sunaseka Israyeli? Kodi iye anapezedwa mwa mbala? pakuti nthawi zonse unena za iye, upukusa mutu." 
Jeremiah48:28 Inu okhala m'Moabu, siyani midzi, khalani m'thanthwe; nimukhale monga njiwa imene isanja cisanja cace pambali pakamwa pa dzenje." 
Jeremiah48:29 Ife tamva kudzikuza kwa Moabu, wadzikuza ndithu, kunyang'wa kwace, ndi kunyada kwace, ndi kudzitama kwace, ndi kudzikuza kwa mtima wace." 
Jeremiah48:30 Ine ndidziwa mkwiyo wace, ati Yehova, kuti uli cabe; zonyenga zace sizinacita kanthu." 
Jeremiah48:31 Cifukwa cace ndidzakuwira Moabu; inde, ndidzapfuulira Moabu yense, adzalirira anthu a ku Kirere." 
Jeremiah48:32 Iwe mpesa wa Sibima; ndidzakulirira iwe ndi kulira kopambana kulira kwa Yazeri, nthambi zako zinapitirira nyanja, zinafikira ku nyanja ya Yazeri; wakufunkha wagwera zipatso zako za mpakasa ndi mphesa zako." 
Jeremiah48:33 Ndipo kusekera ndi kukondwa kwacotsedwa, ku munda wobala ndi ku dziko la Moabu; ndipo ndaletsa vinyo pa zoponderamo; sadzaponda ndi kupfuula; kupfuula sikudzakhala kupfuula." 
Jeremiah48:34 Kuyambira kupfuula kwa Hesiboni mpaka ku Eleale, mpaka ku Yahazi anakweza mau, kuyambira pa Zoari mpaka ku Horonaimu, ku Egilati-Selisiya; pakuti pa madzi a ku Nimurimu komwe padzakhala mabwinja." 
Jeremiah48:35 Ndiponso ndidzaletsa m'Moabu, ati Yehova, iye amene apereka nsembe pamsanje, ndi iye amene afukizira milungu yace." 
Jeremiah48:36 Cifukwa cace mtima wanga umlima Moabu monga zitolilo, ndipo mtima wanga uwalirira anthu a Kireresi monga zitolilo, cifukwa cace zakucuruka zace adadzionera zatayika." 
Jeremiah48:37 Pakuti mitu yonse iri yadazi, ndipo ndebvu ziri zosengedwa; pa manja onse pali pocekedwa-cekedwa, ndi pacuuno ciguduli." 
Jeremiah48:38 Pamwamba pa macindwi a Moabu ndi m'miseu mwace muli kulira monse monse; pakuti ndaswa Moabu monga mbiya m'mene mulibe cikondwero, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah48:39 Yasweka bwanji! Akuwa bwanji Moabu! Wapotoloka bwanji ndi manyazi! Comweco Moabu adzakhala coseketsa ndi coopsera onse omzungulira iye. 
Jeremiah48:40 Pakuti Yehova atero: Taonani, adzauluka ngati ciombankhanga, adzamtambasulira Moabu mapiko ace." 
Jeremiah48:41 Keroti walandidwa, ndi malinga agwidwa, ndipo tsiku lomwelo mtima wa anthu amphamvu a Moabu adzakhala ngati mtima wa mkazi alinkudwala." 
Jeremiah48:42 Ndipo Moabu adzaonongeka asakhalenso mtundu wa anthu, cifukwa anadzikuzira yekha pa Yehova." 
Jeremiah48:43 Mantha, ndi dzenje, ndi khwekhwe, ziri pa iwe, wokhala m'Moabu, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah48:44 Ndipo iye wakuthawa cifukwa ca mantha adzagwa m'dzenje; ndi iye amene aturuka m'dzenje adzagwidwa m'khwekhwe; pakuti ndidzatengera pa iye, pa Moabu, caka ca kulangidwa kwao, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah48:45 Iwo amene anathawa aima opanda mphamvu pansi pa mthunzi wa Hesiboni; pakuti moto waturuka m'Hesiboni, ndi malawi a moto m'kati mwa Sihoni, nadya ngondya ya Moabu, ndi pakati pamtu pa ana a phokoso," 
Jeremiah48:46 Tsoka iwe, Moabu! anthu a Kemosi athedwa; pakuti ana ako amuna atengedwa ndende, ndi ana ako akazi atengedwa ndende." 
Jeremiah48:47 Koma ndidzabwezanso undende wa Moabu masiku akumariza, ati Yehova. Ziweruzo za Moabu ndi zomwezi." 
Jeremiah49:1 Za ana a Amoni. Yehova atero: Kodi Israyeli alibe ana amuna? alibe wolowa dzina? M'mwemo mfumu yao yalowa pa Gadi cifukwa canji, ndi anthu ace akhala m'midzi mwace?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Cifukwa cace, taonani, masiku afika, ati Yehova, Ine ndidzamveketsa mpfuu ya nkhondo yomenyana ndi Raba wa ana a Amoni; ndipo adzasanduka muunda wabwinja, ndipo ana ace akazi adzatenthedwa ndi moto; pamenepo Israyeli adzalanda iwo amene adamlanda, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah49:3 Kuwa, iwe Hesiboni, pakuti Ai wapasuka; lirani, inu ana akazi a Raba, mubvale ciguduli; citani maliro, thamangani kwina ndi kwina pamipanda; pakuti mfumu yao idzalowa m'ndende, ansembe ace ndi akuru ace pamodzi." 
Jeremiah49:4 Cifukwa canji udzitamandira ndi zigwa, cigwa cako coyendamo madzi, iwe mwana wamkazi wobwerera m'mbuyo, amene anakhulupirira cuma cace, nati, Adza kwa ine ndani?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Taona ndidzakutengera mantha, ati Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu, akucokera kwa onse amene akuzungulira iwe; ndipo mudzaingitsidwa yense kulozera maso ace, ndipo palibe amene adzasonkhanitsa osocera." 
Jeremiah49:6 Koma pambuyo pace ndidzabwezanso undende wa ana a Amoni, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah49:7 Za Edomu. Yehova wa makamu atero: Kodi m'Temani mulibenso nzeru? kodi uphungu wawathera akucenjera? kodi nzeru zao zatha psiti? 
Jeremiah49:8 Thawani inu, bwerani, khalani mwakuya, inu okhala m'Dedani; pakuti ndidzatengera pa iye tsoka la Esau, nthawi yoti ndidzamlanga iye." 
Jeremiah49:9 Akafika kwa inu akuchera mphesa, sadzasiya mphesa zokunkha? akafika usiku akuba, adzaononga mpaka kutha?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Pakuti ndambvula Esau, ndambvundukula, sadzatha kubisala; mbeu zace zaonongeka, ndi abale ace, ndi anansi ace, ndipo palibe iye." 
Jeremiah49:11 Siya ana ako amasiye, Ine ndidzawasunga; akazi ako amasiye andikhulupirire Ine." 
Jeremiah49:12 Pakuti Yehova atero: Taonani, iwo amene sanaweruzidwa kuti amwe cikho adzamwadi; kodi iwe ndiye amene adzakhala wosalangidwa konse? sudzakhala wosalangidwa, koma udzamwadi." 
Jeremiah49:13 Pakuti ndalumbira, Pali Ine, ati Yehova, kuti Boma adzakhala cizizwitso, citonzo, copasuka, ndi citemberero; ndipo midzi yace yonse idzakhala yopasuka cipasukire." 
Jeremiah49:14 Ndamva mthenga wa kwa Yehoya, ndipo mthenga watumidwa mwa amitundu, wakuti, Sonkhanani, mumdzere, nimuukire nkhondo." 
Jeremiah49:15 Pakuti, caona, ndakuyesa iwe wamng'ono mwa amitundu, ndi wonyozedwa mwa anthu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Koma za kuopsya kwako, kunyada kwa mtima wako kunakunyenga iwe, wokhala m'mapanga a thanthwe, woumirira msanje wa citunda, ngakhale usanja cisanja cako pamwamba penipeni ngati ciombankhanga, ndidzakutsitsa iwe kumeneko, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah49:17 Ndipo Edomu adzakhala cizizwitso; ndipo yense wakupitapo adzazizwa, ndipo adzatsonyera zobvuta zace zonse." 
Jeremiah49:18 Monga m'kupasuka kwa Sodomu ndi Gomora ndi midzi inzace, ati Yehova, munthu ali yense sadzakhala m'menemo, mwana wa munthu ali yense sadzagona m'menemo." 
Jeremiah49:19 Taona, wina adzakwerera mudzi wolimba ngati mkango wocokera ku Yordano wosefuka; koma dzidzidzi ndidzamthamangitsa amcokere; ndipo ali yense amene asankhidwa, ndidzamuika woyang'anira wace, pakuti wakunga Ine ndani? adzandiikira nthawi ndani? ndipo mbusa adzaima pamaso panga ndani?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Cifukwa cace tamvani uphungu wa Yehova, umene waupangira pa Edomu; ndi zimene walingalirira okhala m'Temani, ndithu adzawakoka, ana ang'ono a zoweta; ndithu adzayesa busa lao bwinja pamodzi nao." 
Jeremiah49:21 Dziko lapansi linthunthumira ndi phokoso Ija kugwa kwao; pali mpfuu, phokoso lace limveka pa Nyanja Yofiira." 
Jeremiah49:22 Taonani, adzafika nadzauluka ngati ciombankhanga, adzatambasulira Boma mapiko ace, ndipo tsiku lomwelo mtima wa anthu amphamvu a Edomu adzakhala ngati mtima wa mkazi alinkudwala." 
Jeremiah49:23 Za Damasiko. Hamati ndi Aripadi ali ndi manyazi, cifukwa anamva malodza, asungunuka kunyanja, adera nkhawa osatha kukhala cete." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damasiko walefuka, atembenukira kuti athawe, kunthunthumira kwamgwira; zobvuta ndi kulira zamgwira iye, ngati mkazi alimkudwala." 
Jeremiah49:25 Alekeranji kusiya mudzi wa cilemekezo, mudzi wa cikondwero canga?" 
Jeremiah49:26 Cifukwa cace anyamata ace adzagwa m'miseu yace, ndipo anthu onse a nkhondo adzatontholetsedwa tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Jeremiah49:27 Ndipo Ine ndidzayatsa moto m'khoma la Damasiko, udzathetsa zinyumba za Beni-Hadadi." 
Jeremiah49:28 Za Kedara, ndi za maufumu a Hazori, amene anawakantha Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo. Yehova atero: Ukani, kwerani ku Kedara, funkhani ana a kum'mawa." 
Jeremiah49:29 Mahema ao ndi zoweta zao adzazilanda, adzadzitengera nsaru zocingira zao, ndi katundu wao yense, ndi ngamila zao; ndipo adzapfuulira iwo, Mantha ponse ponse." 
Jeremiah49:30 Thawani inu, yendani kutari, khalani mwakuya, Inu okhala m'Hazori, ati Yehova; pakuti Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo anapangira uphungu pa inu, nakulingalirirani." 
Jeremiah49:31 Nyamukani, kwererani mtundu wokhala ndi mtendere, wokhala osadera nkhawa, ati Yehova, amene alibe zitseko ndi mipiringidzo, okhala pa okha." 
Jeremiah49:32 Ndipo ngamila zao zidzakhala zofunkha, ndi unyinji wa ng'ombe zao udzakhala wolanda; ndipo ndidzabalalitsira ku mphepo zonse iwo amene ameta m'mbali mwa tsitsi lao; ndipo ndidzatenga tsoka lao ku mbali zao zonse, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah49:33 Ndipo Hazori adzakhala mokhalamo ankhandwe, bwinja lacikhalire; simudzakhalamo munthu, simudzagonamo mwana wa munthu." 
Jeremiah49:34 Mau a Yehova amene anafika kwa Yeremiya mneneri, onena za Elamu poyamba kulamulira Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda, kuti," 
Jeremiah49:35 Yehova wa makamu atero: Taonani, ndidzatyola uta wa Elamu, ndiwo mtima wa mphamvu yao." 
Jeremiah49:36 Pa Elamu ndidzatengera mphepo zinai ku mbali zinai za mlengalenga, ndidzamwaza iwo ku mphepo zonsezo; ndipo sikudzakhala mtundu kumene opitikitsidwa a Elamu sadzafikako." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ndipo ndidzacititsa Elamu mantha pamaso pa amaliwongo ao, ndi pamaso pa iwo ofuna moyo wao; ndipo ndidzatengera coipa pa iwo, mkwiyo wanga waukali, ati Yehova; ndipo ndidzatumiza lupanga liwalondole, mpaka nditawatha;" 
Jeremiah49:38 ndipo ndidzaika mpando wacifumu wanga m'Elamu, ndipo ndidzaononga pamenepo mfumu ndi akulu, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah49:39 Koma padzaoneka masiku akutsiriza, kuti ndidzabwezanso undende wa Elamu, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah50:1 Mau amene ananena Yehova za Babulo, za dziko la Akasidi, mwa Yeremiya mneneri." 
Jeremiah50:2 Lalikirani mwa amitundu, falikitsani, kwezani mbendera; falikitsani, musabise; munene, Babulo wagwidwa, Beli wacitidwa manyazi, Merodake watyokatyoka, zosema zace zacitidwa manyazi, mafano ace atyokatyoka." 
Jeremiah50:3 Pakuti mtundu wa anthu udzaturuka kumpoto kudzamenyana naye, udzacititsa dziko lace bwinja, losakhalamo anthu; athawa, apita, anthu ndi nyama." 
Jeremiah50:4 Masiku omwewo, nthawi yomweyo, ati Yehova, ana a Israyeliadzadza, iwo ndi ana a Yuda; pamodzi adzayenda m'njira mwao alinkulira, nadzafuna Yehova Mulungu wao." 
Jeremiah50:5 Adzafunsira Ziyoni nkhope zao zirikuyang'ana kumeneko, ndi kuti, Tiyeni inu, dzilumikizeni kwa Yehova m'cipangano ca muyaya cimene sicidzaiwalika." 
Jeremiah50:6 Anthu anga anakhala nkhosa zotayika; abusa ao anazisokeretsa pa mapiri onyenga; acoka kuphiri kunka kucitunda; aiwala malo ao akupuma. 
Jeremiah50:7 Onse amene anazipeza anazidya; adani ao anati, Sitiparamula mlandu, cifukwa iwo anacimwira Yehova, ndiye mokhalamo zolungama, Yehova, ciyembekezo ca atate ao." 
Jeremiah50:8 Thawani pakati pa Babulo, turukani m'dziko la Akasidi, mukhale monga atonde patsogolo pa zoweta." 
Jeremiah50:9 Pakuti, taonani, ndidzabukitsa ndidzafikitsa kudzamenyana ndi Babulo msonkhano wa mitundu yaikuru kucokera ku dziko la kumpoto; ndipo adzaguba pomenyana ndi iye; kumeneko Babulo adzacotsedwa; mibvi yao idzakhala ngati ya munthu wamaluli wamphamvu; yosabwera cabe." 
Jeremiah50:10 Ndipo Kasidi adzakhala cofunkha; onse amene amfunkhitsa iye adzakhuta, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah50:11 Cifukwa mukondwa, cifukwa musekerera, inu amene mulanda colowa canga, cifukwa muli onenepa monga ng'ombe yamsoti yoponda tirigu, ndi kulira ngati akavalo olimba;" 
Jeremiah50:12 amai anu adzakhala ndi manyazi ambiri; amene anakubalani adzathedwa nzeru; taonani, adzakhala wapambuyo wa amitundu, cipululu, dziko louma, bwinja." 
Jeremiah50:13 Cifukwa ca mkwiyo wa Yehova sadzakhalamo anthu, koma padzakhala bwinja; onse akupita pa Babulo adzadabwa, adzatsonyera pa zobvuta zace zonse." 
Jeremiah50:14 Gubani ndi kuzungulira Babulo kumenyana naye, inu nonse okoka uta; mumponyere iye, osaderera mibvi; pakuti wacimwira Yehova." 
Jeremiah50:15 Mumpfuulire iye pomzungulira iye; pakuti wagwira mwendo; malinga ace agwa; makoma ace agwetsedwa; pakuti ndi kubwezera cilango kwa Yehova; mumbwezere cilango; monga iye wacita mumcitire iye momwemo. 
Jeremiah50:16 Muwathe ofesa ku Babulo, ndi iwo amene agwira zenga nyengo ya masika; cifukwa ca lupanga losautsa adzatembenukira yense kwa anthu ace, nadzathawira yense ku dziko lace." 
Jeremiah50:17 Israyeli ndiye nkhosa yolowerera, mikango yampitikitsa, poyamba inamudya mfumu ya Asuri; ndipo pomariza Nebukadirezara uyo watyola mafupa ace." 
Jeremiah50:18 Cifukwa cace atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli: Taonani, ndidzalanga mfumu ya ku Babulo ndi dziko lace, monga ndinalanga mfumu ya Asuri." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ndipo ndidzabwezeranso Israyeli ku busa lace, ndipo adzadya pa Karimeli ndi pa Basana, moyo wace nudzakhuta pa mapiri a Efraimu ndi m'Gileadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Masiku omwewo, nthawi yomweyo, ati Yehova, zoipa za Israyeli zidzafunidwa, koma zidzasoweka; ndi zocimwa za Yuda, koma sizidzapezeka; pakuti ndidzakhululukira iwo amene ndidzawasiya ngati cotsala." 
Jeremiah50:21 Kwera kukamenyana ndi dziko la Merataimu, ndi okhala m'Pekoli, ipha nuononge konse pambuyo pao, ati Yehova, cita monga mwa zonse ndinakuuza iwe." 
Jeremiah50:22 Phokoso la nkhondo liri m'dziko lino, ndi lakuononga kwakukuru." 
Jeremiah50:23 Nyundo ya dziko lonse yaduka ndi kutyoka! Babulo wasandulca bwinja pakati pa amitundu! 
Jeremiah50:24 Ndakuchera iwe msampha, ndi iwenso wagwidwa, iwe Babulo, ndipo sunadziwa, wapezeka, ndiponso wagwidwa, cifukwa walimbana ndi Yehova." 
Jeremiah50:25 Yehova watsegula pa nyumba ya zida zace, ndipo waturutsa zida za mkwiyo wace; pakuti Ambuye Yehova wa makamu, ali ndi nchito m'dziko la Akasidi." 
Jeremiah50:26 Tadzani kudzamenyana ndi iye kucokera ku malekezero ace, tsegulani pa nkhokwe zace; unjikani zace monga miyulu, mumuononge konse; pasatsale kanthu ka pa iye." 
Jeremiah50:27 Iphani ng'ombe zamphongo zace zonse; zitsikire kukaphedwa; tsoka iwo! pakuti tsiku lao lafika, tsiku la kulanga kwao." 
Jeremiah50:28 Mau a iwo akuthawa akupulumuka m'dziko la Babulo, kuti alalikire m'Ziyoni kubwezera cilango kwa Yehova Mulungu wathu, kubwezera cilango cifukwa ca Kacisi wace." 
Jeremiah50:29 Memezani amauta amenyane ndi Babulo, onse amene akoka uta; mummangire iye zitando pomzungulira iye, asapulumuke mmodzi wace yense; mumbwezere iye monga mwa nchito yace; monga mwa zonse wazicita, mumcitire iye; pakuti anamnyadira Yehova, Woyera wa Israyeli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Cifukwa cace anyamata ace adzagwa m'miseu yace, ndi anthu ankhondo ace onse adzatontholetsedwa tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah50:31 Taonani, nditsutsana nawe, wonyada iwe, ati Ambuye, Yehova wa makamu; pakuti tsiku lako lafika, nthawi imene ndidzakulanga iwe." 
Jeremiah50:32 Ndipo wonyadayo adzakhumudwa nadzagwa, ndipo palibe amene adzamuutsa iye; ndipo Ine ndidzayatsa moto m'midzi yace, ndipo udzatentha onse akumzungulira iye." 
Jeremiah50:33 Yehova wa makamu atero: Ana a Israyeli ndi ana a Yuda asautsidwa pamodzi; ndipo onse amene anawagwira ndende awagwiritsitsa; akana kuwamasula. 
Jeremiah50:34 Mombolo wao ngwa mphamvu; dzina lace Yehova wa makamu: adzawanenera mlandu wao ndithu; kuti apumitse dziko lapansi, nadzidzimutse okhala m'Babulo." 
Jeremiah50:35 Lupanga liri pa Akasidi, ati Yehova, pa okhala m'Babulo, pa akuru ace, ndi pa anzeru ace." 
Jeremiah50:36 Lupanga liri pa amatukutuku, ndipo adzapusa; lupanga liri pa anthu olimba ace, ndipo adzaopa." 
Jeremiah50:37 Lupanga liri pa akavalo ao, ndi pa magareta ao, ndi pa anthu onse osanganizidwa amene ali pakati pace, ndipo adzakhala ngati akazi; lupanga liri pa cuma cace, ndipo cidzalandidwa." 
Jeremiah50:38 Cirala ciri pa madzi ace, ndipo adzaphwa; pakuti ndi dziko la mafano osema, ndipo ayaruka ndi kufuna zoopsa." 
Jeremiah50:39 Cifukwa cace zirombo za kucipululu ndi mimbulu zidzakhalamo, ndi nthiwatiwa zidzakhala m'menemo; ndipo sadzakhalamo anthu konse; ndipo sadzakhalamo m'mibadwo mibadwo." 
Jeremiah50:40 Monga muja Yehova anagwetsa Sodomu ndi Gomora ndi midzi Inzace, ati Yehova; anthu sadzakhalamo, mwana wa munthu sadzagonamo." 
Jeremiah50:41 Taonani, anthu acokera kumpoto; ndiwo mtundu waukuru, ndipo mafumu ambiri adzaukitsidwa kucokera ku malekezero a dziko lapansi." 
Jeremiah50:42 Agwira uta ndi nthungo; ali ankharwe, alibe cifundo; mau ao apokosera ngati nyanja, ndipo akwera akavalo, yense aguba monga munthu wa kunkhondo, kukamenyana ndi iwe, mwana wamkazi wa Babulo." 
Jeremiah50:43 Mfumu ya ku Babulo yamva mbiri yao, ndipo manja ace alefuka; wagwidwa ndi nkhawa, ndi zowawa zonga za mkazi alimkudwala." 
Jeremiah50:44 Taonani, mtundu uja adzakwerera mudzi wolimba ngati mkango wocokera ku Yordano wosefuka; koma dzidzidzi ndidzauthamangitsa umcokere, ndipo ali yense amene asankhidwa, ndidzamuika woyang'anira wace; pakuti wakunga Ine ndani? adzandiikira nthawi ndani? ndipo mbusa adzaima pamaso panga ndani?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Cifukwa cace tamvani uphungu wa Yehova, umene waupangira pa Babulo; ndi zimene walingirira dziko la Akasidi; ndithu adzawakoka, ana ang'ono a zoweta; ndithu adzayesa busa lao bwinja pamodzi nao." 
Jeremiah50:46 Dziko lapansi linthunthumira, pa phokoso la kugwidwa kwa Babulo, ndipo mpfuu wamveka mwa amitundu." 
Jeremiah51:1 Yehova atero: Taonani, ndidzaukitsira Babulo, ndi iwo okhala m'Lebi-kamai, mphepo yoononga," 
Jeremiah51:2 Ndipo ndidzatuma ku Babulo alendo, amene adzamkupira iye, amene adzataya zonse m'dziko lace, pakuti tsiku la cisauko adzamenyana ndi iye pomzungulira pace." 
Jeremiah51:3 Wauta asakoke uta wace, asadzikweze m'malaya ace acitsulo; musasiye anyamata ace; muononge ndithu khamu lace lonse." 
Jeremiah51:4 Ndipo adzagwa ophedwa m'dziko la Akasidi, opyozedwa m'miseu yace." 
Jeremiah51:5 Pakuti Israyeli ndi Yuda sasiyidwa ndi Mulungu wao, ndiye Yehova wa makamu: ngakhale dziko lao ladzala ndi ucimo kucimwira Woyera wa Israyeli." 
Jeremiah51:6 Thawani pakati pa Babulo, yense apulumuke moyo wace; musathedwe m'coipa cace; pakuti ndi nthawi ya kubwezera cilango; Yehova adzambwezera iye mphotho yace." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babulo wakhala cikho cagolidi m'dzanja la Yehova, amene analedzeretsa dziko lonse lapansi; amitundu amwa vinyo wace; cifukwa cace amitundu ali ndi misala." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babulo wagwa dzidzidzi naonongedwa; mumkuwire iye; mutengere zowawa zace bvunguti, kapena angacire." 
Jeremiah51:9 Tikadaciritsa Babulo koma sanacire; mumsiye iye, tipite tonse yense ku dziko lace; pakuti ciweruziro cace cifikira kumwamba, cinyamulidwa mpaka kuthambo," 
Jeremiah51:10 Yehova waturutsa cilungamo cathu; tiyeni tilalikire m'Ziyoni nchito ya Yehova Mulungu wathu. 
Jeremiah51:11 Nolani mibvi; gwirani zolimba zikopa; Yehova waukitsa mtima wa mafumu a Amedi; cifukwa alingalirira Babulo kuti amuononge; pakuti ndi kubwezera cilango kwa Yehova; kubwezera cilango cifukwa ca Kacisi wace. 
Jeremiah51:12 Muwakwezere mbendera makoma a Babulo, mulimbikitse ulonda, muike alonda, mupangiretu olalira, pakuti Yehova waganiziratu ndi kucita comwe ananena za okhala m'Babulo." 
Jeremiah51:13 Iwe wokhala pa madzi ambiri, wocuruka cuma, cimariziro cako cafika, cilekezero ca kusirira kwako." 
Jeremiah51:14 Yehova wa makamu walumbira pa Iye mwini, kuti, Ndithu ndidzakudzaza iwe ndi anthu, monga ndi madzombe; ndipo adzakukwezera iwe mpfuu." 
Jeremiah51:15 Iye analenga dziko lapansi ndi mphamvu yace, wakhazika dziko lapansi ndi nzeru yace, ndi luso anayala thambo;" 
Jeremiah51:16 pamene Iye anena mau, pali unyinji wa madzi m'mwamba, ndipo akweretsa nkhungu ku malekezero a dziko lapansi, ayesa mphezi ya mvula, aturutsa mphepo ya m'nyumba za cuma zace." 
Jeremiah51:17 Anthu onse ali opulukira ndi opanda nzeru; wakusula golidi acitidwa manyazi ndi fanizo lace losema; pakuti fanizo lace loyenga liri bodza, mulibe mpweya m'menemo." 
Jeremiah51:18 Ngwacabe, ciphamaso; nthawi yakulangidwa kwao adzatayika." 
Jeremiah51:19 Gawo la Yakobo silifanafana ndi izo; pakuti Iye ndiye analenga zonse; Israyeli ndi mtundu wa colowa cace, dzina lace ndi Yehova wa makamu." 
Jeremiah51:20 Iwe ndiwe cibonga canga ndi zida zanga za nkhondo; ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola amitundu, ndi iwe ndidzaononga maufumu;" 
Jeremiah51:21 ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola kavalo ndi wakwera wace; 
Jeremiah51:22 ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola gareta ndi iye wokweramo; ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola mwamuna ndi mkazi; ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola wokalamba ndi mnyamata; ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola mnyamata ndi namwali; 
Jeremiah51:23 ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola mbusa ndi zoweta zace; ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola wakulima ndi gori la ng'ombe lace; ndi iwe ndidzatyolatyola akazembe ndi ziwanga," 
Jeremiah51:24 Ndipo ndidzabwezera Babulo ndi okhala m'Kasidi zoipa zao zonse anazicita m'Ziyoni pamaso panu, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah51:25 Taona, ndimenyana ndi iwe, iwe phiri lakuononga, ati Yehova, limene liononga dziko lonse; ndipo ndidzakutambasulira iwe dzanja langa, ndipo ndidzakugubuduza iwe kumatanthwe, ndipo ndidzakuyesa iwe phiri lotenthedwa." 
Jeremiah51:26 Ndipo sadzacotsa pa iwe mwala wa pangondya, kapena mwala wa pamaziko; koma udzakhala bwinja nthawi zonse, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah51:27 Kwezani mbendera m'dziko, ombani lipenga mwa amitundu, konzerani amitundu amenyane naye, mummemezere maufumu a Ararati, Mini, ndi Asikenaza; muike nduna; amenyane naye; mukweretse akavalo ngati mandowa." 
Jeremiah51:28 Konzerani amitundu amenyane ndi iye, mafumu a Amedi, akazembe ace, ndi ziwanga zace zonse, ndi dziko lonse la ufumu wace." 
Jeremiah51:29 Dziko linthunthumira ndi kuphwetekedwa, pakuti zimene Yehova analingalirira Babulo ziripobe, zoti ayese dziko la Babulo bwinja lopanda wokhalamo." 
Jeremiah51:30 Olimba a ku Babulo akana kumenyana, akhala m'malinga ao; mphamvu yao yalephera; akhala ngati akazi; nyumba zace zapsya ndi moto; akapici ace atyoka." 
Jeremiah51:31 Wamtokoma mmodzi adzathamanga kukakomana ndi mnzace, ndi mthenga mmodzi kukomana ndi mnzace, kukauza mfumu ya ku Babulo kuti mudzi wace wagwidwa ponsepo;" 
Jeremiah51:32 pamadooko patsekedwa, pamatamanda a mabango patenthedwa ndi moto, ndi anthu a nkhondo aopa." 
Jeremiah51:33 Pakuti atero Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli: Mwana wamkazi wa Babulo akunga dwale pamene aliunda; patsala kanthawi kakang'ono, ndipo nthawi yamasika idzamfikira iye." 
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo wandidya ine, wandiphwanya ine, wandiyesa ine ngati mbiya yopanda kanthu, wandimeza ngati ng'ona, wadzaza m'kamwa mwace ndi zotsekemera zanga, wanditaya ine," 
Jeremiah51:35 Wokhala m'Ziyoni adzati, Ciwawa anandicitira ine ndi thupi langa cikhale pa Babulo; nadzati Yerusalemu, Mwazi wanga ukhale pa okhala m'Kasidi." 
Jeremiah51:36 Cifukwa cace Yehova atero: Taona, ndidzanenera iwe mlandu wako, ndidzawabwezera cilango cifukwa ca iwe; ndidzaphwetsa nyanja yace, ndidzaphwetsa citsime cace." 
Jeremiah51:37 Ndipo Babulo adzasanduka miunda, mokhala ankhandwe, cizizwitso, cotsonyetsa, wopanda okhalamo." 
Jeremiah51:38 Adzabangula pamodzi ngati misona ya mikango; adzacita nthulu ngati ana a mikango. 
Jeremiah51:39 Pamene atentha, ndidzakonza madyerero ao, ndidzawaledzeretsa, kuti asangalale, agone cigonere, asanyamuke, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah51:40 Ndidzawagwetsa kuti aphedwe manga nkhosa zamphongo, ndi atonde." 
Jeremiah51:41 Sesake wagwidwatul cimene dziko lonse lapansi linacitamanda calandidwa dzidzidzi Babulo wakhalatu bwinja pakati pa amitundu 
Jeremiah51:42 Nyanja yakwera kufikira ku Babulo; wamira ndi mafunde ace aunyinji. 
Jeremiah51:43 Midzi yace yakhala bwinja, dziko louma, cipululu mosakhalamo anthu, mosapita mwana wa munthu ali yense." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ndipo Ine ndiweruza Beli m'Babulo, ndipo ndidzaturutsa m'kamwa mwace comwe wacimeza; ndipo amitundu sadzasonkhaniranso konse kwa iye; inde, khoma la Babulo lidzagwa." 
Jeremiah51:45 Anthu anga, turukani pakati pace, mudzipulumutse munthu yense ku mkwiyo waukali wa Yehova." 
Jeremiah51:46 Mtima wanu usalefuke, musaope cifukwa ca mbiri imene idzamveka m'dzikomu; pakuti mbiri idzafika caka cina, pambuyo pace caka cina mbiri yina, ndi ciwawa m'dziko, wolamulira kumenyana ndi wolamulira." 
Jeremiah51:47 Cifukwa cace, taonani, masiku alinkudza, amene ndidzaweruza mafano osemasema a Babulo, ndipo dziko lace lonse lidzakhala ndi manyazi; ndipo ophedwa ace onse adzagwa pakati pace." 
Jeremiah51:48 Pamenepo kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, ndi zonse ziri m'menemo, zidzayimba mokondwerera Babulo; pakuti akufunkha adzafika kwa iye kucokera kumpoto, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah51:49 Monga Babulo wagwetsa ophedwa a Israyeli, momwemo pa Babulo padzagwa ophedwa a dziko lonse." 
Jeremiah51:50 Inu amene mwapulumuka kulupanga, pitani inu, musaime ciimire; mukumbukire Yehova kutari, Yerusalemu alowe m'mtima mwanu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Tiri ndi manyazi, cifukwa tamva mnyozo; manyazi aphimba nkhope zathu; pakuti alendo alowa m'malo opatulika a nyumba ya Yehova." 
Jeremiah51:52 Cifukwa cace, taona, masiku alinkudza, ati Yehova, amene ndidzaweruza mafano ace; ndipo pa dziko lace lonse olasidwa adzabuula." 
Jeremiah51:53 Ngakhale Babulo adzakwera kumwamba, ngakhale adzalimbitsa msanje wa mphamvu yace, koma kucokera kwa Ine akufunkha adzafika kwa iye, ati Yehova." 
Jeremiah51:54 Mau akupfuula ocokera ku Babulo, ndi a cionongeko cacikuru ku dziko la Akasidi!" 
Jeremiah51:55 pakuti Yehova afunkha Babulo, aononga m'menemo mau akuru; ndipo mafunde ace adzakokoma ngati madzi ambiri, mau ao aphokosera;" 
Jeremiah51:56 pakuti wakufunkha wafika kwa iye, kwa Babulo, ndi anthu ace olimba agwidwa, mauta ao atyokatyoka, pakuti Yehova ndiye Mulungu wakubwezera, adzabwezera ndithu." 
Jeremiah51:57 Ndipo ndidzaledzeretsa akuru ace ndi anzeru ace, akazembe ace ndi ziwanga zace, ndi anthu ace olimba; ndipo adzagona cigonere, sadzanyamuka, ati Mfumu, dzina lace ndi Yehova wa makamu." 
Jeremiah51:58 Yehova wa makamu atero: Makoma otakata a Babulo adzagwetsedwa ndithu, ndi zitseko zace zazitari zidzatenthedwa ndi moto; anthu adzagwirira nchito cabe, ndi mitundu ya anthu idzagwirira moto, nidzatopa." 
Jeremiah51:59 Mau amene Yeremiya mneneri anauza Seraya mwana wa Neriya, mwana wa Maseya, pamene iye ananka ndi Zedekiya mfumu ya Yuda ku Babulo caka cacinai ca ufumu wace. Ndipo Seraya anali kapitao wa cigono cace." 
Jeremiah51:60 Ndipo Yeremiya analemba m'buku coipa conse cimene cidzafika pa Babulo, mau onse awa olembedwa za Babulo." 
Jeremiah51:61 Ndipo Yeremiya anati kwa Seraya, Pamene ufika ku Babulo, samalira kuti uwerenge mau awa onse," 
Jeremiah51:62 nuti, inu Yehova, mwanena za malo ano, kuti mudzawatha, kuti asakhalemo, ngakhale anthu ngakhale nyama, koma akhale bwinja nthawi za nthawi." 
Jeremiah51:63 Ndipo padzakhala, utatha kuwerenga buku ili, Ib ulimange ndi mwala, nuliponye pakati pa Firate;" 
Jeremiah51:64 nuti, Comweco adzamira Babulo, sadzaukanso cifukwa ca coipa cimene ndidzamtengera iye; ndipo adzatopa. Mau a Yeremiya ndi omwewo." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiya anali wa zaka makumi awiri kudza cimodzi pamene analowa ufumu wace; ndipo analamulira m'Yerusalemu zaka khumi kudza cimodzi; dzina la amace ndi Hamutala mwana wamkazi wa Yeremiya wa ku Libina. 
Jeremiah52:2 Ndipo iye anacita zoipa pamaso pa Yehova, monga mwa zonse anazicita Yehoyakimu." 
Jeremiah52:3 Pakuti zonse zinacitika m'Yerusalemu ndi m'Yuda cifukwa ca mkwiyo wa Yehova, mpaka anawacotsa pamaso pace; ndipo Zedekiya anampandukira mfumu ya Babulo." 
Jeremiah52:4 Ndipo panaoneka caka cacisanu ndi cinai ca ufumu wace mwezi wakhumi, tsiku lakhumi la mwezi, Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo anafika, iye ndi nkhondo yace, kuti amenyane ndi Yerusalemu, ndipo anammangira zitando; ndipo anammangira malinga pozungulira pace." 
Jeremiah52:5 Ndipo mudzi unazingidwa mpaka caka ca khumi ndi cimodzi ca mfumu Zedekiya. 
Jeremiah52:6 Mwezi wacinai, tsiku lacisanu ndi cinai la mwezi, njala inabvuta m'mudzi, ndipo anthu a m'dziko analibe zakudya." 
Jeremiah52:7 Pamenepo anaboola mudzi, ndipo anathawa amuna onse a nkhondo, naturuka m'mudzi usiku pa njira ya kucipata ca pakati pa makoma awiri, imene inali pa munda wa mfumu; Akasidi alikumenyana ndi mudzi pozungulira pace, ndipo anapita njira ya kucidikha." 
Jeremiah52:8 Koma nkhondo ya Akasidi inamtsata mfumu, nimpeza Zedekiya m'zidikha za ku Yeriko; ndipo nkhondo yace yonse inambalalikira iye." 
Jeremiah52:9 Ndipo anamgwira iye, namtengera kwa mfumu ya ku Babulo ku Ribila m'dziko la Hamati; ndipo iye anamweruza." 
Jeremiah52:10 Ndipo mfumu ya ku Babulo inapha ana a Zedekiya pamaso pace; niphanso akuru onse a Yuda m'Ribila. 
Jeremiah52:11 Ndipo anakolowola maso a Zedekiya, ndipo mfumu ya ku Babulo inammanga m'zigologolo, nimtengera ku Babulo, nimuika m'ndende mpaka tsiku la kufa kwace." 
Jeremiah52:12 Mwezi wacisanu, tsiku lakhumi la mwezi, ndico caka cakhumi ndi cisanu ndi cinai ca Nebukadirezara, mfumu ya ku Babulo, analowa m'Yerusalemu Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda, amene anaimirira pamaso pa mfumu ya ku Babulo:" 
Jeremiah52:13 ndipo anatentha nyumba ya Yehova ndi nyumba ya mfumu, ndi nyumba zonse za m'Yerusalemu, ngakhale zinyumba zazikuru zonse, anazitentha ndi moto." 
Jeremiah52:14 Ndipo nkhondo yonse ya Akasidi, imene inali ndi kapitao wa alonda, inagumula makoma onse a Yerusalemu pomzungulira pace." 
Jeremiah52:15 Ndipo Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anatenga ndende anthu aumphawi, ndi anthu otsala amene anatsala m'mudzi, ndi amene anapandukira, kutsata mfumu ya ku Babulo, ndi otsala a unyinjiwo." 
Jeremiah52:16 Koma Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anasiya aumphawi a padziko akhale akulima mphesa ndi akulima m'minda. 
Jeremiah52:17 Ndi mizati yamkuwa imene inali m'nyumba ya Yehova, ndi zoikapo ndi thawale lamkuwa zimene zinali m'nyumba ya Yehova, Akasidi anazityolatyola, nanka nao mkuwa wace wonse ku Babulo." 
Jeremiah52:18 Ndiponso miphika, ndi zoolera, ndi mbano zao, ndi mbale, ndi zipande, ndi zipangizo zonse zamkuwa zimene anatumikira nazo, anazicotsa." 
Jeremiah52:19 Ndi zikho, ndi zopalira moto, ndi mbale, ndi miphika, ndi zoikapo nyali, ndi zipande, ndi mitsuko; ndi golidi, wa zija zagolidi, ndi siliva, wa zija zasiliva, kapitao wa alonda anazicotsa." 
Jeremiah52:20 Nsanamira ziwirizo, thawale limodzilo, ndi ng'ombe zamkuwa zinali pansi pa zoikapo, zimene mfumu Solomo anazipangira nyumba ya Yehova; mkuwa wa zipangizo zonsezi sanatha kuyesa kulemera kwace." 
Jeremiah52:21 Koma nsanamirazo, utari wace wa nsanamira yina unafikira mikono khumi mphambu isanu ndi itatu; ndi cingwe ca mikono khumi ndi iwiri cinaizinga; kucindikira kwace kunali zala zinai; inali yagweregwere." 
Jeremiah52:22 Ndipo korona wamkuwa anali pamwamba pace; utari wace wa korona mmodzi unali wa mikono isanu, ndi made ndi makangaza pakorona pozungulira pace, onse amkuwa: nsanamira inzace yomwe inali nazo zonga zomwezi, ndi makangaza." 
Jeremiah52:23 Ndipo pambali pace panali makangaza makumi asanu ndi anai kudza asanu ndi limodzi; ndipo makangaza onse anali zana limodzi pamade pozungulira pace. 
Jeremiah52:24 Ndipo kapitao wa alonda anatenga Seraya mkuru wansembe, ndi Zefaniya wansembe waciwiri, ndi akudikira pakhomo atatu;" 
Jeremiah52:25 ndipo m'mudzi anatenga kazembe amene anali woyang'anira anthu a nkhondo ndi amuna asanu ndi awiri a iwo akuona nkhope ya mfumu, amene anapezedwa m'mudzi; ndi mlembi wa kazembe wa nkhondo, amene akamemeza anthu a m'dziko; ndi amuna makumi asanu ndi limodzi a anthu a m'dziko, amene anapezedwa pakati pa mudzi." 
Jeremiah52:26 Ndipo Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anatenga iwo, nadza nao kwa mfumu ya ku Babulo ku Ribila." 
Jeremiah52:27 Ndipo mfumu ya ku Babulo anawakantha, nawapha pa Ribila m'dziko la Hamati. Comweco Yuda anatengedwa ndende kuturuka m'dziko lace." 
Jeremiah52:28 Amenewa ndi anthu amene Nebukadirezara anatenga ndende: caka cacisanu ndi ciwiri, Ayuda zikwi zitatu kudza makumi awiri ndi atatu;" 
Jeremiah52:29 caka cakhumi ndi cisanu ndi citatu ca Nebukadirezara iye anatenga ndende kucokera m'Yerusalemu anthu mazana asanu ndi atatu kudza makumi atatu ndi awiri; 
Jeremiah52:30 caka ca makumi awiri ndi zitatu ca Nebukadirezara Nebuzaradani kapitao wa alonda anatenga ndende Ayuda mazana asanu ndi awiri kudza makumi anai ndi asanu; anthu onse anali zikwi zinai kudza mazana asanu ndi limodzi. 
Jeremiah52:31 Ndipo panali caka ca makumi atatu ndi zisanu ndi ziwiri ca undende wa Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda, mwezi wakhumi ndi iwiri, tsiku la makumi awiri ndi asanu la mwezi, Evili-Merodaki mfumu ya ku Babulo anaweramutsa mutu wa Yehoyakimu mfumu ya Yuda, namturutsa iye m'ndende;" 
Jeremiah52:32 nanena naye bwino, naika mpando wace upose mipando ya mafumu amene anali naye m'Babulo." 
Jeremiah52:33 Ndipo anapindula zobvala zace za m'ndende, ndipo sanaleka kudya pamaso pace masiku onse a moyo wace." 
Jeremiah52:34 Koma phoso lace mfumu ya ku Babulo sanaleka kumpatsa, phoso tsiku ndi tsiku gawo lace, mpaka tsiku la kufa kwace, masiku onse a moyo wace." 
Lamentations1:1 Ha! mudziwo unadzala anthu, ukhalatu pa wokha! Ukunga mkazi wamasiye! Waukuruwo mwa amitundu, kalonga wamkazi m'madera a dziko Wasanduka wolamba!" 
Lamentations1:2 Uliralira usiku; misozi yace iri pa masaya ace; Mwa onse amene anaukonda mulibe mmodzi wakuutonthoza: Mabwenzi ace onse aucitira ziwembu, Asanduka adani ace." 
Lamentations1:3 Yuda watengedwa ndende cifukwa ca msauko ndi ukapolo waukuru; Akhala mwa amitundu, sapeza popuma; Onse akumlondola anampeza pakati popsinjikiza." 
Lamentations1:4 M'njira za Ziyoni mulira posoweka akudzera msonkhano; Pa zipata zace zonse papasuka; ansembe ace onse ausa moyo; Anamwali ace asautsidwa; iye mwini namva zowawa. 
Lamentations1:5 Amaliwongo ace asanduka akuru ace, adani ace napindula; Pakuti Yehova wamsautsa pocuruka zolakwa zace; Ana ace ang'ono alowa m'ndende pamaso pa adani ace." 
Lamentations1:6 Ulemu wace wonse wamcokera mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; Akalonga ace asanduka nswala zosapeza busa, Anayenda opanda mphamvu pamaso pa wompitikitsa." 
Lamentations1:7 M'masiku a msauko wace ndi kusocera kwace Yerusalemu ukumbukira zokondweretsa zace zonse zacikhalire; Pogwidwa anthu ace ndi mdaniyo popanda wakuupulumutsa, Adaniwo anamuona naseka mwacipongwe mabwinja ace." 
Lamentations1:8 Yerusalemu wacimwa kwambiri; cifukwa cace wasanduka cinthu conyansa; Onse akuulemekeza aupeputsa, pakuti auona wamarisece; Inde, uusa moyo, nubwerera m'mbuyo." 
Lamentations1:9 Udio wace unali m'nsaru zace; sunakumbukira citsiriziro cace; Cifukwa cace watsika mozizwitsa; ulibe wakuutonthoza; Taonani Yehova, msauko wanga, pakuti mdaniyo wadzikuzayekha." 
Lamentations1:10 Amaliwongo atambasulira manja ao pa zokondweretsa zace zonse; Pakuti waona amitundu atalowa m'malo ace opatulika, Amene munalamulira kuti asalowe mumsonkhano mwanu." 
Lamentations1:11 Anthu ace onse ausa moyo nafunafuna mkate; Ndi zokondweretsa zao agula zakudya kuti atsitsimutse moyo wao; Taonani, Yehova, nimupenye; pakuti ndasanduka wonyansa." 
Lamentations1:12 Kodi muyesa cimeneci cabe, nonsenu opita panjira? Penyani nimuone, kodi ciripo cisoni cina ngati cangaci amandimvetsa ine, Cimene Yehova wandisautsa naco tsiku la mkwiyo wace waukali?" 
Lamentations1:13 Anatumiza moto wocokera kumwamba kulowa m'mafupa anga, unawagonjetsa; Wachera mapazi anga ukonde, wandibwezera m'mbuyo; Wandipululutsa ndi kundilefula tsiku lonse." 
Lamentations1:14 Gori la zolakwa zanga lamangidwa ndi dzanja lace; Zalukidwa, zakwera pakhosi panga; iye wakhumudwitsa mphamvuyanga; Ambuye wandipereka m'manja mwao, sindithai kuwalaka." 
Lamentations1:15 Ambuye wapepula ngwazi zanga zonse pakati panga; Waitanira msonkhano pa ine kuti uphwanye anyamata anga, Ambuye wapondereza namwaliyo, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, monga mopondera mphesa." 
Lamentations1:16 Cifukwa ca zimenezi ndilira; diso langa, diso langatu likudza madzi: Pakuti wonditonthoza, wotsitsimutsa moyo wanga, anditarikira; Ana anga asungulumwa, pakuti adaniwo apambana." 
Lamentations1:17 Ziyoni atambasula manja ace, palibe wakumtonthoza; Yehova walamulira kuti omzungulira Yakobo akhale adani ace; Yerusalemu wasanduka cinthu conyansa pakati pao."
