Lamentations1:18 Yehova ali wolungama; pakuti ndapikisana ndi m'kamwa mwace: Mudtvetu, mitundu ya anthu nonsenu, nimuone cisoni canga; Anamwali ndi anyamata anga atha kulowa m'ndende." 
Lamentations1:19 Ndinaitanaakundikondawokoma anandinyenga; Ansembe ndi akulu anga anamwalira m'mudzimu, Alikufunafuna zakudya zotsitsimutsa miyoyo yao." 
Lamentations1:20 Onani, Yehova; pakuti ndabvutika, m'kati mwanga mugwedezeka; Mtima wanga wasanduka mwa ine; pakuti ndapikisana nanu ndithu; Kunjako lupanga limangopha ana; m'nyumba muli imfa." 
Lamentations1:21 Iwo anamva kuti ndiusa moyo, palibe wonditonthoza; Adani anga onse atha kumva msauko wanga, nakondwera kuti mwatero ndinu; Mudzafikitsa tsiku lija mwalichula, ndipo iwowo adzanga ine." 
Lamentations1:22 Zoipa zao zonse zidze pamaso panu, Muwacitire monga mwandicitira ine cifukwa ca zolakwa zanga zonse, Pakuti ndiusa moyo kwambiri, ndi kulefuka mtima wanga," 
Lamentations2:1 Ambuye waphimbatu ndi mtambo mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, pomkwiyira! Wagwetsa pansi kucokera kumwamba kukoma kwace kwa Israyeli; Osakumbukira poponda mapazi ace tsiku la mkwiyo wace." 
Lamentations2:2 Yehova wameza nyumba zonse za Yakobo osazicitira cisoni; Wagumula malinga a mwana wamkazi wa Yuda mwa ukali wace; Wawagwetsera pansi, waipitsa ufumuwo ndi akalonga ace." 
Lamentations2:3 Pokwiya moopsya walikha nyanga zonse za Israyeli; Wabweza m'mbuyo dzanja lace lamanja pamaso pa adaniwo, Natentha Yakobo ngati moto wamalawi wonyambita mozungulira." 
Lamentations2:4 Wathifula uta wace ngati mdani, waima ndi dzanja lace lamanja ngati mmaliwongo; Wapha onse okondweretsa maso; Watsanulira ukali wace ngati moto pa hema wa mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni." 
Lamentations2:5 Yehova wasanduka mdani, wameza Israyeli; Wameza zinyumba zace zonse, wapasula malinga ace; Nacurukitsira mwana wamkazi wa Yuda maliro ndi cibumo." 
Lamentations2:6 Wacotsa mwamphamvu dindiro lace ngati la m'munda; Waononga mosonkhanira mwace; Yehova waiwalitsa anthu msonkhano ndi sabata m'Ziyoni; Wanyoza mfumu ndi wansembe mokwiya mwaukali. 
Lamentations2:7 Ambuye wataya guwa lace la nsembe, malo ace opatulika amnyansira; Wapereka m'manja a adani ace makoma a zinyumba zace; Iwo anaphokosera m'nyumba ya Yehova ngati tsiku la msonkhano." 
Lamentations2:8 Yehova watsimikiza mtima kupasula linga la mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; Watambalika cingwe, osabweza dzanja lace kuti lisaonongepo; Waliritsa chemba ndi linga; zilefuka pamodzi." 
Lamentations2:9 Zipata zace zalowa pansi; waononga ndi kutyola mipiringidzo yace; Mfumu yace ndi akalonga ace ali pakati pa amitundu akusowa cilamulo; Inde, aneneri ace samalandira masomphenya kwa Yehova." 
Lamentations2:10 Akulu a mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni akhala pansi natonthola; Aponya pfumbi pa mitu yao, namangirira ciguduli m'cuuno mwao: Anamwali a ku Yerusalemu aweramitsa pansi mitu yao." 
Lamentations2:11 Maso anga alefuka ndi misozi, m'kati mwanga mugwedezeka; Ciwindi canga cagwa pansi cifukwa ca kupasuka kwa mwana wamkazi wa anthu amtundu wanga; Cifukwa tiana ndi oyamwa akomoka m'makwalala a mudziwu." 
Lamentations2:12 Amati kwa amao, Tirigu ndi vinyo ali kuti? Pokomoka iwo ngati olasidwa m'makwalala a mudziwu, Potsanulidwa miyoyo yao pa zifuwa za amao." 
Lamentations2:13 Ndikucitire umboni wotani? ndikuyerekeze ndi ciani, mwana wamkazi wa Yerusalemu? Ndikulinganize ndi ciani kuti ndikutonthoze, namwaliwe, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni? Popeza akula ngati nyanja; ndani angakucize?" 
Lamentations2:14 Aneneri ako anakuonera masomphenya acabe ndi opusa; Osaulula mphulupulu yako kuti abweze undende wako, Koma anakuonera manenero acabe ndi opambutsa." 
Lamentations2:15 Onse opita panjira akuombera manja: Atsonya, napukusira mitu yao pa mwana wamkazi wa Yerusalemu, nati, Kodi uwu ndi mudzi wochedwa wokongola, wangwiro, wokondweretsa dziko lonse?" 
Lamentations2:16 Adani ako onse ayasamira pa iwe, Atsonya nakukuta mano, nati, Taumeza; Ndithu ili ndi tsiku tinaliyembekezalo, talipeza, taliona." 
Lamentations2:17 Yehova wacita comwe analingalira; Watsiriza mau ace, amene analamulira nthawi yakale; Wagwetsa osacitira cisoni; Wakondweretsa adani pa iwe, Wakweza nyanga ya amaliwongo ako." 
Lamentations2:18 Mtima wao unapfuula kwa Ambuye, Linga iwe la mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, igwe misozi ngati mtsinje usana ndi usiku; Usapume kanthawi, asaleke mwana wa diso lako." 
Lamentations2:19 Tauka, tapfuula usiku, poyamba kulonda; Tsanulira mtima wako ngati madzi pamaso pa Ambuye; Takwezera maso ako kwa Iye, cifukwa ca moyo wa tiana tako, Timene tilefuka ndi njala pa malekezero a makwalala onse." 
Lamentations2:20 Onani Yehova, nimupenye, mwacitira ayani ici? Kodi akazi adzadya zipatso zao, kunena ana amene anawaseweza? Kodi wansembe ndi mneneri adzaphedwa m'malo opatulika a Ambuye?" 
Lamentations2:21 Wamng'ono ndi nkhalamba agona pansi m'makwalala; Anamwali ndi anyamata anga agwa ndi lupanga; Munawapha tsiku la mkwiyo wanu, munawagwaza osacitira cisoni." 
Lamentations2:22 Mwaitana zondiopsya mozungulira ngati tsiku la msonkhano; Panalibe wopulumuka ndi wotsala tsiku la mkwiyo wa Yehova; Omwe ndinawaseweza ndi kuwalera, adaniwo anawatsiriza." 
Lamentations3:1 Ine ndine munthuyu wakuona msauko ndi ndodo ya ukali wace. 
Lamentations3:2 Wanditsogolera, nandiyendetsa mumdima, si m'kuunika ai." 
Lamentations3:3 Zoonadi amandibwezera-bwezera dzanja lace monditsutsa tsiku lonse. 
Lamentations3:4 Wagugitsa thupi langa ndi khungu langa, natyola mafupa anga." 
Lamentations3:5 Wandimangira zitando za nkhondo, wandizinga ndi ulembe ndi mabvuto." 
Lamentations3:6 Wandikhalitsa mumdima ngati akufakale. 
Lamentations3:7 Wanditsekereza ndi guta, sindingaturuke; walemeretsa unyolo wanga." 
Lamentations3:8 Inde, popfuula ine ndi kuitana andithandize amakaniza pemphero langa." 
Lamentations3:9 Watsekereza njira zanga ndi miya la yosema, nakhotetsa mayendedwe anga." 
Lamentations3:10 Andikhalira cirombo colalira kapena mkango mobisalira. 
Lamentations3:11 Wapambutsa njira zanga, nanding'amba; nandipululutsa." 
Lamentations3:12 Wathifula uta wace, nandiyesa polozetsa mubvi." 
Lamentations3:13 Walowetsa m'imso mwanga mibvi ya m'phodo mwace. 
Lamentations3:14 Ndasanduka wondiseka mtundu wanga wonse, ndi nyimbo yao tsiku lonse." 
Lamentations3:15 Wandidzaza ndi zowawa, wandikhutitsa civumulo." 
Lamentations3:16 Watyolanso mano anga ndi tinsangalabwi, wandikuta ndi phulusa." 
Lamentations3:17 Watarikitsanso moyo wanga ndi mtendere; ndinaiwala zabwino. 
Lamentations3:18 Ndipo ndinati, Mphamvu yanga yatha, osayembekezanso kanthu kwa Yehova." 
Lamentations3:19 Kumbukirani msauko Wanga ndi kusocera kwanga, ndizo civumulo ndi ndulu." 
Lamentations3:20 Moyo wanga uzikumbukirabe nuwerama mwa ine," 
Lamentations3:21 Ndiri naco ciyembekezo popeza ndilingalira ici ndiyembekeza kanthu. 
Lamentations3:22 Cifukwa cakusathedwa ife ndico cifundo ca Yehova, pakuti cisoni cace sicileka;" 
Lamentations3:23 Cioneka catsopano m'mawa ndi m'mawa; mukhulupirika ndithu. 
Lamentations3:24 Moyo wanga uti, Gawo langa ndiye Yehova; cifukwa cace ndidzakhulupirira." 
Lamentations3:25 Yehova akhalira wabwino omlindirira, ndi moyo womfunafuna." 
Lamentations3:26 Nkokoma kuti munthu ayembekeze ndi kulindirira modekha cipulumutso ca Yehova. 
Lamentations3:27 Nkokoma kuti munthu asenze gori ali wamng'ono. 
Lamentations3:28 Akhale pa yekha, natonthole, pakuti Mulungu wamsenzetsa ilo." 
Lamentations3:29 Aike kamwa lace m'pfumbi; kapena ciripo ciyembekezo. 
Lamentations3:30 Atembenuzire wompanda tsaya lace, adzazidwe ndi citonzo." 
Lamentations3:31 Pakuti Yehova sadzataya kufikira nthawi zonse," 
Lamentations3:32 Angakhale aliritsa, koma adzacitira cisoni monga mwa kucuruka kwa zifundo zace." 
Lamentations3:33 Pakuti samasautsa dala, ngakhale kumvetsa ana a anthu cisoni." 
Lamentations3:34 Kupondereza andende onse a m'dziko," 
Lamentations3:35 Kupambutsa ciweruzo ca munthu pamaso pa Wam'mwambamwamba," 
Lamentations3:36 Kukhotetsa mlandu wa munthu, zonsezi Ambuye sazikonda." 
Lamentations3:37 Ndani anganene, conena cace ndi kucitikadi, ngati Ambuye salamulira?" 
Lamentations3:38 Kodi m'kamwa mwa Wam'mwambamwamba simuturuka zobvuta ndi zabwino? 
Lamentations3:39 Kodi munthu wamoyo adandauliranji pokhala m'zocimwa zace? 
Lamentations3:40 Tisanthule ntiyese njira zathu ntibwerenso kwa Yehova. 
Lamentations3:41 Titukulire mitima yathu ndi, manja athu omwe kwa Mulungu ali kumwamba." 
Lamentations3:42 Ife tilakwa ndi kupikisana nanu, ndipo Inu simunatikhululukira." 
Lamentations3:43 Mwadzikuta ndi mkwiyo ndi kutilondola, mwatipha osacitira cisoni." 
Lamentations3:44 Mwadzikuta ndi mtambo kuti pemphero lathu lisapyolemo. 
Lamentations3:45 Mwatiika pakati pa amitundu ngati zinyalala ndi za kudzala. 
Lamentations3:46 Adani athu onse anatiyasamira," 
Lamentations3:47 Mantha ndi dzenje zitifikira, ndiphokose ndi cionongeko." 
Lamentations3:48 M'diso mwanga mutsikamitsinje ya madzi cifukwa ca mwana wamkazi wa anthu amtundu wanga woonongedwa," 
Lamentations3:49 Diso langa lingotsanulira osaleka, osapumula," 
Lamentations3:50 Kufikira Yehova adzazolika kumwamba ndi kuona; 
Lamentations3:51 Diso langa limvetsa moyo wanga zowawa cifukwa ca ana akazi onse a m'mudzi mwanga. 
Lamentations3:52 Ondida opanda cifukwa anandiinga ngati mbalame; 
Lamentations3:53 Anaononga moyo wanga m'dzenje, naponya mwala pamwambapaine;" 
Lamentations3:54 Madzi anayenda pamwamba pa mutu panga, ndinati, dalikhidwa." 
Lamentations3:55 Ndinaitana dzina lanu, Yehova, ndiri m'dzenje lapansi;" 
Lamentations3:56 Munamva mau anga; musabise khutu lanu popuma ndi popfuulaine. 
Lamentations3:57 Munayandikira tsiku la kukuitanani ine; munati, Usaope." 
Lamentations3:58 Ambuye munanenera moyo wanga mirandu yace; munaombola moyo wanga. 
Lamentations3:59 Yehova, mwaona coipa anandicitiraco, mundiweruzire;" 
Lamentations3:60 Mwaona kubwezera kwao konse ndi zopangira zao zonse za pa ine. 
Lamentations3:61 Mwamva citonzo cao, Yehova, ndi zopangira zao zonse za pa ine," 
Lamentations3:62 Milomo ya akutsutsana nane ndi zolingalira zao za pa ine tsiku lonse. 
Lamentations3:63 Taonani kukhala ndi kunyamuka kwao; ndine nyimbo yao. 
Lamentations3:64 Mudzawabwezera cilango, Yehova, monga mwa macitidwe a manja ao;" 
Lamentations3:65 Muphimbe mtima wao ndi kuwatemberera; 
Lamentations3:66 Mudzawalondola mokwiya ndi kuwaononga pansi pa thambo la Yehova. 
Lamentations4:1 Ha! golidi wagugadi; golidi woona woposa wasandulika; Miyala ya malo opatulika yakhutulidwa pa malekezero a makwalalaonse. 
Lamentations4:2 Ana a Ziyoni a mtengo wapatari, olingana ndi golidi woyengetsa, Angoyesedwa ngati mbiya zadothi zozipanga manja a woumba." 
Lamentations4:3 Angakhale ankhandwe amapatsa bere, nayamwitsa ana ao; Koma mwana wamkazi wa anthu amtundu wanga wasanduka wankhanza, ngati nthiwatiwa za m'cipululu." 
Lamentations4:4 Lilime la mwana woyamwa limamatira kumalakalaka kwace ndi ludzu; Ana ang'ono apempha mkate koma palibe wakuwanyemera. 
Lamentations4:5 Omwe anadya zolongosoka angosiyidwa m'makwalala; Omwe analeredwa nabvekedwa mlangali afungatira madzala. 
Lamentations4:6 Pakuti mphulupulu ya mwana wamkazi wa anthu amtundu wanga, ikula koposa cimo la Sodomu, Umene unapasuka m'kamphindi, anthu osaucitira kanthu." 
Lamentations4:7 Omveka ace anakonzeka koposa cipale cofewa, nayera koposa mkaka, Matupi ao anafiira koposa timiyala toti pyu; maonekedwe ao ananga a safiro wa mtengo wapatari." 
Lamentations4:8 Maonekedwe ao ada koposa makala, sazindikirika m'makwalala; Khungu lao limamatira pa mafupa ao, lakhwinyata, lasanduka ngati ndodo." 
Lamentations4:9 Ophedwa ndi lupanga amva bwino kupambana ophedwa ndi njala; Pakuti amenewa angokwalika napyozedwa, posowa zipatso za m'munda." 
Lamentations4:10 Manja a akazi acisoni anaphika anaanao; Anali cakudya cao poonongeka mwana wamkazi wa anthu a mtundu wanga. 
Lamentations4:11 Yehova wakwaniritsa kuzaza kwace, watsanulira ukali wace; Anayatsa moto m'Ziyoni, unanyambita maziko ace," 
Lamentations4:12 Mafumu a dziko lapansi sanakhulupirira, ngakhale onse okhala kunja kuno, Kuti adani ndi amaliwongo adzalowadi m'zipata za Yerusalemu." 
Lamentations4:13 Ndico cifukwa ca macimo a aneneri ndi mphulupulu za ansembeace, Amene anakhetsa mwazi wa olungama pakati pace." 
Lamentations4:14 Asocera m'makwalala ngati akhungu, aipsidwa ndi mwazi; Anthu sangakhudze zobvala zao." 
Lamentations4:15 Amapfuula kwa iwo, Cokani, osakonzeka inu, cokani, cokani, musakhudze kanthu. Pothawa iwo ndi kusocera, anthu anati mwa amitundu, Sadzagoneranso kuno." 
Lamentations4:16 Mkwiyo wa Yehova unawalekanitsa, sadzawasamaliranso; Iwo sanalemekeza ansembe, sanakomera mtima akulu." 
Lamentations4:17 Maso athu athedwa, tikali ndi moyo, poyembekeza thandizo cabe; Kudikira tinadikira mtundu wosatha kupulumutsa." 
Lamentations4:18 Amalondola mapazi athu, sitingayende m'makwalala athu; Citsiriziro cathu cayandikira, masiku athu akwaniridwa; pakuti citsiriziro cathu cafikadi." 
Lamentations4:19 Otilondola anaposa ziombankhanga za m'mlengalenga m'liwilo lao, Anatithamangitsa pamapiri natilalira m'cipululu." 
Lamentations4:20 Wodzozedwa wa Yehova, ndiye mpweya wa m'mphuno mwathu, anagwidwa m'maenje ao; Amene tinanena kuti, Tidzakhala m'mthunzi mwace pakati pa amitundu," 
Lamentations4:21 Kondwera nusangalale, mwana wamkazi wa Edomu, wokhala m'dzikola Uzi; Cikho cidzapita ngakhale mwa iwenso; udzaledzera ndi kubvulazako." 
Lamentations4:22 Mphulupulu yako yatha, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, Yehova sadzakutenganso ndende; Koma adzazonda mphulupulu yako, mwana wa mkazi wa Edomu, nadzabvumbulutsa zocimwa zako." 
Lamentations5:1 Yehova, kumbukirani cotigweraci, Penyani nimuone citonzo cathu." 
Lamentations5:2 Colowa cathu casanduka ca alendo, Ndi nyumba zathu za acilendo." 
Lamentations5:3 Ndife amasiye opanda atate, Amai athu akunga akazi amasiye." 
Lamentations5:4 Tinamwa madzi athu ndi ndalama, Tiona nkhuni zathu pozigula." 
Lamentations5:5 Otilondola atigwira pakhosi pathu, Tatopa osaona popumira." 
Lamentations5:6 Tinagwira mwendo Aigupto Ndi Asuri kuti tikhute zakudya. 
Lamentations5:7 Atate athu anacimwa, kulibe iwo; Ndipo tanyamula mphulupulu zao." 
Lamentations5:8 Akapolo atilamulira; Palibe wotipulumutsa m'dzanja lao. 
Lamentations5:9 Timalowa m'zoopsya potenga zakudya zathu, Cifukwa ca lupanga la m'cipululu," 
Lamentations5:10 Khungu lathu lapserera ngati pamoto Cifukwa ca kuwawa kwa njala. 
Lamentations5:11 Anaipitsa akazi m'Ziyoni, Ndi anamwali m'midzi ya Yuda." 
Lamentations5:12 Anawapacika akalonga manja ao; Sanalemekeza nkhope za akulu. 
Lamentations5:13 Anyamata ananyamula mphero, Ana nakhumudwa posenza nkhuni." 
Lamentations5:14 Akulu adatha kuzipata, Anyamata naleka nyimbo zao." 
Lamentations5:15 Cimwemwe ca mtima wathu calekeka, Masewera athu asanduka maliro." 
Lamentations5:16 Korona wagwa pamutu pathu; Kalanga ife! pakuti tinacimwa. 
Lamentations5:17 Cifukwa ca ici mtima wathu ufoka, Cifukwa ca izi maso athu acita cimbuuzi;" 
Lamentations5:18 Pa phiri la Ziyoni lopasukalo Ankhandwe ayendapo. 
Lamentations5:19 Inu, Yehova, mukhala cikhalire, Ndi mpando wanu wacifumu ku mibadwo mibadwo." 
Lamentations5:20 Bwanji mutiiwala ciiwalire, Ndi kutisiya masiku ambirimbiri;" 
Lamentations5:21 Mutitembenuzire kwa Inu, Yehova, ndipo tidzatembenuzidwadi, Mukonzenso masiku athu ngati kale lija." 
Lamentations5:22 Koma mwatikaniza konse, Mwatikwiyira kopambana." 
Ezekiel1:1 NDIPO kunali caka ca makumi atatu, mwezi wacinai, tsiku lacisanu la mwezi, pokhala ine pakati pa andende kumtsinje Kebara, kunatseguka kumwamba, ndipo ndinaona masomphenya a Mulungu." 
Ezekiel1:2 Tsiku lacisanu la mwezi, ndico caka cacisanu ca kutengedwa ndende mfumu Yoyakini," 
Ezekiel1:3 anadzadi mau a Yehova kwa Ezekieli wansembe, mwana wa Buzi, m'dziko la Akasidi kumtsinje Kebara; ndi pomwepo dzanja la Yehova lidamkhalira." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, mkuntho wa mphepo wocokera kumpoto, mtambo waukuru ndi moto wopfukusika m'mwemo, ndi pozungulira pace padacita ceza, ndi m'kati mwace mudaoneka ngati citsulo cakupsa m'kati mwa moto." 
Ezekiel1:5 Ndi m'kati mwace mudaoneka mafaniziro a zamoyo zinai. Ndipo maonekedwe ao ndiwo anafanana ndi munthu," 
Ezekiel1:6 ndi yense anali nazo nkhope zinai, ndi yense wa iwo anali nao mapiko anai." 
Ezekiel1:7 Ndi mapazi ao anali mapazi oongoka, ndi ku mapazi ao kunanga kuphazi kwa mwana wa ng'ombe; ndipo ananyezimira ngati mawalidwe a mkuwa wowalitsidwa." 
Ezekiel1:8 Zinali naonso manja a munthu pansi pa mapiko ao pa mbali zao zinai; ndipo zinaizi zinali nazo nkhope zao ndi mapiko ao. 
Ezekiel1:9 Mapiko ao analumikizana; sizinatembenuka poyenda; ciri conse cinayenda ndi kulunjika kutsogoloko. 
Ezekiel1:10 Mafaniziro a nkhope zao zinali nayo nkhope ya munthu; ndi izi zinai zinali nayo nkhope ya mkango pa mbali ya ku dzanja lamanja; ndi izi zinai zinali nayo nkhope ya ng'ombe pa mbali ya ku dzanja lamanzere; izi zinai zinali nayonso nkhope ya ciombankhanga. 
Ezekiel1:11 Ndi nkhope zao ndi mapiko ao zinagawikana kumutu; ciri conse cinali nao mapiko awiri olumikizana, ndi awiri anaphimba thupi." 
Ezekiel1:12 Ndipo zinayenda, ciri conse cinalunjika kutsogolo kwace uko mzimu unafuna kumukako zinamuka, sizinatembenuka poyenda." 
Ezekiel1:13 Kunena za mafaniziro a zamoyozo, maonekedwe ao ananga makara amoto, monga maonekedwe a miyuni; motowo unayendayenda pakati pa zamoyozo, ndi motowo unacita ceza, ndi m'motomo mudaturuka mphezi." 
Ezekiel1:14 Ndipo zamoyozo zinathamanga ndi kubwerera, ngati maonekedwe a mphezi yong'anima." 
Ezekiel1:15 Ndipo pakupenyerera ine zamoyozo, taonani, njinga imodzi imodzi yoponda pansi pafupi ndi zamoyozo pa nkhope zao zinai." 
Ezekiel1:16 Maonekedwe a njingazi ndi mapangidwe ao ananga mawalidwe a berulo; ndi izi zinai zinafanana mafaniziro ao; ndi maonekedwe ao ndi mapangidwe ao anali ngati njinga ziwiri zopingasitsana. 
Ezekiel1:17 Poyenda zinayenda ku mbali zao zinai, zosatembenuka poyenda." 
Ezekiel1:18 Ndi mikombero yace inali yokuzika ndi yoopsa; ndi izi zinai zinali ndi mikombero yao yodzala ndi maso pozungulira pao. 
Ezekiel1:19 Ndipo poyenda zamoyozo, njingazi zinayenda pambali pao; ndipo ponyamuka pansi zamoyozo, njinga zinanyamuka." 
Ezekiel1:20 Kuli konse mzimu ukuti umuke, zinamuka komwe mzimu ukuti umuke; ndi njingazi zinanyamuka pambali pa izo; pakuti mzimu wa zamoyozo unali m'njingazo." 
Ezekiel1:21 Poyenda zija zinayenda izi, poima zija zinaima izi; ndipo ponyamuka pansi zija njingazi zinanyamuka pambali pa izo; pakuti mzimu wa zamoyozo unali mu njingazi." 
Ezekiel1:22 Ndi pa mitu ya zamoyozi panali cifaniziro ca thambo, monga mawalidwe a krustalo woopsa, loyalika pamwamba pamitu pao." 
Ezekiel1:23 Ndi pansi pa thambolo mapiko ao analunjikana, lina kulunjika ku linzace; ciri conse cinali nao mapiko awiri akuphimba matupi ao, cakuno ndi cauko." 
Ezekiel1:24 Ndipo pakuyenda izi ndinamva mkokomo wa mapiko ao, ngati mkokomo wa madzi akulu, ngati mau a Wamphamvuyonse, phokoso lakusokosera ngati phokoso la ankhondo; pakuima zinagwetsa mapiko ao." 
Ezekiel1:25 Ndipo panamveka mau pamwamba pa thambolo linali pamwamba pa mitu yao; pakuima izi zinagwetsa mapiko ao. 
Ezekiel1:26 Ndi pamwamba pa thambo linali pamitu pao panali cifaniziro ca mpando wacifumu, maonekedwe ace ngati mwala wa safiro; ndipo pa cifaniziro ca mpando wacifumu panali cifaniziro ngati maonekedwe ace a munthu wokhala pamwamba pace." 
Ezekiel1:27 Ndipo ndinapenya ngati citsulo cakupsa, ngati maonekedwe ace a moto m'kati mwace pozungulira pace, kuyambira maonekedwe a m'cuuno mwace ndi kumwamba kwace; ndipo kuyambira maonekedwe a m'cuuno mwace ndi kunsi kwace ndinaona ngati maonekedwe ace a moto; ndi kunyezimira kudamzinga." 
Ezekiel1:28 Ngati maonekedwe a utawaleza uli m'mtambo tsiku la mvula, momwemo maonekedwe a kunyezimira kwace pozungulira pace. Ndiwo maonekedwe a cifaniziro ca ulemerero wa Yehova. Ndipo pakucipenya ndinagwa nkhope pansi, ndipo ndinamva mau a wina wakunena." 
Ezekiel2:1 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, khala ciriri, ndipo ndidzanena nawe." 
Ezekiel2:2 Ndipo unandilowa mzimu pamene ananena nane, ndi kundiimika ndikhale ciriri; ndipo ndinamumva Iye wakunena nane." 
Ezekiel2:3 Nati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, ndikutumizira kwa ana a Israyeli, kwa mitundu ya anthu opanduka, amene anapandukana nane; iwo ndi makolo ao anandilakwira mpaka lero lomwe." 
Ezekiel2:4 Ndipo anawa, ndiwo acipongwe ndi ouma mtima, ndikutumiza kwa iwo; ndipo ukanene nao, Atero Yehova Mulungu." 
Ezekiel2:5 Ndipo iwowa, ngakhale akamva kapena akaleka kumva, (pakuti ndiwo nyumba yopanduka,) koma adzadziwa kuti panali mneneri pakati pao." 
Ezekiel2:6 Ndipo iwe, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, usawaopa, kapena kuopa mau ao; ingakhale mitungwi ndi minga ikhala ndi iwe, nukhala pakati pa zinkhanira, usaopa mau ao kapena kuopsedwa ndi nkhope zao; pakuti ndiwo nyumba yopanduka." 
Ezekiel2:7 Ndipo ukanene nao mau anga, ngakhale akamva kapena akaleka kumva; pakuti iwo ndiwo opanduka." 
Ezekiel2:8 Koma iwe, wobadwa ndi munthu, tamvera ici ndirikunena nawe; usakhale iwewopanduka, ngati nyumba ija yopanduka; tsegula pakamwa pako, nudye comwe ndikupatsa." 
Ezekiel2:9 Ndipo pakupenya ine ndinaona dzanja londiturutsira, ndipo taonani, mpukutu wa buku m'mwemo;" 
Ezekiel2:10 naufunyulula pamaso panga; ndipo unalembedwa m'kati ndi kubwalo; munalembedwa m'mwemo nyimbo za maliro, ndi cisoni, ndi tsoka." 
Ezekiel3:1 Ndipo ananena nane, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Idya cimene wacipeza; idya mpukutu uwu, numuke ndi kunena ndi nyumba ya Israyeli." 
Ezekiel3:2 Pamenepo ndinatsegula pakamwa panga ndipo anandidyetsa mpukutuwo. 
Ezekiel3:3 Nati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, dyetsa m'mimba mwako, nudzaze matumbo ako ndi mpukutu uwu ndakupatsawu. M'mwemo ndinaudya, ndi m'kamwa mwanga munazuna ngati uci." 
Ezekiel3:4 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Muka, nufike kwa nyumba ya Israyeli, nunene nao mau anga." 
Ezekiel3:5 Pakuti sutumizidwa kwa anthu a cinenedwe cosamveka ndi cobvuta, koma kwa nyumba ya Israyeli;" 
Ezekiel3:6 si kwa mitundu yambiri ya anthu a cinenedwe cosamveka ndi cobvuta, amene sukhoza kudziwitsa cinenedwe cao. Zedi ndikakutumiza kwa iwowa adzamvera iwe." 
Ezekiel3:7 Koma nyumba ya Israyeli siidzakumvera, pakuti siifuna kundimvera Ine; pakuti nyumba yonse ya Israyeli ndiyo yolimba mutu ndi youma mtima." 
Ezekiel3:8 Taona ndakhwimitsa nkhope yako itsutsane nazo nkhope zao; ndalimbitsanso mutu wako utsutsane nayo mitu yao. 
Ezekiel3:9 Ndalimbitsa mutu wako woposa mwala wolimbitsitsa, usawaopa kapena kutenga nkhawa pamaso pao; pakuti iwo ndiwo nyumba yopanduka." 
Ezekiel3:10 Ananenanso nane, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, mau anga onse ndidzawanena ndi iwe uwalandire m'mtima mwako, utawamva m'makutu mwako." 
Ezekiel3:11 Numuke, nufike kwa andende kwa ana a anthu a mtundu wako, nunene nao ndi kuwauza, Atero Yehova Mulungu, ngakhale akamva kapena akaleka kumva." 
Ezekiel3:12 Pamenepo mzimu unandinyamula, ndipo ndinamva kumbuyo kwanga mau a mkokomo waukuru, ndi kuti, Wodala ulemerero wa Yehova m'malo mwace." 
Ezekiel3:13 Ndipo ndinamva mkokomo wa mapiko a zamoyozo pakukhudzana, ndi mlikiti wa njingazo m'mbali mwa izo, ndilo phokoso la mkokomo waukuru." 
Ezekiel3:14 M'mwemo mzimu unandinyamula ndi kucoka nane; ndipo ndinamuka wowawidwa, womyuka mtima; koma dzanja la Yehova linandigwirizitsa," 
Ezekiel3:15 Ndipo ndinafika kwa andende ku Telabibu, okhala kumtsinje Kebara, ndiko kwao; ndipo ndinakhalako woda bwa pakati pao masiku asanu ndi awiri." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ndipo kunali atatha masiku asanu ndi awiri, mau a Yehova anandidzera, ndi kuti," 
Ezekiel3:17 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, ndakuika ukhale mlonda wa nyumba ya Israyeli, m'mwemo mvera mau oturuka m'kamwa mwanga, nundicenjezere iwo." 
Ezekiel3:18 Ndikanena kwa woipa, Udzafa ndithu, koma iwe osamcenjeza, wosanena kumcenjeza woipayo aleke njira yace yoipa, kumsunga ndi moyo, woipa yemweyo adzafa mu mphulupulu yace; koma mwazi wace ndidzaufuna pa dzanja lako." 
Ezekiel3:19 Koma ukacenjeza woipa, osabwerera iye kuleka coipa cace kapena njira yace yoipa, adzafa mu mphulupulu yace; koma iwe walanditsamoyo wako." 
Ezekiel3:20 Momwemonso akabwerera wolungama kuleka cilungamo cace, ndi kucita cosalungama, ndipo ndikamuikira comkhumudwitsa, adzafa; popeza sunamcenjeza, adzafa m'cimo lace, ndi zolungama zace adazicita sizidzakumbukika; koma mwazi wace ndidzaufuna pa dzanja lako." 
Ezekiel3:21 Koma ukamcenjeza wolungamayo, kuti asacimwe wolungamayo, ndipo sacimwa, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu, popeza anacenjezedwa; ndipo iwe walanditsa moyo wako." 
Ezekiel3:22 Ndipo dzanja la Yehova linandikhalira komweko, nati kwa ine, Nyamuka, turuka kumka kucidikha, ndipo pomwepo ndidzalankhula ndi iwe." 
Ezekiel3:23 Ndipo ndinauka ndi kuturuka kumka kucidikha, ndipo taonani, ulemerero wa Yehova unaimako monga ulemerero uja ndinauona ku mtsinje Kebara, ndipo ndinagwa nkhope pansi." 
Ezekiel3:24 Pamenepo unandilowa mzimu ndi kundiimika ndikhale ciriri; ndipo analankhula ndi ine, nanena nane, Muka, katsekedwe m'nyumba mwako." 
Ezekiel3:25 Koma iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, taona, adzakuikira iwe zingwe zolimba, nadzakumanga nazo, ndipo sudzaturuka pakati pao;" 
Ezekiel3:26 ndipo ndidzamamatiritsa lilime lako ku malakalaka ako, kuti ukhale wosanena, wosawakhalira wakuwadzudzula; pakuti iwo ndiwo nyumba yopanduka." 
Ezekiel3:27 Koma pamene ndilankhula nawe ndidzatsegula pakamwa pako, nudzanena nao, Atero Yehova Mulungu. Wakumvera amvere, wasafuna kumvera akhale; pakuti iwo ndiwo nyumba yopanduka." 
Ezekiel4:1 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, dzitengere njerwa, nulike pamaso pako, nulembepo mudzi, ndiwo Yerusalemu;" 
Ezekiel4:2 nuuzinge, nuumangire nsanja zouzinga, nuundire nthumbira, ndi kuumangira misasa, nuuikire zogumulira pozungulira pace." 
Ezekiel4:3 Nudzitengere ciwaya cacitsulo, ndi kuciika ngati khoma lacitsulo pakati pa iwe ndi mudziwo; nuulozetsere nkhope yako kuti umangidwire misasa, ndipo udzamangira misasa. Ici cikhale cizindikilo ca nyumba ya Israyeli." 
Ezekiel4:4 Ndipo iwe ugonere pansi mbali yako ya kumanzere, nuikepo mphulupulu ya nyumba ya Israyeli; monga mwa kuwerenga kwa masiku amene udzagonapo udzasenza mphulupulu yao." 
Ezekiel4:5 Ndipo Ine ndakuikira zaka za mphulupulu yao ngati masiku, ndiwo masiku mazana atatu mphambu makumi asanu ndi anai, kuti usenze mphulupulu ya nyumba ya Israyeli." 
Ezekiel4:6 Ndipo utatsiriza awa, ugonerenso mbali yako ya kumanja, ndi kusenza mphulupulu ya nyumba ya Yuda; ndakuikira masiku makumi anai, kuliyesa tsiku limodzi ngati caka cimodzi." 
Ezekiel4:7 Ndipo ulozetse nkhope yako kuzingidwa kwace kwa Yerusalemu, ndi dzanja lako losapfundika, nuunenere." 
Ezekiel4:8 Ndipo taona ndidzakumanga ndi zingwe zolimba kuti usakunkhulire, mpaka watsiriza masiku a kuzingidwa kwako." 
Ezekiel4:9 Udzitengerenso tirigu, ndi barele, ndi nyemba, ndi mphodza, ndi mapira, ndi mawere, nuziike m'mbale imodzi, ndi kudzipangira mkate nazo; uzidyako monga mwa kuwerenga kwa masiku udzagonawo pambali pako, ndiwo masiku mazana atatu mphambu makumi asanu ndi anai." 
Ezekiel4:10 Ndipo cakudya cako uzicidya ciyesedwe masekeli makumi awiri tsiku limodzi; uzidyako tsiku ndi tsiku pa nthawi yace. 
Ezekiel4:11 Uzimwanso madzi monga mwa muyeso, limodzi la magawo asanu ndi limodzi la hini; uzimwako tsiku ndi tsiku pa nthawi yace." 
Ezekiel4:12 Ndipo uzicidya ngati timikate ta barele, ndi kutioca pamaso pao ndi zonyansa za munthu." 
Ezekiel4:13 Ndipo Yehova anati, Motero ana a Israyeli adz adya ca kudya cao codetsedwa, mwa amitundu kumene ndidzawaingitsirako." 
Ezekiel4:14 Pamenepo ndinati, Ha, Ambuye Yehova! taonani, moyo wanga sunadetsedwa, pakuti ciyambire ubwana wanga mpaka tsopano sindinadye cinthu cakufa cokha, kapena cogwidwa ndi cirombo; simunalowanso m'kamwa mwanga nyama yonyansa." 
Ezekiel4:15 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Taona ndakuninkha ndowe ya ng'ombe m'malo mwa zonyansa za munthu, uoce mkate wako pamenepo." 
Ezekiel4:16 Nanenanso nane, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, taona, ndidzatyola mcirikizo, ndiwo cakudya, m'Yerusalemu; ndipo adzadya cakudyaco monga mwa muyeso, ndi mosamalira, nadzamwa madzi monga mwa muyeso, ndi kudabwa;" 
Ezekiel4:17 kuti asowe cakudya ndi madzi, nasumwesumwe, naondetse mu mphulupulu zao." 
Ezekiel5:1 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, udzitengere mpeni wakuthwa, ndiwo lumo la wometa, udzitengere ndi kulipititsa pamutu pako ndi pa ndebvu zako; nudzitengere muyeso kuyesa nao, ndi kugawa tsitsilo." 
Ezekiel5:2 Limodzi la magawo ace atatu utenthe ndi moto pakati pa mudzi pakutha masiku a kuzingidwa mudzi, nutenge gawo lina ndi kukwapula-kwapula ndi lupanga pozungulira pace, nuwaze kumphepo gawo lotsala; pakuti ndidzasolola lupanga lakuwatsata." 
Ezekiel5:3 Utengekonso owerengeka ndi kuwamanga m'mkawo wa maraya ako. 
Ezekiel5:4 Nutengekonso pa amenewa ndi kuwaponya pakati pa moto, ndi kuwatentha m'moto; kucokera kumeneko udzaturuka moto pa nyumba yonse ya Israyeli." 
Ezekiel5:5 Atero Yehova Mulungu, Uwu ndi Yerusalemu ndinauika pakati pa amitundu, ndi pozungulira pace pali maiko." 
Ezekiel5:6 Koma anakaniza maweruzo anga ndi kucita zoipa koposa amitundu, nakaniza malemba anga koposa maiko akuuzungulira; pakuti anataya maweruzo anga, ndi malemba anga, sanayendamo." 
Ezekiel5:7 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza kupokosera kwanu kwaposa kwa amitundu akukuzingani, ndipo simunayenda m'malemba anga, kapena kucita maweruzo anga, ngakhale maweruzo a amitundu akukuzingani simunawacita;" 
Ezekiel5:8 cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona ndidzatsutsana nawe Inedi, ndi kucita maweruzo pakati pako pamaso pa amitundu." 
Ezekiel5:9 Ndipo ndidzacita mwa iwe cimene sindinacicita ndi kale lonse, ndi kusadzacitanso momwemo, cifukwa ca zonyansa zako zonse." 
Ezekiel5:10 Cifukwa cace atate adzadya ana pakati pako, ndi ana adzadya atate ao; ndipo ndidzacita maweruzo mwa iwe, ndi akutsala onse ndidzawabalalitsa ku mphepo zonse." 
Ezekiel5:11 M'mwemo, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, popeza wadetsa malo anga opatulika ndi zonyansa zako zonse ndi zoipsa zako zonse, ndidzakucepsa; diso langa silidzalekerera, ndi Inenso sindidzacita cifundo." 
Ezekiel5:12 Limodzi la magawo atatu la iwe lidzafa ndi mliri, nilidzatha ndi njala pakati pa iwe; ndi limodzi lidzagwa ndi lupanga pozinga pako; ndi limodzi ndidzalibalalikitsa ku mphepo zonse, ndi kuwasololera lupanga lakuwatsata." 
Ezekiel5:13 Motero mkwiyo wanga udzakwaniridwa, ndipo ndidzakhutitsa ukali wanga pa iwo, ndi kudzitonthoza; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndinanena m'cangu canga, pokwaniridwa nao ukali wanga." 
Ezekiel5:14 Ndidzakuikanso ukhale bwinja ndi cotonza pakati pa amitundu akukuzinga, pamaso pa onse akupitirirapo." 
Ezekiel5:15 Momwemo cidzakhala cotonza ndi mnyozo, cilangizo ndi codabwiza kwa amitundu akukuzinga, pamene ndikucitira maweruzo mu mkwiyo ndi ukali ndi madzudzulo aukali; Ine Yehovandanena." 
Ezekiel5:16 Pakuwatumizira Ine mibvi yoipa ya njala yakuononga, imene ndidzatumiza kukuonongani, pamenepo ndidzakukuzirani njala, ndi kukutyolerani mcirikizo, ndiwo cakudya." 
Ezekiel5:17 Inde ndidzakutumizirani njala ndi zirombo, ndipo zidzakusowetsa ana ako; ndi mliri ndi mwazi zidzakugwera; ndidzakufikitsiranso lupanga; Ine Yehova ndacinena." 
Ezekiel6:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera, kuti," 
Ezekiel6:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lozetsa nkhope yako ku mapiri a Israyeli, uwanenere," 
Ezekiel6:3 nunene, Mapiri a Israyeli inu, tamverani mau a Yehova Mulungu: Atero Yehova Mulungu kwa mapiri ndi zitunda, kwa mitsinje ndi zigwa, Taonani, Ine ndikufikitsirani lupanga, ndipo ndidzaononga misanje yanu." 
Ezekiel6:4 Ndi maguwa anu a nsembe adzakhala opasuka, ndi zoimiritsa zanu zadzuwa zidzasweka; ndipo ndidzagwetsa ophedwa anu pamaso pa mafano anu." 
Ezekiel6:5 Ndipo ndidzaika mitembo ya ana a Israyeli pamaso pa mafano anu, ndi kumwaza mafupa anu mozungulira maguwa anu a nsembe." 
Ezekiel6:6 Pokhala inu ponse midzi idzapasuka, ndi misanje idzakhala yabwinja; kuti maguwa anu a nsembe akhale opasuka ndi mabwinja, ndi mafano anu asweke nalekeke, ndi zoimiritsa zanu zadzuwa zilikhidwe, ndi nchito zanu zifafanizidwe." 
Ezekiel6:7 Ndi ophedwa adzagwa pakati panu, matero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel6:8 Koma ndidzasiyapo otsala, popeza mudzakhala nao ena akupulumuka lupanga mwa amitundu pobalalitsidwa inu m'maiko maiko." 
Ezekiel6:9 Pamenepo akupulumuka anu adzandikumbukila Ine kwa amitundu kumene anatengedwa ndende, kuti ndasweka ndi mtima wao wacigololo wolekana ndi Ine, ndi maso ao acigololo akutsata mafano ao; ndipo iwo adzakhala onyansa pamaso pao pa iwo eni, cifukwa ca zoipa anazicita m'zonyansa zao zonse." 
Ezekiel6:10 Ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, sindinanena cabe kuti ndidzawacitira coipa ici." 
Ezekiel6:11 Atero Yehova Mulungu, Omba manja ako, ponda ndi phazi lako, nuti, Kalanga ine, cifukwa ca zonyansa zoipa zonse za nyumba ya Israyeli; pakuti adzagwa ndi lupanga, ndi njala, ndi mliri." 
Ezekiel6:12 Wokhala kutali adzafa ndi mliri, wakhala pafupi adzagwa ndi lupanga; koma wotsala ndi kuzingidwa adzafa ndi njala; momwemo ndidzawakwaniritsira ukali wanga," 
Ezekiel6:13 Ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, pokhala ophedwa ao pakati pa mafano ao, pozinga maguwa ao a nsembe, pa zitunda zonse zazitali, pamwamba pa mapiri onse, ndi patsinde pa mitengo yogudira yonse, ndi patsinde pa thundu ali yense wagudugudu, pomwe adapereka zonunkhira zokoma kwa mafano ao onse." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ndipo ndidzawatambasulira dzanja langa, ndi kulisandutsa dziko bwinja ndi lopasuka, koposa cipululu ca ku Dibla mokhalamo iwo monse; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel7:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera, akuti," 
Ezekiel7:2 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, atero Ambuye Yehova kwa dziko la Israyeli, Kwatha; kwafika kutha kwace pa ngondya zinai za dziko." 
Ezekiel7:3 Tsopano kwakudzera kutha kwako, ndipo ndidzakutumizira mkwiyo wanga, ndi kukuweruza monga mwa njira zako, ndipo ndidzakubwezera zonyansa zako zanse." 
Ezekiel7:4 Ndipo diso langa silidzakulekerera, sindidzacita cifundo, koma ndidzakubwezera njira zako, ndi zonyansa zako zidzakhala pakati pako; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel7:5 Atero Yehova Mulungu, Coipa, coipa ca pa cokha, taona cirinkudza." 
Ezekiel7:6 Kutha kwafika, kwafika kutha, kwakugalamukira, taona kwafika." 
Ezekiel7:7 Tsoka lako lakufikira, nzika iwe, yafika nthawi, tsiku liri pafupi, ndilo laphokoso, si lakupfuula mokondwera kumapiri," 
Ezekiel7:8 Katsala kamphindi, ndipo ndidzakutsanulira ukali wanga, ndi kukukwaniritsira mkwiyo wanga, ndi kukuweruza monga mwa njira zako, ndipo ndidzakubwezera zonyansa zako zonse." 
Ezekiel7:9 Ndipo diso langa silidzalekerera, wosacita cifundo Ine, ndidzakubwezera monga mwa njira zako, ndi zonyansa zako zidzakhala pakati pako; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova wakukantha." 
Ezekiel7:10 Taona, tsikuli, taona, lafika; tsoka lako laturuka, ndodo yaphuka mphundu za maluwa, kudzitama kwaphuka." 
Ezekiel7:11 Ciwawa cauka cikhale ndodo ya coipa; sadzawatsalira ndi mmodzi yense, kapena wa unyinji wao, kapena wa cuma cao; sipadzakhalanso kuwalira maliro." 
Ezekiel7:12 Yafika nthawi, layandikira tsikulo, wogula asakondwere, ndi wogulitsa asamve cisoni; pakuti mkwiyo ukhalira unyinji wao wense." 
Ezekiel7:13 Pakuti wogulitsa sadzabwera ku cogulitsaco, cinkana akali ndi moyo, popeza masomphenyawo akunena unyinji wace wonse sadzapita pacabe, ndipo palibe mmodzi adzalimbitsa moyo wace m'mphulupulu yace." 
Ezekiel7:14 Aomba lipenga, nakonzeratu zonse, koma palibe womuka kunkhondo; pakuti mkwiyo wanga ukhalira unyinji wace wonse." 
Ezekiel7:15 Kunja kuli lupanga, ndi m'katimo muli mliri ndi njala; wokhala kuthenso adzafa ndi lupanga, ndi wokhala m'mudziyo njala ndi mliri zidzamutha." 
Ezekiel7:16 Ndipo akupulumuka mwa iwo adzapulumuka, koma adzakhala kumapiri ngati njiwa za kuzigwa, onse akubuula, ali yense m'mphulupulu zace." 
Ezekiel7:17 Manja onse adzalenda, ndi maondo onse adzaweyeseka ngati madzi." 
Ezekiel7:18 Ndipo adzadzimangira m'cuuno ndi ziguduli, ndi zoopsetsa zidzawaphimba, ndi nkhope zonse zidzacita manyazi, ndi mitu yao yonse idzacita dazi." 
Ezekiel7:19 Adzataya siliva wao kumakwalala, nadzayesa golidi wao cinthu codetsedwa; siliva wao ndi golidi wao sadzakhoza kuwalanditsa tsiku la mkwiyo wa Yehova, sadzakwaniritsa moyo wao, kapena kudzaza matumbo ao; pakuti izi ndi cokhumudwitsa ca mphulupulu zao." 
Ezekiel7:20 Ndipo cokometsera cace cokongola anaciyesa codzikuza naco, napanga naco mafanizo ao onyansa, ndi zonyansa zao zina; cifukwa cace ndinapatsa ici cikhale cowadetsa." 
Ezekiel7:21 Ndipo ndidzacipereka m'dzanja la alendo cikhale colandika, ndi kwa oipa a m'dziko cikhale cofunkha; ndipo adzaciipsa." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ndipo nkhope yanga idzawayang'anira kumbali, ndipo iwo adzadetsa pobisika panga, nadzalowamo acifwamba, nadzamudetsa." 
Ezekiel7:23 Sula unyolo, popeza dziko ladzala ndi mirandu yamwazi, ndi mudzi wadzala ndi ciwawa." 
Ezekiel7:24 Cifukwa cace ndidzabwera nao amitundu oipitsitsa, ndipo iwo adzalandira nyumba zao ngati colowa, ndidzaleketsanso kudzikuza kwa amphamvu, kuti adetsedwe malo ao opatulika." 
Ezekiel7:25 Cionongeko cirinkudza, adzafunafuna mtendere, koma palibe." 
Ezekiel7:26 Lidzafika tsoka lotsatana-tsatana, kudzakhalanso mbiri yotsatana-tsatana, ndipo adzafunafuna masomphenya a mneneri, koma malamulo adzatayikira wansembe, uphungu ndi kutayikira akulu." 
Ezekiel7:27 Mfumu idzalira maliro, ndi kalonga adzabvala cipasuko, ndi manja a anthu a m'dziko adzanjenjemera, Ndidzawacitira monga mwa njira zao, ndi kuwaweruza monga mwa maweruzo ao; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel8:1 Ndipo kunali caka cacisanu ndi cimodzi, mwezi wacisanu ndi cimodzi, tsiku lacisanu la mweziwo, pokhala ine m'nyumba mwanga, akulu a Yuda omwe analikukhala pamaso panga, dzanja la Yehova Mulungu linandigwera komweko." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ndipo ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, cifaniziro ca maonekedwe a moto; kuyambira maonekedwe a m'cuuno mwace ndi kunsi kwace, moto; ndi kuyambira m'cuuno mwace ndi kumwamba kwace, monga maonekedwe a ceza, ngan citsulo cakupsa." 
Ezekiel8:3 Ndipo anatambasula conga dzanja, nandigwira tsitsi la pamutu panga; ndipo mzimu unandilengetsa pakati pa dziko ndi thambo, numuka nane m'masomphenya a Mulungu ku Yerusalemu, ku citseko ca cipata ca bwalo la m'katimo loloza kumpoto, kumene kunali mpando wa fano la nsanje locititsa nsanje." 
Ezekiel8:4 Ndipo taonani, pomwepo panali ulemerero wa Mulungu wa lsrayeli, monga mwa maonekedwe ndinawaona ku cidikha cija." 
Ezekiel8:5 Pamenepo ananena ndi ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, kweza maso ako ku njira yoloza kumpoto. Ndipo ndinakweza maso anga ku njira yoloza kumpoto, ndipo taonani, kumpoto kwa cipata ca guwa la nsembe fano ili la nsanje polowera pace." 
Ezekiel8:6 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, uona kodi izi alikuzicita? zonyansa zazikulu nyumba ya Israyeli irikuzicita kuno, kuti ndicoke kutali kwa malo anga opatulika? Koma udzaonanso zonyansa zina zoposa." 
Ezekiel8:7 Ndipo anadza nane ku cipata ca kubwalo, ndipo popenya ine, taonani, pobooka palinga." 
Ezekiel8:8 Pamenepo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, booletsa kulinga; ndipo nditabooletsa palinga, ndinaona khomo." 
Ezekiel8:9 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Lowa, kapenye zonyansa zoipa alikuzicita komweko." 
Ezekiel8:10 M'mwemo ndinalowa ndi kupenya, ndipo taonani, maonekedwe ali onse a zokwawa, ndi zirombo zonyansa, ndi mafano onse a nyumba ya Israyeli, zolembedwa pakhoma pozungulira ponse." 
Ezekiel8:11 Ndipo pamaso pao panaima amuna makumi asanu ndi awiri a akulu a nyumba ya Israyeli, ndi pakati pao panaima Jazaniya mwana wa Safana munthu ali yense ndi mbale yace ya zofukiza m'dzanja lace; ndi pfungo lace la mtambo wa zonunkhira linakwera." 
Ezekiel8:12 Pamenepo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, wapenya kodi cocita akulu a nyumba ya lsrayeli mumdima, ali yense m'cipinda cace ca zifanizo? pakuti ati, Yehova satipenya, Yehova wataya dziko." 
Ezekiel8:13 Anatinso kwa ine, Udzaonanso zonyansa zazikuru zina azicita." 
Ezekiel8:14 Pamenepo anadza nane ku citseko ca cipata ca nyumba ya Yehova coloza kumpoto; ndipo taonani, apo panakhala akazi akulirira Tainuzi." 
Ezekiel8:15 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Waciona ici, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe? udzaonanso zonyansa zazikuru zoposa izi." 
Ezekiel8:16 Ndipo anadza nane ku bwalo lam'kati la nyumba ya Yehova, ndipo taonani, pa khomo la Kacisi wa Yehova, pakati pa khonde lace ndi guwa la nsembe, panali amuna ngati makumi awiri mphambu asanu akufulatira, ku Kacisi wa Yehova, ndi kuyang'ana kum'mawa; napembedza dzuwa kum'mawa." 
Ezekiel8:17 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Waciona ici, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe? Cinthu copepuka ici kodi ndi nyumba ya Yuda, kuti acite zonyansa azicita kunozi? pakuti anadzaza dziko ndi ciwawa, nabwereranso kuutsa mkwiyo wanga, ndipo taonani, aika nthambi kumphuno kwao." 
Ezekiel8:18 Cifukwa cace Inenso ndidzacita mwaukali; diso langa silidzalekerera, osawacitira cifundo Ine; ndipo cinkana apfuula m'makutu mwanga ndi mau akulu, koma sindidzawamvera ine." 
Ezekiel9:1 Pamenepo Iye anapfuula m'makutu mwanga ndi mau akuru, ndi kuti, Asendere oyang'anira mudzi, ali yense ndi cida cace coonongera m'dzanja lace." 
Ezekiel9:2 Ndipo taonani, anadza amuna asanu ndi mmodzi, odzera njira ya cipata ca kumtunda coloza kumpoto, ali yense ndi cida cace cophera m'dzanja lace; ndi munthu mmodzi pakati pao wobvala bafuta, ndi zolembera nazo m'cuuno mwace. Ndipo analowa, naima m'mphepete mwa guwa la nsembe lamkuwa." 
Ezekiel9:3 Ndipo ulemerero wa Mulungu wa Israyeli unakwera kucoka pakerubi, pamene unakhalira kumka ku ciunda ca nyumba, naitana munthu wobvala bafutayo wokhala ndi zolembera nazo m'cuuno mwace." 
Ezekiel9:4 Ndipo Yehova ananena naye, Pita pakati pa mudzi, pakati pa Yerusalemu, nulembe cizindikilo pa mphumi zao za anthu akuusa moyo ndi kulira cifukwa ca zonyansa zonse zicitidwa pakati pace." 
Ezekiel9:5 Nati kwa enawo, nditikumva ine, Pitani pakati pa mudzi kumtsata iye, ndi kukantha; maso anu asalekerere, musacite cifundo;" 
Ezekiel9:6 iphanitu nkhalamba, mnyamata ndi namwali, makanda, ndi akazi; koma musayandikira munthu ali yense ali naco cizindikilo, ndipo muyambe pa malo anga opatulika, Pamenepo anayamba ndi akuluwo anali pakhomo pa nyumba." 
Ezekiel9:7 Nati kwa iwo, Muipse nyumbayi ndi kudzaza mabwalo ndi ophedwa, mukani. Ndipo anaturuka, nakantha m'mudzimo." 
Ezekiel9:8 Ndipo kunali, alimkukantha iwo, nditatsala ine, ndinagwa nkhope yanga pansi, ndi kupfuula, ndi kuti, Kalanga ine. Ambuye Mulungu! kodi mudzaononga otsala onse a Israyeli pakutsanulira ukali wanu pa Yerusalemu?" 
Ezekiel9:9 Pamenepo ananena nane, Mphulupulu ya nyumba ya Israyeli ndi Yuda ndi yaikurukuru ndithu, ndi dziko ladzala ndi mwazi, ndi mudziwo wadzala ndi kukhotetsa mirandu; pakuti ati, Yehova wataya dziko, Yehova sapenya." 
Ezekiel9:10 Ndipo Inenso diso langa silidzalekerera, wosacita cifundo Ine, koma ndidzawabwezera njira yao pamtu pao." 
Ezekiel9:11 Ndipo taonani, munthu wobvala bafutayo, wokhala ndi zolembera nazo m'cuuno mwace, anabweza mau, ndi kuti, Ndacita monga munandilamulira ine." 
Ezekiel10:1 Ndipo ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, ku thambo lokhala pamwamba pa mitu ya akerubi kudaoneka ngati mwala wasafiro, ngati maonekedwe a cifaniziro ca mpando wacifumu pamwamba pao." 
Ezekiel10:2 Ndipo Yehova analankhula ndi munthu wobvala bafuta, nati, Lowa pakati pa njingazi pansi pa kerubi, nudzaze manja ako makara a moto ocokera pakati pa akerubi, nuwamwaze pamwamba pa mudzi. Nalowa, ndiri cipenyere ine." 
Ezekiel10:3 Tsono akerubi anaima ku dzanja lamanja la nyumba polowa munthuyo, ndi mtambo unadzara bwalo la m'kati." 
Ezekiel10:4 Ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unakwera kucokera kukerubi kumka ku ciundo ca nyumba; ndi nyumba inadzala nao mtambo, ndi bwalo linadzala ndi ceza ca ulemerero wa Yehova." 
Ezekiel10:5 Ndipo mkokomo wa mapiko a akerubi unamveka mpaka bwalo lakunja, ngati mau a Mulungu Wamphamvuyonse, pakunena Iye." 
Ezekiel10:6 Ndipo kunali pomlamulira munthu wobvala bafutayo, ndi kuti, Para moto pakati pa njingazi ndi pakati pa akerubi; iye analowa, naima m'mbali mwa njinga." 
Ezekiel10:7 Pamenepo kerubi wina anatambasula dzanja lace pakati pa akerubi ku moto uli pakati pa akerubi, naparako, nauika m'manja mwa iye wobvala bafuta, ndiye naulandita, naturuka." 
Ezekiel10:8 Ndipo panaoneka pa akerubi conga dzanja la munthu pansi pa mapiko ao. 
Ezekiel10:9 Pamenepo ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, njinga zinai m'mbali mwa akerubi, njinga imodzi m'mbali mwa kerubi mmodzi, ndi njinga yina m'mbali mwa kerubi wina, ndi maonekedwe a njingazi ananga mawalidwe a berulo." 
Ezekiel10:10 Ndipo maonekedwe ace, zonse zinai zinafanana, ngati njinga ziwiri zopingasitsana," 
Ezekiel10:11 Pakuyenda akerubi anayenda ku mbali zao zinai, sanatembenuka poyenda; koma komwe udalozako mutu anatsatako, sanatembenuka poyenda." 
Ezekiel10:12 Ndipo thupi lao lonse, ndi misana yao, ndi manja ao, ndi mapiko ao, ndi njinga zomwe, zinadzala ndi maso pozungulira pao, zingakhale njingazi anai aja anali nazo." 
Ezekiel10:13 Kunena za njingazi, wina anazipfuulira, ndiri cimvere ine, Kunkhulirani." 
Ezekiel10:14 Ndipo ali yense anali nazo nkhope zinai, nkhope yoyamba ndiyo nkhope ya kerubi, ndi nkhope yaciwiri ndiyo nkhope ya munthu, ndi yacitatu ndiyo nkhope ya mkango, ndi yacinai ndiyo nkhope ya ciombankhanga." 
Ezekiel10:15 Pamenepo akerubi anakwera, ndizo zamoyo zija ndinaziona kumtsinje Kebara." 
Ezekiel10:16 Ndipo pakuyenda akerubi, njinga zinayenda pambali pao, ndi pakutambasula mapiko ao akerubiwo kuuluka padziko, njingazi sizinatembenuka pambali pao." 
Ezekiel10:17 Pakuima iwo zinaima izi, ndi pakukwera iwo izi zinakwera pamodzi nao; pakuti mzimu wa zamoyozo unali mwa izo." 
Ezekiel10:18 Ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unacoka pa ciundo ca nyumba, nuima pamwamba pa akeruibi." 
Ezekiel10:19 Ndipo akerubi anatambasula mapiko ao, nauluka padziko, ndiri cipenyere, pakucoka iwo ndi njingazi pa mbali pao; ndipo anaima pa citseko ca cipata ca kum'mawa ca nyumba ya Yehova, ndi ulemerero wa Mulungu wa Israyeli unali pamwamba pao." 
Ezekiel10:20 Awa ndi zamoyozo ndinaziona pansi pa Mulungu wa Israyeli kumtsinje Kebara, ndipo ndinadziwa kuti ndiwo akerubi." 
Ezekiel10:21 Yense anali nazo nkhope zinai, ndi yense mapiko anai, ndi cifaniziro ca manja a munthu pansi pa mapiko ao." 
Ezekiel10:22 Ndi cifaniziro ca nkhope zao ndico nkhope zomwezo ndinaziona kumtsinje Kebara, maonekedwe ao ndi iwo eni; ali yense anayenda, nalunjika m'tsogolo." 
Ezekiel11:1 Pamenepo unandikweza mzimu, nudza nane ku cipata ca kum'mawa ca nyumba ya Yehova coloza kum'mawa; ndipo taonani, pa citseko ca cipata amuna makumi awiri mphambu asanu; ndipo ndinaona pakati pao Yazaniya mwana wa Azuri ndi Pelatiya mwana wa Benaya, akalonga a anthu." 
Ezekiel11:2 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, awa ndi anthu olingirira za mphulupulu, ndi kupangira uphungu woipa m'mudzi muno;" 
Ezekiel11:3 ndiwo akuti, siinafike nyengo yakumanga nyumba; mudzi uwu ndi mphika, ife ndife nyama." 
Ezekiel11:4 Cifukwa cace uwanenere, neneratu, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe." 
Ezekiel11:5 Pamenepo mzimu wa Yehova unandigwera, ndipo ananti kwa ine, Nena, Atero Yehova, Mwatero nyumba ya Israyeli, pakuti ndidziwa zimene zimalowa m'mtima mwanu." 
Ezekiel11:6 Mwacurukitsa ophedwa anu m'mudzi muno, mwadzazanso makwalala ace ndi ophedwawo." 
Ezekiel11:7 Cifukwa cace atero Yehova Mulungu, Ophedwa anu munawaika m'kati mwace, iwo ndiwo nyama imene, ndi mudzi uwu ndiwo mphika; koma inu mudzaturutsidwa m'kati mwace." 
Ezekiel11:8 Mwaopa lupanga, tsono ndidzakufikitsirani lupanga, ati Yehova Mulungu." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ndipo ndidzakuturutsani m'kati mwace, ndi kukuperekani m'manja a alendo, ndi kucita maweruzo pakati panu." 
Ezekiel11:10 Mudzagwa ndi lupanga, ndidzakuweruzirani ku malire a Israyeli; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel11:11 Mudzi uno sudzakhala mphika wanu, ndi inu simudzakhala nyama m'kati mwace, ndidzakuweruzirani ku malire a Israyeli;" 
Ezekiel11:12 ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, pakuti simunayenda m'malemba anga, kapena kucita maweruzo anga, koma mwacita monga mwa maweruzo a amitundu okhala pozungulira panu." 
Ezekiel11:13 Ndipo kunali, pakunenera ine, anamwalira Pelatiya mwana wa Benaya. Pamenepo ndinagwa nkhope yanga pansi, ndi kupfuula ndi mau akuru, ndi kuti, Kalanga ine, Yehova Mulungu! mudzatsiriza kodi otsala a Israyeli?" 
Ezekiel11:14 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera kuti," 
Ezekiel11:15 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, abale ako, inde abale ako amuna a cibale cako, ndi nyumba yonse ya Israyeli, yonseyi ndiwo amene okhala m'Yerusalemu ananena nao, Muzikhala kutali kwa Yehova; dziko ili lapatsidwa kwa ife, likhale colowa cathu;" 
Ezekiel11:16 cifukwa cace uziti, Atero Yehova Mulungu, Ngakhale ndawacotsa kutali mwa amitundu, ngakhalenso ndawabalalikitsa m'maiko, koma ndidzawakhalira malo opatulika kanthawi ku maiko adafikako." 
Ezekiel11:17 Cifukwa cace uziti, Atero Yehova Mulungu, Ndidzakumemezani ku mitundu ya anthu, ndi kukusonkhanitsani mucoke m'maiko m'mene munabalalikiramo, ndipo ndidzakuninkhani dziko la Israyeli." 
Ezekiel11:18 Ndipo adzafikako, nadzacotsako zonyansa zace zonse, ndi zace zonse zakuipitsamo." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ndipo ndidzawapatsa mtima umodzi, ndi kuika mzimu watsopano m'kati mwao; ndipo ndidzawacotsera mtima wamwala m'thupi mwao, ndi kuwapatsa mtima wamnofu;" 
Ezekiel11:20 kuti ayende m'malemba anga, ndi kusunga maweruzo anga, ndi kuwacita; ndipo adzakhala anthu anga, ndi Ine ndidzakhala Mulungu wao." 
Ezekiel11:21 Koma iwo amene mtima wao unatsata mtima wa zonyansa zao, ndi zoipitsitsa zao, ndidzawabwezera njira yao pamtu pao, ati Yehova Mulungu." 
Ezekiel11:22 Pamenepo akerubi anatambasula mapiko ao, ndi njinga zinali pa mbali pao; ndi ulemerero wa Mulungu wa Israyeli unali pamwamba pao." 
Ezekiel11:23 Ndipo ulemerero wa Yehova unakwera kucoka pakati pa mudzi, nuima pa phiri la kum'mawa kwa mudzi." 
Ezekiel11:24 Ndipo mzimu unandikweza, nufika nane m'masomphenya mwa mzimu wa Mulungu ku dziko la Akasidi, kwa andendewo. M'mwemo masomphenya ndidawaona anandicokera, nakwera." 
Ezekiel11:25 Pamenepo ndinanena ndi andendewo zonse zija adandionetsa Yehova. 
Ezekiel12:1 Mau a Yehova anandidzeranso, ndi kuti," 
Ezekiel12:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, ukhala pakati pa nyumba yampanduko, yokhala nao maso akuonera, koma osaona; ndi makutu akumvera, koma osamva; pakuti iwo ndiwo nyumba yampanduko." 
Ezekiel12:3 Potero wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, udzikonzeretu akatundu a pa ulendo wa kundende, nucoke usana pamaso pao, ucoke pakhala iwepo kumka malo ena pamaso pao; kapena adzacizindikira, angakhalendiwo nyumbayopanduka." 
Ezekiel12:4 Uziturutsa akatundu ako usana pamaso pao, ngati a pa ulendo wa kundende; ndipo madzulo uzituruka wekha pamaso pao, monga amaturuka olowa kundende." 
Ezekiel12:5 Udziboolere khoma pamaso pao, nuwaturutsire akatundu pamenepo," 
Ezekiel12:6 Pamaso pao uwasenze paphewa pako, ndi kuwaturutsa kuli mdima, nuphimbe nkhope yako kuti usapenye dziko; popeza ndakuika cizindikilo ca nyumba ya Israyeli." 
Ezekiel12:7 Ndipo ndinacita monga momwe anandilamulira, ndinaturutsa akatundu anga usana, ngati a pa ulendo wa kundende, ndi madzulo ndinaboola pakhoma ndi dzanja langa, ndinawaturutsa pali mdima, ndi kuwasenza paphewa panga pamaso: pao." 
Ezekiel12:8 Ndipo m'mawa mau a Yehova anandidzera, ndi kuti," 
Ezekiel12:9 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, kodi nyumba ya Israyeli, nyumba yampanduko, siinati kwa iwe. Ucitanji?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Unene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Katundu uyu anena za kalonga wa m'Yerusalemu, ndi nyumba yonse ya Israyeli yokhala pakati pao." 
Ezekiel12:11 Uziti, Ine ndine cizindikilo canu, monga ndacita ine momwemo kudzacitidwa nao; adzacotsedwa kumka kundende." 
Ezekiel12:12 Kalongayo ali pakati pao adzasenza paphewa pace mumdima, nadzaturuka; adzaboola palinga, nadzaturutsapo; adzaphimba nkhope yace kuti asapenye dziko ndi maso ace." 
Ezekiel12:13 Ndidzamphimba ndi ukonde wanga, nadzakodwa iye mu msampha wanga; ndipo ndidzafika naye ku Babulo, ku dziko la Akasidi; sadzaliona, cinkana adzafako." 
Ezekiel12:14 Ndipo onse omzinga kumthandiza, ndi magulu ace onse, ndidzawamwaza ku mphepo zonse, ndidzawasololeranso lupanga lakuwatsata." 
Ezekiel12:15 Motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, pakuwamwaza Ine mwa amitundu, ndi kuwabalalitsa m'maiko." 
Ezekiel12:16 Koma ndidzawasiya owerengeka apulumuke lupanga, ndi njala, ndi mliri, kuti afotokoze zonyansa zao kwa amitundu kumene afikako; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel12:17 Anandidzeranso mau a Mulungu, akuti," 
Ezekiel12:18 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, udye mkate wako ndi kunthunthumira, ndi kumwa madzi ako ndi kunjenjemera, ndi kutenga nkhawa;" 
Ezekiel12:19 nunene kwa anthu a m'dziko, Atero Yehova Mulungu za iwo okhala m'Yerusalemu, ndi za dziko la Israyeli, Adzadya mkate wao ndi nkhawa, ndi kumwa madzi ao ndi kusumwa; pakuti dziko lao lidzakhala lacipululu, kuleka kudzala kwace cifukwa ca ciwawa ca onse okhalamo." 
Ezekiel12:20 Ndi midzi yokhalamo anthu idzapasuka, ndi dziko lidzakhala labwinja; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel12:21 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel12:22 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, ngwotani mwambi umene muli nao m'dziko la Israyeli, wakuti, Masiku acuruka, ndi masomphenya ali onse apita pacabe?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Cifukwa cace unene nao, Atero Yehova Mulungu, Ndidzaleketsa mwambi uwu, ndipo sadzauchulanso mwambi m'Israyeli; koma unene nao, Masiku ayandikira, nadzacitika masomphenya ali onse." 
Ezekiel12:24 Pakuti sikudzakhalanso masomphenya acabe, kapena ula wosyasyalika m'nyumba ya Israyeli." 
Ezekiel12:25 Pakuti Ine ndine Yehova, ndidzanena, ndi mau ndidzanenawo adzacitika, osazengerezekanso; pakuti m'masiku anu, nyumba yopanduka inu, ndidzanena mau ndi kuwacita, ati Yehova Mulungu." 
Ezekiel12:26 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel12:27 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, taona, iwo a nyumba ya Israyeli akuti, masomphenya awaona ndiwo a masiku ambiri: ndipo anenera za nthawi ziri kutali," 
Ezekiel12:28 Cifukwa cace uziti nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Palibe amodzi a mau anga adzazengerezekanso; koma mau ndidzanenawo adzacitika, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera ine, akuti," 
Ezekiel13:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Unenere za aneneri a Israyeli onenerawo, nuziti nao onenera za m'mtima mwao mwao, Tamverani mau a Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:3 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsoka aneneri opusawo akutsata mzimu wao wao, cinkana sanaona kanthu." 
Ezekiel13:4 Aneneri ako, Israyeli, akhala ngati nkhandwe m'mapululu." 
Ezekiel13:5 Simunakwera kuima mopasuka, kapena kumanganso linga la nyumba ya Israyeli, kuima kunkhondo tsiku la Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:6 Iwo aona zopanda pace, ndi phenda labodza amene anena, Atero Yehova; koma Yehova sanawatuma, nayembekezetsa anthu kuti mauwo adzakhazikika." 
Ezekiel13:7 Simunaona masomphenya opanda pace kodi? simunanena ula wabodza kodi? pakunena inu, Atero Yehova; cinkana sindinanena?" 
Ezekiel13:8 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza mwanena zopanda pace, ndi kuona mabodza, cifukwa cace taonani, ndikhala Ine wotsutsana nanu, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:9 Ndi dzanja langa lidzakhala lotsutsana nao aneneri akuona zopanda pace, ndi kupenda za bodza; sadzakhala mu msonkhano wa anthu anga, kapena kulembedwa m'buku lolembedwamo nyumba ya Israyeli, kapena kulowa m'dziko la Israyeli; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Ambuye Yehova," 
Ezekiel13:10 Popeza, inde popeza asokeretsa anthu anga, ndi kuti, Mtendere, pokhala palibe mtendere; ndipo anthu akamanga linga, aneneriwo alimata ndi dothi losapondeka;" 
Ezekiel13:11 uziti nao olimata ndi dothi losapondeka, kuti lidzagwa, lidzabvumbidwa ndi mvula yaikuru; ndi inu, matalala akuru, mudzagwa; ndi mkuntho udzalithithimula." 
Ezekiel13:12 Ndipo taonani, litagwa linga, sadzanena nanu kodi, Liri kuti dothi munalimata nalo?" 
Ezekiel13:13 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzalithithimula ndi mkuntho m'ukali wanga; ndipo lidzabvumbidwa ndi mvula yaikuru mu mkwiyo wanga, ndi matalala akuru adzalitha m'ukali wanga." 
Ezekiel13:14 M'mwemo ndidzagumula linga munalimata ndi dothi losapondeka, ndi kuligwetsa pansi; kuti maziko ace agadabuke, ndipo lidzagwa; ndi inu mudzathedwa pakati pace; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:15 M'mwemo ndidzakwaniritsa ukali wanga pa lingalo, ndi pa iwo analimata ndi dothi losapondeka, ndipo ndidzati kwa inu, Lingalo palibe, ndi olimata palibe," 
Ezekiel13:16 ndiwo aneneri a Israyeli akunenera za Yerusalemu, nauonera masomphenya a mtendere, pamene palibe mtendere, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:17 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, uziika nkhope yako itsutsane nao ana akazi a anthu ako, akunenera za m'mtima mwao, nunenere cowatsutsa," 
Ezekiel13:18 nuziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsoka akazi osoka zophimbira mfundo zonse za dzanja, ndi iwo okonza zokuta mitu za misinkhu iri yonse, kuti asake miyoyo! Kodi musaka miyoyo ya anthu anga ndi kudzisungira miyoyo yanu?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Ndipo mundidetsa mwa anthu anga kulandirapo barele wodzala manja, ndi zidutsu za mkate, kuipha miyoyo yosayenera kufa, ndi kusunga miyoyo yosayenera kukhala ndi moyo, ndi kunena mabodza kwa anthu anga omvera bodza." 
Ezekiel13:20 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Taonani, nditsutsana nazo zophimbira zanu, zimene musaka nazo miyoyo komweko, kululuza; ndipo ndidzazikwatula m'manja mwanu, ndi kuimasula, ndiyo miyoyo muisaka kululuza." 
Ezekiel13:21 Zokuta mitu zanu zomwe ndidzazing'amba, ndi kulanditsa anthu anga m'manja mwanu; ndipo sadzakhalanso m'mphamvu mwanu kusakidwa; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel13:22 Popeza mwamvetsa cisoni ndi mabodza mtima wa wolungama, amene sindinamvetsa cisoni Ine, ndi kumlimbitsa manja woipa, kuti asabwerere kuleka njira yace yoipa, ndi kusungidwa wamoyo;" 
Ezekiel13:23 cifukwa cace simudzaonanso zopanda pace, kapena kupenda; koma ndidzalanditsa anthu anga m'manja mwanu; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel14:1 Pamenepo anafika kwa ine akulu ena a Israyeli nakhala pansi pamaso panga. 
Ezekiel14:2 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel14:3 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, anthu awa anautsa mafano ao mumtima mwao, naimika cokhumudwitsa ca mphulupulu yao pamaso pao; ndifunsidwe nao konse kodi?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Cifukwa cace ulankhule nao, nunene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Ali yense wa nyumba ya Israyeli wakuutsa mafano ace mumtima mwace, naimika cokhumudwitsa ca mphulupulu yace pamaso pace, nadza kwa mneneri, Ine Yehova ndidzamyankhapo monga mwa mafano ace aunyinji;" 
Ezekiel14:5 kuti ndigwire nyumba ya Israyeli mumtima mwao; popeza onsewo asanduka alendo ndi Ine mwa mafano ao. 
Ezekiel14:6 Cifukwa cace uziti kwa nyumba ya Israyeli, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Bwerani, lekani mafano anu, tembenuzani nkhope zanu kuzisiya zonyansa zanu zonse." 
Ezekiel14:7 Pakuti ali yense wa nyumba ya Israyeli, kapena wa alendo ogonera m'Israyeli, wodzisiyanitsa kusatsata Ine, nautsa mafano ace m'mtima mwace, naimika cokhumudwitsa ca mphulupulu yace pamaso pace, nadzera mneneri kudzifunsira kwa Ine, Ine Yehova ndidzamyankha ndekha;" 
Ezekiel14:8 ndipo ndidzaikira munthu uyu nkhope yanga imtsutse, ndi kumuyesa codabwitsa, ndi cizindikilo, ndi mwambi, ndi kumsadza pakati pa anthu anga; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel14:9 Ndipo akaceteka mneneriyo, nakanena mau, Ine Yehova ndamceta mneneri uja; ndipo ndidzamtambasulira dzanja langa, ndi kumuononga pakati pa anthu anga Israyeli." 
Ezekiel14:10 Ndipo adzasenza mphulupulu yao, mphulupulu ya mneneri idzanga mphulupulu ya uja wamfunsira;" 
Ezekiel14:11 kuti nyumba ya Israyeli isasocerenso kusatsata Ine, kapena kudzidetsanso ndi zolakwa zao zonse; koma kuti akhale anthu anga, ndipo ndikhale Ine Mulungu wao, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel14:12 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova akuti," 
Ezekiel14:13 Likandicimwira dziko ndi kucita monyenga, ndipo ndikalitambasulira dzanja langa, ndi kulityolera mcirikizo wace, ndiwo mkate, ndi kulitumizira njala, ndi kulidulira munthu ndi nyama," 
Ezekiel14:14 cinkana akadakhala m'mwemo anthu awa atatu, Nowa, Danieli, ndi Yobu, akadapulumutsa moyo wao wokha mwa cilungamo cao, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel14:14 cinkana akadakhala m'mwemo anthu awa atatu, Nowa, Danieli, ndi Yobu, akadapulumutsa moyo wao wokha mwa cilungamo cao, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel14:15 Ndikapititsa zirombo zoipa pakati pa dziko, nizipulula ana, kuti likhale lacipululu losapitako munthu cifukwa ca zirombo," 
Ezekiel14:16 cinkana anthu omwewo atatu akadakhala m'mwemo, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, sakadapulumutsa ana amuna kapena akazi; iwo akadapulumuka okha; koma dziko likadakhala lacipululu." 
Ezekiel14:17 Kapena ndikadza pa dziko ndi lupanga, ndi kuti, Lupanga lipite pakati pa dziko, kuti ndilidulire munthu ndi nyama;" 
Ezekiel14:18 cinkana anthu atatuwo akadakhala m'mwemo, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, sakadapulumutsa ana amuna kapena akazi; koma iwo akadapulumuka okha." 
Ezekiel14:19 Kapena ndikatumizira dzikolo mliri, ndi kulitsanulira ukali wanga ndi mwazi, kulidulira munthu ndi nyama;" 
Ezekiel14:20 cinkana Nowa, Danieli, ndi Yobu, akadakhala m'mwemo, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, sakadapulumutsa ana amuna kapena akazi; akadapulumutsa moyo wao wokha ndi cilungamo cao." 
Ezekiel14:20 cinkana Nowa, Danieli, ndi Yobu, akadakhala m'mwemo, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, sakadapulumutsa ana amuna kapena akazi; akadapulumutsa moyo wao wokha ndi cilungamo cao." 
Ezekiel14:21 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Kopambana kotani nanga ndikatumizira Yerusalemu maweruzo anga anai owawa, lupanga, njala, zirombo zoipa, ndi mliri, kuudulira anthu ndi nyama?" 
Ezekiel14:22 Koma onani mudzatsala opulumuka m'mwemo amene adzaturutsidwa, ndiwo ana amuna ndi akazi; taonani, adzaturuka kudza kwa inu; ndipo mudzaona njira zao, ndi zocita zao; mudzatonthozedwanso pa zoipa ndazitengera pa Yerusalemu, inde pa zonse ndazitengerapo." 
Ezekiel14:23 Ndipo adzakusangalatsani pamene muona njira yao, ndi zocita zao; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti sindinazicita kopanda cifukwa zonse ndinazicita momwemo, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel15:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel15:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, mtengo wampesa uposeranji mtengo uli wonse wina, nthambi ya mpesa yokhalayo mwa mitengo ya kunkhalango?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Kodi atengako mtengo kupanga nao nchito? atengako ciciri kodi kupacikapo cipangizo ciri conse? 
Ezekiel15:4 Taona, auponya kumoto kuuyesa nkhuni, moto unyeketsa nsonga zace zonse ziwiri, nupserera pakati pace, kodi ukomera nchito Irf yonse?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Taonani, pokhala wamphumphu sunayenera nchito iri yonse, nanga utanyeketsa moto nupserera udzayeneranso nchito iri yonse?" 
Ezekiel15:6 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Ngati mtengo wampesa pakati pa mitengo ya kunkhalango ndauponya kumoto ukhale nkhuni, momwemo ndidzapereka okhala m'Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel15:7 Ndipo ndidzaika nkhope yanga iwatsutse; adzaturuka kumoto, koma moto udzawatha; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, pakuika Ine nkhope yanga iwatsutse." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ndipo ndidzasandutsa dziko cipululu; popeza anacita colakwa, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel16:1 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel16:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Dziwitsa Yerusalemu zonyansa zace, nuziti," 
Ezekiel16:3 Atero Ambuye Yehova kwa Yerusalemu, Ciyambi cako ndi kubadwa kwako ndiko ku dziko la Akanani; atate wako anali M-amori, ndi mai wako Mhiti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Ndipo za kubadwa kwako, tsiku lobadwa iwe sanadula ncofu yako, sanakuyeretsa ndi kukusambitsa ndi madzi, sanakuthira mcere konse, kapena kukukulunga m'nsaru ai." 
Ezekiel16:5 Panalibe diso linakucitira cifundo, kukucitira cimodzi conse ca izi, kucitira iwe nsoni; koma unatayidwa kuyere; pakuti ananyansidwa nao moyo wako tsiku la kubadwa kwake," 
Ezekiel16:6 Ndipo popita Ine panali iwepo, ndinakuona ulikubvimvinizika m'mwazi wako. Pamenepo ndinanena ndi iwe m'mwazi wako, Khala ndi moyo, inde ndinati kwa iwe m'mwazi mwako, Khala ndi moyo." 
Ezekiel16:7 Ndinakucurukitsa ngati mphundu za kumunda; ndipo unathululuka ndi kukula kufikira wakongola nkhope, maere ako anamera, ndi tsitsi lako linamera; koma unali wamarisece ndi wausiwa." 
Ezekiel16:8 Ndipo popita Ine panali iwepo ndi kukupenya, taona nyengo yako ndiyo nyengo yakukondana; pamenepo ndinakupfunda copfunda canga, ndi kuphimba umarisece wako; inde ndinakulumbirira ndi kupangana nawe, ati Ambuye Yehova, ndipo unakhala wanga." 
Ezekiel16:9 Ndipo ndinakusambitsa ndi madzi, inde ndinakutsuka kukucotsera mwazi wako, ndi kukudzoza mafuta." 
Ezekiel16:10 Ndinakubvekanso ndi nsaru zopikapika, ndi kukubveka nsapato za cikopa ca katumbu; ndinakuzenenga nsaru yabafuta, ndi kukuphimba ndi nsaru yasilika." 
Ezekiel16:11 Ndinakukometseranso ndi zokometsera, ndi kuika zigwinjiri m'manja mwako, ndi unyolo m'khosi mwako." 
Ezekiel16:12 Momwemo ndinaika cipini m'mphuno mwako, ndi maperere m'makutu mwako, ndi korona wokongola pamutu pako." 
Ezekiel16:13 Ndipo unadzikometsera ndi golidi, ndi siliva, ndi cobvala cako ndi bafuta ndi silika ndi yopikapika; unadya ufa wosalala, ndi uci, ndi mafuta; ndipo unali wokongola woposa ndithu, ndipo unapindula-pindula kufikira unasanduka ufumu." 
Ezekiel16:14 Ndi mbiri yako inabuka mwa amitundu cifukwa ca kukongola kwako; pakuti ndiko kwangwiro, mwa ulemerero wanga ndinauika pa iwe, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel16:15 Koma unatama kukongola kwako, ndi kucita zacigololo potama mbiri yako, ndi kutsanulira zigololo zako pa munthu ali yense wopitapo; unali wace." 
Ezekiel16:16 Ndipo unatengako zobvala zako, ndi kudzimangira misanje ya mawanga mawanga, ndi kucitapo cigololo; zotere sizinayenera kufika kapena kucitika." 
Ezekiel16:17 Unatenganso zokometsera zako zokoma za golidi wanga ndi siliva wanga, zimene ndinakupatsa, ndi kudzipangira mafano a amuna, ndi kucita nao cigololo." 
Ezekiel16:18 Unatenganso zobvala zako za nsaru yopikapika, ndi kuwabveka nazo, unaikanso mafuta anga ndi cofukiza canga pamaso pao." 
Ezekiel16:19 Ndi mkate wanga ndinakupatsawo, ufa wosalala, ndi mafuta, ndi uci, ndinakudyetsazo, unawaikira izi pamaso pao, zicite pfungo lokoma; kunatero, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel16:20 Unatenganso ana ako amuna ndi akazi amene unandibalirawo, ndi kuwapereka nsembe awathe. Zigololo zako zidacepa kodi," 
Ezekiel16:21 kuti unawapha ana anga ndi kuwapereka, pakuwapititsa pamoto?" 
Ezekiel16:22 Ndipo pa zonyansa zako zonse ndi zigololo zako sunakumbukila masiku a ubwana wako, mujaunakhala wamarisece ndi wausiwa, wobvimvinizika m'mwazi wako." 
Ezekiel16:23 Ndipo kudacitika utatha zoipa zako zonse, (tsoka iwe, tsoka, ati Ambuye Yehova)" 
Ezekiel16:24 unadzimangira nyumba yacimphuli, unadzimangiranso ciunda m'makwalala ali onse." 
Ezekiel16:25 Unamanga ciunda cako pa mphambano ziri zonse, ndipo unanyansitsa kukongola kwako, ndi kutukula mapazi ako kwa yense wopitako, ndi kucurukitsa cigololo cako." 
Ezekiel16:26 Wacitanso cigololo ndi Aaigupto oyandikizana nawe, akulu thupi, ndi kucurukitsa cigololo cako kuutsa mkwiyo wanga." 
Ezekiel16:27 Taona tsono, ndakutambasulira dzanja langa, ndi kucepsa gawo lako la cakudya, ndi kukupereka ku cifuniro ca iwo akudana nawe, kwa ana akazi a Afilisti akucita manyazi ndi njira yako yoipa." 
Ezekiel16:28 Unacitanso cigololo ndi Aasuri, pakuti unakhala wosakoledwa, inde unacita cigololo nao, koma sunakoledwa." 
Ezekiel16:29 Unacurukitsanso cigololo cako m'dziko la Kanani, mpaka dziko la Akasidi, koma sunakoledwa naconso." 
Ezekiel16:30 Ha! mtima wako ngwofoka, ati Ambuye Yehova, pakucita iwe izi zonse, ndizo nchito za mkazi wacigololo wouma m'maso." 
Ezekiel16:31 Pakumanga nyumba yako yacimphuli pa mphambano ziri zonse, ndi pomanga ciunda cako m'makwalala ali onse, sunakhala ngati mkazi wadama waphindu, popeza unapeputsa mphotho." 
Ezekiel16:32 Ndiwe mkazi wokwatibwa wocita cigololo, wolandira alendo m'malo mwa mwamuna wace." 
Ezekiel16:33 Anthu amaninkha akazi onse acigololo mphatso, koma iwe umaninkha mabwenzi ako onse mphatso zako ndi kuwalipira, kuti akudzere kucokera ku mbali zonse, kuti acite nawe cigololo." 
Ezekiel16:34 M'mwemo usiyana konse ndi akazi ena m'cigololo cako; pakuti palibe wokutsata kucita nawe cigololo; popezanso uwalipira, koma sakupatsa iwe mphotho; potero usiyana nao konse ena." 
Ezekiel16:35 Cifukwa cace, wacigololo iwe, tamvera mau a Yehova:" 
Ezekiel16:36 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza ndalama zako zamwazika, nubvundukuka umarisece wako mwa cigololo cako ndi mabwenzi ako, ndi cifukwa ca mafano onse a zonyansa zako, ndi mwazi wa ana ako umene unawa patsa;" 
Ezekiel16:37 cifukwa cace taona, ndidzasonkhanitsa mabwenzi ako onse amene wakondwera nao, ndi onse unawakonda, pamodzi ndi onse unawada; inde ndidzawasonkhanitsira iwe pozungulira ponse, ndi kuwabvundukulira umarisece wako, kuti aone umarisece wako wonse." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ndipo ndidzaweruza mlandu wako, monga aweruza akazi acigololo ndi okhetsa mwazi; ndipo ndidzakutengera mwazi wa ukali ndi wa nsanje." 
Ezekiel16:39 Ndidzakuperekanso m'dzanja lao, ndipo adzagwetsa nyumba yako yacimphuli, ndi kugumula ziunda zako, nadzakubvula zobvala zako, ndi kulanda zokometsera zako zokongola, nadzakusiya wamarisece ndi wausiwa." 
Ezekiel16:40 Ndipo adzamemezera iwe msonkhano, nadzakuponya miyala, ndi kukupyoza ndi malupanga ao." 
Ezekiel16:41 Ndipo adzatentha nyumba zako ndi moto, nadzakuweruza pamaso pa akazi ambiri; ndipo ndidzakuleketsa kucita cigololo, ndipo sudzalipiranso mphotho yacigololo." 
Ezekiel16:42 M'mwemo ukali wanga udzakhuta nawe, ndi nsanje yanga idzakucokera, ndipo ndidzakhala cete wosakwiyanso." 
Ezekiel16:43 Popeza sunakumbukila masiku a ubwana wako, koma wandibvuta nazo zonsezi, cifukwa cace taona, Inenso ndidzakubwezera njira yako pamutu pako, ati Ambuye Yehova; ndipo sudzacita coipa ici coonjezerapo pa zonyansa zako zonse." 
Ezekiel16:44 Taona, ali yense wonena miyambi adzakunenera mwambi uwu, wakuti, Monga mace momwemo mwana wace." 
Ezekiel16:45 Iwe ndiwe mwana wa mako wonyansidwa naye mwamuna wace ndi ana ace, ndipo iwe ndiwe mng'ono wao wa akulu ako akunyansidwa ndi amuna ao ndi ana ao; mai wako ndiye Mhiti, ndi atate wako ndiye M-amori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Ndi mkulu wako ndiye Samariya, wokhala ku dzanja lako lamanzere, iye ndi ana ace akazi; ndi mng'ono wako wokhala ku dzanja lako lamanja ndiye Sodomu ndi ana ace akazi." 
Ezekiel16:47 Koma sunayenda m'njira zao, kapena kucita monga mwa zonyansa zao pang'ono pokha; unawaposa iwo m'kubvunda kwako, m'njira zako zonse." 
Ezekiel16:48 Pali ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, Sodomu mng'ono wako sanacita, iye kapena ana ace akazi, monga umo unacitira iwe ndi ana ako akazi." 
Ezekiel16:49 Taona, mphulupulu ya mng'onowako Sodomu ndi iye, kudzikuza, kucuruka kwa cakudya, ndi kupumula kwa mtambasali, anali nako iye ndi ana ace; ndipo sanalimbitsa dzanja la wosauka ndi wosowa." 
Ezekiel16:50 Ndipo anadzikuza, nacita conyansa pamaso panga; cifukwa cace ndinawacotsa pakuciona." 
Ezekiel16:51 Ngakhale Samariya sanacita theka la zocimwa zako, koma unacurukitsa zonyansa zako kuwaposa iwowa, ndi kuika abale ako olungama ndi zonyansa zako zonse unazicita." 
Ezekiel16:52 Usenzenso manyazi ako, iwe wakuweruza abale ako mwa zocimwa zako unazicita monyansa koposa iwowa; iwo akuposa iwe m'cilungamo cao, nawenso ucite manyazi nusenze manyazi ako, popeza waika abale ako olungama." 
Ezekiel16:53 Ndipo ndidzabweza undende wao, undende wa Sodomu ndi ana ace, ndi undende wa Samariya ndi ana ace, ndi undede wa andende ako pakati pao;" 
Ezekiel16:54 kuti usenze manyazi ako, ndi kuti ucite manyazi cifukwa ca zonse unazicita pakuwatonthoza." 
Ezekiel16:55 Ndipo abale ako Sodomu ndi ana ace adzabwerera umo unakhalira kale; ndi iwe ndi ana ako mudzabwerera umo munakhalira kale. 
Ezekiel16:56 Ndipo sunakamba za mbale wako Sodomu pakamwa pako tsiku la kudzikuza kwako; 
Ezekiel16:57 cisanabvundukuke coipa cako monga nthawi ya citonzo ca ana akazi a Aramu, ndi onse akumzungulira iye, ana akazi a Afilisti akupeputsa pozungulira ponse." 
Ezekiel16:58 Wasenza coipa cako ndi zonyansa zako, ati Yehova." 
Ezekiel16:59 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzacita ndi iwe monga umo unacitira; popeza wapepula lumbiro ndi kutyola pangano." 
Ezekiel16:60 Koma ndidzakumbukila Ine pangano langa ndi iwe m'masiku a ubwana wako, ndipo ndidzakhazikitsa pangano losatha nawe." 
Ezekiel16:61 Pamenepo udzakumbukila njira zako ndi kucita manyazi, pakulandira abale ako akuru ndi ang'ono; ndipo ndidzakupatsa awa akhale ana ako akazi, angakhale sali a pangano lako." 
Ezekiel16:62 Pakuti ndidzakhazikitsa pangano langa ndi iwe, ndipo udzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova;" 
Ezekiel16:63 kuti uzikumbukila ndi kucita manyazi ndi kusatsegulanso pakamwa pako konse, cifukwa ca manyazi ako, pamene ndikufafanima zonse unazicita, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel17:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel17:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, ipha mwambi, nunene fanizo kwa nyumba ya Israyeli," 
Ezekiel17:3 nuziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Ciombankhanga cacikuru ndi mapiko akuru, ndi maphiphi atali, odzala nthenga ca mathotho-mathotho, cinafika ku Lebano, nicitenga nsonga ya mkungudza," 
Ezekiel17:4 cinabudula nsonga yosomphoka ya nthambi zace zanthete, ndi kumuka nayo ku dziko la malonda, cinaiika m'mudzi wa amalonda." 
Ezekiel17:5 Cinatengakonso mbeu ya m'dziko, ndi kuibzala m'nthaka yokoma, cinaiika panali madzi ambiri, cinaioka ngati mtengo wamsondodzi." 
Ezekiel17:6 Ndipo inaphuka, nikhala mpesa wotambalala wofupi msinkhu, nthambi zace zinapindikira momwe, ndi mizu yace pansi pace, nikhala mpesa, nuonetsa nthambi ndi kuphuka mphukira." 
Ezekiel17:7 Panalinso ciombankhanga cina cacikuru, ndi mapiko akuru, ndi nthenga zambiri; ndipo taona, mpesa uwu unacipindira mizu yace, nucilunjikitsira nthambi zace, kucokera pookedwa pace, kuti ciuthirire madzi." 
Ezekiel17:8 Unaokedwa mu nthaka yabwino kuli madzi ambiri, kuti uphuke nthambi, nubale zipatso, nukhale mpesa wabwino." 
Ezekiel17:9 Uziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Udzakondwa kodi? sadzausula ndi kudula zipatso zace, kuti uume, kuti masamba ace onse ophuka aume, ngakhale palibe mphamvu yaikuru, kapena anthu ambiri akuuzula?" 
Ezekiel17:10 Inde ungakhale waokedwa udzakondwa kodi? sudzauma ciumire kodi pakuuomba mphepo ya kum'mawa? udzauma pookedwa apo udaphuka. 
Ezekiel17:11 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti." 
Ezekiel17:12 Uziti tsono kwa nyumba ya mpandukoyi, Simudziwa kodi izi nciani? Uziti, Taonani mfumu ya ku Babulo inadza ku Yerusalemu, nitenga mfumu yace ndi akalonga ace, nibwera nao kuti iye ku Babulo;" 
Ezekiel17:13 nitenga wa mbumba yacifumu, nicita naye pangano, nimlumbiritsa, nicotsa amphamvu a m'dziko;" 
Ezekiel17:14 kuti ufumuwo ukhale wopepuka, kuti usadzikweze, koma kuti pakusunga pangano lace ukhale." 
Ezekiel17:15 Koma anapandukira ndi kutuma mithenga yace ku Aigupto, kuti ampatse akavalo ndi anthu ambiri. Adzapindula kodi? adzapulumuka wakucita izi? atyole pangano ndi kupulumuka kodi?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, pamalo pokhala mfumu, imene idamcititsa ufumu, imene anapeputsa lumbiro lace, imene anatyola pangano lace, adzafa pamodzi ndi iye pakati pa Babulo." 
Ezekiel17:17 Ndipo Farao ndi nkhondo yace yaikuru, ndi khamu lace launyinji, sadzacita pamodzi naye kunkhondo, pakuunda mtumbira, ndi kumanga malinga, kulikha anthu ambiri." 
Ezekiel17:18 Pakuti anapepula lumbiro, ndi kutyola pangano, angakhale anapereka dzanja lace; popeza anacita izi zonse sadzapulumuka." 
Ezekiel17:19 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Pali Ine, lumbiro langa, analipepula, ndi pangano langa analityola, ndidzawabweza pamutu pace." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ndidzamphimbanso ndi ukonde wanga, nadzakodwa iye mu msampha wanga; ndipo ndidzadza naye ku Babulo, ndi kunena naye komweko mlandu wa kulakwa kwace anandilakwira nako." 
Ezekiel17:21 Ndipo othawa ace onse m'magulu ace onse adzagwa ndi lupanga, ndi otsala adzabalalitsidwa ku mphepo zonse; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndanena." 
Ezekiel17:22 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzatenganso nsonga ya mkungudza wautali ndi kulika; ndidzabudula nsonga yosomphoka'ya nthambi zace zanthete, ndi kuioka pa phiri lalitali lothubvuka;" 
Ezekiel17:23 pa phiri lothubvuka la Israyeli ndidzaioka, ndipo idzaphuka nthambi ndi kubala zipatso, nidzakhala mkungudza wokoma, ndi m'munsi mwace mudzakhala mbalame ziri zonse za mapiko ali onse; mu mthunzi wa nthambi zace zidzabindikira." 
Ezekiel17:24 Ndipo mitengo yonse ya kuthengo idzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndatsitsa mtengo wosomphoka, ndakuza mtengo waung'ono, ndaumitsa mtengo wauwisi, ndi kuphukitsa mtengo wouma; Ine Yehova ndanena ndi kucicita." 
Ezekiel18:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehoya, akuti," 
Ezekiel18:2 Mutani inu ndi kunena mwambi uwu za dziko la Israyeli, wakuti, Atate adadya mphesa zosacha, ndi mano a ana ayayamira." 
Ezekiel18:3 Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, simudzaonanso cifukwa ca kunena mwambiwu m'Israyeli." 
Ezekiel18:4 Taonani, miyoyo yonse ndi yanga, monga moyo wa atate momwemonso moyo wa mwana, ndiyo yanga; moyo wocimwawo ndiwo udzafa." 
Ezekiel18:5 Koma munthu akakhala wolungama, nakacita ciweruzo ndi cilungamo," 
Ezekiel18:6 wosadya pamapiripo, wosakweza maso ace ku mafano a nyumba ya Israyeli, wosaipsa mkazi wa mnansi wace, kapena kuyandikira mkazi ataoloka," 
Ezekiel18:7 wosasautsa munthu ali yense, koma wambwezera wangongole cigwiriro cace, wosatenga zofunkha, anampatsa wanjala cakudya cace, nabveka wamarisece ndi cobvala," 
Ezekiel18:8 wosapereka molira phindu, wosatenga coonjezerapo wobweza dzanja lace lisacite cosalungama, woweruza zoona pakati pa munthu ndi mnzace," 
Ezekiel18:9 amayenda m'malemba anga, nasunga maweruzo anga kucita cokhulupirika; iye ndiye wolungama, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu, anena Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel18:10 Akabala mwana ndiye mkhungu, wokhetsa mwazi, wocita cimodzi ca izi," 
Ezekiel18:11 wosacita zabwino zonse zija, koma anadyanso pamapiri, naipsa mkazi wa mnansi wace," 
Ezekiel18:12 nasautsa osauka ndi osowa, natenga zofunkha, wosabwezera cigwiriro, nakweza maso ace kumafano, nacita conyansa," 
Ezekiel18:13 napereka molira phindu, nalandira coonjezerapo; adzakhala ndi moyo uyu kodi? sadzakhala ndi moyo, anacita zonyansa izi zonse; kufa adzafadi, niwazi wace umkhalira." 
Ezekiel18:14 Taona tsono, yemweyo akabala mwana uyu, naona zocimwa zonse adazicita atate wace, naopa wosacita zoterezo," 
Ezekiel18:15 wosadya pamapiri, kapena kukweza maso ace ku mafano a nyumba ya Israyeli, wosaipsa mkazi wa mnansi wace," 
Ezekiel18:16 kapena kusautsa wina ali yense, wosatenga cigwiriro, wosatenga zofunkha; koma anapatsa wanjala cakudya cace, nabveka wamarisece ndi cobvala," 
Ezekiel18:17 naletsa dzanja lace pa wozunzika, wosalandira phindu kapena coonjezerapo, wocita maweruzo anga, nayenda m'malemba anga; uyu sadzafera mphulupulu ya atate wace, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu." 
Ezekiel18:18 Atate wace, popeza anazunza cizunzire, nafunkha za mbale wace, nacita cimene siciri cabwino pakati pa anthu ace, taona, adzafa mu mphulupulu yace." 
Ezekiel18:19 Koma inu mukuti, Alekeranji mwana kusenza mphulupulu za atate wace? Mwanayo akacita ciweruzo ndi cilungamo, nakasunga malemba anga onse, ndi kuwacita, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu." 
Ezekiel18:20 Moyo wocimwawo ndiwo udzafa; mwana sadzasenza mphulupulu zaatate wace, ndi atate sadzasenza mphulupulu za mwana; cilungamo ca wolungama cidzamkhalira, ndi coipa ca woipa cidzamkhalira," 
Ezekiel18:21 Koma woipayo akabwerera kusiya macimo ace onse adawacita nakasunga malemba anga onse, ndi kucita ciweruzo ndi cilungamo, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu, sadzafa." 
Ezekiel18:22 Nnena cimodzi conse ca zolakwa zace zonse adazicita cidzakumbukika cimtsutse; m'cilungamo cace adacicita adakhala ndi moyo. 
Ezekiel18:23 Ngati ndikondwera nayo imfa ya woipa? ati Ambuye Yehova, si ndiko kuti abwerere kuleka njira yace, ndi kukhala ndi moyo?" 
Ezekiel18:24 Koma wolungamayo akabwerera kuleka cilungamo cace, nakacita mphulupulu, ndi kucita monga mwa zonyansa zonse azicita woipa, adzakhala ndi moyo kodi? Nnena cimodzi ca zolungama zace zonse adzazicita cidzakumbukika m'kulakwa kwace analakwa nako, ndi m'kucimwa kwace anacimwa nako; momwemo adzafa." 
Ezekiel18:25 Koma mukuti, Njira ya Ambuye njosayenera. Tamvera tsono nyumba ya Israyeli, Kodi njira yanga njosayenera? njira zanu si ndizo zosayenera?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Wolungamayo akatembenukira kuleka cilungamo cace, nakacita mphulupulu, adzafa momwemo; m'mphulupulu yace adaicita adzafa." 
Ezekiel18:27 Ndipo woipayo akatembenukira kuleka coipa cace adacicita, nakacita ciweruzo ndi cilungamo, adzapulumutsa moyo wace."
