Ezekiel18:28 Popeza anasamalira, natembenukira kuleka zolakwa zace zonse adazicita, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu, sadzafa." 
Ezekiel18:29 Koma nyumba ya Israyeli imanena, Njira ya Ambuye njosayenera, Inu, nyumba ya Israyeli, kodi njira zanga nzosayenera? njira zanu si ndizo zosayenera?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Cifukwa cace ndidzakuweruzani inu, nyumba ya Israyeli, yense monga mwa njira zace, ati Ambuye Yehova. Bwererani, nimutembenukire kuleka zolakwa zanu zonse, ndipo simudzakhumudwa nazo, ndi kuonongeka nayo mphulupulu." 
Ezekiel18:31 Tayani, ndi kudzicotsera zolakwa zanu zonse zimene munalakwa nazo, ndi kudzifunira mtima watsopano, ndi mzimu watsopano; pakuti mudzaferanji inu, nyumba ya Israyeli?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Pakuti sindikondwera nayo imfa ya wakufayo, ati Ambuye Yehova; cifukwa cace bwererani, nimukhale ndi moyo." 
Ezekiel19:1 Ndipo iwe, takwezera akalonga a Israyeli nyimbo ya maliro," 
Ezekiel19:2 uziti, Mai wako ndi ciani? Mkango waukazi unabwanthama mwa mikango, unalera ana ace pakati pa misona." 
Ezekiel19:3 Ndipo unalera mmodzi wa ana ace, iye nasanduka msona, unaphunzira kugwira nyama, unalusira anthu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Mitundu ya anthu idamva mbiri yace, unagwidwa m'mbuna mwao; ndipo anadza nao ndi zokowera ku dziko la Aigupto." 
Ezekiel19:5 Pakuona tsono waukaziwo, kuti unalindirira, ndi kuti ciyembekezo cace cidatha, unatenga wina wa ana ace, numsandutsa msona." 
Ezekiel19:6 Ndipo unayendayenda pakati pa mikango, nukhala msona, nuphunzira kugwira nyama, nulusira anthu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Ndipo unadziwa amasiye ao, nupasula midzi yao, ndipo dziko ndi kudzala kwace linasanduka labwinja, cifukwa ca phokoso la kubangula kwace." 
Ezekiel19:8 Pamenepo mitundu ya anthu inadzipereka kuukola kucokera ku maiko a ku mbali zonse, niuphimba ndi ukonde wao, nugwidwa uwu m'mbuna mwao." 
Ezekiel19:9 Nauika m'citatanga ndi zokowera, nadza nao kwa mfumu ya ku Babulo; anaulonga m'malinga, kuti mau ace asamvekenso pa mapiri a Israyeli." 
Ezekiel19:10 Mai wako ananga mpesa wookedwa kumadzi; muja anakhala mumtendere unabala zipatso, wodzala ndi nthambi, cifukwa ca madzi ambiri." 
Ezekiel19:11 Ndipo unali nazo ndodo zolimba zikhale ndodo zacifumu, za ocita ufumu, ndi msinkhu wao unakula kufikira kumitambo, nizinaoneka m'kusomphoka kwao pakati pa nthambi zace zambiri." 
Ezekiel19:12 Koma unazulidwa mwaukali, unaponyedwa pansi ndi mphepo ya kum'mawa, inaumitsa zipatso zace, ndodo zace zolimba zinatyoka ndi kuuma, moto unazitha." 
Ezekiel19:13 Ndipo tsopano waokedwa m'cipululu m'dziko louma ndi la ludzu. 
Ezekiel19:14 Unaturukanso moto ku ndodo za ku nthambi zace, unatha zipatso zace; m'mwemo ulibe ndodo yolimba ikhale ndodo yacifumu ya kucita ufumu. Iyi ndi nyimbo idzakhala nyimbo ya maliro." 
Ezekiel20:1 Ndipo kunali caka cacisanu ndi ciwiri, mwezi wacisanu; tsiku lakhumi la mwezi, anadza akulu ena a Israyeli kufunsira kwa Yehova, nakhala pansi iwowa pamaso panga." 
Ezekiel20:2 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel20:3 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lankhula ndi akulu a Israyeli, nunene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Mwadza kodi kufunsira kwa Ine? Pali Ine, sindidzafunsidwa ndi inu, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel20:4 Udzawaweruza kodi, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe? udzawaweruza? uwadziwitse zonyansa za makolo ao," 
Ezekiel20:5 nunene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsiku lija ndinamsankha Israyeli, ndi kukwezera mbeu ya nyumba ya Yakobo dzanja langa, ndi kudzidziwitsa kwa iwo m'dziko la Aigupto, pakuwakwezera dzanja langa, ndi kuti, Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu;" 
Ezekiel20:6 tsiku lomwelo ndinawakwezera dzanja langa kuwaturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto, kumka nao ku dziko ndinawazondera, moyenda mkaka ndi uci, ndilo lokometsetsa mwa maiko onse;" 
Ezekiel20:7 ndipo ndinanena nao, Ali yense ataye zonyansa za pamaso pace, nimusadzidetsa ndi mafano a Aigupto; Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Ezekiel20:8 Koma anapandukira Ine, osafuna kundimvera Ine, sanataya yense zonyansa pamaso pace, sanaleka mafano a Aigupto; pamenepo ndidati ndiwatsanulire ukali wanga, kuwakwaniritsira mkwiyo wanga m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Ezekiel20:9 Koma ndinacicita cifukwa ca dzina langa, kuti lisadetsedwe pamaso pa amitundu amene anakhala pakati pao, amene pamaso pao ndinadzidziwitsa kwa iwo, pakuwaturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Ezekiel20:10 Momwemo ndinaturuka nao m'dziko la Aigupto, ndi kulowa nao kucipululu." 
Ezekiel20:11 Ndinawapatsanso malemba anga, ndi kuwadziwitsa maweruzo anga, ndiwo munthu akawacita adzakhala nao ndi moyo." 
Ezekiel20:12 Ndipo ndinawapatsanso masabata anga akhale cizindikilo pakati pa Ine ndi iwo, kuti adziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova wakuwapatula." 
Ezekiel20:13 Koma nyumba ya Israyeli inapaodukira Ine m'cipululu, sanayenda m'malemba anga, nanyoza maweruzo anga, amene, munthu akawacita adzakhala nao ndi moyo; ndi masabata anga anawaipsa kwambiri; pamenepo ndidati ndiwatsanulire ukali wanga m'cipululu kuwatha." 
Ezekiel20:14 Koma ndinacicita cifukwa ca dzina langa, kuti lisaipsidwe pamaso pa amitundu amene ndinawaturutsa pamaso pao." 
Ezekiel20:15 Ndipo ndinawakwezeranso dzanja langa m'cipululu, kusawalowetsa m'dzikolo ndidawapatsa, moyenda mkaka ndi uci, ndilo lokometsetsa mwa maiko onse;" 
Ezekiel20:16 popeza ananyoza maweruzo anga, osayenda m'malemba anga, naipsa masabata anga; pakuti mitima yao inatsata mafano ao." 
Ezekiel20:17 Koma diso langa lidawaleka osawaononga, sindinawatha onse m'cipululu." 
Ezekiel20:18 Ndipo ndinati kwa ana ao m'cipululu, Musamayenda m'malemba a atate anu, musawasunga maweruzo ao, kapena kudzidetsa ndi mafano ao;" 
Ezekiel20:19 Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu, muziyenda m'malemba anga, ndi kusunga maweruzo anga, ndi kuwacita;" 
Ezekiel20:20 muzipatulanso masabata anga, ndipo adzakhala cizindikilo pakati pa Ine ndi inu, kuti mudziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Ezekiel20:21 Koma anawo anapandukira Ine, sanayenda m'malemba anga, kapena kusunga maweruzo anga kuwacita, amene munthu akawacita adzakhala nao ndi moyo; anaipsa masabata anga; pamenepo ndinati ndidzawatsanulira ukali wanga, kuwakwaniritsira mkwiyo wanga m'cipululu." 
Ezekiel20:22 Koma ndinabweza dzanja langa ndi kucicita, cifukwa ca dzina langa; kuti lisaipsidwe pamaso pa amitundu, amene ndinawaturutsa pamaso pao. Ndinawakwezeranso dzanja langa m'cipululu," 
Ezekiel20:23 kuti ndidzawabalalitsa mwa amitundu, ndi kuwamwaza m'maiko;" 
Ezekiel20:24 popeza sanacita maweruzo anga, koma ananyoza malemba anga, naipsa masabata anga, ndi maso ao anatsata mafano a atate ao." 
Ezekiel20:25 Momwemonso ndinawapatsa malemba amene sanali abwino, ndi maweruzo osakhala nao ndi moyo;" 
Ezekiel20:26 ndinawadetsanso m'zopereka zao; pakuti anapititsa pamoto onse oyamba kubadwa kuti ndiwapasule; kuti adziwe kuti Ine ndine Yehova. 
Ezekiel20:27 Cifukwa cace wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lankhula ndi nyumba ya Israyeli, nunene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Mwa icinso atate anu anandicitira mwano pakundilakwira Ine." 
Ezekiel20:28 Nditafika nao m'dzikolo ndinawakwezera dzanja langa kuwapatsa ilo, anapenya citunda ciri conse cacitali, ndi mtengo uli wonse wagudugudu, naphera pomwepo nsembe zao, napetekapo nsembe zao zondiputa, aponso anacita pfungo lao lokoma, nathiraponso nsembe zao zothira." 
Ezekiel20:29 Pamenepo ndinanena nao, Msanje wotani uwu mumapitako? Momwemo dzina lace lichedwa Msanje, mpaka lero lino." 
Ezekiel20:30 Cifukwa cace uziti kwa nyumba ya Israyeli, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Mudzidetsa kodi monga umo anacitira makolo anu? mucita cigololo kodi kutsata zonyansa zao?" 
Ezekiel20:31 ndipo popereka zopereka zanu popititsa ana anu pamoto, mudzidetsa kodi ndi mafano anu onse mpaka lero lino? ndipo kodi ndidzafunsidwa ndi inu, nyumba ya Israyeli? Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, sindidzafunsidwa ndi inu;" 
Ezekiel20:32 ndi ici cimauka mumtima mwanu sicidzacitika, umo mukuti, Tidzakhala ngati amitundu, ngati mabanja a m'maiko, kutumikira mtengo ndi mwala." 
Ezekiel20:33 Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, zedi ndi dzanja lamphamvu, ndi mkono wotambasuka, ndi ukali wotsanulidwa, ndidzakhala mfumu yanu." 
Ezekiel20:34 Ndipo ndidzakuturutsani mwa mitundu ya anthu, ndi kukusonkhanitsani m'maiko munabalalikamo ndi dzanja lamphamvu, ndi mkono wotambasuka, ndi ukali wotsanulidwa." 
Ezekiel20:35 Ndipo ndidzalowa nanu m'cipululu ca mitundu ya anthu, ndi kukuweruzani komweko popenyana maso." 
Ezekiel20:36 Monga ndinaweruza makolo anu m'cipululu ca dziko la Aigupto, momwemo ndidzaweruza inu, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel20:37 Ndipo ndidzakupititsani pansi pa ndodo ya mbusa ndi kukulowetsani m'cimango ca cipangano; 
Ezekiel20:38 ndipo ndidzasankhula mwa inu opanduka ndi ondilakwira, ndidzawaturutsa m'dziko logoneramo iwo; koma sadzalowa m'dziko la Israyeli; motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel20:39 Ndipo inu, nyumba ya Israyeli, atero Ambuye Yehova, mukani, tumikirani yense mafano ace, ndi m'tsogolo momwe, popeza simundimvera Ine; koma musaipsanso dzina langa lopatulika ndi zopereka zanu ndi mafano anu." 
Ezekiel20:40 Pakuti pa phiri langa lopatulika, pa phiri lothubvuka la Israyeli, ati Ambuye Yehova, pomwepo onse a nyumba ya Israyeli, onsewo adzanditumikira Ine m'dzikomo; pomwepo ndidzawalandira, ndi pomwepo ndidzafuna nsembe zanu zokweza, ndi zoyamba za msonkho wanu, pamodzi ndi zopatulika zanu zonse." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ngati pfungo lokoma ndidzakulandirani pakukuturutsani mwa mitundu ya anthu, ndipo ndidzakusonkhanitsani kukucotsani m'maiko munabalalikiramo, ndipo ndidzazindikirika Woyera mwa inu pamaso pa amitundu." 
Ezekiel20:42 Ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, pakukulowetsani Ine m'dzil ko la Israyeli, m'dzikoli ndinalikwezera dzanja langa kulipereka kwa makolo anu." 
Ezekiel20:43 Ndi pomwepo mudzakumbukila njira zanu, ndi zonse mudazicita ndi kudzidetsa nazo, ndipo mudzakhala onyansa pamaso pa inu nokha, cifukwa ca zoipa zanu zonse mudazicita." 
Ezekiel20:44 M'mwemo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova nditacita nanu cifukwa ca dzina langa, si monga mwa njira zanu zoipa, kapena monga mwa macitidwe anu obvunda, nyumba ya Israyeli inu, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel20:45 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel20:46 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lozetsa nkhope yako njira ya kumwera, nubenthulire mau kumwera, nunenere nkhalango ya kuthengo la kumwera kwa Yuda;" 
Ezekiel20:47 nuziti kwa nkhalango ya kumwera kwa Yuda, Tamvera mau a Yehova, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona ndidzayatsa moto mwa iwe, udzanyeketsa mtengo uli wonse wauwisi mwa iwe, ndi mtengo uli wonse wouma; malawi amoto sadzazimika, ndi nkhope zonse kuyambira kumwera kufikira kumpoto zidzapsa nao." 
Ezekiel20:48 Ndi anthu onse adzaona kuti Ine Yehova ndinauyatsa, sudzazimika." 
Ezekiel20:49 Pamenepo ndinati, Ha, Ambuye Yehova! anandinena, Wonena mafanizo uyu." 
Ezekiel21:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel21:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lozetsa nkhope yako ku Yerusalemu, nuwabenthulire mau malo opatulikawa, nunenere dziko la Israyeli kulitsutsa;" 
Ezekiel21:3 nuziti kwa dziko la Israyeli, Atero Yehova, Taona Ine ndine wotsutsana nawe, ndidzasolola lupanga langa m'cimace, ndi kukulikhira olungama ndi oipa." 
Ezekiel21:4 Popeza ndidzakulikhira olungama ndi oipa, cifukwa cace lupanga langa lidzasololokera anthu onse, kuyambira kumwera kufikira kumpoto;" 
Ezekiel21:5 ndi anthu onse adzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndasolola lupangalanga m'cimace, silidzabwereranso." 
Ezekiel21:6 Koma wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, usa moyo, ndi kuduka msana, ndi kuwawa mtima, uuse moyo pamaso pao." 
Ezekiel21:7 Ndipo kudzakhala akanena ndi iwe, Uusa moyo cifukwa ninji? uzikati, Cifukwa ca mbiri; pakuti ikudza, ndi mtima uli wonse udzasungunuka, ndi manja onse adzalenda, ndi mzimu uli wonse udzakomoka, ndi maondo onse adzaweyeseka ngati madzi; taona irinkudza, inde idzacitika, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel21:8 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel21:9 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, nenera ndi kuti, Atero Yehova, Nena, Lupanga, lupanga lanoledwa, latuulidwanso;" 
Ezekiel21:10 lanoledwa kuti liphetu, lituulidwa kuti linge mphezi; tisekererepo kodi? ndilo ndodo yacifumu ya mwana wanga, yopeputsa mtengo uli wonse." 
Ezekiel21:11 Ndipo analipereka alituule, kuti acite nalo lupangali analinola, inde analituula kulipereka m'dzanja la wakupha." 
Ezekiel21:12 Pfuula ndi kulira, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, pakuti likhalira pa anthu anga, likhalira pa akalonga onse a Israyeli, laperekedwa kulupanga pamodzi ndi anthu anga; cifukwa cace panda pancafu pako." 
Ezekiel21:13 Pakuti pali kuyesedwa; ndipo nanga ndodo yacifumu yopeputsa ikapanda kukhalanso? ati Ambuye Yehova. 
Ezekiel21:14 Ndipo wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, nenera, nuombe manja, lupanga lipitirize katatu, lupanga la wolasidwa ndilo lupanga la wolasidwa wamkuruyo, limene liwazinga." 
Ezekiel21:15 Ndalozetsa nsonga ya lupanga ku zipata zao zonse, kuti mtima wao usungunuke, ndi kukhumudwa kwao kucuruke; ha! analituula linyezimire, analisongoza liphe," 
Ezekiel21:16 Udzisonkhanitsire pamodzi, muka ku dzanja lamanja; undandalitsa nkhondo kumuka kulamanzere; kuli konse ilozako nkhope yako." 
Ezekiel21:17 Inenso ndidzaomba manja anga, ndipo ndidzakukwaniritsa ukali wanga; Ine Yehova ndanena." 
Ezekiel21:18 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera, akuti," 
Ezekiel21:19 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, udziikire njira ziwiri zodzera lupanga la mfumu ya ku Babulo; zonse ziwiri zicokere dziko lomwelo; nulembe cizindikilo colozera, ucilembe pa mphambano ya njira ya kumudzi." 
Ezekiel21:20 Uiike njira yodzera lupanga kumka ku Raba wa ana a Amoni, ndi ya ku Yuda ku Yerusalemu, mudzi walinga." 
Ezekiel21:21 Pakuti mfumu ya ku Babulo aima pa mphambano ya njira, polekana njira ziwirizo, kuti aombeze maula; agwedeza mibvi, afunsira kwa aterafi, apenda ndi ciwindi." 
Ezekiel21:22 M'dzanja lace lamanja muli ula wa ku Yerusalemu, kuika zogundira, kutsegula pakamwa pa kupha, kukweza mau ndi kupfuula, kuikira zitseko zogundira, kuundira mtumbira, kumanga malinga." 
Ezekiel21:23 Ndipo kudzakhala ngati kuombeza konyenga pamaso pa iwo amene anawalumbirira malumbiro; koma akumbutsa mphulupulu kuti akodwe. 
Ezekiel21:24 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza mwakumbutsa mphulupulu yanu pobvumbuluka zolakwa zanu, kotero kuti macimo anu aoneka m'zonse muzicita, popeza mukumbukika, mudzagwidwa ndi dzanja." 
Ezekiel21:25 Ndipo iwe wolasidwa woipa, kalonga wa Israyeli, amene lafika tsiku lako, nthawi ya mphulupulu yotsiriza;" 
Ezekiel21:26 atero Ambuye Yehova, Cotsa cilemba, bvula korona, ufumu sudzakhalanso momwemo, kweza copepuka, cepsa cokwezeka." 
Ezekiel21:27 Ndidzagubuduza gubuduza gubuduza ufumu uno, sudzakhalanso kufikira akadza Iye mwini ciweruzo; ndipo ndidzaupereka kwa Iye." 
Ezekiel21:28 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, nenera, nuziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova za ana a Amoni, ndi za citonzo cao; nuziti, Lupanga, lupanga lasololedwa, latuulidwa, kuti likaphe, kuti liononge, likhale lonyezimira." 
Ezekiel21:29 Akuonera zopanda pace, akuombezera mabodza, lupanga likugoneka pa makosi a oipa olasidwa, amene lafika tsiku lao nthawi ya mphulupulu yotsiriza." 
Ezekiel21:30 Ulibwezere m'cimace. Pamalo unalengedwapo m'dziko la kubadwa kwako ndidzakuweruza. 
Ezekiel21:31 Ndipo ndidzakutsanulira mkwiyo wanga, ndidzakuuzira ndi moto wa kuzaza kwanga, ndidzakuperekanso m'manja mwa anthu ankharwe odziwa kuononga." 
Ezekiel21:32 Udzakhala ngati nkhuni ya pamoto, mwazi wako udzakhala pakati pa dziko, sudzakumbukikanso; pakuti Ine ndine Yehova ndacinena." 
Ezekiel22:1 Anandidzeransomau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel22:2 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, udzaweruza, udzauweruza mudziwo wa mwazi kodi? uudziwitse tsono zonyansa zace zonse." 
Ezekiel22:3 Nuziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndiwo mudzi wokhetsa mwazi pakati pace, kuti nthawi yace ifike, nudzipangire mafano kudzidetsa nao." 
Ezekiel22:4 Waparamula nao mwazi wako, waukhetsa, nudetsedwa nao mafano ako udawapanga, nuyandikizitsa masiku ako, wafikiranso zako zako; cifukwa cace ndakuika ukhale citonzo ca amitundu ndi coseketsa ca maiko onse." 
Ezekiel22:5 Okhala pafupi ndi okhala patali adzakuseka pwepwete, wodetsedwa dzina iwe, wodzala ndi kusokosera." 
Ezekiel22:6 Taona akalonga a Israyeli, yense monga mwa mphamvu yace, akhala mwa iwe, kuti akhetse mwazi." 
Ezekiel22:7 Mwa iwe anapepula atate ndi mai, pakati pa iwe anamcitira mlendo momzunza, mwa iwe anazunza ana amasiye, ndi mkazi wamasiye." 
Ezekiel22:8 Wanyoza zopatulika zanga, waipsa masabata anga." 
Ezekiel22:9 Anthu oneneza anali mwa iwe, kuti akhetse mwazi; ndipo anadya pamapiri mwa iwe, pakati pa iwe anacita zamanyazi." 
Ezekiel22:10 Anabvula umarisece wa atate ao mwa iwe, mwa iwe anacepsa wodetsedwa ndi kooloka kwace." 
Ezekiel22:11 Ndipo wina anacita conyansa ndi mkazi wa mnansi wace, winanso wadetsa mpongozi wace mwamanyazi, ndi wina mwa iwe anaipitsa mlongo wace mwana wamkazi wa atate wace." 
Ezekiel22:12 Analandira mphotho mwa iwe kukhetsa mwazi, walandira phindu loonjezerapo, wanyengerera anansi ako ndi kuwazunza, ndipo wandiiwala Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel22:13 Taona, ndaomba manja pa phindu lako lonyenga waliona, ndi pa mwazi wokhala pakati pako." 
Ezekiel22:14 Mtima wako udzaimika kodi, manja ako adzalimbikira masikuwo ndidzacita nawe? Ine Yehova ndanena, ndidzacicita." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ndipo ndidzakumwaza mwa amitundu, ndi kukubalalitsa m'maiko, ndi kukuthera zodetsa zako zikucokere." 
Ezekiel22:16 Ndipo udzaipsidwa mwa iwe wekha pamaso pa amitundu; motero udzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova. 
Ezekiel22:17 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera, akuti," 
Ezekiel22:18 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, nyumba ya Israyeli yandikhalira mphala; onsewo ndiwo mkuwa, ndi seta, ndi citsulo, ndi ntobvu, m'kati mwa ng'anjo; ndiwo mphala zasiliva." 
Ezekiel22:19 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza mwasanduka mphala nonsenu, cifukwa cace taonani, ndidzakusonkhanitsani m'kati mwa Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel22:20 Monga asonkhanitsamtapo wa siliva, ndi mkuwa, ndi citsulo, ndi ntobvu, ndi seta, m'kati mwa ng'anjo, kuzibvukutira moto, kuzisungunula momwemo, ndidzakusonkhanitsani mu mkwiyo wanga ndi ukali wanga, ndi kukuikani komweko, ndi kukusungunulani." 
Ezekiel22:21 Inde ndidzakusonkhanitsani, ndi kukubvukutirani ndi moto wa kuzaza kwanga, ndipo mudzasungunuka pakati pace." 
Ezekiel22:22 Monga siliva asungunuka m'kati mwa ng'anjo, momwemo inu mudzasungunuka m'kati mwace; motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndakutsanulirani ukali wanga." 
Ezekiel22:23 Nandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel22:24 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, nena ndi Yuda, Iwe ndiwe dziko losayeretsedwa, losabvumbwa mvula tsiku la ukalilo." 
Ezekiel22:25 Pali ciwembu ca aneneri ace pakati pace, ngati mkango wobangula womwetula nyama, analusira miyoyo, alanda cuma ndi za mtengo wace, acurukitsa amasiye pakati pace." 
Ezekiel22:26 Ansembe ace acitira coipa cilamulo canga, nadetsa zopatulika zanga, sasiyanitsa pakati pa zopatulika ndi zosapatulika, ndipo sazindikiritsa anthu pakati pa zodetsa ndi zoyera, nabisira masabata anga maso ao; ndipo Ine ndidetsedwa pakati pao." 
Ezekiel22:27 Akalonga ace m'kati mwace akunga afisi akumwetula nyama, kukhetsa mwazi, kuononga miyoyo, kuti aone phindu lonyenga." 
Ezekiel22:28 Ndipo aneneri ao anawamatira ndi dothi losapondeka, ndi kuonera zopanda pace, ndi kuwaombezera mabodza, ndi kuti, Atero Ambuye Yehova posanena Yehova." 
Ezekiel22:29 Anthu a m'dziko anazunzazunza, nalandalanda mwaciwawa, napsinja ozunzika ndi aumphawi, nazunza mlendo wopanda cifukwa." 
Ezekiel22:30 Ndipo ndinafunafuna munthu pakati pao wakumanganso linga, ndi kuimira dziko popasukira pamaso panga, kuti ndisaliononge; koma ndinapeza palibe." 
Ezekiel22:31 Cifukwa cace ndinawatsanulira ukali wanga, ndawatha ndi moto wa kuzaza kwanga, njira yao yao ndinaibweza pa mutu pao, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel23:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel23:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, panali akazi awiri, mai wao ndi mmodzi;" 
Ezekiel23:3 ndipo anacita cigololo iwo m'Aigupto, anacita cigololo m'ubwana wao; pomwepo anthu anasindikiza maere ao, pomweponso anakhudza nsonga za maere za unamwali wao." 
Ezekiel23:4 Ndipo maina ao ndiwo Ohola wamkuru, ndi Oholiba mng'ono wace; nakhala anga, nabala ana amuna ndi akazi. Ndipo maina ao, Samariya ndiye Ohola, ndi Yerusalemu ndiye Oholiba." 
Ezekiel23:5 Koma Ohola anacita cigololo pamene anali wanga, anaumirira mabwenzi ace Aasuri oyandikizana naye;" 
Ezekiel23:6 obvala cibakuwa, ziwanga, ndi akazembe, onsewo anyamata ofunika, anthu oyenda pa akavalo." 
Ezekiel23:7 Ndipo anacita nao zigololo zace, ndiwo anthu osankhika a ku Asuri onsewo, ndipo ali onse anawaumirira anadziipsa nao mafano ao." 
Ezekiel23:8 Sanalekanso zigololo zace zocokera ku Aigupto, pakuti anagona naye m'unamwali wace, nakhudza maere a unamwali wace, namtsanulira cigololo cao." 
Ezekiel23:9 Cifukwa cace ndampereka m'dzanja la mabwenzi ace, m'dzanja la Aasuri amene anawaumirira." 
Ezekiel23:10 Iwowa anabvula umarisece wace, anatenga ana ace amuna ndi akazi, namupha iyeyu ndi lupanga; ndi dzina lace linamveka mwa akazi atamcitira maweruzo." 
Ezekiel23:11 Pamene mng'ono wace Oholiba anaciona, anabvunda ndi kuumirira kwace koposa iyeyo; ndi zigololo zace zidaposa zigololo za mkuru wace." 
Ezekiel23:12 Anaumirira Aasuri, ziwanga, ndi akazembe oyandikizana naye, obvala zangwiro, anthu oyenda pa akavalo, onsewo anyamata ofunika." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ndipo ndinamuona kuti anadetsedwa, onse awiri adatenga njira yomweyi." 
Ezekiel23:14 Ndipo anaonjeza zigololo zace, naona amuna olembedwa pakhoma, zithunzithunzi za Akasidi olembedwa ndi kundwe;" 
Ezekiel23:15 omangira malamba m'cuuno mwao, ndi nduwira zazikuru zonika pamitu pao, maonekedwe ao ngati akalonga onsewo, akunga a ku Babulo, dziko la kubadwa kwao ndi Kasidi." 
Ezekiel23:16 Ndipo pakuwaona anawalakalaka, nawatumira mithenga ku dziko la Akasidi." 
Ezekiel23:17 Namdzera a ku Babulo ku kama wa cikondi, namdetsa ndi cigololo cao, iyenso anadetsedwa nao; atatero moyo wace unafukidwa nao." 
Ezekiel23:18 M'mwemo iye anaulula cigololo cace, nabvula umarisece wace; pamenepo moyo wanga unaipidwa naye, monga umo moyo unaipidwira mkuru wace." 
Ezekiel23:19 Koma anacurukitsa zigololo zace, nakumbukila masiku a ubwana wace, muja anacita cigololo m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Ezekiel23:20 Ndipo anaumirira amuna ao amene nyama yao ikunga ya aburu, ndi kutentha kwao ngati kutentha kwa akavalo." 
Ezekiel23:21 Momwemo wautsanso coipa ca ubwana wako, pakukhudza Aaigupto nsonga za maere ako, cifukwa ca maere a ubwana wako." 
Ezekiel23:22 Cifukwa cace, Oholiba, atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona ndidzakuutsira mabwenzi ako amene moyo wako wakufidwa nao, ndi kukufikitsira iwowa pozungulira ponse atsutsane nawe," 
Ezekiel23:23 a ku Babulo, ndi Akasidi, Pekodi, ndi Sowa, ndi Kowa, ndi Aasuri onse pamodzi nao, anyamata ofunika, ziwanga ndi akazembe onsewo, akalonga ndi mandoda onsewo, oyenda ndi akavalo." 
Ezekiel23:24 Ndipo adzakudzera ndi zida, magareta a nkhondo, ndi magareta ena, pamodzi ndi msonkhano wa mitundu ya anthu; adzadziikira pozungulira pako ndi zikopa zocinjiriza ndi zisoti; ndipo ndidzawaika aweruze, nadzakuweruza monga mwa maweruzo ao." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ndipo ndidzakuikira nsanje yanga, nadzakucitira mwaukali, iwowa adzakudula mphuno ndi makutu; ndi otsiriza ako adzagwa ndi lupanga, adzakucotsera ana ako amuna ndi akazi, ndi otsirizira ako adzatha ndi moto." 
Ezekiel23:26 Adzakubvulanso zobvala zako, ndi kukucotsera zokometsera zako zokongola." 
Ezekiel23:27 Motero ndidzakuleketsera coipa cako, ndi cigololo cako cocokera m'dziko la Aigupto; ndipo sudzazikwezeranso maso ako, kapena kukumbukiranso Aigupto," 
Ezekiel23:28 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona ndidzakupereka m'dzanja la iwo amene uwada, m'dzanja la iwo amene moyo wako ufukidwa nao;" 
Ezekiel23:29 ndipo adzacita nawe mwaudani, nadzalanda zonse udazigwirira nchito, nadzakusiya wamarisece ndi wausiwa; ndi umarisece wa zigololo zako udzabvulidwa, dama lako ndi zigololo zako zomwe." 
Ezekiel23:30 Izi adzakucitira cifukwa watsata amitundu, ndi kucita nao cigololo, popezanso wadetsedwa ndi mafano ao." 
Ezekiel23:31 Wayenda m'njira ya mkuru wako, cifukwa cace ndidzapereka cikho cace m'dzanja lako." 
Ezekiel23:32 Atero Ambuye Yehova, M'cikho ca mkuru wako udzamweramo ndico cacikuru ngati mcenje; adzakuseka pwepwete, nadzakunyoza muli zambiri m'menemo." 
Ezekiel23:33 Udzadzala ndi kuledzera ndi cisoni, ndi cikho codabwitsa ndi ca cipasuko, ndi cikho ca mkuru wako Samariya." 
Ezekiel23:34 Udzamwa ici ndi kugugudiza, ndi kuceceta-ceceta zibade zace, ndi kung'amba maere ako; pakuti ndacinena, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel23:35 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza wandiiwala Ine, ndi kunditaya pambuyo pako, uzisenza iwenso coipa cako ndi zigololo zako." 
Ezekiel23:36 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, kodi udzaweruza Ohola ndi Oholiba? uwafotokozere tsono zonyansa zao." 
Ezekiel23:37 Pakuti anacita cigololo, ndi m'manja mwao muli mwazi, ndipo anacita cigololo ndi mafano ao, nawapititsiranso pamoto ana ao amuna amene anandibalira, kuti athedwe." 
Ezekiel23:38 Anandicitiranso ici, anadetsa malo anga opatulika tsiku lomwelo naipsa masabata anga;" 
Ezekiel23:39 pakuti ataphera mafano ao, ana ao analowa tsiku lomwelo m'malo anga opatulika kuwadetsa; ndipo taona, anatero m'kati mwa nyumba yanga." 
Ezekiel23:40 Ndiponso munatuma kuitana anthu ocokera kutali, ndiwo munawatumira mthenga; ndipo taona, anadza amenewo unasamba, cifukwa ca iwo unapaka maso ako mankhwala, ndi kubvala zokometsera;" 
Ezekiel23:41 ndipo unakhala pa kama waulemu, pali gome lokonzekeratu patsogolo pace; pamenepo unaika cofukiza conga ndi mafuta anga." 
Ezekiel23:42 Ndipo phokoso lalikuru lidaleka pomwepo, ndipo pamodzi ndi anthu wamba anabwera nao alodzera ocokera kucipululu, naika makoza m'manja mwa awiriwo, ndi akorona okongola pamitu pao." 
Ezekiel23:43 Pamenepo ndinati za uyu anakalamba nazo zigololo, Tsopano iwo adzacita zigololo naye, ndi iyenso nao." 
Ezekiel23:44 Ndipo analowa kwa iye monga umo amalowera kwa mkazi wacigololo, motero analowa kwa Ohola ndi Oholiba akazi oipawo." 
Ezekiel23:45 Ndipo anthu olungama adzawaweruza monga mwa maweruzo a acigololo, ndi maweruzo a akazi okhetsa mwazi; pakuti ndiwo acigololo, ndi m'manja mwao muli mwazi." 
Ezekiel23:46 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzawakweretsera msonkhano wa anthu, ndi kuwapereka awazunze, ndi kulanda cuma cao." 
Ezekiel23:47 Ndi msonkhanowo udzawaponya miyala, ndi kuwatha ndi malupanga ao, adzawapha ana ao amuna ndi akazi, ndi kutentha nyumba zao ndi moto." 
Ezekiel23:48 Momwemo ndidzaleketsa dama m'dzikomo, kuti alangizidwe akazi onse kusacita monga mwa dama lanu." 
Ezekiel23:49 Ndipo adzakubwezerani dama lanu, nimudzasenza macimo a mafano anu; motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel24:1 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova caka cacisanu ndi cinai, mwezi wakhumi, tsiku lakhumi la mwezi, ndi kuti," 
Ezekiel24:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Udzilembere dzina la tsiku lomwe lino, mfumu ya ku Babulo wayandikira Yerusalemu tsiku lomwe lino." 
Ezekiel24:3 Ndipo uphere nyumba yopandukayo fanizo, nunene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tereka mphika; uutereke, nuthire madzi m'menemo." 
Ezekiel24:4 Longamo pamodzi ziwalo zace, ziwalo zonse zokoma, mwendo wathako ndi wamwamba; uudzaze ndi mafupa osankhika." 
Ezekiel24:5 Tengako coweta cosankhika, nuikire mafupa mulu wa nkhuni pansi; ubwadamuke, ndi mafupa ace omwe uwaphike m'mwemo." 
Ezekiel24:6 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsoka mudzi wokhetsa mwazi, mphika m'mene muli dzimbiri, losaucokera dzimbiri lace; ucotsemo ciwalo ciwalo; sanaugwera maere." 
Ezekiel24:7 Pakuti mwazi wace uli m'kati mwace anauika pathanthwe poyera, sanautsanulira panthaka kuukwirira ndi pfumbi." 
Ezekiel24:8 Pofuna kuutsa ukali, ndi kubwezera cilango, ndaika mwazi wace pathanthwe poyera, kuti usakwiririke." 
Ezekiel24:9 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsoka mudzi wokhetsa mwazi, ndidzakulitsa mulu wa nkhuni." 
Ezekiel24:10 Zicuruke nkhuni, kuleza moto, nyama ipse, uwiritse msuzi wace, ubwadamuke, ndi mafupa ace atibuke." 
Ezekiel24:11 Pamenepo uukhazike pa makara ace opanda kanthu m'menemo, kuti utenthe, nuyake mkuwa wace; ndi kuti codetsa cace cisungunuke m'mwemo, kuti dzimbiri lace lithe." 
Ezekiel24:12 Nchito ya mphika ndi yolemetsa, koma dzimbiri lace lalikuru siliucokera, dzimbiri lace liyenera kumoto." 
Ezekiel24:13 M'codetsa cako muli dama, popeza ndinakuyeretsa; koma sunayeretsedwa, sudzayeretsedwanso kukucotsera codetsa cako, mpaka nditakwaniritsa ukali wanga pa iwe." 
Ezekiel24:14 Ine Yehova ndacinena, cidzacitika; ndipo ndidzacicita, sindidzamasula, kapena kulekerera, kapena kuwaleka, monga mwa njira zako, ndi monga umo unacitira adzakuweruza iwe, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel24:15 Mau a Yehova anandidzeranso, akuti," 
Ezekiel24:16 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, taona, ndikucotsera cokonda maso ako ndi cikomo, koma usamve cisoni, kapena kulira, kapena kudza misozi." 
Ezekiel24:17 Usa moyo mosamveka, usalira wakufayo, dzimangire cilemba, nubvale nsapato ku mapazi ako, usaphimbe milomo yako, kapena kudya mkate wa anthu." 
Ezekiel24:18 Ndipo nditalankhula ndi anthu m'mawa, madzulo ace mkazi wanga anamwalira; ndi m'mawa mwace ndinacita monga anandilamulira." 
Ezekiel24:19 Nanena nane anthu, Simudzatiuza kodi zitani nafe izi muzicita?" 
Ezekiel24:20 Ndipo ndinanena nao, Anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel24:21 Nena ndi nyumba ya Israyeli, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona, ndidzadetsa malo anga opatulika, ulemerero wa mphamvu yanu, cokonda m'maso mwanu, cimene moyo wanu ali naco cifundo; ndipo ana anu amuna ndi akazi otsalira inu adzagwa ndi lupanga." 
Ezekiel24:22 Ndipo mudzacita monga umo ndacitira ine, osaphimba milomo yanu, kapena kudya mkate wa anthu." 
Ezekiel24:23 Ndi zilemba zanu zidzakhala pamitu panu, ndi nsapato zanu ku mapazi anu, simudzacita cisoni kapena kulira, koma mudzaonda ndi mphulupulu zanu, ndi kubulirana wina ndi mnzace." 
Ezekiel24:24 Momwemo Ezekieli adzakhala kwa inu cizindikilo; umo monse anacitira iye mudzacita ndinu; cikadza ici mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Ambuye Yehova. 
Ezekiel24:25 Ndipo wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, sikudzakhala kodi tsiku loti ndiwacotsera mphamvu yao, cimwemwe cao copambana, cowakonda m'maso mwao, ndi cokhumbitsa mtima wao, ana ao amuna ndi akazi," 
Ezekiel24:26 kuti tsiku lomwelo wopulumukayo adzakudzera, kukumvetsa m'makutu mwako?" 
Ezekiel24:27 Tsiku lomwelo pakamwa pako padzatsegukira wopulumukayo; mudzalankhula osakhalanso cete, momwemo udzawakhalira cizindikilo; ndipo adzadziwa kuti ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel25:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera, akuti," 
Ezekiel25:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Lozetsa nkhope yako kwa ana a Amoni, nuwanenere;" 
Ezekiel25:3 nunene kwa ana a Amoni, Tamverani mau a Ambuye Yehova, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza unati, Onyo, kunena malo anga opatulika; muja anadetsedwa ndi kunena dziko la Israyeli; muja linapasuka ndi kunena nyumba ya Yuda; muja adalowa kundende;" 
Ezekiel25:4 cifukwa cace taona, ndidzakupereka kwa ana a kum'mawa ukhale wao wao, kuti amange misasa yao mwa iwe, namange pokhala pao mwa iwe, iwo adzadya zipatso zako ndi kumwa mkaka wako." 
Ezekiel25:5 Ndipo ndidzayesa Raba khola la ngamira, ndi ana a Amoni popumula zoweta zazing'ono; matero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel25:6 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Waomba manja, ndi kubvina, ndi kukondwera ndi cipeputso conse ca moyo wako, kupeputsa dziko la Israyeli," 
Ezekiel25:7 cikufwa cace taona, ndakutambasulira dzanja langa, ndipo ndidzakupereka ukhale cofunkha ca amitundu, ndi kukudula mwa mitundu ya anthu, ndi kukutayikitsa m'maiko, ndidzakuononga; motero udzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel25:8 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza Moabu ndi Seiri akuti, Taona nyumba ya Yuda ikunga amitundu onse;" 
Ezekiel25:9 cifukwa cace taona, ndidzatsegula pambali pace pa Moabu kuyambira ku midzi, ku midzi yace yokhala mphepete, yokometsetsa ya m'dziko, Betiyesimoti, Baalameoni, ndi Kiriataimu," 
Ezekiel25:10 kuwapereka kwa ana a kum'mawa pamodzi ndi ana a Amoni; ndipo ndidzawapereka akhale ao ao, kuti ana a Amoni asakumbukikenso mwa amitundu;" 
Ezekiel25:11 ndipo ndidzakwaniritsa maweruzo m'Moabu; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova. 
Ezekiel25:12 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza Edomu anacita mobwezera cilango pa nyumba ya Yuda, naparamula kwakukuru pakuibwezera cilango," 
Ezekiel25:13 cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzatambasulira Edomu dzanja langa, ndi kulilikhira munthu ndi nyama, ndi kulisandutsa labwinja; kuyambira ku Temani mpaka Dedani adzagwa ndi lupanga." 
Ezekiel25:14 Ndipo ndidzalibwezera Edomu cilango mwa dzanja la anthu anga Israyeli; ndipo adzacita m'Edomu monga mwa mkwiyo wanga, ndi ukali wanga; motero adzadziwa kubwezera cilango kwanga, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel25:15 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza Afilisti anacita mobwezera cilango nabwezera cilango ndi mtima wopeputsa kuononga, ndi udani wosatha," 
Ezekiel25:16 cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona ndidzatambasulira Afilisti dzanja langa, ndi kulikha. Akereti, ndi kuononga otsalira mphepete mwa nyanja." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ndipo ndidzawabwezera cilango cacikuru, ndi malango ankharwe; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, pakuwabwezera cilango Ine." 
Ezekiel26:1 Ndipo kunali caka cakhumi ndi cimodzi, tsiku loyamba la mwezi, anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel26:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, popeza Turo ananyodola Yerusalemu, ndi kuti, Onyo, watyoka uwu udali cipata ca mitundu ya anthu; wanditembenukira ine; ndidzakhuta ine, wapasuka uwu;" 
Ezekiel26:3 cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona ndikutsutsa iwe, Turo, ndidzakukweretsera amitundu, monga nyanja iutsa mafunde ace." 
Ezekiel26:4 Ndipo adzagumula malinga a Turo, ndi kugwetsa nsanja zace; inde ndidzausesa pfumbi lace, ndi kuuyesa pathanthwe poyera." 
Ezekiel26:5 Udzakhala poyanika khokapakati pa nyanja, pakuti Ine ndacinena, ati Ambuye Yehova; ndipo udzakhala cofunkha ca amitundu." 
Ezekiel26:6 Ndi ana ace akazi okhala kumunda adzaphedwa ndi lupanga; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova. 
Ezekiel26:7 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona ndidzafikitsira Turo Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo, mfumu ya mafumu, yocokera kumpoto ndi akavalo, ndi magareta, ndi apakavalo, ndi msonkhano wa anthu ambiri." 
Ezekiel26:8 Ana ako akazi adzawapha kumunda ndi lupanga; ndipo adzakumangira nsanja, ndi kukuundira mtumbira, ndi kukuimikira cikopa." 
Ezekiel26:9 Nadzaikira malinga ako zogumulira, nadzagwetsa nsanja zako ndi zida zace." 
Ezekiel26:10 Papeza acuruka akavalo ace, pfumbi lao lidzakukuta; malinga ako adzagwedezeka ndi phokoso la apakavalo, ndi njinga za magareta, palowa iye pa zipata zako, monga umo amalowera m'mudzi popasukira linga lace." 
Ezekiel26:11 Ndi ziboda za akavalo ace iye adzapondaponda m'makwalala ako onse; adzapha anthu ako ndi lupanga; ndi zoimiritsa za mphamvu yako zidzagwa pansi. 
Ezekiel26:12 Ndipo adzalanda cuma cako ndi kufunkha malonda ako, nadzagwetsa malinga ako ndi kupasula nyumba zako zofunika, nadzaponya miyala yako, ndi mitengo yako, ndi pfumbi lako, m'madzi." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ndipo ndidzaleketsa phokoso la nyimbo zako, ndi kulira kwa mazeze ako sikudzamvekanso." 
Ezekiel26:14 Ndipo ndidzakuyesa pathanthwe poyera; udzakhala poyanika khoka, sadzakumanganso; pakuti Ine Yehova ndacinena, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel26:15 Atero Ambuye Yehova kwa Turo, Zisumbu sizidzagwedezeka nanga pomveka kugwa kwako, pabuula olasidwa, pakucitika kuphako pakati pako?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Pamenepo akalonga onse a kunyanja adzatsika ku mipando yacifumu yao, nadzabvula zobvala zao zopikapika, nadzabvala kunjenjemera, nadzakhala panthaka pansi, nadzanjenjemera mphindi zonse ndi kukudabwa." 
Ezekiel26:17 Ndipo adzakukwezera nyimbo ya maliro, ndi kunena nawe, Watayika bwanji, ndiwe pakhala pa anthu a panyanja, mudzi womveka, unalimbika panyanja, uwo ndi okhalamo, amene anakhalitsa kuopsa kwao pa onse okhala momwemo!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Pamenepo zisumbu zidzanjenjemera tsiku la kugwa kwako, inde zisumbu za kunyanja zidzatenga nkhawa pa kucokera kwako." 
Ezekiel26:19 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Pamene ndikusandutsa mudzi wapasuka, ngati midzi yosakhalamo anthu, ndi kukukweretsera nyanja, nadzakumiza madzi akuru;" 
Ezekiel26:20 pamenepo ndidzakutsitsa nao otsikira kumanda, kwa anthu a kale lomwe, ndi kukukhalitsa ku malo a kunsi kwa dziko, kopasukira kale lomwe, pamodzi nao otsikira kumanda, kuti mwa iwe musakhale anthu; ndipo ndidzaika ulemerero m'dziko la amoyo," 
Ezekiel26:21 ndidzakuika woopsa; ndipo sudzaonekanso, cinkana akufunafuna sudzapezekanso konse, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel27:1 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel27:2 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, Takwezera Turo nyimbo ya maliro;" 
Ezekiel27:3 nuti kwa Turo, Iwe wakukhala polowera m'nyanja, wakucita malonda ndi mitundu ya anthu m'zisumbu zambiri, atero Ambuye Yehova, Iwe, Turo, wati, Ine ndine wokongola wangwiro." 
Ezekiel27:4 M'mphepete mwako muli m'kati mwa nyanja, iwo anakumanga iwe anakonza kukongola kwako kukhale kwangwiro." 
Ezekiel27:5 Anaceka matabwa ako onse amlombwa wa ku Seniri, anatenga mikungudza ya ku Lebano kukupangira milongoti." 
Ezekiel27:6 Anasema nkhafi zako za thundu wa ku Basana, anapanga mipando yako yamnyanga, woika mu mtengo wanaphini wocokera ku zisumbu za Kitimu." 
Ezekiel27:7 Thanga lako ndi labafuta wopikapika wa ku Aigupto, likhale ngati mbendera yako; cophimba cako ndico nsaru yamadzi ndi yofiirira zocokera ku zisumbu za Elisa." 
Ezekiel27:8 Okhala m'Zidoni ndi Arivadi ndiwo opalasa ako; anzeru ako, Turo, okhala mwa iwe, ndiwo oongolera ako." 
Ezekiel27:9 Akr-ru a ku Gebala ndi eni luso ace anali mwa iwe kukonza ziboo zako; zombo zonse za kunyanja pamodzi ndi amarinyero ao anali mwa iwe kusinthana nawe malonda. 
Ezekiel27:10 Aperisiya, Aludi, Apuri, anali m'khamu lako; anthu ako a nkhondo anapacika cikopa ndi cisoti mwa iwe, anamveketsa kukoma kwako." 
Ezekiel27:11 Anthu a Ativadi pamodzi ndi ankhondo ako anali pa malinga ako pozungulira, ndi Agamadi anali mu nsanja zako; anapacika zikopa zao pa makoma ako pozungulira, anakwaniritsa kukoma kwako." 
Ezekiel27:12 Tarisi anagulana nawe malonda m'kucuruka kwa cuma ciri conse; anagula malonda ako ndi siliva ndi citsulo, seta ndi ntobvu." 
Ezekiel27:13 Yavani, Tuba, Meseke, anagulana nawe malonda; ndi anthu amoyo ndi zotengera zamkuwa anagulana nawe malonda." 
Ezekiel27:14 Iwo a nyumba ya Togarima anagula malonda ako ndi akavalo, ndi akavalo a nkhondo, ndi nyuru." 
Ezekiel27:15 Anthu a ku Dedani anakutsatsa malonda, zisumbu zambiri zinazolowerana nawe malonda ako, anabwera nazo minyanga ndi phingo kugulana nawe malonda." 
Ezekiel27:16 Aramu anacita nawe malonda cifukwa ca zambirizo udazipanga, anagula malonda ako ndi smaragido, nsaru yofiirira, ndi yopikapika, ndi bafuta, ndi korale, ndi ngale." 
Ezekiel27:17 Yuda ndi dziko la Israyeli anagulana nawe malonda, anagula malonda ako ndi tirigu wa ku Miniti, ndi zozuna, ndi uci, ndi mafuta, ndi mafuta amankhwala." 
Ezekiel27:18 Damasiko anagulana nawe malonda cifukwa ca zambirizo udazipanga, cifukwa ca kucuruka kwa cuma ciri conse, ndi vinyo wa ku Keliboni, ndi ubweya wa nkhosa woyera." 
Ezekiel27:19 Vedani ndi Yavani anagula malonda ako ndi thonje, unagulana nao citsulo cosalala, ngaho, ndi mzimbe." 
Ezekiel27:20 Dedani anagulana nawe malonda ndi nsaru za mtengo wace zoyenda nazo pa kavalo. 
Ezekiel27:21 Arabu ndi akalonga onse a ku Kedara anazolowerana nao malonda ako; ana a nkhosa, nkhosa zamphongo, ndi mbuzi, izi anagulana nawe." 
Ezekiel27:22 Amalonda a ku Seba ndi a ku Rama anagulana nawe malonda; anagula malonda ako ndi zonunkhira zoposa ziri zonse, ndi miyala iri yonse ya mtengo wace, ndi golidi." 
Ezekiel27:23 Harani ndi Kane ndi Edene, amalonda a ku Seba Asuri ndi Kilimadi, anagulana nawe malonda." 
Ezekiel27:24 Awa anagulana nawe malonda ndi zobvala zosankhika, ndi mitumba ya nsaru zofiirira ndi zopikapika, ndi cuma ca thonje lopotapota, ndi zingwe zopota zolimba za malonda ako." 
Ezekiel27:25 Zombo za ku Tarisi ndizo amtengatenga a malonda ako; ndipo unadzazidwa ndi cuma ndi ulemu waukuru pakati pa nyanja," 
Ezekiel27:26 Opalasa ako anakufikitsa ku madzi akuru; mphepo ya kum'mawa inakutyola m'kati mwa nyanja," 
Ezekiel27:27 Cuma cako, zako zogulana nazo malonda ako, amarinyero ako, ndi oongolera ako, amisiri ako, ndi ogulitsa malonda ako, ndi ankhondo ako onse okhala mwa iwe, pamodzi ndi msonkhano wonse uli pakati pa iwe, adzagwa m'kati mwa nyanja tsiku la kugwa kwako." 
Ezekiel27:28 Pakumveka mpfuu wa oongolera ako mabwalo ako adzagwedezeka. 
Ezekiel27:29 Ndi onse ogwira nkhafi, amarinyero, ndi oongolera onse a kunyanja, adzatsika ku zombo zao, nadzaima pamtunda," 
Ezekiel27:30 nadzamveketsa mau ao pa iwe, nadzalira mowawa mtima, nadzathira pfumbi pamitu pao, nadzakunkhulira m'maphulusa," 
Ezekiel27:31 nadzameta mpala, cifukwa ca iwe, nadzadzimangira ziguduli m'cuuno, nadzakulirira ndi mtima wowawa maliro owawa." 
Ezekiel27:32 Ndipo pakulira adzakukwezera nyimbo ya maliro, ndi kukulirira, ndi kuti, Wakunga Turo ndani, wakunga uyu waonongeka pakati pa nyanja?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Pakuturuka malonda ako m'nyanja unadzaza mitundu yambiri ya anthu, unalemeretsa mafumu a pa dziko lapansi ndi cuma cako cocuruka ndi malonda ako." 
Ezekiel27:34 Muja unatyoka ndi nyanja m'madzi akuya malonda ako ndi msonkhano wako wonse adagwa pakati pako. 
Ezekiel27:35 Onse okhala pa zisumbu adagwa nawe, ndi mafumu ao aopsedwa kwambiri zikhululuka nkhope zao." 
Ezekiel27:36 Amalonda mwa mitundu ya anthu akunyodola, wakhala coopsetsa iwe, ndipo sudzakhalanso konse." 
Ezekiel28:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel28:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, uziti kwa kalonga wa Turo, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza mtima wako wadzikweza, nuti, Ine ndine mulungu, ndikhala pa mpando wa Mulungu pakati pa nyanja, ungakhale uli munthu, wosati Mulungu, ungakhale waika mtima wako ngati mtima wa Mulungu," 
Ezekiel28:3 taona, ndiwe wanzeru woposa Danieli, palibe cinsinsi angakubisire;" 
Ezekiel28:3 taona, ndiwe wanzeru woposa Danieli, palibe cinsinsi angakubisire;" 
Ezekiel28:4 mwa nzeru zako ndi luntha lako wadzionerera cuma, wadzionereranso golidi ndi siliva mwa cuma cako;" 
Ezekiel28:5 mwa nzeru zako zazikuru ndi kugulana malonda kwako wacurukitsa cuma cako, ndi mtima wako wadzikuza cifukwa ca cuma cako;" 
Ezekiel28:6 cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza waika mtima wako ngati mtima wa Mulungu;" 
Ezekiel28:7 cifukwa cace taona, ndidzakufikitsira alendo oopsa a mitundu ya anthu, iwo adzasololera malupanga ao nzeru zako zokongola, nadzaipsa kunyezimira kwako." 
Ezekiel28:8 Adzakutsitsira kumanda, nudzafa mafedwe a ophedwa m'kati mwa nyanja." 
Ezekiel28:9 Kodi udzanena ndithu pamaso pa iye wakupha iwe, Ine ndine Mulungu, pokhala uli munthu, wosati Mulungu, m'dzanja la iye wakupha iwe." 
Ezekiel28:10 Udzafa mafedwe a osadulidwa ndi dzanja la alendo, pakuti ndacinena, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel28:11 Nandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel28:12 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, kweza nyimbo ya maliro yolirira mfumu ya Turo, nuziti kwa iye, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Wakomera muyeso ndi cizindikilo, wodzala ndi nzeru wokongola wangwiro." 
Ezekiel28:13 Unali m'Edene, munda wa Mulungu, mwala uli wonse wa mtengo wace unali copfunda cako, sardiyo, topazi, diamondi, berulo, sohamu, ndi yaspi, safiro, nofeki, bareketi, ndi golidi; malingaka ako ndi akazi ako anakutumikira tsiku lolengedwa iwe zinakonzekeratu." 
Ezekiel28:14 Unali kerubi wodzozedwa wakuphimba, ndipo ndinakuika unali pa phiri lopatulika la Mulungu, anayendayenda pakati pa miyala yamoto." 
Ezekiel28:15 Unali wangwiro m'njira zako cilengedwere iwe, mpaka cinapezeka mwa iwe cosalungama." 
Ezekiel28:16 Mwa kucuruka kwa malonda ako anakudzaza m'kati mwako ndi ciwawa, ndipo unacimwa; cifukwa cace ndinakukankha kukucotsa pa phiri la Mulungu; ndipo ndinakuononga, kerubi wakuphimba iwe, kukucotsa pakati pa miyala yamoto." 
Ezekiel28:17 Unadzikuza mtima cifukwa ca kukongola kwako, waipsa nzeru zako; cifukwa ca kuwala kwako ndakugwetsa pansi, ndakuika pamaso pa mafumu, kuti akupenye." 
Ezekiel28:18 Mwa mphulupulu zako zocuruka ndi malonda ako osalungama waipsa malo ako opatulika; cifukwa cace ndaturutsa moto m'kati mwako wakunyeketsa iwe; ndipo ndakusandutsa mapulusa panthaka pamaso pa onse akuona. 
Ezekiel28:19 Onse akudziwa iwe mwa mitundu ya anthu adzadabwa nawe; wasanduka coopsa, ndipo sudzakhalanso konse." 
Ezekiel28:20 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel28:21 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lozetsa nkhope yako ku Zidoni, nuunenere;" 
Ezekiel28:22 uziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona, nditsutsana nawe Zidoni, ndipo ndidzalemekezedwa pakati pako; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova pakucita Ine maweruzo mwa uwu, ndi kuzindikiridwa Woyera mwa uwu." 
Ezekiel28:23 Pakuti ndidzatumiza mliri ndi mwazi ilowe m'makwalala ace, ndi olasidwa adzagwa m'kati mwace ndi lupanga lougwera pozungulira ponse; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel28:24 Ndipo nyumba ya Israyeli siidzakhalanso nayo mitungwi yolasa, kapena minga yaululu ya ali yense wakuizinga ndi kuipeputsa; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel28:25 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Pakusonkhanitsa nyumba ya Israyeli mwa mitundu ya anthu anabalalikamo, ndidzazindikirika Woyera mwa iwowa, pamaso pa amitundu; ndipo adzakhala m'dziko mwao mwao ndinalipereka kwa Yakobo mtumiki wanga." 
Ezekiel28:26 Nadzakhalamo osatekeseka, nadzamanga nyumba, ndi kunka mpesa m'mindamo, nadzakhalamo mosatekeseka, ndikatha kukwaniritsira maweruzo pa onse akuwapeputsa pozungulira pao; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wao." 
Ezekiel29:1 Caka cakhumi, mwezi wakhumi, tsiku lakhumi ndi ciwiri la mweziwo, anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel29:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lozetsa: nkhope yako itsutsane naye Farao mfumu ya Aigupto, nunenere motsutsana ndi iye, ndi Aigupto lonse;" 
Ezekiel29:3 nena, uziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona nditsutsana nawe, Farao mfumu ya Aigupto, ng'ona yaikuru yakugona m'kati mwa mitsinje yace, imene ikuti, Mtsinje wanga ndi wangatu, ndadzipangira ndekha uwu." 
Ezekiel29:4 Koma ndidzaika mbedza m'kamwa mwako, ndi kumamatiritsa nsomba za m'mitsinje mwako ku mamba ako; ndipo ndidzakukweza kukuturutsa m'kati mwa mitsinje yako, pamodzi ndi nsomba zonse za m'mitsinje mwako zomamatira pa mamba ako." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ndipo ndidzakutaya kucipululu, iwe ndi nsomba zonse za m'mitsinje mwako; udzagwa kuthengo koyera, sudzaunjikidwa, kapena kuoledwa; ndakupereka ukhale cakudya ca zirombo za padziko, ndi mbalame za kumlengalenga," 
Ezekiel29:6 Ndi onse okhala m'Aigupto adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, popeza anakhalira nyumba ya Israyeli mcirikizo wabango." 
Ezekiel29:7 Muja anakugwira ndi dzanja unatyoka, ndi kulasa mapewa ao onse; ndi muja anakutsamira unatyoka, ndi kuwagwedeza ziuno zao zonse." 
Ezekiel29:8 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona, ndikudzera ndi lupanga, ndi kukulikhira munthu ndi nyama." 
Ezekiel29:9 Ndi dziko la Aigupto lidzakhala lopasuka ndi labwinja; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, popeza anati, Mtsinjewo ndi wanga, ndinaulenga ndine." 
Ezekiel29:10 Cifukwa cace taona, nditsutsana ndi iwe ndi mitsinje yako, ndipo ndidzasandutsa dziko la Aigupto likhale lopasuka konse, ndi labwinja, kuyambira nsanja ya Sevene kufikira malire a Kusi." 
Ezekiel29:11 Silidzapitamo phazi la munthu, kapena phazi la nyama losapitamo, losakhalamo anthu zaka makumi anai." 
Ezekiel29:12 Ndipo ndidzasandutsa dziko la Aigupto labwinja pakati pa maiko a mabwinja; ndi midzi yace pakati pa midzi yopasuka idzakhala yabwinja zaka makumi anai; ndipo ndidzamwaza Aaigupto mwa amitundu, ndi kuwabalalitsa m'maiko." 
Ezekiel29:13 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Zitatha zaka makumi anai ndidzasonkhanitsa Aaigupto ku mitundu ya anthu kumene anamwazikirako;" 
Ezekiel29:14 ndipo ndidzabweza undende wa Aigupto, ndi kuwabwezera ku dziko la Patro, ku dziko la kubadwa kwao, ndi komweko adzakhala ufumu wopepuka," 
Ezekiel29:15 Udzakhala wopepuka wa maufumu onse, sudzadzikwezanso pa amitundu; ndipo ndidzawacepsa, kuti asacitenso ufumu pa amitundu." 
Ezekiel29:16 Ndipo sudzakhalanso cotama ca nyumba ya Israyeli, kukumbutsa mphulupulu, pakuwatembenukira kuwatsata; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel29:17 Ndipo kunali caka ca makumi awiri mphambu zisanu ndi ziwiri mwezi woyamba, tsiku loyamba la mwezi, anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel29:18 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo anacititsa ankhondo ace nchito yaikuru yoponyana ndi Turo; mitu yonse inacita dazi, ndi mapewa onse ananyuka; koma analibe kulandira mphotho ya ku Turo, iye kapena ankhondo ace, pa nchito anagwirayo;" 
Ezekiel29:19 cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona, ndidzapereka dziko la Aigupto kwa Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo; ndipo adzacoka nao aunyinji ace, nadzafunkha ndi kulanda zace, ndizo mphotho ya khamu lace." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ndamninkha dziko la Aigupto combwezera nchito yace, popeza anandigwirira nchito, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel29:21 Tsiku ilo ndidzameretsera nyumba ya Israyeli nyanga; ndipo ndidzakutsegulira pakamwa pakati pao; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova. 
Ezekiel30:1 Anandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel30:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, nenera, uziti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Liritsani, Ha, tsikulo" 
Ezekiel30:3 Pakuti layandikira tsiku, layandikira tsiku la Yehova, tsiku lamitambo, ndiyo nyengo ya amitundu." 
Ezekiel30:4 Ndi lupanga lidzadzera Aigupto, ndi m'Kusi mudzakhala kuwawa kwakukuru, pakugwa ophedwa m'Aigupto; ndipo adzacotsa aunyinji ace, ndi maziko ace adzagadamuka," 
Ezekiel30:5 Kusi, ndi Puti, ndi Ludi, ndi osokonezeka onse, ndi Kubi, ndi anthu a dziko lopangana nao, adzagwa pamodzi nao ndi lupanga." 
Ezekiel30:6 Atero Yehova, Iwonso ocirikiza Aigupto adzagwa, ndi mphamvu yace yodzikuza idzatsika, kuyambira nsanja ya Sevene adzagwa m'kati mwace ndi lupanga, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel30:7 Ndipo adzakhala opasuka pakati pa maiko opasuka, ndi midzi yace idzakhala pakati pa midzi yopasuka." 
Ezekiel30:8 Ndipo adzadziwa, kuti Ine ndine Yehova, nditaika moto m'Aigupto, naonongeka onse akumthandiza." 
Ezekiel30:9 Tsiku ilo mithenga idzaturuka pamaso panga m'zombo kuopsa Akusi osalabadira; ndipo kudzakhala kuwawa kwakukuru pakati pao, monga tsiku la Aigupto, pakuti taona, likudza." 
Ezekiel30:10 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzaleketsa kusokosera kwa Aigupto ndi dzanja la Nebukadirezara mfumu ya ku Babulo." 
Ezekiel30:11 Iye ndi anthu ace pamodzi naye, woopsa amitundu, adzatengedwa aliononge dzikolo, nadzasololera Aigupto malupanga ao, ndi kudzaza dziko ndi ophedwa." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ndipo ndidzaphwetsa mitsinje, ndi kugulira dziko m'dzanja la anthu oipa, ndipo ndidzalisandutsa likhale dziko lopasuka, ndi zonse ziri m'mwemo mwa dzanja la alendo; Ine Yehova ndacinena." 
Ezekiel30:13 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzaononganso mafano, ndi kuleketsa milungu yopanda pace ku Nofu; ndipo sadzaonekanso kalonga wocokera ku Aigupto, ndipo ndidzaopsa dziko la Aigupto." 
Ezekiel30:14 Ndipo ndidzasandutsa Patro labwinja, ndi kuika moto m'Zoani, ndi kukwaniritsa maweruzo m'No." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ndipo ndidzatsanulira ukali wanga pa Sini, polimbika peni peni pa Aigupto, ndi kulikha aunyinji a No." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ndipo ndidzaika moto m'Aigupto; Sini adzamva kuwawa kwakukuru, ndi No adzagawika pakati, ndi Nofu adzaona adani usana." 
Ezekiel30:17 Anyamata a Avene ndi Pibezeti adzagwa ndi lupanga, ndi midziyi idzalowa undende." 
Ezekiel30:18 Ndi ku Tehafinehesi kudzada usana, pakutyola Ine magoli a Aigupto komweko; ndi mphamvu yace yodzikuza idzalekeka m'menemo; kunena za ilo mtambo udzaliphimba, ndi ana ace akazi adzalowa undende." 
Ezekiel30:19 Motero ndidzakwaniritsa maweruzo m'Aigupto, ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel30:20 Ndipo kunali caka cakhumi ndi cimodzi, mwezi woyamba, tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri la mwezi, anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel30:21 Wabadwa ndi munthu iwe, ndatyola dzanja la Parao mfumu ya Aigupto, ndipo taona, silinamangidwa kuti lipole, kulikulunga ndi nsaru, kulilimbitsa ligwire lupanga." 
Ezekiel30:22 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona, Ine ndilimbana naye Parao mfumu ya Aigupto, ndidzatyola manja ace, lolimba ndi lotyokalo, ndi kutayitsa lupanga m'dzanja lace." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ndipo ndidzamwaza Aaigupto mwa amitundu, ndi kuwabalalitsa m'maiko." 
Ezekiel30:24 Ndipo ndidzalimbitsa manja a mfumu ya ku Babulo, ndi kuika lupanga langa m'dzanja lace; koma ndidzatyola manja a Parao, ndipo adzabuula pamaso pace mabuulo a munthu wopyozedwa." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ndipo ndidzalimbitsa manja a mfumu ya ku Babulo, koma manja a Parao adzagwa; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova pakuika Ine lupanga langa m'dzanja la mfumu ya ku Babulo, nalitambasula Iye pa dziko la Aigupto." 
Ezekiel30:26 Ndipo ndidzamwaza Aaigupto mwa amitundu, ndi kuwabalalitsa mwa amitundu; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel31:1 Ndipo kunali caka cakhumi ndi cimodzi, mwezi wacitatu, tsiku loyamba la mwezi, anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel31:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, nena kwa Farao mfumu ya Aigupto ndi aunyinji ace, Ufanana ndi yani m'ukulu wako?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Taona, Asuri anali mkungudza wa ku Lebano ndi nthambi zokoma zobvalira, wautali msinkhu, kunsonga kwace ndi kumitambo." 
Ezekiel31:4 Madzi anaumeretsa, cigumula cinaukulitsa, mitsinje yace inayenda, nizungulira munda wace, nipititsa micera yace ku mitengo yonse ya kuthengoko." 
Ezekiel31:5 Cifukwa cace msinkhu wace unaposa mitengo yonse ya kuthengo, ndi nthambi zace zinacuruka, ndi nthawi zace zinatalika, Cifukwa ca madzi ambiri pophuka uwu." 
Ezekiel31:6 Mbalame zonse za m'mlengalenga zinamanga zisa zao pa nthambi zace, ndi pansi pa nthawi zace zinaswana nyama zonse za kuthengo, ndi pa mthunzi wace inakhala mitundu yonse yaikuru ya anthu." 
Ezekiel31:7 M'mwemo unakoma m'ukulu wace, m'kutalika kwa nthawi zace, popeza muzu wace unakhala ku madzi ambiri." 
Ezekiel31:8 Mikungudza ya m'munda wa Mulungu siinathe kuubisa, milombwasimanga nthambi zace, mifula siinanga nthawi zace; m'munda wa Mulungu munalibe mtengo wofanana nao kukoma kwace." 
Ezekiel31:9 Ndinaupanga wokoma ndi nthawi zace zocuruka; ndi mitengo yonse ya m'Edene inali m'munda wa Mulungu inacita nao nsanje. 
Ezekiel31:10 Cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza mtengowo unakuza msinkhu wace, nufikitsa nsonga yace kumitambo, nukwezeka mtima wace m'kukula kwace," 
Ezekiel31:11 ndidzaupereka m'dzanja la wamphamvu wa amitundu; iye adzacita naotu, Ine ndautaya mwa coipa cace." 
Ezekiel31:12 Ndipo alendo oopsawo a amitundu anaulikhatu, nausiya; nthawi zace zidagwa pamapiri ndi m'zigwa zonse, ndi nthambi zace zinatyokera ku timitsinje tonse ta m'dziko; ndi mitundu yonse ya anthu a pa dziko lapansi inatsika ku mthunzi wace, niusiya." 
Ezekiel31:13 Pogwera pace padzakhala mbalame zonse za m'mlengalenga, ndi nyama zonse za kuthengo zidzakhala pa nthambi zace;" 
Ezekiel31:14 kuti mitengo iri yonse ya kumadzi isadzikuze cifukwa ca msinkhu wao, kapena kufikitsa nsonga zao pakati pa mitambo, ndi kuti amphamvu ao asaime m'kukula kwao, ndiwo onse akumwa madzi; pakuti onsewo aperekedwa ku imfa munsi mwace mwa dziko, pakati pa ana a anthu, pamodzi ndi iwo otsikira kumanda." 
Ezekiel31:15 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsiku lija anatsikira kumanda ndinacititsa maliro, ndinamphimbira nyanja, ndinacepsa mitsinje yace, ndi madzi akuru analetseka; ndipo ndinamdetsera Lebano, ndi mitengo yonse ya kuthengo inafota cifukwa ca uwo." 
Ezekiel31:16 Ndirtagwedeza amitundu ndi phokoso la kugwa kwace, muja ndinamgwetsera kumanda, pamodzi ndi iwo otsikira kumanda; ndi mitengo yonse ya ku Edene yosankhika, ndi yokometsetsa ya ku Lebano, yonse yakumwa madzi, inasangalala munsi mwace mwa dziko lapansi." 
Ezekiel31:17 Iwonso anatsika naye kumanda kwa iwo ophedwa ndi lupanga, ndiwo amene adakhala dzanja lace okhala mumthunzi mwace pakati pa amitundu." 
Ezekiel31:18 Momwemo ufanana ndi yani m'ulemerero ndi ukulu pakati pa mitengo ya Edene? koma udzatsitsidwa pamodzi ndi mitengo ya Edene munsi mwace mwa dziko lapansi, udzagona pakati pa osaditiidwa, pamodzi ndi iwo ophedwa ndi lupanga. Uwu ndi Farao ndi aunyinji ace onse, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel32:1 Ndipo kunali caka cakhumi ndi ciwiri, mwezi wakhumi ndi ciwiri, tsiku loyamba la mwezi, anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel32:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, takwezera Farao mfumu ya Aigupto nyimbo yamaliro; uziti naye, Unafanana nao msona wa mkango wa amitundu, unanga ng'ona ya m'nyanja, unabuka m'mitsinje mwako, nubvundulira madzi ndi mapazi ako, ndi kudetsa mitsinje yao." 
Ezekiel32:3 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndidzakuponyera khoka langa mwa msonkhano wa mitundu yambiri ya anthu, nadzakubvuulira m'khoka mwanga." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ndipo ndidzakusiya pamtunda, ndidzakuponya kuthengo koyera, ndi kuteretsa pa iwe mbalame zonse za m'mlengalenga, ndi kukhutitsa zirombe za dziko lonse lapansi ndi iwe." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ndipo ndidzaika nyama yako pamapiri, ndi kudzaza zigwa ndi msinkhu wako." 
Ezekiel32:6 Ndipo ndidzamwetsa dziko losambiramo iwe ndi mwazi wako, kufikira kumapiri; ndi mitsinje idzadzala nawe." 
Ezekiel32:7 Ndipo pakukuzima iwe ndidzaphimba thambo, ndi kudetsa nye nyezi zace; ndidzaphimba dzuwa ndi mtambo, ndi mwezi sudzaonetsa kuwala kwace." 
Ezekiel32:8 Ndidzakudetsera miyuni ronse yakuunikira kuthambo, ndi kucititsa mdima pa dziko lako, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel32:9 Ndidzabvutanso mitima ya mitundu yambiri ya anthu, pakufikitsa Ine cionongeko cako mwa amitundu, m'maiko amene sunawadziwa." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ndipo ndidzasumwitsa nawe mitundu yambiri ya anthu, ndi mafumu ao adzacita malunga cifukwa ca iwe, pakung'animitsa Ine lupanga langa pamaso pao; ndipo adzanjenjemera mphindi zonse, yense cifukwa ca moyo wace tsiku lakugwa Iwe," 
Ezekiel32:11 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Lupanga la mfumu ya ku Babulo lidzakudzera." 
Ezekiel32:12 Ndidzagwetsa aunyinji ako ndi malupanga a eni mphamvu, ndiwo onse oopsetsa a amitundu; ndipo adzaipsa kudzikuza kwa Aigupto, ndi aunyinji ace onse adzaonongeka." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ndidzaononganso nyama zace zonse za ku madzi ambiri; ndi phazi la munthu silidzabvundulira, ndi ziboda za nyama zosawabvundulira." 
Ezekiel32:14 Pamenepo ndidzadikhitsa madzi ace, ndi kuyendetsa madzi a m'mitsinje mwao ngati mafuta, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel32:15 Pakusanduliza Ine dziko la Aigupto likhale lopasuka ndi labwinja, dziko losowa zodzaza zace, pakukantha Ine onse okhala m'mwemo, pamenepo adzadziwa kuti ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel32:16 Iyi ndi nyimbo ya maliro adzalira nayo, ana akazi a amitundu adzacita nayo maliro; adzalirira nayo Aigupto ndi aunyinji ace onse, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel32:17 Kunalinso caka cakhumi ndi ciwiri, tsiku lakhumi ndi cisanu la mwezi, anandidzera mau a Yehova, ndi kuti," 
Ezekiel32:18 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, lirira aunyinji a Aigupto, nuwagwetsere iye ndi ana akazi a amitundu omveka kunsi kwa dziko, pamodzi ndi iwo akutsikira kudzenje." 
Ezekiel32:19 Uposa yani m'kukoma kwako? tsika, nuikidwe ndi osadulidwa." 
Ezekiel32:20 Adzagwa pakati pa iwo ophedwa ndi lupanga, operekedwa kwa lupanga, mkokereko ndi aunyinji ace onse." 
Ezekiel32:21 Amphamvu oposa ali m'kati mwa manda adzanena naye, pamodzi ndi othandiza ace, Anatsikira, agonako osadulidwawo, ophedwa ndi lupanga," 
Ezekiel32:22 Asuri ali komwe ndi msonkhano wace wonse, manda ace amzinga; ophedwa onsewo, adagwa ndi lupanga;" 
Ezekiel32:23 manda ao aikidwa ku malekezero a dzenje, ndi gulu lace lizinga manda ace; ophedwa onsewo adagwa ndi lupanga, amene anaopsetsa m'dziko la amoyo." 
Ezekiel32:24 Elamu ali komwe ndi gulu lace lonse lozinga manda ace; ophedwa onsewo, adagwa ndi lupanga; amene anatsikira osadulidwa kunsi kwace kwa dziko, amene anaopsetsa m'dziko la amoyo, nasenza manyazi ao, pamodzi ndi iwo akutsikira kudzenje." 
Ezekiel32:25 Pakati pa ophedwa anamuikira kama, iye ndi aunyinji ace onse, manda ace amzinga, onsewo osadulidwa, ophedwa ndi lupanga, pakuti anaopsetsa m'dziko la amoyo, nasenza manyazi ao, pamodzi ndi iwo akutsikira kudzenje, aikidwa pakati pa ophedwa," 
Ezekiel32:26 Meseke, Tubala, ndi aunyinji ace onse ali komweko, manda ace amzinga; onsewo osadulidwa, ophedwa ndi lupanga; pakuti anaopsetsa m'dziko la amoyo." 
Ezekiel32:27 Koma sagona pamodzi ndi amphamvu osadulidwa adagwawo amene anatsikira kumanda ndi zida zao za nkhondo, amene anawatsamiritsa malupanga ao; ndi mphulupulu zao ziri pa mafupa ao; pakuti anaopsetsa amphamvu m'dziko la amoyo." 
Ezekiel32:28 Ndipo udzatyoledwa pakati pa osadulidwa, nudzagona pamodzi ndi iwo ophedwa ndi lupanga." 
Ezekiel32:29 Edomu ali komwe, mafumu ace ndi akalonga ace onse, amene anaikidwa mu mphamvu yao, pamodzi ndi iwo ophedwa ndi lupanga; agona pamodzi ndi osadulidwa, ndi iwo akutsikira kudzenje." 
Ezekiel32:30 Akalonga a kumpoto ali komwe onsewo, ndi Azidoni onse, amene anatsikira pamodzi ndi ophedwa, nacita manyazi cifukwa ca kuopsetsa anacititsaku ndi mphamvu yao, nagona osadulidwa pamodzi ndi iwo ophedwa ndi lupanga, nasenza manyazi ao pamodzi ndi iwo otsikira kudzenje." 
Ezekiel32:31 Farao adzawaona, nadzasangalala nao aunyinji ace onse, Farao ndi ankhondo ace onse ophedwa ndi lupanga, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel32:32 Pakuti ndinaika kuopsa kwace m'dziko la amoyo; ndipo adzaikidwa pakati pa osadulidwa, pamodzi ndi iwo ophedwa ndi lupanga, ndiye Farao ndi aunyinji ace onse, ali Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel33:1 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel33:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Nena ndi ana a anthu a mtundu wako, uziti nao, Ndikafikitsira dziko liri lonse lupanga, nakatenga eni dziko munthu wa pakati pao, nakamuika awadikirire," 
Ezekiel33:3 nakaona iye lupanga lirikudzera dziko, nakaomba lipenga ndi kucenjeza anthu;" 
Ezekiel33:4 ndipo wina, kumva adamva mau a lipenga, koma osalabadira, likadza lupanga, nilimcotsa, wadziphetsa ndi mtima wace." 
Ezekiel33:5 Anamva mau a lipenga, osawalabadira, wadziphetsa ndi mtima wace; akadalabadira, akadalanditsa moyo wace." 
Ezekiel33:6 Koma mlonda akaona lupanga likudza, osaomba lipenga, osacenjeza anthu, nilidza lupanga, nilicotsa mwa iwo; munthu atengedwadi m'mphulupulu zace, koma mwazi wace ndidzaufunsa pa dzanja la mlonda." 
Ezekiel33:7 Iwe tsono, wobadwa ndi munthu, ndakuika mlonda wa nyumba ya Israyeli, m'mwemo imva mau a pakamwa panga, nundicenjezere iwo." 
Ezekiel33:8 Ndikati Ine kwa woipa, Woipawe, udzafa ndithu, osanena iwe kumcenjeza woipayo aleke njira yace, woipa uyo adzafa m'mphulupulu yace, koma mwazi wace ndidzaufunsa pa dzanja lako." 
Ezekiel33:9 Koma ukacenjeza woipa za njira yace, aileke; koma iye osaileka njira yace, adzafa m'mphulupulu mwace iye, koma iwe walanditsa moyo wako." 
Ezekiel33:10 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, nena kwa nyumba ya Israyeli, Mumatero inu ndi kuti, Zolakwa zathu ndi zocimwa zathu zitikhalira, ndipo ticita nazo liwondewonde, tidzakhala ndi moyo bwanji?" 
Ezekiel33:11 Uziti nao, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, sindikondwera nayo imfa ya woipa, koma kuti woipa aleke njira yace, nakhale ndi moyo; bwererani, bwererani, kuleka njira zanu zoipa, muferenji inu nyumba ya Israyeli?" 
Ezekiel33:12 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, unene ndi ana a anthu amtundu wako, Colungama ca wolungama sicidzamlanditsa tsiku la kulakwa kwace, ndi kunena za coipa ca woipa, sadzagwa naco tsiku lakubwerera iye kuleka coipa cace; ndi munthu wolungama sadzakhoza kukhala ndi moyo ndi cilungamo cace tsiku lakucimwa iye." 
Ezekiel33:13 Ndikanena kwa wolungama kuti adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu, akatama cilungamo cace, akacita cosalungama, sizikumbukika zolungama zace ziri zonse; koma m'cosalungama cace anacicita momwemo adzafa." 
Ezekiel33:14 Ndipo ndikanena kwa woipa, Udzafa ndithu: koma akabwerera iye kuleka cimo lace, nakacita coyenera ndi colungama;" 
Ezekiel33:15 woipayo akabweza cikole, nakabweza ico anacilanda mwacifwamba, nakayenda m'malemba a moyo wosacita cosalungama, adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu, sadzafa." 
Ezekiel33:16 Zoipa zace ziri zonse anazicita sizidzakumbukika zimtsutse, anacita coyenera ndi colungama; adzakhala ndi moyo ndithu." 
Ezekiel33:17 Koma ana a anthu a mtundu wako akuti, Njira ya Ambuye siiyenera; koma iwowa njira yao siiyenera." 
Ezekiel33:18 Akabwerera wolungama kuleka cilungamo cace, nakacita cosalungama, adzafa m'mwemo." 
Ezekiel33:19 Ndipo woipa akabwerera kuleka coipa cace, nakacita coyenera ndi colungama, adzakhala ndi moyo nazo." 
Ezekiel33:20 Koma munati, Njira ya Ambuye siiyenera. Nyumba ya Israyeli inu, ndidzakuweruzani, yense monga mwa njira zace." 
Ezekiel33:21 Ndipo kunali caka cakhumi ndi ciwiri ca undende wathu, mwezi wakhumi, tsiku lacisanu la mweziwo, anandidzera wina wopulumuka ku Yerusalemu, ndi kuti, Wakanthidwa mudzi." 
Ezekiel33:22 Koma dzanja la Yehova linandikhalira madzulo, asanandifike wopulumukayo; ndipo ananditsegula pakamwa mpaka anandifika m'mawa, m'mwemo panatseguka pakamwa panga, wosakhalanso wosalankhula." 
Ezekiel33:23 Ndipo anandidzera mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel33:24 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, iwo okhala ku mabwinja a dziko la Israyeli anena, ndi kuti, Abrahamu anali yekha, nakhala nalo dziko colowa cace; koma ife ndife ambiri, dzikoli lipatsidwa kwa ife colowa cathu." 
Ezekiel33:25 Cifukwa cace unene nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Mumadyera kumodzi ndi mwazi, mumakwezera maso anu ku mafano anu, ndi kukhetsa mwazi; ndipo kodi mudzakhala nalo dziko colowa canu?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Mumatama lupanga lanu, mumacita conyansa, mumaipsa yense mkazi wa mnansi wace; ndipo kodi mudzakhala nalo dziko colowa canu?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Uzitero nao, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Pali Ine, iwo okhala kumabwinja adzagwadi ndi lupanga, ndi iye ali kuthengo koyera ndidzampereka kwa zirombo, adyedwe nazo; ndi iwo okhala m'malinga ndi m'mapanga adzafa ndi mliri." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ndipo ndidzasanduliza dziko likhale lacipululu ndi lodabwitsa, ndi mphamvu yace yodzikuza idzatha, ndi mapiri a Israyeli adzakhala acipululu, osapitako munthu." 
Ezekiel33:29 Pamenepo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, posanduliza Ine dziko likhale lacipululu ndi lodabwitsa, cifukwa ca zonyansa zao zonse anazicita." 
Ezekiel33:30 Ndipo iwe wobadwa ndi munthu, ana a anthu a mtundu wako anena za iwe ku makoma ndi ku makomo a nyumba zao, nanenana yense ndi mbale wace, ndi kuti, Tiyeni tikamve mau ofuma kwa Yehova." 
Ezekiel33:31 Ndipo akudzera monga amadzera anthu, nakhala pansi pamaso pako ngati anthu anga, namva mau ako, koma osawacita; pakuti pakamwa pao anena mwacikondi, koma mtima wao utsata phindu lao." 
Ezekiel33:32 Ndipo taona, akuyesa iwe ngati nyimbo yacikondi ya woyimba bwino, woyimba limba bwino; pakuti akumva mau ako, koma osawacita." 
Ezekiel33:33 Ndipo pakucitika ici, pakuti cifikadi, pamenepo adzadziwa kuti panali mneneri pakati pao." 
Ezekiel34:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anandidzera, akuti," 
Ezekiel34:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Nenera motsutsa abusa a Israyeli; nenera, nuti nao abusawo, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsoka abusa a Israyeli odzidyetsa okha; kodi abusa sayenera kudyetsa nkhosa?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Mukudya mafuta, mubvala ubweya, mukupha zonenepa; koma simudyetsa nkhosa." 
Ezekiel34:4 Zofoka simunazilimbitsa; yodwala simunaiciritsa, yotyoka simunailukira chika, yopitikitsidwa simunaibweza, yotayika simunaifuna; koma munazilamulira mwamphamvu ndi moopsa," 
Ezekiel34:5 M'mwemo zinamwazika posowa mbusa, nizinakhala cakudya ca zirombo ziri zonse za kuthengo, popeza zinamwazika." 
Ezekiel34:6 Nkhosa zanga zinasokera ku mapiri ali onse, ndi pa citunda ciri conse cacitali; inde nkhosa zanga zinabalalika pa dziko lonse lapansi, ndipo panalibe wakuzipwaira kapena kuzifunafuna." 
Ezekiel34:7 Cifukwa cace abusa inu, imvani mau a Yehova:" 
Ezekiel34:8 Pali ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, zedi, popeza nkhosa zanga zinakhala nyama, ndi nkhosa zanga zinakhala cakudya ca zirombo zonse za kuthengo, cifukwa kunalibe mbusa, ndi abusa anga sanafunafuna nkhosa zanga, koma abusawo anadzidyetsa okha, osadyetsa nkhosa zanga;" 
Ezekiel34:9 cifukwa cace, abusa inu, imvani mau a Yehova:" 
Ezekiel34:10 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taonani, Ine ndiipidwa nao abusa, ndidzafunsa nkhosa zanga pa dzanja lao, ndi kuwaletsa asadyetsenso nkhosazo, ngakhale kudzidyetsa okha sadzacitanso; ndipo ndidzalanditsa nkhosa zanga pakamwa pao, zisakhale cakudya cao." 
Ezekiel34:11 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, Taonani, Ine, Inedi ndidzapwaira nkhosa zanga ndi kuzifunafuna." 
Ezekiel34:12 Monga mbusa afunafuna nkhosa zace tsiku lokhala iye pakati pa nkhosa zace zobalalika, mamwemo ndidzafunafuna nkhosa zanga; ndipo ndidzawalanditsa m'malo monse anabalalikamo tsiku la mitambo ndi la mdima." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ndipo ndidzaziturutsa mwa mitundu ya anthu, ndi kuzisonkhanitsa m'maiko, ndi kulowa nazo m'dziko lao; ndipo ndidzazidyetsa pa mapiri a Israyeli, patimitsinje, ndi ponse pokhala anthu m'dziko." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ndidzazidyetsa podyetsa pabwino; ndi pa mapiri atali a Israyeli padzakhala kholo lao, apo adzagona m'khola mwabwino, nadzadya podyetsa pokometsetsa pa mapiri a Israyeli." 
Ezekiel34:15 Ine ndekha ndidzadyetsa nkhosa zanga, ndi kuzigonetsa, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel34:16 Ndidzafuna yotayika, ndi kubweza yopitikitsidwa, ndi kulukira chika yotyoka mwendo, ndi kulimbitsa yodwalayo; koma yanenepa ndi yolimba ndidzaziononga, ndidzazidyetsa ndi ciweruzo." 
Ezekiel34:17 Ndipo inu, gulu langa, atero Ambuye Yehova, ndiweruza pakati pa zoweta ndi zoweta, nkhosa zamphongo ndi atonde." 
Ezekiel34:18 Kodi cikuceperani, kuti mwadya podyetsa pabwino? muyenera kodi kupondereza ndi mapazi anu podyera panu potsala? muyenera kumwa madzi ndikha, ndi kubvundulira otsalawo ndi mapazi anu?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Ndi nkhosa zanga zidye kodi zoponderezeka ndi mapazi anu, ndi kumwa zobvunduliridwa ndi mapazi anu?" 
Ezekiel34:20 Cifukwa cace atero nao Ambuye Yehova, Taonani, Ine, Inedi ndidzaweruza pakati pa zoweta zonenepa, ndi zoweta zoonda." 
Ezekiel34:21 Popeza mukankha ndi nthiti ndi phewa, nimugunda zodwala zonse ndi nyanga zanu, mpaka mwazibalalitsa kubwalo," 
Ezekiel34:22 cifukwa cace ndidzapulumutsa gulu langa lisakhalenso cakudya; ndipo ndidzaweruza pakati pa zoweta ndi zoweta. 
Ezekiel34:23 Ndipo ndidzaziutsira mbusa mmodzi; iye adzazidyetsa, ndiye mtumiki wanga Davide, iye adzazidyetsa, nadzakhala mbusa wao." 
Ezekiel34:24 Ndipo Ine Yehova ndidzakhala Mulungu wao, ndi mtumiki wanga Davide kalonga pakati pao; Ine Yehova ndanena." 
Ezekiel34:25 Ndipo ndidzapangana nazo pangano la mtendere, ndi kuleketsa zirombo zoipa m'dzikomo; ndipo zidzakhala mosatekeseka m'cipululu, ndi kugona kunkhalango." 
Ezekiel34:26 Pakuti ndidzaika izi ndi miraga yozungulira citunda canga; zikhale mdalitso; ndipo ndidzabvumbitsa mibvumbi m'nyengo yace, padzakhala mibvumbi ya madalitso." 
Ezekiel34:27 Ndi mitengo ya kuthengo idzapereka zobala zao, ndi nthaka idzapereka zipatso zace, ndipo adzakhazikika m'dziko mwao; ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, nditadula zomangira goli lao, ndi kuwalanditsa m'manja mwa iwo akuwatumikiritsa." 
Ezekiel34:28 Ndipo sadzakhalanso cakudya ca amitundu, ndi cirombo ca kuthengo sicidzawadyanso; koma adzakhala osatekeseka, opanda wina wakuwaopsa." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ndipo ndidzawautsira mbeu yomveka, ndipo sadzacotsedwanso ndi njala m'dzikomo, kapena kusenzanso manyazi a amitundu." 
Ezekiel34:30 Ndipo adzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova Mulungu wao ndiri nao, ndi kuti iwo, nyumba ya Israyeli, ndiwo anthu anga, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel34:31 Ndipo inu nkhosa zanga, nkhosa za pabusa panga, ndinu anthu, ndi Ine ndine Mulungu wanu, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel35:1 Nandidzeranso mau a Yehova, akuti," 
Ezekiel35:2 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, Lozetsa nkhope yako ku phiri la Seiri, nulinenere molitsutsa;" 
Ezekiel35:3 nuti nalo, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taona, ndiipidwa nawe phiri la Seiri, ndipo ndidzakutambasulira dzanja langa, ndi kukusanduliza lacipululu ndi lodabwitsa." 
Ezekiel35:4 Ndidzapasula midzi yako, nudzakhala lacipululu; ndipo udzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel35:5 Popeza uli nao udani wosatha, waperekanso ana a Israyeli ku mphamvu ya lupanga m'nthawi ya tsoka lao, mu nthawi ya mphulupulu yotsiriza;" 
Ezekiel35:6 cifukwa cace, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, ndikukonzeratu uphedwe, ndi mwazi udzakulondola; popeza sunadana nao mwazi, mwazi udzakulondola." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ndipo ndidzaika phiri la Seiri lodabwitsa ndi lacipululu, ndi kuononga pomwepo wopitapo ndi wobwerapo." 
Ezekiel35:8 Ndipo ndidzadzaza mapiri ace ndi ophedwa ace pa zitunda zako, ndi m'zigwa zako, ndi m'mitsinje mwako monse; adzagwa ophedwa ndi lupanga." 
Ezekiel35:9 Ndidzakusandutsa mabwinja osatha; ndi m'midzi mwako simudzakhalanso anthu; motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova," 
Ezekiel35:10 Popeza wanena, Mitundu iwiri iyi ya anthu ndi maiko awiri awa adzakhala anga, tidzakhala nao ngati colowa cathu, angakhale Yehova anali komweko;" 
Ezekiel35:11 cifukwa cace, Pali Ine, ati Ambuye Yehova, ndidzacita monga mwa mkwiyo wako, ndi monga mwa nsanje yako unacita nayo pa kukwiya nao iwe; ndipo ndidzadziwika nao pamene ndikuweruza." 
Ezekiel35:12 Ndipo udzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndidamva zamwano zako zonse udazinena pa mapiri a Israyeli, ndi kuti, Apasuka, apatsidwa kwa ife tiwadye." 
Ezekiel35:13 Ndipo pakamwa panu mwadzikuza pa Ine, ndi kundicurukitsira mau anu ndawamva Ine." 
Ezekiel35:14 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Pokondwerera dziko lonse ndidzakusanduliza lacipululu." 
Ezekiel35:15 Monga momwe unakondwerera colowa ca nyumba ya Israyeli, papeza cidapasuka, momwemo ndidzakucitira iwe; udzakhala wopasuka, phiri la Seiri iwe, ndi Edomu lonse lonseli; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel36:1 Ndipo iwe, wobadwa ndi munthu, unenere kwa mapiri a Israyeli, uziti, Mapiri a Israyeli inu, imvani mau a Yehova." 
Ezekiel36:2 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza mdani ananena za inu, Onyo, ingakhale misanje yakale iri yathu, colowa cathu;" 
Ezekiel36:3 cifukwa cace unenere, nuti, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Cifukwa, inde cifukwa kuti anakupasulani, nakumemezani pozungulira ponse, kuti mukhale colowa ca amitundu otsala, ndipo mwafika pa milomo ya akazitape, ndi pa mbiri yoipa ya anthu;" 
Ezekiel36:4 cifukwa cace, mapiri inu a Israyeli, imvani mau a Ambuye Yehova. Atero Ambuye Yehova kunena ndi mapiri, ndi zitunda, ndi mitsinje, ndi zigwa, ndi zipululu zopasuka, ndi midzi yamabwinja, imene yakhala cakudya ndi coseketsa amitundu otsala akuzungulira;" 
Ezekiel36:5 cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Zoonadi pa nsanje yanga yodya nayo moto ndinanena motsutsana nao amitundu otsala, ndi Edomu lonse, amene anadzipatsira dziko langa likhale colowa cao ndi cimwemwe ca mtima wonse, ndi, mtima wopeputsa, kuti alande zace zonse zikhale zofunkha." 
Ezekiel36:6 Cifukwa cace unenere za dziko la Israyeli, nuti kwa mapiri ndi kwa zitunda, kwa mitsinje ndi kwa zigwa, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Taonani, ndalankhula mu nsanje yanga ndi ukali wanga, popeza mwasenza manyazi a amitundu;" 
Ezekiel36:7 cifukwa cace atero Ambuye Yehova, Ndakweza dzanja langa Ine, ndi kuti, Zedi amitundu akuzungulira inu adzasenza manyazi ao." 
Ezekiel36:8 Koma inu, mapiri a Israyeli, mudzaphukitsa nthambi zanu, ndi kubalira anthu anga Israyeli zipatso zanu, pakuti ayandikira kufika." 
Ezekiel36:9 Pakuti taonani, Ine ndikhalira nanu kumodzi, ndipo ndidzakutembenukirani; ndipo mudzabzalidwa ndi kupaliridwa," 
Ezekiel36:10 ndipo ndidzakucurukitsirani anthu nyumba yonse ya Israyeli, yonseyi, ndi m'midzimo mudzakhala anthu, ndi kumabwinja kudzamangidwa midzi." 
Ezekiel36:11 Ndipo ndidzakucurukitsirani anthu ndi nyama; ndipo adzacuruka, nadzabalana; ndipo ndidzakhalitsa anthu pa inu, monga umo anakhalira kale, ndipo ndidzacitira inu zabwino koposa poyamba paja; motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel36:12 Ndipo ndidzayendetsa anthu pa inu, ndiwo anthu anga Israyeli; adzakhala nawe dziko lao lao, ndipo udzakhala colowa cao osafetsanso ana ao." 
Ezekiel36:13 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Popeza akuti nawe, Dzikowe ukudya anthu, nuyesa anthu ako afedwa;" 
Ezekiel36:14 cifukwa cace sudzadyanso anthu, kapena kuyesanso amtundu wako afedwa, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel36:15 Ndipo sindidzakumvetsanso za manyazi a amitundu, ndipo sudzaseozanso mtonzo wa mitundu ya anthu, kapena kukhumudwitsanso anthu ako, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Ezekiel36:16 Mau a Yehova anandidzeranso, ndi kuti," 
Ezekiel36:17 Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, muja a nyumba ya Israyeli anakhala m'dziko mwao, analidetsa ndi njira yao, ndi macitidwe ao; njira yao pamaso panga inanga cidetso ca mkazi wooloka." 
Ezekiel36:18 M'mwemo ndinawatsanulira ukali wanga, cifukwa ca mwazi anautsanulira padziko, ndi cifukwa ca mafano analidetsa dziko nao;" 
Ezekiel36:19 ndipo ndinawabalalitsa mwa amitundu, namwazika m'maiko monga mwa njira yao; ndi monga mwa macitidwe ao ndinawaweruza." 
Ezekiel36:20 Ndipo pofika iwo kwa amitundu kumene anamukako, anadetsa dzina langa loyera; popeza anthu ananena za iwowa, Awa ndi anthu a Yehova, naturuka m'dziko mwace." 
Ezekiel36:21 Koma ndinawaleka cifukwa ca dzina langa loyera, limene a nyumba ya Israyeli adalidetsa pakati pa amitundu, kumene adarakako," 
Ezekiel36:22 Cifukwa cace nena kwa nyumba ya Israyeli, Atero Ambuye Yehova, Sindicicita ici cifukwa ca inu, nyumba ya Israyeli, koma cifukwa ca dzina langa loyera munaliipsalo pakati pa amitundu, kumene mudamukako." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ndipo ndidzazindikiritsa dzina langa lalikuru kuti liri loyera, limene laipitsidwa mwa amitundu, limene inu munaliipsa pakati pao; ndipo amitundu adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova, ati Ambuye Yehova, pozindikiridwa Ine woyera mwa inu pamaso pao." 
Ezekiel36:24 Pakuti ndidzakutengani kukuturutsani kwa amitundu, ndi kukusokolotsani m'maiko onse, ndi kubwera nanu m'dziko lanu." 
Ezekiel36:25 Ndipo ndidzakuwazani madzi oyera, ndipo mudzakhala oyera; ndidzakuyeretsani kukucotserani zodetsa zanu zonse, ndi mafano anu onse." 
Ezekiel36:26 Ndipo ndidzakupatsani mtima watsopano, ndi kulonga m'kati mwanu mzimu watsopano; ndipo ndidzacotsa mtima wamwala m'thupi, ndi kukupatsani mtima wamnofu." 
Ezekiel36:27 Ndipo ndidzaika mzimu wanga m'kati mwanu, ndi kukuyendetsani m'malemba anga; ndipo mudzasunga maweruzo anga ndi kuwacita." 
Ezekiel36:28 Ndipo mudzakhala m'dziko ndinapatsa makolo anulo, ndipo mudzakhala anthu anga, ndi Ine ndidzakhala Mulungu wanu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Ndipo ndidzakupulumutsani kwa zodetsa zanu zonse, ndidzaitananso tirigu ndi kumcurukitsa, osaikiranso inu njala." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ndipo ndidzacurukitsa zobala za mitengo, ndi zipatso za m'munda, kuti musalandirenso citonzo ca njala mwa amitundu." 
Ezekiel36:31 Pamenepo mudzakumbukila njira zanu zoipa, ndi zocita inu zimene sizinali zabwino; ndipo mudzanyansidwa nokha pamaso panu, cifukwa ca mphulupulu zanu ndi zonyansa zanu." 
Ezekiel36:32 Dziwani kuti sindicita ici cifukwa ca inu, ati Ambuye Yehova; citani manyazi, dodomani, cifukwa ca njira zanu, nyumba ya Israyeli inu." 
Ezekiel36:33 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Tsiku loti ndikuyeretsani kukucotserani mphulupulu zanu zonse, ndidzakhalitsa anthu m'midzimo; ndi pamabwinja padzamangidwa." 
Ezekiel36:34 Ndi dziko lacipululu lidzalimidwa, cinkana linali lacipululu pamaso pa onse opitako." 
Ezekiel36:35 Ndipo adzati, Dziko ili lacipululu lasanduka ngati munda wa Edene, ndi midzi yamabwinja, ndi yacipululu, ndi yopasuka, yamangidwa malinga, muli anthu m'mwemo." 
Ezekiel36:36 Pamenepo amitundu otsala pozungulira panu adzadziwa kuti Ine Yehova ndamanga malo opasuka, ndi kubzala pamene panali cipululu; Ine Yehova ndanena ndidzacita." 
Ezekiel36:37 Atero Ambuye Yehova, Ici comwe adzandipempha a nyumba ya Israyeli ndiwacitire ici, ndidzawacurukitsira anthu ngati nkhosa." 
Ezekiel36:38 Ngati nkhosa za nsembe, ngati nkhosa za ku Yerusalemu pa madyerero ace oikika, momwemo midzi yamabwinja idzadzala nao magulu a anthu; motero adzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova." 
Ezekiel37:1 Dzanja la Yehova linandikhalira, ndipo anaturuka nane mu mzimu wa Yehova, nandiika m'kati mwa cigwa, ndico codzala ndi mafupa;" 
Ezekiel37:2 ndipo anandipititsa pamenepo pozungulira ponse, ndipo taonani, anali aunyinji pacigwa pansi, ndipo anaumitsitsa." 
Ezekiel37:3 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, mafupa awa nkukhala ndi moyo kodi? Ndipo ndinati, Ambuye Yehova, mudziwa ndinu." 
Ezekiel37:4 Pamenepo anati kwa ine, Nenera kwa mafupa awa, nuti nao, Mafupa ouma inu, imvani mau a Yehova." 
Ezekiel37:5 Atero Ambuye Yehova kwa mafupa awa, Taonani, ndidzalonga mpweya mwa inu, ndipo mudzakhala ndi moyo." 
Ezekiel37:6 Ndipo ndidzakuikirani mtsempha, ndi kufikitsira inu mnofu, ndi kukuta inu ndi khungu, ndi kulonga mpweya mwa inu; ndipo mudzakhala ndi moyo; motero mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehoya."
