Daniel4:33 Nthawi yomweyo anacitika mau awa kwa Nebukadinezara; anamuinga kumcotsa kwa anthu; nadya udzu ngati ng'ombe iye, ndi thupi lace linakhathamira ndi mame a kumwamba, mpaka tsitsi lace lidamera ngati nthenga za ciombankhanga ndi makadabo ace ngati makadabo a mbalame." 
Daniel4:34 Atatha masiku awa tsono, ine Nebukadinezara ndinakweza maso anga kumwamba, ndi nzeru zanga zinandibwerera; ndipo ndinalemekeza Wam'mwambamwamba, ndi kumyamika ndi kumcitira ulemu Iye wokhala cikhalire; pakuti kulamulira kwace ndiko kulamulira kosatha, ndi ufumu wace ku mibadwo mibadwo;" 
Daniel4:35 ndi okhala pa dziko lapansi onse ayesedwa acabe; ndipo Iye acita mwa cifunito cace m'khamu la kumwamba ndi mwa okhala pa dziko lapansi; ndipo palibe woletsa dzanja lace, kapena wakunena naye, Mucitanji?" 
Daniel4:36 Nthawi yomweyi nzeru zanga zinandibwerera, ndi cifumu canga ndi kunyezimira kwanga zinandibwerera, kuti uonekenso ulemerero wa ufumu wanga; ndi mandoda anga ndi akuru anga anandifuna; ndipo ndinakhazikika m'ufumu wanga, Iye nandioniezeranso ukulu wocuruka." 
Daniel4:37 Tsono ine Nebukadinezara ndiyamika, ndi kukuza, ndi kulemekeza Mfumu ya Kumwamba, pakuti nchito zace zonse nzoona, ndi njira zace ciweruzo; ndi oyenda m'kudzikuza kwao, Iye akhoza kuwacepetsa." 
Daniel5:1 Mfumu Belisazara anakonzera anthu ace akulu cikwi cimodzi madyerero akuru, namwa vinyo pamaso pa cikwico." 
Daniel5:2 Belisazara, pakulawa vinyo, anati abwere nazo zotengera za golidi ndi siliva adazicotsa Nebukadinezara atate wace ku Kacisi ali ku Yerusalemu, kuti mfumu ndi akuru ace, akazi ace ndi akazi ace ang'ono, amweremo." 
Daniel5:3 Nabwera nazo zotengera zagolidi adazicotsa ku Kacisi wa nyumba ya Mulungu ya ku Yerusalemu, ndipo mfumu ndi akuru ace, akazi ace ndi akazi ace ang'ono, anamweramo." 
Daniel5:4 Anamwa vinyo, nalemekeza milungu yagolidi, ndi yasiliva, yamkuwa, yacitsulo, yamtengo, ndi yamwala." 
Daniel5:5 Nthawi yomweyo zinabuka zala za dzanja la munthu, nizinalemba pandunji pa coikapo nyali, pomata pa khoma la cinyumba ca mfumu; ndipo mfumu inaona nsonga yace ya dzanja lidalembalo." 
Daniel5:6 Pamenepo padasandulika pa nkhope pace pa mfumu, ndi maganizo ace anamsautsa, ndi mfundo za m'cuuno mwace zinaguruka, ndi maondo ace anaombana." 
Daniel5:7 Nipfuulitsa mfumu abwere nao openda, Akasidi, ndi alauli, Mfumu inalankhula, niti kwa anzeru a ku Babulo, Ali yense amene adzawerenga lemba ili, nadzandifotokozera kumasulira kwace, adzabvekedwa cibakuwa, ndi unyolo wagolidi m'khosi mwace, nadzakhala wolamulira wacitatu m'ufumuwu." 
Daniel5:8 Pamenepo analowa anzeru onse a mfumu, koma sanakhoza kuwerenga lembalo, kapena kudziwitsa mfumu kumasulira kwace." 
Daniel5:9 Ndipo mfumu Belisazara anabvutika kwambiri, ndi nkhope yace inasandulika, ndi akuru ace anathedwa nzeru." 
Daniel5:10 Cifukwa ca mau a mfumu ndi akuru ace mkazi wamkuru wa mfumu analowa m'nyumba ya madyerero; mkazi wa mfumu ananena, nati, Mfumu, mukhale ndi moyo kosatha; asakubvuteni maganizo anu, ndi nkhope yanu isasandulike;" 
Daniel5:11 pali munthu m'ufumu mwanu mwa iye muli mzimu wa milungu yoyera; ndipo masiku a atate wanu munapezeka mwa iye kuunika, ndi luntha, ndi nzeru, ngati nzeru ya milungu; ndipo mfumu Nebukadinezara atate wanu, inde mfumu atate wanu anamuika akhale mkuru wa alembi, openda, Akasidi, ndi alauli;" 
Daniel5:12 popeza m'Danieli yemweyo, amene mfumu adamucha Belitsazara, mudapezeka mzimu wopambana, ndi cidziwitso, ndi luntha, kumasulira maloto ndi kutanthauzira mau ophiphiritsa, ndi kumasula mfundo. Amuitane Danieli tsono, iye adzafotokozera kumasuliraku." 
Daniel5:13 Pamenepo analowa naye Danieli kwa mfumu. Mfumu inayankha, niti kwa Danieli, Ndiwe kodi Danieli uja wa ana a ndende a Yuda, amene mfumu atate wanga anatenga ku Yuda?" 
Daniel5:14 Ndamva za iwe kuti muli mzimu wa milungu mwa iwe, ndi kuti mupezeka mwa iwe kuunika, ndi luntha, ndi nzeru zopambana." 
Daniel5:15 Ndipo tsono anabwera nao kwa ine anzeru, openda, kuti awerenge lemba ilo, ndi kundidziwitsa kumasulira kwace; koma sanakhoza kufotokozera kumasulira kwa cinthuci." 
Daniel5:16 Koma ndamva ine za iwe, kuti ukhoza kutanthauzira mau, ndi kumasula mfundo; tsono ukakhoza kuwerenga lembalo, ndi kundidziwitsa kumasulira kwace, udzabvekedwa cibakuwa, ndi unyolo wagolidi m'khosi mwako; nudzakhala wolamulira wacitatu m'ufumuwo." 
Daniel5:17 Pamenepo anayankha Danieli, nati kwa mfumu, Mphatso zanu zikhale zanu, ndi mphotho zanu mupatse wina; koma ndidzawerengera mfumu lembalo, ndi kumdziwitsa kumasulira kwace." 
Daniel5:18 Mfumu inu, Mulungu Wam'mwambamwamba anapatsa Nebukadinezara atate wanu ufumuwu, ndi ukulu, ndi ulemerero, ndi cifumu;" 
Daniel5:19 ndipo cifukwa ca ukulu adampatsawo anthu onse, mitundu yonse ya anthu, a manenedwe onse, ananjenjemera, naopa pamaso pace; amene anafuna kuwapha anawapha; amene anafuna kuwasunga anawasunga amoyo; amene anafuna kuwakweza anawakweza; amene anafuna kuwatsitsa anawatsitsa." 
Daniel5:20 Koma pokwezeka mtima wace, nulimba mzimu wace kucita modzikuza, anamtsitsa pa mpando wa ufumu wace, namcotsera ulemerero wace;" 
Daniel5:21 ndipo anamuinga kumcotsa kwa ana a anthu, ndi mtima wace unasandulika ngati wa nyama za kuthengo, ndi pokhala pace mpa mbidzi, anamdyetsa udzu ngati ng'ombe, ndi thupi lace linakhathamira ndi mame a kumwamba; mpaka anadziwa kuti Wam'mwambamwamba alamulira m'ufumu wa anthu, nauikira ali yense Iye afuna mwini." 
Daniel5:22 Ndipo inu mwana wace, Belisazara inu, simunadzicepetsa m'mtima mwanu, cinkana munazidziwa izi zonse;" 
Daniel5:23 koma munadzikweza kutsutsana naye Ambuye wa Kumwamba; ndipo anabwera nazo zotengera za nyumba yace kwa inu; ndi inu ndi akuru anu, akazi anu ndi akazi anu ang'ono, mwamweramo vinyo; mwalemekezanso milungu yasiliva, ndi yagolidi, yamkuwa, yacitsulo, yamtengo, ndi yamwala, imene siiona, kapena kumva, kapena kudziwa; ndi Mulungu amene m'dzanja mwace muli mpweya wanu, ndi njira zanu zonse, yemweyo simunamcitira ulemu." 
Daniel5:24 Pamenepo nsonga ya dzanja inatumidwa kucokera pamaso pace, nililembedwa lembali." 
Daniel5:25 Ndipolembalolembedwa ndi ili: MENE MENE TEKEL UF ARSIN. 
Daniel5:26 Kumasulira kwace kwa mau awa ndi uku: MENE, Mulungu anawerenga ufumu wanu, nautha." 
Daniel5:27 TEKEL, Mwayesedwa pamiyeso, nimupezeka mwaperewera." 
Daniel5:28 PERES, ufumu wanu wagawika, nuperekedwa kwa Amedi ndi Aperisi." 
Daniel5:29 Pamenepo Belisazara analamulira, ndipo anabveka Danieli cibakuwa, ndi unyolo wagolidi m'khosi mwace, nalalikira za iye kuti ndiye wolamulira wacitatu m'ufumumo." 
Daniel5:30 Usiku womwewo Belisazara mfumu ya Akasidi anaphedwa. 
Daniel5:31 Ndipo Dariyo Mmedi analandira ufumuwo ali wa zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu ziwiri. 
Daniel6:1 Kudamkomera Dariyo kuikira ufumuwo akalonga zana limodzi mphambu makumi awiri akhale m'madera onse a ufumu; 
Daniel6:2 ndi akuyang'anira iwo akulu atatu, woyamba wao ndi Danieli; kuti akalonga awa adziwerengere kwa iwo, ndi kuti za mfumu zisasoweke." 
Daniel6:3 Pamenepo Danieli amene anaposa akuluwa ndi akalonga, popeza munali mzimu wopambana mwa iye, ndi mfumu inati imuike woyang'anira ufumu wonse." 
Daniel6:4 Ndipo akuluwa ndi akalonga anayesa kumtola cifukwa Danieli, kunena za ufumuwo; koma sanakhoza kupeza cifukwa kapena colakwira, popeza anali wokhulupirika; ndipo sanaona cosasamala kapena colakwa ciri conse mwa iye." 
Daniel6:5 Pamenepo anthu awa anati, Sitidzamtola cifukwa ciri conse Danieli amene, tikapanda kumtola ici pa cilamulo ca Mulungu wace." 
Daniel6:6 Ndipo akuru awa ndi akalonga anasonkhana kwa mfumu mofulumira, natero nayo, Mfumu Dariyo, mukhale ndi moyo cikhalire." 
Daniel6:7 Akuru onse a ufumuwo, ndi akazembe ndi akalonga, mandoda, ndi ziwanga, anapangana kukhazika lemba lacifumu, ndi kuikapo coletsa colimba, kuti ali yense akapempha kanthu kwa mulungu ali yense, kapena kwa munthu ali yense masiku makumi atatu, osati kwa inu nokha, mfumu, adzaponyedwa m'dzenje la mikango," 
Daniel6:8 Tsopano, mfumu, mukhazikitse coletsaco, ndi kutsimikiza colembedwaco, kuti cisasinthike monga mwa malamulo a Amedi ndi Aperisi, amene sasinthika." 
Daniel6:9 Momwemo mfumu Dariyo anatsimikiza colembedwa ndi coletsaco. 
Daniel6:10 Ndipo podziwa Danieli kuti adatsimikiza colembedwaco, analowa m'nyumba mwace, m'cipinda mwace, cimene mazenera ace anatseguka oloza ku Yerusalemu; ndipo anagwadamaondo ace tsiku limodzi katatu, napemphera, nabvomereza pamaso pa Mulungu wace monga umo amacitira kale lonse." 
Daniel6:11 Pamenepo anasonkhana anthu awa, napeza Danieli alikupemphera ndi kupembedza pamaso pa Mulungu wace." 
Daniel6:12 Ndipo anayandikira, nanena pamaso pa mfumu za coletsaco ca mfumu, Kodi simunatsimikiza coletsaco, kuti ali yense akapempha kanthu kwa mulungu ali yense, kapena kwa munthu ali yense, masiku makumi atatu, osati kwa inu nokha, mfumu, adzaponyedwa m'dzenje la mikango? Mfumu niyankha, niti, Coona cinthuci, monga mwa malamulo a Amedi ndi Aperisi amene sasinthika." 
Daniel6:13 Pamenepo anayankha, nati pamaso pa mfumu, Danieli uja wa ana a ndende a Yuda sasamalira inu, mfumu, kapena coletsa munacitsimikizaco; koma apempha pemphero lace katatu tsiku limodzi." 
Daniel6:14 Ndipo mfumu m'mene atamva mau awa anaipidwa kwambiri, naika mtima wace pa Danieli kuti amlanditse, nayesetsa mpaka polowa dzuwa kumlanditsa." 
Daniel6:15 Koma anthu awa anasonkhana kwa mfumu, nati kwa mfumu, Dziwani, mfumu, kuti lamulo la Amedi ndi Aperisi, ndilo kuti coletsa ciri conse ndi lemba liri lonse idazikhazikira mfumu, zisasinthike." 
Daniel6:16 Pamenepo inalamula mfumu, ndipo anadza naye Danieli, namponya m'dzenje la mikango. Ndipo mfumu inalankhula, niti kwa Danieli, Mulungu wako amene umtumikira kosalekeza, Iyeyu adzakulanditsa." 
Daniel6:17 Ndipo anatenga mwala, nauika pakamwa pa dzenje, niukomera mfumu ndi cosindikizira cace, ndi cosindikizira ca akuru ace, kuti kasasinthike kanthu ka Danieli." 
Daniel6:18 Pamenepo mfumu inamuka ku cinyumba cace, nicezera kusala usikuwo, ngakhale zoyimbitsa sanabwera nazo pamaso pace, ndi m'maso mwace munamuumira." 
Daniel6:19 Nilawira mamawa mfumu, nimuka mofulumira ku dzenje la mikango." 
Daniel6:20 Ndipo poyandikira padzenje inapfuula ndi mau acisoni mfumu, ninena, niti kwa Danieli, Danieli, mnyamata wa Mulungu wamoyo, kodi Mulungu wako, amene umtumikira kosalekeza, wakhoza kukulanditsa kwamikango?" 
Daniel6:21 Pamenepo Danieli anati kwa mfumu, Mfumu, mukhale ndi moyo cikhalire." 
Daniel6:22 Mulungu wanga watuma mthenga wace, natseka pakamwa pa mikango; ndipo siinandipweteka, cifukwa anandiona wosacimwa pamaso pace, pamaso panunso, mfumu, sindinalakwa." 
Daniel6:23 Pamenepo mfumu inakondwera kwambiri, niwauza aturutse Danieli m'dzenje. Momwemo anamturutsa Danieli m'dzenje, ndi pathupi pace sipadaoneka bala, popeza anakhulupirira Mulungu wace." 
Daniel6:24 Ndipo italamulira mfumu, anabwera nao amuna aja adamneneza Danieli, nawaponya m'dzenje la mikango, iwowa, ana ao, ndi akazi ao; ndipo asanafike pansi pa dzenje mikango inawaposa mphamvu, niphwanya mafupa ao onse." 
Daniel6:25 Pamenepo mfumu Dariyo analembera kwa anthu, mitundu ya anthu, ndi a manenedwe onse okhala pa dziko lonse lapansi, Mtendere ucurukire inu." 
Daniel6:26 Ndilamulira ine kuti m'maiko onse a ufumu wanga anthu anjenjemere, naope pamaso pa Mulungu wa Danieli; pakuti Iye ndiye Mulungu wamoyo wakukhala cikhalire, ndi ufumu wace ngwosaonongeka, ndi kulamulira kwace kudzakhala mpaka cimariziro." 
Daniel6:27 Iye apulumutsa, nalanditsa, nacita zizindikilo ndi zozizwa m'mwamba ndi pa dziko lapansi, ndiye amene anapulumutsa Danieli ku mphamvu ya mikango." 
Daniel6:28 Momwemo Danieli amene anakuzikabe pokhala Dariyo mfumu, ndi pokhala mfumu Koresi wa ku Perisiya." 
Daniel7:1 Caka coyamba ca Belisazara mfumu ya ku Babulo Danieli anaona loto, naona masomphenya a m'mtima mwace pakama pace; ndipo analemba lotolo, nalifotokozera, mwacidule." 
Daniel7:2 Danieli ananena, nati, Ndinaona m'masomphenya anga usiku, taonani, mphepo zinai za mumlengalenga zinabuka pa nyanja yaikuru." 
Daniel7:3 Ndipo zinaturuka m'nyanja zirombo zazikuru zinai zosiyana-siyana. 
Daniel7:4 Coyamba cinanga mkango, cinali nao mapiko a ciombankhanga, ndinapenyera mpaka nthenga zace zinathothoka, nicinakwezeka kudziko, ndi kuimitsidwa ndi mapazi awiri ngati munthu, nicinapatsidwa mtima wa munthu." 
Daniel7:5 Ndipo taonani, cirombo cina caciwiri cikunga cimbalangondo cinatundumuka mbali imodzi; ndi m'kamwa mwace munali nthiti zitatu pakati pa mano ace; ndipo anatero naco, Nyamuka, lusira nyama zambiri." 
Daniel7:6 Pambuyo pace ndinapenya ndi kuona cina ngati nyalugwe, cinali nao mapiko anai a nkhuku pamsana pace, ciromboco cinali nayonso mitu inai, nicinapatsidwa ulamuliro." 
Daniel7:7 Pambuyo pace ndinaona m'masomphenya a usiku, ndi kuona cirombo cacinai, coopsa ndi cocititsa mantha, ndi camphamvu coposa, cinali nao mano akuru acitsulo, cinalusa ndi kuphwanya ndi kupondereza cotsala ndi mapazi ace; cinasiyana ndi zirombo zonse zidacitsogolera; ndipo cinali ndi nyanga khumi." 
Daniel7:8 Ndinali kulingirira za nyangazi, taonani, pakati pa izo panaphuka nyanga yina, ndiyo yaing'ono; patsogolo pace zitatu za nyanga zoyambazi zinazulidwa ndi mizu yomwe; ndipo taonani, m'nyanga m'menemo munali maso ngati maso a munthu, ndi pakamwa palikunena zazikuru." 
Daniel7:9 Ndinapenyerera mpaka anaikapo mipando yacifumu, nikhalapo Nkhalamba ya kale lomwe, zobvala zace zinali za mbu ngati cipale cofewa, ndi tsitsi la pa mutu pace ngati ubweya woyera, mpando wacifumu unali malawi amoto, ndi njinga zace moto woyaka." 
Daniel7:10 Mtsinje wamoto unayenda woturuka pamaso pace, zikwi zikwi anamtumikira, ndi unyinji wosawerengeka unaima pamaso pace, woweruza mlandu anakhalapo, ndi mabuku anatsegulidwa." 
Daniel7:11 Pamenepo ndinapenyera cifukwa ca phokoso la mau akuru idanena nyangayi; ndinapenyera mpaka adacipha ciromboci, ndi kuononga mtembo wace, ndi kuupereka utenthedwe ndi moto." 
Daniel7:12 Ndipo zirombo zotsalazo anazicotsera ulamuliro wao, koma anatalikitsa moyo wao, ukhalenso nyengo ndi nthawi." 
Daniel7:13 Ndinaona m'masomphenya a usiku, taonani, anadza ndi mitambo ya kumwamba wina ngati mwana wa munthu, nafika kwa Nkhalamba ya kale lomwe; ndipo anamyandikizitsa pamaso pace." 
Daniel7:14 Ndipo anampatsa ulamuliro, ndi ulemerero, ndi ufumu, kuti anthu onse, ndi mitundu yonse ya anthu, ndi a manenedwe onse, amtumikire; ulamuliro wace ndi ulamuliro wosatha wosapitirira, ndi ufumu wace sudzaonongeka." 
Daniel7:15 Koma ine Danieli, mzimu wanga unalaswa m'kati mwa thupi langa, ndi masomphenya a m'mtima mwanga anandibvuta." 
Daniel7:16 Ndinayandikira kwa wina wa iwo akuimako ndi kumfunsa za coonadi za ici conse. Ndipo ananena nane, nandidziwitsa kumasulira kwace kwa zinthuzi:" 
Daniel7:17 Zirombo zazikuru izi zinai ndizo mafumu anai amene adzauka pa dziko lapansi. 
Daniel7:18 Koma opatulika la Wam'mwambamwamba adzalandira ufumuwo, ndi kukhala nao ufumu kosatha, ku nthawi zomka muyaya." 
Daniel7:19 Pamenepo ndinafuna kudziwa coonadi ca cirombo cacinai cija cidasiyana nazo zonsezi, coopsa copambana, mano ace acitsulo, ndi makadabo ace amkuwa, cimene cidalusa, ndi kuphwanya, ndi kupondereza zotsala ndi mapazi ace;" 
Daniel7:20 ndi za nyanga khumi zinali pamutu pace, ndi nyanga yina Idaphukayi, imene zidagwa zitatu patsogolo pace; nyangayo idali ndi maso ndi pakamwa pakunena zazikuru, imene maonekedwe ace anaposa zinzace." 
Daniel7:21 Ndinapenya, ndipo nyanga yomweyi inacita nkhondo ndi opatulikawo, niwalaka, mpaka inadza Nkhalamba ya kale lomwe;" 
Daniel7:22 ndi mlandu unakomera opatulika a Wam'mwambamwamba, nifika nthawi yakuti ufumu unali wao wa opatulikawo." 
Daniel7:23 Anatero, cirombo cacinai ndico ufumu wacinai pa dziko lapansi, umene udzasiyana nao maufumu onse, nudzalusira dziko lonse lapansi, nudzalipondereza ndi kuliphwanya." 
Daniel7:24 Kunena za nyanga khumi, m'ufumu uwu adzauka mafumu khumi, ndi pambuyo pao idzauka yina; iyo idzasiyana ndi oyamba aja, nidzacepetsa mafumu atatu." 
Daniel7:25 Nidzanena mau akutsutsana ndi Wam'mwambainwamba, nidzalemetsa opatulika a Wam'mwambamwamba, nidzayesa kusintha nthawizo ndi cilamulo; ndipo adzaperekedwa m'dzanja lace mpaka nthawi imodzi, ndi nthawi zina, ndi nthawi yanusu." 
Daniel7:26 Koma woweruza mlandu adzakhalako, ndipo adzacotsa ulamuliro wace, kuutha ndi kuuononga kufikira cimariziro." 
Daniel7:27 Ndipo ufumu, ndi ulamuliro, ndi ukulu wa maufumu, pansi pa thambo lonse, zidzapatsidwa kwa anthu a opatulika a Wam'mwambamwamba; ufumu wace ndiwo ufumu wosatha, ndi maiko onse adzamtumikira ndi kummvera." 
Daniel7:28 Kutha kwace kwa cinthuci nkuno. Ine Danieli, maganizo anga anandibvuta kwambiri, ndi nkhope yanga inasandulika; koma ndinasunga cinthuci m'mtima mwanga." 
Daniel8:1 Caka cacitatu ca Belisazara mfumu masomphenya anandionekera kwa ine Danieli, atatha kundionekera oyamba aja." 
Daniel8:2 Ndipo ndinaona m'masomphenya; tsono kunali, pakuwaona ine ndinali m'Susani, m'nyumba ya mfumu, ndiwo m'dziko la Elamu; ndinaona m'masomphenya kuti ndinali kumtsinje Ulai." 
Daniel8:3 Ndipo ndinakweza maso anga ndi kupenya; taonani, panaima pamtsinje nkhosa yamphongo yokhala nazo nyanga ziwiri, ndi nyanga ziwirizo zinali za msinkhu wautali, koma imodzi inaposa inzace; yoposayo inaphuka m'mbuyo." 
Daniel8:4 Ndinaona nkhosa yamphongo irikugunda kumadzulo, ndi kumpoto, ndi kumwela; ndipo panalibe zamoyo zokhoza kuima pamaso pace; panalibenso wakulanditsa m'dzanja lace; koma inacita monga mwa cifuniro cace, nidzikulitsa." 
Daniel8:5 Ndipo polingirfrapo ine, taonani, wadza tonde wocokera kumadzulo, pa nkhope ya dziko lonse lapansi, wosakhudza nthaka; ndi mbuziyo inali ndi nyanga yooneka bwino pakati pa maso ace." 
Daniel8:6 Ndipo anadzera nkhosa yamphongoyo yokhala ndi nyanga ziwiri, imene ndidaiona irikuima kumtsinje, naithamangira ndi mphamvu yace yaukali." 
Daniel8:7 Ndipo ndinamuona wayandikira pafupi pa nkhosa yamphongo, nawawidwa mtima nayo, naigunda nkhosa yamphongo, natyola nyanga zace ziwiri; ndipo mphongoyo inalibe mphamvu yakuima pamaso pace, koma anaigwetsa pansi, naipondereza; ndipo panalibe wakupulumutsa mphongoyo m'dzanja lace." 
Daniel8:8 Ndipo tondeyo anadzikulitsa kwakukuru, koma atakhala wamphamvu, nyanga yace yaikuru inatyoka; ndi m'malo mwace munaphuka nyanga zinai zooneka bwino, zoloza ku mphepo zinai za mlengalenga." 
Daniel8:9 Ndipo mu imodzi ra izi munaphuka nyanga yaing'ono, imene inakula kwakukuru ndithu, kuloza kumwela, ndi kum'mawa, ndi ku dziko lokometsetsa." 
Daniel8:10 Nikula, kufikira khamu la kuthambo; ndi zina za khamulo ndi za nyenyezi inazigwetsa pansi, nizipondereza." 
Daniel8:11 Inde inadzikulitsa kufikira kwa kalonga wa khamulo, nimcotsera nsembe yopsereza yacikhalire; ndi pokhala malo ace opatulika panagwetsedwa." 
Daniel8:12 Ndipo khamulo linaperekedwa kwa iyo, pamodzi ndi nsembe yopsereza yacikhalire mwa kulakwa kwace, nigwetsa pansi coonadi, nicita cifuniro cace, nikuzika." 
Daniel8:13 Pamenepo ndinamva wina woyera, alikunena; ndi wina woyera anati kwa iye uja wanenayo, Masomphenya a nsembe yopsereza yacikhalire, ndi colakwa cakupululutsa ca kupereka malo opatulika ndi khamulo ziponderezedwe, adzakhala mpaka liti?" 
Daniel8:14 Nati kwa ine, Mpaka masiku zikwi ziwiri mphambu mazana atatu usana ndi usiku; pamenepo malo opatulika adzayesedwa olungama." 
Daniel8:15 Ndipo kunali, nditaona masomphenyawo, ine Danieli ndinafuna kuwazindikira; ndipo taonani, panaima popenyana ndi ine ngati maonekedwe a munthu." 
Daniel8:16 Ndipo ndinamva mau a munthu pakati pa magombe a Ulai, naitana, nati, Gabrieli, zindikiritsa munthuyu masomphenyawo." 
Daniel8:17 Nayandikira iye poima inepo; atadza iye tsono ndinacita mantha, ndinagwa nkhope pansi; koma anati kwa ine, Zindikira, wobadwa ndi munthu iwe, pakuti masomphenyawo anena za nthawi ya cimariziro." 
Daniel8:18 Ndipo m'mene analikulankhula ndi ine ndinagwidwa ndi tulo tatikuru, nkhope yanga pansi; koma anandikhudza, nandiimiritsa pokhala inepo," 
Daniel8:19 Ndipo anati, Taona, ndidzakudziwitsa cimene cidzacitika pa citsiriziro ca mkwiyowo; pakuti pa nthawi yoikika mpakutha pace," 
Daniel8:20 Nkhosa yamphongo waiona ya nyanga ziwiri ndizo mafumu a Mediya ndi Perisiya. 
Daniel8:21 Ndi tonde wamanyenje ndiye mfumu ya Helene, ndi nyanga yaikuru iri pakati pa maso ace ndiyo mfumu yoyamba." 
Daniel8:22 Ndi kuti zinaphuka zinai m'malo mwace mwa iyo itatyoka, adzauka maufumu anai ocokera mu mtunduwu wa anthu, koma osakhala nayo mphamvu ya uja." 
Daniel8:23 Ndipo potsiriza pace pa ufumu wao, atakwanira olakwa, idzauka mfumu ya nkhope yaukali yakuzindikira zinsinsi." 
Daniel8:24 Ndi mphamvu yace idzakhala yaikuru, koma si mphamvu yace yace ai, nidzaononga modabwiza, nidzakuzika, ndi kucita, ndi kuononga amphamvuwo, ndi anthu opatulikawo." 
Daniel8:25 Ndipo mwa kucenjera kwace adzapindulitsa cinyengo m'dzanja mwace, nadzadzikuza m'mtima mwace; ndipo posatekeseka anthu, adzaononga ambiri; adzaukiranso kalonga wa akalonga, koma adzatyoledwa popanda dzanja." 
Daniel8:26 Ndipo masomphenya a madzulo ndi mamawa adanenawo ndi oona; koma iwe ubise masomphenyawo, popeza adzacitika atapita masiku ambiri." 
Daniel8:27 Ndipo ine Danieli ndinakomoka ndi kudwala masiku ena; pamenepo ndinauka ndi kucita nchito ya mfumu; ndipo ndinadabwa nao masomphenyawo, koma panalibe wakuwazindikiritsa." 
Daniel9:1 Caka coyamba ca Dariyo mwana wa Ahaswero, wa mbeu ya Amedi, amene anamlonga mfumu ya Akasidi;" 
Daniel9:2 caka coyamba ca ufumu wace, ine Danieli ndinazindikira mwa mabuku kuti ciwerengo cace ca zaka, cimene mau a Yehova anadzera naco kwa Yeremiya mneneri, kunena za makwaniridwe a mapasuko a Yerusalemu, ndizo zaka makumi asanu ndi awiri." 
Daniel9:3 Ndipo ndinaika nkhope yanga kwa Ambuye Mulungu, kumfunsa Iye m'pemphero, ndi mapembedzero, ndi kusala, ndi ziguduli, ndi mapulusa." 
Daniel9:4 Ndipo ndinapemphera kwa Yehova Mulungu wanga ndi kubvomereza, ndi kuti, Ambuye Mulungu wamkuru ndi woopsa, wakuwasungira pangano ndi cifundo iwo akukukondani, ndi kusunga malamulo anu," 
Daniel9:5 tacimwa, tacita mphulupulu, tacita zoipa, tapanduka, kupambuka ndi kusiya maneno anu ndi maweruzo anu;" 
Daniel9:6 sitinamvera atumiki anu aneneri, amene ananena m'dzina lanu kwa mafumu athu, akalonga athu, makolo athu, ndi anthu onse a m'dziko." 
Daniel9:7 Ambuye, cilungamo nca Inu, koma kwa ife manyazi a nkhope yathu, monga lero lino; kwa anthu a Yuda, ndi kwa okhala m'Yerusalemu, ndi kwa Aisrayeli onse okhala pafupi ndi okhala kutali, ku maiko onse kumene mudawaingira, cifukwa ca kulakwa kwao anakulakwirani nako." 
Daniel9:8 Ambuye, kwa ife kuli manyazi a nkhope yathu, kwa mafumu athu, kwa akalonga athu, ndi kwa makolo athu; pakuti takucimwirani." 
Daniel9:9 Ambuye Mulungu wathu ndiye wacifundo, ndi wokhululukira; pakuti tampandukira Iye;" 
Daniel9:10 sitinamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wathu, kuyenda m'malamulo ace anatiikirawo pamaso pathu, mwa atumiki ace aneneri." 
Daniel9:11 Inde Israyeli yense walakwira cilamulo canu, ndi kupambuka, kuti asamvere mau anu; cifukwa cace temberero lathiridwa pa ife, ndi Ilumbiro lolembedwa m'cilamulo ca Mose mtumiki wa Mulungu; pakuti tamcimwira." 
Daniel9:12 Ndipo anakwaniritsa mau ace adanenawo, kutitsutsa ife ndi oweruza athu otiweruza, ndi kutitengera coipa cacikuru; pakuti pansi pa thambo lonse sipanacitika monga umo panacitikira Yerusalemu." 
Daniel9:13 Monga mulembedwa m'cilamulo ca Mose coipa ici conse catidzera; koma sitinapepeza Yehova Mulungu wathu, ndi kubwera kuleka mphulupulu zathu, ndi kucita mwanzeru m'coonadi canu." 
Daniel9:14 Cifukwa cace Yehova wakhala maso pa coipaco, ndi kutifikitsira ico; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wathu ali wolungama mu nchito zace zonse azicita; ndipo sitinamvera mau ace." 
Daniel9:15 Ndipo tsopano, Ambuye Mulungu wathu, amene munaturutsa anthu anu m'dziko la Aigupto ndi dzanja lamphamvu, ndi kudzitengera mbiri monga lero lino, tacimwa, tacita coipa." 
Daniel9:16 Ambuye, monga mwa cilungamo canu conse, mkwiyo wanu ndi ukali wanu zitembenuketu, zicoke ku mudzi wanu Yerusalemu, phiri lanu lopatulika; pakuti mwa zocimwa zathu, ndi mphulupulu za makolo athu, Yerusalemu ndi anthu anu asanduka cotonza ca onse otizungulira." 
Daniel9:17 Ndipo tsopano, Mulungu wathu, mumvere pemphero la mtumiki wanu, ndi mapembedzero ace, nimuwalitse nkhope yanu pa malo anu opatulika amene ali opasuka, cifukwa ca Ambuye," 
Daniel9:18 Mulungu wanga, cherani khutu, nimumvere, tsegulani maso anu, nimupenye zopasuka zathu, ndi mudzi udachedwawo dzina lanu; pakuti sititula mapembedzero athu pamaso panu, cifukwa ca nchito zathu zolungama, koma cifukwa ca zifundo zanu zocuruka." 
Daniel9:19 Ambu ye, imvani; Ambuye, khululukirani; Ambuye, mverani nimucite; musacedwa, cifukwa ca inu nokha, Mulungu wanga; pakuti mudzi wanu ndi anthu anu anachedwa dzina lanu." 
Daniel9:20 Ndipo pakunena ine, ndi kupemphera, ndi kubvomereza cimo langa, ndi cimo la anthu amtundu wanga Israyeli, ndi kutula cipembedzero canga pamaso pa Yehova Mulungu wanga, cifukwa ca phiri lopatulika la Mulungu wanga;" 
Daniel9:21 inde pakunena ine m'kupemphera, munthu uja Gabrieli, amene ndidamuona m'masomphenya poyamba paja, anauluka mwaliwiro nandikhudza ngati nthawi yakupereka nsembe ya madzulo." 
Daniel9:22 Ndipo anandilangiza ine, ndi kulankhula nane, nati, Danieli iwe, ndaturuka tsopano ine kukuzindikiritsa mwaluntha." 
Daniel9:23 Pakuyamba iwe mapembedzero ako, linaturuka lamulo; ndipo ndadza ine kukufotokozera; pakuti ukondedwa kwambiri; zindikira tsono mau awa, nulingirire masomphenyawo." 
Daniel9:24 Masabata makumi asanu ndi awiri alamulidwira anthu amtundu wako ndi mudzi wako wopatulika, kumariza colakwaco, ndi kutsiriza macimo, ndi kutetezera mphulupulu, ndi kufikitsa cilungamo cosalekeza, ndi kukhomera cizindikilo masomphenya ndi zonenera, ndi kudzoza malo opatulikitsa." 
Daniel9:25 Dziwa tsono, nuzindikire, kuti kuyambira kuturuka lamulo lakukonzanso, ndi kummanga Yerusalemu, kufikira wodzozedwayo, ndiye kalonga, kudzakhala masabata asanu ndi awiri; ndi masabata makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu awiri makwalala ndi chemba zidzamangidwanso, koma mu nthawi za mabvuto." 
Daniel9:26 Ndipo atapita masabata makumi asanu ndi limodzi mphambu awiri wodzozedwayo adzalikhidwa, nadzakhala wopanda kanthu; ndi anthu a kalonga wakudzayo adzaononga mudzi ndi malo opatulika; ndi kutsiriza kwace kudzakhala kwa cigumula, ndi kufikira cimariziro kudzakhala nkhondo; cipasuko calembedweratu." 
Daniel9:27 Ndipo iye adzapangana cipangano colimba ndi ambiri sabata limodzi; ndi pakati pa sabata adzaleketsa nsembe yophera ndi nsembe yaufa; ndi pa phiko la zonyansa padzafika wina wakupasula, kufikira cimariziro colembedweratu, mkwiyo udzatsanulidwa pa wopasulayo." 
Daniel10:1 Caka cacitatu ca Koresi mfumu ya Perisiya, cinabvumbulutsidwa cinthu kwa Danieli, amene anamucha Belitsazara; ndipo cinthuco ncoona, ndico nkhondo yaikuru; ndipo anazindikira cinthuco, nadziwa masomphenyawo." 
Daniel10:2 Masiku aja ine Danieli ndinali kulira masabata atatu amphumphu," 
Daniel10:3 Cakudya cofunika osacidya ine, nyama kapena vinyo zosapita pakamwa panga, osadzola ine konse, mpaka anakwaniridwa masabata atatu amphumphu," 
Daniel10:4 Ndipo tsiku la makumi awiri mphambu anai la mwezi woyamba, pokhala ine m'mphepete mwa mtsinje waukuru, ndiwo Hidikeli," 
Daniel10:5 ndinakweza maso anga, ndinapenya ndi kuona munthu wobvala bafuta, womanga m'cuuno ndi golidi woona wa ku Ufazi;" 
Daniel10:6 thupi lace lomwe linanga berulo, ndi nkhope yace ngati maonekedwe a mphezi, ndi maso ace ngati nyali zamoto, ndi manja ace ndi mapazi ace akunga mkuwa wonyezimira, ndi kumveka kwa mau ace kunanga phokoso la aunyinji." 
Daniel10:7 Ndipo ine Danieli ndekha ndinaona masomphenyawo; pakuti anthu anali nane sanaona masomphenyawo; koma kunawagwera kunjenjemera kwakukuru, nathawa kubisala." 
Daniel10:8 Momwemo ndinatsala ndekha, ndipo ndinaona masomphenya akuruwa, koma wosakhala ndi mphamvu ine; pakuti kukoma kwanga kunasandulika cibvundi mwa ine, wosakhalanso ndi mphamvu ine." 
Daniel10:9 Ndipo ndinamva kunena kwa mau ace, ndipo pamene ndinamva kunena kwa mau ace ndinagwidwa ndi tulo tatikuru pankhope panga, nkhope yanga pansi." 
Daniel10:10 Ndipo taonani, linandikhudza dzanja ndi kundikhalitsa ndi maondo anga, ndi zikhato za manja anga." 
Daniel10:11 Nati kwa ine, Danieli, munthu wokondedwatu iwe, tazindikira mau ndirikunena ndi iwe, nukhale ciriri; pakuti ndatumidwa kwa iwe tsopano. Ndipo pamene adanena mau awa kwa ine ndinaimirira ndi kunjenjemera." 
Daniel10:12 Pamenepo anati kwa ine, Usaope Danieli; pakuti kuyambira tsiku loyamba lija unaika mtima wako kuzindikira ndi kudzicepetsa pamaso pa Mulungu wako, mau ako anamveka; ndipo ndadzera mau ako," 
Daniel10:13 Koma kalonga wa ufumu wa Perisiya ananditsekerezera njira masiku makumi awiri ndi limodzi; ndipo taonani, Mikaeli, wina wa akalonga omveka, anadza kundithandiza; ndipo ndinakhala komweko ndi mafumu a Perisiya." 
Daniel10:14 Ndadzera tsono kukuzindikiritsa codzagwera anthu a mtundu wako masiku otsiriza; pakuti masomphenyawo ndiwo a masiku a m'tsogolo. 
Daniel10:15 Ndipo atanena ndi ine monga mwa mau awa, ndinaweramitsa nkhope yanga pansi ndi kukhala du." 
Daniel10:16 Ndipo taonani, wina wakunga ana a anthu anakhudza milomo yanga; pamenepo ndinatsegula pakamwa panga ndi kunena naye woima popenyana nane, Mbuye wanga, cifukwa ca masomphenyawo zowawa zanga zandibwerera, ndipo ndiribenso mphamvu." 
Daniel10:17 Pakuti mnyamata wa mbuye wanga inu akhoza bwanji kulankhula ndi mbuye wanga inu? pakuti ine tsopano apa mulibenso mphamvu mwa ine, osanditsaliranso mpweya." 
Daniel10:18 Pamenepo anandikhudzanso wina, maonekedwe ace ngati munthu, nandilimbikitsa ine." 
Daniel10:19 Nati, Munthu wokondedwatu iwe, Usaope, mtendere ukhale nawe; limbika, etu limbika. Ndipo pamene ananena ndi ine ndinalimbikitsidwa, ndinati, Anene mbuye wanga; pakuti mwandilimbikitsa." 
Daniel10:20 Pamenepo anati, Kodi udziwa cifukwa coti ndakudzera? ndipo tsopano ndibwerera kulimbana ndi kalonga wa Perisiya; ndipo pomuka ine, taonani, adzadza kalonga wa Helene." 
Daniel10:21 Koma ndidzakufotokozera colembedwa pa lemba la coonadi; ndipo palibe wina wakudzilimbikitsa pamodzi ndi ine, kutsutsana ndi aja, koma Mikaeli kalonga wanu." 
Daniel11:1 Ndipo ine, caka coyamba ca Dariyo Mmedi, ndinauka kumlimbikitsa ndi kumkhazikitsa." 
Daniel11:2 Ndipo tsopano ndikufotokozera coonadi. Taona, adzaukanso mafumu atatu m'Perisiya, ndi yacinai idzakhala yoletnera ndithu yoposa onsewo; ndipo itadzilimbitsa yokha mwa kulemera kwace idzawautsa onse alimbane nao ufumu wa Helene." 
Daniel11:3 Ndipo idzauka mfumu yamphamvu, nidzacita ufumu ndi ulamuliro waukuru, nidzacita monga mwa cifuniro cace." 
Daniel11:4 Ndipo pakuuka iye ufumu wace udzatyoledwa, nudzagawikira ku mphepo zinai za mlengalenga; koma sadzaulandira a mbumba yace akudza m'mbuyo, kapena monga mwa ulamuliro wace anacita ufumu nao; pakuti ufumu wace udzazulidwa, ukhale wa ena, si wa aja ai." 
Daniel11:5 Ndipo mfumu ya kumwela, ndiye wina wa akalonga ace, idzamposa mphamvu, nidzakhala nao ulamuliro; ulamuliro wace ndi ulamuliro waukuru." 
Daniel11:6 Ndipo pakutha zaka adzaphatikizana iwo; ndi mwana wamkazi wa mfumu ya kumwela adzafika kwa mfumu ya kumpoto, kupangana naye zoyenera koma mkaziyo sadzaisunga mphamvu ya dzanja lace; ngakhale mwamunayo sadzaimika, ngakhale dzanja lace; koma mkaziyo adzaperekedwa, pamodzi ndi iwo adadza naye, ndi iye amene anambala, ndi iye amene anamlimbitsa nthawi zija." 
Daniel11:7 Koma apo pophukira mizu yace adzauka wina m'malo mwace, ndiye adzafika kulimbana nalo khamu la nkhondo, nadzalowa m'linga la mfumu ya kumpoto, nadzacita molimbana nao, nadzawalaka;" 
Daniel11:8 ndi milungu yao yomwe, pamodzi ndi akalonga ao, ndi zipangizo zao zofunika za siliva ndi golidi adzazitenga kumka nazo ndende ku Aigupto; ndi zaka zace zidzaposa za mfumu ya kumpoto." 
Daniel11:9 Ndipo adzalowa m'ufumu wa mfumu ya kumwela, koma adzabwera m'dziko lace lace." 
Daniel11:10 Ndi ana ace adzacita nkhondo, nadzamemeza makamu a nkhondo akuru ocuruka, amene adzalowa, nadzasefukira, nadzapita; ndipo adzabwerera, nadzacita nkhondo mpaka linga lace." 
Daniel11:11 Ndi mfumu ya kumwela adzawawidwa mtima, nadzaturuka kulimbana naye, ndiye mfumu ya kumpoto imene idzaonetsa unyinji waukuru; koma unyinjiwo udzaperekedwa m'dzanja lace." 
Daniel11:12 Ndipo ataucotsa unyinjiwo udzakwezeka mtima wace; ndipo adzagwetsa zikwi makumi makumi, koma sadzalakika." 
Daniel11:13 Ndi mfumu ya kumpoto idzabwera, nidzaimika unyinji wa kuposa oyamba aja; nidzafika pa cimariziro ca nthawi, ca zaka, ndi khamu lalikuru la nkhondo ndi cuma cambiri." 
Daniel11:14 Ndipo nthawi zija ambiri adzaukira mfumu ya kumwela, ndi aciwawa mwa anthu a mtundu wako adzadzikuza kukhazikitsa masomphenyawo, koma adzagwa iwo." 
Daniel11:15 Ndi mfumu ya kumpoto idzadza, nidzaunda mtumbira, nidzalanda midzi yamalinga; ndi ankhondo a kumwela sadzalimbika, ngakhale anthu ace osankhika; inde sipadzakhala mphamvu yakulimbika." 
Daniel11:16 Koma iye amene amdzera kulimbana naye adzacita cifuniro cace ca iye mwini; palibe wakulimbika pamaso pace; ndipo adzaima m'dziko lokometsetsalo, ndi m'dzanja mwace mudzakhala cionongeko." 
Daniel11:17 Ndipo adzalimbitsa nkhope yace, kudza ndi mphamvu ya ufumu wace wonse, ndi oongoka mtima pamodzi naye; ndipo adzacita cifuniro cace, nadzampatsa mwana wamkazi wa akazi kumuipitsa; koma mkaziyo sadzalimbika, kapena kubvomerezana naye." 
Daniel11:18 Pambuyo pace adzatembenuzira nkhope yace kuzisumbu, nadzalanda zambiri; koma kalonga wina adzaleketsa kunyoza kwace adanyoza nako; inde adzambwezera yekha kunyoza kwace." 
Daniel11:19 Pamenepo adzatembenuzira nkhope yace ku malinga a dziko lace lace; koma adzakhumudwa, nadzagwa osapezedwanso." 
Daniel11:20 Ndipo m'malo mwace adzauka wina wakupititsa wamsonkho pa ulemerero wa ufumuwo; koma atatha masiku owerengeka adzatyoledwa iye, si mwamkwiyo, kapena kunkhondo ai." 
Daniel11:21 Ndi m'malo mwace adzauka munthu woluluka, amene anthu sanampatsa ulemu wa ufumu, koma adzafika kacetecete, nadzalanda ufumu ndi mau osyasyalika." 
Daniel11:22 Ndipo mwa mayendedwe ace a cigumula adzakokololedwa pamaso pace, nadzatyoledwa, ngakhale kalonga yemwe wa cipangano." 
Daniel11:23 Ndipo atapangana naye adzacita monyenga; pakuti adzakwera, nadzasanduka wamphamvu ndi anthu owerengeka." 
Daniel11:24 Adzafika kacetecete ku minda yokometsetsa ya derali, nadzacita cosacita atate ace, kapena makolo ace; adzawawazira zofunkha, ndi zankhondo, ndi cuma, nadzalingiririra malinga ziwembu zace; adzatero nthawi." 
Daniel11:25 Nadzautsa mphamvu yace ndi mtima wace ayambane ndi mfumu ya kumwela ndi khamu lalikuru la nkhondo; ndi mfumu ya kumwela ndi khamu lalikuru ndi lamphamvu ndithu; koma sadzaimika, popeza adzamlingiririra ziwembu." 
Daniel11:26 Inde iwo akudyako cakudya cace adzamuononga; ndi ankhondo ace adzasefukira, nadzagwaambiri ophedwa." 
Daniel11:27 Ndipo mafumu awa onse awiri mitima yao idzakumbuka kucita zoipa, nadzanena bodza ali pa gome limodzi; koma osapindula nalo; pakuti kutha kwace kudzakhala pa nthawi yoikika." 
Daniel11:28 Ndipo adzabwerera ku dziko lace ndi cuma cambiri; ndi mtima wace udzatsutsana ndi cipangano copatulika, nadzacita cifuniro cace, ndi kubwerera ku dziko lace." 
Daniel11:29 Pa nthawi yoikika adzabwera, nadzalowa kumwela; koma sikudzakhala monga nthawi yoyamba ija, kapena yotsirizayi." 
Daniel11:30 Pakuti zombo za ku Kitimu zidzafika kuyambana naye; cifukwa cace adzatenga nkhawa, nadzabwerera, nadzaipidwa mtima ndi cipangano copatulika, nadzacita cifuniro cace; adzabweranso, nadzasamalira otaya cipangano copatulika." 
Daniel11:31 Ndipo ankhondo adzamuimirira, nadzadetsa malo opatulika ndi linga lace; nadzacotsa nsembe yosalekezayo, nadzaimitsa conyansa copululutsaco." 
Daniel11:32 Ndipo akucitira coipa cipanganoco iye adzawaipsa, ndi kuwasyasyalika; koma anthu akudziwa Mulungu wao adzalimbika mtima, nadzacita mwamphamvu." 
Daniel11:33 Ndipo aphunzitsi a anthu adzalangiza ambiri, koma adzagwa ndi lupanga, ndi lawi lamoto, ndi undende, ndi kufunkhidwa masiku ambiri." 
Daniel11:34 Ndipo pakugwa iwo adzathandizidwa ndi thandizo laling'ono; koma ambiri adzaphatikizana nao ndi mau osyasyalika. 
Daniel11:35 Nadzagwa aphunzitsi ena kuwayesa ndi moto, ndi kuwatsutsa, ndi kuwayeretsa, mpaka nthawi ya citsiriziro; pakuti kukaliko kufikira nthawi yoikika." 
Daniel11:36 Ndipo mfumu idzacita monga mwa cifuniro cace, nidzadzikweza, ndi kudzikuza koposa milungu iri yonse nidzanena zodabwiza pa Mulungu wa milungu, nidzapindula, mpaka udzacitidwa ukaliwo; pakuti cotsimikizika m'mtimaco cidzacitika." 
Daniel11:37 Ndipo sidzasamalira milungu ya makolo ace, kapena coikhumba akazi, kapena kusamalira milungu iri yonse; pakuti idzadzikuza koposa onse." 
Daniel11:38 Koma kumalo kwace idzacitira ulemu mulungu wa malinga; ndi mulungu amene makolo ace sanaudziwa, adzaulemekeza ndi golidi, ndi siliva, ndi miyala ya mtengo wace, ndi zinthu zofunika." 
Daniel11:39 Ndipo adzacita molimbana ndi malinga olimba koposa, pomthandiza mulungu wacilendo; ali yense wombvomereza adzamcurukitsira ulemu, nadzawacititsa ufumu pa ambiri, nadzagawa dziko mwa mtengo wace." 
Daniel11:40 Ndipo nthawi yotsiriza mfumu ya kumwela idzalimbana naye, ndi mfumu ya kumpoto idzamdzera ngati kabvumvulu, ndi magareta, ndi apakavalo, ndi zombo zambiri; nadzalowa m'maiko, nadzasefukira ndi kupitirira." 
Daniel11:41 Adzalowanso m'dziko lokometsetsalo ndi maiko ambiri adzapasuka; koma opulumuka dzanja lace ndi awa: Edomu, ndi Moabu, ndi oyamba a ana a Amoni." 
Daniel11:42 Adzatambalitsiranso dzanja lace kumaiko; dziko la Aigupto lomwe silidzapulumuka. 
Daniel11:43 Ndipo adzacita mwamphamvu ndi cuma ca golidi, ndi siliva, ndi zinthu zofunika zonse za Aigupto; Alubi ndi Akusi adzatsata mapazi ace." 
Daniel11:44 Koma mbiri yocokera kum'mawa ndi kumpoto idzambvuta; nadzaturuka iye ndi ukali waukuru kupha ndi kuononga konse ambiri. 
Daniel11:45 Ndipo adzamanga mahema a nyumba yacifumu yace pakati pa nyanja yamcere ndi phiri lopatulika lofunika; koma adzafikira cimariziro cace wopanda wina wakumthandiza. 
Daniel12:1 Ndipo nthawi yomweyi adzauka Mikaeli kalonga wamkuru wakutumikira ana a anthu amtundu wako; ndipo padzakhala nthawi ya masautso, siinakhala yotere kuyambira mtundu wa anthu kufikira nthawi yomwe ija; ndipo nthawi, yomweyo anthu ako adzapulumutsidwa, yense amene ampeza wolembedwa m'buku." 
Daniel12:2 Ndipo ambiri, a iwo ogona m'pfumbi lapansi adzauka, ena kumka ku moyo wosatha, ndi ena ku manyazi ndi mnyozo wosatha." 
Daniel12:3 Ndipo aphunzitsi adzawala ngati kunyezimira kwa thambo; ndi iwo otembenuza ambiri atsate cilungamo ngati nyenyezi ku nthawi za nthawi. 
Daniel12:4 Koma iwe Danieli, tsekera mau awa, nukomere cizindikilo buku, mpaka nthawi ya cimariziro; ambiri adzathamanga cauko ndi cauko, ndi cidziwitso cidzacuruka." 
Daniel12:5 Pamenepo ine Danieli ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, anaimapo awiri ena, wina m'mphepete mwa mtsinje tsidya lino, ndi mnzace m'mphepete mwa mtsinje tsidya lija." 
Daniel12:6 Ndipo wina anati kwa munthu wobvala bafuta, wokhala pamwamba pa madzi a mumtsinje, Cimariziro ca zodabwiza izi cidzafika liti?" 
Daniel12:7 Ndipo ndinamva munthuyo wobvala bafuta wokhala pamwamba pa madzi a mumtsinje, nakweza dzanja lace lamanja ndi lamanzere kumwamba, nalumbira pali Iye wokhala ndi moyo kosatha, kuti zidzacitika nthawi, ndi nthawi zina, ndi nusu; ndipo atatha kumwaza mphamvu ya anthu opatulikawo zidzatha izi zonse." 
Daniel12:8 Ndinacimva ici, koma osacizindikira; pamenepo ndinati Mbuye wanga, citsiriziro ca izi nciani?" 
Daniel12:9 Ndipo anati, Pita Danieli; pakuti mauwo atsekedwa, nakomeredwa cizindikilo mpaka nthawi ya citsiriziro." 
Daniel12:10 Ambiri adzadzitsuka ndi kudziyeretsa, nadzayesedwa ndi moto; koma oipa adzacita moipa; ndipo palibe mmodzi wa oipa adzazindikira; koma aphunzitsi ndiwo adzazindikira." 
Daniel12:11 Ndipo kuyambira nthawi yoti idzacotsedwa nsembe yacikhalire, nicidzaimika conyansa cakupululutsa, adzakhalanso masiku cikwi cimodzi mphambu mazana awiri kudza makumi asanu ndi anai." 
Daniel12:12 Wodala iye amene ayembekeza, nafikira ku masiku cikwi cimodzi mphambu mazana atatu kudza makumi atatu ndi asanu." 
Daniel12:13 Koma iwe, muka mpaka cimariziro; pakuti udzapumula, nudzaima m'gawo lako masiku otsiriza." 
Hosea1:1 MAU a Yehova amene anadza kwa Hoseya mwana wa Beeri masiku a Uziya, Yotamu, Ahazi, ndi Hezekiya, mafumu a Yuda, ndi masiku a Yerobiamu mwana wa Yoasi mfumu ya Israyeli." 
Hosea1:2 Ciyambi ca kunena kwa Yehova mwa Hoseya, Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Hoseya, Muka, udzitengere mkazi wacigololo ndi ana acigololo; pakuti dziko latsata cigololo cokha cokha kuleka kutsata Yehova." 
Hosea1:3 Ndipo anamuka natenga Gomeri mwana wamkazi wa Diblaimu; iye naima, nambalira mwana wamwamuna." 
Hosea1:4 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye, Umuche dzina lace Yezreeli; pakuti katsala kanthawi, ndipo ndidzabwezera cilango mwazi wa Yezreeli pa nyumba ya Yehu, ndi kuleketsa ufumu wa nyumba ya Israyeli." 
Hosea1:5 Ndipo kudzacitika tsiku lomwelo, ndidzatyola uta wa Israyeli m'cigwa ca Yezreeli." 
Hosea1:6 Ndipo anaimanso, nabala mwana wamkazi. Ndipo Yehova anati kwa iye, Umuche dzina lace Wosacitidwacifundo; pakuti sindidzacitiranso cifundo nyumba ya Israyeli, kuti ndiwakhululukire konse." 
Hosea1:7 Koma ndidzacitira cifundo nyumba ya Yuda, ndi kuwapulumutsa mwa Ine Yehova Mulungu wao, osawapulumutsa ndi uta, kapena lupanga, kapena nkhondo ndi akavalo, kapena apakavalo." 
Hosea1:8 Ataleka tsono kuyamwitsa Wosacitidwa cifundo, anaima, nabala mwana wamwamuna." 
Hosea1:9 Ndipo Yehova anati, Umuche dzina lace Si-anthuanga; pakuti inu sindinu anthu anga, ndipo Ine sindine wanu." 
Hosea1:10 Angakhale anatero, kuwerenga kwace kwa ana a Israyeli kudzanga mcenga wa kunyanja, wosayeseka kapena kuwerengeka; ndipo kudzatero kuti m'mene adawanena, Simuli anthu anga, adzanena nao, Muli ana a Mulungu wamoyo." 
Hosea1:11 Ndipo ana a Yuda ndi ana a Israyeli adzasonkhanidwa pamodzi, nadzadziikira mkuru mmodzi, nadzakwera kucoka m'dziko; pakuti tsiku la Yezreeli ndi lalikuru." 
Hosea2:1 Nenani kwa abale anu, Anthu anga, ndi kwa alongo anu, Wocitidwa-cifundo." 
Hosea2:2 Mutsutsane naye mai wanu, mutsutsane naye; pakuti sali mkazi wanga, ndi Ine sindiri mwamuna wace; ndipo acotse zadama zace pankhope pace, ndi zigololo zace pakati pa maere ace;" 
Hosea2:3 ndingambvule wamarisece, ndi kumuika ngati tsiku lija anabadwalo, ndi kumsanduliza ngati cipululu, ndi kumuika ngati dziko louma, ndi kumupha nalo ludzu;" 
Hosea2:4 ndipo ana ace sindidzawacitira cifundo; pakuti iwo ndiwo ana acigololo. 
Hosea2:5 Pakuti mai wao anacita cigololo; iye amene anali ndi pakati pa iwo anacita camanyazi; pakuti anati, Ndidzatsata ondikondawo, akundipatsa ine cakudya canga, ndi madzi anga, ubweya wanga, ndi thonje langa, mafuta anga, ndi cakumwa canga." 
Hosea2:6 Cifukwa cace taonani, ndidzacinga njira yako ndi minga, ndipo ndidzammangira mpanda, kuti asapeze mabande ace." 
Hosea2:7 Ndipo adzatsata omkonda koma osawakumika, adzawafunafuna koma osawapeza; pamenepo adzati, Ndidzamuka ndi kubwererana ndi mwamuna wanga woyamba, popeza pamenepo panandikomera koposa tsopano." 
Hosea2:8 Pakuti sanadziwa kuti ndine ndinampatsa tirigu, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta, ndi kumcurukitsira siliva ndi golidi, zimene anapanga nazo Baala." 
Hosea2:9 Cifukwa cace ndidzabwera ndi kucotsa tirigu wanga m'nyengo yace, ndi vinyo wanga m'nthawi yace yoikika, ndi kukwatula ubweya wanga ndi thonje langi, zimene zikadapfunda umarisece wace." 
Hosea2:10 Ndipo tsopano ndidzaonetsa manyazi ace pamaso pa omkonda, popandanso wakumlanditsa m'dzanja langa." 
Hosea2:11 Ndidzaleketsanso kusekerera kwace konse, madyerero ace, pokhala mwezi pace, ndi masabata ace, ndi masonkhano ace onse oikika." 
Hosea2:12 Ndipo ndidzapasula mipesa yace ndi mikuyu yace, imene adanena, Iyi ndi mphotho yanga anandipatsa ondikondawo; ndipo ndidzaisandutsa thengo, ndi nyama zakuthengo zidzaidya." 
Hosea2:13 Ndipo ndidzamlanga cifukwa ca masiku a Abaala amene anawafukizira, nabvala mphete za m'mphuno, ndi zokometsera zace, natsata omkonda, nandiiwala Ine, ati Yehova." 
Hosea2:14 Cifukwa cace taonani, ndidzamkopa ndi kumka naye kucipululu, ndi kulankhula naye momkonda mtima." 
Hosea2:15 Ndipo ndidzampatsa minda yace yamphesa kuyambira pomwepo, ndi cigwa ca Akori cikhale khomo la ciyembekezo; ndipo adzabvomereza pomwepo monga masiku a ubwana wace, ndi monga tsiku lokwera iye kuturuka m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Hosea2:16 Ndipo kudzakhala tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova, udzandicha Mwamuna wanga, osandichanso Baala wanga." 
Hosea2:17 Pakuti ndidzacotsa maina a Abaala m'kamwa mwace; ndipo silidzakumbukikanso dzina lao. 
Hosea2:18 Ndipo tsiku lomwelo ndidzawacitira pangano ndi nyama za kuthengo, ndi mbalame za mlengalenga, ndi zokwawa pansi; ndipo ndidzatyola uta, ndi lupanga, ndi nkhondo, zicoke m'dziko, ndi kuwagonetsa pansi mosatekeseka." 
Hosea2:19 Ndipo ndidzakutomera ukhale wanga kosatha, inde ndidzakutomera ukhale wanga m'cilungamo, ndi m'ciweruzo, ndi m'ukoma mtima, ndi m'cifundo." 
Hosea2:20 Ndidzakutomeranso ukhale wanga mokhulupirika, ndipo udzadziwa Yehova." 
Hosea2:21 Ndipo kudzacitika tsiku lomwelo, ndidzabvomereza, ati Yehova, ndidzabvomereza thambo, ndi ilo lidzabvomereza dziko lapansi;" 
Hosea2:22 ndi dziko lapansi lidzabvomereza tirigu, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta; ndi izi zidzabvomereza Yezreeli." 
Hosea2:23 Ndipo ndidzadzibzalira iye m'nthaka, ndipo ndidzacitira cifundo Wosacitidwa-cifundo; ndipo ndidzati kwa Si-anthu-anga, Muli anthu anga; ndipo iwo adzati, Ndinu Mulungu wathu." 
Hosea3:1 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Mukanso, konda mkazi wokondedwa ndi bwenzi lace, koma wakucita cigololo monga Yehova akonda ana a Israyeli, angakhale atembenukira ku milungu yina, nakonda ncinci za mphesa zouma." 
Hosea3:2 M'mwemo ndinadzigulira iye ndi ndalama khumi ndi zisanu zasiliva, ndi homeri ndi nusu wa barele;" 
Hosea3:3 ndipo ndinati kwa iye, Uzikhala ndi ine masiku ambiri, usacita cigololo, usakhala mkazi wa mwamuna ali yense; momwemo inenso nawe." 
Hosea3:4 Pakuti ana Israyeli adzakhala masiku ambiri a opanda mfumu, ndi opanda kalonga, ndi opanda nsembe, ndi opanda coimiritsa, ndi opanda efodi kapena aterafi;" 
Hosea3:5 atatero ana a Israyeli adzabwera, nadzafuna Yehova Mulungu wao, ndi Davide mfumu yao, nadzafika ndi mantha kwa Yehova, ndi ku ukoma wace masiku otsiriza." 
Hosea4:1 Imvani mau a Yehova, inu ana a Israyeli; pakuti Yehova ali ndi mlandu ndi okhala m'dziko, popeza palibe coonadi, kapena cifundo, kapena kudziwa Mulungu m'dziko." 
Hosea4:2 Koma kulumbira, ndi kunama, ndi kupha, ndi kuba, ndi kucita cigololo; aboola, ndi mwazi ukhudzana nao mwazi." 
Hosea4:3 Cifukwa cace dziko lidzacita cisoni, ndi ali yense wokhalamo adzalefuka, pamodzi ndi nyama za kuthengo, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga; ndi nsomba za m'nyanja zomwe zidzacotsedwa." 
Hosea4:4 Koma munthu asatsutsane ndi mnzace, kapena kudzudzula mnzace; popeza anthu ako ndiwo akunga otsutsana ndi wansembe." 
Hosea4:5 Ndipo udzakhumudwa usana, ndi mneneri yemwe adzakhumudwa pamodzi ndi iwe usiku; ndipo ndidzaononga mai wako." 
Hosea4:6 Anthu anga aonongeka cifukwa ca kusadziwa; popeza unakana kudziwa, Inenso ndikukaniza, kuti usakhale wansembe wanga; popeza waiwala cilamulo ca Mulungu wako, Inenso ndidzaiwala ana ako." 
Hosea4:7 Monga anacuruka, momwemo anandicimwira; ndidzasanduliza ulemerero wao ukhale manyazi." 
Hosea4:8 Adyerera cimo la anthu anga, nakhumbira cosalungama cao, yense ndi mtima wace." 
Hosea4:9 Ndipo kudzakhala monga anthu, momwemo wansembe; ndipo ndidzawalanga cifukwa canjira zao, ndi kuwabwezera macitidwe ao." 
Hosea4:10 Ndipo adzadya, koma osakhuta; adzacita cigololo, koma osacuruka; pakuti waleka kusamalira Yehova." 
Hosea4:11 Cigololo, ndi vinyo, ndi vinyo watsopano, zicotsa mtima," 
Hosea4:12 Anthu anga afunsira ku mtengo wao, ndi ndodo yao iwafotokozera; pakuti mzimu wacigololo wawalakwitsa, ndipo acita cigololo kucokera Mulungu wao." 
Hosea4:13 Pamwamba pa mapiri aphera nsembe, nafukiza pazitunda, patsinde pa thundu, ndi miniali, ndi mkundi; popeza mthunzi wace ndi wabwino, cifukwa cace ana anu akazi acita citole, ndi apongozi anu acita cigololo." 
Hosea4:14 Sindidzalanga ana anu akazi pocita citole iwo, kapena apongozi anu pocita cigololo iwo; pakuti iwo okha apambukira padera ndi akazi acitole, naphera nsembe pamodzi ndi akazi operekedwa kucitole; ndi anthu osazindikirawo adzagwetsedwa camutu." 
Hosea4:15 Cinkana iwe, Israyeli, ucita citole, koma asaparamule Yuda; ndipo musafika inu ku Giligala, kapena kukwera ku Betaveni, kapena kulumbira, Pali Yehova." 
Hosea4:16 Pakuti Israyeli wacita kuuma khosi ngati ng'ombe yaikazi yaing'ono youma khosi; tsopano Yehova adzawadyetsa ngati mwana wa nkhosa ku thengo lalikuru. 
Hosea4:17 Efraimu waphatikana ndi mafano, mlekeni." 
Hosea4:18 Cakumwa cao casasa, acita citole kosalekeza; akuru ao akonda manyazi kwambiri." 
Hosea4:19 Mphepo yamkulunga m'mapiko ace, ndipo adzacita manyazi cifukwa ca nsembe zao." 
Hosea5:1 Imvani ici, ansembe inu; mverani, inu nyumba ya Israyeli; cherani khutu, inu nyumba ya mfumu; pakuti ciweruzoci cinena inu; pakuti munakhala msampha ku Mizipa, ndi ukonde woyalidwa pa Tabora." 
Hosea5:2 Ndipo opandukawo analowadi m'zobvunda; koma Ine ndine wakuwadzudzula onsewo. 
Hosea5:3 Ndimdziwa Efraimu, ndi Israyeli sandibisikira; pakuti Efraimu iwe, wacita citole tsopano, Israyeli wadetsedwa." 
Hosea5:4 Macitidwe ao sawalola kubwerera kwa Mulungu wao; pakuti mzimu wacitole uli m'kati mwao, ndipo sadziwa Yehova." 
Hosea5:5 Ndipo kudzikuza kwa Israyeli kudzamcitira umboni pamaso pace; cifukwa cace Israyeli ndi Efraimu adzakhumudwa m'mphulupulu mwao; Yudanso adzakhumudwa pamodzi nao. 
Hosea5:6 Adzamuka ndi zoweta zao zazing'ono ndi zazikuru kufunafuna Yehova: koma sadzampeza; Iye wadzibweza kuwacokera. 
Hosea5:7 Anacita mosakhulupirika pa Yehova, pakuti anabala ana acilendo; mwezi wokhala udzawatha tsopano, pamodzi ndi maiko ao." 
Hosea5:8 Ombani mphalasa m'Gibeya, ndi lipenga m'Rama; pfuulani ku Betaveni; pambuyo pako, Benjamini." 
Hosea5:9 Efraimu adzasanduka bwinja tsiku lakudzudzula; mwa mapfuko a Israyeli ndadziwitsa codzacitikadi. 
Hosea5:10 Akalonga a Yuda akunga anthu osuntha malire; ndidzawatsanulira mkwiyo wanga ngati madzi. 
Hosea5:11 Efraimu azunzika, apsinjika pa mlanduwo; pakuti anafuna mwini wace kutsata lamulolo." 
Hosea5:12 Ndipo ndikhala kwa Efraimu ngati njenjete, ndi kwa nyumba ya Yuda ngati cibvundi." 
Hosea5:13 Pamene Efraimu anaona nthenda yace, ndi Yuda bala lace, Efraimu anamuka kwa Asuri, natumiza kwa mfumu Yarebu; koma iye sakhoza kukuciritsani, kapena kupoletsa bala lanu." 
Hosea5:14 Pakuti ndidzakhala kwa Efraimu ngati mkango, ndi kwa nyumba ya Yuda ngati msona wa mkango; ndidzamwetula Ine ndi kucoka; ndidzanyamula, ndipo palibe wakulanditsa." 
Hosea5:15 Ndidzamuka ndi kubwerera kumka kumalo kwanga, mpaka adzabvomereza kuparamula kwao, nafunafuna nkhope yanga; m'msauko mwao adzandifunafuna mwacangu." 
Hosea6:1 Tiyeni, tibwerere kunka kwa Yehova; pakuti wang'amba, nadzatipoletsera; wakantha, nadzatimanga." 
Hosea6:2 Atapita masiku awiri adzatitsitsimutsa, tsiku lacitatu adzatiutsa; ndipo tidzakhala ndi moyo pamaso pace." 
Hosea6:3 Tidziwe tsono, tilondole kudziwa Yehova; kuturuka kwace kwakonzekeratu ngati matanda kuca; ndipo adzatidzera ngati mvula, ngati mvula ya masika yakuthirira dziko." 
Hosea6:4 Efraimu iwe, ndidzakucitira ciani? Yuda iwe, ndikucitire ciani? pakuti kukoma mtima kwako kukunga mtambo wam'mawa ndi ngati mame akuphawa mamawa." 
Hosea6:5 Cifukwa cace ndawalikha mwa aneneri; ndawapha ndi mau a pakamwa panga; ndi maweruzo anga aturuka ngati kuunika. 
Hosea6:6 Pakuti ndikondwera naco cifundo, si nsembe ai; ndi kumdziwa Mulungu koposa nsembe zopsereza." 
Hosea6:7 Koma iwo analakwira cipangano ngati Adamu, m'mene anandicitira monyenga." 
Hosea6:8 Gileadi ndiwo mudzi wa ocita zoipa, wa mapazi a mwazi." 
Hosea6:9 Ndipo monga magulu a mbala alalira munthu, momwemo msonkhano wa ansembe amapha pa njira ya ku Sekemu; indedi acita coipitsitsa." 
Hosea6:10 M'nyumba ya Israyeli ndinaona cinthu coopsetsa; pamenepo pali citole ca Efraimu; Israyeli wadetsedwa. 
Hosea6:11 Akuikidwiratunso nyengo yakukolola, Yuda iwe, pamene ndikabwezanso undende wa anthu anga." 
Hosea7:1 M'mene ndiciritsa Israyeli, mphulupulu ya Efraimu ibvumbuluka, ndi zoipa za Samariya; pakuti acita bodza, ndipo mkhungu alowa m'nyumba, ndi gulu la mbala manca kubwalo." 
Hosea7:2 Ndipo sanena m'mtima mwao kuti Ine ndikumbukila zoipa zao zonse; tsopano macitidwe ao awazinga; ali pamaso panga," 
Hosea7:3 Akondweretsa mfumu ndi zoipa zao, ndi akalonga ndi mabodza ao." 
Hosea7:4 Acigololo onsewo; akunga ng'anjo anaitenthetsa wooca mkate; aleka kusonkha moto, poyambira kukanda mtanda kufikira watupa mtandawo." 
Hosea7:5 Tsiku la mfumu yathu akalonga adzidwalitsa ndi kutentha kwa vinyo; iye anatambasula dzanja lace pamodzi ndi oseka. 
Hosea7:6 Pakuti asendera nao mtima wao wakunga ng'anjo ya mkate, pokhala alikulalira; wooca mkate wao agona usiku wonse, m'mawa iyaka ngati moto wa malawi." 
Hosea7:7 Onsewo atentha ngati ng'anjo, natha oweruza ao, agwa mafumu ao onse; palibe mmodzi mwa iwo wakuitana Ine." 
Hosea7:8 Efraimu asokonezana nayo mitundu ya anthu; Efraimu ndiye kamtanda ka mkate kosatembenuzidwa. 
Hosea7:9 Alendo anatha mphamvu yace osacidziwaiye; imvi zomwe zampakiza osacidziwa iye," 
Hosea7:10 Ndipo kudzikuza kwa Israyeli kumcitira umboni pamaso pace; koma sanabwerera kumka kwa Yehova Mulungu wao, kapena kumfunafuna mwa ici conse." 
Hosea7:11 Ndipo Efraimu ali ngati nkhunda yopusa yopanda nzeru; aitanira kwa Aigupto, amuka kwa Asuri." 
Hosea7:12 Pamene amuka ndidzawayalira ukonde wanga, ndidzawagwetsa ngati mbalame za m'mlengalenga, ndidzawalanga monga udamva msonkhano wao." 
Hosea7:13 Tsoka kwa iwowa! pakuti anandizembera; cionongeko kwa iwowa! pakuti anandilakwira; ndikadawalanditsa Ine, koma anandinenera zabodza." 
Hosea7:14 Ndipo sanapfuulira kwa Ine ndi mtima wao, koma alira pakama pao, asonkhanira tirigu ndi vinyo, apikisana ndi Ine." 
Hosea7:15 Cinkana ndawalangiza ndi kulimbitsa manja ao, andilingiririra coipa," 
Hosea7:16 Abwerera, koma si kwa Wam'mwambayo; akunga uta wosakhulupirika; akalonga ao adzagwa ndi lupanga mwa cipongwe ca lilime lao; ici ndico adzawasekera m'dziko la Aigupto." 
Hosea8:1 Lipenga kukamwa kwako, Akudza ngati ciombankhanga, kulim bana ndi nyumba ya Yehova; cifukwa analakwira cipangano canga, napikisana naco cilamulo canga." 
Hosea8:2 Adzapfuulira kwa Ine, Mulungu wanga, ife Aisrayeli tikudziwani." 
Hosea8:3 Israyeli wacitaya cokoma, mdani adzamlondola." 
Hosea8:4 Analonga mafumu, koma sikunacokera kwa Ine; anaika akalonga, koma sindinadziwa; anadzipangira mafano a siliva wao ndi golidi wao, kuti akalikhidwe." 
Hosea8:5 Mwana wa ng'ombe wako wakutaya, Samariya iwe; mkwiyo wanga wayakira iwo; adzalephera kuyera mtima mpaka liti?" 
Hosea8:6 Pakuti ici comwe cafumira kwa Israyeli; mmisiri wampanga, koma sali Mulungu; inde mwana wa ng'ombe wa Samariya adzaphwanyika-phwanyika." 
Hosea8:7 Pakuti abzala mphepo, nadzakolola kabvumvulu; alibe tirigu wosasenga; ngala siidzaturutsa ufa; cinkana iuturutsa, alendo adzaumeza." 
Hosea8:8 Israyeli wamezedwa; tsopano ali mwa amitundu ngati cotengera coti munthu sakondwera naco. 
Hosea8:9 Pakuti anakwera kumka ku Asuri, ngati mbidzi ya pa yokha mwini wace; Efraimu walembera omkonda ngati anchito." 
Hosea8:10 Inde angakhale alembera mwa amitundu ndidzawasonkhanitsa tsopano; ndipo ayamba kucepa cifukwa ca katundu wa mfumu ya akalonga. 
Hosea8:11 Popeza Efraimu anacurukitsa maguwa a nsembe akucimwako, maguwa a nsembe omwewo anamcimwitsa." 
Hosea8:12 Ndinamlembera zinthu zambirimbirizo za cilamulo canga, koma zinayesedwa ngati cinthu cacilendo." 
Hosea8:13 Kunena za nsembe za zopereka zanga, aphera nsembe yanyama, naidya; koma Yehova sazilandira; tsopano adzakumbukila mphulupulu yao, nadzalanga zocimwa zao; adzabwerera kumka ku Aigupto." 
Hosea8:14 Pakuti Israyeli waiwala Mlengi wace, namanga akacisit ndipo Yuda wacurukitsa midzi yamalinga; koma ndidzatumizira midzi yace moto, nudzatha nyumba zace zazikuru." 
Hosea9:1 Usakondwera, Israyeli, ndi kusekerera, ngati mitundu ya anthu; pakuti wacita cigololo kuleka Mulungu wako, wakonda mphotho ya cigololo pa dwale la tirigu liri lonse." 
Hosea9:2 Dwale ndi coponderamo mphesa sizidzawadyetsa, vinyo watsopano adzamsowa." 
Hosea9:3 Sadzakhala m'dziko la Yehova; koma Efraimu adza bwerera kumka ku Aigupto; ndipo adzadya cakudya codetsa m'Asuri. 
Hosea9:4 Sadzatsanulira Yehova nsembe zavinyo; sizidzamkomera Iye nsembe zao; zidzakhala kwa iwo ngati mkate wa acisoni; onse akudyako adzadetsedwa; pakuti mkate wao udzakhala wa njala yao, uwu sudzalowa m'nyumbaya Yehova." 
Hosea9:5 Mudzacitanji tsiku la masonkhano oikika, ndi tsiku la madyerero a Yehova?" 
Hosea9:6 Pakuti taonani, anacokera cionongeko, koma Aigupto adzawasonkhanitsa, Mofi adzawaika m'manda; khwisa adzalanda zofunika zao zasiliva; minga idzakhala m'mahema mwao." 
Hosea9:7 Masiku a kulanga afika, masiku a kubwezera afika; Israyeli adzadziwa; mneneri ali wopusa, munthu wamzimu ali wamisala, cifukwa ca kucuruka mphulupulu yako, ndi popeza udani ndi waukuru." 
Hosea9:8 Efraimu ndiye wozonda kwa Mulungu wanga; kunena za mneneri, msampha wa msodzi uli m'njira zace zonse, ndi udani m'nyumba ya Mulungu wace." 
Hosea9:9 Anadzibvunditsa kwambiri, monga masiku a Gibeya; adzakumbukila mphulupulu yao, adzalanga zocimwa zao." 
Hosea9:10 Ndinapeza Israyeli ngati mphesa m'cipululu, ndinaona makolo anu ngati cipatso coyamba ca mkuyu nyengo yace yoyamba; koma anadza kwa Baala Peori, nadzipatulira conyansaco, nasandulika onyansa, conga cija anacikonda." 
Hosea9:11 Kunena za Efraimu, ulemerero wao udzauluka ndi kucoka ngati mbalame; sipadzakhala kubala, ndi kukhala ndi pakati, ndi kuima." 
Hosea9:12 Angakhale alera ana ao, koma ndidzawasowetsa, wosatsala munthu; ndithunso tsoka iwowa, pamene ndiwacokera." 
Hosea9:13 Efraimu, monga ndaona, akunga Turo, wookedwa pokoma; koma Efraimu adzaturutsira ana ace wakuwaphera." 
Hosea9:14 Apatseni, Yehova; mudzapatsa ciani? muwapatse mimba yotayataya, ndi mawere ouma." 
Hosea9:15 Coipa cao conse ciri m'Giligala; pakutipamenepo ndinawada, cifukwa ca kuipa kwa macitidwe ao ndidzawainga kuwacotsa m'nyumba mwanga; sindidzawakondanso; akalonga ao onse ndiwo opanduka." 
Hosea9:16 Efraimu wakanthidwa, muzu wao wauma, iwo sadzabala zipatso; inde ngakhale abala, koma ndidzapha zipatso zofunika za mimba yao." 
Hosea9:17 Mulungu wanga adzawataya, pakuti sanammvera Iye; ndipo adzakhala othawathawa mwa amitundu." 
Hosea10:1 Israyeli ndi mpesa wotambalala, wodzibalira wokha zipatso; monga umo zinacurukira zipatso zace, momwemo anacurukitsa maguwa a nsembe ace; monga mwa kukoma kwace kwa dziko lace anapanga zoimiritsa zokoma." 
Hosea10:2 Mtima wao wagawikana, tsopano adzapezeka oparamula, adzapasula maguwa ao a nsembe, nadzaononga zoimiritsa zao." 
Hosea10:3 Pakuti tsopano adzati, Tiribe mfumu, popeza sitiopa Yehova; ndi mfumu idzaticitira ciani?" 
Hosea10:4 Anena mau akulumbira monama, pakucita mapangano momwemo; ciweruzo ciphuka ngati zitsamba zowawa m'micera ya munda." 
Hosea10:5 Okhala m'Samariya adzaopera cifanizo ca ana a ng'ombe a ku Betaveni; pakuti anthu ace adzamva naco cisoni, ndi ansembe ace amene anakondwera naco, cifukwa ca ulemerero wace, popeza unacicokera." 
Hosea10:6 Adzacitengeranso ku Asuri cikhale mphatso ya kwa mfumu Yarebu; Efraimu adzatenga manyazi, ndi Israyeli adzacita manyazi ndi uphungu wace." 
Hosea10:7 Ndipo Samariya, mfumu yace yamwelera ngati thobvu pamadzi." 
Hosea10:8 Ndipo misanje ya Aveni, ndiyo cimo la Israyeli, idzaonongeka; minga ndi mitungwi idzamera pa maguwa ao a nsembe; ndipo adzati kwa mapiri, Tiphimbeni; ndi kwa zitunda, Tigwereni." 
Hosea10:9 Israyeli, wacimwa kuyambira masiku a Gibeya; pomwepo anaimabe; nkhondo ya pa ana a cosalungama siinawapeza ku Gibeya." 
Hosea10:10 Pamene ndifuna ndidzawalanga, ndi mitundu ya anthu idzawasonkhanira pomangidwa iwo pa zolakwa zao ziwiri." 
Hosea10:11 Ndipo Efraimu ndiye ng'ombe yaikazi yaing'ono, yozereweredwa, yokonda kupuntha tirigu; koma ndapita pa khosi lace lokoma; ndidzamsenzetsa Efraimu goli; Yuda adzalima, Yakobo adzaphwanya cibuluma cace." 
Hosea10:12 Mudzibzalire m'cilungamo mukolole monga mwa cifundo; limani masala anu, pakuti yafika nthawi ya kufuna Yehova, mpaka afika Iye, nabvumbitsira inu cilungamo." 
Hosea10:13 Mwalima coipa, mwakolola cosalungama, mwadya zipatso za mabodza; pakati watama njira yako ndi kucuruka kwa anthu ako amphamvu." 
Hosea10:14 Momwemo phokoso lidzaukira anthu ako, ndi malinga ako onse adzapasuka, monga Salimani anapasula Betaribeli; tsiku la nkhondo amai anaphwanyika pamodzi ndi ana ace." 
Hosea10:15 Momwemo adzakucitirani Betele, cifukwa ca coipa canu cacikuru; mbanda kuca mfumu ya Israyeli idzalikhika konse." 
Hosea11:1 Pamene Israyeli anali mwana, ndinamkonda, ndinaitana mwana wanga ali m'Aigupto." 
Hosea11:2 Monga anawaitana, momwemo anawacokera; anaphera nsembe Abaala, nafukizira mafano osema." 
Hosea11:3 Koma Ine ndinaphunzitsa Efraimu kuyenda, ndinawafungata m'manja mwanga; koma sanadziwa kuti ndinawaciritsa." 
Hosea11:4 Ndinawakoka ndi zingwe za munthu, ndi zomangira za cikondi; ndinakhala nao ngati iwo akukweza goli pampuno pao, ndipo ndinawaikira cakudya." 
Hosea11:5 Iye sadzabwerera kumka ku dziko la Aigupto, koma Asuri adzakhala mfumu yace, popeza anakana kubwera." 
Hosea11:6 Ndi lupanga lidzagwera midzi yace, lidzatha mipiringidzo yace, ndi kuononga cifukwa ca uphungu wao." 
Hosea11:7 Ndipo anthu anga alimbika kubwerera m'mbuyo kundileka Ine; cinkana akawaitana atsate Iye ali m'mwamba, sadzakweza ndi mmodzi yense." 
Hosea11:8 Ndidzakusiya bwanji, Efraimu? ndidzakupereka bwanji, Israyeli? ndidzakuyesa bwanji ngati Adima? ndidzakuika bwanji ngati Zeboimu? mtima wanga watembenuka m'kati mwanga, zacifundo zanga zilira zonse pamodzi." 
Hosea11:9 Sindidzacita mkwiyo wanga waukali, sindidzabwerera kuononga Efraimu; pakuti Ine ndine Mulungu, si munthu ai; Woyera wa pakati pako; ndipo sindidzalowa m'mudzi." 
Hosea11:10 Adzatsata Yehova, Iye adzabangula ngati mkango; pamene abangula, ana adzafika ndi kunjenjemera kucokera kumadzulo." 
Hosea11:11 Adzafika ndi kunjenjemera ngati mbalame ya ku Aigupto, ndi ngati nkhunda m'dziko la Asuri; ndipo ndidzawakhalitsa m'nyumba zao, ati Yehova." 
Hosea11:12 Efraimu andizinga ndi bodza, ndi nyumba ya Israyeli ndi cinyengo, ndi Yuda apikisana ndi Mulungu, ndiye Woyera wokhulupirika." 
Hosea12:1 Efraimu akudya mphepo, natsata mphepo ya kum'mawa; tsiku lonse acurukitsa mabodza ndi cipasuko, ndipo acita pangano ndi Asuri, natenga mafuta kumka nao ku Aigupto," 
Hosea12:2 Ndipo Yehova ali ndi mlandu ndi Yuda, nadzalanga Yakobo monga mwa njira zace, adzambwezera monga mwa macitidwe ace." 
Hosea12:3 M'mimba anagwira ku citende ca mkuru wace, ndipo atakula mphamvu analimbana ndi Mulungu;" 
Hosea12:4 inde, analimbana ndi wamthenga nampambana; analira, nampembedza Iye; anampeza Iye ku Beteli, ndi kumeneko Iye analankhula ndi ife;" 
Hosea12:5 ndiye Yehova Mulungu wa makamu, cikumbukilo cace ndi Yehova." 
Hosea12:6 M'mwemo utembenukire kwa Mulungu wako, sunga cifundo ndi ciweruzo, nuyembekezere Mulungu wako kosalekeza." 
Hosea12:7 Ndiye Mkanani, m'dzanja lace muli miyeso yonyenga, akonda kusautsa." 
Hosea12:8 Ndipo Efraimu anati, Zedi ndasanduka wolemera, ndadzionera cuma m'nchito zonse ndinazigwira; sadzapeza mwa ine mphulupulu yokhala cimo." 
Hosea12:9 Koma Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako cicokere dziko la Aigupto, ndidzakukhalitsanso m'mahema, monga masiku a masonkhano oikika." 
Hosea12:10 Ndalankhulanso ndi aneneri, ndipo Ine ndacurukitsa masomphenya; ndi pa dzanja la aneneri ndinanena ndi mafanizo." 
Hosea12:11 Kodi Gileadi ndiye wopanda pace? akhala acabe konse; m'Giligala aphera nsembe yang'ombe; inde maguwa ao a nsembe akunga miulu yamiyala m'micera ya munda. 
Hosea12:12 Ndipo Yakobo anathawira ku thengo la Aramu, ndi Israyeli anagwira nchito cifukwa ca mkazi, ndi cifukwa ca mkazi anaweta nkhosa." 
Hosea12:13 Ndipo mwa mneneri Yehova anakweretsa Israyeli kucokera m'Aigupto, ndi mwa mneneri anasungika." 
Hosea12:14 Efraimu wautsa mkwiyo wowawa, m'mwemo Iye adzamsiyira mwazi wace, ndi Ambuye wace adzambwezera comtonza cace." 
Hosea13:1 Pamene Bfraimu analankhula panali kunjenjemera; anadzikweza m'Israyeli; koma pamene anaparamula mwa Baala, anafa." 
Hosea13:2 Ndipo tsopano aonjeza kucimwa, nadzipangira mafano oyenga a siliva wao, mafano monga mwa nzeru zao, onsewo nchito ya amisiri; anena za iwo, Anthu ophera nsembe apsompsone ana a ng'ombe." 
Hosea13:3 Cifukwa cace adzakhala ngati mtambo wa m'mawa, ndi ngati mame asansuka mamawa, ngati mungu umene mphepo iuuluza kudwale, ndi ngati utsi woturuka kukafwambira." 
Hosea13:4 Koma Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wako cicokere m'dziko la Aigupto, ndipo suyenera kudziwa mulungu wina koma Ine; ndi popanda Ine palibe mpulumutsi." 
Hosea13:5 Ndinakudziwa m'cipululu, m'dziko lotentha kwambiri." 
Hosea13:6 Monga mwa podyetsa pao, momwemo anakhuta; anakhuta, ndi mtima wao unakwezeka; cifukwa cace anandiiwala Ine." 
Hosea13:7 Cifukwa cace ndikhala nao ngati mkango; ngati nyalugwe ndidzalalira kunjira. 
Hosea13:8 Ndidzakomana nao ngati cimbalangondo cocilanda ana ace, ndi kung'amba cokuta mtima wao; ndi pomwepo ndidzawalusira ngati mkango; cirombo cidzawamwetula." 
Hosea13:9 Israyeli, cikuononga ndi ici, cakuti utsutsana ndi Ine, cithandizo cako." 
Hosea13:10 Iri kuti mfumu yako tsopano, kuti ikupulumutse m'midzi yako yonse? ndi oweruza ako amene unanena za iwo, Ndipatseni mfumu ndi akalonga?" 
Hosea13:11 Ndinakupatsa mfumu mu mkwiyo wanga; ndinamcotsanso m'ukali wanga. 
Hosea13:12 Mphulupulu ya Efraimu yamangika, cimo lace lisungika." 
Hosea13:13 Zowawa zonga za mkazi wobala zidzamgwera, ndiye mwana wopanda nzeru; pakuti pali nyengo yakuti asacedwe mobalira ana." 
Hosea13:14 Ndidzawaombola ku, mphamvu ya kumanda, ndidzawaombola kuimfa; imfa, miliri yako iri kuti? manda, cionongeko cako ciri kuti? Kulekerera kudzabisika pamaso panga." 
Hosea13:15 Cinkana abala mwa abale ace, mphepo ya kum'mawa idzafika, mphepo ya Yehova yokwera kucokera kucipululu; ndi gwero lace lidzaphwa, ndi kasupe wace adzauma, adzafunkha cuma ca akatundu onse ofunika." 
Hosea13:16 Samariya adzasanduka wabwinja, pakuti anapandukana ndi Mulungu wace; iwo adzagwa ndi lupanga, ana ao amakanda adzaphwanyika, ndi akazi ao okhala ndi pakati adzatumbulidwa." 
Hosea14:1 Israyeli, bwerera kumka kwa Yehova Mulungu wako; pakuti wagwa mwa mphulupulu yako." 
Hosea14:2 Mukani nao mau, nimubwerere kwa Yehova; nenani kwa Iye, Cotsani mphulupulu zonse, nimulandire cokoma; ndipo tidzapereka mau milomo yathu ngati: ng'ombe." 
Hosea14:3 Asuri sadzatipulumutsa; sitidzayenda pa akavalo, ndipo sitil dzanenanso kwa nchito ya manja athu, Inu ndinu milungu yathu; pakuti mwa Inu ana amasiye apeza cifundo." 
Hosea14:4 Ndidzaciritsa kubwerera kwao, ndidzawakonda mwaufulu; pakuti mkwiyo wanga wamcokera." 
Hosea14:5 Ndidzakhala kwa Israyeli ngati mame; adzacita maluwa ngati kakombo, ndi kutambalalitsa mizu yace ngati Lebano." 
Hosea14:6 Nthambi zace zidzatambalala, ndi kukoma kwace kudzanga kwa mtengo waazitona, ndi pfungo lace ngati Lebano." 
Hosea14:7 Iwo okhala pansi pa mthunzi wace adzabwera, nadzatsitsimuka ngati tirigu, nadzaphuka ngati mpesa, cikumbukilo cace cidzanga vinyo wa Lebano." 
Hosea14:8 Efraimu adzati, Ndiri ndi cianinso ndi mafano? Ndayankha, ndidzampenyerera; ndiri ngati mtengo wamlombwa wabiriwiri; zipatso zako zipezeka zocokera kwa Ine." 
Hosea14:9 Wanzeru ndani, kuti azindikire izi? waluntha, kuti adziwe izi? pakuti njira za Yehova ziri zoongoka; ndipo olungama adzayendamo, koma olakwa adzagwamo." 
Joel1:1 MAU a Yehova a kwa Yoeli mwana wa Petueli. 
Joel1:2 Imvani ici, akulu akulu inu, nimuchere khutu, inu nonse okhala m'dziko. Cacitika ici masiku anu kodi, kapena masiku a makolo anu?" 
Joel1:3 Mufotokozere ana anu ici, ndi ana anu afotokozere ana ao, ndi ana ao afotokozere mbadwo wina." 
Joel1:4 Cosiya cimbalanga, dzombe lidacidya; ndi cosiya dzombe, cirimamine adacidya; ndi cosiya cirimamine, anoni adacidya." 
Joel1:5 Galamukani, oledzera inu, nimulire; bumani, nonse akumwa vinyo, cifukwa ca vinyo watsopano; pakuti waletsedwa pakamwa panu." 
Joel1:6 Pakuti mtundu wadza, wakwerera dziko langa, wamphamvu wosawerengeka, mano ace akunga mano a mkango, nukhala nao mano acibwano a mkango waukuru." 
Joel1:7 Unaonongadi mpesa wanga, nunyenya mkuyu wanga, nuukungudza konse, nuutaya; nthambi zace zasanduka zotumbuluka." 
Joel1:8 Lirani ngati namwali wodzimangira m'cuuno ciguduli, cifukwa ca mwamuna wa unamwali wace." 
Joel1:9 Nsembe yaufa ndi nsembe yothira zalekeka ku nyumba ya Yehova; ansembe, atumiki a Yehova, acita maliro." 
Joel1:10 M'munda mwaonongeka, nthaka ilira; pakuti tirigu waonongeka, vinyo watsopano wamwelera, mafuta akudza pang'onong'ono." 
Joel1:11 Gomani, akulima m'minda inu; lirani, akulima mpesa; cifukwa ca tirigu ndi barele; pakuti dzinthu za m'minda zatayika." 
Joel1:12 Mpesa wauma, mkuyu wafota, mtengo wa mkangaza ndi kanjedza ndi muula, inde mitengo yonse ya kuthengo yafota; pakuti cimwemwe cathera ana a anthu." 
Joel1:13 Mudzimangire ciguduli m'cuuno mwanu, nimulire ansembe inu; bwnani, otumikira ku guwa la nsembe inu; lowani, gonani usiku wonse m'ciguduli, inu otumikira Mulungu wanga; pakuti nsembe yaufa ndi nsembe yothira zaletsedwera nyumba ya Mulungu wanu." 
Joel1:14 Patulani tsiku losala, lalikirani masonkhano oletsa, sonkhanitsani akulu akulu, ndi onse okhala m'dziko, ku nyumba ya Yehova Mulungu wanu; nimupfuulire kwa Yehova." 
Joel1:15 Kalanga ine, tsikuli! pakuti layandikira tsiku la Yehova, lidzafika ngati cionongeko cocokera kwa Wamphamvuyonse." 
Joel1:16 Cakudya sicicotsedwa kodi pamaso pathu? cimwemwe ndi cikondwerero pa nyumba ya Mulungu wathu? 
Joel1:17 Mbeu zaola pansi pa zibuluma zao; zosungiramo zaonongeka, nkhokwe zapasuka; pakuti tirigu wakwinyata." 
Joel1:18 Ha! nyama ziusa moyo, magulu a ng'ombe azimidwa; pakuti zisowa podyera; magulu a nkhosa omwe atha." 
Joel1:19 Ndipfuulira kwa Inu Yehova, pakuti moto wapsereza mabusa a m'cipululu, ndi malawi a moto anatentha mitengo yonse ya kuthengo," 
Joel1:20 inde nyama za kuthengo zilira kwa Inu; pakuti mitsinje yamadzi yaphwa, ndi moto wapsereza mabusa a m'cipululu." 
Joel2:1 Muombe lipenga m'Ziyoni, nimupfuulitse m'phiri langa lopatulika; onse okhala m'dziko anjenjemere; pakuti tsiku la Yehova lirinkudza, pakuti liyandikira;" 
Joel2:2 tsiku la mdima, la mdima wandiweyani, tsiku la mitambo, mitambo yocindikira, ngati m'mbandakuca moyalika pamapiri; mtundu waukuru ndi wamphamvu, panalibe wotere ndi kale lonse, sipadzakhalanso wotere utapita uwu, kufikira zaka za mibadwo yambiri." 
Joel2:3 Moto unyambita pamaso pao, ndi m'mbuyo mwao litentha lawi la moto; kumaso kwao dziko likunga munda wa Edeni, koma m'mbuyo mwao likunga cipululu copanda kanthu; palibenso wakuwapulumuka." 
Joel2:4 Maonekedwe ao aoneka ngati akavalo, nathamanga ngati akavalo a nkhondo." 
Joel2:5 Atumphako ngati mkokomo wa magareta pamwamba pa mapiri, ngati kulilima kwa malawi a moto akupsereza ziputu, ngati mtundu wamphamvu wa anthu ondandalikira nkhondo." 
Joel2:6 Pamaso pao mitundu ya anthu ikumva zowawa, nkhope zonse zitumbuluka." 
Joel2:7 Athamanga ngati amphamvu; akwera linga ngati anthu a nkhondo; niliyenda liri lonse njira yace, osasokonezeka m'mabande ao." 
Joel2:8 Sakankhana, ayenda liri lonse m'mopita mwace; akagwa m'zida, siityoka nkhondo yao." 
Joel2:9 Alumphira mudzi, athamanga palinga, akwerera nyumba, alowera pamazenera ngati mkhungu." 
Joel2:10 Dziko lapansi linjenjemera pamaso pao, thambo ligwedezeka, dzuwa ndi mwezi zada, ndi nyenyezi zi'bweza kuwala kwao;" 
Joel2:11 ndipo Yehova amveketsa mau ace pamaso pa khamu lace la nkhondo; pakuti a m'cigono mwace ndi ambirimbiri; pakuti Iye wakucita mau ace ndiye wamphamvu ndithu; pakuti tsiku la Yehova ndi lalikuru ndi loopsa ndithu; akhoza kupirira nalo ndani? 
Joel2:12 Koma ngakhale tsopano, ati Yehova, munditembenukire Ine ndi mtima wanu wonse, ndi kusala, ndi kulira, ndi kucita maliro;" 
Joel2:13 ndipo ng'ambani mitima yanu, si zobvala zanu ai; ndi kurembenukira kwa Yehova Mulungu wanu; pakuti Iye ndiye wacisomo, ndi wodzala cifundo, wosapsa mtima msanga, ndi wocuruka kukoma mtima, ndi woleka coipaco." 
Joel2:14 Kaya, kapena adzabwerera, nadzalekerera, ndi kusiya mdalitso pambuyo pace, ndiwo nsembe yaufa ndi nsembe yathira ya Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Joel2:15 Ombani lipenga m'Ziyoni, patulani tsiku losala, lalikirani msonkhano woletsa," 
Joel2:16 sonkhanitsani anthu, patulani msonkhano, memezani akulu akulu, sonkhanitsani ana ndi oyamwa mawere; mkwati aturuke m'cipinda mwace, ndi mkwatibwi m'mogona mwace." 
Joel2:17 Ansembe, atumiki a Yehova, alire pakati pa khonde la pakhomo ndi guwa la nsembe, nanene, Alekeni anthu anu, Yehova, musapereka colowa canu acitonze, kuti amitundu awalamulire; adzaneneranji mwa anthu, Ali kuti Mulunguwao?" 
Joel2:18 Pamenepo Yehova anacitira dziko lace nsanje, nacitira anthu ace cifundo." 
Joel2:19 Ndipo Yehova anayankha, nati kwa anthu ace, Taonani, ndidzakutumizirani tirigu, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta; ndipo mudzakhuta ndi izo; ndipo sindidzakuperekaninso mukhale citonzo mwa amitundu;" 
Joel2:20 koma ndidzakucotserani kutali nkhondo ya kumpoto, ndi kulingira ku dziko louma ndi lopasuka, a kumaso kwace ku nyanja ya kum'mawa, ndi a kumbuyo kwace ku nyanja ya kumadzulo; ndi kununkha kwace kudzakwera, ndi pfungo lace loipa lidzakwera; pakuti inacita zazikuru." 
Joel2:21 Usaopa, dziko iwe; kondwera, nusekerere; pakuti Yehova wacita zazikuru." 
Joel2:22 Musamaopa, nyama za kuthengo inu; pakuti m'cipululu muphukanso msipu; pakuti mitengo ibala zipatso zao; mikuyu ndi mipesa ipatsa mphamvu zao." 
Joel2:23 Mukondwere tsono, inu ana a Ziyoni, nimusekerere m'Yehova Mulungu wanu; pakuti adzayamba kukupatsani mvula yamyundo, monga mwa cilungamo cace; nakubvumbitsirani mvula, mvula yamyundo ndi yamasika mwezi woyamba." 
Joel2:24 Ndipo madwale adzakhala ndi tirigu, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta; zidzasefuka m'zosungiramo zao." 
Joel2:25 Ndipo ndidzakubwezerani zaka zidazidya dzombe, ndi cirimamine, ndi anoni, ndi cimbalanga, gulu langa lalikuru la nkhondo, limene ndinalitumiza pakati pa inu." 
Joel2:26 Ndipo mudzadyaidya ndi kukhuta, nimudzalemekeza dzina la Yehova Mulungu wanu, amene anacita nanu modabwiza; ndi anthu anga sadzacita manyazi nthawi zonse." 
Joel2:27 Ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndiri pakati pa Israyeli, ndi kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu, palibe wina; ndi anthu anga sadzacita manyazi nthawi zonse." 
Joel2:28 Ndipo kudzacitika m'tsogolo mwace, ndidzatsanulira mzimu wanga pa anthu onse, ndi ana anu amuna ndi akazi adzanenera, akulu akulu anu adzalota maloto, anyamata anu adzaona masomphenya;" 
Joel2:29 ndi pa akapolo ndi adzakazi omwe ndidzatsanulira mzimu wanga masiku awo. 
Joel2:30 Ndipo ndidzaonetsa zodabwiza kuthambo ndi pa dziko lapansi, mwazi, ndi moto, ndi utsi tolo." 
Joel2:31 Dzuwa lidzasanduka mdima, ndi mwezi udzasanduka mwazi, lisanadze tsiku la Yehova lalikuru ndi loopsa." 
Joel2:32 Ndipo kudzacitika kuti ali yense adzaitana pa dzina la Yehova adzapulumutsidwa; pakuti m'phiri la Ziyoni ndi m'Yerusalemu mudzakhala cipulumutso, monga Yehova anatero, ndi mwa otsala amene Yehova adzawaitana." 
Joel3:1 Pakuti taonani, masiku awo, ndi nthawi iyo, pamene ndibwera nao andende a Yuda ndi a Yerusalemu," 
Joel3:2 ndidzasonkhanitsa amitundu onse, ndi kutsikira nao ku cigwa ca Yosafati; ndipo ndidzaweruzana nao komweko za anthu anga, ndi colowa canga Israyeli, amene anawabalalitsa mwa amitundu, nagawa dziko langa," 
Joel3:3 Ndipo anacitira anthu anga maere, napereka mwana wamwamuna kusinthana ndi mkazi wadama, nagula vinyo ndi mwana wamkazi kuti amwe." 
Joel3:4 Ndiponso ndiri ndi ciani ndi inu, Turo ndi Zidoni, ndi malire onse a Afilisti? mudzandibwezera cilango kodi? Mukandibwezera cilango msanga, mofulumira, ndidzabwezera cilango canu pamutu panu," 
Joel3:5 Popeza inu munatenga siliva wanga ndi golidi wanga, ndi kulonga zofunika zanga zokoma m'akacisi anu;" 
Joel3:6 munagulitsanso ana a Yuda ndi ana a Yerusalemu kwa ana a Yavani, kuwacotsa kutali kwa malire ao;" 
Joel3:7 taonani, ndidzawautsa kumalo kumene munawagulitsako, ndi kubwezera cilango canu pamutu panu;" 
Joel3:8 ndipo ndidzagulitsa ana ako amuna ndi akazi m'dzanja la ana a Yuda; ndipo iwo adzawagulitsa kwa anthu a Seba, kwa anthu okhala kutari; pakuti Yehova wanena." 
Joel3:9 Mulalikire ici mwa amitundu mukonzeretu nkhondo; utsani amuna amphamvu; amuna onse a nkhondo ayandikire nakwere. 
Joel3:10 Sulani makasu anu akhale malupanga, ndi anangwape anu akhale nthungo; wofoka anene, Ndine wamphamvu." 
Joel3:11 Fulumirani, idzani, amitundu inu nonse pozungulirapo; sonkhanani pamodzi, mutsitsire komweko amphamvu anu, Yehova." 
Joel3:12 Agalamuke amitundu, nakwerere ku cigwa ca Yosafati; pakuti ndidzakhala komweko kuweruza amitundu onse ozungulira," 
Joel3:13 Longani zenga, pakuti dzinthu dzaca; idzani, pondani, pakuti cadzala coponderamo mphesa; zosungiramo zisefuka; pakuti zoipa zao nzazikuru." 
Joel3:14 Aunyinji, aunyinji m'cigwa cotsirizira mlandu! pakuti layandikira tsiku la Yehova m'cigwacotsiriziramlandu." 
Joel3:15 Dzuwa ndi mwezi zada, ndi nyenyezi zibweza kuwala kwao." 
Joel3:16 Ndipo Yehova adzadzuma ali ku Ziyoni, ndi kumveketsa mau ace ali ku Yerusalemu; ndi thambo ndi dziko lapansi zidzagwedezeka; koma Yehova adzakhala copulumukirako anthu ace, ndi linga la ana a Israyeli." 
Joel3:17 Momwemo mudzadziwa kuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wanu wakukhala m'Ziyoni, phiri langa lopatulika; pamenepo Yerusalemu adzakhala wopatulika, osapitanso alendo pakati pace," 
Joel3:18 Ndipo kudzacitika tsiku ilo mapiri adzakhetsa vinyo wozuna, ndi pazitunda padzayenda mkaka, ndi m'mitsinje yonse ya Yuda mudzayenda madzi; ndi madzi a kasupe adzaturuka m'nyumba ya Yehova, nadzamwetsa madzi cigwa ca Sitimu." 
Joel3:19 Aigupto adzasanduka bwinja, ndi Edomu adzasanduka cipululu copanda kanthu, cifukwa ca ciwawaci anawacitira ana a Yuda; popeza anakhetsa mwazi wosacimwa m'dziko lao." 
Joel3:20 Koma Yuda adzakhala cikhalire, ndi Yerusalemu ku mibadwo mibadwo." 
Joel3:21 Ndipo ndidzayeretsa mwazi wao umene sindinauyeretsa, pakuti Yehova akhala m'Ziyoni." 
Amos1:1 MAU a Amosi, amene anali mwa oweta ng'ombe a ku Tekoa, ndiwo amene anawaona za Israyeli masiku a Uziya mfumu ya Yuda, ndi masiku a Yerobiamu mwana wa Yoasi mfumu ya Israyeli, zitatsala zaka ziwiri cisanafike cibvomezi." 
Amos1:2 Ndipo anati, Yehova adzadzuma ali m'Ziyoni, nadzamveketsa mau ace ali m'Yerusalemu; podyetsa abusa padzacita cisoni, ndi mutu wa Karimeli udzauma." 
Amos1:3 Atero Yehova, Cifukwa ca zolakwa zitatu za Damasiko, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwace; popeza anapuntha Gileadi ndi zopunthira zacitsulo;" 
Amos1:4 koma ndidzatumiza moto ku nyumba ya Hazaeli, ndipo udzanyeketsa nyumba zacifumu za Benihadadi." 
Amos1:5 Ndipo ndidzatyola mpiringidzo wa Damasiko, ndi kulikha okhala m'cigwa ca Aveni, ndi iye wogwira ndodo yacifumu m'Betedeni; ndi anthu a Aramu adzalowa ndende ku Kiri, ati Yehova." 
Amos1:6 Atero Yehova, Cifukwa ca zolakwa zitatu za Gaza, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwace; popeza anatenga ndende anthu onse kuwapereka kwa Edomu;" 
Amos1:7 koma ndidzatumiza moto pa linga la Gaza, ndipo udzatha nyumba zace zacifumu;" 
Amos1:8 ndipo ndidzalikha okhala m'Asidodi, ndi iye wogwira ndodo yacifumu m'Asikeloni; ndipo ndidzabwezera Ekroni dzanja langa limlange; ndi Afilisti otsala adzatayika, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Amos1:9 Atero Yehova, Cifukwa ca zolakwa zitatu za Turo, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwace; popeza anapereka anthu onse kwa Edomu, osakumbukila pangano lacibale;" 
Amos1:10 koma ndidzatumiza moto pa linga la Turo, ndipo udzanyeketsa nyumba zace zacifumu." 
Amos1:11 Atero Yehova, Cifukwa ca zolakwa zitatu za Edomu, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwace; popeza analondola mphwace ndi lupanga, nafetsa cifundo cace conse, ndi mkwiyo wace unang'amba cing'ambire, nasunga mkwiyo wace cisungire;" 
Amos1:12 koma ndidzatumiza moto pa Temani, udzanyeketsa nyumba zacifumu za Bozira." 
Amos1:13 Atero Yehova, Cifukwa ca zolakwa zitatu za ana a Amoni, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwace; popeza anatumbula akazi ali m'pakati a Gileadi, kuti akuze malire ao;"
