Amos1:14 koma ndidzayatsa moto pa linga la Raba, udzanyeketsa nyumba zacifumu zace, ndi kupfuula tsiku la nkhondo, ndi namondwe, tsiku la kabvumvulu;" 
Amos1:15 ndipo mfumu yao idzalowa kundende, iyo ndi akalonga ace pamodzi, ati Yehova." 
Amos2:1 Atero Yehova, Cifukwa ca zolakwa zitatu za Moabu, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwace; popeza anatentha mafupa a mfumu ya ku Edomu asanduke njereza;" 
Amos2:2 koma ndidzatumiza moto pa Moabu, udzanyeketsa nyumba zacifumu za Kerioti; ndipo Moabu adzafa ndi phokoso, ndi kupfuula, ndi mau a lipenga;" 
Amos2:3 ndipo ndidzalikha woweruza pakati pace, ndi kupha akalonga ace onse, ati Yehova." 
Amos2:4 Atero Yehova, Cifukwa ca zolakwa zitatu za Yuda, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwace; popeza akaniza cilamulo ca Yehova, osasunga malemba ace; ndipo awalakwitsa mabodza ao amene makolo ao anawatsata;" 
Amos2:5 koma ndidzatumiza moto pa Yuda, udzanyeketsa nyumba zacifumu za m'Yerusalemu." 
Amos2:6 Atero Yehova, Cifukwa ca zolakwa zitatu za Israyeli, kapena zinai, sindidzabweza kulanga kwace; popeza agulitsa wolungama ndi ndalama, ndi wosowa cifukwa ca nsapato;" 
Amos2:7 ndiwo amene aliralira pfumbi lapansi liri pamutu pa wosauka, napotoza njira ya wofatsa; ndipo munthu ndi atate wace amuka kwa namwali yemweyo, kuti aipse dzina langa loyera;" 
Amos2:8 nagona pansi pa zopfunda za cikole ku maguwa a nsembe ali onse, ndi m'nyumba ya Mulungu wao akumwa vinyo wa iwo olipitsidwa." 
Amos2:9 Koma ndinaononga Ine pamaso pa Aamori, amene msinkhu wao unanga msinkhu wa mikungudza, nakhala nayo mphamvu ngati thundu; koma ndinaononga zipatso zao m'mwamba, ndi mizu yao pansi." 
Amos2:10 Ndipo ndinakukwezani kucokera m'dziko la Aigupto, ndi kukutsogolerani zaka makumi anai m'cipululu, kuti mulandire dziko la Aamori likhale colowa canu." 
Amos2:11 Ndipo ndinaukitsa mwa ana anu aneneri, ndi mwa anyamata anu Anaziri. Si momwemo, inu ana a Israyeli, ati Yehova?" 
Amos2:12 Koma munamwetsa Anaziri vinyo, ndi kulamulira aneneri ndi kuti, Musamanenera." 
Amos2:13 Taonani, ndidzakupsinjani m'malo mwanu, monga lipsinja gareta lodzala ndi mitolo fwa." 
Amos2:14 Ndipo populumukirapo padzasowera waliwiro, ndi wamphamvu; sadzalimbikitsa mphamvu yace, ndi ngwazi siidzapulumutsa moyo wace;" 
Amos2:15 ndi wokoka uta sadzalimbika, ndi waliwiro sadzadzipulumutsa; ngakhale woyenda pa akavalo sadzapulumutsa moyo wace;" 
Amos2:16 ndi wolimba mtima mwa ngwazi adzathawa wamarisece tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova." 
Amos3:1 Tamverani mau awa akunenerani Yehova motsutsa, inu ana a Israyeli, kulinenera banja lonse ndinalikweza kuliturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto, ndi kuti," 
Amos3:2 Inu nokha ndinakudziwani mwa mabanja onse a pa dziko lapansi, m'mwemo ndidzakulangani cifukwa ca mphulupulu zanu zonse." 
Amos3:3 Kodi awiri adzayenda pamodzi asanapanganiranetu? 
Amos3:4 Kodi mkango udzabangula m'nkhalango wosakhala nayo nyama? Kodi msona wa mkango udzalira m'ngaka mwace usanagwire kanthu? 
Amos3:5 Kodi mbalame idzakodwa mumsampha pansi popanda msampha woichera? Kodi msampha ufamphuka pansi wosakola kanthu? 
Amos3:6 Kodi adzaomba lipenga m'mudzi osanieniemera anthu? Kodi coipa cidzagwera mudzi osacicita Yehova? 
Amos3:7 Pakuti Ambuye Yehova sadzacita kanthu osaulula cinsinsi cace kwa atumiki ace aneneri. 
Amos3:8 Mkango ukabangula, ndani amene saopa? Ambuye Yehova wanena, ndani amene sanenera?" 
Amos3:9 Bukitsani ku nyumba zacifumu za Asidodi, ndi ku nyumba zacifumu za m'dziko la Aigupto, nimuziti, Sonkhanani pa mapiri a Samariya, ndipo penyani masokosero akuru m'menemo, ndi ozunzika m'kati mwace." 
Amos3:10 Pakuti sadziwa kucita zolungama, amene akundika zaciwawa ndi umbala m'nyumba zao zacifumu, ati Yehova." 
Amos3:11 Cifukwa cace, atero Ambuye Yehova, Padzakhala mdani pozungulira pace pa dziko, nadzatsitsa kukucotsera mphamvu yako; ndi za m'nyumba zako zacifumu adzazifunkha." 
Amos3:12 Atero Yehova, Monga mbusa alanditsa m'kamwa mwa mkango miyendo iwiri, kapena kansonga ka khutu, momwemo adzalanditsidwa ana a Israyeli okhala pansi m'Samariya, m'ngondya ya guwa logonapo, ndi pa mitsamiro ya kama." 
Amos3:13 Tamverani inu, mucitire umboni wotsutsa nyumba ya Yakobo, ati Ambuye Yehova Mulungu wa makamu." 
Amos3:14 Pakuti tsiku lakumlanga Israyeli cifukwa ca zolakwa zace, ndidzalanganso maguwa a nsembe a ku Beteli; ndi nyanga za guwa la nsembe zidzadulidwa, nizidzagwa pansi." 
Amos3:15 Ndipo ndidzakantha nyumba ya nyengo yacisanu, pamodzi ndi nyumba ya nyengo yadzuwa; ndi nyumba zaminyanga zidzaonongeka; ndi nyumba zazikuruzo zidzatha, ati Yehova." 
Amos4:1 Tamverani mau awa, inu ng'ombe zazikazi za ku Basana, zokhala m'phiri la Samariya, zosautsa aumphawi, zopsinja osowa, zonena kwa ambuyao, Bwerani naco, timwe." 
Amos4:2 Ambuye Yehova walumbira pali ciyero cace, kuti taonani, adzakugwerani masiku akuti adzakucotsani ndi zokowera, ndi otsala anu ndi mbedza." 
Amos4:3 Ndipo mudzaturukira popasuka linga, yense m'tsogolo mwace, ndi kutayika ku Harimoni, ati Yehova." 
Amos4:4 Idzani ku Beteli, mudzalakwe ku Giligala, nimucurukitse zolakwa, nimubwere nazo nsembe zanu zophera m'mawa ndi m'mawa, magawo anu akhumi atapita masiku atatu atatu;" 
Amos4:5 nimutenthe nsembe zolemekeza zacotupitsa, nimulalikire nsembe zaufulu, ndi kuzimveketsa; pakuti ici mucikonda, inu ana a Israyeli, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Amos4:6 Ndipo ine ndakupatsaninso mano oyera m'midzi yanu yonse, ndi kusowa mkate m'malo mwanu monse; koma simunabwerera kudza kwa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Amos4:7 Ndipo Ine ndakumanani mvula, itatsala miyezi itatu isanafika nyengo yakukolola; ndipo ndinabvumbistira mudzi umodzi mvula, osabvumbitsira mudzi wina; munda wina unabvumbidwa mvula, ndi m'munda mosabvumbidwa mvula munafota." 
Amos4:8 M'mwemo midzi iwiri kapena itatu inayenda peyupeyu ku mudzi umodzi kukamwa madzi, koma sanakhuta; koma simunai bwerera kudza kwa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Amos4:9 Ndinakukanthani ndi cinsikwi ndi cinoni; minda yanu yocuruka yamipesa, ndi yamikuyu, ndi yaazitona, yaonongeka ndi cirimamine; koma simunabwerera kudza kwa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Amos4:10 Ndinatumiza mliri pakati panu monga m'Aigupto; anyamata anu ndawapha ndi lupanga, ndi kutenga akavalo anu; ndipo ndinakweretsa kununkha kwa cigono canu kufikitsa kumphuno kwanu; ikoma simunabwerera kudzakwa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Amos4:11 Ndinagubuduza ena mwa inu, monga umo Mulungu anagubuduzira Sodomu ndi Gomora; ndipo inu munali ngati muuni wofumulidwa kumoto; koma simunabwerera kudza kwa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Amos4:12 Cifukwa cace ndidzatero nawe, Israyeli; popeza ndidzakucitira ici, dzikonzeretu kukomana ndi Mulungu wako, Israyeli." 
Amos4:13 Pakuti taona, Iye amene aumba mapiri, nalenga mphepo, nafotokozera munthu maganizo ace, nasanduliza m'mawa ukhale mdima, naponda pa misanje ya dziko lapansi, dzina lace ndiye Yehova Mulungu wamakamu." 
Amos5:1 Tamverani mau awa ndinenawa, akhalire inu nyimbo ya maliro, nyumba ya Israyeli inu." 
Amos5:2 Namwali wa Israyeli wagwa, sadzaukanso; wagwetsedwa pa nthaka yace, palibe womuutsa." 
Amos5:3 Pakuti atero Ambuye Yehova, M'nyumba ya Israyeli, mudzi woturukamo cikwi cimodzi adzautsalira zana limodzi, ndi uwu woturukamo zana limodzi adzautsalira khumi." 
Amos5:4 Pakuti atero Yehova kwa nyumba ya Israyeli, Mundifunefune Ine, ndipo mudzakhala ndi moyo;" 
Amos5:5 koma musamafuna Beteli, kapena kumalowa m'Giligala; musamapita ku Beereseba; pakuti Giligala adzalowadi m'ndende, ndi Beteli adzasanduka cabe." 
Amos5:6 Funani Yehova, ndipo mudzakhala ndi mayo; angabuke ngati moto m'nyumba ya Yosefe, ndipo unganyeke wopanda wakuzima m'Beteli;" 
Amos5:7 inu osintha ciweruzo cikhale civumulo, nimugwetsa pansi cilungamo," 
Amos5:8 Iye wakulenga Nsangwe ndi Akamwiniatsatana, nasanduliza mdima wandiweyani ukhale m'mawa, nasanduliza usana ude ngati usiku, wakuitana madzi a m'nyanja, nawatsanulira pa dziko lapansi, dzina lace ndiye Yehova;" 
Amos5:9 wakufikitsa cionongeko pa wamphamvu modzidzimuka, cionongeko nicigwera linga," 
Amos5:10 Iwo adana naye wodzudzula kucipata, nanyansidwa naye wolunjikitsa mau." 
Amos5:11 Popeza tsono mupondereza aumphawi, ndi kumsonkhetsa tirigu; mwamanga nyumba za miyala yosema, koma simudzakhala m'mwemo; mwaoka minda ya mipesa yokonda, koma simudzamwa vinyo wace." 
Amos5:12 Pakuti ndidziwa kuti zolakwa zanu nzocuruka, ndi macimo anu ndi olimba, inu akusautsa olungama, akulandira cokometsera mlandu, akukankha osowa kucipata." 
Amos5:13 Cifukwa cace wocenierayo akhala cete nthawi yomweyo; pakuti ndiyo nthawi yoipa. 
Amos5:14 Funani cokoma, si coipa ai; kuti mukhale ndi moyo; motero Yehova Mulungu wamakamu adzakhala ndi inu, monga munena." 
Amos5:15 Danani naco coipa, nimukonde cokoma; nimukhazikitse ciweruzo kucipata; kapena Yehova Mulungu wa makamu adzacitira cifundo otsala a Yosefe." 
Amos5:16 Cifukwa cace atero Yehova, Mulungu wa makamu, Ambuye, M'makwalala onse mudzakhala kulira, ndi m'miseu yonse adzati, Kalanga ine! kalanga ine! nadzaitana wakumunda adze kumaliro, ndi odziwa maliridwe a nthetemya alire." 
Amos5:17 Ndi m'minda yonse yamipesa mudzakhala kulira, pakuti ndipita pakati pako, ati Yehova." 
Amos5:18 Tsoka inu akufuna tsiku la Yehova! mudzapindulanji nalo tsiku la Yehova? ndilo mdima, si kuunika ai." 
Amos5:19 Kudzakhala monga munthu akathawa mkango, ndi cimbalangondo cikomana naye; kapena akalowa m'nyumba, natsamira kukhoma ndi dzanja lace, nimluma njoka." 
Amos5:20 Kodi tsiku la Yehova silidzakhala la mdima, si la kuunika ai? lakuda bii, lopanda kuwala m'menemo?" 
Amos5:21 Ndidana nao, ndinyoza madyerero anu, sindidzakondwera nao masonkhano anu oletsa." 
Amos5:22 Inde, mungakhale mupereka kwa Ine nsembe zanu zopsereza, ndi nsembe zaufa, sindidzazilandira Ine; ndinsembe zoyamika za ng'ombe zanu zonenepa, sindidzazisamalira Ine." 
Amos5:23 Mundicotsere phokoso la nyimbo zanu; sindifuna kumva mayimbidwe a zisakasa zanu. 
Amos5:24 Koma ciweruzo ciyende ngati madzi, ndi cilungamo ngati mtsinje wosefuka." 
Amos5:25 Ngati munabwera nazo kwa Ine nsembe zophera ndi zaufa zaka makumi anai m'cipululu, inu nyumba ya Israyeli?" 
Amos5:26 Inde mwasenza hema wa mfumu yanu, ndi tsinde la mafano anu, nyenyezi ya mlungu wanu, amene mudadzipangira." 
Amos5:27 M'mwemo ndidzakutengani kumka nanu kundende kutsogolo kwa Damasiko, ati Yehova, amene dzina lace ndiye Mulungu wa makamu." 
Amos6:1 Tsoka osalabadirawo m'Ziyoni, ndi iwo okhazikika m'phiri la Samariya, ndiwo anthu omveka amtundu woposa wa anthu, amene nyumba ya Israyeli iwafikira!" 
Amos6:2 Pitani ku Kaline, nimuone; kucokera komweko mupite ku Hamati wamkulu mutsikire ku Gati wa Afilisti; kodi awo ndi okoma koposa maufumu ano? kapena malire ao aposa malire anu?" 
Amos6:3 Inu akutalikitsa tsiku loipa, ndi kusendeza pafupi mpando waciwawa;" 
Amos6:4 ogona pa makama aminyanga, nadzithinula pa maguwa ao ogonapo, nadya ana a nkhosa a ku zoweta, ndi ana a ng'ombe ocoka pakati pa khola;" 
Amos6:5 akungoyimba kutsata maliridwe a zeze, nadzilingiririra zoyimbira nazo Ingati Davide;" 
Amos6:6 akumwera vinyo m'zipanda, nadzidzoza ndi mafuta abwino oposa, osagwidwa cisoni ndi kutyoka kwa Yosefe." 
Amos6:7 Cifukwa cace tsono, adzatengedwa ndende ndi oyamba kutengedwa ndende; ndi phokoso la iwo odzithinula lidzapita." 
Amos6:8 Ambuye Yehova walumbira pali Iye mwini, ati Yehova Mulungu wa makamu, Ndinyansidwa nako kudzikuza kwa Yakobo, ndidana nazo nyumba zace zacifumu; m'mwemo ndidzapereka mudzi, ndi zonse ziri m'menemo." 
Amos6:9 Ndipo kudzacitika, mukatsala amuna khumi m'nyumba imodzi, adzafa." 
Amos6:10 Ndipo mbalewace wa munthu akamnyamula, ndiye womtentha, kuturutsa mafupa m'nyumba, nakati kwa iye ali m'kati mwa nyumbamo, Atsala wina nawe kodi? nakati, lai; pamenepo adzati, Khala cete; pakuti sitingachule dzina la Yehova." 
Amos6:11 Pakuti taonani, Yehova walamulira, nadzakantha nyumba yaikuru icite mpata, ndi nyumba yaing'ono icite mindala." 
Amos6:12 Kodi akavalo adzathamanga pathanthwe? kodi adzalimako ndi ng'ombe? pakuti mwasanduliza ciweruzo cikhale ndulu, ndi cipatso ca cilungamo cikhale civumulo;" 
Amos6:13 inu okondwera naco copanda pace, ndi kuti, Kodi sitinadzilimbitsa tokha mwa mphamvu yathu yathu?" 
Amos6:14 Pakuti taonani, ndidzakuutsirani mtundu wa anthu, nyumba ya Israyeli, ati Yehova Mulungu wa makamu; ndipo adzakupsinjani kuyambira polowera ku Hamati kufikira mtsinje wa kucidikha." 
Amos7:1 Ambuye Yehova anandionetsa cotere; ndipo taonani, anaumba dzombe, poyamba kuphuka kwa maudzu a cibwereza; ndipo taonani, ndico cibwereza atawasengera mfumu." 
Amos7:2 Ndipo kunacitika m'mene lidatha kudya msipu wa dziko, ndinati, Ambuye Yehova, khululukiranitu Yakobo; adzakhala ciriri bwanji? popeza ndiye wamng'ono." 
Amos7:3 Ndipo Yehova anacileka. Sicidzacitika, ati Yehova." 
Amos7:4 Ambuye Yehova anandionetsa cotere; ndipo taonani, Ambuye Yehova anaitana kuti atsutse ndi moto; ndipo unanyambita cakudya cacikuru ukadanyambitanso dziko." 
Amos7:5 Pamenepo ndinati, Ambuye Yehova, Iekanitu; Yakobo adzakhala ciriri bwanji? pakuti ali wamng'ono." 
Amos7:6 Ndipo Yehova anacileka. Ici comwe sicidiacitika, ati Ambuye Yehova." 
Amos7:7 Anandionetsa cotere; ndipo taonani, Ambuye anaima pa khoma lomangiwda ndi cingwe colungamitsira ciriri; ndi cingwe colungamitsira ciriri m'dzanja lace." 
Amos7:8 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Amosi, uona ciani? Ndipo ndinati, Cingwe colungamitsira ciriri. Nati Ambuye, Taona, ndidzaika cingwe colungamitsira ciriri pakati pa anthu anga Israyeli, sindidzawalekanso:" 
Amos7:9 ndi misanje ya Isake idzakhala bwinja; ndi malo opatulika a Israyeli adzapasuka; ndipo ndidzaukira nyumba ya Yerobiamu ndi lupanga. 
Amos7:10 Pamenepo Amaziya wansembe wa ku Beteli anatumiza kwa Yerobiamu mfumu ya Israyeli, ndi kuti, Amosi wapangira inu ciwembu pakati pa nyumba ya Israyeli; dziko silikhoza kulola mau ace onse." 
Amos7:11 Pakuti atero Amosi, Yerobiamu adzafa ndi lupanga, ndi Israyeli adzatengedwadi ndende, kucoka m'dziko lace." 
Amos7:12 Amaziya anatinso kwa Amosi, Mlauli iwe, coka, thawira ku dziko la Yuda, nudye, nunenere komweko;" 
Amos7:13 koma usaneneranso ku Beteli; pakuti pamenepo mpa malo opatulika a mfumu, ndiyo nyumba yacifumu." 
Amos7:14 Pamenepo Amosi anayankha, nati kwa Amaziya, Sindinali mneneri, kapena mwana wa mneneri, koma ndinali woweta ng'ombe, ndi wakuchera nkhuyu;" 
Amos7:15 ndipo Yehova ananditenga ndirikutsata nkhosa, nati kwa ine Yehova, Muka, nenera kwa anthu anga Israyeli." 
Amos7:16 Cifukwa cace tsono, tamvera mau a Yehova, Iwe ukuti, Usamanenera cotsutsana ndi Israyeli, usadonthetsa mau akutsutsana ndi nyumba ya Isake;" 
Amos7:17 cifukwa cace atero Yehova, Mkazi wako adzakhala wadama m'mudzi, ndi ana ako amuna ndi akazi adzagwa ndi lupanga, ndi dziko lako lidzagawanidwa ndi kuyesa cingwe, ndi iwe mwini udzafa m'dziko lodetsedwa; ndipo Israyeli adzatengedwadi ndende kucoka m'dziko lace." 
Amos8:1 Ambuye Yehova anandionetsa cotere; ndipo taonani, mtanga wa zipatso zamalimwe." 
Amos8:2 Ndipo anati, Amosi uona ciani? Ndipo ndinati, Mtanga wa zipatso zamalimwe. Nati Yehova kwa ine, Citsiriziro cafikira anthu anga Israyeli, sindidzawalekanso." 
Amos8:3 Koma nyimbo za kukacisi zidzasanduka kubuma tsiku ilo, ati Ambuye Yehova; mitembo idzacuruka; adzaitaya pali ponse padzakhala zii." 
Amos8:4 Tamverani ici, inu akumeza aumphawi, ndi kuwatha ofatsa m'dziko, ndi kuti," 
Amos8:5 Mwezi wokhala upita liti, kuti tigulitse dzinthu? ndi Sabata, kuti titsegulire tirigu? ndi kucepsa efa, ndi kukuliitsa sekeli, ndi kucenjerera nayo miyeso yonyenga;" 
Amos8:6 kuti tigule osauka ndi ndarama, ndi aumphawi ndi nsapato, ndi kugulitsa nsadwa za tirigu." 
Amos8:7 Yehova walumbira pali kudzikuza kwa Yakobo, Ngati ndidzaiwala konse nchito zao ziri zonse?" 
Amos8:8 Kodi dziko silidzanjenjemera cifukwa ca ici, ndi kulira ali yense wokhalamo? inde lidzakwera lonseli ngati madzi a m'mtsinje; lidzagwedezeka, ndi kutsikanso ngati mtsinje wa Aigupto," 
Amos8:9 Ndipo kudzacitika tsiku lomwelo, ati Ambuye Yehova, ndidzalowetsa dzuwa usana, ndi kudetsa dziko pausana poyera." 
Amos8:10 Ndipo ndidzasanduliza madyerero anu, akhale maliro, ndi nyimbo zanu zikhale za maliro, ndi kufikitsa ziguduli m'cuuno monse, ndi mpala pa mutu uli wonse; nadzakhala ngati maliro a mwana mmodzi yekha, ndi citsiriziro cace ngati tsiku lowawa." 
Amos8:11 Taonani, akudza masiku, ati Ambuye Yehova, akuti ndidzatumiza njala m'dzikomo, si njala ya mkate kapena ludzu la madzi, koma njala ya kumva mau a Yehova." 
Amos8:12 Ndipo adzayendayenda peyupeyu kuyambira kunyanja kufikira kunyanja ndi kuyambira kumpoto kufikira kum'mawa; adzathamangathamanga kufunafuna mau a Yehova, koma osawapeza." 
Amos8:13 Tsiku lomwelo anamwali okongola ndi anyamata adzakomoka nalo ludzu. 
Amos8:14 Iwo akulumbira ndi kuchula cimo la Samariya, ndi kuti, Pali Mulungu wako, Dani; ndipo, Pali moyo wa njira ya ku Beereseba, iwowa adzagwa, osaukanso konse." 
Amos9:1 Ndinaona Ambuye alikuima pa guwa la nsembe, nati Iye, Kantha mitu ya nsanamira, kuti ziundo zigwedezeke; nuphwanye mitu yao yonse; ndipo ndidzapha otsiriza ao ndi lupanga; wothawayo mwa iwo sadzathawadi, ndi wopulumukayo mwaiwosadzapulumukadi." 
Amos9:2 Angakhale akumba mpaka kunsi kwa manda, dzanja langa lidzawatenga kumeneko; angakhale akwera kumwamba, ndidzawatsitsa komweko." 
Amos9:3 Angakhale abisala pamwamba pa Karimeli, ndidzawapwaira ndi kuwatenga komweko; angakhale abisala pamaso panga pansi pa nyanja, kumeneko ndidzalamulira njoka, ndipo idzawaluma." 
Amos9:4 Angakhale alowa ndende pamaso pa adani ao, kumeneko ndidzalamulira lupanga, ndipo lidzawapha; ndipo ndidzayang'anitsa maso anga kwa iwowa, kuwacitira coipa, si cokoma ai." 
Amos9:5 Pakuti Ambuye Yehova wa makamu ndiye amene akhudza dziko, nilisungunuka; ndi onse okhalamo adzacita maliro; ndipo lidzakwera lonseli ngati madzi a m'nyanja; nilidzatsikanso ngati nyanja ya m'Aigupto;" 
Amos9:6 ndiye amene amanga zipinda zace zosanja m'mwamba, nakhazika tsindwi lace pa dziko lapansi; Iye amene aitana madzi a m'nyanja, nawatsanulira padziko; dzina lace ndiye Yehova." 
Amos9:7 Kodi simukhala kwa Ine ngati ana a Kusi, inu ana a Israyeli? ati Yehova. Sindinakweza Israyeli ndine, kumturutsa m'dziko la Aigupto, ndi Afilisti ku Kafitori, ndi Aaramu ku Kiri?" 
Amos9:8 Taonani, maso a Ambuye Yehova ali pa ufumu wocimwawo, ndipo ndidzauononga kuucotsa pa dziko lapansi; pokhapo sindidzaononga nyumba ya Yakobo kuitha konse, ati Yehova." 
Amos9:9 Pakuti taonani, ndidzalamulira, ndipo ndidzapeta nyumba ya Israyeli mwa amitundu onse, monga apeta tirigu m'licero; koma silidzagwa pansi diso, ndi limodzi lonse." 
Amos9:10 Ocimwa onse a anthu anga adzafa ndi lupanga, ndiwo amene akuti, Coipa sicidzatipeza, kapena kutidulira." 
Amos9:11 Tsiku lomwelo ndidzautsa msasa wa Davide udagwawo, ndi kukonzanso zopasuka zace; ndipo ndidzautsa zogumuka zace, ndi kuumanga monga masiku a kalelo;" 
Amos9:12 kuti alandire otsala a Edomu akhale colowa cao, ndi amitundu onse akuchedwa dzina langa, ati Yehova wakucita izi." 
Amos9:13 Taonani akudza masiku, ati Yehova, akud wolima adzapezana ndi wodula, ndi woponda mphesa adzapezana ndi wofesa, ndi mapiri adzakhetsa vinyo watsopano, ndi zitunda zonse zidzasungunuka." 
Amos9:14 Ndipo ndidzabwezanso undende wa anthu anga Israyeli, ndipo adzamanganso mabwinja, ndi kukhala m'menemo; nadzaoka minda ya mipesa nadzamwa vinyo wace, nadzalima minda ndi kudya zipatso zace." 
Amos9:15 Ndipo ndidzawaoka m'dziko mwao ndipo sadzazulidwanso m'dziko lao limene ndawapatsa, ati Yehova Mulungu wako." 
Obadiah1:1 MASOMPHENYA a Obadiya. Atero Ambuye Yehova za Edomu: Tamva mbiri yocokera kwa Yehova, ndi mthenga wotumidwa mwa amitundu, ndi kuti, Nyamukani, timuukire kumthira nkhondo." 
Obadiah1:2 Taona, ndakuika wamng'ono mwa amitundu; unyozedwa kwambiri." 
Obadiah1:3 Kudzikuza kwa mtima wako kwakunyenga, iwe wokhala m'mapanga a thanthwe, iwe pokhala pako pamwamba, wakunena m'mtima mwace, Adzanditsitsira pansi ndani?" 
Obadiah1:4 Cinkana ukwera pamwamba peni peni ngati ciombankhanga, cinkana cisanja cako cisanjika pakati pa nyenyezi, ndidzakutsitsa kumeneko, ati Yehova." 
Obadiah1:5 Akakudzera akuba, kapena mbala usiku, (Ha! waonongeka) sadzaba mpaka adzakhuta kodi? Akakudzera akuchera mphesa sadzasiya khunkha kodi?" 
Obadiah1:6 Ha! za Esau zasanthulidwa; ha! zobisika zace zafunidwa. 
Obadiah1:7 Anthu onse a akupangana nawe anakuperekeza mpaka pamalire; anthu okhala ndi mtendere nawe anakunyenga, nakuposa mphamvu; iwo akudya cakudya cako akuchera msampha pansi pako; mulibe nzeru mwa iye." 
Obadiah1:8 Ati Yehova, Kodi sindidzaononga tsiku lija anzeru mwa Edomu, ndi luntha m'phiri la Esau?" 
Obadiah1:9 Ndipo amuna anu amphamvu adzatenga nkhawa, Temani iwe, kuti onse aonongeke m'phiri la Edomu, ndi kuphedwa." 
Obadiah1:10 Cifukwa ca ciwawa unamcitira mphwako Yakobo, udzakutidwa ndi manyazi, nudzaonongeka ku nthawi yonse." 
Obadiah1:11 Tsiku lija unaima padera, tsiku lija alendo anagwira ndende makamu ace, nalowa m'zipata zace acilendo, nacitira Yerusalemu maere, iwenso unakhala ngati mmodzi wa iwowa." 
Obadiah1:12 Koma usapenyerera tsiku la mphwako, tsiku loyesedwa mlendo iye, nusasekerere ana a Yuda tsiku la kuonongeka kwao, kapena kuseka cikhakha tsiku lakupsinjika." 
Obadiah1:13 Usalowe m'mudzi wa anthu anga tsiku la tsoka lao, kapena kupenyerera iwe coipa cao tsiku la tsoka lao, kapena kuthira manja khamu lao tsiku la tsoka lao." 
Obadiah1:14 Ndipo usaime pamphambano kuononga opulumuka ace; kapena kupereka otsala ace tsiku lakupsinjika. 
Obadiah1:15 Pakuti tsiku la Yehova layandikira amitundu onse; monga unacita iwe, momwemo adzakucitira; cocita iwe cidzakubwererapamtupako." 
Obadiah1:16 Pakuti monga munamwa pa phiri langa lopatulika, momwemo amitundu onse adzamwa kosalekeza; inde adzamwa, nadzameza, nadzakhala monga ngati sanalipo." 
Obadiah1:17 Koma m'phiri la Ziyoni mudzakhala opulumuka, ndipo lidzakhala lopatulika; ndi a nyumba ya Yakobo adzakhala nazo zolowa zao." 
Obadiah1:18 Ndipo nyumba ya Yakobo idzakhala moto, ndi nyumba ya Yosefe lawi, ndi nyumba ya Esau ngati ciputu, ndipo adzawatentha pakati pao, ndi kuwapsereza; ndipo sadzakhalapo otsalira nyumba ya Esau; pakuti Yehova wanena." 
Obadiah1:19 Ndipo akumwela adzakhala nalo phiri la Esau colowa cao; ndi iwo a kucidikha adzakhala nalo dziko la Afilisti; ndipo adzakhala nayo minda ya Efraimu, ndi minda ya Samariya colowa cao; ndi Benjamini adzakhala nalo la Gileadi." 
Obadiah1:20 Ndipo andende a khamu ili la ana a Israyeli, okhala mwa Akanani, adzakhala naco colowa cao mpaka pa Zarefati; ndi andende a ku Yerusalemu okhala m'Sefaradi adzakhala nayo midzi ya kumwela, colowa cao." 
Obadiah1:21 Ndipo apulumutsi adzakwera pa phiri la Ziyoni kuweruza phiri la Esau; ndipo ufumu udzakhala wace wa Yehova. 
Jonah1:1 NDIPO mau a Yehova anadza kwa Yona mwana wa Amitai, ndi kuti," 
Jonah1:2 Nyamuka, pita ku Nineve, mudzi waukuruwo, nulalikire motsutsana nao; pakuti coipa cao candikwerera pamaso panga." 
Jonah1:3 Koma Yona ananyamuka kuti athawire ku Tarisi, kuzemba Yehova; ndipo anatsikira ku Yopa, napezako combo comuka ku Tarisi, napereka ndalama zace, natsikira m'menemo, kuti apite nao ku Tarisi kuzemba Yehova." 
Jonah1:4 Koma Yehova anautsa cimphepo cacikuru panyanja, ndipo panali namondwe wamkuru panyanja, ndi combo cikadasweka." 
Jonah1:5 Pamenepo amarinyero anacita mantha, napfuulira yense kwa mlungu wace, naponya m'nyanja akatundu anali m'combo kucipepuza. Koma Yona adatsikira m'munsi mwa combo, nagona tulo tofa nato." 
Jonah1:6 Ndipo mwini combo anadza kwa iye, nanena naye, Utani iwe wam'tulo? uka, itana Mulungu wako, kapena Mulunguyo adzatikumbukila tingatayike." 
Jonah1:7 Ndipo anati yense kwa mnzace, Tiyeni ticite maere, kuti tidziwe coipa ici catigwera cifukwa ca yani. M'mwemo anacita maere, ndipo maere anagwera Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Pamenepo anati kwa iye, Utiuzetu coipa ici catigwera cifukwa ca yani? nchito yako njotani? ufuma kuti? dziko lako nliti? nanga mtundu wako?" 
Jonah1:9 Ndipo ananena nao, Ndine Mhebri, ndiopa Yehova Mulungu wa Kumwamba amene analenga nyanja ndi mtunda." 
Jonah1:10 Pamenepo amunawo anaopa kwambiri, nati kwa iye, Ici nciani wacicita? Pakuti amunawo anadziwa kuti anathawa pamaso pa Yehova, popeza adawauza." 
Jonah1:11 Tsono anati kwa iye, Ticitenji nawe, kuti nyanja iticitire bata? popeza namondwe anakula-kulabe panyanja." 
Jonah1:12 Ndipo anati nao, Mundinyamule ndi kundiponya m'nyanja, momwemo nyanja idzacitira inu bata; pakuti ndidziwa kuti namondwe wamkuru amene wakugwerani cifukwa ca ine." 
Jonah1:13 Koma amunawo anapalasa kubwerera kumtunda, koma sanathe; pakuti namondwe wa panyanja anakulakula mokomana nao." 
Jonah1:14 Pamenepo anapfuulira kwa Yehova, nati, Tikupemphanitu, Yehova, tisatayike cifukwa ca moyo wa munthu uyu, musatisenzetse mwazi wosacimwa; pakuti, Inu Yehova, mwacita monga mudakomera Inu." 
Jonah1:15 Momwemo ananyamula Yona, namponya m'nyanja; ndipo nyanja inaleka kukokoma kwace." 
Jonah1:16 Ndipo amunawo anaopa Yehova ndi manthaakuru, namphera Yehova nsembe, nawinda." 
Jonah1:17 Koma Yehova anaikiratu cinsomba cacikuru cimeze Yona; ndipo Yona anali m'miroba mwa nsombayi masiku atatu usana ndi usiku. 
Jonah2:1 Pamenepo Yona anapemphera kwa Yehova Mulungu wace ali m'mimba mwa nsombayo. 
Jonah2:2 Ndipo anati, Ndinaitana Yehova m'nsautso yanga, Ndipo anandiyankha ine; Ndinapfuula ndiri m'mimba ya manda, Ndipo munamva mau anga." 
Jonah2:3 Pakuti munandiponya mwakuya m'kati mwa nyanja, Ndipo madzi anandizinga; Mapfunde anu onse a nyondonyondo anandimiza." 
Jonah2:4 Ndipo ndinati, Ndatayika ndicoke pamaso panu; Koma ndidzapenyanso Kacisi wanu wopatulika." 
Jonah2:5 Madzi anandizinga mpaka moyo wanga, Madzi akuya anandizungulira, Kayandeyande wa m'nyanja anandikulunga mutu." 
Jonah2:6 Ndinatsikira ku matsinde a mapiri, Mipingiridzo ya dziko inanditsekereza kosatha; Koma munandikwezera moyo wanga kuucotsa kucionongeko, Yehova Mulungu wanga." 
Jonah2:7 Pokomoka moyo wanga m'kati mwanga ndinakumbukila Yehova; Ndi pemphero langa linafikira Inu m'Kacisi wanu wopatulika. 
Jonah2:8 Iwo osamalira mabodza opanda pace Ataya cifundo cao cao. 
Jonah2:9 Koma ine ndidzakupherani Inu nsembe ndi mau akuyamika, Ndidzakwaniritsacowindacanga. Cipulumutso nca Yehova." 
Jonah2:10 Pamenepo Yehova analankhula ndi nsombayo, ndipo inamsanzira Yona kumtunda." 
Jonah3:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa Yona nthawi yaciwiri, ndi kuti," 
Jonah3:2 Nyamuka, pita ku Nineve mudzi waukuru uja, nuulalikire uthenga umene ndikuuza." 
Jonah3:3 Ndipo Yona ananyamuka, napita ku Nineve, monga mwa mau a Yehova. Koma Nineve ndiwo mudzi waukuru pamaso pa Yehova, wa ulendo wa masiku atatu." 
Jonah3:4 Ndipo Yona anayamba kulowa mudziwo ulendo wa tsiku limodzi, nalalikira, nati, Atsala masiku makumi anai ndipo Nineve adzapasuka." 
Jonah3:5 Ndipo anthu a Nineve anakhulupirira Mulungu, nalalikira cosala, nabvala ciguduli, kuyambira wamkuru kufikira wamng'ono wa iwowa." 
Jonah3:6 Pakuti mau awa anafikira mfumu ya Nineve, ndipo Inanyamuka ku mpando wace wacifumu, nibvula copfunda cace, nipfunda ciguduli, nikhala m'mapulusa." 
Jonah3:7 Ndipo analalikira, nanena m'Nineve mwa lamulo la mfumu ndi nduna zace, ndi kuti, Ngakhale munthu kapena nyama, ngakhale ng'ombe kapena nkhosa, zisalawe kanthu, zisadye, zisamwe madzi;" 
Jonah3:8 koma zipfundidwe ndi ciguduli munthu ndi nyama, nizipfuulire kolimba kwa Mulungu; ndipo abwere yense kuleka njira yace yoipa, ndi ciwawa ciri m'manja mwace." 
Jonah3:9 Kaya, akatembenuka Mulungu, ndi kuleka kubwera ku mkwiyo wace waukali, kuti tisatayike," 
Jonah3:10 Ndipo Mulungu anaona nchito zao, kuti anabwera kuleka njira yao yoipa; ndipo Mulungu analeka coipa adanenaci kuti adzawacitira, osacicita." 
Jonah4:1 Koma sikudakomera Yona konse, ndipo anapsa mtima." 
Jonah4:2 Ndipo anapemphera kwa Yehova, nati, Ha, Yehova! si ndiwo mau anga ndikali m'dziko langa? cifukwa cace ndinafulumira kuthawira ku Tarisi, pakuti ndinadziwa kuti Inu ndinu Mulungu wacisomo ndi wodzala cifundo, wolekerera ndi wokoma mtima mocuruka, ndi woleka coipaco." 
Jonah4:3 Ndipo tsopano, Yehova, mundicotseretu moyo wanga, kundikomera ine kufa, osakhala ndi moyo ai." 
Jonah4:4 Ndipo Yehova anati, Uyenera kupsa mtima kodi?" 
Jonah4:5 Pamenepo Yona anaturuka m'mudzi, nakhala pansi kum'mawa kwa mudzi, nadzimangira komweko thandala, nakhala pansi pace mumthunzi mpaka adzaona cocitikira mudzi." 
Jonah4:6 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu anaikiratu msatsi, naumeretsera Yona, ucite mthunzi pamutu pace, kumlanditsa m'nsautso yace. Ndipo Yona anakondwera kwambiri cifukwa ca msatsiwo." 
Jonah4:7 Koma Mulungu anauikira mphanzi pakuca m'mawa mwace, ndiyo inadya msatsi, nufota." 
Jonah4:8 Ndipo kunali, poturuka dzuwa Mulungu anaika mphepo ya kum'mawa yotentha, ndipo dzuwa linatentha mutu wace wa Yona, nalefuka iye, nadzipempherera kuti afe; nati, Kundikomera ine kufa, kukhala ndi moyo ai." 
Jonah4:9 Ndipo Mulungu anati kwa Yona, Uyenera kodi kupsa mtima cifukwa ca msatsiwo? Nati iye, Ee, kundiyenera ine kupsa mtima mpaka imfa." 
Jonah4:10 Ndipo Yehova anati, Unacitira cifundo msatsiwo umene sunagwirapo nchito, kapena kuumeretsa, umene unamera usiku, nutha usiku;" 
Jonah4:11 ndipo sindiyenera Ine kodi kucitira cifundo Nineve mudzi waukuru uwu; m'mene muli anthu oposa zikwi zana limodzi mphambu zikwi makumi awiri osadziwa kusiyanitsa pakati pa dzanja lao lamanja ndi lamanzere, ndi zoweta zambiri zomwe?" 
Micah1:1 MAU a Yehova amene anadza kwa Mika wa ku Morese masiku a Yotamu, Ahazi, ndi Hezekiya, amene adaona za Samariya ndi Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:2 Imvani, mitundu ya anthu, inu nonse; tamvera, dziko lapansi, ndi zonse ziri m'mwemo; ndipo Ambuye Yehova akhale mboni yakutsutsa inu, Ambuye m'Kacisi wace wopatulika." 
Micah1:3 Pakuti, taonani, Yehova alikuturuka m'malo mwace, nadzatsika, nadzaponda pa misanje ya dziko lapansi." 
Micah1:4 Ndi mapiri adzasungunuka pansi pa Iye, ndi zigwa zidzang'ambika, ngati sera pamoto, ngati madzi otsanulidwa potsetseremba." 
Micah1:5 Cicitika ici conse cifukwa ca kulakwa kwa Yakobo, ndi macimo a nyumba ya Israyeli. Kulakwa kwa Yakobo nkotani? Si ndiko Samariya? ndi misanje ya Yuda ndi iti? si ndiyo Yerusalemu?" 
Micah1:6 Cifukwa cace ndidzaika Samariya ngati mulu wa miyala ya m'munda, ngati zooka m'munda wamphesa; ndipo ndidzataya miyala yace m'cigwa, ndi kufukula maziko ace." 
Micah1:7 Ndi mafano ace osema onse adzaphwanyika, ndi mphotho zace zonse zidzatenthedwa ndi moto, ndi mafano ace onse ndidzawapasula; pakuti anazisonkhanitsa pa mphotho ya mkazi waciwerewere, ndipo zidzabwerera ku mphotho ya mkazi waciwerewere." 
Micah1:8 Cifukwa ca ici ndidzacita maliro, ndi kucema, ndidzayenda wolandidwa ndi wamarisece; ndidzalira ngati mimbulu, ndi kubuma ngati nthiwatiwa." 
Micah1:9 Pakuti mabala ace ndi osapola; pakuti afikira ku Yuda; afikira ku cipata ca anthu anga, ku Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:10 Musacifotokoza m'Gati, musalira misozi konse; m'nyumba ya Afira ndinagubuduka m'pfumbi." 
Micah1:11 Pitiratu, wokhala m'Safiri iwe, wamarisece ndi wamanyazi; wokhala m'Zanana sanaturuka; maliro a Betezeli adzakulandani pokhala pace." 
Micah1:12 Pakuti wokhala m'Maroti alindira cokoma, popeza coipa catsika kwa Yehova kumka ku cipata ca Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:13 Manga gareta ku kavalo waliwiro, wokhala m'Lakisi iwe, woyamba kucimwitsa mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni ndi iye; pakuti zolakwa za Israyeli zinapezedwa mwa iwe." 
Micah1:14 Cifukwa cace pereka mphatso zolawirana kwa Moreseti Gati; nyumba za Akizibi zidzakhala cinthu cabodza kwa mafumu a Israyeli. 
Micah1:15 Ndidzakutengeranso wokhala m'Maresa iwe, iye amene adzakulandira ukhale colowa cace; ulemerero wa Israyeli udzafikira ku Adulamu." 
Micah1:16 Udziyeseze wadazi, udzimete wekha cifukwa ca ana ako okondwera nao; kuza dazi lako ngati la muimba; pakuti anakucokera, nalowa ndende." 
Micah2:1 Tsoka iwo akulingirira cinyengo, ndi kukonza coipa pakama pao! kutaca m'mawa acicita, popeza cikhozeka m'manja mwao." 
Micah2:2 Ndipo akhumbira minda, nailanda; ngakhale nyumba, nazicotsa; asautsa mwamuna ndi nyumba yace, inde munthu ndi colowa cace." 
Micah2:3 Cifukwa cace atero Yehova, Taonani, ndilingirira coipa pa banja ili, cimene simudzacotsako makosi anu, kapena kuyenda modzikuza inu; Pakuti nyengo iyi ndi yoipa." 
Micah2:4 Tsiku ilo adzanena fanizo lakunena inu, nadzalira maliro olemerera, ndi kuti, Tapasuka konse; iye asintha gawo la anthu anga; ha! andicotsera ili! agawira opikisana minda yathu." 
Micah2:5 Cifukwa cace udzasowa woponya cingwe camaere m'msonkhano wa Yehova. 
Micah2:6 Musamanenera, amanenera ati. Sadzanenera kwa awa; matonzo sadzacoka." 
Micah2:7 Kodi adzati, Nyumba ya Yakobo iwe, Mzimu wa Yehova waperewera kodi? izi ndi nchito zace kodi? Mau anga samcitira zokoma kodi, iye amene ayenda coongoka?" 
Micah2:8 Koma ngakhale dzulo anthu anga anauka ngati mdani; mukwatula copfunda ku maraya a iwo opitirira mosatekeseka, ngati anthu osafuna nkhondo." 
Micah2:9 Muwataya akazi a anthu anga kunja kwa nyumba zao zokondweretsa; mucotsa ulemerero wanga kwa ana ao kosatha. 
Micah2:10 Nyamukani, cokani, pakuti popumula panu si pano ai; cifukwa ca udio Wakuononga ndi cionongeko cacikuru." 
Micah2:11 Munthu akayenda ndi mtima wacinyengo ndi kunama, ndi kuti, Ndidzanenera kwa iwe za vinyo ndi cakumwa cakuledzeretsa; iye ndiye mneneri wa anthu ace." 
Micah2:12 Ndidzakumemezani ndithu, Yakobo, inu nonse; ndidzasonkhanitsa ndithu otsala a Israyeli; ndidzawaika pamodzi ngati nkhosa za ku Boma; ngati zoweta pakati pa busa pao adzacita phokoso cifukwa ca kucuruka anthu." 
Micah2:13 Wotyola wakwera pamaso pao; iwo anatyola, napita kucipata, naturuka pomwepo; ndi mfumu yao yapita pamaso pao, ndipo Yehova awatsogolera." 
Micah3:1 Ndipo ndinati, Imvanitu, inu akuru a Yakobo, ndi oweruza a nyumba ya Israyeli; simuyenera kodi kudziwa ciweruzo?" 
Micah3:2 inu amene mudana naco cokoma ndi kukondana naco coipa; inu akumyula khungu lao pathupi pao, ndi mnofu wao pa mafupa ao;" 
Micah3:3 inu amene mukudyanso mnofu wa anthu anga; ndi kusenda khungu lao ndi kutyola mafupa ao; inde awaduladula ngati nyama yoti aphike, ndi ngati nyama ya mumphika." 
Micah3:4 Pamenepo adzapfuulira kwa Yehova, koma sadzawayankha; inde, adzawabisira nkhope yace nthawi yomweyo, monga momwe anaipsa macitidwe ao." 
Micah3:5 Atero Yehova za aneneriakulakwitsa anthu anga; akuluma ndi mano ao, ndi kupfuula, Mtendere; ndipo, ali yense wosapereka m'kamwa mwao, amkonzera nkhondo;" 
Micah3:6 cifukwa cace kudzakhala ngati usiku kwa inu, wopanda masomphenya; ndipo kudzadera inu, wopanda kulosa; ndi dzuwa lidzalowera aneneri, ndi usana udzawadera bii." 
Micah3:7 Ndipo alauli adzacita manyazi, ndi olosa adzathedwa nzeru; ndipo onsewo adzasunama; pakuti kuyankha kwa Mulungu kulibe." 
Micah3:8 Koma ine ndidzala nayo mphamvu mwa Mzimu ya Yehova, ndi ciweruzo, ndi camuna, kufotokozera Yakobo kulakwa kwace, ndi kwa Israyeli cimo lace." 
Micah3:9 Tamvanitu ici, akuru a nyumba ya Yakobo inu, ndi oweruza a nyumba ya Israyeli inu, akuipidwa naco ciweruzo, ndi kupotoza zoongoka zonse." 
Micah3:10 Amanga Ziyoni ndi mwazi, ndi Yerusalemu ndi cisalungamo." 
Micah3:11 Akuru ace aweruza cifukwa ca mphotho, ndi ansembe ace aphunzitsa cifukwa ca malipo, ndi aneneri ace alosa cifukwa ca ndarama; koma atsamira pa Yehova, nati, Kodi Yehova sali pakati pa ife? palibe coipa codzatigwera." 
Micah3:12 Momwemo Ziyoni adzalimidwa ngati: munda cifukwa ca inu, ndi m'Yerusalemu mudzasanduka miunda, ndi phiri la nyumba ngati misanje ya m'nkhalango." 
Micah4:1 Koma kudzacitika masiku otsiriza, kuti phiri la nyumba ya Yehova lidzakhazikika pamwamba pa mapiri, nilidzakuzika pamwamba pa zitunda; ndi mitundu ya anthu idzayendako." 
Micah4:2 Ndipo amitundu ambiri adzamuka, nadzati, Tiyeni, tikwere ku phiri la Yehova, ndi ku nyumba ya Mulungu wa Yakobo; kuti Iye atiphunzitse njira zace, ndipo tidzayenda m'mabande ace; pakuti ku Ziyoni kudzaturuka cilamulo, ndi ku Yerusalemu mau a Yehova." 
Micah4:3 Ndipo Iye adzaweruza mwa mitundu yambiri ya anthu, nadzadzudzula amitundu amphamvu ali kutali; ndipo iwo adzasula malupanga ao akhale makasu, ndi mikondo yao ikhale mazenga, mtundu wa anthu sudzasamulira mtundu unzace lupanga, kapena kuphunziranso nkhondo." 
Micah4:4 Koma adzakhala munthu yense patsinde pa mpesa wace, ndi patsinde pa mkuyu wace; ndipo sipadzakhala wakuwaopsa; pakuti pakamwa pa Yehova wa makamu padanena." 
Micah4:5 Pakuti mitundu yonse ya anthu idzayenda, wonse m'dzina la mlungu wace, ndipo ife tidzayenda m'dzina la Yehova Mulungu wathu ku nthawi yomka muyaya." 
Micah4:6 Tsiku ilo, ati Yehova, ndidzamemeza wakutsimphinayo, ndi kusonkhanitsa wopitikitsidwayo, ndi iye amene ndinamsautsa;" 
Micah4:7 ndipo wotsimphinayo ndidzamuyesa wotsala, ndi iye wotayidwa kutali mtundu wamphamvu; ndipo Yehova adzakhala mfumu yao m'phiri la Ziyoni kuyambira pamenepo kufikira kosatha." 
Micah4:8 Ndipo iwe, nsanja ya nkhosa, citunda ca mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, udzafikira iwe, inde udzafika ulamuliro wakale, ufumu wa mwana wamkazi wa Yerusalemu." 
Micah4:9 Tsono upfuulitsa cifukwa ninji? palibe mfumu mwa iwe kodi? watayika kodi mu uphungu wako, kuti zowawa zakugwira ngati mkazi wobala?" 
Micah4:10 Imva zowawa, nuyesetse kubala, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni, ngati mkazi wakubala; pakuti udzaturuka m'mudzi tsopano, nudzakhala kuthengo, nudzafika ku Babulo; komweko udzapulumutsidwa; komweko Yehova adzakuombola m'manja a adani ako." 
Micah4:11 Ndipo tsopano amitundu ambiri asonkhana kuyambana nawe, akuti, Aipsidwe, diso lathu lipenye ku Ziyoni." 
Micah4:12 Koma sadziwa zolingirira za Yehova, kapena kuzindikira uphungu wace; pakuti anawasonkhanitsa ngati mitolo kudwale." 
Micah4:13 Nyamuka nupunthe, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; pakuti ndidzasanduliza nyanga yako ikhale yacitsulo, ndi ziboda zako zikhale zamkuwa; ndipo udzaphwanya mitundu yambiri ya anthu; ndipo uzipereka ciperekere phindu lao kwa Yehova, ndi cuma cao kwa Ambuye wa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Micah5:1 Uzisonkhana tsopano magulu magulu, mwana wamkazi wa magulu iwe; watimangira misasa, adzapanda woweruza wa Israyeli ndi ndodo patsaya." 
Micah5:2 Koma iwe, Betelehemu Efrata, ndiwe wamng'ono kuti ukhale mwa zikwi za Yuda, mwa iwe mudzanditurukira wina wakudzakhala woweruza m'Israyeli; maturukiro ace ndiwo a kale lomwe, kuyambira nthawi yosayamba." 
Micah5:3 Cifukwa cace Iye adzawapereka kufikira nthawi yoti wobalayo wabala; pamenepo otsala a abale ace adzabwera pamodzi ndi ana a Israyeli," 
Micah5:4 Ndipo adzaimirira, nadzadyetsa nkhosa zace mu mphamvu ya Yehova, m'ukulu wa dzina la Yehova Mulungu wace; ndipo iwo adzakhalabe; pakuti pamenepo Iye adzakhala wamkuru kufikira malekezero a dziko lapansi." 
Micah5:5 Ndipo ameneyo adzakhala Mtendere; pamene a ku Asuri adzalowa m'dziko lathu, ndi pamene adzaponda m'zinyumba zathu, tidzawaukitsira abusa asanu ndi awiri, ndi akalonga asanu ndi atatu." 
Micah5:6 Ndipo iwo adzatha dziko la Asuri ndi lupanga, ndi dziko la Nimrodi, ndilo polowera pace; ndipo adzatilanditsa kwa a ku Asuri pamene alowa m'dziko lathu, pamene aponda m'kati mwa malire athu." 
Micah5:7 Ndipo otsala a Yakobo adzakhala pakati pa mitundu yambiri ya anthu, ngati mame ocokera kwa Yehova, ngati mvula paudzu, yosacedwera munthu, yosalindira ana a anthu." 
Micah5:8 Ndipo, otsala a Yakobo adzakhala mwa amitundu, pakati pa mitundu yambiri ya anthu, ngati mkango mwa nyama za kuthengo, ngati msona wa mkango mwa magulu a nkhosa; umenewo ukapitako, upondereza, numwetula, ndipo palibe wakupulumutsa." 
Micah5:9 Dzanja lako likwezeke pamwamba pa iwo akuyambana nawe, ndi adani ako onse aonongeke." 
Micah5:10 Ndipo kudzacitika tsiku ilo, ati Yehova, ndidzaononga akavalo ako m'kati mwako, ndi kutha magareta ako;" 
Micah5:11 ndipo ndidzaononga midzi ya m'dziko lako, ndi kupasula malinga ako onse;" 
Micah5:12 ndipo ndidzaononga zanyanga za m'dzanja lako; ndipo sudzakhalanso nao alosi; 
Micah5:13 ndidzaononganso mafano ako osema, ndi zoimiritsa zako pakati pako; ndipo sudzalambiranso nchito za manja ako." 
Micah5:14 Ndipo ndidzazula zifanizo zako m'kati mwako, ndi kutha midzi yako." 
Micah5:15 Ndipo ndidzabwezera amitundu osamvera cilango mu mkwiyo waukali. 
Micah6:1 Tamverani tsono conena Yehova: Nyamuka, tsutsana nao mapiri, ndi zitunda zimve mau ako." 
Micah6:2 Tamvani, mapiri inu, citsutsano ca Yehova, ndi inu maziko olimba a dziko lapansi; pakuti Yehova ali naco citsutsano ndi anthu ace, ndipo adzatsutsana ndi Israyeli." 
Micah6:3 Anthu anga inu, ndakucitirani ciani? ndakulemetsani ndi ciani? citani umboni wonditsutsa." 
Micah6:4 Pakuti ndinakukwezani kukuturutsani m'dziko la Aigupto, ndi kuombola inu m'nyumba ya ukapolo; ndipo ndinatuma akutsogolereni Mose, Aroni, ndi Miriamu." 
Micah6:5 Anthu anga, kumbukilanitu cofunsira Balaki mfumu ya Moabu, ndi comuyankha Balamu mwana wa Beori, kuyambira ku Sitimu kufikira ku Giligala; kuti mudziwe zolungama za Yehova." 
Micah6:6 Ndidzafika kwa Yehova ndi ciani, ndi kuwerama kwa Mulungu Wam'mwamba? Kodi ndifike kwa Iye ndi nsembe zopsereza, ndi ana a ng'ombe a caka cimodzi?" 
Micah6:7 Kodi Yehova adzakondwera nazo nkhosa zamphongo zikwi, kapena ndi mitsinje ya mafuta zikwi khumi? Kodi ndipereke mwana wanga woyamba cifukwa ca kulakwa kwanga, cipatso ca thupi langa cifukwa ca kucimwa kwa moyo wanga?" 
Micah6:8 Iye anakuuza, munthuwe, comwe ciri cokoma; ndipo Yehova afunanji nawe koma kuti ucite colungama, ndi kukonda cifundo ndi kuyenda modzicepetsa ndi Mulungu wako?" 
Micah6:9 Mau a Yehova aitana mudzi, ndi wanzeru aopa dzina lanu; tamverani ndodo, ndi Iye amene anaiika." 
Micah6:10 Kodi m'nyumba ya woipa mukali cuma cosalungama, ndi muyeso wocepa umene ayenera kuipidwa nao?" 
Micah6:11 Kodi ndikhoza kuyera ndi miyeso yoipa, ndi thumba la miyala yonyenga?" 
Micah6:12 Pakuti anthu ace olemera adzala ndi ciwawa, ndi okhalamo amanena bodza, ndi lilime lao limacita monyenga m'kamwa mwao." 
Micah6:13 Cifukwa cace Inenso ndakukantha ndi kukupweteketsa; ndakupulula cifukwa ca zocimwa zako. 
Micah6:14 Udzadya koma osakhuta; ndi njala yako idzakhala pakati pako; ndipo udzacotsa koma osalanditsa; ndi ici wacilanditsa ndidzacipereka kulupanga. 
Micah6:15 Udzafesa koma osaceka; udzaponda azitona koma osadzola mafuta; udzaponda mphesa koma osamwa vinyo. 
Micah6:16 Pakuti asunga malemba a Omri, ndi nchito za nyumba ya Ahabu, ndipo mumayenda m'uphungu wao; kuti ndikusandulize bwinja, ndi okhalamo cotsonya; ndipo mudzasenza citonzo ca anthu anga." 
Micah7:1 Kalanga ine! pakuti ndikunga atapulula zipatso za m'mwamvu, atakunkha m'munda wamphesa; palibe mphesa zakudya; moyo wanga ukhumba nkhuyu yoyamba kupsa." 
Micah7:2 Watha wacifundo m'dziko, palibe woongoka mwa anthu; onsewo alalira mwazi; yense asaka mbale wace ndi ukonde." 
Micah7:3 Manja ao onse awiri agwira coipa kucicita ndi cangu; kalonga apempha, ndi woweruza aweruza cifukwa ca mphotho; ndi wamkuruyo angonena cosakaza moyo wace; ndipo aciluka pamodzi." 
Micah7:4 Wokoma wa iwo akunga mitungwi; woongoka wao aipa koposa mpanda waminga; tsiku la alonda ako la kulangidwa kwako lafika, tsopano kwafika kuthedwa nzeru kwao." 
Micah7:5 Musakhulupirira bwenzi, musatama bwenzi loyanja; usamtsegulire pakhomo pakamwa pako, ngakhale kwa iye wogona m'fukato mwako." 
Micah7:6 Pakuti mwana wamwamuna apeputsa atate, mwana wamkazi aukira amace, mpongozi aukira mpongozi wace; adani ace a munthu ndiwo a m'nyumba yace." 
Micah7:7 Koma ine, ndidzadikira Yehova; ndidzalindirira Mulungu wa cipulumutso canga; Mulungu wanga adzandimvera." 
Micah7:8 Usandiseka, mdani wangawe; pakugwa ine ndidzaukanso; pokhala ine mumdima Yehova adzakhala kuunika kwanga." 
Micah7:9 Ndidzasenza mkwiyo wa Yehova, cifukwa ndamcimwira, mpaka andinenera mlandu wanga, ndi kundiweruzira mlandu wanga; adzanditurutsira kwa kuunika, ndipo ndidzapenya cilungamo cace." 
Micah7:10 Pamenepo mdani wanga adzaciona, ndi manyazi adzamkuta iye amene adati kwa ine, Ali kuti Yehova Mulungu wako? Maso anga adzamuona; tsopano adzampondereza ngati thope la m'miseu." 
Micah7:11 Tsiku lakumanga malinga ako, tsiku lomwelo lembalo lidzacotsedwa kunka kutali." 
Micah7:12 Tsiku lomwelo adzadza kwa iwe, kucokera ku Asuri ndi midzi ya ku Aigupto, kuyambira ku Aigupto kufikira ku Mtsinje, ndi kuyambira kunyanja kufikira kunyanja, ndi kuyambira kuphiri kufikira kuphiri." 
Micah7:13 Koma dziko lidzakhala labwinja cifukwa ca iwo okhalamo, mwa zipatso za macitidwe ao." 
Micah7:14 Mudyetse anthu anu ndi ndodo yanu, nkhosa za colowa canu zokhala pa zokha m'nkhalango pakati pa Karimeli, zidye m'Basana ndi m'Gileadi masiku a kale lomwe." 
Micah7:15 Monga masiku a kuturuka kwako m'dziko la Aigupto ndidzamuonetsa zodabwitsa. 
Micah7:16 Amitundu adzaona nadzacita manyazi ndi mphamvu yao yonse; adzagwira pakamwa, m'makutu mwao mudzagontha." 
Micah7:17 Adzanyambita pfumbi ngati njoka; ngati zokwawa za padziko, adzanjenjemera poturuka m'ngaka mwao; adzafika kwa Yehova Mulungu wao ndi mantha, nadzaopa cifukwa ca iwe." 
Micah7:18 Ndani Mulungu wofanana ndi Inu, wakukhululukira mphulupulu, wakupitirira zolakwa za otsala a colowa cace? sasunga mkwiyo wace ku nthawi yonse popeza akondwera naco cifundo." 
Micah7:19 Adzabwera, nadzaticitira nsoni; adzagonjetsa mphulupulu zathu; ndipo mudzataya zocimwa zao zonse m'nyanja yakuya," 
Micah7:20 Mudzapatsa kwa Yakobo coonadi, ndi kwa Abrahamu cifundo cimene munalumbirira makolo athu kuyambira masiku a kale lomwe." 
Nahum1:1 KATUNDU wa Nineve. Buku la masomphenya a Nahumu wa ku Elikosi. 
Nahum1:2 Yehova ndiye Mulungu wansanje, nabwezera cilango; Yehova ndiye wobwezera cilango, ndi waukali ndithu; Yehova ndiye wobwezera cilango oyambana naye, nasungira mkwiyo pa adani ace." 
Nahum1:3 Yehova ndiye wolekerera mkwiyo, koma wa mphamvu yaikuru; ndi wosamasula ndithu woparamula; njira ya Yehova iri m'kabvumvulu ndi mumkuntho; ndipo mitambo ndiyo pfumbi la mapazi ace." 
Nahum1:4 Adzudzula nyanja, naiphwetsa, naumitsa mitsinje yonse; Basana ndi Karimeli afota, ndi duwa la ku Lebano linyala." 
Nahum1:5 Mapiri agwedezeka cifukwa ca Iye, ndi zitunda zisungunuka; ndi dziko lapansi likwezeka pamaso pace, ndi maiko ndi onse okhala m'mwemo." 
Nahum1:6 Adzaima ndani pa kulunda kwace? ndipo adzakhalitsa ndani pa mkwiyo wace wotentha? ukali wace utsanulidwa ngati moto, ndi matanthwe asweka ndi Iye." 
Nahum1:7 Yehova ali wabwino, ndiye polimbikirapo tsiku la msauko; ndipo adziwa iwo omkhulupirira Iye." 
Nahum1:8 Koma ndi cigumula cosefukira adzatha konse malo ace, nadzapitikitsira adani ace kumdima." 
Nahum1:9 Mulingaliranji cotsutsana ndi Yehova? Iye adzatha psiti; nsautso siidzauka kawiri. 
Nahum1:10 Pakuti cinkana akunga minga yoyangayanga, naledzera naco coledzeretsa cao, adzathedwa konse ngati ciputu couma." 
Nahum1:11 Mwa iwe waturuka wina wolingalira coipa cotsutsana ndi Yehova, ndiye phungu wopanda pace." 
Nahum1:12 Atero Yehova: Angakhale iwo ali ndi mphamvu yokwanira, nacuruka momwemo, koma momwemonso adzasalikidwa, ndipo iye adzapitiratu. Cinkana ndakuzunza iwe, sindidzakuzunzanso." 
Nahum1:13 Koma tsopano ndidzatyola ndi kukucotsera goli lace, ndipo ndidzadula zomangira zako." 
Nahum1:14 Ndipo Yehova walamulira za iwe kuti asabzalidwenso ena a dzina lako; m'nyumba ya milungu yako ndidzacotsa fano losema ndi fano loyenga; ndidzakukonzerapo manda, pakuti iwe ndiwe wopepuka." 
Nahum1:15 Taonani pamapiri mapazi a iye wakulalikira uthenga wabwino, wakubukitsa mtendere! cita madyerero ako, Yuda, kwaniritsa zowinda zako; pakuti wopanda paceyo sadzapitanso mwa iwe; iye waonongeka konse." 
Nahum2:1 Wophwanyayo wakwera pamaso pako; sunga linga, yang'anira panjira, limbitsa m'cuuno mwako, limbikitsatu mphamvu yako." 
Nahum2:2 Pakuti Yehova abwezeranso ukulu wace wa Yakobo ngati ukulu wace wa Israyeli; pakuti okhuthula anawakhuthula, naipsa nthambi zace za mpesa." 
Nahum2:3 Zikopa za amphamvu ace zasanduka zofiira, ngwazi zibvala mlangali; magareta anyezimira ndi citsulo tsiku la kukonzera kwace, ndi mikondo itinthidwa." 
Nahum2:4 Magareta acita mkokomo m'miseu, akankhana m'makwalala; maonekedwe ao akunga miuni, athamanga ngati mphezi." 
Nahum2:5 Akumbukila omveka ace; akhumudwa m'kupita kwao, afulumira ku linga lace, ndi cocinjiriza cakonzeka." 
Nahum2:6 Pa zipata za mitsinje patseguka, ndi cinyumba casungunuka." 
Nahum2:7 Catsimikizika, abvulidwa, atengedwa, adzakazi ace alira ngati mau a nkhunda, nadziguguda pacifuwa pao." 
Nahum2:8 Koma Nineve wakhala ciyambire cace ngati thamanda lamadzi; koma athawa. Imani, Imani! ati, koma palibe woceuka." 
Nahum2:9 Funkhani siliva, funkhani golidi; pakuti palibe kutha kwace kwa zosungikazo, kwa cuma ca zipangizo zofunika ziri zonse." 
Nahum2:10 Ndiye mopanda kanthu mwacemo ndi mwacabe, ndi wopasuka; ndi mtima usungunuka, ndi maondo aombana, ndi m'zuuno zonse muwawa, ndi nkhope zao zatumbuluka." 
Nahum2:11 Iri kuti ngaka ya mikango, ndi podyera misona ya mikango; kumene mkango, waumuna ndi waukazi, ukayenda ndi mwana wa mkango, kopanda wakuiposa?" 
Nahum2:12 Mkangowo unamwetula zofikira ana ace, nusamira yaikazi yace, nudzaza mapanga ace ndi nyama, ngaka zace ndi zojiwa." 
Nahum2:13 Taona, nditsutsana nawe, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndipo ndidzatentha magareta ace m'utsi; ndi lupanga lidzadya misona yako ya mkango; ndipo ndidzacotsa zofunkha zako pa dziko lapansi, ndi mau a mithenga yako sadzamvekanso." 
Nahum3:1 Tsoka mudzi wa mwazi! udzala nao mabodza ndi zacifwamba; zacifwamba sizidukiza. 
Nahum3:2 Kumveka kwa cikoti, ndi mkokomo wa kuyenda kwa njinga za magareta; ndi kaphata kaphata wa akavalo, ndi gwegwegwe wa magareta;" 
Nahum3:3 munthu wokwera pa kavalo, ndi lupanga lonyezimira, ndi mkondo wong'anipa; ndi aunyinji ophedwa, ndi cimulu ca mitembo, palibe kutha zitanda; angokhumudwa ndi zitanda;" 
Nahum3:4 cifukwa ca ciwerewere cocuruka ca waciwerewere wokongola, ndiye mkaziyo mwini nyanga, wakugulitsa amitundu mwa ciwerewere cace, ndi mabanja mwa nyanga zace." 
Nahum3:5 Taona, nditsutsana nawe, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndidzaphimba nkhope yako ndi nsaru yako yoyesa mthendene; ndipo ndidzaonetsa amitundu umarisece wako, ndi maufumu manyazi ako." 
Nahum3:6 Ndipo ndidzakuponyera zonyansa, ndi kukucititsa manyazi, ndi kukuika copenyapo," 
Nahum3:7 Ndipo kudzali kuti onse akupenyerera iwe adzakuthawa, nadzati, Nineve wapasuka, adzamlira maliro ndani? ndidzakufunira kuti akukutonthoza?" 
Nahum3:8 Kodi uli wabwino woposa No-Amoni, wokhala pakati pa mitsinje wozingidwa ndi madzi; amene chemba lace ndilo nyanja, ndi linga lace ndilo nyanja?" 
Nahum3:9 Kusi ndi Aigupto ndiwo mphamvu yace, ndiyo yosatha, Puti ndi Lubimu ndiwo akukuthandiza." 
Nahum3:10 Koma iye anatengedwa, analowa ndende; ana ace a makanda anaphwanyika polekeza pace pa miseu yace yonse; ndi pa omveka ace anacita maere, ndi akulu ace onse anamangidwa maunyolo." 
Nahum3:11 Iwenso udzaledzera, udzabisala; iwenso udzafunanso polimbikira cifukwa ca mdani." 
Nahum3:12 Malinga ako onse adzanga mikuyu ndi nkhuyu zoyamba kupsa; akaigwedeza zingokugwa m'kamwa mwa wakudya. 
Nahum3:13 Taona, anthuako m'kati mwako akunga akazi; zipata za dziko lako zatsegulidwira adani ako papakuru; moto watha mipingiridzo yako." 
Nahum3:14 Udzitungiretu madzi a nthawi yokumangira misasa, limbikitsa malinga ako, lowa kuthope, ponda dothi, limbitsa ng'anjo yanjerwa." 
Nahum3:15 Pomwepo moto udzatha iwe; lupanga lidzakuononga; lidzatha iwe ngati cirimamine; udzicurukitse ngati cirimamine, udzicurukitse ngati dzombe." 
Nahum3:16 Wacurukitsa amalonda ako koposa nyenyezi za kuthambo; cirimamine anyambita, nauluka, nathawa." 
Nahum3:17 Obvala korona ako akunga dzombe, ndi akazembe, ndi akazembe ako ngati ziwalamsatsi zakutera m'macinga tsiku lacisanu, koma likafundukula dzuwa ziuluka nizithawa, ndi kumene zinakhalako sikudziwikanso." 
Nahum3:18 Abusa ako aodzera, mfumu ya ku Asuri; omveka ako apumula; anthu ako amwazika pamapiri, ndipo palibe wakuwasonkhanitsa." 
Nahum3:19 Palibe cakulunzitsa kutyoka kwako; bala lako liwawa; onse akumva mbiri yako akuombera manja; pakuti ndaniyo kuipa kwako sikunampitapitabe? 
Habakkuk1:1 KATUNDU adamuona Habakuku 
Habakkuk1:2 Yehova, ndidzapfuula mpaka liti osamva Inu? ndipfuulira kwa Inu za ciwawa, koma simupulumutsa." 
Habakkuk1:3 Mundionetseranji zopanda pace, ndi kundionetsa zobvuta? pakuti kufunkha ndi ciwawa ziri pamaso panga; ndipo pali ndeli nauka makani." 
Habakkuk1:4 Pakuti cilamulo calekeka, ndi ciweruzo siciturukira konse; popeza woipa azinga wolungama, cifukwa cace ciweruzo cituruka copindika." 
Habakkuk1:5 Penyani mwa amitundu, penyetsetsani, nimudabwe kwakukuru, pakuti ndicita nchito masiku anu, imene simudzabvomera cinkana akufotokozerani." 
Habakkuk1:6 Pakuti taonani, ndiukitsa Akasidi, mtundu uja wowawa ndi waliwiro, wopitira, pa citando ca dziko lapansi, kulowa m'malo mosati mwao, mukhale mwao mwao." 
Habakkuk1:7 Ali oopsa, acititsa mantha, ciweruzo cao ndi ukulu wao zituruka kwa iwo eni." 
Habakkuk1:8 Akavalo ao aposa anyalugwe liwiro lao, aposa mimbulu ya madzulo ukali wao, ndipo apakavalo ao atanda; inde apakavalo ao afumira kutali; auluka ngati ciombankhanga cofulumira kudya." 
Habakkuk1:9 Adzera ciwawa onsewo; nkhope zao zikhazikika zolunjika m'tsogolo; asonkhanitsa andende ngati mcenga," 
Habakkuk1:10 Inde anyoza mafumu, aseka akalonga; aseka linga liri lonse; popeza aunjika dothi, nalilanda." 
Habakkuk1:11 Pamenepo adzapitirira ngati mphepo, oadzalakwa ndi kuparamula, iye amene aiyesa mphamvu yace mulungu wace." 
Habakkuk1:12 Si ndinu wacikhalire, Yehova Mulungu wanga, wopatulika wanga? sitidzafa. Yehova munamuikiratu kuti aweruzidwe; ndipo Inu, Thanthwe, munamkhazika kuti alangidwe." 
Habakkuk1:13 Inu wa maso osalakwa, osapenya coipa, osakhoza kupenyerera cobvuta, mupenyereranji iwo akucita mocenjerera, ndi kukhala cete pamene woipa ammeza munthu wolungama woposa iye mwini;" 
Habakkuk1:14 ndi kuyesa anthu ngati nsomba za m'nyanja, ngati zokwawa zopanda wakuzilamulira." 
Habakkuk1:15 Aziwedza zonse ndi mbedza, azigwira m'ukonde wace, nazisonkhanitsa m'khoka mwace; cifukwa cace asekera nakondwerera." 
Habakkuk1:16 Cifukwa cace aphera nsembe ukonde wace, nafukizira khoka lace, pakuti mwa izi gawo lace lilemera, ndi cakudya cace cicuruka." 
Habakkuk1:17 Kodi m'mwemo adzakhuthula m'ukonde mwace osaleka kuphabe amitundu? 
Habakkuk2:1 Ndidzaima pa dindiro langa ndi kudziika palinga, ndipo ndidzayang'anira ndione ngati adzanenanji mwa ine, ngatinso ndidzamyankha ciani pa coneneza canga." 
Habakkuk2:2 Ndipo Yehova anandiyankha nati, Lembera masomphenyawo, nuwacenutse pamagome, kuti awawerenge mofulumira." 
Habakkuk2:3 Pakuti masomphenyawo alindira nyengo yoikidwiratu, ndipo afulumirira potsirizira pace, osanama; akacedwa uwalindirire; popeza afika ndithu, osazengereza." 
Habakkuk2:4 Taonani, moyo wace udzikuza, wosaongoka m'kati mwace; koma wolungama adzakhala ndi moyo mwa cikhulupiriro cace." 
Habakkuk2:5 Ndiponso vinyo ngwonyenga, ngati munthu wodzikuza, wosakhala kwao; wakukulitsa cikhumbo cace ngati kunsi kwa manda, akunga imfa, yosakhuta, koma adzisonkhanitsira amitundu onse, nadzimemezera mitundu yonse ya anthu." 
Habakkuk2:6 Kodi sadzamnenera fanizo onsewo, ndi mwambi womnyodola, ndi kuti, Tsoka iye wocurukitsa zimene siziri zace! mpaka liti? iye wodzisenzera zigwiriro." 
Habakkuk2:7 Sadzauka kodi modzidzimuka iwo amene adzakuluma, ndi kugalamuka iwo amene adzakugwedezetsa; ndipo udzakhala zofunkha zao?" 
Habakkuk2:8 Popeza iwe wafunkha amitundu ambiri, otsala onse a mitundu ya anthu adzakufunkha iwe; cifukwa ca mwazi wa anthu, ndi ciwawa cocitikira dziko, mudzi, ndi onse okhalamo." 
Habakkuk2:9 Tsoka iye wakupindulitsira nyumba yace phindu loipa, kuti aike cisanja cace ponyamuka, kuti alanditsidwe m'dzanja la coipa!" 
Habakkuk2:10 Wapangira nyumba yako camanyazi, pakuononga mitundu yambiri ya anthu, ndipo wacimwira moyo wako." 
Habakkuk2:11 Pakuti mwala wa m'khoma upfuula, ndi mtanda wa kuphaso udzaubvomereza." 
Habakkuk2:12 Tsoka tye wakumanga mudzindi mwazi, nakhazikitsa mudzi ndi cisalungamo!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Taonani, sicicokera kwa Yehova wa makamu kodi kuti mitundu ya anthu ingogwirira moto nchito, ndi anthu angodzilemetsa pa zopanda pace?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Pakuti dziko lapansi lidzadzazidwa ndi cidziwitso ca ulemerero wa Yehova, monga madzi aphimba pansi panyanja." 
Habakkuk2:15 Tsoka wakuninkha mnzace cakumwa, ndi kuonjezako mankhwala ako, ndi kumledzeretsa, kuti upenyerere manyazi ao!" 
Habakkuk2:16 Udzazidwa nao manyazi m'malo mwa ulemerero; imwa iwenso, nukhale wosadulidwa; cikho ca dzanja lamanja la Yehova cidzatembenukira iwe, ndi kusanza kwa manyazi kudzakhala pa ulemerero wako," 
Habakkuk2:17 Pakuti ciwawa cidacitikira Lebano cidzakukuta, ndi cionongeko ca nyama cidzakuopsa; cifukwa ca mwazi wa anthu, ndi ciwawa cocitidwira dziko, mudzi, ndi onseokhalamo." 
Habakkuk2:18 Apindulanji nalo fano losema, kuti wakulipanga analisema; fano loyenga ndi mphunzitsi wamabodza, kuti wakulipanga alikhulupirira, ata panga matafano osanena mau?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Tsoka iye wakunena kwa mtengo, Galamuka; ndi kwa mwala wosalankhula, Nyamuka Kodi ici ciphunzitsa? Taona cakutidwa ndi golidi ndi siliva, ndi m'kati mwace mulibe mpweya konse." 
Habakkuk2:20 Koma Yehova ali m'Kacisi wace wopatulika; dziko lonse lapansi ale, cete pamaso pace." 
Habakkuk3:1 Pemphero la Habakuku mneneri, pa Sigionoto." 
Habakkuk3:2 Yehova, ndinamva mbiri yanu ndi mantha; Yehova, tsitsimutsani nchito yanu pakati pa zaka, Pakati pa zaka mudziwitse; Pa mkwiyo mukumbukile cifundo." 
Habakkuk3:3 Mulungu anafuma ku Temani, Ndi Woyerayo ku phiri la Parana. Ulemerero wace unaphimba miyamba, Ndi dziko lapansi linadzala ndi kumlemekeza." 
Habakkuk3:4 Ndi kunyezimira kwace kunanga kuunika; Anali nayo mitsitsi ya dzuwa yoturuka m'dzanja lace. Ndi komweko kunabisika mphamvu yace. 
Habakkuk3:5 Patsogolo pace panapita mliri, Ndi makara amoto anaturuka pa mapaziace." 
Habakkuk3:6 Anaimirira, nandengulitsa dziko lapansi; Anapenya, nanjenjemeretsa amitundu; Ndi mapiri acikhalire anamwazika, Zitunda za kale lomwe zinawerama; Mayendedwe ace ndiwo a kale lomwe." 
Habakkuk3:7 Ndinaona mahema a Kusani ali mkusauka; Nsaru zocinga za dziko la Midyani zinanjenjemera. 
Habakkuk3:8 Kodi Yehova anaipidwa nayo mitsinje? Mkwiyo wanu unali pamitsinje kodi, Kapena ukali wanu panyanja, Kuti munayenda pa akavalo anu, Pa magareta anu a cipulumutso?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Munapombosola uta wanu; Malumbiro analumbirira mafuko anali mau oona. Munang'amba dziko lapansi ndi mitsinje. 
Habakkuk3:10 Mapiri anakuonani, namva zawawa; Cigumula ca madzi cinapita; Madzi akuya anamveketsa mau ace, Nakweza manja ace m'mwamba." 
Habakkuk3:11 Dzuwa ndi mwezi zinaima njera mokhala mwao; Pa kuunika kwa mibvi yanu popita iyo. Pa kung'anipa kwa nthungo yanu yonyezimira. 
Habakkuk3:12 Munaponda dziko ndi kulunda, Munapuntha amitundu ndi mkwiyo." 
Habakkuk3:13 Munaturukira cipulumutso ca anthu anu, Cipulumutso ca odzozedwa anu; Munakantha mutu wa nyumba yawoipa, Ndi kufukula maziko kufikira m'khosi." 
Habakkuk3:14 Munapyoza ndi maluti ace mutu wa ankhondo ace; Anadza ngati kabvumvulu kundimwaza; Kukondwerera kwao kunanga kufuna kutha ozunzika mabisika. 
Habakkuk3:15 Munaponda panyanja ndi akavaloanu, Madzi amphamvu anaunjikana mulu." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ndinamva, ndi m'mimba mwanga munabwadamuka, Milomo yanga inanthunthumira pamau, M'mafupa mwanga mudalowa cibvundi, ndipo ndinanjenjemera m'malo mwanga; Kuti ndipumule tsiku lamsauko, Pamene akwerera anthu kuti ayambane nao ndi makamu." 
Habakkuk3:17 Cinkana mkuyu suphuka, Kungakhale kulibe zipatso kumpesa; Yalephera nchito ya azitona, Ndi m'minda m'mosapatsa cakudya; Ndi zoweta zacotsedwa kukhola, Palibenso ng'ombe m'makola mwao;" 
Habakkuk3:18 Koma ndidzakondwera mwa Yehova, Ndidzasekerera mwa Mulungu wa cipulumutso canga." 
Habakkuk3:19 Yehova, Ambuye, ndiye mphamvuyanga, Asanduliza mapazi anga ngati a mbawala, Nadzandipondetsa pa misanje yanga." 
Zephaniah1:1 MAU a Yehova amene anadza kwa Zefaniya mwana wa Kusi, mwana wa Gedaliya, mwana wa Amariya, mwana wa Hezekiya, masiku a Yosiya, mwana wa Amoni mfumu ya Yuda." 
Zephaniah1:2 Kuzitha ndidzazitha zonse kuzicotsa panthaka, ati Yehova." 
Zephaniah1:3 Ndidzatha munthu ndi nyama; ndidzatha mbalame za m'mlengalenga, ndi nsomba za m'nyanja, ndi zokhumudwitsa pamodzi ndi oipa; ndipo ndidzaononga anthu kuwacotsa panthaka, ati Yehova." 
Zephaniah1:4 Ndipo ndidzatambasulira dzanja langa pa Yuda, ndi pa onse okhala m'Yerusalemu; ndipo a ndidzaononga otsala a Baala kuwacotsa m'malo muno, ndi dzina la Akemari pamodzi ndi ansembe;" 
Zephaniah1:5 ndi iwo akulambira khamu la kumwamba pamwamba pa matsindwi; ndi iwo akulambira, akulumbira pali Yehova, nalumbiranso pali mfumu;" 
Zephaniah1:6 ndi iwo akubwerera osamtsata Yehova; ndi osamfuna Yehova, kapena kufunsira kwa Iye." 
Zephaniah1:7 Khala cete pamaso pa Ambuye Yehova; pakuti tsiku la Yehova liyandikira; pakuti Yehova wakonzeratu nsembe, anapatula oitanidwa ace." 
Zephaniah1:8 Ndipo kudzacitika tsiku la nsembe ya Yehova, kuti ndidzalanga akalonga ndi ana a mfumu, ndi onse akubvala cobvala cacilendo." 
Zephaniah1:9 Ndipo tsiku ilo ndidzalanga olumpha ciundo, nadzaza nyumba ya mbuye wao ndi ciwawa ndi cinyengo." 
Zephaniah1:10 Ndipo tsiku ilo, ati Yehova, kudzakhala phokoso lakulira locokera ku cipata cansomba, ndi kucema kocokera ku dera laciwiri, ndi kugamuka kwakukuru kocokera kuzitunda." 
Zephaniah1:11 Cemani okhala m'cigwa, pakuti amalonda onse atayika, onsewo osenza siliva aonongeka." 
Zephaniah1:12 Ndipo kudzacitika nthawi yomweyi kuti ndidzasanthula Yerusalemu ndi nyali, ndipo ndidzalanga amunawo okhala ndi nsenga, onena m'mtima mwao, Yehova sacita cokoma, kapena kucita coipa." 
Zephaniah1:13 Ndipo zolemera zao zidzakhala zakufunkhidwa; ndi nyumba zao zabwinja; adzamangadi nyumba, koma sadzagonamo; adzanka minda yampesa koma sadzamwa vinyo wace." 
Zephaniah1:14 Tsiku lalikuru la Yehova liri pafupi, liri pafupi lifulumira kudza, mau a tsiku la Yehova; munthu wamphamvu adzalirapo mowawa mtima." 
Zephaniah1:15 Tsikulo ndi tsiku la mkwiyo, tsiku la msauko ndi lopsinja tsiku la bwinja, ndi cipasuko, tsiku la mdima ndi la cisisira, tsiku la mitambo ndi lakuda bii;" 
Zephaniah1:16 tsiku la lipenga ndi lakupfuulira midzi yamalinga, ndi nsanja zazitali za kungondya." 
Zephaniah1:17 Ndipo ndidzatengera anthu zowapsinja, kuti adzayenda ngati anthu a'khungu, popeza anacimwira Yehova; ndi mwazi wao udzatsanulidwa ngati pfumbi, ndi nyama yao idzanga ndowe." 
Zephaniah1:18 Ngakhale siliva wao, ngakhale golidi wao sizidzakhoza kuwalanditsa tsiku la mkwiyo wa Yehova; koma dziko lonse lidzatha ndi moto wa nsanje yace; pakuti adzacita cakutsiriza, mofulumira, onse okhala m'dziko." 
Zephaniah2:1 Dzisanthuleni, inde santhulani; inu mtundu wosakhumba kanthu;" 
Zephaniah2:2 lamulo lisanabale, tsiku lisanapitirire ngati mungu, usanakugwereni mkwiyo waukali wa Yehova, lisanakugwereni tsiku la mkwiyo wa Yehova." 
Zephaniah2:3 Funani Yehova, ofatsa inu nonse a m'dziko, amene munacita ciweruzo cace; funani cilungamo, funani cifatso; kapena mudzabisika tsiku la mkwiyo wa Yehova." 
Zephaniah2:4 Pakuti Gaza adzasiyidwa, ndi Asikeloni adzakhala bwinja; adzaingitsa Asidodi usana, ndi Ekroni adzazulidwa." 
Zephaniah2:5 Tsoka, okhala m'dziko la kunyanja, mtundu wa Akereti! Mau a Yehova atsutsana nawe, Kanani, dziko la Afilisti; ndidzakuononga, kuti pasakhale wokhala m'dziko." 
Zephaniah2:6 Ndipo dziko la kunyanja lidzakhala husa, ndi mapanga a abusa, ndi makola a zoweta." 
Zephaniah2:7 Ndipo dziko la kunyanja lidzakhala la otsala a nyumba ya Yuda; adzadyetsa zoweta zao pamenepo; madzulo adzagona m'nyumba za Asikeloni; pakuti Yehova Mulungu wao adzawazonda, nadzabweza undende wao." 
Zephaniah2:8 Ndinamva kutonza kwa Moabu ndi matukwano a ana a Amoni, zimene anatonza nazo anthu anga, ndi kudzikuza pa malire ao." 
Zephaniah2:9 Cifukwa cace, pali moyo wanga, ati Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wa Israyeli, Zedi Moabu adzakhala ngati Sodomu, ndi ana a Amoni ngati Gomora, pocuruka khwisa ndi maenje a mcere, ndi bwinja losatha; otsala a anthu anga adzalanda zao, ndi otsala amtundu wa anthu anga adzawalandira akhale colowa cao." 
Zephaniah2:10 Ici adzakhala naco m'malo mwa kudzikuza kwao, cifukwa anatonza, nadzikuza pa anthu a Yehova wa makamu." 
Zephaniah2:11 Yehova adzawakhalira woopsa; pakuti adzaondetsa milungu yonse ya pa dziko lapansi; ndipo adzamlambira Iye, yense pamalo pace, a m'zisumbu zonse za amitundu." 
Zephaniah2:12 Inunso Akusi, mudzaphedwa ndi lupanga langa." 
Zephaniah2:13 Ndipo adzatambasulira dzanja lace kumpoto nadzaononga Asuri, nadzasanduliza Nineve akhale bwinja, wouma ngati cipululu." 
Zephaniah2:14 Ndipo zoweta zidzagona pansi pakati pace; nyama zonse za mitundu mitundu; ndi bvuo ndi nungu zidzakhala m'mitu ya nsanamira zace; adzayimba mau ao m'mazenera; paziundo padzakhala cipasuko; pakuti anagadamula nchito yace ya mkungudza. 
Zephaniah2:15 Uwu ndi mudzi wosekererawo unakhala wosasamalira, unanena m'mtima mwace, Ine ndine, ndi wopanda ine palibe wina; ha! wasanduka bwinja, mogonera nyama za kuthengo! yense wakuupitirira adzatsonya mtsonyo, ndi kupukusa mutu." 
Zephaniah3:1 Tsoka uyo wopanduka, ndi wodetsedwa, ndiye mudzi wozunza!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Sanamvera mau, sanalola kulangizidwa; sanakhulupirira Yehova, sanayandikira kwa Mulungu wace." 
Zephaniah3:3 Akalonga ace m'kati mwace ndiwo mikango yobangula; oweruza ace ndi mimbulu ya madzulo, sasiya kanthu ka mawa." 
Zephaniah3:4 Aneneri ace ndiwo anthu a matukutuku ndi onyenga; ansembe ao anaipsa malo opatulika, napotoza cilamulo." 
Zephaniah3:5 Yehova pakati pace ali wolungama; sadzacita cosalungama, m'mawa ndi m'mawa aonetsera ciweruzo cace poyera, cosasowa kanthu; koma wosalungama sadziwa manyazi." 
Zephaniah3:6 Ndaononga amitundu; nsanja zao za kungondya nza bwinja, ndapasula miseu yao, palibe wopitapo; midzi yao yaonongeka, palibe munthu, palibe wokhalamo." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ndinati, Zedi udzandiopa Ine, udzalola kulangizidwa, kuti pokhala pace pasaonongeke, monga mwa zonse ndamuikira; koma analawirira mamawa, nabvunditsa macitidwe ao onse." 
Zephaniah3:8 Cifukwa cace, mundilindire, ati Yehova, kufikira tsiku loukira Ine zofunkha; pakuti ndatsimikiza mtima Ine kusonkhanitsa amitundu, kuti ndimemeze maufumu kuwatsanulira kulunda kwanga, ndilo mkwiyo wanga wonse waukali; pakuti dziko lonse lapansi lidzathedwa ndi moto wa nsanje yanga." 
Zephaniah3:9 Pakuti pamenepo ndidzapatsa mitundu ya anthu mlomo woyera, kuti onsewa aitanire pa dzina la Yehova kumtumikira ndi mtima umodzi." 
Zephaniah3:10 Kucokera tsidya lija la mitsinje ya Kusi ondipembedza, ndiwo mwana wamkazi wa obalalika anga, adzabwera naco copereka canga." 
Zephaniah3:11 Tsiku ilo sudzacita manyazi ndi zocita zako zonse unandilakwira nazo; pakuti pamenepo ndidzacotsa pakati pako amene akondwera ndi kudzikuza kwako, ndipo sudzacita kudzikuzanso m'phiri langa lopatulika." 
Zephaniah3:12 Koma ndidzasiya pakati pako anthu ozunzika ndi osauka, ndipo iwo adzakhulupirira dzina la Yehova." 
Zephaniah3:13 Otsala a Israyeli sadzacita cosalungama, kapena kunena mabodza; ndi m'kamwa mwao simudzapezeka lilime lonyenga; pakuti adzadya nadzagona pansi, ndi palibe wakuwaopsa." 
Zephaniah3:14 Yimba, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; pfuula, Israyeli; kondwera nusekerere ndi mtima wonse, mwana wamkazi wa Yerusalemu." 
Zephaniah3:15 Yehova wacotsa maweruzo ako, anataya kunja mdani wako; mfumu ya Israyeli, Yehova, ali pakati pako, sudzaopanso coipa." 
Zephaniah3:16 Tsiku lomwelo adzati kwa Yerusalemu, Usaopa Ziyoni, manja anu asakhale olefuka." 
Zephaniah3:17 Yehova Mulungu wako ali pakati pako, wamphamvu wakupulumutsa; adzakondwera nawe ndi cimwemwe, adzakhala wopanda thamo m'cikondi cace; adzasekerera nawe ndi kuyimbirapo." 
Zephaniah3:18 Ndidzasonkhanitsa iwo akulirira msonkhano woikika, ndiwo a mwa iwe, amene katundu wace anawakhalira mtonzo." 
Zephaniah3:19 Taonani, nthawi yomweyo ndidzacita nao onse akuzunza iwe; ndipo ndidzapulumutsa wotsimphinayo, ndi kusonkhanitsa wopitikitsidwayo; ndipo ndidzawaika akhale cilemekezo ndi dzina, iwo amene manyazi ao anali m'dziko lonse." 
Zephaniah3:20 Nthawi yomweyo ndidzakulowetsani, ndi nthawi yomweyo ndidzakusonkhanitsani; pakuti ndidzakuikani mukhale dzina, ndi cilemekezo mwa mitundu yonse ya anthu a pa dziko lapansi, pamene ndibweza undende wanu pamaso panu, ati Yehova." 
Haggai1:1 CAKA caciwiri ca mfumu Dariyo, mwezi wacisanu ndi cimodzi, mau a Yehova anadza mwa Hagai mneneri kwa Zerubabele mwana wa Sealitiyeli, ciwanga ca Yuda, ndi kwa Yoswa mwana wa Yehozadaki, mkulu wa ansembe, ndi kuti," 
Haggai1:2 Atero Yehova wa makamu, akuti, Anthu awa anena, Nthawi siinafike, nthawi yakumanga nyumba ya Yehova." 
Haggai1:3 Pamenepo mau a Yehova anadza mwa Hagai mneneri, ndi kuti," 
Haggai1:4 Kodi imeneyi ndiyo nthawi yakuti inu nokha mukhala m'nyumba zanu zocingidwa m'katimo, ndi nyumba iyi ikhale yopasuka?" 
Haggai1:5 Cifukwa cace tsono, atero Yehova wa makamu: Mtima wanu usamalire njira zanu." 
Haggai1:6 Mwabzala zambiri, koma mututa pang'ono; mukudya, koma osakhuta; mukumwa, koma osakoledwa; mudzibveka, koma palibe wofundidwa; ndi iye wolembedwa nchito yakulipidwa alandirira kulipirako m'thumba lobooka." 
Haggai1:7 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Mtima wanu usamalire njira zanu. 
Haggai1:8 Kwerani ku dziko la mapiri, ndi kukwera nayo mitengo, nimumange nyumbayi; ndipo kudzandikomera, ndipo ndidzalemekezedwa, ati Yehova." 
Haggai1:9 Munayembekezera zambiri, koma taonani, pang'ono; ndipo, mutabwera napo kwanu, ndinauzirapo. Cifukwa ninji? ati Yehova wa makamu. Cifukwa ca nyumba yanga yokhala yopasuka, ndipo nuthamangira yense kunyumba kwace." 
Haggai1:10 M'mwemo cifukwa ca inu kumwamba kukaniza mame, ndi nthaka ikaniza zipatso zace." 
Haggai1:11 Ndipo ndinaitana cirala cidzere dziko, ndi mapiri, ndi tirigu, ndi vinyo, ndi mafuta, ndi zimene ibala nthaka, ndi anthu, ndi zoweta, ndi nchito zonse za manja." 
Haggai1:12 Pamenepo Zerubabele mwana wa Sealitiyeli, ndi Yoswa mwana wa Yehozadaki, mkuru wa ansembe, ndi otsala onse a anthu, anamvera mau a Yehova Mulungu wao, ndi mau a Hagai mneneri, monga Yehova Mulungu wao adamtuma; ndipo anthu anaopa pamaso pa Yehova." 
Haggai1:13 Ndipo Hagai mthenga wa Yehova m'uthenga wa Yehova ananena ndi anthu, ndi kuti, Ine ndiri nanu, ati Yehova." 
Haggai1:14 Ndipo Yehova anautsa mzimu wa Zerubabele mwana wa Sealitiyeli, ciwanga ca Yuda, ndi mzimu wa Yoswa mwana wa Yehozadaki, mkulu wa ansembe, ndi mzimu wa otsala onse a anthu, ndipo anadza nagwira nchito m'nyumba ya Yehova wa makamu, Mulungu wao," 
Haggai1:15 tsiku la makumi awiri ndi anai la mwezi, mwezi wacisanu ndi cimodzi, caka caciwiri ca mfumu Dariyo." 
Haggai2:1 Mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri, tsiku la makumi awiri ndi cimodzi la mweziwo, mau a Yehova anadza mwa Hagai mneneri, ndi kuti," 
Haggai2:2 Unenetu kwa Zerubabele, mwana wa Sealitiyeli, ciwanga ca Yuda, ndi kwa Yoswa mwana wa Yehozadaki, mkuru wa ansembe, ndi kwa otsala a anthu, kuti," 
Haggai2:3 Adatsala ndani mwa inu amene anaona nyumba iyi m'ulemerero wace woyamba? ndipo muiona yotani tsopano? Kodi siikhala m'maso mwanu ngati cabe? 
Haggai2:4 Koma limbika tsopano, Zerubabele, ati Yehova; ulimbikenso Yoswa mwana wa Yehozadaki, mkuru wa ansembe; ndipo mulimbike inu nonse anthu a m'dziko, ati Yehova, ndi kucita; pakui. Ine ndiri pamodzi ndi inu, ati Yehova wa makamu;" 
Haggai2:5 monga momwe ndinapangana nanu muja munaturuka m'Aigupto, ndi Mzimu wanga unakhala pakati pa inu; musamaopa inu." 
Haggai2:6 Pakuti atero Yehova wa makamu: Kamodzinso, katsala kanthawi, ndidzagwedeza miyamba ndi dziko lapansi, ndi nyanja, ndi mtunda womwe;" 
Haggai2:7 ndipo ndidzagwedeza amitundu onse, ndi zofunika za amitundu onse zidzafika, ndipo ndidzadzaza nyumba iyi ndi ulemerero, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Haggai2:8 Siliva ndi wanga, golidi ndi wanga, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Haggai2:9 Ulemerero wotsiriza wa nyumba iyi udzaposa woyambawo, ati Yehova wa makamu; ndipo m'malo muno ndidzapatsa mtendere, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Haggai2:10 Tsiku la makumi awiri ndi anai la mwezi wacisanu ndi cinai, caka caciwiri ca Dariyo, mau a Yehova anadza mwa Hagai mneneri, ndi kuti," 
Haggai2:11 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Funsatu ansembe za cilamulo, ndi kuti," 
Haggai2:12 Munthu akanyamulira nyama yopatulika m'ngudulira, nakhudza mkate, kapena ndiwo, kapena vinyo, kapena mafuta, kapena cakudya ciri conse, ndi ngudulira, kodi cisandulika copatulika? Ndipo ansembe anayankha nati, Iai." 
Haggai2:13 Pamenepo Hagai anati, Munthu wodetsedwa ndi mtembo akakhudza kanthu ka izi, kodi kali kodetsedwa kanthuka? Ndipo ansembe anayankha nati, Kadzakhala kodetsedwa." 
Haggai2:14 Ndipo Hagai anayankha, nati, Momwemo anthu awa, ndi momwemo mtundu uwu pamaso panga, ati Yehova; ndi momwemo nchito iri yonse ya manja ao; ndi ici acipereka, ciri codetsedwa." 
Haggai2:15 Ndipo tsono, samalirani, kuyambira lero ndi m'tsogolomo, kuti, kusanaikidwe mwala pa mwala m'Kacisi wa Yehova," 
Haggai2:16 pamenepo ponse munthu akadza ku mulu woyenera miyeso makumi awiri, pali khumi yokha; munthu akadza ku coponderamo mphesa kudzatunga mbiya makumi asanu, pali makumi awiri okha." 
Haggai2:17 Ndinakukanthani ndi cinsikwi ndi cinoni ndi matalala m'nchito zonse za manja anu, koma simunabwerera kudza kwa Ine, ati Yehova." 
Haggai2:18 Musamalire, kuyambira lero ndi m'tsogolo, kuyambira tsiku la makumi awiri ndi cinai la mwezi wacisanu ndi cinai, kuyambira tsiku lija anamanga maziko a Kacisi wa Yehova, samalirani." 
Haggai2:19 Kodi mbeu ikali m'nkhokwe? Ngakhale mpesa, ndi mkuyu, ndi khangaza ndi mzitona sizinabala; kuyambira lero lino ndidzakudalitsani." 
Haggai2:20 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza nthawi yaciwiri kwa Hagai tsiku la makumi awiri la mwezi, ndi kuti," 
Haggai2:21 Nena ndi Zerubabele ciwanga ca Yuda, kuti, Ndidzagwedeza miyamba ndi dziko lapansi;" 
Haggai2:22 ndipo ndidzagubuduza mipando yacifumu ya maufumu, ndidzaononga mphamvu ya maufumu a amitundu; ndidzagubuduza magareta ndi iwo akuyendapo; ndi akavalo ndi apakavalo adzatsika, yense ndi lupanga la mbale wace." 
Haggai2:23 Tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndidzakutenga, Zerubabele mtumiki wanga, mwana wa Sealitiyeli, ati Yehova, ndi kuika iwe ngati mphete yosindikizira; pakuti ndakusankha, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Zechariah1:1 MWEZI wacisanu ndi citatu, caka caciwiri ca Dariyo, mau a Yehova anadza kwa Zekariya mwana wa Berekiya, mwana wa Ido mneneri, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah1:2 Yehova anakwiya kwambiri ndi makolo anu. 
Zechariah1:3 Cifukwa cace uziti nao, Atero Yehova wa makamu: Bwererani kudza kwa Ine, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndipo Ine ndidzabwerera kudza kwa inu, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Zechariah1:4 Musamakhala ngati makolo anu, amenie aneneri akale anawapfuulira, nd kuti, Atero Yehova wa makamu Bwereranitu kuleka njira zanu zoipa, ndi macitidwe anu oipa; ko ma sanamva, kapena klimvera Ine ati Yehova." 
Zechariah1:5 Makolo anu, ali kut iwowo? ndi alieneri, akhala nd moyo kosatha kodi?" 
Zechariah1:6 Koma mau anga ndi malemba anga, amene ndinalamulira atumiki anga aneneriwo, kodi sanawapeza makolo anu? ndipo anabwera, nati, Monga wno Yehova wa makamu analingirira kuticitira ife, monga mwa njira zathu ndi monga mwa macitidwe athu, momwemo anaticitira. Masomphenya oyamba: akavalo," 
Zechariah1:7 Tsiku la makumi awiri ndi cinai la mwezi wakhumi ndi cimodzi, ndiwo mwezi wa Segati, caka caciwiri ca Dariyo, mau a Yehova anadza kwa Zekariya mwana wa Berekiya, mwana wa Ido mneneri, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah1:8 Ndinaona usiku, taonani, munthu woyenda pa kavalo wofiira, alikuima pakati pa mitengo yamcisu inali kunsi; ndi pambuyo pace panali akavalo ofiira, odera ndi oyera." 
Zechariah1:9 Pamenepo ndinati, Awa ndi ciani, mbuyanga? Ndi mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine anati kwa ine, Ndidzakuonetsa awa ndi ciani." 
Zechariah1:10 Ndipo wakuima pakati pa mitengo yamcisu anayankha, nati, Awa ndiwo amene Yehova anawatumiza ayendeyende m'dziko." 
Zechariah1:11 Ndipo iwo anamyankha mthenga wa Yehova wakuima pakati pa mitengo yamcisu, nati, Tayendayenda m'dziko, ndipo taonani, dziko lonse likhala cete, lipumula." 
Zechariah1:12 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anayankha nati, Yehova wa makamu, mudzakhala mpaka liti osacitira cifundo Yerusalemu, ndi midzi ya Yuda, imene munakwiya nayo zaka izi makumi asanu ndi awiri?" 
Zechariah1:13 Ndipo Yehova anamyankha mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine mau okoma, mau akutonthoza mtima." 
Zechariah1:14 Ndipo mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine anati kwa ine, Pfuula, ndi kuti, Atero Yehova wa makamu: Ndicitira nsanje Yerusalemu ndi Ziyoni ndi nsanje yaikuru." 
Zechariah1:15 Ndipo ndikwiya nao amitundu okhala osatekeseka ndi mkwiyo waukuru; pakuti ndinakwiya pang'ono, ndipo anathandizira coipa," 
Zechariah1:16 Cifukwa cace atero Yehova: Ndabwera kudza ku Yerusalemu ndi zacifundo; nyumba yanga idzamangidwamo, ndipo adzayesa Yerusalemu ndi cingwe." 
Zechariah1:17 Pfuulanso, ndi kuti, Atero Yehova wa makamu: Midzi yanga idzalemerera ndi kufalikiranso; ndipo Yehova adzasangalatsanso Ziyoni, nadzasankhamo Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah1:18 Ndipo ndinakweza maso anga, ndinapenya, taonani, nyanga zinai." 
Zechariah1:19 Ndipo ndinati kwa mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine, Izi nziani? Ndipo anandiyankha, Izi ndi nyangazi zinabalalitsa Yuda, Israyeli, ndi Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah1:20 Ndipo Yehova anandionetsa osula anai. 
Zechariah1:21 Pamenepo ndinati, Adzeranji awa? Ndipo ananena, nati, Izi ndi nyanga zimene zinabalalitsa Yuda, wopandanso wina woweramutsa mutu wace; koma awa anadza kuziopsa, kugwetsa nyanga za amitundu, amene anakwezera dziko la Yuda nyanga zao kulimwaza." 
Zechariah2:1 Ndinakwezanso maso anga, ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, munthu ndi cingwe coyesera m'dzanja lace." 
Zechariah2:2 Ndipo ndinati, Upita kuti? Ndipo anati kwa ine, Kukayesa Yerusalemu, kuona ngati citando cace ncotani, ndi m'litali mwace motani." 
Zechariah2:3 Ndipo taonani, mthenga wolankhula nane anaturuka, ndi mthenga wina anaturuka kukomana naye," 
Zechariah2:4 nanena naye, Thamanga, lankhula ndi mnyamata uyu, ndi kuti, M'Yerusalemu mudzakhala anthu ngati m'midzi yopanda malinga, cifukwa ca kucuruka anthu ndi zoweta momwemo." 
Zechariah2:5 Pakuti Ine, ati Yehova, ndidzakhala kwa iye linga lamoto pozungulira pace, ndipo ndidzakhala ulemerero m'kati mwace." 
Zechariah2:6 Haya, haya, thawani ku dziko la kumpoto, ati Yehova; pakuti ndinakubalalitsani ngati mphepo zinai za kuthambo, ati Yehova." 
Zechariah2:7 Haya Ziyoni, thawa iwe wakukhala ndi mwana wamkazi wa Babulo." 
Zechariah2:8 Pakuti atero Yehova wa makamu: Utatha ulemererowo ananditumiza kwa amitundu amene anakufunkhani; pakuti iye wokhudza inu, akhudza mwana wa m'diso lace." 
Zechariah2:9 Pakuti, taonani, ndidzawayambasira dzanja langa, ndipo adzakhala zofunkha za iwo amene anawatumikira; ndipo mudzadziwa kuti Yehova wa makamu anandituma." 
Zechariah2:10 Yimba, nukondwere, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; pakuti taonani, ndirinkudza, ndipo ndidzakhala pakati pako, ati Yehova." 
Zechariah2:11 Ndipo amitundu ambiri adzaphatikidwa kwa Yehova tsiku ilo, nadzakhala anthu anga; ndipo ndidzakhala pakati pako, ndipo udzadziwa kuti Yehova wa makamu anandituma kwa iwe." 
Zechariah2:12 Ndipo Yehova adzalandira colowa cace Yuda, ngati gawo lace m'dziko lopatulikalo, nadzasankhanso Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah2:13 Khalani cete, anthu onse, pamaso pa Yehova; pakuti wagalamuka mokhalira mwace mopatulika." 
Zechariah3:1 Pamenepo anandionetsa Yoswa mkulu wa ansembe alikuima pamaso pa mthenga wa Yehova, ndi Satana alikuima pa dzanja lace lamanja, atsutsana naye." 
Zechariah3:2 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa Satana, Yehova akudzudzula, Satana iwe; inde Yehova amene anasankha Yerusalemu akudzudzula; uyu sindiye muuni wofumulidwa kumoto?" 
Zechariah3:3 Koma Yoswa analikubvala nsaru zonyansa, naima pamaso pa mthenga." 
Zechariah3:4 Ndipo Iye anayankha nanena ndi iwo akuima pamaso pace, ndi kuti, Mumbvule nsaru zonyansazi. Nati kwa iye, Taona, ndakucotsera mphulupulu zako, ndipo ndidzakubveka: zobvala za mtengo wace." 
Zechariah3:5 Ndipo ndinati, Amuike nduwira yoyera pamutu pace. Naika nduwira yoyera pamutu pace, nambveka ndi zobvala; ndi mthenga wa Yehova anaimirirapo," 
Zechariah3:6 Ndipo mthenga wa Yehova anamcitira Yoswa umboni, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah3:7 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Ukadzayenda m'njira zanga, ndi kusunga udikiro wanga, pamenepo udzaweruza nyumba yanga, ndi kusunga mabwalo anga, ndipo ndidzakupatsa malo oyendamo mwa awa oimirirapo." 
Zechariah3:8 Tamvera tsono, Yoswa mkulu wa ansembe, iwe ndi anzako akukhala pansi pamaso pako; pakuti iwo ndiwo cizindikilo; pakuti taonani, ndidzafikitsa mtumiki wanga, ndiye Mphukira."
