Zechariah3:9 Pakuti taona, mwalawo ndinauika pamaso pa Yoswa; pa mwala umodzi pali maso asanu ndi awiri; taonani, ndidzaloca malocedwe ace, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndipo ndidzacotsa mphulupulu ya dziko lija tsiku limodzi." 
Zechariah3:10 Tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova wa makamu, mudzaitanizana yense mnansi wace patsinde pa mpesa ndi patsinde pa mkuyu." 
Zechariah4:1 Ndipo mthengayo adalankhula nane, anadzanso, nandiutsa ngati munthu woutsidwa m'tulo tace." 
Zechariah4:2 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Uona ciani? Ndipo ndinati, Ndaona, taonani, coikapo nyali ca golidi yekha yekha, ndi mbale yace pamwamba pace, ndi nyali zace zisanu ndi ziwiri pamenepo; nyalizo zinali ndi misiwe isanu ndi iwiri, ndiyo ya nyalizo zinali pamwamba pace;" 
Zechariah4:3 ndi mitengo iwiri yaazitona pomwepo, wina ku dzanja lamanja la mbaleyo, ndi wina ku dzanja lace lamanzere." 
Zechariah4:4 Ndipo ndinayankha ndi kunena ndi mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine, ndi kuti, Izi nziani mbuyanga?" 
Zechariah4:5 Ndipo mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine anayankha, nati kwa ine, Sudziwa kodi kuti nziani izi? Ndipo ndinati, Iai, mbuyanga." 
Zechariah4:6 Pamenepo anayankha, nanena kwa ine, ndi kuti, Awa ndi mau a Yehova kwa Zerubabele, Ndi khamu la nkhondo ai, ndi mphamvu ai, koma ndi Mzimu wanga, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Zechariah4:7 Ndiwe yani, phiri lalikuru iwe? pamaso pa Zerubabele udzasanduka cidikha; ndipo adzaturutsa mwala wa cimbudzi, ndi kupfuula, Cisomo, cisomo nao." 
Zechariah4:8 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa ine, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah4:9 Manja a Zerubabele anaika maziko a nyumba iyi, manja ace omwe adzaitsiriza; ndipo udzadziwa kuti Yehova wa makatnu anandituma kwa inu." 
Zechariah4:10 Pakuti wapeputsa tsiku la tinthu tating'ono ndani? pakuti adzakondwera, asanu ndi awiri awa, nadzaona cingwe colungamitsira ciriri m'dzanja la Zerubabele, ndiwo maso a Yehova; ayendayenda mwa dziko lonse." 
Zechariah4:11 Pamenepo ndinayankha, ndinati kwa iye, Mitengo iyi iwiri ya azitona kulamanja ndi kulamanzere kwa coikapo nyali nciani?" 
Zechariah4:12 Ndipo ndinayankha kaciwiri, ndinati naye, Nzotani nthambi ziwiri izi za azitona zirikutsanula zokha mafuta onga golidi mwa misiwe iwiri yagolidi?" 
Zechariah4:13 Ndipo anandiyankha, nati, Sudziwa kodi kuti nziani izi? Ndipo ndinati, Iai, mbuyanga." 
Zechariah4:14 Pamenepo anati, Awa ndi ana amuna awiri a mafuta oimirira pamaso pa Mbuye wa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Zechariah5:1 Pamenepo ndinakwezanso maso anga, ndinapenya, taonani, mpukutu wouluka." 
Zechariah5:2 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Uona ciani? Ndipo ndinayankha, Ndiona mpukutu wouluka; utali wace mikono makumi awiri, ndi citando cace mikono khumi." 
Zechariah5:3 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Ili ndi temberero lirikuturukira pa dziko lonse; pakuti ali yense wakuba adzapitikitsidwa kuno monga mwa ili; ndi ali yense wakulumbira zonama adzapitikitsidwa kuno monga mwa ili." 
Zechariah5:4 Ndidzaliturutsa ili, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndipo lidzalowa m'nyumba ya wakuba, ndi m'nyumba ya iye wolumbira monama pa dzina langa; ndipo lidzakhala pakati pa nyumba yace, ndi kuitha pamodzi ndi mitengo yace ndi miyala yace." 
Zechariah5:5 Pamenepo mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine anaturuka, nati kwa ine, Kwezatu maso ako, nuone ngati nciani ici cirikuturukaci." 
Zechariah5:6 Ndipo ndinati, Nciani ici? Nati iye, Ici ndi efa alikuturuka. Natinso, Ici ndi maonekedwe ao m'dziko lonse;" 
Zechariah5:7 (ndipo taonani, cozunguniza cantobvu cotukulidwa) ndipo ici ndi mkazi wokhala pakati pa efa." 
Zechariah5:8 Ndipo anati, Uyu ndi ucimo; namgwetsa m'kati mwa efa; naponya ntobvu wolemerawo pakamwa pace." 
Zechariah5:9 Pamenepo ndinakweza maso anga, ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, anaturuka akazi awiri, ndi m'mapiko mwao munali mphepo; ndipo anali nao mapiko ngati mapiko a cumba, nanyamula efayo pakati pa dziko ndi thambo." 
Zechariah5:10 Ndipo ndinati kwa mthenga wakulankhula ndi ine, Amenewa amuka naye kuti efayo?" 
Zechariah5:11 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Kummangira nyumba m'dziko la Sinara; kuti amuike, namkhazikeko pa kuzika kwace." 
Zechariah6:1 Ndipo ndinakwezanso maso anga, ndinapenya, ndipo taonani, anaturuka magareta anai pakati pa mapiri awiri; ndi mapiriwo ndiwo mapiri amkuwa." 
Zechariah6:2 Ku gareta woyamba kunali akavalo ofiira; ndi ku gareta waciwiri akavalo akuda; 
Zechariah6:3 ndi ku gareta wacitatu akavalo oyera; ndi ku gareta wacinai akavalo olimba amawanga. 
Zechariah6:4 Ndipo ndinayankha ndinati kwa mthenga wolankhula ndi ine, Izi nziani, mbuyanga?" 
Zechariah6:5 Ndi mthenga anayankha, nati kwa ine, Izi ndi mphepo zinai zakumwamba zakuturuka kumene zimaimirira pamaso pa Ambuye wa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Zechariah6:6 Gareta wa akavalo akuda aturukira ku dziko la kumpoto; ndi oyerawo aturukira kuwatsata; ndi amawanga aturukira ku dziko la kumwela. 
Zechariah6:7 Ndi amphamvuwo anaturuka nayesa kumka kuyendayenda m'dziko; pakuti adati, Mukani, yendayendani m'dziko. Momwemo anayendayenda m'dziko." 
Zechariah6:8 Ndipo anandiitana, nanena nane, kuti, Taonani, iwo akuturuka kumka ku dziko la kumpoto anapumulitsa Mzimu wanga m'dziko lakumpoto." 
Zechariah6:9 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa ine, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah6:10 Tenga a iwo a kundende, a Keledai, a Tobiya, ndi a Yedaya; nudze tsiku lomwelo, nulowe ku nyumba ya Yosiya, mwana wa Zefaniya, kumene anafikirako kucokera ku Babulo," 
Zechariah6:11 ndipo utenge siliva ndi golidi, nupange akorona, nuwaike pamutu pa Yoswa mwana wa Yehozadaki mkuru wa ansembe;" 
Zechariah6:12 nunene naye, kuti, Atero Yehova wa makamu, ndi kuti, Taonani, munthu dzina lace ndilo Mphukira, ndipo adzaphuka m'malo mwace, nadzamanga Kacisi wa Yehova:" 
Zechariah6:13 inde adzamanga Kacisi wa Yehova; nadzasenza ulemererowo, nadzakhala ndi kulamulira pa mpando wacifumu wace; nadzakhala wansembe pampando wacifumu wace; ndi uphungu wa mtendere udzakhala pakati pa iwo awiri," 
Zechariah6:14 Ndipo akorona adzakhala wa Kelemu, ndi wa Tobiya, ndi wa Yedaya, ndi wa Keni mwana wa Zefaniya, akhale cikumbutso m'Kacisi wa Yehova." 
Zechariah6:15 Ndipo iwo akukhala kutari adzafika, nadzamanga ku Kacisi wa Yehova, ndipo inu mudzadziwa kuti Yehova wa makamu ananditumiza kwa inu. Ndipo ici cidzacitika ngati mudzamvera mwacangu mau a Yehova Mulungu wanu." 
Zechariah7:1 Ndipo kunacitika caka cacinai ca mfumu Dariyo, mau a Yehova anadza kwa Zekariya tsiku lacinai la mwezi wacisanu ndi cinai, ndiwo Kisilevi." 
Zechariah7:2 Ndipo a ku Beteli anatuma Sarezere ndi Regemeleke ndi anthu ao, apepeze Yehova," 
Zechariah7:3 nanene kwa ansembe a nyumba ya Yehova wa makamu, ndi kwa aneneri, ndi kuti, Kodi ndilire mwezi wacisanu, ndi kudzipatula, monga umo ndikacitira zaka izi zambiri?" 
Zechariah7:4 Ndipo mau a Yehova wa makamu anadza kwa ine, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah7:5 Nena kwa anthu onse a m'dziko, ndi kwa ansembe, kuti, Muja mukasala ndi kulira mwezi wacisanu, ndi wacisanu ndi citatu, zaka izi makumi asanu ndi awiri, kodi mukasalira Ine, Inedi?" 
Zechariah7:6 Ndipo pamene mukadya, ndi pamene mukamwa, mukadya si ndinu, mukamwa si ndinu kodi?" 
Zechariah7:7 Si ndiwo mau Yehova anawalalikira mwa aneneri oyamba aja, muja Yerusalemu anali nao okhalamo, ndi wokhazikika; ndi m'midzi mwace pozungulira pace, ndi m'dziko la kumwela, ndi m'cidikha munali anthu okhalamo?" 
Zechariah7:8 Ndipo mau a Yehova anadza kwa Zekariya, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah7:9 Watero Yehova wa makamu, kuti, Weruzani ciweruzo coona, nimucitire yense mnzace cifundo ndi ukoma mtima;" 
Zechariah7:10 musazunza mkazi wamasiye, kapena ana amasiye, mlendo kapena waumphawi; ndipo nnena mmodzi wa inu alingirire m'mtima mwace kumcitira coipa munthu mnzace." 
Zechariah7:11 Koma anakana kumvera, nakaniza phewa lao, natseka makutu ao, kuti asamve." 
Zechariah7:12 Inde, anasanduliza mitima yao ikhale ngati mwala woti gwa, kuti angamve cilamulo, ndi mau amene Yehova wa makamu anatumiza ndi Mzimu wace mwa aneneri oyamba aja; m'menemo munafuma mkwiyo waukuru wocokera kwa Yehova wa makamu." 
Zechariah7:13 Ndipo kunacitika, monga Iye anapfuula, koma iwo sanamvera; momwemo iwo adzapfuula, koma Ine sindidzamva, ati Yehova wa makamu;" 
Zechariah7:14 koma ndidzawabalalitsa ndi kabvumvulu mwa amitundu onse amene sanawadziwa. Motero dziko linakhala bwinja, m'mbuyo mwao; palibe munthu wopitapo ndi kubwererako; pakuti adaika dziko lofunikalo labwinja." 
Zechariah8:1 Ndipo mau a Yehova wa makamui anadza kwa ine, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah8:2 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Ndimcitira nsanje Ziyoni ndi nsanje yaikuru, ndipo ndimcitira nsanje ndi ukali waukuru." 
Zechariah8:3 Atero Yehova: Ndabwerera kudza ku Ziyoni, ndidzakhala pakati pa Yerusalemu; ndi Yerusalemu adzachedwa, Madzi wa coonadi; ndi phiri la Yehova wa makamu, Phiri lopatulika." 
Zechariah8:4 Atero Yehova wa makamu: M'miseu ya Yerusalemu mudzakhalanso amuna ndi akazi okalamba, yense ndi ndodo yace m'dzanja lace cifukwa ca ukalamba wace." 
Zechariah8:5 Ndi m'miseu ya mudzi mudzakhala ana amuna ndi akazi akusewera m'miseu yace. 
Zechariah8:6 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Cikakhala codabwitsa pamaso pa otsala a anthu awa masiku awo, kodi cidzakhalanso codabwitsa pamaso panga? ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Zechariah8:7 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Taonani, ndidzapulumutsa anthu anga m'dziko la kum'mawa, ndi m'dziko la kumadzulo;" 
Zechariah8:8 ndipo ndidzabwera nao, nadzakhala m'kati mwa Yerusalemu; ndipo iwo adzakhala anthu anga, nanenso ndidzakhala Mulungu wao, m'coonadi ndi m'cilungamo." 
Zechariah8:9 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Alimbike manja anu, inu akumva masiku ano mau awa pakamwa pa aneneri amene anakhalako tsiku lakuikidwa maziko a nyumba ya Yehova wa makamu, ndiyo Kacisi, kuti amangidwe." 
Zechariah8:10 Pakuti asanafike masiku aja, panalibe kulipidwira munthu, kapena kulipidwira nyama, ndipo analibe mtendere iye wakuturuka, kapena wakulowa, cifukwa ca wosautsa; pakuti ndinatumiza munthu yense atsutsane naye mnzace." 
Zechariah8:11 Koma tsopano sindidzakhala kwa otsala a anthu awa monga momwe ndinakhalira masiku oyamba, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Zechariah8:12 Pakuti padzakhala mbeu ya mtendere; mpesa udzapatsa zipatso zace, ndi nthaka idzapatsa zobala zace, ndi miyamba Idzapatsa mame ao; ndipo ndidzalandiritsa otsala a anthu awa izi zonse, cikhale colowa cao." 
Zechariah8:13 Ndipo kudzacitika kuti, monga munali cotembereretsa mwa amitundu, inu nyumba ya Yuda, ndi nyumba ya Israyeli, momwemo ndidzakusungani, ndipo mudzakhala codalitsa naco; musaope, alimbike manja anu." 
Zechariah8:14 Pakuti atero Yehova wa makamu: Monga ndil nalingirira kucitira inu coipa, muja makolo anu anautsa mkwiyo wanga, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndipo sindinawaleka;" 
Zechariah8:15 momwemonso ndinalingirira masiku ano kucitira cokoma Yerusalemu ndi nyumba ya Yuda; musaopa. 
Zechariah8:16 Izi ndizo muzicite: Nenani coonadi yense ndi mnzace; weruzani zoona ndi ciweruzo ca mtendere m'zipata zanu; 
Zechariah8:17 ndipo musalingirira coipa m'mtima mwanu yense pa mnzace; nimusakonde lumbiro lonama; pakuti izi zonse ndidana nazo, ati Yehova." 
Zechariah8:18 Ndipo mau a Yehova wa makamu anadza kwa ine, ndi kuti," 
Zechariah8:19 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Kusala kwa mwezi wacinai, ndi kusala kwa mwezi wacisanu, ndi kusala kwa mwezi wacisanu ndi ciwiri, ndi kusala kwa mwezi wakhumi kukhale kwa nyumba ya Yuda cimwemwe ndi cikondwerero, ndi nyengo zoikika zosekerera; cifukwa cace kondani coonadi ndi mtendere." 
Zechariah8:20 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Kudzacitikanso kuti mitundu ya anthu, ndi okhalamo m'midzi yambiri adzafika," 
Zechariah8:21 ndi okhala m'mudzi umodzi adzamuka ku mudzi wina, ndi kuti, Tiyeni msanga kukapepeza Yehova, ndi kufunafuna Yehova wa makamu; ndimuka inenso." 
Zechariah8:22 Inde, mitundu yambiri ya anthu, ndi amitundu amphamvu adzadza kufunafuna Yehova wa makamu m'Yerusalemu, ndi kupepeza Yehova." 
Zechariah8:23 Atero Yehova wa makamu: Kudzacitika masiku awo amuna khumi adzagwira, ndiwo a manenedwe onse a amitundu, inde adzagwira mkawo wa munthu ali Myuda, ndi kuti, Tidzamuka nanu, pakuti tamva kuti Mulungu ali ndi inu." 
Zechariah9:1 Katundu wa mau a Yehova pa dziko la Hadraki, ndipo Damasiko adzakhala popumula pace; pakuti Yehova apenyerera anthu monga apenyerera mafuko onse a Israyeli;" 
Zechariah9:2 ndi Hamati yemwe wogundana naye malire; Turo ndi Zidoni, angakhale ali ndi nzeru zambiri." 
Zechariah9:3 Ndipo Turo adzadzimangira polimbikirapo, nadzakundika siliva ngati pfumbi, ndi golidi woyenga ngati thope la kubwalo." 
Zechariah9:4 Taonani, Yehova adzamlanda zace, nadzakantha mphamvu yace igwe m'manja; ndipo adzatha ndi moto." 
Zechariah9:5 Asikeloni adzaciona, nadzaopa; Gazanso, nadzanjenjemera kwambiri; ndi Ekroni, pakuti ciyembekezo cace cacitidwa manyazi; ndipo mfumu idzatayika ku Gaza, ndi Asikeloni adzasowa okhalamo." 
Zechariah9:6 Ndi mtundu wa anthu osokonezeka udzakhala m'Asidodi, ndipo ndidzaononga kudzikuza kwa Afilisti." 
Zechariah9:7 Ndipo ndidzacotsa mwazi wace m'kamwa mwace, ndi zonyansa zace pakati pa mano ace; momwemo iyenso adzakhala wotsalira wa Mulungu wathu, ndipo adzakhala ngati mkuru wa pfuko m'Yuda, ndi Ekroni ngati Myebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Ndipo ndidzamangira nyumba yanga misasa, kuiletsera nkhondo, asapitepo munthu kapena kubweranso; ndipo wakuwasautsa sadzapitanso pakati pao; pakuti tsopano ndapenya ndi maso anga." 
Zechariah9:9 Kondwera kwambiri, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; pfuula mwana wamkazi wa Yerusalemu; taona, Mfumu yako ikudza kwa iwe; ndiye wolungama, ndi mwini cipulumutso; wofatsa ndi wokwera pa buru, ndi mwana wamphongo wa buru." 
Zechariah9:10 Ndipo ndidzaononga magareta kuwacotsa m'Efraimu, ndi akavalo kuwacotsa m'Yerusalemu; ndi uta wa nkhondo udzaonongeka; ndipo adzanena zamtendere kwa amitundu; ndi ufumu wace udzakhala kuyambira kunyanja kufikira nyanja, ndi kuyambira ku Mtsinje kufikira malekezero a dziko." 
Zechariah9:11 Iwenso, cifukwa ca mwazi wa pangano lako ndinaturutsa andende ako m'dzenje m'mene mulibe madzi." 
Zechariah9:12 Bwererani kudza kulinga, andende a ciyembekezo inu; ngakhale lero lino ndilalikira kuti ndidzakubwezera cowirikiza." 
Zechariah9:13 Pakuti ndadzikokera Yuda, ndadzaza uta ndi Efraimu; ndipo ndidzautsa ana ako, Ziyoni, alimbane nao ana ako, Yavani, ndipo ndidzakuyesa lupanga la ngwazi." 
Zechariah9:14 Ndipo Yehova adzaoneka pamwamba pao, ndi mubvi wace udzaturuka ngati mphezi; ndipo Ambuye Mulungu adzaomba lipenga, nadzayenda ndi akabvumvulu a kumwela." 
Zechariah9:15 Yehova wa makamu adzawacinjiriza; ndipo adzadza, nadzapondereza miyala yoponyera; ndipo adzamva, nadzacita phokoso ngati avinyo; ndipo adzadzazidwa ngati mbale, ngati ngondya za guwa la nsembe." 
Zechariah9:16 Ndipo Yehova Mulungu wao adzawapulumutsa tsiku ilo, ngati zoweta za anthu ace; pakuti adzakhala ngati miyala ya m'korona yakunyezimira pa dziko lace." 
Zechariah9:17 Pakuti ukoma wace ndi waukuru ndithu, ndi kukongola kwace nkwa kukuru ndithu! tirigu adzakometsera anyamata, ndi vinyo watsopano anamwali." 
Zechariah10:1 Pemphani kwa Yehova mvula, m'nyengo ya mvula ya masika, kwa Yehova wolenga mphezi; ndipo adzawapatsa mibvumbi ya mvula, kwayense zophukira kuthengo." 
Zechariah10:2 Pakuti aterafi anena zopanda pace, ndi aula aona bodza; nafotokoza maloto acabe, asangalatsa nazo zopanda pace; cifukwa cace ayendayenda ngati nkhosa, azunzika popeza palibe mbusa." 
Zechariah10:3 Mkwiyo wanga wayakira abusa, ndipo ndidzalanga atonde; pakuti Yehova wa makamu adzazonda zoweta zace, ndizo nyumba ya Yuda, nadzaziika ngati kavalo wace waulemerero kunkhondo." 
Zechariah10:4 Kwa iye kudzafuma mwala wa kungondya, kwa iye msomali, kwa iye uta wankhondo, kwa iye osautsa onse pamodzi." 
Zechariah10:5 Ndipo adzakhala ngati ngwazi zakupondereza adani m'thope la kubwalo kunkhondo; ndipo adzacita nkhondo, cifukwa Yehova ali nao; ndi apakavalo adzacitidwa manyazi." 
Zechariah10:6 Ndipo ndidzalimbitsa nyumba ya Yuda, ndi kusunga nyumba ya Yosefe, ndipo ndidzawakhalitsa, pakuti ndawacitira cifundo; ndipo adzakhala monga ngati sindinawataya konse; pakuti Ine ndine Yehova Mulungu wao, ndipo ndidzawamvera." 
Zechariah10:7 Ndipo iwo a ku Efraimu adzakhala ngati ngwazi, ndi mtima wao udzakondwera ngati ndi vinyo; ndipo ana ao adzaciona nadzakondwera; mtima wao udzakondwerera mwa Yehova." 
Zechariah10:8 Ndidzawayimbira mluzu ndi kuwasonkhanitsa, pakuti ndawaombola; ndipo adzacuruka monga anacurukira kale." 
Zechariah10:9 Ndipo ndidzawafesa mwa mitundu ya anthu, ndipo adzandikumbukila m'maiko akutali; nadzakhala pamodzi ndi ana ao, nadzabwera." 
Zechariah10:10 Ndidzawatenganso ku dziko la Aigupto, ndi kuwasonkhanitsa m'Asuri; ndipo ndidzalowa nao m'dziko la Gileadi ndi Lebano; koma sadzawafikira." 
Zechariah10:11 Ndipo adzapita pakati pa nyanja ya nsautso, nadzapanda mafunde a m'nyanja, ndi maiwe onse a mtsinje adzaphwa; ndi kudzikuza kwa Asuri kudzagwetsedwa; ndi ndodo yacifumu ya Aigupto idzacoka." 
Zechariah10:12 Ndipo ndidzawalimbitsa mwa Yehova; ndipo adzayendayendam'dzina lace, ati Yehova." 
Zechariah11:1 Tsegula pa makomo ako Lebano, kuti moto uthe mikungudza yako." 
Zechariah11:2 Cema, mtengo wamlombwa, pakuti mkungudza wagwa, popeza mitengo yokoma yaipitsidwa; cemani athundu a ku Basani, pakuti nkhalango yocinjirizika yagwa pansi." 
Zechariah11:3 Mau a kucema kwa abusa! pakuti ulemerero wao waipsidwa; mau a kubangula kwa misona ya mikango! pakuti kudzikuza kwa Yordano kwaipsidwa. 
Zechariah11:4 Atero Yehova Mulungu wanga: Dyetsani zoweta zakukaphedwa; 
Zechariah11:5 zimene eni ace azipha, nadziyesera osaparamula; ndi iwo akuwagulitsa akuti, Alemekezedwe Yehova, pakuti ine ndine wolemera; ndi abusa ao sazicitira cifundo." 
Zechariah11:6 Pakuti sindidzacitiranso cifundo okhala m'dzikomo, ati Yehova; koma taonani, ndidzapereka anthu, yense m'dzanja la mnansi wace, ndi m'dzanja la mfumu yace; ndipo iwo adzakantha dzikoli, ndi m'dzanja mwao sindidzawalanditsa." 
Zechariah11:7 M'mwemo ndinadyetsa zoweta zakukaphedwa, ndizo zoweta zonyankhalala. Ndipo ndinadzitengera ndodo ziwiri; yina ndinaicha Cisomo, inzace ndinaicha Comanganitsa; ndipo ndinadyetsa zowetazo." 
Zechariah11:8 Ndipo ndinatha abusa atatuwo mwezi umodzi; pakuti mtima wanga unalema nao, ndi mtima waonso unaipidwa nane." 
Zechariah11:9 Pamenepo ndinati, Sindidzadyetsanso inu; cirikufa cife; cosoweka cisoweke; ndi zotsala zidyane, conse nyama ya cinzace." 
Zechariah11:10 Ndipo ndinatenga ndodo yanga Cisomo, ndi kuidula pakati, kuti ndiphwanye pangano langa ndinalicita ndi mitundu yonse ya anthu." 
Zechariah11:11 Ndipo linatyoka tsikulo, momwemo zonyankhalala za zoweta, zakundisamalira Ine, zinadziwa kuti ndiwo mau a Yehova." 
Zechariah11:12 Ndipo ndinanena nao, Cikakomera inu, ndipatseni mphotho yanga; ngati iai, lekani. Ndipo anayesa mphotho yanga, kulemera kwace ndarama zasiliva makumi atatu." 
Zechariah11:13 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Kaziponye kwa woumba mbiya, mtengo wace wokometsetsa anandiyesawo. Ndipo ndinatenga ndarama makumi atatu asiliva, ndi kuziponya kwa woumba mbiya, m'nyumba ya Yehova." 
Zechariah11:14 Pamenepo ndinadula ndodo yanga yina, ndiyo Comanganitsa, kuti ndithetse cibale ca pakati pa Yuda ndi Israyeli." 
Zechariah11:15 Ndipo Yehova anati kwa ine, Dzitengerenso zipangizo za mbusa wopusa." 
Zechariah11:16 Pakuti taonani, ndidzautsa mbusa m'dziko amene sadzazonda otayika, kapena kufunafuna zomwazika, kapena kulunzitsa yotyoka, kapena kudyetsa yamoyo, koma adzadya nyama ya zonenepa, nadzang'amba ziboda zao." 
Zechariah11:17 Tsoka mbusa wopanda pace, wakusiya zoweta! lupanga pa dzanja lace, ndi pa diso lace la kumanja; dzanja lace lidzauma konse, ndi diso lace lamanja lidzada bii." 
Zechariah12:1 Katundu wa mau a Yehova wakunena Israyeli. Atero Yehova, wakuyala miyamba, ndi kuika maziko a dziko lapansi, ndi kulenga mzimu wa munthu m'kati mwace;" 
Zechariah12:2 Taonani, ndidzaika Yerusalemu akhale cipanda codzandiritsa kwa mitundu yonse ya anthu yozungulirapo, ndipo cidzafikira Yuda yemwe pomangira misasa Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah12:3 Ndipo kudzacitika tsiku ilo, ndidzaika Yerusalemu akhale mwala wolemetsa mitundu yonse ya anthu; onse akuusenza adzadzilasa nao; ndi amitundu onse a pa dziko lapansi adzasonkhana kutsutsana nao." 
Zechariah12:4 Tsiku ilo, ati Yehova, ndidzakantha kavalo ali yense ndi kumdabwitsa, ndi womkwera adzayaluka; ndipo ndidzatsegulira maso anga nyumba ya Yuda, ndi kukantha kavalo ali yense wa mitundu ya anthu akhale wakhungu." 
Zechariah12:5 Ndipo akalonga a Yuda adzanena m'mtima mwao, Okhala m'Yerusalemu ndiwo mphamvu yanga m'Yehova wa makamu Mulungu wao." 
Zechariah12:6 Tsiku ilo ndidzaika akalonga a Yuda ngati phale la moto pansi pa nkhuni, ndi ngati muuni wamoto mwa mitolo ya tirigu; ndipo adzatha mitundu yonse ya anthu pozungulirapo, ku dzanja lamanja ndi lamanzere; ndipo Yerusalemu adzakhalanso m'malo mwace, m'Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah12:7 Ndipo Yehova adzayamba kupulumutsa mahema a Yuda, kuti ulemerero wa nyumba ya Davide ndi ulemerero wa okhala m'Yerusalemu usakulire Yuda." 
Zechariah12:8 Tsiku ilo Yehova adzacinjiriza okhala m'Yerusalemu; ndi iye wokhumudwa pakati pao tsiku lomwelo adzakhala ngati Davide; ndi nyumba ya Davide idzakhala ngati Mulungu, ngati mthenga wa Yehova pakati pao." 
Zechariah12:9 Ndipo kudzacitika tsiku lomwelo, ndidzayesa kuononga amitundu onse akudza kuyambana ndi Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah12:10 Ndipo ndidzatsanulira pa nyumba ya Davide, ndi pa okhala m'Yerusalemu, mzimu wa cisomo ndi wakupembedza; ndipo adzandipenyera Ine amene anandipyoza; nadzamlira ngati munthu alira mwana wace mmodzi yekha, nadzammvera zowawa mtima, monga munthu amvera zowawa mtima mwana wace woyamba." 
Zechariah12:11 Tsiku lomwelo kudzakhala maliro akuru m'Yerusalemu, ngati maliro a Hadadirimoni m'cigwa ca Megidoni," 
Zechariah12:12 Ndipo dziko lidzalira, banja liri lonse pa lokha; banja la nyumba ya Davide pa lokha, ndi akazi ao pa okha; banja la nyumba ya Natani pa lokha, ndi akazi ao pa okha;" 
Zechariah12:13 banja la nyumba ya Levi pa lokha, ndi akazi ao pa lokha; banja la Asimei pa okha, ndi akazi ao pa okha;" 
Zechariah12:14 mabanja onse otsala, banja liri lonse pa lokha, ndi akazi ao pa okha." 
Zechariah13:1 Tsiku lomwelo padzatsegukira nyumba ya Davide ndi okhala m'Yerusalemu kasupe wa kwa ucimo ndi cidetso. 
Zechariah13:2 Ndipo kudzacitika tsiku lomwelo, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndidzaononga maina a mafano m'dziko; ndipo sadzakumbukikanso; ndipo ndidzacotsa m'dziko aneneri ndi mzimu wacidetso." 
Zechariah13:3 Ndipo kudzacitika, akaneneranso wina, atate wace ndi mai wace ombala adzanena naye, Sudzakhala ndi moyo, pakuti unena bodza m'dzina la Yehova; ndipo atate wace ndi mai wace ombala adzamgwaza ponenera iye." 
Zechariah13:4 Ndipo kudzacitika tsiku lomwelo kuti aneneri adzacita manyazi yense ndi masomphenya ace, ponenera iye; ndipo sadzabvala copfunda caubweya kunyenga naco;" 
Zechariah13:5 koma adzati, Sindiri mneneri, ndiri wolima munda; pakuti munthu anandiyesa kapolo kuyambira ubwana wanga." 
Zechariah13:6 Ndipo wina akati kwa iye, Zipsera izi m'manja mwako nza ciani? adzayankha, Ndizo za mabala anandilasa m'nyumba ya ondikonda." 
Zechariah13:7 Galamuka, lupanga, pa mbusa wanga, ndi pa munthu mnzanga wa pamtima, ati Yehova wa makamu; kantha mbusa, ndi nkhosa zidzabalalika; koma ndidzabwezera dzanja langa pa zazing'onozo." 
Zechariah13:8 Ndipo kudzacitika m'dziko lonse, ati Yehova, magawo awiri m'menemo adzalikhidwa nadzafa; koma gawo lacitatu lidzasiyidwa m'mwemo." 
Zechariah13:9 Ndi gawo lacitatulo ndidzalitengera kumoto, ndi kuwayenga ngati ayenga siliva, ndi kuwayesa monga ayesa golidi; adzaitana dzina langa, ndipo ndidzawamvera; ndidzati, Awa ndi anthu anga; ndi iwo adzati, Yehova ndi Mulungu wanga." 
Zechariah14:1 Taonani likudza tsiku la Yehova, limene zofunkha zako zidzagawanika pakati pako." 
Zechariah14:2 Pakuti ndidzasonkhanitsa amitundu onse alimbane ndi Yerusalemu; ndipo mudziwo udzalandidwa, ndi nyumba zidzafunkhidwa, ndi akazi adzakakamizidwa; ndi limodzi la magawo awiri la mudzi lidzaturuka kumka kundende, koma anthu otsala sadzaonongeka m'mudzimo." 
Zechariah14:3 Pamenepo Yehova adzaturuka, nadzacita nkhondo ndi amitundu aja, monga anacitira nkhondo tsiku lakudumana." 
Zechariah14:4 Ndi mapazi ace adzaponda tsiku lomwelo pa phiri la Azitona, liri pandunji pa Yerusalemu kum'mawa, ndi phiri la Azitona lidzang'ambika pakati kuloza kum'mawa ndi kumadzulo, ndipo padzakhala cigwa cacikuru; ndi gawo lina la phirilo lidzamuka kumpoto, ndi gawo lina kumwela." 
Zechariah14:5 Pamenepo mudzathawa kudzera cigwa ca mapiri anga; pakuti cigwa ca mapiri cidzafikira ku Azali; ndipo mudzathawa monga umo munathawira cibvomezi, masiku a Uziya mfumu ya Yuda; ndipo Yehova Mulungu wanga adzadza, ndi opatulika onse pamodzi ndi Inu." 
Zechariah14:6 Ndipo kudzacitika tsiku lomwelo, sikudzakhala kuunika, zowalazo zidzada;" 
Zechariah14:7 koma lidzakhala tsiku la pa lokha lodziwika ndi Yehova; palibe usana, palibe usiku; koma kudzatero kuti madzulo kudzati mbe." 
Zechariah14:8 Ndipo kudzacitika tsiku lomwelo kuti madzi amoyo adzaturuka ku Yerusalemu; gawo lao lina kumka ku nyanja ya kum'mawa, ndi gawo lina kumka ku nyanja ya kumadzulo; adzatero nyengo ya dzinja ndi ya mwamvu." 
Zechariah14:9 Ndipo Yehova adzakhala mfumu ya dziko lonse; tsiku lomwelo Yehova adzakhala Iye yekha, ndi dzina lace ilo lokha." 
Zechariah14:10 Dziko lonse lidzasandulika, lidzanga cidikha, kuyambira ku Geba kufikira ku Rimoni, kumwela kwa Yerusalemu; ndipo pali uwupo padzakhala ponyamuka, ndipo udzakhala m'malo mwace, kuyambira ku cipata ca Benjamini kufikira ku malo a cipata coyamba, kufikira ku cipata ca kungondya, ndi kuyambira nsanja ya Hananeli kufikira ku zoponderamo mphesa za mfumu." 
Zechariah14:11 Ndipo anthu adzakhala m'menemo, ndipo sipadzakhalanso kuonongetsa; koma Yerusalemu adzakhala mosatekeseka." 
Zechariah14:12 Ndipo mliri umene Yehova adzakantha nao mitundu yonse ya anthu imene idathira nkhondo pa Yerusalemu ndi uwu: nyama yao idzaonda akali ciriri pa mapazi ao, ndi maso ao adzapuala m'pfunkha mwao, ndi lilime lao lidzanyala m'kamwa mwao." 
Zechariah14:13 Ndipo kudzali tsiku lomwelo, kuti cisokonezo cacikuru cocokera kwa Yehova cidzakhala pakati pao; ndipo adzagwira yense dzanja la mnzace; ndi dzanja lace lidzaukira dzanja la mnzace." 
Zechariah14:14 Ndi Yuda yemwe adzacita nkhondo ku Yerusalemu; ndi zolemera za amitundu onse ozungulirapo zidzasonkhanizidwa, golidi, ndi siliva, ndi zobvala zambirimbiri." 
Zechariah14:15 Momwemonso mliri wa pa akavalo, nyuru, ngamila, ndi aburu, ndi nyama zonse zokhala m'misasa iyo, udzakhala ngati mliri uwo." 
Zechariah14:16 Ndipo kudzacitika kuti otsala onse a amitundu onse anadzawo kulimbana ndi Yerusalemu, adzakwera caka ndi caka kulambira mfumu Yehova wa makamu, ndi kusunga madyerero amisasa." 
Zechariah14:17 Ndipo kudzacitika kuti ali yense wa mabanja a dziko wosakwera kumka ku Yerusalemu kulambira mfumu Yehova wa makamu, pa iwowa sipadzakhala mvula." 
Zechariah14:18 Ndipo banja la ku Aigupto likapanda kukwera, losafika, sirdzawagwera kodi mliri umene Yehova adzakantha nao amitundu osakwera kusunga madyerero amisasa?" 
Zechariah14:19 Ili ndi cimo la Aigupto, ndi cimo la amitundu onse osakwerako kusunga madyerero a misasa." 
Zechariah14:20 Tsiku lomwelo padzaoneka pa miriu ya akavalo OPATULIKIRA YEHOVA; ndi mbiya za m'nyumba ya Yehova zidzanga mbale za ku guwa la nsembe. 
Zechariah14:21 Inde mbiya zonse za m'Yerusalemu ndi m'Yuda zidzakhala zopatulikira Yehova wa makamu; ndi onse akuphera nsembe adzafika nadzatengako, ndi kuphikamo; ndipo tsiku lomwelo simudzakhalanso Mkanani m'nyumba ya Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi1:1 KATUNDU wa mau a Yehova wa kwa Israyeli mwa Malaki. 
Malachi1:2 Ndakukondani, ati Yehova; koma inu mukuti, Mwatikonda motani? Esau si mkulu wace wa Yakobo kodi? ati Yehova; ndipo ndinakonda Yakobo;" 
Malachi1:3 koma Esau ndinamuda, ndinasanduliza mapiri ace abwinja, ndi kupereka colowa cace kwa ankhandwe a m'cipululu." 
Malachi1:4 Cinkana Edomu akuti, Taphwanyika, koma tidzabwera ndi kumanganso mabwinja; atero Yehova wa makamu, Adzamanga, koma Ine ndidzapasula; ndipo adzawacha, Dziko la coipa, ndiponso, Anthu amene Yehova akwiya nao cikwiyire." 
Malachi1:5 Ndipo maso anu adzaona, nimudzati, Yehova ali wamkuru kupitirira malire a Israyeli." 
Malachi1:6 Mwana alemekeza atate wace, ndi mnyamata mbuye wace; ngati Ine tsono ndine atate, uli kuti ulemu wanga? ngati Ine ndine mbuye, kundiopa kuli kuti? ati Yehova wa makamu kwa inu ansembe akupeputsa dzina langa. Ndipo mukuti, Tapeputsa dzina lanu motani?" 
Malachi1:7 Mupereka mkate wodetsedwa pa guwa langa la nsembe; ndipo mukuti, Takudetsani motani? M'menemo, mwakuti munena, Gome la Yehova nlonyozeka." 
Malachi1:8 Ndipo pamene mupereka yakhungu ikhale nsembe, mukuti, Palibe coipa! ndi popereka yotsimphina ndi yodwala, palibe coipa! Kaiperekeni kwa kazembe wanu, mudzamkomera kodi? kapena adzakubvomerezani kodi? ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi1:9 Ndipo tsopano, mupepeze Mulungu, kuti aticitire cifundo; icico cicokera kwa inu; kodi Iye adzabvomereza ena a inu? ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi1:10 Mwenzi atakhala wina mwa inu wakutseka pamakomo, kuti musasonkhe moto cabe pa guwa langa la nsembe! Sindikondwera nanu, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndipo sindidzalandira capereka m'dzanja lanu." 
Malachi1:11 Pakuti kuyambira koturukira dzuwa kufikira kolowera kwace dzina langa lidzakhala lalikuru mwa amitundu; ndipo m'malo monse adzaperekera dzina langa cofukiza ndi copereka coona; pakuti dzina langa lidzakhala lalikuru mwa amitundu, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi1:12 Koma inu muliipsa, pakunena inu, Gome la Yehova laipsidwa, ndi zipatso zace, cakudya cace, conyozeka." 
Malachi1:13 Mukutinso, Taonani, ncolemetsa ici! ndipo mwacipeputsa, ati Yehova wa makamu; ndipo mwabwera nazo zofunkha, ndi zotsimphina, ndi zodwala; momwemo mubwera nayo nsembe; kodi ndiyenera kuilandira ku dzanja lanu? ati Yehova." 
Malachi1:14 Koma wotembereredwa wonyengayo, wokhala nayo yaimuna m'gulu lace, nawinda, naphera Yehova nsembe cinthu cacirema; pakuti Ine ndine mfumu yaikuru, ati Yehova wa makamu; ndipo dzina langa ndi loopsa pakati pa amitundu." 
Malachi2:1 Ndipo tsono, ansembe inu, lamulo ili ndi la kwa inu." 
Malachi2:2 Mukapanda kumvera, mukapanda kuliika mumtima mwanu, kupatsa dzina langa ulemerero, ati Yehova wa makamu, ndidzakutumizirani temberero, ndi kutemberera madalitso anu; inde, ndawatemberera kale cifukwa simuliika mumtima." 
Malachi2:3 Taonani, ndidzaipsa mbeu cifukwa ca inu, ndi kuwaza ciphwidza pankhope panu, ndico ciphwidza ca nsembe zanu, ndipo adzakucotsani pamodzi naco." 
Malachi2:4 Ndipo mudzadziwa kuti ndatumiza lamulo ili kwa inu, kuti cipangano canga cikhale ndi Levi, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi2:5 Cipangano canga cinali naye ca moyo ndi ca mtendere; ndipo ndinampatsa izi kuti aope; nandiopa, naopsedwa cifukwa ca dzina langa." 
Malachi2:6 Cilamulo ca zoona cinali m'kamwa mwace, ndi cosalungama sicinapezeka m'milomo mwace; anayenda nane mumtendere ndi moongoka, nabweza ambiri aleke mphulupulu," 
Malachi2:7 Pakuti milomo ya wansembe iyenera kusunga cidziwitso, ndi anthu ayenera kufunafuna cilamulo pakamwa pace; pakuti iye ndiye mthenga wa Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi2:8 Koma inu mwapambuka m'njira; mwakhumudwitsa ambiri m'cilamulo; mwaipsa cipangano ca Levi, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi2:9 Cifukwa cace Inenso ndakuikani onyozeka ndi ocepseka kwa anthu onse, popeza simunasunga njira zanga, koma munaweruza mwankhope pocita cilamulo." 
Malachi2:10 Kodi sitiri naye Atate mmodzi ife tonse? sanatilenga kodi Mulungu mmodzi? Ticita monyengezana yense ndi mnzace cifukwa ninji, ndi kuipsa cipangano ca makolo athu?" 
Malachi2:11 Yuda wacha monyenga, ndi m'Israyeli ndi m'Yerusalemu mwacitika conyansa; pakuti Yuda waipsa cipatuliko ca Yehova cimene acikonda, nakwatira mwana wamkazi wa mlungu wacilendo." 
Malachi2:12 Yehova adzalikha munthu wakucita ici, wogalamutsa ndi wobvomereza m'tnahema a Yakobo, ndi iye wopereka copereka kwa Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi2:13 Ndi ici mubwereza kucicita: mukuta guwa la nsembe la Yehova ndi misozi, ndi kulira, ndi kuusa moyo; momwemo Iye sasamaliranso copereka, kapena kulandira mokondwera m'dzanja lanu." 
Malachi2:14 Koma mukuti, Cifukwa ninji? Cifukwa kuti Yehova anali mboni pakati pa iwe ndi mkazi wa ubwana wako, amene unamcitira cosakhulupirika, cinkana iye ndiye mnzako, mkazi wa pangano lako." 
Malachi2:15 Ndipo sanatero kodi wina womtsalira mzimu? Ndipo winayo anatero bwanji? Anatero pofuna mbeu ya Mulungu. Koma sungani mzimu wanu; ndipo asamcitire monyenga mkazi wa ubwana wace ndi mmodziyense. 
Malachi2:16 Pakuti ndidana nako kuleka kumene, ati Yehova Mulungu wa Israyeli, ndi iye wakukuta cobvala cace ndi ciwawa, ati Yehova wa makamu; cifukwa cace sungani mzimu wanu kuti musacite mosakhulupirika." 
Malachi2:17 Mwalemetsa Yehova ndi mau anu. Koma mukuti, Tamlemetsa ndi ciani? Ndi ici cakuti munena, Yense wakucita coipa ali wokoma pamaso pa Mulungu, ndipo akondwera nao; kapena, Ali kuti Mulungu wa ciweruzo?" 
Malachi3:1 Taonani, ndituma mthenga wanga, kuti akonzeretu njira pamaso panga; ndipo Ambuye amene mumfuna adzadza ku Kacisi wace modzidzimutsa; ndiye mthenga wa cipangano amene mukondwera naye; taonani akudza, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi3:2 Koma ndani adzapirira tsiku la kudza kwace? ndipo adzaima ndani pooneka Iye? pakuti adzanga moto wa woyenga, ndi sopo wa otsuka;" 
Malachi3:3 ndipo adzakhala pansi ndi kuyenga ndi kuyeretsa siliva, nadzayeretsa ana a Levi, nadzawayengetsa ngati golidi ndi siliva; pamenepo iwo adzapereka kwa Yehova zopereka m'cilungamo." 
Malachi3:4 Pamenepo copereka ca Yuda ndi Yerusalemu cidzakomera Yehova, ngati masiku a kale lija ndi ngati zaka zoyamba zija." 
Malachi3:5 Ndipo ndidzayandikiza kwa inu kuti ndiweruze; ndipo ndidzakhala mboni yakufulumira kutsutsa obwebweta, ndi acigololo, ndi olumbira monama; ndi iwo akunyenga wolembedwa nchito pa kulipira kwace, akazi amasiye, ndi ana amasiye, ndi wakuipsa mlandu wa mlendo, osandiopa Ine, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi3:6 Pakuti Ine Yehova sindisinthika, cifukwa cace inu ana a Yakobo simunathedwa." 
Malachi3:7 Kuyambira masiku a makolo anu mwapambuka kuleka malemba anga osawasunga. Bwererani kudza kwa Ine, ndipo Ine ndidzabwerera kwa inu, ati Yehova wa makamu. Koma inu mukuti, Tibwerere motani?" 
Malachi3:8 Kodi munthu adzalanda za Mulungu? ndipo inu mundilanda Ine. Koma mukuti, Takulandani zotani? Limodzi limodzi la magawo khumi, ndi zopereka." 
Malachi3:9 Mutembereredwa ndi temberero; pakuti mundilanda Ine, ndinu mtundu uwu wonse." 
Malachi3:10 Mubwere nalo limodzi limodzi lonse la khumi, ku nyumba yosungiramo, kuti m'nyumba mwanga mukhale cakudya; ndipo mundiyese nako tsono, ati Yehova wa makamu, ngati sindikutsegulirani mazenera a kumwamba, ndi kukutsanulirani mdalitso wakuti adzasoweka malo akuulandira." 
Malachi3:11 Ndipo ndidzadzudzula zolusa cifukwa ca inu, kuti zisakuonongereni zipatso za nthaka yanu; ngakhale mpesa wanu sudzayoyoka zipatso zace, zosaca m'munda, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi3:12 Ndipo amitundu onse adzacha inu odala; pakuti mudzakhala dziko lokondweretsa, ati Yehova wa makamu." 
Malachi3:13 Mau anu andilimbira, ati Yehova. Koma inu mukuti, Tanena motsutsana nanu ndi ciani?" 
Malachi3:14 Mwanena, Kutumikira Mulungu nkwa cabe; ndipo tapindulanji ndi kusunga udikiro wace, ndi kuyenda obvala zamaliro pamaso pa Yehova wa makamu?" 
Malachi3:15 Ndipo tsopano tiwacha odzikuza odala, inde iwo ocita zoipa amangidwa ngati nyumba; inde, ayesa Mulungu, napulumuka." 
Malachi3:16 Pamenepo iwo akuopa Yehova analankhulana wina ndi mnzace; ndipo Yehova anawachera khutu namva, ndi buku la cikumbutso linalembedwa pamaso pace, la kwa iwo akuopa Yehova, nakumbukila dzina lace." 
Malachi3:17 Ndipo adzakhala anga anga, ati Yehova wa makamu, tsiku ndidzaikalo, ndipo ndidzawaleka monga munthu aleka mwana wace womtumikira." 
Malachi3:18 Pamenepo mudzabwera ndi kuzindikira pakati pa wolungama ndi woipa, pakati pa iye wotumikira Mulungu ndi iye wosamtumikira." 
Malachi4:1 Pakuti taonani, likudza tsiku, lotentha ngati ng'anjo; ndipo onse akudzikuza ndi onse akucita coipa, adzakhala ngati ciputu; ndi tsiku lirinkudza lidzawayatsa, ati Yehova wa makamu, osawasiyira muzu kapena nthambi." 
Malachi4:2 Koma inu akuopa dzina langa, dzuwa la cilungamo lidzakuturukirani, muli kuciritsa m'mapiko mwace; ndipo mudzaturuka ndi kutumphatumpha ngati ana a ng'ombe onenepa," 
Malachi4:3 Ndipo mudzapondereza oipa; pakuti adzakhala ngati mapulusa ku mapazi anu, tsiku ndidzaikalo, ati Yehova wamakamu." 
Malachi4:4 Kumbukilani cilamulo ca Mose mtumiki wanga, ndinamlamuliraco m'Horebu cikhale ca Israyeli lonse, ndico malemba ndi maweruzo." 
Malachi4:5 Taonani, ndidzakutumizirani Eliya mneneri lisanadze tsiku lalikuru ndi loopsa la Yehova." 
Malachi4:6 Ndipo adzabwezera mitima ya atate kwa ana, ndi mitima ya ana kwa atate ao; kuti ndisafike ndi kukantha dziko lionongeke konse."
